Matthew1:1 Men bɑ lwøbi gøl yɑɑ Yëso Mesiy, en ɑ kwɑɑr Debïd, o bɑ kwɑɑr Abrɑhɑm." 
Matthew1:2 Cɑg kì ri Abrɑhɑm gïti ri Rɑ̈dh Debïd, kwɑyy møg-ɑ bɑ ɑlwøb: Isɑɑk, Yɑgob, Yeudɑ̀ geki nyiimen, kí Peredh kí Dherɑ̀, (meyi gen bɑ Tɑmɑr.) Ëdhrön, Rɑm, Aminɑdɑb, Nɑɑcön, Sɑlmön, Boɑdh, Obed (meye bɑ Ruth), Yesì, kì Rɑ̈dh Debïd." 
Matthew1:3 Cɑg kì ri Debïd gïti kɑ ɑ́køøl ji yïnø Bɑbïl, kwɑyy møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed: Debïd, Sølømøn, Reöboɑm, Abiyɑ̀, Asɑ̀, Yöcɑpɑt, Yeörɑm, Udhiyɑ̀, Yöthɑm, Akɑɑdh, Kedhekiyɑ̀, Mɑnɑsè, Amön, Yöciyɑ̀, Yöyɑkin geki nyiimen." 
Matthew1:4 Cɑg kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́køøl ji Bɑbïl gïti kɑ ɑ́øør Yëso piny, kwɑyy møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed: Yöyɑkin, Ceɑltiel, Dherubɑbïl, Abikud, Eliɑkim, Adhör, Dhɑdök, Akim, Eliud, Eliɑdhɑr, Mɑtɑn, Yɑgob, kí Yosep ɑ ɑ́nywøm Meerì, ɑ bɑ meyi Yëso ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Mesiy." 
Matthew1:5 Rïjj-ɑ cɑ̈gi kì ri Abrɑhɑm gïti ri Debïd bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen; o rïjj-ɑ cɑ̈gi kì ri Debïd gïti kɑ ɑ́køøl ji yïnø Bɑbïl bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen; o rïjj-ɑ cɑ̈gi kì ri køøli ji yïnø Bɑbïl gïti ri Mesiy bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen. 
Matthew1:6 O men bene kër-ɑ ɑ́øør Yëso Mesiy piny: Meerì ɑ́bëëd e onywømø yi Yosep, de ɑ́yod yije dɑ dhɑnhø men-ɑ óyodø ki tegi Wëykwërø, e nuti dɑ̈gi yïe." 
Matthew1:7 O Yosep ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑl me døj, nuti dwɑddi wøwi møgɑni, de gø ɑ́dwɑdde’ tɑ̈ngø kì gød." 
Matthew1:8 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd e orumø kì ri møgɑni, ɑcwöb wëywöni Wë kì bøle kì yethi lɑ̈g, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Yosep, kwɑɑr Debïd, yï ko böggi ki kwɑnyi Meerì ɑ́ cyëgí. Mɑ́ dhɑnhø men-ɑ yije ɑ́yod kɑ tegi Wëykwërø." 
Matthew1:9 Óøør piny ki wɑ̈d, kɑ nyinge ócɑɑg ɑ́ Yëso, mɑ́ jie óyiele kì yij orøøg gen.”" 
Matthew1:10 Møgɑni bënn ɑ́cwöb kɑ per kinni, o møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi Wë ki dhø jɑltöng mee pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen; kinni," 
Matthew1:11 “Nyɑnɑjur me nuti pɑ̈nyø nywɑlø yi jɑlø, óngøl ki dhɑnhø, kɑ øør-ɑ piny ki wɑ̈d, o ócɑg ɑ́ Imɑnwel.” (A wɑngi kinni, “Jwøk nud kì kellee.”)" 
Matthew1:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyëëw Yosep, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgii yi wëywöni Wë gwøge ceth, kɑ Meerì kwɑnye ɑ́ cyëge." 
Matthew1:13 De nuti buddø ki gøn, kì kɑɑm-ɑ́ nuti pɑ̈dh en wɑ̈de piny. Kɑ cɑg yi Yosep ɑ́ Yëso." 
Matthew2:1 Yëso ɑ́øør piny kì kɑɑl Betleem kì Yeudiyɑ̀, kì ri Rɑ̈dh Ërödøs. Bɑng kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́bëën jøg wɑ̈thi gen pel Yerusɑlem, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl," 
Matthew2:2 ge opëjø kinni, “Dhɑnhø men-ɑ ɑ́øør piny, ɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ógöögø ki Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud ying-ɑ keny? Kyele ɑ́lidh yi wøn kɑ ɑ́tuule, o wø ɑ́bï-ɑ be mɑlii.”" 
Matthew2:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Rɑ̈dh Ërödøs, ɑngɑ̈nge geki tyëng Yerusɑlem bënn." 
Matthew2:4 Acønge jɑggi ókwër bënn geki jøpwönyi Ciggi Yeud, kɑ gï pëjje keny-ɑ óøør Mesiy piny." 
Matthew2:5 Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Óøør piny kì kɑɑl Betleem kì Yeudiyɑ̀, mɑ́ møgɑni ɑ ɑ́gwed yi jɑltööng Jwøk kinni," 
Matthew2:6 ‘Yïn ɑ Betleem kì piny Yeudiyɑ̀, pɑth ki yïn ɑ thinh kì kelli kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ mɑ́ pëëji ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ rií eni pëny-ɑ ójɑɑg jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Codhe, ɑcwøøl jøg-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel yi Ërödøs, kɑ gï pëjje bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́cwööb yi kyelɑni." 
Matthew2:8 Aöre gïn Betleem, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedh wun, yɑbu nyelthinh kidøøj, kɑ yɑ köbbi wun, keny-ɑ óyodu en, o yɑ ókedhɑ be mɑlii thyew.”" 
Matthew2:9 Codhe ɑkedh gen, kɑ kyel-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi gen kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl cigi lidhø yi gen. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh ge gøn, kɑ pëthi gen ceg-ɑ mïnø ki mendwøng. Akedh kyelɑni e kedh-ɑ bøli gen pïd kɑ ɑ́cunge kì mɑl, wïj keny-ɑ di nyelthinh." 
Matthew2:10  
Matthew2:11 Akedhi gen ød. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen dhɑnhø geki Meerì meye, ɑbøødh gen ri gen piny, kɑ gø mɑl gen. Apɑ̈d gen jɑmmi gen, kɑ ge kɑ̈n-ɑ wɑ̈g ki dhɑb, kí bɑkur, kí ryɑ̈ mor." 
Matthew2:12 Codhe, ɑkedh gen ge kɑ̈l-ɑ yöö megø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́kyëddi yi Jwøk kì yethi lɑ̈g kinni ge ko døøg yï Ërödøs." 
Matthew2:13 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum jøgɑni ki kedhø, ɑcwöb wëywöni Wë kì bøli Yosep kì yethi lɑ̈g, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Ërödøs óbï be yɑbi nyelthinh o gø nɑ̈ge. De dhwöödh, kwɑny nyelthinh geki meye, kɑ wu pɑ̈ɑ̈r wun Rïp. Kɑ wu bëëd wun kì kunɑni gïti keny-ɑ óköbbɑ yïn kinni dwöög.”" 
Matthew2:14 Adhwödh Yosep, kɑ nyelthinh kwɑnye kì wɑ̈r geki meye, kɑ ge dɑ̈g-ɑ Rïp." 
Matthew2:15 Kɑ ge obëëdø kì kunɑni gïti kɑ ɑ́thøw Ërödøs. Møgɑni ɑ́cwöb kɑ per kinni, o møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wë ki dhøg jɑltöng pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen kinni, “Wɑ̈dɑ ɑ́cwöölɑ wɑ̈g kì Rïp.”" 
Matthew2:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yodii yi Ërödøs kinni ɑ́wëny yi wëll-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, ɑrënyi pyëwe ki mendwøng. Amuuje ki cigg kinni nɑ̈ɑ̈g othønh-ɑ bɑ cwøw kì Betleem geki myërr-ɑ bute; gen ɑ othønh-ɑ runni gen bɑ ɑ́ryew kí møg-ɑ thønhø kibøli gen bënn. Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi en gø kwɑɑne’ ri bøli kej cwöbi kyelø men-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wëllɑni." 
Matthew2:17 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jermɑyɑ̀ jɑltööng Jwøk pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen kinni," 
Matthew2:18 “Akyew olïngø e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Rɑmɑ̀, bɑ ywøg me dwøng Rɑceel ywøg-ɑ nyige, ɑ́dhɑ̈li lugø mɑ́ ge ɑ́rum ki thøø.”" 
Matthew2:19 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́thøw Ërödøs, ɑcwöb wëywöni Wë kì bøli Yosep kì yethi lɑ̈g kì Rïp." 
Matthew2:20 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Dhwöödh, kwɑny nyelthinh geki meye, kɑ wu døøg wun piny Isrɑil, mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddii nɑ̈gø ɑ́thøw.”" 
Matthew2:21 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Yosep, kɑ nyelthinh kwɑnye geki meye, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ piny Isrɑil." 
Matthew2:22 De kɑ ɑ́lïng Yosep kinni, bɑ Arkelɑøs ɑ kwɑɑny lɑwi wïye Ërödøs, ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑbwøge ki døøg kunɑni. Ácigi köbbø yi Jwøk kì yethi lɑ̈g, codhe ɑkedhe be bëëdø kì myërri Gɑlelì." 
Matthew2:23 Kɑ pëgg-ɑ kɑɑl Nɑdhɑreth. Codhe, ɑpɑ̈dhi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi jøtööng Jwøk kɑ̈jji gen kinni, “Ócwøl ɑ́ jɑl Nɑdhɑreth.”" 
Matthew3:1 Yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni ɑ ɑ́kedhi Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g yij pɑ̈ɑ̈l Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ócɑ̈gø ki pwönyø kinni," 
Matthew3:2 “Yewi wun ki orøøg wun, mɑ́ Pödhi Jwøk cyɑ̈gi.”" 
Matthew3:3 Bene en ɑ ɑ́wɑngi yi Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng, kɑ ɑ́kööbe kinni, “Ngɑn megø ócwöddø kì pɑ̈l kinni, ‘Tyenyu yuu Wë, gwøgu yëth-ɑ cyɑ̈dhe gɑ óbödh.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Jøn nyi rug-ɑ ógødh men-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø ki yëyyi ɑmɑlø, o wëne bɑ dël, o gïgcɑmme bɑ bɑ̈nyy kí møøw kïc." 
Matthew3:5 Akedhi tyëng Yerusɑlem yïe, kí tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn, kí tyëng-ɑ myërri kömi Nɑm Urdun." 
Matthew3:6 Kɑ orøøg gen töng yi gen, kɑ ge jwɑ̈ɑ̈g yi Jøn kì Nɑm Urdun." 
Matthew3:7 Jøn keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe Jøpɑresì geki Jøsɑduk mø gïïr ge bï-ɑ yïe be jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Wu bɑ thöllì, ɑ́ men ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun kinni pɑru cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi?" 
Matthew3:8 Göög wun ki gïndøj men nyodh kinni, wu ɑ́yewi." 
Matthew3:9 Kɑ wu ko nyi rum ki pëthi wun kinni, wu óbødh ki cɑyø kɑ̀ kööb wun kinni, Abrɑhɑm bɑ kweyi wun. Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, tuggi kïttì møg ócuggø kwɑnyø yi Jwøk kɑ gï gwøge gɑ kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm." 
Matthew3:10 Dørø ɑ́rum ki cïb tyeli yɑdh, o yɑnh pɑ kɑ̈ni ki nywøl mø døøj, ceg kɑ ngølø, o leeng mɑc." 
Matthew3:11 Yɑ jwɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ wun ki pï ɑ́ ngïji yewø, de ngɑn-ɑ óbï kì bɑngɑ wu ójwɑ̈ɑ̈g yi en kɑ Wëykwërø kí mɑc. Dwøng cɑrø kibølɑ; o yɑ pɑ døøj ki kɑ̈lli wɑrre." 
Matthew3:12 Ólɑng-ɑ kwööde ki byel ying-ɑ cinge, byelle ókwøre kidøøj. Byelle ókïdhe yij thebø, de cong órɑ̈b yi en ki mɑc me pɑ thøw.”" 
Matthew3:13 Kɑ Yëso obëënø kì Gɑlelì, e bï-ɑ be jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø yi Jøn kì kömi Nɑm Urdun." 
Matthew3:14 De ɑ́kyëddi yi Jøn kinni, “Yɑn ɑ ceg dwɑddi jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø yi yïn, de yïde ɑ yöd yï bï-ɑ yïɑ?”" 
Matthew3:15 De møge ɑ́løøg yi Yëso kinni, “Wiy bëëde kinøw ɑnɑn. O bene yöö men-ɑ gwøg wɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk.” Kɑ Jøn oyïëyø." 
Matthew3:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø ceth, ɑbëëne wɑ̈g kì yethi pï. Kɑ mɑl ree yiebe, kɑ Wëykwërø lidhe, e bï-ɑ piny e nɑ ɑkur, kɑ pëgg-ɑ köme." 
Matthew3:17 Kɑ cwɑg mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl okööbø kinni, “Men bene Wɑ̈dɑ, wɑ̈n-ɑ mɑɑrɑ, pyëwɑ med ki en.”" 
Matthew4:1 Codhe, ɑpeej Yëso pɑ̈l yi Wëykwërø kun pɑ̈nyii yi Cethɑn." 
Matthew4:2 Kɑ ree twöne ki gïncɑm ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, ɑmɑgii yi kɑ̈j." 
Matthew4:3 Abëën Cethɑn, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Keløg yï bɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk, köbbí tuggi kïttì møg, o ri gen løg gen gïncɑm.”" 
Matthew4:4 Kɑ Yëso ólöggø kinni, “Bɑ ɑgwed kinni, ‘Pɑth ki gïncɑm kete ɑ nyi mïdhi dhɑnhø e onëënø, den-ɑ́ møg-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøk bënn.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Codhe, ɑkïdhi Yëso Yerusɑlem yi Cethɑn, kɑ gø cïbe oledh Kengø," 
Matthew4:6 ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Keløg yï bɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk, leeng rií piny, mɑ́ e bɑ ɑgwed kinni, ‘Jwøk wëywödde óköbbe o yï ógɑm yi gen ki cinggi gen, kipe tyellí ópög yi kït.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Bɑ ɑgwed thyew kinni, ‘Wöw, Jwøgí ko rɑɑng.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Akïdhi Yëso mɑl wïj kït me bɑ̈r yi Cethɑn, kɑ pödhhi kömi piny bëne nyudhe gøn, geki myërri gen." 
Matthew4:9 Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Møg bënn ómëggɑ yïn keløg rií bøødhí piny, kɑ yɑ mɑl yi yïn.”" 
Matthew4:10 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Kedh Cethɑn! Mɑ́ e bɑ ɑgwed kinni, ‘Wør Wöw Jwøgí, kɑ mɑllí e kete kete.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Codhe, ɑwiyii yi Cethɑn, kɑ wëywödd bï-ɑ be kɑ̈llii." 
Matthew4:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Yëso kinni, i Jøn ómɑgø, ɑkedhe Gɑlelì." 
Matthew4:13 Nuti bëëdø kì Nɑdhɑreth, de ɑ́kedh-ɑ be bëëdø kì Kɑpernɑum kì buti Tɑɑy Gɑlelì kì piny Dhebulun geki Nɑptɑlì." 
Matthew4:14 Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg, o møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen kinni," 
Matthew4:15 “Yïn ɑ piny Dhebulun kí piny Nɑptɑlì, wun ɑ kö yuu-ɑ kedhi nɑɑm omelø, kì løøg Nɑm Urdun, eni Gɑlelì piny pödhh-ɑ kyeelø!" 
Matthew4:16 Tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yij muudhø ge ólïdhi ki cɑr me dwøng. Kömi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yij muudhi thøø ómëëny yi cɑr.” 
Matthew4:17 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi Yëso ki pwönyi wööne kinni, “Yewi wun ki orøøg wun, mɑ́ Pödhi Jwøk cyɑ̈gi.”" 
Matthew4:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi Yëso kì thɑ̈ngi Tɑɑy Gɑlelì, ɑlïdhe ki nyiimëëg ɑ́ryew, Sɑymøn (ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Pïtør) geki Andrø ómen, ge ópyëjjø ki bøy, mɑ́ ge bɑ yïdd." 
Matthew4:19 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Bïu bɑngɑ, o wu løgɑ jømɑy ki ji.”" 
Matthew4:20 Awiy gen bøyyi gen piny, kɑ ge løg-ɑ bɑnge." 
Matthew4:21 Kɑ ɑ́dhwödhe kì kenyɑni, ɑlïdhe ki nyiimëëg ɑ́ryew møøgø; gen ɑ Yɑgob geki Jøn wɑ̈ddi Dhebedì, ge ying-ɑ yij morkɑb geki Dhebedì wïyi gen, ge pyël-ɑ bøyyi gen. Acwøle gïn." 
Matthew4:22 Kɑ wïyi gen wiy gen yij morkɑmɑni, ɑløg gen bɑng Yëso." 
Matthew4:23 Kɑ Yëso ócyɑ̈dhø kì myërri Gɑlelì bënn, e ópwönyø kì sinɑgøgg, e töng-ɑ per Wöndøj men-ɑ kööbø kì ri Pödhi Jwøk. Kɑ ji mø gïïr yiel yi en ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, kɑ tyëng-ɑ bɑ pùdh gwøge." 
Matthew4:24 Kɑ pere tɑɑy-ɑ yij Suriyɑ̀ bëne, kɑ tyëng-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø kïdhi yïe, kí møg-ɑ ri gen di wëyrijjø, kí pùdh, kí ji-ɑ dëlli gen dwɑnyø. Kɑ gï yiele bënn." 
Matthew4:25 Kɑ ji mø gïïr ólugø kì bɑnge, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Gɑlelì kí kɑ̈dd-ɑ pyɑ̈rø, kí Yerusɑlem, kí Yeudiyɑ̀ kí myërr-ɑ løøg Nɑm Urdun." 
Matthew5:1 Kɑ lidh yi Yëso kinni ji gïïr, ɑkedhe mɑl wïj kït, kɑ pëgg-ɑ piny. Kɑ jøbɑnge ri gen cøng gen bute." 
Matthew5:2 Atuge dhøge, kɑ gï pwönye kinni," 
Matthew5:3 “Tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni nyingi gen cɑn kì ri wëy, ri gen dɑ gyëdh, Pödhi Jwøk bɑ mi gen!" 
Matthew5:4 Tyëng-ɑ kïïmø ri gen dɑ gyëdh, ge ólug yi Jwøk!" 
Matthew5:5 Tyëng-ɑ bɑ mööl ri gen dɑ gyëdh, piny ólɑg yi gen!" 
Matthew5:6 Tyëng-ɑ nyi tyer gøggi dyër, ri gen dɑ gyëdh, ge óthödhi yi Jwøk kɑ pëthi gen ókwöjø!" 
Matthew5:7 Tyëng-ɑ yethi gen nyi ywöngi kipe ji møøgø ri gen dɑ gyëdh, Jwøk pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen!" 
Matthew5:8 Tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen tïl, ri gen dɑ gyëdh, Jwøk ólidh yi gen!" 
Matthew5:9 Tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø kipe mër ri gen dɑ gyëdh, ge ócwølli yi Jwøk gɑ nyige!" 
Matthew5:10 Tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen guud kipe kɑ̀ nyi gwøg gen gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk, ri gen dɑ gyëdh, Pödhi Jwøk, bɑ mi gen!" 
Matthew5:11 “Ri wun dɑ gyëdh, kenyi yɑnyyi wun yi teedø, kɑ nyingi wun guud yi gen, kɑ wu kwɑ̈dhhi yi gen ki kwøbbi pyed, kipe kɑ̀ bëëd wun ɑ́ jøbɑngɑ." 
Matthew5:12 Mïni pëthi wun ki mendwøng, mɑ́ köögi me dwøng omïdhø ɑ́ mi wun kì Pödhi Jwøk. Bene kër-ɑ ɑ́guud nyingi jøtöng, møg-ɑ ɑ́ying bøli wun ɑnɑn." 
Matthew5:13 “Wu pɑ̈r ki omelø, kipe kömi piny bëne. Keløg omelø ólwënyø, pɑ cuggi bëëdø ɑ́ omelø këti. Bong gïndøj kì ree këti, de ceg kɑ weddø, kɑ nyøn yi ji." 
Matthew5:14 “Wu pɑ̈r ki cɑr kipe piny. Kɑɑl-ɑ ógeer wïj kït, pɑ cuggi kɑnø." 
Matthew5:15 Bong ngɑn cwiny lɑ̈mbɑ̈ kɑ gø kume ki ɑ́tɑy, de nyi cïb-ɑ wïj tɑrɑbedhɑ̀, o tyëng-ɑ ying ød bënn thödhe ki cɑr." 
Matthew5:16 Wiy cɑɑr wun mëënye kì bøli teedø, kipe kinni, o gïg-ɑ døj møg-ɑ gøggi yi wun lidh yi teedø, o Wïyi wun ɑ ying mɑl pwøj yi gen." 
Matthew5:17 “Wu ko rum kinni, yɑ ɑ́bï-ɑ be rënyi møg-ɑ kømmi yi Cigg geki pwönyi jøtöng. Yɑ nuti bëën-ɑ be rënyi gen, de yɑ ɑ́bï-ɑ be cïbi gen kɑ̈jji gen." 
Matthew5:18 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, kɑ̀ nud mɑl kí piny, bong gwedø ɑ́kyel wɑlɑ̀ cwinyø men-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì ri Cigg, gïti keny-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen bënn." 
Matthew5:19 Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, ngɑn pyem nyɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel kì ri Cigg, o ji nyi pwönye kinni göög gen kinøw, ngɑn ni menɑni ócwøl ɑ́ ngɑn bong pere kì Pödhi Jwøk. De ngɑn-ɑ nyi göögø kì bɑng Cigg, kɑ ji nyi pwönye ki møgɑni, bene en ɑ ócwølli ɑ́ ngɑndwøng kì Pödhi Jwøk." 
Matthew5:20 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, keløg døøji wun pɑ lod døøji jøpwönyi Cigg geki Jøpɑresì, wu pɑ wöl wɑ̈dhi Pödhi Jwøk." 
Matthew5:21 “Møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi tyëng-ɑ ócyɑ̈ɑ̈ngi ɑ́lïngi yi wun kinni, ‘Yï ko nɑ̈gi ki dhɑnhø, o ngɑn nɑ̈gi ki dhɑnhø ceg kɑ kïdhi burø be gøny.’" 
Matthew5:22 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, ngɑn wër ki wɑɑd gen ceg kɑ kïdhi burø, o ngɑn yɑny wɑɑd gen kïdh-ɑ burø. Ngɑn köbbi wɑɑd gen kinni, ‘Yï bɑ dhëg’ óleeng yij mɑc." 
Matthew5:23 Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, keløg yï køm-ɑ thödhi Jwøk kì wïj këli lɑm ki gëëdhi, kɑ yï ópɑ̈dø kì kenyɑni kinni, kɑɑm wun dɑ kwøb wuki wɑɑd wun," 
Matthew5:24 wiy gïn-ɑ muuj yi yïn kì bøli këli lɑm, kɑ yï kedh, kɑ wu rëbi wun, wuki wɑɑd wun, codhe o yï bïí, o gënhɑni muuj yi yïn cyee." 
Matthew5:25 “Jwɑnu rëbø ki ngɑn-ɑ gøøny yïn kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti wɑ̈dhi wun burø, kipe yï ómuuj jɑgø yi ngɑnɑni, kɑ yï mëggi bölidh yi jɑgø, kɑ yï leeng ød mɑg." 
Matthew5:26 Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kidyër kinni, yï pɑ bï wɑ̈g kì kenyɑni gïti keny-ɑ órum kwör-ɑ kömí ki colø bëne." 
Matthew5:27 “Møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi cøn ɑ́rum ki lïngø yi wun kinni, ‘Ngɑn nuti nywøøm wun ri wun ko niin yi yïn.’" 
Matthew5:28 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, ngɑn nenni ri ngɑndhɑjø, kɑ ómwönyø ki lɑ́ɑ̀w, ɑ́rum ki orøg ki gøn kì pyëwe." 
Matthew5:29 Keløg wɑɑng kyëjí yï peeje’ be gwøg ki gïnrɑj, gööl wɑ̈g kɑ weddí, mɑ́ lɑ̈w keløg ɑ́ gïjø ɑ́kyel ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì ri dëlí, kibøli ke di leeng dëlí bëne yij mɑc." 
Matthew5:30 O keløg cingi kyëjí yï peeje’ be gwøg ki gïnrɑj, ngul wɑ̈g kɑ weddí, mɑ́ lɑ̈w ke lɑ̈ɑ̈ny gïjø ɑ́kyel kì ri dëlí, kibøli ke di kedhi dëlí bëne yij mɑc." 
Matthew5:31 “Ákwøb cøn kinni, ‘Ngɑn tɑ̈ng cyëge, nënge gøn ki wɑ̈nyi tɑ̈ng.’" 
Matthew5:32 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, ngɑn tɑ̈ng cyëge, e nuti niin yi jɑlø megø, ngɑnɑni ɑ́løge ngɑn niin ki köögi, o ngɑn nywøm ɑtɑ̈ng, ɑ́røngi thyew." 
Matthew5:33 “Wu ɑ́lïng thyew, i ji óköbbø kɑ̈ge dööng kinni, ‘Yï ko nyi köngi ki pyed, de nyi gwøg møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöng yi yïn kì bøli Wë.’" 
Matthew5:34 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, wu ko nyi köngi kinni tek. Mɑl ko nyi kwöng, mɑ́ e bɑ kwøøm Jwøk," 
Matthew5:35 wɑlɑ̀ piny ko nyi kwöng, mɑ́ e bɑ thɑ̈nhi tyelle, wɑlɑ̀ Yerusɑlem ko nyi kwöng, mɑ́ e bɑ kɑɑl rɑ̈nh-ɑ dwøng." 
Matthew5:36 Kɑ wïjí ko nyi kwööng, mɑ́ yëyø ɑ́kyel dhɑ̈li gwøgø yi yïn e tɑr wɑlɑ̀ looj." 
Matthew5:37 De nyi kwøb wun kinni, ‘Yɑ ɑ́yïëy’ wɑlɑ̀ kinni, ‘Yɑ ɑ́kyëëd,’ keti gen. Keløg wu ókɑ̈nø ki kwøb møøgø, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Ngɑnrɑj." 
Matthew5:38 “Møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi cøn ɑ́lïngi yi wun kinni, ‘Wɑng col kɑ wɑng, o lëjø col kɑ lëjø.’" 
Matthew5:39 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, keløg yï ogöggø ki gïnrɑj yi ngɑn megø, kejí ko cool. Ngɑn gøj yïn kì thɑ̈ngi kyëjí, lugí thɑ̈ng-ɑ kyeelø o gø gøje thyew." 
Matthew5:40 O keløg e dɑ ngɑn pir yïn e dwɑdd-ɑ kwɑnyi ɑ́ywödhí, ɑ́ywönhthinh, mëggí ɑ́ywönhdwøng en thyew." 
Matthew5:41 Keløg yï ocirø yi deny-ɑ ɑ́mɑg pödhee, kinni kɑ̈l jɑmme ki kïlomïtïr ɑ́kyel, lwøøg ki kïlomïtïr ɑ́ryew." 
Matthew5:42 Thödhí ngɑn kwɑ̈jji kì yïí, kɑ ngɑn dwɑddi wïdhø kì yïí ko mɑ̈ɑ̈n." 
Matthew5:43 “Wu ɑ́lïng i ókwøbø kinni, ‘Mɑɑr wɑddi wun, kɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø mɑɑn.’" 
Matthew5:44 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, mɑɑru tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn wun, kɑ wu kwɑ̈jji wun kiper tyëng-ɑ guud nyingi wun," 
Matthew5:45 mɑ́ kɑ̀ göög wun kinøw, bene keny-ɑ óbëëd wun, wun-ɑ́ nyigi Wïyi wun ɑ ying mɑl. Mɑ́ cɑ̈nge nyi wëgge’ yeer kömi tyëngdøj geki tyëngrijjø, kɑ kødh nyi mëgge tyëngtir geki tyëngorøg bënn." 
Matthew5:46 Keløg wu nyi mɑɑr-ɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr wun, bong köögi men-ɑ óyod yi wun kì yï Jwøk, cɑgg ɑ́ tyëng gwɑ̈j, ge pɑ nyi göög ɑ nøw?" 
Matthew5:47 O keløg wu nyi mɑ̈dh-ɑ wɑddi wun keti gen, bong gïndøj mɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun, me lod wun tyëng-ɑ kyeelø. Cɑgg ɑ́ tyëng pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, ge nyi göög ɑ nøw thyew!" 
Matthew5:48 Bëëd wun wu tir, ni Wïyi wun ɑ ying mɑl." 
Matthew6:1 “Wu ko nyi göög ki gïgdøj kì bøli ji kipe kinni o wu pwøj, mɑ́ keløg wu ógöögø kinøw, bong köögi men-ɑ óyod yi wun ki yï Wïyi wun ɑ ying mɑl." 
Matthew6:2 “Kenyi thödhí ɑbuur ki gïïpiny, köörí ko nyi pwööd ni kenyi göög tyëngwëënyø kì uddi mɑlli Jwøk kí yethi yëëth, kipe kinni o ge pwøj yi teedø. Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, köögi mi gen ɑ́rum ki kwɑnyø yi gen." 
Matthew6:3 De kenyi muuj ki gïïpiny, wɑddí ko ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn," 
Matthew6:4 o muunyí cöge e pɑ lidh. O yï óyïddí ki köögi kì yï Wïyí, ngɑn-ɑ nyi lidh møg-ɑ pɑ nenni yi teedø." 
Matthew6:5 “Kenyi kwɑ̈jjí, yï ko nyi göög ni tyëngwëënyø! Ge mɑɑr-ɑ kwɑ̈jjø ge ócungø kì uddi mɑlli Jwøk, kí ɑ́kɑrri yëëth, o ge nenni yi ji. Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, köögi mi gen ɑ́rum ki kwɑnyø yi gen." 
Matthew6:6 De kenyi kwɑjjí Jwøk, nyi kedhí ødí yï ketí, kɑ dhø ød cyëëg, kɑ Wïyí kwɑjjí, en ɑ ngɑn-ɑ nud kì keny-ɑ pɑ nenni yi teedø. O yï óyïddí ki köögi kì yï Wïyí, ngɑn-ɑ nyi lidh møg-ɑ pɑ nenni yi teedø." 
Matthew6:7 “Kenyi kwɑ̈jji wun, wu ko nyi kööb ki kwøb mø gïïr, mø bong gïn wɑngi yi gen, ni tyëng pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, mɑ́ tyëngɑni nyii rumø kinni ce mø gen ólïngi yi Jwøk kipe kɑ̀ bëëd kwøbbi gen gïïr." 
Matthew6:8 Wu ko nyi bëëd ni gen, mɑ́ gïg-ɑ cɑ̈nni wun ngɑ̈nyi yi Wïyi wun, e men-ɑ́ ge nuti kwɑjjø yi wun." 
Matthew6:9 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, nyi kwɑ̈jji wun kinni, ‘Wïyi wøn, yï ying-ɑ mɑl, wiy nyingí kwërø wør," 
Matthew6:10 wiy Pödhí bëe; wiy møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn gwøg kì piny, ni kɑ̀ gwøøg gen kì mɑl." 
Matthew6:11 Mëggí wøn gïncɑɑm wøn mi dicyɑ̈ngtïn. 
Matthew6:12 Kɑ lɑɑwí dwöög piny kipe orøøg wøn, ni kenyi wiy wøn ji-ɑ nyi göggi wøn ki bɑ̈jjø." 
Matthew6:13 Wø ko wëggí pɑ̈nyø ki kwøb mø teeg, de yiel wøn kì cingi Ngɑnrɑj.’" 
Matthew6:14 “Wïyi wun ɑ mɑl lɑɑwe ódwööge piny kipe wun, keløg lɑɑwi wun nyi dwöögu’ piny thyew kipe gïgrijjø møg-ɑ nyi göggi wun yi ji møøgø." 
Matthew6:15 De keløg lɑɑwi wun pɑ nyi dwöög wun piny kipe ji møøgø, Wïyi wun lɑɑwe pɑ dwööge piny kipe gïgrijjø møg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi wun." 
Matthew6:16 “O kenyi thuum wun, wu ko nyi bëëd bøli wun looj, ni tyëng-ɑ bɑ wëëny, mɑ́ ge nyi cïll-ɑ bøli gen, ge nyudh-ɑ teedø kinni ge ceg-ɑ thuumø. Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, köögi mi gen ɑ́rum ki kwɑnyø yi gen." 
Matthew6:17 De yïn, kenyi thuum, nyi lwøg nyingí, kɑ yëyyi wïjí pyëël," 
Matthew6:18 o yï cöög yï pɑ ngij yi teedø kinni, yï ceg-ɑ thuumø, de yï óngij-ɑ yi Wïyí kete, ngɑn-ɑ pɑ nënni. O yï óyïddí ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn kì yï Wïyí, ngɑn-ɑ nyi lidh møg-ɑ pɑ nenni yi teedø." 
Matthew6:19 “Ri wun ko nyi cungi wun ki kɑ̈rì kì kömi piny, keny-ɑ nyi rënyi gen yi thoth kí nyɑllì, ɑ yije kwɑ̈ɑ̈d yi kurrì møg-ɑ nyi tørri ud." 
Matthew6:20 De cøngu jɑmmi wun mɑl, keny-ɑ pɑ rënyi gen yi thoth kí nyɑllì, o bong kurrì mø turri yethi ud, kɑ ge okwɑ̈dø." 
Matthew6:21 Mɑ́ pyëwí óying-ɑ keny-ɑ di kɑ̈rí. 
Matthew6:22 “Wɑng pɑ̈r ki lɑ̈mbɑ̈ kipe dëël dhɑnhø. Keløg wɑngí døøj, dëlí bëne óbëëd e pɑ̈ng yi cɑr," 
Matthew6:23 de keløg wɑngí pɑ døøj, dëlí bëne óying yij muudhø. O keløg cɑr men-ɑ ying rií bɑ muudhø, koo bëëdø ɑ́ muudhø me dwøng!" 
Matthew6:24 “Bong ngɑn cuggi göggi wëëg ɑ́ryew; ɑ́kyel omɑɑrø yi en kɑ ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø mɑɑne, wɑlɑ̀ ócyɑ̈dhø kì bɑng ɑ́kyel, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø bɑnye. Yï pɑ cuggi gwøg wïj ɑ́kyel kipe Jwøk geki kɑ̈r." 
Matthew6:25 “Bene ɑ pere köbbɑ wun kinni, pëthi wun ko lïngi kipe gïn-ɑ ócɑm yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ gïn-ɑ ómɑdh yi wun, kipe kinni o wu nëën wun, kɑ pëthi wun ko lïngi kipe ógudhi dëlli wun. Per wëyi dhɑnhø pɑ teg kibøli gïncɑm? O dëël dhɑnhø pere pɑ teg kibøli ógudh?" 
Matthew6:26 Lidhu winy, ge pɑ nyi kɑ̈gø ki köödh, wɑlɑ̀ ge pɑ nyi kɑ̈jø ki byel, kɑ gï kïdhi gen yethi thebb, de ge pidh-ɑ yi Wïyi wun ɑ ying mɑl. Per wun pɑ teg cɑrø kibøli winy?" 
Matthew6:27 Á men ɑ cuggi medi runne kɑ̀ lïngi pyëwe? 
Matthew6:28 “Á kipe ngø ɑ lïngi pëthi wun kipe ógudh? Lidh wun ókøggi lum kì pɑ̈l kɑ̀ dhɑ̈ɑ̈y gen. Ge pɑ nyi göögø, wɑlɑ̀ ri gen pɑ nyi cwɑ̈jji gen ki ógudh." 
Matthew6:29 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, cɑgg ɑ́ Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn kì yij dhwɑ̈nge bëne, nuti rugø ki ógødh mø pɑ̈r ki ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen." 
Matthew6:30 Keløg luum pɑ̈l oruugø yi Jwøk kinøw; eni lum-ɑ nud dicyɑ̈ngtïn, kɑ kwɑny dhuki kɑ leeng yij purun ɑ́ yugg, ruung-ɑ óruug wun óbëëd ɑ dï? Yïëyø mi wun nøg nɑ ngø!" 
Matthew6:31 “Adɑ́ pëthi wun ko lïngi kɑ wu okööbø kinni, ‘Wø ócɑm-ɑ ngø? Wø ómɑdh-ɑ ngø? Wø órug-ɑ ngø?’" 
Matthew6:32 (Bene gïgɑni ceth ɑ nyi tɑg yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø.) Ngɑ̈nyi yi Wïyi wun, ɑ ying mɑl kinni, jɑmmɑni bënn di dwɑddø yi wun." 
Matthew6:33 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, yɑbu Pödhi Jwøk møti, kɑ wu gwøgu gïn-ɑ dwɑdde, o jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø bënn ómëgge wun." 
Matthew6:34 “Kɑ pëthi wun ko lïngi kipe møg-ɑ óbï dhuki, mɑ́ dhuki óbï kɑ ɑkørre. Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng dɑ ɑkørre, o cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng dɑ ɑkørre." 
Matthew7:1 “Wu ko nyi cɑ̈ɑ̈y ki ji møøgø, o wu ócög wu pɑ cɑy yi Jwøk," 
Matthew7:2 mɑ́ wu ócɑy yi Jwøk kɑ kër-ɑ cɑyyi wun ji møøgø, o gïn-ɑ yije nyi rummi wun ji møøgø, en ɑ yije órummi wun yi Jwøk." 
Matthew7:3 Yïde ɑ nenní wëël-ɑ thiinh kì wɑɑng wɑɑd wun, o men-ɑ́ duli yɑdh men-ɑ wɑngí pɑ ywør yi yïn?" 
Matthew7:4 Wɑlɑ̀ wɑɑd wun óköbbi yi yïn kidï kinni, ‘Wiy wëël-ɑ wɑngí èn kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g,’ e men-ɑ́ wɑngí dɑ duli yɑdh?" 
Matthew7:5 Yï bɑ wëny! Kɑ̈ɑ̈l duli yɑdh wɑ̈g kì wɑngí møti, o yï ónëën kidøøj, o yï cuggí kɑ̈ɑ̈li wëël-ɑ wɑɑng wɑɑd wun wɑ̈g." 
Matthew7:6 “Gïn-ɑ bɑ ɑkwër ko nyi mëggu gwögg, mɑ́ wu ógwɑ̈y yi gwöggɑni. Kɑ tiggi wun ko nyi lëngu kundhøngø, mɑ́ gï ónyøn yi gen." 
Matthew7:7 “Cwöddi wun, o wu óthödhi; yɑ̈ɑ̈b wun, o wu óyïddi wun; ngɑ̈jji wun, o dhø ød óyïëbbi wun." 
Matthew7:8 Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ nyi cwöddi, nyii thödhø; o ngɑn-ɑ nyi yɑ̈bø nyii yïddø; o ngɑn-ɑ nyi ngɑ̈jji, dhø ød nyi yïëbb-ɑ en." 
Matthew7:9 Dɑ dhɑnhø kì kelli wun me mëggi wɑ̈de tungi kït, kɑ̀ kwɑ̈jje ki ópun?" 
Matthew7:10 Wɑlɑ̀ gø mëgge’ thwöl, ke kwɑ̈jje ki rëjø?" 
Matthew7:11 Keløg wu ngɑ̈ny thödhi nyigi wun ki gïgdøj, wun ɑ́ tyëngrijjø, Wïyi wun ɑ ying mɑl, tyëng-ɑ cwöddi kì yïe, koo thödhe ki gïg pëddi døøjø?" 
Matthew7:12 “Göggi wun ji møøgø gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun o ge göggi wun yi gen. Bene møgɑni ɑ wɑngi yi Cigg geki tyëngtöng mø Jwøk. 
Matthew7:13 “Nyi kɑ̈lu dhøng-ɑ dhing, mɑ́ dhøng-ɑ yïëbbi mɑc lɑɑj, o wɑ̈dh yööd kì yuu-ɑ kedhi yije, o ji-ɑ kɑ̈lli yuuɑni gïïr." 
Matthew7:14 De yuu-ɑ kedhi kej nënn-ɑ ɑtheer dhing, o wɑ̈dh teeg kì yije, o bɑ ji mø nøg ɑ nyi yod yuuɑni." 
Matthew7:15 “Koru ri wun kipe jøtöng mø pyed, møg-ɑ nyi bï yï wun ge nënni ge nɑ dyëg, de kì yethi gen, ge bɑ óthönhì mø rijjø." 
Matthew7:16 Ge óngij yi wun kì bɑng gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen. Nywøli oløg pɑ nyi pøn kì kö but. O nywøli ólɑm pɑ nyi pøn ki kö ɑ́lɑl. 
Matthew7:17 Yɑnh døj nyi nywøl-ɑ nywøl mø døøj, o yɑnh rɑj nyi nywøl-ɑ nywøl mø rijjø." 
Matthew7:18 Yɑnh døj pɑ cuggi nywølø ki nywøl mø rijjø, o yɑnh rɑj pɑ cuggi nywølø ki nywøl mø døøj." 
Matthew7:19 Yɑnh pɑ nywøl ki nywøl mø døøj, nyi ngøl-ɑ piny, kɑ leeng mɑc." 
Matthew7:20 Jøtöng mø pyed óngij yi wun kì bɑng gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen ceth. 
Matthew7:21 “Pɑth ki tyëng-ɑ nyi cwølli yɑn kinni, ‘Wuö, Wuö,’ ɑ ówɑ̈dhi Pödhi Jwøk, den-ɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ nyi gwøg gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Wïyɑ, ɑ ying mɑl." 
Matthew7:22 Kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Cɑ́y, yɑ óköbbi yi ji mø gïïr kinni, ‘Wuö, Wuö, wø ɑ́tööng ki nyingí, kɑ wø ryëmm-ɑ wɑ̈g ki wëyrijjø ki nyingí, kɑ wø ogöögø ki gïgdøngø mø gïïr ki nyingí.’" 
Matthew7:23 De ge óköbbɑ kinni, ‘Wu kwïj yi yɑn ki mendwøng, kedh wun kì butɑ, wu bɑ tyëngrijjø.’" 
Matthew7:24 “Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, ngɑn-ɑ lïngi kwøbbɑ, kɑ ogöögø ki gïg-ɑ kømmɑ, ópɑ̈ɑ̈r yi yɑn kɑ jɑl me rumme nud, mɑ ɑ́geer øde kömi kït." 
Matthew7:25 Kɑ kødh ómɑ̈gø, kɑ bɑɑyø obëënø, kɑ yømø ocödø, kɑ ge göjj-ɑ kömi ønɑni, kɑ ocögø e pɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dh, mɑ́ e ókëël-ɑ kömi kït." 
Matthew7:26 “O ngɑn-ɑ lïngi kwøbbɑ, kɑ gïg-ɑ kømmɑ ocögø gï pɑ gwøge, pɑ̈r ki jɑl mɑ dhëg, mɑ ɑ́geer øde kömi kwöjø." 
Matthew7:27 Kɑ kødh ómɑ̈gø, kɑ bɑɑyø obëënø, kɑ yømø ocödø, kɑ ge göjj-ɑ kömi ønɑni, kɑ ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø ki pɑ̈ɑ̈nhi dwøng!”" 
Matthew7:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki kwøbi møgɑni, kɑ teedø ongɑ̈ngø yi yëth-ɑ pwönye." 
Matthew7:29 Nuti bëëdø e pɑ̈r ki jøpwönyi Cigg; de ɑ́pwönyi kɑ tegø. 
Matthew8:1 Kɑ ɑ́yïnhi Yëso piny kì wïj kït, ɑløg bɑnge yi ji mø gïïr." 
Matthew8:2 Kɑ jɑl me ree di lɑ̈y bï-ɑ yïe, ɑbøødhe ree piny kì bøle, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Wuö, yɑ ócuggø yielø yi yïn, keløg yï dwɑdd-ɑ yieli yɑn.”" 
Matthew8:3 Kɑ Yëso cinge rïje, kɑ jɑlɑni nywɑle, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ yieli yïn.” Awɑ̈ɑ̈ny lɑ̈y kì ree kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Matthew8:4 Codhe, ɑköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Lïng! Ko di ngɑn me köbbi yi yïn, de kedh kɑ rií nyudhí ókwërø, o yï rɑng yi en; kɑ yï muuj ki gënh-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi Mosɑ̀, ɑ́ nyudhi kiper dönyí.”" 
Matthew8:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Yëso Kɑpernɑum, ɑbëën dhɑbïdh megø yïe," 
Matthew8:6 e ókwɑ̈jjø kinni, “Wuö, bɑ̈ngɑ obuddø kì gølɑ, dhɑ̈rø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dële, o ceg-ɑ orɑng.”" 
Matthew8:7 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ óbï be yielii.”" 
Matthew8:8 De ɑ́kyëddi yi dhɑbïnhɑni kinni, “Wuö, yɑ pɑth ki ngɑn gølɑ kedhi yi yïn; de ceg kwøb yøw, o bɑ̈ngɑ bødhe." 
Matthew8:9 Møgɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, mɑ́ yɑ ceg kɑ jɑɑgø, o dɑ ji mø jɑɑgɑ thyew. Ngɑn jɑɑgɑ nyi köbbɑ’ köbbø kinni, ‘Kedh!’ Kɑ nyii kedhø, kɑ megø nyi köbbɑ kinni, ‘Bïí!’ Kɑ nyii bëënø. Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑ nyi köbbɑ kinni, ‘Gwøg gïn!’ Kɑ gø nyi gwøge.”" 
Matthew8:10 Angɑ̈ng Yëso kɑ ɑ́lïnge møgɑni, kɑ tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì bɑnge köbbe kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, yɑ nuti yïddø ki ngɑn yïe di yïëyø me ni men, cɑgg ɑ́ kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil." 
Matthew8:11 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, ji mø gïïr óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, møøgø óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ tɑw kì Pödhi Jwøk, kyeel ki Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob." 
Matthew8:12 De tyëng-ɑ di ying pönhɑni óryeem yij muudhø, kun-ɑ óywöngi ji, kɑ leggi gen ngenyyi gen.”" 
Matthew8:13 Aköbbi dhɑbïnhɑni yi Yëso kinni, “Kedhí gølí, møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi yïn ógöggi yïn.” Kɑ bɑ̈ng dhɑbïdh ódönyø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Matthew8:14 Codhe, ɑkedhi Yëso gøl Pïtør, kɑ meyi cï Pïtør lidh yi en e buud-ɑ piny ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dële, o dële lëëdh." 
Matthew8:15 Anywɑɑl cingi ngɑnɑni yi Yëso, kɑ lëdhi dële døøg-ɑ piny. Adhwödh ngɑnɑni, kɑ kedh-ɑ be kɑ̈lli gen." 
Matthew8:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög piny ki wɑɑng thyënhø, kɑ ji mø gïïr mø ri gen di wëyrijjø kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïe, kɑ wëyɑni ryeeme wɑ̈g kì ri gen, kɑ tyëng-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø bënn yiele." 
Matthew8:17 Møgɑni ɑ́gwøge kɑ per kinni, o møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng, pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen kinni, “Rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllee ɑ́kɑ̈l yi en. Kɑ gïg-ɑ rijjø kì dëllee tëre.”" 
Matthew8:18 De kɑ ɑ́liidh ji yi Yëso ge gïïr kì bute, ɑköbbe jøbɑnge kinni, kedhi gen løøg nɑm." 
Matthew8:19 Kɑ jɑl mɑ jɑlpwönyi Cigg bï-ɑ yïe, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, yɑ ólugi kì bɑngí kì yethi kɑ̈jj-ɑ ókedhi yi yïn bënn.”" 
Matthew8:20 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Ógwøgg dɑ burrì mø yethi gen nyi bëëd yi gen, o winy dɑ uddi gen, de Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø bong keny nyi thɑ̈ɑ̈nhe wïje.”" 
Matthew8:21 Kɑ Yëso köbbi yi jɑl megø kì kelli jøbɑnge kinni, “Wuö, wiy yɑ kedhɑ be konyi wïyɑ møti.”" 
Matthew8:22 Kɑ köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Bïí bɑngɑ, kɑ wiy tyëngthøø, kony gen tyëngthøø mø gen.”" 
Matthew8:23 Kɑ Yëso kɑdh-ɑ yij morkɑb, ɑløg jøge bɑnge." 
Matthew8:24 Kɑ ɑtunø me dwøng ocödø ge ying-ɑ nɑm, kɑ morkɑb køm-ɑ mudø yi ɑpɑgø, de Yëso ɑ́bëëd e onenø." 
Matthew8:25 Kɑ jøbɑnge kedh-ɑ be cyëëwii, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Wuö, yiel wøn! Wø othøø!”" 
Matthew8:26 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wude ɑ böggi wun? Yïëyø mi wun nøg kidï!” Adhwödhe, kɑ yømø geki ɑpɑgø köbbe cungi gen, kɑ piny ceg-ɑ ì dïw." 
Matthew8:27 Kɑ jøgɑni ongɑ̈ngø, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Jɑɑl ceg bëëdø ɑ́ ngø, ɑ lïngi dhøge yi yømø geki ɑpɑgø!”" 
Matthew8:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Yëso løøg nɑm, kì myërri Gɑdɑrɑ̀, ɑrøøm gen ki jøg ɑ́ryew mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l kelli rörri ji. Jøgɑni ryeet, ri gen dɑ wëyrijjø, ge nyi cɑɑg-ɑ rødh ki ji, kɑ yuuɑni wiy ki cɑɑdhø." 
Matthew8:29 Kɑ ge ceg-ɑ ryeerø kinni, “Cwɑggí ɑ́ ngø ki wøn, yïn ɑ́ Wɑ̈d Jwøk? Yï bï-ɑ be judi wøn e bøli kej wøn nuti bëënø?”" 
Matthew8:30 Ádɑ dɑɑg kundhøngø me cyɑ̈mø, e lɑ̈wi kì buti gen." 
Matthew8:31 Kɑ Yëso kwɑjji yi wëyɑni kinni, “Keløg wø ryeem-ɑ wɑ̈g yi yïn, ör wøn yij dɑɑg kundhøngø.”" 
Matthew8:32 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedh wun!” Kɑ ge bï-ɑ wɑ̈g, ɑkedhi gen yij dɑɑg kundhøngø. Kɑ dɑɑg kundhøngø reng-ɑ piny kì wïj gëlø, kɑ ceg-ɑ ì cur kì nɑm, kɑ omudø bëne." 
Matthew8:33 Kɑ jøg-ɑ kwɑ̈yø reng-ɑ kɑɑl, kɑ møgɑni dwøg gen bënn, kí gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kipe jøgɑni ryeet geki wëyrijjø." 
Matthew8:34 Codhe, kɑ tyëng kɑɑlɑni bënn kedh-ɑ be pɑɑri Yëso. Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Yëso yi gen, ɑkwɑjjii yi gen kinni kedhe kì pödhi gen." 
Matthew9:1 Kɑ Yëso kɑdh-ɑ yij morkɑb, kɑ bï-ɑ løøgø, kɑ kedh-ɑ pɑɑ gen." 
Matthew9:2 Akɑ̈ɑ̈l jɑl me dële dwɑnyø yïe, e kɑ̈lli e obuddø kì yij pyën. Kɑ ɑ́liidh yïëyø mi gen yi Yëso, ɑköbbe jɑl-ɑ dële dwɑnyø kinni, “Cwed pyëwí wɑ̈dɑ, orøgí ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny.”" 
Matthew9:3 De kwï jøpwönyi Cigg ɑ́kööb ki pëthi gen kinni, “Jɑlɑni bwöl-ɑ nyingi Jwøk.”" 
Matthew9:4 De rummi gen ɑ́yod yi Yëso, kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Wude ɑ rum wun ki rummì mø rijjø ki pëthi wun?" 
Matthew9:5 Á ngø ɑ yöd, köbbi dhɑnhø kinni, ‘Orøgí ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny,’ wɑlɑ̀ kinni, ‘Dhwöödh, kɑ yï cyɑ̈dhí?’" 
Matthew9:6 De wu ónyudhɑ kinni Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø yïe dɑ tegø kì kömi piny, men lɑ̈ɑ̈nye orøg.” Aköbbe jɑl-ɑ dële dwɑnyø kinni, “Dhwöödh, kwɑny pyëní kɑ yï kedhí gølí.”" 
Matthew9:7 Adhwödh jɑlɑni kɑ kedh-ɑ gøle. 
Matthew9:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh møgɑni yi teedø, kɑ ge obwøgø, kɑ Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thödhi ji ki tengɑni lejji gen." 
Matthew9:9 Kɑ ɑ́dhwödh Yëso kì kenyɑni, kɑ jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Mɑthyëw lidhe, e obëëdø kì kej gwɑ̈j. Kɑ köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Bïí bɑngɑ.” Kɑ Mɑthyëw odhwödhø, ɑkedhe bɑnge." 
Matthew9:10 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëde e ocyɑ̈mø kì gøl Mɑthyëw, kɑ jøgwɑ̈j mø gïïr obëënø geki tyëngorøg, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ piny be cɑm geki Yëso kí jøbɑnge." 
Matthew9:11 Kɑ lidh yi Jøpɑresì, ɑpyëj gen jøbɑng Yëso kinni, “Ede jɑlpwönyi wun ɑ cyɑ̈me kì kej ɑ́kyel, ki jøgwɑ̈j geki tyëngorøg?”" 
Matthew9:12 Møgɑni ɑ́lïngi yi Yëso, ɑkööbe kinni, “Pɑth ki tyëng-ɑ dëlli gen yööd ɑ nyi dwɑddi ɑkïm, den-ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø." 
Matthew9:13 Kedh wun kɑ tyelli møg-ɑ kööbø kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø yɑb wun kidøøj kinni, ‘Pɑth ki gëëdhi ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn, de yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ lɑ̈mpyëw.’ Mɑ́ yɑ nuti bëën-ɑ be cwøli tyëngtir, den-ɑ́ tyëngorøg.”" 
Matthew9:14 Kɑ jøbɑng Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g bï-ɑ yïe, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ nyi thuum wøn, wøki Jøpɑresì, de jøbɑngí pɑ nyi thuumø?”" 
Matthew9:15 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Tyëng nywöm pɑ nyi kïïmø kɑ̀ nud jɑlnywöm kì kelli gen, de dhuki megø keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l jɑlnywöm kì kelli gen, bene keny-ɑ óthuum gen." 
Matthew9:16 “Bong ngɑn nyi buul ógødh mɑ kwɑ̈ɑ̈l ki ógødh me nyɑ̈n, mɑ́ ógønh-ɑ ɑ́buud ree óyööde wɑ̈g kì ri ógønhɑni, kɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́buul ópëddø lɑ̈nyyø." 
Matthew9:17 Wɑlɑ̀ møgi oløg me nyɑ̈n pɑ nyi kïdhi yethi ɑthebb mø kɑ̈gi gen dööng, kipe ɑthebb ópyëëd, kɑ møgø kedh-ɑ piny, kɑ ɑthebb órënyø. De møng-ɑ nyɑ̈n nyi kïdh-ɑ yethi ɑthebb mø nyɑ̈n o ge cög gen ge døøj bënn.”" 
Matthew9:18 De kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëde e köbb-ɑ gïn møgɑni, kɑ jɑl Yeud mɑ jɑgø bï-ɑ yïe, kɑ ree bøødhe piny kì bøle, ɑkööbe kinni, “Nyɑrɑ ɑ́cer-ɑ thøø ɑnɑn. De bïí, kɑ cinggí thɑɑny köme, o cɑ̈re.”" 
Matthew9:19 Kɑ Yëso odhwödhø, kɑ ókedhø geki jɑlɑni kí jøbɑnge." 
Matthew9:20 Kɑ ngɑndhɑjø me ree cyɑ̈dhi yi wɑɑnø ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈j Yëso. Kɑ tuung ógødh Yëso nywɑle," 
Matthew9:21 mɑ́ e ɑ́rum ki pyëwe kinni, “Keløg tuung ógødhe onywɑlø yi yɑn yøw, yɑ ódönyø.”" 
Matthew9:22 Kɑ Yëso ree luge, kɑ ngɑnɑni lidhe, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Nyɑrɑ, pyëwí ko lïngi, yï ɑ́yiel yi yïëyí.” Adönyi ngɑnɑni, kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Matthew9:23 Codhe, ɑwɑ̈dhi Yëso gøl jɑgø, kɑ ji-ɑ nyi ywöngi ge okudhø ki kɑ̈ngì geki ji møøgø mø ngenyø yuude ge owøwø." 
Matthew9:24 Akööbe kinni, “Kedhu wɑ̈g, mɑ́ nyɑnthinh nuti thøø, de ceg-ɑ nenø.” Kɑ gɑg yi gen." 
Matthew9:25 De keny-ɑ ɑ́rum teedø ki ryeem wɑ̈g, ɑkedhe ød, kɑ cingi nyɑnthinh mɑge, kɑ nyɑnɑni dhwödh-ɑ mɑl." 
Matthew9:26 Kɑ per møgɑni tɑɑy-ɑ yij pönhɑni bëne. 
Matthew9:27 Kɑ ɑ́kedh Yëso kì kenyɑni, ɑløg jøg mø bɑ cörr ɑ́ryew bɑnge, ge óryeerø kinni “Wɑ̈d Debïd, ywöngi yijí kiper wøn!”" 
Matthew9:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe kɑl, kɑ cörrɑni kedh-ɑ bute. Kɑ ge pyëj yi Yëso kinni, “Wu ɑ́yïëy kinni, wu ócuggø yielø yɑn?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Wø ɑ́yïëy, Wuö.”" 
Matthew9:29 Kɑ nyingi gen nywɑl yi Yëso, ɑkööbe kinni, “Gïn-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi wun ógöggi wun ceth.”" 
Matthew9:30 Kɑ nyingi gen óyïëbbø. Kɑ ge kyëddi yi Yëso kinni, “Ko di ngɑn köbbu møgɑni!”" 
Matthew9:31 De ge ɑ́kedh, kɑ kwøbbi Yëso wɑjji gen kì yethi myërrɑni bënn." 
Matthew9:32 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh jøgɑni, kedh jɑl me mïïlø, o ree dɑ wëyrijjø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Yëso." 
Matthew9:33 Kɑ ɑ́ryëëm wëyɑni wɑ̈g kì ri jɑlɑni, kɑ okööbø. Kɑ teedø ongɑ̈ngø, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Gïn ni men nuti pɑ̈nyø lidhø kì Isrɑil.”" 
Matthew9:34 De Jøpɑresì ɑ́kööb kinni, “Bɑ jɑngi wëyrijjø ɑ thödhi Yëso ki tegø men-ɑ cyedde wëyrijjø.”" 
Matthew9:35 Kɑ Yëso ócyɑ̈dhø kì kelli kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø geki myërr-ɑ thønhø bënn, e ópwönyø ki ji kì sinɑgøgg. Kɑ kwøbbi Wöndøj mi Pödhi Jwøk pwönyi yi en, kɑ tyëngbuud yiele, ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlli gen." 
Matthew9:36 De keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe ji ge ngenyø, ɑywöngi yije kiper gen, mɑ́ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ twɑ̈lø; wɑ̈thi gen muumø ni dyëg mø bong ngɑn kwɑy gen." 
Matthew9:37 Aköbbe jøbɑnge kinni, “Byel ɑ́cyeg ki mendwøng, de tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈jø nøg," 
Matthew9:38 de kwɑjji wun wïi pwödhø, o kɑ̈ne ki ji mø öre be kɑj ki byel.”" 
Matthew10:1 Kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge cwøle gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. Kɑ gï thödhe ki tegø men ryeem gen wëyrijjø wɑ̈g, kí yieli tyëng-ɑ buud ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì bënn." 
Matthew10:2 Nyingi tyëngwöödø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew ek: mɑɑl gen bɑ Sɑymøn ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Pïtør, kí ómen Andrø; kí wɑ̈ddi Dhebedì, Yɑgob geki Jøn;" 
Matthew10:3 kí Pïlïp, kí Bɑrthølømɑøs; kí Tömɑs kí Mɑthyëw jɑlgwɑ̈j; kí Yɑgob wɑ̈d Alpɑ̀ kí Thɑdeøs;" 
Matthew10:4 kí Sɑymøn Lunø, kí Yeudɑ̀ jɑl Iskɑryøt, ɑ ɑ́ngeew Yëso." 
Matthew10:5 Bene pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryewɑni ɑ ɑ́ör yi Yëso, kɑ gï cege kinni, “Wu ko töngi kelli tyëng pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ wu ko kedhi kelli myërri Sɑmɑriyɑ̀," 
Matthew10:6 de pödhu yï dyëg-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì gøl Isrɑil. 
Matthew10:7 Cyɑ̈dhi wun wu kɑ̈ll-ɑ wöndøj kinni, ‘Pödhi Jwøk ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi.’" 
Matthew10:8 Nyi yielu tyëng-ɑ buud; kɑ tyëngthøø nyi tug wun; kɑ tyëng-ɑ ri gen di lɑ̈y gwøg wun, o ge dönyi gen; kɑ wëyrijjø ryeem wun wɑ̈g. Ko di gïn culi wun, mɑ́ tengɑni nuti cɑɑg kɑ ngewø yi wun." 
Matthew10:9 Wu ko kɑ̈ddi ki ngyëny dhɑb, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́tegø, wɑlɑ̀ dilɑl kì yethi pödhhi wun," 
Matthew10:10 wɑlɑ̀ wu ko kɑ̈ddi ki beeg wel, wɑlɑ̀ ógudh mø pɑ rug, wɑlɑ̀ wɑr, wɑlɑ̀ lødh, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ göögø nyi ceg kɑ thödhø ceth ki köögi." 
Matthew10:11 “Kenyi wɑ̈dhu pɑc wɑlɑ̀ kɑɑl, nyi pëjji wun ki ngɑn-ɑ bute døøj ki pëggø, kɑ wu bëëd wun kì gøle gïti keny-ɑ ódhwödh wun kì kenyɑni." 
Matthew10:12 De kɑ̀ kedhu kɑl, mɑ̈dh wun tyëng gølɑni kinni, ‘Wu óbëëdø ki mër.’" 
Matthew10:13 O keløg tyëng gølɑni bɑ jii mër, mëër wun óbëëdø kì yije, de keløg gølɑni pɑth ki gøl mër, mëër wun døøg-ɑ yï wun." 
Matthew10:14 O keløg e dɑ kɑɑl wɑlɑ̀ pɑc me pɑ cwøøl wun yije, wɑlɑ̀ kwøbbi wun pɑ lïngi yi en, tëëngu tør tyelli wun wɑ̈g, kɑ wu kedh wun kì kenyɑni." 
Matthew10:15 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Cɑ́y, cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑy Sødømɑ̀ geki Gømørɑ̀ óbëëd ge lɑ̈w kibøli cɑ́y-ɑ ócɑɑy tyëng kɑɑlɑni!" 
Matthew10:16 “Lïdhi wun! Wu ör yi yɑn wu pɑ̈r ki dyëg møg gøøj kelli óthönhì. Bëëd wun wɑ̈thi wun pel ni thöllì, kɑ wu bëëd wu bɑ mööl ni ɑkùr." 
Matthew10:17 Koru ri wun kipe teedø, mɑ́ kelli gen ódi tyëng-ɑ ómɑg wun, kɑ wu kïdhi burø, kɑ wu peej be pwödø kì yethi sinɑgøgg." 
Matthew10:18 Wu ópeej bøli modïrr geki rɑ̈nhì kipe nyingɑ; de köbbu Wöndøj gen geki tyëng pödhh-ɑ kyeelø. 
Matthew10:19 Pëthi wun ko lïngi keny-ɑ ókïdhi wun burø, kipe møg-ɑ ókømmi yi wun, mɑ́ wu ónyudhi møg-ɑ ókømmi yi wun kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Matthew10:20 Mɑ́ kwøbb-ɑ ókømmi yi wun pɑth ki mø wun, de ge ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Wëyi Wïyi wun, o bɑ en ɑ ókööbø kì ri wun." 
Matthew10:21 “Dhɑnhø ómen ómuuje, o kïdhi be nɑ̈gø, kɑ dhɑnhø wɑ̈de muuje, kɑ yɑnythønhø ri gen lugi gen wëëg gen kɑ gï nɑ̈g gen." 
Matthew10:22 Wu ómɑɑn yi ji bënn kipe nyingɑ. De ngɑn-ɑ óngïnø gïti kɑ̀ thumi møgɑni, bene en ɑ óyiel." 
Matthew10:23 Keny-ɑ ócuul nyingi gen ki wun kì kɑɑl, pɑ̈ɑ̈r wun kɑɑl-ɑ kyeelø. Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, myërri Isrɑil pɑ tyëg yi wun e Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø nuti bëënø." 
Matthew10:24 “Ngɑn ceg ki pwönyø pɑ ying mɑl kibøli ngɑn-ɑ pwönyii, o bɑ̈ng pɑ ying mɑl kibøli wɑ̈n." 
Matthew10:25 Døøj ke göög ngɑn ceg ki pwönyø e pɑ̈r ki ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́pwönyii, o bɑ̈ng gööge e pɑ̈r ki wɑ̈n. Keløg wïi kɑl cwølli yi teedø ɑ́ Bɑɑldhebul, tyëng gøle ócwøl ɑ dï?" 
Matthew10:26 “Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, wu ko böggi yi tyëngɑni, mɑ́ e bong gïjø ɑ́kyel me ying thɑ piny men koo nyodh. O bong gïjø ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ókɑnø men koo yod." 
Matthew10:27 Møg-ɑ köbbɑ wun kì yij muudhø, töngu gen kì dicɑ̈ng, o møg-ɑ ólïngi yi wun kì gød, töngu gen kì wɑ̈thi óthɑɑng ud mɑl." 
Matthew10:28 Wu ko böggi yi tyëng-ɑ nyi nɑ̈g dëël dhɑnhø, o wëy pɑ cuggi nɑ̈gø yi gen; de böggu Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ cuggi nɑ̈gi dëël dhɑnhø geki wëye kì yij mɑc." 
Matthew10:29 Ákeej ɑ́ryew nyii ngewø ki gïrïc ɑ́kyel, de bong ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen, men dëëm piny e kwïj yi Wïyi wun." 
Matthew10:30 Cɑgg ɑ́ kwɑnni yëyyi wɑ̈thi wun ngɑ̈nyi yi en bënn. 
Matthew10:31 Wu ko böggi, mɑ́ per wun teeg kibøli ɑ́keej mø ngenyø." 
Matthew10:32 “Ngɑn-ɑ óyïëy yɑn kì bøli teedø, ólonyɑ ki yïëyø kì bøli Wïyɑ ɑ ying mɑl." 
Matthew10:33 De ngɑn-ɑ óbɑny yɑn kì bøli teedø, ólony yi yɑn ki bɑnyø kì bøli Wïyɑ ɑ ying mɑl." 
Matthew10:34 “Wu ko rum kinni, yɑ ɑ́bï-ɑ be kɑ̈ɑ̈li mër kömi piny. Yɑ nuti bëën-ɑ be kɑ̈ɑ̈li mër dɑ́ be kɑ̈ɑ̈li pilø." 
Matthew10:35 Yɑ ɑ́bï-ɑ be cwɑ̈ɑ̈gi dhɑnhø kí wïye, kí cwɑ̈ɑ̈gi nyɑndhɑjø kí meye, kí cwɑ̈ɑ̈gi meyi jɑlø geki cï wɑ̈de." 
Matthew10:36 Tyëng-ɑ ómɑn dhɑnhø óbëëd gɑ tyëng gøl gen. 
Matthew10:37 “Ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑr wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø me lod mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑre yɑn, pɑ døøj ki bëëdø ɑ́ ngetibɑngɑ; o ngɑn mɑɑr wɑ̈de wɑlɑ̀ nyɑre ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø me lod mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑre yɑn, pɑ døøj ki bëëdø ɑ́ ngetibɑngɑ." 
Matthew10:38 Ngɑn koo byel yɑdh ɑrïwe, kɑ lug-ɑ bɑngɑ, pɑ døøj ki bëëdø ɑ́ ngetibɑngɑ." 
Matthew10:39 Ngɑn kor wëye, wëye ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì yïe, o ngɑn lɑ̈ɑ̈ny wëye kiperɑ, wëye óyiele." 
Matthew10:40 “Ngɑn yïëy wun kì gøle, ɑ́yïëy-ɑ yɑn; o ngɑn yïëy yɑn kì gøle, ɑ́yïëy-ɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn." 
Matthew10:41 Ngɑn yïëy ngeti wööni Jwøk kipe kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ ngeti wööni Jwøk, ókwɑny-ɑ kööngi ngeti wööni Jwøk. O ngɑn yïëy ngɑndøj kipe bëëde ɑ́ ngɑndøj, ókwɑny-ɑ kööngi ngɑndøj." 
Matthew10:42 O ngɑn thödhi othinh-ɑ thinh kì kelli møg, ki pïg ngij kipe kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ ngetibɑngɑ, köönge pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny.”" 
Matthew11:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki cegi jøbɑnge, gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, ɑdhwödhe kì kenyɑni, kɑ kedh-ɑ be pwönyø kì yethi myërr." 
Matthew11:2 Alïng Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g kì ød mɑg ki møg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi Mesiy, kɑ öd-ɑ yïe ki jøbɑnge." 
Matthew11:3 Kɑ Yëso pyëj yi gen kinni, “Bene yïn ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kømmi, i obëënø, wɑlɑ̀ yïd wøn ki ngɑn megø?”" 
Matthew11:4 Kɑ mø gen løøg yi Yëso kinni, “Kedh wun, kɑ Jøn köbbu møg-ɑ lïngi yi wun, kí møg-ɑ nenni yi wun;" 
Matthew11:5 cörr nyi døøg-ɑ be nënnø, kɑ ngöll døøg-ɑ be cyɑ̈dhø, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ri gen di lɑ̈y dëlli gen nyii dönyø, kɑ mïng nyi døøg-ɑ be lïngø, kɑ tyëngthøø nyi tug kì yij thøø, o Wöndøj pwöny-ɑ ɑbuur." 
Matthew11:6 Tyëng-ɑ yethi gen pɑ pyëër ki yɑn ri gen dɑ gyëdh.” 
Matthew11:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh jøgɑni, ɑköbbi teedø yi Yëso kipe Jøn kinni, “Wu ɑ́kedh-ɑ be ngø yij pɑ̈l? Wu ɑ́kedh-ɑ be ywøøri obej me nïngi yi yømø?" 
Matthew11:8 De wu ɑ́kedh-ɑ be ywøøri ngø? Wu ɑ́kedh-ɑ be ywøøri ngɑn rugø ki ógudh mø myëër cɑrø? Tyëng-ɑ nyi rugø kinøw, nyi bëëd ɑ yethi kɑ̈ll-ɑ døngø; kɑ̈lli rɑ̈nhì!" 
Matthew11:9 Köbbu yɑn, wu ɑ́kedh-ɑ be lidhi ngø yij pɑ̈l? Jɑltöng? Ngee, de ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wun lod-ɑ jɑltöng." 
Matthew11:10 Bɑ Jøn ɑ kømmi yi wɑ̈jji kwërø kinni, ‘Jwøk ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Jɑlwöönɑ óörɑ bølí, o tyenye yöö kiperí.’" 
Matthew11:11 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g dwøng kibøli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kömi piny bënn. De ngɑn-ɑ thinh kì Pödhi Jwøk, dwøng kibøle." 
Matthew11:12 Kër-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi Jøn ki pwönyø, pïd ɑnɑn, Pödhi Jwøk, ceg-ɑ orɑng kì cinggi tyëngkɑ̈b." 
Matthew11:13 Mø Pödhi Jwøk ɑ́bëëd ge okømmø yi tyëngtöng mø Jwøk, kɑ ge nyodh kì yethi Ciggi Mosɑ̀ gïti kɑ ɑ́bëën Jøn." 
Matthew11:14 Keløg wu dwɑdd-ɑ yïëyi wöni gen, Jøn kiree bene Eliyɑ̀, ɑ bëëne ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈g ki kwøbø." 
Matthew11:15 Ngɑn di yïthhe mø lïnge, wiy lïnge." 
Matthew11:16 “De rïj men ópɑ̈ɑ̈r yi yɑn kɑ ngø? Pɑ̈r ki othønhø mø bëëdø piny kì kej ngyew, ge ócwöddø ki wɑddi gen kinni," 
Matthew11:17 ‘Wu ɑ́göjji wøn ki bul, de wu nuti cöngø. Kɑ wø óywöngø ki ywøøg thøø, de wu nuti ywöngø.’" 
Matthew11:18 Mɑ́ Jøn ɑ́bï e pɑ cyɑ̈mø, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ nyi mɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg, kɑ teedø okööbø kinni, ‘Ree dɑ wɑ̈lø.’" 
Matthew11:19 Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ɑ́bï e ocyɑ̈mø, o omɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, ‘Lidhu jɑɑl! Bɑ jɑlcɑm, o bɑ mɑ̈dhhi møgø, o bɑ mɑ̈dh ki jøgwɑ̈j geki tyëngorøg, kí luuy thyew!’ Peli wïj Jwøk nyi ngij-ɑ bɑng gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi en.”" 
Matthew11:20 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi Yëso ki cɑyi tyëng kɑ̈dd-ɑ́ yethi gen ɑ́gööge ki gïïngɑ̈ngø mø ngenyø, kipe kɑ̀ nuti yewi gen ki orøøg gen." 
Matthew11:21 Ákööb kinni, “Cyën ying-ɑ kömí, yïn ɑ Korɑdhïn! Cyën ying-ɑ kömí, yïn ɑ Betsɑidɑ̀, mɑ́ keløg gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg kì yethi wun, di gwøg-ɑ Suur kí Sïdön, tyëng-ɑ yethi gen di yewi kɑ̈gi piny dööng, kɑ ge di rug ki ocwɑ̈llì, kɑ ge di bëëd kì yij belø." 
Matthew11:22 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Cɑ́y, cɑ́y-ɑ ócɑɑy Suur kí Sïdön óbëëd ge lɑ̈w kibøli cɑ́y-ɑ ócɑɑy wun." 
Matthew11:23 O yïn ø, Kɑpernɑum! Yï ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ tïngi rií mɑl? Pɑth, yï óleeng-ɑ piny yij ölø. Mɑ́ keløg gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg kì yijí di gwøg-ɑ Sødømɑ̀, di bëëd e nudd e nud pïd dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Matthew11:24 De yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kinni, kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Cɑ́y, cɑ́y-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kömi Sødømɑ̀ óbëëd ge lɑ̈w kibøli cɑ́y-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kömí.”" 
Matthew11:25 Akööb Yëso kì bøli kenyɑni kinni, “Wïyø, yɑ pwøj-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Wïi mɑl kí piny, kipe kɑ ɑ́kɑ̈nní møgɑni tyëng-ɑ dïdø kidøøj geki tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel, de ge ɑ́nyudhí tyëng-ɑ pɑ̈r ki othønhø." 
Matthew11:26 Ngee, Wïyø, møgɑni ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ yi yïn." 
Matthew11:27 “Jɑmmì bënn ɑ́cïb cingɑ yi Wïyɑ. Bong ngɑn ngɑ̈nyi Wɑ̈d den-ɑ́ Wïye, o bong ngɑn ngɑ̈nyi Wïy den-ɑ́ Wɑ̈de geki tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi nyudhø yi Wɑ̈de." 
Matthew11:28 “Bïu yïɑ wu bënn, wu tyëng-ɑ dhɑ̈rø, kí tyëng-ɑ torø yi tyëddi gïgpeg, o wu nëngɑ ki ywömø." 
Matthew11:29 Cïb wun ɑcebɑ muddi wun, kɑ møgɑ dïd wun, mɑ́ yɑ bɑ mölø, o pyëwɑ bong dhɑ̈w. O wu óyïddi wun ki ywömø." 
Matthew11:30 Mɑ́ ɑcebø men-ɑ ómëggɑ wun døøj, gïg-ɑ ócïbɑ wɑ̈thi wun yööd.”" 
Matthew12:1 Bɑng kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́kedh Yëso, e kɑ̈ll-ɑ yethi pwödh. Kɑ ɑ́mɑɑg jøbɑnge yi kɑ̈j, ɑmööd gen ki byel, kɑ ge onyɑ̈mø. O cyɑ̈ngɑni bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth." 
Matthew12:2 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh gen yi Jøpɑresì, ɑköbbi gen Yëso kinni, “Lidh, jøbɑngí gwøg-ɑ møg-ɑ bɑ ɑkerø gwøgø cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth.”" 
Matthew12:3 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wu nuti rɑ̈ngø cøn ki kwøbbi gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Debïd keny-ɑ ɑ́mɑgii yi kɑ̈j geki jøg-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki en?" 
Matthew12:4 A ɑ́kedhe ød Jwøk, kɑ ocyɑ̈mø ki ópùn-ɑ nyi thërri Jwøk, møg-ɑ bɑ ɑkerø cɑmø yi gen, de nyi cɑm-ɑ yi tyëng kwër keti gen." 
Matthew12:5 Wɑlɑ̀ wu nuti rɑ̈ngø kì yethi Cigg kinni, ókwër nyi pyem-ɑ ciggi Sɑbɑth, kenyi göög gen kì yij Kengø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, de kömi gen bong cɑ́y?" 
Matthew12:6 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, dɑ ngɑn megø kì keny, me lod Kengø ki döng." 
Matthew12:7 Wɑ̈jji kwërø okööbø kinni, ‘Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ lɑ̈mpyëw, de pɑth ki gëëdhi ɑ dwɑddɑ.’ Ke di bëëd gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møgɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi wun, tyëng-ɑ yï gen bɑ̈r pɑ di cɑy yi wun." 
Matthew12:8 Mɑ́ Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø bɑ jɑngi Sɑbɑth.” 
Matthew12:9 Kɑ odhwödhø kì kenyɑni, ɑkedhe sinɑgøg." 
Matthew12:10 O ɑ́dɑ jɑl me cinge dhëgø kì kenyɑni. Kɑ Yëso pyëj yi gen kinni, “Møgɑni nud kì yethi Cigg kinni, nyi yieel dhɑnhø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth?” Ge ɑ́yɑb-ɑ gïn pere di gøøny ge gøn." 
Matthew12:11 Kɑ mø gen løøg yi Yëso kinni, “Ngɑn yïe di órömø kì kelli wun, kɑ órömɑni pɑ̈dh-ɑ yij bur me ludhø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, gø pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g?" 
Matthew12:12 De dhɑnhø pere pɑ teeg kibøli dyel! Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, bɑ ɑyïëy yi Ciggee eni gwøgi gïndøj kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth.”" 
Matthew12:13 Codhe, ɑköbbe jɑl-ɑ cinge dhëgø kinni, “Rïj cingí.” Kɑ gø rïje. Kɑ cinge døøg-ɑ keje ni cing-ɑ kyeelø." 
Matthew12:14 Kɑ Jøpɑresì ókedhø, ge oyɑ̈bø ki kwøbbi nɑ̈gi Yëso." 
Matthew12:15 Yëso keny-ɑ ɑ́yode gïn-ɑ dwɑddi göggii, ɑdhwödhe kì kenyɑni. Kɑ ji mø gïïr løg-ɑ bɑnge, kɑ gï yiele bënn ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ri gen." 
Matthew12:16 Kɑ gï cege kinni ko di ngɑn köbbi yi gen ki pere," 
Matthew12:17 o møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen kinni," 
Matthew12:18 “Men bene bɑ̈ngɑ, bɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́yienyɑ, Mɑɑr yi yɑn, o pyëwɑ med ki en. Wëyɑ ócïbɑ ree, o møg-ɑ dwɑddɑ gï köbbe pödhh-ɑ kyeelø." 
Matthew12:19 Koo pëmø wɑlɑ̀ koo ryeer, wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn-ɑ ólïngi cwɑgge kì yethi yëëth." 
Matthew12:20 Pɑ turri ki obej me bøømø wɑlɑ̀ lɑ̈mbɑ̈ me kwengø pɑ nɑ̈g yi en, Ódyëjø ceth, gïti keny-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi møg-ɑ dwɑddɑ kɑ̈jji gen." 
Matthew12:21 O nyinge ógɑ̈nni yi tyëng pödhh-ɑ kyeelø.” 
Matthew12:22 Kɑ Yëso muuj jɑl me bɑ cwør, o pɑ kööbø, mɑ́ ree dɑ wëyrijjø. Kɑ gwøg yi Yëso, kɑ døøg-ɑ be kwøb, kɑ nyinge onëënø." 
Matthew12:23 Kɑ teedø ongɑ̈ngø yi gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yëso, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Jɑɑl ócuggø bëëdø ɑ́ Wɑ̈d Debïd?”" 
Matthew12:24 De kɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Jøpɑresì, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Bɑ tegi Bɑɑldhebul, jɑngi wëyrijjø ɑ cyeddi wëyɑni yi jɑlɑni.”" 
Matthew12:25 De rummi gen ngɑ̈nyi yi Yëso, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Pönh-ɑ nyi dɑ̈ɑ̈ng ree, kɑ døøg-ɑ be nyïɑ̈ggø kete nyii rënyø, o pɑ nyi cwööng ki pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Matthew12:26 Keløg cethɑn cyedd-ɑ cethɑn, pönhɑni pɑ rum dɑ̈ngø? Ócungi e teeg kidï!" 
Matthew12:27 Wu okööbø i wëyrijjø cyeddi yi yɑn kɑ tegi Bɑɑldhebul. Keløg ɑ́ dyër, dɑ́ men ɑ nyi thödhi jøbɑnggi wun ki teng-ɑ cyëddi gen ki wëyrijjø? Menɑni nyodh-ɑ kinni wu pɑ kømmi dyër." 
Matthew12:28 De keløg ɑ́ tegi Wëyi Jwøk ɑ ryëmmɑ ki wëyrijjø, Pödhi Jwøk ɑ́wɑ̈nhi kelli wun." 
Matthew12:29 “Dɑ ngɑn cuggi kedhi gøl jɑl me teg be yɑgi jɑmmi gølɑni, keløg jɑlkɑl nuti twööj en møti?" 
Matthew12:30 “Ngɑn pɑ ying tungɑ, mɑ̈n ki yɑn, o ngɑn pɑ køny yɑn ki cungø, kedhh-ɑ jɑmmì." 
Matthew12:31 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, lɑ́ɑ̀w ódwöög piny kipe ngɑn gwɑddi yɑn; de lɑ́ɑ̀w pɑ dwöög piny kipe ngɑn gwɑddi Wëykwërø." 
Matthew12:32 Ngɑn kwɑ̈dhhi Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø lɑ́ɑ̀w ódwöög piny kipe orøge; de ngɑn kwɑ̈dhhi Wëykwërø, lɑ́ɑ̀w pɑ dwöög piny kipe orøge, kì kömi piny men, wɑlɑ̀ kì bøli keny-ɑ óbï." 
Matthew12:33 “Gwøgu yɑdh e døøj, o kɑ̈ne ki nywøl mø døøj, wɑlɑ̀ gwøgu yɑdh e rɑɑj, o kɑ̈ne ki nywøl mø rijjø, mɑ́ yɑdh nyi ngij-ɑ ri nywøle." 
Matthew12:34 Wu bɑ thöllì, wu di kööb ɑ dï ki kwøb mø døøj, wu ceg bëëdø wu rijjø? Mɑ́ dhøg nyi kwøb-ɑ møg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈ng pyëw dhɑnhø." 
Matthew12:35 Ngɑndøj nyi kɑ̈n-ɑ wɑ̈g ki møg døj kì ri gïgdøj møg-ɑ congi yi en, o ngɑnrɑj nyi kɑ̈n-ɑ wɑ̈g ki rɑj kì ri gïgrijjø møg-ɑ congi yi en." 
Matthew12:36 “De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Cɑ́y, kwøbb-ɑ nyi gwɑ̈ny kì dhøg dhɑnhø, bɑ møg-ɑ ókwɑ̈nnii ceth." 
Matthew12:37 Mɑ́ yï ócwɑg-ɑ bɑng kwøbbí, o yï ócɑy-ɑ bɑng kwøbbí thyew.”" 
Matthew12:38 Codhe, ɑkööb kwï jøpwönyi Cigg kí Jøpɑresì kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, wø dwɑdd-ɑ lidhi yïn, yï ogöögø ki ngïji.”" 
Matthew12:39 Kɑ mø gen løøge kinni, “Rïny-ɑ rɑj ki orøg, ɑ cöödh ree, oyɑ̈bø ki ngïji? Bogøn! Ngïji men-ɑ ónyudhi wun bɑ ngïji mi Yönɑ̀ jɑltöng." 
Matthew12:40 Ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd Yönɑ̀ ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g kí wɑ̈rr ɑ́dɑ̈g, kì yij gur me dwøng, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø óbëëdø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g kí wɑ̈rr ɑ́dɑ̈g kì yij lɑ̈bø." 
Matthew12:41 Tyëng Ninɑwɑ̀ ódhwödh kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Cɑ́y, kɑ wu gøøny yi gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́yewi ki orøøg gen keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen kwøbbi Yönɑ̀. O yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, ngɑn lod Yönɑ̀ ki döng ɑ keny èn!" 
Matthew12:42 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Cebɑ̀ rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø, ódhwödh kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Cɑ́y, kɑ wu gøøny yi en, mɑ́ e ɑ́bï be lïngø ki kwøbbi peli wïj mø Sølømøn, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kun lɑ̈wi. O yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, ngɑn lod Sølømøn ki döng ɑ keny èn!" 
Matthew12:43 “Kenyi bëën wëyrɑj wɑ̈g kì ri dhɑnhø, nyii wïïnø kì keny bong pï, e yɑb-ɑ keny ywööme ree. Ke pɑ yïdde," 
Matthew12:44 ree nyi köbbe’ köbbø kinni, ‘Yɑ ódøøg ødɑ.’ Odøøge, ønɑni óyuude e wɑ̈dh-ɑ bëëdø, o óyejø kɑ pyël kidøøj." 
Matthew12:45 Codhe, o døøge be yɑ̈bbø ki wëy ɑ́bïryew mø pëddi rɑ̈jø kibøle. Kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ be bëëdø kì ri ngɑnɑni. Bëëdi ngɑnɑni ceg-ɑ pëddø rɑ̈jø kibøli mi tyeli mɑl. Bene gïn-ɑ ócwöb ɑnɑn, kipe rïj men-ɑ rɑj èn.”" 
Matthew12:46 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd Yëso okööbø ki teedø, kɑ meye geki nyiimen yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw obëënø, kɑ ge ócungø kì wɑ̈g, ge dwɑdd-ɑ yïddø ki en." 
Matthew12:47 Kɑ köbbi yi ngɑn megø kinni, “Meyí geki nyiimyëw ócungø kì wɑ̈g, ge dwɑdd-ɑ yïddø ki yïn.”" 
Matthew12:48 De møge ɑ́løøg yi Yëso kinni, “Meyɑ bɑ men, o nyiimïɑ bɑ møg?”" 
Matthew12:49 Kɑ nyudh-ɑ tung-ɑ di jøbɑnge, ɑkööbe kinni, “Lïdhi wun! Meyɑ kí nyiimïɑ yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw ek!" 
Matthew12:50 Ngɑn nyi gwøg møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi Wïyɑ ɑ ying mɑl, bene ómïɑ, kí meyɑ, kí nyimïɑ.”" 
Matthew13:1 Kɑ Yëso odhwödhø kì kɑl, kɑ kedh-ɑ gɑ̈d, ɑpëgge thɑ̈ngi nɑm." 
Matthew13:2 De ɑ́kuud yi ji mø gïïr, codhe, ɑkɑdhe yij morkɑb kɑ pëgg-ɑ piny. Kɑ tyëngɑni ócungø kì thɑ̈ngi nɑm kì wɑ̈g." 
Matthew13:3 Kɑ gï köbbe ki gɑ́j mø gïïr. Ákööb kinni, “Jɑl megø ɑ́kedhi be wïïwø ki köödh." 
Matthew13:4 Kɑ ɑ́wïïwe, kɑ kwï köödh dëëm-ɑ tøg yöö. Abëën winy kɑ gï cɑm gen." 
Matthew13:5 Kɑ köödh møøgø dëëm-ɑ keny mɑ kït, me lɑ̈bø nøg kì köme, kɑ ge jwɑn-ɑ twïyø yi kɑ̀ bëëd lɑ̈bø e reeb." 
Matthew13:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yer cɑ̈ng, ɑrɑ̈bbi gen, kɑ ge othwøwø yi kɑ̀ bëëd ge bong byerri gen." 
Matthew13:7 Kɑ köödh møøgø dëëm-ɑ kelli koodh. Kɑ koodhɑni ódøngø, kɑ byel twij yi gen." 
Matthew13:8 Kɑ köödh møøgø dëëm-ɑ yij lɑ̈bø me døøj, kɑ ge ókɑ̈nø ki nying. Kwï gen ɑ́kɑ̈ni ki miyø, møøgø pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, møøgø pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g.”" 
Matthew13:9 Codhe ɑkööbe kinni, “Ngɑn di yïthhe mø lïnge, wiy lïnge.”" 
Matthew13:10 Kɑ jøbɑnge bï-ɑ yïe, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Yïde ɑ 'kööb gɑ́j?”" 
Matthew13:11 Kɑ Yëso ólöggø kinni, “Wun ɑ ɑ́thödhi ki dïdø men yod wun møg-ɑ bɑ ɑkɑnn kì Pödhi Jwøk, de pɑth ki gen." 
Matthew13:12 Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ yïe di gïïpiny óthödhi, o jɑmme ngënyi gen. De ngɑn jɑdø, cɑgg ɑ́ møg-ɑ nud kì yïe ókwɑny." 
Matthew13:13 Ge köbbi yi yɑn kɑ gɑ́j, mɑ́ nyingi gen bɑ ɑyieb de ge pɑ nëënø, o yïthhi gen kyëën gen, de bong gïn gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen." 
Matthew13:14 Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng kì ri tyëngɑni ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen ceth kinni, ‘Jiɑni yïthhi gen ókënni gen, de bong gïn gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen; nyingi gen ógwiir gen piny, de bong gïn lidh yi gen," 
Matthew13:15 mɑ́ wɑ̈thi gen gug, o yïthhi gen coog gen, o nyingi gen kum gen. Mɑ́ keløg ge di nëën ki nyingi gen, kɑ ge olïngø ki yïthhi gen, kɑ møgɑ gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen, ge di dwöög köörɑ o ge di yielɑ.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Ri wun dɑ gyëdh, mɑ́ nyingi wun onëënø. O ri wun dɑ gyëdh, mɑ́ yïthhi wun olïngø." 
Matthew13:17 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, tyëngtöng mø Jwøk mø ngenyø geki tyëngtir mø ngenyø, ge ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ lidhi møg-ɑ nenni yi wun, de møgɑni nuti liidh gen. O ge ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ lïngi møg-ɑ lïngi yi wun, de gï nuti lïngi gen." 
Matthew13:18 “De ɑnɑn lïngu gɑ́ji ngeti wïïwø ki köödh. 
Matthew13:19 Ngɑn lïngi kwøbbi Pödhi Jwøk, de gï pɑ gɑm yi wïje, bene köödh-ɑ ɑ́dëëm tøg yöö. Kenyi bëën Ngɑnrɑj, gïg-ɑ ɑ́piidh pyëwe nyi gwɑre’ gwɑrø." 
Matthew13:20 O ngɑn lïngi kwøbbi Pödhi Jwøk, kɑ gï kwɑnye ki medi pyëwe kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, bene en köödh-ɑ ɑ́dëëm kömi piny-ɑ bɑ kït." 
Matthew13:21 Kwøbbɑni nuti niyeeng pyëwe, o ge pɑ mɑ̈gi ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r; mɑ́ kenyi bëën ɑkørr geki guudi nying, ge nyi jwɑn-ɑ døøg ngɑ̈thi gen." 
Matthew13:22 O köödh-ɑ ɑ́dëëm kelli koodh, bɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi lïngi kwøb, de kenyi bëën olïng pëëth, kí mɑɑri kɑ̈rì, wöödø nyii twijø yi gen, kɑ ocögø e pɑ kɑ̈ni ki nywøl." 
Matthew13:23 De møg-ɑ ɑ́dëëm kömi lɑ̈m-ɑ med, bɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi lïngi kwøb, kɑ gï nyi gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen; gen ɑ nyi kɑ̈ni ki nywøl ceth, møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ miyø, møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g.”" 
Matthew13:24 Aköbbe gïn ki gɑ́j møøgø kinni, “Pödhi Jwøk ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑ jɑl megø mɑ ɑ́wïïw ki köödhi gemè mø døj kì yij pwödhe." 
Matthew13:25 Kɑ ngɑn mɑɑnii obëënø ji onenø, kɑ nywøli ɑdengø wiiwe kelli gemè kì yij pwönhɑni, kɑ ókedhø." 
Matthew13:26 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døngi gemè kɑ odhɑ̈yø, kɑ ɑdengø ree thyere thyew." 
Matthew13:27 Kɑ bɑ̈nggi jɑlpwödhø kedh-ɑ yïe, ɑkööb gen kinni, ‘Wuö, pɑth ki köödh mø døj ɑ ɑ́wiw yi wɑ kì yij pwödhø? De ɑdengø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny?’" 
Matthew13:28 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, ‘Bɑ ngɑn mɑɑn yɑn ɑ gwøøg gïnɑni.’ Kɑ pyëj yi bɑ̈ngge kinni, ‘Wø pɑ kedhi be puthi ɑdengø?’" 
Matthew13:29 Kɑ gï kyëdde kinni, ‘Pɑth, mɑ́ keløg ɑdengø puth wu’ wɑ̈g, wu puth-ɑ wɑ̈g ki gemè thyew." 
Matthew13:30 Wiy ge døngi gen kyeel gïti keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kej nyɑri gen. Keny-ɑ ócɑ̈gi nyɑr, tyëng-ɑ nyɑ̈rø óceg yi yɑn kinni, ‘Puth wun ɑdengø møti, kɑ töjji wun, o rɑ̈b. Codhe, o gemè nyɑr yi wun cyee, o pwöd, o kïdhi yethi thebbɑ.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Aköbbe gïn ki gɑ́j møøgø kinni, “Pödhi Jwøk ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑ wɑɑng köödhi kɑrdɑl, mɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi jɑl megø, kɑ gø kɑ̈ɑ̈ge yij pwödhe." 
Matthew13:32 Köödhø menɑni wɑnge thiinh kì kelli köödh bënn, de kenyi dønge nyi lod-ɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́pidh bënn ki döng, kɑ ree nyi løge yɑdh me dwøng, kɑ winy nyii bëënø, kɑ ge nyii gëdø kì bɑ̈dde.”" 
Matthew13:33 Aköbbe gïn ki gɑ́j møøgø kinni, “Pödhi Jwøk ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑ kɑmïrɑ̀ men kwɑny yi ngɑndhɑjø, kɑ gø nyööme møng-ɑ búr me bɑ rummì ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ ɑwɑnyɑni okwödø bëne.”" 
Matthew13:34 Møgɑni bënn ɑ́kømmi yi Yëso, e ceg-ɑ gɑj kì bøli teedø. O bong kwøb møøgø mɑ ɑ́kømme ge pɑth ki gɑ́j." 
Matthew13:35 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen kinni, “Dhøgɑ ótug yi yɑn, yɑ 'kööb-ɑ gɑ́j. O møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ ɑkɑnn kër-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j piny töngɑ.”" 
Matthew13:36 Codhe, ɑdhwödhe kì kelli teedø, kɑ kedh-ɑ kɑl. Kɑ jøbɑnge bï-ɑ yïe, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Nyudhí wøn gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gɑ́ji ɑdengø kì yij pwödhø.”" 
Matthew13:37 Kɑ mø gen løøge kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wiw köödh møg-ɑ døj bɑ Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø," 
Matthew13:38 pwödhø bɑ piny, o köödh møg-ɑ døj bɑ jii Pödhi Jwøk, o ɑdengø bɑ jii Ngɑnrɑj." 
Matthew13:39 O ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø men-ɑ ɑ́wiw gen bene Cethɑn, o bøli kej nyɑr bɑ thumi piny, o jøgwøg bɑ wëywödd." 
Matthew13:40 Ni kenyi gween ɑdengø kì pwödhø, kɑ rɑ̈b ki mɑc, kwøbbɑni óbëëd ɑ nøw kì ri thumi piny." 
Matthew13:41 Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø wëywödde óöre yij pödhe, o tyëng-ɑ nyi peej ji be orøg, kí tyëng-ɑ gøggi gïgrijjø bënn gwëën wɑ̈g." 
Matthew13:42 O ge leeng yij mɑc, kenyɑni ódi ywøg kí ngenyyi leg." 
Matthew13:43 Kì bøli kenyɑni jii Jwøk ómënyø ni cɑɑr cɑ̈ng kì yij Pödhi Wïyi gen. Ngɑn di yïthhe mø lïnge, wiy lïnge!" 
Matthew13:44 “Pödhi Jwøk ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑ gïn pere teg men-ɑ ókɑnø kì yij pwödhø, kɑ yod yi jɑl megø, kɑ gø døøge ki kɑnø. Kɑ ókedhø, kɑ jɑmme bënn ngeewe wɑ̈g, pyëwe omedø, kɑ pwönhɑni ngewe." 
Matthew13:45 “Thyew, Pödhi Jwøk ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑ jɑlngyëwø men-ɑ nyi yɑ̈bø ki tigg mø døj." 
Matthew13:46 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yïddi jɑlɑni ki tigø me pere teeg cɑrø, ɑkedhe, kɑ jɑmme bënn ngeewe wɑ̈g, kɑ tingɑni lonye ki ngewø." 
Matthew13:47 “Thyew, Pödhi Jwøk ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑ bøy mɑ ɑ́luudh nɑm yi jømɑy, kɑ ómɑ̈gø ki wɑ̈thi rij bënn." 
Matthew13:48 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ng bøyɑni, ɑywɑ̈ɑ̈jii wɑ̈g yi jøgɑni, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ kenyɑni, kɑ møg-ɑ døj cøng gen yethi dhöng, kɑ møg-ɑ bong per gen weddi." 
Matthew13:49 Óbëëdø kinøw thyew kì ri thumi piny. Wëywödd óbï kɑ tyëngrijjø dɑ̈ɑ̈ng yi gen ki tyëngdøj," 
Matthew13:50 kɑ tyëngrijjø leeng mɑc, kenyɑni ódi ywøg kí ngenyyi leg.”" 
Matthew13:51 Apyëëj gen yi Yëso kinni, “Møgɑni ɑ́lïngi yi wun bënn?” Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Ngee.”" 
Matthew13:52 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, jɑlpwönyi Cigg men göögø ki ngeti Pödhi Jwøk, pɑ̈r ki jɑlkɑl men-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ni wɑ̈g kì ri jɑmmi kɑ̈re, kwï gen bɑ møg nyɑ̈n, o kwï gen bɑ møg kɑ̈gi gen dööng.”" 
Matthew13:53 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki kwøbi gɑ́jɑni, ɑdhwödhe kì kenyɑni." 
Matthew13:54 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe pödhi gen, ɑpwönye teedø kì sinɑgøg. Kɑ teedø ongɑ̈ngø yi møgɑni, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Jɑlɑni kɑ̈n-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny ki dïdø men, kí gïïngɑ̈ngø møg?" 
Matthew13:55 Jɑlɑni pɑth ki wɑ̈d bødhi pɑ̈mmì? Pɑth ki Meye ɑ nyi cwøl ɑ́ Meerì, o pɑth ki ómï Yɑgob, kí Yosep, kí Sɑymøn, kí Yeudɑ̀?" 
Matthew13:56 O nyiimen womɑ̈nn pɑ nud kì keny? Jɑlɑni kɑ̈n-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny ki kwøbb-ɑ ni møg bënn?” 
Matthew13:57 Kɑ gø bɑny gen. Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Jɑltöng kenyi bɑnyii, nyi bɑny-ɑ yi pödhi gen geki gøl gen.”" 
Matthew13:58 Kɑ ocögø e nuti göögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø mø gïïr kì kunɑni, kì bɑng kɑ̀ nuti yïëëyii yi gen." 
Matthew14:1 Kɑ per Yëso lïngi yi Ërödøs, ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ modïïr Gɑlelì, kì bøli kenyɑni." 
Matthew14:2 Kɑ jøge köbbe kinni, “Bɑ Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g, ɑ ɑ́dhwödh kì yij thøø kidyër. Bene ɑ di yïe teng-ɑ gööge ki gïïngɑ̈ngø.”" 
Matthew14:3 Mɑ́ Jøn ómɑgø yi Ërödøs, kɑ gø twöje kɑ leeng ød mɑg, kipe Ërödiyɑ̀ cï Pïlïp ómen." 
Matthew14:4 Mɑ́ Jøn ɑ́ceg-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Pɑ døøj kɑ̀ kɑɑb cï ómyëw.”" 
Matthew14:5 Kɑ Jøn dwɑdde nɑ̈gø, de ɑ́bwøg yi teedø, mɑ́ Jøn cwølli yi gen ɑ́ jɑltööng Jwøk." 
Matthew14:6 De keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi cyɑ̈ng-ɑ pɑɑr pɑ̈dhi Ërödøs piny, ɑcööng nyɑɑr Ërödiyɑ̀ kì bøli wëll-ɑ ɑ́ryej. Kɑ Ërödøs pyëwe ómïnø." 
Matthew14:7 Aköbbe nyɑnɑni kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn; kwøb gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, ómëggɑ yïn ceth!”" 
Matthew14:8 Kɑ nyɑnɑni pɑng yi meye, ɑköbbe Ërödøs kinni, “Mëggí yɑn wïj Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g kì yij tɑbø.”" 
Matthew14:9 Kɑ rɑ̈dh yije óywöngø ki mendwøng, de pɑ cuggi døøg cyɑ̈n, mɑ́ e ɑ́rum ki köngø kì bøli ji." 
Matthew14:10 Kɑ oödø, ɑkeb wïj Jøn kì ød mɑg." 
Matthew14:11 Kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì yij tɑbø kɑ mëggi nyɑnɑni, ɑmuuje gøn meye." 
Matthew14:12 Abëën jøbɑng Jøn, kɑ dëël dhɑnhø kɑ̈l yi gen, kɑ gø kony gen. Akedh gen, kɑ møgɑni dwöggi gen Yëso." 
Matthew14:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Yëso, ɑdhwödhe kì kenyɑni ki morkɑb, kɑ töng-ɑ wɑ̈g kì keny me bong ji. De møgɑni ɑ́lïngi yi teedø, ɑløg gen bɑnge, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kelli myërr ge ócyɑ̈dhø ki tyelli gen." 
Matthew14:14 Akɑdhe wɑ̈g kì yij morkɑb, kɑ ólïdhø ki ji mø gïïr, kɑ yije óywöngø kipe gïn, kɑ tyëng-ɑ buud kì kelli gïn yiele." 
Matthew14:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög piny ki wɑɑng thyënhø, ɑbëën jøbɑnge yïe, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Men bɑ pɑ̈l, o wøw ɑ́yuudh. Dɑ̈ɑ̈ng teedø, o ge kedhi gen kelli myërr be ngyew ki gïgcɑmm.”" 
Matthew14:16 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ kedh gen? Thödhu gen ki gïncɑm!”" 
Matthew14:17 Kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Yï wøn dɑ ópùn ɑ́bïj kí rij ɑ́ryew keti gen kì keny.”" 
Matthew14:18 Alögge kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu gen!”" 
Matthew14:19 Kɑ teedø köbbe kinni pëggi gen piny kömi lum. Kɑ ópùn kí rijjɑni kwɑnye. Alïïdhe mɑl, kɑ Jwøk pwøje, ɑpødde ópùnɑni, kɑ gï mëgge jøbɑnge. Kɑ ge cïmmi kì bøli teedø yi jøbɑnge." 
Matthew14:20 Kɑ teedø ocyɑ̈mø bënn, kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø, kɑ nyingi gïncɑm møg-ɑ ɑ́döng gwen gen, kɑ dhöng pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew opɑ̈ngø yi thull-ɑ ɑ́döng." 
Matthew14:21 Jøg-ɑ cwøw møg-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj, de tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn geki othønhø nuti kwɑnø." 
Matthew14:22 Kɑ jøbɑnge ciire yij morkɑb, o ge møøl gen løøgø, kɑ̈ng-ɑ ódɑ̈ɑ̈nge teedø." 
Matthew14:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume dɑ̈ɑ̈ngi teedø, ɑyedhe mɑl wïj kït be lɑm, e kete. Kɑ wøw óyuudhø, e obëëdø kì kenyɑni kete." 
Matthew14:24 Morkɑb ɑ́bëëd e rum wɑ̈dhi dïnɑm kì bøli kenyɑni, e di lenggø yi ɑpɑgø, mɑ́ ge pyem-ɑ yømø." 
Matthew14:25 Abëën Yëso yï jøbɑnge kì bɑ̈ɑ̈rø, e ócyɑ̈dhø kì wɑ̈thi pï." 
Matthew14:26 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi jøbɑnge, e ócyɑ̈dhø kì wɑ̈thi pï, ɑbwøg gen ki mendwøng, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Bɑ tïbi ngɑnthøø!” Kɑ ge óryeerø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́nɑ̈g yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Matthew14:27 De ge ɑ́köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Wu ko böggi! Bɑ yɑn!”" 
Matthew14:28 Kɑ møge løøg yi Pïtør kinni, “Wuö, keløg ɑ́ yïn, köbbí yɑn, o yɑ bïɑ yïí, yɑ ócyɑ̈dhø kì wɑ̈thi pï.”" 
Matthew14:29 Akööbe kinni, “Bïí!” Akɑdhi Pïtør wɑ̈g kì yij morkɑb, kɑ kedh-ɑ yï Yëso, e ócyɑ̈dhø kì wɑ̈thi pï." 
Matthew14:30 De kɑ ɑ́lidhe yømø e dwøng, kɑ obwøgø, kɑ ócyɑ̈ngø mudø, ɑryeere kinni, “Wuö, yiel yɑn.”" 
Matthew14:31 Kɑ Yëso cinge rïje, ɑmɑge Pïtør, kɑ gø pyëje kinni, “Yïëyí nøg, ede yijí ɑ pyëre?”" 
Matthew14:32 Kɑ ge kɑdh-ɑ yij morkɑb, ɑbed yømø." 
Matthew14:33 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ying yij morkɑmɑni ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bøli Yëso, ge okööbø kinni, “Yï bɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk kidyër!”" 
Matthew14:34 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen løøgø, ɑtöngi gen wɑ̈g kì myërri Genesɑret." 
Matthew14:35 Kɑ Yëso ngij yi tyëng myërrɑni, kɑ tyëng-ɑ buud bënn dwɑɑy gen, kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïe." 
Matthew14:36 Gø ɑ́kwɑjji gen kinni wiy tuung ógødhe nywɑl yi gen yøw. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nywɑ̈ddi bënn yiel ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlli gen. 
Matthew15:1 Kɑ Jøpɑresì geki jøpwönyi Cigg bï-ɑ yï Yëso, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Yerusɑlem, kɑ ge okööbø kinni," 
Matthew15:2 “Gede jøbɑngí ɑ nyi pyem gen kwööng kweyyee? Cinggi gen pɑ nyi lwøg yi gen kɑ̀ cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen ki gïncɑm.” 
Matthew15:3 Kɑ mø gen løøg yi en kinni, “Wude ɑ nyi pyem wun Ciggi Jwøk, kipe mïdhi kwööng wun?" 
Matthew15:4 Mɑ́ Jwøk ɑ́cïg kinni, ‘Wør wïyí kí meyí,’ o ‘Ngɑn yɑny wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye, ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø.’" 
Matthew15:5 De wu pwöny-ɑ ji kinni, i ke di ngɑn yïe di gïïpiny me di kønye wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, gïn-ɑni di mëggɑ yïn, de ɑ́rum ki mëggi Jwøk," 
Matthew15:6 ngɑnɑni köme bong cɑ́y ke pɑ kønye wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye. Ciggi Jwøk nuti pyeem wun kipe mïdhi kwööng wun? 
Matthew15:7 Wu bɑ tyëngwëënyø! Møg-ɑ ɑ́töng yi Icɑyɑ̀ kiper wun bɑ dyër kinni," 
Matthew15:8 ‘Pönhï, yɑ wør yi en kɑ dhøge, de pyëwe lɑ̈wi ki yɑn." 
Matthew15:9 Bong gïn wɑngi yi mɑl-ɑ mɑlli yɑn yi gen mɑ́ ge pwöny-ɑ ciggi ji yøw.’ ” 
Matthew15:10 Kɑ teedø cwøl yi Yëso, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Lïngu møg, kɑ gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen ti wun ki yodø." 
Matthew15:11 Pɑth ki gïn-ɑ nyi kedhi dhø dhɑnhø ɑ nyi rënyii, den-ɑ́ gïn-ɑ nyi bï wɑ̈g kì dhøge.”" 
Matthew15:12 Codhe, ɑbëën jøbɑnge yïe, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni, Jøpɑresì pëthi gen ɑ́rënyi kɑ ɑ́lïngi gen møg-ɑ kømmi yi yïn?”" 
Matthew15:13 Kɑ mø gen løøge kinni, “Yɑnh nuti pidh-ɑ yi Wïyɑ, ɑ ying mɑl, ceg kɑ puth wɑ̈g." 
Matthew15:14 Wiyu gen, mɑ́ ge bɑ cörr, o ji-ɑ pyejji yi gen bɑ cörr. O keløg cwør pyejj-ɑ yi cwør megø, ge pɑ̈dh-ɑ yij bur ryeet.”" 
Matthew15:15 Aköbbii yi Pïtør kinni, “Nyudhí wøn gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gɑ́jɑni.”" 
Matthew15:16 Alögge kinni, “Wun thyew, yethi kwøbbɑni nuti yood wun?" 
Matthew15:17 Kwïj yi wun kinni, gïn-ɑ nyi kedhi dhø dhɑnhø, nyi pödh-ɑ yije, kɑ nyi bï-ɑ wɑ̈g," 
Matthew15:18 de gïn-ɑ nyi bï wɑ̈g kì dhø dhɑnhø, nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pyëwe, o bene en ɑ nyi ywëdh dhɑnhø." 
Matthew15:19 Mɑ́ gïg-ɑ nyi bï wɑ̈g kì pyëw dhɑnhø, gen ɑ rumm-ɑ rijjø, kí nɑ̈gi dhɑnhø, kí orøøg yɑb ki mɑ̈nn, kí kwɑl, kí pyed, geki kwɑ̈dh." 
Matthew15:20 Bene gen gïg-ɑ nyi ywëdh dhɑnhø, de dhɑnhø pɑ ywëdh ke cyɑ̈me e cingge nuti lwøøg en.”" 
Matthew15:21 Adhwödh Yëso kì kenyɑni, kɑ wel-ɑ myërri Suur kí Sïdön." 
Matthew15:22 Kɑ ngɑn mɑ ngeti Kɑnɑɑn obëënø, kɑ ócwöddø kinni, “Wuö, yïn ɑ Wɑ̈d Debïd, ywöngi yijí ki yɑn! Nyɑrɑ wɑnge ɑ́guud yi wëyrijjø.”" 
Matthew15:23 De møge ɑ́cög ge pɑ løøg yi Yëso. Abëën jøbɑnge, kɑ gø kwɑjji gen kinni, “Ryem ngɑnɑni, mɑ́ e ceg-ɑ ryeerø kì bɑngee.”" 
Matthew15:24 Kɑ ólöggø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ be dyëg-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì gøl Isrɑil keti gen.”" 
Matthew15:25 Kɑ ngɑnɑni obëënø, kɑ ree bøødhe piny kì bøle, ɑkööbe kinni, “Wuö, køny yɑn.”" 
Matthew15:26 Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Gïncɑɑm othønhø pɑ døøj ki kwɑnyø, o lëngi gwögg.”" 
Matthew15:27 Alöggi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Bɑ dyër Wuö, de cɑgg ɑ́ gwögg kiri gen, ge nyii cyɑ̈mø ki nyingi gïncɑm møg-ɑ nyi dëëm kì wïj tɑrɑbeedh wïi gen.”" 
Matthew15:28 Kɑ møge løøg yi Yëso kinni, “Dhɑnh, yïëyí dwøng cɑrø! Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, óyod yi yïn.” Kɑ nyɑre ódönyø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Matthew15:29 Adhwödh Yëso kì kenyɑni, kɑ kɑ̈l-ɑ tøg Tɑɑy Gɑlelì, ɑyedhe mɑl wïj nyɑ kït, kɑ pëgg-ɑ piny." 
Matthew15:30 Kɑ ji mø gïïr bï-ɑ yïe, ge ókɑ̈ddø ki pùdh, kí ngöll, kí cörr, kí mïng, kí ji-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø mø ngenyø. Kɑ ge cïb piny kì bøli Yëso, kɑ gï yiele bënn." 
Matthew15:31 Kɑ teedø ongɑ̈ngø kɑ ɑ́lïdhi gen kinni, mïng okööbø, pùdh ócyɑ̈dhø, cörr onëënø. Kɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil lejji gen." 
Matthew15:32 Kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge cwøle yïe, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Nyingi tyëngɑni ocɑnø kì yïɑ, mɑ́ ge ɑ́lugi kì bɑngɑ ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g ɑnɑn, e bong gïn cɑm yi gen. De yɑ pɑ dwɑddi öri gen yöö ki kɑ̈j kipe ge ódhɑ̈ɑ̈r.”" 
Matthew15:33 Kɑ köbbi yi jøbɑnge kinni, “Wɑ yïd-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny ki gïncɑm, wɑ ying-ɑ pɑ̈l ni men, kí ji-ɑ gïïr ni møg?”" 
Matthew15:34 Kɑ ge pyëj yi Yëso kinni, “Yï wun dɑ ópùn ɑ́dï?” Akööb gen kinni, “Ópùn ɑ́bïryew kí nywøli rij mø nøg.”" 
Matthew15:35 Kɑ teenɑni köbbi yi Yëso kinni pëggi gen piny. 
Matthew15:36 Kɑ ópùnɑni kí rijjɑni kwɑnye, kɑ Jwøk pwøje, ɑpødde gïn, kɑ gï mëgge jøbɑnge, kɑ ge lony ki mëggi teedø yi jøbɑnge." 
Matthew15:37 Kɑ teedø ocyɑ̈mø bënn, kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø, kɑ nyingi gïncɑm møg-ɑ ɑ́döng gwen gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yethi dhöng ɑ́bïryew." 
Matthew15:38 Kwɑnni jøg-ɑ cwøw møg-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́ngwen, o tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn kí othønhø nuti kwɑnø." 
Matthew15:39 Kɑ teedø dɑ̈ɑ̈ng yi Yëso, ɑkɑdhe yij morkɑb, kɑ kedh-ɑ myërri Mɑgɑdɑn." 
Matthew16:1 Abëën Jøpɑresì kí Jøsɑduk, kɑ gø kwɑjji gen kinni nyudhe gïn ki ngïji men kɑ̈ɑ̈l Pödhi Jwøk, ge ceg-ɑ gøn ki rɑngø." 
Matthew16:2 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Kì ri buddi cɑ̈ng, wu nyii kööbø kinni, ‘Wɑɑng piny óbëëd e tɑr kɑ̀ bëëd mɑl e kwɑɑr.’" 
Matthew16:3 O kì mwøl wu nyii kööbø kinni, ‘Kødh ómɑ̈gi dicyɑ̈ngtïn, mɑ́ pøøl kwɑɑr, o mɑl køm-ɑ mïnø.’ Wu ngɑ̈ny rɑng ki ngïjji mɑl, de wu dhɑl yi rɑng ki ngïjji bëëdi dhɑnhø kì kömi piny." 
Matthew16:4 Rïny-ɑ rɑj ki orøg yɑb-ɑ ngïji. De bong ngïji men-ɑ ónyudhi gen, den-ɑ́ ngïji mi Yönɑ̀ kete.” Adhwödhe, kɑ gï wiye." 
Matthew16:5 Akedhi jøbɑng Yëso løøgø, de wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́wïl ki kɑ̈nø ki gïncɑm." 
Matthew16:6 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Tiu nënnø, kɑ ri wun kor wun kipe kɑmïrɑ̀ mi Jøpɑresì kí Jøsɑduk.”" 
Matthew16:7 Kɑ dhøggi gen lømmi gen kinni, “Kööb ɑ bɑng kɑ̀ bëëd e bong ópùn mɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wɑ.”" 
Matthew16:8 De møgɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi Yëso, kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Wu tyëng-ɑ yïëyø mi wun nøg, wude ɑ lømmu dhøggi wun ki kwøbbi bongi ópùn kì yï wun?" 
Matthew16:9 Kwøbbɑni nuti gɑmø yi wɑ̈thi wun? Wɑ̈thi wun ɑ́wïl ki ópùn ɑ́bïj møg-ɑ ɑ́cɑm yi ji gɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj? Á kwɑnni dhöng ɑ́dï ɑ ɑ́cøng yi wun ge pɑ̈ng yi nyingi gïncɑmɑni? 
Matthew16:10 Kí ópùn ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ ɑ́cɑm yi ji gɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́ngwen, ɑ́ dhöng ɑ́dï ɑ ɑ́cøng yi wun?" 
Matthew16:11 Dhɑ̈li yodø kidï yi wun kinni yɑ pɑ kømmi kwøbbi ópun. De koru ri wun kipe kɑmïrɑ̀ mi Jøpɑresì kí Jøsɑduk.” 
Matthew16:12 Codhe, ɑyodii yi gen kinni pɑ wɑng-ɑ kinni kor gen ri gen kipe kɑmïri ópun, den-ɑ́ pwönyi Jøpɑresì geki Jøsɑduk ɑ kømme." 
Matthew16:13 De keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Yëso myërr-ɑ buti kɑɑl Kɑysɑriyɑ̀ Pïlïpì, kɑ jøbɑnge pyëje kinni, “Ji okööbø kinni, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø bɑ men?”" 
Matthew16:14 Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Kwï ji okööbø kinni, bɑ Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g, o møøgø okööbø kinni bɑ Eliyɑ̀, o møøgø okööbø kinni bɑ Jermɑyɑ̀ wɑlɑ̀ jɑltöng megø.”" 
Matthew16:15 Kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “De wu okööbø kinni, yɑ bɑ men?”" 
Matthew16:16 Alöggi Sɑymøn Pïtør kinni, “Yï bɑ Mesiy, Wɑ̈d Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø.”" 
Matthew16:17 Kɑ köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Yïn ɑ Sɑymøn wɑ̈d Jøn, rií dɑ gyëdh, mɑ́ møgɑni nuti nyudhi yïn ɑ yi dhɑnhø, den-ɑ́ Wïyɑ, ngɑn-ɑ ying mɑl." 
Matthew16:18 O yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn thyew kinni, yï bɑ kït, o kömi kïnɑni ɑ ógeerɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ miɑ, o bong gïn-ɑ ótyɑmii, cɑgg ɑ́ thøø." 
Matthew16:19 Moptɑɑ̀ mø Pödhi Jwøk ómëggɑ yïn, o gïn-ɑ kyer yi yïn kì kömi piny ókyer kì Pödhi Jwøk, o gïn-ɑ yïëy yi yïn kì kömi piny, bɑ ɑyïëy kì Pödhi Jwøk.”" 
Matthew16:20 Codhe, kɑ jøbɑnge kyëdde kinni ko di ngɑn köbbi yi gen kinni, bɑ Mesiy." 
Matthew16:21 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi Yëso ki nyudhi jøbɑnge kinni bɑ men kedhi Yerusɑlem, de órɑngi yi jɑmmì mø ngenyø kì cinggi jɑggi pödhø, kí jɑggi ókwër, kí jøpwönyi Cigg. O ónɑ̈g, de ódhwödh kì yij thøø, kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng." 
Matthew16:22 Kɑ peej wɑ̈ye yi Pïtør, ɑcyɑ̈re gøn kinni, “Wuö, møgɑni tøøk kì yï Jwøk, gïg ni møg pɑ cuggi bëën kömí!”" 
Matthew16:23 Kɑ lïïdh-ɑ yïe kidøøj, ɑköbbe Pïtør kinni, “Kedh kì butɑ, Cethɑn! Yïde ɑ rïwwí bølɑ? Møg-ɑ kømmi yi yïn pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, de ge bɑ rummi dhɑnhø yøw!”" 
Matthew16:24 Codhe, kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Ke di ngɑn dwɑddi bëën bɑngɑ, wedde pyëwe, kɑ yɑdh ɑrïwe byele, kɑ luge bɑngɑ." 
Matthew16:25 Mɑ́ ngɑn dwɑddi yieli wëye, wëye ólɑ̈ɑ̈nye, o ngɑn lɑ̈ɑ̈ny wëye kiperɑ, wëye óyode." 
Matthew16:26 Dɑ gïndøj me yod yi dhɑnhø, keløg piny bëne oyodø yi en, kɑ wëye lɑ̈ɑ̈nye? Wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ gïn ɑ ómuuj yi dhɑnhø ɑ́ men gøøme wëye?" 
Matthew16:27 Mɑ́ Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi bëënø, ki mɑ̈ɑ̈r Wïye, geki wëywödde, o ji mëgge köggi gen; ngɑn mëgg-ɑ kööng-ɑ kyëëw ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøgge." 
Matthew16:28 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, dɑ ji møøgø kì kelli tyëng-ɑ nud kì keny ɑnɑn, mø thøø pɑ bel yi gen, gïti keny-ɑ ólidh gen Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø, e obëënø ɑ́ Rɑ̈dh.”" 
Matthew17:1 Kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l Pïtør, kí Yɑgob kí Jøn ómen yi Yëso, kɑ gï kïdhe wïj kït me bɑ̈ɑ̈r keti gen." 
Matthew17:2 Kɑ ree wile kì bøli gïn, kɑ lele orɑ̈ɑ̈dø ni cɑ̈ng, kɑ ógudhe ótɑ̈rø ge ceg-ɑ orɑ̈ng." 
Matthew17:3 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ kí Eliyɑ̀ ocwöbø kì bøli gen, ge okööbø ki Yëso." 
Matthew17:4 Kɑ Yëso köbbi yi Pïtør kinni, “Wuö, døøj kɑ̀ ying wɑ keny! Ke dwɑddií, yɑ ógëdø ki ɑkɑnnì ɑ́dɑ̈g; ɑ́kyel mií, ɑ́kyel mi Mosɑ̀, ɑ́kyel mi Eliyɑ̀.”" 
Matthew17:5 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd e okööbø, kɑ ge rïm yi pøølø me tɑr. Kɑ ge olïngø ki cwɑg mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l yij pøølø, ge okööbø kinni, “Men bene Wɑ̈dɑ, wɑ̈n-ɑ mɑɑrɑ, lïngu kwøbbe!”" 
Matthew17:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi jøbɑnge, kɑ ge obwøgø ki mendwøng, kɑ ge ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø yethi gen rum gen piny." 
Matthew17:7 Abëën Yëso kɑ gï nywɑle, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Dhwödhu mɑl! Wu ko böggi!”" 
Matthew17:8 De kɑ ɑ́tïng gen wɑ̈thi gen, bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́lidh yi gen, den-ɑ́ Yëso kete." 
Matthew17:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yïnhi gen piny kì wïj kït, ɑceg gen yi Yëso kinni, “Ko di dhɑnhø me köbbi yi wun ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wun, gïti bøli keny-ɑ órum Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ki tugø kì yij thøø.”" 
Matthew17:10 Kɑ Yëso pyëj yi jøbɑnge kinni, “Gede jøpwönyi Cigg ɑ nyi kööb gen kinni, bɑ Eliyɑ̀ ɑ ókwöngi ki bëënø?”" 
Matthew17:11 Kɑ mø gen løøge kinni, “Eliyɑ̀ óbï kidyër, o jɑmmì bënn tyeny yi en." 
Matthew17:12 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, Eliyɑ̀ ɑ́rum ki bëënø, de nuti ngijø yi tyëngɑni. Kɑ gø göggi gen ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi gen ki cwɑggi gen. Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ólunyi ki orɑng kì cinggi gen.”" 
Matthew17:13 Codhe, ɑyodii yi jøbɑnge kinni, kømm-ɑ Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g." 
Matthew17:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen kun-ɑ di teedø, ɑbëën jɑl megø yïe, kɑ ree bøødhe piny kì bøle, ɑkööbe kinni," 
Matthew17:15 “Wuö, ywöngi yijí ki wɑ̈dɑ, mɑ́ ree dɑ wëyrijjø, kɑ nyii rɑngø yi gøn ki mendwøng. Kɑ nyi pɑ̈dh-ɑ mɑc kí yethi pï tyel mø gïïr." 
Matthew17:16 Kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï jøbɑngí, de ge ɑ́dhɑl yi yielii.”" 
Matthew17:17 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Yï rïny-ɑ rɑj, rïny-ɑ dhɑ̈li yïëyø! Yɑ gït-ɑ wɑɑng kì kelli wun? Wɑlɑ̀ yɑ gït-ɑ wɑɑng yɑ ngin-ɑ bëëdi wun? Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu nyelthinh keny!”" 
Matthew17:18 Kɑ wëyrijjø ryeem wɑ̈g kì ree yi Yëso. Kɑ nyelthinh ódönyø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth. 
Matthew17:19 Codhe, ɑbëën jøbɑnge yïe kì gød, kɑ pyëj yi gen kinni, “Wøde ɑ ɑ́dhɑɑl wøn yi ryemi wëyɑni?”" 
Matthew17:20 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Bɑ kɑ̀ bëëd yïëyi wun nøg. Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, cɑgg yïëyi wun di bëëd e thiinh ni wɑɑng köödhi kɑrdɑl, kïn-ɑ dwøng èn, oköbbø yi wun kinni, ‘Nyegí kun-ɑcɑ̀,’ kɑ di nyegi ceth. Bong gïn di dhɑl wun!”" 
Matthew17:21 De wëyɑni, nyi cyeddi kɑ mɑ̈ddø geki thuumø." 
Matthew17:22 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́wïïn gen kì Gɑlelì, ɑköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ócïb cingi teedø," 
Matthew17:23 o ónɑ̈g yi gen, o kì ri dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, ótug kì yij thøø.” Kɑ jøbɑnge pëthi gen órënyø ki mendwøng." 
Matthew17:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen Kɑpernɑum, kɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi cøng gwɑ̈ɑ̈j Kengø bï-ɑ yï Pïtør, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Jɑlpwönyi wun nyii cudø ki gwɑ̈ɑ̈j Kengø?”" 
Matthew17:25 Kɑ oyïëyø kinni, “Ngee.” Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi Pïtør kɑl, kɑ mɑɑg ki pyëjø yi Yëso kinni, “Sɑymøn, yï rum ɑ dï? Rɑ̈nhi kömi piny nyi kɑ̈b-ɑ́ɑ̀ yï wɑddi gen wɑlɑ̀ kì yi tyëngpɑth ki gwɑ̈j?”" 
Matthew17:26 Alöggi Pïtør kinni, “Ge nyi kɑ̈b-ɑ́ɑ̀ yï tyëngpɑth.” Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, tyëng pödhø pɑ cudø." 
Matthew17:27 De kipe tyëngɑni pëthi gen órënyi, kedhí gɑ̈d, kɑ ɑbɑdh leeng nɑm, kɑ dhø rëny-ɑ ókwøng yi yïn ki mɑgø yieeb; yï óyïddi ki ngyënyø kì dhøge. Kwɑny ngyënyyɑni kɑ mëggí tyëngɑni ɑ́ gwɑ̈jee.”" 
Matthew18:1 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́bëën jøbɑng Yëso yïe, kɑ ge ópëjjø kinni, “Á men ɑ ti döng kì Pödhi Jwøk?”" 
Matthew18:2 Acwøøl nyɑ nyel me thiinh yi Yëso, kɑ gø cuunge kì dïdyëri gen." 
Matthew18:3 Akööbe kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, keløg ri wun pɑ løg yi wun, kɑ wu obëëdø ni othønhø, wu pɑ wöl kedhi Pödhi Jwøk." 
Matthew18:4 De ngɑn-ɑ ódwöög ree cyɑ̈n, kɑ obëëdø ni othinh men, bene en ɑ ying mɑl kì Pödhi Jwøk." 
Matthew18:5 O ngɑn-ɑ ókwɑny othinh ɑ́kyel ni men ki nyingɑ, ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ yɑn thyew." 
Matthew18:6 “De ngɑn peej othinh ni men yij orøg, lɑ̈w keløg pil me dwøng di twööj mune, kɑ di luudh dïnɑm." 
Matthew18:7 Cyën ying-ɑ kömi piny kì bɑng gïg-ɑ nyi peej ji yij orøg. Mɑ́ ge bɑ møg bï ceth, de cyën ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l gen." 
Matthew18:8 “Keløg yï kïdh-ɑ yij orøg yi cingí wɑlɑ̀ tyelí, ngul wɑ̈g kɑ weddí. Mɑ́ e lɑ̈w ke kedhí yethi nënnì, yï bɑ ngwøl, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́cingikyel, kibøli kɑ̀ bëëd yïí dɑ cing ɑ́ryew kí tyel ɑ́ryew, kɑ yï leeng mɑc men pɑ thøw." 
Matthew18:9 O keløg yï kïdh-ɑ yij orøg yi wɑngí, gööl wɑ̈g kɑ weddí. Mɑ́ e lɑ̈w ke kedhí yethi nënnì ki wɑng ɑ́kyel, kibøli ke di leeng yïn mɑc, e yïí dɑ nying ɑ́ryew." 
Matthew18:10 “Ko di ngɑn benyi othønhø kì kelli wun, mɑ́ yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, wëywöddi gen nyi bëëd ɑ buti Wïyɑ ngɑn ɑ ying mɑl." 
Matthew18:11 Mɑ́ Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ɑ́bï-ɑ be yieli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny. 
Matthew18:12 “De wu rum ɑ dï? Keløg jɑl megø yïe dɑ dyëg miyø, kɑ ɑ́kyel ówɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì kelli gen, pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïngwen wïdɑ́bïngwen pɑ wiye piny, kɑ kedh-ɑ be yɑbi men-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny?" 
Matthew18:13 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, keløg e óyod yi en, pyëwe ceg-ɑ mïnø ki dyelɑni, ki me lod medi pyëwe ki dyëg-ɑ kyeelø gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïngwen wïdɑ́bïngwen møg-ɑ nuti wɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
Matthew18:14 Bëëd ɑ nøw kì yï Wïyi wun ɑ ying mɑl. Pɑ dwɑddi kinni o nget ɑ́kyel lɑ̈ɑ̈nye kì kelli møg-ɑ thønhø. 
Matthew18:15 “Keløg yï ogöggø yi ómyëw ki gïnrɑj, kedhí yïe, kɑ wu kööb wun keti wun, kɑ nyudhí gïn-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n. Keløg kwøbbí ólïnge, ómyëw ɑ́yiel yi yïn." 
Matthew18:16 De keløg kwøbbí pɑ lïnge, cwöddí ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel wɑlɑ̀ ji ɑ́ryew, o møgɑni lïngi yi gen, mɑ́ kwøbbi dhøggi ji ɑ́ryew ócuggø yïëyø." 
Matthew18:17 De keløg mø gen óbɑny yi en, ngɑ̈j kɑnïsɑ̀ ki møgɑni. O keløg kwøbbi kɑnïsɑ̀ óbɑny yi en thyew, wiy bëëde kì yïí e nɑ ngɑn nuti yïëyø wɑlɑ̀ ngeti gwɑ̈j." 
Matthew18:18 “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, møg-ɑ ókyer yi wun kì kömi piny, ókyer kì Pödhi Jwøk, o møg-ɑ óyïëy yi wun kì kömi piny, óyïëy kì Pödhi Jwøk." 
Matthew18:19 “De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër këti kinni, keløg ji ɑ́ryew kì kelli wun onywɑ̈gø ki kwøb kì kömi piny kipe gïn-ɑ ókwɑjji yi gen, gïnɑni ógöggi gen yi Wïyɑ ɑ ying mɑl." 
Matthew18:20 Mɑ́ keny cugi yi ji ɑ́ryew wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g ki nyingɑ, yɑ nud kì kelli gen.”" 
Matthew18:21 Kɑ Pïtør bï-ɑ yïe, kɑ gø pyëje kinni, “Wuö, ɑ́ tyel ɑ́dï ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwɑ ki ómïɑ kenyi gögge yɑn ki gïnrɑj? Tyel ɑ́bïryew?”" 
Matthew18:22 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Pɑth ki tyel ɑ́bïryew, dɑ́ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew tyel ɑ́bïryew." 
Matthew18:23 Mɑ́ Pödhi Jwøk pɑ̈r ki rɑ̈dh mɑ ɑ́dwɑddi lidhi kwɑnni gïg-ɑ gøggi yi bɑ̈ngge. 
Matthew18:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kwɑ̈ɑ̈n gen, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l bɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel yïe, cwɑgge dɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø." 
Matthew18:25 De kɑ ɑ́jɑde ki gïn cude, ɑkööb wɑ̈n kinni i ngeew jɑlɑni wɑ̈g geki cyëge, kí nyige, kí jɑmme bënn, o ngyënyyi gen cool kwör-ɑ köme." 
Matthew18:26 Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni ree bøødhe piny, kɑ gø kwɑjje kinni, ‘Wuö mɑg pyëwí! Kwörɑni ócol yi yɑn bëne!’" 
Matthew18:27 Kɑ wïi bɑ̈ngɑni yije óywöngø kipere, kɑ gø gønye, kɑ kwörɑni bëne kyere kinni ko col." 
Matthew18:28 “De bɑ̈ngɑni kiree, kɑ ɑ́kedhe, ɑrwööme ki bɑ̈ng megø me cwɑgge di kwöre, mɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg miyø. Kɑ gø mɑge kì mune, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, ‘Col ngyënyyɑ!’" 
Matthew18:29 Kɑ bɑ̈ng-ɑ kyeelø ree bøødhe piny kì bøle, kɑ gø kwɑjje kinni, ‘Mɑg pyëwí! Kwörɑni ócol yi yɑn.’" 
Matthew18:30 Kɑ okyëdø, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le gøn, kɑ gø leenge ød mɑg, gïti keny-ɑ óthumi kwör ki colø bëne." 
Matthew18:31 Kɑ ɑ́liidh møgɑni yi bɑ̈ngg-ɑ kyeelø, ɑrënyi pëthi gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yï wïi gen, kɑ gø köbbi gen gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb." 
Matthew18:32 Codhe, ɑcwøøl bɑ̈ngɑni yi wɑ̈n, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, ‘Yïn ɑ bɑ̈ng rɑj, kwör men-ɑ ɑ́ying kömí ɑ́wiy yi yɑn kɑ per kɑ ɑ́kwɑjjí yɑn." 
Matthew18:33 Pɑ lɑ̈w ke di ywöngi yijí ki wɑɑd wun thyew ni kɑ ɑ́ywöngi yijɑ ki yïn?’ 
Matthew18:34 Kɑ wïi jɑlɑni owërø, kɑ gø cïbe cinggi tyëng-ɑ nyi cir ɑmɑgg, gïti keny-ɑ óthumi kwör-ɑ köme ki colø bëne.”" 
Matthew18:35 Kɑ kwøbbɑni ngøl yi Yëso kinni, “Wïyɑ, ngɑn-ɑ mɑl, ógöögø kinøw thyew ki wun, keløg pëthi wun pɑ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wɑddi wun.”" 
Matthew19:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki kwøbi møgɑni, ɑdhwödhe kì myërri Gɑlelì, kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ myërri Yeudiyɑ̀, kì løøg Nɑm Urdun." 
Matthew19:2 Kɑ ji mø gïïr løg-ɑ bɑnge, kɑ gï yiele ki gïg-ɑ ri gen kì kunɑni." 
Matthew19:3 Kɑ Jøpɑresì bï-ɑ yïe, kɑ gø pyëj gen, ge pɑ̈ny-ɑ gøn ki kwøb kinni, “Bɑ ɑyïëy yi Ciggee kinni, jɑlø ócuggø tɑ̈ngi cyëge kipe göj?”" 
Matthew19:4 Kɑ ólöggø kinni, “Nuti rɑɑng wun cøn kinni, Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j dhɑnhø kì tyeli mɑl, ɑ́cwɑ̈j-ɑ jɑlø kí dhɑjø?" 
Matthew19:5 Kɑ Jwøk okööbø kinni, ‘Bene ɑ bɑnge nyi wiy dhɑnhø wïye geki meye, kɑ ómɑ̈gø kì ri cyëge, kɑ ge ogöögø ki ɑ́kyel.’" 
Matthew19:6 De ge pɑth ki ji ɑ́ryew këti, de ge bɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel. Gïn-ɑ ɑ́reb yi Jwøk, pɑ cuggi dɑ̈ngø yi dhɑnhø.”" 
Matthew19:7 Kɑ pyëj yi Jøpɑresì kinni, “Dɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ ɑ́cïg Mosɑ̀ kinni, jɑlø nënge cyëge ki wɑ̈nyi tɑ̈ng, kɑ gø ryeme?”" 
Matthew19:8 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Mosɑ̀ ɑ́yïëy kinni, nyi tɑ̈ng wun mɑ̈nni wun, mɑ́ wu ɑ́ceg-ɑ dhɑ̈lø ki pwönyø. De nuti bëëd ɑ nøw kì ri cwɑ̈ji lɑ̈bø." 
Matthew19:9 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, ngɑn tɑ̈ng cyëge, e nuti røngø ki jɑlø megø, kɑ ónyömø, jɑlɑni ɑ́røngi. O ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́tɑ̈ng yi en, ɑ́gwøøge ngetorøg.”" 
Matthew19:10 Aköbbii yi jøbɑnge kinni, “Keløg møgɑni bëëd ɑ nøw kì kɑɑm dhɑnhø geki cyëge, lɑ̈w cögi dhɑnhø e pɑ nyömi.”" 
Matthew19:11 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Møgɑni pɑ cuggi lïngø yi teedø bëne den-ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mëggi møgɑni keti gen." 
Matthew19:12 Gïg-ɑ per gen pɑ nyi nyömi ji bɑ̈nni; mɑ́ e dɑ ji mɑ ɑ́nywøl kinøw, o møøgø ɑ́gwøg-ɑ yi ji, o møøgø ri gen ɑ́gwøg gen kinøw kipe Pödhi Jwøk. Ngɑn cuggi yïëyi møgɑni wiy yïëye.”" 
Matthew19:13 Kɑ ji møøgø kɑ̈n-ɑ yï Yëso ki othønhø kipe kinni o cingge thɑɑnye kömi gïn, o gï kwënge. Kɑ tyëngɑni cyɑ̈r yi jøbɑnge." 
Matthew19:14 Kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni, “Wiy othønhø bï gen yïɑ; ge ko mɑ̈ɑ̈n wun, mɑ́ Pödhi Jwøk bɑ mi gen.”" 
Matthew19:15 Athɑɑnye cingge kömi gïn, kɑ odhwödhø kì kenyɑni." 
Matthew19:16 Kɑ wøb megø bï-ɑ yï Yëso, ɑkööbe kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, gwøgɑ ngø ɑ døj, o yɑ yïddɑ ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer?”" 
Matthew19:17 Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ pëjji yɑn gïn-ɑ døj? Bɑ nget ɑ́kyel kete ɑ døj. De keløg yï dwɑdd-ɑ yïddø ki nënnì, mïdhí Cigg.”" 
Matthew19:18 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Á cigg ɑ́?” Akööb Yëso kinni, “Yï ko nɑ̈gi ki dhɑnhø; yï ko niin ki ngɑn nuti nywøøm wun ri wun; yï ko kwɑ̈ɑ̈d; wɑɑd wun ko gøøny ki kwøbbi pyed." 
Matthew19:19 Wør wïyí kí meyí, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ butí mɑɑr ni kɑ̀ mɑɑr rií.”" 
Matthew19:20 Alöggi nyelɑni kinni, “Møgɑni di mïdhø yi yɑn bënn. Dɑ́ gïn këti ɑ dwɑddi, o gwøgɑ?”" 
Matthew19:21 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Keløg yï dwɑdd-ɑ bëëdø yï tir, kedh, kɑ jɑmmí ngeew wɑ̈g, kɑ ngyënyy-ɑ óngeew gen pɑ̈ngí kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur, o yï óyïddi ki kɑ̈r kì Pödhi Jwøk, kɑ yï lug bɑngɑ.”" 
Matthew19:22 De kɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi nyelɑni ɑkedhe, yije bɑɑrø, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd yïe dɑ jɑmmì mø gïïr cɑrø." 
Matthew19:23 Kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, kedhi Pödhi Jwøk teeg kipe ngɑn yïe di jɑmmì mø gïïr." 
Matthew19:24 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun këti kinni, kɑ̈li ɑmɑlø wɑɑng ɑlïbrøw, yööd kibøli kedhi ngetikɑ̈r yij Pödhi Jwøk.”" 
Matthew19:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi jøbɑnge, ɑmuum wɑ̈thi gen ki mendwøng, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, dɑ ngɑn cuggi yielø?”" 
Matthew19:26 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Møgɑni pɑ cuggi lwɑ̈ngø yi dhɑnhø, de bong gïn nyi dhɑl Jwøk.”" 
Matthew19:27 Alöggi Pïtør kinni, “Jɑmmi wøn bënn ɑ́wiy wøn piny, kɑ wø bï-ɑ bɑngí, ɑ́ gïn ɑ óyod yi wøn?”" 
Matthew19:28 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, kì piny-ɑ nyɑ̈n, keny-ɑ ópëggi Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø wïj kwøm kì yij dhwɑ̈nge, wu ópëggi wɑ̈thi kwømm pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, wun ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kì bɑngɑ, wu jɑɑg-ɑ kɑ̈lli Isrɑil gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew." 
Matthew19:29 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wiy ud, kí nyiimëëg-ɑ cwøw kí mɑ̈nn, kí wïye, kí meye, kí nyige geki pwödhe kipe nyingɑ, óyïddi ki møg lod gen ki tyel miyø, kɑ thödhi ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer." 
Matthew19:30 Ji mø ngenyø møg-ɑ ying mɑl ɑnɑn ódøøg cyɑ̈n, o møg-ɑ cyɑ̈n óying mɑl." 
Matthew20:1 “Pödhi Jwøk, pɑ̈r ki jɑl megø me yïe di bɑɑg oløg. Kɑ møøl-ɑ be yɑb ki ji møg kïdhe be gwøg kì bɑɑg oløge."
