Matthew20:2 Kɑ kwøb nywɑg gen ki jøgwøg kinni köögi mi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel bɑ ngyënyø ɑ́tegø; ɑöre gïn yij bɑge. 
Matthew20:3 Kɑ odøøgø kì sɑɑ̀ ɑ́bïngwen kì mwøl, kɑ óyïddø ki ji møøgø, ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ bëëdø kì kej ngyew." 
Matthew20:4 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, ‘Kedhu yij bɑɑg oløgɑ thyew, wu óthödhɑ ki kööng-ɑ kyëëw ki wun.’" 
Matthew20:5 Kɑ ge ókedhø. Kɑ odøøgø kì sɑɑ̀ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì dicɑ̈ng, kí sɑɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g kì böörø, kɑ ogöögø kinøw." 
Matthew20:6 Kɑ døøg-ɑ kej ngyew, e piny køm-ɑ gwøg ki sɑɑ̀ ɑ́bïj, kɑ jøgwøg møøgø lidhe ge nudd ge ócungø kì kenyɑni. Kɑ gï pyëje kinni, ‘Wude ɑ tyëgu cɑ̈ng wu wɑ̈dh-ɑ cung kinnï?’" 
Matthew20:7 Alöggi gen kinni, ‘Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́kïr wøn.’ Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, ‘Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, kedhu yij bɑɑg oløgɑ thyew.’" 
Matthew20:8 “Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög piny ki wɑɑng thyënhø, ɑköbbe jɑngi jøgwøg kinni, ‘Cwøl jøgwøg, kɑ ge mëggí ngyënyyi gen, cɑ̈gí kì ri møg-ɑ ɑ́bï kì cyɑ̈n gïti ri møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi bëënø.’" 
Matthew20:9 Abëën jøg-ɑ ɑ́kïr kì sɑɑ̀ ɑ́bïj kì böörø, kɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mëggi ngyënyø ɑ́tegø." 
Matthew20:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën jøg-ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki kwɑnyø, ge ɑ́rømm-ɑ kinni, kööngi gen ómed, de dhɑnhø ɑ́mëgg-ɑ ngyënyø ɑ́tegø thyew." 
Matthew20:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki kwɑnyi ngyënyyi gen, kɑ ge oköörø kì ri jɑlbɑɑg oløg," 
Matthew20:12 ge ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Jøg-ɑ ɑ́bï kì cyɑ̈n, ge ɑ́göög kɑ sɑɑ̀ ɑ́kyel kete, de yöd ge ceg kɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈rø yi yïn ki wøn, wøn ɑ ɑ́göög ki gwøg me teeg kì yij cɑ̈ng e keej!’" 
Matthew20:13 “Kɑ jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen köbbi yi jɑlbɑɑg oløg kinni, ‘Mɑ̈dh, bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́göggɑ yïn, mɑ́ yï ɑ́rum ki yïëyø kinni, yï kïr kɑ ngyënyø ɑ́tegø ɑ́kyel." 
Matthew20:14 Kwɑny kööngí kɑ yï kedh. Mɑ́ yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ thödhi jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bï kì cyɑ̈n ni kɑ̀ thödhɑ yïn ceth. 
Matthew20:15 Yɑ pɑ göögø ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ ki ngyënyyɑ? Wɑlɑ̀ yijí dɑ mud kipe kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ bɑ jwödhø?’ ” 
Matthew20:16 Kɑ Yëso kwøbbe tyëge kinni, “Bene en ɑnɑn; tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈n óying mɑl, o tyëng-ɑ mɑl ódøøg cyɑ̈n.”" 
Matthew20:17 Yëso ɑ́bëëd e ócyɑ̈dhø kì yöö, e kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem, kɑ jøbɑnge pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew cwøle wɑ̈yi gen, kɑ gï köbbe kinni," 
Matthew20:18 “Wɑ kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem, de Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø, bɑ men cïb cinggi jɑggi ókwër geki jøpwönyi Cigg, o kuum yi gen ki thøø," 
Matthew20:19 o ócïb cinggi tyëngpɑth, o gɑggi yi gen, o pwöd yi gen, o gur gen wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, de ódhwödh kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng.”" 
Matthew20:20 Kɑ meyi wɑ̈ddi Dhebedì bï-ɑ yïe, geki wɑ̈dde. Abøødhe ree piny kì bøle, e kwɑjj-ɑ gøn." 
Matthew20:21 Kɑ ngɑnɑni pyëj yi Yëso kinni, “Yï kwɑjj-ɑ ngø?” Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Kööb kinni, wɑ̈ddɑ óbëëdø kì butí kì yij Pödhí, ɑ́kyel kì wïj kyëjí, ɑ́kyel kì wïj cɑɑmí.”" 
Matthew20:22 Kɑ møge løøg yi Yëso kinni, “Gïn-ɑ kwɑjji yi wun kwïj yi wun. Wu ócuggi mɑ̈dhø kì yij óthɑ̈ng-ɑ ómɑ̈ɑ̈dh yi yɑn?” Kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Wø ócuggø mɑdh.”" 
Matthew20:23 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Wu ómɑ̈dhi kì yij óthɑ̈ngɑ kidyër, de kwøbbi bëëdø kì wïj kyëjɑ wɑlɑ̀ wïj cɑɑmɑ, pɑth ki mø cwɑggɑ, de kɑ̈jjɑni ɑ́rum ki tyenyø yi Wïyɑ kipe ji-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi en.”" 
Matthew20:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi jøbɑnge gɑ pyɑ̈rø, kɑ pëthi gen ceg-ɑ rënyø ki nyiimëëgɑni." 
Matthew20:25 Codhe, ɑcwøøl gen kej ɑ́kyel yi Yëso, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, jyɑ̈ggi pödhh møøgø nyi jyɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ ɑthwøg, o jɑgg-ɑ døngø mø gen nyi jyɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ tegø." 
Matthew20:26 De pɑ bëëdø kinøw kì kelli wun. Ngɑn dwɑddi bëëdø ɑ́ ngɑndwøng kì kelli wun, bëëde ɑ́ ngɑn göggi wun," 
Matthew20:27 o ngɑn dwɑddi ying mɑl kì kelli wun, bëëde ɑ́ bɑ̈ng wun." 
Matthew20:28 Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø bëëd ɑ nøw; nuti bëënø kɑ per kinni o göggi yi teedø, dɑ́ kiper kinni o gögge teedø, o wëye ómuuje e gøøm-ɑ bøli ji mø ngenyø.”" 
Matthew20:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh gen ge cɑ̈dhh-ɑ Yerikö, kɑ ji mø gïïr løg-ɑ bɑnge." 
Matthew20:30 Kɑ jøg ɑ́ryew mø bɑ cörr, mø bëëdø kì tøg yöö olïngø kinni i Yëso obëënø e kɑ̈ll-ɑ yuuɑni, ɑryeer gen, ge ócwöddø kinni, “Wuö, yïn ɑ Wɑ̈d Debïd, ywöngi yijí kiper wøn!”" 
Matthew20:31 Kɑ ge kyëddi yi teedø kinni, kud gen, de ge ɑ́yöd ge ceg-ɑ pëddø ryeerø kinni, “Wuö, yïn ɑ Wɑ̈d Debïd, ywöngi yijí kiper wøn!”" 
Matthew20:32 Kɑ Yëso ócungø, kɑ gï cwøle, ɑkööbe kinni, “Wu dwɑdd-ɑ ngø, o göggɑ wun?”" 
Matthew20:33 Aköbbii yi gen kinni, “Yieb nyingi wøn, Wuö!”" 
Matthew20:34 Kɑ yij Yëso óywöngø kiper gen, ɑnywɑle nyingi gïn; kɑ ge onëënø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kɑ ge løg-ɑ bɑnge." 
Matthew21:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi gen ki Yerusɑlem, ɑtöngi gen Betpɑjì, kì thɑ Kïti Dhetun, kɑ Yëso oödø ki jøbɑnge ɑ́ryew," 
Matthew21:2 kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedhu pɑn-ɑ bøli wun, wu óyïddi kì pɑnɑni ki ɑderø e ómɑɑg piny ki wɑ̈de kì bute. Gønyu gen, kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈lu keny." 
Matthew21:3 De keløg e dɑ ngɑn di gïn köbbe wun, köbbu en kinni, ‘Ge dwɑdd-ɑ yi Wïi wøn.’ Gï ómuuje.”" 
Matthew21:4 Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg kipe kinni o møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi jɑltöng pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen, kinni," 
Matthew21:5 “Köbbu Kɑɑl Dhɑyøn kinni, Lidh rɑ̈dhí ɑ bï yïí ɑnɑn! Bɑ mölø, o cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi ɑderø; cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi ɑderø ówöb.”" 
Matthew21:6 Kɑ jøbɑnge ókedhø, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Yëso gwøg yi gen." 
Matthew21:7 Aderø ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen kí wɑ̈de, kɑ ógudhi gen peedh gen kömi ɑderø ówöb, kɑ Yëso pëgg-ɑ kömi ógudhɑni." 
Matthew21:8 Kɑ ji mø gïïr ógudhi gen peedh gen yij yöö, kɑ kwï ji ongudø ki ɑnɑ̈bbi yenh. Kɑ gï peedh gen yij yöö." 
Matthew21:9 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì mɑl, kí møg-ɑ kɑ̈lli cyɑ̈n óryeerø kinni, “Lenhi wɑ kwɑɑr Debïd! Ngɑn-ɑ bï ki nyingi Wë, bɑ ɑgyëdh! Lenhi wɑ Jwøk!”" 
Matthew21:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe Yerusɑlem kɑ kɑɑl oyöllø bëne, ge opëjø kinni, “Jɑlɑni ɑ́ men?”" 
Matthew21:11 Kɑ teedø okööbø kinni, “Bɑ Yëso jɑltöng, kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Nɑdhɑreth kì myërri Gɑlelì.”" 
Matthew21:12 Kɑ Yëso kedh-ɑ Kengø, kɑ jøngyew ryeeme wɑ̈g bënn kì kenyɑni. Kɑ tɑrɑbedhhi jøg-ɑ wïïdø ki ngyëny dhure piny geki jɑmmi jøngyëwø ki ɑkùr." 
Matthew21:13 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Bɑ ɑgwed kinni, ‘Ødɑ ócwøl ɑ́ ød mɑ̈ddø.’ De ɑ́løgu keny pɑ̈nni yi kurrì!”" 
Matthew21:14 Kɑ cörr, kí ngöll bï-ɑ yïe kì Kengø, kɑ gï yiele." 
Matthew21:15 Kɑ jɑggi ókwër geki jøpwönyi Cigg mɑg yi liny kɑ ɑ́lidh gen ngïjj-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en, kí othønhø kɑ̀ ryeer gen kì Kengø kinni, “Lenhu kwɑɑr Debïd!”" 
Matthew21:16 Apyëj gen Yëso kinni, “Møg-ɑ kømmi yi gen olïngø yi yïn?” Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Ngee, olïngø yi yɑn! Wu nuti rɑ̈ngø cøn kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, ‘Dhøggi othønhø geki møg-ɑ dhødh ɑ́cïbí ki mɑlli pwøj?’ ”" 
Matthew21:17 Kɑ gï wiye, ɑkedhe Betɑnì, kɑ nïnn-ɑ kunɑni." 
Matthew21:18 Kɑ dwöög-ɑ kɑɑldwøng kì mwøl, e ree dɑ kɑ̈j." 
Matthew21:19 Kɑ ólïdhø ki ólɑm kì tøg yöö, ɑkedhe yï ólɑmɑni, de bong nywøl mɑ ɑ́yode kì kööre, den-ɑ́ yïthh keti gen. Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Yï koo nywøl këti kinni tek!” Kɑ ólɑmɑni owøwø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Matthew21:20 Kɑ ɑ́liidh møgɑni yi jøbɑnge, kɑ ge ongɑ̈ngø, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Ólɑmɑni ɑ́jwɑn wøwø kidï kinnï?”" 
Matthew21:21 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, keløg wu yïëyø o wu pɑ pëmø, wu ócuggø gwøg ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ ólɑm men. Pɑth ki codhi gen, de kït men-ɑn ócuggø köbbø yi wun kinni, ‘Dhwöödh, kɑ rií leeng nɑɑm omelø.’ Kɑ ócuggø ceth." 
Matthew21:22 Jɑmm-ɑ kwɑjji yi wun bënn, e pëthi wun dɑ yïëyø, ge ceg kɑ yodø yi wun ceth.”" 
Matthew21:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhe Kengø, ɑbëën jɑggi ókwër geki tyëngdøngø yïe, ɑpëjji gen kinni, “Yï göög-ɑ tegø mɑ ngø, ki gïg bënn? Á men ɑ ɑ́thödhi yïn ki tengɑni?”" 
Matthew21:24 Kɑ mø gen løøg yi Yëso kinni, “Wu ólonyɑ ki pëjji gïjø ɑ́kyel. Keløg møgɑ óløøg yi wun, wu óköbbɑ teng-ɑ göögɑ ki møg." 
Matthew21:25 Jwɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g ji yi Jøn ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny? Kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, wɑlɑ̀ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï ji?” Kɑ ge opëmø keti gen kinni, “Keløg wɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk,’ wɑ óköbbe kinni, ‘De wude ɑ bɑnyu yïëyø?’" 
Matthew21:26 O keløg wɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï ji,’ wɑ óböggø yi teedø, mɑ́ ge rum yïëyø kinni, Jøn ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑltöng.”" 
Matthew21:27 Codhe, ɑløøg gen kwøbbi Yëso kinni, “Kwïj yi wøn.” Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “De wu pɑ köbbɑ teng-ɑ göögɑ ki gïg." 
Matthew21:28 “De wu rum ɑ dï? Ádɑ jɑl me yïe di wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew, kɑ kedh-ɑ yï nyel-ɑ dwøng, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, ‘Kedhí be gwøg yij bɑɑg oløg tïn, wɑ̈dɑ.’" 
Matthew21:29 Kɑ nyelɑni ólöggø kinni, ‘Yɑ pɑ dwɑddi kedhø.’ De ɑ́pɑ̈di kì cyɑ̈n, kɑ ókedhø." 
Matthew21:30 Kɑ kedh-ɑ yï wɑ̈de nyel-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ gø köbbe møgɑni. Kɑ ólöggø kinni, ‘Yɑ ókedh wuö.’ De ɑ́cög e pɑ kedh." 
Matthew21:31 Á men kì kelli yɑɑgɑni ryeet, ɑ ɑ́gwøg gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi wïyi gen?” Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Nyel-ɑ dwøng.” Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, jøgwɑ̈j geki tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ki köögi, ge ókwöngi wɑ̈dhi Pödhi Jwøk kibøli wun." 
Matthew21:32 Mɑ́ Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g ɑ́bï be nyudhi wun yuu-ɑ døøj kì bøli Jwøk, de møge nuti yïëëy wun, kɑ møge yïëy yi jøgwɑ̈j geki tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ki köögi. Møgɑni ɑ́lidh yi wun, de wu nuti yewø, o møge nuti yïëëy wun.”" 
Matthew21:33 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Lïng wun ki gɑ́j møøgø. Ádɑ jɑl me yïe di pinye. Kɑ opïdhø ki bɑɑg oløg. Kɑ gø gëdde ki kyel, kɑ ogëdø ki keny nyi biij oløg, kɑ ogëdø ki ønbɑ̈r men koorii. Acïbe gøn cinggi jøgwøg, kɑ kedh-ɑ be wel." 
Matthew21:34 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi bøli kej lemi oløg, ɑöre bɑ̈ngge yï jøgwøg, kinni o muuj bun-ɑ bɑ mee." 
Matthew21:35 Kɑ bɑ̈ngge mɑg yi jøgwøg, kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen pwöd gen, kɑ megø nɑ̈g, kɑ megø bɑ̈lli ki tuggi kïttì." 
Matthew21:36 Kɑ cig-ɑ ör ki bɑ̈ngg møøgø, mø gïïr kibøli mø tyeli mɑl, kɑ tyëngɑni cig-ɑ gwøg kinøw thyew." 
Matthew21:37 Kì cyɑ̈n, ɑöre wɑ̈de, e okööbø kinni, ‘Wɑ̈dɑ óböggi yi gen.’" 
Matthew21:38 De kɑ ɑ́liidh wɑ̈d jɑlɑni yi jøgwøg, kɑ ri gen köbbi gen kinni, ‘Bene ngɑn-ɑ ólɑg jɑmmì èn, bïu nɑ̈g wɑ en, o jɑmme kwɑny yi wɑ.’" 
Matthew21:39 Kɑ nyelɑni mɑg gen, kɑ gø peej gen wɑ̈g kì yij bɑɑg oløg, kɑ gø nɑ̈g gen.”" 
Matthew21:40 Kɑ Yëso ópëjjø kinni, “Keny-ɑ óbëën wïi bɑɑg oløg, ɑ́ ngø ɑ ógögge tyëngɑni?”" 
Matthew21:41 Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Tyëngrijjø møgɑni ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø yi en, o bɑɑg oløg cïbe cinggi jøgwøg møøgø, møg-ɑ ómëggii nywøli oløg kenyi cyeg gen.”" 
Matthew21:42 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Nuti rɑngø yi wun kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø, kinni, ‘Kït men-ɑ ɑ́bɑny yi bödhhi gyer, en ɑ ɑ́göög ki kïn-ɑ mïdhi ød. Menɑni bɑ gwøøg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de bɑ gïïngɑ̈ngø, kɑ ɑ́lidhii yi wɑ!’" 
Matthew21:43 “Ngɑn-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kömi kïnɑni ceg-ɑ torø, de ngɑn-ɑ köme ópɑ̈dhi yi kïnɑni ónyɑdh yi en. O yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, Pödhi Jwøk ókɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì cinggi wun, kɑ cïb cinggi ji møg-ɑ ókɑ̈ni ki nywøl mø myër ki pere.”" 
Matthew21:44  
Matthew21:45 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gɑ́jɑni yi jɑggi ókwër geki Jøpɑresì, kɑ gø ngij gen kinni, bɑ gen ɑ kømmi yi Yëso." 
Matthew21:46 Kɑ dwɑddi mɑgø yi gen, de ge ɑ́bëëd ge óböggø yi teedø, mɑ́ e cwøl yi gen ɑ́ jɑltöng." 
Matthew22:1 Kɑ ge cigi köbbø yi Yëso ki gɑ́j møøgø kinni," 
Matthew22:2 “Pödhi Jwøk pɑ̈r ki rɑ̈dh mɑ ɑ́göög ki thyëëg wɑ̈de. 
Matthew22:3 Kɑ rɑ̈nhɑni bɑ̈ngge öre be cwøli ji-ɑ ɑ́ryej, kɑ ge óbɑ̈nyø bëënø." 
Matthew22:4 Kɑ cig-ɑ ör ki bɑ̈ngg møøgø kinni, ‘Köbbu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ryej kinni, yɑ ɑ́rum ki gwøg ki gïncɑm; dhögɑ, dhög-ɑ døngø geki røjj-ɑ cwɑɑdhø ɑ́rum ki ngɑlø yi yɑn, jɑmmì bënn ɑ́rum ki pyëlø. Bïu be thyëg.’" 
Matthew22:5 De kɑ̀ bëëd kwøbbɑni bong per gen kì yï gen, ɑcög ge pɑ kedh, kɑ men kedh-ɑ pwödhe, kɑ megø kedh-ɑ cuge." 
Matthew22:6 Kɑ bɑ̈ngge mɑg yi ji møøgø kì kelli gen, kɑ gï göggi gen ki gïnrɑj, kɑ ge nɑ̈g." 
Matthew22:7 Kɑ rɑ̈dh owërø, kɑ oödø ki jøliny, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g bɑ̈ngge nɑ̈g, kɑ kɑɑl gen rɑ̈b." 
Matthew22:8 Codhe, ɑköbbe bɑ̈ngge kinni, ‘Jɑmmi thyëg ɑ́rum ki pyëlø, de tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ryej pɑ døøj ki thegø." 
Matthew22:9 Kedhu yethi yëëth, kɑ tyëng-ɑ óyod yi wun bënn cwööl wun kej thyëg.’" 
Matthew22:10 Kɑ bɑ̈nggɑni kedh-ɑ yethi yëëth, kɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́yod yi gen bënn cøng yi gen; tyëngrijjø kí tyëngdøj bënn, kɑ kej nywöm opɑ̈ngø yi wëll." 
Matthew22:11 “De kɑ ɑ́bëën rɑ̈dh be lidhi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ryej, ɑlïdhe ki jɑl me pɑ rugø ki ógødh nywöm." 
Matthew22:12 Kɑ gø pyëje kinni, ‘Mɑ̈dh, yï ɑ́wɑ̈nhi keny kidï, e rií bong ógødh nywöm?’ Kɑ ojɑdø ki gïn løøge." 
Matthew22:13 Codhe, kɑ rɑ̈dh bɑ̈ngge köbbe kinni, ‘Twöju cinggi jɑlɑni kí tyelle, kɑ leengu wɑ̈g yij muudhø, kunɑni dɑ ywøg kí ngenyyi leg.’ ”" 
Matthew22:14 Atyëg Yëso kwøbbe kinni, “Ji mø gïïr ɑ ɑ́cwøl, dɑ́ ji mø nøg ɑ ɑ́yieny.”" 
Matthew22:15 Codhe, ɑkedh Jøpɑresì, kɑ dhøggi gen nywɑg gen kipe kinni o gø myen yi gen kì ri gïn-ɑ ókwøbe." 
Matthew22:16 Kɑ Jøpɑresì kí jø Ërödøs ör gen yïe. Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni, møgí bɑ dyër, o yuu Jwøk nyi pwönyi yi yïn kì ri kwøbb-ɑ dyër, yï pɑ nyi böggi yi ji, mɑ́ e bong ngɑn nyi yieny yi yïn." 
Matthew22:17 Köbbí wøn møg-ɑ rømmi yi yïn. Bɑ ɑyïëy yi cigg kinni, nyi cudi wɑ Kɑysɑr ki gwɑ̈j?”" 
Matthew22:18 De gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi gwøgø yi gen ngɑ̈nyi yi Yëso, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Wun ɑ tyëngwëënyø, wude ɑ pɑ̈nyu yɑn?" 
Matthew22:19 Nyudhu yɑn ki ngyënyi gwɑ̈j.” Kɑ ngyënyø ɑ́kyel mëggii," 
Matthew22:20 ɑpyëje gïn kinni, “Á ngïji men kí gweddi men ek?”" 
Matthew22:21 Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Mø Kɑysɑr.” Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, mëggu jɑmmi Kɑysɑr Kɑysɑr, kɑ jɑmmi Jwøk mëggu Jwøk.”" 
Matthew22:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen møgɑni, kɑ ge ongɑ̈ngø, ɑwiy ge gøn, kɑ ge ókedhø." 
Matthew22:23 Kɑ kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth, ɑbëën Jøsɑduk yïe, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi kööbø kinni, i bong dhwödhø kì yij thøø. Kɑ gø pyëj gen kinni," 
Matthew22:24 “Jɑlpwönyø, Mosɑ̀ ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Keløg dhɑnhø othøø de yïe bong wɑ̈de, lɑɑg cyëge yi ómen o nywøle wïj ómen.’" 
Matthew22:25 De ɑ́dɑ nyiimëëg ɑ́bïryew. Kɑ nyel-ɑ dwøng ónyömø, kɑ othøø e bong wïje, kɑ cyëge lɑg yi nyel-ɑ bɑnge." 
Matthew22:26 Kɑ othøø ni menɑni, kí dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen thyew, gïti ri bïryeew gen." 
Matthew22:27 Athøw ngɑnɑni kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n gen bënn. 
Matthew22:28 Ngɑnɑni óbëëd ɑ́ cï men, keny-ɑ ódhwödh ji kì yij thøø, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ cï gen bënn?”" 
Matthew22:29 Kɑ mø gen løøg yi Yëso kinni, “Wu ɑ́bɑ̈jji, mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø kwïj yi wun geki tegi Jwøk." 
Matthew22:30 Keny-ɑ ódhwödh ji kì yij thøø, bong ngɑn-ɑ ónyömi wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn-ɑ ónywøm, de ji óbëëd ge nɑ wëywödd kì mɑl." 
Matthew22:31 De keløg ɑ́ per dhwödhø kì yij thøø, møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun yi Jwøk nuti rɑɑng wun kinni," 
Matthew22:32 ‘Yɑ bɑ Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm, o yɑ bɑ Jwøøg Isɑɑk, o yɑ bɑ Jwøøg Yɑgob.’ Jwøk pɑth ki Jwøøg tyëngthøø, de bɑ Jwøøg tyëngnëënø.”" 
Matthew22:33 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi teedø, kɑ ge ongɑ̈ngø yi pwönye." 
Matthew22:34 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Jøpɑresì kinni, dhøggi Jøsɑduk nɑ̈ɑ̈g en, ɑcugi gen kì kej ɑ́kyel." 
Matthew22:35 Kɑ Yëso pyëj yi jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøpwönyi Cigg, e pɑ̈ny-ɑ gøn, kinni," 
Matthew22:36 “Jɑlpwönyø, cigg-ɑ døngø kì kelli cigg bënn, bɑ cigg ɑ́?”" 
Matthew22:37 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “ ‘Mɑɑr Wöw Jwøgí, ki pyëwí bëne, kí wëyí bëne, kí rummí bënn.’" 
Matthew22:38 Bene cigg-ɑ mɑl; ɑ døngø kibøli cigg bënn. 
Matthew22:39 O ryeew gen nɑ en kinni, ‘Mɑɑr ngɑn-ɑ butí ni kɑ̀ mɑɑr rií.’" 
Matthew22:40 Ciggɑni ryeet ɑ bɑ byerri cigg geki pwönyi jøtöng bënn.” 
Matthew22:41 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Jøpɑresì ying-ɑ kej ɑ́kyel, ɑpyëëj gen yi Yëso kinni," 
Matthew22:42 “Wu rum ɑ dï kì ri Mesiy? Bɑ kwɑɑr men?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Bɑ kwɑɑr Debïd.”" 
Matthew22:43 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Dɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ cwøllii yi Debïd ɑ́ Wɑ̈n, kì bɑng pwönyi Wëy? Kɑ ɑ́kööbe kinni," 
Matthew22:44 ‘Wɑ̈ɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Bëëd kì wïj kyëjɑ gïti keny-ɑ ócïbɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn thɑ́ tyellí.’" 
Matthew22:45 Keløg e cwølli yi Debïd ɑ́ Wɑ̈n, Mesiy óløg kwɑre kidï?”" 
Matthew22:46 De bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́cuggi løøgi kwøbbe, kɑ teedø bëne obwøgø, kɑ gø wiy gen ki pyënyø." 
Matthew23:1 Kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge geki teedø köbbe kinni," 
Matthew23:2 “Jøpwönyi Cigg geki Jøpɑresì bɑ gen ɑ nyi lwøb gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi Ciggi Mosɑ̀. 
Matthew23:3 Nyi gwøgu møg-ɑ köbbi wun yi gen ceth. De gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen ko nyi ngøy wun. Mɑ́ ge nyi wɑ̈dh-ɑ kwøb, de møg-ɑ kømmi yi gen pɑ nyi gwøg yi gen." 
Matthew23:4 Tyëngɑni nyi cøng-ɑ gïg peg møg-ɑ nyi cïb gen wɑ̈thi ji, de ge pɑ yïëy nywɑ̈dø ki lwedø ɑ́kyel." 
Matthew23:5 Gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen bënn, nyi gwøg yi gen kɑ per kinni o ge nenni yi ji, mɑ́ wɑ̈jj-ɑ rug yi gen nyi gwøg yi gen ge døngø, kɑ ojwɑrri ógudhi gen nyi gwøg yi gen ge bɑ̈rrø," 
Matthew23:6 ge mɑɑr-ɑ bëëdø kì wɑ̈thi kwømm-ɑ per gen teg kì kɑ̈jji ryëj, kí kwømm-ɑ døj kì sinɑgøgg," 
Matthew23:7 kí mɑ̈dhhø yi teedø kì yethi kɑ̈jji ngyew, geki cwølli gen yi teedø kinni, ‘Jɑlpwönyø.’" 
Matthew23:8 De ri wun ko wëggu cwøllø kinni, ‘Jɑlpwönyø.’ Mɑ́ jɑlpwönyi wun nud ɑ́ ɑ́kyel, o wu bɑ nyiimëëg bënn." 
Matthew23:9 Kɑ ko di dhɑnhø me cwølli yi wun ɑ́ wïyi wun kì kömi piny, mɑ́ wïyi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel kete, en ɑ ngɑn-ɑ ying Pödhi Jwøk." 
Matthew23:10 Wɑlɑ̀ wu ko nyi yïëy cwøllø yi teedø kinni, ‘Wuö,’ mɑ́ wïi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel en ɑ Mesiy." 
Matthew23:11 De ngɑn-ɑ dwøng kì kelli wun óløg bɑ̈ng wun. 
Matthew23:12 Ngɑn-ɑ nyi tïng ree mɑl ódwøøg cyɑ̈n, o ngɑn-ɑ nyi dwøøg ree cyɑ̈n ótïng mɑl." 
Matthew23:13 “Wun ɑ jøpwönyi Cigg kí Jøpɑresì, wu bɑ tyëngwëënyø, ri wun dɑ cyën, mɑ́ Pödhi Jwøk ɑ́cyëëg yi wun kipe ji møøgø; wu pɑ kedhi yije, o ji møøgø nuti wëggu kedhi yije." 
Matthew23:14 Wun ɑ jøpwönyi Cigg kí Jøpɑresì, wu bɑ tyëngwëënyø, ri wun dɑ cyën, mɑ́ kɑ̈lli thwömm nyii kɑbø yi wun, kɑ wu nyii lɑ̈mø ki lɑm mø bɑ̈rrø, kipe kinni o wu nenni yi teedø. Kömi wun ódi cɑ́y mø døngø." 
Matthew23:15 “Wun ɑ jøpwönyi Cigg kí Jøpɑresì, wu bɑ tyëngwëënyø, ri wun dɑ cyën, mɑ́ wu nyi bɑ̈nn-ɑ piny kí nɑ̈mmi omelø, wu oyɑ̈bø ki ngɑn yïëy ki kwøbbi wun. O kenyi yïddi wun, kɑ ngɑnɑni nyi løg wun ngɑn kedhi mɑc, me lod wun ki rɑ̈jø tyel ɑ́ryew!" 
Matthew23:16 “Wun ɑ pëjj-ɑ bɑ cörr, ri wun dɑ cyën, mɑ́ wu nyii kööbø kinni, ‘Keløg dhɑnhø nyi kwöng-ɑ Kengø, bong nyinge, de keløg dhɑnhø nyi kwöng-ɑ dhɑm-ɑ yij Kengø, köme dɑ kwör mi köngɑni.’" 
Matthew23:17 Wun ɑ dhëgg-ɑ bɑ cörr, ɑ́ gïn ɑ pere teg, dhɑb wɑlɑ̀ Kengø ɑ nyi kwër dhɑb?" 
Matthew23:18 Kɑ wu nyii kööbø kinni, ‘Keløg dhɑnhø nyi kwöng-ɑ këli lɑm, bong nyinge, de keløg dhɑnhø kwöng-ɑ gënh-ɑ muuj kì kömi këli lɑm, köme dɑ kwör mi köngɑni.’" 
Matthew23:19 Wun ɑ cörr, ɑ́ gïn ɑ pere teg kì kelli gen? Gënh-ɑ muuj wɑlɑ̀ këli lɑm men-ɑ nyi kwër gënh-ɑ muuj?" 
Matthew23:20 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, ngɑn-ɑ nyi kwöng këli lɑm, nyi kwöng-ɑ gøn geki jɑmm-ɑ wïje bënn." 
Matthew23:21 O ngɑn-ɑ nyi kwöng Kengø, nyi kwöng-ɑ gøn geki Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì yije," 
Matthew23:22 o ngɑn-ɑ kwöng mɑl, kwöng-ɑ kwøøm Jwøk geki ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì wïje." 
Matthew23:23 “Wun ɑ jøpwönyi Cigg kí Jøpɑresì, wu bɑ tyëngwëënyø, ri wun dɑ cyën, mɑ́ wu nyi muuj-ɑ ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rø kì ri nɑnɑɑ̀ kí cumɑ̈r kí kɑmun, de møg-ɑ per gen teg kì yethi Cigg ɑ́wiy yi wun, gen ɑ kwøbbi jyɑ̈ng-ɑ tir kí ywøøg yeth geki yïëyø. Bene møgɑni ɑ di dwɑddi gwøgø yi wun ceth, kɑ møg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi wun ko nyi wiy wun." 
Matthew23:24 Wun ɑ pëjj-ɑ bɑ cörr, wu nyi reg-ɑ yi bɑ̈yø yøw, de ɑmɑlø nyii mwønyø yi wun." 
Matthew23:25 “Wun ɑ jøpwönyi Cigg kí Jøpɑresì, wu bɑ tyëngwëënyø, ri wun dɑ cyën, mɑ́ tɑ̈mmì geki ɑ́ludhhì nyii lwøgø yi wun kidøøj kì kömi gen, de yethi gen pɑ̈ng yi gïg-ɑ nyi gweem ji geki gïg-ɑ nyi kɑbbi ki döngi pëëth." 
Matthew23:26 Yïn ɑ Jɑlpɑresì, yï bɑ cwør, nyi lɑw yethi ɑ́ludhhì geki tɑ̈mmì møti, o kömi gen dhïwi gen." 
Matthew23:27 “Wun ɑ jøpwönyi Cigg kí Jøpɑresì, wu bɑ tyëngwëënyø, ri wun dɑ cyën, mɑ́ wu pɑ̈r ki rörri ji møg-ɑ ógøjø ki böyø me tɑr, o ge nënni ge døøj kì kömi gen, de yethi gen pɑ̈ng yi cu tyëngthøø geki gïgrijjø bënn." 
Matthew23:28 Wu nɑ gen ceth; wu nenni yi teedø wu døøj kì kömi wun, de pëthi wun pɑ̈ng yi wëënyø kí orøg." 
Matthew23:29 “Wun ɑ jøpwönyi Cigg kí Jøpɑresì, wu bɑ tyëngwëënyø, ri wun dɑ cyën, mɑ́ rörri tyëngtöng mø Jwøk nyii gerø yi wun, kɑ rörri tyëngdøj nyi göggi ki dhwɑ̈ng yi wun." 
Matthew23:30 Kɑ wu nyii kööbø kinni, ‘Keløg wø di ying-ɑ mø nud kì bøli keny-ɑ́ nud kweyyi wøn, cinggi wøn pɑ di kedhi yi remmi jøtöng ni gen.’" 
Matthew23:31 Kɑ̀ kööb wun kinøw, wu nyodh-ɑ ri wun kinni, wu bɑ wɑ̈ddi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g jøtöng!" 
Matthew23:32 De ɑnɑn, tyëgu gwøøg kweyyi wun." 
Matthew23:33 Wu bɑ thöllì, wɑ̈ddi thöllì, cɑyø ki mɑc óbɑj yi wun kidï?" 
Matthew23:34 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, wu óödɑ ki tyëngtöng, kí tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel geki jøpwönyø. Kwï gen ógur yi wun wɑ̈thi yenh ɑrïw, o møøgø ónɑ̈g yi wun, o møøgø ópwöd yi wun kì sinɑgøgg, kɑ nyingi gen guud yi wun kì yethi myërr." 
Matthew23:35 Codhe, o cu tyëngdøj bënn kì kömi piny bëne ying gen cinggi wun, cɑg kì ri cöngi Abel ngɑn yïe bɑ̈r, gïti ri cöngi Dhekɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Berɑkiyɑ̀, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi wun kì kɑɑm Kengø geki këli lɑm." 
Matthew23:36 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, møgɑni bënn óbï kömi rïj men." 
Matthew23:37 “Yerusɑlem! Yerusɑlem! Yïn ɑ nyi nɑ̈gø ki jøtöng, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ör yïí yi Jwøk bɑ̈llí ki tuggi kïttì. Tyel mø gïïr yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ cøngi nyigí ni gyenø kenyi cønge nyige thɑ́ obërre, de yï ɑ́bɑ̈nyi." 
Matthew23:38 De ɑnɑn, Kengi wun ódöng e lïïwø." 
Matthew23:39 Mɑ́ yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, yɑ pɑ lidh yi wun këti gïti keny-ɑ ókööb wun kinni, ‘Ngɑn-ɑ bï ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ ɑgyëdh.’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 Akedhi Yëso wɑ̈g kì yij Kengø, kɑ jøbɑnge kedh-ɑ be nyudhii udd-ɑ bɑdhhi Kengø." 
Matthew24:2 Kɑ mø gen løøg yi en kinni, “Jɑmmì møg bënn di nennø yi wun? Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, bong kït ɑ́kyel kì keny men-ɑ ódöng kì kömi megø e nuti dhur piny.”" 
Matthew24:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pëgge piny kì wïj Kïti Dhetun, ɑbëën jøbɑnge yïe kì wɑ̈yi gen, ge okööbø kinni, “Köbbí wøn bøli keny-ɑ óbëën møgɑni. Á ngïji mɑ ngø ɑ ónyodh bøli kej bëëní geki thumi piny?”" 
Matthew24:4 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Koru ri wun kipe wu ópeej pɑ̈l yi ngɑn megø." 
Matthew24:5 Mɑ́ ji mø gïïr óbï ki nyingɑ, ge okööbø kinni, ‘Yɑn ɑ bɑ Mesiy.’ Kɑ ji mø gïïr peej gen pɑ̈l." 
Matthew24:6 Kɑ wu olïngø ki kwøbbi liny geki wöddi liny, de wu ko böggi, mɑ́ møgɑni bënn ɑ óbï møti, e thumi piny nuti bëënø." 
Matthew24:7 Mɑ́ pödhø megø ónyïɑ̈ggi ki pönh-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ rɑ̈dh ónyïɑ̈ggø ki rɑ̈nh-ɑ kyeelø, o kɑ̈j me dwøng óbï, kɑ piny onhɑ̈nhø kì kɑ̈jj møøgø." 
Matthew24:8 O møgɑni bɑ cɑ̈gi orɑng kì kömi piny. 
Matthew24:9 “Kì bøli kenyɑni nyingi gen ócuul ki wun, kɑ wu nɑ̈g yi gen. Kɑ wu mɑɑn yi jurrì bënn kipe nyingɑ." 
Matthew24:10 Ocwöb møgɑni, ji mø gïïr ódøøg cyɑ̈n. Kɑ ri gen tummi gen, kɑ ri gen mɑny gen." 
Matthew24:11 O jøtöng mø pɑ kømmi dyër ócwöb, kɑ ji mø ngenyø peej gen pɑ̈l." 
Matthew24:12 Rɑj óngënyi, kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ ɑ́ying pëthi ji mø ngenyø ólwënyø." 
Matthew24:13 De ngɑn-ɑ óngïnø gïti keny-ɑ óthumi møgɑni, bene en ɑ óyiel." 
Matthew24:14 Codhe, o Wöndøj men-ɑ kööbø kì ri Pödhi Jwøk èn, kɑ̈lli kì kömi piny bëne, ɑ́ nyuudhi kipe wɑ̈thi jurrì bënn; o thumi piny bëe." 
Matthew24:15 “Ólidh yi wun, eni ‘Gïnrɑj,’ men-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi Dɑniel jɑltöng e ócungø kì kej kwër.” (Ngɑn-ɑ rɑ̈ngø yode gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møgɑni!)" 
Matthew24:16 “Ocwöb møgɑni, kɑ tyëng-ɑ Yeudiyɑ̀ pɑ̈ɑ̈r gen kelli kïttì." 
Matthew24:17 O ngɑn ying wïj óthɑɑng ød, ko yïnhi piny be kwɑnyi jɑmme møg-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød." 
Matthew24:18 Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ pwödhø ko døøg be yɑɑbi ógødhe. 
Matthew24:19 Kì bøli kenyɑni, tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ bɑ ɑ́yɑjj, kí møg-ɑ köthi gen dhøødh yi othønhø, ri gen ódi cyën." 
Matthew24:20 De kwɑjju Jwøk kipe kinni o wu ócög wu pɑ reng-ɑ́ɑ̀ wuudø wɑlɑ̀ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth! 
Matthew24:21 Mɑ́ cyɑ̈ngɑni bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng orɑng me dwøng. Bong gïn ni menɑni mɑ ɑ́cwöb këër cɑ̈gi piny pïd dicyɑ̈ngtïn, o koo cigi cwöbø thyew." 
Matthew24:22 De keløg kwï cyɑ̈nggɑni pɑ di ngøl yi Jwøk, bong dhɑnhø me di bodh. De cyɑ̈nggɑni ɑ́ngøl ge ceggø kɑ per tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yieny." 
Matthew24:23 “Keløg e dɑ ngɑn köbbi wun kinni, ‘Mesiy ɑ keny èn,’ wɑlɑ̀ kinni, ‘Mesiy nud kì kun-ɑcɑ̀,’ kwøbbe ko yïëy wun." 
Matthew24:24 Mɑ́ Mesiy mø pyed, kí jøtöng mø pyed ócwöb; kɑ ge ogöögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø mø døngø, ge pɑ̈ny-ɑ jii Jwøk møg-ɑ ɑ́yieny ki peej pɑ̈l." 
Matthew24:25 Lïng wun kidøøj, wu ɑ́rum ki köbbø yi yɑn e møgɑni nuti bëënø." 
Matthew24:26 “Wɑlɑ̀ keløg wu óköbbi yi gen kinni, ‘Mesiy nud kì yij pɑ̈l,’ wu ko kedhi kunɑni. Wɑlɑ̀ keløg ge okööbø kinni, ‘Mesiy nud kì kelli kɑ̈llì,’ møgɑni ko yïëy wun." 
Matthew24:27 Mɑ́ Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø óbï e nɑ mɑl kenyi gööge kinni rɑ̈d kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ mënyy-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Matthew24:28 “Keny-ɑ di gïnthøø, bɑ en ɑ yije nyi cugi yi cor órɑj." 
Matthew24:29 “De kì bøli keny-ɑ óthumi ryɑ̈ngɑni ceth, cɑ̈ng ólunyi, kɑ dwɑ̈y ocögø e pɑ mënyø, kɑ kyell odyëmø kì mɑl, kɑ gïg-ɑ teg kì yij mɑl okïïrø." 
Matthew24:30 Codhe, o ngïji Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø cwöbe kì yij mɑl; o ji ywöngi gen kì kömi piny bëne, o Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø lidh yi teedø e obëënø kì wɑ̈thi pølli mɑl, ki tege geki dhwɑ̈nge." 
Matthew24:31 Codhe, o wëywödde öre nyingi yømø gɑ ɑ́ngwen, ge okudhø ki kɑ̈ngì mø cwɑggi gen døngø. O jie møg-ɑ ɑ́yieny cung yi gen kì wɑ̈thi tùngi piny gɑ ɑ́ngwen, cɑg kì wïj tuung gïti wïj tung-ɑ kyeelø." 
Matthew24:32 “Dïd wun ki ri ólɑm. Kenyi nyog ólɑm kɑ ómɑ̈rø, nyii yodø yi wun kinni cwir ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
Matthew24:33 Nɑ menɑni ceth, keny-ɑ ólidhu møgɑni bënn, kɑ wu ngɑ̈nyu wøw kinni, thumi piny ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
Matthew24:34 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, møgɑni ócwöb, e rïj men nuti thumø." 
Matthew24:35 Mɑl kí piny ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny, de kwøbbɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
Matthew24:36 “De bøli kej bëëni cyɑ̈ngɑni wɑlɑ̀ sɑɑ̀ menɑni bong ngɑn ngɑ̈nyii; kwïj yi wëywödd kì Pödhi Jwøk, o kwïj yi Wɑ̈d, den-ɑ́ Wïy kete ɑ ngɑ̈nyii." 
Matthew24:37 Bëëni Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø óni gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì ri Nöö. 
Matthew24:38 Mɑ́ kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd bɑɑyø nuti bëënø, ji ɑ́bëëd ge ocyɑ̈mø, o ge omɑ̈dhø; cwøw ónyömø, o mɑ̈nn onywømø gïti cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kɑdhi Nöö yij yɑ̈y;" 
Matthew24:39 gïn-ɑ cwöb nuti yodø yi wɑ̈thi gen, pïd kɑ ɑ́bëën bɑɑyø, ɑmude gïn. Óbëëd ɑ nøw keny-ɑ óbëën Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø." 
Matthew24:40 Kì bøli kenyɑni jøg ɑ́ryew óløg mø nud kì yij pwödhø, ɑ́kyel ókɑ̈l kɑ megø wiy." 
Matthew24:41 Tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ɑ́ryew ogurø kì kɑl, ɑ́kyel ókɑ̈l kɑ megø wiy." 
Matthew24:42 “De koru ri wun, mɑ́ cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óbëën Wïi wun kwïj yi wun." 
Matthew24:43 Bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, keløg jɑlkɑl di bëëd bøli keny-ɑ óbëën yi kur kì wɑ̈r ngɑ̈nyi yi en, gøle pɑ di wëgge yɑyø yi kur." 
Matthew24:44 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, bëëd wun ri wun gwiir wun, mɑ́ Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø óbï-ɑ bøli keny me pɑ rømmi yi wun." 
Matthew24:45 “Á men ɑ bɑ bɑ̈ng-ɑ wïje pel? Bɑ bɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wɑ̈n, ɑ́ jɑngi bɑ̈ngg-ɑ kyeelø, o gï nyi mëgge gïncɑɑm gen kì bøli keje." 
Matthew24:46 Bɑ̈ngɑni ree ódi gyëdh, keløg e óyuud e ogöögø kinøw yi wɑ̈n keny-ɑ ódwööge." 
Matthew24:47 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, jɑmme bënn cïbe’ cingi bɑ̈ngɑni." 
Matthew24:48 De keløg ɑ́ bɑ̈ng me rɑj, kɑ okööbø ki pyëwe kinni, ‘Wɑ̈ɑ ɑ́cöög yïnø.’" 
Matthew24:49 Kɑ bɑ̈ngg-ɑ kyeelø nyi pwöde, kɑ nyii cyɑ̈mø kɑ nyii mɑ̈dhø geki jømɑdh ki muggì," 
Matthew24:50 wïi bɑ̈ngɑni óbï kì cyɑ̈ng me pɑ rømmi yi en, kì sɑɑ̀ me kwïj yi en thyew." 
Matthew24:51 Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni pwöd yi en ki pwödø me teg, kɑ kïdhi kelli wëëny. Kenyɑni yije dɑ ywøg kí ngenyyi leg." 
Matthew25:1 “Kì bøli kenyɑni, Pödhi Jwøk óbëëdø ni wojur gɑ pyɑ̈rø møg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ mø gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be pɑɑri jɑlnywöm." 
Matthew25:2 Ábïj kì kelli gen bɑ dhëgg, de ɑ́bïj møøgø rummi gen nud." 
Matthew25:3 Kɑ møg-ɑ bɑ dhëgg kɑ̈l-ɑ lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ mø gen yethi gen dɑ jɑ̈s, de bong jɑ̈s megø mɑ ɑ́kwöög yi gen." 
Matthew25:4 De møg-ɑ rummi gen nud kɑ̈dø ki jɑ̈s kì yethi ɑdhɑ̈dhì kyeel ki lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ mø gen. 
Matthew25:5 Kɑ jɑlnywöm ócwöngø, ɑpëggi gen be nwɑyyø, kɑ ge ónenø bënn." 
Matthew25:6 “Kì dïwɑ̈r ɑlïngi cwɑg mø cwöddi kinni, ‘Bïu wɑ̈g be pɑɑri jɑlnywöm.’" 
Matthew25:7 Kɑ woɑni bënn odhwödhø, kɑ lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ mø gen tim gen." 
Matthew25:8 Kɑ møg-ɑ rummi gen nud köbbi yi møg-ɑ bɑ dhëgg kinni, ‘Nëngu wøn ki jɑ̈s, mɑ́ lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ mø wøn køm-ɑ thøø.’" 
Matthew25:9 Kɑ møg-ɑ rummi gen nud ólöggø kinni, ‘Jɑ̈s nøg, pɑ rømi ki wɑ bënn, kedhu cugg, kɑ wu ngëëw wun.’" 
Matthew25:10 Kɑ kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kedhi gen be ngyew, ɑbëën jɑlnywöm, kɑ wojur-ɑ tyeeny ri gen kedh-ɑ kej nywöm, kɑ dhø kɑl cyëëg." 
Matthew25:11 “Abëën woɑni kì cyɑ̈n, ge okööbø kinni, ‘Wuö, Wuö, yïëbbí wøn dhø kɑl.’" 
Matthew25:12 Kɑ mø gen løøg yi en kinni, ‘Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, wu kwïj yi yɑn.’ ”" 
Matthew25:13 Kɑ møgɑni ngøl yi Yëso kinni, “Koru ri wun, mɑ́ cyɑ̈ngɑni geki sɑɑ̀ menɑni kwïj yi wun.”" 
Matthew25:14 “Pödhi Jwøk pɑ̈r ki jɑl megø mɑ ɑ́dwɑddi kedhi be wel, kɑ bɑ̈ngge cwøle, kɑ jɑmme bënn cïbe cinggi gïn." 
Matthew25:15 Ákyel ɑ́mëgge ngyëny ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj, kɑ megø mëgge ɑ́ryew, kɑ megø mëgge ɑ́kyel, gɑ møg lug kì kej ngyew." 
Matthew25:16 Kɑ nyel-ɑ ɑ́mëggi ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj jwɑn-ɑ be løg, kɑ ɑ́bïjɑni onywølø ki ɑ́bïj møøgø." 
Matthew25:17 Kɑ nyel-ɑ ɑ́mëggi ɑ́ryew kedh-ɑ be løg thyew, kɑ óyïddø ki ɑ́ryew møøgø." 
Matthew25:18 Kɑ nyel-ɑ ɑ́mëggi ɑ́kyel ókedhø, kɑ okunyø ki bur kì piny, kɑ ngyënyyi wɑ̈n kɑne." 
Matthew25:19 “Kɑ wïi bɑ̈nggɑni ódwöögø piny kɑ̈ɑ̈l kun, kɑ ge ócɑ̈gø kwɑ̈nø ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen." 
Matthew25:20 Kɑ nyel-ɑ ɑ́mëggi ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj obëënø e ókɑ̈ddø ki ɑ́bïj møøgø, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Wuö, yɑ ɑ́mëggí ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj, de yɑ ɑ́yïddi ki ɑ́bïj møøgø.’" 
Matthew25:21 Kɑ köbbi yi wɑ̈n kinni, ‘Gwøgí døøj, yïn ɑ bɑ̈ng-ɑ døj, yï ngɑ̈ny gɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Jɑmmì mø nøg ɑ́kor yi yïn kidøøj, o mø ngenyø ócïbɑ cingí. Bïí pëggí yij dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng wöw.’" 
Matthew25:22 “Kɑ nyel-ɑ ɑ́mëggi ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew obëënø thyew, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Wuö, yɑ ɑ́mëggí ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew, o yɑ ɑ́yïddi ki ɑ́ryew møøgø.’" 
Matthew25:23 Kɑ köbbi yi wɑ̈n kinni, ‘Gwøgí døøj, yïn ɑ bɑ̈ng-ɑ døj, yï ngɑ̈ny gɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Jɑmmì mø nøg ɑ́kor yi yïn kidøøj, o mø ngenyø ócïbɑ cingí. Bïí pëggí yij dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng wöw.’" 
Matthew25:24 “Kɑ nyel-ɑ ɑ́mëggi ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyel obëënø thyew, kɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Wuö, yï ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, yï bɑ jɑlkej, yï nyii kɑ̈jø kì keny me nuti kɑ̈g-ɑ yi yïn. Kɑ yï nyii cungø ki byel mø nuti kwør-ɑ yi yïn." 
Matthew25:25 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ óböggø, ɑkedhɑ kɑ ɑ́lïp mií kɑɑnɑ piny. Ngyënyyí ɑgɑk.’" 
Matthew25:26 “Aköbbii yi wɑ̈n kinni, ‘Yï bɑ bɑ̈ng me rɑj, dëlí ledh. Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni, yɑ nyii kɑ̈jø ki byel mø nuti kɑ̈g-ɑ yi yɑn, kɑ yɑ nyii cungø ki byel mø nuti kwør-ɑ yi yɑn." 
Matthew25:27 Pɑ lɑ̈w ke di kïdhí ngyënyyɑ beng, o ge di yuud yi yɑn ge nywølø?" 
Matthew25:28 Anɑn kwɑnyu ɑ́lïp menɑni kì yïe, kɑ mëggi nyel-ɑ yïe di pyɑ̈rø." 
Matthew25:29 Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ yïe di jɑmmì ócigi thödhø, kɑ jɑmme óngënyø. O ngɑn-ɑ jɑdø cɑgg ɑ́ møg-ɑ nud ge nøg kì yïe ceg kɑ kwɑnyø." 
Matthew25:30 Kɑ bɑ̈ng-ɑ rɑj leeng wun wɑ̈g yij muudhø. Kenyɑni yije dɑ ywøg kí ngenyyi leg.’ 
Matthew25:31 “Keny-ɑ óbëën Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ki wëywödde kì yij dhwɑ̈nge, ópëggi wïj kwøøm rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø," 
Matthew25:32 o wɑ̈thi jurrì bënn ócugi kì bøle. Codhe, o gï dɑ̈ɑ̈ng yi en, ni kenyi dɑ̈ɑ̈ng römm ki ɑ́tegg yi jɑlkwɑ̈yø." 
Matthew25:33 Römm ócïbe wïj kyëje kɑ ɑ́tegg cïbe wïj cɑɑme. 
Matthew25:34 Codhe, o Rɑ̈dh tyëng-ɑ wïj kyëje köbbe kinni, ‘Bïu, wun ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́gyëdh yi Wïyɑ. Kwɑnyu pödhø men-ɑ ɑ́pyël ɑ́ mi wun, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑg piny ki cwɑ̈jø." 
Matthew25:35 Mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́mɑg yi kɑ̈j, kɑ yɑ nëngi yi wun ki gïncɑm; yɑ ɑ́mɑg yi röödhø, kɑ yɑ nëngi yi wun ki gïn mɑdh. Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑn ɑ́ wëlø, kɑ yɑ kïdhi wun ød." 
Matthew25:36 Yɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, kɑ yɑ ruug yi wun ki ógødh. Yɑ ɑ́bëëd dëlɑ orɑ̈mø, kɑ yɑ këëm yi wun. Yɑ ɑ́ying-ɑ ød møg, kɑ wu bï-ɑ be këëmi yɑn.’" 
Matthew25:37 “O møge óløøg yi tyëngdøj kinni, ‘Wuö, ɑ́ ɑ́wën ɑ ɑ́lidh wøn yïn rií dɑ kɑ̈j, kɑ yï nëngi yi wøn ki gïncɑm? Wɑlɑ̀ rií dɑ röödhø, kɑ yï nëngi yi wøn ki gïn mɑdh?" 
Matthew25:38 O bɑ ɑ́wën ɑ ɑ́lidh wøn yïn, yï bɑ wëlø, kɑ yï kïdhi wøn ød? Wɑlɑ̀ yï cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, kɑ yï ruug yi wøn ki ógødh?" 
Matthew25:39 O bɑ ɑ́wën ɑ́bëëd dëlí orɑ̈mø, wɑlɑ̀ yï ying-ɑ ød mɑg, kɑ yï këëm yi wøn?’" 
Matthew25:40 Codhe, o mø gen løøg yi Rɑ̈dh kinni, ‘Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, gïn-ɑ göggu ngɑn-ɑ thinh kì kelli nyiimïɑ, ɑ́göggu’ yɑn ceth.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Codhe, o tyëng-ɑ wïj cɑɑme köbbe kinni, ‘Kedh wun kì butɑ, wu tyëng-ɑ kömi wun di cyënni Jwøk! Kedhu yij mɑc men-ɑ gïti ɑtheer, eni mɑny-ɑ ɑ́gwøg kipe Cethɑn geki wëywödde." 
Matthew25:42 Mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́mɑg yi kɑ̈j, de yɑ nuti nëngø yi wun ki gïncɑm. Yɑ ɑ́mɑg yi röödhø, de yɑ nuti nëngø yi wun ki gïn mɑdh." 
Matthew25:43 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ bɑ wëlø, de yɑ nuti kïdhi wun ød. Yɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, de yɑ nuti ruugø yi wun ki ógødh. Yɑ ɑ́bëëd dëlɑ orɑ̈mø, kɑ yɑ ying-ɑ ød mɑg, de yɑ nuti këëm wun.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Codhe, o ge löggi gen kinni, ‘Wuö, ɑ́ ɑ́wën ɑ ɑ́lidh wøn yïn yï ómɑgø yi kɑ̈j wɑlɑ̀ yi röödhø; wɑlɑ̀ yï bɑ wëlø; wɑlɑ̀ yï cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw; wɑlɑ̀ dëlí orɑ̈mø; wɑlɑ̀ yï ying-ɑ ød mɑg, kɑ yï ocögø yï pɑ køny yi wøn?’" 
Matthew25:45 O mø gen óløøg yi Rɑ̈dh kinni, ‘Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, kɑ̀ nuti göggu ngɑn pere bogøn ki møgɑni, wu nuti gögg-ɑ yɑn thyew.’" 
Matthew25:46 Tyëngɑni ócɑy ki cɑ́y mø gïti ɑtheer, de tyëngdøj ókedhi yethi nënn-ɑ ɑtheer.”" 
Matthew26:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki kwøbi møgɑni ɑköbbe jøbɑnge kinni," 
Matthew26:2 “Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni Kwëër Ákɑɑdh ógwøg kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew, o Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø bɑ men muuj o gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw.”" 
Matthew26:3 Codhe, ɑ cugi jɑggi ókwër geki jøgdøngø kì gøl Kɑyɑpɑ̀ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng." 
Matthew26:4 Kɑ dhøggi gen nywɑg gen kinni o Yëso mɑg yi gen, o nɑ̈g yi gen kì gød." 
Matthew26:5 De ge ɑ́kööb kinni, “De gïnɑni pɑ gwøg yi wɑ kì bøli kej kwër kipe ji ówër.”" 
Matthew26:6 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́ying Yëso Betɑnì kì gøl Sɑymøn jɑl-ɑ́ ree ɑ́di lɑ̈y," 
Matthew26:7 ɑbëën ngɑndhɑjø megø yïe, e ókɑ̈ddø ki ɑ́thïwi møw me yøme med, o ngewe teeg. Kɑ gø kønye wïje, kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëde kì tɑw." 
Matthew26:8 De keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh møgɑni yi jøbɑnge, kɑ pëthi gen órënyø, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Ede møwɑni ɑ wɑ̈dhii ki nyïɑ̈gø kinøw?" 
Matthew26:9 Møwɑni pɑ di ngeew wɑ̈g ki ngyëny mø gïïr, kɑ ngyënyyɑni di mëggi tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur?”" 
Matthew26:10 Angij møgɑni yi Yëso, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wude ɑ goddi wun ki ngɑnɑni, gïn-ɑ ɑ́gögge yɑn døøj cɑrø." 
Matthew26:11 Mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur nud ceth kì kelli wun, de yɑ koo cög yɑ nud kì kelli wun." 
Matthew26:12 Møwɑni ɑ́kønye wïjɑ e gwir-ɑ yɑn kipe konyɑ. 
Matthew26:13 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi ngɑnɑni ókømmi kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ópwönyi wöndøj men kì kömi piny bëne, o nyi pɑ̈rri møgɑni.”" 
Matthew26:14 Codhe, kɑ Yeudɑ̀ jɑl Iskɑryøt kedh-ɑ yï jɑggi ókwër," 
Matthew26:15 ɑpëjje kinni, “Á gïn ɑ ómëggu yɑn kipe kinni o jɑlɑni twɑ̈nyɑ wun?” Kɑ gø thödhi gen ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Matthew26:16 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ ócɑ̈gø kì bøli kenyɑni ki yɑb ki keny muuje gøn. 
Matthew26:17 Kɑ tyëngwöödø kedh-ɑ yï Yëso kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ cɑ̈gi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Á keny ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, o gïi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh pyël yi wøn kì yije kiperí?”" 
Matthew26:18 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedhu kɑɑldwøng yï ngɑn-ɑni, kɑ köbbu kinni, ‘Jɑlpwönyø okööbø kinni, bøli kejɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ gwøgi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh kì gølí wøki jøbɑngɑ.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Yëso gwøg yi jøbɑnge, kɑ jɑmmi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh pyël yi gen." 
Matthew26:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën wɑɑng thyënhø, ɑpëgge tɑw geki jøbɑnge pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew." 
Matthew26:21 Kɑ okööbø ge nudd ge ocyɑ̈mø kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, yɑ óngeew yi nget ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun.”" 
Matthew26:22 Kɑ ge okïïmø ki mendwøng, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki pyënyii, e nyi pëjji ɑ́ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kinni, “Yï kømm-ɑ yɑn, Wuö?”" 
Matthew26:23 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ cingɑ órøøm yij lwøl ki cinge, bɑ en ɑ óngeew yɑn." 
Matthew26:24 Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø óthøw kɑ yöö men-ɑ ógwedø kipere, de ngɑn-ɑ ngeewii ree dɑ cyën. Lɑ̈w keløg ngɑnɑni pɑ di nywøl.”" 
Matthew26:25 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ jɑlɑmolpiny okööbø kinni, “Yï kømm-ɑ yɑn, Wuö?” Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Ákwøb yi yïn ceth.”" 
Matthew26:26 Kɑ Yëso ókɑ̈bbø ki ópun ge nudd ge ocyɑ̈mø, ɑpwøje Jwøk, kɑ ópunɑni pøde, kɑ gø mëgge jøbɑnge e okööbø kinni, “Kwɑnyu en kɑ cɑm wun. Men bɑ dëlɑ.”" 
Matthew26:27 Kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki óthɑ̈gi, ɑpwøje Jwøk, kɑ gø mëgge gïn, e okööbø kinni, “Mɑ̈dhi wun kì ree, wu bënn." 
Matthew26:28 Men bɑ remɑ; remi nywɑ̈g ki kwøb, men-ɑ ókyëër piny kipe ji mø ngenyø kipe lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi orøg." 
Matthew26:29 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, yɑ pɑ cigi mɑdh ki møgi oløg, gïti cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ómɑdhɑ en e nyɑ̈n, kì Pödhi Wïyɑ.”" 
Matthew26:30 Codhe, ɑmɑ̈ddi gen ki wör, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ wïj Kïti Dhetun." 
Matthew26:31 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ ówiy piny yi wun tïn kì wɑ̈r, mɑ́ e ógwedø kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, ‘Jɑlkwɑ̈yø ónɑ̈g yi yɑn, o dyëg tɑy gen.’" 
Matthew26:32 De keny-ɑ ódhwödhɑ kì yij thøø, wu óyöömɑ Gɑlelì.”" 
Matthew26:33 Alöggi Pïtør kinni, “Cɑgg yï wiy piny yi teedø, yï pɑ wiyɑ piny.”" 
Matthew26:34 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kidyër kinni, yï ókyëdø kinni yɑ kwïj yi yïn tïn kì wɑ̈r, ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g, e óthwønh nuti köögø.”" 
Matthew26:35 Aköbbii yi Pïtør kinni, “Cɑgg yɑ thøw kyeel ki yïn, yï pɑ kyer yi yɑn.” Kɑ jøbɑnge bënn okööbø kinøw thyew." 
Matthew26:36 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Yëso geki jøbɑnge, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ keny me cwøl ɑ́ Getsemɑnì. Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Bëëd wun kì keny, o yɑ kedh-ɑ kun-ɑcɑ̀ be lɑm.”" 
Matthew26:37 Kɑ Pïtør kɑ̈ɑ̈le geki wɑ̈ddi Dhebedì ryeet. Kɑ ócɑ̈gø kïïmø pyëwe olïngø. 
Matthew26:38 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Pyëwɑ olïngø ki mendwøng. Bëëd wun kì keny, kɑ wɑ nëën wɑ.”" 
Matthew26:39 Akɑle kedhø kì buti gen ki kɑɑm me thinh, kɑ ree leenge piny bøle këële’ piny, kɑ ókwɑ̈jjø kinni, “Wïyø, keløg e ócuggø, nyiig óthɑ̈ngi orɑng men kì butɑ! De pɑth ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ, den-ɑ́ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn ɑ gwøg.”" 
Matthew26:40 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøge yï jøbɑnge, kɑ gï yuude ge nenø, kɑ Pïtør köbbe kinni, “Bene gen ɑgɑk, wu pɑ cuggi bëëdø wu onëënø kyeel ki yɑn, ki sɑɑ̀ ɑ́kyel yøw?" 
Matthew26:41 Nëën wun, kɑ wu kwɑ̈jji wun, o wu cög wu pɑ thɑb. Pyëw otyëëdø, de dël nyøødh.”" 
Matthew26:42 Acigi Yëso kedhø, kɑ ókwɑ̈jjø kinni, “Wïyø, keløg óthɑ̈ngɑni pɑ cuggi nyiigø, dɑ́ kinni mɑdhɑ en ceth, gwøg gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi pyëwí.”" 
Matthew26:43 Adwööge, kɑ gï yuude ge rum nenø, mɑ́ nyingi gen ɑ́dhɑ̈li bëëdø gɑ ɑyieb" 
Matthew26:44 Kɑ gï cige wiyø, ɑkedhe kɑ ókwɑ̈jjø ni menɑni, ki dɑ̈ɑ̈g kwɑ̈jjø." 
Matthew26:45 Codhe, ɑbëëne yï jøbɑnge, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wu nudd wu ceg-ɑ nenø, wu ywöm-ɑ ri wun? Bøli kenyɑni ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø cïb-ɑ cinggi tyëngorøg." 
Matthew26:46 Dhwödh wun, kedh wɑ. Ngɑn-ɑ ngeew yɑn ɑ́wɑ̈nhi.”" 
Matthew26:47 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ ówɑ̈nhø e Yëso nudd e okööbø. O Yeudɑ̀ bɑ jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøbɑng Yëso gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew; ɑ́bï kɑ yɑy me dwøng. Tyëngɑni ɑ́ör-ɑ yi jɑggi ókwër geki jøgdøngø, ge ókɑ̈ddø pil kí lødh." 
Matthew26:48 Ge óthödhø ki ngïji yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ngeewii kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ónuum yi yɑn, bene en. Kɑ mɑg wun.”" 
Matthew26:49 Kɑ pödh-ɑ yï Yëso ceth, ɑkööbe kinni, “Mɑ̈dh rií jɑlpwönyø.” Kɑ gø nuume." 
Matthew26:50 Kɑ köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Mɑ̈dh, gwøg gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́bëën yi yïn.” Codhe, ɑmɑg gen Yëso, kɑ gø kɑ̈l gen." 
Matthew26:51 Kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøbɑng Yëso pile wøødhe. Kɑ bɑ̈ng Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng gøje, kɑ yïthe juude wɑ̈g." 
Matthew26:52 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Dwøøg pilí keje, mɑ́ ngɑn cinge di pilø, nyi nɑ̈g-ɑ yi pilø." 
Matthew26:53 Wɑlɑ̀ yï orumø kinni, yɑ pɑ cuggi kwɑ̈jjø kì yï Wïyɑ, kɑ yɑ öde ki wëywödd møg lod yɑ̈yyì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew?" 
Matthew26:54 Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, møg-ɑ ying yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø ópɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen kidï, mɑ́ e bɑ ɑgwed kinni ge bɑ møg cwöb?”" 
Matthew26:55 Codhe, ɑköbbi teedø yi Yëso kinni, “Wu bï yïɑ, wu ókɑ̈ddø ki pil kí lødh de yɑ nɑ ngetigöj? Yɑ ce nyi bëëd ɑ Kengø, yɑ ópwönyø yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, o yɑ nuti mɑɑg wun." 
Matthew26:56 De møgɑni bënn ɑ́gwøg kɑ per kinni o møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed yi jøtöng pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen.” Codhe, ɑwiyii yi jøbɑnge, kɑ ge órengø." 
Matthew26:57 Kɑ Yëso peej gøl Kɑyɑpɑ̀, Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mɑgii. Kun-ɑ cugi jøpwönyi Cigg geki jøgdøngø." 
Matthew26:58 Kɑ Pïtør løg-ɑ bɑnge e cyɑ̈dhi e lɑ̈wi, gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe gøl Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, kɑ pödh-ɑ kɑl, ɑpëgge kelli bölidhh e nenn-ɑ thumi kwøbbɑni." 
Matthew26:59 Ókwërr-ɑ døngø geki jø tøg burø bënn, ɑ́bëëd ge oyɑ̈bø ki møg myeen gen kömi Yëso kipe kinni o nɑ̈g yi gen." 
Matthew26:60 De ge ɑ́jɑd ki møg myeen köme, mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mënni köme ɑ́ceg-ɑ pyed. Codhe, kɑ jøg ɑ́ryew dhwödh-ɑ mɑl," 
Matthew26:61 ɑkööb gen kinni, “Jɑlɑni ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Kengø men ócuggø cøør piny yi yɑn, kɑ døøgɑ ki gerø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 Kɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng dhwödh-ɑ mɑl, ɑköbbe Yëso kinni, “Bong gïn løøg yi yïn, kì ri møg-ɑ gøøny yïn yi gen?”" 
Matthew26:63 De Yëso ɑ́cög e okudø. Kɑ köbbi yi Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kinni, “Yï ceg yi yɑn kɑ köbbi köngø ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, köbbí wøn keløg yï bɑ Mesiy, Wɑ̈d Jwøk.”" 
Matthew26:64 Kɑ köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi yïn ceth. O yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ólidh yi wun e obëëdø kì wïj kyëëj Jwøk ɑ bong gïn dhɑlii, kɑ lidh yi wun e obëënø e kɑ̈ll-ɑ kömi pølli mɑl.”" 
Matthew26:65 Codhe, kɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng ógødhe kɑge, ɑkööbe kinni, “Jwøk ɑ́bwöl yi jɑlɑni. Bong kwøb møøgø mø dwɑddi yi wɑ këti! Møg-ɑ ɑ́bwöle Jwøk ɑ́lïngi yi wun." 
Matthew26:66 Wu rum ɑ dï?” Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Jɑlɑni ɑ́røngi, o ceg-ɑ thøø ceth.”" 
Matthew26:67 Codhe, kɑ nyinge nguddi yi gen ki lɑ́ɑ̀w, kɑ gø pwöd gen. Kenyi gøjii ge nyi ceg-ɑ kwøb" 
Matthew26:68 kinni, “Yïn ɑ Mesiy, tööng! Á men ɑ ɑ́gøj yïn!”" 
Matthew26:69 Pïtør ɑ́ying-ɑ wɑ̈g e obëëdø kì kɑl. Kɑ bɑ̈ng mɑ dhɑjø kì gøl Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng bï-ɑ yïe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yïn thyew, yï ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kɑ Yëso jɑl Gɑlelì.”" 
Matthew26:70 Kɑ Pïtør okyëdø kì bøli gen bënn kinni, “Møg-ɑ kømmi yi yïn kwïj yi yɑn.”" 
Matthew26:71 Kɑ kedh-ɑ ódɑ̈r-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g. Kɑ lidh yi bɑ̈ng megø mɑ dhɑjø, kɑ tyëng-ɑ kenyɑni köbbe kinni, “Jɑɑl, ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kɑ Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth.”" 
Matthew26:72 Kɑ Pïtør cig-ɑ kyëdø, kɑ óköngø kinni, “Jɑlɑni kwïj yi yɑn!”" 
Matthew26:73 Kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ying kenyɑni bï-ɑ yï Pïtør, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Kidyër, yï bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen, yï ceg kɑ ngijø kì ri kwøbbí!”" 
Matthew26:74 Codhe, ɑkööb Pïtør kinni, “Yɑ ceg-ɑ köngø ceth kinni yɑ kømm-ɑ dyër! Yɑ ócɑy yi Jwøk keløg yɑ ceg-ɑ pyed! Jɑlɑni kwïj yi yɑn!” Kɑ óthwønh oköögø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Matthew26:75 Kɑ Pïtør møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Yëso pɑre; kɑ ɑ́kööbe kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kidyër kinni, yï ókyëdø kinni yɑ kwïj yi yïn tïn kì wɑ̈r, ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g, e óthwønh nuti köögø.” Akedhi Pïtør wɑ̈g kɑ óywöngø ki ywøng dwøng." 
Matthew27:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ru wøw, ɑcung jɑggi ókwër geki jøgdøngø ki burø kipe kwøbbi nɑ̈gi Yëso." 
Matthew27:2 Atwöj gen cingge, kɑ gø muuj gen modïr Pilɑtø." 
Matthew27:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yodii yi Yeudɑ̀ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́twɑ̈ɑ̈ny kinni i Yëso ókuumø ki thøø, ɑpɑ̈dde kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g dögge jɑggi ókwër." 
Matthew27:4 Akööbe kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́göög ki orøg, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́twɑny-ɑ ngɑn yïe bɑ̈r kipe kinni o nɑ̈g!” Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Cwɑggi wøn ɑ́ ngø? Møgɑk bɑ møgí!”" 
Matthew27:5 Kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg møgɑni leenge Kengø, ɑkedhe kɑ ree ngɑbe." 
Matthew27:6 Kɑ ngyënyyɑni kwɑny yi jɑggi ókwër, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Møg bɑ ngyënyyi remø, o bɑ ɑkerø yi Ciggee kinni ge pɑ kïdhi kömi ngyënyyi Kengø.”" 
Matthew27:7 Codhe, ɑlwööb gen, kɑ ngyënyyɑni ngeew pwödhi bødhi lɑ̈b, ɑ́ men yije nyi koony tyëng-ɑ thøw gɑ wëll." 
Matthew27:8 Bene ɑ bɑnge cwølli pwönhɑni ɑ́ ‘Pwödhi Remø,’ pïd dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Matthew27:9 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jermɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen, gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kinni, “Kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g kwɑny yi gen, gen ɑ ngyënyy-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi tyëng Isrɑil gɑ møg ngewii," 
Matthew27:10 kɑ ngyënyyɑni ngeew pwödhi bødhi lɑ̈b, ni kɑ ɑ́ceg yɑn yi Wë.”" 
Matthew27:11 Kɑ Yëso kïdhi bøli modïr, kɑ gø pyëje kinni, “Bene yïn Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud?” Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi yïn ceth.”" 
Matthew27:12 De møg-ɑ ɑ́gøønyii yi jɑggi kwër geki jøgdøngø nuti løøg en. 
Matthew27:13 Aköbbii yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Yï pɑ lïngø ki møg-ɑ gøøny yïn yi gen bënn?”" 
Matthew27:14 De Yëso nuti wöl löggø, kɑ Modïr ceg-ɑ ngɑ̈ngø ki mendwøng." 
Matthew27:15 Kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, Modïr-ɑ jyɑ̈gø ki nyingi mïri Römɑ̀, ɑ́bëëd e nyi göny-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ød mɑg ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel men-ɑ kwøb yi teedø kinni gøny." 
Matthew27:16 Kì bøli kenyɑni ɑ́bëëd e dɑ ɑmɑg me pere ngɑ̈nyi yi teedø bëne, me nyinge cwøl ɑ́ Yëso Bɑrɑbɑ̀." 
Matthew27:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cugi teedø, ɑpyëëj gen yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Á men ɑ dwɑddi yi wun, o gönyɑ wun? Wu dwɑdd-ɑ Yëso Bɑrɑbɑ̀, wɑlɑ̀ Yëso jɑl-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Mesiy?”" 
Matthew27:18 Ábëëd gø ngɑ̈nyi yi en kinni, Yëso ɑ́muujii kɑ ɑter yi jɑggi Yeud." 
Matthew27:19 Kɑ Pilɑtø ödi ki wöödø yi cyëge e nudd e ying-ɑ kej gøny kinni, “Ko di gïn göggí jɑl-ɑ yïe bɑ̈r ni men, mɑ́ pyëwɑ orɑ̈mø yi møg-ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ kipere.”" 
Matthew27:20 Kɑ wɑ̈thi ji pɑng yi jɑggi ókwër geki jøgdøngø kinni cwøl gen Bɑrɑbɑ̀ kì yï Pilɑtø, kɑ Yëso nɑ̈g." 
Matthew27:21 Kɑ teedø pyëj yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Á men kì kelli gen ryeet ɑ dwɑddi yi wun, o gönyɑ wun?” Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Bɑrɑbɑ̀!”" 
Matthew27:22 Aköbbi gen yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, ɑ́ gïn ɑ göggɑ Yëso, jɑl-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Mesiy?” Kɑ ge ólöggø bënn kinni, “Gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw!”" 
Matthew27:23 Kɑ Pilɑtø okööbø kinni, “Á kipe ngø? Á ngø ɑ ɑ́rënye?” Kɑ ge óryeerø ki mendwøng kinni, “Gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw!”" 
Matthew27:24 De kɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Pilɑtø kinni, kwøbbɑni dhɑ̈li, o ɑwøw køm-ɑ tugø, ɑkɑ̈bbe ki pï, kɑ cingge lwøge kì bøli teedø bëne, e okööbø kinni, “Yïɑ bɑ̈r ki remi jɑlɑni; bɑ ngɑn yïe bɑ̈r. Menɑni bɑ gwøøg wun.”" 
Matthew27:25 Kɑ teedø bëne ólöggø kinni, “Wiy reme yinge kömi wøn, wøki nyigi wøn.”" 
Matthew27:26 Codhe, ɑgönye gïn Bɑrɑbɑ̀. Kɑ Yëso mëgge teedø kɑ ɑ́rume pwödø, o gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw." 
Matthew27:27 Kɑ Yëso mɑg yi jøliny Pilɑtø, kɑ gø kïdhi gen ódɑ̈r-ɑ dwøng, kɑ tyeeg dïdyërø yi kɑtïbɑ̀ bëne." 
Matthew27:28 Kɑ lɑne luny wɑ̈g yi gen, kɑ gø rug gen ki pɑrø mɑ ɑ́cwïcwïl." 
Matthew27:29 Kɑ ge okɑ̈dø ki yɑ̈ɑ̈r koodh, kɑ bødh wïje, kɑ cingi kyëje cïbi ki obej. Kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bøle, ge gɑgg-ɑ gøn kinni, “Wø mɑl-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud.”" 
Matthew27:30 Kɑ köme nguddi gen ki lɑ́ɑ̀w, kɑ obej kwɑny yi gen, kɑ Yëso gøj ki wïje." 
Matthew27:31 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki gɑggii, kɑ pɑrø luny wɑ̈g kì ree, ɑruug ge gøn ki ógudhe. Kɑ gø peej gen be gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw." 
Matthew27:32 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi gen wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, ɑrøøm gen ki jɑl megø, mɑ jɑl Serin me cwøl ɑ́ Sɑymøn. Kɑ jɑlɑni cir yi gen kinni byele yɑdh ɑrïw Yëso." 
Matthew27:33 Kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen keny-ɑ nyi cwøl ɑ́ Gölgöthɑ̀, men-ɑ wɑngi kinni, “Kej Cu Wïj.”" 
Matthew27:34 Kɑ gø nëngi gen ki møgi oløg men-ɑ ótolø ki gïjø me keej, de gø ɑ́wɑ̈dhe belø; gø nuti mɑɑdh en." 
Matthew27:35 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, kɑ lɑ̈ne pɑ̈ngi yi gen, ge leng kɑ wél." 
Matthew27:36 Kɑ ge obëëdø kì kenyɑni, ge kor-ɑ gøn." 
Matthew27:37 Kɑ gøny-ɑ́ pere ɑ́kuumii gweed mɑl kinni, “Men bene Yëso Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud.”" 
Matthew27:38 Codhe, ɑguddi gen wɑ̈thi yenh ɑrïw ki ɑ́muddi ji ɑ́ryew, kì bute; ɑ́kyel kì wïj kyëje kí ɑ́kyel kì wïj cɑɑme." 
Matthew27:39 Kɑ nyi gɑg yi ji-ɑ nyi kɑ̈l bute kì yöö, ge lëgg-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen," 
Matthew27:40 kinni, “Yïn ɑ ngɑn-ɑ di dhur Kengø piny, kɑ cigí gerø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g; yiel rií, keløg yï bɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk, kɑ yï bïí piny kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïw.”" 
Matthew27:41 Kɑ gɑg yi jɑggi ókwër kí jøpwönyi Cigg geki jøgdøngø ni menɑni thyew, kɑ ge okööbø kinni," 
Matthew27:42 “Ji møøgø ɑ́yiele, de dhɑ̈li yieli ree. Keløg e bɑ Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, wiy bëe piny kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, o yïëy yi wɑ." 
Matthew27:43 Jwøk nyii ngɑ̈dhø yi en, wiy gø yiele ɑnɑn, keløg e dwɑdd-ɑ yielii, mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb cem ɑ́ Wɑ̈d Jwøk!”" 
Matthew27:44 Kɑ gwɑddi yi ɑ́muddi ji ni menɑni thyew, gen ɑ jøg-ɑ ɑ́gur wɑ̈thi yenh ɑrïw kyeel ki en." 
Matthew27:45 Kɑ piny ree løge muudhø, cɑg kì sɑɑ̀ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì dicɑ̈ng gïti sɑɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g kì böörø." 
Matthew27:46 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi sɑɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g kì böörø, ɑcwöddi Yëso, e óryeerø kinni, “Elì, Elì, lɑmɑ̀ sɑbɑktɑnì.” Møgɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni, “Jwøgɑ, Jwøgɑ, yïde ɑ wiy yɑn piny?”" 
Matthew27:47 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng ji-ɑ cungi kì kenyɑni ɑkööb gen kinni, “Jɑlɑni cwøll-ɑ Eliyɑ̀.”" 
Matthew27:48 Kɑ jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen órengø, kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki ispwøny, ɑjwɑ̈ɑ̈ge gøn yij møgi oløg me wɑj, kɑ gø gɑ̈ɑ̈ne wïj obej. Kɑ gø tïnge mɑl kinni o cwij yi Yëso." 
Matthew27:49 Kɑ ji møøgø okööbø kinni, “Nëën wɑ, men-ɑ óbëën Eliyɑ̀ be yielii.”" 
Matthew27:50 Kɑ Yëso cig-ɑ ryeerø, ɑmije wɑnge." 
Matthew27:51 Kɑ sitɑrɑ̀ men-ɑ bɑ gëng kì yij Kengø ópyëdø kì dïdyëre, cɑg kì wïje mɑl gïti tyele piny. Kɑ piny onhɑ̈nhø kɑ tuggi kïttì ópyëdø." 
Matthew27:52 Kɑ rörri ji ri gen yieb gen, kɑ jii Jwøk mø gïïr tug kì yij thøø," 
Matthew27:53 kɑ ge bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yethi rörr; kɑ ge lidh yi ji mø gïïr kì kɑɑldwøng, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki dhwödhø kì yij thøø." 
Matthew27:54 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kí kër-ɑ ɑ́kïïr piny yi dhɑbïdh geki deny-ɑ kor Yëso, ɑbwøg gen ki mendwøng, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Jɑlɑni ce ying-ɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk kidyër!”" 
Matthew27:55 Ádɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn mø gïïr, mɑ ɑ́bëëd ge onëënø ge lɑ̈wi kì kenyɑni; tyëngɑni ɑ́lug ɑ bɑng Yëso, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑ Gɑlelì, o ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ gen ɑ kɑ̈llii." 
Matthew27:56 Meerì Mɑgdɑliyɑ̀ kí Meerì meyi Yɑgob geki Yosep, kí meyi wɑ̈ddi Dhebedì, ge ɑ́ying-ɑ kelli gen." 
Matthew27:57 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög piny ki wɑɑng thyënhø, ɑbëën jɑl mɑ jɑlkɑ̈r kì Arimɑthiyɑ̀, me cwøl ɑ́ Yosep, o ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑlbɑng Yëso thyew." 
Matthew27:58 Kɑ jɑlɑni kedh-ɑ yï Pilɑtø be kwɑjji dëël Yëso. Kɑ Pilɑtø ocïgø kinni mëggii. 
Matthew27:59 Kɑ Dhɑnhø kwɑny yi Yosep, kɑ gø kode ki ógødh kor-ɑ yöm." 
Matthew27:60 Kɑ gø cïbe yij bur me nyɑ̈n, men-ɑ ówödø kì yij kït, kɑ kït me dwøng ngyeele dhø burɑni, kɑ ókedhø." 
Matthew27:61 De Meerì Mɑgdɑliyɑ̀ kí Meerì men-ɑ kyeelø, ge ɑ́bëëd ɑ piny ge rwöm ki rörɑni." 
Matthew27:62 Kɑ jɑggi ókwër geki Jøpɑresì kedh-ɑ be yïddø ki Pilɑtø, dhuki kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth." 
Matthew27:63 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Jɑldwøng, møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi jɑlɑni keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde e onëënø ɑ́pɑr yi wøn; ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Yɑ ódhwödh kì yij thøø kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g.’" 
Matthew27:64 De muuj ki cigg kinni koor röre kidøøj gïti keny-ɑ óthumi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, kipe jøbɑnge óbï kɑ dële kwɑl yi gen, kɑ teedø köbbi gen kinni, ‘Ádwöög wɑ̈g kì yij thøø.’ Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n kì tyeli mɑl, lod yi møg-ɑ óbï kì cyɑ̈n.”" 
Matthew27:65 Aköbbi gen yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Kɑ̈bbi wun ki jøg mø kurø, kɑ kenyɑni kor kidøøj.”" 
Matthew27:66 Akedh gen, kɑ dhø rörø mul kidøøj, ɑwïy gen ki jøg korii." 
Matthew28:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø, ɑkedh Meerì Mɑgdɑliyɑ̀ geki Meerì men-ɑ kyeelø kì mwøl ceth, ge kedh-ɑ be lidhi rörø." 
Matthew28:2 Kɑ piny onhɑ̈nhø ki mendwøng, e wëywöni Wë obëënø, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, kɑ kït ngyeele wɑ̈ye, kɑ pëgg-ɑ kömi gøn." 
Matthew28:3 Ánënni e ceg-ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dø ni loodh mɑl, o ógødhe tɑr ni ɑ́piy." 
Matthew28:4 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ kurø obwøgø yi gøn, kɑ dëlli gen okïïrø, kɑ ge nɑ tyëngthøø." 
Matthew28:5 Aköbbi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn yi wëywödø kinni, “Wu ko böggi, mɑ́ yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, wu yɑb-ɑ Yëso, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw." 
Matthew28:6 Tøøk kì keny; ɑ́dhwödh kì yij thøø ni kɑ ɑ́kööbe. Bïu, lidhu keny-ɑ́ yije ɑ́di en." 
Matthew28:7 Jwɑnu kedhø, kɑ jøbɑnge köbbu kinni, ‘Ádhwödh kì yij thøø, de ɑ́møøl bøli wun; ɑ́kedhi Gɑlelì, ólidh yi wun kì kunɑni.’ Wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl ki møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun.”" 
Matthew28:8 Kɑ ge jwɑn-ɑ dhwödhø kì buti rörø, ge óböggø, o pëthi gen med cɑrø, kɑ ge reng-ɑ be köbbi wöönɑni jøbɑnge." 
Matthew28:9 Arøøm gen ki Yëso, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wu óbëëdø ki mër.” Akedhi tyëngɑni yïe, kɑ tyelle mɑg gen, kɑ mɑl yi gen." 
Matthew28:10 Codhe, ɑköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Wu ko böggi, de köbbu nyiimïɑ, kinni kedhi gen Gɑlelì, yɑ ólidh yi gen kì kunɑni.”" 
Matthew28:11 De kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn dwöög-ɑ kɑɑl, kwï jøg-ɑ ɑ́kor rörø ɑ́jwɑni, kɑ jɑggi ókwër köbbi gen gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb bënn." 
Matthew28:12 Kɑ jɑggi ókwër ócugø kì kej ɑ́kyel geki jøgdøngø, kɑ dhøggi gen nywɑg gen. Kɑ jøliny thödhi yi gen ki ngyëny mø gïïr," 
Matthew28:13 kɑ gï köbbi gen kinni, “Köbbu teedø kinni, ‘Jøbɑnge bëënø kì wɑ̈r, kɑ dële kwɑl yi gen wø onenø.’" 
Matthew28:14 De keløg kwøbbɑni ólïngi yi modïr, wïje ópɑng yi wøn, o bongii gïn lïngø kì pëthi wun.”" 
Matthew28:15 Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny ngyëny yi gen, kɑ ge ogöögø ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi gen ceth. Kɑ kwøbbɑni otɑyø kì kelli Yeud, o ge nudd ge okømmø gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Matthew28:16 Kɑ jøbɑnge, gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel, kedh-ɑ Gɑlelì wïj kït, kun-ɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi Yëso." 
Matthew28:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi gen, ɑmɑlii yi gen, ngö kwï gen yethi gen ópyërø." 
Matthew28:18 Abëën Yëso yï gen, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́rum ki mëggi tegø bëne kì mɑl kí piny." 
Matthew28:19 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, kedhu yï ji kì kömi piny bëne, kɑ ge gwøg wun gɑ jiɑ, kɑ ge jwɑ̈ɑ̈g wun ki nyingi Wïy kí Wɑ̈d kí Wëykwërø," 
Matthew28:20 kɑ ge pwönyi wun ki mïdhi møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ wun bënn. O yɑ óbëëdø kì kelli wun ceth kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn gïti thumi piny.” 
Mark1:1 Men bene Wöndøj mi Yëso Mesiy Wɑ̈d Jwøk. 
Mark1:2 Ácɑ̈gi ni kɑ ógwedii kì yij wɑ̈nyi Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng kinni, “Jwøk ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Jɑlwöönɑ óörɑ bølí o tyenye yuuí.’" 
Mark1:3 Dɑ cwɑg mø cwöddi kì yij pɑ̈l kinni, ‘Tyenyu yöö kipe Wë, kɑ yëthe gwøg wun gɑ óbödh.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g ɑ́cwöb kì yij pɑ̈l e jwɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ ji, o ópwönyø kinni yewi ji kipe lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi orøg." 
Mark1:5 Kɑ tyëng myërri Yeudiyɑ̀ kí tyëng Yerusɑlem bënn nyi kedh-ɑ pɑ̈l yïe, kɑ gï nyi jwɑ̈ɑ̈ge kì Nɑm Urdun, ge töng-ɑ orøøg gen." 
Mark1:6 Jøn ɑ́rug-ɑ ógødh men-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø ki yëyyi ɑmɑlø, o wëne bɑ dël, o nyi cɑm-ɑ bɑ̈nyy kí møøw kïc." 
Mark1:7 Kɑ ji nyi köbbe kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ óbï kì bɑngɑ, pëddi döng kibølɑ. Yɑ pɑ døøj ki kuung piny kì bøle kɑ wɑrre pɑ̈ɑ̈dɑ wɑ̈g kì tyelle." 
Mark1:8 Yɑ jwɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ wun ki pï, de wu ójwɑ̈ɑ̈ge kɑ Wëykwërø.”" 
Mark1:9 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni ɑ ɑ́bëën Yëso, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Nɑdhɑreth kì Gɑlelì, kɑ jwɑ̈ɑ̈g yi Jøn kì Nɑm Urdun." 
Mark1:10 Kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëne wɑ̈g kì yethi pï, kɑ mɑl lidhe ree yieeb en, o Wëy bï-ɑ piny köme e nɑ ɑkur." 
Mark1:11 Kɑ cwɑg obëënø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl kinni, “Yï bɑ dïl Wɑ̈dɑ. Pyëwɑ med ki yïn.”" 
Mark1:12 Kɑ Yëso kïdhi pɑ̈l yi Wëykwërø. 
Mark1:13 Kɑ obëëdø kì kunɑni ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, e nyii pɑ̈nyø yi Cethɑn. Ábëëd ɑ kelli lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, e okɑ̈llø yi wëywödd." 
Mark1:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Jøn ki kïdhi ød mɑg, ɑkedhi Yëso Gɑlelì, e pwöny-ɑ wöndøj men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk." 
Mark1:15 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Bøli kenyɑni ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, o Pödhi Jwøk ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Wiy wun orøg, kɑ Wöndøj yïëy wun.”" 
Mark1:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh Yëso e ócyɑ̈dhø kì thɑ̈ngi Tɑɑy Gɑlelì, ɑlïdhe ki óyïnnì ɑ́ryew; Sɑymøn geki Andrø ómen, ge ocögø ki bøy." 
Mark1:17 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Bïu bɑngɑ, o wu løgɑ jømɑy ki ji.”" 
Mark1:18 Awiy gen bøyyi gen piny, kɑ ge løg-ɑ bɑnge." 
Mark1:19 Kɑ kɑl-ɑ kedhø, ɑcige lïdhø ki nyiimëëg ɑ́ryew møøgø; Yɑgob geki Jøn wɑ̈ddi Dhebedì. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge pyël-ɑ bøyy kì yij yɑ̈ɑ̈y gen." 
Mark1:20 Acwøle gïn, kɑ wïyi gen Dhebedì wiy gen yij morkɑb, geki jøg-ɑ bɑ ɑkïr. Kɑ ge løg-ɑ bɑng Yëso." 
Mark1:21 Akedhi gen kɑɑl Kɑpernɑum. Kɑ Yëso kedh-ɑ sinɑgøg kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth geki jøbɑnge, kɑ ócɑ̈gø ki pwönyø." 
Mark1:22 Kɑ teen-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møge ongɑ̈ngø yi pwönye, mɑ́ e pɑ pwönyi ni jøpwönyi Cigg; de ɑ́pwönyi kɑ tegø." 
Mark1:23 Kɑ jɑl me ree di wëy me rɑj kedh-ɑ sinɑgøg, ɑcɑ̈ge ryeerø kinni," 
Mark1:24 “Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth, yïde ki wøn? Yï ɑ́bï-ɑ be nɑ̈gi wøn? Yï ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn; yï bɑ Ngeti Kwërø men-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Jwøk!”" 
Mark1:25 Kɑ wëyɑni köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Kud, kɑ yï bïí wɑ̈g kì ree!”" 
Mark1:26 Kɑ jɑlɑni tyelli yi wëyɑni, ɑryeere kɑ bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ree." 
Mark1:27 Kɑ teedø ongɑ̈ngø bënn, ɑpyënyi gen ri gen kinni, “Men bɑ ngø? Ceg bëëdø ɑ́ pwönyø me nyɑ̈n! Jɑɑl yïe dɑ tegø men köbbe wëyrijjø, kɑ dhøge lïngi yi gen!”" 
Mark1:28 Kɑ per Yëso jwɑn-ɑ tɑɑy yethi myërri modïri Gɑlelì bënn. 
Mark1:29 Adhwödh Yëso kì sinɑgøg geki jøbɑnge; Yɑgob kí Jøn, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ gøl yɑɑ Sɑymøn geki Andrø." 
Mark1:30 Øri Sɑymøn, meyi cyëge, ɑ́bëëd e buud-ɑ piny yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dële, o dële lëëdh. Kɑ pere köbbi Yëso." 
Mark1:31 Akedhi Yëso yïe, kɑ cinge mɑge, ɑkønye gøn ki dhwödhi mɑl. Akwööj dëël ngɑnɑni, kɑ kedh-ɑ be kɑ̈lli gen." 
Mark1:32 Kì thyënhø cɑ̈ng rum buddø, kɑ tyëng-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø geki møg-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen di ɑ́nɑ̈gø muuj Yëso bënn." 
Mark1:33 Kɑ tyëng kɑɑlɑni bënn ócugø kì dhø gølɑni. 
Mark1:34 Kɑ ji mø gïïr, mø dëlli gen rɑ̈mø yi gïg mø bɑ̈nni yiele. Kɑ wëyrijjø mø ngenyø ryëëme wɑ̈g. Kɑ wëyrijjø møgɑni kyëdde kinni, ge ko kööb, mɑ́ e ngɑ̈nyi yi gen." 
Mark1:35 Kɑ Yëso odhwödhø kì kɑɑl dhuki kì mwøl, e cɑ̈ng nuti tuulø. Kɑ kedh-ɑ kun mɑlle Jwøk e kete." 
Mark1:36 Kɑ Sɑymøn geki jøg-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi gen kedh-ɑ be yɑbii. 
Mark1:37 Ayod ge gøn, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Dhɑnhø bëne yɑb-ɑ yïn.”" 
Mark1:38 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedhi wɑ yethi myërr-ɑ bølee, o yɑ pwönyɑ kì kɑ̈jjɑni thyew, mɑ́ bene per møgɑni ɑ ɑ́bëënɑ.”" 
Mark1:39 Kɑ myërri Gɑlelì tyëge bënn, e ópwönyø kì sinɑgøgg. Kɑ wëyrijjø nyi ryeeme wɑ̈g kì ri ji." 
Mark1:40 Kɑ jɑl me ree di lɑ̈y bï-ɑ yï Yëso, ɑbøødhe ree piny kì bøle, kɑ gø kwɑjje kinni, “Ke dwɑddií, yɑ ócuggø gwøgø yi yïn o yɑ dhïwɑ.”" 
Mark1:41 Kɑ Yëso yije óywöngø kipe jɑlɑni, ɑrïje cinge, kɑ gø nywɑle, codhe ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Di dwɑddø yi yɑn, wiy dëlí dönye.”" 
Mark1:42 Kɑ lɑ̈y ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì ree, kɑ dële ódönyø." 
Mark1:43 Acem wɑɑng jɑlɑni ki mendwøng yi Yëso, kɑ gø jwɑne ki ör yöö;" 
Mark1:44 kɑ ɑ́rume köbbii kinni, “Ko di ngɑn köbbi yi yïn, de kedh, kɑ rií nyudhí ókwërø. Kɑ yï muuj ki gëëdhi kipe kɑ ɑ́dönyi dëlí ni møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi Mosɑ̀, ɑ́ nyuudhi kì bøli teedø.”" 
Mark1:45 De jɑlɑni ɑ́kedh e kømm-ɑ kwøbbɑni kì kɑ̈jj bënn. Kɑ Yëso ódhɑ̈lø cyɑ̈dhø kì yethi myërr, de ɑ́bëëd ɑ pɑ̈l. Kɑ ji bënn nyi kedh-ɑ yïe, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kɑ̈jj mø gïïr." 
Mark2:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg Yëso Kɑpernɑum, kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng mø nøg, ɑlïngi pere yi teedø kinni, i ying-ɑ kɑl." 
Mark2:2 Kɑ ji ócugø ge gïïr, kɑ kɑl opɑ̈ngø gïti dhøge. Kɑ gï pwönye ki kwøbbi Jwøk." 
Mark2:3 Kɑ ji møøgø bï-ɑ yïe ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ jɑl me dële dwɑnyø, e otyëddø yi ji ɑ́ngwen." 
Mark2:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhɑɑl gen yi wɑ̈dhi buti Yëso yi ngenyi ji, ɑyedhi gen wïj óthɑɑng ød, kɑ keny-ɑ rwöm ki Yëso pɑ̈d yi gen. Codhe ɑluudh gen jɑl-ɑ dële dwɑnyø piny ki pyëne." 
Mark2:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh yïëyi gen yi Yëso, ɑköbbe jɑl-ɑ dële dwɑnyø kinni, “Wɑ̈dɑ, lɑ́ɑ̀w ɑ́dwöög piny kipe orøgí.”" 
Mark2:6 Kɑ kwï jøpwönyi Cigg møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kenyɑni orumø ki pëthi gen kinni," 
Mark2:7 “Ede jɑlɑni ɑ kööbe kinøw? Men bɑ bwöli nyingi Jwøk! Pɑth ki Jwøk kete ɑ cuggi dwöögi lɑ́ɑ̀w piny kipe orøg?” 
Mark2:8 De møg-ɑ rømmi yi gen ki pëthi gen ɑ́yod yi Yëso, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Wude ɑ rum wun kinøw ki pëthi wun?" 
Mark2:9 Á ngø ɑ yöd? Köbbi ɑdwɑny kinni, ‘Lɑ́ɑ̀w ɑ́dwöög piny kipe orøgí,’ wɑlɑ̀ köbbe kinni, ‘Dhwöödh, kwɑny pyëní, kɑ yï kedh’?" 
Mark2:10 De wu ónyudhɑ kinni Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø yïe dɑ tegø kì kömi piny, men dwööge lɑ́ɑ̀w piny kipe orøg.” Aköbbe ɑdwɑny kinni," 
Mark2:11 “Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn, dhwöödh, bɑn pyëní, kɑ yï kedhí gølí.”" 
Mark2:12 Adhwödh jɑlɑni kɑ pyëne bɑne, ɑkedhe wɑ̈g e onennø yi teedø bëne. Kɑ teedø ongɑ̈ngø ki mendwøng, kɑ Jwøk lejji gen, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Wø nuti wöl lïdhø ki gïn ni men!”" 
Mark2:13 Kɑ Yëso døøg-ɑ kömi Tɑɑy Gɑlelì. Kɑ ji mø gïïr ócugø kì bute, kɑ gï pwönye." 
Mark2:14 Kɑ ɑ́dhwödhe kì kenyɑni, ɑlidhe Leebì wɑ̈d Alpɑ̀, e obëëdø kì kej gwɑ̈j. Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Bïí bɑngɑ.” Adhwödhe, kɑ løg-ɑ bɑnge." 
Mark2:15 Yëso ɑ́bëëd e ocyɑ̈mø kì gøl Leebì geki jøbɑnge, kí jøgwɑ̈j geki luuy møg-ɑ ɑ́lugi kì bɑnge." 
Mark2:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi jøpwönyi Cigg møg-ɑ bɑ Jøpɑresì kinni, Yëso onywɑ̈gø geki luuy kí jøgwɑ̈j, ɑköbbi gen jøbɑnge kinni, “Ede ɑ nywɑ̈ge ki jøgwɑ̈j geki luuy?”" 
Mark2:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Yëso, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ dëlli gen yööd bong ɑkïm me nyi dwɑddi yi gen, dɑ́ tyëng-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø ɑ nyi dwɑddi ɑkïm. Yɑ nuti bëën-ɑ be cwøli tyëngdøj den-ɑ́ tyëngorøg.”" 
Mark2:18 Jøbɑng Jøn geki Jøpɑresì ɑ́bëëd ge othuumø. Kɑ ji møøgø bï-ɑ yï Yëso, kɑ gø pyëj gen kinni, “Gede jøbɑng Jøn geki Jøpɑresì ɑ nyi thuum gen, o jøbɑngí pɑ nyi thuumø?”" 
Mark2:19 Kɑ mø gen løøg yi Yëso kinni, “Jønywöm pɑ nyi thuumø e jɑlnywöm nud kì kelli gen. Ge pɑ cuggi thuumø." 
Mark2:20 De cyɑ̈ng megø óbï; eni cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l jɑlnywöm kì kelli gen, codhe o ge óthuum gen cyee." 
Mark2:21 “Bong ngɑn nyi buul ógødh me bɑ kwɑ̈ɑ̈l ki ógødh me nyɑ̈n, kipe ógønh-ɑ nyɑ̈n ree óruude wɑ̈g kì ri kwɑ̈ɑ̈lɑni kɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́buul ópëddø lɑ̈nyyø." 
Mark2:22 O bong ngɑn nyi kïdhi møgi oløg me nyɑ̈n yethi ɑthebb mø kɑ̈gi gen dööng, kipe ɑthebbɑni ópyëëd, kɑ møngɑni ogɑ̈gø geki ɑthebbɑni. De møng-ɑ nyɑ̈n nyi kïdh-ɑ yethi ɑthebb mø nyɑ̈n.”" 
Mark2:23 Kɑ Yëso cør-ɑ yethi pwödh geki jøbɑnge, kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. Kɑ jøbɑnge omödø ki byel, ge kedh ge ócyɑ̈dhø." 
Mark2:24 Kɑ Yëso köbbi yi Jøpɑresì kinni, “Lidh jøbɑngí! Gede ɑ göög gen ki gïn-ɑ bɑ ɑkerø gwøgø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth?”" 
Mark2:25 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Wu nuti pɑ̈nyi rɑng ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Debïd kɑ ɑ́jɑde ki gïn cɑ̈mme kɑ̈j geki jøg-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki en?" 
Mark2:26 Kí kɑ ɑ́kedhe ød Jwøk, kɑ ópùn-ɑ bɑ gëëdhi cɑm gen, e nyi cɑm-ɑ yi ókwër keti gen? Møgɑni nuti cwöbø ɑ́ Abiyɑthɑr ɑ bɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng?”" 
Mark2:27 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth ɑ́gwøg kɑ per dhɑnhø, de dhɑnhø nuti cwɑ̈jø kɑ per Sɑbɑth." 
Mark2:28 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø bɑ Wïi Sɑbɑth.”" 
Mark3:1 Codhe, ɑkedhi Yëso sinɑgøg. O ɑ́dɑ jɑl me cinge dhëgø kì kenyɑni." 
Mark3:2 Kenyɑni ɑ́dɑ ji mɑ ɑ́nennii, ying jɑlɑni ódi yielø yi en kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, kipe kinni o gø gøøny gen." 
Mark3:3 Kɑ jɑl-ɑ cinge dhëgø köbbe kinni, “Dhwöödh kɑ yï bïí cungí kì dïdyër.”" 
Mark3:4 Kɑ teedø pyëje kinni, “Á gïn ɑ bɑ ɑyïëy yi Ciggee kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, gwøgi gïndøj wɑlɑ̀ gïnrɑj? Yieli dhɑnhø wɑlɑ̀ nɑ̈gii?” Kɑ ri gen dhïïg gen." 
Mark3:5 Kɑ owïïdø ki nënnø kì kelli gïn, e ómɑgø yi liny, o yije orɑ̈mø kipe tegi wɑ̈thi gen. Aköbbe jɑl-ɑ cinge dhëgø kinni, “Rïj cingí.” Kɑ gø rïje, kɑ cinge døøg-ɑ keje." 
Mark3:6 Kɑ Jøpɑresì ókedhø kì sinɑgøg, kɑ dhøggi gen jwɑn gen ki nywɑgø geki jø Ërödøs, kɑ ge oyɑ̈bø ki yöö men nɑ̈g gen Yëso." 
Mark3:7 Kɑ Yëso geki jøbɑnge odhwödhø, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ thɑ̈ngi Tɑɑy Gɑlelì. Kɑ ji mø gïïr løg-ɑ bɑnge, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ myërri Gɑlelì kí Yeudiyɑ̀," 
Mark3:8 kí Yerusɑlem, kí Idumiyɑ̀, kí løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl geki myërr-ɑ buti Suur kí Sïdön. Jiɑni bënn ɑ́bï yï Yëso mɑ́ gïg-ɑ gøgge bënn ɑ́lïngi yi gen." 
Mark3:9 Aköbbe jøbɑnge kinni, yɑ̈bbi ki morkɑb, o cöge e pɑ dhing yi teedø." 
Mark3:10 Ji mø gïïr ɑ́yiele, kɑ tyëng-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø bënn rïjj-ɑ bute, kipe kinni o gø nywɑl gen." 
Mark3:11 Tyëng-ɑ ri gen di wëyrijjø, ri gen nyi bøødh ge’ piny kì bøle, kɑ ge nyii ryeerø kinni, “Yï bɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk!”" 
Mark3:12 Kɑ nyingi gen tie ki cemø, kinni pere ko dwønggi gen." 
Mark3:13 Kɑ Yëso kedh-ɑ wïj kït, kɑ jøg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑdde cwøle. Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yïe," 
Mark3:14 ɑkɑ̈bbe ki pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, kɑ gï cɑge gɑ tyëngwöödø, møg cyɑ̈dhi ki en, o gï nyi öre be pwönyø." 
Mark3:15 O yï gen dɑ tegø men ryëmmi gen ki wëyrijjø. 
Mark3:16 Jøgɑni gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew bɑ Sɑymøn ɑ ɑ́cɑg yi Yëso ɑ́ Pïtør," 
Mark3:17 kí wɑ̈ddi Dhebedì, Yɑgob geki Jøn ómen, gen ɑ ɑ́cɑg yi en gɑ Wɑ̈ddi Pööd Mɑl." 
Mark3:18 Kí Andrø, kí Pïlïp, kí Bɑrthølømɑøs, kí Mɑthyëw, kí Tömɑs, kí Yɑgob wɑ̈d Alpɑ̀, kí Thɑdeøs, kí Sɑymøn Lunø," 
Mark3:19 kí Yeudɑ̀ jɑl Iskɑryøt, ɑ ɑ́ngeew Yëso." 
Mark3:20 Kɑ Yëso kedh-ɑ pɑɑ gen. Kɑ teedø ódøøgø cugø, kɑ Yëso ójɑ̈ddø ki keny cyɑ̈me geki jøbɑnge." 
Mark3:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi wɑdde, ɑkedhi gen be mɑgii, mɑ́ kwï ji ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wïje ɑ́mɑg yi ɑ́nɑ̈gø!”" 
Mark3:22 Kwï jøpwönyi Cigg møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Yerusɑlem ɑ́bëëd ge okööbø kinni, “Ree dɑ Bɑɑldhebul! Bɑ jɑngi wëyrijjø ɑ nëngii ki teng-ɑ ryemme wëyrijjø.”" 
Mark3:23 Codhe, ɑcwøøl teedø yi Yëso. Kɑ gï köbbe ki gɑ́j kinni, “Cethɑn ócuggø ryemi Cethɑn kidï?" 
Mark3:24 Keløg pödhø ópyëdø, kɑ ónyïɑ̈ggø ki ree kete, pönhɑni ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Mark3:25 O keløg kɑl ópyëdø, gølɑni ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Mark3:26 O keløg pödhi Cethɑn ónyïɑ̈ggø ki ree, pɑ cuggi bëëdø; ceg-ɑ dɑ̈ngø kɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Mark3:27 “O bong ngɑn cuggi kedhi gøl jɑl me teg be yɑgi jɑmme, e jɑlkɑl nuti twööj en møti; codhe o gøle yɑge cyee." 
Mark3:28 “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, lɑ́ɑ̀w ódwöög piny kipe orøøg teedø bëne, geki kwøbb-ɑ rijjø møg-ɑ nyi kømmi yi gen bënn." 
Mark3:29 De ngɑn-ɑ nyi kööbø kì ri Wëykwërø ki kwøb mø rijjø, lɑ́ɑ̀w pɑ dwöög piny kipere, de orøge óying köme gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Mark3:30 (Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi Yëso kipe kɑ ɑ́kööb kwï teedø kinni, “Ree dɑ wëy me rɑj.”)" 
Mark3:31 Kɑ meyi Yëso geki nyiimen yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw obëënø. Kɑ ge ócungø kì wɑ̈g, ɑöd gen, ge cwøl-ɑ gøn." 
Mark3:32 Kɑ Yëso köbbi yi teen-ɑ bëëdø kì bute kinni, “Lidh, meyí kí nyiimyëw ge ying-ɑ wɑ̈g, ge cwøll-ɑ yïn.”" 
Mark3:33 Kɑ ólöggø kinni, “Meyɑ kí nyiimïɑ ɑ́ møg?”" 
Mark3:34 Alïïdhe ri tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì bute, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Meyɑ kí nyiimïɑ ek!" 
Mark3:35 Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ nyi gwøg gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk, bene en ɑ bɑ ómïɑ, kí nyimïɑ, kí meyɑ.”" 
Mark4:1 Kɑ Yëso ócɑ̈gø pwönyø ki thɑ̈ngi Tɑɑy Gɑlelì. Kɑ dhing yi ji mø gïïr, ɑkɑdhe yij morkɑb, kɑ pëgg-ɑ yije kì nɑm. De teedø bëne ying-ɑ thɑ̈ngi nɑm kì wɑ̈g." 
Mark4:2 Kɑ gï pwönye ki kwøb mø gïïr kì yethi gɑ́j. Kɑ gï köbbe kì yij pwönye kinni," 
Mark4:3 “Lïng wun! Jɑl megø ɑ́kedhi be wïïwø ki köödh. 
Mark4:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wïïwe, kɑ kwï köödh dëëm-ɑ tøg yöö. Abëën winy, kɑ gï cɑm gen." 
Mark4:5 Kɑ köödh møøgø dëëm-ɑ keny mɑ kïttì, me lɑ̈bø reeb kì köme. Kɑ ge jwɑn-ɑ twïyø, yi kɑ̀ reb lɑ̈bø." 
Mark4:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yer cɑ̈ng, ɑrɑ̈bbi gen, kɑ ge othwøwø yi kɑ̀ bëëd ge bong byerri gen." 
Mark4:7 Kɑ kwï köödh dëëm-ɑ kelli koodh. Kɑ koodh ódøngø, kɑ byel twij yi koodh, kɑ ge ocögø ge pɑ kɑ̈ni ki nying." 
Mark4:8 Kɑ köödh møøgø dëëm-ɑ yij lɑ̈bø me med, keny-ɑ ɑ́twïy gen kɑ ge ódøngø, kɑ kwï gen ókɑ̈nø ki nying pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ møøgø ókɑ̈nø ki pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, kɑ møøgø ókɑ̈nø ki miyø.”" 
Mark4:9 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Ngɑn di yïthhe mø lïnge, wiy lïnge.”" 
Mark4:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dɑ̈ngi Yëso ki teedø, ɑkwɑjjii yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lugi kì bɑnge, kí tyëngwöödø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, kinni lwøbe gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gɑ́jɑni." 
Mark4:11 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Bene wun ɑ ɑ́nëngi ki ngɑ̈nyi wøw ki møg-ɑ nuti nyodhø kipe Pödhi Jwøk. De tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈g kwøb bënn lïngi yi gen ɑ yethi gɑ́j," 
Mark4:12 kipe kinni, ‘Ge ónëënø, kɑ ge onëënø, de bong gïn lidh yi gen; ge ólïngø, kɑ ge olïngø de kwøbbɑni pɑ gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen. Mɑ́ ke yod gen møgɑni, ge døøg-ɑ kö Jwøk, kɑ lɑɑwe di dwøøge piny kipe gïn.’ ”" 
Mark4:13 Kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gɑ́jɑni nuti yood wun? O gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gɑ́j bënn óyod yi wun kidï?" 
Mark4:14 Ngɑn-ɑ wïïwø pidh-ɑ wööni Jwøk. 
Mark4:15 Kwï ji nɑ köödh møg-ɑ ɑ́dëëm tøg yöö; kwøbbi Jwøk nyii lïngø yi gen, kɑ kwøbbɑni nyi jwɑn ki gwɑ̈ɑ̈r wɑ̈g yi Cethɑn kì pëthi gen." 
Mark4:16 Kwï ji nɑ köödh-ɑ ɑ́dëëm keny-ɑ bɑ kïttì; kenyi lïngi gen kwøbbi Jwøk, gï nyi jwɑn yi gen kɑ yïëyø ki medi pëëth." 
Mark4:17 De kwøbbɑni pɑ nyi niyeeng pëthi gen, o ge pɑ nyi mɑ̈gi kì ri gen. O kenyi bëën ɑkørr wɑlɑ̀ guudi nying, ge nyi jwɑn-ɑ døøg cyɑ̈n." 
Mark4:18 Kwï ji nɑ köödh-ɑ ɑ́dëëm kelli koodh; kwøbbi Jwøk nyii lïngø yi gen ceth," 
Mark4:19 de ge nyii tyɑmø yi ɑkørri kömi piny, kí mɑɑri kɑ̈r, kí döngi pëëth, kɑ kwøbbi Jwøk nyi twij yi gïgɑni bënn, kɑ bong-ɑ nywøl mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen." 
Mark4:20 O kwï ji nɑ köödh-ɑ ɑ́dëëm yij lɑ̈m-ɑ med; kwøbbi Jwøk nyii yïëyø yi gen, kɑ gï pwönyi gen tyëng-ɑ kyeelø, kelli gen dɑ møg kɑ̈ni ki nywøl pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ miyø.”" 
Mark4:21 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Lɑ̈mbɑ̈ pɑ nyi kïdhi ød kɑ cïb thɑ ɑ́tɑy, wɑlɑ̀ thɑ nɑngɑreb, de nyi cïb ɑ wïj tɑrɑbedhɑ̀." 
Mark4:22 Gïg-ɑ bɑ ɑkɑnn ókɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g, o gïg-ɑ bɑ ɑkum óyɑl." 
Mark4:23 Ngɑn di yïthhe mø lïnge, wiy lïnge.”" 
Mark4:24 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Nyi rum wun kì ri møg-ɑ lïngi yi wun. Rumi men-ɑ yije nyi muuj yi wun, bɑ en ɑ yije órummi wun, kɑ med thyew." 
Mark4:25 Mɑ́ ngɑn yïe di jɑmmì, møge ómed; o ngɑn jɑdø, cɑgg ɑ́ møg-ɑ nøg kì yïe ókwɑny.”" 
Mark4:26 Kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni, “Pödhi Jwøk nɑ jɑl mɑ ɑ́pidh köödh kì pwödhe." 
Mark4:27 Kɑ nyii buddø kì wɑ̈r, kɑ nyii dhwödhø kì dicɑ̈ng, kɑ köödh møgɑni otwïyø, kedh ge ódøngø, o kër-ɑ døngi gen kwïj yi en." 
Mark4:28 Mɑ́ lɑ̈bø ɑ nyi pidh gen kete, o bɑ thyɑngø ɑ nyi bï møti, o wïj bëe kì bɑnge, codhe o nyingi byel bï gen cyee." 
Mark4:29 Kenyi cyeg byel, jɑlɑni nyi pödh-ɑ ri pɑlø, mɑ́ bøli kej kɑj ɑ́wɑ̈nhi.”" 
Mark4:30 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Pödhi Jwøk pɑ̈ɑ̈r yi wɑ kɑ ngø? Wɑlɑ̀ ónyodh kì ri gɑ́j mɑ ngø?" 
Mark4:31 Pɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑ wɑɑng köödhi kɑrdɑl men-ɑ nyi piidh piny e thiinh cɑrø kibøli köödh bënn kì kömi piny. 
Mark4:32 De kenyi rume ki twïyø, nyii göögø ɑ́ yɑdh me dwøng, e lod-ɑ yenh møøgø ki döng. Kɑ bɑ̈dde nyi peedhe, kɑ winy nyii gëdø kì bɑ̈dde.”" 
Mark4:33 Kɑ gï pwönye ki gɑ́j mø gïïr ni møgɑni, ni kɑ ɑ́cuggi gen ki lïngø." 
Mark4:34 O bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́köbbe gïn e pɑth ki gɑ́j, de møg-ɑ wɑngi yi gɑ́jɑni nyi löbbe’ jøbɑnge kì wɑ̈yi gen." 
Mark4:35 Cyɑ̈ngɑni kì wɑɑng thyënhø, ɑ ɑ́köbbe gïn kinni, “Kedhi wɑ løøng-ɑcɑ̀.”" 
Mark4:36 Kɑ teedø wiy gen. Akɑ̈l gen Yëso kì yij morkɑm-ɑ ɑ́bëëde, e di lwønggø yi morkɑbb møøgø." 
Mark4:37 Kɑ ɑtunø me dwøng ocödø, kɑ ɑpɑgø nyi pɑ̈dh-ɑ yij morkɑb, kɑ morkɑb køm-ɑ pɑ̈ngø yi pï," 
Mark4:38 o Yëso ɑ́bëëd e onenø kì kuni thɑ morkɑb, wïje thɑ̈ɑ̈nh en ki mɑkɑdɑ̀. Kɑ cyëëw yi jøbɑnge, ɑköbbi ge gøn kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, pɑ nenni yi yïn wɑ ceg-ɑ thøø?”" 
Mark4:39 Adhwödh Yëso kɑ yømø cɑ̈wwe, ɑköbbe nɑm kinni, “Cungí! Bëëd mɑ̈ɑ̈dh!” Abed yømø, kɑ piny ceg-ɑ ì dïw ki mendwøng." 
Mark4:40 Kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Wude ɑ böggi wun? Bong yïëyø kì pëthi wun?”" 
Mark4:41 Kɑ ge ongɑ̈ngø ki mendwøng. Kɑ ge okööbø ki ri gen kinni, “Jɑɑl bɑ men, ɑ lïngi dhøge yi yømø geki ɑpɑgø?”" 
Mark5:1 Kɑ Yëso wɑ̈dh-ɑ myërri Gerɑsɑ̀ kì løøg Tɑɑy Gɑlelì geki jøbɑnge. 
Mark5:2 Kì ri kɑdhe piny kì yij morkɑb ceth, kɑ ceg ki pɑɑrø yi jɑl me ree di wëyrijjø." 
Mark5:3 Jɑlɑni nyi bëëd ɑ wɑ̈thi rörri ji kì pɑ̈l, e ceg-ɑ dhɑ̈lø mɑgø ki ɑ́cwecwel." 
Mark5:4 Ábëëd e nyii twöjø ki ɑ́cwecwel tyel mø gïïr, kɑ ɑ́cwecwel nyi cödde kì cingge, kɑ digïddì nyi tørre kì tyelle. O bong ngɑn me teg me nyi dwöög wïje." 
Mark5:5 De nyi bëëd ɑ wɑ̈thi rörri ji kì pɑ̈l geki wɑ̈thi kïttì, e ceg-ɑ ryeerø kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng, kɑ dële nyi kɑgge ki óbɑyyi kïttì." 
Mark5:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe Yëso e lɑ̈wi, ɑrenge yïe, kɑ gø mɑle," 
Mark5:7 ɑryeere ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Yïde ki yɑn, Yëso Wɑ̈d Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng? Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn ki nyingi Jwøk, yɑ ko göjjí orɑng.”" 
Mark5:8 Ákööb kinøw kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Wëyrɑj, bï wɑ̈g kì ri jɑlɑni!”" 
Mark5:9 Kɑ pyëj yi Yëso kinni, “Nyingí ɑ́ men?” Alögge kinni, “Nyingɑ bɑ Yɑy, mɑ́ wø gïïr.”" 
Mark5:10 Kɑ Yëso kwɑjji yi jɑlɑni ki mendwøng, kinni wëyrijjø møgɑni ko ör wɑ̈g kì pönhɑni." 
Mark5:11 Ádɑ dɑɑg kundhøngø me cyɑ̈mø kì wɑɑng ngëdi kït. 
Mark5:12 Kɑ Yëso kwɑjji yi wëyɑni kinni, “Ör wøn kun-ɑ di kundhøngø, kɑ wiy wø kedhi wøn ri gen.”" 
Mark5:13 Kɑ mø gen yïëy yi Yëso. Kɑ wëyrijjø bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ri jɑlɑni, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ ri kundhøngø. Kɑ dɑɑg kundhøngø e kwɑnne bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew, reng-ɑ piny kì wïj gëlø, kɑ ceg-ɑ ì cur kì nɑm, kɑ omudø bëne." 
Mark5:14 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwɑy kundhøngø órengø. Kɑ møgɑni dwøg gen kì kɑɑlɑni geki yethi myërr bënn. Kɑ teedø bï-ɑ be lidhi gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb. 
Mark5:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi gen yï Yëso, kɑ jɑl-ɑ́ ree ɑ́di wëyrijjø yuud gen e obëëdø kì piny, ree dɑ ógødh, o göögø ki dhɑnhø me døøj; kɑ tyëngɑni obwøgø." 
Mark5:16 Kɑ ge löbbi gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb, kì ri jɑl-ɑ́ ree ɑ́di wëyrijjø, kí gïn-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi kundhøngø yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi." 
Mark5:17 Kɑ Yëso kwɑjji yi gen kinni dhwödhe kì pödhi gen. 
Mark5:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh Yëso e kɑdh-ɑ yij morkɑb, ɑkwɑjjii yi jɑl-ɑ́ ree ɑ́di wëyrijjø kinni, “Wiy yɑ kedhɑ ki yïn!”" 
Mark5:19 Akyëëd Yëso, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Kedhí pɑɑ wun yï wɑddi wun, kɑ ge köbbí gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi yïn yi Wë, kí kɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe ki yïn.”" 
Mark5:20 Akedhe, kɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yëso kipere kwøb yi en kì yethi kɑ̈dd-ɑ pyɑ̈rø. Kɑ ji ongɑ̈ngø bënn." 
Mark5:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg Yëso løøgø ki morkɑb, kɑ ji mø gïïr ócugø kì bute kì thɑ̈ngi nɑm." 
Mark5:22 Kɑ jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jɑggi sinɑgøg me cwøl ɑ́ Yɑyrøs, bï-ɑ yï Yëso. Kɑ ree bøødhe piny kì bøle." 
Mark5:23 Kɑ gø kwɑjje ki mendwøng kinni, “Nyɑrɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki thøø. Bïí, thɑɑny cinggí köme, o dële dönye, o bødhe.”" 
Mark5:24 Akedhe geki jɑlɑni. Kɑ teedø mø gïïr løg-ɑ bɑnge, kɑ dhing yi ji." 
Mark5:25 Ádɑ ngɑndhɑjø me ree cyɑ̈dhi yi wɑɑnø ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. 
Mark5:26 Ánëngi ki yɑdh yi ɑkïmm mø gïïr, kɑ jɑmme tyëge ki muujø de ɑ́dhɑ̈li dönyø, o dële ɑ́kedh e ceg-ɑ rënyø." 
Mark5:27 Per Yëso lïng en, codhe ɑkedhe bɑnge kɑ rïjj-ɑ kelli teedø." 
Mark5:28 Mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb ki pyëwe kinni, “Cɑgg yɑ nywɑl ógødhe yøw, yɑ bɑ men dönyi.”" 
Mark5:29 Kɑ ógødhe nywɑle, ɑcungi wɑɑnø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth; kɑ gø yode kinni dële ɑ́yöni." 
Mark5:30 Kɑ yod yi Yëso kinni, dɑ tegø me kedhø kì ree, ɑluge ree teedø, kɑ ópëjjø kinni, “Á men ɑ ɑ́nywɑl ógødhɑ?”" 
Mark5:31 Aköbbii yi jøbɑnge kinni, “Nenni yi yïn yï bɑ ɑdhing yi teedø, o yï pëjj-ɑ́ɑ̀ dï kinni, ɑ́ men ɑ ɑ́nywɑl yïn?”" 
Mark5:32 De ɑ́cög e oyɑ̈bø ki wɑnge kì kelli teedø, e yɑb-ɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg gïnɑni." 
Mark5:33 Abëën ngɑnɑni e óböggø, o dële okïïrø, kɑ ɑ́yode gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg kipere. Abøødhe ree piny kì bøle, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kidyër, kwøb yi en bënn." 
Mark5:34 Kɑ ngɑnɑni köbbe kinni, “Nyɑrɑ, yï ɑ́yiel yi yïëyí. Kedh ki mër, o yï pɑ cigi mɑgø yi gïnɑni.”" 
Mark5:35 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd e okööbø, ɑbëën ji møøgø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ gøl jɑngi sinɑgøg, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Nyɑrí ɑ́thøw. Yïde ɑ nudd yï jud-ɑ Jɑlpwönyø?”" 
Mark5:36 De møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi gen ɑ́wøy yi Yëso, kɑ jɑngi sinɑgøg köbbe kinni, “Yï ko böggi, de ceg yïëyø.”" 
Mark5:37 Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́yïëye ki løg bɑnge kɑl, den-ɑ́ Pïtør kí Yɑgob kí Jøn ómï Yɑgob keti gen, ɑ ɑ́wëgge kedhi kɑl ki en." 
Mark5:38 Kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen dhø gøl Yɑyrøs, ji ɑ́yuud gen ge ceg-ɑ wøwø, o ge ceg-ɑ ywøg." 
Mark5:39 Akedhe kɑl, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wude ɑ wøw wun wu óywöngø? Nyɑnthinh nuti thøø, de ceg-ɑ nenø.”" 
Mark5:40 Kɑ gɑggi yi gen, kɑ gï ryeeme wɑ̈g bënn. Acwøle wïyi nyɑnɑni geki meye, kí jøbɑnge gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ øn-ɑ di dhɑnhø." 
Mark5:41 Kɑ nyɑnthinh mɑge kì cinge. Aköbbe gøn kinni, “Tɑlithɑ̀ koomì,” Møgɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni, “Nyɑnthinh, dhwöödh!”" 
Mark5:42 Adhwödhi nyɑnɑni mɑl kì bøli kenyɑni ceth. Kɑ ócyɑ̈dhø, mɑ́ runne bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. Kɑ teedø ceg-ɑ ngɑ̈ngø ki mendwøng." 
Mark5:43 De ge ɑ́kyëddi yi Yëso kinni ko di ngɑn köbbi yi gen. Akööbe kinni, “Nëngu nyɑnthinh ki gïncɑm.”" 
Mark6:1 Kɑ Yëso odhwödhø kì kenyɑni, kɑ kedh-ɑ pɑɑ gen. Kɑ jøbɑnge løg-ɑ bɑnge." 
Mark6:2 Kɑ ócɑ̈gø pwönyø kì sinɑgøg kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. Kɑ ji mø gïïr møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbe ongɑ̈ngø, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Jɑɑl kɑ̈n-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny ki kwøb møg bënn? O peli wïj men bɑ ngø, o göög ɑ dï ki gïïngɑ̈ngø?" 
Mark6:3 Pɑth ki bødhi pɑ̈mmì, wɑ̈d Meerì, ɑ bɑ ómï Yɑgob kí Yosep kí Yeudɑ̀ kí Sɑymøn, o nyiimen pɑ bëëd ɑ kellee kì pɑɑn?” Kɑ pëthi gen órënyø ki en." 
Mark6:4 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Jøtöng nyi ceg kɑ wørø kì kɑ̈jj bënn, de ge nyi bɑny-ɑ yi tyëng pɑɑ gen geki wɑddi gen.”" 
Mark6:5 Kɑ Yëso ódhɑ̈lø gwøg ki gïïngɑ̈ngø kì kenyɑni, dɑ́ cingge ɑ ɑ́thɑɑnye kömi kwï tyëng-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø, kɑ gï yiele." 
Mark6:6 Kɑ ceg-ɑ ngɑ̈ngø yi nøgi yïëyø mi gen. Kɑ Yëso ókedhø e kɑ̈ll-ɑ yethi myërr e ópwönyø. 
Mark6:7 Kɑ jøbɑnge gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew cwøøle yïe. Kɑ gï öre bënn, gɑ ɑ́ryew, ɑ́ryew. Kɑ gï thödhe ki tegø kì kömi wëyrijjø." 
Mark6:8 Kɑ gï cege kinni, “Kɑ̀ kedh wun, kɑ̈lli dhɑnhø lodh kete; wu ko kɑ̈ddi ki gïncɑm, wu ko kɑ̈ddi ki beg, kɑ wu ko kɑ̈ddi ki ngyëny kì yethi jyebbi wun." 
Mark6:9 Cyɑ̈dhi wun ki wɑrr-ɑ tyelli wun, de dhɑnhø ko kɑ̈ddi ki ógødh megø.”" 
Mark6:10 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Bëëd wun kì gøl-ɑ yije ócwøøl wun, pïd keny-ɑ ódhwödh wun kì kenyɑni." 
Mark6:11 Keløg e dɑ keny megø men-ɑ óbɑɑny wun, kɑ mø wun bɑny ki lïngø yi tyëng-ɑ kenyɑni, keny-ɑ ódhwödh wun kì kenyɑni, kɑ tør teng wun kì tyelli wun, e bɑ ngɑ̈ji gen kipe cɑ́y-ɑ óbï kömi gen.”" 
Mark6:12 Codhe, ɑkedh gen. Kɑ ge ópwönyø kinni, yewi ji ki orøg." 
Mark6:13 Kɑ ge cyëdd-ɑ wɑ̈g ki wëyrijjø mø gïïr. Kɑ ji mø gïïr mø dëlli gen rɑ̈mø gïny yi gen ki møw, kɑ gï yiel gen." 
Mark6:14 Kɑ møgɑni lïngi yi Rɑ̈dh Ërödøs, mɑ́ nyingi Yëso ɑ́tɑɑy kɑ̈jj bënn. Kɑ kwï ji okööbø kinni, “Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g ɑ́dhwödh kì yij thøø! Bene ɑ di yïe tegø men-ɑ gööge ki gïïngɑ̈ngø.”" 
Mark6:15 Kɑ møøgø okööbø kinni, “Bɑ Eliyɑ̀.” Kɑ møøgø okööbø kinni, “Bɑ jɑltöng me ni jøtöng møg-ɑ ɑ́wɑɑng.”" 
Mark6:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Ërödøs, ɑkööbe kinni, “Bɑ Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g, jɑl-ɑ́ wïje ɑ́keb yi yɑn, ɑ́dhwödh kì yij thøø!”" 
Mark6:17 Bɑ Ërödøs ɑ ɑ́öd, ɑ mɑɑg Jøn, kɑ gø twöje kì ød mɑg. Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi en kɑ per Ërödiyɑ̀, cï ómen Pïlïp ɑ ɑ́kɑb yi en." 
Mark6:18 Kɑ Ërödøs nyi köbbi yi Jøn kinni, “Pɑ døøj kɑ̀ kɑɑb cï Pïlïp ómyëw!”" 
Mark6:19 Ërödiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd pyëwe rɑɑj ki Jøn, kɑ gø dwɑdde nɑ̈gø, de ɑ́dhɑ̈li." 
Mark6:20 O Ërödøs ɑ́bëëd e óböggø yi Jøn, mɑ́ e ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni Jøn bɑ ngeti kwërø. Kɑ gø korre kidøøj. Nyi tyer-ɑ lïngi kwøbbe, ngö e ɑ́bëëd pyëwe nyi ceg-ɑ olïng yi møg-ɑ lïnge." 
Mark6:21 Kɑ Ërödiyɑ̀ óyïddø ki yöö keny-ɑ ɑ́ryeej jø tøg burø, kí pëjji liny, kí jøgdøngi Gɑlelì yi Ërödøs kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ pɑɑr cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nywøølii." 
Mark6:22 Nyɑɑr Ërödiyɑ̀ ɑ́kedh cyɑ̈ngɑni kɑ ocöngø kì bøli Ërödøs geki wëlle. Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Ërödøs pyëwe ómïnø, ɑköbbe nyɑnthinh kinni, “Köbbí yɑn gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, o mëggɑ yïn.”" 
Mark6:23 Kɑ óköngø kinni, “Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, ómëggɑ yïn ceth, cɑgg ɑ́ budi pödhɑ!”" 
Mark6:24 Akedhe wɑ̈g, kɑ meye pyëje kinni, “Á gïn ɑ cwøl yi yɑn?” Akööb meye kinni, “Cwøl wïj Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g.”" 
Mark6:25 Kɑ jwɑn-ɑ døøg yï rɑ̈dh, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni mëggí yɑn wïj Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g kì yij tɑbø!”" 
Mark6:26 Kɑ rɑ̈dh yije óywöngø ki mendwøng. De pɑ cuggi kyëdø mɑ́ e ɑ́rum ki köngø kì bøli wëlle. 
Mark6:27 Kɑ öd-ɑ ød mɑg kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kinni kɑ̈ɑ̈l wïj Jøn. Kɑ ɑlɑthker men-ɑ ɑ́ör kedh-ɑ ød mɑg, kɑ wïj Jøn kïbe wɑ̈g," 
Mark6:28 ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le gøn kì yij tɑbø, kɑ gø mëgge nyɑnɑni. Kɑ gø muuje meye." 
Mark6:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi jøbɑng Jøn, ɑbëën gen kɑ dële kɑ̈l yi gen, kɑ gø kony gen." 
Mark6:30 Kɑ tyëngwöödø dwöög-ɑ yï Yëso. Kɑ gø löbbi gen gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi gen kí møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi yi gen bënn. 
Mark6:31 Ji ɑ́bëëd ge gïïr kì buti gen; møøgø obëënø, møøgø ókedhø, kɑ tyëngwöödø ojɑdø ki keny ywöm gen ri gen wɑlɑ̀ keny cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen. Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Bïu, kedhi wɑ kun bëëd wɑ ketee, o wu kɑlu ywömø.”" 
Mark6:32 Akedh gen ki morkɑb, ge kedh-ɑ keny bëëd gen kì wɑ̈yi gen." 
Mark6:33 Kɑ ge lidh yi ji mø gïïr, ge ókedhø, kɑ gï ngij gen. Kɑ ji órïngø kì yethi myërr bënn, ge reng-ɑ kunɑni, kɑ ge møøl-ɑ bøli Yëso." 
Mark6:34 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑdhi Yëso wɑ̈g, ɑlidhe ji ge gïïr. Aywöngi yije kipe gïn, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bëëd ge nɑ dyëg mø bong ngɑn kwɑy gen. Kɑ gï pwönye ki gïg mø ngenyø." 
Mark6:35 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yuudh wøw ɑbëën jøbɑnge yïe. Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Keny bɑ pɑ̈l, o wøw ɑ́yuudh." 
Mark6:36 Ör ji, o ge kedhi gen yethi myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi, o ge ngëëw gen ki gïn cɑm yi gen.”" 
Mark6:37 Kɑ mø gen løøg yi Yëso kinni, “Thödhu gen ki gïncɑm.” Apëjji gen kinni, “Yï dwɑdd-ɑ kinni kedhi wøn be ngyew ki ópùn møg cɑm yi gen, ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg miy ɑ́ryew?”" 
Mark6:38 Kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Á ópùn ɑ́dï ɑ yï wun? Kedh wun, lidhu gen.” Kɑ ge lidh, ɑköbbii kinni, “Ópùn ɑ́bïj kí rij ɑ́ryew.”" 
Mark6:39 Kɑ teedø bëne köbbe kinni pëggi gen kömi lum-ɑ mɑr, gɑ ɑkudd." 
Mark6:40 Kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ piny gɑ ɑkudd, møøgø bɑ miy, møøgø bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïjj." 
Mark6:41 Kɑ ópùnɑni gɑ ɑ́bïj kí rij ɑ́ryew kwɑny yi Yëso. Alïïdhe mɑl, kɑ gï kwënge. Apødde ópùn, kɑ gï mëgge jøbɑnge, o gï pɑ̈ngi gen kì bøli teedø. Kɑ rijjɑni ryeet pɑ̈ngi yi gen kì kelli ji bënn." 
Mark6:42 Kɑ ge ocyɑ̈mø bënn, kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø." 
Mark6:43 Kɑ nyingi ópùn kí rijj-ɑ ɑ́döng gwen, kɑ dhöng pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew opɑ̈ngø." 
Mark6:44 Kwɑnni jøg-ɑ cwøw møg-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki ópùnɑni bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj. 
Mark6:45 Kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge køøle yij morkɑb, kipe kinni o ge møøl gen løøg Betsɑidɑ̀, o dönge e köbb-ɑ teedø kinni dɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen." 
Mark6:46 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume ki mɑ̈dhi tyëngɑni, ɑkedhe wïj kït be lɑm." 
Mark6:47 Kɑ piny ogöögø ki wɑɑng thyënhø, e morkɑb rum wɑ̈dhi dïnɑm, o Yëso ying-ɑ wɑ̈g e kete." 
Mark6:48 Kɑ gø lidhe kinni, köthi gen ɑ́buudh yi këw, mɑ́ ge pyem-ɑ yømø. Kɑ kedh-ɑ yï gen kì bɑ̈ɑ̈rø, e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑ̈thi pï, kɑ gï køme pödhø," 
Mark6:49 kɑ lidh yi gen, e ócyɑ̈dhø kì wɑ̈thi pï, kɑ ge orumø kinni bɑ tïbi ngɑnthøø, ɑryeer gen," 
Mark6:50 mɑ́ ge ɑ́bwøg bënn kɑ ɑ́lidh ge gøn. Kedh gï köbbe’ köbbø kinni, “Mɑɑgu pëthi wun piny! Wu ko böggi. Bɑ yɑn!”" 
Mark6:51 Akɑdhe yij morkɑb keny-ɑ di gen, kɑ yømø obedø. Kɑ ge ongɑ̈ngø ki mendwøng," 
Mark6:52 mɑ́ gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi kwøbbi ópùn nuti yood gen, kì bɑng nøgi wɑ̈thi gen." 
Mark6:53 Kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ løøgø, ɑkɑdhi gen piny kì bøli myërri Genesɑret, kɑ morkɑb mɑɑg gen piny." 
Mark6:54 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën gen wɑ̈g kì yij morkɑb ceth, ɑngijii yi teedø." 
Mark6:55 Kɑ teenɑni reng-ɑ yij pönhɑni bëne. Kɑ ge ócɑ̈gø ki tëëri tyëng-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø kì yethi pënni gen, ge tëër-ɑ kun-ɑ lïngi yi gen, i ying-ɑ yije." 
Mark6:56 Kɑ kì yethi kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi kedhi yi en, kì myërr-ɑ thønhø, wɑlɑ̀ myërr-ɑ døngø kì yij pödhø, tyëng-ɑ buud nyi yuude ge ótëër kɑ̈jji ngyew. Kɑ nyi kwɑjji yi gen, kinni wiy tuung lɑne nywɑl yi gen yøw. Kɑ møg-ɑ nyi nywɑlii bënn nyii dönyø." 
Mark7:1 Kɑ Jøpɑresì geki jøpwönyi Cigg møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Yerusɑlem ócugø kì buti Yëso. 
Mark7:2 Kɑ lidh yi gen kinni, kwï jøbɑnge ocyɑ̈mø cinggi gen nuti lwøøg gen ni kwööng kwɑyy." 
Mark7:3 (Mɑ́ Jøpɑresì kí Yeud bënn mïdh-ɑ kwöng; ge pɑ nyi cyɑ̈mø e cinggi gen nuti lwøøg gen. 
Mark7:4 O gïn-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì kej ngyew pɑ nyi cɑm yi gen e nuti lwøgø kidøøj. O dɑ könggi mø ngenyø mɑ ɑ́lɑg yi gen kì yï kweyyi gen, møg ceg ki mïdhø ceth; ni lwøgi óthɑ̈ggì kí ɑ́thïwwì, kí gïg-ɑ bɑ dilɑl, kí sɑrirr.)" 
Mark7:5 Kɑ pyëj yi Jøpɑresì geki jøpwönyi Cigg kinni, “Gede jøbɑngí ɑ pɑ mïdhi gen kwööng kweyyee; gede ɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen cinggi gen nuti lwøgø?”" 
Mark7:6 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wu bɑ tyëngwëënyø, møg-ɑ ɑ́töng yi Icɑyɑ̀ kiper wun bɑ dyër, gen ɑ møg-ɑ ógwedø kinni, ‘Yɑ wør yi ji møg kɑ dhøggi gen, de pëthi gen lɑ̈wi ki yɑn." 
Mark7:7 Yɑ mɑlli yi gen kɑ pyed, mɑ́ ge pwöny-ɑ kwööng ji, e dhɑ̈y ge nɑ Ciggi Jwøk.’"
