Mark7:8 “Ciggi Jwøk ɑ́wiy yi wun, kɑ wu mïdh-ɑ kwööng ji.”" 
Mark7:9 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Ciggi Jwøk ceg yi wun kɑ këëjø ki wëënyø, kipe kinni o wu mïdhi wun kwööng wun!" 
Mark7:10 Mosɑ̀ ɑ́cïg kinni, ‘Wør wïyí ki meyí,’ kɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Nɑ̈ɑ̈g ngɑn lɑ̈mmi cyën wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye.’" 
Mark7:11 De wu pwöny-ɑ ji kinni, i keløg dhɑnhø yïe dɑ gïn di kønye wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye, de okööbø kinni, ‘Men bɑ Gorbɑn,’ (ɑ wɑngi kinni, rumø ki mëggi Jwøk,)" 
Mark7:12 ngɑnɑni pɑ cïrri kønyi wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye. 
Mark7:13 O kɑ̀ göög wun kinøw, wu kyer-ɑ kwøbbi Jwøk. O dɑ gïg ni møgɑni mø gïïr, møg nyi gwøg yi wun.”" 
Mark7:14 Kɑ teedø cige cwööl yïe, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Lïngu møgɑ wu bënn, kɑ ge ti wun ki yodø." 
Mark7:15 Bong gïjø me nud kì wɑ̈g me cuggi ywëdhi dhɑnhø kɑ̀ kedhe yije. De bɑ gïg-ɑ nyi bï wɑ̈g kì yij dhɑnhø ɑ nyi ywëdhii.” 
Mark7:16 (Ngɑn di yïthhe mø lïnge, wiy lïnge.)" 
Mark7:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wiy teedø yi en, kɑ kedh-ɑ kɑl, ɑpyëjii yi jøbɑnge ki gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gɑ́jɑni." 
Mark7:18 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wu bëëd ɑ nøw thyew, wu pɑ nyi lïngø? Kwïj yi wun kinni, gïn-ɑ kedhi yij, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈g, dhɑnhø pɑ cuggi ywëdhø yi en?" 
Mark7:19 Mɑ́ gïnɑni pɑ kedhi pyëwe den-ɑ́ yije, o nyi bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì dële.” (Møgɑni nyodh-ɑ kinni, gïgcɑmm bënn ɑ́kwøb yi Yëso kinni ge dhïw.)" 
Mark7:20 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Gïn-ɑ bï wɑ̈g kì pyëw, bɑ en ɑ ywëdh dhɑnhø." 
Mark7:21 Mɑ́ e bɑ yethi pëthi ji ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi rumm-ɑ rijjø, kí kwïji burø, kí kwɑl, kí nɑ̈g ki ji," 
Mark7:22 kí niini tyëng-ɑ nuti nywøøm ri gen, kí mud, kí gwøg ki gïgrijjø, kí wëënyø, kí bëëdi orøg, kí tyiel, kí ɑtum, kí ɑthwøg, kí gwøøg dhëëgø." 
Mark7:23 Gïgrijjø møgɑni bënn nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pyëw, kɑ dhɑnhø nyi ywëdh yi gen.”" 
Mark7:24 Kɑ Yëso odhwödhø, kɑ kedh-ɑ myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki Suur. Kɑ pödh-ɑ kɑl megø, mɑ́ e nuti dwɑddi kinni o per bëëne yod yi ji, de ɑ́dhɑ̈li pɑ̈nø." 
Mark7:25 Per bëëne ólïngø yi ngɑndhɑjø me ri nyɑre di wëy me rɑj. Akedh ngɑnɑni, kɑ ree bøødhe piny kì bøle." 
Mark7:26 Ngɑnɑni pɑth ki nyɑɑr Yeud, de bɑ ngeti Pinikiyɑ̀ kì Suriyɑ̀ me kweyye bɑ tyëng Yönɑn. Kɑ Yëso kwɑjje kinni ryëëme wëyrijjø wɑ̈g kì ri nyɑre." 
Mark7:27 Aløøg mø ngɑnɑni yi Yëso kinni, “Wiy othønhø yɑ̈ng gen møti; gïncɑɑm othønhø pɑ døøj ki kwɑnyø o lëngi gwögg.”" 
Mark7:28 Kɑ møge løøg yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Wuö, cɑgg ɑ́ gwögg kiri gen, thull-ɑ dyëëm thɑ tɑrɑbedhɑ̀ kì dhøggi othønhø, nyii cɑmø yi gen.”" 
Mark7:29 Kɑ ngɑnɑni köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Kedhí gølí, wëyrijjø ɑ́bï wɑ̈g kì ri nyɑrí kì bɑng löggí.”" 
Mark7:30 Akedhe gøle, kɑ nyɑre yuude e obuddø kì wïj sɑrir, o wëyrijjø rum kedhø." 
Mark7:31 Kɑ Yëso odhwödhø kì myërri Suur, kɑ dwöög-ɑ Tɑɑy Gɑlelì, ɑcøre Sïdön kɑ kɑ̈l-ɑ yuu Kɑ̈dd-ɑ Pyɑ̈rø." 
Mark7:32 Kɑ muuj jɑl mɑ ming me mïïlø. Kɑ Yëso kwɑjji yi teedø kinni thɑɑnye cingge kömi jɑlɑni. 
Mark7:33 Kɑ kïdhi wɑ̈ye yi Yëso, kɑ lwedde cøde yïthhi mingɑni, kɑ ónguddø ki lɑ́ɑ̀w, kɑ leeb jɑlɑni nywɑle." 
Mark7:34 Ayëgge piny, kɑ lïïdh-ɑ mɑl, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Ipɑtɑ̀,” ɑ wɑngi kinni, “Yïëbbí.”" 
Mark7:35 Kɑ yïthhe ri gen yieb gen, kɑ lebe ree gønye, kɑ okööbø dhøge døøj." 
Mark7:36 Kɑ nyingi gen cem yi Yëso kinni ko di ngɑn köbbu møgɑni. De kenyi ti nyingi gen ki cemø, ge nyi ceg-ɑ pëddø kømmi møgɑni." 
Mark7:37 Kɑ wɑ̈thi gen ócungø de ge kømm-ɑ kinni, “Jɑmmì bënn ɑ́gwøge kidøøj! Cɑgg ɑ́ mïng gï ɑ́wëgge lïngø, kɑ tyëng-ɑ mïïlø wëgge kwøb!”" 
Mark8:1 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg ji mø ngenyø ki cugø, kɑ ge ójɑ̈ddø ki gïn cɑm yi gen, ɑcwøle jøbɑnge yïe, kɑ gï köbbe kinni," 
Mark8:2 “Nyingi tyëngɑni ocɑnø kì yïɑ; ge lug-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑngɑ ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g ɑnɑn, e bong gïn cɑm yi gen." 
Mark8:3 De keløg ge örɑ’ myërri gen ki kɑ̈j, ge bɑ møg dhɑ̈ɑ̈r kì kö yöö, mɑ́ kwï gen kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kun lɑ̈wi.”" 
Mark8:4 Kɑ møge løøg yi jøbɑnge kinni, “Tyëngɑni ócuggi thödhø ki gïncɑm kidï kì yij pɑ̈l ni men?”" 
Mark8:5 Kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Á ópùn ɑ́dï ɑ yï wun?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Ópùn ɑ́bïryew?”" 
Mark8:6 Kɑ teenɑni köbbe kinni pëggi gen piny. Kɑ ópùnɑni gɑ ɑ́bïryew kwɑnye. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume pwøji Jwøk, ɑpødde gïn, kɑ gï mëgge jøbɑnge, o gï pɑ̈ngi gen kì bøli teedø, kɑ gï pɑ̈ngi gen." 
Mark8:7 O yï gen ɑ́dɑ nywøli rij mø nøg thyew. Kɑ ge kwëng yi Yëso thyew, ɑköbbe jøbɑnge kinni pɑ̈ngi ge gïn kì kelli teedø thyew." 
Mark8:8 Acyɑ̈ɑ̈m teedø, kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø. Kɑ nyingi gïncɑm møg-ɑ ɑ́döng gwen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yethi dhöng ɑ́bïryew." 
Mark8:9 Teedø ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø. Kwɑnni tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́ngwen. 
Mark8:10 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni kedh gen. Kɑ kɑdh-ɑ yij morkɑb kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, geki jøbɑnge, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ myërri Dɑlmɑnuthɑ̀." 
Mark8:11 Kwï Jøpɑresì ɑ́bï, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki pëmø ki en, ge yɑb-ɑ ngïji kì yïe me nyodh kinni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, ge rɑng-ɑ gøn." 
Mark8:12 Agɑ̈y Yëso, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Ede rïny, ɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈be ki ngïji? Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, bong ngïji me mëggi rïny!”" 
Mark8:13 Awiye gïn, kɑ kɑdh-ɑ yij morkɑb, ɑdøøge løøgø." 
Mark8:14 Jøbɑng Yëso wɑ̈thi gen wïlø ki ópùn, dɑ́ ópun ɑ́kyel kete ɑ yï gen kì yij morkɑb." 
Mark8:15 Kɑ nyingi gïn ceme kinni, “Nëën wun, kɑ ri wun kor wun kipe kɑmïrɑ̀ mi Jøpɑresì kí kɑmïrɑ̀ mi Ërödøs.”" 
Mark8:16 Kɑ ri gen pyënyi gen kinni, “Bɑ kɑ̀ bëëd e bong ópùn kì yïee ɑ pere kööbe kinøw?”" 
Mark8:17 Kɑ møg-ɑ kømmi yi gen yod yi Yëso, ɑpyëje gïn kinni, “Wude ɑ kømmi wun kwøbbi bëëdi ópùn ge bogïn kì yï wun? Wu nudd wu pɑ ngïji, wɑlɑ̀ wu pɑ lïngø kidøøj? Yethi wun teeg kinnï?" 
Mark8:18 Yï wun dɑ nying, de wude ɑ pɑ nëën wun? O yï wun dɑ yïthh, de wude ɑ pɑ lïng wun? Wɑ̈thi wun pɑ nyi pɑ̈ddi?" 
Mark8:19 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pøddɑ ópùn ɑ́bïj, ge mëggɑ’ ji ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj, ɑ́ dhöng ɑ́dï ɑ ɑ́gwen yi wun?” Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew.”" 
Mark8:20 Apëjje kinni, “O keny-ɑ ɑ́pøddɑ ópùn ɑ́bïryew, ge mëggɑ’ ji ɑ́lïp ɑ́ngwen, ɑ́ dhöng ɑ́dï ɑ ɑ́gwen yi wun?” Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Dhöng ɑ́bïryew.”" 
Mark8:21 Kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Møgɑni nuti gɑmø yi wɑ̈thi wun?”" 
Mark8:22 Kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Betsɑidɑ̀. Kɑ jɑl mɑ cwør kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïe yi ji møøgø. Kɑ Yëso kwɑjji gen kinni nywɑle gøn. 
Mark8:23 Kɑ jɑl-ɑ bɑ cwør mɑge kì cinge, kɑ gø peeje ngɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑc. Kɑ ngudd-ɑ nyinge ki lɑ́ɑ̀w, ɑthɑɑnye cingge kömi jɑlɑni, kɑ gø pyëje kinni, “Dɑ gïjø me nenni yi yïn?”" 
Mark8:24 Kɑ jɑlɑni lïïdh-ɑ mɑl, ɑkööbe kinni, “Ji nennɑ ge nɑ yenh kɑ̀ cyɑ̈dhi gen.”" 
Mark8:25 Acige cingge thɑɑny kömi nyinge. Kɑ jɑlɑni nyinge gwiire piny, kɑ jɑmmì bënn yïëy-ɑ nennø yi en kidøøj." 
Mark8:26 Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Kedh kɑ yï pödhí gølí, yï ko töngi dïpɑc, kɑ ko di ngɑn köbbi yi yïn.”" 
Mark8:27 Kɑ Yëso pödh-ɑ myërri Kɑysɑriyɑ̀ Pïlïpì geki jøbɑnge. Kɑ jøbɑnge pyëje kì kö yöö kinni, “Ji okööbø i yɑ bɑ men?”" 
Mark8:28 Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Kwï ji okööbø i yï bɑ Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g. O ji møøgø okööbø i yï bɑ Eliyɑ̀. O ji møøgø okööbø i yï bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøtöng.”" 
Mark8:29 Kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “O wun ø, wu okööbø kinni yɑ bɑ men?” Kɑ møge løøg yi Pïtør kinni, “Yï bɑ Mesiy.”" 
Mark8:30 Kɑ ge kyëddi yi Yëso kinni, ko di ngɑn köbbi yi gen pere." 
Mark8:31 Kɑ ócɑ̈gø pwönyi gen kinni, “Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø órɑngi yi gïg ngenyø. O óbɑny yi jøgdøngø, kí jɑggi ókwër, kí jøpwönyi Cigg, o ónɑ̈g. De ódhwödh kì yij thøø kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g.”" 
Mark8:32 De møgɑni ɑ́kømmi yi en gɑ dyër. Apeej Yëso wɑ̈ye yi Pïtør, kɑ ócɑ̈gø kyëddii." 
Mark8:33 Kɑ Yëso ree løge, kɑ nenn-ɑ yï jøbɑnge, ɑcyɑ̈re Pïtør kinni, “Døøg ngɑ̈jɑ, yïn ɑ Cethɑn! Yï rømm-ɑ rummi dhɑnhø, de pɑth ki rummi Jwøk.”" 
Mark8:34 Kɑ teedø cwøøle yïe bënn kí jøbɑnge. Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Ke di ngɑn dwɑddi bëën bɑngɑ, wedde pyëwe, kɑ yɑdh ɑrïwe byele, kɑ luge bɑngɑ." 
Mark8:35 Mɑ́ ngɑn dwɑddi kori wëye, wëye ólɑ̈ɑ̈nye. O ngɑn-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny wëye kiperɑ geki per wöndøj, wëye óyiele." 
Mark8:36 Á ngø ɑ óyod yi dhɑnhø e døj kipere, keløg piny bëne oyodø yi en, kɑ wëye lɑ̈ɑ̈nye?" 
Mark8:37 Dhɑnhø wëye ócuggø gøømø yi en ki ngø? 
Mark8:38 Mɑ́ ngɑn wïje ólɑ̈ɑ̈y ki yɑn, kɑ wïje ólɑ̈ɑ̈yø ki kwøbbɑ kì kelli rïny-ɑ rɑj, ɑ kwïj Jwøk èn, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø wïje ólɑ̈ɑ̈y ki en thyew, keny-ɑ óbëëne ki dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wïye geki wëywödd-ɑ tir.”" 
Mark9:1 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, kwï ji nud kì kelli tyëng-ɑ cungi kì keny, møg ko bel thøø, pïd keny-ɑ ólidh gen Pödhi Jwøk e obëënø ki dhwɑ̈ng me dwøng.”" 
Mark9:2 Kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l Pïtør, kí Yɑgob, kí Jøn yi Yëso, kɑ gï peeje mɑl wïj kït me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, keny bëëd gen kì wɑ̈yi gen ki Yëso. Kɑ ree løge kì bøli gïn." 
Mark9:3 Kɑ lɑ̈ne omënyø, ge tɑr ki mendwøng, ge lod-ɑ ke di tɑ̈ri gen yi bödhhi lwøg mø kömi piny." 
Mark9:4 Kɑ Eliyɑ̀ geki Mosɑ̀ ocwöbø kì bøli gen, kɑ ge okööbø ki Yëso." 
Mark9:5 Kɑ Yëso köbbi yi Pïtør kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, døj kɑ̀ ying wɑ keny. Wiy wø göög wøn ki ɑkɑnnì ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑ́kyel mií, ɑ́kyel mi Mosɑ̀, ɑ́kyel mi Eliyɑ̀.”" 
Mark9:6 Pïtør wïje ɑ́ceg-ɑ cung, kɑ ojɑdø ki gïn kwøbe, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bwøg ki mendwøng." 
Mark9:7 Abëën pøølø, kɑ ge rïm yi gøn. Kɑ cwɑg kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yij pøølø kinni, “Men bene Wɑ̈dɑ men-ɑ mɑɑrɑ, lïngu kwøbbe!”" 
Mark9:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́tïng gen wɑ̈thi gen kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kɑ ge lidh-ɑ Yëso kete kì buti gen." 
Mark9:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën gen piny kì wïj kït, ɑcem nyingi gen yi Yëso kinni ko di ngɑn köbbi gen møgɑni, gïti keny-ɑ ódhwödh Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø kì yij thøø." 
Mark9:10 Codhe, ɑmïdhi gen kwøbbɑni, de ge ɑ́bëëd ge pyëny-ɑ ri gen ki gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi dhwödhø kì yij thøø." 
Mark9:11 Apyëj ge gøn kinni, “Gede jøpwönyi Cigg ɑ nyi kööb gen kinni, bɑ Eliyɑ̀ ɑ ókwöngi bëënø?”" 
Mark9:12 Alögge kinni, “Bɑ Eliyɑ̀ ɑ ókwöngi bëënø kidyër. O jɑmmì bënn dwøøge kɑ̈jji gen. Pɑth ki ɑgwed kipe Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø kinni, bɑ ngɑn-ɑ órɑngi yi gïg mø ngenyø, kɑ benyi yi teedø?" 
Mark9:13 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, Eliyɑ̀ ɑ́rum ki bëënø. Kɑ göggi yi gen ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi gen, ni kɑ̀ ógwedii kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø.”" 
Mark9:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög gen yï jøbɑnge møg-ɑ ɑ́döng, ɑlidh gen teedø mø gïïr kì buti gïn, e jøpwönyi Cigg opëmø ki gen." 
Mark9:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Yëso yi teedø, ɑngɑ̈ng gen ki mendwøng, kɑ ge reng-ɑ yïe, kɑ gø mɑl gen." 
Mark9:16 Kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Wu kømm-ɑ ngø ki gen?”" 
Mark9:17 Kɑ møge løøg yi nget ɑ́kyel kì kelli teenɑni kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, yɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈dɑ yïí, mɑ́ ree dɑ wëyrɑj me mɑ̈ɑ̈nii kwøb." 
Mark9:18 Kenyi mɑgii yi wëyɑni, gø nyi leenge’ piny, kɑ dhøge nyii thungø ki óböy, kɑ legge nyi mwöde, kɑ nyi ceg-ɑ ì teel. Jøbɑngí ɑ́kwɑjjɑ kinni ryem ge gøn, de ge ɑ́dhɑl yi wëyɑni.”" 
Mark9:19 Kɑ mø gen løøg yi Yëso kinni, “Wu rïny-ɑ pyëwe bong yïëyø kinnï, yɑ ópïd wɑɑng yɑ obëëdø kì kelli wun? Yɑ pïd-ɑ wɑɑng yɑ ngin-ɑ bëëdi wun? Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu nyelthinh yïɑ!”" 
Mark9:20 Kɑ nyelthinh muujii. Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Yëso yi wëyɑni, ɑjwɑne nyelthinh ki telø, kɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kɑ ree ngyelle kì piny, dhøge othungø ki óböy." 
Mark9:21 Kɑ wïye pyëj yi Yëso kinni, “Á keny me bëëdø kidï ɑ ɑ́tyëg yi en e ree dɑ gïnɑni?” Kɑ ólöggø kinni, “Kër-ɑ́ nudd e thiinh cɑrø." 
Mark9:22 Nyi leeng-ɑ mɑc geki yethi pï tyel mø gïïr yi wëyrɑj menɑni, e dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gii. Keløg e ócuggø kì yïí, ywöngi yijí kiper wøn, kɑ wø køny.”" 
Mark9:23 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Keløg yï ócuggø yïëyø, jɑmmì bënn nyii cuggø göggi ngɑn yïe di yïëyø.”" 
Mark9:24 Aryeer wïyi nyelthinh kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́yïëy, de yïëyɑ nøg! Køny yɑn o yïëyɑ ree mede.”" 
Mark9:25 Kɑ lidh yi Yëso, kinni ge ceg kɑ kuulø yi teedø, ɑcyɑ̈re wëyrɑj, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Yïn ɑ wëy-ɑ bɑ ming-ɑ mïïlø, yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn, bïí wɑ̈g kì ree, kɑ yï ko døøg ree këti.”" 
Mark9:26 Aryeer wëyɑni, e tyell-ɑ nyelɑni ki mendwøng, codhe ɑbëëne wɑ̈g kì ree. Kɑ nyelthinh odöngø kì piny ni ngɑnthøø, kɑ kwï teedø okööbø kinni, “Áthøw!”" 
Mark9:27 De ɑ́mɑg kì cinge yi Yëso, kɑ gø tïnge mɑl, kɑ odhwödhø." 
Mark9:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe kɑl, ɑpyëjii yi jøbɑnge kì wɑ̈yi gen kinni, “Wøde ɑ dhɑɑl wøn yi ryemi wëyɑni?”" 
Mark9:29 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Gïn ni men bong gïn cuggi kɑ̈ɑ̈lii wɑ̈g, den-ɑ́ kwɑjji Jwøk.”" 
Mark9:30 Akedh gen kì kenyɑni, kɑ ge cør-ɑ yethi myërri Gɑlelì. Ádwɑdd-ɑ kinni ko di dhɑnhø me yod pere," 
Mark9:31 mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd e pwöny-ɑ jøbɑnge, kɑ gï nyi köbbe kinni, “Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ócïb cingi teedø, o ónɑ̈g yi gen. O ódhwödh kì yij thøø, kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g.”" 
Mark9:32 De kwøbbɑni ɑ́cög ge pɑ gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen, o ge ɑ́bëëd ge óböggø ki pyëjii." 
Mark9:33 Kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Kɑpernɑum. Apyëje gïn keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen kɑl kinni, “Á gïn ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi wun kì kö yöö?”" 
Mark9:34 Kɑ ge okudø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́ceg-ɑ pëmø kì yöö ki mɑ bëëde ɑ́ men ɑ ti döng kì kelli gen." 
Mark9:35 Kɑ Yëso pëgg-ɑ piny, kɑ jøbɑnge gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew cwøøle yïe. Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Ke di ngɑn dwɑddi ying mɑl, wiy bëëde e ying-ɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈n teedø bëne, kɑ bëëde ɑ́ bɑ̈ng teedø bëne.”" 
Mark9:36 Kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki nyɑ nyelthinh, kɑ gø cuunge kì dïdyëri gïn. Kɑ gø dööbe kööre, ɑköbbe gïn kinni," 
Mark9:37 “Ngɑn-ɑ ókwɑny nyɑ gïnthinh me ni men ki nyingɑ, ngɑnɑni ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ yɑn. O ngɑn-ɑ ókwɑny yɑn, pɑth ki yɑn ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi en, dɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn.”" 
Mark9:38 Aköbbii yi Jøn kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, wø ɑ́lïdhi ki jɑl megø, e ryëmm-ɑ wɑ̈g ki wëyrijjø ki nyingí. Kɑ kyëddi yi wøn, mɑ́ e pɑ ying kelli ɑkudee.”" 
Mark9:39 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Ko kyëddi wun, mɑ́ ngɑn göögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø ki nyingɑ pɑ cuggi jwɑn kwøb ki rɑj kì riɑ." 
Mark9:40 Mɑ́ ngɑn pɑ mɑ̈n ki wɑ, ying-ɑ tungee." 
Mark9:41 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, ke di ngɑn thödhi wun ki pïg mɑdh kì yij lwøl kipe kɑ̀ cyɑ̈dhi wun ki nyingi Mesiy, köönge ókwɑny yi en ceth." 
Mark9:42 “Ngɑn thɑɑb nyɑ gïnthinh be orøg kì kelli møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yɑn, lɑ̈w keløg pil me dwøng di twööj mune, kɑ di leeng nɑɑm omelø." 
Mark9:43 Keløg cingí, yï wëgge’ orøg, ngul wɑ̈g, mɑ́ e lɑ̈w kɑ̀ kedhí kej nënnì ki cingø ɑ́kyel, kibøli ke di kedhí mɑc e yïí dɑ cing ɑ́ryew, eni men-ɑ́ mɑny-ɑ pɑ nyi thøw." 
Mark9:44 [Keny-ɑ di kunnì mø pɑ nyi thøw, o mɑc pɑ nyi thøw kì yije.]" 
Mark9:45 O keløg tyelí yï wëgge’ orøg, ngul wɑ̈g, mɑ́ e lɑ̈w kɑ̀ kedhí kej nënnì ki tyelø ɑ́kyel, kibøli ke di kedhí mɑc e yïí dɑ tyel ɑ́ryew." 
Mark9:46 [Keny-ɑ di kunnì mø pɑ nyi thøw, o mɑc pɑ nyi thøw kì yije.]" 
Mark9:47 O keløg wɑngí yï wëgge’ orøg, gööl wɑ̈g, mɑ́ e lɑ̈w kɑ̀ kedhí Pödhi Jwøk ki wɑng ɑ́kyel, kibøli ke di kedhí mɑc, e yïí dɑ nying ɑ́ryew." 
Mark9:48 Kunn-ɑ cyɑ̈mø kì kenyɑni pɑ nyi thøw, o mɑny-ɑ yije pɑ nyi nɑ̈g." 
Mark9:49 “Ji bënn ógwøg ge dhïw ki mɑc, ni kenyi gwøøg gëdhhì ge dhïw ki omelø." 
Mark9:50 “Omelø døøj, de keløg e ólwënyø, ógwøg yi wun e tɑng kidï? “Bëëd wun ri wun dɑ omelø, kɑ wu bëëd wun ki mër, ki ri wun.”" 
Mark10:1 Kɑ Yëso odhwödhø kì kenyɑni, kɑ kedh-ɑ myërri Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ Nɑm Urdun bɑ̈ɑ̈ne. Kɑ teedø cig-ɑ cugø kì bute, kɑ gï pwönye ni kenyi pwönye kì yethi cyɑ̈ng." 
Mark10:2 Kɑ Jøpɑresì bï-ɑ yïe, kɑ pyëj yi gen, ge rɑng-ɑ gøn kinni, “Bɑ ɑkerø kinni, dhɑnhø cyëge ko tɑ̈ng yi en?”" 
Mark10:3 Kɑ mø gen løøge kinni, “Wu ɑ́cïg-ɑ ngø yi Mosɑ̀?”" 
Mark10:4 Alöggi gen kinni, “Mosɑ̀ ɑ́yïëy kinni, nyi gwëëd jɑlø ki wɑ̈nyi tɑ̈ng, kɑ cyëge ryeme.”" 
Mark10:5 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Bɑ kì bɑng tegi wɑ̈thi wun ɑ ɑ́gwëdi wun ciggɑni." 
Mark10:6 De cɑg kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j piny, ‘Jwøk ɑ́cwɑ̈j-ɑ jɑlø kí dhɑjø,’ ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø." 
Mark10:7 ‘Bene ɑ bɑnge nyi wiy jɑlø wïye kí meye, kɑ órëbø ki cyëge," 
Mark10:8 kɑ ge ogöögø ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel.’ Wɑng-ɑ kinni ge pɑth ki ɑ́ryew këti, de ge bɑ ɑ́kyel." 
Mark10:9 Gïn-ɑ ɑ́reb yi Jwøk, pɑ cuggi dɑ̈ngø yi dhɑnhø.”" 
Mark10:10 Kɑ cigi pyëjø yi jøbɑnge kì kɑl kipe møgɑni. 
Mark10:11 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Ngɑn tɑ̈ng cyëge, kɑ ónyömø ki megø, jɑlɑni pɑ̈r ki ngɑn kedhi yethi pënnì mø pɑth." 
Mark10:12 Nɑ menɑni ceth, ngɑndhɑjø men wiy jɑlgøle kɑ kedh-ɑ yï jɑlø megø, ngɑnɑni ɑ́göög ki orøg.”" 
Mark10:13 Kɑ ji møøgø kɑ̈n-ɑ yï Yëso ki othønhø, kipe kinni o cingge thɑɑnye kömi gïn. Kɑ ge cyɑ̈r yi jøbɑnge." 
Mark10:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yood møgɑni yi Yëso, ɑrënyi pyëwe. Kɑ jøbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Wiy othønhø bï gen yïɑ; ge ko mɑ̈ɑ̈n, mɑ́ Pödhi Jwøk bɑ ji-ɑ ni gen." 
Mark10:15 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, ngɑn pɑ kwɑny Pödhi Jwøk e nɑ othinh, pɑ wöl kedhi yije.”" 
Mark10:16 Kɑ othønhø dööbe kööre, ɑthɑɑnye cingge kömi gïn bënn, kɑ gï kwënge." 
Mark10:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwödhe yuue, ɑrengi jɑl megø yïe. Abøødhe ree piny kì bøle, kɑ gø pyëje kinni, “Jɑlpwöny-ɑ døj, gwøgɑ ngø, o yɑ yïddɑ ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer?”" 
Mark10:18 Kɑ köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Á kipe ngø, ɑ cwøllí yɑn yɑ døj? Bong ngɑn døj den-ɑ́ Jwøk kete." 
Mark10:19 Cigg ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni, ‘Yï ko nɑ̈gi ki dhɑnhø, yï ko niin ki ngɑn nuti nywøøm wun ri wun, yï ko kwɑ̈ɑ̈d, wɑɑd wun ko gøøny ki kwøbbi pyed, yï ko wëëny. Wør wïyí ki meyí.’ ”" 
Mark10:20 Kɑ møgɑni løøge kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, yɑ ɑ́wöni yɑ thiinh, ciggɑni omïdhø yi yɑn.”" 
Mark10:21 Kɑ Yëso nenn-ɑ ri jɑlɑni ki medi pyëwe. Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Bɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel kete ɑ jɑ̈ddi yïn. Kedh, ngeew jɑmmí wɑ̈g, kɑ ngyënyyi gen mëggí tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur, o yï yïddí ki kɑ̈r kì pɑn-ɑ yij mɑl, codhe kɑ yï lug bɑngɑ.”" 
Mark10:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi jɑlɑni, kɑ dële ójuurø, kɑ ókedhø yije bɑɑrø, mɑ́ yïe ɑ́dɑ jɑmmì mø gïïr." 
Mark10:23 Kɑ Yëso lïïdh-ɑ yï jøbɑnge, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedhi Pödhi Jwøk teeg cɑrø kipe tyëngkɑ̈rì!”" 
Mark10:24 Kɑ jøbɑnge ongɑ̈ngø yi kwøbbe. Kɑ gï cige köbbø kinni, “Nyigɑ, kedhi Pödhi Jwøk teeg cɑrø." 
Mark10:25 Kɑ̈li ɑmɑlø wɑɑng ɑlïbrøw yööd kibøli kedhi ngetikɑ̈r Pödhi Jwøk.” 
Mark10:26 Kɑ jøgɑni wɑ̈thi gen ceg-ɑ muumø ki mendwøng, kɑ ri gen pyënyi gen kinni, “Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, ɑ́ men ɑ cuggi yielø?”" 
Mark10:27 Anenni Yëso yï gen, kɑ ólöggø kinni, “Møgɑni pɑ cuggi lwɑ̈ngø yi dhɑnhø, de ge ócuggø lwɑ̈ngø yi Jwøk, mɑ́ jɑmmì bënn nyii cuggø gwøgø yi Jwøk.”" 
Mark10:28 Aköbbii yi Pïtør kinni, “Lidh, jɑmmì bënn ɑ́wiy yi wøn, kɑ wø lug-ɑ bɑngí.”" 
Mark10:29 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wiy øde, wɑlɑ̀ nyiimen, wɑlɑ̀ meye, wɑlɑ̀ wïye, wɑlɑ̀ nyige, wɑlɑ̀ pwödhe, kiperɑ geki per wöndøj," 
Mark10:30 óyïddi ki møg ngenyø kì yij rïny. Óyïddi ki ud gɑ miy, kí nyiimëëg gɑ miy, kí mëëg gɑ miy, kí nywøl gɑ miy, kí pwödh gɑ miy, geki guudi nying thyew, O óyïddi ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer kì yij rïny-ɑ óbï." 
Mark10:31 Dɑ ji mø ngenyø møg ying mɑl ɑnɑn, de ge ódøøg cyɑ̈n; o dɑ mø ngenyø møg ying cyɑ̈n, de ge ókedhi mɑl.”" 
Mark10:32 Yëso ɑ́bëëd e cyɑ̈dhi kɑ jøbɑnge, ge kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem. Yëso ɑ́cyɑ̈dh ɑ mɑl, o jøbɑnge lug-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑnge wɑ̈thi gen cungø; o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kì cyɑ̈n ɑ́bëëd ge ceg-ɑ böggø. Kɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew cwøøle wɑ̈yi gen, kɑ gï köbbe gïg-ɑ ócwöb." 
Mark10:33 Gï ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Wɑ ɑ kedhi Yerusɑlem èn, o Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ócïb cinggi jɑggi ókwër, kí jøpwönyi Cigg, o ókuum yi gen ki thøø, kɑ cïb cinggi tyëng pödhh-ɑ kyeelø," 
Mark10:34 o ógɑggi yi tyëngɑni, kɑ köme nguddi gen ki lɑ́ɑ̀w, kɑ pwöd gen, kɑ nɑ̈g gen; de ódhwödh kì yij thøø kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g.”" 
Mark10:35 Abëën wɑ̈ddi Dhebedì, Yɑgob geki Jøn yï Yëso, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, wø dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, o wø göggi yi yïn gïn-ɑ kwɑjji yi wøn.”" 
Mark10:36 Kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun bɑ ngø, o göggɑ wun?”" 
Mark10:37 Akööb gen kinni, “Wiy wø óbëëd wøn, ɑ́kyel kì wïj kyëjí kí ɑ́kyel kì wïj cɑɑmí, keny-ɑ ópëggí wïj kwømí kì Pödhí.”" 
Mark10:38 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Gïn-ɑ kwɑjji yi wun kwïj yi wun. Wu ócuggi mɑ̈dhø kì yij óthɑ̈ng-ɑ yije ómɑ̈ɑ̈dh yi yɑn? Wɑlɑ̀ wu ócuggi jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki jwɑ̈ng-ɑ ójwɑ̈ɑ̈g yɑn?”" 
Mark10:39 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Wø ócuggi.” Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Wu ómɑ̈dhi kì yij óthɑ̈ng-ɑ ómɑ̈ɑ̈dh yi yɑn, o wu ójwɑ̈ɑ̈g ki jwɑ̈ng-ɑ ójwɑ̈ɑ̈g yɑn." 
Mark10:40 De bëëdi dhɑnhø kì wïj kyëjɑ wɑlɑ̀ wïj cɑɑmɑ pɑth ki cwɑggɑ. Kɑ̈jjɑni bɑ kipe tyëng-ɑ ɑ́gwir kiper gen.” 
Mark10:41 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi jøbɑng Yëso gɑ pyɑ̈rø, kɑ pëthi gen órënyø ki Yɑgob geki Jøn." 
Mark10:42 Kɑ ge cwööl yi Yëso, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, kì kömi piny men, tyëng-ɑ mïdhi gɑ jyɑ̈ggì, tyëng-ɑ jɑɑg yi gen nyi jɑɑg yi gen kɑ tegø." 
Mark10:43 Menɑni pɑ bëëd ɑ nøw kì kelli wun, de ngɑn dwɑddi bëëdø ɑ́ ngɑndwøng kì kelli wun, bëëde ɑ́ ngɑn göggi tyëng-ɑ kyeelø." 
Mark10:44 O ngɑn dwɑddi ying mɑl kì kelli wun bëëde ɑ́ bɑ̈ng wun bënn. 
Mark10:45 Mɑ́ Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø thyew nuti bëënø kɑ per kinni o göggi, den-ɑ́ kiper kinni o gööge, o wëye muuje gɑ møg gøøm bøli ji mø ngenyø.”" 
Mark10:46 Kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Yerikö. Kɑ odhwödhø kì Yerikö geki jøbɑnge, kí teedø mø gïïr. Kɑ cwør me bɑ kwɑ̈ɑ̈j, me cwøl ɑ́ Bɑrtimɑøs wɑ̈d Timɑøs, yuud gen e obëëdø kì tøg yöö." 
Mark10:47 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge kinni, bɑ Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth ɑ bï, ɑcɑ̈ge cwöd kinni, “Yëso Wɑ̈d Debïd, ywöngi yijí kiperɑ.”" 
Mark10:48 Kɑ kyëddi yi ji mø ngenyø kinni kude. De ɑ́kedh e ceg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈dhø ki ryeerø kinni, “Wɑ̈d Debïd, ywöngi yijí kiperɑ!”" 
Mark10:49 Acungi Yëso kɑ okööbø kinni, “Cwølu en!” Kɑ cwørɑni cwööl yi gen kinni, “Mïni pyëwí, dhwöödh, yï ocwøllø yi en.”" 
Mark10:50 Aleenge lɑne wïj tøge, kɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ mɑl, kɑ bï-ɑ yï Yëso." 
Mark10:51 Kɑ pyëj yi Yëso kinni, “Yï dwɑdd-ɑ ngø, o göggɑ yïn?” Kɑ köbbi yi cwørɑni kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ døøg be nënnø.”" 
Mark10:52 Kɑ köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Kedhí yuuí, yï ɑ́yiel yi yïëyí.” Kɑ døøg-ɑ be nënnø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kɑ løg-ɑ bɑng Yëso." 
Mark11:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi gen ki Yerusɑlem, kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Betpɑjì, kí Betɑnì kì buti Kïti Dhetun, ɑöde ki ji ɑ́ryew kì kelli jøbɑnge," 
Mark11:2 kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedhu pɑn-ɑ bøli wun. Keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhu yije, wu óyïddi ki ɑderø ówöb me köme nuti pɑ̈nyø kɑdhø; óyuud yi wun e ómɑɑg piny. Gønyu en, kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun." 
Mark11:3 Keløg e dɑ ngɑn-ɑ ópyëj wun kinni, ‘Wude ɑ göög wun kinøw?’ Kööb wun kinni, di dwɑddø yi Wë, de gø ójwɑn yi en ki dwöögø.”" 
Mark11:4 Akedh gen, kɑ ge óyïddø ki ɑderø ówöb, e ómɑɑg dhø ød me cyɑ̈gi ki yöö. Kɑ gø gøny gen." 
Mark11:5 Kɑ ge pyëj yi ji mø cungi kì kenyɑni kinni, “Ede ɑderø ɑ gønyu en?”" 
Mark11:6 Kɑ gï köbbi gen møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Yëso. Kɑ ge wiy kedh gen. 
Mark11:7 Kɑ ɑderø ówöb muuj gen Yëso. Kɑ ógudhi gen peedh gen köme. Kɑ Yëso kɑdh-ɑ köme. 
Mark11:8 Kɑ ji mø gïïr ógudhi gen peedh gen yij yöö. Kɑ møøgø pedh-ɑ ɑnɑ̈bbi yenh møg-ɑ ɑ́ngøl yi gen kì yethi pwödh. 
Mark11:9 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì mɑl kí møg-ɑ cyɑ̈n ómɑ̈ddø ge óryeerø kinni, “Lenhi wɑ Jwøk! Ngɑn-ɑ bï ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ ɑgyëdh!" 
Mark11:10 Lɑ̈ng-ɑ bï; lɑ̈gi kweyee Debïd, ógyëdh yi Jwøk! Lenhi wɑ Jwøk!”" 
Mark11:11 Awɑ̈dhe Yerusɑlem, kɑ kedh-ɑ yij Kengø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume nenni jɑmmì bënn, ɑkedhe wɑ̈g, kɑ kedh-ɑ Betɑnì geki jøbɑnge gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, mɑ́ wøw ɑ́yuudh." 
Mark11:12 Dhuki keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën gen ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Betɑnì, ɑmɑgii yi kɑ̈j kì kö yöö." 
Mark11:13 Kɑ ólïdhø ki ólɑm me di yïthhe, e nudd e lɑ̈wi. Kɑ kedh-ɑ be lïdhø mɑ bëëd e dɑ gïn di yode kì ree. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe bute, kɑ gø yode ree bong nywøl, dɑ́ yïthh keti gen ɑ ree, mɑ́ e pɑth ki bøli keny-ɑ nyi cyeg nywøli ólɑm." 
Mark11:14 Kɑ gø kwënge kinni, “Bong ngɑn-ɑ ówöl cɑm ki nywølí këti.” Kɑ møgɑni lïngi yi jøbɑnge." 
Mark11:15 Kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Yerusɑlem. Kɑ kedh-ɑ Kengø, ɑcɑ̈ge ki ryëmmi wɑ̈g ki tyëng-ɑ ngyëwi ki jɑmmì kì Kengø. Kɑ tɑrɑbedhhi tyëng-ɑ wïïdø ki ngyëny geki kwømmi jøngyëwø ki ɑkùr tɑrre kì piny bënn." 
Mark11:16 Kɑ ji mɑ̈ɑ̈ne bɑ̈ɑ̈ni ódɑ̈ri Kengø ge ótyëddø ki jɑmmì. 
Mark11:17 Codhe, ɑpwönye ji kinni, “Bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø kinni, Jwøk ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Ødɑ ócwøl ɑ́ ød mɑ̈ddø yi wɑ̈thi jurrì bënn.’ De ɑ́løgu keny pɑ̈nni yi kurrì.”" 
Mark11:18 Kɑ møgɑni lïngi yi jɑggi ókwër geki jøpwönyi Cigg, kɑ ge oyɑ̈bø ki yöö men nɑ̈g gen Yëso. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge óböggø yi en, mɑ́ teedø bëne ngɑ̈ngø yi pwönye." 
Mark11:19 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yuudh wøw, ɑkedhi Yëso wɑ̈g kì kɑɑldwøng geki jøbɑnge." 
Mark11:20 Dhuki kì mwøl keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l gen yuuɑni, kɑ ólɑmɑni lidh gen e thwøwø pïd tyele." 
Mark11:21 Kɑ kwøbbi Yëso pɑr yi Pïtør, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, lidh ólɑm-ɑ ɑ́kwëng yi yïn ɑ́wøw.”" 
Mark11:22 Kɑ møge løøg yi Yëso kinni, “Yïëy wun Jwøk." 
Mark11:23 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, ngɑn köbbi kïn-ɑ dwøng èn kinni, dhwödhe kɑ ree leenge nɑɑm omelø, keløg yije pɑ pyëër, de yïëyø kinni gïn-ɑ kwøb yi en ótïj, gïnɑni gögg-ɑ en ceth." 
Mark11:24 Bene gïn-ɑ pere köbbɑ wun kinni, kenyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m wun kɑ wu ókwɑ̈jjø ki gïïpiny, nyi bëëd wu yïëyø kinni gïnɑni ɑ́rum ki yodø yi wun, o ómëggi wun ceth." 
Mark11:25 O kenyi cungi wun, wu ókwɑ̈jjø, nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m pëthi wun ki ri wun, o Wïyi wun ɑ ying mɑl pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈me ki wun, kɑ orøøg wun lɑ̈ɑ̈nye." 
Mark11:26 [De keløg pëthi wun pɑ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m kipe rɑjj-ɑ göggi wun, Wïyi wun ɑ ying mɑl pyëwe pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wun.”]" 
Mark11:27 Kɑ døøg-ɑ Yerusɑlem. Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhe e ócyɑ̈dhø kì Kengø, ɑkedhi jɑggi ókwër geki jøpwönyi Cigg, kí jøgdøngø yïe." 
Mark11:28 Kɑ pyëj yi gen kinni, “Á teng ɑ́, ɑ gwøøg gïgɑni yi yïn? Wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ men ɑ mëggi yïn teng-ɑ göög yi yïn?”" 
Mark11:29 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Wu ópyëj yi yɑn ki gïjø ɑ́kyel. Løøg wun møgɑ, o wu köbbɑ teng-ɑ gwøøgɑ gïgɑni." 
Mark11:30 Köbbu yɑn, teng-ɑ ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g ji yi Jøn ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï dhɑnhø?”" 
Mark11:31 Kɑ ge okööbø keti gen kinni, “Keløg wɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Ákɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk,’ ókööbø kinni, ‘De ede Jøn, ɑ bɑnyu en ki yïëyø?’" 
Mark11:32 De ke kööb wɑ kinni, ‘Kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï dhɑnhø’ ” (De ge ɑ́bwøg yi teedø, mɑ́ teedø yïëyø bëne kinni Jøn bɑ jɑltöng kidyër.)" 
Mark11:33 Codhe, ɑløøg gen mø Yëso kinni, “Kwïj yi wøn.” Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Wu pɑ köbbɑ thyew ki teng-ɑ gwøøgɑ gïgɑni.”" 
Mark12:1 Kɑ Yëso ócɑ̈gø köbbi gen kì yethi gɑ́j kinni, “Jɑl megø ɑ́pïïdh ki bɑɑg oløg. Kɑ gø wene ki kyel. Kɑ ogöögø ki bur men nyi biij oløg. Kɑ ogëdø ki ɑkɑnø me bɑ̈r men wïje nyi kur. Kɑ bɑngɑni bëne kïrre jøg mø korii, kɑ ówelø." 
Mark12:2 Kì bøli keny-ɑ nyi cyeg jɑmmì, ɑöde yï jøg-ɑ kor bɑg ki bɑ̈ng, kinni o di kɑ̈ne kì yï gen ki bun-ɑ bɑ mee kì ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́nywøl yi bɑngɑni." 
Mark12:3 Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni mɑg gen, kɑ gø pwöd gen, kɑ gø ryem gen ki cingge." 
Mark12:4 Kɑ öd-ɑ yï gen ki bɑ̈ng megø. Kɑ wïje kïdhi gen ki kedd. Kɑ gø göggi gen ki gïnrɑj. 
Mark12:5 Aöde ki megø, kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni nɑ̈g gen. Kɑ oödø ki møøgø, kɑ mø gïïr kì kelli gen pwöd gen, kɑ kwï gen nɑ̈g gen." 
Mark12:6 Kɑ döng-ɑ́ wɑ̈de, wɑ̈n-ɑ mɑɑre. Kì cyɑ̈n cyee, ɑöre wɑ̈de yï jøgɑni, e okööbø kinni, ‘Wɑ̈dɑ ówør yi gen.’" 
Mark12:7 De jøg-ɑ kor bɑɑg oløg ri gen ɑ́köbbi gen kinni, ‘Men bɑ wɑ̈d jɑlbɑg. Bïu, nɑ̈g wɑ en, o bɑg gööge ɑ́ miee.’" 
Mark12:8 Kɑ gø mɑg gen, kɑ gø nɑ̈g gen. Kɑ gø ywɑɑj gen wɑ̈g kì yij bɑg.”" 
Mark12:9 Apëjji Yëso kinni, “Wïi bɑngɑni ógöög ɑ dï? Óbï kɑ tyëng-ɑ kor bɑngɑni nɑ̈ge, kɑ bɑg cïbe cinggi ji møøgø." 
Mark12:10 Wu nuti rɑ̈ngø ki møg-ɑ ógwedø kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø kinni, ‘Kït men-ɑ ɑ́bɑny yi bödhhi gyer, en ɑ ɑ́göög ɑ́ kïn-ɑ mïdhi wïj tuung ød." 
Mark12:11 Menɑni ɑ́gwøg-ɑ yi Wë bɑ gïïngɑ̈ngø kɑ ɑ́lidhii yi wɑ!’ ” 
Mark12:12 Kɑ gø dwɑddi gen mɑgø, mɑ́ e ɑ́ngij yi gen kinni ɑ́gɑj-ɑ gen, de ge ɑ́bwøg yi teedø. Kɑ gø wiy gen, kɑ ge ókedhø." 
Mark12:13 Kɑ ge öd-ɑ yïe ki kwï Jøpɑresì kí kwï jøgi ɑkuud Ërödøs, o ge yɑb gen dhøge, men-ɑ ókööbe ki gïn pere mɑgii yi gen." 
Mark12:14 Abëën gen, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni, yï bɑ ngeti dyër, o bong ngɑn nyi geny yi yïn, mɑ́ yï pɑ nyi nenni bëëdi ji, de yï nyi pwöny-ɑ yuu-ɑ dyër, ɑ bɑ kwøbbi Jwøk. Bɑ ɑkerø yi Ciggee eni cudi Kɑysɑr ki gwɑ̈j? Nyi cud wøn, wɑlɑ̀ wø ko nyi cud?”" 
Mark12:15 Kɑ wëënyi gen ngij yi Yëso, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ rɑngu yɑn? Muuju yɑn ki ngyënyø ɑ́tegø, o lidhɑ.”" 
Mark12:16 Kɑ ngyënyø ɑ́kyel kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen. Apëjje kinni, “Á ngïji men, kí gweddi men ek?” Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Mø Kɑysɑr.”" 
Mark12:17 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, mëggu jɑmmi Kɑysɑr, Kɑysɑr, kɑ jɑmmi Jwøk mëggu Jwøk.” Kɑ ge ongɑ̈ngø yi møg-ɑ kømmi yi Yëso." 
Mark12:18 Kɑ Jøsɑduk møg-ɑ kööbø kinni i bong dhwödhø kì yij thøø bï-ɑ yï Yëso. Kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni," 
Mark12:19 “Jɑlpwönyø, Mosɑ̀ wø ɑ́gwëde cigg møg kinni, ‘Keløg dhɑnhø ómen othøø, kɑ cyëge wiye, e bong wɑ̈d, lɑge cï ómen, o ómen nyödde ki wïj.’" 
Mark12:20 Ádɑ nyiimëëg ɑ́bïryew, kɑ nyeldwøng ónyömø ki dhɑjø, kɑ othøø e bong nywøl mɑ ɑ́wiy yi en." 
Mark12:21 Kɑ cyëge lɑg yi nyel-ɑ bɑnge, kɑ nyelɑni othøø, e bong nywøl mɑ ɑ́wiy yi en. Kɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen kɑ̈l-ɑ bɑng gen thyew." 
Mark12:22 Kɑ jøgɑni gɑ ɑ́bïryew bënn othøø e bong nywøl mɑ ɑ́wiy yi gen. Athøw ngɑnɑni kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n gen bënn. 
Mark12:23 Ngɑnɑni óbëëd ɑ́ cï men, keny-ɑ ódwöög ji wɑ̈g kì yij thøø? Mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ dhɑjø kì yï ɑ́bïryew bënn.”" 
Mark12:24 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Wu ɑ́bɑ̈jji! Gïn-ɑ pere ɑ́bɑ̈jji wun ngɑ̈nyi wun? Bɑ kipe kɑ̀ kwïj wun Wɑ̈jji Kwërø geki tegi Jwøk." 
Mark12:25 Mɑ́ keny-ɑ ódhwödh ji kì yij thøø, ge pɑ nyömi wɑlɑ̀ ge pɑ nywøm, de ge óni wëywödd kì mɑl." 
Mark12:26 Anɑn kipe kwøbbi dwöögi tyëngthøø mɑl, wu nuti rɑ̈ngø kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Mosɑ̀ ki møg-ɑ ógwedø kì ri kwøbbi nyɑ kïrø? Kí keny-ɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøk kinni, ‘Yɑ bene Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm, kí Jwøøg Isɑɑk, kí Jwøøg Yɑgob.’" 
Mark12:27 Jwøk pɑth ki Jwøøg tyëngthøø, den-ɑ́ Jwøøg tyëngnëënø. Wu ɑ́bɑ̈jji ki mendwøng!”" 
Mark12:28 Ákyel kì kelli jøpwönyi Cigg ɑ́bëëd e nud kì kenyɑni, o møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi gen ɑ́lïnge. Kɑ gø lidhe kinni, mø Jøsɑduk ɑ́løøg yi Yëso kidøøj, codhe ɑkedhe yïe kɑ gø pyëje kinni, “Á cigg ɑ́, ɑ mɑl kibøli cigg bënn?”" 
Mark12:29 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Cigg-ɑ mɑl bɑ kinni, ‘Lïng yïn ɑ Isrɑil, Wöw Jwøgí, ɑ bɑ Jwøk kete." 
Mark12:30 Mɑɑr Wöw Jwøgí, ki pyëwí bëne, kí wëyí bëne, kí rummí bënn, kí tegí bëne.’" 
Mark12:31 Men ɑ bɑnge bɑ kinni, ‘Mɑɑr ngɑn-ɑ butí ni kɑ̀ mɑɑr rií.’ Bong cigg møøgø mø lod møg ryeet ki döng.”" 
Mark12:32 Kɑ köbbi yi jɑlpwönyi Cigg kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, kwøbbí bɑ dyër. Gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn bɑ dyër kinni, Wë bene Jwøk, bong jwøg megø den-ɑ́ en kete." 
Mark12:33 O kɑ̀ mɑɑr Jwøk yi dhɑnhø ki pyëwe bëne kí rumme bënn, kí tege bëne; kí mɑɑri dhɑnhø ngɑn-ɑ bute ni kɑ mɑɑre ree, møgɑni lod-ɑ gëdhhì geki gïg-ɑ nyi muuj, gɑ møg rɑ̈bbi Jwøk bënn.”" 
Mark12:34 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Yëso kinni lögge døøj, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Yï pɑ lɑ̈wi ki Pödhi Jwøk.” Kɑ teedø obwøgø pyëjii këti." 
Mark12:35 Yëso ɑ́bëëd e ópwönyø kì yij Kengø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Mesiy nyi cwølli yi jøpwönyi Cigg ɑ́ kwɑɑr Debïd. Møgɑni ócuggi kidï?" 
Mark12:36 Møgɑni pɑ cuggi, mɑ́ Debïd kiree ɑ́kööb kì ri tegi Wëykwërø kinni, ‘Wɑ̈ɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, Bëëd kì wïj kyëjɑ, gïti keny-ɑ ócïbɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn thɑ́ tyellí.’" 
Mark12:37 Cwølli yi Debïd kiree ɑ́ wɑ̈n, de óløg kwɑre kidï?” Kɑ mø Yëso lïngi yi teedø bëne ki medi pëëth." 
Mark12:38 Kɑ okööbø e pwöny-ɑ gen kinni, “Koru ri wun kipe jøpwönyi Cigg, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen med ki wïïnø ki ɑ́ywödhh mø bɑ̈rrø, o ge nyi yɑb-ɑ mɑ̈dhhø kì kɑ̈jji ngyew." 
Mark12:39 Ge nyi yɑb-ɑ bëëdø kì wɑ̈thi kwømm-ɑ døj kì sinɑgøgg, o ge yɑb-ɑ pëggi kɑ̈jj-ɑ døj kì kɑ̈jji ryëj." 
Mark12:40 Ge nyii kɑ̈ɑ̈bø ki uddi thwömm, kɑ ge nyii lɑ̈mø ki lɑm me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, ge ceg-ɑ nɑ̈n. Ge óyïddi ki cɑ́y mø døngø.”" 
Mark12:41 Kɑ Yëso pëgg-ɑ piny ree rwööm en ki sɑnduug ngyëny. Kɑ teedø mø gïïr nenne, ge kïdh-ɑ yij sɑndungɑni ki ngyëny. Kɑ tyëngkɑ̈rì mø gïïr kïdh-ɑ yije ki ngyëny mø ngenyø." 
Mark12:42 Kɑ ngɑndhɑjø mɑ thwöm, mɑ ɑbuur obëënø. Kɑ kïdh-ɑ yije ki gïrïc ɑ́ryew." 
Mark12:43 Kɑ jøbɑnge cwøøle yïe. Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, thwöm-ɑ ɑbuur men, ɑ́muuj ki ngyëny mø lod møg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi teedø bëne." 
Mark12:44 Mɑ́ tyëngɑni bënn ɑ́muuj ɑ ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́döngi piny kì yï gen, de thwöm-ɑ ɑbuur men, ɑ́muuj-ɑ gïg-ɑ nud kì yïe bënn, gɑ møg di mïdhii.”" 
Mark13:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëne wɑ̈g kì yij Kengø, ɑköbbii yi ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøbɑnge kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, lidh døøji kïttì kí døøji ud!”" 
Mark13:2 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Udd-ɑ døngø ɑgɑk onennø yi yïn? Bong kït ɑ́kyel kì kelli kïtt-ɑ ógeer gen, men-ɑ ódöng kì kömi megø, e nuti leeng piny.”" 
Mark13:3 Yëso ɑ́bëëd ɑ piny kì wïj Kïti Dhetun, e rwöm ki Kengø e kete, ɑkedhi Pïtør yïe geki Yɑgob, kí Jøn kí Andrø, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni," 
Mark13:4 “Köbbí wøn, ryɑ̈ngɑni óbï ɑ wën? Á ngïji mɑ ngø ɑ ónyodh kinni bëëne ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi?”" 
Mark13:5 Kɑ Yëso ócɑ̈gø köbbi gen kinni, “Koru ri wun, o bongi ngɑn-ɑ ópeej wun pɑ̈l." 
Mark13:6 Ji mø gïïr óbï ce ge bɑ yɑn, ge ókööbø kinni, ‘Yɑ bene en!’ Kɑ ji mø gïïr peej ge pɑ̈l." 
Mark13:7 O keny-ɑ ólïng wun ki kwøbbi liny kí wöddi liny, kɑ pëthi wun ko lïngi, mɑ́ møgɑni bɑ møg bï ceth, de cögi piny nuti." 
Mark13:8 Mɑ́ jur ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi jur-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ pönhï pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi pönh-ɑ kyeelø. Kɑ piny onhɑ̈nhø kì kɑ̈jj mø gïïr. Kɑ kɑ̈j ómɑ̈gø. O møgɑni óbëëd gɑ mwölli orɑng." 
Mark13:9 “Kɑ nyingi wun yieb wun kidøøj, mɑ́ wu ópeej sinɑgøgg, kɑ wu pwöd kì yethi sinɑgøgg, o wu ócungi kì bøli modïrr geki rɑ̈nhì kipe nyingɑ, kipe kinni, o møg-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi wun töng yi wun kì bøli gen." 
Mark13:10 De wɑ̈thi jurrì bënn ceg kɑ pwönyø ki wöndøj, e cögi piny nuti bëënø." 
Mark13:11 Keny-ɑ ómɑɑg wun kɑ wu køøl be gøny, kɑ pëthi wun ko lïngi kipe møg-ɑ ókømmi yi wun. De nyi kwøb wun møg-ɑ ómëggi wun kì bøli kenyɑni, mɑ́ e pɑth ki wun ɑ ókööbø den-ɑ́ Wëykwërø." 
Mark13:12 Dhɑnhø ómen óngeewe kipe kinni o nɑ̈g, kɑ dhɑnhø wɑ̈de ngeewe, kɑ nywøl pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi wëëg gen geki mëëg gen, kɑ gï nɑ̈g gen." 
Mark13:13 O wu ómɑɑn yi teedø bëne kipe nyingɑ, de ngɑn-ɑ óngïnø gïti keny-ɑ óthumi møgɑni, óyiel." 
Mark13:14 “Gïnrɑj men-ɑ Böggi ólidh yi wun, e ócïb keny-ɑ pɑ døøj ki en, (Yod thɑ́ møgɑni, yïn ɑ ngɑn-ɑ rɑ̈ngø,) kɑ wiy tyëng-ɑ ying Yeudiyɑ̀ rengi gen kelli kïttì." 
Mark13:15 Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ wïj óthɑɑng ød ko yïnhi piny, wɑlɑ̀ ko kedhi øde be dwɑ̈ddø ki gïïpiny." 
Mark13:16 Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ yij pwödhe ko døøg be kwɑnyi ógødhe. 
Mark13:17 Tyëng-ɑ bɑ ɑ́yɑjj geki ɑ́nyödd kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni ri gen ódi cyën. 
Mark13:18 Kwɑ̈jji wun kipe kinni o møgɑni cög ge pɑ bï kì cwir. 
Mark13:19 Mɑ́ yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni ódi orɑng me dwøng, me nuti pɑ̈nyi bëënø kër-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j piny yi Jwøk gïti ɑnɑn, o koo cigi bëënø." 
Mark13:20 O keløg cyɑ̈nggɑni pɑ di ngwöddi yi Wë, bong dhɑnhø me di bodh. De cyɑ̈nggɑni ɑ́ngwöddi yi en kipe ji-ɑ ɑ́yienye." 
Mark13:21 “O keløg e dɑ ngɑn köbbi wun kinni, ‘Lidhu, Mesiy èn!’ Wɑlɑ̀ kinni, ‘Lidhu en ɑcɑ̀!’ Møgɑni ko yïëy wun." 
Mark13:22 Mesiy mø pɑth ki dyër ócwöb, o jøtöng mø pɑth ki dyër ócwöb, kɑ ge onyudhø ki ngïjjì kí gïïngɑ̈ngø, kipe kinni o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yieny peej gen pɑ̈l, keløg ɑ́ gïn cuggi." 
Mark13:23 De koru ri wun. Møgɑni ɑ́rum ki köbbi wun yi yɑn, e bøli kenyɑni nuti bëënø." 
Mark13:24 “Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, kì yij orɑng, cɑ̈ng ólunyi, kɑ bong-ɑ cɑr me kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi dwɑ̈y." 
Mark13:25 Kɑ kyell odyëmø kì mɑl, kɑ gïg-ɑ teg kì mɑl okïïrø." 
Mark13:26 Kì bøli kenyɑni, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ólidh yi ji, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl kì yij pøølø ki tegø me dwøng geki mɑ̈r." 
Mark13:27 Kɑ wëywödde öre wɑ̈thi tùngi piny gɑ ɑ́ngwen, be cøngi ji-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk." 
Mark13:28 “Dïd wun kì ri ólɑm. Kɑ̀ nyi yömi ɑnɑ̈bbe, kɑ yïthhe otwïyø ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, cwir ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
Mark13:29 Thyew, keny-ɑ ólidhu møgɑni ge ocwöbø, kɑ wu ngɑ̈nyu wøw kinni, thumi piny ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki bëënø." 
Mark13:30 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, rïj men pɑ thumi ki thøø, e møgɑni bënn nuti cwöbø." 
Mark13:31 Mɑl kí piny ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny, de kwøbbɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
Mark13:32 “De cyɑ̈ngɑni wɑlɑ̀ sɑɑ̀ menɑni bong ngɑn ngɑ̈nyi gen, cɑgg ɑ́ wëywödd kì mɑl, wɑlɑ̀ Wɑ̈d den-ɑ́ Wïy kete ɑ ngɑ̈nyii." 
Mark13:33 Koru ri wun, kɑ wu nëën wun kidøøj, mɑ́ keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni kwïj yi wun." 
Mark13:34 Menɑni nɑ jɑl mɑ ɑ́weli, kɑ gøle wiye kì cinggi bɑ̈ngge. Kɑ men nyi nyudhe gwøge. Kɑ jɑl-ɑ kor dhø kɑl cege kinni, nëëne kidøøj." 
Mark13:35 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, nëën wun, mɑ́ bøli keny-ɑ óbëën wïi kɑl kwïj yi wun, ócuggø bëënø kì böörø, wɑlɑ̀ dïwɑ̈r, wɑlɑ̀ bɑ̈ɑ̈rø, wɑlɑ̀ mwøl." 
Mark13:36 Nëën wun, o wu ócög wu pɑ yuude, wu onenø." 
Mark13:37 Møg-ɑ köbbɑ wun, köbbɑ’ teedø bëne kinni, nëën wun!”" 
Mark14:1 E döngø ɑ́ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew, o cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Kwëër Ákɑɑdh geki Kwëër Olwëny wɑ̈nhi gen. Ayɑ̈ɑ̈b jɑggi ókwër geki jøpwönyi Cigg ki yöö men mɑg gen Yëso kì gød, o nɑ̈g." 
Mark14:2 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Ko mɑg yi wɑ kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi kwër, kipe teedø ókër.”" 
Mark14:3 Kɑ kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́ying Yëso Betɑnì kì gøl Sɑymøn, jɑl-ɑ́ ree ɑ́di lɑ̈y cøn, ge ocyɑ̈mø kì tɑw, ɑbëën ngɑndhɑjø megø, e ókɑ̈ddø ki ɑ́thïwi mɑ kït, me yije di nɑrd, møw-ɑ yøme med, o ngewe teeg. Kɑ dhøg ɑ́thïwɑni tore, kɑ møwɑni kønye wïj Yëso." 
Mark14:4 Kɑ kwï møøgø kì kelli teen-ɑ kenyɑni okööbø pëthi gen dɑ liny kinni, “Ede møw ɑ wɑ̈dhii ki nyïɑ̈gø kinøw?" 
Mark14:5 Møwɑni pɑ di ngeew wɑ̈g ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg mø pöödh miy ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ ge di mëggi tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur?” Kɑ ngɑnɑni cɑy gen." 
Mark14:6 Kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni, “Wiyu en. Ede ɑ judu en? Ágwøg-ɑ gïjø me myëër kiperɑ." 
Mark14:7 Tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur ying-ɑ buti wun yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, o ge ócuggø göggø yi wun ki gïgdøj kì bøli keny-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun. De yɑ koo ying buti wun yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
Mark14:8 Ágwøg-ɑ gïn-ɑ cuggi lwɑ̈ngø yi en. Dëlɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈ge’ gïnyø e gwir-ɑ yɑn kipe konyø, e bøli kenyɑni nuti wɑ̈nhø." 
Mark14:9 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi ngɑɑn, ówɑjji kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ópwönyi wöndøj kì kömi piny bëne, o ge nyi pɑ̈rrii.”" 
Mark14:10 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ jɑl Iskɑryøt, o bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøbɑng Yëso gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, kedh-ɑ yï jɑggi ókwër, e kedh-ɑ be twɑnyi Yëso." 
Mark14:11 Amïni pëthi gen, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni ónëngi yi gen ki ngyëny. Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ oyɑ̈bø ki keny muuje gøn." 
Mark14:12 Kɑ pyëj yi jøbɑnge, kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ cɑ̈gi Kwëër Olwëny, eni cyɑ̈ng-ɑ nyi ngɑɑl órömm kì thyënhø kinni, “Á keny ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, o wø kedhi wøn be gwøgi gïi kwër kì yije?”" 
Mark14:13 Aöde ki ɑ́ryew kì kelli jøbɑnge, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedhu kɑɑldwøng, wu órøøm ki jɑl me kɑ̈ddi ki pugi pï, kɑ wu løgu bɑnge." 
Mark14:14 Kɑ jɑl gøl-ɑ ókedhe pyëj wun kinni, ‘Jɑlpwönyø okööbø kinni, ɑ́gøne øn-ɑ ócɑɑmɑ gïi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, wøki jøbɑngɑ?’" 
Mark14:15 Wu ónyudhe ød mɑl me lɑɑj, me yije di jɑmmì møg-ɑ ópyëlø. Kɑ jɑmmi kwër pyël wun kì kenyɑni.”" 
Mark14:16 Adhwödh jøbɑnge kɑ ge kedh-ɑ kɑɑldwøng. Kɑ møgɑni yood yi gen ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe gïn. Kɑ jɑmmi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh pyël gen. 
Mark14:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög piny ki wɑɑng thyënhø, ɑbëëne geki jøbɑnge, jøg-ɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew." 
Mark14:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ying gen tɑw ge ocyɑ̈mø, ɑkööb Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, yɑ óngeew yi nget ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun; men-ɑ́ ngɑn cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wøn ceth.”" 
Mark14:19 Acɑ̈gi gen ki kïïmø yi kwøbbe, kɑ gø pyënyi gen, megø kì bɑng megø kinni, “Bɑ yɑn?”" 
Mark14:20 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun, wun ɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, o ngɑnɑni cingɑ ójwɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ yij tɑbø kyeel ki cinge." 
Mark14:21 Nyɑɑr dhɑnhø bɑ men thøw, ni kɑ̀ ógwedii kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø. De ngɑn-ɑ ngeew Nyɑɑr dhɑnhø ree dɑ cyën! Lɑ̈w ke di cöge e pɑ nywøl.”" 
Mark14:22 Kɑ kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd ge ocyɑ̈mø, ɑkɑ̈bbi Yëso ki ópun, ɑkwënge gøn, kɑ gø pøde, ɑmëgge gøn jøbɑnge, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Kwɑnyu en, men bɑ dëlɑ.”" 
Mark14:23 Kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki óthɑ̈gi, kɑ Jwøk pwøje, kɑ gø mëgge gïn. Kɑ ge ómɑ̈dhø bënn kì ree." 
Mark14:24 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Men bɑ remɑ men-ɑ thyeer lwömi Jwøk, ókyëër piny kipe ji mø ngenyø." 
Mark14:25 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, yɑ pɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg këti, gïti cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ómɑdhɑ en, e nyɑ̈n kì Pödhi Jwøk.”" 
Mark14:26 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki mɑlli Jwøk ki wör, ɑkedhi gen wïj Kïti Dhetun." 
Mark14:27 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Wu órengi wu bënn, kɑ yɑ wiyu piny, mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, ‘Jɑlkwɑ̈yø ónɑ̈g yi Jwøk, kɑ dyëg otɑyø.’" 
Mark14:28 De keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ mɑl, wu óyöömɑ Gɑlelì.”" 
Mark14:29 Kɑ köbbi yi Pïtør kinni, “Yï pɑ wiyɑ piny, cɑgg yï wiy piny yi tyëng-ɑ kyeelø bënn!”" 
Mark14:30 Kɑ köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kidyër kinni, tïn kì wɑ̈r, e óthwønh nuti köögø tyel ɑ́ryew, yɑ ókyer yi yïn kinni yɑ kwïj yi yïn ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g.”" 
Mark14:31 Kɑ Pïtør órɑ̈ɑ̈yø ki kwøb kinni, “Cɑgg yɑ ceg thøø kyeel ki yïn, yɑ pɑ kyëdø kinni yï kwïjɑ!” Kɑ jøbɑnge møg-ɑ kyeelø bënn okööbø ki møg ni møgɑni." 
Mark14:32 Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ keny me cwøl ɑ́ Getsemɑnì. Kɑ jøbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Pëggu keny, kɑ̈ng-ɑ kwɑ̈jjɑ.”" 
Mark14:33 Akɑ̈ɑ̈le Pïtør, kí Yɑgob, kí Jøn. Acɑ̈gi dële ki juurø, kɑ okïïmø ki mendwøng." 
Mark14:34 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Yijɑ óywöngø ki mendwøng, yɑ køm-ɑ nɑ̈gø yi kwøbbɑni. Bëëd wun kì keny, kɑ wu nëën wun.”" 
Mark14:35 Kɑ kɑl-ɑ kedhø, ɑleenge ree piny, kɑ ókwɑ̈jjø kinni, keløg ɑ́ gïn di cuggi, o di cöge e pɑ kedhi yij orɑng." 
Mark14:36 Kɑ ókwɑ̈jjø kinni, “Wïyø! Jɑmmì bënn nyii cuggø gwøgø yi yïn. Nyiig óthɑ̈ngi orɑng men kì bølɑ. De pɑth ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ, dɑ́ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn ɑ gwøg.”" 
Mark14:37 Kɑ ódwöögø, kɑ jøbɑnge gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g bënn yuude ge nenø. Kɑ Pïtør köbbe kinni, “Sɑymøn, yï ɑ́neni? Yï ɑ́dhɑ̈li bëëdø yï onëënø, cɑgg ɑ́ ki sɑɑ̀ ɑ́kyel yøw?”" 
Mark14:38 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Nëën wun, kɑ wu kwɑ̈jji wun, o wu cög wu pɑ pɑ̈dhi yethi thɑb. Pyëw otyëëdø, de dël nyøødh.”" 
Mark14:39 Kɑ odøøgø, kɑ ókwɑ̈jjø e jøl-ɑ kwøbbi tyeli mɑl." 
Mark14:40 Codhe ɑdwööge, kɑ gï yuude ge nenø, mɑ́ nyingi gen peeg yi nin. Kɑ ge ójɑ̈ddø ki gïn köbbi ge gøn." 
Mark14:41 Kì ri dɑ̈ɑ̈g dwönge, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wu nudd wu onenø? Wu ywöm-ɑ ri wun? Árum! Sɑɑ̀ menɑni ɑ́wɑ̈nhi! Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø cïb-ɑ cinggi tyëngorøg." 
Mark14:42 Dhwödh wun, kedh wɑ. Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́twɑny yɑn ɑ wɑ̈nhi èn!”" 
Mark14:43 Kì bøli kenyɑni ceth kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd e okööbø, ɑbëën Yeudɑ̀, jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøbɑng Yëso gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, e cyɑ̈dhi kɑ ji mø gïïr, mø yï gen di pil kí lødh. Ge ör-ɑ yi jɑggi ókwër, geki jøpwönyi Cigg kí jøgdøngø." 
Mark14:44 Ge rumø ki nyudhø ki ngïji yi jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ngeewii kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ónuum yi yɑn, bene en jɑlɑni. Mɑgu en, kɑ kɑ̈l wun e okorø kidøøj.”" 
Mark14:45 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe, ɑpödhe yï Yëso, kɑ ócwöddø kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø!” Kɑ gø nuume." 
Mark14:46 Amɑg gen Yëso. 
Mark14:47 Kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyëng-ɑ cungi kì kenyɑni, pile wøødhe, kɑ bɑ̈ng Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng gøje, kɑ yïthe juude wɑ̈g." 
Mark14:48 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Wu bï be mɑgi yɑn ki pil kí lødh, de wu ce bï-ɑ yï ɑ́muddi ji?" 
Mark14:49 Kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng yɑ nyi bëëd yɑ nud kì kelli wun kì yij Kengø, yɑ ópwönyø, o yɑ nuti mɑɑg wun. De møg-ɑ yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø ceg-ɑ pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen ceth.”" 
Mark14:50 Kɑ wiy piny yi jøbɑnge bënn, kɑ ge órengø." 
Mark14:51 Kɑ nyelɑwøb megø ólugø kì bɑng Yëso, e rug-ɑ lɑwi kor-ɑ yöm kete. Kɑ dwɑddi mɑgø," 
Mark14:52 de ɑ́bodh kɑ órengø e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, lɑwe wiye’ piny." 
Mark14:53 Kɑ Yëso peej gøl Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng. Kɑ jɑggi ókwër geki jøgdøngø kí jøpwönyi Cigg bënn ócugø. 
Mark14:54 Pïtør ɑ́bëëd e ólugø kì bɑng Yëso, e lɑ̈wi, gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe gøl Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng. Kɑ pëgg-ɑ buti jøg-ɑ nyi kurø, e oröjø ki mɑc." 
Mark14:55 Ayɑ̈ɑ̈b jɑggi ókwër geki jøg-ɑ burø bënn, ki kwøb møg bɑng gen nɑ̈g gen Yëso. Kɑ ge ocögø ge pɑ yïddi." 
Mark14:56 Kɑ ji mø gïïr nyi mënn-ɑ köme ki gøny me pɑth ki dyër, kɑ møg-ɑ nyi gøønyii yi gen nyii cögø ge pɑ røøm." 
Mark14:57 Kɑ kwï ji møøgø dhwödh-ɑ mɑl, kɑ gø gøøny gen ki møg pɑth ki dyër, ge okööbø kinni," 
Mark14:58 “Álïngi yi wøn, e okööbø kinni, ‘Kengø men-ɑ ógerø ki cing èn, ónyɑɑgɑ piny, o kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, yɑ ógëdø ki men nuti gerø kɑ cinggi ji.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, gøøny gen nuti røømø." 
Mark14:60 Kɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng dhwödh-ɑ mɑl, kì bøli burø, kɑ Yëso pyëje kinni, “Yï pɑ löggí ki møg-ɑ gøøny yïn yi gen?”" 
Mark14:61 De Yëso ɑ́cög e okudø, nuti wöl löggø. Acigii pyëjø yi Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kinni, “Yïn ɑ bɑ Mesiy, Wɑ̈d Jwøng-ɑ lenhi?”" 
Mark14:62 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Bene yɑn, o Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ólidh yi wun, e obëëdø kì wïj kyëëj Ngɑn-ɑ yïe di tegø, o ólidh yi wun e obëënø ki pølli mɑl!”" 
Mark14:63 Kɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng ógødhe kɑge, ɑkööbe kinni, “Wɑ ócigi yɑb ki cwɑ̈gg?" 
Mark14:64 Møg-ɑ ɑ́bwöle Jwøk ɑ́lïngi yi wun. Wu lög-ɑ́ɑ̀ dï?” Kɑ ge ólöggø bënn kinni i bɑ̈jjø, o ceg-ɑ thøø." 
Mark14:65 Kɑ kwï gen ngudd-ɑ kömi Yëso ki lɑ́ɑ̀w, kɑ nyinge twöj, kɑ pwöd, kɑ gø nyi köbbi gen kinni, “Bɑ̈ggí ki ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́gøj yïn!” Kɑ kwɑny yi jøg-ɑ nyi kurø, kɑ gø pwöd gen." 
Mark14:66 Kɑ nyɑn me bɑ bɑ̈ng kì gøl Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng obëënø, e Pïtør obëëdø kì kɑl." 
Mark14:67 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe Pïtør, e oröjø ki mɑc, ɑnenne ree, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yïn thyew, yï ɑ́bëëd wu cyɑ̈dhi kɑ Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth.”" 
Mark14:68 Kɑ okyëdø kinni, “Møg-ɑ kømmi yi yïn kwïj yi yɑn, ge pɑ kedhi yïthhɑ.” Kɑ kedh-ɑ ódɑ̈r-ɑ kuni dhø kɑl. Kedh óthwønh oköögø." 
Mark14:69 Kɑ lidh yi bɑ̈ng-ɑ dhɑjø, ɑcɑ̈ge ki köbbi tyëng-ɑ cungi kì kenyɑni këti kinni, “Jɑɑl bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen.”" 
Mark14:70 Kɑ møgɑni cigi kyerø yi Pïtør. Kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thinh, kɑ Pïtør köbbi yi jøg-ɑ cungi kì kenyɑni kinni, “Kidyër yï bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen, mɑ́ yï bɑ jɑl Gɑlelì.”" 
Mark14:71 Kɑ óköngø ki mendwøng kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ kømmi yi wun èn, kwïj yi yɑn.”" 
Mark14:72 Kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, ɑköög óthwønh ki ryeew køøg. Kɑ Pïtør ópɑ̈dø ki møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kidyër kinni, tïn kì wɑ̈r, e óthwønh nuti köögø tyel ɑ́ryew, yɑ ókyer yi yïn kinni yɑ kwïj yi yïn ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g.” Kɑ óywöngø." 
Mark15:1 Kì ri ru wøw ceth, kɑ jɑggi ókwër, kí jøgdøngø, kí jøpwönyi Cigg, kí jø tøg burø bënn ri gen löggi gen. Kɑ Yëso twöj gen, kɑ gø muuj gen Pilɑtø." 
Mark15:2 Kɑ pyëj yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Bene yï Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud?” Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Ákwøb yi yïn.”" 
Mark15:3 Kɑ gøøny yi jɑggi ókwër ki kwøb mø ngenyø. 
Mark15:4 Kɑ pyëj yi Pilɑtø këti kinni, “Bong gïn løøg yi yïn? Lidh kwøbb-ɑ gïïr ek møg-ɑ gøøny gen yïn.”" 
Mark15:5 Kɑ ɑ́cög Yëso e pɑ löggi, ɑngɑ̈ng Pilɑtø." 
Mark15:6 De kì yethi Cyɑ̈nggi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, Pilɑtø ɑ́bëëd e nyi göny-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ød mɑg ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel, o ngɑnɑni nyi cwøl-ɑ yi teedø." 
Mark15:7 O ɑ́bëëd e dɑ jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Bɑrɑbɑ̀ kì ød mɑg. Jɑlɑni ɑ́mɑg-ɑ kyeel ki jøg mɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g ki ji kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi ɑgwɑg. 
Mark15:8 Kɑ teedø ócugø, ge kwɑjj-ɑ Pilɑtø kipe kinni o gööge ki gïn-ɑ nyi gwøge." 
Mark15:9 Kɑ teedø pyëje kinni, “Wu dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, gönyɑ wun Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud?”" 
Mark15:10 Mɑ́ e ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, Yëso ɑ́muujii kɑ ɑter yi jɑggi ókwër." 
Mark15:11 Kɑ teedø cwɑɑg mɑl yi jɑggi ókwër kinni cwøl gen Bɑrɑbɑ̀ kì yï Pilɑtø. 
Mark15:12 Aköbbi teedø këti yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, wu dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o ngɑn-ɑ cwølli yi wun ɑ́ Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud, göggɑ ngø?”" 
Mark15:13 Kɑ ge óryeerø kinni, “Gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw!”" 
Mark15:14 Apëjji Pilɑtø kinni, “Á rɑj mɑ ngø ɑ ɑ́gwøge?” Kɑ ge ti-ɑ ryeerø ki mendwøng kinni, “Gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw!”" 
Mark15:15 Kɑ Bɑrɑbɑ̀ gönyi teedø yi Pilɑtø, e dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o pëthi gen kwööj gen. Kɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki pwödø, ɑmuuje gøn, o gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw." 
Mark15:16 Kɑ Yëso peej gøldwøng, (ɑ bɑ gøl modïr) yi dej, kɑ kɑtïbɑ̀ bëne cøng." 
Mark15:17 Aruug ge gøn ki pɑrø me bɑ ɑ́cwïcwïl, kɑ ge okɑ̈dø ki yɑ̈ɑ̈r koodh, ɑcïb ge gøn wïje." 
Mark15:18 Kɑ gø mɑl gen kinni, “Yï ɑ́mïdhi yi Jwøk, Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud!”" 
Mark15:19 Apwöd ge gøn kì wïje ki obej, kɑ ge ngudd-ɑ köme ki lɑ́ɑ̀w, kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bøle." 
Mark15:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki gɑggii, ɑluny gen pɑrø ɑ́cwïcwïl wɑ̈g kì ree, kɑ ógudhe dwøøg gen ree. Apeej ge gøn be gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw." 
Mark15:21 Kɑ ge órøømø ki Sɑymøn jɑl Serin, (wïyi Iskɑnder kí Rupus,) e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yethi myërr. Kɑ cir yi jødej, kinni byelle yɑdh ɑrïw Yëso." 
Mark15:22 Akïdhi ge gøn keny-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Gölgöthɑ̀ (men-ɑ wɑngi kej Cu Wïj). 
Mark15:23 Kɑ gø nëngi gen ki møgi oløg men-ɑ ótolø ki gïjø me keej. De ɑ́cög gø pɑ mɑdhe. 
Mark15:24 Agur ge gøn wïj yɑdh ɑrïw. Kɑ ógudhe pɑ̈ngi yi gen kì kelli gen, ge leng kɑ wél." 
Mark15:25 Águr wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, e piny bɑ sɑɑ̀ ɑ́bïngwen kì mwøl." 
Mark15:26 Møg-ɑ per gïn ɑ́kuumii ógwedø kinni, “Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud.”" 
Mark15:27 Kɑ ɑ́muddi ji ɑ́ryew gur wɑ̈thi yenh ɑrïw kyeel ki en, ɑ́kyel kì wïj kyëje kí ɑ́kyel kì wïj cɑɑme. Kɑ møg-ɑ ókwøbø kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø kinni, “Ákwɑɑn kelli tyëngorøg,” pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen." 
Mark15:28  
Mark15:29 Kɑ gɑggi yi tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈lli kenyɑni, ge lëgg-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen, ge okööbø kinni, “Ëë! Yï ngɑn-ɑ nyɑɑg Kengø piny kɑ ger yi yïn ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g!" 
Mark15:30 Yiel rií, kɑ yï bïí piny kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïw!”" 
Mark15:31 Kɑ gɑggi yi jɑggi ókwër geki jøpwönyi Cigg kinni, “Ji møøgø ɑ́yiele, de pɑ cuggi yieli ree." 
Mark15:32 Wiy Mesiy Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil bëe piny ɑnɑn kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, o lidh yi wɑ, o yïëy yi wɑ.” Kɑ gwɑddi thyew yi jøg-ɑ ɑ́gur wɑ̈thi yenh ɑrïw kyeel ki en." 
Mark15:33 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög piny ki sɑɑ̀ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì dicɑ̈ng, ɑløg piny ree muudhø kì wïj piny bëne, kɑ muunhɑni gït-ɑ sɑɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g kì böörø." 
Mark15:34 Kì sɑɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g kì böörø ɑcwöddi Yëso e óryeerø kinni, “Elöì, Elöì, lɑmɑ̀ sɑbɑktɑnì.” Møgɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni, “Jwøgɑ, Jwøgɑ, yïde ɑ wiy yɑn piny?”" 
Mark15:35 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi kwï ji møg-ɑ cungi kì kenyɑni, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Lïng wun, cwøll-ɑ Eliyɑ̀!”" 
Mark15:36 Kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen órengø, kɑ ispwøny jwɑ̈ɑ̈ge yij møgi oløg me wɑj. Agɑ̈ɑ̈ne gøn wïj obej, kɑ gø cïbe dhøg Yëso, o gø cwije, ɑkööbe kinni, “Nëën wɑ, men-ɑ óbëën Eliyɑ̀ be kɑ̈ɑ̈lii piny kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïw!”" 
Mark15:37 Kɑ Yëso óryeerø, kɑ othøø." 
Mark15:38 Kɑ ógønh-ɑ bɑ gëng kì yij Kengø ópyëdø kì dïdyëre, cɑg kì wïje mɑl gïti tyele piny." 
Mark15:39 Kɑ dhɑbïdh men-ɑ ɑ́cungi ree rwööm en ki yɑdh ɑrïw, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe thøw-ɑ ɑ́thøw Yëso, ɑkööbe kinni, “Kidyër jɑɑl ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ Wɑ̈d Jwøk!”" 
Mark15:40 Ádɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn mɑ ɑ́nëën ge lɑ̈wi. Meerì Mɑgdɑliyɑ̀, ki Meerì meyi Yɑgom-ɑ thinh geki Yosep, kí Sɑlömɑ̀." 
Mark15:41 Gen ɑ ɑ́lugi kì bɑng Yëso keny-ɑ ɑ́yinge Gɑlelì, ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ gøn. O ɑ́dɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møøgø thyew møg-ɑ ɑ́bï Yerusɑlem ki en." 
Mark15:42 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög piny ki böörø; en ɑ bøli kej gwïdø kipe cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, kɑ Yosep jɑl Rɑmɑ̀, o bɑ jɑl me pere teg kì buri Yeud, o ying-ɑ kelli tyëng-ɑ nenni bëëni Pödhi Jwøk, pyëwe cwede, kɑ kedh-ɑ yï Pilɑtø, ɑcwøle dëël Yëso." 
Mark15:43  
Mark15:44 Kɑ Pilɑtø ongɑ̈ngø kɑ ɑ́lïnge kinni, ɑ́rum ki thøø. Acwøle dhɑbïdh, kɑ gø pyëje mɑ rum Yëso ki thøø." 
Mark15:45 Kɑ ɑ́yode møgɑni kì yï dhɑbïnhɑni, ɑmëgge dhɑnhø Yosep." 
Mark15:46 Kɑ Yosep ongëwø ki ógødh kor-ɑ yöm. Kɑ dhɑnhø kɑ̈ɑ̈le piny kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, ɑkode gøn ki ógønhɑni, kɑ gø pyële yij rörø men-ɑ ótwegø kì ri kït. Kɑ ngyëd-ɑ dhø burɑni ki tungi kït." 
Mark15:47 Kɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́pyëël dhɑnhø lidh yi Meerì Mɑgdɑliyɑ̀ geki Meerì meyi Yosep. 
Mark16:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pöödh cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, kɑ Meerì Mɑgdɑliyɑ̀, kí Meerì meyi Yɑgob, kí Sɑlömɑ̀ ge ongëwø ki ryɑ̈, me kïdhi gen be gïnyi dëël Yëso." 
Mark16:2 Kì mwøl ceth kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk, ri tuuli cɑ̈ng, ɑ ɑ́kedhi gen kun-ɑ di bur." 
Mark16:3 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Á men ɑ ókøny wɑ ki ngyeli kït kì dhø bur?” (Ábëëd ɑ́ tungi kït me dwøng cɑrø.)" 
Mark16:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́tïng gen wɑ̈thi gen, ɑlidhii yi gen kinni, kïnɑni óngyeel cyɑ̈n." 
Mark16:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi gen yij burɑni, ɑlïdhi gen ki nyelɑwøb me bëëdø kì wïj tuung kyëj, e orugø ki ógødh me tɑr. Kɑ ge obwøgø." 
Mark16:6 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wu ko böggi. Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni wu yɑb-ɑ Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw. Ádhwödh, tøøk kì keny. Lidhu keny-ɑ ɑ́pyëëlii." 
Mark16:7 De kedh wun, köbbu jøbɑnge, kí Pïtør kinni, ‘Møøl-ɑ bøli wun, ceg-ɑ kedhi Gɑlelì. Ólidh yi wun kì kunɑni, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe wun.’ ”" 
Mark16:8 Akedhi gen wɑ̈g, kɑ ge órengø kì buti burɑni, mɑ́ wɑ̈ɑ̈rø ɑ́bï kömi gen, kɑ dëlli gen okïïrø. O bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́köbbi yi gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bëëd ge óböggø." 
Mark16:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh Yëso kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk kì mwøl ceth, ɑkwønge ree ki nyudhi Meerì Mɑgdɑliyɑ̀, ngɑn-ɑ́ ree ɑ́ryeme wëyrijjø ɑ́bïryew." 
Mark16:10 Akedh Meerì kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki Yëso köbbe. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge óywöngø yethi gen bɑɑrø. 
Mark16:11 De ge nuti yïëyø keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng gen kinni Yëso onëënø, o ólidhø yi ngɑnɑni." 
Mark16:12 Kɑ ocwöbø këti, e ree løg en, kì bøli jøg ɑ́ryew kì kelli gen, ge kedh-ɑ yethi myërr." 
Mark16:13 Adøg ɑ́ryewɑni, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng köbbi gen; de ge ɑ́cög ge pɑ yïëy ki møgɑni." 
Mark16:14 Kì cyɑ̈n cyee, ɑcwöbe kì bøli jøbɑnge gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel ge ocyɑ̈mø. Kɑ gï cɑye kipe kɑ̀ nuti yïëëy gen, kí kipe tegi wɑ̈thi gen. Mɑ́ ge ɑ́cög ge pɑ yïëy ki kwøbbi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lidhii kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́dwööge wɑ̈g kì yij thøø." 
Mark16:15 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedhu wïj piny bëne, kɑ teedø bëne pwönyi wun ki wöndøj." 
Mark16:16 Ngɑn-ɑ óyïëy kɑ jwɑ̈ɑ̈g óyiel, de ngɑn-ɑ pɑ yïëy ócɑy." 
Mark16:17 Tyëng-ɑ yïëy ónëngi ki tegø men göög gen ki gïïngɑ̈ngø; ge óryëmmi wɑ̈g ki wëyrijjø ki nyingɑ; ge ódhumø ki dhøg mø pɑth ki dhøggi gen; 
Mark16:18 keløg ge omɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki thöllì, wɑlɑ̀ ge omɑ̈dhø ki sïm, bong gïnrɑj me kedhi ri gen; cinggi gen óthɑɑny gen kömi tyëngbuud, kɑ ge ódönyø.”" 
Mark16:19 Kɑ ɑ́rum Wë Yëso ki kwøb ki gen, ɑkïdhii mɑl, kɑ pëgg-ɑ wïj kyëëj Jwøk." 
Mark16:20 Akedh tyëngwöödø, kɑ ge ópwönyø kì kɑ̈jj bënn, ge okønyø yi Wë. Kɑ wööni Jwøk nyodhe kinni bɑ dyër, kì ri ngïjj-ɑ gøggi yi gen." 
Mark16:21 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn kedh-ɑ yï Pïtør geki mɑ̈dhhe, kɑ gï löbbi gen møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi gen bënn." 
Mark16:22 Kì bɑng kenyɑni, kɑ Yëso kiree jøge öre kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, gï öre’ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, o ge kɑ̈l gen wööni kwërø; wöön-ɑ nëënø mi yïën-ɑ gïti ɑtheer." 
Luke1:1 Yïn ɑ jɑldwøng Thyøpiløs. Ji mø gïïr ri gen ɑ́pɑ̈nyi yi gen ki gwed kì ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì kellee. 
Luke1:2 Ge ɑ́gwed-ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wɑ kì yï ji, ɑ løg tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi ki nyingi gen, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi gen, kɑ ge ogöögø kipe nyingi Jwøk, ge köbb-ɑ ji wööni Jwøk." 
Luke1:3 Mɑ́ tyelli møgɑni ɑ́rum ki yɑbø yi yɑn kidøøj, yïn ɑ jɑldwøng Thyøpiløs, nënni e døøj kì yïɑ kinni o ge gwëdɑ yïn, ge pyëël yɑn ni kɑ ɑ́cwöb gen ceth." 
Luke1:4 O yod yi yïn kinni kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi yïn bënn bɑ dyër. 
Luke1:5 Kì ri Rɑ̈dh Ërödøs, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑ́dɑ ókwërø me cwøl ɑ́ Dhekɑriyɑ̀, kì yij ɑkuud Abiyɑ̀. O cyëge bɑ nyɑɑr gøl kwër thyew, nyinge cwøl ɑ́ Elidhɑbeth." 
Luke1:6 Gen ryeet, bëëdi gen ɑ́bëëd e døøj kì bøli Jwøk, ge mïdh-ɑ cigge kidøøj." 
Luke1:7 De ge ɑ́bëëd ge bong nyigi gen, mɑ́ Elidhɑbeth ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ bwøj, o ge yöø bënn geki Dhekɑriyɑ̀." 
Luke1:8 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, ókwërø Dhekɑriyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e ogöögø kì bøli Jwøk kì yij Kengø, mɑ́ e bɑ ɑkun-ɑ yije di en ɑ göögø kì bøli kenyɑni." 
Luke1:9 Ábëëd ɑ́ kwöng kì yï ókwër kinni, ngɑn-ɑ kedhi be rɑ̈bi bɑkur, nyi ceg kɑ lengø, codhe ɑpɑ̈dhi wél ki Dhekɑriyɑ̀. Akedhe Kengi Wë." 
Luke1:10 Ádɑ ji mø gïïr cɑrø, mø cungi kì wɑ̈g ge ómɑ̈ddø kì bøli keny-ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈b bɑkur." 
Luke1:11 Codhe, kɑ wëywöni Wë ocwöbø kì bøli Dhekɑriyɑ̀, e cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ wïj kyëëj këli bɑkur." 
Luke1:12 Dhekɑriyɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe wëywödø, kɑ obwøgø ki mendwøng." 
Luke1:13 De ɑ́köbbi yi wëywödø kinni, “Dhekɑriyɑ̀, yï ko böggi. Kwɑ̈jjí ɑ́lïngi yi Jwøk. Cyëgí Elidhɑbeth ónywøl ki wɑ̈d. Kɑ nyinge ócɑɑg ɑ́ Jøn." 
Luke1:14 Yï óyïddi ki medi pyëw me dwøng, dhɑnhø bëne pyëwe ómïni keny-ɑ ónywøølii." 
Luke1:15 Jøn óbëëd ɑ́ jɑl me pere teg kì yï Wë. Pɑ pɑ̈nyi mɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg geki mugg-ɑ teg møg-ɑ kyeelø, ónywøl thyew e pɑ̈ngø yi Wëykwërø." 
Luke1:16 Tyëng Isrɑil mø gïïr ódwööge yï Wë Jwøøg gen. 
Luke1:17 Ócyɑ̈dhi kì bøli Wë ki Wëy geki tegø ni Eliyɑ̀ jɑltöng. Wëëg ólug yi en, kɑ gï rebe këti ki nyigi gen, kɑ tyëng-ɑ pyem kwøbbi Jwøk gï dwööge yij yuu rumm-ɑ dyër, o ji tyenye kipe bëëni Wë.”" 
Luke1:18 Aköbbi wëywönɑni yi Dhekɑriyɑ̀ kinni, “Óyod yi yɑn kidï, kinni møg-ɑ kømmi yi yïn bɑ dyër, yɑ yöø ni men? O cyëgɑ bɑ yu thyew!”" 
Luke1:19 Alöggi wëywödø kinni, “Bene yɑn Gɑbriel ngɑn-ɑ cungi kì bøli Jwøk. Yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yïí be kwøb ki yïn, o yï muujɑ wöön-ɑ døj èn." 
Luke1:20 Adɑ́ lïng! Yï pɑ cuggi kwøb gïti keny-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kwøbbɑni, mɑ́ kwøbbɑ nuti yïëëy yïn!”" 
Luke1:21 Ji ɑ́pïd yi yïd kì wɑ̈g, kɑ ge ongɑ̈ngø mɑ løge ngø ɑ wëggi Dhekɑriyɑ̀ cwöngø kì Kengø." 
Luke1:22 Dhekɑriyɑ̀ ɑ́dhɑ̈li kwøb keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëne wɑ̈g. Kɑ yod yi ji kinni dɑ gïn liidh en kì Kengø. 
Luke1:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi bøli kej gwøge kì yij Kengø, ɑkedhe pɑc." 
Luke1:24 Kì bɑng kenyɑni, kɑ Elidhɑbeth cyëge óyïddø ki dhɑnhø. Kɑ ocögø e pɑ bï wɑ̈g kì gøle ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïj." 
Luke1:25 Kɑ Elidhɑbeth okööbø kinni, “Lidhu gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi yɑn yi Jwøk! Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ yɑ̈rø kì bøli ji bënn, de ɑnɑn ɑyɑ̈rɑni ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì kömɑ yi Wë!”" 
Luke1:26 Kì bïkyeel dwɑ̈tt, e Elidhɑbeth yije dɑ dhɑnhø, ɑör wëywödø Gɑbriel yi Jwøk, gø öre’ kɑɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Nɑdhɑreth kì modïri Gɑlelì," 
Luke1:27 yï nyɑnɑjur me nywøm yi jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Yosep kì thɑ gøl Debïd. Nyingi nyɑnɑni cwøl ɑ́ Meerì. 
Luke1:28 Wëywödø ɑ́bï yïe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Mɑ̈dh rií! Yï okorrø yi Wë, kɑ yï gyëdhe ki mendwøng!”" 
Luke1:29 De Meerì ɑ́bwøg yi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wëywönɑni, de pyëny-ɑ ree mɑ løge’ ngø ɑ wɑngi yi mɑ̈dhhɑni." 
Luke1:30 Aköbbii yi wëywödø kinni, “Yï ko böggi Meerì, yï óthödhi yi Jwøk ki dhwɑ̈nge." 
Luke1:31 Lïng! Yï óngøl ki dhɑnhø, kɑ yï pɑ̈dh-ɑ piny ki wɑ̈d. Kɑ nyinge ócɑɑg ɑ́ Yëso." 
Luke1:32 Óbëëd ɑ́ dhɑnhø me dwøng, o ócwøl ɑ́ wɑ̈d Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng. Ómëggi kwøøm kwɑn Rɑ̈dh Debïd yi Wë Jwøk." 
Luke1:33 Tyëng gøl Yɑgob ójɑɑg yi en gïti ɑtheer, o jyɑ̈ge óbong cöge!”" 
Luke1:34 Kɑ Meerì wëywödø köbbe kinni, “Kwøbbɑni ócuggi kidï, e yɑ nuti pɑ̈nyø nywɑlø yi jɑlø?”" 
Luke1:35 Kɑ Meerì köbbi yi wëywödø kinni, “Wëykwërø óbï kömí, kɑ yï rïm yi tegi Jwøk, o nyelthinh óbëëd ɑ́ kwërø, o ócwøl ɑ́ Wɑ̈d Jwøk." 
Luke1:36 Anɑn lidh Elidhɑbeth nyiwɑɑd wun, yije dɑ dhɑnhø ngö e bɑ yu. Ji bënn ɑ́rum kinni i pɑ cuggi yïddø dhɑnhø, de ɑnɑn, yije pɑ di dhɑnhi dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïkyel?" 
Luke1:37 Bong gïjø ɑ́kyel me pɑ cuggi gwøgø yi Jwøk.” 
Luke1:38 Kɑ Meerì okööbø kinni, “Bene yɑn nyɑ bɑ̈ng Wë, wiy møgɑni cwöb gen kiperɑ ni kɑ ɑ́kwøøb gen!” Codhe, kɑ wëywödø ókedhø." 
Luke1:39 Adhwödh Meerì, kɑ jwɑn-ɑ pɑc megø kì myërri kwøømi Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Luke1:40 Kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ gøl Dhekɑriyɑ̀, ɑmɑ̈dhe Elidhɑbeth." 
Luke1:41 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi mɑ̈dhhi Meerì yi Elidhɑbeth, ɑcɑ̈bbi dhɑnhø kì yije. Kɑ Elidhɑbeth opɑ̈ngø yi Wëykwërø." 
Luke1:42 Aryeere ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Yïn ɑ bɑ ɑgyëdh kì kelli tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn bënn, o dhɑnhø men-ɑ ónywøl yi yïn bɑ ɑgyëdh." 
Luke1:43 Gïn-ɑ døøj ni men göggi yɑn kɑ per ngø, ɑ këëm yɑn yi meyi Wɑ̈ɑ?" 
Luke1:44 Mɑ́ keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngɑ cwɑggí ceth, kɑ dhɑnhø ócɑ̈bbø kì yijɑ yi medi pyëwe." 
Luke1:45 Yï ɑ́gyëdh kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́yïëëy kinni, møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wë ócwöb ceth kidyër!”" 
Luke1:46 Codhe, kɑ Meerì okööbø kinni, “Yɑ lejj-ɑ Wë ki pyëwɑ bëne," 
Luke1:47 kɑ pyëwɑ ómïnø kì ri nyingi Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ bɑ Yïënɑ. 
Luke1:48 Mɑ́ yɑn yɑ bɑ̈nge, yɑ korre’ korrø. Cɑg ɑnɑn ceth, yɑ ócwølli yi ji bënn yɑn ɑ́ ɑgyëdh," 
Luke1:49 mɑ́ Jwøk Áyïmø ɑ́göög ki gïgdøngø kiperɑ. Nyinge bɑ kwërø. 
Luke1:50 Jwøk lɑ̈mpyëwe nyi nyudhe’ tyëng-ɑ wørii kì yethi rïjj bënn gït-ɑ ɑtheer. 
Luke1:51 Ágöög ki gïgdøngø ki tege. Tyëng-ɑ tɑ̈dø møg-ɑ nyi rumø ce dɑ per gen, ɑ́cyedde." 
Luke1:52 Tyëng-ɑ jyɑ̈gø ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le piny kì wɑ̈thi kwømmi gen, kɑ tyëng-ɑ bɑ mööl tïnge mɑl." 
Luke1:53 Tyëng-ɑ ri gen di kɑ̈j, ɑ́yɑ̈ɑ̈nge ki jɑmm-ɑ døøj. Kɑ tyëngkɑ̈rì ryeme ki cinggi gen." 
Luke1:54 Bɑ̈nge, Isrɑil nyi kønye’ kønyø, pyëwe nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ceth ki jie." 
Luke1:55 Ni kɑ ɑ́könge kì bøli kweyyee, ɑ løg Abrɑhɑm geki kwɑrre kinni, gï ókorre gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Luke1:56 Abëëd Meerì kì gøl Elidhɑbeth ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g, codhe ɑdøøge pɑɑ gen." 
Luke1:57 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi dwɑ̈tti Elidhɑbeth, ɑpɑ̈dhe piny ki wɑ̈d." 
Luke1:58 Kɑ lïngi yi tyëng byëëg gen kí wɑddi gen kinni i Jwøk pyëwe lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki en, kɑ pëthi gen ómïnø ki mendwøng, geki Elidhɑbeth bënn." 
Luke1:59 Kɑ nyɑnyelthinh ngøl keny-ɑ ɑ́göög cyɑ̈ngge ki ɑ́bïdɑ̈g. Nyinge ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ cɑgø yi gen ɑ́ Dhekɑriyɑ̀, o di cwølli ki nyingi wïye." 
Luke1:60 De meye ɑ́kyëëd kinni, “Pɑth! Nyinge ócɑg ɑ́ Jøn.”" 
Luke1:61 Aköbbi Elidhɑbeth yi gen kinni, “Dɑ́ ngø, e bong dhɑnhø me cwølli ki nyingɑni kì gøl wun.”" 
Luke1:62 Agwel wïye yi gen, ge pyëj-ɑ gøn ki nying-ɑ dwɑdde cɑ̈ggi dhɑnhø." 
Luke1:63 Kɑ Dhekɑriyɑ̀ ócwöddø ki pɑ̈m-ɑ köme nyi gwëëd, ɑgwëde kinni, “Nyinge bɑ Jøn!” Kɑ dhɑnhø bëne ongɑ̈ngø." 
Luke1:64 Kedh Dhekɑriyɑ̀ døøg-ɑ be kwøb kì bøli kenyɑni ceth. Kɑ ócɑ̈gø lejji Jwøk. 
Luke1:65 Kɑ tyëng byëëg gen bënn obwøgø, kɑ teedø pëgg-ɑ be wɑjji møgɑni kì yethi myërri kwøømi Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn." 
Luke1:66 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ lïngø ri gen nyi pyënyi gen kinni, “Dhɑnhø men, ógöögø ɑ́ ngø mɑwɑnø?” Mɑ́ tegi Wë ying-ɑ köme." 
Luke1:67 Codhe, kɑ Wëykwërø bï-ɑ kömi Dhekɑriyɑ̀ wïyi Jøn, ɑcɑ̈ge töngi møg-ɑ ócwöb dhuki megø, ɑ́kööb kinni," 
Luke1:68 “Lejji wɑ Wë Jwøøg Isrɑil! Kipe kɑ ɑ́bëëne be kønyi wɑ, kɑ wɑ dwööge wɑ̈g kì yethi rɑj." 
Luke1:69 Wɑ ɑ́thödhe ki Yïëdi me teg, me kɑ̈ɑ̈l thɑ gøl Debïd bɑ̈nge," 
Luke1:70 ni kɑ ɑ́kööbe kì ri jøtöng møge kwërø, kɑ̈ge dööng kinni, møgɑni ógwøge" 
Luke1:71 ɑ́köngi kinni wɑ óyiel yi en kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn wɑ pɑ yïddi ki tegø. 
Luke1:72 Ákööb kinni pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki kweyyee, o wïje pɑ pɑ̈nyi wïlø ki könge, köng-ɑ bɑ kwër." 
Luke1:73 Abrɑhɑm kweyee ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøk kinni, Wɑ óyiel yi en kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. O wɑ göggi wɑ en, wɑ pɑ böggi." 
Luke1:74  
Luke1:75 O wɑ bëëd wɑ, wɑ bɑ ɑkwër, o wɑ tir kì bøli Jwøk, kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ónëën wɑ bënn." 
Luke1:76 Yïn, nyɑrɑ! Yï ócwølli yïn ɑ́ jɑltööng Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng. Yï ócyɑ̈dhi kì bøli Wë, yï gwir-ɑ yuue." 
Luke1:77 Jie ónyudhi yi yïn kinni ge bɑ møg-ɑ óyiel keny-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny orøøg gen. 
Luke1:78 Jwøgee pyëwe yöd. Wɑ óthödhe ki cɑr, o wɑ óyiel yi en," 
Luke1:79 o óbï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, kɑ omënyø kì kömi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yij muudhi thøø bënn, o wɑ ókɑ̈lli yi en kì yij yuu mër.”" 
Luke1:80 Kɑ nyelthinh Jøn ókedhø e ódøngø, kedh e opɑ̈ngø yi wëy. Kɑ obëëdø kì yij pɑ̈l gïti kɑ ɑ́bëëne be pwönyi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Luke2:1 Kì bøli kenyɑni, Ogostøs Kɑysɑr ɑ́muuj ki cigg i gweed nyingi ji-ɑ bëëdø kì yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi mïri Römɑ̀ bënn." 
Luke2:2 Gwenɑni ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki gwedø kì Suriyɑ̀, ɑ́ Kwïrïniyøs ɑ bɑ modïr." 
Luke2:3 Kɑ ji bënn kedh-ɑ yethi kɑ̈ddi gen be gwedø. 
Luke2:4 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Yosep kì kɑɑl Nɑdhɑreth kì modïri Gɑlelì, kɑ kedh-ɑ Betleem kì modïri Yeudiyɑ̀. Betleem bene kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́nywøøl Rɑ̈dh Debïd. Yosep ɑ́kedh-ɑ kunɑni mɑ́ e bɑ wɑ̈d gøl Debïd." 
Luke2:5 Kɑ Yosep nyinge gwed geki Meerì nyɑn-ɑ nywøm yi en, e yije dɑ dhɑnhø." 
Luke2:6 Kɑ Meerì pïïd yi pɑ̈dhi piny ge nudd ge ying-ɑ Betleem," 
Luke2:7 Kɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ piny ki wɑ̈de, wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø. De mɑ́ e bong ød mɑ ɑ́yod yi gen kì gøl wëll, ɑbɑne dhɑnhø ki ógudh, kɑ gø pyëële yij gïn-ɑ nyi nëngi dhög ki gïn cɑm yi gen kì lwɑg." 
Luke2:8 Kì wɑ̈rɑni, ɑ́dɑ jødyëg mɑ ɑ́ying yethi pwödh ge kor-ɑ dyëgi gen." 
Luke2:9 Kɑ wëywödø ocwöbø kì bøli gen. Kɑ ge cɑr yi mɑ̈ɑ̈r Wë, ɑbwøg gen ki mendwøng." 
Luke2:10 Kɑ ge köbbi yi wëywönɑni kinni, “Wu ko böggi, yɑ muuj-ɑ wun wöödø me døj, men-ɑ óthödhi ji bënn ki medi pyëw." 
Luke2:11 Dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, yïëni wun ɑ́øør piny kì kɑɑl Debïd, bene en Mesiy Wë." 
Luke2:12 Men bɑ ngïji kiper wun. Óyod yi wun e óbɑnø ki ógudh, o ópyëël yij gïn-ɑ nyi nëngi dhög ki gïn cɑm yi gen kì lwɑg.”" 
Luke2:13 Codhe, kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, ɑcwöb yɑɑy wëywödd kì buti wëywöni tyeli mɑl, ge lejj-ɑ Jwøk kinni," 
Luke2:14 “Dhwɑ̈ng bɑ mi Jwøk kì mɑl, o mër bɑ mø ji-ɑ pyëw Jwøk med ki gen kì kömi piny!”" 
Luke2:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh wëywödd kì buti gen, ge døøg-ɑ mɑl, kɑ jødyëg ri gen köbbi gen kinni, “Kedhi wɑ Betleem, o wɑ lidh wɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb, ɑ pere ɑ́köbbi wɑ yi Wë.”" 
Luke2:16 Codhe, kɑ jøkwɑ̈yø ókedhø ge ójwɑnø, ɑyod gen Meerì geki Yosep kí dhɑnhø. Dhɑnhø ɑ́yuud yi gen e buud-ɑ yij gïn-ɑ nyi nëngi dhög ki gïn cɑm yi gen kì lwɑg." 
Luke2:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh ge gøn, ɑkwøb gen møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi wëywödø kì ri nyɑgïnɑni." 
Luke2:18 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lïng bënn ɑ́ngɑ̈ng yi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi jødyëg. 
Luke2:19 De Meerì møgɑni mïdhe’ mïdhø kì pyëwe, e orumø kì ri gïn." 
Luke2:20 Codhe, ɑdøøg jødyëg kun-ɑ di dyëgi gen, ge lejj-ɑ Jwøk, gø pøjji ge’ pøjjø kipe gïg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi gen, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi gen. Kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi wëywödø ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen ceth." 
Luke2:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög cyɑ̈nggi nyɑgïnɑni ki ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, ɑngølii, kɑ nyinge cɑg ɑ́ Yëso, nyingɑni ɑ ɑ́cɑɑgii yi wëywödø cøn e nuti yodø yi meye." 
Luke2:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën bøli kej dhïwi gen, ni kɑ̀ ógwedii kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Mosɑ̀, ɑkïdhi ge gøn Yerusɑlem be thërrii Wë," 
Luke2:23 ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi Ciggi Wë kinni, “Thyëyi kɑyø men-ɑ nywøl ɑ́ jɑlø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Luke2:24 Kì bɑng menɑni, Meerì geki Yosep ɑ́kedhi be muujø ki gëëdhi ni kɑ̀ kööb Ciggi Wë kinni, i muuj dhɑnhø ki ɑkùr-ɑ døngø ɑ́ryew, o ke bong ge gïn, muuje ki ɑkùr ójwɑt ɑ́ryew." 
Luke2:25 Ádɑ jɑl mɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Yerusɑlem, me cwøl ɑ́ Sɑymøn, jɑlɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ngɑntir, o Jwøk wør yi en ki mendwøng. Ábëëd e yïd-ɑ bëëni ngɑn-ɑ óyiel Isrɑil, o Wëykwërø ɑ́ying-ɑ köme." 
Luke2:26 Sɑymøn óköbbø yi Wëykwërø i pɑ wöl thøø, e Mesiy men-ɑ óör yi Wë be yieli Isrɑil nuti bëënø, kɑ gø lidhe." 
Luke2:27 Akøøl Sɑymøn Kengø yi Wëykwërø keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Yosep geki Meerì yij Kengø, be thyeri nyɑgïnthinh Yëso, ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi Cigg." 
Luke2:28 Kɑ nyɑgïnthinh kwɑny yi Sɑymøn, kɑ Jwøk pwøje, ɑkööbe kinni," 
Luke2:29 “Anɑn Wuö, wiy yɑn, yɑ bɑ̈ngí, o yɑ thøwɑ ki mër." 
Luke2:30 Yïëní ɑ́lidhɑ ki wɑngɑ," 
Luke2:31 eni Yïën-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi yïn bøli ji bënn. 
Luke2:32 Bɑ cɑr men-ɑ ólidh yi tyëngpɑth, o tyëng Isrɑil ówør kì bɑnge.”" 
Luke2:33 Wïyi Yëso geki Meye ɑ́ngɑ̈ng yi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Sɑymøn kì ree. 
Luke2:34 Akwëëng gen yi Sɑymøn. Kɑ Meerì köbbi yi Sɑymøn kinni, “Dhɑnhø men, ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk kɑ per kinni, o ji mø gïïr pɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen, o møøgø yiel kì Isrɑil. Bɑ ngïji men-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Jwøk, de pɑth ki men-ɑ óyïëy yi ji bënn." 
Luke2:35 O pyëwí ópyëëd yi ledhi kwøbbɑni, ge óni pilø kì pyëwí, o rumm-ɑ kɑnni yi teedø kì pëthi gen yod.”" 
Luke2:36 Ádɑ ngetitöng, me cwøl ɑ́ Anɑ̀, bɑ nyɑɑr Pɑnuel kwɑɑr Aceer. Anɑ̀ bɑ yu. Ábëëd kɑ runn ɑ́bïryew geki jɑlgøle." 
Luke2:37 Codhe, kɑ jɑlgøle othøø, ɑdönge ɑ́ thwöm. Anɑn runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g wïdɑ́ngwen. Anɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e pɑ nyi kedhi wɑ̈g kì Kengø, de nyi rïïjø e kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøk, e ree nyi twöne’ twönø ki gïncɑm kì dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r." 
Luke2:38 Anɑ̀ ɑ́bï kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, ɑpwøje Jwøk, kɑ okööbø kì ri Yëso, e köbb-ɑ tyëng-ɑ nenni yieli Yerusɑlem yi Jwøk" 
Luke2:39 Yosep geki Meerì keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki gwøgi jɑmmi kwöng ni kɑ ɑ́cïg Wë, ɑdøøg gen Nɑdhɑreth pɑɑ gen kì Gɑlelì." 
Luke2:40 Nyelthinh ɑ́døngi kɑ ótëngø. Ábëëd wïje pel, o gyëdhhi Jwøk ónënnø kì köme." 
Luke2:41 Kì yethi runn bënn, tyëng gøl yɑɑ Yëso ɑ́bëëd ge nyi kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem be Kwëër Ákɑɑdh." 
Luke2:42 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög runni Yëso ki pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, ɑkedhe ki gïn ni kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ kwöng." 
Luke2:43 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum cyɑ̈nggi kwër, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki døøg pɑc. Nyelthinh Yëso döngø kì ngɑ̈thi gen kì Yerusɑlem, de kwïj yi Yosep geki meye kinni döngø." 
Luke2:44 Cɑ̈ng ɑ́tyëg yi gen ge ócyɑ̈dhø, ge rømm-ɑ kinni Yëso ying-ɑ kelli ji-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki gen. Codhe, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki yɑbii kì kelli wɑddi gen geki mɑ̈dhhi gen." 
Luke2:45 Kɑ ocögø e pɑ yod yi gen, ɑdøøg gen Yerusɑlem be yɑbii." 
Luke2:46 Kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑyod gen Yëso kì yij Kengø, e obëëdø kì kelli jøpwönyø, e lïng-ɑ kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi gen, kɑ gï nyi pyëje thyew." 
Luke2:47 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbe ɑ́ngɑ̈ng bënn yi peli wïje geki lögg-ɑ nyi løøge. 
Luke2:48 Wïyi Yëso geki meye ɑ́ceg ngɑ̈ngø keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh ge gøn. Kɑ köbbi yi meye kinni, “Wɑ̈dɑ, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ göggí wøn ki gïn ni men? Pëthi wøn ɑ́lïngi wøki wïyí, wø yɑb-ɑ yïn.”" 
Luke2:49 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Á kipe ngø, ɑ ɑ́yɑbu yɑn? Kwïj yi wun kinni, yɑ di dwɑddø o yɑ bëëdɑ kì ød Wïyɑ?”" 
Luke2:50 De gïn-ɑ ɑ́wɑngi yi en nuti gɑmø yi wɑ̈thi gen. 
Luke2:51 Kɑ Yëso kedh-ɑ pɑc Nɑdhɑreth ki gen. Kɑ obëëdø e lïng-ɑ dhøggi gen. De møgɑni omïdhø yi meye kì pyëwe. 
Luke2:52 Yëso wïje ɑ́pëddi pïlø, kɑ ódøngø. Pyëw Jwøk ɑ́bëëd e med ki en. O mɑɑr yi ji bënn." 
Luke3:1 Ábëëd ɑ́ Tiberyøs Kɑysɑr ɑ jyɑ̈gø ɑ́ rɑ̈nhdwøng, e runne bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj kì yij lɑwø. Kì bøli kenyɑni Pilɑtø jɑl Pøntøs, ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ modïr mi Yeudiyɑ̀, o Ërödøs bɑ modïr mi Gɑlelì, o Pïlïp ómï Ërödøs bɑ modïr mi Ithuriyɑ̀, o Trɑkonitì geki Lisɑniyɑ̀ bɑ gen ɑ jyɑ̈gø kì Abilenɑ̀." 
Luke3:2 Anɑ̀ geki Kɑyɑpɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd gɑ ókwërr-ɑ døngø. Kì bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́bëën wööni Jwøk yï Jøn wɑ̈d Dhekɑriyɑ̀ e ying-ɑ yij pɑ̈l. 
Luke3:3 Acyɑ̈dhe kì yethi myërri kömi Nɑm Urdun e cïj-ɑ ji kinni yewi gen, o ge jwɑ̈ɑ̈g, o lɑ́ɑ̀w ódwöög piny kipe orøøg gen." 
Luke3:4 Ni kɑ ógwedii kì yij wɑ̈nyi Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng kinni, “Dɑ cwɑg møg cwöddi kì yij pɑ̈l kinni, Gwiru yuu Wë. Gwøgu yöö ɑ́ óbödh kipere." 
Luke3:5 Thør kɑ̈jj-ɑ bɑ mɑ̈dd bënn. Kɑ kïttì geki ótøng bënn wɑ̈thi gen pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki piny. Tyeeny yëth-ɑ bɑ ɑ́dud. Kɑ yëth-ɑ bɑ gøngì gwøg ge lïw. 
Luke3:6 O dhɑnhø bëne lïdhe ki yïën-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk.” 
Luke3:7 Kɑ ji mø gïïr møg-ɑ ɑ́bï yïe be jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø, köbbe kinni, “Wu bɑ thöllì! Á men ɑ ɑ́töddi wun kinni, rengi wun yi rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøk?" 
Luke3:8 Göög wun ki gïg nyodh kinni wu ɑ́yewi. Kɑ wu ko kööb ki pëthi wun kinni, ‘Abrɑhɑm bɑ kweyi wøn.’ Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, Jwøk ócuggø kɑ̈ni wɑ̈g kì ri kïttì møg ki kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm." 
Luke3:9 Dørø ying-ɑ ri tyeli yɑdh ɑnɑn, yɑnh-ɑ pɑ kɑ̈ni ki nywøl mø døøj, ceg kɑ ngøl piny kɑ leeng mɑc.”" 
Luke3:10 Kɑ Jøn pyëj yi teedø kinni, “Gwøg wøn ngø?”" 
Luke3:11 Alöggi Jøn kinni, “Ke di ngɑn yïe di ógudh ɑ́ryew, nënge ngɑn-ɑ yïe bong ógødh. Ke di ngɑn yïe di gïncɑm, nywɑɑg gïncɑmɑni thyew.”" 
Luke3:12 Cɑgg ɑ́ jøgwɑ̈j, ge ɑ́bï yï Jøn thyew be jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø. Kɑ Jøn pyëj yi gen kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø! Gwøg wøn ngø?”" 
Luke3:13 Aköbbi gen yi Jøn kinni, “Wu ko nyi kɑ̈bbi ki gwɑ̈j mø gïïr kibøli men-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun.”" 
Luke3:14 Kɑ pyëj yi ɑlɑthkerr kinni, “O wøn ø, gwøg wøn ngø?” Aköbbi gen yi Jøn kinni, “Ji ko nyi cir wun, o wu thödhi yi gen ki ngyëny, kɑ wu ko nyi mënni kömi gen ki kwøb. Nyi cöög wun ri ngyënyy-ɑ nyi culi wun kipe gwøøg wun.”" 
Luke3:15 Mɑ́ teedø ɑ́bëëd ge yïd-ɑ bëëni Mesiy, ge ɑ́cɑ̈gi ki pyënyi ri gen mɑ løge’ Jøn ɑ bɑ Mesiy." 
Luke3:16 Aløøg kwøbbi teedø yi Jøn kinni, “Yɑ jwɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ wun ki pï. De dɑ ngɑn megø me bï, me teg kibølɑ, yɑ pɑ døøj ki gønyi wɑrre kì tyelle. Wu ójwɑ̈ɑ̈g yi en kɑ mɑc geki Wëykwërø." 
Luke3:17 Óbï e kɑ̈ll-ɑ ólɑng me kwööde ki byelle; byell-ɑ døj ókïdhe yethi thebbe, de cong órɑ̈b yi en ki mɑc me pɑ thøw.”" 
Luke3:18 Kɑ obëëdø e pwöny-ɑ Wöndøj, kɑ gï nyi cïje ki kwøb møøgø mø gïïr." 
Luke3:19 De Jøn Ërödøs ɑ́cɑye kinni, “Yïde ɑ ɑ́kwɑɑny Ërödiyɑ̀ cï ómyëw? O yïde ɑ nyi göög ki jɑmmì mø rijjø?”" 
Luke3:20 De Ërödøs ɑ́yöd e ceg-ɑ gwøg ki gïjø me pëddi rɑ̈jø; Jøn ɑ́kïdhe ød mɑg. 
Luke3:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum ji ki jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø bënn yi Jøn, ɑjwɑ̈ɑ̈g Yëso thyew. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Yëso e ókwɑ̈jjø, ɑyieb mɑl ree." 
Luke3:22 Kɑ Wëykwërø bï-ɑ köme e nɑ ɑkur. Kɑ cwɑg obëënø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl kinni, “Yï bɑ dïl wɑ̈dɑ; yï mɑɑr yi yɑn ki mendwøng, pyëwɑ med ki yïn.”" 
Luke3:23 Yëso runne ɑ́bëëd gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈ge ki gwøge. Teedø ɑ́rum i Yëso bɑ wɑ̈d Yosep. Yosep wɑ̈d Elì. 
Luke3:24 Elì wɑ̈d Mɑthɑt, Mɑthɑt wɑ̈d Leebì. Leebì wɑ̈d Melkì. Melkì wɑ̈d Yɑnɑy, Yɑnɑy wɑ̈d Yosep." 
Luke3:25 Yosep wɑ̈d Mɑtɑthiyɑ̀. Mɑtɑthiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amos. Amos wɑ̈d Nɑum. Nɑum wɑ̈d Eslì. Eslì wɑ̈d Nɑgɑy. 
Luke3:26 Nɑgɑy wɑ̈d Mɑɑth. Mɑɑth wɑ̈d Mɑtɑthiyɑ̀, Mɑtɑthiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Semein. Semein wɑ̈d Yosek. Yosek wɑ̈d Yodɑ̀." 
Luke3:27 Yodɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöɑnɑn. Yöɑnɑn wɑ̈d Reesɑ̀. Reesɑ̀ wɑ̈d Dherubɑbïl. Dherubɑbïl wɑ̈d Ceɑltiel. Ceɑltiel wɑ̈d Nerì. 
Luke3:28 Nerì wɑ̈d Melkì. Melkì wɑ̈d Adì. Adì wɑ̈d Kösɑm. Kösɑm wɑ̈d Elmɑdɑm. Elmɑdɑm wɑ̈d Er. 
Luke3:29 Er wɑ̈d Jöcwø. Jöcwø wɑ̈d Eliedher. Eliedher wɑ̈d Yörïm. Yörïm wɑ̈d Mɑthɑt. Mɑthɑt wɑ̈d Leebì. 
Luke3:30 Leebì wɑ̈d Simeon. Simeon wɑ̈d Yeudɑ̀. Yeudɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yosep. Yosep wɑ̈d Yönɑm. Yönɑm wɑ̈d Eliɑkim. 
Luke3:31 Eliɑkim wɑ̈d Meleɑ̀. Meleɑ̀ wɑ̈d Menɑ̀. Menɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mɑtɑthiyɑ̀. Mɑtɑthiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Nɑthɑn. Nɑthɑn wɑ̈d Debïd. 
Luke3:32 Debïd wɑ̈d Yesì. Yesì wɑ̈d Obed. Obed wɑ̈d Boɑdh. Boɑdh wɑ̈d Sɑlmön. Sɑlmön wɑ̈d Nɑɑ̈cön. 
Luke3:33 Nɑɑ̈cön wɑ̈d Aminɑdɑb. Aminɑdɑb wɑ̈d Admïn. Admïn wɑ̈d Arnì. Arnì wɑ̈d Ëdhrön. Ëdhrön wɑ̈d Peredh. Peredh wɑ̈d Yeudɑ̀. 
Luke3:34 Yeudɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yɑgob. Yɑgob wɑ̈d Isɑɑk. Isɑɑk wɑ̈d Abrɑhɑm. Abrɑhɑm wɑ̈d Terɑ̀. Terɑ̀ wɑ̈d Nɑor. 
Luke3:35 Nɑor wɑ̈d Serug. Serug wɑ̈d Reu. Reu wɑ̈d Peleg. Peleg wɑ̈d Eber. Eber wɑ̈d Celɑ̀. 
Luke3:36 Celɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kenɑn. Kenɑn wɑ̈d Arpɑkɑd. Arpɑkɑd wɑ̈d Sɑm. Sɑm wɑ̈d Nöö. Nöö wɑ̈d Lɑmɑk. 
Luke3:37 Lɑmɑk wɑ̈d Mɑtucɑlè. Mɑtucɑlè wɑ̈d Enök. Enök wɑ̈d Yɑred. Yɑred wɑ̈d Mɑɑ̈lɑlel. Mɑɑ̈lɑlel wɑ̈d Kenɑn. 
Luke3:38 Kenɑn wɑ̈d Enök. Enök wɑ̈d Ceeth. Ceeth wɑ̈d Adɑm. Adɑm wɑ̈d Jwøk. 
Luke4:1 Yëso ɑ́dwöög kì kömi Nɑm Urdun e pɑ̈ngø yi Wëykwërø. Cem e døøg-ɑ pɑɑ gen, ɑpeejii pɑ̈l yi Wëykwërø," 
Luke4:2 kun-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyii ki thɑbø yi Cethɑn, ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen e ying-ɑ yij pɑ̈l. Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi cyɑ̈nggɑni, ɑmɑgii yi kɑ̈j." 
Luke4:3 Kɑ Yëso köbbi yi Cethɑn kinni, “Keløg yï bɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk, köbbí tungi kït men o ree løge ópun.”" 
Luke4:4 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø kinni, ‘Pɑth ki gïncɑm kete ɑ ree bëëd yi dhɑnhø.’ ”" 
Luke4:5 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l Yëso yi Cethɑn kɑ gø nyudhe pödhhi kömi piny bënn ki nyɑ keny me thiinh." 
Luke4:6 Aköbbi Yëso yi Cethɑn kinni, “Yï ómëggɑ pödhhɑni bënn, ki tegi gen geki dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen. Ge ɑ́rum ki mëggi yɑn, o ge ócuggø muujø yi yɑn, ge mëggɑ’ ngɑn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn." 
Luke4:7 Keløg yɑ omɑlø yi yïn, ge ceg-ɑ gwøg gɑ møgí.”" 
Luke4:8 Kɑ Yëso ólöggø kinni, “Bɑ ɑgwed kinni, ‘Mɑllí Wöw Jwøgí, kɑ göggí e kete kete.’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Codhe, kɑ Yëso kïdhi Yerusɑlem yi Cethɑn, kɑ gø cïbe oledh Kengø. Aköbbe Yëso kinni, “Keløg yï bɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk, leeng rií piny kì keny." 
Luke4:10 Mɑ́ e bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, ‘Wëywödde óköbbe, o yï kor yi gen.’" 
Luke4:11 Bɑ ɑgwed thyew kinni, ‘Yï ókwɑg yi gen kì yethi cinggi gen, o tyelí cöge e pɑ pög yi tuggi kïttì.’ ”" 
Luke4:12 Alöggi Yëso kinni “De bɑ ɑgwed thyew kinni, ‘Wöw, Jwøgí ko pɑ̈nyí ki rɑngø.’ ”" 
Luke4:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Cethɑn ki pɑ̈nyi Yëso ki yëëth bënn, ɑkɑle gøn ki wiyø." 
Luke4:14 Kɑ Yëso døøg-ɑ Gɑlelì e pyejj-ɑ yi Wëykwërø. Kɑ møg-ɑ kømmi kì ree tɑɑy-ɑ yethi myërrɑni bënn. 
Luke4:15 Kɑ ócɑ̈gø pwönyø kì yethi sinɑgøgg kì myërrɑni, kɑ pøjji yi dhɑnhø bëne." 
Luke4:16 Kɑ Yëso kedh-ɑ Nɑdhɑreth kun-ɑ ɑ́pïïdhe. Kɑ kedh-ɑ sinɑgøg kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, ni kenyi kedhe ceth, kɑ dhwödh-ɑ mɑl be rɑng." 
Luke4:17 Kɑ mëggi wɑ̈nyi Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng, ɑyiebe wɑ̈nyø, kɑ yod-ɑ keny-ɑ ógwedø kinni," 
Luke4:18 “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Wëye ɑ́cïbe riɑ, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi en, o yɑ köbb-ɑ Wöndøj tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur. Yɑ ɑ́ör yi en, o yɑ köbb-ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑmɑgg kinni, ge ɑ́gøny, o cörr köbbɑ kinni, ge ócuggø nënnø. o yɑ kønyɑ tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen guud," 
Luke4:19 o yɑ kwøbɑ kinni ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, eni bøli keny-ɑ óyiel Wë jie.”" 
Luke4:20 Yëso keny-ɑ ɑ́rume rɑng, ɑbɑne wɑ̈nyø, kɑ gø dögge jɑl-ɑ göögø kì sinɑgøg, ɑpëgge piny kì bøli teedø. Kɑ dhɑnhø bëne nyinge tööd-ɑ ri Yëso." 
Luke4:21 Codhe ɑcɑ̈ge köbbi gen kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wun ɑnɑn, ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen dicyɑ̈ngtïn!”" 
Luke4:22 Kɑ Yëso lenhi yi dhɑnhø bëne. Ge ɑ́ngɑ̈ng yi lögg-ɑ døj møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l dhøge, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Nyel cøn, pɑth ki wɑ̈d Yosep?”" 
Luke4:23 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, wu dwɑdd-ɑ köbbi yɑn gɑ́j-ɑ nyi kømmi kinni, ‘Akïm, yiel rií,’ wu dwɑdd-ɑ kwøb kinni, ‘Wø ɑ́lïng ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi yïn kì Kɑpernɑum! Gwøg gïgɑni kì pɑɑ wun keny!’ ”" 
Luke4:24 Kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër, jɑltöng pɑ nyi yïëy kì pɑn-ɑ ɑ́nywøølii." 
Luke4:25 “De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, ɑ́dɑ thwömm mø gïïr kì Isrɑil kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́nud Eliyɑ̀. Kødh nuti mɑ̈gø kì Isrɑil ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g kí dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïkyel, o kɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd e teeg kì yij pödhø bëne." 
Luke4:26 De Eliyɑ̀ nuti ör yï thwöm ɑ́kyel kì kelli thwömmi Isrɑil. De ɑ́ör-ɑ yï thwöm me bëëdø kì Dhɑrepɑth kì myërri Sïdön. 
Luke4:27 O ɑ́dɑ ji mø gïïr kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́nud Elicɑ̀ jɑltöng, mø ri gen di wɑɑny kì Isrɑil. De bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́yiel yi Elicɑ̀ kì kelli gen, den-ɑ́ Nɑɑmɑn, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Suriyɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́yiel kete.”" 
Luke4:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi teedø bëne kì sinɑgøg, kɑ ge ceg ki mɑgø yi liny." 
Luke4:29 Kɑ ge dhwödh-ɑ mɑl, kɑ Yëso ywɑɑj gen wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, kɑ gø kïdhi gen wïj tøg kïn-ɑ köme ógeer kɑɑlɑni. Ge ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ leengii piny kì wïj tøg kït." 
Luke4:30 De Yëso ree ɑ́bodhe kɑ kɑ̈l-ɑ kelli gen, kɑ ókedhø kì wɑ̈ye." 
Luke4:31 Kɑ Yëso kedh-ɑ Kɑpernɑum, kɑ ji pwönye kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth." 
Luke4:32 Ji ɑ́ngɑ̈ng yi pwönye, mɑ́ kwøbbe nënni ge teg." 
Luke4:33 Ádɑ jɑl me ree di wëy me rɑj kì sinɑgøg, kɑ jɑlɑni óryeerø ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni," 
Luke4:34 “Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth! Yïde ki wøn? Yï ɑ́bï-ɑ be rënyi wøn? Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni yïn ɑ́ men, yï bɑ ngeti kwërø, men-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Jwøk.”" 
Luke4:35 Aköbbi wëyɑni yi Yëso kinni, “Kud, kɑ yï bïí wɑ̈g kì ree!” Kɑ jɑlɑni leeng piny yi wëyɑni kì bøli ji bënn. Codhe, kɑ jɑlɑni wiye e bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́gögge gøn." 
Luke4:36 Kɑ ji ongɑ̈ngø de ge pyëny-ɑ ri gen kinni, “Á kwøbbi ngø ɑ bëëdø’ ni? Acire wëyrijjø kinni bï gen wɑ̈g, kɑ dhøge lïngi yi gen!”" 
Luke4:37 Kɑ per Yëso wɑ̈dh-ɑ yethi myërrɑni bënn. 
Luke4:38 Kɑ Yëso odhwödhø kì sinɑgøg, kɑ kedh-ɑ gøl Sɑymøn. Øri Sɑymøn, meyi cyëge, ɑ́bëëd ree dɑ lëdhi dël, kɑ Yëso kwɑjji yi gen kinni kønye gøn." 
Luke4:39 Akedhe buti ngɑnɑni, kɑ lëdhi dël menɑni cïïre wɑ̈g kì ree. Kɑ dële ókwöjø, ɑdhwödhe mɑl kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kɑ kedh-ɑ be kɑ̈lli gen." 
Luke4:40 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi cɑ̈ng piny, kɑ tyëng-ɑ buud muuj Yëso yi wɑddi gen. Kɑ gï yiele ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlli gen bënn, e nyi cïb-ɑ cingge kömi ngɑn-ɑ buud." 
Luke4:41 Wëyrijjø ɑ́bï wɑ̈g ge okïïwø kinni, “Yï bɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk.” De Yëso wëyɑni ɑ́kyëdde kɑ gï mɑ̈ɑ̈ne kwøb, kipe kɑ ɑ́yod ge gøn kinni Yëso bene Mesiy." 
Luke4:42 Kɑ Yëso odhwödhø kì mwøl kì ri tɑ̈ri piny ceth, kɑ kedh-ɑ kun bëëde kì wɑ̈ye, de ɑ́yɑb yi ji, kɑ yod yi gen, kɑ gø mɑ̈ɑ̈n gen kedhø." 
Luke4:43 De ge ɑ́köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Di dwɑddø kinni o yɑ pwönyɑ kwøbbi Jwøk kì yethi kɑ̈dd-ɑ kyeelø thyew, bene gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́ör yɑn.”" 
Luke4:44 Codhe, ɑwïïne e ópwönyø kì yethi sinɑgøgg kì myërri Yeud bënn." 
Luke5:1 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, Yëso ɑ́bëëd e ócungø kì tøg Tɑɑy Gɑlelì, kɑ ji mø gïïr ócugø kì bute be lïngi kwøbbi Jwøk." 
Luke5:2 Kɑ Yɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́ryew lidh yi Yëso kì dhøwɑdh. Jømɑy rum bëën wɑ̈g kì yethi gen, o ge olöögø ki bøyyi gen." 
Luke5:3 Kɑ Yëso kɑdh-ɑ yij morkɑb ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen, morkɑm-ɑ bɑ mi Sɑymøn, kɑ gø köbbe kinni kɑle morkɑb ki cøør nɑm. Kɑ Yëso pëgg-ɑ yij morkɑb e nudd e ópwönyø ki ji." 
Luke5:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki pwönyø, ɑköbbe Sɑymøn kinni, “Kyeew morkɑb keny-ɑ pɑ̈ng, kɑ bøyí leeng piny o yï mɑ̈gí ki rij.”" 
Luke5:5 Alöggi Sɑymøn kinni, “Wuö, wø ɑ́lɑng wɑ̈r wø omɑ̈yø, o wø nuti mɑ̈gø, de yï okööbø i leeng wøn bøyy piny, ge óleng yi yɑn.”" 
Luke5:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́leeng gen bøyy piny ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Yëso, ge ɑ́mɑ̈gi ki rij mø gïïr cɑrø, kɑ bøyy kømi kɑggø yi rij." 
Luke5:7 Kɑ jøg-ɑ yij morkɑm-ɑ kyeelø cwööl yi gen be kønyi gen. Abëën gen kɑ yɑ̈thɑni ryeet opɑ̈ngø yi rij, kɑ ge køm-ɑ mudø." 
Luke5:8 Sɑymøn Pïtør keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb, kɑ ree bøødhe piny kì bøli Yëso, ɑkööbe kinni, “Nyegí kì butɑ, Wuö. Yɑ bɑ jɑlorøg!”" 
Luke5:9 Ge ɑ́ngɑ̈ng geki jøg-ɑ kyeelø yi ngenyi rijj-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi gen. 
Luke5:10 Yɑgob geki Jøn, wɑ̈ddi Dhebedì ɑ́ngɑ̈ng thyew yi møgɑni, ge ɑ́bëëd ge omɑ̈yø kyeel ki Sɑymøn. Kɑ Sɑymøn köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Yï ko böggi! Cɑg ɑnɑn ceth, yï ómɑngg-ɑ ji.”" 
Luke5:11 Jøgɑni keny-ɑ ɑ́rum yɑ̈thi gen ki mɑɑg piny kì dhøwɑdh, kɑ jɑmmi gen wiy gen piny, kɑ ge løg-ɑ bɑng Yëso." 
Luke5:12 Yëso kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́yinge kɑɑl megø, ɑ́dɑ jɑl me ree di lɑ̈y kì kɑɑlɑni. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe Yëso, ɑbøødhe ree piny kì bøle, kɑ gø kwɑjje, kinni, “Ke dwɑddií Wuö, yɑ ócuggø gwøgø yi yïn kɑ yɑ ódhïwø.”" 
Luke5:13 Kɑ Yëso cinge rïïje, ɑnywɑle jɑlɑni, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Odwɑddø yi yɑn! Dönyi dëlí!” Kɑ lɑ̈y ówɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Luke5:14 Codhe, ɑkööb Yëso kinni, “Ko di ngɑn köbbi yi yïn. De kedh, kɑ rií nyudhí ókwërø, kɑ yï muuj ki gëëdhi kipe kɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny lɑ̈y, ni kɑ ɑ́cïg Mosɑ̀, menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ nyuudhi kì bøli teedø.”" 
Luke5:15 De wöddi Yëso ɑ́ceg pëddø tɑyø. Kɑ ji mø gïïr bï-ɑ yï Yëso be lïngi kwøbbe, møøgø bï kɑ per kinni o ge yiel ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlli gen." 
Luke5:16 De Yëso ree nyi boodhe’ wɑ̈ye kun cugge’ mɑlli Jwøk. 
Luke5:17 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, Yëso ɑ́bëëd e pwöny-ɑ ji, O kenyɑni ɑ́dɑ Jøpɑresì geki jøpwönyi Cigg mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l myërri Gɑlelì, møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Yeudiyɑ̀, o møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Yerusɑlem. Yëso ɑ́bëëd e nyii thödhø yi Wë ki tegø men yiele tyëng-ɑ buud ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì." 
Luke5:18 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́bëën jøg møøgø ge ókɑ̈ddø kì yij pyën ki jɑl me bɑ ɑdwɑny. Kɑ ri gen pɑ̈nyi gen ki kïdhii ød, o gø di cïb gen bøli Yëso." 
Luke5:19 De ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li wɑ̈dhi ød yi ngenyi ji. Codhe, kɑ ge yedh-ɑ wïj óthɑɑng ød, men-ɑ yije di Yëso, kɑ jɑlɑni luudh gen piny kì keny mɑ ɑ́yɑl yi gen kì wïj ønɑni, kɑ gø cïb gen dïdyëri ji kì bøli Yëso." 
Luke5:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh yïëyø mi gen yi Yëso, ɑkööbe kinni, “Jɑl, lɑ́ɑ̀w ɑ́dwöög piny kipe orøgí.”" 
Luke5:21 Kɑ jøpwönyi Cigg geki Jøpɑresì orumø ki pëthi gen kinni, “Jɑɑl, bɑ men cøn, ɑ yøn Jwøk kinnï? Pɑth ki Jwøk kete ɑ nyi cuggi lɑ̈ɑ̈ny orøøg dhɑnhø!”" 
Luke5:22 De møg-ɑ rømmi yi gen ngɑ̈nyi yi Yëso, ɑkööbe kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ rum wun ki gïg ni møg?" 
Luke5:23 Á ngø ɑ yöd, kwøb kinni, ‘Orøgí ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny’ wɑlɑ̀ kinni, ‘Dhwöödh kɑ yï cyɑ̈dhí?’" 
Luke5:24 De wu ónyudhɑ kinni Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø yïe dɑ tegø kì kömi piny, men lɑ̈ɑ̈nye orøg.” Codhe, kɑ Yëso jɑl-ɑ dële dwɑnyø köbbe kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn, dhwödhí mɑl, kwɑny pyëní, kɑ yï kedhí pɑɑ wun.”" 
Luke5:25 Kɑ jɑlɑni dhwödh-ɑ mɑl e onennø yi teedø bëne, ɑkwɑnye pyëne kɑ kedh-ɑ pɑɑ gen e lejj-ɑ Jwøk." 
Luke5:26 Teedø ɑ́ngɑ̈ng kɑ ge obwøgø, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Wɑ ɑ́lïdhi ki gïïngɑ̈ngø dicyɑ̈ngtïn!”" 
Luke5:27 Kɑ Yëso ókedhø e owïïnø kì kɑɑlɑni, kɑ jɑlgwɑ̈j me cwøl ɑ́ Leebì lidhe e obëëdø kì kej gwøge. Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Bïí bɑngɑ!”" 
Luke5:28 Codhe, kɑ Leebì dhwödh-ɑ mɑl kì keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde, ɑwiye jɑmme bënn kenyɑni, kɑ løg-ɑ bɑng Yëso." 
Luke5:29 Codhe, kɑ Leebì ogöögø ki ryëj me dwøng kipe kɑ ɑ́kedhi Yëso gøle. Jøgwɑ̈j mø gïïr geki kwï ji møøgø ɑ́bëëd ge nud kì kenyɑni thyew." 
Luke5:30 De jøpwönyi Cigg geki Jøpɑresì ɑ́cɑ̈gi ki gönyi jøbɑng Yëso kinni, “Wude ɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun kì kej ɑ́kyel wuki jøgwɑ̈j geki tyëngorøg?”" 
Luke5:31 Aløøg kwøbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Pɑth ki tyëng-ɑ dëlli gen yööd ɑ nyi yɑ̈bø ki ɑkïm, den-ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø." 
Luke5:32 Yɑ nuti bëën-ɑ be cwøli tyëngdøj, den-ɑ́ tyëngrijjø ɑ cwööl yi yɑn kipe kinni o pëthi gen geki bëëdi gen wil.”"
