Luke5:33 Kɑ Yëso pyëj yi ji møøgø kinni, “Jøbɑng Jøn ɑ́bëëd ri gen nyii twönø yi gen ki gïncɑm, kɑ ge nyii rïïjø ge mɑll-ɑ Jwøk ni kenyi göög Jøpɑresì. De jøbɑngí gede ɑ wɑ̈dhi gen cɑm yøw?”" 
Luke5:34 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Wëll ócuggi wiyø yi wun ki kɑ̈j kì kej thyëg, e jɑlnywöm nud kì kelli gen? Pɑ cuggi!" 
Luke5:35 De bøli keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l jɑlnywöm kì kelli gen óbï, o bene bøli kenyɑni ɑ ótwöön gen ri gen ki gïncɑm.”" 
Luke5:36 Awɑ̈jji gen gɑ́j møg yi Yëso kinni, “Bong dhɑnhø me cuggi kɑ̈ggø kì ri ógødh me nyɑ̈n ki nyɑ ógødh men buule ógødh me bɑ kwɑ̈ɑ̈l. Ngɑn göögø kinøw rëny-ɑ ógønh-ɑ nyɑ̈n, o men-ɑ ɑ́yød kì ri ógønh-ɑ nyɑ̈n pɑ kyëëw ki ógønh-ɑ bɑ kwɑ̈ɑ̈l." 
Luke5:37 Thyew, bong dhɑnhø me cuggi kønyi møgi oløg me nyɑ̈n yij ɑtheb me bɑ kwɑ̈ɑ̈l. Ke gwøgii kinøw, møng-ɑ nyɑ̈n ɑtheb pyëde’ pyëdø, kɑ møgø røy-ɑ piny, kɑ ɑtheb órënyø." 
Luke5:38 Møng-ɑ nyɑ̈n nyi kïdh-ɑ yij ɑtheb me nyɑ̈n. 
Luke5:39 Bong dhɑnhø me nyi dwɑddi mɑdh ki møng-ɑ nuti twɑgø keløg e rum mɑdh ki men-ɑ twɑgø, mɑ́ e bɑ men kööbø ceth kinni, ‘Møng-ɑ twɑgø, en ɑ lɑ̈w!’ ”" 
Luke6:1 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel Yëso ɑ́kedh e ócyɑ̈dhø e kɑ̈ll-ɑ yethi pwödh geki jøbɑnge, cyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. Akɑ̈bbi jøbɑnge ki byel, ɑnyøng ge gïn kì cinggi gen, kɑ gï nyɑm gen." 
Luke6:2 Kɑ kwï Jøpɑresì okööbø kinni, “Wude ɑ göög wun ki gïn-ɑ bɑ ɑkerø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth?”" 
Luke6:3 Kɑ Yëso ólöggø kinni, “Wu nuti rɑ̈ngø ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Debïd geki jøbɑnge keny-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑg gen yi kɑ̈j?" 
Luke6:4 Nuti kedhi ød Jwøk, kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki ópun-ɑ bɑ ɑkwër kɑ gø cɑme, ngö e nyi cɑm-ɑ yi ókwër, kɑ kwëe mëgge jøg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en!”" 
Luke6:5 Codhe kɑ Jøpɑresì köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø bɑ Wïi Sɑbɑth.”" 
Luke6:6 Kɑ Yëso kedh-ɑ be pwönyø kì sinɑgøg kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. Ádɑ jɑl me cingi kyëje dhëgø kì kenyɑni, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Yëso e ópwönyø." 
Luke6:7 Jøpwönyi Cigg geki Jøpɑresì ɑ́bëëd ge lebb-ɑ Yëso mɑ di gööge ki tyëng-ɑ buud ki cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, o gø di gøøny gen." 
Luke6:8 De gïn-ɑ ɑ́rømmi yi gen ngɑ̈nyi yi Yëso. Kɑ jɑl-ɑ cinge dhëgø köbbe kinni, “Cungí kì dïdyëri ji keny.” Adhwödhi jɑlɑni mɑl kɑ ócungø kì kenyɑni." 
Luke6:9 Kɑ Yëso jøg-ɑ lebbii köbbe kinni, “Yɑ pyëj-ɑ wun, ɑ́ ngø ɑ døj ki gwøgø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, gwøgi gïndøj wɑlɑ̀ gwøgi gïnrɑj? Yieli wëyi dhɑnhø ɑ døj, wɑlɑ̀ nɑ̈gi dhɑnhø?”" 
Luke6:10 Kɑ lïïdh-ɑ nyingi tyëng-ɑ gëddii ki ɑlɑggø ree werre’ werrø, kɑ jɑlɑni köbbe kinni, “Rïj cingí.” Kɑ jɑlɑni cinge rïïje, kɑ cinge ódönyø." 
Luke6:11 De Jøpɑresì ɑ́bëëd pëthi gen rijjø ki mendwøng, kɑ ri gen pyënyi gen, ki gïn-ɑ ócuggi göggi Yëso yi gen." 
Luke6:12 Kì bøli kenyɑni, kɑ Yëso yedh-ɑ wïj kït be mɑ̈ddø. Kɑ lɑng-ɑ wɑ̈r e mɑll-ɑ Jwøk." 
Luke6:13 Kì mwøl keny-ɑ ɑ́ru wøw, ɑcwööle jøbɑnge yïe, kɑ oyïënyø ki pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì kelli gen, kɑ gï cɑge gɑ tyëngwöödø," 
Luke6:14 Sɑymøn (ɑ ɑ́cɑg yi Yëso ɑ́ Pïtør) kí Ándrø ómï Sɑymøn, kí Yɑgob, kí Jøn, kí Pïlïp, kí Bɑrthølømɑøs" 
Luke6:15 kí Mɑthyëw, kí Tömɑs, kí Yɑgob wɑ̈d Alpɑ̀, kí Sɑymøn (ɑ nyi cwøl ɑ́ Lunø,)" 
Luke6:16 kí Yeudɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yɑgob, kí Yeudɑ̀ Iskɑryøt jɑl-ɑ ɑ́twɑny Yëso." 
Luke6:17 Kɑ Yëso yïnh-ɑ piny kì wïj kït geki tyëngwöödø, kɑ ócungø kì dïthwørø. Ji mø gïïr kì kelli jøbɑnge ɑ́bëëd ge nud kì kenyɑni, kí ji mø gïïr cɑrø mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l myërri Yeudiyɑ̀, kí Yerusɑlem, kí myërri kömi nɑɑm omelø, ɑ løg Suur kí Sïdön." 
Luke6:18 Ge ɑ́bï-ɑ be lïngi pwönye, o ge yiel ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlli gen. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ köthi gen buudh yi wëyrijjø, yiele ki wëyɑni." 
Luke6:19 Ji bënn ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ nywɑli Yëso, mɑ́ e ɑ́dɑ tegø me nyi bï wɑ̈g kì ree, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ nywɑlii nyii dönyø." 
Luke6:20 Kɑ Yëso lïïdh-ɑ yï jøbɑnge, ɑkööbe kinni, “Wu tyëng-ɑ nyingi wun cɑn, ri wun dɑ gyëdh; mɑ́ Pödhi Jwøk bɑ mi wun!" 
Luke6:21 Wu tyëng-ɑ ri wun di kɑ̈j ɑnɑn, ri wun dɑ gyëdh, mɑ́ wu óyɑ̈ng! Wu tyëng-ɑ ywöngi ɑnɑn, ri wun dɑ gyëdh, mɑ́ wu óngedhi ki medi pyëw!" 
Luke6:22 “Ri wun dɑ gyëdh keny-ɑ ómɑɑn wun yi ji, kɑ wu bɑny yi gen, kɑ wu gwɑddi yi gen, kɑ ge okööbø i wu bɑ tyëngrijjø kipe kɑ̀ cyɑ̈dhi wun kì bɑng Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø." 
Luke6:23 Mïni pëthi wun dicyɑ̈ngɑni, mɑ́ köögi mi wun dwøng kì mɑl, mɑ́ gïg ni møgɑni ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nyi gögg-ɑ jøtöng yi kweyyi gen." 
Luke6:24 “De wun ɑ tyëngkɑ̈rì, ri wun dɑ cyën, mɑ́ jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́tyer yi pëthi wun ɑ́yod yi wun!" 
Luke6:25 Wu tyëng-ɑ yɑ̈ngø ɑnɑn ri wun dɑ cyën, mɑ́ wu ómɑg yi kɑ̈j! Wu tyëng-ɑ ngedhi ɑnɑn, ri wun dɑ cyën, mɑ́ wu óywöngi kɑ wu okïïmø." 
Luke6:26 “Ri wun dɑ cyën keløg wu ceg kɑ lenhø yi teedø bëne, mɑ́ kweyyi gen ɑ́bëëd ge nyi lenh-ɑ jøtöng møg-ɑ pɑ nyi töng dyër." 
Luke6:27 “De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, wu tyëng-ɑ lïngø èn kinni, mɑɑru tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Nyi göggu tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn wun ki gïndøj." 
Luke6:28 Nyi kwɑjji wun gyëdh kipe tyëng-ɑ nyi lɑ̈mmi wun cyën, geki tyëng-ɑ guud nyingi wun." 
Luke6:29 Ke di ngɑn gøj yïn kì thɑ̈ngí, lugí thɑ̈ng-ɑ kyeelø thyew, o gø gøje. Keløg e dɑ ngɑn kwɑny lɑwí ko mɑ̈ɑ̈n ɑ́ywödhí thyew." 
Luke6:30 Nyi thödhí ngɑn-ɑ kwɑ̈jji kì yïí. Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ kwɑny gïí ko piir. 
Luke6:31 Bëëd ki ji ki bëën-ɑ di dwɑddi yi yïn kì yï gen. 
Luke6:32 “Keløg yï mɑɑr-ɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yïn keti gen, dɑ gyëdh kì ri mɑ̈ɑ̈dø menɑni? Cɑgg ɑ́ tyëngorøg, ɑ́ ngø ge nyii göögø kinøw!" 
Luke6:33 Keløg ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ nyi göggi yïn ki gïndøj, ɑ nyi göggi yi yïn ki gïndøj, dɑ gyëdh kì ri gwøng ni menɑni? Cɑgg ɑ́ tyëngorøg, ɑ́ ngø ge nyii göögø kinøw!" 
Luke6:34 Keløg wu nyi wïdh-ɑ tyëng-ɑ rømmi yi wun kinni wu ócuggø cudø yi gen, dɑ gyëdh kì ri menɑni? Cɑgg ɑ́ tyëngorøg, ɑ́ ngø ge nyi wïdh-ɑ ji-ɑ ni gen kipe kinni o gïn-ɑ widh ócol!" 
Luke6:35 De mɑɑru tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Nyi göggu gen ki gïndøj, kɑ ge nyi wïdhi wun wu pɑ rumø kinni wu ócuddi, o wu óyïddi wun ki köögi me dwøng, kɑ wu ogöögø ki nyigi Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng, mɑ́ en kiree, pyëwe nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki ji, cɑgg gɑ ji mø kwïj pwøj, o pëthi gen pɑ̈ng yi orøg." 
Luke6:36 Nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m pëthi wun, ni kenyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw Wïyi wun ceth." 
Luke6:37 “Wu ko nyi cɑ̈ɑ̈y ki tyëng-ɑ kyeelø kipe wu ócɑy. Tyëng-ɑ kyeelø ko nyi gøøny wun kinni i ge bɑ̈jjø, o wu ócög wun wu pɑ gøøny thyew. Nyi wiy wun tyëng-ɑ cɑɑg wun piny, o wu ówiy keny-ɑ ócɑ̈gi wun piny." 
Luke6:38 Nyi nëngu ji møøgø, o wu ónëngi yi Jwøk. Wu ónëngi ki mø ngenyø; gïn-ɑ yije órummi óyeg kɑ rɑɑr-ɑ piny, kɑ køny yethi cinggi wun. Mɑ́ gïn-ɑ́ yije ɑ́muuj yi wun, en ɑ yije óthödhi wun yi Jwøk. Wu óthödhi yi Jwøk, kɑ yuu-ɑ nyi muuj yi wun.”" 
Luke6:39 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Dɑ cwør me cuggi pyejji cwør-ɑ kyeelø? Pɑ cuggi! Ge pɑ̈dh-ɑ yij wøl ryeet." 
Luke6:40 Nyiigwed pɑ lɑ̈w kibøli jɑlpwönye, de nyiigwed men-ɑ ópwönyø kidøøj, ceg-ɑ gwøg e pɑ̈r ki jɑlpwönye." 
Luke6:41 “Yïde ɑ nenní nyɑ wëëlø kì wɑɑng wɑɑd wun, o yï cöög duli yɑdh men-ɑ wɑngí pɑ nenni yi yïn?" 
Luke6:42 Wɑɑd wun óköbbi yi yïn kidï kinni, ‘Mɑ̈dh, wiy yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ nyɑ wëëlø men wɑ̈g kì wɑngí,’ e duli yɑdh men-ɑ wɑngí pɑ nenni yi yïn? Yïn, wëny! Kɑ̈ɑ̈l duli yɑdh men-ɑ wɑngí wɑ̈g møti, codhe o yï nëën kidøøj, o wëël-ɑ wɑɑng ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn wɑ̈g cyee." 
Luke6:43 “Yɑdh men-ɑ døj pɑ nyi nywøl ki nywøl mø rijjø, nɑ kɑ̀ pɑ nyi nywøl yɑnh rɑj ki nywøl mø døøj." 
Luke6:44 Yɑdh nyi ngij-ɑ ri nywøle. Ji pɑ nyi punø ki nywøli ólɑm kì ri ɑ́lɑl, nɑ kɑ̀ pɑ nyi pøn nywøli oløg kì kö but." 
Luke6:45 Tyëngdøj nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ gïgdøj wɑ̈g kì ri døøjø men-ɑ mïdhi yi gen kì yethi pëthi gen. De tyëngrijjø nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ gïgrijjø wɑ̈g kì ri rɑ̈jø men-ɑ mïdhi yi gen kì yethi pëthi gen. Ji nyi kømm-ɑ gïg-ɑ pëthi gen. 
Luke6:46 “Wude ɑ nyi cwøllu yɑn kinni ‘Wuö, Wuö’ o gïn-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn pɑ gwøg yi wun?" 
Luke6:47 Wu ónyudhɑ ki ngɑn-ɑ pɑ̈r ki ngɑn bï be lïngi kwøbbɑ, kɑ ogöögø kì ri kwøbbɑni." 
Luke6:48 Ngɑnɑni nɑ jɑl mɑ ɑ́gëëd ki ød. Kɑ tyelli ød konye, kɑ ge niyeeng-ɑ piny keny-ɑ bɑ kït. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën bɑɑyø, kɑ thew ree pɑ̈nye ki wøji ønɑni, de ød nuti wöl onhɑ̈nh, mɑ́ e ókëël-ɑ kömi kït." 
Luke6:49 De ngɑn-ɑ lïngi kwøbbɑ, kɑ ocögø e pɑ göögø kì ri kwøbbɑni, nɑ jɑl mɑ ɑ́gëëd ki ød, e tyelli gøn nuti niyengø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën bɑɑyø, ønɑni ɑ́jwɑn pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kɑ órënyø ki mendwøng!”" 
Luke7:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum møgɑni bënn ki köbbi ji yi Yëso, ɑkedhe Kɑpernɑum." 
Luke7:2 Ádɑ dhɑbïdh me yïe di bɑ̈ng me pere teg yi wɑ̈n. Bɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́bëëd dële orɑ̈mø ki menrɑj, kɑ ócyɑ̈ngø thøø." 
Luke7:3 Dhɑbïnhɑni keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge møg-ɑ kømmi yi teedø kì ri Yëso, ɑöde ki kwï jøgdøngi Yeud mø kedhi be kwɑjji Yëso, kinni bëe be yieli bɑ̈nge." 
Luke7:4 Akedhi jøgɑni yï Yëso, kɑ kwɑjji yi gen kinni, “Dhɑbïnhɑni døøj ki kønyø yi yïn." 
Luke7:5 Tyëng pödhee mɑɑr yi en, o wɑ ɑ́gëdde ki sinɑgøg.”" 
Luke7:6 Codhe, kɑ Yëso ókedhø ki gen. E rum cyɑ̈ngø ki gøl dhɑbïdh, ɑödi dhɑbïnhɑni yïe ki ji møg köbbii kinni, “Rií ko pïd ki bëën gølɑ Wuö, kipe yɑ pɑth ki dhɑnhø me gøle cuggi bëënø yi yïn." 
Luke7:7 Bene gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́cögɑ yɑ pɑ bï yïí ki dëlɑ. De ceg kwøb yøw, o bɑ̈ngɑ bødhe." 
Luke7:8 Yɑn thyew, yɑ bɑ dhɑnhø me ceg ki jɑɑgø. O yïɑ dɑ ɑlɑthkerr møg jɑɑg yi yɑn. Alɑthker nyi köbbɑ’ köbbø kinni, ‘Bïí!’ Kɑ nyii bëënø. O bɑ̈ngɑ nyi köbbɑ’ köbbø kinni, ‘Gwøg gïn!’ Kɑ gïnɑni nyi gwøge.”" 
Luke7:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Yëso, kɑ ceg-ɑ ngɑ̈ngø. Aluge ree teen-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì bɑnge, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, bene yïëyø men-ɑ pëddi döng èn. Yɑ nuti wöl yïddø ki dhɑnhø me yïe di yïëyø me ni men, cɑgg ɑ́ kì Isrɑil!”" 
Luke7:10 Adøøg jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör gøl dhɑbïdh, kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni yuud gen dële yönø." 
Luke7:11 Dhuki, ɑkedhi Yëso kɑɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Nɑin, kɑ jøbɑnge geki teedø mø ngenyø løg-ɑ bɑnge." 
Luke7:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe dhø döri kɑɑlɑni, ɑrøøme ki dhɑnhø me kɑ̈lli e thøø, nyelɑni bɑ wɑ̈dkyel, meye ɑ́wiye piny ɑ́ thwöm, ngɑnɑni lug-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng wɑ̈de kɑ̀ tëërrii be konyø, o ji mø gïïr ólugø kì bɑnge." 
Luke7:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh ngɑnɑni yi Wë, kɑ yije óywöngø kipere ki mendwøng, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Yï ko ywöngi.”" 
Luke7:14 Akedhe kɑ gïn-ɑ yije kɑ̈lli dhɑnhø nywɑle, kɑ tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈llii ócungø. Kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni, “Jɑlthinh, yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn, dhwödhí mɑl!”" 
Luke7:15 Kɑ nyel-ɑ thøø dhwödh-ɑ mɑl, kɑ ócɑ̈gø kwøb. Codhe, kɑ döggi meye yi Yëso." 
Luke7:16 Ji bënn ɑ́ngɑ̈ng, kɑ ge ócɑ̈gø lejji Jwøk kinni, “Yïee ɑ́bëën yi jɑltöng me dwøng! Jwøk ɑ́bï be yieli jie.”" 
Luke7:17 Kɑ kwøbbi gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yëso tɑɑy-ɑ yethi myërri Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn, kí myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi." 
Luke7:18 Jøn ɑ́köbbi yi jøbɑnge ki møgɑni bënn. Acwödde ki ɑ́ryew kì kelli jøbɑnge. 
Luke7:19 Kɑ gï öre yï Wë be pëjjø kinni, “Bene yïn ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wɑngi i obëënø, wɑlɑ̀ yïd wøn ki ngɑn megø?”" 
Luke7:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi jøgɑni yï Yëso, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g, wø ɑ́öre yïí be pyëji yïn kinni, ‘Bene yïn ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wɑngi i obëënø, wɑlɑ̀ yïd wøn ki ngɑn megø?’ ”" 
Luke7:21 Kì bøli kenyɑni Yëso ɑ́bëëd e ceg-ɑ yïëdø ki ji møg-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø bënn. Kɑ wëyrijjø cyedde, kɑ cörr nyingi gïn yiebe." 
Luke7:22 Codhe, kɑ jøbɑng Jøn kwøbbi gen løøg yi Yëso, kinni, “Kedh wun, köbbu Jøn gïg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wun kí møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wun kì keny. Cwør ócuggø nënnø, ngwøl ócuggø cyɑ̈dhø, tyëng-ɑ ri gen di lɑ̈y nyii gwøgø kɑ ge ódhïwø. Ming ócuggø lïngø, tyëngthøø nyi dwöög-ɑ be nënnì. O tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur opwönyø ki Wöndøj." 
Luke7:23 Tyëng-ɑ koo bɑny yɑn, ri gen dɑ gyëdh!”" 
Luke7:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh jøbɑng Jøn, ɑcɑ̈gi Yëso ki kwøb kì ri Jøn, kinni, “Wu ɑ́kedh-ɑ be lidhi ngø kì yij pɑ̈l? Obej me nïngi yi yømø?" 
Luke7:25 Wu ɑ́kedh-ɑ be lidhi ngø? Jɑl me rugø ki ógudh mø myëër? Pɑth, ji-ɑ nyi rugø ki ógudh-ɑ myëër, bɑ tyëngkɑ̈rì, o ge nyi ying-ɑ kɑ̈lli rɑ̈nhì." 
Luke7:26 De wu ɑ́kedh-ɑ be lidhi ngø? Jɑltöng? Awøø, o yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, Jøn dwøng kibøli jɑltöng." 
Luke7:27 Møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed kì ree ek: ‘Jɑlwöönɑ óörɑ mɑl bølí, en ɑ ógwir yöö kiperí.’" 
Luke7:28 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, Jøn dwøng kibøli ji-ɑ ɑ́nywøl yi mɑ̈nn bënn, de cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, ngɑn pere pɑ ti teg, dwøng kibøle kì Pödhi Jwøk.”" 
Luke7:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi ji, geki jøgwɑ̈j thyew, kɑ ge oyïëyø kinni pwönyi kwøbbi Jwøk døøj, mɑ́ ge ɑ́rum ki jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø yi Jøn." 
Luke7:30 De Jøpɑresì geki jøpwönyi Cigg, møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg ki gwirø yi Jwøk kiper gen ɑ́bɑny yi gen; ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø yi Jøn." 
Luke7:31 Codhe, kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni, “Rïj men ópɑ̈ɑ̈rɑ kɑ ngø? O ge nɑ ngø?" 
Luke7:32 Ge nɑ othønhø mø bëëdø kì yij kyeel ngyew, ge cwøll-ɑ ri gen kinni, ‘Wu ɑ́göjji wøn ki bul, de wu ɑ́cög wu nuti cöngø. Wø ɑ́wör wø óywöngø, de wu ɑ́cög wu nuti ywøg.’" 
Luke7:33 Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g ɑ́bï e pɑ nyi cyɑ̈mø ki gïncɑm, o pɑ nyi mɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg, kɑ wu okööbø i ree dɑ wɑ̈l." 
Luke7:34 Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ɑ́bï e ocyɑ̈mø ki gïncɑm, o omɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg, kɑ wu okööbø kinni, ‘Lidhu en! Bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈mø, o bɑ mɑ̈dhi møgø, o bɑ mɑ̈dh ki jøgwɑ̈j geki tyëngorøg!’" 
Luke7:35 De peli wïj Jwøk, ɑ́nyodh kinni bɑ dyër, yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëyii.”" 
Luke7:36 Kɑ Yëso ryej yi jɑl mɑ Jɑlpɑresì, ɑkedhe gøl jɑlɑni kɑ pëgg-ɑ tɑw." 
Luke7:37 Ádɑ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi kì kɑɑlɑni, keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng ngɑnɑni kinni i Yëso bɑ ɑryej kì gøl jɑl-ɑ bɑ Jɑlpɑresì, ɑbëëne e ókɑ̈ddø ki ɑ́thïwi e pɑ̈ng yi møw me yøme med." 
Luke7:38 Kɑ pëgg-ɑ piny buti Yëso kì dhøggi tyelle, e óywöngø. Kɑ tyelli Yëso nebe ki pïi nyinge, kɑ gï nyi dime ki yëyyi wïje, gï numme’ nummø, kɑ gï nyi gïnye ki møw-ɑ yøme med." 
Luke7:39 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi Jɑlpɑresì men-ɑ ɑ́ryej Yëso kì gøle, ɑrume ki pyëwe kinni, “Keløg jɑɑl di bëëd ɑ́ jɑltöng kidyër, di yod yi en kinni, ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ nywɑllii bɑ ngetorøg!”" 
Luke7:40 Aköbbi Jɑlpɑresì menɑni yi Yëso kinni, “Sɑymøn, yïɑ dɑ gïjø me dwɑddɑ köbbi yïn.” Alögge kinni, “Kööb jɑlpwönyø.”" 
Luke7:41 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Ádɑ ji ɑ́ryew mø kömi gen di kwör mi jɑl megø. Ákyel köme dɑ ngyëny miy ɑ́bïj, o ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø köme dɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
Luke7:42 Yï gen bong ngyëny møg cud yi gen ki körri gen. De jɑlngyëny, jøgɑni ryeet ɑ́köbbe kinni i ge ko cud. Á men kì kelli gen ɑ ómɑɑr jɑlngyëny ki mendwøng?”" 
Luke7:43 Alöggi Sɑymøn kinni, “Yɑ orumø kinni, bɑ jɑl-ɑ́ köme ɑ́di ngyënyy-ɑ ngenyø.” Akööb Yëso kinni, “Yï ɑ́kwøb dyër.”" 
Luke7:44 Codhe, kɑ Yëso wïje luge ngɑnɑni, kɑ Sɑymøn köbbe kinni, “Ngɑɑn, onennø yi yïn? Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëënɑ gølí, bong pïg lwøøgɑ tyellɑ mɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn, de ngɑnɑni tyellɑ ɑ́lwøge ki pïi nyinge, kɑ gï nyi dime ki yëyyi wïje." 
Luke7:45 Yɑ nuti nuumø yi yïn ki nuumi mër, de ngɑnɑni kër-ɑ ɑ́bëënɑ kɑl, nuti wïyø ki nummi tyellɑ." 
Luke7:46 Wïjɑ nuti gïnyø yi yïn ki møw, de ngɑnɑni, møw me yøme med ɑ́kønye kömi tyellɑ." 
Luke7:47 Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kinni, orøge cɑgg e dwøng, ɑ́rum ki lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, bene ɑ bɑnge mɑ̈ɑ̈de ki mendwøng, de ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yiel ki orøg me nøg, mɑ̈ɑ̈d-ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø me nøg.”" 
Luke7:48 Codhe, ɑköbbi ngɑnɑni yi Yëso kinni, “Orøgí ɑ́rum ki lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø.”" 
Luke7:49 Kɑ ji-ɑ tɑw ócɑ̈gø pyënyi ri gen kinni, “Jɑɑl bɑ men cøn, ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nye orøg?”" 
Luke7:50 Kɑ ngɑnɑni köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Yï ɑ́yiel yi yïëyí; kedh ki mër.”" 
Luke8:1 Codhe, ɑkedh Yëso e owïïnø kì kelli kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø kí kɑ̈dd-ɑ thønhø bënn, e pwöny-ɑ Wöndøj mi Pödhi Jwøk. Tyëngwöödø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kɑ en." 
Luke8:2 Thyew, ɑ́dɑ kwï tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn mɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki Yëso, tyëngɑni ɑ́ceg kɑ yielø yi Yëso ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì geki wëyrijjø, ɑ løg Meerì ɑ nyi cwøl ɑ́ Mɑgdɑliyɑ̀, ɑ ree ɑ́ryëëm wëy ɑ́bïryew wɑ̈g." 
Luke8:3 Kí Anɑ̀ cï Kudhɑ̀, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑgø kì tøg buri Ërödøs; kí Susɑnɑ̀, kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møøgø mø gïïr. Tyëngɑni ɑ́bëëd Yëso geki jøbɑnge nyii kønyø yi gen ki ngyëny møg-ɑ bɑ mø cwɑggi gen." 
Luke8:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cugi teedø mø gïïr, kɑ ji møøgø bï-ɑ yï Yëso ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ myërr mø gïïr, ɑwɑ̈jji gen gɑ́j møg yi Yëso." 
Luke8:5 “Dɑ jɑl megø mɑ ɑ́kedhi pwödhe be wïïwø ki köödh. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́wïïwe, kwï köödh ɑ́dëëm yij yöö. Kɑ köödhɑni nyøn yi ji, kɑ ge cɑm yi winy." 
Luke8:6 Kwï köödh ɑ́dëëm keny me bɑ kït, keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi gen ki twïyø, kɑ ge othøø, mɑ́ lɑ̈bi kenyɑni ɑ́jwɑn thwøwø." 
Luke8:7 Kwï köödh ɑ́dëëm kelli koodh, de koodhɑni ɑ́kedh ge jwɑn-ɑ døngø, kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́twïy twij yi gen." 
Luke8:8 Kɑ kwï köödh dëëm-ɑ yij lɑ̈bø me døøj, kɑ ge ocyegø kidøøj, kɑ ɑ́kyel onywølø ki nying miyø.” Kɑ møgɑni ngøl yi Yëso kinni, “Lïng wun keløg yï wun dɑ yïthh!”" 
Luke8:9 Apyëëj Yëso yi jøbɑnge ki gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gɑ́jɑni. 
Luke8:10 Kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni, “Bene wun ɑ ɑ́yieny, o wu nyudhi gïg-ɑ bɑ ɑkɑnn kì yij Pödhi Jwøk. De ji-ɑ kyeelø nyi wɑ̈jji kɑ gɑ́j kipe kinni, o ge bëëd gen nyingi gen bɑ ɑyieb, de ge pɑ nëënø. O ge lïng gen de gïg-ɑ lïngi yi gen pɑ gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen." 
Luke8:11 “Bene gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gɑ́jɑni èn: köödh bɑ wööni Jwøk. 
Luke8:12 Köödh-ɑ ɑ́dëëm tøg yöö, pɑ̈r ki ji-ɑ nyi lïngi kwøbbi Jwøk, de Cethɑn nyii bëënø kɑ kwøbbɑni nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì pëthi gen. Codhe, o ge dhɑ̈li gen ki yïëyø, o ge cög ge pɑ yiel." 
Luke8:13 Köödh-ɑ ɑ́dëëm keny-ɑ bɑ kït, pɑ̈r ki ji-ɑ nyi lïngi kwøbbi Jwøk, kɑ yïëy yi gen ki medi pëthi gen, de kwøbbɑni pɑ nyi wëggi gen niyeeng pëthi gen. Ge nyi yïëy kɑ nyɑ keny me thiinh, kɑ ge nyi døøg-ɑ cyɑ̈n kenyi bëën ɑkørr." 
Luke8:14 Köödh-ɑ ɑ́dëëm kelli koodh pɑ̈r ki ji-ɑ nyi lïngi kwøbbi Jwøk, de ri gen nyi wëggi ge’ tyɑmø yi rummi kömi piny geki ngwej kì bɑng kɑ̈rì, kí bëëdi kömi piny, kɑ ge nyii cögø ge pɑ døngi, kɑ ge nyii cögø ge pɑ kɑ̈ni ki nywøl." 
Luke8:15 O köödh-ɑ ɑ́dëëm yij lɑ̈m-ɑ med, pɑ̈r ki ji-ɑ nyi lïngi kwøbbi Jwøk ki pëëth mø døøj, kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi gen nyi mïdhi yi gen, kɑ ge odyëjø gïti keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ni gen ki nywøl." 
Luke8:16 “Bong dhɑnhø me cwiny lɑ̈mbɑ̈ kɑ gø kume ki ɑ́tɑy, wɑlɑ̀ kɑ gø kɑɑne thɑ nɑngɑreb. De dhɑnhø kenyi cwinye lɑ̈mbɑ̈, gø nyi cïbe’ wïj tɑrɑbedhɑ̀, o ji-ɑ óbï ød nëën gen ki cɑr." 
Luke8:17 “Jɑmm-ɑ bɑ ɑ́kɑnn bënn ónënni, kɑ gïg-ɑ kɑnni bënn yod." 
Luke8:18 “Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, nyi lïng wun kidøøj, mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ nyi lïngø kɑ tyelli kwøb yod yi gen, dïdi gen ómed. De tyëng-ɑ pɑ nyi lïngø, o tyelli kwøb pɑ yod yi gen, cɑgg ɑ́ møg nøg, møg-ɑ rømmi yi gen ce gï yood gen, bɑ møg-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì yï gen.”" 
Luke8:19 Kɑ meyi Yëso geki nyiimen bï-ɑ yïe be këëmii, de piny ɑ́bëëd e twij yi ngenyi ji, kɑ ge ódhɑ̈lø wɑ̈dhi yïe." 
Luke8:20 Kɑ nget ɑ́kyel Yëso köbbe kinni, “Meyí geki nyiimyëw cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑ̈g ge dwɑdd-ɑ yïddø ki yïn.”" 
Luke8:21 21 Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Meyɑ ki nyiimïɑ, bɑ ji-ɑ nyi lïngi kwøbbi Jwøk, kɑ gï mïdhi gen.”" 
Luke8:22 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, Yëso geki jøbɑnge ɑ́kɑdhi yij morkɑb, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedhi wɑ løøg nɑm.” Kɑ ge ócɑ̈gø këwwi løøngɑni." 
Luke8:23 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd ge ókyëwø, kɑ Yëso ónenø. Kɑ yømø me teeg ocödø ge ying-ɑ dïnɑm. Kɑ morkɑb opɑ̈ngø yi pïgi ɑpɑgø; ge bɑ møg mud." 
Luke8:24 Kɑ jøgɑni jwɑn-ɑ be cyëëwi Yëso ge okööbø kinni, “Wuö! Wuö! Wɑ othøø!” Adhwödhi Yëso mɑl, kɑ ɑtunø geki ɑpɑgø köbbe cungi gen. Kɑ piny ceg-ɑ ì dïw kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Luke8:25 Kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Yïëyi wun ying-ɑ keny?” Abwøg jøgɑni kɑ ge ongɑ̈ngø, de ge pyëny-ɑ ri gen kinni, “Jɑɑl bɑ men cyee, ɑ köbbi yømø geki ɑpɑgø, kɑ kwøbbe lïngi yi gen?”" 
Luke8:26 Kɑ Yëso geki jøbɑnge, odhwödhø ki morkɑb kì Gɑlelì ge bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ nɑm, ge kedh-ɑ myërri Gerɑsɑ̀." 
Luke8:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑdhi Yëso piny, ɑbëën jɑl me ree di wëyrijjø yïe. Jɑlɑni yïe dɑ keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r e pɑ rugø ki ógudh, o pɑ bëëdø kì pɑc, de bëëd ɑ wɑ̈thi rörri ji kì pɑ̈l." 
Luke8:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe Yëso, ɑryeere kɑ ree leenge piny kì bøli Yëso. Akööbe ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Yï yɑb-ɑ ngø kì yï wøn, Yëso, Wɑ̈d Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng? Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, yɑ ko göjjí orɑng!”" 
Luke8:29 Møgɑni ɑ́kwøbe kɑ per kɑ ɑ́köbbi wëyrɑj yi Yëso kinni bëe wɑ̈g kì ri jɑlɑni. Nyii mɑgø yi wëyɑni tyel mø gïïr. Cɑgg tyelle di yëll geki cingge, yëllɑni nyi tørre’ tørrø, kɑ nyi kïdhi pɑ̈l yi wëyɑni o bëëde kete kì kunɑni." 
Luke8:30 Apyëjii yi Yëso kinni, “Nyingí bɑ men?” Alögge kinni, “Nyingɑ bɑ Yɑy!” Mɑ́ wëyɑni ɑ́bëëd ge gïïr kì ri jɑlɑni." 
Luke8:31 Akwɑjji Yëso yi wëyɑni kinni, ge ko ör yij ölø." 
Luke8:32 Ádɑ dɑɑg kundhøngø me cyɑ̈mø kì wïj kwøømø, kɑ Yëso kwɑjji yi wëyɑni kinni wiye gïn, o ge kedhi gen ri kundhøngø. Kɑ gï wiye kedh gen." 
Luke8:33 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën wëyɑni wɑ̈g kì ri jɑlɑni, ɑkedhi gen ri kundhøngø, kɑ dɑɑg kundhøngø reng-ɑ piny kì wïj kwøømø, kɑ ceg-ɑ ì cur kì nɑm, kɑ omudø bëne." 
Luke8:34 Kwɑ̈yyi kundhøngø keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb, ɑrengi gen. Kɑ tyëng kɑɑlɑni geki tyëng myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi köbbi gen gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb." 
Luke8:35 Kɑ ji kedh-ɑ be lidhi gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi gen yï Yëso, kɑ jɑl-ɑ́ ree ɑ́di wëyrijjø yuud gen e obëëdø kì buti Yëso, ree dɑ ógudh, o göögø ki dhɑnhø me døøj. Kɑ jiɑni obwøgø." 
Luke8:36 Ji-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi, tyëng-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́lony ki köbbø yi gen, ki kër-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg jɑlɑni yi Yëso." 
Luke8:37 Kɑ Yëso kwɑjji yi tyëng myërri Gerɑsɑ̀ bënn kinni dhwödhe kì pödhi gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bwøg bënn. Codhe, ɑkɑdhi Yëso yij morkɑb kɑ døøg-ɑ Gɑlelì." 
Luke8:38 Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yëso ɑ́kwɑ̈jji kinni, “Wiy yɑ kedhɑ ki wun.” De ɑ́ör yi Yëso kinni," 
Luke8:39 “Døøg pɑc, kɑ ji köbbí gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi yïn yi Jwøk!” Codhe, kɑ jɑlɑni ókedhø e owïïnø kì yethi myërr e köbb-ɑ ji gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggii yi Yëso." 
Luke8:40 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg Yëso Gɑlelì, ɑywøørii yi dhɑnhø bëne, mɑ́ ji ɑ́bëëd ge yïd-ɑ en." 
Luke8:41 Kɑ jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Yɑyrøs, o bɑ jɑngi sinɑgøg, bï-ɑ yï Yëso, kɑ ree bøødhe piny kì bøle, e kwɑjj-ɑ gøn kinni kedhe gøle." 
Luke8:42 Nyɑɑr Yɑyrøs, bɑ ɑ́kyel kete, runne bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, o cyɑ̈ngø thøø. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhe e kedh-ɑ gøl Yɑyrøs, kɑ ceg ki twijø yi teedø." 
Luke8:43 Ádɑ ngɑndhɑjø kì kelli teenɑni me ree cyɑ̈dhi yi wɑɑnø ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, ngyënyye ɑ́tyëg yi ɑkïmm de ɑ́dhɑ̈li yielø ki gïn ni menɑni." 
Luke8:44 Ngɑnɑni ɑ́jwɑni bɑng Yëso, kɑ tuung ógødhe nywɑle, kɑ wɑɑnø ócungø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Luke8:45 Kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni, “Á men ɑ ɑ́nywɑl yɑn?” Kɑ ji okyëdø bënn, ɑkööb Pïtør kinni, “Wuö, yï pëjj-ɑ́ɑ̀ dï ɑnɑn, yï ótwij kej ɑ́kyel yi ji ni men, kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn, o yï ceg kɑ dhɑ̈nggø yi gen?”" 
Luke8:46 De Yëso ɑ́kööb këti kinni, “Dɑ dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́nywɑl yɑn ceth, kipe ɑ́yod yi yɑn kinni dɑ tegø mɑ ɑ́bï wɑ̈g kì riɑ.”" 
Luke8:47 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yodii yi ngɑnɑni kinni ɑ́rum ki yodø, ɑbëëne yï Yëso dële okïrrø, kɑ ree bøødhe bøli Yëso, kɑ okööbø kì bøli teedø ki gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́nywɑle Yëso, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́dönye kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Luke8:48 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Nyɑrɑ, yï ɑ́yiel yi yïëyí; kedh ki mër.”" 
Luke8:49 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd Yëso okööbø, ɑbëën ngɑn me kɑ̈ɑ̈l gøl Yɑyrøs, jɑngi sinɑgøg, kɑ Yɑyrøs köbbe kinni, “Nyɑrí ɑ́rum ki thøø. Jɑlpwönyø ko jud këti.”" 
Luke8:50 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Yëso ɑköbbe Yɑyrøs kinni, “Yï ko bwøg. Yïëëy yøw, o nyɑrí bødhe.”" 
Luke8:51 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Yëso kɑl, ɑ́wiy-ɑ Pïtør, kí Jøn, kí Yɑgob, kí wïyi nyɑnthinh geki meye, o ge kedhi gen ød kyeel ki en." 
Luke8:52 Ji bënn ɑ́bëëd ge óywöngø, pëthi gen orɑ̈mø kipe thøwi nyɑnthinh, de Yëso ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wu ko ywöngi; nyɑnthinh nuti thøø, ceg-ɑ nenø yøw!”" 
Luke8:53 Kɑ Yëso gɑg yi teedø, mɑ́ ge ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni nyɑnthinh rum thøø." 
Luke8:54 De Yëso cingi nyɑnɑni ɑ́mɑge, ɑcwøle gøn kinni, “Nyɑrɑ, dhwödhí mɑl!”" 
Luke8:55 Kɑ wëye dwöög-ɑ ree, kɑ dhwödh-ɑ mɑl kì bøli kenyɑni ceth. Codhe, ɑkööb Yëso kinni thödhi nyɑnthinh ki gïncɑm." 
Luke8:56 Kɑ wïyi nyɑnɑni ongɑ̈ngø geki meye bënn, de ge ɑ́ceg yi Yëso kinni ko di dhɑnhø me köbbi yi gen ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb." 
Luke9:1 Kɑ tyëngwöödø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, cwøøl kej ɑ́kyel yi Yëso, kɑ gï thödhe ki tegø kì kömi wëyrijjø bënn, kí tegø me yïëëd gen ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì bënn." 
Luke9:2 Jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör, gï ɑ́öre’ be köbbi ji kwøbbi Pödhi Jwøk, o ji yiel yi gen ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlli gen." 
Luke9:3 Gï ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Ko di gïn kɑ̈lli yi wun, wu ko kɑ̈ddi ki lodh, wu ko kɑ̈ddi ki beg, wu ko kɑ̈ddi ki gïncɑm wɑlɑ̀ ngyëny, kɑ dhɑnhø ko kɑ̈ddi ki ógudh ɑ́ryew." 
Luke9:4 Bëëd wun kì gøl-ɑ ótöngi yi wun ceth, gïti keny-ɑ ódhwödh wun kì kenyɑni." 
Luke9:5 Keløg e dɑ kɑɑl men-ɑ óbɑny wun, kedhu wɑ̈g kì kɑɑlɑni kɑ tør teng wun kì tyelli wun, e bɑ ngɑ̈ji gen.”" 
Luke9:6 Codhe, kɑ tyëngwöödø ókedhø ge owïïnø kì yethi myërr bënn, ge pwöny-ɑ Wöndøj. O ge oyïëdø ki ji kì myërrɑni bënn." 
Luke9:7 Kɑ modïr, Ërödøs olïngø ki møg-ɑ kømmi yi teedø kì ri Yëso, kí gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb bënn, kɑ wïje omuumø, mɑ́ kwï ji okööbø kinni, “Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g ɑ́dhwödh kì yij thøø.”" 
Luke9:8 Møøgø okööbø kinni, “Eliyɑ̀ ɑ́dwöög mɑl.” Thyew, kwï møøgø okööbø kinni, “Ákyel kì kelli jøtöng mø kɑ̈ge dööng ɑ́dwöög mɑl.”" 
Luke9:9 Akööb Ërödøs kinni, “Jøn wïje ɑ́kïbɑ wɑ̈g, de jɑɑl bɑ men, ɑ ree lïngɑ kwøbb-ɑ ni møg?” Kɑ Ërödøs oyɑ̈bø ki keny yode Yëso, o gø di lidhe." 
Luke9:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög tyëngwöödø, ɑ́köbbi Yëso yi gen ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen bënn. Codhe, ɑkïdhi gen pɑc me cwøl ɑ́ Betsɑidɑ̀ yi Yëso, kun cuggi gen ki bëëdø keti gen kì kej ɑ́kyel." 
Luke9:11 De keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi yi Yëso ɑ́yod yi teedø, kɑ ge løg-ɑ bɑnge kunɑni. Kɑ Yëso oyïëyø yïddø ki gen, kɑ gï köbbe kì ri Pödhi Jwøk, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yielø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, yiele." 
Luke9:12 Abëën jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew yï Yëso keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi cɑ̈ng ki buddø, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Köbbí teedø kedh gen. Wiy ge kedhi gen yethi bɑ̈gg geki myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi o ge yïddi gen ki kɑ̈jj mø buddi yi gen, kí gïg cɑm yi gen, mɑ́ e bong ji mø bëëdø kì keny.”" 
Luke9:13 De ge ɑ́köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Thödhu gen ki gïn cɑm yi gen.” Alöggi gen kinni, “Yï wøn dɑ ópùn ɑ́bïj kí rij ɑ́ryew, codhi gen. Keløg ri gen pɑ ngëwwi, bong gïn gwøg yi gen ki dhɑnhø men bëne.”" 
Luke9:14 Kwɑnni ji møg-ɑ kenyɑni bɑ gïn ni ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj. Kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Köbbu ji pëggi gen piny gɑ ɑkudd; ɑkud ɑ́kyel yije dɑ ji pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj.”" 
Luke9:15 Codhe, ɑgwøøg møgɑni yi jøgɑni. Kɑ ji pɑ̈ngi gen gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
Luke9:16 Codhe, kɑ ópùnɑni gɑ ɑ́bïj kí rij ɑ́ryew møgɑni kwɑny yi Yëso, kɑ Jwøk pwøje, e nenn-ɑ mɑl, kipe gïncɑm menɑni. Codhe, ɑpɑ̈nge gïncɑm, kɑ gø mëgge jøbɑnge, o ge thödhi gen ji." 
Luke9:17 Acyɑ̈ɑ̈m ji bënn, kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø, kɑ men-ɑ ɑ́döng cøng kej ɑ́kyel. Kɑ dhöng pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew opɑ̈ngø yi thulli ópùn-ɑ ɑ́döng kì bɑng tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m." 
Luke9:18 Tyelø ɑ́kyel Yëso ɑ́bëëd e mɑll-ɑ Jwøk kì wɑ̈ye, de jøbɑnge ɑ́bëëd ge cyɑ̈gi ki en, kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Teedø okööbø i yɑ bɑ men?”" 
Luke9:19 Alöggi gen kinni, “Kwï ji okööbø i yï bɑ Jøn Jɑljwɑ̈g. Møøgø okööbø i yï bɑ Eliyɑ̀. O dɑ møøgø mø kööbø i yï bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøtöng mø kɑ̈ge dööng, me dwöög mɑl.”" 
Luke9:20 Apëjji Yëso kinni, “De wun ø, wu okööbø kinni yɑ bɑ men?” Alöggi Pïtør kinni, “Yï bɑ Mesiy mi Jwøk.”" 
Luke9:21 Akyëddi gen ki mendwøng yi Yëso kinni, ko di dhɑnhø me köbbi møgɑni yi gen. Kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni," 
Luke9:22 “Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø órɑngi yi gïg mø gïïr. Óbɑny yi jøgdøngø geki ókwërr-ɑ døngø, kí jøpwönyi Cigg. Ónɑ̈g, o ódhwödh kì yij thøø bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g.”" 
Luke9:23 Aköbbi ge bënn yi Yëso kinni, “Ngɑn dwɑddi cyɑ̈dhø ki yɑn, wiye jɑmm-ɑ tyer yi pyëwe. Kɑ yɑdh ɑrïwe byelle yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kɑ luge kì bɑngɑ." 
Luke9:24 Ngɑn dwɑddi yieli wëye gï lɑ̈ɑ̈nye’ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, de ngɑn-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny wëye kiperɑ, gï yiele’ yielø." 
Luke9:25 Dɑ gïndøj me yod yi ji, cɑgg piny bëne göögø ki mi gen, o men-ɑ́ gen kì ri gen, ge rum lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, wɑlɑ̀ ge bɑ ɑtyɑm? Bogøn kinni tek!" 
Luke9:26 Keløg yɑ obɑnyø yi ji, o kwøbbɑ bɑny yi gen, ge ólony ki bɑnyø yi Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø keny-ɑ óbëëne ki mɑ̈re, geki mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøk kí wëywödde kwërø." 
Luke9:27 Dyër ɑ köbbɑ wun kinni, kelli ji-ɑ cungi kì keny èn, dɑ møg koo thøw, pïd keny-ɑ ólidh gen Pödhi Jwøk.”" 
Luke9:28 Kì ri cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïdɑ̈g kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki kwøbi møgɑni, ɑkwɑnye Pïtør, kí Jøn, kí Yɑgob, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ wïj kït be mɑ̈ddø." 
Luke9:29 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Yëso e ómɑ̈ddø, kɑ bøle ree wile, kɑ ógudhe ótɑ̈rø ge ceg-ɑ orɑ̈ng." 
Luke9:30 Codhe, kɑ jøg ɑ́ryew, ɑ løg Mosɑ̀ geki Eliyɑ̀, okööbø ki Yëso." 
Luke9:31 Ge ɑ́cwöb ki dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng mɑl kì ri gen, kɑ ge okööbø ki kwøbbi kër-ɑ óthøwe kì Yerusɑlem, e tyëg-ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́gwir yi Jwøk." 
Luke9:32 Pïtør geki jøg-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́bëëd ge ceg-ɑ nwɑyyø, de keny-ɑ ɑ́yieb gen nyingi gen kidøøj, ɑlidh gen mɑ̈ɑ̈r Yëso kí jøg-ɑ cungi ki en gɑ ɑ́ryew." 
Luke9:33 Ri kedhi Mosɑ̀ kí Eliyɑ̀, kɑ ge ódɑ̈ngø ki en, ɑköbbi Yëso yi Pïtør kinni, “Wuö, døøj ke ying wɑ keny. Wiy wø gëëd wøn ki ud ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑ́kyel mií, ɑ́kyel mi Mosɑ̀, ɑ́kyel mi Eliyɑ̀.” Pïtør gïn-ɑ kømmi yi en kwïje." 
Luke9:34 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd e kwøb-ɑ møgɑni, kɑ pøølø obëënø, kɑ ge rïm yi pøølɑni, kɑ ge obwøgø keny-ɑ ɑ́rïïm gen yi pøølø." 
Luke9:35 Kɑ cwɑg obëënø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yij pøølɑni kinni, “Men bene Wɑ̈dɑ men-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi yɑn, lïngu møge!”" 
Luke9:36 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum cwɑggɑni ki kwøb, döngø ɑ́ Yëso kete kì kenyɑni. Jøbɑnge møgɑni ɑ́cög ge okudø, o bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́köbbi gïn-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi gen kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni." 
Luke9:37 Dhuki, ɑyïnhi gen piny kì wïj kït, kɑ teedø mø ngenyø bï-ɑ yï Yëso." 
Luke9:38 Kɑ jɑl megø kì kelli teenɑni óryeerø e köbb-ɑ Yëso kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, bï lidh wɑ̈dɑ, bɑ wɑ̈dkyel." 
Luke9:39 Dɑ wëy me rɑj me nyi mɑgii, kɑ nyi ceg-ɑ ì kɑɑg ki ɑkiw. Nyelthinh nyi tɑ̈ɑ̈ye’ piny e pwöd-ɑ ree, dhøge othungø ki óböy. Nyi gögg-ɑ men-ɑ́ gïjø me rɑɑj yi wëyɑni, o pɑ nyi wiy yi en ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r." 
Luke9:40 Jøbɑngí ɑ́kwɑjjɑ, kinni cïïr ge gøn wɑ̈g, de ɑ́dhɑ̈li lwɑ̈ngø yi gen.”" 
Luke9:41 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Wu bɑ ji mø yï wun bong yïëyø, o bëëdi wun rɑɑj. Yɑ ógït-ɑ wɑɑng yɑ obëëdø kì kelli wun, yɑ torø yi kwøbbi wun kinnï? Kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈dí keny.”" 
Luke9:42 Kɑɑm-ɑ ɑ́kedhi nyelthinh yï Yëso, ɑleengii piny yi wëyrɑj kɑ ree pwöde. De Yëso ɑ́cwøw ki menteg, kɑ wëy-ɑ rɑj köbbe bëe wɑ̈g. Kɑ nyelthinh yiele, ɑdögge gøn wïye." 
Luke9:43 Teedø bëne ɑ́ngɑ̈ng kɑ ge obwøgø yi tegi Jwøk. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ji ge ceg-ɑ omøy yi gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yëso, ɑköbbe jøbɑnge kinni," 
Luke9:44 “Wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl ki gïn-ɑ köbbɑ wun ɑnɑn, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ócïb cinggi ji.”" 
Luke9:45 De kwøbbɑni nuti gɑmø yi wɑ̈thi jøbɑnge, kí gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møgɑni; gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møgɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ɑkɑn kipe rummi gen, o ge cög gen møgɑni pɑ yod yi gen. De ge ɑ́bwøg ki pëjjii møgɑni." 
Luke9:46 Kɑ jøbɑng Yëso ócɑ̈gø pëmø ki ri gen, ki mɑ́ løge men ɑ ti döng kì kelli gen." 
Luke9:47 Kɑ møg-ɑ rømmi yi gen yod yi Yëso, codhe ɑcwödde ki nyelthinh, kɑ nyelɑni cuunge kì bute." 
Luke9:48 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Ngɑn yïëy nyelthinh men ki nyingɑ, yïëy-ɑ yɑn. O ngɑn-ɑ óyïëy yɑn, yïëy-ɑ Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ thinh kì kelli wun bënn, bene en ngɑn-ɑ dwøng kidyër.”" 
Luke9:49 Alöggi Jøn kinni, “Wuö, jɑl megø ɑ́lidh yi wøn e cïïr-ɑ wëyrijjø wɑ̈g kì ri ji ki nyingí. De ɑ́kyëddi yi wøn, mɑ́ e pɑ ying yij ɑkudee.”" 
Luke9:50 De Yëso ɑ́kyëëd kinni, “Ko kyëddi wun, mɑ́ ngɑn pɑ rïwwi bøli wun ying-ɑ tuung wun.”" 
Luke9:51 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi bøli kej kedhe mɑl, ɑkööbe cem e dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi Yerusɑlem." 
Luke9:52 Kɑ öd-ɑ bøle ki jøg mø kedhi be gwiri gøl-ɑ ópëgge kì pɑc ɑ́kyel kì kelli myërri Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. 
Luke9:53 De tyëng pɑnɑni ɑ́kyëëd i ge ko töngi pɑɑ gen, mɑ́ Yëso kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
Luke9:54 Kɑ jøbɑng Yëso, ɑ løg Yɑgob geki Jøn, okööbø kinni, “Odwɑddø yi yïn Wuö, kinni cwööl wøn mɑc piny kì mɑl, o rɑ̈be tyëngɑni, ni men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Eliyɑ̀?”" 
Luke9:55 De Yëso ree ɑ́luge gïn, kɑ gï cɑ̈wwe." 
Luke9:56 Codhe, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ pɑc megø." 
Luke9:57 Kɑ jɑl megø Yëso köbbe, e ócyɑ̈dhø kì yöö kinni, “Yɑ ólugi kì bɑngí kì yethi kɑ̈jj-ɑ ókedhi yi yïn.”" 
Luke9:58 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Ógwøgg dɑ burrì mø yethi gen nyi buud yi gen. O winy dɑ uddi gen, de Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø yïe bong keny ywööme wïje.”" 
Luke9:59 Kɑ jɑl megø köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Lugí kì bɑngɑ!” De jɑlɑni ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wuö, wiy yɑ kedhɑ be konyi wïyɑ møti.”" 
Luke9:60 Kɑ köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Wiy ji-ɑ thøø kony gen tyëngthøø mø gen. De men-ɑ́ yïn, kedh kɑ yï pwönyí Wöndøj mi Pödhi Jwøk.”" 
Luke9:61 Kɑ jɑl megø okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ólugi kì bɑngí Wuö, de wiy yɑ kedhɑ be mɑ̈dhi wɑddi wøn møti.”" 
Luke9:62 Kɑ köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Ngɑn cïb cinge ri kwer, kɑ nyi lïïdh-ɑ ngɑ̈je, pɑ kyëëw ki Pödhi Jwøk.”" 
Luke10:1 Codhe, kɑ Wë ókɑ̈bbø ki ji pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew wïdɑ́ryew, kɑ gï öre gɑ ɑ́ryew, ɑ́ryew. Gï ɑ́öre bøle mɑl yethi myërr-ɑ dwɑdde kedhø." 
Luke10:2 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Byel ɑ́cyeg ge gïïr ki mendwøng, de jøgwøg møg-ɑ nud kwɑnni gen nøg. Kwɑjju wïi pwödhø, o öne ki jøgwøg mø gïïr møg kɑj byelle." 
Luke10:3 Kedh wun ɑnɑn, de lïng wun! Wu ör yi yɑn wu nɑ dyëg møg kedhi kelli óthönhì." 
Luke10:4 Wu ko kɑ̈ddi ki pødhi ngyëny, kɑ wu ko kɑ̈ddi ki beg, wɑlɑ̀ wɑr, kɑ wu ko nyi cungi wu mɑ̈dh-ɑ ji kì kö yöö." 
Luke10:5 Nyi kööb wun kì ɑ́dyëddi gøl-ɑ kedhi yi wun kinni, ‘Wiy gøl, bëëde ki mër.’" 
Luke10:6 Keløg yij gølɑni dɑ ngeti mër, mɑ̈dhhi mër mø wun óbëëdø kì gølɑni, de keløg ge pɑth ki tyëngmër, mɑ̈dhhi mër mø wun ódwöög yï wun." 
Luke10:7 Bëëd wun kì gøl-ɑ bɑ gøl mër, kɑ wu cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun, kɑ wu mɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun ki gïg-ɑ ómëggi wun, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ göögø nyi ceg kɑ thödhø ki köögi. Wu ko nyi dhwödh kì kɑl, kɑ wu dɑ̈g-ɑ gøl-ɑ kyeelø." 
Luke10:8 Keløg wu kedh-ɑ kɑɑl kɑ wu kïdhi kɑl yi tyëng kɑɑlɑni, cɑm wun gïncɑm-ɑ ómëggi wun." 
Luke10:9 Yiel wun tyëng-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø kì kenyɑni, kɑ ge köbbi wun kinni, ‘Pödhi Jwøk cyɑ̈gi ki wun.’" 
Luke10:10 De keløg wu kedh-ɑ kɑɑl, kɑ wu ocögø wu pɑ cwøøl kɑl yi tyëng kɑɑlɑni, kedhu dïkɑɑlɑni kɑ wu kööb wun kinni," 
Luke10:11 ‘Cɑgg ɑ́ tør kɑɑl wun men-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈gi ki tyelli wøn tënggi wø’ wun. De wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl kinni Pödhi Jwøk ɑ́rum ki bëën buti wun!’ 
Luke10:12 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Gøny, cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑy Sødømɑ̀ óløg mø lɑ̈w kibøli cɑ́y-ɑ ócɑɑy kɑɑlɑni." 
Luke10:13 “Yï ɑ́gɑ̈g Korɑdhïn! Yï ɑ́gɑ̈g Betsɑidɑ̀! Mɑ́ keløg gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg kì yethi wun di gwøg-ɑ Suur kí Sïdön, ge bɑ møg di yewi kɑ̈ge dööng, kɑ ri gen di bug gen ki belø, kɑ ge orugø ki ocwɑ̈llì." 
Luke10:14 De kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Gøny, cɑ́y-ɑ ócɑɑy Suur kí Sïdön óløg mø lɑ̈w kibøli cɑ́y-ɑ ócɑɑy wun." 
Luke10:15 O yïn ø, Kɑpernɑum! Yï ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ tïngi rií mɑl? Pɑth, yï óleeng-ɑ piny yij ölø!”" 
Luke10:16 Kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ólïngi kwøbbi wun, lïng-ɑ kwøbbɑ. O ngɑn-ɑ lïngi kwøbbɑ, lïng-ɑ kwøbbi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn.”" 
Luke10:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew wïdɑ́ryew, ge ɑ́dwöög pëthi gen omedø, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Wuö, cɑgg ɑ́ wëyrijjø, ge ceg-ɑ lïngø ki kwøbbi wøn, kenyi köbbi gen yi wøn ki nyingí!”" 
Luke10:18 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Cethɑn ɑ́nenni yi yɑn e ceg-ɑ dëëmø ni loodh mɑl." 
Luke10:19 Lïng wun, wu ɑ́thödhɑ ki tegø me nyøn wun thöllì kí ïïdh; tegø me lod tegi ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø. O bëëd e bong gïn-ɑ ónywɑl wun." 
Luke10:20 Pëthi wun ko med kipe kɑ̀ lïngi kwøbbi wun yi wëyrijjø, de med pëthi wun kiper kɑ ɑ́rum nyingi wun ki gwedø kì mɑl.”" 
Luke10:21 Amïni pyëw Yëso kì ri tegi Wëykwërø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑ lejj-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Wïyɑ; Wïi mɑl kí piny, kipe kɑ ɑ́kɑ̈nní møgɑni tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel, geki tyëng-ɑ rummi gen nud. De ge ɑ́nyudhí ji-ɑ nuti dïdø. Ngee Wïyø, bɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi yïn ceth kidyër." 
Luke10:22 “Wïyɑ, yɑ ɑ́mëgge jɑmmì bënn. Bong ngɑn ngɑ̈nyi kinni Wɑ̈d bɑ men, dɑ́ Wïy kete ɑ ngɑ̈nyii. O bong ngɑn ngɑ̈nyi Wïy, den-ɑ́ Wɑ̈d geki ji-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi Wɑ̈d kɑ gï köbbe møgɑni.”" 
Luke10:23 Kɑ ree luge jøbɑnge, ɑköbbe gïn kì wɑ̈yi gen kinni, “Ri wun dɑ gyëdh, mɑ́ gïg di nennø yi wun!" 
Luke10:24 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, jøtöng mø gïïr, kí rɑ̈nhì ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ lidhi gïg-ɑ nenni yi wun ek, de ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li. O ge ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ lïngi møg-ɑ lïngi yi wun ek, de ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li.”" 
Luke10:25 Kɑ jɑl mɑ jɑlpwönyi Cigg kedh-ɑ be pɑ̈nyi Yëso, ɑkööbe kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, ɑ́ ngø ɑ dwɑddi kinni o gwøg yi yɑn, o yɑ yïddɑ ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer?”" 
Luke10:26 Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Á ngø ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi Cigg? Á ngø ɑ ɑ́rɑng yi yïn kì yij wɑ̈nyi Cigg?”" 
Luke10:27 Kɑ jɑlɑni ólöggø kinni, “Mɑɑr Wöw Jwøgí ki pyëwí bëne, kí wëyí bëne, kí tegí bëne, kí rummí bënn, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ butí mɑɑr ni kɑ̀ mɑɑr rií.”" 
Luke10:28 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Löggí bɑ dyër. Gwøg møgɑni o yï yïddí ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer.”" 
Luke10:29 De jɑlpwönyi Cigg ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ yodi tegi per pyëjj-ɑ ɑ́pyëje, ɑpyëje Yëso kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ butɑ ɑ́ men?”" 
Luke10:30 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Dɑ jɑl megø mɑ ɑ́dhwödh kì Yerusɑlem e wel-ɑ Yerikö, kɑ rødh yi kurrì. Kɑ ógudhe kɑggi yi gen, kɑ gø pwöd gen, kɑ gø wiy gen e dhɑ̈rø." 
Luke10:31 Kɑ jɑl mɑ ókwërø obëënø e kɑ̈ll-ɑ yuuɑni. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe gøn, kɑ gø kyëje kedh e opödhø." 
Luke10:32 Kì bɑnge, ɑbëën jɑl mɑ Kwɑɑr Leebì. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe kenyɑni, gø ɑ́lidhe, kɑ gø kyëje, kedh e opödhø." 
Luke10:33 Codhe, kɑ jɑl Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ obëënø, e kɑ̈ll-ɑ yuuɑni. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe jɑl-ɑ ɑ́pwöd, kɑ yije óywöngø kipere." 
Luke10:34 Kɑ kedh-ɑ yïe, kɑ kedde kunye ki møgi oløg kí møw, kɑ gï kode. Atïnge gøn kömi ɑdere. Kɑ gø kïdhe gøl wëll, kun tuure gøn." 
Luke10:35 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ru wøw dhuki, kɑ jɑl Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ omuujø ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́ryew, gï mëgge’ jɑl-ɑ yïe di gøl wëll, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, ‘Tuur jɑɑl. Keløg e dɑ ngyëny møg-ɑ ódwɑddi yi yïn keny-ɑ óthumi møg, ge ócullɑ yïn keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ.’ ”" 
Luke10:36 Codhe, ɑkööb Yëso kinni, “Yï orumø kinni bɑ men kì kelli jøgɑni gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g ɑ ɑ́göög ni ngɑn ying buti jɑl-ɑ ɑ́pwöd yi kurrì?”" 
Luke10:37 Kɑ jɑlpwönyi Cigg ólöggø kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ́ pyëwe ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki en.” Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Adɑ́ kedh ceth, kɑ yï göög kinøw.”" 
Luke10:38 Yëso geki jøbɑnge ɑ́bëëd ge ceg-ɑ wel, ɑtöngi gen pɑc megø. Kɑ ge cwøøl kɑl yi ngɑndhɑjø me cwøl ɑ́ Mɑrthɑ̀." 
Luke10:39 Mɑrthɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ nyimen me cwøl ɑ́ Meerì. Meerì ɑ́pëggi buti Yëso e lïng-ɑ pwönye. 
Luke10:40 De Mɑrthɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e ceg-ɑ gwøg ki gïg-ɑ dwɑddi gwøgø. Kɑ kedh-ɑ ød, ɑkööbe kinni, “Pɑ nenni yi yïn Wuö, nyimïɑ yɑ ɑ́wïye gwøg bëne? Köbbí bëe o yɑ køny yi en.”" 
Luke10:41 De møge ɑ́løøg yi Wë kinni, “Mɑrthɑ̀, Mɑrthɑ̀! Pyëwí lïngø kɑ per jɑmmì mø gïïr." 
Luke10:42 Bɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel kete ɑ pere teg. Meerì ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ gïn-ɑ lɑ̈w, o pɑ cuggi kwɑnyø kì yïe.”" 
Luke11:1 Tyelø ɑ́kyel Yëso ɑ́bëëd e ókwɑ̈jjø kì keny megø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume, ɑpyëjii yi jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøbɑnge kinni, “Wuö, pwönyí wøn ki kwɑ̈jjø ni Jøn kɑ ɑ́pwönye jøbɑnge.”" 
Luke11:2 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Kenyi kwɑ̈jji wun, nyi kööb wun kinni, ‘Yïn ɑ Wïyi wøn, wiy nyingí kwërø wør; wiy Pödhí bëe." 
Luke11:3 Nyi mëggí wøn gïncɑm men-ɑ dwɑddi yi wøn kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. 
Luke11:4 Dwöög lɑɑwí piny kipe orøøg wøn, mɑ́ wøn kì ri wøn, ngɑn-ɑ nyi göggi wøn ki gïnrɑj nyii wiyø yi wøn. Kɑ wø ko wëggí pɑ̈nyø ki kwøb mø teeg.’ ”" 
Luke11:5 Codhe, ɑköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Keløg dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun kedh-ɑ yï mɑ̈dhe kì dïwɑ̈r kɑ gø köbbe kinni, ‘Mɑ̈dh, wïdhí yɑn ki ópùn ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Luke11:6 Dɑ mɑ̈dhɑ mɑ ɑ́bï be këëmi yɑn, de yïɑ bong gïncɑm me mëggɑ en.’" 
Luke11:7 Kɑ mɑ̈dhí ólöggø kì yiny-ɑ ød kinni, ‘Yɑ ko jud yi yïn! Dhø ød ɑ́rum ki dijø, o wø buud kɑ nyigɑ. Yɑ pɑ cuggi dhwödhi mɑl kɑ yï thödhɑ ki gïïpiny.’" 
Luke11:8 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, keløg yï pɑ thödhi yi en kipe kɑ̀ bëëd yï bɑ mɑ̈dhe, yï thödhe’ thödhø kipe kɑ̀ dyëëj ki kwɑ̈jjø, e wïjí pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈y." 
Luke11:9 “Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, kwɑ̈jji wun, wu óthödhi. Yɑ̈ɑ̈b wun, wu óyïddi. Cwöddi wun, dhø ød óyïëbbi wun." 
Luke11:10 Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ókwɑ̈jji, óthödhi, o ngɑn-ɑ óyɑ̈bø óyïddi, o ngɑn-ɑ ócwöddi, dhø ød óyïëbbii." 
Luke11:11 Á men ɑ nyɑre cwöddi ki rëjø kì yïe, kɑ gø mëgge thwöl ɑ́ kej rëjø?" 
Luke11:12 Wɑlɑ̀ keløg e ócwöddø ki tøng gyenø, gø mëgge’ iidh?" 
Luke11:13 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd wun wu rijjø, wu ngɑ̈ny thödhi nyigi wun ki gïgdøj. Muuny-ɑ ómuuj yi Wïyi wun ɑ ying mɑl, óbëëd ɑ dï; keny-ɑ óöre Wëykwërø kömi tyëng-ɑ kwɑjjii!”" 
Luke11:14 Tyelø ɑ́kyel, Yëso ɑ́bëëd e ryem-ɑ wëyrijjø me mïïlø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën wëyɑni wɑ̈g, kɑ jɑl-ɑ́ ree ɑ́di wëyɑni okööbø cyee, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd e pɑ nyi kööbø. Kɑ ji ceg-ɑ ngɑ̈ngø." 
Luke11:15 De kwï gen ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yëso göög-ɑ tegi Bɑɑldhebul, jɑngi wëyrijjø, gøn ɑ cyëëde wëyrijjø wɑ̈g kì ri ji.”" 
Luke11:16 Ji møøgø ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ pɑ̈nyi Yëso, ɑköbbi ge gøn kinni thödhe gïn ki ngïji me kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl." 
Luke11:17 De mɑ́ rummi gen ɑ́yod yi Yëso, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Pödhø men-ɑ pɑ̈ngi ree ɑ́ ɑkudd, kɑ døøg-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki ree kete, pɑ nyi cwööng ki rënyø." 
Luke11:18 Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, Cethɑn ke pɑ̈nge ree, jyɑ̈ge pɑ mɑ̈gi ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r. Wu okööbø i yɑ göög-ɑ tegi Bɑɑldhebul, o bɑ en ɑ cyëddɑ wɑ̈g ki wëyrijjø." 
Luke11:19 De keløg yɑ göög-ɑ tegi Bɑɑldhebul, o bɑ en ɑ cyëddɑ wɑ̈g ki wëyrijjø, ɑ́ tegø men-ɑ́, ɑ nyi göög yi jii wun, ɑ nyi cyëddi gen wɑ̈g ki wëyrijjø? Jii wun bɑ gen ɑ ócɑy wun." 
Luke11:20 De keløg yɑ göög-ɑ tegi Jwøk, ɑ cyëddɑ wɑ̈g ki wëyrijjø, bene kinni Pödhi Jwøk ɑ́wɑ̈nhi yï wun." 
Luke11:21 “Keløg nyel me teg, me yïe di tøngg mø gïïr pëgg-ɑ be kori gøle, bong gïjø me nywɑl jɑmme." 
Luke11:22 De ke bëën ngɑn me lodii ki tegø, kɑ tyɑm yi en, tøngg-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈dhe okwɑnyø kì yïe yi nyel-ɑ teg, kɑ jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑbe pɑ̈nge." 
Luke11:23 “Ngɑn pɑ ying tungɑ bɑ ngɑn mɑ̈n ki yɑn. O ngɑn-ɑ pɑ cunggi kyeel ki yɑn ceg-ɑ kyedh. 
Luke11:24 “Kenyi bëën wëy me rɑj wɑ̈g kì ri dhɑnhø, nyi kɑ̈ll-ɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ thwøwø, e oyɑ̈bø ki keny me ywööme ree. De kenyi jɑde, nyii kööbø kinni, ‘Yɑ døøg-ɑ øn-ɑ ɑ́wiy yi yɑn.’" 
Luke11:25 Keny-ɑ ódwööge, kɑ ønɑni yuude e rumø’ yiejø kidøøj, o thøø yi gwirø." 
Luke11:26 Wëyrɑj ceg-ɑ døøgø, kɑ ókɑ̈nø ki wëyrijjø ɑ́bïryew mø lodii ki rɑ̈jø. Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ ri ngɑnɑni, kɑ ge obëëdø kì ree. Ngɑnɑni ceg-ɑ yïddø ki göj me lod mi tyeli mɑl.”" 
Luke11:27 E Yëso nudd e kwøb-ɑ møgɑni, ɑtïng ngɑndhɑjø megø cwɑgge kì kelli teedø, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈lli yïn kì yije, ɑ thïnhe ɑ́dhødh yi yïn ree dɑ gyëdh!”" 
Luke11:28 De Yëso ɑ́yöd e ceg-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Pɑth, tyëng-ɑ ri gen di gyëdh, bɑ ji-ɑ lïngi kwøbbi Jwøk kɑ gï mïdhi gen.”" 
Luke11:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh teedø ge óngënyø, ɑkööb Yëso kinni, “Rïj men, bɑ rïj me rɑj. Ge dwɑdd-ɑ lïdhø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø ɑ́ ngïji, de bong ngïji men-ɑ ónyudhi gen, den-ɑ́ ngïji Yönɑ̀." 
Luke11:30 Ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd Yönɑ̀ ɑ́ ngïji kipe tyëng Ninɑwɑ̀, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø óbëëdø ɑ ngïji kipe rïj men." 
Luke11:31 Kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Gøny, Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Cebɑ̀ rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø, ócungi kì bøli rïj men kɑ gø cɑye, mɑ́ e ɑ́bï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kun lɑ̈wi be lïngi pwönyi Sølømøn kì ri peli wïj. O yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, ngɑn me dwøng kibøli Sølømøn ɑ keny èn." 
Luke11:32 Kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Gøny, tyëng Ninɑwɑ̀ ócungi kì bøli rïj men kɑ gø cɑy gen, mɑ́ keny-ɑ ɑ́cïïj gen yi Yönɑ̀, ge ɑ́yewi kɑ bëëdi gen wil yi gen. O yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, ngɑn me dwøng kibøli Yönɑ̀ ɑ keny èn." 
Luke11:33 “Bong dhɑnhø me nyi cwiny lɑ̈mbɑ̈ kɑ gø kɑne, wɑlɑ̀ kɑ gø kume ki ɑ́tɑy, de gø nyi cïbe’ wïj tɑrɑbedhɑ̀, o cɑr lidh yi ji-ɑ bï ød." 
Luke11:34 Nyingí bɑ cɑr kipe dëlí. Ke bëëd nyingí ge døøj, dëlí bëne óbëëd e pɑ̈ng yi cɑr. De keny-ɑ óbëëd nyingí pɑ døøj, dëlí bëne óbëëd e pɑ̈ng yi muudhø." 
Luke11:35 De gwir wïjí kidøøj, kipe cɑr men-ɑ rií ógöögø ɑ́ muudhø." 
Luke11:36 Keløg dëlí bëne pɑ̈ng yi cɑr, o bong keny me looj kì ree, bene keny-ɑ ómëëny ni kenyi meeny yïn yi cɑɑr lɑ̈mbɑ̈.”" 
Luke11:37 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki kwøb, ɑryejii yi jɑl mɑ Jɑlpɑresì. Codhe, kɑ Yëso ókedhø, kɑ pëgg-ɑ tɑw." 
Luke11:38 De Jɑlpɑresì menɑni ɑ́ngɑ̈ng keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe Yëso e ócɑ̈gø cɑm, e cingge pɑ lwøg yi en møti." 
Luke11:39 Aköbbii yi Wë kinni, “Wu Jøpɑresì, wu nyi lwøg-ɑ kömi óthɑ̈ggì geki löd, de yethi wun pɑ̈ng yi rummi kɑ̈b geki rumm-ɑ rijjø." 
Luke11:40 Wu bɑ dhëgg! Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g, pɑth ki en cøn ɑ ɑ́gwøg yiny-ɑ yij thyew." 
Luke11:41 Nyi mëggu gïn-ɑ yethi óthɑ̈ggi wun kí löddi wun tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur, codhe cyee, o wu dhïwi wun." 
Luke11:42 “Wun ɑ Jøpɑresì, ri wun dɑ cyën! Mɑ́ wu nyi muuj-ɑ ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈r kì ri nɑnɑɑ̀ kí cumɑ̈r geki jɑmm-ɑ nyi pidh kì yij bɑg bënn. De wu dhɑ̈li göggi tyëng-ɑ kyeelø ki gïndøj, kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi Jwøk wøy yi wun. Møgɑni bene gen ɑ di gwøg yi wun, wu kedh wu ogöögø ki jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø." 
Luke11:43 “Wu Jøpɑresì, ri wun dɑ cyën! Mɑ́ wu nyi tyer-ɑ bëëdø kì wɑ̈thi kwømm-ɑ døj kì sinɑgøgg, o wu tyer-ɑ mɑ̈dhhø yi teedø, wu owørø ki mendwøng kì dhøggi cugg." 
Luke11:44 Ri wun dɑ cyën, mɑ́ wu nɑ rörri ji møg-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pɑ̈ɑ̈rø ki piny, kɑ ji nyii cyɑ̈dhø kì kömi gen, ge kwïj gɑ rörr.”" 
Luke11:45 Kɑ Yëso köbbi yi ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøpwönyi Cigg kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, kɑ̀ kwøøb møgɑni ɑnɑn, yï pɑ ceg wøn ki gwɑddø thyew!”" 
Luke11:46 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Wun, wu jøpwönyi Cigg, ri wun dɑ cyën! Wu nyi muuj-ɑ cigg mø peeg, mø pɑ cuggi mïdhø yi ji, de men-ɑ́ wun, ri wun pɑ nyi pɑ̈nyi yi wun ki gwøg kì ri ciggɑni." 
Luke11:47 Ri wun dɑ cyën! Kipe wu nyi ger-ɑ kenggi jøtöng møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg ki nɑ̈gø yi kweyyi wun! 
Luke11:48 O ɑnɑn wu nyodh-ɑ kinni wu ɑ́yïëy ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi kweyyi wun. Jøtöng nɑ̈g yi kweyyi wun, o wu gëddu gen ki keng!" 
Luke11:49 Bene gïn-ɑ pere kööb yi men-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Peli wïj Jwøk kinni, ‘Ge óödɑ ki jøtöng geki tyëngwödd. Kwï gen ónɑ̈g yi gen, o møg-ɑ kyeelø ógöggi yi gen ki gïnrɑj.’" 
Luke11:50 Kì bɑng menɑni, wun, wu tyëng-ɑ nud ɑnɑn, wu bɑ møg-ɑ ócɑy kipe thøwi jøtöng møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kër-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi piny," 
Luke11:51 cɑg kì ri nɑ̈gi Abel gïti ri nɑ̈gi Dhekɑriyɑ̀, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì kɑɑm këli lɑm geki kej kwër. Ngee, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, wu tyëng-ɑ nud kì bøli keny ɑnɑn, kinni wu bɑ møg-ɑ ócɑy ceth kipe gen bënn." 
Luke11:52 “Ri wun dɑ cyën, wun ɑ jøpwönyi Cigg! Muptɑɑ̀ men-ɑ nyi yieeb dhø kej dïdø ɑ́kwɑny yi wun. Wun kiri wun, wu nuti kedhi yije, o tyëng-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n yi wun kedhi yije!”" 
Luke11:53 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Yëso e ókedhø kì kenyɑni, kɑ ceg ki dhingø ki pyëj yi jøpwönyi Cigg geki Jøpɑresì. Kɑ dhøge yɑb yi gen ki kwøb mø gïïr," 
Luke11:54 ge lebb-ɑ gøn, mɑ di kööbe ki kwøb mø per gen di mɑgii." 
Luke12:1 Kɑ ji mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp mø ngenyø ri gen cøng gen, de ge nyøn-ɑ ri gen. Acɑ̈gi Yëso ki kwøb e köbb-ɑ jøbɑnge, kinni, “Wu ko göög wu bɑ wëëny ni Jøpɑresì, wëënyø mi gen nɑ kɑmïrɑ̀." 
Luke12:2 Gïg-ɑ bɑ ɑkɑnn bënn ónyodh, o gïg-ɑ gonni yi teedø kì pëthi gen bɑ møg-ɑ ónyodh." 
Luke12:3 Gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn kì yij muudhø, ólïngi kì dicɑ̈ng, o gïg-ɑ ɑ́möngi yi yïn kì yiny-ɑ ød, bɑ møg-ɑ ólïngi kì wïj ød." 
Luke12:4 “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun mɑ̈dhhɑ, wu ko böggi yi ji-ɑ cuggi nɑ̈gi dël, o kì bɑng menɑni bong gïn ledh me cuggi gwøgø yi gen këti." 
Luke12:5 Wu ónyudhɑ ngɑn-ɑ cuggi böggø. Böggu Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ yïe di tegø me cugge nɑ̈gi dhɑnhø, o yïe dɑ tegø thyew me cugge leengi dhɑnhø mɑc. Ngee, bene ngɑn-ɑ cuggi böggø yi wun ɑnɑn." 
Luke12:6 “Winy ɑ́keej gɑ ɑ́bïj pɑ nyi ngew kɑ gïrïc ɑ́ryew yøw? Ngee, o bong ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen me wïl kì wïj Jwøk." 
Luke12:7 De cɑgg ɑ́ yëyyi wɑ̈thi wun, kwɑnni gen ngɑ̈nyi. Wu ko böggi. Per wun teeg kibøli ɑ́kej mø gïïr!”" 
Luke12:8 “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, ji bënn møg-ɑ ócungi kì bøli teedø, kɑ ge okööbø kinni yɑ ɑ́yïëy yi gen; yɑn, yɑ Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø, yɑ ókööbø kì bøli wëywöddi Jwøk kinni, jiɑni bɑ jiɑ." 
Luke12:9 De tyëng-ɑ ócungi kì bøli teedø, kɑ ge okööbø kinni yɑ nuti yïëyø yi gen, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ókööbø kì bøli wëywöddi Jwøk kinni, ge pɑth ki jie." 
Luke12:10 “Ngɑn kööbø ki rɑj kì ri Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø, ócuggø wïyi bɑ̈jje, de ngɑn kööbø ki rɑj kì ri Wëykwërø pɑ cuggi wiyø e pɑ cɑy." 
Luke12:11 “Keny-ɑ ókïdhi wun be gøønyø kì sinɑgøgg, kì bøli jɑgg geki tyëng-ɑ yï gen di tegø, pëthi wun ko lïngi kipe gïn-ɑ ókwøb yi wun, wu nyɑg-ɑ ri wun." 
Luke12:12 Mɑ́ kì bøli kenyɑni, wu ópwönyi yi Wëykwërø ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi en kinni o kwøb yi wun.”" 
Luke12:13 Kɑ Yëso köbbi yi jɑl megø kì kelli teedø kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, köbbí ómïɑ o jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́wiy yi wïyi wøn keny-ɑ ɑ́thøwe, pɑ̈ngi yi en kì kɑɑm wøn.”" 
Luke12:14 De ɑ́köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Jɑl, ɑ́ men ɑ ɑ́kööb i yɑ bɑ jɑgø men pɑ̈ggi kì kɑɑm wun?”" 
Luke12:15 Codhe, ɑköbbi teedø yi Yëso kinni, “Koru ri wun, kɑ pëthi wun ko wëggu døngø kipe kɑ̈r. Cɑgg dhɑnhø jɑmme ngenyø, pɑ nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈n thøø yi ngenyi jɑmme.”" 
Luke12:16 Codhe, ɑwɑɑj gɑ́j møg yi Yëso kinni, “Ádɑ jɑlkɑ̈r me yïe di pwödh mø døngø, møg yethi gen ócyeeg yi jɑmmì kidøøj." 
Luke12:17 Kɑ orumø kì pyëwe kinni, ‘Yɑ ógöög ɑ dï? Bong keny yije mïdhɑ jɑmmɑ.’" 
Luke12:18 Codhe, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Bene gïn-ɑ ógwøgɑ èn, kɑ̈jj-ɑ mïdhɑ jɑmmɑ ócøørɑ piny, o yɑ gëëdɑ ki møg mø døngø, o yethi gen ómïdhɑ wɑ̈thi jɑmmɑ bënn." 
Luke12:19 Codhe, o riɑ köbbɑ kinni, yïí dɑ jɑmmì mø døøj mɑ ɑ́cøng yi yïn, møg mɑ̈gi ki runn mø gïïr ge ocɑmø. Ywöm rií, kɑ yï cyɑ̈ɑ̈m, kɑ yï mɑ̈ɑ̈dh, kɑ yï bëëd pyëwí omedø!’" 
Luke12:20 De ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøk kinni, ‘Jɑl-ɑ dhëg! Tïn kì wɑ̈r, wëyí bɑ møg kwɑny kì yïí. Dɑ́ men ɑ ókwɑny jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́cøng yi yïn kiperí?’ ”" 
Luke12:21 Kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni, “Bene en ɑnɑn, kër-ɑ óbëëd tyëng-ɑ nyi congi jɑmmì kiper gen, o ge pɑth ki tyëngkɑ̈rì kidyër kì yï Jwøk.”" 
Luke12:22 Kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Kì bɑng menɑni, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni pëthi wun ko lïngi kipe gïncɑm men-ɑ mïdhi wun wu onëënø, wɑlɑ̀ kipe ógudh møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun kipe dëlli wun." 
Luke12:23 Wëy pere teg kibøli gïncɑm, o dël pere teg kibøli ógudh." 
Luke12:24 Lidhu winy; ge pɑ nyi pïïdhø ki byel, o bong gïn nyi kɑj yi gen, yï gen bong thebb kí óköddì, de ge ocɑɑmø yi Jwøk! O wun, per wun pɑ teeg kibøli winy!" 
Luke12:25 Á men kì kelli wun ɑ cuggi medi runne ki olïng pyëwe, cɑgg ɑ́ ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel yøw?”" 
Luke12:26 Keløg wu dhɑl-ɑ yi gwøgi nyɑ gïjø me thiinh ni menɑni, gede pëthi wun ɑ lïngi gen kipe gïg-ɑ kyeelø?" 
Luke12:27 Nennu luum okøgg kenyi twïye, eni lum-ɑ pɑ nyi göögø, o pɑ nyi cwɑ̈jø ki ógudh. De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni cɑgg ɑ́ Sølømøn ki kɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́ying yïe bëne, nuti rugø ki rug me myëër ni ɑ́kyel kì kelli okøggɑni." 
Luke12:28 Jwøk rug-ɑ luum pɑ̈l, eni lum-ɑ nud dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, kɑ leeng mɑc dhuki! De men-ɑ́ wun, wu óruug-ɑ dï yi Jwøk, mɑ́ per wun teeg kibøli lum? Wu tyëng-ɑ yïëyi wun nøg!" 
Luke12:29 “Wu ko nyi rïïj wu rømm-ɑ per gïn-ɑ cɑm yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ gïn-ɑ mɑdh yi wun, kɑ wu ko nyi rïïj pëthi wun olïngø." 
Luke12:30 Ji bënn kì kömi piny tyer-ɑ yodi gïgɑni bënn, o Wïyi wun ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni gïgɑni bënn odwɑddø yi wun." 
Luke12:31 De yɑb wun kwøbbi Pödhi Jwøk, o wu ómëgge jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø bënn møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun." 
Luke12:32 “Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd wun, wu bɑ nyɑ ɑkud me thiinh ni men, wu ko böggi, mɑ́ Wïyi wun dwɑdd-ɑ mëggi wun lɑ̈gø." 
Luke12:33 Ngeew wun jɑmmi wun wɑ̈g, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur thödhi wun. Yɑ̈ɑ̈b wun ki pødhi ngyëny men-ɑ pɑ nyi rënyi, kɑ kɑ̈rri wun kɑɑn wun mɑl, keny-ɑ bong kurrì møg kwɑ̈dø, o bong thoth men cyɑ̈mø ki jɑmmì." 
Luke12:34 Mɑ́ pëthi wun óying-ɑ keny-ɑ di jɑmmi wun. 
Luke12:35 “Bëëd wun ógudhi wun ying-ɑ ri wun, wu nenn-ɑ gwøøg wun ceth, kɑ wiy lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ mø wun bëëd gen ge olyelø," 
Luke12:36 ni bɑ̈ngg møg yïd wïi gen keny-ɑ ódwööge kì kej nywöm, kipe kinni ocwödde kì dhø kɑl, o kɑl ójwɑn ki yïëbbii ceth." 
Luke12:37 Ge óyuud ógudhi gen ying-ɑ ri gen keny-ɑ ódwöög wïi gen. O lidh yi en kinni ge nenn-ɑ bëëne. Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, wïi gen ree ólunye ki ógudhi bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø, kɑ bɑ̈ngge köbbe kinni pëggi gen tɑw, kɑ gï kɑ̈lle." 
Luke12:38 Bɑ̈nggɑni pëthi gen óløg mø med keny-ɑ óyuud gen ge onëënø yi wïi gen, cɑgg ɑ́ kì dïwɑ̈r, wɑlɑ̀ kì bɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Luke12:39 Nyi pɑru møg kinni, ke di bëëd e bøli keny-ɑ bëën yi kur ngɑ̈nyi yi jɑlkɑl, kur pɑ di wëgge kedhi gøle." 
Luke12:40 De bëëd wun wu nenn-ɑ yöö, mɑ́ Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø óbï-ɑ bøli keny me kwïj yi wun!”" 
Luke12:41 Kɑ Pïtør okööbø kinni, “Wuö, gɑ́j møg ɑ́gɑ̈jjí wøn wɑlɑ̀ ge ɑ́gɑ̈jjí teedø?”" 
Luke12:42 Kɑ Wë okööbø kinni, “Á men ɑ bɑ bɑ̈ng-ɑ døj, ɑ cuggi ngɑ̈dhø yi wɑ̈n, kɑ cinge cïbe gïgcɑmmi bɑ̈ngg-ɑ kyeelø, o gï nyi thödhe kì bøli keny-ɑ dwɑddii?" 
Luke12:43 Keny-ɑ ódwöög wïi bɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ gø yuude gwøge ógwøgø yi en kidøøj. Bɑ̈ngɑni ree dɑ gyëdh." 
Luke12:44 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër, jɑmme bënn cïbe’ cingi bɑ̈ngɑni." 
Luke12:45 De keløg bɑ̈ngɑni di rum kinni, wɑ̈ɑ pɑ jwɑn dwöögø, kɑ ócɑ̈gø pöd ki bɑ̈ngg-ɑ kyeelø, mɑ̈nn ki cwøw bënn, kɑ pëgg-ɑ be cɑm kí mɑdh, kɑ nyi nɑ̈g yi møgø," 
Luke12:46 jɑlkɑl ódwöög kì bøli keny me nuti rømmø yi bɑ̈ngɑni; gø ópɑ̈ɑ̈ye piny e ree nuti gwiir en. Kɑ ceg ki ngøllø yi wɑ̈n; ónɑ̈g yi en ni kenyi nɑ̈ɑ̈g tyëngrijjø. 
Luke12:47 “Bɑ̈ng-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi wɑ̈n, de gø pɑ gwøge, ceg kɑ pwödø ki pwöni dwøng!" 
Luke12:48 De bɑ̈ng-ɑ kwïj gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi wɑ̈n, kɑ ogöögø ki gïn-ɑ pere nyi cɑɑy dhɑnhø, ópwöd kɑ pwödø me nøg. Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thödhi ki mø ngenyø, yïe ócwøøl-ɑ mø ngenyø. O ngɑn-ɑ cinge cïbi ki mø pëddi ngenyø, yïe dwɑdd-ɑ mø pëddi ngenyø." 
Luke12:49 “Yɑ ɑ́bï-ɑ be lëngi kömi piny ki mɑc, o ce di bëëd e rum cɑ̈gø lyelø!" 
Luke12:50 Yïɑ dɑ jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø men-ɑ ójwɑ̈ɑ̈g yɑn ki orɑng, pyëwɑ pɑ wïyi ki olïng gïti keny-ɑ órume." 
Luke12:51 Wu orumø kinni yɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mër kömi piny? Pɑth, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, kinni yɑ ɑ́bï-ɑ be dɑ̈ɑ̈ngii." 
Luke12:52 Cɑg ɑnɑn gïti dhuki megø, gøl-ɑ yije di ji ɑ́bïj ceg-ɑ dɑ̈ngø, ɑ́dɑ̈g ómɑ̈ni ki ɑ́ryew, kɑ ɑ́ryew ómɑ̈nø ki ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Luke12:53 Ri gen ópɑ̈ngi yi gen kinni, dhɑnhø ódɑ̈ɑ̈ng ki wɑ̈de kɑ wɑ̈d ódɑ̈ngø ki wïye; ngɑndhɑjø ódɑ̈ɑ̈ng ki nyɑre, kɑ nyɑndhɑjø ódɑ̈ngø ki meye; meyi jɑlø ódɑ̈ɑ̈ng ki kwɑre cï wɑ̈de, kɑ cï jɑlø ódɑ̈ngø ki wønge meyi jɑlgøle.”" 
Luke12:54 Codhe, ɑköbbi teedø yi Yëso kinni, “Kenyi lidhu pøøl ge obëënø kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ng böörø, wu nyii kööbø kinni, ‘Kødh bɑ men mɑ̈gi,’ kɑ kødh nyii mɑ̈gø." 
Luke12:55 O kenyi lidhu yømø e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kɑ wu nyii kööbø kinni, ‘Piny óbëëd e lëëdh dicyɑ̈ngtïn.’ Kɑ piny nyi løg-ɑ me lëëdh." 
Luke12:56 Wu bɑ wëëny! Ngïjji piny geki mɑl ngɑ̈nyi yi wun. De wude ɑ pɑ yod wun gïg-ɑ göögø ɑnɑn? 
Luke12:57 “Wude ɑ pɑ yod wun gïn-ɑ bɑ dyër. 
Luke12:58 Keløg yï peej-ɑ burø yi ngɑn gøøny yïn, pɑ̈nyí rií ki kwɑjjii, o kwøbbɑni wiy wu nuti wɑ̈dhi burø. De keløg rií pɑ pɑ̈nyi yi yïn, yï kïdh-ɑ bøli jɑgø yi ngɑn-ɑ gøøny yïn, o jɑgø yï ómëgge bölidh, kɑ yï leeng ød mɑg yi bölidh." 
Luke12:59 Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn, yï pɑ wɑ̈nhi wɑ̈g kì kenyɑni gïti keny-ɑ ócool kwör-ɑ kömí.”" 
Luke13:1 Kì bøli kenyɑni, ɑ ɑ́köbbi Yëso yi ji møøgø i dɑ ji møg-ɑ ónɑ̈gø yi Pilɑtø kì Gɑlelì ge mɑll-ɑ Jwøk. Remmi tyëngɑni ɑ́rebe ki remmi lɑ̈yy-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈lli Jwøk yi gen gɑ gëdhhì." 
Luke13:2 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Wu orumø kinni gïnɑni ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi gen kɑ per kɑ̀ bëëd ge lod-ɑ tyëng Gɑlelì bënn ki orøg?" 
Luke13:3 Pɑth, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun cyee kinni, keløg wu pɑ wïyi ki orøg, kɑ pëthi wun wil yi wun geki bëëdi wun, wu bɑ møg thøw ni gen!" 
Luke13:4 O ji-ɑ ɑ́thøw gɑ ɑ́bïdɑ̈g keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi ønbɑ̈r kömi gen kì Silwɑm ø? Wu orumø kinni gïnɑni ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi gen kɑ per kɑ̀ bëëd ge lod-ɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem ki orøg? 
Luke13:5 Pɑth, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun cyee kinni, keløg wu pɑ wïyi ki orøg, kɑ pëthi wun geki bëëdi wun wil yi wun, wu bɑ møg thøw thyew!”" 
Luke13:6 Awɑɑj gɑ́j møg yi Yëso kinni, “Jɑl megø yïe ɑ́dɑ ólɑm kì yij bɑge. Kɑ kedh-ɑ be yɑ̈bbø ki nywøl kö ólɑmɑni, de bong mɑ ɑ́yode." 
Luke13:7 Codhe, kɑ nyel-ɑ göögø kì bɑg köbbi yi jɑlɑni kinni, ‘Yɑ nyi yɑ̈mm-ɑ kö yɑɑnh ki nywøl, o yɑ pɑ nyi yïddi kì kööre ki nywøl. Ágöög ɑnɑn ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g. Ngøl piny. Á kipe ngø ɑ nyïɑ̈ge bɑg?’" 
Luke13:8 De bɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́löggi kinni, ‘Wuö, wiy yɑnhɑni ki run ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ónywøle. Wiy tyele kony yi yɑn o kïdhɑ ki nor." 
Luke13:9 Keløg e ónywøl run-ɑ bï, døøj. De keløg e pɑ nywøl, ócuggø ngøl piny yi yïn.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Yëso ɑ́bëëd e ópwönyø kì sinɑgøg kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. 
Luke13:11 Kenyɑni ɑ́dɑ ngɑndhɑjø me ree di wëy me rɑj, me dool köme, o yïe dɑ runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g e köme ree dool en. Nyi cyɑ̈dhi e köme kuul en piny, pɑ cuggi cung e kööre tïng en." 
Luke13:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Yëso, ɑcwøle gøn, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Ngɑn, yï ɑ́pɑ̈d kì ri gïn-ɑ rií.”" 
Luke13:13 Kɑ Yëso cingge thɑɑnye kömi ngɑnɑni, kɑ köme tyenye kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kɑ ócungø ree tyeeny en, kɑ ócɑ̈gø lejji Jwøk." 
Luke13:14 Kɑ jɑngi sinɑgøg mɑg yi liny kipe kɑ ɑ́yïëëd Yëso kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. Aköbbe ji kinni, “Dɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel møg-ɑ yethi gen nyi göög yi ji, nyi bï wun be yielø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlli wun kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, de wu ko nyi bï be yielø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth.”" 
Luke13:15 Alöggi Wë kinni, “Wu bɑ wëëny! Dhögi wun pɑ nyi gøny yi wun kɑ ge køøl wun be mɑ̈dhø ki pï, cɑgg ɑ́ kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth?" 
Luke13:16 Ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ ɑ́yiel yi yɑn ki köme, bɑ nyɑɑr Abrɑhɑm, ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ɑmɑg yi Cethɑn ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g. Pɑ cuggi pɑ̈dø kì yethi töjjɑni cɑgg ɑ́ kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth!”" 
Luke13:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe møgɑni kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cɑyyii wɑ̈thi gen ólɑ̈ɑ̈yø, de teen-ɑ ɑ́ying kenyɑni bëne pyëwe ɑ́mïni yi gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yëso bënn." 
Luke13:18 Codhe, ɑkööb Yëso kinni, “Pödhi Jwøk nɑ ngø? Pɑ̈ɑ̈r yi yɑn kɑ ngø?" 
Luke13:19 Nɑ nyɑ wɑɑng köödhi kɑrdɑl men pidh yi dhɑnhø kì yij bɑge. Kɑ köönhɑni otwïyø, kɑ ogöögø ki yɑdh, kɑ winy ogëdø ki uddi gen kì bɑ̈dde.”" 
Luke13:20 Kɑ Yëso okööbø këti kinni, “Pödhi Jwøk ópɑ̈ɑ̈r yi yɑn kɑ ngø?" 
Luke13:21 Pɑ̈r kɑ kɑmïrɑ̀ men kwɑny yi ngɑndhɑjø, kɑ gø nyööme ɑwɑj mɑ rummì ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ okwödø bëne yi kɑmïrɑni.”" 
Luke13:22 Yëso ɑ́kedh e kɑ̈ll-ɑ köthi myërr e ópwönyø, e kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
Luke13:23 Kɑ Yëso köbbi yi jɑl megø kinni, “Wuö, bɑ ji mø nøg ɑ óyiel keti gen?” Alöggi Yëso kinni," 
Luke13:24 “Pɑ̈nyu ri wun ki kɑ̈li dhøng-ɑ dhing, mɑ́ ji mø gïïr ri gen ópɑ̈nyi yi gen ki kɑ̈li kenyɑni, de ge koo cuggi." 
Luke13:25 Keny-ɑ ódhwödh ngɑn-ɑ yïe di kɑl, kɑ kɑl cyëge, kɑ wu ócungø kì dhø kɑl kì wɑ̈g, wu ócwöddø kinni, ‘Wuö, yïëbbí wøn kɑl!’ Ólöggi kinni, ‘Wu kwïj yi yɑn, wu kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny.’" 
Luke13:26 Wu ókööbø kinni, ‘Wø ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m kɑ wø omɑ̈dhø kì kej ɑ́kyel ki yïn, kɑ yï ópwönyø kì pɑɑ wøn.’" 
Luke13:27 Wu óyöd wu oköbbø yi en kinni, ‘Wu kwïj yi yɑn, o keny-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wun kwïjɑ thyew. Kedh wun kì butɑ, wu tyëng-ɑ gøggi rɑj!’" 
Luke13:28 Wu óywöngi kɑ lweddi wun kɑ̈ɑ̈j wun yi ledhi dhø keny-ɑ ónenni wun Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob, geki jøtöng bënn kì Pödhi Jwøk, de wun kì ri wun, wu óleeng wɑ̈g." 
Luke13:29 Ji óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, møøgø óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, møøgø óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø, o møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ piny kì tɑw kì Pödhi Jwøk." 
Luke13:30 Dɑ ji møøgø mø ying cyɑ̈n ɑnɑn, ge ókedhi mɑl, o dɑ møøgø mø ying mɑl, ge ódwøøg cyɑ̈n.”" 
Luke13:31 Kì bøli kenyɑni, ɑ ɑ́bëën kwï Jøpɑresì yï Yëso kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Kedh kì keny! Ërödøs dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yïn!”" 
Luke13:32 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Kedh wun, köbbu ógwøngɑni kinni, ‘Dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kí dhuki, yɑ cyëëd-ɑ wëyrijjø wɑ̈g kì ri ji, o yɑ oyïëdø ki ji-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø. O gwøgɑ ótyëg yi yɑn kì ri dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng.’" 
Luke13:33 Cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw ceth, yɑ di dwɑddø o yɑ cyɑ̈dhɑ ki yuuɑ dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, kí dhuki kí cyɑ̈ng-ɑ kyeelø. Pɑth ki dyër kinni jɑltöng ócuggø nɑ̈gø kì keny megø e pɑth ki Yerusɑlem." 
Luke13:34 “Yerusɑlem, Yerusɑlem! Yï nyi nɑ̈g-ɑ jøtöng, kɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́ör yïí nɑ̈ɑ̈g ge bɑ̈llí bɑ̈llø ki tuggi kïttì. Riɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyɑ tyel mø gïïr ki congi jií, ni gyenø kenyi cønge nyige thɑ́ obërre, de møgɑni nuti dwɑddø yi wun!" 
Luke13:35 Kengí ówiy piny. Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, yɑ pɑ lidh yi wun gïti bøli keny-ɑ ókööb wun kinni, ‘Ngɑn-ɑ bï ki nyingi Wë, bɑ ɑgyëdh.’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Kɑ Yëso kedh-ɑ be cɑm kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, kì gøl jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli pëjji Jøpɑresì. Teedø ɑ́bëëd ge nenn-ɑ Yëso men-ɑ óyïëde kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth." 
Luke14:2 O bøle ɑ́dɑ jɑl me ree di thyëw. 
Luke14:3 Kɑ Jøpɑresì geki jøpwönyi Cigg pyëj yi Yëso kinni, “Yïëdø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, bɑ ɑyïëy yi Ciggee wɑlɑ̀ bɑ ɑkerø?”" 
Luke14:4 De ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li løøgi pyëjje. Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny jɑl-ɑ ree di thyëw yi Yëso kɑ gø yiele ki gïn-ɑ ree, kɑ gø köbbe kinni kedhe." 
Luke14:5 Aköbbi Jøpɑresì geki jøpwönyi Cigg yi Yëso kinni, “Keløg wɑ̈dí wɑlɑ̀ wɑdhí pɑ̈dh-ɑ yij yith kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, pɑ jwɑn yi yïn ki tëël wɑ̈g?”" 
Luke14:6 De ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li løøgi kwøbbe. 
Luke14:7 Kɑ lidh yi Yëso kinni tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ryej tyer-ɑ pëggi kɑ̈jj-ɑ døøj, ɑwɑje gɑ́j møg kinni," 
Luke14:8 “Keløg yï oryejø kì kej thyëg, yï ko pëggi wïj kwøm-ɑ pere teg, kipe óbëëd e dɑ dhɑnhø me pere teg kibølí men-ɑ óryejø," 
Luke14:9 kɑ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ryej wun ryeet bï-ɑ yïí, kɑ yï köbbe kinni, ‘Mëggí jɑɑl kwømí.’ Codhe, kɑ yï døøg-ɑ wïj kwøm-ɑ cyɑ̈n yï yɑ̈rø." 
Luke14:10 De keny-ɑ óryeej yïn, kedh kɑ yï pëggí wïj kwøm me pere pɑ teg. Obëën jɑlryëj, o yï óköbbe kinni, ‘Mɑ̈dh, dwöög mɑl keny-ɑ døøj èn.’ Codhe, o yï ówør yi wëll-ɑ kyeelø." 
Luke14:11 Tyëng-ɑ tïng ri gen mɑl ódwöög cyɑ̈n, de tyëng-ɑ ódwöög ri gen cyɑ̈n ótïng mɑl.”" 
Luke14:12 Codhe, kɑ Yëso jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ryejii köbbe kinni, “Kenyi rëëj, yï ko nyi ryej mɑ̈dhhí, wɑlɑ̀ nyiimyëw, wɑlɑ̀ wɑddí, wɑlɑ̀ tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈rø kì byëëg wun kipe kinni o yï ólony yi gen ki ryejø, kɑ menɑni ógöögø ɑ́ köögi kì yïí." 
Luke14:13 Keny-ɑ órëëj, cwøl ɑbuur, kí ngöll, kí pùdh, kí cörr," 
Luke14:14 o yï ógyëdh, mɑ́ yï gen bong gïn cudi yïn yi gen, o yï ócudd-ɑ yi Jwøk, keny-ɑ ódhwödh tyëngtir kì yij thøø.”" 
Luke14:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi jɑl me cyɑ̈mø kì kenyɑni, ɑköbbe Yëso kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ óryej kì Pödhi Jwøk ri gen dɑ gyëdh.”" 
Luke14:16 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Dɑ jɑl mɑ ɑ́göög ki thyëg, kɑ ji mø gïïr ryeje." 
Luke14:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën bøli kej cɑm, kɑ jɑlɑni bɑ̈nge öre be köbbi tyëng-ɑ theg kinni, ‘Bï wun, jɑmmì ɑ́rum ki gwirø bënn.’" 
Luke14:18 De tyëng-ɑ theg bënn ɑ́yöd ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ gøny megø. Jɑl-ɑ́ yïe ɑ́kwøng ki kedhø ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Yɑ ɑ́cer-ɑ ngyew ki pwödhø. Yɑ ceg-ɑ kedhi be lidhii. Yɑ pɑ wɑ̈nhi.’" 
Luke14:19 Kɑ jɑl-ɑ kyeelø okööbø kinni, ‘Yɑ ɑ́cer-ɑ ngyew ki wɑ̈dhh pyɑ̈rø, møg nyi köögø ki pwödh, yɑ kedh-ɑ be pɑ̈nyi gen. Yɑ pɑ wɑ̈nhi.’" 
Luke14:20 Kɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen okööbø kinni, ‘Yɑ ɑ́cer-ɑ nywöm, o cyëgɑ ɑ́cer-ɑ dɑ̈ngø. Yɑ pɑ wɑ̈nhi.’" 
Luke14:21 “Codhe, kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni ódwöögø, ɑköbbe wɑ̈n ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb. Kɑ wïi bɑ̈ngɑni mɑg yi liny, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Kedh yï ójwɑnø ɑnɑn ceth, kɑ ngöll, kí cörr, kí pùdh geki tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur møg-ɑ óyood yi yïn yij kyel, kí yethi yëëth, kɑ̈ɑ̈l keny bënn.’" 
Luke14:22 Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni ódwöögø, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Wuö, møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn bënn ɑ́rum ki gwøgø yi yɑn, de kɑl nuti pɑ̈ngø yi ji.’" 
Luke14:23 Kɑ jɑl gølɑni bɑ̈nge köbbe kinni, ‘Kedhí yethi myërr, ko di nyɑ pɑc me wiy yi yïn, kɑ ji cwööl gølɑ bënn gïti keny-ɑ ópɑ̈ng kɑl." 
Luke14:24 Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn, bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddɑ thegø men-ɑ óbel gïncɑmɑ tïn!’ ”" 
Luke14:25 Teedø mø ngenyø ɑ́bëëd ge ócyɑ̈dhø kì bɑng Yëso. Kɑ Yëso ree luge gïn, kɑ gï köbbe kinni," 
Luke14:26 “Ngɑn-ɑ óbï yïɑ pɑ cuggi gwøg ki ngetibɑngɑ, keløg yɑ pɑ mɑɑr yi en kibøli wïye, kí meye, kí cyëge, kí nyige, kí nyiimen, cɑgg ɑ́ wëye." 
Luke14:27 Ngɑn pɑ byel yɑdh ɑrïwe, kɑ lug-ɑ bɑngɑ, pɑ cuggi bëëdø ɑ́ ngetibɑngɑ." 
Luke14:28 “Keløg yï dwɑdd-ɑ gyer ki ønbɑ̈r, yï ceg-ɑ wïjí ki gwirø møti, o yod yi yïn mɑ løge ngyëny ɑ́dï ɑ ókɑ̈l yi gere, kí mɑ di ngyëny mø ni møgɑni kì yïí, møg cuggi tyëgi gwøngɑni." 
Luke14:29 Ke pɑ göög kinøw, yï bɑ men cɑg tyeli ønbɑ̈r, de pɑ cuggi lwɑ̈ngø yi yïn ki tyëgø. Codhe, kɑ yï gɑggi yi ji kinni," 
Luke14:30 ‘Dhɑnhø men ɑ́cɑ̈gi ki gyer de ɑ́dhɑ̈li tyëgi gwøge!’ 
Luke14:31 “Ke di rɑ̈dh me dwɑddi kedhi be nyïɑ̈ggø ki rɑ̈dh megø, ceg-ɑ pëggi piny o wïje gwire møti. Bɑ en ɑ ókwøb kinni kedh-ɑ be nyïɑ̈ggø, en geki yɑy-ɑ yïe gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø kɑ rɑ̈nh-ɑ kyeelø tyɑme, e rɑ̈nhɑni yïe dɑ yɑy mɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew." 
Luke14:32 Ke yode gøn kinni pɑ cuggi tyɑ̈mø, kɑ̈ng-ɑ nudd rɑ̈nh-ɑ kyeelø e obëënø ki yɑye, ceg-ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki ör ki ji møg kedhi be kwøb ki rɑ̈nh-ɑ bï, o ge kwɑjji ge gøn kipe mër." 
Luke14:33 Ki yuu-ɑ ni menɑni ceth, bong ngɑn cuggi bëëdø ɑ́ ngetibɑngɑ, keløg jɑmm-ɑ yïe bënn pɑ wiye piny." 
Luke14:34 “Omelø døøj, de keløg e ólwënyø, pɑ cuggi gwøgø yi yïn kɑ ódönyø." 
Luke14:35 Bong gïn gwøøgii këti, o pɑ cuggi gwøgø ɑ́ nor. Ceg kɑ weddø. Ngɑn yïe di yïthhe mø lïnge, wiy lïnge.”" 
Luke15:1 Kɑ jøgwɑ̈j geki tyëngorøg kedh-ɑ be lïngi pwönyi Yëso. 
Luke15:2 De Jøpɑresì geki jøpwönyi Cigg ɑ́cɑ̈gi ki gøny kinni, “Lïdhi wun, jɑlɑni bëëdø kɑ tyëngorøg, kɑ tøøny-ɑ nywɑ̈g ki gen.”" 
Luke15:3 Codhe, ɑwɑ̈jji gen gɑ́j møg yi Yëso." 
Luke15:4 “Keløg nget ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun yïe dɑ dyëg miyø, kɑ ɑ́kyel ówɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì kelli gen, dyëg-ɑ kyeelø gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïngwen wïdɑ́bïngwen pɑ wiye piny, kɑ kedh-ɑ be yɑbi dyel ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny gïti keny-ɑ óyode gøn?" 
Luke15:5 Keny-ɑ óyode gøn, gø cïbe’ wɑ̈thi tøgge pyëwe omedø," 
Luke15:6 kɑ kedh-ɑ pɑc. Kɑ mɑ̈dhhe cwøle geki tyëng byëëg gen, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, ‘Mïni pëthee mɑ́ dyelɑ men-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny ɑ́yodɑ.’" 
Luke15:7 Ki yuu ni menɑni ceth, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, ódi medi pyëw me dwøng kì mɑl kipe ngetorøg ɑ́kyel men wil pyëwe kɑ óyewø kibøli tyëngdøj gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïngwen wïdɑ́bïngwen møg bong gïn pere dwɑddi gen yewø." 
Luke15:8 “Ngɑndhɑjø ke di yïe ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈rø kɑ ɑ́kyel ówɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, lɑ̈mbɑ̈ ocwinyø yi en, kɑ ød yeje, kɑ oyɑ̈bø kidøøj ki ngyënye gïti keny-ɑ óyode gøn." 
Luke15:9 O keny-ɑ óyode gøn, mɑ̈dhhe geki tyëng byëëg gen gï cwøle cwølø, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, ‘Mïni pëthee kipe ngyënyɑ men-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny ɑ́yod yi yɑn.’" 
Luke15:10 Ki yuu ni menɑni ceth, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, wëywöddi Jwøk pëthi gen nyi ceg-ɑ mïnø kipe ngetorøg ɑ́kyel men yewi.”" 
Luke15:11 Kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni, “Ádɑ jɑl me yïe di wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew." 
Luke15:12 Kɑ nyel-ɑ thinh wïye köbbe kinni, ‘Mëggí yɑn budɑ kì ri jɑmmi kɑl.’ Codhe, kɑ jɑlɑni jɑmmì pɑ̈nge kì kɑɑm wɑ̈dde." 
Luke15:13 Codhe, kɑ nyel-ɑ thinh jɑmme cønge bënn, kɑ kedh-ɑ pödhø me lɑ̈wi. Kɑ ngyënyye tyëge kì kunɑni ki nøgi wïje." 
Luke15:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́tyëge jɑmme bënn, kɑ kɑ̈j me dwøng ómɑ̈gø kì pönhɑni, kɑ nyelɑni ójɑ̈ddø ki gïn kwɑny yi en, kɑ mɑg yi kɑ̈j me teg." 
Luke15:15 Kɑ kedh-ɑ be gwøg kì cingi jɑl mɑ jɑl pönhɑni, kɑ gø öre yethi pwödhhe be pïïdhø ki kundhøngø." 
Luke15:16 Kɑ nyelɑni mɑg yi kɑ̈j ki menteg, kɑ pyëwe nyi dwɑdd-ɑ nyɑm ki thinyø men-ɑ cɑm yi kundhøngø, de bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyii ki thödhø." 
Luke15:17 Kɑ wïje ódwöögø, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Bɑ̈nggi wïyɑ bënn yï gen dɑ gïgcɑmm mø gïïr. De yɑn kì keny, yɑ ceg-ɑ thøø yi kɑ̈j." 
Luke15:18 Yɑ ceg-ɑ dhwödhø o yɑ døøgɑ yï wïyɑ, o köbbɑ kinni, ‘Wïyø, yɑ ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøk, kɑ yɑ ogöögø ki gïnrɑj kì bølí." 
Luke15:19 Yɑ pɑ døøj ki cwøllø këti yɑn ɑ́ wɑ̈dí, de wiy yɑ bëëdɑ yɑ nɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli bɑ̈nggí.’" 
Luke15:20 Codhe, kɑ nyelɑni odhwödhø kɑ kedh-ɑ yï wïye. “Kɑ lidh yi wïye e nudd e lɑ̈wi, kɑ jɑlɑni pyëwe ocödø kipe wɑ̈de, ɑrenge be pɑɑrii, kɑ gø dööbe kööre kɑ gø nuume." 
Luke15:21 Akööb wɑ̈de kinni, ‘Wïyø, yɑ ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøk, kɑ yɑ ogöögø ki gïnrɑj kì bølí. Yɑ pɑ døøj ki cwøllø yɑn ɑ́ wɑ̈dí këti.’" 
Luke15:22 De wïye ɑ́yöd e köbb-ɑ bɑ̈ngge kinni, ‘Jwɑni wun! Kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun ógudh-ɑ pëddi døøjø kɑ ge lønyu ree. Kɑ lwede budhi wun ki gwelø, kɑ tyelle kïdhi wun ki wɑr." 
Luke15:23 Kɑ wɑnh-ɑ pëddi cwɑɑdhø kì kelli wɑ̈dhh kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun kɑ ngɑl wun, o wɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wɑ, o wɑ tug wɑ." 
Luke15:24 Mɑ́ wɑ̈dɑ men ɑ́bëëd e thøø, de ɑ́dwöög be nënnì, ɑ́bëëd e lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, de ɑ́yod!’ Codhe, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki tugø." 
Luke15:25 “Wɑ̈n-ɑ dwøng ɑ́bëëd e ying-ɑ yij pwödhø, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëne e ócyɑ̈ngø ki kɑl, ɑlïnge bul kí cwɑggi ji mø cöngø." 
Luke15:26 Acwøle ɑ́kyel kì kelli bɑ̈ngg, kɑ gø pyëje mɑ løge ngø ɑ cwöbø." 
Luke15:27 Akööb bɑ̈ngɑni kinni, ‘Ómyëw ɑ́dwöög, kɑ wɑnh-ɑ cwɑɑdhø ngɑl yi wïyí, kipe kɑ ɑ́dwööge dële oyödø.’" 
Luke15:28 “Kɑ wɑ̈n-ɑ dwøng mɑg yi liny, kɑ óbɑ̈nyø kedhi kɑl. Akedhi wïye wɑ̈g kɑ gø kwɑjje kinni bëe kɑl." 
Luke15:29 De nyel-ɑ dwøng wïye ɑ́köbbe kinni, ‘Yï ɑ́göggɑ de yɑ nɑ bɑ̈ng ki runn mø gïïr, o dhøgí nuti pyeem yɑn. Á ngø ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn? Yɑ nuti thödhø yi yïn ki nyɑ ónywøg yøw, men cɑm yi yɑn wøki mɑ̈dhhɑ!" 
Luke15:30 De wɑ̈dí men-ɑ ɑ́cɑm ngyënyyí geki tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ki köögi, bene en ɑ ngɑ̈ddi yi yïn ki wɑdh me cwɑɑdhø, kipe kɑ ɑ́dwööge pɑc!’" 
Luke15:31 Kɑ wïyi gen ólöggø kinni, ‘Wɑ̈dɑ, yï bëëd ɑ butɑ yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, o jɑmm-ɑ nud kì yïɑ bënn bɑ møgí." 
Luke15:32 Wɑ ceg-ɑ tugø ceth ki medi pëthee, mɑ́ ómyëw ɑ́bëëd e thøø, de ɑ́dwöög be nënnì ɑnɑn. Ábëëd e lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø de ɑ́yod.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Ádɑ jɑlkɑ̈r me yïe di jɑgø kì kömi jɑmme. Kɑ jɑngɑni gøøny yï wɑ̈n kinni i jɑmmi wɑ̈n ceg kɑ rënyø yi en." 
Luke16:2 Codhe, ɑcwølii yi wɑ̈n kɑ gø pyëje kinni, ‘Á gïg ɑ lïngɑ kì rií ek? Gwëdí yɑn gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi yïn ki ngyënyyɑ, mɑ́ yï pɑ cuggi bëëdø yïn ɑ́ jɑgø kì kömi jɑmmɑ këti.’" 
Luke16:3 Kɑ jɑngɑni orumø ki pyëwe kinni, ‘Yɑ göög ɑ dï cyee, mɑ́ yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kej gwøgɑ yi wɑ̈ɑ? Yɑ nyøødh, o men-ɑ́ pur pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi yɑn, o wïjɑ ceg-ɑ lɑ̈yyø ki kwɑ̈jjø." 
Luke16:4 Gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi yɑn ngɑ̈nyɑ, o yɑ óyïëy yi ji ki kedhi kɑ̈lli gen keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l yɑn wɑ̈g kì kej gwøgɑ.’" 
Luke16:5 “Codhe, kɑ jɑngɑni tyëng-ɑ kömi gen di körri jɑmmi wɑ̈n cwööle bënn. Apyëje jɑl-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi bëënø kinni, ‘Á kwör mɑ ngø ɑ kömí?’" 
Luke16:6 Alöggi jɑlɑni kinni, ‘Thɑpiy møw gɑ miyø.’ Kɑ köbbi yi jɑngɑni kinni, ‘Kwɑny wɑ̈nyi körrí, kɑ yï jwɑn pëggi piny, kɑ yï gwed pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj.’" 
Luke16:7 Codhe, ɑpyëje jɑl-ɑ kyeelø kinni, ‘Á kwör mɑ ngø ɑ kömí?’ Alögge kinni, ‘Ocwɑ̈lli gemè gɑ miyø.’ Aköbbii yi jɑngɑni kinni, ‘Kwɑny wɑ̈nyi körrí, kɑ yï jwɑn pëggi piny, kɑ yï gwed pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g.’" 
Luke16:8 “Kɑ jɑng-ɑ pɑ gøggi dyër pwøj yi wɑ̈n kipe kɑ ɑ́gööge ki peli wïje. Mɑ́ nyigi kömi piny men, wɑ̈thi gen pëddi pelø kibøli nyigi cɑr, kì ri yëth-ɑ bëëd gen ki ji-ɑ pɑ̈r ki gen." 
Luke16:9 “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, yɑ̈ɑ̈b wun ki mɑ̈dhh ki jɑmmi kömi piny, o keny-ɑ óthumi jɑmmɑni, o wu óyïëy ki kedhi kɑ̈ll-ɑ bëëd gïti ɑtheer." 
Luke16:10 Ngɑn cinge cïb nyɑ gïjø me thiinh, kɑ gø korre kidøøj, jɑmmì mø gïïr ócuggø cïb cinge, kɑ gï korre kidøøj. O ngɑn rënyi nyɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́cïb cinge e thiinh, bɑ men rënyi gïjø me dwøng." 
Luke16:11 Keløg wu dhɑl-ɑ yi mïdhi kɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi piny men-ɑ ɑ́cïb cinggi wun kinni o kor yi wun, ɑ́ men ɑ ócïbi cinggi wun ki kɑ̈r-ɑ dyër?" 
Luke16:12 O keløg wu pɑ cuggi kori jɑmm-ɑ bɑ mø ngɑn megø, o møg-ɑ bɑ mø wun ómëggi wun yi men?" 
Luke16:13 “Bong bɑ̈ng me cuggi göggi wëëg ɑ́ryew. Bɑ̈ngɑni wɑ̈n ɑ́kyel mɑɑne’ mɑɑnø, kɑ men-ɑ kyeelø mɑɑre, wɑlɑ̀ ómɑ̈gø kì ri jɑl ɑ́kyel, kɑ jɑl-ɑ kyeelø wiye. Wu pɑ cuggi göggi Jwøk, kedh wu ogöögø kiper ngyëny.”" 
Luke16:14 Jøpɑresì, jøg-ɑ mɑɑr ngyëny, ɑ́bëëd ge olïngø, kɑ Yëso gɑg yi gen." 
Luke16:15 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Ri wun nyi gwøøg wu’ ji mø nënni ge døøj kì bøli teedø, De Jwøk gïn-ɑ ying pëthi wun ngɑ̈nyi yi en kidøøj. Gïn-ɑ pere teg kì yï ji, bong pere kì yï Jwøk." 
Luke16:16 “Ciggi Mosɑ̀ geki kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́gwed yi jøtöng ɑ́bëëd ge opwönyø gïti kɑ ɑ́bëën Jøn. Ki këër kenyɑni, Wöndøj men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Pödhi Jwøk ceg kɑ kømmø, kɑ dhɑnhø bëne ree pɑ̈nye ki kedhi yij pönhɑni ki tegø." 
Luke16:17 Lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi mɑl geki piny yööd kibøli lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi gwedø ɑ́kyel kì ri gweddi Cigg. 
Luke16:18 “Ngɑn tɑ̈ng cyëge, kɑ ónyömø ki dhɑjø megø, ɑ́røngi; o jɑl nyömi ki dhɑjø me bɑ ɑtɑ̈ng, ɑ́røngi." 
Luke16:19 Kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni, “Ádɑ jɑlkɑ̈r mɑ ɑ́bëëd e rug-ɑ ógudh mø pëddi døøjø, o ceg-ɑ tɑ̈bbø kì yij kɑ̈r, e cɑmm-ɑ jɑmmì mø døøj yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
Luke16:20 O ɑ́dɑ jɑl me wɑnge cɑn me cwøl ɑ́ Lɑdhɑrøs. Lɑdhɑrøs dële ɑ́bëëd e pɑ̈ng yi kɑ̈jj mø ledh, o nyi rïïjø e buud-ɑ dhø gøl jɑlkɑ̈rɑni," 
Luke16:21 e pyëwe tyer-ɑ cɑmi thulli gïncɑm møg-ɑ nyi dyëm kì yï jɑlkɑ̈r kenyi cyɑ̈me. O kɑ̈jj-ɑ ledh kì dële nyi ceg kɑ nɑngø yi gwögg. 
Luke16:22 “Kɑ Lɑdhɑrøs othøø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈lii yi wëywödd, kɑ cïb buti Abrɑhɑm. Kɑ jɑlkɑ̈r othøø, ɑkonyii." 
Luke16:23 Kɑ jɑlkɑ̈r wïje tïnge e ceg-ɑ orɑng kì Ades, kɑ Abrɑhɑm lidhe geki Lɑdhɑrøs kì bute, ge lɑ̈wi ki en." 
Luke16:24 Acwödde kinni, ‘Wïyø, Abrɑhɑm, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki yɑn! Ör Lɑdhɑrøs be jwɑ̈ɑ̈gi lwede yethi pï, o lebɑ kuure, o kwöje, mɑ́ yɑ ceg-ɑ orɑng kì yij mɑc men!’" 
Luke16:25 “De Abrɑhɑm ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Nyɑrɑ, pɑr kɑ ɑ́bëëd yï ying-ɑ kömi piny, yïí ɑ́dɑ jɑmm-ɑ døj, de Lɑdhɑrøs ɑ́yod-ɑ gïgrijjø. Anɑn Lɑdhɑrøs bong gïn cɑ̈nnii kì keny. O yï ceg-ɑ orɑng." 
Luke16:26 Thyew, dɑ ölø me dwøng kì kɑɑmee, o bong ngɑn me cuggi kɑɑdhii, kɑ bï-ɑ yïí, o bong ngɑn me cuggi bëënø kì kun-ɑ di yïn, kɑ bï-ɑ keny.’" 
Luke16:27 Kɑ jɑlkɑ̈r okööbø kinni, ‘Wïyø, keløg ɑ́ kinøw, ör Lɑdhɑrøs gøl wïyɑ." 
Luke16:28 Yïɑ dɑ nyiimïɑ yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw ɑ́bïj, o ge köbbi yi Lɑdhɑrøs kipe ge ógöögø ni yɑn, kɑ ge bï-ɑ kej orɑng men.’" 
Luke16:29 “Kɑ köbbi yi Abrɑhɑm kinni, ‘Nyiimyëw ókyëddi yi Mosɑ̀ geki jøtöng, wiy kwøbbi gen lïngi yi nyiimyëw.’" 
Luke16:30 Kɑ jɑlkɑ̈r ólöggø kinni, ‘Pɑth, wïyø Abrɑhɑm! Keløg e dɑ ngɑn kedhi yï gen kì kelli tyëngthøø, ge ócuggø yïëyø kɑ pëthi gen geki bëëdi gen wil yi gen.’" 
Luke16:31 De ɑ́köbbi yi Abrɑhɑm kinni, ‘Keløg kwøbbi Mosɑ̀ geki jøtöng pɑ lïngi yi gen, ge pɑ cuggi lïngi kwøbbi ngɑn dhwödh kì yij thøø.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Kɑ jøbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Gïg-ɑ nyi göjji ji orøg ócwöb, de ngɑn-ɑ cinge ókɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gönyɑni ree dɑ cyën!" 
Luke17:2 Lɑ̈w keløg e luudh-ɑ nɑm e mune ótöjjø ki pil me dwøng kibøli keløg e køøl-ɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli møg-ɑ thønhø ek be orøg. 
Luke17:3 De koru ri wun! “Keløg wɑɑd wun óbɑ̈jjø, kyëddí; o keløg e óyewø kɑ ówïyø ki orøg, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki en." 
Luke17:4 Keløg yï cɑɑge’ piny tyel ɑ́bïryew cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kɑ nyi dwöög-ɑ yïí e okööbø kinni ‘Yɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji,’ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki en.”" 
Luke17:5 Kɑ Yëso köbbi yi tyëngwöödø kinni, ‘Med yïëyi wøn!’" 
Luke17:6 Kɑ Wë okööbø kinni, “Cɑgg yïëyi wun thiinh ni nyɑ wɑɑng köödhi kɑrdɑl, yɑdh men-ɑ dwøng èn ócuggø köbbø yi wun kinni, ‘Dhööy rií wɑ̈g kì keny, kɑ rií cwöödh nɑɑm omelø.’ Kɑ kwøbbi wun lïngi yi en." 
Luke17:7 “Keløg e dɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun me yïe di bɑ̈ng me nyi purø, wɑlɑ̀ me kwɑ̈yø ki dyëg, keny-ɑ óbëën bɑ̈ngɑni e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ be gwøg kì yij pɑ̈l, ócuggø köbbø yi yïn kinni, ‘Bïí ød kɑ yï pëggí piny kɑ yï cyɑ̈ɑ̈m?’" 
Luke17:8 Pɑth, óköbbií kinni, ‘Göggí yɑn ki gïncɑm. Kɑ yɑ kɑ̈llí kidøøj pïd keny-ɑ órumɑ ki cɑm.’" 
Luke17:9 Bɑ̈ng pɑ nyi pwøj kipe kenyi rume ki gwøgi gïn-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi wɑ̈n i gwøge gøn. 
Luke17:10 Pɑ̈r ki wun ceth, keny-ɑ ógwøg wun gïn-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun i gwøgu en, ceg wun kwøb kinni, ‘Wø bɑ bɑ̈ngg yøw, wø ɑ́gwøg-ɑ gwøøg wøn kete!’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhe e kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem, ɑ́kedh e kɑ̈ll-ɑ köthi myërri Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ geki Gɑlelì." 
Luke17:12 Kɑ töng-ɑ nyɑ pɑc me thiinh, ɑrøøm gen ki jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈rø mø ri gen di lɑ̈y. Kɑ jøgɑni ócungø ge lɑ̈wi ki Yëso," 
Luke17:13 ɑryeer gen kinni, ‘Wuö, Yëso! Lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki wøn!’" 
Luke17:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh gen yi Yëso, ɑkööbe kinni, “Kedh wun, kɑ ri wun nyudhi wun ókwërø.” Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kedh ge ókedhø, kɑ dëlli gen ódönyø." 
Luke17:15 Jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen kɑ ɑ́lidhe ree kinni dönyø, ɑdøøge yï Yëso, e lejj-ɑ Jwøk ki cwɑg mø døngø." 
Luke17:16 Abøødhe ree piny kì dhøggi tyelli Yëso kɑ gø pwøje. Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́dwöög bɑ jɑl Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. 
Luke17:17 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Pɑth ki ji pyɑ̈rø ɑ ɑ́yiel ki lɑ̈y? Ábïngwen ying-ɑ keny?" 
Luke17:18 Bene jɑl Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ men kete ɑ dwöög be pwøji Jwøk?” 
Luke17:19 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Dhwödhí mɑl kɑ yï kedh. Yï ɑ́yiel yi yïëyí.”" 
Luke17:20 Kɑ Yëso pyëj yi kwï Jøpɑresì kinni, ‘Á kì wɑɑng ɑ óbëën Pödhi Jwøk?’ Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Pödhi Jwøk obëënø, de pɑ bï kɑ yöö men-ɑ cugge lidhø yi wun." 
Luke17:21 Ji koo kööbø kinni, ‘Lïdhi wun, en ɑ keny èn!’ Wɑlɑ̀ kinni, ‘En ɑ kun-ɑcɑ̀!’ Mɑ́ Pödhi Jwøk ying-ɑ kelli wun.”" 
Luke17:22 Codhe, kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Óbï eni bøli keny-ɑ ódwɑddu lïdhø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kì kelli cyɑ̈nggi Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø, de koo lidh yi wun." 
Luke17:23 Ji ókööbø kinni ‘Lïdhi wun, en ɑcɑ̀!’ Wɑlɑ̀ kinni, ‘Lïdhi wun, en ɑ keny èn!’ Bëëd wun kì keny-ɑ di wun, wu ko kedhi be yɑb." 
Luke17:24 Keny-ɑ óbëën Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø, óceg meny ni loodh mɑl, ɑ nyi ì tɑr e bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ mɑl, kɑ gø cɑre kì tuung gïti tung-ɑ kyeelø." 
Luke17:25 De óceg orɑng yi gïg mø gïïr møti, kɑ bɑny yi ji-ɑ nud ɑnɑn." 
Luke17:26 Keny-ɑ ódwöög Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø, óbëëd e nɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́nud Nöö." 
Luke17:27 Ji ɑ́bëëd ge omɑ̈dhø, o ge ocyɑ̈mø, o ge ónyömø, o nyigi gen onywømø, gïti cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kedhi Nöö yij yɑ̈y, ɑbëën bɑɑyø, kɑ ge nɑ̈g yi bɑɑyø bënn." 
Luke17:28 Óbëëd e pɑ̈r ki cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nud Lot. Ji ɑ́bëëd ge ocyɑ̈mø, o ge omɑ̈dhø, ge ongëwø, o ge ngëww-ɑ wɑ̈g ki jɑmmì, o ge okɑ̈gø ki byel, o ge ogëdø ki ud." 
Luke17:29 Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh Lot kì Sødømɑ̀, mɑc geki kïbrït ɑ́dëëm kì mɑl, kɑ ge nɑ̈g yi mɑc bënn." 
Luke17:30 Bene kër-ɑ óbëëde ɑnɑn, keny-ɑ ódwöög Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø." 
Luke17:31 “Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, ngɑn-ɑ óying wïj óthɑɑng ød, o jɑmme ying-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød, ko kedhi ød be dwɑɑyi gen. Ngɑn-ɑ óying yij pwödhø ko døøg pɑc." 
Luke17:32 Pɑru gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kipe cï Lot. 
Luke17:33 Tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi mïdhi wëyi gen, wëyi gen ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi gen. De tyëng-ɑ óbøy muuji wëyi gen, wëyi gen óyiel yi gen." 
Luke17:34 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, kì wɑ̈rɑni ji ɑ́ryew óbëëd ge obuddø kì yij pyën ɑ́kyel, ɑ́kyel ókwɑny kɑ ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø wiy." 
Luke17:35 Ódi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ɑ́ryew mø rɑ̈gø ki byel kì kej ɑ́kyel, ɑ́kyel ókwɑny kɑ ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø wiy." 
Luke17:36 Ódi jøg ɑ́ryew kì yij pɑ̈l, ɑ́kyel ókwɑny kɑ ɑ́kyel wiy.”" 
Luke17:37 Kɑ Yëso pyëj yi jøbɑnge kinni, ‘Gïnɑni ócwöb-ɑ keny Wuö?’ Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Cor órɑj nyi cug-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny-ɑ di gïnthøø.”" 
Luke18:1 Codhe, kɑ Yëso gɑ́j møg wɑ̈jje jøbɑnge e pwöny-ɑ gen kinni, pëthi gen ko nyönhi, de nyi kwɑ̈jji gen ceth kɑ ge ko wïyi ki gɑ̈nni Jwøk. Gï ɑ́köbbe kinni," 
Luke18:2 “Ádɑ jɑngi gøny kì kɑɑl megø, jɑngɑni Jwøk pɑ wør yi en, o yïe bɑ̈r ki ji." 
Luke18:3 O ɑ́dɑ ngɑndhɑjø mɑ thwöm kì kɑɑlɑni me nyi kedhi yï jɑngɑni be gøny e pir-ɑ ngɑn megø, kɑ nyii kööbø kinni, ‘Cwɑ̈ggí yɑn jɑmmɑ møg-ɑ yï ngɑn-ɑ gööny wøn.’" 
Luke18:4 Kɑ jɑngɑni ocögø kwøbbi ngɑnɑni pɑ jwɑn yi en ki løøgø. De kì bɑng keny megø, ɑ́rum ki pyëwe kinni, ‘Cɑgg Jwøk pɑ wør yi yɑn, wɑlɑ̀ cɑgg yïɑ bɑ̈r ki ji," 
Luke18:5 ngɑɑn ócwɑ̈ggɑ jɑmme. Ke pɑ cwɑ̈ggɑ en jɑmme, pɑ wïyi ki judi yɑn.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Akööb Wë kinni, “Lïngu møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi jɑng-ɑ bɑ ɑ́muddi ji." 
Luke18:7 O men-ɑ́ Jwøk ocögø jie møg-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi en pɑ cwɑ̈gge gïg-ɑ kwɑjji yi gen, ge ywøøg-ɑ kööre ki wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng?" 
Luke18:8 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, ge ójwɑn ki kønyø yi Jwøk. De keny-ɑ ódwöög Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø, ódi yïddø kì kömi piny ki ji møg yï gen di yïëyø?”" 
Luke18:9 Gɑ́j møg ɑ́wɑj yi Yëso, e wɑ̈jj-ɑ kwï ji-ɑ nyi rumø ce ge døøj, o teen-ɑ kyeelø ceg kɑ benyø yi gen." 
Luke18:10 Ákööb kinni, “Dɑ Jɑlpɑresì mɑ ɑ́kedhi be kwɑ̈jjø kì Kengø geki jɑlgwɑ̈j." 
Luke18:11 “Kɑ Jɑlpɑresì ócungø kì wɑ̈ye e ókwɑ̈jjø kinni, ‘Yïn ɑ Jwøk, yɑ pwøj-ɑ yïn kipe yɑ pɑ ni tyëng-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ kwɑ̈dø, ɑ mudø ki ji, wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ yɑ̈bø ki mɑ̈nni tyëngmøøgø. Yɑ pwøj-ɑ yïn kipe yɑ pɑ pɑ̈r ki jɑlgwɑ̈j men." 
Luke18:12 Yɑ nyii thuumø tyel ɑ́ryew kì osboo, kɑ ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈ri jɑmmɑ bënn nyi mëggɑ yïn!’" 
Luke18:13 “De jɑlgwɑ̈j ɑ́cungi e lɑ̈wi, nuti pɑ̈nyi lïïdh mɑl. De ɑ́ceg-ɑ wïje ki kuul piny, e cingge cïb en pyëwe, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Yïn ɑ Jwøk, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki yɑn, yɑ bɑ ngetorøg.’" 
Luke18:14 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, bɑ jɑlgwɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́kedhi gøle e tir kì yï Jwøk, de pɑth ki Jɑlpɑresì. Mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ nyi tïng ri gen mɑl ódwöög cyɑ̈n, de tyëng-ɑ nyi dwöög ri gen cyɑ̈n ótïng mɑl.”" 
Luke18:15 Kɑ kwï ji nyigi gen, cɑgg ɑ́ møg-ɑ dhødh, muuj gen Yëso o gï gyëdhe. Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh møgɑni yi jøbɑng Yëso, kɑ tyëngɑni cyɑ̈r yi gen." 
Luke18:16 De Yëso othønhø ɑ́cwööle, ɑkööbe kinni, “Wiyu othønhø bï gen yïɑ. Ge ko jog wun. Mɑ́ Pödhi Jwøk bɑ mi ji-ɑ pɑ̈r ki othønhø ni møg." 
Luke18:17 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, ngɑn-ɑ pɑ kwɑny Pödhi Jwøk e nɑ othinh, pɑ wöl kedhi yije.”" 
Luke18:18 Jɑldwøng megø Yëso ɑ́pyëje kinni, ‘Jɑlpwöny-ɑ døj, gwøgɑ ngø o yɑ yïddɑ ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer?’" 
Luke18:19 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ cwøllí yɑn, yɑ døj? Bong ngɑn døj den-ɑ́ Jwøk kete." 
Luke18:20 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn gen ɑ cigg-ɑ kööbø kinni, ‘Yï ko niin ki ngɑn nuti nywøøm wun ri wun; yï ko nɑ̈gi ki dhɑnhø; yï ko kwɑ̈ɑ̈d; yï ko mënni kömi wɑɑd wun ki kwøbbi pyed; wør wïyí kí meyí.’ ”" 
Luke18:21 Kɑ jɑldwøngɑni ólöggø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi ki mïdhi ciggɑni yɑ nudd yɑ thiinh; gïti ɑnɑn, ge mïdhɑ’ mïdhø.”" 
Luke18:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Yëso, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Dɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel thyew, me cɑ̈nni yïn. Ngeew jɑmmí wɑ̈g bënn, kɑ ngyënyy-ɑ óngeew gen mëggí ɑbuur, o bëëd e yïí dɑ kɑ̈r kì mɑl. Codhe, kɑ yï bïí bɑngɑ.”" 
Luke18:23 De keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi jɑlɑni, kɑ yije ceg-ɑ bɑɑrø ki menteg, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd e kɑ̈rø ki mendwøng." 
Luke18:24 Kɑ Yëso nenn-ɑ yïe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Kedhi Pödhi Jwøk teeg kipe tyëngkɑ̈rì." 
Luke18:25 Kɑ̈li ɑmɑlø wɑɑng ɑlïbrøw yööd kibøli kedhi ngetikɑ̈r Pödhi Jwøk.” 
Luke18:26 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi teedø ɑkööb gen kinni, ‘Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, ɑ́ men ɑ ócuggi yielø?’" 
Luke18:27 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Jwøk ócuggø gwøg ki gïg mø pɑ cuggi gwøgø yi ji.”" 
Luke18:28 Kɑ Pïtør okööbø kinni, ‘Lidh, jɑmmi wøn bënn ɑ́wiy wøn piny, kɑ wø lug-ɑ bɑngí.’" 
Luke18:29 Kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni, “Yɑ kømm-ɑ dyër, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wiy ud, kí mɑ̈nn, kí nyiimëëg gen kí wɑdd, wɑlɑ̀ nywøl kipe Pödhi Jwøk," 
Luke18:30 ge óyïddi ki mø ngenyø ɑnɑn kì bøli keny, o ge óyïddi ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer kì bøli keny-ɑ óbï.”" 
Luke18:31 Codhe, kɑ tyëngwöödø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kïdhi wɑ̈yi gen yi Yëso, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wɑ kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwed bënn yi jøtöng kì ri Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø, bɑ møg cwöb." 
Luke18:32 Ócïb cinggi tyëngpɑth yi Yeud. Ógɑggi yi gen, kɑ yɑnyyi yi gen, kɑ köme nguddi gen ki lɑ́ɑ̀w." 
Luke18:33 Kɑ pwöd yi gen ki dëllì, kɑ nɑ̈g yi gen. De ódhwödh kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, kɑ dwöög-ɑ be nënnì.”" 
Luke18:34 Thɑ́ møgɑni nuti yodø yi tyëngwöödø, gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi kwøbbɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ɑkɑn kipe rummi gen, o møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi ɑ́cög ge pɑ gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen." 
Luke18:35 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi Yëso ki kɑɑl Yerikö, ɑ́dɑ jɑl mɑ cwør me bëëdø kì tøg yöö e ókwɑ̈jjø." 
Luke18:36 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge ji ge obëënø ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ yöö, ɑpëjje kinni, ‘Á ngø ɑ ɑ́cwöb?’" 
Luke18:37 Aköbbii kinni, “Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth ɑ bï e kɑ̈ll-ɑ yöö.”" 
Luke18:38 Aryeer cwørɑni kinni, “Yëso Wɑ̈d Debïd, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki yɑn!”" 
Luke18:39 Kɑ jɑl-ɑ cwør cyɑ̈r yi jøg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì bøli teedø mɑl kinni kude. De jɑl-ɑ bɑ cwør ɑ́ceg pëddø ryeerø kinni, ‘Wɑ̈d Debïd, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki yɑn!’" 
Luke18:40 Acungi Yëso kɑ okööbø kinni muuj jɑlɑni en. Kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe bute ɑpyëje gøn kinni," 
Luke18:41 “Á ngø ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, o göggɑ yïn?” Kɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Wuö, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ døøg be nënnø.’" 
Luke18:42 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Adɑ́ nëën. Yï ɑ́yiel yi yïëyí.”" 
Luke18:43 Kɑ jɑlɑni onëënø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth. Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh møgɑni yi teedø bënn ɑlejji gen Jwøk. 
Luke19:1 Yëso ɑ́kedh e bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ kɑɑl Yerikö. 
Luke19:2 Ádɑ jɑl me cyeg, mɑ jɑlgwɑ̈j me kɑ̈rø ki mendwøng, me cwøl ɑ́ Dhɑkɑ̀, o bëëd ɑ kɑɑlɑni." 
Luke19:3 Dhɑkɑ̀ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ lidhi Yëso de ɑ́dhɑ̈li wɑ̈dhi bute yi ngenyi ji, o pɑ cuggi lïdhø kì wɑ̈thi ji, mɑ́ e bɑ jɑl me cyeg." 
Luke19:4 Arenge mɑl kö yuu-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi yi Yëso kɑ yedh-ɑ wïj ólɑm, o Yëso cugge lidhø yi en."
