Luke19:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Yëso kenyɑni, kɑ lïïdh-ɑ mɑl, ɑkööbe kinni, “Dhɑkɑ̀, jwɑn yïnhi piny! Kipe yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ bëëdø yɑn ɑ́ wëlí dicyɑ̈ngtïn.”" 
Luke19:6 Kɑ Dhɑkɑ̀ jwɑn-ɑ yïnhi piny pyëwe omedø, kɑ Yëso cwøøle gøle." 
Luke19:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi teedø, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki gøny kinni, ‘Yëso bëëd ɑ gøl ngetorøg!’" 
Luke19:8 De Dhɑkɑ̀ ɑ́dhwödhi mɑl, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Budi jɑmmɑ ómëggɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur, o keløg e dɑ dhɑnhø men-ɑ órujø yi yɑn, gëe ócullɑ en ɑ́ ɑ́ngwen.’" 
Luke19:9 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Gøl ɑ́rum ki yielø dicyɑ̈ngtïn, mɑ́ jɑɑl thyew bɑ wɑ̈d gøl Abrɑhɑm." 
Luke19:10 Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ɑ́bï-ɑ be yɑbi ji-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, o ge yiel yi en.”" 
Luke19:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum ji ki lïngø ki møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi en, ɑwɑ̈jje gïn ki gɑ́j kipe kɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈nge ki Yerusɑlem, o ge ɑ́rum kinni Pödhi Jwøk ócwöb ɑnɑn ceth." 
Luke19:12 Ákööb kinni, “Jɑl megø me pere teg ɑ́kedhi pödhø me lɑ̈wi be yɑ̈bbø ki lɑwø, o ódwööge pödhi gen ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
Luke19:13 Kɑ bɑ̈ngge gɑ pyɑ̈rø cwøle, kɑ ngɑɑn nyi nënge ki ngyënyø pyɑ̈rø ɑ́kyel. Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, ‘Lug wun ki ngyëny møg gïti keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ.’" 
Luke19:14 De jɑlɑni mɑɑn yi tyëng pödhi gen, kɑ ge öd-ɑ bɑnge ki ji møg kööbø kinni, ‘Wø pɑ dwɑddi jɑɑl, o bëëde ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wøn.’" 
Luke19:15 “De jɑlɑni ɑ́göög ki rɑ̈dh. Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøge pödhi gen, ɑkööbe kinni, cwööl bɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́nënge ki ngyëny, o yod yi en mɑ løge ngyëny ɑ́dï ɑ ónywølø yi ngyënyyɑni." 
Luke19:16 Kɑ bɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi bëënø okööbø kinni, ‘Wuö, ngyëny-ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn ɑ́lugɑ, kɑ yɑ óyïddø ki ngyëny pyɑ̈rø.’" 
Luke19:17 Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, ‘Døøj cɑrø! Yï bɑ bɑ̈ng me døj, mɑ́ cingí ɑ́cïb-ɑ nyɑ gïjø me thiinh, kɑ mïdhi yi yïn kidøøj, yï ówëggɑ jɑɑgi kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø.’" 
Luke19:18 Kɑ ryeew bɑ̈ngg okööbø kinni, ‘Wuö, yɑ ɑ́yïddi ki ngyëny ɑ́bïj keny-ɑ ɑ́lugɑ ki ngyëny-ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn.’" 
Luke19:19 Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, ‘Yï ócuggø jyɑ̈gø ki kɑ̈dd ɑ́bïj.’" 
Luke19:20 “Kɑ bɑ̈ng megø obëënø, kɑ rɑ̈dh, köbbe kinni ‘Wuö, ngyënyí èn, ɑ́bɑɑnɑ yij nyɑ ógødh," 
Luke19:21 mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ óböggø ki yïn, kipe yï bɑ jɑl me yijí wöny. Yï nyi kwɑny-ɑ ngyëny mø nuti lem-ɑ yi yïn. Kɑ yï nyii kɑ̈jø ki byel mø nuti kɑ̈g-ɑ yi yïn.’" 
Luke19:22 Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, ‘Yï ócɑy yi yɑn kɑ kwøbbi dhøgí, yï bɑ̈ng-ɑ rɑj. Yɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn yɑ bɑ jɑl me yijɑ wöny, yɑ nyi kwɑny-ɑ ngyëny mø nuti lem-ɑ yi yɑn, o yɑ nyi kɑj-ɑ byel mø nuti kɑ̈g-ɑ yi yɑn." 
Luke19:23 Ede ngyënyɑ ɑ bɑɑnyí ki kïdhi beng? O ngyënyɑ di yuudɑ e nywølø keny-ɑ ɑ́bëënɑ.’ 
Luke19:24 “Kɑ jøg-ɑ cungi kì kenyɑni köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, ‘Kwɑnyu ngyënyø kì yï bɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ mëggu bɑ̈ng-ɑ yïe di pyɑ̈rø.’" 
Luke19:25 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, ‘Wuö, bɑ̈ngɑni yïe dɑ ngyëny pyɑ̈rø.’" 
Luke19:26 Alöggi rɑ̈dh kinni, ‘Ngɑn yïe di gïïpiny, gëe ceg kɑ medø; o ngɑn-ɑ yïe bong gïïpiny, cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ nud kì yïe, ceg kɑ kwɑnyø." 
Luke19:27 Anɑn, ɑ́gøne tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn, ɑ nuti dwɑddi kinni o yɑ göögɑ ki rɑ̈dh? Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu gen keny, kɑ ge nɑ̈g wun kì bølɑ.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki kwøbi møgɑni, ɑwɑ̈dde yöö e kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
Luke19:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi Yëso ki myërri Betpɑjì geki Betɑnì kì buti Kïti Dhetun, ɑöde ki ɑ́ryew kì kelli jøbɑnge," 
Luke19:30 kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedhu pɑn-ɑ nenni yi wun ɑcɑ̀. Keny-ɑ ókedhu yije, wu óyïddi ki ɑderø ówöb, me köme nuti pɑ̈nyø kɑdhø yi dhɑnhø. Gønyu en kɑ muuju yɑn." 
Luke19:31 Keløg e dɑ ngɑn me pyëj wun kinni ede ɑ gønyu en, kööb wun kinni dwɑdd-ɑ yi Wë.”" 
Luke19:32 Kɑ jøgɑni ryeet ókedhø, kɑ ɑderø ówöb yod gen ceth ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi Yëso." 
Luke19:33 Agøny ge gøn. Kɑ ge pyëj yi wëëg ɑderø kinni, ‘Ede ɑderø ɑ gønyu en?’" 
Luke19:34 Kɑ jøgɑni ólöggø kinni, “Dwɑdd-ɑ yi Wë.”" 
Luke19:35 Codhe, kɑ ɑderø muuj gen Yëso, ɑpeedh gen lɑ̈wwi gen kömi ɑderɑni, kɑ Yëso køny gen ki kɑdhi köme." 
Luke19:36 E Yëso kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem e ying-ɑ kömi ɑderø, kɑ ji ógudhi gen peedh gen yij yöö kì bøle." 
Luke19:37 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈nge ki Yerusɑlem, keny-ɑ töngi yöö piny kì thɑ Kïti Dhetun, kɑ teen-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì bɑng Yëso ócɑ̈gø ryeerø ki medi pëthi gen, ge lejj-ɑ Jwøk kipe gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi gen bënn." 
Luke19:38 Ge ɑ́ryeer kinni, “Rɑ̈nh-ɑ bï ki nyingi Wë bɑ ɑgyëdh. Dɑ mër kì mɑl, o Jwøk ceg kɑ lejjø!”" 
Luke19:39 Kɑ kwï Jøpɑresì møg-ɑ ɑ́ying kelli teedø Yëso köbbi gen kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, kyëddí jøbɑngí o ge cög ge pɑ kööbø ki gïg ni møg.”" 
Luke19:40 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, ke kud ji møg, tuggi kïttì ceg-ɑ cɑ̈gø ryeerø!”" 
Luke19:41 Kɑ ócyɑ̈ngø ki Yerusɑlem, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe gøn, ɑywönge," 
Luke19:42 kɑ okööbø kinni, “Ce di bëëd e gïn-ɑ dwɑddi kipe mër ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn dicyɑ̈ngtïn! De ɑnɑn ɑ́dhɑ̈li lidhø yi yïn!" 
Luke19:43 Bøli keny-ɑ ótyeeg yïn yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø óbï, kɑ yëthí cyëëg gen bënn, kɑ yï twij gen kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
Luke19:44 Yï órënyi yi gen ki menteg, kɑ dörí cøør kömi ji-ɑ yijí, bong kïti gyer ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ówiy e ócungø kömi megø, mɑ́ bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Jwøk be yieli yïn nuti ngij yïn!”" 
Luke19:45 Codhe, ɑkedhi Yëso Kengø, kɑ ócɑ̈gø cyeedi jøngyew wɑ̈g," 
Luke19:46 e gï köbbe’ köbbø kinni, “Bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø i Jwøk kööbø kinni, ‘Kengɑ ócwøl ɑ́ kej mɑ̈ddø.’ De ɑ́løgu keny pɑ̈nni yi kurrì!”" 
Luke19:47 Yëso ɑ́bëëd e nyii pwönyø kì Kengø yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. Kɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gø yi ókwërr-ɑ døngø, geki jøpwönyi Cigg kí jyɑ̈ggi pödhø." 
Luke19:48 De ge ɑ́jɑd ki yöö me nɑ̈g ge gøn, mɑ́ ji bënn ɑ́bëëd ge lïng-ɑ kwøbbe, e bong møg wëggi bodhø yi gen." 
Luke20:1 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel Yëso ɑ́bëëd e ying-ɑ Kengø, e pwöny-ɑ Wöndøj. Kɑ ókwërr-ɑ døngø geki jøpwönyi Cigg, kí jɑggi Yeud bï-ɑ yïe," 
Luke20:2 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Köbbí wøn, ɑ́ tegø mɑ ngø ɑ göög ki gïg-ɑ gøggi yi yïn ek? Á men ɑ ɑ́thödhi yïn ki tegø menɑni?”" 
Luke20:3 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Wu ólonyɑ ki pyëjø thyew. Köbbu yɑn," 
Luke20:4 Jøn keny-ɑ ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈ge ji, teng-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï ji?”" 
Luke20:5 Kɑ møgɑni dwønggi gen ki kɑɑm gen kinni, “Keløg wɑ ólöggø kinni, Jwɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g ji yi Jøn ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, ókööbø kinni ‘De ede ɑ bɑnyii ki yïëyø yi wun?’" 
Luke20:6 De keløg wɑ okööbø kinni, kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï ji, wɑ ceg kɑ bɑ̈llø yi ji bënn ki tuggi kïttì, kɑ wɑ nɑ̈g yi gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́yïëy kinni Jøn bɑ jɑltöng.”" 
Luke20:7 Codhe, ɑlöggi gen kinni, “Keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi tengɑni kwïj yi wøn.”" 
Luke20:8 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, wu pɑ köbbɑ thyew ki teng-ɑ gwøøgɑ møgɑni.”" 
Luke20:9 Codhe, ɑwɑ̈jji ji gɑ́j møg yi Yëso kinni, “Ádɑ jɑl mɑ ɑ́pïïdh ki bɑɑg oløg, kɑ gø kïre ki jøg mø purii. Codhe, ɑwele kɑ ómɑ̈gø ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r e tøøk." 
Luke20:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën kej lemi oløg, ɑöde yï jøg-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ggi bɑg ki bɑ̈ng me kɑ̈ɑ̈l bun-ɑ bɑ mee kì yï gen. De bɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́yöd e ceg kɑ pwödø yi gen, kɑ gø ryem gen ki cingge." 
Luke20:11 Adøøge ki ör ki bɑ̈ng megø. Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni pwöd yi gen thyew, o nuti wørø yi gen, kɑ gø ryem gen ki cingge." 
Luke20:12 Codhe, kɑ jɑlɑni dɑ̈ɑ̈g bɑ̈ngg öre. Kɑ thödhi ki kedd yi jøgɑni, kɑ ywɑɑj gen wɑ̈g kì yij bɑg." 
Luke20:13 Kɑ jɑlbɑg okööbø kinni, ‘Yɑ gwøg-ɑ ngø ɑnɑn? Wɑ̈dɑ ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, óör yi yɑn, ówør yi gen mɑwɑnø.’" 
Luke20:14 De jøg-ɑ pur bɑg keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen wɑ̈d jɑlɑni, ɑköbbi gen ri gen kinni, ‘Wɑ̈de men, bene en ɑ ólɑg bɑg. Bïu, nɑ̈g wɑ en, o bɑg gööge ɑ́ miee.’" 
Luke20:15 Codhe, kɑ wɑ̈d jɑlɑni ywɑɑj wɑ̈g kì yij bɑg yi jøgɑni kɑ gø nɑ̈g gen. “Jøgɑni ógögg-ɑ ngø yi wïi bɑngɑni?" 
Luke20:16 Óbï kɑ gï nɑ̈ge bënn, kɑ bɑg mɑ̈gge jøpur møøgø.” Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi teedø, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Wiy gïn ni men cöge e pɑ cwöb!”" 
Luke20:17 De Yëso ɑ́lïïdh yï gen, ɑkööbe kinni, “Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, ɑ́ ngø ɑ wɑngi yi møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kinni, ‘Kïti gyer men-ɑ ɑ́bɑny yi bödhhi gyer, en ɑ ɑ́göög ki kïn-ɑ pere teg kibøli kïtti gyer bënn.’" 
Luke20:18 Ngɑn pɑ̈dhi kömi kïnɑni ceg-ɑ yïddø ki turø, o ngɑn-ɑ köme pɑ̈dhi yi kïnɑni, gø nyɑdhe’ nyɑdhø!”" 
Luke20:19 Kɑ Yëso dwɑddi mɑgø yi jøpwönyi Cigg geki ókwërr-ɑ døngø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, mɑ́ gø ɑ́yod yi gen kinni gɑ́jɑni ɑ́gɑɑj-ɑ gen. De ge ɑ́bwøg yi teedø." 
Luke20:20 Codhe, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ be lebbi Yëso, kɑ ge oödø kì piny ki ji mø lebbii, ge nënni ge nɑ tyëngdøj. Ge ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ thɑbi Yëso mɑ di kööbe ki gïjø mɑ bɑ̈jjø, o gø di gøøny gen bøli modïr." 
Luke20:21 Codhe, kɑ Yëso pyëj yi jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör gɑ yïth kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, wø ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi yïn, kí kwøbb-ɑ pwönyi yi yïn bɑ dyër. Yïí bɑ̈r ki bëëdi ji, ying gɑ ngø, o yï nyi pwöny-ɑ dyër ceth kì ri yëth-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk." 
Luke20:22 Köbbí wøn, bɑ ɑyïëy yi Ciggee eni cudi Kɑysɑr ki gwɑ̈j, wɑlɑ̀ pɑth ki ɑyïëy?”" 
Luke20:23 De wëënyi gen ɑ́yod yi Yëso, ɑkööbe kinni," 
Luke20:24 “Nyudhu yɑn ki ngyënyø ɑ́tegø. Á ngïji men kí nyingi men ɑ köme?” Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Mø Kɑysɑr.”" 
Luke20:25 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Keløg ɑ́ kinøw mëggu Kɑysɑr jɑmm-ɑ bɑ mø Kɑysɑr, kɑ jɑmm-ɑ bɑ mø Jwøk mëggu Jwøk.”" 
Luke20:26 Codhe, kɑ ge ódhɑ̈lø mɑgi Yëso kì ri gïn-ɑ di kwøb yi en kɑ ɑ́thɑb ge gøn kì bøli teedø. Ge ɑ́ngɑ̈ng yi lögg-ɑ ɑ́løøge, ɑcög gen ge okudø." 
Luke20:27 Kɑ kwï Jøsɑduk, ɑ løg jøg-ɑ nyi kööbø kinni ji koo dhwödh kì yij thøø, bï-ɑ yï Yëso." 
Luke20:28 Apyëjii yi gen kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, Mosɑ̀ ɑ́kööb kinni i keløg dhɑnhø othøø, kɑ ówïyø ki dhɑjø e bong nyige, i lɑɑg cï nyel-ɑ ɑ́thøw yi ómen, o nywøle wïj nyel-ɑ ɑ́thøw." 
Luke20:29 Kì bøli keny megø, ɑ́dɑ nyiimëëg ɑ́bïryew. Kɑ nyel-ɑ mɑl ónyömø kɑ othøø, de bong nywøl mɑ ɑ́wiy yi en." 
Luke20:30 Kɑ ngɑnɑni lɑg yi ryeew yɑɑgɑni, kɑ nyelɑni othøø." 
Luke20:31 Kɑ nyɑnɑni lony ki lɑgø yi dɑ̈ɑ̈g nyiimëëgɑni, kɑ nyelɑni othøø thyew. Gïjø ɑ́kyel ɑ ɑ́cwöb kipe nyiimëëgɑni bënn, ge ɑ́thøw e bong nyigi gen." 
Luke20:32 Alunyi ngɑnɑni ki thøø kì cyɑ̈n. 
Luke20:33 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëd ngɑnɑni ki nyiimëëgɑni gɑ ɑ́bïryew bënn, óbëëd ɑ́ cï men kì kelli gen keny-ɑ ódhwödh ji kì yij thøø?”" 
Luke20:34 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Kì kömi piny, ji nyii nyömø, kɑ ji nyi nywøm." 
Luke20:35 De ji-ɑ bɑ ɑpwøj kinni ge óyïddi ki kej gen kì piny-ɑ óbï kì bɑng dhwödhø kì yij thøø, ge pɑ nywøm, o ge pɑ nyömi." 
Luke20:36 Kì yij bëënɑni, ge nɑ wëywödd, o ge pɑ cuggi thøø këti. Ge bɑ nyigi Jwøk, mɑ́ ge ɑ́tug-ɑ yij thøø." 
Luke20:37 Keløg ɑ́ per dhwödhø kì yij thøø, men-ɑ́ Mosɑ̀ kiree ɑ́nyuudh kì ri nyɑ kïrø, kɑ ɑ́kööbe kinni Wë bɑ Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm, o bɑ Jwøøg Isɑɑk, o bɑ Jwøøg Yɑgob." 
Luke20:38 Jwøk pɑth ki Jwøøg tyëngthøø, de ceg bëëdø ɑ́ Jwøøg tyëngnëënø, mɑ́ ji bënn onëënø kì yïe!”" 
Luke20:39 Kɑ kwï jøpwönyi Cigg okööbø kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, löggí døøj.”" 
Luke20:40 Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́cwed pyëwe, kɑ ópëjjø ki pyëj møøgø." 
Luke20:41 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ nyi kööb ji kinni Mesiy bɑ wɑ̈d Debïd?" 
Luke20:42 Debïd kiree okööbø kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Wör kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Wɑ̈ɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, Bëëd kì wïj kyëjɑ," 
Luke20:43 gïti keny-ɑ ócïbɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn thɑ́ tyellí.’ 
Luke20:44 Mesiy cwølli yi Debïd ɑ́ Wɑ̈n, keløg ɑ́ kinøw, Mesiy óbëëd ɑ́ wɑ̈d Debïd kidï?”" 
Luke20:45 Kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge köbbe teedø olïngø bëne, kinni," 
Luke20:46 “Koru ri wun kipe jøpwönyi Cigg. Ge nyi tyer-ɑ wïïnø ge orugø ki ógudh mø bɑ̈rrø, o ge mɑɑr-ɑ mɑ̈dhhø yi ji kì kɑ̈jji ngyew. Ge nyi mɑɑr-ɑ bëëdø kì wɑ̈thi kwømm-ɑ døj kì sinɑgøgg geki kɑ̈jji ryëj." 
Luke20:47 De ge kedh ge ruj-ɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ bɑ thwömm, ge kwɑll-ɑ kɑ̈lli thwömmɑni, o ri gen nyi nyodh gen ce gɑ ji mø døøj, kenyi kwɑ̈jji gen ki kwɑ̈jjø me bɑ̈ɑ̈r. Ge ócɑy kɑ cɑ́y mø døngø!”" 
Luke21:1 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Yëso e nenn-ɑ ji kɑ̀ lëngi gen yij sɑnduug ngyënyy-ɑ nyi muuj kì Kengø, ɑ́lïdhi ki tyëngkɑ̈rì mø gïïr ge lëng-ɑ yij sɑndug ki ngyëny." 
Luke21:2 Codhe, ɑlidhe ngɑndhɑjø mɑ thwöm me wɑnge cɑn, e lëng-ɑ yij sɑndug ki gïrïc ɑ́ryew." 
Luke21:3 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, thwöm-ɑ bɑ ɑbuur èn, bɑ en ɑ ɑ́muuj ki ngyëny mø ngenyø kibøli ji møgɑk bënn." 
Luke21:4 Ge ɑ́muuj ɑ ri ngyënyy-ɑ ɑ́döngi piny kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum gen ki ngyew ki jɑmm-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen. Ngɑndhɑjø men wɑnge cɑn ki mendwøng, de ɑ́muuj-ɑ ngyënyy-ɑ di ngëëwe ki gïn cɑm yi en.”" 
Luke21:5 Kwï jøbɑng Yëso ɑ́bëëd ge okööbø kì ri Kengø, kí kër-ɑ ótɑɑgii ki kïttì mø myëër, kí ngenyi jɑmm-ɑ nyi mëggi Jwøk. De Yëso ɑ́løøg-ɑ kinni," 
Luke21:6 “Keløg ɑ́ per gïg-ɑ nenni yi wun ek bënn, bøli keny megø obëënø; owɑ̈nhi bøli kenyɑni, bong kït ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ówiy e ócungø kì kömi men-ɑ kyeelø; kïttɑni bënn ócøør piny.”" 
Luke21:7 Apyëëj Yëso yi teedø kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, ɑ́ kì wɑɑng ɑ ócwöb gïg ni møgɑni? Á ngø ɑ óbëëd ɑ́ ngïji, me nyodh kinni kej cwöbi gen ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi?”" 
Luke21:8 Alögge kinni, “Nëën wun kidøøj kipe wu ówëny. Ji mø gïïr óbï ki nyingɑ ge okööbø kinni, ‘Bene yɑn en.’ Kí kinni, ‘Bøli kenyɑni ɑ́wɑ̈nhi!’ De wu ko løg bɑng gen." 
Luke21:9 Keny-ɑ ólïng wun ki wöddi liny geki ɑgwɑg, wu ko bwøg, mɑ́ gïgɑni di dwɑddø o ge cwöb gen, de ge pɑ wɑngi kinni thumi piny ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi.”" 
Luke21:10 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Pödhh ónyïɑ̈ggi ki pödhh-ɑ kyeelø. Kɑ rɑ̈nhì ónyïɑ̈ggø ki rɑ̈nhh-ɑ kyeelø." 
Luke21:11 Piny ónhɑ̈nhi kì kɑ̈jj mø gïïr, kɑ kɑ̈j ómɑ̈gø, kɑ yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g tɑɑy-ɑ kelli ji. Gïg böggi mø gïïr ócwöb, kɑ ngïjjì mø døngø obëënø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl." 
Luke21:12 De kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti cwööb gïgɑni, wu ómɑg yi teedø, kɑ wu göggi gen ki gïgrijjø. Kɑ wu nyi gøøny gen kì sinɑgøgg, kɑ wu kïdhi gen uddi mɑg, kɑ wu kïdhi be gøønyø kì bøli rɑ̈nhì geki modïrr, kipe nyingɑ." 
Luke21:13 De bene bøli kenyɑni ɑ óyod yi wun e døøj ki kwøbi Wöndøj. 
Luke21:14 Pëthi wun ko nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈g ki olïng kipe gïn-ɑ ókwøb yi wun. 
Luke21:15 Wu óthödhi yi yɑn ki peli wïj men nyi kwøb wun møg pɑ cuggi løøgø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, wɑlɑ̀ bong bɑ̈jjø men-ɑ óyod yi gen kì dhøggi wun." 
Luke21:16 Cɑgg ɑ́ wëëg wun geki mëëg wun, kí nyiimï wun, kí wɑddi wun, kí mɑ̈dhhi wun bënn, ge ómɑ̈ni ki wun, kɑ kwï wun nɑ̈g yi gen." 
Luke21:17 Wu ómɑɑn yi ji bënn kipe nyingɑ. 
Luke21:18 De bong yëyø ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ódëëm kì wɑ̈thi wun. 
Luke21:19 Wëyi wun óyiel yi wun kɑ mïdhi yïëyø mi wun. 
Luke21:20 “Keny-ɑ ólidhu Yerusɑlem e ótyegø yi yɑy me dwøng, kɑ wu ngɑ̈nyu wøw kinni kej cøøre piny ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
Luke21:21 Kì bøli kenyɑni, rengi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kelli kïttì. Kɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem rengi gen wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, kɑ tyëng-ɑ buti kɑɑl ko kedhi yije." 
Luke21:22 Mɑ́ cyɑ̈nggɑni óbëëd gɑ ‘Cyɑ̈nggi Cɑ́y’ møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø. 
Luke21:23 Tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ óbëëd gɑ ɑ́yɑjj geki møg-ɑ mïdhi ki othønhø kì bøli kenyɑni, ri gen dɑ cyën! Orɑng me dwøng ópɑ̈dhi kömi piny men, Jwøk pyëwe órënyi ki ji møg." 
Luke21:24 Kwï gen ónɑ̈g, kɑ kwï gen kïdhi pödhh møøgø gɑ ɑmɑgg. Yerusɑlem ócøør piny yi ji mø pɑth ki Yeud, o óbëëd e onyønø yi jurrɑni gïti keny-ɑ óthumi kej gen." 
Luke21:25 “Dɑ ngïjjì møg-ɑ ócwöb kì ri cɑ̈ng kí dwɑ̈y, kí kyell. Pödhh bënn óbëëd ge óböggø wɑ̈thi gen cungø kì kömi piny keny, ge bögg-ɑ ruuri nɑɑm omelø kí ngwölli ɑpɑgø." 
Luke21:26 Ji ónɑ̈g yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø; wɑ̈thi gen ócungi yi gïn-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kömi piny e nɑ menɑni, mɑ́ jɑmm-ɑ teg kì mɑl ceg kɑ rungø kì kɑ̈jji gen." 
Luke21:27 Codhe, o Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø lidh yi ji e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl kì yij pøølø, ki tegø me dwøng geki mɑ̈r me dwøng." 
Luke21:28 Keny-ɑ ócɑ̈gi gïgɑni ki cwöbø, lïïdhu mɑl kɑ wɑ̈thi wun tïng wun, mɑ́ bøli keny-ɑ óyieel wun ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi!”" 
Luke21:29 Codhe, ɑwɑɑj gɑ́j møg yi Yëso kinni, “Lidh wun ólɑm geki yenh-ɑ kyeelø." 
Luke21:30 Kenyi nyog gen, kɑ yod yi wun kinni cwir ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
Luke21:31 Ki yuu-ɑ ni menɑni ceth, keny-ɑ ólidh wun gïgɑni ge ocwöbø, óyod yi wun kinni Pödhi Jwøk ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
Luke21:32 “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, gïgɑni ócwöb bënn, ji møg-ɑ nud ɑnɑn nudd ge onëënø." 
Luke21:33 Mɑl kí piny ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny, de kwøbbɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
Luke21:34 “Koru ri wun, wu ko nyi tyëg piny wu ceg-ɑ cɑm, o wu ceg-ɑ mɑdh, wɑlɑ̀ wu ceg-ɑ tɑg kì ri jɑmmi kömi piny. Keløg wu ógöögø kinøw, wu pɑ̈ɑ̈y-ɑ piny yi cyɑ̈ngɑni kɑ wu mɑge," 
Luke21:35 ni kenyi mɑ̈gi ɑ́kɑ̈llì. Gïgɑni ópɑ̈dhi kömi ji bënn kì kömi piny. 
Luke21:36 De nëën wun kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. Kɑ wu nyi kwɑ̈jji wun ceth, o wu óbodh wun keny-ɑ ócwöb gïgɑni bënn, o wu ócuggi wun ki cung kì bøli Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø.”" 
Luke21:37 Kɑ Yëso nyii rïïjø e pwöny-ɑ ji kì yij Kengø, kɑ nyi kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl kì wɑ̈r, kɑ nyi nïnn-ɑ wïj Kïti Dhetun." 
Luke21:38 Kɑ ji nyi møøl-ɑ yij Kengø kì mwøl yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, be lïngø ki kwøbbi Yëso." 
Luke22:1 Kɑ bøli kej Kwëër Olwëny obëënø, kwërɑni ɑ nyi cwøl ɑ́ Kwëër Ákɑɑdh." 
Luke22:2 Ókwërr-ɑ døngø geki jøpwönyi Cigg ɑ́bëëd ge oyɑ̈bø ki yöö men nɑ̈g gen Yëso, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bëëd ge óböggø yi teedø." 
Luke22:3 Kɑ Cethɑn kedh-ɑ ri Yeudɑ̀ ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Iskɑryøt, jɑlɑni bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyëngwöödø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew." 
Luke22:4 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ kedh-ɑ yï ókwërr-ɑ døngø geki kwï bölidhhi Kengø, kɑ gï köbbe yuu-ɑ cugge cïbi Yëso cinggi gen." 
Luke22:5 Kɑ pëthi gen ómïnø, kɑ kwøb reb gen kinni, Yeudɑ̀ óthödhi ki ngyëny." 
Luke22:6 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ oyïëyø, kɑ oyɑ̈bø ki keny-ɑ ócïbe Yëso cinggi gen e kwïj yi teedø." 
Luke22:7 Kɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Kwëër Olwëny obëënø, bøli keny-ɑ nyi ngɑɑl órömmi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh." 
Luke22:8 Kɑ Pïtør geki Jøn köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Kedh wun kɑ jɑmmi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh gwir wun, o wɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wɑ.”" 
Luke22:9 Apëjji gen kinni, “Dwɑddi yi yïn o gwir yi wøn kì keny?”" 
Luke22:10 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Keny-ɑ órum wun ki wɑ̈dhi kɑɑl, wu órøøm ki jɑl me kɑ̈ddi ki pugi pï. Kɑ wu løgu bɑnge gøl-ɑ ókedhe." 
Luke22:11 Kɑ jɑlkɑl köbbu kinni, ‘Jɑlpwönyø okööbø kinni, ɑ́gøne øn-ɑ yije ócɑɑmɑ gïi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh wøki jøbɑngɑ?’" 
Luke22:12 Wu ónyudhe ød mɑl me lɑɑj, me rumø ki pedhø. Gwiru jɑmmi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh kì kenyɑni.”" 
Luke22:13 Codhe, ɑkedh Pïtør geki Jøn, kɑ møgɑni yuud gen ceth ni kɑ ɑ́kwøøb gen yi Yëso. Kɑ gïgcɑmmi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh gwøg yi gen." 
Luke22:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën bøli keny-ɑ nyi cɑɑg jɑmmi kwër ki cɑmø, e Yëso rum pëggi tɑw geki jøbɑnge." 
Luke22:15 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Ádwɑddi yi yɑn ki mendwøng kinni o gïi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh men cɑm yi wɑ kì kej ɑ́kyel, yɑ nuti rɑngø." 
Luke22:16 Yɑ pɑ cigi cɑm ki Kwëër Ákɑɑdh gïti keny-ɑ óbëën Pödhi Jwøk.” 
Luke22:17 Codhe, kɑ Yëso ókɑ̈bbø ki óthɑ̈gi, kɑ Jwøk pwøje, ɑkööbe kinni, “Kwɑny wun óthɑ̈gi men, kɑ nywɑg wun." 
Luke22:18 Yɑ pɑ cigi mɑdh këti ki møgi oløg gïti keny-ɑ óbëën Pödhi Jwøk.” 
Luke22:19 Codhe, kɑ Yëso ókɑ̈bbø ki ópun, kɑ Jwøk pwøje, ɑpøde gøn, kɑ gø mëgge gïn, ɑkööbe kinni, “Men bɑ dëlɑ, men-ɑ muuj yi yɑn kiper wun. Nyi gwøgu møg, gɑ møg nyi pɑɑr yɑn yi wun.”" 
Luke22:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki cɑm, kɑ óthɑ̈gi kwɑnye, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Óthɑ̈gi men bɑ lwöm-ɑ nyɑ̈n kì kɑɑm Jwøk geki jie. Lwömɑni cɑ̈gi kɑ remɑ, rem-ɑ ókøny piny kiper wun." 
Luke22:21 “De ngɑn-ɑ ótwɑny yɑn, cinge ying-ɑ yij lwøl ɑ́kyel ki cingɑ." 
Luke22:22 Gïn-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Jwøk kipe Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ócwöb, de ngɑn-ɑ ótwɑnyii ree dɑ cyën me dwøng!”" 
Luke22:23 Acɑ̈gi gen ki pyënyi ri gen, mɑ løge men kì kelli gen, ɑ cuggi gwøgi gïn ni menɑni." 
Luke22:24 Kɑ tyëngwöödø ócɑ̈gø pëmø thyew ki mɑ løge men ɑ mɑl kì kelli gen. 
Luke22:25 De ge ɑ́köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Rɑ̈nhi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, jɑɑg-ɑ jii gen. O tyëng-ɑ jyɑ̈gø nyi tyer-ɑ cwøllø gɑ ji mø göggi ji ki gïgdøj." 
Luke22:26 De wu pɑ bëëdø kinøw, wiy ngɑn-ɑ dwøng kì kelli wun bëëde e nɑ en ɑ thinh, o jɑgø bëëde e nɑ bɑ̈ng." 
Luke22:27 Á men ɑ pere teg, ngɑn-ɑ pëggi piny be cɑm, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn-ɑ göggii ki gïncɑm? Pɑth ki ngɑn-ɑ pëggi be cɑm ɑ pere teg? De yɑ ce nɑ bɑ̈ng kì kelli wun?" 
Luke22:28 “Wun ɑ nyi cungi kì kömɑ kenyi rɑɑng yɑn. 
Luke22:29 O nɑ kɑ ɑ́thödhi yɑn ceth yi Wïyɑ ki tegø me jyɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ, wu óthödhɑ ki tegø ni menɑni ceth." 
Luke22:30 Wu ócyɑ̈mø kɑ wu omɑ̈dhø kì tɑwɑ kì Pödhɑ. Kɑ wu pëgg-ɑ wɑ̈thi kwømm, wu jɑɑg-ɑ kɑ̈lli Isrɑil gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew." 
Luke22:31 “Sɑymøn, Sɑymøn, Cethɑn kwɑjj-ɑ kinni o wu yieg yi en ni kenyi yieeg byel." 
Luke22:32 De yɑ ɑ́kwɑ̈jji kinni o yïëyí cöge e pɑ wiy yi yïn! O nyiimyëw ótëngi gen kì bɑngí, keny-ɑ ódwöög yïɑ.”" 
Luke22:33 Alöggi Pïtør kinni, “Wuö, yɑ ceg-ɑ kedhi ød mɑg kyeel ki yïn, o yɑ ɑ́böyi ki thøø!”" 
Luke22:34 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn Pïtør, óthwønh óköögø tïn, yï rum kyëdø tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g, kinni yɑ kwïj yi yïn.”" 
Luke22:35 Aköbbi jøwöödø yi Yëso kinni, “Keny-ɑ ɑ́örɑ wun, yï wun bong pødhi ngyëny, wɑlɑ̀ beeg ógudh, wɑlɑ̀ wɑr, ɑ́dɑ gïjø mɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ddi wun?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Bong gøn.”" 
Luke22:36 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “De ɑnɑn, ngɑn yïe di pødhi ngyëny, wɑlɑ̀ beeg ógudh, kɑ̈lle gïn. Keløg yïí bong pilø, ngeew ógødhí wɑ̈g kɑ yï ngëëw." 
Luke22:37 Wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, ‘Ákwɑɑn kelli tyëngorøg.’ O kwøbbi wɑ̈nyɑni bɑ møg pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen, møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed kiperɑ, bɑ møg bï gɑ dyër ceth.”" 
Luke22:38 Kɑ jøbɑnge okööbø kinni, “Lïdhí, pil ɑ́ryew ɑ keny èn, Wuö.” Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Døj, ɑ́rum!”" 
Luke22:39 Adhwödh Yëso kì kɑɑldwøng, kɑ kedh-ɑ wïj Kïti Dhetun, ni kenyi kedhe cøn, kɑ jøge løg-ɑ bɑnge." 
Luke22:40 Kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe kenyɑni, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Kwɑ̈jji wun, o wu ócög wu pɑ thɑb.”" 
Luke22:41 Kɑ Yëso ókedhø kì buti gen, kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑɑm me dëëm yi tuug kɑ̀ bɑ̈ddii. Arume cønge piny, kɑ ókwɑ̈jjø kinni," 
Luke22:42 “Wïyø, keløg e odwɑddø yi yïn, nyiig óthɑ̈ngi orɑng men kì butɑ! De pɑth ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn, dɑ́ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn ɑ gwøg.”" 
Luke22:43 Kɑ wëywödø obëënø kì mɑl, ɑcïïje gøn." 
Luke22:44 Kɑ Yëso ókwɑ̈jjø ki menteg, e pyëwe orɑ̈mø. Kɑ kwɑ̈ge dyëëm-ɑ piny e nɑ remø." 
Luke22:45 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume kwɑ̈jjø, ɑdøøge yï jøbɑnge kɑ gï yuude ge pïdø yi kïïmø, o ge nenø." 
Luke22:46 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Wude ɑ neni wun? Dhwödhu mɑl kɑ wu kwɑ̈jji wun, o wu ócög wu pɑ thɑb.”" 
Luke22:47 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd Yëso e okööbø, kɑ ji møøgø obëënø, ɑ́ Yeudɑ̀ ɑ pyejji gen, Yeudɑ̀ bɑ jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyëngwöödø møg-ɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. Apödhe be nuumi Yëso," 
Luke22:48 Kɑ köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Yeudɑ̀, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø twɑny yi yïn kɑ nuumø?”" 
Luke22:49 Jøbɑnge møg-ɑ ɑ́ying bute, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen gïn-ɑ kømi cwöbø, ɑpëjji gen kinni, “Wuö, pwöd wø gen ki pilli wøn?”" 
Luke22:50 Kɑ bɑ̈ng Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng gøj yi ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen ki pilø, kɑ yïth kyëje juude wɑ̈g." 
Luke22:51 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Árum! Ko di gïn ni menɑni.” Codhe, kɑ yïth bɑ̈ngɑni nywɑle, kɑ gø dwøøge keje." 
Luke22:52 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bï be mɑgi Yëso, bɑ jɑggi ókwër, kí bölidhh-ɑ nyi kor Kengø, kí jøgdøngi Yeud. Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Wu ɑ́ceg bëënø wu kɑ̈ll-ɑ pil kí lødh, de yɑ nɑ ngetigöj." 
Luke22:53 Yɑ nuti nywɑɑl wun, kenyi bëëdɑ kì buti wun kì yij Kengø yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. De men bene bøli kej wun, eni bøli keny-ɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈g yi muudhø.”" 
Luke22:54 Kɑ Yëso mɑg gen, kɑ gø kɑ̈l gen. Akïdhi ge gøn gøl Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng. Kɑ Pïtør ókedhø e ólugø kì bɑng gen, e lɑ̈wi." 
Luke22:55 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum ɑlɑthkerr ki kodh ki mɑc kì dïkɑl, ɑpëggi Pïtør kelli gen." 
Luke22:56 Kɑ Pïtør lidh kì cɑɑr mɑc yi ngɑndhɑjø me göögø ɑ́ bɑ̈ng, kɑ gø tide kidøøj, ɑkööbe kinni, “Jɑɑl, ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kɑ Yëso thyew.”" 
Luke22:57 De Pïtør ɑ́kyëëd kinni, “Jɑlɑni kwïj yi yɑn, ngɑn!”" 
Luke22:58 Kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh, kɑ Pïtør lidh yi jɑl megø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yï bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen thyew.” Akyëëd Pïtør kinni, “Yɑ pɑth, jɑl!”" 
Luke22:59 Kɑ ɑ́thumi sɑɑ̀, ɑdhiingii yi jɑl megø kinni, “Jɑɑl, pɑ bɑ̈jji bëëdø e cyɑ̈dhø kɑ Yëso, mɑ́ e bɑ jɑl Gɑlelì thyew!”" 
Luke22:60 De Pïtør ɑ́kyëëd kinni, “Jɑl, gïn-ɑ kømmi yi yïn kwïj yi yɑn!” Kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́nudd Pïtør e okööbø ceth, kɑ óthwønh oköögø." 
Luke22:61 Kɑ Wë ree luge, ɑlïïdhe yï Pïtør. Kɑ Pïtør ópɑ̈dø ki møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Wë kinni, “Óthwønh óköögø tïn, yï rum kyëdø tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g, kinni yɑ kwïj yi yïn.”" 
Luke22:62 Akedhi Pïtør dhø kɑl, kɑ óywöngø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe." 
Luke22:63 Kɑ Yëso gɑggi yi jøg-ɑ korii, kɑ gø pwöd gen." 
Luke22:64 Nyinge ɑ́twöj gen kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Bɑ̈ggí! Á men ɑ ɑ́gøj yïn?”" 
Luke22:65 Kɑ gø köbbi gen ki gïgrijjø mø gïïr. 
Luke22:66 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ru wøw, kɑ jøgdøngø geki ókwërr-ɑ døngø kí jøpwönyi Cigg ge ócugø bënn kì kej ɑ́kyel, kɑ Yëso kïdhi burɑni." 
Luke22:67 Kɑ Yëso köbbi gen kinni, “Köbbí wøn, yïn ɑ bɑ Mesiy?” Kɑ Yëso ólöggø kinni, “Ke köbbɑ wun, wu pɑ yïëy," 
Luke22:68 o ke pyëjɑ wun, wu pɑ löggi." 
Luke22:69 De cɑg ɑnɑn gïti dhuki megø, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø óbëëd ɑ wïj cingi kyëëj Jwøk Áyïmø.”" 
Luke22:70 Akööb gen bënn kinni, “Ngøø, bene yïn Wɑ̈d Jwøk?” Aløøge kwøbbi gïn kinni, “Ákwøb yi wun, bɑ yɑn.”" 
Luke22:71 Akööb gen kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈b wɑ ki ji møg köngi kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi en? Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe ɑ́lïngi yi wɑ kiriee!”" 
Luke23:1 Codhe, kɑ ɑkunɑni bëne odhwödhø, kɑ Yëso peej gen yï Pilɑtø." 
Luke23:2 Kɑ ge ócɑ̈gø gøønyi Yëso kinni, “Jɑɑl, ɑ́mɑg yi wøn e köbb-ɑ tyëng pödhi wøn ki kwøb mø rënyi wɑ̈thi gen, kɑ gï mɑ̈ɑ̈ne cudi Kɑysɑr ki gwɑ̈j, o ree cwølli yi en ɑ́ Mesiy, rɑ̈dh.”" 
Luke23:3 Apyëjii yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Bene yïn Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud?” Kɑ Yëso ólöggø kinni, “Ákwøb yi yïn ceth.”" 
Luke23:4 Kɑ jɑggi ókwër geki teedø köbbi yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́yod yi yɑn e óbɑjø yi jɑɑl.”" 
Luke23:5 Kɑ ge odyëjø ki gøny kinni, “Jɑlɑni rëny-ɑ wɑ̈thi ji ki pwöny-ɑ pwönyi yi en. Ácɑ̈g ɑ Gɑlelì, o ɑ́wɑ̈nhi keny ɑnɑn.”" 
Luke23:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Pilɑtø, ɑpëjje kinni, “Jɑɑl, bɑ jɑl Gɑlelì?”" 
Luke23:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yode gøn kinni Yëso kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ myërr-ɑ jɑɑg yi Ërödøs, o Ërödøs ɑ́bëëd e nud kì Yerusɑlem kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, ɑöre Yëso yï Ërödøs." 
Luke23:8 Ërödøs keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe Yëso, kɑ pyëwe ceg-ɑ mïnø ki mendwøng, mɑ́ kwøbbi Yëso rumø ki lïngø yi en, o ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ yïddø ki Yëso ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r. Ádwɑdd-ɑ lidhi Yëso, e ogöögø gïïngɑ̈ngø." 
Luke23:9 Kɑ Ërödøs Yëso pyënye ki pyëj mø gïïr, de bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́løøg yi Yëso." 
Luke23:10 Jɑggi ókwër geki jøpwönyi Cigg ɑ́bëëd ge ócungø kì kenyɑni, ge gøøny-ɑ Yëso ki gøønyø me teg." 
Luke23:11 Kɑ Yëso gɑggi yi Ërödøs geki ɑlɑthkerr møge, codhe ɑlunyi gen ree ki ógødh me døj, kɑ gø döggi gen Pilɑtø." 
Luke23:12 Pilɑtø ɑ́bëëd ge mɑ̈n geki Ërödøs ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, de ge ɑ́ceg gwøg ki mɑ̈dhh dicyɑ̈ngɑni." 
Luke23:13 Kɑ teedø bëne geki jɑggi ókwër, kí jøgdøngi Yeud, cwööl kej ɑ́kyel yi Pilɑtø." 
Luke23:14 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Jɑɑl, ɑ́muuj wun yɑn, wu okööbø i ókɑ̈ddø ki göj kì kelli ji. De ɑ́pyënyɑ kì bøli wun bënn, o nuti yodø yi yɑn kinni dɑ gïnrɑj men-ɑ ógwøgø yi en kì kelli møg-ɑ ɑ́gøønyu en bënn." 
Luke23:15 Thyew, Ërödøs bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́yode men-ɑ ógwøgø yi en, bene ɑ bɑnge dögge gøn wɑ. Ni kɑ̀ nëën wun, bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́gwøge me pere cugge kuumø ki thøø." 
Luke23:16 Ópwöd yi yɑn, o gøny.”" 
Luke23:17 Nyi dɑ ɑmɑg me nyi gøny yi Pilɑtø cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Kwëër Ákɑɑdh. 
Luke23:18 Kɑ teedø bëne ceg-ɑ ryeerø wïj ɑ́kyel kinni, “Nɑ̈ɑ̈g! Kɑ wø gönyí Bɑrɑbɑ̀!”" 
Luke23:19 Bɑrɑbɑ̀ ómɑgø kɑ per ɑgwɑg me tug en kì kɑɑlɑni, kí per dhɑnhø me nɑ̈ɑ̈g en." 
Luke23:20 Pilɑtø ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ gønyi Yëso, kɑ møgɑni köbbe teedø kinøw." 
Luke23:21 De ge ɑ́yöd ge ceg-ɑ ryeerø këti kinni, “Gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw! Gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw!”" 
Luke23:22 Apëjji Pilɑtø kì ri dɑ̈ɑ̈g lögge kinni, “Á kipe ngø? Á ngø ɑ ɑ́rënye? Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́yodɑ me pere cugge nɑ̈gø. De ópwöd, o gøny.”" 
Luke23:23 De ge ɑ́cög ge nuti wïyø ryeerø kinni, i gur Yëso wïj yɑdh ɑrïw. Kì cyɑ̈n, kɑ Pilɑtø tyɑm yi ɑwøøw gen." 
Luke23:24 Akuum Yëso ki thøø yi Pilɑtø ni kɑ ɑ́dwɑddii yi teedø. 
Luke23:25 Kɑ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi gen gøny, eni jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ceg ki kïdhi ød mɑg kiper nɑ̈gi dhɑnhø, kɑ Yëso mëgge gïn, o gø göggi gen gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen." 
Luke23:26 Kɑ Yëso køøl wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl yi ɑlɑthkerr. Arøøm gen ki jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Sɑymøn jɑl Serin, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pwödhø. Amɑg gen Sɑymøn kɑ yɑdh ɑrïw cïb wïj tøge, o gø byelle kì bɑng Yëso." 
Luke23:27 Ji mø gïïr ɑ́bëëd ge ólugø kì bɑng Yëso, kelli gen dɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn mø pëthi gen rɑ̈mø kipere, o ge cyɑ̈dhi ge ywøg-ɑ en." 
Luke23:28 Kɑ Yëso ree luge gïn, ɑkööbe kinni, “Wun ɑ mɑ̈nni Yerusɑlem, wu ko ywøg yɑn, de ywøg wun ri wun, wuki nyigi wun." 
Luke23:29 Ácyɑ̈ngi eni bøli keny-ɑ ókööb ji kinni, ‘Tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ bøøjø, ɑ thïnhhi gen nuti pɑ̈nyø dhødhø, ri gen dɑ gyëdh!’" 
Luke23:30 Kì bøli kenyɑni, kïttì óköbbi yi ji kinni, ‘Pɑ̈dhu kömi wøn!’ Kɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ bɑ ótøng köbbi kinni, ‘Rïgu wøn piny!’" 
Luke23:31 Mɑ́ keløg ɑ́ gïn ni men ɑ göggi yɑdh e mɑr, ógögg-ɑ ngø keny-ɑ ówøwe?”" 
Luke23:32 Ádɑ tyëngorøg ɑ́ryew mɑ ɑ́køøl wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl kyeel ki Yëso, ge kïdh-ɑ be nɑ̈gø." 
Luke23:33 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen keny-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Tɑngdɑr, ɑgur Yëso wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, kɑ tyëngorøg møgɑni gur wɑ̈thi yenh ɑrïw thyew, ɑ́kyel ying-ɑ wïj kyëëj Yëso, o men-ɑ kyeelø ying-ɑ wïj cɑɑme." 
Luke23:34 Kɑ Yëso okööbø kinni, “Wïyø, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki gen, mɑ́ gïn-ɑ gwøg yi gen kwïj yi gen.” Kɑ ógudhe pɑ̈ngi yi ɑlɑthkerr ge ceg kɑ lengø ki wél." 
Luke23:35 Ji ɑ́cungi ge onëënø ge lɑ̈wi, e Yëso ogɑggø yi jøg-ɑ jɑgg kinni, “Ji møøgø ɑ́yiele. Wiy yiele ree keløg e bɑ Mesiy men-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk.”" 
Luke23:36 Ágɑggi yi ɑlɑthkerr thyew, ge ɑ́kedhi yï Yëso kɑ gø thödhi gen ki møgi oløg me wɑj." 
Luke23:37 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Keløg yï bɑ Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud, yiel rií!”" 
Luke23:38 Ádɑ gwedd kì wïj yɑnh-ɑ ɑ́gurii møg-ɑ ógwedø kinni, “Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud èn.”" 
Luke23:39 Kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyëngorøg kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, ócɑ̈gø yɑnyyi Yëso kinni, “Yï pɑth ki Mesiy? Yiel rií kɑ wø yieel!”" 
Luke23:40 De ɑ́kyëddi yi jɑlorøg men-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Yï pɑ böggi ki Jwøk! Yï bɑ ɑcɑy ki cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑyii." 
Luke23:41 Wɑ ɑ́cɑy kɑ dyër; wɑ cɑ̈y-ɑ per gïn-ɑ ɑ́rënyi yi wɑ. De jɑɑl, bong gïjø me rɑj mɑ ɑ́gwøge.”" 
Luke23:42 Akööbe kinni, “Yëso, pɑr yɑn keny-ɑ óbëën yïn ɑ́ Rɑ̈dh.”" 
Luke23:43 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kidyër kinni, yï óying butɑ tïn kì yij Pɑrdös.”" 
Luke23:44 Keny-ɑ ɑ́gud cɑ̈ng ki löj, kɑ piny bëne ogöögø ki muudhø, kɑ gït-ɑ sɑɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g kì böörø piny looj." 
Luke23:45 Mɑ́ cɑ̈ng cɑre ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny. Kɑ ógønh-ɑ bɑ gëng kì yij Kengø ópyëdø kì dïdyëre kɑ ree pɑ̈nge ɑ́ ɑ́ryew. 
Luke23:46 Aryeer Yëso ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Wïyø, wëyɑ cïbɑ’ cingí.” Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki kwøbi møgɑni, ɑthøwe." 
Luke23:47 Dhɑbïdh dej keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb, ɑlenhe Jwøk kinni, “Jɑɑl, bëëdø ɑ́ ngɑntir kidyër.”" 
Luke23:48 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge ócungø kì kenyɑni ge onëënø, kɑ ɑ́lidh gen gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb, ɑdøøg gen kɑɑl ge tïngg-ɑ cinggi gen, pëthi gen orɑ̈mø." 
Luke23:49 De møg-ɑ bɑ wɑddi Yëso geki mɑ̈dhhe kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ ɑ́lug bɑnge ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Gɑlelì, ɑ́cungi ge lɑ̈wi, ge onëënø." 
Luke23:50 Ádɑ jɑl me døøj me mïdhi kwøbbi Jwøk, o bɑ jɑgø kì buri Yeud me cwøl ɑ́ Yosep." 
Luke23:51 De gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi Yëso yi jɑggi Yeud ɑ́bëëd gï nuti yïëëy en. Bɑ jɑl Arimɑthiyɑ̀, o ɑ́bëëd e nenn-ɑ bëëni Pödhi Jwøk." 
Luke23:52 Yosep ɑ́kedhi yï Pilɑtø be kwɑjji dëël Yëso. 
Luke23:53 Kɑ Yëso kɑ̈ɑ̈le piny kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, ɑbɑɑne gøn yij ógødh, kɑ gø kïdhe yij rörø men-ɑ ótwegø kì ri kït. Rörɑni nuti pɑ̈nyø kïdhø ki dhɑnhø." 
Luke23:54 Cyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng gwøg ɑ́bïj, o cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ ri buddi cɑ̈ng." 
Luke23:55 Tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ ɑ́bï ki Yëso kì Gɑlelì, ɑ́kedhi bɑng Yosep, ɑlidh gen keny-ɑ ɑ́cïb dëël Yëso yi Yosep." 
Luke23:56 Codhe, ɑkedhi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn be yɑb ki mɑ̈ɑ̈th møg-ɑ yømi gen med. Kɑ ge oywömø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii kì yethi Cigg." 
Luke24:1 Kì mwøl ceth kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl kì yij osboo, ɑ ɑ́møøl tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn kun-ɑ di rörø, ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ mɑ̈th-ɑ yømi gen med møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen." 
Luke24:2 Kɑ kït yood gen e óngyeel wɑ̈ye kì dhø rörø," 
Luke24:3 de keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi gen yiny-ɑ ød, dëël Wë Yëso ɑ́cög gø nuti yood gen." 
Luke24:4 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd wɑ̈thi gen cungø yi møgɑni, kɑ jøg ɑ́ryew mø ógudhi gen rɑ̈nggø ceg-ɑ ì nywil, kɑ ge ócungø kì buti gen." 
Luke24:5 Abwøg tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ki mendwøng, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny. Aköbbi gen yi jøgɑni ryeet kinni, “Wude ɑ yɑb wun ngɑn nëënø kì kelli tyëngthøø?" 
Luke24:6 Tøøk kì keny; ɑ́dhwödh. Pɑru møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbe wun keny-ɑ ɑ́yinge Gɑlelì," 
Luke24:7 kinni, ‘Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ócïb cinggi tyëngorøg, kɑ gø gur gen wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, o ódhwödh kì yij thøø kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Yëso pɑr yi tyëngɑni. 
Luke24:9 Akedh gen kɑ tyëngwöödø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel köbbi yi gen, geki jøbɑng Yëso møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Luke24:10 Bɑ Meerì Mɑgdɑliyɑ̀, kí Anɑ̀, kí Meerì meyi Yɑgob, kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møøgø, ɑ ɑ́köbbi tyëngwöödø ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb bënn." 
Luke24:11 De kwøbbi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn nuti yïëëy gen, mɑ́ gï lïngi yi gen e nɑ pyed yøw." 
Luke24:12 De Pïtør ɑ́dhwödh kɑ reng-ɑ kun-ɑ di rörø. Amëdde yije, kɑ lidh-ɑ ógønh-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yije óbɑɑn Yëso. Adøøg Pïtør pɑc e ngɑ̈ngø, gø kwïje mɑ løge ngø ɑ cwöbø." 
Luke24:13 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth, ɑ́dɑ jøbɑng Yëso ɑ́ryew mɑ ɑ́kedhi pɑc me cwøl ɑ́ Emɑos, kɑɑm pɑnɑni geki Yerusɑlem bɑ kïlomïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel." 
Luke24:14 Ge ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ge okööbø kì ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb bënn. 
Luke24:15 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi gen ge opëmø, kɑ Yëso obëënø, kɑ ócɑ̈gø’ cyɑ̈dhø ki gen," 
Luke24:16 de gø nuti ngij gen. 
Luke24:17 Codhe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Á gïg ɑ ri gen kööb yi wun, wu ócyɑ̈dhø?” Kɑ jøgɑni ryeet ócungø, ge nënni pëthi gen rijjø." 
Luke24:18 Alöggi jɑl-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Kelyöbɑ̀ kinni, “Bene yïn wëël-ɑ döngø kì Yerusɑlem e nuti lïngø ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́cer cwöbø?”" 
Luke24:19 Apyëëj gen yi Yëso kinni, “Á gïg mɑ ngø?” Akööb gen kinni, “Wø kømm-ɑ Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth. Ábëëd ɑ́ jɑltöng mɑ ɑ́göög ki gïgdøngø mø gïïr kì bøli Jwøk, kí bøli teedø." 
Luke24:20 Jɑggi pödhi wøn geki jɑggi ókwër, gen ɑ ɑ́muujii kinni cɑy ki thøø, kɑ gø gur gen wïj yɑdh ɑrïw." 
Luke24:21 De wø ɑ́gɑ̈nn-ɑ kinni bɑ en ɑ di yiel Isrɑil. Pɑth ki codhi gen thyew, ɑ́göög ɑnɑn ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g kër-ɑ ɑ́cwöb gïgɑni." 
Luke24:22 Átïni wɑ̈thi wøn ɑ́cuung yi kwøbbi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møøgø kì kelli wøn. Ge ɑ́møøl rörø ɑ́cøøn kì mwøl," 
Luke24:23 de dële nuti yodø yi gen kì kenyɑni. Adwöög gen kɑ wø köbbi gen ce dɑ wëywödd ɑ́ryew mø liidh gen, kɑ ge okööbø i Yëso onëënø!" 
Luke24:24 Kwï jø wøn ɑ́kedhi rörø thyew. Kɑ gø yod gen ceth ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, de Yëso nuti liidh gen.”" 
Luke24:25 Codhe, ɑköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Wu bɑ dhëgg! O wu dhɑ̈li yïëyi kwøbbi jøtöng bënn." 
Luke24:26 Ge ɑ́kööb kinni i Mesiy órɑngi yi gïgɑni bënn, o kedhe yij dhwɑ̈nge cyee.”" 
Luke24:27 Codhe, kɑ ócɑ̈gø kì ri Mosɑ̀ gïti kɑ ɑ́tyëge jøtöng bënn, e nyudh-ɑ gen ki gïg-ɑ ógwedø kì ree kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø." 
Luke24:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen buti Emɑos, kɑ Yëso ókedhø e dhɑ̈y ce ceg-ɑ pöödhø." 
Luke24:29 Amɑ̈ɑ̈nii yi gen, ge okööbø kinni, “Buddí kì buti wøn keny, mɑ́ wøw ɑ́yuudh, piny køm-ɑ gwøg ki wɑ̈r.” Codhe, ɑtönge pɑc be buddø." 
Luke24:30 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pëggi gen be cɑm, ɑkɑ̈bbe ki ópun, kɑ Jwøk pwøje, ɑpøde gøn kɑ gø mëgge gïn." 
Luke24:31 Kɑ Yëso ngij yi gen kì bøli kenyɑni ceth. De Yëso ɑ́wɑ̈dhi lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø yøw keny-ɑ ɑ́ngij ge gøn. 
Luke24:32 Kɑ ri gen köbbi gen kinni, “Ce ying-ɑ en ɑ bëëde e nɑ mɑc ɑ lyel kì pëthee ɑ́tïni kì kö yöö keny-ɑ ɑ́kööb Yëso, e nyudh-ɑ wɑ møg-ɑ ógwedø kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø.”" 
Luke24:33 Codhe, kɑ jøgɑni ryeet, dhwödh-ɑ mɑl kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ Yerusɑlem. Ayuud gen tyëngwöödø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel geki kwï jøbɑng Yëso kunɑni, ge obëëdø kì kej ɑ́kyel." 
Luke24:34 Gï ɑ́yuud gen ge okööbø kinni, “Wë ɑ́dhwödh kidyër kì yij thøø! Ácwöb kì bøli Sɑymøn.”" 
Luke24:35 Codhe, kɑ jøgɑni ryeet olwöbø ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì kö yöö, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́ngij gen Yëso keny-ɑ ɑ́pøde ópun." 
Luke24:36 E jøgɑni nudd ge wɑj-ɑ møgɑni ceth, kɑ Yëso kiree ócungø kì dïdyëri gen, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Wu óbëëdø ki mër.”" 
Luke24:37 Kɑ ge obwøgø ki mendwøng, ge orumø ce ge liidh-ɑ tïbi ngɑnthøø." 
Luke24:38 De ge ɑ́köbbi yi Yëso kinni, “Wude ɑ böggi wun? Ede yethi wun ɑ pyëër gen?" 
Luke24:39 Lidhu tyellɑ geki cinggɑ. Bɑ yɑn kiriɑ! Nywɑlu yɑn kɑ yɑ lidh wun, mɑ́ tïbi dhɑnhø bong dël kì ree, ni kɑ̀ nëën wun, riɑ dɑ dël.”" 
Luke24:40 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki kwøbi møgɑni, ɑnyudhe gïn cingge geki tyelle." 
Luke24:41 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nuti yïëëy gen yi kɑ̀ med pëthi gen, ɑkööb Yëso kinni, “Dɑ gïncɑm kì yï wun?”" 
Luke24:42 Athödhi ge gøn ki budi rëjø men-ɑ óthɑlø. 
Luke24:43 Kɑ rënyɑni kwɑny yi Yëso, ɑcɑme gøn e onennø yi gen." 
Luke24:44 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Bene gïn-ɑ ɑ́wɑngi yi yɑn, kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd yɑ obëëdø kì kelli wun kinni, gïg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Mosɑ̀, kí wɑ̈jji jøtöng, kí Wɑ̈nyi Wör, bɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi ceth kinni o ge pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen.”" 
Luke24:45 Codhe, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen yieb yi Yëso, o ge cuggi gen ki yodi møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø." 
Luke24:46 Gï ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Bɑ ɑgwed kinni, Mesiy órɑngi kɑ odhwödhø kì yij thøø kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng." 
Luke24:47 Kí kinni jurrì bënn ócïj ki nyinge, kipe kinni o minni gen kí bëëdi gen wil yi gen, o lɑ́ɑ̀w ódwöög piny kipe orøøg gen, gwøngɑni cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ Yerusɑlem." 
Luke24:48 Wun ɑ óköbbi ji kwøbbɑni. 
Luke24:49 Wu óörɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïyɑ kinni gø ómëgge wun, de bëëd wun kì Yerusɑlem gïti keny-ɑ óbëën tegø menɑni kömi wun, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl.”" 
Luke24:50 Kɑ Yëso jøbɑnge peeje wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ buti Betɑnì, kɑ cingge tïnge, kɑ kwëng kønye kömi gïn." 
Luke24:51 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd e kwëng-ɑ gen, kɑ ókedhø kì buti gen, e kedh-ɑ mɑl." 
Luke24:52 Amɑɑl Yëso yi gen, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ Yerusɑlem pëthi gen omedø." 
Luke24:53 Kɑ ge nyii rïïjø kì Kengø, ge lejj-ɑ Jwøk." 
John1:1 Kì ri cɑ̈gø cøn, Lögø ɑ́bëëd e nud, o Lögø ɑ́ying-ɑ yï Jwøk, o Lögø ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ Jwøk." 
John1:2 Lögø ɑ́ying-ɑ yï Jwøk kì ri cɑ̈gø cøn. 
John1:3 Jɑmmì bënn ɑ́gwøg-ɑ ri Lögø, bong gïjø ɑ́kyel kì ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j me nuti gwøgø kì ree." 
John1:4 Lögø ɑ ree ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi nënnì, o nënnɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ cɑr kipe dhɑnhø bëne." 
John1:5 Cɑrɑni ceg-ɑ meny kì yij muudhø, de nuti pɑ̈nyø nɑ̈gø yi muudhø." 
John1:6 Jwøk, jɑlwööne ɑ́öre, jɑlɑni cwøl ɑ́ Jøn." 
John1:7 Jɑlɑni ɑ́bï-ɑ be köbbi ji kwøbbi cɑrɑni, o ji yïëy gen bënn." 
John1:8 En kiree nuti bëëdø ɑ́ cɑr, ɑ́bï-ɑ be thyeri kwøbbi cɑr." 
John1:9 Cɑrɑni, bene cɑr-ɑ dyër, eni cɑr-ɑ bï kömi piny, kɑ dhɑnhø bëne menye." 
John1:10 Lögø ɑ́ying-ɑ kömi piny, de nuti ngijø yi kömi piny, ngö ɑ́ en ɑ ree ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j piny bëne." 
John1:11 Ábï-ɑ pödhe, de ɑ́bɑny yi jie." 
John1:12 De tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwɑnyii, ɑ bɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëyii, gï ɑ́thödhe ki dyër me göög gen ki nyigi Jwøk." 
John1:13 Tyëngɑni nuti nywølø kɑ yuu-ɑ nyi nywøøl ji yi wëëg geki mëëg, Jwøk kiree ɑ ɑ́ceg bëëdø ɑ́ wïyi gen." 
John1:14 Lögø ree ɑ́løge dhɑnhø, kɑ obëëdø kì kellee, e pɑ̈ngø yi dhwɑ̈ng geki dyër. Mɑ̈re ɑ́lidh yi wøn, eni mɑ̈ɑ̈r wɑ̈d Wïy, ɑ bɑ wɑ̈dkyel." 
John1:15 Pere ɑ́kwøb yi Jøn, kɑ óryeerø kinni, “Bene ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kømmɑ èn, keny-ɑ ɑ́kööbɑ kinni, ‘Óbï-ɑ bɑngɑ, de pëddi döng kibølɑ, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd e nud, yɑ nuti nywølø.’ ”" 
John1:16 Wɑ ɑ́thödhe kì ri dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ pɑ̈ng kì yïe, kɑ wɑ nyi cige thödhø." 
John1:17 Cigg ɑ́muuj ɑ ri Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøk, de dhwɑ̈ng geki dyër ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri Yëso Mesiy." 
John1:18 Bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi Jwøk ki lidhø, de Wɑ̈d Jwøk, ɑ bɑ wɑ̈dkyel, ɑ ying buti Jwøk, bɑ en ɑ ɑ́nyodh Jwøk." 
John1:19 Kɑ jɑggi Yeud kì Yerusɑlem öd-ɑ yï Jøn ki ókwër kí Kwɑrri Leebì møg pyëjii kinni, “Yï bɑ men?”" 
John1:20 Jøn nuti bɑ̈nyø ki löggø, de ɑ́kyëëd kinni, “Yɑ pɑth ki Mesiy.”" 
John1:21 Kɑ gø pyëj gen kinni, “De yï ceg bëëdø yïn ɑ́ men? Yï bɑ Eliyɑ̀?” Kɑ okyëdø kinni, “Yɑ pɑth ki en.” Apëjji gen kinni, “Yï bɑ Jɑltöng?” Kɑ ólöggø kinni, “Yɑ pɑth.”" 
John1:22 Akööb gen kinni, “Adɑ́ köbbí wøn, yï bɑ men? Köbbí wøn, o møgɑni döggi wøn tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ör wøn. Á ngø ɑ kwøb yi yïn kì rií?”" 
John1:23 Jøn ɑ́löggi e kwøb-ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́töng yi Icɑyɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑ bɑ cwɑggi ngɑn cwöddi kì pɑ̈l kinni, Gwøgu yuu-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi yi Wë ɑ́ óbödh.’ ”" 
John1:24 Apyëjii yi gen kinni, “De yïde ɑ jwɑ̈ɑ̈g ji, keløg yï pɑth ki Mesiy, wɑlɑ̀ Eliyɑ̀ wɑlɑ̀ jɑltöng?”" 
John1:25  
John1:26 Alöggi Jøn kinni, “Ji jwɑ̈ɑ̈g yi yɑn kɑ pï, de dɑ dhɑnhø me cungi kì kelli wun, me ree kwïj yi wun." 
John1:27 En ɑ óbï kì bɑngɑ, o yɑ pɑ døøj ki pɑ̈di wɑrre kì tyelle.”" 
John1:28 Møgɑni bënn ɑ́cwöb-ɑ Betɑnì, kì kömi Nɑm Urdun, kì tung-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Jøn e jwɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ ji." 
John1:29 Kɑ Yëso lidh yi Jøn dhuki, e bï-ɑ yïe. Kɑ Jøn okööbø kinni, “Bene Órömi Jwøk èn, en ɑ ókɑ̈l orøøg piny bëne!" 
John1:30 Men bene ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi yɑn, keny-ɑ ɑ́kööbɑ kinni, ‘Jɑl-ɑ óbï kì bɑngɑ, pëddi döng kibølɑ, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd e nud, yɑ nuti nywølø.’" 
John1:31 Ábëëd e kwïj yi yɑn mɑ løge’ men, de yɑ ɑ́bï yɑ jwɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ ji ki pï, kipe kinni, o ngɑnɑni yod yi tyëng Isrɑil.”" 
John1:32 Kɑ Jøn møg-ɑ kømme tönge kinni, “Wëy ɑ́lidhɑ, e bï-ɑ piny ni ɑkur, kɑ pëgg-ɑ köme." 
John1:33 Ábëëd e kwïj yi yɑn, de ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn be jwɑ̈ɑ̈gi ji ki pï, bɑ en ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn kinni, ‘Jɑl-ɑ ólidh yi yïn, e Wëy bï-ɑ köme, bene jɑlɑni. Bene en ɑ ójwɑ̈ɑ̈g ji ki Wëykwërø.’" 
John1:34 Møgɑni ɑ́rum ki lidhø yi yɑn, o yɑ ceg-ɑ wun ki köbbø cyee kinni, en ɑ bɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk.”" 
John1:35 Kì bɑng dhuki e Jøn ócungø geki ɑ́ryew kì kelli jøbɑnge," 
John1:36 kɑ Yëso lidhe, e kɑ̈l-ɑ buti gen, ɑkööbe kinni, “Órömi Jwøk ɑnɑn!”" 
John1:37 Kɑ møgɑni lïngi yi jøgɑni ryeet, ɑløg gen bɑng Yëso." 
John1:38 Kɑ Yëso ree luge, kɑ gï lidhe, ge lug-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑnge, ɑpyëje gïn kinni, “Wu yɑb-ɑ ngø?” Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Rɑbì, yï bëëd ɑ keny?” (Rɑbì wɑng-ɑ “Jɑlpwönyø.”)" 
John1:39 Kɑ ólöggø kinni, “Bïu, kɑ wu lïdhi wun.” (Piny ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ sɑɑ̀ ɑ́ngwen kì böörø.) Codhe ɑkedh gen, kɑ keny-ɑ bëëd yi en lidh yi gen. Kɑ wøw óyuudhø ge nudd ge ying-ɑ keny-ɑ bëëde." 
John1:40 Dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli ji ɑ́ryew-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbi Jøn, kɑ løg-ɑ bɑng Yëso, bɑ Andrø ómï Sɑymøn Pïtør." 
John1:41 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yode Sɑymøn ómen, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Mesiy ɑ́yod yi wøn.”" 
John1:42 Akɑ̈ɑ̈le gøn yï Yëso. Kɑ Yëso nenn-ɑ yïe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Nyingí bɑ Sɑymøn wɑ̈d Jøn, de yï ócwøl yi yɑn yïn ɑ́ Sɑpɑ̀.” (Sɑpɑ̀ wɑng-ɑ Kït)" 
John1:43 Dhuki e Yëso køm-ɑ kedhi Gɑlelì, ɑyode Pïlïp, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Bïí bɑngɑ.”" 
John1:44 Pïlïp ɑ́bëëd ɑ Betsɑidɑ̀, kɑɑl-ɑ́ yije ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Andrø geki Pïtør." 
John1:45 Ayood Nɑthɑnɑil yi Pïlïp, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́gwed yi Mosɑ̀ kì yethi Cigg, kɑ pere gwed yi jøtöng kì yethi wɑ̈jji gen, ɑ́yod yi wøn. Bɑ Yëso wɑ̈d Yosep kì Nɑdhɑreth.”" 
John1:46 Akööb Nɑthɑnɑil kinni, “Dɑ gïndøj me cuggi kɑ̈ɑ̈l Nɑdhɑreth?” Aköbbii yi Pïlïp kinni, “Bïí, o yï lïdhí.”" 
John1:47 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Nɑthɑnɑil yi Yëso, e bï-ɑ yïe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Lidhu jɑɑl, bɑ wɑ̈d dyëël Isrɑil kidyër, bong gïn gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ree.”" 
John1:48 Apyëjii yi Nɑthɑnɑil kinni, “Yɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn ɑ kun?” Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Yï ɑ́lidh yi yɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì thɑ ólɑm, yï nuti cwølø yi Pïlïp.”" 
John1:49 Aköbbii yi Nɑthɑnɑil kinni, “Rɑbì, yï bɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk, o yï bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil!”" 
John1:50 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Yï yïëy kɑ per kɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn kinni, ‘Yï ɑ́lidh yi yɑn yï obëëdø kì thɑ ólɑm?’ Yï ólïdhi ki gïg mø døngø kibøli møgɑni,”" 
John1:51 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, mɑl ólidh yi wun ɑ́ ɑyieb, kɑ wëywöddi Jwøk lidh yi wun, ge nyi kedh-ɑ mɑl kɑ ge nyi dwöög-ɑ piny kömi Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø.”" 
John2:1 Kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, ɑ́dɑ nywöm kì kɑɑl Gɑnɑ̀ kì myërri Gɑlelì, o meyi Yëso ɑ́bëëd e nud kì kenyɑni." 
John2:2 Kɑ Yëso geki jøbɑnge cwøøl kej nywöm thyew. 
John2:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi møgi oløg, ɑköbbi Yëso yi meye kinni, “Tyëngɑni ɑ́jɑ̈ddi ki møgø.”" 
John2:4 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Dhɑnh, yïde ki yɑn, bøli kejɑ nuti bëënø.”" 
John2:5 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ göögø köbbi yi meyi Yëso kinni, “Gwøgu gïn-ɑ óköbbe wun.”" 
John2:6 Kenyɑni ɑ́dɑ puggì ɑ́bïkyel mø bɑ kïttì, ɑ́kyel yije nyi røm-ɑ yi gïn ni lïtïr miyø. Yethi gen nyi kïdh-ɑ pïg-ɑ nyi löög kì yij kwööng Yeud." 
John2:7 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Pɑ̈ngu puggì ki pï.” Apɑ̈ng ge gïn ki pï." 
John2:8 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Tömi wun, kɑ muuj wun jɑldwøøng jønywöm.” Kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi gen." 
John2:9 Abel pïg-ɑ ɑ́løg ri gen møgi oløg yi jɑlɑni, de kun-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi møngɑni kwïj yi en, dɑ́ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́tøm pïgɑni ɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw. Acwøle jɑlnywöm," 
John2:10 kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Ji nyi muuj-ɑ møng-ɑ døj kì tyeli mɑl, o keny-ɑ órum ji ki nɑ̈gø yi møgø, o møng-ɑ rɑɑj kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì cyɑ̈n. De yï yöd yï mïdh-ɑ møng-ɑ døj, o kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑnɑn kì cyɑ̈n!”" 
John2:11 Bene ngïji men-ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki gwøgø yi Yëso, gø ɑ́gwøg yi en ɑ Gɑnɑ̀, kì myërri Gɑlelì. Kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́nyodhe mɑ̈re, kɑ yïëy yi jøbɑnge." 
John2:12 Codhe, ɑkedh gen bënn, ge kedh-ɑ Kɑpernɑum; en kí meye kí nyiimen geki jøbɑnge, kɑ obëëdø kì kunɑni ki cyɑ̈ng me nøg." 
John2:13 Kɑ Yëso kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Kwëër Ákɑɑdh. 
John2:14 Kɑ jøngyëwø ki dhög kí dyëg kí ɑkùr yuude ódɑ̈ri Kengø. Kɑ jøwïïdø ki ngyëny yuude ge obëëdø kì buti tɑrɑbedhhi gen. 
John2:15 Kɑ oyëdø ki ócøl, kɑ jiɑni cyeede wɑ̈g bënn kì ódɑ̈ri Kengø, kyeel kí dyëg, kí dhög. Kɑ ngyënyyi jøwïïdø kedhhe, kɑ tɑrɑbedhhi gen tɑrre kì piny." 
John2:16 Kɑ jøngyëwø ki ɑkùr köbbe kinni, “Yëëg wun jɑmmi wun wɑ̈g, ød Wïyɑ ko løgu kej ngyew!”" 
John2:17 Apɑɑr møg-ɑ yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø yi jøbɑnge kinni, “Mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑrɑ Kengí yïn ɑ Jwøk, lyel nɑ mɑc kì pyëwɑ.”" 
John2:18 Codhe, ɑköbbi Yëso yi Yeud kinni, “Á ngïji mɑ ngø ɑ ónyudhí wøn, kipe møg-ɑ gwøg yi yïn ek?”" 
John2:19 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Nyɑɑg wun Kengɑni piny, o ódøøgɑ ki gerø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g.”" 
John2:20 Akööb Yeud kinni, “Kengɑni ɑ́tyëg-ɑ runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́bïkyel e ogerø, ócuggi gerø yi yïn ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g?”" 
John2:21 De Keng-ɑ kømme bɑ dële kiree. 
John2:22 Kɑ kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́dwööge wɑ̈g kì yij thøø, ɑpɑɑr møg-ɑ ɑ́kømme yi jøbɑnge, kɑ møg-ɑ yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø yïëy yi gen geki møg-ɑ kømmi yi Yëso." 
John2:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ying Yëso Yerusɑlem kì cyɑ̈nggi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, ɑ́yïëy yi ji mø ngenyø, kɑ ɑ́lïdhi gen ki ngïjjì møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en." 
John2:24 De Yëso ree nuti nyudh en tyëngɑni, mɑ́ dhɑnhø bëne ngɑ̈nyi yi en," 
John2:25 o bong ngɑn dwɑdde me di köbbii møg-ɑ ying pëthi ji, mɑ́ en kiree, gïn-ɑ pyëw dhɑnhø bëne ngɑ̈nyi yi en." 
John3:1 Ádɑ Jɑlpɑresì me cwøl ɑ́ Nikødemøs, o ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi sinɑgøg." 
John3:2 Jɑlɑni ɑ́bï yï Yëso kì wɑ̈r, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni, yï ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, mɑ́ e bong ngɑn me cuggi gwøg ki ngïjj-ɑ gøggi yi yïn, keløg e pɑ cyɑ̈dhi kɑ Jwøk.”" 
John3:3 Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kidyër kinni, keløg dhɑnhø pɑ cigi nywølø, Pödhi Jwøk pɑ cuggi lidhø yi en.”" 
John3:4 Apyëjii yï Nikødemøs kinni, “Dhɑnhø ócigi nywølø e bɑ jɑldwøng? Ócuggi døøg yij meye kɑ cigi nywølø?”" 
John3:5 Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kidyër kinni, keløg dhɑnhø pɑ cigi nywølø ki pï geki Wëy, pɑ wöl kedhi yij Pödhi Jwøk." 
John3:6 Ngɑn-ɑ nywøl yi dhɑnhø bɑ dhɑnhø, o ngɑn nywøl yi Wëy bɑ wëy." 
John3:7 Yï ko ngɑ̈ng kɑ̀ köbbɑ yïn kinni, ‘Di dwɑddø kinni cigi wun nywølø.’" 
John3:8 Yømø nyi ködd-ɑ kun-ɑ dwɑdde, kɑ cwɑgge nyi lïngi yi yïn, de kun-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈le kí kun-ɑ kedhe kwïj yi yïn. Ngɑn-ɑ ónywølø kì ri Wëy bëëd ɑ nøw.”" 
John3:9 Akööb Nikødemøs kinni, “Møgɑni óbëëd ɑ dï?”" 
John3:10 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Yï bɑ jɑlpwönyi kwɑrri Isrɑil, de yï dhɑɑl yïn yi møg kidï?" 
John3:11 Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kidyër kinni, wø nyi kømm-ɑ gïn ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn, o wø nyi töng-ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wøn, de mø wøn pɑ yïëy yi wun." 
John3:12 Keløg wu pɑ yïëy kɑ̀ köbbɑ wun ki jɑmmi piny, wu óyïëy kidï, keløg wu köbbɑ’ jɑmmi mɑl?" 
John3:13 Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́kedhi mɑl, den-ɑ́ Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́bï piny e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl.”" 
John3:14 Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ceg kɑ tïng mɑl ceth, ni kɑ ɑ́tïng thwööl dilɑl mɑl yi Mosɑ̀ kì yij pɑ̈l," 
John3:15 o ngɑn-ɑ óyïëyii yïdde ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer. 
John3:16 Mɑ́ jii kömi piny men ɑ́mɑɑr yi Jwøk ki mendwøng, ɑ bɑnge ɑ́muuje wɑ̈de, wɑ̈dkyel; kipe kinni o ngɑn-ɑ óyïëyii ócöge e pɑ thøw, de óyod-ɑ nënn-ɑ ɑtheer." 
John3:17 Mɑ́ Jwøk kɑ ɑ́öre Wɑ̈de piny, nuti öre’ be cɑyi piny, de gø ɑ́öre ɑ́ ngɑn yiel piny." 
John3:18 Ngɑn yïëyii pɑ cɑy, de ngɑn pɑ yïëyii ɑ́rum ki cɑyø, mɑ́ Wɑ̈d Jwøk nuti yïëëy en, Wɑ̈n-ɑ bɑ ɑ́kyel." 
John3:19 Cɑ́yɑni bɑ kinni; cɑr ɑ́bï piny de ji ɑ́yöd ge mɑɑr-ɑ muudhø, kɑ cɑr bɑny yi gen, mɑ́ ge gøgg-ɑ rɑj." 
John3:20 Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ gøggi rɑj mɑɑn-ɑ cɑr, kɑ nyii cögø e pɑ bï yij cɑr, kipe gwøge ócɑy." 
John3:21 De ngɑn-ɑ gøggi dyër nyi bï-ɑ yij cɑr o nyodh kinni, nyi gwøg-ɑ gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk." 
John3:22 Codhe, ɑkedhi Yëso myërri Yeudiyɑ̀ geki jøbɑnge, kɑ ge obëëdø kì kunɑni, kɑ ócɑ̈gø jwɑ̈ɑ̈gi ji." 
John3:23 O Jøn ɑ́bëëd e jwɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ ji thyew kì Ein Nun, kì buti Sɑlïm, mɑ́ pï gïïr kì kunɑni. Kɑ ji nyii bëënø, kɑ ge nyi jwɑ̈ɑ̈g." 
John3:24 (Jøn ɑ́bëëd e nuti kïdhi ød mɑg, keny-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg møgɑni.)" 
John3:25 Kɑ kwï jøbɑng Jøn opëmø ki Yeudì ɑ́kyel, kì ri guöög dhïwø." 
John3:26 Codhe ɑkedhi gen yï Jøn, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ying butí kì løøg Nɑm Urdun, kɑ lejji yi yïn, ji jwɑ̈ɑ̈ge’ jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø kì keny ɑnɑn, o teedø bëne ceg-ɑ kedhi yïe.”" 
John3:27 Aköbbi gen yi Jøn kinni, “Bong gïn yod yi dhɑnhø keløg e nuti mëggii kì mɑl." 
John3:28 Wun ki ri wun, wu ɑ́lïng keny-ɑ ɑ́kööbɑ kinni, ‘Yɑ pɑth ki Mesiy, de yɑ ɑ́ceg kɑ ör bøle.’" 
John3:29 Nyɑn-ɑ nywøm bɑ mi jɑlnywöm; de mɑ̈ɑ̈dh jɑlnywöm nyi cungi kì buti jɑlnywömɑni pyëwe omedø yi mwöjji jɑlnywöm. O pyëwɑ med nɑ menɑni ɑnɑn. 
John3:30 Di dwɑddø kinni o kedhe e ódøngø, o yɑ kedhɑ yɑ ónungø.”" 
John3:31 Ngɑn-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl bɑ en ɑ dwøng kibøli ji bënn. Ngɑn-ɑ bɑ ngeti piny, bɑ mi piny, o nyi kømm-ɑ mø piny; de ngɑn-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl bɑ en ɑ dwøng kibøli ji bënn." 
John3:32 Nyi kømm-ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́lidhe kí møg-ɑ ɑ́lïnge, de bong ngɑn yïëy kwøbbe." 
John3:33 Ngɑn yïëy møge nyi nyodh-ɑ kinni Jwøk nyi kømm-ɑ dyër ceth. 
John3:34 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Jwøk kɑ̈ll-ɑ kwøbbi Jwøk, mɑ́ Wëy nyi muuj yi Jwøk e bong cöge." 
John3:35 Wɑ̈d mɑɑr yi Wïye, o jɑmmì bënn ɑ́cïbe cinge." 
John3:36 Ngɑn yïëy Wɑ̈nɑni yïe dɑ nënn-ɑ ɑtheer. De ngɑn pɑ yïëy møge pɑ yïddi ki nënnì, o ócög köme dɑ cɑ́yi Jwøk." 
John4:1 Kɑ Jøpɑresì olïngø kinni i ji mø gïïr løg bɑng Yëso, kɑ gï nyi jwɑ̈ɑ̈ge, o jie ɑ́ngënyi kibøli jii Jøn." 
John4:2 (Pɑth ki Yëso kiree ɑ nyi jwɑ̈ɑ̈g ji, dɑ́ jøbɑnge.)" 
John4:3 Kɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Wë, ɑdhwödhe kì myërri Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ døøg-ɑ Gɑlelì." 
John4:4 Yuu-ɑ ɑ́kedhe kɑ̈ll-ɑ yethi myërri Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. 
John4:5 Atönge kɑɑl megø kì kelli kɑ̈ddi Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́tönge cwøl ɑ́ Sukɑr, kì buti piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Yosep yi wïye Yɑgob." 
John4:6 Kenyɑni ɑ́dɑ yith, o kɑ ɑ́pïd Yëso yi wɑ̈dh ɑpëgge buti yiinhɑni. Piny ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ dicɑ̈ng." 
John4:7 Kɑ ngɑndhɑjø obëënø e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, e bï-ɑ be tömø ki pï. Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Nëngí yɑn ki pïg mɑdhɑ.”" 
John4:8 Mɑ́ jøbɑnge ɑ́kedhi pɑc be ngyew ki gïncɑm. 
John4:9 Aköbbii yi ngeti Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ kinni, “Yïde ɑ kwɑ̈jjí ki pï kì yïɑ, yï bɑ Yeudì, o yɑ bɑ ngeti Sɑmɑriyɑ̀?” (Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ pɑ nyi nywɑ̈gø ki tyëng Sɑmɑriyɑ̀.)" 
John4:10 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Keløg gïn-ɑ nyi muuj yi Jwøk geki ngɑn-ɑ kwɑ̈jji kinni, ‘Nëngí yɑn ki pïg mɑdhɑ,’ di bëëd e ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, ti yï di kwɑ̈jji kì yïe, kɑ yï di nënge ki pïi nënnì.”" 
John4:11 Aköbbii yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Yïí bong ɑtög, o yith ludhø, de yï kɑ̈n-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny ki pïi nënnì Jɑldwøng?" 
John4:12 Kweyi wøn Yɑgob ɑ ɑ́mëggi yiinhɑni wøn, o ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈dh kì yije; en kí wɑ̈dde, kí dhöge, de yï lod-ɑ Yɑgob ki döng?”" 
John4:13 Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Ngɑn mɑ̈ɑ̈dhø ki pïgɑni nyi cig-ɑ mɑgø yi röödhø." 
John4:14 De ngɑn mɑdh pïg-ɑ ómëggɑ en, pɑ mɑg yi röödhø kinni tek. Pïg-ɑ ómëggɑ en ceg-ɑ gwøg kì ree ki wɑɑng pï me nëngii ki pïi nënnì, kɑ nëngi yi pïgɑni ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer.”" 
John4:15 Kɑ köbbi yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Jɑldwøng, nëngí yɑn ki pïgɑni, o yɑ cögɑ yɑ pɑ mɑg yi röödhø, o yɑ cögɑ yɑ pɑ dwöög keny be tömø ki pï.”" 
John4:16 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Kedh, cwøl jɑlgølí, kɑ wu bïu keny.”" 
John4:17 Aløøg møge yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Yïɑ bong jɑlgølɑ.” Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Yï kømm-ɑ dyër kinni yïí bong jɑlgølí," 
John4:18 mɑ́ cwøw-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ki yïn bɑ ɑ́bïj, o jɑl-ɑ bëëd wun ɑnɑn pɑth ki jɑlgølí. Møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbí yɑn bɑ dyër.”" 
John4:19 Aköbbii yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Jɑldwøng, ɑ́lidh yi yɑn kinni, yï bɑ jɑltöng." 
John4:20 Jwøk ɑ́mɑl ɑ wïj kït men yi kweyyi wøn. De wu tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ wu okööbø kinni, i mɑlli Jwøk kì Yerusɑlem.”" 
John4:21 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Dhɑnh, yïëy møgɑ, óbï eni bøli keny-ɑ koo mɑlli Wïy kì wïj kït men wɑlɑ̀ kì Yerusɑlem." 
John4:22 Wu mɑll-ɑ ngɑn ree kwïj yi wun, de wø mɑll-ɑ ngɑn ree ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn, mɑ́ yïëdø ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Yeud." 
John4:23 De bøli kenyɑni obëënø, o ɑ́rum ki wɑ̈nhø, eni bøli keny-ɑ ómɑlli Wïy ki mɑll-ɑ dyër, ki tegi Wëyi Jwøk." 
John4:24 Jwøk bɑ Wëy, o mɑlli kɑ tegi Wëye geki dyër yi tyëng-ɑ mɑllii.”" 
John4:25 Aköbbii yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, Mesiy óbï, o keny-ɑ óbëëne, wɑ ónyudhe jɑmmì bënn.”" 
John4:26 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ ngɑn-ɑ kööbø ki yïn èn, yɑ bɑ en.”" 
John4:27 Bøli kenyɑni ceth ɑ ɑ́bëën jøbɑnge, kɑ ge ongɑ̈ngø yi kɑ̀ kööbe ki ngɑndhɑjø. De bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́pyëjii kinni, “Yï dwɑdd-ɑ ngø?” Wɑlɑ̀ kinni, “Wude ɑ kööb wun ki ngɑnɑni?”" 
John4:28 Kɑ ngɑnɑni puge wiye kɑ reng-ɑ kɑɑl, kɑ teedø köbbe kinni," 
John4:29 “Bïu lidhu jɑl-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ bënn cøn. Pɑ cuggi bëëdø ɑ́ Mesiy?” 
John4:30 Abëën teedø wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yï Yëso." 
John4:31 Kɑ Yëso kwɑjji yi jøbɑnge, e tyëngɑni nuti wɑ̈nhø kinni, “Cyɑ̈ɑ̈m, jɑlpwönyø!”" 
John4:32 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yïɑ dɑ gïncɑm me nyi cɑmɑ, me kwïj yi wun.”" 
John4:33 Akööb jøbɑnge ki ri gen kinni, “Dɑ ngɑn me muujii ki gïncɑm mɑwɑnø?”" 
John4:34 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Gïncɑmɑ bɑ gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn, kí tyëgi gwøge." 
John4:35 Wu nyii kööbø kinni, ‘Ádöng ɑ́ dwɑ̈tt ɑ́ngwen o byel kɑj.’ De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, lidhu byel, kɑ̀ tɑ̈ri gen, o bøli kej kɑji gen ɑ́wɑ̈nhi." 
John4:36 Ngɑn-ɑ kɑ̈jø köönge okwɑnyø yi en, o cønge byel kipe nënn-ɑ ɑtheer, o ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈g geki ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈j pëthi gen mïni gen ryeet." 
John4:37 O møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi cøn kinni, ‘Nget ɑ́kyel ceg-ɑ kɑ̈g, o ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø kɑ̈ɑ̈je, bï gen gɑ dyër." 
John4:38 Wu ɑ́örɑ’ be kɑji jɑmmi pwödhø mø nuti pur-ɑ yi wun; ji møøgø ɑ ɑ́göög, dɑ́ wun ɑ yïddi ki døøjø kì bɑng gwøøg gen.”" 
John4:39 Kɑ Yëso yïëy yi tyëng Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ mø ngenyø møg-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑlɑni, kì bɑng møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi ngɑnɑni kɑ ɑ́kööbe kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́köbbe møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ bënn cøn.”" 
John4:40 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën tyëng Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ yïe, gø ɑ́kwɑjji gen kinni bëëde kì kɑɑl gen. Kɑ obëëdø kì kɑɑlɑni ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew." 
John4:41 Kɑ kwɑnni ji-ɑ ɑ́yïëy kì bɑng møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi gen kì yïe, óngënyø." 
John4:42 Kɑ ngɑnɑni köbbi gen kinni, “Wø ɑ́yïëy, de pɑth ki bɑng møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn keti gen. Mɑ́ ɑnɑn, wø ɑ́lïng ki møg-ɑ kømmi yi en. Kɑ yod yi wøn kinni, bɑ yïëni kömi piny bëne kidyër.”" 
John4:43 Kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew, ɑdhwödh Yëso kì kenyɑni, kɑ kedh-ɑ Gɑlelì," 
John4:44 mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb kiree kinni, “Jɑltöng pɑ nyi wør kì pödhi gen.”" 
John4:45 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe Gɑlelì, kɑ tyëng Gɑlelì yuude ge yïd-ɑ en, mɑ́ gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge kì Yerusɑlem kì cyɑ̈nggi kwër ɑ́lidh yi gen." 
John4:46 Adøøge Gɑnɑ̀ kì myërri Gɑlelì, kun-ɑ́ yije ɑ́løge pï møgi oløg. Ádɑ jɑl gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì Kɑpernɑum, o yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈de me dële rɑ̈mø." 
John4:47 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng jɑlɑni kinni, Yëso wɑ̈nhi Gɑlelì, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑkedhe yïe, kɑ gø kwɑjje kinni kedhe be yieli wɑ̈de, mɑ́ nyelɑni cyɑ̈ngø thøø." 
John4:48 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Keløg wu pɑ lïdhi ki ngïji geki gïïngɑ̈ngø, wu pɑ yïëy.”" 
John4:49 Akwɑjjii yi jɑlɑni kinni, “Jɑldwøng, bïí kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti thøw wɑ̈dɑ.”" 
John4:50 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Døøg yuuí, wɑ̈dí pɑ thøw.” Ayïëëy møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Yëso yi jɑlɑni, kɑ odøøgø." 
John4:51 Kɑ røøm-ɑ yöö ki bɑ̈ngge, ɑköbbi ge gøn kinni, “Wɑ̈dí dële ɑ́yöni.”" 
John4:52 Apyëje gïn, mɑ yöni dële piny bëëd ɑ dï? Alöggi gen kinni, “Dële ɑ́kwööj ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ kì sɑɑ̀ ɑ́kyel kì dicɑ̈ng.”" 
John4:53 Kɑ yod yi wïye kinni, bɑ bøli kenyɑni ceth ɑ ɑ́kööb Yëso kinni, “Wɑ̈dí pɑ thøw.” Ayïëy jɑlɑni geki tyëng gøle bënn." 
John4:54 Menɑni bene ryeew ngïjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yëso keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëne Gɑlelì, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Yeudiyɑ̀." 
John5:1 Kɑ kwëër Yeud obëënø, ɑkedhi Yëso Yerusɑlem." 
John5:2 Dɑ luy kì Yerusɑlem kì buti Dhøg Dyëg, luyɑni cwøl ɑ́ Bet Dhɑtɑ̀ ki dhøg Ibru, o bute dɑ ɑkɑnnì ɑ́bïj." 
John5:3 Thɑ̈thi ɑkɑnnɑni dɑ tyëngbuud mø ngenyø, kwï gen bɑ cörr, o møøgø bɑ ngöll, o møøgø bɑ pùdh. Ge yïd-ɑ bøli keny-ɑ nyi kyeer pï." 
John5:4 Mɑ́ wëywöni Wë nyi kedh-ɑ yij luyɑni kì bøli keny megø, kɑ pï nyi kyere. Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ nyi kwöngi ki wɑ̈dhi yij luyɑni, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum pï ki kyerø, nyi yiel ki gïn-ɑ ree." 
John5:5 Kenyɑni ɑ́dɑ jɑl me buddø ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g. 
John5:6 Kɑ jɑlɑni lidh yi Yëso e obuddø kì piny, o ngɑ̈nyi yi en kinni, buddø kɑ̈ge dööng, ɑpyëje gøn kinni, “Yï dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, o yï yiel?”" 
John5:7 Alöggi jɑl-ɑ buud kinni, “Jɑldwøng bong dhɑnhø me nyi kïdhi yɑn yij luy kì bøli keny-ɑ nyi tulli pï ri gen. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ nyi nudd yɑ ókedhø, ngɑn megø nyi møøl-ɑ bølɑ.”" 
John5:8 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Dhwödhí mɑl, kwɑny pyëní, kɑ yï kedh.”" 
John5:9 Kɑ jɑlɑni ódönyø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, ɑkwɑnye pyëne kɑ ókedhø. De cyɑ̈ngɑni bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth." 
John5:10 Codhe, ɑköbbi jɑl-ɑ ɑ́dönyi yi Yeud kinni, “Men bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, o yï pɑth ki ɑyïëy ki tyëddi pyëní.”" 
John5:11 Aløøg mø gen yi jɑlɑni kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yiel yɑn, en ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn kinni, ‘Kwɑny pyëní kɑ yï kedh.’ ”" 
John5:12 Apyëjii yi gen kinni, “Á men ɑ ɑ́köbbi yïn kinni, ‘Kwɑny pyëní, kɑ yï kedh?’ ”" 
John5:13 De jɑl-ɑ ɑ́yiel, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yielii kwïje; mɑ́ Yëso ree ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈we kì teen-ɑ cugø kì kenyɑni." 
John5:14 Kɑ jɑlɑni yod yi Yëso kì Kengø, kì bɑng keny megø, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Anɑn dëlí ɑ́yöni, yï ko göög ki orøg këti, o bëëd e bong gïnrɑj me yod yi yïn me lod menɑni.”" 
John5:15 Kɑ jɑlɑni ókedhø, kɑ Yeud köbbe kinni, bɑ Yëso ɑ ɑ́yielii." 
John5:16 Kɑ Yëso jud yi Yeud, mɑ́ e ɑ́yïëëd ɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth." 
John5:17 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Wïyɑ pɑ nyi wïyi ki gwøg, o yɑ ceg-ɑ gwøg ceth.”" 
John5:18 Kɑ ge ti-ɑ pëddø yɑb ki yöö men nɑ̈gii, kipe kɑ̀ pɑ mïdhe Ciggi Sɑbɑth, kí per kɑ̀ kööbe thyew kinni, Jwøk bɑ Wïye, e pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ ree ki Jwøk." 
John5:19 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, bong gïjø me cuggi gwøgø yi Wɑ̈d ki cwɑgge, den-ɑ́ gïn-ɑ nyi lidh yi en, e ogwøgø yi Wïy. Mɑ́ gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi Wïy bënn, bɑ gen ɑ nyi gwøg yi Wɑ̈d, ni kɑ̀ nyi gwøøg gen yi Wïy ceth." 
John5:20 Mɑ́ Wɑ̈d mɑɑr yi Wïy, o gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi en bënn nyi nyudhe’ gøn, o ónyudhi yi en ki møg pëddi döng, kɑ wu ongɑ̈ngø." 
John5:21 Ni kɑ̀ nyi tug tyëngthøø yi Wïy kɑ gï thödhe ki nënnì, Wɑ̈d tyëng-ɑ dwɑdde nyi thödhe’ thödhø thyew ki nënnì." 
John5:22 Bong ngɑn me gønye lidh yi Wïy, mɑ́ gønyy bënn ɑ́cïb cingi Wɑ̈d," 
John5:23 o Wɑ̈d wør yi teedø bëne ni kɑ̀ wør gen Wïy. Ngɑn pɑ wør Wɑ̈d, Wïy ɑ ɑ́örii pɑ wør yi en thyew." 
John5:24 “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, ngɑn-ɑ ólïngi kwøbbɑ, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn yïëye, yïe dɑ nënn-ɑ ɑtheer, o pɑ wɑ̈dhi kej cɑ́y, mɑ́ e ɑ́bï wɑ̈g kì yij thøø, kɑ kedh-ɑ yethi nënnì" 
John5:25 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni bøli keny-ɑ ólïngi cwɑggi Wɑ̈d Jwøk yi tyëngthøø obëënø, o ɑ́wɑ̈nhi ɑnɑn, o tyëng-ɑ ólïngi møge ónëënø." 
John5:26 Wïy kiree ɑ yïe nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi nënnì, o Wɑ̈d ɑ́gwøge ɑ́ ngɑn yïe nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi nënnì thyew." 
John5:27 Kɑ gø thödhe ki tegø men nenne gønyy, mɑ́ e bɑ Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø." 
John5:28 Wu ko ngɑ̈ng yi møgɑni, mɑ́ e ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, eni bøli keny-ɑ ólïngi cwɑgge yi tyëngthøø bënn," 
John5:29 kɑ ge bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yethi rörri gen; tyëng-ɑ ɑ́gøggi gïgdøj ódhwödh kɑ ge onëënø, o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́gøggi gïgrijjø ódhwödh kɑ cɑ́y." 
John5:30 “Bong gïjø me cuggi gwøgø yi yɑn ki cwɑggɑ, de gønyy løøg yi yɑn, yɑ ködd-ɑ ri møg-ɑ köbbi yɑn yi Jwøk. O löggɑ óbëëd gɑ dyër, mɑ́ yɑ pɑ gwøg gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn, de yɑ gwøg-ɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn." 
John5:31 “Keløg yɑ kööbø kɑ perɑ, møgɑni pɑ pɑ̈dhi gɑ dyër." 
John5:32 Dɑ ngɑn megø me nyi kööbø ki perɑ, o ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, møg-ɑ kømmi yi en óyïëy gɑ dyër." 
John5:33 Wu ɑ́ödi yï Jøn, kɑ wu köbbi yi en ki møg-ɑ dyër." 
John5:34 Yɑ pɑ dwɑddi cwɑgø yi dhɑnhø, de møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn kɑ per kinni o wu yiel." 
John5:35 Jøn ɑ́bëëd e nɑ lɑ̈mbɑ̈ men muujø kì cɑr, o pëthi wun ɑ́bëëd ge med ki bëëdø kì yij cɑre kɑ̈ng-ɑ tïni." 
John5:36 Yïɑ dɑ cwɑ̈ggɑ mø lod mø Jøn; ɑ løg gïg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Wïy kinni gwøgɑ gen, gïgɑni bɑ cwɑ̈ggɑ, o ge nyodh-ɑ kinni bɑ Wïyɑ ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn." 
John5:37 O yɑ bɑ ɑcwɑg yi Wïyɑ, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn. Cwɑgge nuti lïngø yi wun kinni tek, o kïde kwïj yi wun." 
John5:38 O kwøbbe pɑ bëëdø kì pëthi wun, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yi en nuti yïëëy wun." 
John5:39 Wɑ̈jji kwërø nyii rɑngø yi wun kidøøj, mɑ́ wu orumø kinni, bene ri gen ɑ óyïddi wun ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer. Wɑ̈jjɑni kiri gen cwɑg-ɑ yɑn!" 
John5:40 De wu yöd wu ceg-ɑ bɑ̈nyø ki bëën yïɑ, o wu yïddi wun ki nënnì." 
John5:41 “Bong pwøj mø yɑb yi yɑn kì yï teedø. 
John5:42 De wu ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, mɑɑri Jwøk tøøk kì pëthi wun." 
John5:43 Yɑ ɑ́bï ki nyingi Wïyɑ, o yɑ nuti kwɑnyø yi wun. De keløg ngɑn megø obëënø ki nyinge kete, ngɑnɑni nyii kwɑnyø yi wun." 
John5:44 De wu ócuggi yïëyø kidï? Mɑ́ wu nyi dwɑdd-ɑ lejji ri wun, de dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøng-ɑ bɑ ɑ́kyel kete, pɑ yɑb yi wun?" 
John5:45 Wu ko rum kinni, bɑ yɑn ɑ gøøny wun yï Wïy, de bɑ Mosɑ̀ ɑ ógøøny wun, en ɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈dh yi wun." 
John5:46 Keløg Mosɑ̀ di yïëy yi wun, yɑ di yïëy yi wun thyew, mɑ́ e ɑ́gwëëd kì riɑ." 
John5:47 De keløg wu pɑ yïëy ki møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed yi en, kwøbbɑ óyïëy yi wun kidï?”" 
John6:1 Codhe, ɑkedhi Yëso løøg Tɑɑy Gɑlelì, (cwølli thyew ɑ́ Tɑɑy Thɑbɑriyɑ̀.)" 
John6:2 Kɑ ji mø ngenyø løg-ɑ bɑnge, mɑ́ ge ɑ́lïdhi ki gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge kì ri tyëngbuud." 
John6:3 Ayedhi Yëso wïj kït me thiinh, kɑ pëgg-ɑ piny geki jøbɑnge." 
John6:4 O Kwëër Ákɑɑdh rum cyɑ̈ngø. 
John6:5 Kɑ Yëso wïje tïnge, kɑ ji mø ngenyø lidhe ge bï-ɑ yïe, ɑpyëje Pïlïp kinni, “Wɑ óngëëw ɑ keny ki gïncɑm men-ɑ ócɑm yi tyëngɑni?”" 
John6:6 Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi en, e rɑng-ɑ gøn, mɑ́ gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi en ngɑ̈nyi yi en." 
John6:7 Aløøg møge yi Pïlïp kinni, “Ke ngëëw wɑ ki gïncɑɑm ngyëny miy ɑ́ryew pɑ rømi ri gen, cɑgg e ceg ki teggø.”" 
John6:8 Aköbbi Yëso yi nget ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøbɑnge, ɑ løg Andrø, ómï Sɑymøn Pïtør kinni," 
John6:9 “Dɑ nyelthinh kì keny me yïe di ópùni ceir ɑ́bïj kí rij ɑ́ryew. De ge pɑ rømi ri teen-ɑ ngenyø ni men.” 
John6:10 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Köbbu teedø pëggi gen piny.” Kenyɑni dɑ lum me ngenyø. Apëggi gen piny. Jøg-ɑ cwøw kwɑnni gen wɑ̈dh-ɑ ri ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj." 
John6:11 Kɑ ópùnɑni kwɑny yi Yëso, ɑpwøje Jwøk, kɑ gï mëgge tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì piny. Agwøge rij ni menɑni thyew, kɑ teedø oyɑ̈ngø ni kɑ ɑ́dwɑddii yi gen." 
John6:12 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́yɑ̈ng teedø, ɑköbbe jøbɑnge kinni, “Cøngu nyingi gïncɑm-ɑ ɑ́döng, o bongii gïn lɑ̈ɑ̈ny.”" 
John6:13 Acøng gen nyingi gïncɑm-ɑ ɑ́döng kì ri ópùni ceir ɑ́bïj, gen ɑ thull-ɑ ɑ́döng kì bɑng tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yethi dhöng pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew." 
John6:14 Kɑ ɑ́lïdhi tyëngɑni ki ngïji men-ɑ ɑ́gwøge, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Kidyër, men bɑ jɑltöng-ɑ ɑ́wɑngi i óbï kömi piny!”" 
John6:15 Kɑ yod yi Yëso kinni, tyëngɑni dwɑdd-ɑ mɑgii, o røny ɑ́ rɑ̈dh; codhe ɑlooye wïj kït." 
John6:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög piny ki wɑɑng thyënhø, ɑkedhi jøbɑnge gɑ̈d." 
John6:17 Kɑ ge kɑdh-ɑ yij morkɑb, ge kedh-ɑ Kɑpernɑum. Piny ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ muudhø, o Yëso tøøk kì kelli gen." 
John6:18 Apɑgø ɑ́bëëd e dɑder, mɑ́ yømø ɑ́cöd e teeg." 
John6:19 Kɑ ge kyëw-ɑ keny ni kïlomïtïr ɑ́bïj wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́bïkyel, ɑlidh gen Yëso e ócyɑ̈dhø kì wɑ̈thi pï, e bï-ɑ kun-ɑ di morkɑb, kɑ ge obwøgø." 
John6:20 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Bɑ yɑn, wu ko böggi.”" 
John6:21 Amïni pëthi gen kɑ gø dwɑddi gen ki kïdhi yij morkɑb. Kedh morkɑb wɑ̈dh-ɑ wɑ̈g kì keny-ɑ kedhi yi gen. 
John6:22 Kɑ yod dhuki yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng kì løøgø kinni, bɑ morkɑb ɑ́kyel ɑ ɑ́bëëd e nud kì kenyɑni, o Yëso nuti kɑdhi yije kyeel ki jøbɑnge, dɑ́ jøbɑnge ɑ ɑ́kedh keti gen." 
John6:23 Abëën yɑ̈ɑ̈th møøgø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Thɑbɑriyɑ̀, kɑ ge töng-ɑ wɑ̈g kì buti keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi teedø ki gïncɑm, keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki pwøji Jwøk." 
John6:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yodii yi tyëngɑni kinni, Yëso kí jøbɑnge tøøk kì kenyɑni, ɑkɑdhi gen yethi morkɑbbɑni, kɑ ge bï-ɑ Kɑpernɑum, ge yɑb-ɑ Yëso." 
John6:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yod ge gøn kì løøgø, ɑpyëj ge gøn kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, ɑ́ ɑ́wën ɑ ɑ́bëën keny?”" 
John6:26 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, yɑ pɑ yɑb yi wun kɑ per kɑ ɑ́lïdhi wun ki ngïji, dɑ́ per kɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun ki gïncɑm, kɑ wu oyɑ̈ngø." 
John6:27 Wu ko nyi göög kipe gïncɑm-ɑ nyi jwɑn rënyø, de göög wun kipe gïncɑm-ɑ pɑ nyi rënyi; eni gïncɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l nënn-ɑ ɑtheer. Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø, en ɑ ómëggi wun gïncɑmɑni, mɑ́ en ɑ köme ɑ́cïb ngïji yi Jwøk Wïy.”" 
John6:28 Apyëjii yi gen kinni, “Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk, ógwøg yi wøn kidï?”" 
John6:29 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk bɑ kinni, yïëyu ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yi en.”" 
John6:30 Apyëjii yi gen kinni, “Á ngïji mɑ ngø ɑ ógwøg yi yïn, o lidh yi wøn, o yï yïëy yi wøn? Á ngø ɑ cuggi gwøgø yi yïn?" 
John6:31 Kweyyi wøn ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki mɑnɑ̀ kì yij pɑ̈l, ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø kinni, ‘Gï ɑ́thödhe ki ópun me kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl ɑ́ men cɑm yi gen.’ ”" 
John6:32 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, pɑth ki Mosɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́thödhi wun ki ópun-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl, de bɑ Wïyɑ kì mɑl, ɑ nyi thödhi wun ki ópun-ɑ dyër." 
John6:33 Mɑ́ gïncɑm-ɑ nyi muuj yi Jwøk e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, bɑ en ɑ nyi thödhi lɑ̈bø ki nënnì.”" 
John6:34 Akööb gen kinni, “Wuö, nyi thödhi wøn ki gïncɑmɑni yethi cyɑ̈ng.”" 
John6:35 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ bene ópuun nënnì. Ngɑn bï yïɑ pɑ mɑg yi kɑ̈j, o ngɑn-ɑ óyïëy yɑn pɑ wöl ki mɑgø yi röödhø." 
John6:36 De wu ɑ́rum ki köbbø yi yɑn kinni, yɑ ɑ́lidh yi wun, de wu koo yïëy." 
John6:37 Ngɑn mëggi yɑn yi Wïyɑ óbï yïɑ, o ngɑn-ɑ óbï yïɑ pɑ ryem yi yɑn," 
John6:38 mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́bï yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, yɑ bï-ɑ be gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn, de yɑ nuti bëën-ɑ be gwøgi møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn ki pyëwɑ." 
John6:39 O møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn bɑ kinni, o bongii dhɑnhø me lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mëgge yɑn bënn, de ge ótïngɑ mɑl kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ cyɑ̈n." 
John6:40 O møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi Wïyɑ bɑ kinni, tyëng-ɑ ólidh Wɑ̈d, kɑ yïëy yi gen, ge óyïddi ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer. O ge ótïngɑ mɑl kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ cyɑ̈n.”" 
John6:41 Akwɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yëso yi Yeud kipe kɑ ɑ́kööbe kinni, “Yɑ bɑ ópun men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl.”" 
John6:42 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Men pɑth ki Yëso wɑ̈d Yosep, ɑ wïye kí meye ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ? Ede ɑ kööbe kinni ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl?”" 
John6:43 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Wu ko mungi." 
John6:44 Bong ngɑn me cuggi bëën yïɑ, e nuti kölli yɑn yi Wïyɑ, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn. De ngɑn-ɑ óbï yïɑ ótïngɑ mɑl kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ cyɑ̈n." 
John6:45 Bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi wɑ̈jji jøtöng kinni, ‘Ge ópwönyi yi Jwøk bënn.’ Ngɑn lïngi mø Wïy, kɑ møgɑni dïd yi en, bï-ɑ yïɑ." 
John6:46 Pɑth ki kinni, dɑ ngɑn megø me liidh Wïy, dɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk bɑ en ɑ ɑ́lidh Wïy." 
John6:47 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, ngɑn-ɑ yïëy, yïe dɑ nënn-ɑ ɑtheer." 
John6:48 Yɑ bene ópuun nënnì. 
John6:49 Kweyyi wun ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki mɑnɑ̀ kì yij pɑ̈l, de ge ɑ́thøw." 
John6:50 De gïncɑm-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl, ngɑn-ɑ ócɑmii pɑ thøw." 
John6:51 Yɑn ɑ bɑ gïncɑɑm nënnì men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl, ngɑn cyɑ̈mø ki gïncɑmɑni, ónëënø gïti ɑtheer. Kidyër, gïncɑm-ɑ ómuuj yi yɑn bɑ dëlɑ. Muuj yi yɑn kɑ per kinni o lɑ̈bø yïdde ki nënnì.”" 
John6:52 Apëëm Yeud keti gen kinni, “Jɑlɑni dële ócuggi mëggi wɑ yi en kidï, o cɑm yi wɑ?”" 
John6:53 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, keløg dëël Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø koo cɑm yi wun, kɑ reme koo mɑdh yi wun, nënnì bogïn kì ri wun." 
John6:54 Ngɑn cyɑ̈mø ki dëlɑ kɑ omɑ̈dhø ki remɑ, yïe dɑ nënn-ɑ ɑtheer, o ótïngɑ mɑl ki cyɑ̈ng-ɑ cyɑ̈n." 
John6:55 Mɑ́ dëlɑ bɑ gïncɑm men-ɑ dyër, o remɑ bɑ gïn mɑdh men-ɑ dyër." 
John6:56 Ngɑn cyɑ̈mø ki dëlɑ kɑ omɑ̈dhø ki remɑ, óbëëdø kì riɑ, kɑ yɑ obëëdø kì ree." 
John6:57 Ni kɑ ɑ́ör yɑn yi Wïy ɑ nëënø, o yɑ nëën ɑ ree, ngɑn cyɑ̈mø ki dëlɑ, ónëënø kì riɑ thyew." 
John6:58 Men bene ópun men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl, o pɑ pɑ̈r ki møng-ɑ ɑ́cɑm yi kweyyi wun, kɑ ge othøø. Ngɑn cyɑ̈mø ki ópun men, ónëënø gïti ɑtheer.”" 
John6:59 Møgɑni ɑ́kømmi yi en ɑ Kɑpernɑum kì sinɑgøg, e pwöny-ɑ ji." 
John6:60 Kɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi ji mø ngenyø kì kelli jøbɑnge, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Kwøbbɑni peeg, ge pɑ cuggi gɑmø yi wïj dhɑnhø.”" 
John6:61 Kɑ yod yi Yëso kinni, jøbɑnge omungø kipe kwøbbɑni, ɑpyëje gïn kinni, “Pëthi wun ɑ́rënyi yi kwøbbɑni?" 
John6:62 De di bëëd ɑ dï, keløg Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø di lidh yi wun e kedh-ɑ mɑl, kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëde cøn?" 
John6:63 Bɑ Wëyi Jwøk ɑ nyi muuj nënnì, de dël bong gïn gwøge. Kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun bɑ wëy geki nënnì." 
John6:64 De dɑ ji møøgø kì kelli wun møg pɑ yïëy.” (Yëso, tyëng-ɑ koo yïëyii geki ngɑn-ɑ óngeewii, ngɑ̈nyi yi en ceth.)" 
John6:65 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Bɑ kipe møgɑni ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun cøn kinni, bong ngɑn cuggi bëën yïɑ, keløg Wïy nuti yïëyø kinni bëe.”" 
John6:66 Kɑ ji mø ngenyø kì kelli jøbɑng Yëso døøg-ɑ cyɑ̈n, kɑ ge ówïyø cyɑ̈dhø kì bɑnge." 
John6:67 Apyëje jøwöödø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kinni, “Wu dwɑdd-ɑ kedhø thyew?”" 
John6:68 Aløøg møge yi Sɑymøn Pïtør kinni, “Wuö, wø kedh-ɑ yï men? Bɑ yïn ɑ yïí di nënn-ɑ ɑtheer." 
John6:69 Wø ɑ́rum ki yïëyø, kɑ yod yi wøn kinni yï bɑ ngeti kwërø mi Jwøk.”" 
John6:70 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Wu nuti yieny-ɑ yi yɑn, wun ɑ́ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew? De ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun yije looj ki yɑn.”" 
John6:71 Yëso ɑ́kømm-ɑ Yeudɑ̀ wɑ̈d Sɑymøn Iskɑryøt, mɑ́ en ɑ óngeewii, o bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew." 
John7:1 Kì bɑng kenyɑni, ɑwïïn Yëso kì myërri Gɑlelì, e pɑ dwɑddi cyɑ̈dhø kì myërri Yeudiyɑ̀, mɑ́ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ oyɑ̈bø ki yuu nɑ̈g ge gøn." 
John7:2 Kɑ bøli kej Kwëër Akɑnnì ócyɑ̈ngø. 
John7:3 Aköbbii yi nyiimen kinni, “Dhwöödh kì keny, kɑ yï kedhí myërri Yeudiyɑ̀, o jøbɑngí thyew lïdhi gen ki gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi yïn." 
John7:4 Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ nyi dwɑddi kinni, o gïg-ɑ gøggi yi en yod yi teedø pɑ nyi göögø kì gød. Keløg yï gøgg-ɑ gïg ni møg, nyudhí rií teedø bëne.”" 
John7:5 Mɑ́ møge nuti yïëyø yi nyiimen thyew. 
John7:6 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Bøli kejɑ nuti bëënø, de kì yï wun cyɑ̈ng bënn pɑ̈r." 
John7:7 Wu pɑ cuggi mɑɑnø yi piny, dɑ́ yɑn ɑ mɑɑn yi en, kipe kɑ̀ köbbɑ en kinni, gïg-ɑ gøggi yi en rijjø." 
John7:8 Kedhu be kwërɑni, de yɑ pɑ kedh, mɑ́ bøli kejɑ nuti thumø.”" 
John7:9 Kɑ ɑ́rume kwøbi møgɑni, ɑdönge kì Gɑlelì." 
John7:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi nyiimen be kwërɑni, ɑlunye kedhø kì wɑ̈ye, e kɑnn-ɑ ree." 
John7:11 Ayɑbii yi Yeud kì kej kwër, ge opëjø kinni, “Jɑlɑni ying-ɑ keny?”" 
John7:12 Kɑ ji omungø ge opëmø, kwï ji okööbø kinni, “Bɑ jɑl me døj,” møøgø okööbø kinni, “Pɑth, jɑlɑni peej-ɑ ji pɑ̈l.”" 
John7:13 De bong ngɑn me kwøb møge kì bøli teedø, mɑ́ ge óböggø yi jɑggi Yeud." 
John7:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi budi cyɑ̈nggi kwër, ɑkedhi Yëso Kengø, kɑ ópwönyø." 
John7:15 Angɑ̈ng Yeud yi møgɑni, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Jɑlɑni ɑ́dïd kidï, e nuti pɑ̈nyø ki pwönyø?”" 
John7:16 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Pwönyɑ pɑth ki miɑ, den-ɑ́ mi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn." 
John7:17 Ke di dhɑnhø me pyëwe dwɑddi gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk, pwönyø men ócuggø ngijø yi en ying e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk wɑlɑ̀ yɑ 'kööb-ɑ cwɑggɑ." 
John7:18 Ngɑn-ɑ nyi kømmi mø cwɑgge nyi yɑb-ɑ kinni o pwøj, de ngɑn-ɑ nyi yɑb kinni o ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́örii pwøj, ngɑnɑni nyi kømm-ɑ dyër, o bong ɑ́dud kì yije." 
John7:19 Wu ɑ́thödhi yi Mosɑ̀ ki cigg, de bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun me mïdhi ciggɑni. Wude ɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈b wun ki yöö men nɑ̈gu yɑn?”" 
John7:20 Alöggi teedø kinni, “Wïjí dɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gø, ɑ́ men ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi yïn?”" 
John7:21 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́gwøg-ɑ ngïji ɑ́kyel, kɑ wu ongɑ̈ngø bënn yi menɑni." 
John7:22 Bɑ Mosɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́thödhi wun ki cigg kinni, nyi ngøl dhɑnhø (pɑth ki Mosɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́cɑg kwöngɑni, de ɑ́wön ɑ ri kweyyi wun,) kɑ dhɑnhø nyi ngøl yi wun kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth." 
John7:23 Keløg dhɑnhø nyii ngølø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth kipe Ciggi Mosɑ̀ óbɑ̈ɑ̈n, wude ɑ wër wun ki yɑn, kenyi gwøgɑ dhɑnhø ki cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth kɑ dële ódönyø bëne?" 
John7:24 Wu ko nyi löggi kì bɑng gïn-ɑ lidh yi wun kete, de nyi löggi wun ki lögg-ɑ dyër.”" 
John7:25 Codhe, ɑkööb ji møøgø kì kelli tyëng Yerusɑlem kinni, “Pɑth ki jɑlɑni ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi nɑ̈gø yi gen?" 
John7:26 De pɑth ki en ɑ kööbø kì bøli teedø èn, o bong ngɑn kyëddii? Ócɑɑg kɑ yodø yi jyɑ̈ggì kidyër kinni, bɑ Mesiy?" 
John7:27 Anɑn kun-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi jɑlɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ, de keny-ɑ óbëën Mesiy bong ngɑn-ɑ óngɑ̈nyi kun-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le.”" 
John7:28 Codhe, ɑryeer Yëso, e ópwönyø kì Kengø kinni, “Yɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi wun, o kun-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yɑn ngɑ̈nyi yi wun thyew. Yɑ nuti bëënø kɑ cwɑggɑ, de ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn bɑ ngɑn mɑ dyër, o ree kwïj yi wun." 
John7:29 De ree ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, mɑ́ yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ree, o bɑ en ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn.”" 
John7:30 Kɑ kømi mɑgø yi gen kipe møgɑni, de bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́cïb cinge ree, mɑ́ bøli keje nuti wɑ̈nhø." 
John7:31 De ɑ́yïëy yi ji mø ngenyø, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Keny-ɑ óbëën Mesiy ógöögø ki ngïjjì mø ngenyø kibøli møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi jɑɑl?”" 
John7:32 Kɑ møg-ɑ kømmi kì ree yi teedø lïngi yi Jøpɑresì. Aöd jɑggi ókwër geki Jøpɑresì ki bölidhh møg mɑgii. 
John7:33 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ óbëëdø kì kelli wun ki nyɑ keny me thiinh, codhe o yɑ kedhɑ yï ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn." 
John7:34 Yɑ óyɑb yi wun, de yɑ koo yod yi wun; mɑ́ wu pɑ cuggi kedhi kun-ɑ ódi yɑn.”" 
John7:35 Akööb Yeud kì kelli gen kinni, “Jɑlɑni ókedh-ɑ keny, o dhɑ̈le yodø yi wɑ? Ókedh-ɑ bɑng Yeud møg-ɑ ɑ́töngi yïnø Yönɑn, o pwönye tyëng Yönɑn?" 
John7:36 Wɑng-ɑ ngø kɑ̀ kööbe kinni, ‘Yɑ óyɑb yi wun de yɑ koo yod yi wun,’ kí kinni, ‘Kun-ɑ óbëëdɑ wu dhɑ̈li bëën yije?’ ”" 
John7:37 Kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ thumi kwër, eni cyɑ̈ng-ɑ dwøng kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi kwër, ɑcungi Yëso, kɑ óryeerø kinni, “Ngɑn ree di röödhø, bëe yïɑ." 
John7:38 Ngɑn-ɑ óyïëy yɑn, ceg-ɑ mɑdh; ni kɑ ókwøbii kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø kinni, ‘Nɑ̈mmi pïi nënnì órïngi wɑ̈g kì wɑɑng ngëdi ngɑn-ɑ óyïëy yɑn.’ ”" 
John7:39 O ɑ́kømm-ɑ wëy-ɑ óyod yi tyëng-ɑ óyïëyii, mɑ́ wëy nuti muujø, yi kɑ̀ nuti thödhi Yëso ki dhwɑ̈ng." 
John7:40 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi teedø, ɑkööb kwï gen kinni, “Jɑɑl bɑ jɑltöng kidyër”" 
John7:41 Akööb ji møøgø kinni, “Jɑɑl bɑ Mesiy!” Kɑ kwï gen ópëjjø kinni, “Mesiy ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Gɑlelì?" 
John7:42 Nuti kwøbø kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, Mesiy óbëëd ɑ́ kwɑɑr Debïd, o ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Betleem kɑɑl Debïd?”" 
John7:43 Kɑ teedø ri gen pɑ̈ngi gen ki gööj Yëso. 
John7:44 Ji møøgø ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ mɑgii, de bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́cïb cinge ree." 
John7:45 Adwöög bölidhh yï jɑggi ókwër geki Jøpɑresì, kɑ ge pyëj kinni, “Ede ɑ nuti kɑ̈ɑ̈lii yi wun?”" 
John7:46 Alöggi bölidhh kinni, “Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́kööb cøn ni kɑ̀ kööb jɑlɑni.”" 
John7:47 Apyëëj gen yi Jøpɑresì kinni, “Wu ɑ́ceg kɑ peej pɑ̈l thyew?" 
John7:48 Dɑ ngɑn mɑ ɑ́yïëyii kì kelli jɑgg wɑlɑ̀ kì kelli Jøpɑresì? Bogøn! 
John7:49 De teen-ɑ kwïj Ciggi Mosɑ̀, ri gen dɑ cyën.”" 
John7:50 Apyëëj gen yi Nikødemøs, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bï yï Yëso cøn kinni," 
John7:51 “Ciggee okööbø i cɑɑy dhɑnhø e kwøbbe nuti lïngø, o gïg-ɑ gøggi yi en nuti yodø yi wɑ?”" 
John7:52 Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Yï bɑ jɑl Gɑlelì thyew? Yɑ̈ɑ̈b, kì yethi wɑ̈j, o óyod yi yïn kinni, bong jɑltöng men-ɑ ócwöb kì Gɑlelì.”" 
John7:53 Codhe, kɑ ngɑn kedh-ɑ gøle." 
John8:1 Kɑ teedø bëne kedh-ɑ kɑ̈lli gen, kɑ Yëso kedh-ɑ wïj Kïti Dhetun." 
John8:2 Dhuki kì mwøl ceth, ɑdwööge Kengø, kɑ teedø bëne bï-ɑ yïe. Apëgge piny, kɑ gï pwönye." 
John8:3 Kɑ jøpwönyi Cigg geki Jøpɑresì, ókɑ̈nø ki ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ ómɑgø ki jɑlø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́cïb ge gøn dïdyëri gen," 
John8:4 ɑköbbi Yëso yi gen kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, ngɑɑn ɑ́mɑg kɑ jɑlø." 
John8:5 Ciggi Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni i bɑ̈lli ngɑn ni men ki tuggi kïttì o thøwe. O yï kwøb-ɑ ngø ɑnɑn?” 
John8:6 Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi gen, ge rɑng-ɑ gøn, o ge yïddi gen ki gïn pere gøøny ge gøn. Kɑ Yëso wïje kuule piny, kɑ ogwëdø kì piny ki lwede." 
John8:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhingii yi gen ki pyëjjɑni, ɑtïnge wïje, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wiy ngɑn nuti göögø ki orøg kì kelli wun, kwönge bɑ̈ddø ki tungi kït.”" 
John8:8 Acige wïje kuul piny, kɑ ogwëdø kì piny ki lwede." 
John8:9 Kɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi jøgɑni, ɑlømmi gen ri gen, ge kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g, cɑg kì ri jɑldwøøng gen. Adöng Yëso kete kí ngɑnɑni, e ócungø kì bøle." 
John8:10 Kɑ Yëso wïje tïnge, ɑköbbe ngɑnɑni kinni, “Ge ying-ɑ keny? Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́kuum yïn?”" 
John8:11 Akööb ngɑnɑni kinni, “Bogøn, Wuö.” Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Cɑgg ɑ́ yɑn thyew, yï pɑ kuum yi yɑn. Kedh kɑ yï ko røngi këti.”" 
John8:12 Codhe, ɑcigi gen köbbø yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ bɑ cɑɑr kömi piny. Ngɑn-ɑ ólugi kì bɑngɑ, pɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì yij muudhø, de óyïddi ki cɑɑr nënnì.”" 
John8:13 Aköbbii yi Jøpɑresì kinni, “Yï kööbø kɑ per cwɑggí, møg-ɑ kømmi yi yïn pɑth ki dyër.”" 
John8:14 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Awøø, yɑ kööbø kɑ per cwɑggɑ, de møg-ɑ kømmɑ bɑ dyër, mɑ́ kun-ɑ kedhɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn. De kun-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑlɑ̀ kun-ɑ kedhɑ kwïj yi wun." 
John8:15 Cɑ́y-ɑ cɑ̈ɑ̈y wun bɑ cɑ́yi ji yøw, de bong ngɑn nyi cɑy yi yɑn." 
John8:16 Cɑgg yɑ cɑ̈yø, cɑ́yɑ bɑ dyër, mɑ́ e pɑth ki yɑ ketɑ ɑ nyi cɑ̈ɑ̈yø, dɑ́ wøki ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn." 
John8:17 Bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi ciggi wun kinni, møg-ɑ nyi kwøb yi cwɑ̈gg ɑ́ryew bɑ dyër." 
John8:18 Yɑ bɑ cwɑ̈g kipe møgɑ; o Wïyɑ, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn, bɑ cwɑ̈g kipe møgɑ thyew.”" 
John8:19 Codhe, ɑpyëjii yi gen kinni, “Wïyí ying-ɑ keny?” Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ kwïj yi wun, o Wïyɑ kwïj yi wun thyew. Keløg yɑ di bëëd yɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi wun, Wïyɑ di bëëd e ngɑ̈nyi yi wun thyew.”" 
John8:20 Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi en e bëëd ɑ keny-ɑ nyi mïdhi ngyëny, e ópwönyø kì Kengø, de bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́mɑgii, mɑ́ bøli keje nuti wɑ̈nhø." 
John8:21 Acigi gen köbbø yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ ókedhø, o yɑ óyɑb yi wun, de wu óthøw ki orøøg wun. Wu pɑ cuggi kedhi kun-ɑ kedhɑ.”" 
John8:22 Akööb Yeud kinni, “Ree óceg yi en kɑ nɑ̈gø kɑ̀ kööbe kinni, i wɑ pɑ cuggi kedhi kun-ɑ kedhe?”" 
John8:23 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wu bɑ mø piny, de yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl. Wu bɑ jii piny, de yɑ pɑth ki ngeti piny men." 
John8:24 Wu ɑ́rum ki köbbø yi yɑn kinni, wu óthøw ki orøøg wun, mɑ́ keløg wu pɑ yïëy kinni, yɑ bene en, wu óthøw ki orøøg wun.”" 
John8:25 Apyëjii yi gen kinni, “Yïn ɑ́ men?” Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Wu ɑ́kwøngɑ ki köbbø cøn, kinni yɑ bene en." 
John8:26 Yïɑ dɑ kwøb mø ngenyø mø kømmi yi yɑn kipe wun, geki kwøb mø gïïr møg cɑɑyɑ wun, de ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn bɑ ngeti dyër, o møg-ɑ lïngi yi yɑn kì yïe bɑ gen ɑ nyi köbbɑ kömi piny.”" 
John8:27 De nuti yood gen kinni, kømm-ɑ per Wïy, kɑ̀ kööbe ki gïn." 
John8:28 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Keny-ɑ órum Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ki tïng mɑl yi wun, óyod yi wun kinni, yɑ bene en, o bong gïn nyi gwøg yi yɑn ki cwɑggɑ, de møg-ɑ nyi kømmi yi yɑn bɑ møg-ɑ köbbi yɑn yi Wïyɑ." 
John8:29 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn ying-ɑ butɑ; yɑ nuti wiy en yɑ ketɑ, mɑ́ kì yethi cyɑ̈ng, yɑ nyii göögø ki gïn-ɑ nyi mïni pyëwe.”" 
John8:30 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe møgɑni, ɑyïëy ji mø ngenyø ki gøn." 
John8:31 Kɑ Yëso Yeud møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëyii köbbe kinni, “Keløg wu óbëëdø kì ri kwøbbɑ, wu ógöögø ki jiɑ kidyër." 
John8:32 O dyër óyod yi wun, kɑ wu pɑ̈d yi dyër kì yethi töjjì.”" 
John8:33 Aløøg møge yi gen kinni, “Wø bɑ kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm, o wø nuti pɑ̈nyi bëëdø wø bɑ bɑ̈nggi ngɑn megø. Yïde ɑ kööb kinni, ‘Wu ógøny kì yethi töjjì?’ ”" 
John8:34 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, ngɑn-ɑ nyi røngø, bɑ bɑ̈ng orøg." 
John8:35 Bɑ̈ng pɑ nyi mɑ̈gi ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r kì gøl wɑ̈n, dɑ́ wɑ̈d ɑ nyi bëëdø." 
John8:36 Keløg wu ópɑ̈dø kì yethi töjjì yi Wɑ̈d, wu óbëëd wu bɑ ɑgøny kidyër." 
John8:37 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, wu bɑ kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm, de wu dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yɑn, mɑ́ kwøbbɑ nuti yïddø ki kɑ̈jji gen kì pëthi wun." 
John8:38 Yɑ nyi kømm-ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́nyudhi yɑn yi Wïyɑ, de wu nyi gøgg-ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun yi wïyi wun.”" 
John8:39 Aløøg mø Yëso yi gen kinni, “Wïyi wøn bɑ Abrɑhɑm.” Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Keløg wu di bëëd wu bɑ nyigi Abrɑhɑm, wu di göög ni Abrɑhɑm." 
John8:40 De ɑnɑn wu dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yɑn, yɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun dyër, ni kɑ ɑ́lïngɑ en kì yï Jwøk. Abrɑhɑm nuti göögø kinøw." 
John8:41 Wu nyi gøgg-ɑ gïg-ɑ gwøg yi wïyi wun.” Aköbbii yi gen kinni, “Wø nuti wɑ̈dhø kɑ gwenø yøw. Wïyi wøn bɑ ɑ́kyel, en ɑ Jwøk.”" 
John8:42 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Keløg Jwøk di bëëd ɑ́ Wïyi wun, yɑ di mɑɑr yi wun, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́bï, yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk. O yɑ nuti bëënø kɑ cwɑggɑ, de yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yi en." 
John8:43 De møg-ɑ nyi kømmi yi yɑn pɑ lïngi yi wun, mɑ́ ge peeg kiper wun." 
John8:44 Wu kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï wïyi wun, en ɑ Ngɑnrɑj. Møg-ɑ nyi dwɑddi yi wïyi wun, bɑ gen ɑ nyi dwɑddi yi pëthi wun ki gwøgø. Áwöni ɑ́ jɑlnɑ̈g ki ji, o pɑ nyi cungi kì kömi dyër, mɑ́ dyër tøøk kì pyëwe. O kwøbbi pyed møg-ɑ nyi kømme kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ bɑng bëëde, mɑ́ e bɑ jɑlpyed, o bɑ wïi pyed." 
John8:45 De kwøbbɑ pɑ yïëy yi wun, mɑ́ yɑ kømm-ɑ dyër." 
John8:46 Á men kì kelli wun ɑ cuggi nyudhø kinni, yɑ ɑ́røngi? Keløg yɑ kømm-ɑ dyër, wude ɑ pɑ yïëyu møgɑ?" 
John8:47 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk, kwøbbi Jwøk lïnge’ lïngø, o wu pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, bene ɑ pɑ lïng wun.”" 
John8:48 Aløøg møge yi Yeud kinni, “Wø pɑ kømmi dyër, kɑ̀ kööb wøn kinni, yï bɑ jɑl Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, o rií dɑ wëyrijjø?”" 
John8:49 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Riɑ bong wëyrijjø, o yɑ wør-ɑ Wïyɑ, de yɑ pɑ wør yi wun." 
John8:50 Yɑ pɑ yɑb dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng cwɑggɑ, de dɑ ngɑn megø me nyi yɑbii kiperɑ, o bene en ɑ nyi nenni kwøb." 
John8:51 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, ngɑn mïdhi kwøbbɑ, pɑ wöl thøø.”" 
John8:52 Aköbbii yi Yeud kinni, “Áyod yi wøn ɑnɑn kinni, rií dɑ wëyrijjø. Abrɑhɑm ɑ́thøw geki jøtöng, de yï okööbø kinni, ‘Ngɑn mïdhi kwøbbɑ, pɑ wöl thøø.’" 
John8:53 Yï lod-ɑ kweyi wøn Abrɑhɑm ki döng, o ɑ́thøw? O jøtöng ɑ́thøw thyew, yï løg-ɑ rií men?”" 
John8:54 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Keløg dhwɑ̈ngɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ riɑ, dhwɑ̈ngɑni bong nyinge, de bɑ Wïyɑ ɑ nyi thödhi yɑn ki dhwɑ̈ng, en ɑ ngɑn-ɑ kømmi yi wun kinni, bene Jwøøg wun," 
John8:55 Cɑgg ree kwïj yi wun, ree ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn. Keløg yɑ di kööb kinni, ree kwïj yi yɑn, yɑ di bëëd yɑ bɑ jɑlpyed ni wun. De ree ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, o kwøbbe omïdhø yi yɑn." 
John8:56 Kweyi wun Abrɑhɑm ɑ́tyer-ɑ lidhi bøli kejɑ, o gø ɑ́lidhe, kɑ pyëwe ómïnø.”" 
John8:57 Aköbbii yi Yeud kinni, “Runní nuti wɑ̈dhi ri pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, o yï kööb kinni Abrɑhɑm liidh yïn?”" 
John8:58 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ nud e Abrɑhɑm nuti nywølø.”" 
John8:59 Akɑ̈bbi gen ki tuggi kïttì møg bɑ̈llii, de Yëso ree ɑ́kɑne, kɑ kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g kì Kengø." 
John9:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhe, ɑlïdhe ki jɑl me ónywølø ɑ́ cwør." 
John9:2 Kɑ pyëj yi jøbɑnge kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, ɑ́ men ɑ ɑ́røngi kì kelli nyelɑni kí meye geki wïye, ɑ bɑnge nywøølii ɑ́ cwør?”" 
John9:3 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Pɑth ki nyelɑni wɑlɑ̀ meye wɑlɑ̀ wïye ɑ ɑ́røngi ɑnywøølii ɑ́ cwør, dɑ́ kipe kinni o gwøøg Jwøk ónyodh kì ree." 
John9:4 Wɑ gwøg-ɑ gwøøg ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn kɑ̀ bëëd piny nudd ɑ́ dicɑ̈ng, mɑ́ wɑ̈r obëënø, o bong ngɑn-ɑ ócuggi gwøg keny-ɑ óbëën wɑ̈r."
