John9:5 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ bëëdɑ kì kömi piny, yɑ bɑ cɑɑr kömi piny.”" 
John9:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume kwøbi møgɑni, ɑngudde piny ki lɑ́ɑ̀w, kɑ onywöbø ki lɑ̈bø, ɑwødhe nyingi jɑl-ɑ bɑ cwør ki lɑ̈mɑni," 
John9:7 Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Kedh kɑ nyingí lwøøg kì Luuy Silwɑm.” (A wɑngi ɑör.) Akedhe, kɑ nyinge lwøge, kɑ ódwöögø nyinge onëënø." 
John9:8 Akööb tyëng-ɑ bute geki tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈nyii cøn ɑ́ kwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Pɑth ki jɑlɑni ɑ nyi bëëdø piny, e ókwɑ̈jjø?”" 
John9:9 Akööb møøgø kinni, “Bɑ en!” De møøgø ɑ́kööb kinni, “Pɑth ki en, de ceg-ɑ pɑ̈r ki en.” Akööb jɑlɑni kiree kinni, “Yɑ bɑ jɑlɑni.”" 
John9:10 Kɑ gø pyëj gen kinni, “Yï ɑ́nëën ɑ dï ɑnɑn?”" 
John9:11 Alögge kinni, “Jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Yëso ɑ ɑ́nywööb ki lɑ̈bø, kɑ lɑ̈mɑni wøødhe nyingɑ, kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, ‘Kedhí Luuy Silwɑm, kɑ nyingí lwøøg.’ Akedhɑ, kɑ nyingɑ lwøgɑ, kɑ nyingɑ onëënø.”" 
John9:12 Apyëjii yi gen kinni, “Jɑlɑni ying-ɑ keny?” Kɑ ólöggø kinni, “Kwïj yi yɑn.”" 
John9:13 Kɑ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ cwør muuj Jøpɑresì. 
John9:14 O cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nywööb Yëso ki lɑ̈bø kɑ nyingi jɑlɑni yiebe ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. 
John9:15 Kɑ jɑlɑni pyëj yi Jøpɑresì kinni, nyinge ɑ́nëën ɑ dï? Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Nyingɑ ɑ́wødhe ki lɑ̈bø, ɑlwøgɑ nyingɑ, ɑnëënɑ.”" 
John9:16 Kɑ kwï Jøpɑresì okööbø kinni, “Ngɑnɑni pɑth ki ngeti Jwøk, mɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth pɑ wør yi en.” De ji møøgø ɑ́kööb kinni, “Ngetorøg ócuggø gwøg ki ngïjj-ɑ ni møg kidï?” Kɑ dhøggi gen óbɑ̈nnø." 
John9:17 Kɑ jɑlɑni cigi pyëjø yi gen kinni, “Yï okööbø kinni nyingí yieeb en, yï rum ɑ dï kipere?” Alöggi jɑlɑni kinni, “Bɑ jɑltöng.”" 
John9:18 De Yeud nuti yïëyø kinni, jɑlɑni bëëdø ɑ́ cwør, kɑ nyinge yïëy-ɑ nënnø, codhe ɑcwøøl wïye geki meye yi gen." 
John9:19 Kɑ gï pyëj gen kinni, “Men bɑ wɑ̈d wun, men-ɑ kømmi yi wun kinni, ɑ́nywøl ɑ́ cwør? De nyinge nëën ɑ dï ɑnɑn?”" 
John9:20 Alöggi wïye geki meye kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni, bɑ wɑ̈d wøn, o ɑ́nywøl ɑ́ cwør." 
John9:21 De kwïj yi wøn, kinni ɑ́nëën ɑ dï ɑnɑn. Pyëju en, bɑ ngɑndwøng, o møge ókwøbe.”" 
John9:22 Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi gen, ge bögg-ɑ Yeud, mɑ́ Yeud dhøggi gen rum gen ki nywɑgø kinni, ke di ngɑn yïëy kinni, Yëso ɑ bɑ Mesiy, ngɑnɑni ceg kɑ ryemø kì sinɑgøg." 
John9:23 Bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́kööb wïye geki meye kinni, “Bɑ ngɑndwøng, pyëju en.”" 
John9:24 Acigi jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ cwør cwølø yi gen, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Lejjí Jwøk! Ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni, jɑlɑni bɑ jɑlorøg.”" 
John9:25 Kɑ ólöggø kinni, “Kwïj yi yɑn ying e bɑ jɑlorøg wɑlɑ̀ pɑth, dɑ́ gïjø ɑ́kyel ɑ ngɑ̈nyɑ kinni, yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ bɑ cwør, o yɑ onëënø ɑnɑn.”" 
John9:26 Kɑ gø pyëj gen kinni, “Yï ɑ́gögge’ ngø? Nyingí ɑ́yieb yi en kidï?”" 
John9:27 Aløøge mø gïn kinni, “Wu ɑ́rum ki köbbø yi yɑn ɑ́tïni, de wu pɑ lïngø. Wude ɑ dwɑddu lïngi møgɑni këti? Wu dwɑdd-ɑ gwøg ki jøbɑnge thyew?”" 
John9:28 Agwɑddii yi gen kinni, “Yïn ɑ bɑ ngete, de wø bɑ jø Mosɑ̀." 
John9:29 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni, Jwøk ɑ́kööb ki Mosɑ̀, de jɑɑl kun-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈le kwïj yi wøn.”" 
John9:30 Alöggi jɑlɑni kinni, “Men bɑ gïïngɑ̈ngø! Kun-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi en kwïj yi wun, o nyingɑ ɑ́yieb yi en kidï!" 
John9:31 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ kinni, kwɑ̈jji tyëngorøg pɑ nyi lïngi yi Jwøk; de nyi lïng-ɑ kwɑ̈jji ji-ɑ mɑllii, ɑ nyi gwøg gïn-ɑ dwɑdde." 
John9:32 Kër-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑg piny ki cwɑ̈jø nuti lïngø kinni, i dɑ dhɑnhø me yieeb nyingi ngɑn-ɑ ónywølø ɑ́ cwør." 
John9:33 Keløg jɑlɑni pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk, ti bong gïn di cuggi gwøgø yi en.”" 
John9:34 Aløøg møge yi gen kinni, “Yï dwɑdd-ɑ pwönyi wøn, yïn ɑ ngɑn-ɑ ónywøøl yij orøg?” Kɑ gø ryeem gen wɑ̈g." 
John9:35 Alïng Yëso kinni, gø ryeem gen wɑ̈g. Keny-ɑ ɑ́yode gøn, ɑpyëje gøn kinni, “Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ɑ́yïëy yi yïn?”" 
John9:36 Alögge kinni, “Jɑldwøng, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ɑ́ men, o yïëy yi yɑn?”" 
John9:37 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Árum ki lidhø yi yïn, o bɑ en ɑ kööbø ki yïn èn.”" 
John9:38 Akööbe kinni, “Wuö, yɑ ɑ́yïëy.” Kɑ gø mɑle." 
John9:39 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́bï kömi piny kɑ per lidhi gønyy, o tyëng-ɑ nyinge gen pɑ nëënø, nëën gen; o tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen nëënø, cøør gen.”" 
John9:40 Kɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Jøpɑresì møg-ɑ bute, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Wø thyew, wø cøørø?”" 
John9:41 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Ke di bëëd wun wu cøørø, ti yï wun bong orøg. De ɑnɑn kenyi kööb wun kinni, ‘Nyingi wøn onëënø,’ orøøg wun ceg-ɑ bëëdø kì kömi wun.”" 
John10:1 “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, ngɑn-ɑ pɑ kɑ̈l dhø kyeel dyëg, de nyi kɑ̈l-ɑ wïj kyel, ngɑnɑni bɑ kur, o bɑ ngeti kɑ̈b." 
John10:2 De ngɑn-ɑ nyi kɑ̈l dhø kyel, bɑ wïi dyëg." 
John10:3 Dhø kyel nyi yïëbb-ɑ en yi jɑl-ɑ kurø, kɑ cwɑgge nyi lïngi yi dyëg. Kɑ dyëge nyi cwøle ki nyingi gen, kɑ gï nyi peeje wɑ̈g." 
John10:4 Kenyi wɑ̈dhi gen wɑ̈g bënn, nyi cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ mɑɑl gïn, kɑ ge nyii lugø kì bɑnge, mɑ́ cwɑgge ngɑ̈nyi yi gen." 
John10:5 Ngɑnpɑth, bɑnge pɑ nyi løg yi gen, de ge nyii pɑ̈rø kì yïe, mɑ́ cwɑggi tyëngpɑth kwïj yi gen.”" 
John10:6 Møgɑni ɑ́gɑj yi Yëso kɑ per gen, de gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi en nuti yood gen." 
John10:7 Codhe, ɑköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ dhø kyeel dyëg." 
John10:8 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi bëënø bënn kì bølɑ bɑ kurrì, o ge bɑ tyëngkɑ̈b, o dhøggi gen pɑ nyi lïngi yi dyëg." 
John10:9 Yɑ bɑ dhø kyel, ngɑn-ɑ nyi kɑ̈l riɑ óyiel, o óbëëd e nyi wɑ̈dh-ɑ kedhi yije kɑ nyi wɑ̈dh-ɑ dwöög wɑ̈g, o kej cyɑ̈ɑ̈mø nyii yodø yi en." 
John10:10 Kur nyi bï-ɑ be kwɑl kí nɑ̈g, kí rënyi jɑmmì yøw. De yɑ ɑ́bï-ɑ be yieli ji, o ge yïddi gen ki nënnì." 
John10:11 “Yɑ bɑ jɑlkwɑ̈yø me døj, o jɑlkwɑ̈y-ɑ døj nyi muuj-ɑ wëye kipe dyëge." 
John10:12 De ngɑn kwɑ̈yø e bɑ ɑkïr, e dyëg pɑth ki møge, kenyi lidhe gøøl e obëënø, dyëg nyi wiye’ piny, kɑ órengø, kɑ dyëg gwɑrri yi gøøl, kɑ gï kedhhe." 
John10:13 Jɑl-ɑ bɑ ɑkïr nyi ceg-ɑ rengø, o dyëg bong per gen kì yïe." 
John10:14 Yɑ bɑ jɑlkwɑ̈yø me døj. Dyëgɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, o yɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi gen," 
John10:15 Ni kɑ̀ ngɑ̈nyi yɑn yi Wïyɑ, o Wïyɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, o wëyɑ muujɑ’ muujø kipe dyëgɑ." 
John10:16 Yïɑ dɑ dyëg møøgø mø tøøk kì yij kyel men, ge ceg kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi yɑn thyew, o cwɑggɑ ólïngi yi gen. O dɑɑg bëëde ɑ́ ɑ́kyel kí jɑlkwɑ̈yø ɑ́kyel." 
John10:17 “Yɑ mɑɑr yi Wïyɑ mɑ́ yɑ muuj-ɑ wëyɑ gɑ møg-ɑ ódwöög yïɑ. 
John10:18 Bong ngɑn-ɑ ókwɑny gen kì yïɑ, dɑ́ yɑn ki cwɑggɑ ɑ ómuuj gen. Yïɑ dɑ tegø men muujɑ gen, o yïɑ dɑ tegø men kwɑnyɑ gen. Gwøngɑni ɑ́muuj-ɑ yi Wïyɑ kinni gwøgɑ en.”" 
John10:19 Kɑ Yeud dhøggi gen cig-ɑ bɑ̈nnø kì bɑng kwøbbɑni. 
John10:20 Kɑ ji mø ngenyø kì kelli gen okööbø kinni, “Ree dɑ wëyrijjø, ceg-ɑ myëlø, wude ɑ lïngu møge?”" 
John10:21 De ji møøgø ɑ́kööb kinni, “Kwøbb-ɑ ni møg pɑth ki kwøbbi ngɑn ree di wëyrijjø. Nyingi cörr ócuggø yiebø yi wëyrijjø?”" 
John10:22 Piny ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ wuudø, o bɑ bøli keny-ɑ pɑɑr thyeyi Kengø kì Yerusɑlem." 
John10:23 Yëso ɑ́bëëd e ócyɑ̈dhø kì yij ɑkɑni Sølømøn kì ri Kengø. 
John10:24 Atyegii kej ɑ́kyel yi Yeud, kɑ gø pyëj gen kinni, “Yï gït-ɑ wɑɑng wø pɑ köbbi yi yïn? Köbbí wøn dyër, yï bɑ Mesiy?”" 
John10:25 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Wu ɑ́rum ki köbbø yi yɑn, de wu nuti yïëyø. Gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi yɑn ki nyingi Wïyɑ, bɑ cwɑ̈ggɑ;" 
John10:26 de wu pɑ yïëy, mɑ́ wu pɑth ki dyëgɑ." 
John10:27 Dyëgɑ nyi lïng-ɑ cwɑggɑ, yɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi gen, o ge nyi lug-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑngɑ." 
John10:28 Ge mëggɑ’ nënn-ɑ ɑtheer, o ge pɑ wöl lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn me gwɑr gen kì cingɑ." 
John10:29 Wïyɑ, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen yɑn, bɑ en ɑ dwøng kibøli dhɑnhø bëne, o bong ngɑn me cuggi gwɑri gen kì cingi Wïyɑ." 
John10:30 Wø bɑ ɑ́kyel kí Wïyɑ.” 
John10:31 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈bbi Yeud ki tuggi kïttì møg bɑ̈llii." 
John10:32 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́göög ki gïgdøj mø gïïr kì bøli wun, o ge bɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Wïyɑ kinni gwøgɑ gen. Á kipe gwøng ɑ́ kì kelli gen, ɑ dwɑddu yɑn bɑ̈llø?”" 
John10:33 Alöggi Yeud kinni, “Yï pɑ bɑ̈lli yi wøn kɑ per gwøg me døj, dɑ́ kipe kwøbb-ɑ nyi kømmi yi yïn kì ri Jwøk, mɑ́ yï bɑ dhɑnhø yøw, de yï ceg-ɑ rií ki pɑ̈ɑ̈rø ki Jwøk.”" 
John10:34 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi ciggi wun i Jwøk kööbø kinni, ‘Wu bɑ jwögg.’" 
John10:35 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ kinni møg-ɑ kømmi yi wɑ̈jji kwërø bɑ dyër ceth; o jiɑni cwølli yi Jwøk gɑ jwögg, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wöönɑni." 
John10:36 Keløg ɑ́ perɑ, yɑ ɑ́myeg-ɑ yi Wïy, kɑ yɑ öre kömi piny. De wu kööb ɑ dï kinni yɑ bwöl-ɑ nyingi Jwøk kipe kɑ ɑ́kööbɑ kinni, yɑ bɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk?" 
John10:37 Keløg yɑ pɑ göögø ki gwøøg Wïyɑ, wu ko yïëy ki yɑn." 
John10:38 De keløg yɑ nyi gøgg-ɑ gen, cɑgg yɑ pɑ yïëy yi wun, yïëyu gïg-ɑ gøggɑ, o yod yi wun kinni, Wïyɑ ying-ɑ riɑ, o yɑ ying-ɑ ri Wïyɑ.”" 
John10:39 Adwɑddii mɑgø yi gen këti, de ɑ́bodh kì cinggi gen." 
John10:40 Kɑ Yëso kedh-ɑ løøg Nɑm Urdun, kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi Jøn e jwɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ ji, kɑ obëëdø kì kunɑni." 
John10:41 Abëën ji mø gïïr yïe, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Bong ngïji mɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jøn, de møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi en bënn kì ri jɑlɑni ɑ́bï gɑ dyër.”" 
John10:42 Kɑ yïëy yi ji mø gïïr kì kunɑni. 
John11:1 Jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Lɑdhɑrøs kì Betɑnì, ɑ́bëëd e ceg-ɑ buddø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dël. Pɑnɑni ɑ bëëd yi Meerì geki Mɑrthɑ̀ nyimen." 
John11:2 Bɑ Meerì menɑni ɑ ɑ́gïny Wë ki møw-ɑ yøme med, kɑ tyelle pøjje ki yëyyi wïje, en ɑ ómen Lɑdhɑrøs buud." 
John11:3 Kɑ nyiimï Lɑdhɑrøs öd-ɑ yï Yëso kinni, “Wuö, ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑr yi yïn obuddø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dële.”" 
John11:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Yëso ɑkööbe kinni, “Buunɑni pɑth ki men thøw Lɑdhɑrøs, dɑ́ kipe kinni o Jwøk yïdde ki pwøj, o Wɑ̈d Jwøk yïdde ki pwøj thyew.”" 
John11:5 Mɑrthɑ̀ kí nyimen kí Lɑdhɑrøs ge mɑɑr yi Yëso. 
John11:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Yëso kinni, Lɑdhɑrøs obuddø, ɑ́rïïj ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew kì keny-ɑ ɑ́di en." 
John11:7 Codhe, ɑköbbe jøbɑnge kinni, “Bïu, døøg wɑ myërri Yeudiyɑ̀.”" 
John11:8 Alöggi jøbɑnge kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø, yï ɑ́cer-ɑ kømi bɑ̈llø yi Yeud ki tuggi kïttì, o yï yöd yï døøg-ɑ kunɑni?”" 
John11:9 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Pɑth ki sɑɑ̀ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew ɑ nyi bëëd piny e tɑr? Keløg dhɑnhø cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ dicɑ̈ng tyele pɑ cwɑny yi en, mɑ́ e onëënø yi tɑri piny." 
John11:10 De keløg dhɑnhø cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑ̈r, tyele nyii cwɑnyø yi en, mɑ́ e bong cɑr kì wɑ̈r.”" 
John11:11 Kɑ ɑ́rume kwøbi møgɑni, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Mɑ̈dhee, Lɑdhɑrøs ceg-ɑ nenø, de yɑ kedh-ɑ be cyëëwii.”" 
John11:12 Aköbbii yi jøbɑnge kinni, “Wuö, keløg e nenø dële óyöni.”" 
John11:13 Yëso ɑ́kømm-ɑ ninni thøø, de gø cwøl yi gen kinni, wɑng-ɑ ywömi rɑw kì yethi nin." 
John11:14 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Lɑdhɑrøs ɑ́thøw," 
John11:15 de pyëwɑ med kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ tøøk kì kunɑni kipe kinni o wu yïëy wun. Dhwödh wun, kedhi wɑ yïe!”" 
John11:16 Aköbbi jøbɑng Yëso møg-ɑ kyeelø yi Tömɑs Nyɑjwøk kinni, “Bïu, kedh wɑ thyew, o wɑ thøw wɑ kyeel ki en.”" 
John11:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Yëso, ɑyode gøn kinni, Lɑdhɑrøs cyɑ̈ngge bɑ ɑ́ngwen kì yij rörø." 
John11:18 O Betɑnì cyɑ̈gi ki Yerusɑlem, ki kïlomïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g," 
John11:19 o Yeud mø ngenyø kedhi be lugi Meerì geki Mɑrthɑ̀ ki thøwi ómï gen. 
John11:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Mɑrthɑ̀ kinni Yëso obëënø, ɑkedhe be pɑɑrii, de Meerì ɑ́döng, e obëëdø kì ød." 
John11:21 Kɑ Yëso köbbi yi Mɑrthɑ̀ kinni, “Wuö, keløg yï di ying me nud, ómïɑ pɑ di thøw." 
John11:22 De yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, gïn-ɑ cwøl yi yïn kì yï Jwøk gø nyi mëgge’ yïn.”" 
John11:23 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Ómyëw ódhwödh.”" 
John11:24 Aköbbii yi Mɑrthɑ̀ kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, ódhwödh kì bøli keny-ɑ ódhwödhi ji mɑl kì yij thøø kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ cyɑ̈n.”" 
John11:25 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑn ɑ bɑ dhwödhø kí nënnì; ngɑn yïëy yɑn, cɑgg e thøw ónëënø," 
John11:26 o ngɑn nëënø ke yïëye yɑn, pɑ wöl thøø. Møgɑni ɑ́yïëy yi yïn?”" 
John11:27 Aköbbii yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́yïëy Wuö, yɑ ɑ́yïëy kinni, yï bɑ Mesiy, Wɑ̈d Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb i óbï kömi piny.”" 
John11:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Mɑrthɑ̀ ki kwøbi møgɑni ɑkedhe, kɑ Meerì nyimen cwøle; gø ɑ́köbbe mɑ̈ɑ̈dh kinni, “Jɑlpwönyø nud, o yï ocwøllø yi en.”" 
John11:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Meerì, ɑjwɑne dhwödhø, kɑ kedh-ɑ yïe." 
John11:30 Yëso nuti bëën pɑc; ɑ́nudd e bëëd ɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́yodii yi Mɑrthɑ̀. 
John11:31 Kɑ Yeud møg-ɑ bëëdø kì buti Meerì kì ød, ge lug-ɑ gøn, kɑ ɑ́lidh gen Meerì e jwɑn-ɑ dhwödhø, e kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g, ɑløg gen bɑnge, ge orumø kinni i kedh-ɑ wïj rörø be ywøg." 
John11:32 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Meerì kun-ɑ di Yëso, ɑbøødhe ree piny kì bøle, e okööbø kinni, “Wuö, keløg yï di bëëd yï nud, ómïɑ pɑ di thøw!”" 
John11:33 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Meerì yi Yëso, e óywöngø, geki teen-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki en, ge óywöngø thyew, ɑyëgge mɑl, yije orɑ̈mø yi kwøbbɑni." 
John11:34 Akööbe kinni, “Ákoonyu’ keny?” Alöggi gen kinni “Wuö, bïí lïdhí.”" 
John11:35 Kɑ Yëso óywöngø. 
John11:36 Akööb Yeud kinni, “Lïdhu cyee, cɑɑg bëëdø e mɑɑr yi en ki mendwøng!”" 
John11:37 De kwï ji ɑ́kööb kinni, “Bong gïn di cuggi gwøgø yi jɑɑl, eni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yieb nyingi jɑl-ɑ́ cwør, Lɑdhɑrøs pɑ di mɑ̈ɑ̈ne thøø?”" 
John11:38 Kɑ Yëso cig-ɑ yëggi mɑl, kɑ nyeg-ɑ buti rörø. Rörɑni bɑ órøngi kït, dhøge bɑ ɑrïg ki tungi kït." 
John11:39 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Nyiig wun kïnɑni wɑ̈ye.” Akööb Mɑrthɑ̀ nyimï jɑl-ɑ ɑ́thøw kinni, “Wuö, yømi dhɑnhø óngwɑ̈ɑ̈j tïn, mɑ́ cyɑ̈ngge bɑ ɑ́ngwen kì yij rörø.”" 
John11:40 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Yï nuti köbbø yi yɑn kinni, keløg yï óyïëy, mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøk ólidh yi yïn?”" 
John11:41 Codhe, ɑnyiig kïnɑni wɑ̈ye. Kɑ Yëso lïïdh-ɑ mɑl, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑ pwøj-ɑ yïn Wïyø, kipe kɑ ɑ́lïngí kwøbbɑ." 
John11:42 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, kwøbbɑ nyii lïngø yi yïn ceth, de møgɑni kwøb yi yɑn kɑ per ji-ɑ keny èn, kipe kinni o ge yïëy gen kinni, yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yi yïn.”" 
John11:43 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki kwøbi møgɑni, ɑcwödde e óryeerø kinni, “Lɑdhɑrøs, bïí wɑ̈g.”" 
John11:44 Abëën ngɑnthøø wɑ̈g, cinge geki tyelle bɑ ɑkod ki ógødh, o nyinge bɑ ɑtwöj ki nyɑ ógødh. Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Pɑ̈du en, kɑ wiy kedhe.”" 
John11:45 Ádɑ ji mø gïïr kì kelli Yeud mɑ ɑ́bï yï Meerì, kɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yëso lidh yi gen, kɑ yïëy yi gen." 
John11:46 De kwï gen ɑ́kedhi yï Jøpɑresì, kɑ gï köbbi gen gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yëso." 
John11:47 Codhe, ɑcugi jɑggi ókwër geki Jøpɑresì, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Á gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi wɑ? Lidhu gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ gwøg yi jɑlɑni!" 
John11:48 Keløg e ówiy yi wɑ kinøw, óyïëy yi teedø bëne, kɑ mïri Römɑ̀ obëënø, kɑ Kengee kí juree rënye.”" 
John11:49 Kɑ jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen, me cwøl ɑ́ Kɑyɑpɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kì runɑni, okööbø kinni, “Bong gïn ngɑ̈nyi yi wun!" 
John11:50 Pɑ gɑm yi wɑ̈thi wun kinni, lɑ̈w thøwi jɑl ɑ́kyel e gøøm-ɑ bøli teedø, o jur bëne cöge e pɑ rënyi.”" 
John11:51 Møgɑni nuti kwøbø yi en kɑ cwɑgge, dɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kì runɑni, ɑ́ceg kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki yodø yi en kinni, Yëso bɑ men thøw e gøøm-ɑ bøli Yeud," 
John11:52 o pɑth kipe gen keti gen, dɑ́ kipe nyigi Jwøk møg-ɑ tɑyø bënn, kinni o gï cønge kej ɑ́kyel thyew." 
John11:53 Cɑg kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ge nyii rïïjø ge nywɑgg-ɑ dhøggi gen kipe nɑ̈ge. 
John11:54 Codhe, ɑwïyi Yëso ki wɑ̈dhi cyɑ̈dhø kì kelli Yeud, kɑ odhwödhø kì kenyɑni kɑ kedh-ɑ kɑɑl-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Eprɑim kì buti ryɑng, kɑ obëëdø kì kunɑni geki jøbɑnge." 
John11:55 Kɑ bøli kej Kwëër Ákɑɑdh ócyɑ̈ngø. Kɑ ji mø ngenyø kì yethi myërr-ɑ thønhø kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem be guöög dhïwø, kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nuti bëën cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër." 
John11:56 Kɑ Yëso yɑb yi gen, ge okööbø kinni, “Jɑlɑni pɑ bï be kwër?”" 
John11:57 Mɑ́ jɑggi ókwër geki Jøpɑresì rum ceg kinni, i nyoodh keje yi ngɑn-ɑ óyodii, o mɑg yi gen." 
John12:1 Kɑ ɑ́dönge ɑ́ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel kipe cɑ̈gi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, ɑbëën Yëso Betɑnì, pɑn-ɑ ɑ́di Lɑdhɑrøs, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́tug yi en kì yij thøø." 
John12:2 Aryejii ki gïncɑm kì kenyɑni, o bɑ Mɑrthɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈lli gïncɑm. O Lɑdhɑrøs ɑ́bëëd e nud kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki Yëso." 
John12:3 Akɑ̈ni Meerì ki ɑ́thïwi møw me yøme med, me ngewe teeg, kɑ tyelli Yëso gïnye ki møwɑni. Kɑ gï pøjje ki yëyyi wïje. Kɑ ønɑni kɑb yi yømi møwɑni." 
John12:4 Akööb Yeudɑ̀ Iskɑryøt, ɑ bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøbɑnge, eni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ngeewii kinni," 
John12:5 “Ede møwɑni ɑ bɑnyii ki ngeew wɑ̈g ki ngyëny miy ɑ́dɑ̈g, o ngyënyyɑni di mëggi ɑbuur?”" 
John12:6 Møgɑni nuti kwøbø yi en, e ywøg-ɑ ɑbuur, dɑ́ kipe kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ kur, mɑ́ sɑnduug ngyëny ɑ́mïdh-ɑ yi en, o nyii kɑ̈bbø kì ri ngyënyy-ɑ nyi cïb yije." 
John12:7 Akööb Yëso kinni, “Wiyu en, møwɑni ɑ́mïdhi yi en ɑ́ men koony yɑn." 
John12:8 Abuur bëëd ɑ kelli wun yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, de yɑ koo bëëdø kì kelli wun yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn.”" 
John12:9 Kɑ Yeud mø ngenyø olïngø kinni, Yëso nud kì Betɑnì, ɑbëën gen, de pɑth kipere kete, dɑ́ kipe kinni o Lɑdhɑrøs ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́tug yi en kì yij thøø, lidh yi gen thyew." 
John12:10 Kɑ jɑggi ókwër dhøggi gen nywɑg gen kinni o Lɑdhɑrøs nɑ̈g thyew. 
John12:11 Mɑ́ kì bɑnge, ge ɑ́bɑny yi ji mø ngenyø kì kelli Yeud, kɑ Yëso yïëy yi gen." 
John12:12 Dhuki ɑlïng ji mø ngenyø møg-ɑ ɑ́bï be kwër kinni Yëso bï-ɑ Yerusɑlem. 
John12:13 Akɑ̈bbi gen ki ówɑwwi benø mø mɑr, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be pɑɑrii, ge óryeerø kinni, “Lenhi wɑ Jwøk! Ngɑn-ɑ bï ki nyingi Wë, bɑ ɑgyëdh! Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil ógyëdh yi Jwøk!”" 
John12:14 Ayïddi Yëso ki ɑderø ówöb, kɑ kɑdh-ɑ köme ni kɑ ógwedii kinni," 
John12:15 “Nyɑɑr Dhɑyøn, yï ko böggi! Rɑ̈dhí ɑ bï èn, e obëëdø kì kömi ɑderø ówöb.”" 
John12:16 Tyelli møgɑni nuti yodø yi jøbɑnge kì tyeli mɑl, de kɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki thödhø ki dhwɑ̈ng, ɑpɑrii yi gen kinni, møgɑni ógwedø kɑ pere, o bɑ møgɑni ɑ ɑ́göggii yi teedø." 
John12:17 O tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nud keny-ɑ ɑ́cwööle Lɑdhɑrøs wɑ̈g kì yij bur, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́tuge gøn kì yij thøø, ge ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ge kømm-ɑ møgɑni kì kelli teedø." 
John12:18 O bɑ kipe møgɑni ɑ ɑ́kedhi teedø be pɑɑrii, mɑ́ ge ɑ́lïng kinni, ngïji menɑni ɑ́gwøg-ɑ yi en." 
John12:19 Kɑ Jøpɑresì ri gen köbbi gen kinni, “Bong gïn cuggi gwøgø yi wun. Ji pɑ nenni yi wun ge kedh-ɑ bɑnge!”" 
John12:20 Ádɑ tyëng Yönɑn mø nud kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bï be mɑlli Jwøk kì cyɑ̈nggi kwër. 
John12:21 Kɑ tyëngɑni bï-ɑ yï Pïlïp jɑl Betsɑidɑ̀ kì myërri Gɑlelì, kɑ gø kwɑjji gen kinni, “Jɑldwøng, wø dwɑdd-ɑ yïddø ki Yëso.”" 
John12:22 Akedh Pïlïp, kɑ Andrø köbbe, ɑbëën gen, kɑ Yëso köbbi gen." 
John12:23 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Bøli keny-ɑ óthödhi Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ki dhwɑ̈ng ɑ́wɑ̈nhi." 
John12:24 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, keløg wɑɑng byëlø pɑ dëëm piny kɑ othøø, nudd ɑ́ en ceth, de keløg e othøø, ceg-ɑ kɑ̈nø ki nying mø ngenyø." 
John12:25 Ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑr ree wëye ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì yïe, de ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑn ree kì kömi piny men, wëye ómïdhi yi en kipe nënn-ɑ ɑtheer." 
John12:26 Ngɑn dwɑddi göggi yɑn, luge kì bɑngɑ, o ngɑn-ɑ göggi yɑn óbëëd ɑ keny-ɑ ódi yɑn thyew. O ngɑn göögø kiperɑ, ótheg yi Wïy." 
John12:27 “Anɑn pyëwɑ olïngø, de yɑ ókööb ɑ dï? Kööbɑ kinni, ‘Wïyø, yiel yɑn kì bøli keny?’ Pɑth ki kinøw, mɑ́ e bɑ per møgɑni ɑ ɑ́bëënɑ." 
John12:28 Wïyø, thödhí nyingí ki dhwɑ̈ng.” Abëën cwɑg kì mɑl kinni, “Nyingɑ ɑ́rum ki thödhø dhwɑ̈ng yi yɑn, o cigɑ’ thödhø.”" 
John12:29 Alïngi møgɑni yi teen-ɑ cungi kì bute, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Men bɑ omɑ̈ɑ̈r mɑl!” Kɑ møøgø okööbø kinni, “Wëywödø ɑ ɑ́kööb ki en.”" 
John12:30 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Cwɑggɑni nuti bëënø kɑ perɑ, dɑ́ kiper wun." 
John12:31 Anɑn bøli kej cɑyi piny men ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, o jɑngi piny men, óryeem wɑ̈g." 
John12:32 De yɑn, keny-ɑ ótïng yɑn kì piny, teedø bëne ótëëlɑ riɑ.”" 
John12:33 Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi en, gɑ møg nyodh thøw-ɑ óthøwe." 
John12:34 Aløøg møge yi teedø kinni, “Wø ɑ́lïng kì yethi cigg kinni, ‘Mesiy óbëëdø gïti ɑtheer.’ De yï cigí kwøb kidï kinni, ‘Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ótïng mɑl?’ Á men ɑ bɑ Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø?”" 
John12:35 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Cɑr óbëëdø kì kelli wun kɑ nyɑ keny me thiinh. Cyɑ̈dhi wun kɑ̈ng-ɑ nud cɑr kipe wu ópïïd yi muudhø. Ngɑn cyɑ̈dhi kì yij muudhø kun-ɑ kedhe kwïj yi en." 
John12:36 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ nud cɑr kì kelli wun, yïëyu cɑr, o wu óbëëd wun wu bɑ nyigi cɑr.” Kɑ ɑ́rum møgɑni ki kwøbø yi Yëso, ɑkedhe, kɑ ree kɑne kipe gïn." 
John12:37 Yëso nuti yïëyø yi gen, ngö e ɑ́göög ki ngïjjì mø ngenyø kì bøli gen," 
John12:38 o møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen, kɑ ɑ́kööbe kinni, “Wuö, ɑ́ men ɑ ɑ́yïëy møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wøn? O Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j tege ɑ́nyudhe’ men?”" 
John12:39 Kɑ ge ódhɑ̈lø yïëyø, mɑ́ Icɑyɑ̀ ɑ́cigi kwøb kinni," 
John12:40 “Nyingi gen ɑ́göjji cøørø yi Jwøk, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen ócungø, o nyingi gen cög ge pɑ nëënø o wɑ̈thi gen cög ge pɑ gɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki kwøb o ge cög ge pɑ dwöög köörɑ o ge di yielɑ.”" 
John12:41 Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi Icɑyɑ̀, mɑ́ dhwɑ̈nge ɑ́lidh yi en, kɑ okööbø kipe gøn." 
John12:42 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́kööbe kinøw, møge ɑ́yïëy yi ji mø ngenyø kì kelli jɑgg, de møgɑni nuti tööng gen kì bøli teedø, mɑ́ ge óböggø yi Jøpɑresì kipe ge óryem kì sinɑgøg." 
John12:43 Mɑ́ ge mɑɑr-ɑ gøggi gïg-ɑ yïëy yi teedø kibøli mø Jwøk. 
John12:44 Aryeer Yëso, kinni, “Ngɑn yïëy yɑn, pɑth ki yɑn ɑ yïëy yi en, dɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn." 
John12:45 O ngɑn lidh yɑn ɑ́lidh-ɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn. 
John12:46 Yɑ ɑ́bï piny yɑ bɑ cɑr, kipe kinni o ngɑn-ɑ óyïëy yɑn cöge e pɑ döng kì yij muudhø." 
John12:47 Ke di ngɑn lïngi kwøbbɑ, kɑ gï cög gï pɑ mïdhi yi en, pɑth ki yɑn ɑ ócɑyii, mɑ́ yɑ nuti bëën-ɑ be cɑyi piny, de yɑ ɑ́bï-ɑ be yieli piny." 
John12:48 Ngɑn bɑny yɑn, kɑ kwøbbɑ ódhɑ̈lø yïëyø yi en, dɑ ngɑn-ɑ ócɑyii. Bɑ kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́kømmɑ, ɑ ócɑyii kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ cyɑ̈n!" 
John12:49 Mɑ́ yɑ nuti kööbø kɑ cwɑggɑ, de Wïy ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn, bɑ en ɑ ɑ́cïgi yɑn møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmɑ, kí yuu-ɑ ɑ́lwøbɑ gen." 
John12:50 O ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, cigge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ nënn-ɑ ɑtheer. Møg-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn bɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Wïy kinni kwøbɑ gen.”" 
John13:1 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nuti cɑ̈gi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, o ngɑ̈nyi yi Yëso kinni, bøli keny-ɑ ódhwödhe kì kömi piny, kɑ kedh-ɑ yï Wïye ɑ́wɑ̈nhi. Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee bëne ɑ́cïbe kömi jie kì kömi piny, gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr yi en ki mendwøng." 
John13:2 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ying gen ød ge ocyɑ̈mø, kwøbbi ngeewi Yëso rumø cïb pyëw Yeudɑ̀ wɑ̈d Sɑymøn Iskɑryøt yi wëyrijjø." 
John13:3 O Yëso ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, jɑmmì bënn ɑ́cïb cinge yi Wïy, geki kinni, ɑ́bï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, o bɑ men døøg yïe," 
John13:4 ɑdhwödhe kì wïj lwøl, ɑlunye lɑne wɑ̈g, ɑkɑ̈be ki ógødh, kɑ gø weene ngɑ̈je." 
John13:5 Kɑ pï kønye yij thɑnhø, kɑ ócɑ̈gø lwøgi tyelli jøbɑnge, kɑ gï nyi diime ki ógønh-ɑ twööj en ngɑ̈je." 
John13:6 Awɑ̈dhe yï Sɑymøn Pïtør, kɑ pyëj yi Sɑymøn Pïtør kinni, “Wuö, yïn ɑ lwøg tyellɑ?”" 
John13:7 Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yɑn kwïj yi yïn ɑnɑn, de óyod yi yïn dhuki megø.”" 
John13:8 Aköbbii yi Pïtør kinni, “Tyellɑ pɑ wöl yi yïn ki lwøgø.” Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Keløg yï pɑ lwøg yi yɑn, yï pɑ bëëdø yïn ɑ́ ngetibɑngɑ këti.”" 
John13:9 Aköbbii yi Sɑymøn Pïtør kinni, “Keløg ɑ́ kinøw Wuö, pɑth ki tyellɑ keti gen, de lwøg cingɑ kì wïjɑ thyew.”" 
John13:10 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́rum ki lwøgø dhïw bëne, o bong keny lwøg kì ree, dɑ́ tyelle keti gen. Wu dhïw wu bënn, dɑ́ ɑ́kyel kete kì kelli wun ɑ pɑ dhïw.”" 
John13:11 (Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ óngeewii ngɑ̈nyi yi en, o bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́kööbe kinni, “Pɑth ki wu bënn.”)" 
John13:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum tyelli gen ki lwøgø yi en, ɑkwɑnye lɑne, kɑ pëgg-ɑ piny, kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ wun ngɑ̈nyi yi wun?" 
John13:13 Yɑ nyi cwølli yi wun yɑn ɑ́ ‘Jɑlpwönyi wun, kí Wïi wun,’ o mø wun bɑ dyër, mɑ́ yɑ bëëd ɑ nøw ceth." 
John13:14 Keløg ɑ́ yɑn, yɑ Wïi wun, o yɑ bɑ Jɑlpwönyi wun, ɑ ɑ́lwøg tyelli wun, men-ɑ́ wun kiri wun, nyi lwøg dhɑnhø tyelli ngɑn megø." 
John13:15 Mɑ́ wu ɑ́rum ki nyudhø yi yɑn, o wu ógöög wun kinøw thyew." 
John13:16 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, bɑ̈ng pɑ lod wɑ̈n ki döng, o ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör pɑ lod ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́örii." 
John13:17 Møgɑni ɑ́yod yi wun ɑnɑn, o ri wun ódi gyëdh, keløg wu ógöögø kì ri gen." 
John13:18 “Yɑ pɑ kømmi wun bënn. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi yɑn ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, de wiy møg-ɑ ying yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen kinni, ‘Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wøn kì kej ɑ́kyel, ɑ́dwöög cwɑggɑ.’" 
John13:19 Møgɑni ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ ki köbbi wun ɑnɑn kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti cwööb gen, o wu óyïëy wun, keny-ɑ ócwöb gen kinni, yɑ bɑ en." 
John13:20 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, ngɑn-ɑ ókwɑny ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yi yɑn, kwɑny-ɑ yɑn thyew; o ngɑn-ɑ ókwɑny yɑn, kwɑny-ɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn.”" 
John13:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum møgɑni ki kwøbø yi Yëso ɑrɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, yɑ óngeew yi nget ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun.”" 
John13:22 Anenni jøbɑnge ri gen, wɑ̈thi gen muumø yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi en." 
John13:23 Nget ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen, eni ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑr yi en, ɑ́bëëd e cyɑ̈gi kì bute kì tɑw." 
John13:24 Agwelii yi Sɑymøn Pïtør kinni, “Pyëëj ki ngɑn-ɑ kømmi yi en.”" 
John13:25 Atie nyegi ri Yëso, kɑ gø pyëje kinni, “Wuö, ngɑnɑni bɑ men?”" 
John13:26 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ómëggɑ gïncɑm keny-ɑ órumɑ ki jwɑ̈ɑ̈gii yij thɑnhø, bɑ en.” Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gïncɑmɑni ki jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø yi en, ɑmëgge gøn Yeudɑ̀ wɑ̈d Sɑymøn Iskɑryøt." 
John13:27 Kɑ kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́mëggii gïncɑmɑni ceth, ɑkedhi Cethɑn pyëwe. Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi yïn, jwɑɑn ki gwøgø.”" 
John13:28 De bong dhɑnhø kì tɑw me ngɑ̈nyi gïn-ɑ pere ɑ́köbbe gøn møgɑni. 
John13:29 De mɑ́ sɑnduug ngyëny ɑ́ying-ɑ cingi Yeudɑ̀, kwï gen ɑ́rum kinni, Yëso ceg-ɑ gøn ki köbbø kinni, ngëëwe ki gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen kipe cyɑ̈nggi kwër, wɑlɑ̀ kinni, thödhi tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur ki gïïpiny." 
John13:30 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gïncɑm ki kwɑnyø yi Yeudɑ̀ ɑkedhe wɑ̈g. O piny ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ wɑ̈r. 
John13:31 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yeudɑ̀ ki kedhi wɑ̈g, ɑkööb Yëso kinni, “Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø óthödhi ki dhwɑ̈ng ɑnɑn, o Jwøk óyïddi ki dhwɑ̈ng kì ree." 
John13:32 Kɑ̀ yïddi Jwøk ki dhwɑ̈ng kì ri Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø, Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø óyïddi ki dhwɑ̈ng kì ri Jwøk kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh" 
John13:33 Nyigɑ, wɑ óbëëdø kɑ nyɑ keny me thiinh. Yɑ óyɑb yi wun, de yɑ köbb-ɑ wun ɑnɑn, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbɑ Yeud kinni, ‘Kun-ɑ ókedhɑ wu dhɑ̈li bëën yije.’" 
John13:34 Wu mëggɑ’ cigg mø nyɑ̈n kinni, ‘Mɑɑru ri wun, ni kɑ ɑ́mɑɑrɑ wun.’" 
John13:35 Keløg ri wun ómɑɑr yi wun, óyod yi teedø bëne kinni, wu bɑ jiɑ.”" 
John13:36 Apyëjii yi Sɑymøn Pïtør kinni, “Wuö yï kedh-ɑ keny?” Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Yï pɑ cuggi lug bɑngɑ kun-ɑ kedhɑ, de yï óbï bɑngɑ cyɑ̈ng megø.”" 
John13:37 Apyëjii yi Pïtør kinni, “Wuö, ɑ́ ngø ɑ ómɑ̈ɑ̈n yɑn bëën bɑngí ɑnɑn? Yɑ óbøy thøø kiperí.”" 
John13:38 Apëjji Yëso kinni, “Yï óbøy thøø kiperɑ? Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kidyër kinni, yɑ ókyer yi yïn ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g, e óthwønh nuti köögø.”" 
John14:1 “Pëthi wun ko lïngi. Yïëyu Jwøk kɑ yɑ yïëy wun thyew. 
John14:2 Gøl Wïyɑ dɑ ud mø ngenyø, o yɑ kedh-ɑ be tyenyi kɑ̈jji wun. Wu pɑ di köbbɑ møgɑni, keløg e pɑth ki kinøw." 
John14:3 O keny-ɑ ókedhɑ kɑ kej wun pyëlɑ, yɑ ódwöög, o wu kɑ̈l yi yɑn, o wu bëëd wun kì keny-ɑ bëëd yi yɑn." 
John14:4 Yuu kun-ɑ kedhɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi wun.” 
John14:5 Akööb Tömɑs kinni, “Wuö, kun-ɑ kedhi yi yïn kwïj yi wøn, o yuu-ɑ kedhi kunɑni óngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kidï?”" 
John14:6 Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑn ɑ bɑ yöö, geki dyër kí nënnì. Bong ngɑn cuggi bëën yï Wïy, den-ɑ́ kì riɑ." 
John14:7 Keløg riɑ di ngɑ̈nyi yi wun, ti Wïyɑ di ngɑ̈nyi yi wun thyew. Áyod yi wun ɑnɑn, o ɑ́rum ki lidhø yi wun.”" 
John14:8 Aköbbii yi Pïlïp kinni, “Wuö, nyudhí wøn Wïy, o yethi wøn kwööj gen.”" 
John14:9 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ bëëd ɑ kelli wun ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, yïn ɑ Pïlïp; yɑ nudd yɑ kwïj yi yïn? Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́lidh yɑn, Wïy ɑ́lidh yi en. Yïde ɑ kööb kinni, ‘Nyudhí wøn Wïy?’" 
John14:10 Yï nuti yïëyø kinni, yɑ ying-ɑ ri Wïy, o Wïy ying-ɑ riɑ?” Kɑ jøbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Kwøbb-ɑ nyi köbbɑ wun, pɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ cwɑggɑ, o gïg-ɑ gøggi yi yɑn, ge nyi gwøg-ɑ yi Wïy, ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì riɑ." 
John14:11 Yïëyu møgɑ kinni yɑ ying-ɑ ri Wïy, o Wïy ying-ɑ riɑ, wɑlɑ̀ yïëyu møgɑ kì bɑng gïg-ɑ gøggi yi yɑn." 
John14:12 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, ngɑn yïëy yɑn, gïg-ɑ gøggi yi yɑn ógøggi yi en thyew, o gïg mø lod møgɑni ógøggi yi en, mɑ́ yɑ kedh-ɑ yï Wïy." 
John14:13 Gïn-ɑ ókwɑjji yi wun ki nyingɑ, gïnɑni ógwøg yi yɑn, o Wïy yïdde ki dhwɑ̈ng kì ri Wɑ̈d." 
John14:14 Keløg e dɑ gïjø me kwɑjji yi wun ki nyingɑ, gïnɑni ógwøg yi yɑn." 
John14:15 “Keløg yɑ mɑɑr yi wun, ciggɑ ómïdhi yi wun." 
John14:16 O Wïy ókwɑjji yi yɑn, o wu óthödhi yi en ki ngɑn megø, men-ɑ ókøny wun, o óbëëdø kì kelli wun gïti ɑtheer." 
John14:17 Ngɑnɑni bɑ Wëy men-ɑ nyodh dyër kì ri Jwøk. Pɑ cuggi kwɑnyø yi kömi piny, mɑ́ e pɑ nenni yi kömi piny, o kwïj yi en. De ree ngɑ̈nyi yi wun, mɑ́ e bëëd ɑ kelli wun, o ying-ɑ pëthi wun." 
John14:18 “Wu pɑ wiy yi yɑn wu bɑ kïjj, yɑ óbï yï wun." 
John14:19 Kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh yɑ pɑ lidh yi kömi piny këti, de yɑ ólidh yi wun, mɑ́ kɑ̀ nëënɑ wu ónëënø thyew." 
John14:20 Keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, óyod yi wun kinni, yɑ ying-ɑ ri Wïyɑ, o wu ying-ɑ riɑ ni kɑ̀ yingɑ ri wun." 
John14:21 “Tyëng-ɑ óyïëy ciggɑ, kɑ gï mïdhi gen, bɑ gen ɑ mɑɑr yɑn. Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yɑn ómɑɑr yi Wïyɑ, ge ómɑɑr yi yɑn thyew, kɑ riɑ nyudhɑ gen.”" 
John14:22 Aköbbi Yëso yi Yeudɑ̀; pɑth ki Yeudɑ̀ jɑl Iskɑryøt, kinni, “Cug-ɑ́ɑ̀ dï Wuö, kinni rií nyudhí wøn, o rií pɑ nyudhi kömi piny?”" 
John14:23 Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Ngɑn mɑɑr yɑn, kwøbbɑ ómïdhe. Ngɑnɑni ómɑɑr yi Wïyɑ, o yɑ óbï yïe wøki Wïyɑ, kɑ wø obëëdø kì ree." 
John14:24 O ngɑn pɑ mɑɑr yɑn, kwøbbɑ pɑ mïdhe. O kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wun pɑth ki møgɑ, de ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Wïy, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn." 
John14:25 “Wu ɑ́köbbɑ møgɑni, yɑ nudd yɑ bëëd ɑ kelli wun." 
John14:26 De ngɑn-ɑ ókunyi, en ɑ Wëykwërø, óör yi Wïy ki nyingɑ, jɑmmì bënn ópwönye wun, o wu ópɑ̈ddi yi en ki møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun bënn." 
John14:27 “Wu wïyɑ’ mër; bɑ mërɑ ɑ mëggɑ wun, pɑ muuj yi yɑn kɑ muuny-ɑ nyi muuj yi kömi piny. Pëthi wun ko lïngi, o wu ko böggi." 
John14:28 Wu ɑ́lïng keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun kinni, ‘Yɑ ókedhø, de yɑ ódwöög yï wun.’ Keløg yɑ omɑɑrø yi wun, pëthi wun di mïni, kɑ̀ kedhɑ yï Wïy, mɑ́ e dwøng kibølɑ." 
John14:29 Wu ɑ́köbbɑ møgɑni ɑnɑn ge nuti cwöbø, kipe kinni keny-ɑ ócwöb gen, o ge óyïëy yi wun." 
John14:30 Yɑ pɑ kööbø ki wun ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, mɑ́ jɑngi kömi piny men obëënø. Yïe bong tegø kì kömɑ," 
John14:31 de gïn-ɑ dwɑddi kinni o yod yi kömi piny bɑ kinni, Wïy mɑɑr yi yɑn, o yɑ gøgg-ɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́cïge yɑn. “Bïu, kedh wɑ kì keny." 
John15:1 “Yɑ bene oløng-ɑ dyër, o Wïyɑ ɑ bɑ wïi bɑg." 
John15:2 Bɑ̈ddɑ møg-ɑ pɑ nyi kɑ̈ni ki nywøl bënn, nyi ngule’ wɑ̈g, o bɑ̈dd-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ni ki nywøl nyi tebe tebø, o ge kɑ̈ni gen ki nywøl mø ngenyø." 
John15:3 Wu ɑ́rum ki gwirø ɑnɑn, yi møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyɑ wun." 
John15:4 Bëëd wun kì riɑ, ni kɑ̀ bëëdɑ kì ri wun. Bɑɑd oløg dhɑ̈li kɑ̈nø ki nywøl kete, keløg e pɑ bëëdø kì ri oløg. Nɑ menɑni ceth, wu dhɑ̈li kɑ̈nø ki nywøl, keløg wu pɑ bëëdø kì riɑ." 
John15:5 “Yɑ bɑ oløg, o wu bɑ bɑ̈dd. Ngɑn bëëdø kì riɑ, kɑ yɑ obëëdø kì ree, ókɑ̈ni ki nywøl mø ngenyø, mɑ́ keløg wu pɑ ying riɑ bong gïn cuggi gwøgø yi wun." 
John15:6 Ngɑn pɑ bëëdø kì riɑ, ngɑnɑni óweddi ni bɑɑd oløg kɑ othwøwø. Bɑ̈dd-ɑ ni møgɑni nyi ceg kɑ gwenø, kɑ ge leeng mɑc, kɑ ge órɑ̈bbø." 
John15:7 Keløg wu óbëëdø kì riɑ, kɑ kwøbbɑ obëëdø kì pëthi wun, wu ókwɑ̈jjø ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun, kɑ gïnɑni yod yi wun." 
John15:8 Mɑ̈ɑ̈r Wïyɑ ólidh-ɑ keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ni wun ki nywøl mø ngenyø, o wu göög wun ki jøbɑngɑ ki yuu-ɑ ni menɑni." 
John15:9 Wu mɑɑr yi yɑn ni kɑ̀ mɑɑr yɑn yi Wïy, bëëd wun kì yij mɑ̈ɑ̈dø miɑ." 
John15:10 Keløg ciggɑ ómïdhi yi wun, wu óbëëdø kì yij mɑ̈ɑ̈dø miɑ, ni kɑ̀ mïdhɑ ciggi Wïyɑ, o yɑ obëëdø kì yij mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee." 
John15:11 “Møgɑni ɑ́köbbɑ wun kɑ per kinni o medi pyëwɑ bëëde kì pëthi wun, o medi pëthi wun bëëd e bong gïn tøøk kì ree." 
John15:12 Ciggɑ bɑ kinni, mɑɑru ri wun ni kɑ̀ mɑɑrɑ wun." 
John15:13 Ngɑn muuj wëye kipe mɑ̈dhhe, bong ngɑn lodii ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø." 
John15:14 O wu bɑ mɑ̈dhhɑ keløg møg-ɑ cïgɑ wun ógwøg yi wun. 
John15:15 Wu pɑ cwølli yi yɑn wun-ɑ́ bɑ̈nggɑ këti, mɑ́ bɑ̈ng gïn-ɑ gwøg yi wɑ̈n kwïje. De wu cwølli yi yɑn wun-ɑ́ mɑ̈dhh, mɑ́ gïg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi yɑn bënn kì yï Wïyɑ, ɑ́nyudhɑ wun." 
John15:16 Yɑ nuti myeg-ɑ yi wun, dɑ́ yɑn ɑ ɑ́myeg wun. Kɑ wu cïbɑ kɑ̈jji wun, o wu kedhu be yïddø ki gïg nywøl yi gwøøg wun, o gïg-ɑ nywøl yi gwøøg wun óbëëd gen ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, kipe kinni o gïn-ɑ ókwɑjji yi wun kì yï Wïyɑ ki nyingɑ, ómëggi wun yi en." 
John15:17 Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, bene møg-ɑ cïgɑ wun ek: mɑɑru ri wun." 
John15:18 “Keløg wu mɑɑn yi kömi piny, bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, yɑn ɑ ɑ́kwøng yi en ki mɑɑnø." 
John15:19 Keløg wu di bëëd wun-ɑ́ mø kömi piny, wu di mɑɑr yi kömi piny, mɑ́ wu bɑ møge. De wu ɑ́myeg yi yɑn ɑ kömi piny, o wu pɑth ki møge, bene ɑ bɑnge mɑɑn wun yi kömi piny." 
John15:20 Pɑru møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun kinni, ‘Bɑ̈ngg, wïi gen pɑ lod yi gen ki döng.’ Keløg wɑngɑ óguudø yi ji, nyingi wun óguud yi gen thyew, keløg pwönyɑ oyïëyø yi gen, pwönyi wun óyïëy yi gen thyew." 
John15:21 De møgɑni bënn ógöggi wun yi gen, kipe kɑ̀ bëëd wun, wun-ɑ́ møgɑ, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn kwïj yi gen." 
John15:22 Di bëëd e bong bɑ̈jjø mɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen, keløg yɑ pɑ di bï kɑ yɑ okööbø ki gen, de ɑnɑn, bong keny kyëëj gen orøøg gen." 
John15:23 Ngɑn mɑɑn yɑn, Wïyɑ mɑɑn yi en thyew." 
John15:24 Keløg yɑ pɑ di göög kì kelli gen ki gïg-ɑ nuti pɑ̈nyø gwøgø yi ngɑn megø cøn, di bëëd yï gen bong orøg. De ɑnɑn, ge ɑ́rum ki lïdhø, kɑ yɑ mɑɑn yi gen wøki Wïyɑ." 
John15:25 Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg kɑ per kinni o kwøbb-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi Cigg pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen, kinni, ‘Yɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi kɑ mɑɑnø yi gen.’" 
John15:26 “Ngɑn-ɑ ókunyi óbï, eni ngɑn-ɑ bɑ Wëy, en ɑ ónyodh dyër kì ri Jwøk, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Wïy. Óörɑ wun e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Wïy, o ókööbø kì riɑ." 
John15:27 O wun thyew, wu ókööbø kì riɑ, mɑ́ wu ɑ́bëëd ɑ butɑ këër cɑ̈gø cøn." 
John16:1 “Møgɑni ɑ́köbbɑ wun kɑ per kinni, o yïëyi wun ócöge e pɑ wiy yi wun." 
John16:2 Wu óryeem wɑ̈g yi teedø kì sinɑgøgg. Kidyër bøli kenyɑni obëënø; eni keny-ɑ órum ngɑn-ɑ ónɑ̈g wun kinni, gögg-ɑ Jwøk ki gïndøj." 
John16:3 O møgɑni ógwøg yi gen, mɑ́ wø kwïj yi gen, wøki Wïyɑ." 
John16:4 De møgɑni ɑ́köbbɑ wun kɑ per kinni, keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kɑ̈jji gen, o ge ópɑr yi wun kinni, ge ɑ́rum ki köbbi wun yi yɑn. “Møgɑni nuti köbbi wun yi yɑn cøn, mɑ́ yɑ ying-ɑ buti wun." 
John16:5 De ɑnɑn yɑ kedh-ɑ yï ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn, o bong ngɑn pyëj yɑn kì kelli wun kinni, ‘Yï kedh-ɑ keny?" 
John16:6 O ɑnɑn wu ɑ́köbbɑ, kɑ yethi wun ceg-ɑ bɑɑrø." 
John16:7 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun møg-ɑ bɑ dyër kinni, døøj kiper wun kɑ̀ kedhɑ, mɑ́ keløg yɑ pɑ kedh, ngɑn-ɑ ókøny wun pɑ bï yï wun. De keløg yɑ ókedh, óörɑ yï wun." 
John16:8 O keny-ɑ óbëëne, kömi piny óköbbi yi en kinni møg-ɑ rømmi yi en kì ri orøg, kí bëëndøj, kí cɑ́y ge pɑth ki dyër." 
John16:9 Gï ónyudhe kinni ge ɑ́bɑ̈jji kì ri kwøbbi orøg, mɑ́ yɑ nuti yïëëy gen," 
John16:10 o gï ónyudhe ki kwøbbi bëëndøj, mɑ́ yɑ kedh-ɑ yï Wïy, o yɑ pɑ lidh yi wun këti," 
John16:11 o gï ónyudhe kì ri kwøbbi cɑ́y, mɑ́ jɑngi kömi piny men, ɑ́rum ki cɑyø." 
John16:12 “Yïɑ dɑ kwøb mø gïïr møg köbbɑ wun, o ge pɑ cuggi gɑmø yi wɑ̈thi wun ɑnɑn." 
John16:13 De keny-ɑ óbëën Wëy, ngɑn-ɑ ónyudhi wun dyër kì ri Jwøk, wu ópeeje yï dyër bëne, mɑ́ e koo kømm-ɑ mø cwɑgge, de ókømm-ɑ møg-ɑ nyi lïngi yi en. O wu ótönge møg-ɑ óbï." 
John16:14 Yɑ óyïddi ki dhwɑ̈ng kì bɑnge, mɑ́ kwøbbɑ ókwɑnye kɑ gï köbbe wun." 
John16:15 Jɑmm-ɑ bɑ mø Wïy bënn, bɑ møgɑ, bene ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun kinni, kwøbbɑ ókwɑny yi en, kɑ gï köbbe wun." 
John16:16 “Kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh yɑ pɑ lidh yi wun, de kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thinh këti, yɑ ólidh yi wun.”" 
John16:17 Kɑ jøbɑnge ri gen köbbi gen kinni, “Á ngø ɑ köbbe wɑ kinni, ‘Kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh yɑ pɑ lidh yi wun, de kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh yɑ ólidh yi wun këti? Geki kinni, ‘Mɑ́ yɑ kedh-ɑ yï Wïy?’ ”" 
John16:18 Akööb gen kinni, “Á ngø ɑ wɑngi yi en kɑ̀ kööbe kinni, ‘Kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh?’ Gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi en kwïj yi wɑ.”" 
John16:19 De Yëso ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni ge dwɑdd-ɑ pyëjii, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Wu pyëny-ɑ ri wun kipe møg-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn kinni, ‘Kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh yɑ pɑ lidh yi wun, de kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh yɑ ólidh yi wun këti?’" 
John16:20 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, wu óywöngi, kɑ wu okïïmø, o tyëng kömi piny pëthi gen ómïni. Wu ókïïmø, de kïïmi wun ree óløge medi pëëth." 
John16:21 Ngɑndhɑjø kenyi bëën bøli kej pɑ̈dhe piny nyi ying-ɑ yij orɑng, mɑ́ bøli keje ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, de kenyi rume ki pɑ̈dhi piny, rɑ̈ɑ̈m pɑ̈dhi piny pɑ nyi pɑr yi en, yi medi pyëwe kipe dhɑnhø men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g." 
John16:22 Wun thyew, wu ceg-ɑ kïïmø ɑnɑn, de yɑ ódwöög kɑ wu lidh yi yɑn, kɑ pëthi wun ómïnø, o bong ngɑn-ɑ ókwɑny medi pëthi wun kì yï wun." 
John16:23 “Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, bong pyëj møg-ɑ ópëjju yɑn. Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kidyër kinni, keløg e dɑ gïn kwɑjji yi wun kì yï Wïy, ómëggi wun kì ri nyingɑ." 
John16:24 Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́kwɑjji yi wun kì ri nyingɑ cøn gïti ɑnɑn, kwɑ̈jji wun, wu óyïddi, o døøji medi pëëth yod yi wun." 
John16:25 “Møgɑni ɑ́köbbɑ wun kì yethi gɑ́j. De bøli keny-ɑ ócögɑ yɑ pɑ kööbø ki wun kì yethi gɑ́j ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, o per Wïy ótöngɑ wun e bong gɑ́j." 
John16:26 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni wu ókwɑ̈jji kì yï Wïy ki nyingɑ. De wu pɑ köbbi yi yɑn kinni, Wïy ókwɑjji yi yɑn kiper wun," 
John16:27 mɑ́ wu mɑɑr yi en, kipe kɑ̀ mɑɑr yɑn yi wun, kí kɑ ɑ́yïëy wun kinni, yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïe." 
John16:28 Awøø, yɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Wïy, kɑ yɑ bï-ɑ kömi piny, o yɑ kedh-ɑ yï Wïy.”" 
John16:29 Akööb jøbɑnge kinni, “Anɑn yï ceg-ɑ töng ki kwøb e bong gɑ́j kì ri gen." 
John16:30 Áyod yi wøn ɑnɑn kinni, jɑmmì bënn ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, o bong ngɑn dwɑddi yïn pyënyø këti. Kì bɑng menɑni, wø ɑ́yïëy kinni, yï kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk.”" 
John16:31 Aløøg mø gen yi Yëso kinni, “Wu ɑ́yïëy ɑnɑn cyee?" 
John16:32 Bøli kenyɑni obëënø, ɑ́wɑ̈nhi ɑnɑn, eni bøli keny-ɑ ótɑy wun, ngɑn kedh kɑ yuue, o yɑ ówiy yi wun yɑ ketɑ, de pɑth ki yɑ ketɑ, mɑ́ Wïy nud kì butɑ." 
John16:33 Møgɑni ɑ́köbbɑ wun kɑ per kinni, o wu óyïddi wun ki mër kì riɑ. Wu órɑngi kì kömi piny, de mɑgu pëthi wun, mɑ́ kömi piny ɑ́tyɑm yi yɑn.”" 
John17:1 Kɑ ɑ́rum møgɑni ki kwøbø yi Yëso, ɑlïïdhe mɑl, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Wïyø, bøli kenyɑni ɑ́wɑ̈nhi. Thödhí Wɑ̈dí ki dhwɑ̈ng kipe kinni o yï óthödhi ki dhwɑ̈ng yi en." 
John17:2 Mɑ́ e ɑ́thödhi yi yïn ki tegø kì kömi dhɑnhø bëne, kipe kinni o ji-ɑ ɑ́mëggií bënn óthödhe ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer." 
John17:3 Nënn-ɑ ɑtheer bɑ kinni, o yï yod yi gen; kinni yï ketí ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ dyër, o Yëso Mesiy ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yi yïn, yod yi gen." 
John17:4 Yï ɑ́rum ki thödhø yi yɑn ki dhwɑ̈ng kì kömi piny kì ri kɑ ɑ́tyëgɑ gwøng-ɑ cïb cingɑ yi yïn. 
John17:5 Wïyø! Thödhí yɑn ki mɑ̈r kì bølí ɑnɑn, en ɑ mɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́ying yïɑ, kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nuti cwɑ̈ɑ̈j piny." 
John17:6 “Nyingí ɑ́nyudhɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn kì kömi piny. Ge bɑ møgí, de ge ɑ́mëggí yɑn, kɑ kwøbbí mïdhi yi gen." 
John17:7 O ngɑ̈nyi yi gen ɑnɑn kinni, jɑmmì bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïí." 
John17:8 Mɑ́ kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn, ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ gen kɑ gï yïëy gen, o ngɑ̈nyi yi gen kidyër kinni, yɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïí, o ge yïëyø kinni, yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yi yïn." 
John17:9 “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn kipe gen. Yɑ pɑ kwɑ̈jji kipe kömi piny, dɑ́ kipe tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn, mɑ́ ge bɑ møgí." 
John17:10 Møgɑ bënn bɑ møgí, o møgí bɑ møgɑ, o yɑ yïddɑ ki dhwɑ̈ng kì ri gen." 
John17:11 Yɑ koo ying kömi piny këti, de ge bëëd ɑ kömi piny; yɑ bï-ɑ yïí, yïn ɑ Wïy ɑ bɑ kwërø; mïdhí tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn, o ge bëëd gen, gɑ ɑ́kyel, ni kɑ̀ bëëd wɑ, wɑ bɑ ɑ́kyel." 
John17:12 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn ɑ́mïdhɑ ki tegi nyingí, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ kì kelli gen. Ge ɑ́kor yi yɑn, o bong ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì kelli gen, dɑ́ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ men lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny. Kipe kinni o møg-ɑ yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen." 
John17:13 Yɑ bï-ɑ yïí ɑnɑn, o yɑ kööb ɑ kömi piny, kipe kinni o medi pyëwɑ nude ceth kì pëthi gen." 
John17:14 Kwøbbí ɑ́mëggɑ gen. Kɑ ge mɑɑn yi kömi piny, mɑ́ ge pɑth ki tyëng kömi piny, ni kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ pɑth ki ngeti kömi piny." 
John17:15 Yï pɑ kwɑjjɑ kinni o ge kɑ̈l yi yïn kì kömi piny, dɑ́ kipe kinni o ge kor yi yïn kipe Ngɑnrɑj." 
John17:16 Ge pɑth ki tyëng kömi piny, ni kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ pɑth ki ngeti kömi piny." 
John17:17 Kwër gen kì ri dyër, mɑ́ kwøbbí bɑ dyër." 
John17:18 Ge ɑ́örɑ kömi piny ni kɑ ɑ́ör yɑn kömi piny yi yïn. 
John17:19 Riɑ ɑ́muujɑ kiper gen, kipe kinni o ri gen ómuuj yi gen kì ri dyër." 
John17:20 “Yɑ pɑ kwɑ̈jji kɑ per gen keti gen, dɑ́ kipe tyëng-ɑ óyïëy yɑn thyew kì bɑng kwøbbi gen." 
John17:21 Wiy ge bëëd gɑ ɑ́kyel bënn, o ge bëëd gen gɑ ɑ́kyel kì riee yïn ɑ Wïy; ni yïn kɑ̀ ying riɑ, o yɑ ying-ɑ rií, kipe kinni o kömi piny yïëye kinni, yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yi yïn." 
John17:22 Ge ɑ́mëggɑ dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn, kipe kinni o ge bëëd gɑ ɑ́kyel ni kɑ̀ bëëd wɑ, wɑ bɑ ɑ́kyel." 
John17:23 Yɑ ying-ɑ ri gen, o yï ying-ɑ riɑ, kipe kinni o ri gen reb yi gen gɑ ɑ́kyel, o yod yi kömi piny kinni, yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yi yïn, o tyëngɑni mɑɑr yi yïn, ni kɑ̀ mɑɑr yɑn yi yïn." 
John17:24 “Wuö, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn bëëd gen kì butɑ kì keny-ɑ di yɑn, o dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn lidh yi gen; mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́mɑɑr yi yïn e lɑ̈bø nuti cwɑ̈jø." 
John17:25 Yïn ɑ Wïy ɑ døj, yï kwïj yi kömi piny, de yï ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, o ngɑ̈nyi yi ji møg kinni, yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yi yïn." 
John17:26 Nyingí ɑ́nyudhɑ gen, o ge ócigɑ nyudhø, kipe kinni o mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr yɑn yi yïn óbëëde kì pëthi gen, o yɑ óbëëdø kì ri gen.”" 
John18:1 Kɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki kwøbi møgɑni, ɑkedhe wɑ̈g geki jøbɑnge, ge kedh-ɑ løøg dhøg Kidrön. Kenyɑni dɑ bɑg. Kɑ kedh-ɑ yij bɑngɑni geki jøbɑnge." 
John18:2 O kenyɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi Yeudɑ̀, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ngeewii, mɑ́ Yëso nyii cugø kì kenyɑni geki jøbɑnge tyel mø gïïr." 
John18:3 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ bï-ɑ kenyɑni e ókɑ̈ddø ki ɑlɑthkerri mïri Römɑ̀ kí bölidhhi Kengø, ge ör-ɑ yi jɑggi ókwër geki Jøpɑresì, ge ɑ́bï kenyɑni, ge ókɑ̈ddø ki lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ kí ɑ́menyy geki jɑmmi liny." 
John18:4 De Yëso ngɑ̈ny wøw ki gïg-ɑ óbï köme bënn, kɑ kedh-ɑ yï gïn, kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Wu yɑb-ɑ men?”" 
John18:5 Alöggi gen kinni, “Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth.” Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ bɑ en.” Yeudɑ̀ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ngeewii, ɑ́bëëd e ócungø kì kelli gen." 
John18:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbe gïn kinni, “Yɑ bɑ en,” ɑdøøg gen cyɑ̈n, kɑ ge ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
John18:7 Acigi gen pyëjø yi Yëso kinni, “Wu yɑb-ɑ men?” Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth.”" 
John18:8 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Wu ɑ́rum ki köbbø yi yɑn kinni, ‘Yɑ bɑ en.’ Keløg ɑ́ yɑn ɑ yɑb yi wun, wiyu ji møg kedh gen.”" 
John18:9 (Menɑni bɑ kipe kinni o kwøbbe pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen, kɑ ɑ́kööbe kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn, bong nget ɑ́kyel me lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì kelli gen.”)" 
John18:10 Kɑ Sɑymøn Pïtør pil-ɑ ɑ́ying yïe wöödhe wɑ̈g kì yij bøj, ɑgøje bɑ̈ng Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, kɑ yïth kyëje juude wɑ̈g. Bɑ̈ngɑni cwøl ɑ́ Mɑlkøs." 
John18:11 Aköbbi Pïtør yi Yëso kinni, “Dwøøg pilí yij bøje. Óthɑ̈ngi orɑng men-ɑ mëggi yɑn yi Wïyɑ pɑ mɑdh yi yɑn?”" 
John18:12 Kɑ Yëso mɑg, kɑ twöj yi ɑlɑthkerr kí dhɑbïdh, kí bölidhhi Kengø." 
John18:13 Apeej ge gøn yï Anɑ̀ møti, mɑ́ e bɑ øri Kɑyɑpɑ̀ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kì wɑɑngɑni." 
John18:14 Bɑ Kɑyɑpɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́köbbi Yeud kinni, lɑ̈w thøwi nget ɑ́kyel kibøli thøwi jur bëne." 
John18:15 Kɑ Sɑymøn Pïtør geki jɑlbɑng Yëso ɑ́kyel løg-ɑ bɑng Yëso. O jɑlbɑng Yëso menɑni, ngɑ̈nyi yi Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng. Kɑ kedh-ɑ gøl Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kyeel ki Yëso." 
John18:16 Kɑ Pïtør ócungø kì dhø kɑl. Kɑ jɑlbɑng Yëso men-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng dwöög-ɑ wɑ̈g, kɑ nyɑn-ɑ kor dhø kɑl köbbe, kɑ Pïtør kɑ̈ɑ̈le kɑl." 
John18:17 Apyëëj Pïtør yi nyɑnɑni kinni, “Yï pɑth ki ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøbɑng jɑlɑni thyew?” Alögge kinni, “Yɑ pɑth.”" 
John18:18 Kɑ bɑ̈nggi gølɑni geki bölidhh orubø ki mɑɑc cug, mɑ́ piny dɑ kööjø, kɑ ge ócungø ge oröjø. Kɑ Pïtør thyew ócungø kì kelli gen, e oröjø." 
John18:19 Codhe, ɑpyënyi Yëso yi Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kipe jøbɑnge geki pwönye." 
John18:20 Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́kööb ɑ bøli teedø bëne. Kenyi pwönyɑ, yɑ nyi pwöny-ɑ́ɑ̀ yethi sinɑgøgg geki Kengø, gen ɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi cugi yi Yeud bënn, o bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́kømmɑ kì gød." 
John18:21 Yïde ɑ pyënyí yɑn? Pyëj tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbɑ. Pyëj gen ki møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ gen, mɑ́ møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi gen.”" 
John18:22 Kɑ ɑ́kwøøb møgɑni yi Yëso ɑgøjii ki ɑtɑyø yi jɑngi bölidhh men-ɑ cungi kì bute, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yï løøg-ɑ kwøbbi Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kinøw?”" 
John18:23 Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Keløg gïn-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn rɑɑj nyudhí yɑn ki gïn-ɑ rɑj, de keløg gïn-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn døøj, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ gøøj yɑn?”" 
John18:24 Codhe, ɑörii Kɑyɑpɑ̀ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng yi Anɑ̀ e cingge bɑ ɑtwöj." 
John18:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Sɑymøn Pïtør e ócungø e oröjø ki mɑc. Apyëjii kinni, “Yï pɑth ki ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøbɑnge thyew?” Akyëde kinni, “Yɑ pɑth.”" 
John18:26 Jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli bɑ̈nggi Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng bɑ wɑɑd ki bɑ̈ng-ɑ́ yïthe ɑ́jod yi Pïtør. Apëjji jɑlɑni kinni, “Yï nuti liidh yɑn kì yij bɑg, wuki en?”" 
John18:27 Akyëëd Pïtør këti, kɑ kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, ɑköög óthwønh." 
John18:28 Akɑ̈ɑ̈l Yëso yi gen kì yï Kɑyɑpɑ̀, kɑ kïdhi burø kì mwøl ceth cɑ̈ng nuti tuulø. De ge nuti kedhi kej burø kipe ge óywëdh, kɑ ge ocögø ge pɑ cyɑ̈mø ki gïi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh." 
John18:29 Codhe, ɑkedhi Pilɑtø wɑ̈g yï gen, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Wu gønyu ngø ki jɑlɑni?”" 
John18:30 Aløøg møge yi gen kinni, “Keløg e pɑth ki ngetigöj, pɑ di muuj yïn yi wøn.”" 
John18:31 Aköbbi gen yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Kɑ̈lu en, kɑ gønye lidh wun wu ködd-ɑ kömi ciggi wun.” Alöggi gen kinni, “Wø bɑ ɑkerø ki kuumi dhɑnhø ki thøø.”" 
John18:32 (Møgɑni ɑ́cwöb kɑ per kinni, o møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Yëso keny-ɑ ɑ́nyodhe thøw-ɑ óthøwe pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen.)" 
John18:33 Adøøg Pilɑtø kej burø, kɑ Yëso cwøle, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Bene yïn Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud?”" 
John18:34 Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Møgɑni bɑ mø cwɑggí, wɑlɑ̀ yï ɑ́köbb-ɑ yi ji møøgø kiperɑ?”" 
John18:35 Alöggi Pilɑtø kinni, “Yɑ bɑ Yeudì? Yï ɑ́mëggi yɑn ɑ yi jur wun, kí jɑggi ókwër. Á ngø ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn?”" 
John18:36 Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Pödhɑ pɑth ki mi kömi piny men. Keløg pödhɑ di bëëd ɑ́ mi kömi piny men, ti tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì bɑngɑ di nyïɑ̈ggi kiperɑ, o yɑ di cögɑ yɑ pɑ mɑg yi Yeud. Pɑth, pödhɑ pɑth ki mi keny.”" 
John18:37 Apyëjii yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Yï bɑ rɑ̈dh, pɑth en?” Alöggi Yëso kinni, “Ákwøb yi yïn ceth, yɑ bɑ rɑ̈dh. Bɑ per møgɑni ɑ ɑ́nywøøl yɑn, o yɑ ɑ́bï-ɑ kömi piny be thyeri møg-ɑ bɑ dyër. Ngɑn-ɑ bɑ ngeti dyër cwɑggɑ ólïnge.”" 
John18:38 Apëjji Pilɑtø kinni, “Dyër bɑ ngø?” Kɑ ɑ́rume kwøbi møgɑni, ɑdøøge wɑ̈g yï Yeud, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́yod yi yɑn kì yï jɑlɑni." 
John18:39 De yï wun dɑ lwöbø kinni, nyi gönyɑ wun nget ɑ́kyel, kì bøli kej Kwëër Ákɑɑdh. Wu dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, o wu gönyɑ Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud?”" 
John18:40 Aryeer gen kinni, “Pɑth ki en, dɑ́ Bɑrɑbɑ̀.” O Bɑrɑbɑ̀ bɑ ɑ́muddi ji." 
John19:1 Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny Yëso yi Pilɑtø, kɑ gø pwöde." 
John19:2 Akɑ̈ɑ̈d dej ki yɑ̈ɑ̈r koodh, kɑ gø bødh gen wïje, kɑ rug ki pɑrø mɑ ɑ́cwïcwïl." 
John19:3 Kɑ ge nyi bï-ɑ yïe, ge okööbø kinni, “Mɑ̈dh rií, yïn ɑ Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud.” Kɑ nyi gøj yi gen ki ɑtɑyø." 
John19:4 Akedhi Pilɑtø wɑ̈g, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Jɑlɑni ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g yï wun èn, kipe kinni o wu ngɑ̈nyu wøw kinni, bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́yodɑ kì yïe.”" 
John19:5 Abëën Yëso wɑ̈g, e orugø ki yɑ̈ɑ̈r koodh, kí pɑrø mɑ ɑ́cwïcwïl. Aköbbi gen yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Jɑlɑni èn!”" 
John19:6 Kɑ ɑ́lidhii yi jɑggi ókwër geki bölidhh, ɑryeer gen kinni, “Gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw! Gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw!” Aköbbi gen yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Kwɑnyu en, kɑ gur wun wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, mɑ́ e bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́yodɑ kì yïe.”" 
John19:7 Aløøg møge yi Yeud kinni, “Yï wøn dɑ cigg, o ceg-ɑ thøw bɑng ciggɑni, mɑ́ e cwølli ree, ɑ́ Wɑ̈d Jwøk.”" 
John19:8 Kɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Pilɑtø, kɑ ti-ɑ bwøgø ki mendwøng." 
John19:9 Kɑ døøg-ɑ kej burø, kɑ Yëso pyëje kinni, “Yï kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny?” Kɑ møge ocögø ge pɑ løøg yi Yëso." 
John19:10 Codhe, ɑpyëjii yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Yï pɑ dwɑddi kwøb ki yɑn? Kwïj yi yïn kinni, yïɑ dɑ tegø men gønyɑ yïn, o yïɑ dɑ tegø men gurɑ yïn wïj yɑdh ɑrïw?”" 
John19:11 Aløøg møge yi Yëso kinni, “Ti yïí di bong tegø kì kömɑ, keløg e pɑ di mëggi yïn kì mɑl. Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́muuj yɑn yïn, yïe dɑ orøg me lod orøgí.”" 
John19:12 Kɑ Pilɑtø oyɑ̈bø ki yöö men gønye gøn. Akedh Yeud ge ceg-ɑ pëddø ryeerø kinni, “Keløg jɑlɑni ógøny yi yïn, wu pɑth ki mɑ̈dhh ki Kɑysɑr. Ngɑn-ɑ kööbø cem ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, tyëdd-ɑ Kɑysɑr.”" 
John19:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbɑni yi Pilɑtø, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le Yëso wɑ̈g, kɑ pëgg-ɑ wïj kwøøm jyɑ̈gø kì burø kì keny me cwøl ɑ́ “Wïj Kït.” O cwøl ɑ́ Gɑbɑthɑ̀ ki dhøg Ibru." 
John19:14 Cyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng tyëny ki jɑmmi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, o piny bɑ sɑɑ̀ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì dicɑ̈ng. Aköbbe Yeud kinni, “Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun èn!”" 
John19:15 Aryeer gen kinni, “Gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw! Gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw!” Apyëëj gen yi Pilɑtø kinni, “Gurɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun wïj yɑdh ɑrïw?” Alöggi jɑggi ókwër kinni, “Bong rɑ̈dh kì yi wøn den-ɑ́ Kɑysɑr kete.”" 
John19:16 Codhe, ɑmëggi Yëso gen, o gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw." 
John19:17 Akwɑɑny Yëso yi gen, kɑ gø kɑ̈l gen. Kɑ kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g, e byell-ɑ yɑdh ɑrïwe, kɑ kedh-ɑ keny-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ kej Cu Wïj. (Cwøl ɑ́ Gölgöthɑ̀ ki dhøg Ibru.)" 
John19:18 Kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́gurii wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, kyeel ki jøg ɑ́ryew møøgø, ɑ́kyel kì tuung kí ɑ́kyel kì tuung, e Yëso ying-ɑ kɑɑm gen." 
John19:19 Kɑ Pilɑtø ngɑ̈bb-ɑ wïj yɑdh ɑrïw ki pɑ̈m men-ɑ ógwedø kinni, “Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth, Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud.”" 
John19:20 Kɑ møgɑni rɑng yi Yeud mø ngenyø, mɑ́ keny-ɑ ɑ́gur Yëso wïj yɑdh ɑrïw cyɑ̈gi ki kɑɑl. O kwøbbɑni bɑ ɑgwed ki dhøg Ibru, kí dhø Lɑtïn, kí dhø Yönɑn." 
John19:21 Aköbbi Pilɑtø yi jɑggi ókwërri Yeud kinni, “Ko gwed kinni, ‘Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud, de gwed kinni, ‘Jɑɑl ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Yɑ bɑ Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeud.’ ”" 
John19:22 Alöggi Pilɑtø kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed yi yɑn ɑ́rum ki gwedø.”" 
John19:23 Kɑ ɑ́rum dej ki guri Yëso wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, ɑkwɑny gen ógudhi Yëso, kɑ gï pɑ̈ngi gen gɑ kɑ̈jj ɑ́ngwen, ɑ́kyel kipe nget ɑ́kyel. Kɑ ɑ́ywödhe, men-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø e bɑ̈r gïti tyele, kwɑny yi gen thyew." 
John19:24 Aköbbi gen ri gen kinni, “Ko kɑggi wɑ, de lëëng wɑ ki wél ki ngɑn-ɑ ókwɑnyii.” Kipe kinni o møg-ɑ ying yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen kinni, “Ógudhɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ngi yi gen kì kelli gen, ge leng-ɑ wél kipe ɑ́ywödhɑ.” Møgɑni ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi dej." 
John19:25 Meyi Yëso kí nyimï meye Meerì cï Kelyöbɑ̀, kí Meerì Mɑgdɑliyɑ̀, ge ɑ́cung ɑ buti yɑdh ɑrïw Yëso." 
John19:26 Yëso keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe meye, kí jɑlbɑnge men-ɑ mɑɑr yi en kì bute, ɑköbbe meye kinni, “Dhɑnh, wɑ̈dí ɑnɑn.”" 
John19:27 Kɑ jɑlbɑnge köbbe kinni, “Meyí ɑnɑn.” Kì bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́kwɑɑny ngɑnɑni yi jɑlbɑng Yëso, kɑ gø kïdhe gøle." 
John19:28 Kɑ lidh yi Yëso kinni, jɑmmì bënn ɑ́cïb këër gen. De kipe kinni o møg-ɑ ying yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen, ɑkööbe kinni, “Riɑ dɑ röödhø.”" 
John19:29 Kenyɑni ɑ́dɑ pug me yije pɑ̈ng yi møgi oløg me wɑj. Kɑ ispwøny jwɑ̈ɑ̈g yij møngɑni, kɑ gɑ̈ɑ̈n wïj obej, kɑ kïdhi dhøge." 
John19:30 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yëso ki cwïjjø kì ri møngɑni, ɑkööbe kinni, “Árum.” Akuule wïje piny, kɑ othøø." 
John19:31 Cyɑ̈ngɑni bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng tyëny kipe jɑmmi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, o dëlli ji pɑ nyi dwɑddi, o ge bëëd gen kì wɑ̈thi yenh ɑrïw kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø, mɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø menɑni bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër me dwøng. Akwɑjji Pilɑtø yi Yeud kinni wiy tyelli gen tørri, o dëlli gen kɑ̈ɑ̈l piny." 
John19:32 Codhe, ɑbëën dej yï ngɑn-ɑ mɑl kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́gur wɑ̈thi yenh ɑrïw kyeel ki Yëso, kɑ tyelle tørri, ɑloony tyelli jɑl-ɑ kyeelø ki tørrø." 
John19:33 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën gen yï Yëso, ɑyuud ge gøn e rum thøø, kɑ ocögø tyelle pɑ tørri yi gen." 
John19:34 De ɑ́cwøb ki tøng kì wɑɑng ngëde yi ɑlɑthker ɑ́kyel. Abëën remø wɑ̈g kí pï. 
John19:35 Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi, o wu óyïëy wun. O møgɑni bɑ dyër, o ngɑ̈nyi yi en kinni, kømm-ɑ dyër." 
John19:36 Møgɑni ɑ́cwöb kɑ per kinni, o møg-ɑ yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen kinni, “Bong cögø ɑ́kyel kì ree men-ɑ ótor.”" 
John19:37 O ókwøbø ki keny megø kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Ge ónenni ri ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwøb yi gen.”" 
John19:38 Kɑ Yosep jɑl Arimɑthiyɑ̀, o bɑ jɑlbɑng Yëso kì gød, mɑ́ e óböggø yi Yeud, kedh-ɑ be kwɑjji Pilɑtø kinni mëggi dëël Yëso. Ayïëy Pilɑtø, kɑ Yosep obëënø, kɑ dëël Yëso kɑ̈l yi en." 
John19:39 Kɑ Nikødemøs, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bï yï Yëso kì wɑ̈r cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, obëënø thyew, e ókɑ̈ddø ki ryɑ̈ mor, me óyölø ki lubɑn, ge bɑ kïllì pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ngwen." 
John19:40 Kɑ dëël Yëso kwɑny yi gen, kɑ kod gen ki ógødh kor-ɑ yöm, ni kɑ̀ bëëde kì yij kwööng Yeud." 
John19:41 Buti keny-ɑ ɑ́gurii wïj yɑdh ɑrïw ɑ́dɑ bɑg. Bɑngɑni yije ɑ́dɑ rörø me nyɑ̈n kì yij kït, me yije nuti pɑ̈nyø kïdhø ki dhɑnhø." 
John19:42 Kɑ Yëso kïdhi gen yij burɑni, mɑ́ e bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng tyëny ki jɑmmi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh." 
John20:1 Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk kì mwøl piny nudd e looj, ɑ ɑ́møøl Meerì Mɑgdɑliyɑ̀ kej bur. Kɑ tungi kït lidhe e ónyiig wɑ̈ye kì dhø bur." 
John20:2 Codhe, ɑrenge yï Sɑymøn Pïtør geki jɑlbɑng Yëso men-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr yi Yëso, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wë ókɑ̈ɑ̈lø kì yij bur, o kun-ɑ ókïdhii kwïj yi wøn.”" 
John20:3 Adhwödh Pïtør geki jɑlbɑng Yëso men-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ kun-ɑ di bur." 
John20:4 Arengi gen kyeel, kɑ Pïtør yöm yi jɑl-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ ókwöngø wɑ̈dhi dhø bur." 
John20:5 Kɑ ómëddø, ɑlidhe ógødh kor-ɑ yöm kì piny, de nuti kedhi yij bur." 
John20:6 Awɑ̈nhi Sɑymøn Pïtør kì bɑnge, kɑ pödh-ɑ yij bur. Kɑ ógønhɑni lidhe kì piny," 
John20:7 o nyɑ ógønh-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e ótwööj wïj Yëso óbɑnø, o ócïb wɑ̈ye." 
John20:8 Codhe, ɑlunyi jɑlbɑng Yëso men-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi wɑ̈dhø ki kedhi yij bur, ɑlïdhe kɑ oyïëyø." 
John20:9 (Mɑ́ møg-ɑ kööbø kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni ódhwödh kì yij thøø nuti gɑmø yi wɑ̈thi gen.) 
John20:10 Kɑ jøbɑnge døøg-ɑ kɑ̈lli gen. 
John20:11 Meerì ɑ́cungi e óywöngø kì dhø bur, ɑmëdde yij bur." 
John20:12 Kɑ wëywödd ɑ́ryew lidhe, ge orugø ki ógudh mø tɑr, ge obëëdø piny kì keny-ɑ ɑ́di dëël Yëso, ɑ́kyel ying-ɑ kej wïje, o ɑ́kyel ying-ɑ kej tyelle." 
John20:13 Apyëj ge gøn kinni, “Dhɑnh, yïde ɑ ywöngí?” Alögge kinni, “Wɑ̈ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈lø, o kun-ɑ ókïdhii kwïj yi yɑn.”" 
John20:14 Kɑ ɑ́rume kwøbi møgɑni, ɑlïïdhe ngɑ̈je, kɑ Yëso lidhe e ócungø, de gø nuti ngij en kinni bɑ Yëso." 
John20:15 Apyëjii yi Yëso kinni, “Dhɑnh, yïde ɑ ywöngí? Yï yɑb-ɑ men?” Kɑ Meerì orumø kinni bɑ jɑlbɑg, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Jɑldwøng, keløg ɑ́ yïn ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lii, köbbí yɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́cïbí, o kɑ̈l yi yɑn.”" 
John20:16 Acwølii yi Yëso kinni, “Meerì!” Kɑ Meerì ree løge, kɑ gø köbbe ki dhøg Ibru kinni, “Rɑbonì!” (A wɑngi kinni, Jɑlpwönyø.)" 
John20:17 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑ ko mïdhi, mɑ́ yɑ nuti kedhi mɑl yï Wïy. De kedhí yï nyiimïɑ, kɑ ge köbbí kinni, yɑ kedh-ɑ mɑl yï Wïyɑ, o bɑ Wïyi wun; Jwøgɑ, o bɑ Jwøøg wun.”" 
John20:18 Akedh Meerì Mɑgdɑliyɑ̀, kɑ jøbɑng Yëso köbbe kinni, Wë liidh en. Kɑ gï dwögge møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Yëso." 
John20:19 Kì wɑɑng thyënhi cyɑ̈ngɑni, en ɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk, jøbɑng Yëso ɑ́bëëd ge cugø e thïg bënn bɑ ɑcyëg, mɑ́ ge óböggø yi Yeud. Abëën Yëso, kɑ ócungø kì dïdyëri gen. Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wu óbëëdø ki mër!”" 
John20:20 Kɑ ɑ́rume kwøbi møgɑni, ɑnyudhe gïn cingge geki wɑɑng ngëde. Kɑ jøbɑnge pëthi gen ómïnø kɑ ɑ́lidh gen Wë." 
John20:21 Acigi gen köbbø yi Yëso kinni, “Wu óbëëdø ki mër. Wu ceg yi yɑn kɑ örø, ni kɑ ɑ́ör yɑn yi Wïy.”" 
John20:22 Kɑ ɑ́rume kwøbi møgɑni, ɑkudhe kömi gïn ki yømø, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kwɑnyu Wëykwërø." 
John20:23 Keløg lɑɑwi wun dwöög wu’ piny kipe orøøg dhɑnhø, lɑ́ɑ̀w ɑ́rum ki dwöög piny kipe orøngɑni, de keløg orøøg dhɑnhø ómïdhi yi wun, ónudd e omïdhø.”" 
John20:24 De Tömɑs Nyɑjwøk, ɑ bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøbɑng Yëso gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, ɑ́bëëd e tøøk kì kelli gen keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Yëso." 
John20:25 Aköbbii yi jøbɑng Yëso møg-ɑ kyeelø kinni, “Wë ɑ́lidh yi wøn.” Kɑ ge köbbi yi Tömɑs kinni, “Ke pɑ lidhɑ kɑ̈jji gedd kì cingge, kɑ lwedɑ kïdhɑ kɑ̈jjɑni, kɑ cingɑ cïbɑ wɑɑng ngëde, yɑ pɑ yïëy.”" 
John20:26 Kì bɑng osboo, ɑcugi jøbɑnge kì ød, kí Tömɑs kì kelli gen. Kɑ Yëso obëënø e thïg bɑ ɑcyëg, kɑ ócungø kì dïdyëri gen, ɑkööbe kinni, “Wu óbëëdø ki mër!”" 
John20:27 Codhe, ɑköbbe Tömɑs kinni, “Cïb lwedí keny, kɑ cinggɑ liidh, kɑ cingí rïïj, kɑ cïb wɑɑng ngëdɑ. Wïyí ki pëmø, kɑ yï yïëëy.”" 
John20:28 Alöggi Tömɑs kinni, “Wɑ̈ɑ, Jwøgɑ!”" 
John20:29 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Tömɑs, yï ɑ́yïëy kɑ per kɑ ɑ́liidh yɑn? Ngɑn yïëy e nuti lïdhø, ree dɑ gyëdh.”" 
John20:30 Dɑ gïïngɑ̈ngø møøgø mø ngenyø mɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yëso kì bøli jøbɑnge, o ge nuti gwedø kì yij wɑ̈nyø men." 
John20:31 De møg ɑ́gwed kɑ per kinni o wu yïëy wun kinni, Yëso ɑ bɑ Mesiy, Wɑ̈d Jwøk, kí kinni o wu óyïddi wun ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer kì bɑng yïëyø mi wun." 
John21:1 Kɑ Yëso ocwöbø këti kì bøli jøbɑnge, kì kömi Tɑɑy Thɑbɑriyɑ̀. Bene kër-ɑ ɑ́cwöb møgɑni èn:" 
John21:2 Sɑymøn Pïtør kí Tömɑs (ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Nyɑjwøk,) kí Nɑthɑnɑil jɑl Gɑnɑ̀ kì myërri Gɑlelì, kí wɑ̈ddi Dhebedì, geki jøbɑnge ɑ́ryew møøgø, ge ɑ́bëëd ge cugø kì kej ɑ́kyel." 
John21:3 Aköbbi gen yi Sɑymøn Pïtør kinni, “Yɑ kedh-ɑ be mɑy.” Aköbbii yi gen kinni, “Wɑ ókedh.” Akedh gen, kɑ ge kɑdh-ɑ yij morkɑb, de bong rij mɑ ɑ́yod yi gen kì wɑ̈rɑni." 
John21:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ru wøw, ɑcungi Yëso kì thɑ̈ngi nɑm, de kwïj yi jøbɑnge kinni, bɑ Yëso." 
John21:5 Apyëëj gen yi Yëso kinni, “Yɑnythønhø, yï wun dɑ rij?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Bogïn.”" 
John21:6 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Luudh wun bøy wïj kyëëj morkɑb. O wu mɑ̈gi wun ki rij.” Codhe, ɑluudh ge gøn, kɑ bøy ódhɑ̈lø ywɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ̈g yi ngenyi rij." 
John21:7 Kɑ jɑlbɑng Yëso men-ɑ mɑɑr yi en, Pïtør köbbe kinni, “Ngɑnɑni bɑ Wë.” Kɑ ɑ́lïng Pïtør kinni, bɑ Wë, ɑlønye ógødhe ree, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, kɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ nɑm." 
John21:8 De jøbɑng Yëso møg-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́bï ki morkɑb, ge ywɑjj-ɑ bøyɑni, e pɑ̈ng yi rij, mɑ́ ge cyɑ̈gi ki wɑ̈g, ki mïtïr miyø." 
John21:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen wɑ̈g, ɑkɑdhi gen piny, kɑ mɑɑc cug lidh gen, wïje dɑ rij kí ópun." 
John21:10 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Kɑ̈ni wun ki rijj-ɑ ɑ́cer mɑgø yi wun.”" 
John21:11 Akɑdhi Sɑymøn Pïtør yij morkɑb, kɑ bøy ywɑ̈ɑ̈je wɑ̈g, yije pɑ̈ng yi rij mø døngø, kwɑnni gen bɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj wïdɑ́dɑ̈g. O bøy nuti pyëdø, ngö rij ngenyø." 
John21:12 Aköbbi gen yi Yëso kinni, “Bïu, cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun.” Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi pëjjø kì kelli jøbɑng Yëso kinni, “Yï bɑ men?” Mɑ́ e ngɑ̈nyi yi gen ɑ́ Wë." 
John21:13 Abëën Yëso, ɑkwɑnye ópun kɑ gø mëgge gïn, kɑ rij mëgge gïn thyew." 
John21:14 Men bene dɑ̈ɑ̈g cwöbi Yëso kì bøli jøbɑnge, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́dhwödhe kì yij thøø." 
John21:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki cɑm, ɑpyëëj Sɑymøn Pïtør yi Yëso kinni, “Sɑymøn wɑ̈d Jøn, mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑr yɑn yi yïn, lod-ɑ mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑr yɑn yi ji møg?” Alögge kinni, “Awøø, Wuö, ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni, yï mɑɑr yi yɑn.” Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Kor dyëgɑ.”" 
John21:16 Acige gøn pyëjø kinni, “Sɑymøn wɑ̈d Jøn, yɑ mɑɑr yi yïn?” Alögge kinni, “Awøø, Wuö, ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni, yï mɑɑr yi yɑn.” Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Kwɑy dyëgɑ.”" 
John21:17 Apyëje gøn ki dɑ̈ɑ̈g pëjjø kinni, “Sɑymøn wɑ̈d Jøn, yɑ mɑɑr yi yïn?” Kɑ Pïtør yije obɑɑrø kipe kɑ ɑ́pyëjii ki dɑ̈ɑ̈g pëjjø kinni, “Yɑ mɑɑr yi yïn?” Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Wuö, jɑmmì bënn ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, o yï ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, yï mɑɑr yi yɑn.” Aköbbe gøn kinni, “Kor dyëgɑ." 
John21:18 Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kidyër kinni, kɑ ɑ́bëëd yï bɑ wøb, yï ketí ɑ nyi ruug rií, o yï nyi wïn-ɑ kun-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, de keny-ɑ óyöø yi yïn, cinggí óbøødh rií, kɑ yï ruug yi ngɑn megø, kɑ yï kïdhi kun-ɑ pɑ dwɑddi yi yïn.”" 
John21:19 (Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi en gɑ møg nyoodhe thøw-ɑ óthøw Pïtør, men-ɑ ree óyïddi yi Jwøk ki dhwɑ̈ng.) Codhe, ɑköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Bïí bɑngɑ!”" 
John21:20 Aløg Pïtør ree kɑ jɑlbɑng Yëso men-ɑ mɑɑr yi Yëso lidhe, e ócyɑ̈dhø kì bɑng gen. Bɑ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ree kö Yëso keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen ki gïncɑm, kɑ Yëso pyëje kinni, “Wuö, ɑ́ men ɑ óngeew yïn?”" 
John21:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Pïtør, ɑpyëëj Yëso yi Pïtør kinni, “Wuö, o jɑɑl ø?”" 
John21:22 Aköbbii yi Yëso kinni, “Keløg yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, o bëëde gïti keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ, cwɑggí ɑ́ ngø? Bïí bɑngɑ!”" 
John21:23 Atɑɑy kwøbbɑni kelli nyiimëëg kinni, jɑlbɑng Yëso menɑni pɑ thøw, de Yëso nuti kwøb-ɑ kinni, pɑ thøw, dɑ́ kinni, “Keløg yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, o bëëde gïti keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ, cwɑggí ɑ́ ngø?”" 
John21:24 Jɑlɑni bene jɑlbɑng Yëso men-ɑ thyer møgɑni, o en ɑ ɑ́gwed gïn, o ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ kinni, møg-ɑ thyer yi en bɑ dyër." 
John21:25 O dɑ gïg møøgø thyew mø ngenyø mɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yëso, o keløg ge di gwed bënn, yɑ orumø kinni, kömi piny di göög e dhiing yi wɑ̈jj-ɑ di gweed gen." 
Acts1:1 Yïn ɑ Thyøpiløs, Kì yij wɑ̈nyø men-ɑ ɑ́kwøng yi yɑn ki gwedø, møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi yɑn bɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yëso geki møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi yi en bënn," 
Acts1:2 cɑg kì tyeli mɑl gïti cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kïdhii mɑl. De kì bøli kenyɑni, tyëngwöödø møg-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi en rumø cegø yi en kì ri Wëykwërø." 
Acts1:3 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́thøwe, ree nyi nyudhe’ gïn, e onëënø, kì ri ngïjjì mø ngenyø, o kì yethi cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen ɑ́bëëd e nyii cwöbø kì bøli gen, e kømm-ɑ kwøbbi Pödhi Jwøk." 
Acts1:4 O kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëde ki gïn, gï ɑ́cege kinni, “Wu ko dhwödh kì Yerusɑlem, de yïd wun møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïy kinni ómuuje; o møgɑni ɑ́lïngi yi wun kì yïɑ." 
Acts1:5 Ji ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g yi Jøn kɑ pï kidyër, de kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng mø nøg, ji ójwɑ̈ɑ̈g yi wun kɑ Wëykwërø.”" 
Acts1:6 Kɑ kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́cugi gen, ɑpyëj ge gøn kinni, “Wuö, men bɑ bøli keny-ɑ ódöggí lɑwø tyëng Isrɑil?”" 
Acts1:7 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kɑ̈gi piny, kí bøli keny-ɑ gwøøg jɑmmì bënn ying-ɑ cingi Wïy, ge pɑ dwɑddi kinni o ge bëëd ge ngɑ̈nyi yi wun." 
Acts1:8 De wu óyïddi ki tegø keny-ɑ óbëën Wëykwërø kömi wun; o wu óbëëd wu bɑ cwɑ̈ggɑ kì Yerusɑlem, kí Yeudiyɑ̀ bëne, kí Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ gïti wɑ̈thi tùngi piny.”" 
Acts1:9 Kɑ ɑ́rume kwøbi møgɑni, ge nudd ge nenn-ɑ yïe, ɑtïngii mɑl, kɑ gëng yi pøølø." 
Acts1:10 Ge ɑ́nudd ge nenn-ɑ mɑl, kun-ɑ ɑ́kedhe; ɑcwöb jøg ɑ́ryew mø ri gen di ógudh mø tɑr ge ócungø kì buti gen," 
Acts1:11 kɑ ge köbbi yi jøgɑni ryeet kinni, “Wun ɑ jø Gɑlelì, wude ɑ nudd wu nenn-ɑ mɑl? Yëso, en ɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l kì kelli wun, e kïdh-ɑ mɑl, ódwöög ni kɑ ɑ́lidhii yi wun, e kedh-ɑ mɑl.”" 
Acts1:12 Codhe, ɑdøøg gen Yerusɑlem, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wïj Kïti Dhetun. Kïnɑni cyɑ̈gi ki Yerusɑlem ki kïlomïtïr ɑ́kyel." 
Acts1:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen kɑɑl, ɑpödhi gen ød mɑl keny-ɑ nyi bëëd yi gen; jøgɑni bɑ Pïtør kí Jøn, kí Yɑgob kí Andrø, kí Pïlïp kí Tömɑs, kí Bɑrthølømɑøs, kí Mɑthyëw, kí Yɑgob wɑ̈d Alpɑ̀, kí Sɑymøn Lunø, kí Yeudɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yɑgob." 
Acts1:14 Ge ɑ́bëëd ge kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøk kì kej ɑ́kyel, geki tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, kí Meerì meyi Yëso geki nyiimï Yëso yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw." 
Acts1:15 Yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni ɑ ɑ́löggi Pïtør kì bøli nyiimëëg, e kwɑnni gen wɑ̈dh-ɑ ri miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew. Kɑ okööbø kinni," 
Acts1:16 “Nyiimïɑ, møg-ɑ ying yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø ɑ́bëëd gɑ møg pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen ceth; gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈g ki kwøbø yi Wëykwërø ki dhøg Debïd, e kømm-ɑ Yeudɑ̀, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́pej tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mɑg Yëso." 
Acts1:17 Ábëëd ɑ́ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kellee, kɑ thödhi ki keje kì ri gwøg men.”" 
Acts1:18 (Ngyënyy-ɑ ɑ́køøg Yeudɑ̀ kipe gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́gwøge, ge ɑ́ngëëw ki pwödhø kì keny-ɑ́ yije ɑ́pɑ̈dhe kɑ othøø, kɑ yije ópyëdø, kɑ cïnne røy-ɑ piny." 
Acts1:19 Kɑ kwøbbɑni lïngi yi ji-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem bënn, kɑ pwönhɑni cɑg ɑ́ Akeldɑmɑ̀ ki dhø gen; ɑ wɑngi “Pwödhi Remø.”)" 
Acts1:20 “Wɑ̈nyi Wör okööbø kinni, ‘Wiy gøle döng e lïïwø, o bongii dhɑnhø me bëëdø kì yije.’ Bɑ ɑgwed thyew kinni, ‘Wiy gwøge kwɑny yi ngɑn megø.’" 
Acts1:21 “Wɑ ceg-ɑ kɑ̈bbø ki nget ɑ́kyel me bï kömee, kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki wɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́nud Wë Yëso kì kellee," 
Acts1:22 cɑg kì ri keny-ɑ ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g ji yi Jøn, gïti kɑ ɑ́kïdhii mɑl. O ngɑnɑni ókɑ̈lle kwøbbi dhwönhi Wë kì yij thøø kyeel ki wɑ.”" 
Acts1:23 Akɑ̈ɑ̈l gen jøg ɑ́ryew. Jɑl ɑ́kyel bɑ Yosep ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Bɑrsɑbɑ̀, ɑ dhømmi ɑ́ Yostøs, o jɑl-ɑ kyeelø bɑ Mɑtiyɑs." 
Acts1:24 Akwɑ̈jji gen kinni, “Wuö, pëthi ji bënn ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, nyudhí wøn ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi yïn kì kelli jøg ryeet," 
Acts1:25 ɑ́ men-ɑ ógöögø jɑlwöödø kì kej Yeudɑ̀, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kedhi keny-ɑ bɑ keje.”" 
Acts1:26 Kɑ ge olëngø ki wél, kɑ wél pɑ̈dhi kɑ Mɑtiyɑs, ɑ rëbe ki tyëngwöödø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel." 
Acts2:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi cyɑ̈ng-ɑ Pyɑ̈r Ábïj, ge ɑ́bëëd ge cugø bënn kì kej ɑ́kyel." 
Acts2:2 Kɑ ɑtunø me teeg wɑ̈dh-ɑ ì dut kì øn-ɑ́ yije ɑ́bëëd yi gen. 
Acts2:3 Kɑ lebbi mɑc ocwöbø, kɑ ri gen pɑ̈ngi gen, kɑ ge ócungø kì wɑ̈thi jiɑni; men ki leeb mɑc kì wïje." 
Acts2:4 Kɑ pëthi gen bënn opɑ̈ngø yi Wëykwërø, kɑ ge ócɑ̈gø kwøb ki dhøg møøgø, ni kɑ ɑ́thödhi gen yi Wëykwërø ki dhøgg-ɑ 'kööb gen." 
Acts2:5 Ádɑ Yeud kì Yerusɑlem mø bɑ tyëngtir; ge ɑ́bï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pödhhi kömi piny bënn. 
Acts2:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi cwɑggi ɑtunø yi teenɑni, ɑcugi gen, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen omuumø, mɑ́ ngɑn lïng-ɑ dhø gen, kɑ̀ kööb tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy." 
Acts2:7 Kɑ wɑ̈thi gen ócungø yi møgɑni, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Ji-ɑ kööbø ek bënn pɑth ki tyëng Gɑlelì?" 
Acts2:8 Dɑ́ kidï ɑnɑn, ɑ lïngi wɑ kwøbbi gen; e ngɑn lïng-ɑ dhø jur gen?" 
Acts2:9 Wɑ ɑ́bï wɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Pɑrthiyɑ̀, kí Mɑdɑy, kí Elɑm; møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Pøntøs kí Ásiyɑ̀," 
Acts2:10 møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Perïjiyɑ̀ kí Pɑmpïliyɑ̀; møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Rïp kí myërri Lïbiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ buti Serin. Kwïee kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Römɑ̀; 
Acts2:11 gɑ Yeud, kí jurr-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́løg ri gen Yeud; o kwïee kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Kirit kí pödhi Árɑb, de cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, ge ceg kɑ lïngø yi wɑ bënn ge 'kööb-ɑ dhøggee, ge lwøb-ɑ gïgdøngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk!”" 
Acts2:12 Ge ɑ́ceg ngɑ̈ngø bënn, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen ócungø; ge pyëny-ɑ ri gen kinni, “Men wɑng-ɑ ngø?”" 
Acts2:13 De ji møøgø ɑ́ceg-ɑ gɑ̈ɑ̈gø kinni, “Jiɑni wɑ̈thi gen dɑ møgø!”" 
Acts2:14 Adhwödhi Pïtør mɑl geki tyëngwöödø møg-ɑ kyeelø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel; kɑ cwɑgge tïnge, ɑköbbe teedø kinni, “Lïng wun, wun ɑ Yeud, kí tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem, o wu köbbɑ gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møgɑni." 
Acts2:15 Ji møg wɑ̈thi gen bong møgø, ni kɑ̀ rømmii yi wun, mɑ́ piny nudd ɑ́ sɑɑ̀ ɑ́bïngwen kì mwøl." 
Acts2:16 De møg, bɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Yöiil jɑltöng kinni," 
Acts2:17 ‘Jwøk ɑ́kööb kinni, kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ cyɑ̈n, Wëyɑ ókønyɑ kömi dhɑnhø bëne. Nyigi wun; cwøw kí mɑ̈nn, wöönɑ ótöng yi gen; wøbbi wun ólïdhi ki møg-ɑ ócɑ̈rri gen, o ywödhhi wun ólɑ̈gi ki lɑ̈g." 
Acts2:18 Ngee, cɑgg ɑ́ kömi bɑ̈nggɑ; cwøw kí mɑ̈nn ókunyɑ ki wëyɑ kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, kɑ wöönɑ kɑ̈lli yi gen." 
Acts2:19 Kɑ yɑ onyudhø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø kì mɑl kí ngïjjì kì kömi piny. Ódi remø, kí mɑc, kí yïrø me dwøng." 
Acts2:20 Cɑ̈ng ógöögø ki muudhø, kɑ dwɑ̈y ogöögø e kwɑɑr ni remø, e Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë; cyɑ̈ng-ɑ dwøng, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mɑ̈r nuti bëënø." 
Acts2:21 Codhe, o ngɑn kwɑjji kønyø ki nyingi Wë yiel.’" 
Acts2:22 “Wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil, lïngi wun møg: Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth ɑ́nyudhi wun yi Jwøk kì ri gïgdøngø kí gïïngɑ̈ngø geki ngïjjì møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk kì ree, kɑ ɑ́nude kì kelli wun, ni kɑ̀ ngɑ̈nyu en." 
Acts2:23 Bɑ gïjø mɑ ɑ́rum ki cïbø yi Jwøk, ni kɑ ɑ́dwɑdde gøn, kinni Yëso bɑ men mëggi wun, o nɑ̈g yi wun, e ceg kɑ cïb cinggi tyëngorøg yi wun, o gø gur gen wïj yɑdh ɑrïw." 
Acts2:24 De ɑ́tug mɑl yi Jwøk, kɑ töjji thøø cödde, mɑ́ e pɑ cuggi mïdhø yi thøø." 
Acts2:25 Mɑ́ ree ɑ ɑ́kööb yi Debïd kinni, ‘Wë onennø yi yɑn kì bølɑ kì yethi cyɑ̈ng ying-ɑ butɑ, o pyëwɑ pɑ lïngø." 
Acts2:26 Bene ɑ med pyëwɑ, o yɑ 'kööb-ɑ medi pyëwɑ O cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ bɑ dhɑnhø yøw, yɑ óbëëdø yïɑ dɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Acts2:27 Mɑ́ yɑ koo wiy yi yïn piny pödhi tyëngthøø; bɑ̈ngí koo wëggí kwɑ̈ɑ̈g yij rörø. 
Acts2:28 Yɑ ɑ́nyudhí yëth-ɑ kedhi yethi nënnì, o yɑ óbëëdø ki medi pyëw, mɑ́ yï ying-ɑ butɑ.’" 
Acts2:29 “Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wiy wu köbbɑ kidøøj kinni, kweyee Rɑ̈dh Debïd ɑ́thøw, kɑ kony, o röre nud kì butee dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Acts2:30 Ábëëd ɑ́ jɑltöng, o møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk ngɑ̈nyi yi en. Jwøk ɑ́köngi kinni, ɑ́kyel kì kelli kwɑrre ócïb wïj kwøme." 
Acts2:31 Gïn-ɑ ódwɑddi gwøgø yi Jwøk dhuki megø ɑ ɑ́lidh yi Debïd, ɑkööbe kì ri dhwönhi Mesiy kì yij thøø; ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Nuti wiy pödhi tyëngthøø; nuti kwɑ̈ɑ̈g yij rörø.’" 
Acts2:32 Yëso kiree, ɑ́tug yi Jwøk kì yij thøø, kɑ lidh yi wøn kidyër." 
Acts2:33 Kɑ kïdhi mɑl, kɑ cïb wïj kyëëj Wïye Jwøk, kɑ gø mëgge wëy ni kɑ ɑ́kööbe, kɑ wëyɑni kønye kömi wøn; o bene møgɑni ɑ lïngi yi wun, o gen ɑ nenni yi wun ɑnɑn." 
Acts2:34 Mɑ́ Debïd nuti kedhi mɑl, de ɑ́kwøb-ɑ kinni, ‘Wɑ̈ɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Bëëd kì wïj kyëjɑ," 
Acts2:35 gïti keny-ɑ ócïbɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn thɑ́ tyellí.’ 
Acts2:36 “Wiy gøl Isrɑil bëne ngɑ̈nye wøw ceth kinni Yëso menɑni; eni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́gur yi wun wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, bɑ en ɑ ɑ́røny yi Jwøk ɑ́ Wë kɑ løg-ɑ Mesiy.”" 
Acts2:37 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbɑni yi teedø, ɑpödhi møgɑni pëthi gen, kɑ Pïtør geki tyëngwöödø köbbi gen kinni, “Nyiimïɑ, göög wøn kidï?”" 
Acts2:38 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Pïtør kinni, “Yewi wun, kɑ wu jwɑ̈ɑ̈g, wu bënn, ki nyingi Yëso Mesiy, o lɑ́ɑ̀w dwöög piny kipe orøøg wun, o wu yïddi wun ki Wëykwërø, men-ɑ ómuuj yi Jwøk." 
Acts2:39 Mɑ́ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöng yi Jwøk bɑ kiper wun, wuki nyigi wun, kí tyëng-ɑ lɑ̈wi bënn, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ cwøl yi Wë Jwøgee.”" 
Acts2:40 Kɑ Pïtør okööbø ki kwøb mø gïïr thyew, e cïj-ɑ gen kinni, “Yielu ri wun ki cɑ́y-ɑ óbï kömi ji-ɑ rijjø ek!”" 
Acts2:41 Kɑ kwøbbe yïëy yi ji mø gïïr kì kelli gen, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy jwɑ̈ɑ̈g, kɑ ji ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g órëbø ki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy kì cyɑ̈ngɑni." 
Acts2:42 Kɑ pëthi gen cïb gen kömi møg-ɑ pwönyi yi tyëngwöödø, kí cyɑ̈dhø kì kömi gïjø ɑ́kyel, kí pødi ópun, geki kwɑjji Jwøk." 
Acts2:43 Kɑ tyëngwöödø ogöögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø kí ngïjjì mø ngenyø, kɑ teedø bëne obwøgø." 
Acts2:44 Kɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́yïëy bënn obëëdø kì kej ɑ́kyel, kɑ jɑmmi gen bënn nyi nywɑg yi gen." 
Acts2:45 Kɑ jɑmmi gen ngeew gen wɑ̈g, kɑ ngyëny nyi pɑ̈ngi yi gen kì kelli gen; e ngɑn nyi mëgg-ɑ gïn-ɑ jɑ̈ddii." 
Acts2:46 Kɑ ge nyii cugø kì Kengø, yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, ki pyëw ɑ́kyel, kɑ ópun nyi pød yi gen kì yethi kɑ̈lli gen, kɑ ge nyii nywɑ̈gø ki medi pëthi gen, e bong ɑ́dud ki yethi gen." 
Acts2:47 Kɑ Jwøk nyi pwøj yi gen, kɑ ji bënn pëthi gen løg-ɑ mø med ki gen. Kɑ kwɑnni gen med yi Wë ki tyëng-ɑ nyi kedh ge oyielø kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
Acts3:1 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, kɑ Pïtør kedh-ɑ Kengø geki Jøn, kì bøli keny-ɑ nyi kwɑjji Jwøk ki sɑɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g kì böörø." 
Acts3:2 Ádɑ jɑl men-ɑ ónywølø ɑ́ pudh, me nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l kɑ cïb be kwɑ̈jjø kì yï ji-ɑ kedhi Kengø; ki dhøng-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Dhøng-ɑ Myër." 
Acts3:3 Jɑlɑni keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe Pïtør geki Jøn, ge køm-ɑ kedhi Kengø, ɑkwɑ̈jje kì yï gen." 
Acts3:4 Kɑ Pïtør geki Jøn nenn-ɑ ree, ɑköbbii yi Pïtør kinni, “Lïïdh yï wøn!”" 
Acts3:5 Kɑ lïïdh-ɑ yï gïn, e orumø cem e óyïddi ki gïn mëggii yi gïn." 
Acts3:6 Kɑ köbbi yi Pïtør kinni, “Yïɑ bong ɑ́tegø, o yïɑ bong dhɑb, de yï ómëggɑ gïn-ɑ nud kì yïɑ. Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kinni, dhwöödh kɑ yï cyɑ̈dhí, ki nyingi Yëso Mesiy jɑl Nɑdhɑreth!”" 
Acts3:7 Kɑ gø mɑge kì cingi kyëje, kɑ gø tïnge mɑl, kɑ tyelle kí nyɑ́jyɑ̈nggi tyelle ótëngø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Acts3:8 Apɑ̈ɑ̈re mɑl, kɑ ócungø, kɑ ócyɑ̈dhø. Akedhe Kengø kyeel ki gen, e cyɑ̈dhi e ópɑ̈rrø e lenh-ɑ Jwøk." 
Acts3:9 Kɑ lidh yi teedø bëne e ócyɑ̈dhø, e lenh-ɑ Jwøk," 
Acts3:10 kɑ gø ngij gen kinni bɑ jɑl-ɑ nyi bëëdø kì dhø Kengø, dhøng-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Dhøng-ɑ Myër, ɑ nyi kwɑ̈jji kì yï ji. Angɑ̈ng gen, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen omuumø yi gïn-ɑ ɑ́kedhi ree." 
Acts3:11 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd jɑlɑni e nudd e mɑ̈gø kì bɑng Pïtør geki Jøn, ɑrengi ji bënn yï gen, kì thɑ ɑkɑni Sølømøn, kɑ ge ceg-ɑ ngɑ̈ngø ki mendwøng." 
Acts3:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh møgɑni yi Pïtør, ɑköbbe teedø kinni, “Wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil, wude ɑ ngɑ̈ng wun yi møgɑni, wɑlɑ̀ wude ɑ nenni wun ri wøn, de jɑlɑni ce gwøøg wøn kɑ tegi wøn, wɑlɑ̀ kɑ bëëdi wøn, wøn ɑ́ jii Jwøk?" 
Acts3:13 Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob; eni Jwøøg kweyyee, bɑ en ɑ ɑ́thödhi Yëso wɑ̈de ki dhwɑ̈ng, eni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cïb cingi Pilɑtø yi wun, kɑ bɑny yi wun kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́dwɑdde gø gønyø." 
Acts3:14 Ngee, ngeti kwërø, ngɑntir ɑ́bɑny yi wun, kɑ wu cwøl-ɑ ɑ́muddi ji." 
Acts3:15 Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ yïe kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi nënnì nɑ̈g yi wun, de ɑ́tug yi Jwøk kì yij thøø, kɑ lidh yi wøn." 
Acts3:16 O bɑ tegi nyingi Yëso ɑ ɑ́wëggi jɑɑl dönyø, e ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ pudh. Gïn-ɑ nenni yi wun ɑnɑn, ɑ́gwøg kɑ yïëyi nyingi Yëso; bɑ yïëyi Yëso ɑ ɑ́gwøgii, ɑdönye ni kɑ̀ nennu en ɑnɑn." 
Acts3:17 “O ɑnɑn wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, tyëng Isrɑil, ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggu Yëso wuki jɑggi wun, ɑ́gwøg yi wun kɑ kwïji wøw." 
Acts3:18 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈g yi Jwøk ki kwøbø ki dhøggi jøtöng bënn kinni, Mesiy órɑngi ceth, pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen." 
Acts3:19 De yewi wun, kɑ wu døøgu kö Jwøk, o orøøg wun lɑ̈ɑ̈ny," 
Acts3:20 o cyɑ̈nggi ywömø kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Wë, keny-ɑ óöre wun Mesiy men-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi en, eni Yëso kiree." 
Acts3:21 Ceg-ɑ bëëdø kì mɑl gïti bøli keny-ɑ ódwøøg jɑmmì kɑ̈jji gen bënn, ni kɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈ɑ̈j møgɑni yi Jwøk ki dhøggi jøtöng møge, tyëngtöng-ɑ tir." 
Acts3:22 Mosɑ̀ ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Wu óödi yi Wë Jwøøg wun, ki jɑltöng, ni kɑ ɑ́öre yɑn, o óbëëd ɑ́ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli jii wun. Kɑ møg-ɑ óköbbe wun kinni gwøøg gen, nyi gwøg wun ceth." 
Acts3:23 Ngɑn-ɑ óbɑ̈nyi ki lïngi kwøbbi jɑltöngɑni, ceg kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì kelli jii Jwøk.’" 
Acts3:24 O wööni møg-ɑ cwöb kì yethi cyɑ̈ng møg ɑnɑn, ɑ́rum ki kwøbø yi jøtöng møg-ɑ ɑ́kööb bënn, cɑg kì ri Sɑmwel kí tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bï kì bɑnge." 
Acts3:25 Wu bɑ wɑ̈ddi jøtöng, o wu nud kì yij dhøng-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg yi Jwøk geki kweyyi wun, kɑ ɑ́köbbe Abrɑhɑm kinni, ‘Gyëdhh-ɑ ómëggɑ jurri kömi piny bënn, ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri kwɑrrí.’" 
Acts3:26 Kɑ Jwøk bɑ̈nge myege, ɑkwønge gøn ki ör yï wun, ɑ́ gyëdh møg dwöög wun wɑ̈g kì yuu orøg.”" 
Acts4:1 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd Pïtør geki Jøn ge köbb-ɑ teedø, ɑbëën ókwër geki jɑngi bölidhhi Kengø, kí Jøsɑduk yï gen." 
Acts4:2 Pëthi gen ɑ́rënyi kipe kɑ̀ pwönyi gen teedø kinni, Yëso ɑ́dhwödh kì yij thøø, men nyodh kinni tyëngthøø bɑ møg-ɑ ódhwödh." 
Acts4:3 Kɑ gï mɑg gen, ɑleeng gen ød mɑg gïti dhuki, mɑ́ wøw yuudhø." 
Acts4:4 De ji mø ngenyø kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbɑni ɑ́yïëy, kɑ kwɑnni jøg-ɑ cwøw køm-ɑ wɑ̈dhi ri ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj." 
Acts4:5 Dhuki, kɑ jɑggi Yeud geki jøgdøngø, kí jøpwönyi Cigg ócugø kì Yerusɑlem," 
Acts4:6 kí Anɑ̀ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kí Kɑyɑpɑ̀, kí Jøn, kí Iskɑnder, kí wɑ̈ddi jɑggi ókwër bënn." 
Acts4:7 Akɑ̈ɑ̈l tyëngwöödø bøli burø, kɑ ge pyëj kinni, “Gïn, ɑ́gwøg yi wun ɑ dï? Á tegø mɑ ngø ɑ yï wun, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ kì ri nyingi men ɑ ɑ́gwøgu gïnɑni?”" 
Acts4:8 Kɑ pyëjji gen løøg yi Pïtør, e pyëwe pɑ̈ngø yi Wëykwërø; ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wun ɑ jɑggi pödhø, kí jøgdøngø," 
Acts4:9 keløg wø pëjju’ gïndøj men-ɑ ɑ́göggi pudh men dicyɑ̈ngtïn, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́yieelii," 
Acts4:10 yodu en wuki tyëng Isrɑil bënn kinni, kɑ̀ cunge kì bøli wun dële døøj ɑnɑn, ɑ́gwøg kɑ nyingi Yëso Mesiy, jɑl Nɑdhɑreth; eni jɑl-ɑ ɑ́gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw yi wun, kɑ tug yi Jwøk kì yij thøø." 
Acts4:11 Bɑ Yëso ɑ kømmi yi wɑ̈jji kwërø kinni, ‘Kït men-ɑ ɑ́bɑny yi bödhhi gyer, en ɑ ɑ́göög ki kïn-ɑ pere pëddi tegø.’" 
Acts4:12 Yielø ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ree kete; bong dhɑnhø megø kì kömi piny, mɑ ɑ́muuj yi Jwøk ɑ́ ngɑn yïëdø, den-ɑ́ e kete.”" 
Acts4:13 Kɑ jɑggi burø ongɑ̈ngø keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen yëth-ɑ 'kööb yi Pïtør geki Jøn ki tegi pëëth; mɑ gï ngɑ̈nyi yi gen gɑ ji mø nuti dïdø ki gwed; de ɑ́yod yi gen kinni, ge ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kɑ Yëso cøn." 
Acts4:14 De ge ɑ́jɑd ki gïn kwøb yi gen, mɑ́ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́yiel ócungø kì bøli gen." 
Acts4:15 Aör gen wɑ̈g kì ød burø. Codhe, ɑpyënyi gen ri gen kinni," 
Acts4:16 “Á ngø ɑ göggi wɑ jøgɑni ryeet? Mɑ́ ngïji men ɑ́gwøg yi gen, e ngɑ̈nyi yi tyëng Yerusɑlem bënn, o møgɑni pɑ cuggi pyemø yi wɑ." 
Acts4:17 Lɑ̈w ke cem wɑ nyingi gen, kinni nyingi Yëso ko kømmi yi gen kì kelli teedø, kipe wöönɑni ótɑɑy kelli teedø.”" 
Acts4:18 Codhe, ɑcwööl gen, kɑ gï ceg gen kinni nyingi Yëso ko wöl gen ki kømmø, wɑlɑ̀ ge ko pwönyi këti ki nyingɑni." 
Acts4:19 Kɑ mø gen løøg yi Pïtør geki Jøn kinni, “Wun kiri wun nyodhu gïn bɑ dyër kì bøli Jwøk, — bɑ gwøgi gïn-ɑ kwøb yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ gïn-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøk?" 
Acts4:20 De keløg ɑ́ per wøn, wø pɑ cuggi kudø kì kömi møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wøn, kɑ ge lïngi yi wøn.”" 
Acts4:21 Kɑ nyingi gen døøg ki cemø yi burø, ɑwiy gen kedh gen; ge ɑ́jɑd ki keny cɑy ge gïn, mɑ́ ge óböggø yi teedø. Mɑ́ teedø bëne ɑ́bëëd e pøjj-ɑ Jwøk kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb." 
Acts4:22 Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́yiel kì ri ngïnyɑni runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïje nud. 
Acts4:23 Kɑ ɑ́rum Pïtør geki Jøn ki gønyø, ɑdøøg gen yï ɑkuud gen, kɑ gï köbbi gen møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi jɑggi ókwër geki jøgdøngø." 
Acts4:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen møgɑni, ɑtïng gen cwɑggi gen wïj ɑ́kyel kì bøli Jwøk, ge ókwɑ̈jjø kinni, “Wuö, bɑ yïn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j mɑl kí piny, kí nɑ̈mmì kí gïg-ɑ yethi gen bënn!" 
Acts4:25 Yï ɑ́kööb ki dhø kweyi wøn Debïd, bɑ̈ngí, kɑ ɑ́kööbe ki tegi Wëykwërø kinni, ‘Gede tyëngpɑth ɑ mɑɑg gen yi liny; gede teedø ɑ göög gen ki ɑmolpiny?" 
Acts4:26 Rɑ̈nhi kömi piny ri gen ɑ́tyeny gen kɑ jɑgg ocungø ki bur ge tyëdd-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki Mesiy mee.’ 
Acts4:27 Kidyër, Ërödøs geki Pilɑtø jɑl Pøntøs ɑ́cugi kì kɑɑl, kyeel ki tyëngpɑth ki Yeud, kí tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ dhøggi gen nywɑ̈ggi gen nyɑrí Yëso; eni ngɑntir men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn ɑ́ Mesiy." 
Acts4:28 Ge ɑ́cugi kɑ per gwøgi møg-ɑ ɑ́rum ki pyëlø yi yïn ki tegí kɑ̈ge dööng, gɑ møg-ɑ ócwöb ceth." 
Acts4:29 De ɑnɑn, Wuö, lidh kɑ̀ cemmi gen nyingi wøn. Wiy kwøbbí töng yi bɑ̈nggí, ge pɑ böggi." 
Acts4:30 Rïj cöngí kɑ yï yïëëd, kɑ wiy ngïjjì kí gïïngɑ̈ngø gwøg ki nyingi ngɑn-ɑ tir, Yëso Bɑ̈ngí Kwërø.”" 
Acts4:31 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki kwɑ̈jjø, kɑ keny-ɑ cugi gen okïïrø, kɑ pëthi gen bënn opɑ̈ngø yi Wëykwërø. Kɑ kwøbbi Jwøk pwönyi yi gen, ge pɑ böggi." 
Acts4:32 Kɑ ji møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy bënn rummi gen kí pëthi gen cïb gen kej ɑ́kyel; bong ngɑn kööbø kinni, dɑ jɑmmi cwɑgge. De jɑmmi gen bënn ceg kɑ nywɑgø yi gen." 
Acts4:33 Tyëngwöödø kwøbbi dhwönhi Wë Yëso kì yij thøø ɑ́töng yi gen kidøøj ki tegi pëëth. Kɑ Jwøk gyëdhhe kønye kömi gen bënn. 
Acts4:34 Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́di gïn jɑ̈ddii kì kelli gen, mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ́ yï gen ɑ́di pwödh kí kɑ̈llì, ɑ́bëëd gï nyi ngeew ge’ wɑ̈g, kɑ ngyënyy-ɑ ngeew gen nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen," 
Acts4:35 kɑ gï nyi cïb gen cinggi tyëngwöödø, kɑ ngyënyyɑni nyi pɑ̈ngi kì kelli teedø, e dhɑnhø mëgg-ɑ gïn-ɑ jɑ̈ddii." 
Acts4:36 Gïn ni menɑni ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yosep, ɑ ɑ́cɑg ɑ́ Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ yi tyëngwöödø (men-ɑ wɑngi Jɑlcïïjø). Yosep bɑ Kwɑɑr Leebì kì Kobros." 
Acts4:37 Yosep pwödhe ɑ́ngeewe wɑ̈g, kɑ ngyënyyi pwönhɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈le, kɑ gï cïbe cinggi tyëngwöödø." 
Acts5:1 Kɑ jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Anɑniyɑ̀ geki cyëge Sɑpïrɑ̀ pwödhi gen ngeew gen wɑ̈g. 
Acts5:2 Kɑ kwï ngyënyyi pwödhø kɑn yi jɑlɑni, e ngɑ̈nyi yi cyëge, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́döng kɑ̈ɑ̈le, kɑ gï cïbe cinggi tyëngwöödø." 
Acts5:3 Kɑ köbbi yi Pïtør kinni, “Anɑniyɑ̀, ede pyëwí ɑ wëggí kwɑnyø yi Cethɑn, o yï kømmi kwøbbi pyed ki Wëykwërø, kɑ kwï ngyënyyi pwödhø kɑɑn?" 
Acts5:4 Pwönhɑni bëne nuti bëëdø ɑ́ mií, o pɑ di cög ɑ́ mií ke di mïdhií? Dɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ gwøøg gïn ni men? Pɑth ki ji ɑ ɑ́köbbi yi yïn ki kwøbbi pyed, dɑ́ men-ɑ́ Jwøk kiree.”" 
Acts5:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbɑni yi Anɑniyɑ̀, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈dhe e thøø; kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni obwøgø ki mendwøng." 
Acts5:6 Adhwödh yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb, kɑ dhɑnhø kod yi gen ki ógødh, ɑkɑ̈l ge gøn, kɑ gø kony gen." 
Acts5:7 Kì bɑng thøwe ki sɑɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑbëën cyëge, kɑ kedh-ɑ ød, e gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kwïj yi en." 
Acts5:8 Kɑ pyëj yi Pïtør kinni, “Köbbí yɑn, pwödhi wun ɑ́ngew kɑ ngyënyyɑni ceth?” Kɑ oyïëyø kinni, “Gen ceth.”" 
Acts5:9 Kɑ köbbi yi Pïtør kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ rebu dhøggi wun, wu pɑ̈ny-ɑ Wëyi Wë? Yɑɑg-ɑ ɑ́kony jɑlgølí ɑ wɑ̈g ɑnɑn. Yï ceg kɑ kïdhi wɑ̈g yi gen thyew.”" 
Acts5:10 Apɑ̈ɑ̈dh ngɑnɑni kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kì bøli Pïtør, kɑ othøø. Kɑ yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb kedh-ɑ ød, ɑyuud ge gøn e rum thøø, kɑ gø kïdhi gen wɑ̈g, kɑ gø koony gen buti jɑlgøle." 
Acts5:11 Kɑ böögø me dwøng bï-ɑ kömi kɑnïsɑ̀ bëne, kɑ teen-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni obwøgø." 
Acts5:12 Kɑ tyëngwöödø ogöögø ki ngïjjì kí gïïngɑ̈ngø mø ngenyø kì kelli teedø. Kɑ ge nyii cugø kì thɑ ɑkɑni Sølømøn. 
Acts5:13 Kɑ bong-ɑ nget ɑ́kyel kì kelli ji, mɑ ɑ́cwed pyëwe kɑ kedh-ɑ be rëbø ki gen, ngö ge ɑ́bëëd ge ceg kɑ lejjø yi teedø." 
Acts5:14 Kɑ kwɑnni ji-ɑ ɑ́yïëy Wë ókedhø ge óngënyø ki mendwøng, ge bɑ cwøw kí mɑ̈nn." 
Acts5:15 Kɑ tyëngbuud nyi tëër yethi yëëth, kɑ ge nyi pyëël wɑ̈thi nɑngɑrebb kí pënnì; ge dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o tïbi Pïtør yøw ópɑ̈dhe kömi ngɑn buud kenyi bëëne e kɑ̈ll-ɑ yuuɑni." 
Acts5:16 Kɑ ji nyi bï-ɑ Yerusɑlem ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yethi myërr, ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ tyëngbuud geki tyëng-ɑ ri gen di wëyrijjø, kɑ ge nyi yiel bënn." 
Acts5:17 Kɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng geki Jøsɑduk mɑg yi tyiel ki mendwøng. 
Acts5:18 Kɑ tyëngwöödø mɑg gen, kɑ gï leeng gen ød mɑg." 
Acts5:19 Kɑ dhø ød mɑg yieb yi wëywöni Wë kì wɑ̈r, kɑ tyëngwöödø kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g, kɑ gï köbbe kinni," 
Acts5:20 “Kedh wun, kɑ wu cungi wun kì Kengø, kɑ teedø lwöbbi wun ki kwøbbi bëën-ɑ nyɑ̈n.”" 
Acts5:21 Kɑ kwøbbi wëywödø lïngi gen, ɑmøøl gen Kengø, cɑ̈ng nuti tuulø, kɑ ge ócɑ̈gø pwönyø. Abëën Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng geki tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en, kɑ ge ócugø geki jøgdøngi Isrɑil, kɑ ge öd-ɑ ød mɑg kinni kɑ̈ɑ̈l tyëngwöödø burø." 
Acts5:22 Kɑ bölidhh ókedhø, ɑyuud ge gïn ge tøøk kì ød mɑg, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ burø." 
Acts5:23 Akööb gen kinni, “Ød mɑg ɑ́yuud yi wøn dhøge ódijø kidøøj, o tyëng-ɑ kurø ócungø ki dhø ød kì wɑ̈g, de kɑ ɑ́yieb wøn en, bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́yod yi wøn kì yije.”" 
Acts5:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi jɑggi ókwër geki pëjji bölidhhi Kengø, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen ceg-ɑ cung ki mendwøng, de ge pyëny-ɑ ri gen, mɑ løge ngø ɑ cwöbø kipe tyëngwöödø." 
Acts5:25 Kɑ jɑl megø bï-ɑ ød, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́leengu ød mɑg, ge ócungø kì Kengø, ge pwöny-ɑ teedø!”" 
Acts5:26 Kɑ pënyi bölidhh kedh-ɑ Kengø geki jøge, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l gen tyëngwöödø mɑ̈ɑ̈dh, e bong cïr, mɑ́ ge óböggø kipe ge óbɑ̈lli yi teedø." 
Acts5:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ge gïn, ɑcïb gen bøli burø, kɑ ge pyëj yi Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kinni," 
Acts5:28 “Wu nuti kyëddi wøn ki mendwøng, kinni wu ko pwönyi ki nyingɑni? De wu yöd wu pɑ̈ng-ɑ Yerusɑlem ki pwönyø mi wun, wu dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, o cöngi jɑlɑni cïb wun kömi wøn!”" 
Acts5:29 Kɑ Pïtør geki tyëngwöödø ólöggø kinni, “Lɑ̈w kɑ̀ lïngi wøn kwøbbi Jwøk kibøli ke di lïngi wøn kwøbbi ji." 
Acts5:30 Yëso, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi wun, e ngɑɑb wu’ ri yɑdh, ɑ́tug yi Jwøøg kweyyee." 
Acts5:31 Ácïb yi Jwøk wïj kyëje, kɑ gø gwøge ɑ́ Jɑgø, kɑ løg-ɑ Yïëdi, o tyëng Isrɑil wëgge ki keny yewi gen, o orøøg gen lɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
Acts5:32 O wø bɑ cwɑ̈gg kipe møgɑni, o Wëykwërø men-ɑ ɑ́mëgge tyëng-ɑ mïdhi kwøbbe, bɑ cwɑ̈g thyew.”" 
Acts5:33 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi jɑggi burø, ɑkënyi pëthi gen ki mendwøng, ge dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi gïn." 
Acts5:34 De ɑ́dɑ jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen mɑ Jɑlpɑresì, me cwøl ɑ́ Gɑmɑliel, me bɑ jɑlpwönyi Cigg me pere teeg ki mendwøng kì kelli teedø bëne. Kɑ Gɑmɑliel okööbø kinni, kɑɑl tyëngɑni ki kïdhi wɑ̈g." 
Acts5:35 Aköbbe jɑggi burø kinni, “Wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil, dwøøgu opɑ̈wi wun piny kipe gïn-ɑ dwɑddu göggi jøgɑni." 
Acts5:36 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni Thyødɑs ɑ́dhwödh cøn, kɑ okööbø kinni bɑ jɑldwøng, kɑ jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ miy ɑ́ngwen løg-ɑ bɑnge. De ɑ́nɑ̈g kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́løg bɑnge ókedhhø." 
Acts5:37 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ jɑl Gɑlelì ólunyø dhwödhø, kì yethi cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kwɑɑn ji, kɑ ji møøgø peeje bɑnge. Kɑ nɑ̈g thyew, kɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́løg bɑnge bënn ókedhhø." 
Acts5:38 De ɑnɑn yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kì ri møg kinni, dwøøg wun opɑ̈wi wun piny, kɑ jøgɑni wiy wun, mɑ́ keløg kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi gen, wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ pwönyi yi gen kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yi ji, ge ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
Acts5:39 De keløg ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, ge pɑ cuggi tyɑmø yi wun, mɑ́ ri wun óyod yi wun kinni, wu nyïɑ̈ggi kɑ Jwøk.” Kɑ møge yïëy yi jɑggi burø."
