Acts5:40 Acwööl tyëngwöödø ød, ɑpwöd ge gïn, kɑ gï ceg gen kinni wiy gen kwøb kì ri nyingi Yëso. Kɑ ge wiy kedh gen." 
Acts5:41 Kɑ tyëngwöödø kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g kì bøli burø, pëthi gen omedø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́yod yi Jwøk ge døøj ki ngïïnø ki ɑyɑ̈r, kipe nyingi Yëso." 
Acts5:42 Kɑ ge nyii pwönyø kì Kengø yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kí cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, kinni Yëso ɑ bɑ Mesiy." 
Acts6:1 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, tyëngbɑng Yëso ɑ́kedh kwɑnni gen óngënyø, kɑ tyëng Ibru kwɑ̈dhhi yi tyëng-ɑ nyi kööbø ki dhø Yönɑn kinni, thwömmi gen nyi wiy-ɑ wɑ̈g kenyi pɑ̈ngi jɑmmì, kì yethi cyɑ̈ng." 
Acts6:2 Kɑ jøbɑng Yëso bënn, cwøl yi pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryewɑni, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Wø pɑ wïyi ki pwönyi kwøbbi Jwøk, o wø pëggi wøn be tenyi kwøbbi gïgcɑmm." 
Acts6:3 De kɑ̈bbi wun nyiimïɑ, ki jøg-ɑ cwøw ɑ́bïryew mø bëëdi gen døøj kì kelli wun, gɑ ji mø wɑ̈thi gen pel, mø pëthi gen pɑ̈ng yi Wëykwërø, o ge cïb wøn kömi gwøngɑni," 
Acts6:4 o gwøøg wøn bëëde ɑ́ mɑlli Jwøk, kí pwönyi kwøbbi Jwøk.”" 
Acts6:5 Kɑ møg-ɑ kømmi yi tyëngwöödø yïëy yi ɑkunɑni bëne, kɑ Istïpen, ngɑn-ɑ pyëwe pɑ̈ng yi yïëyø kí Wëykwërø kwɑny, geki Pïlïp, kí Prökörɑs, kí Nikɑnør, kí Timøn, kí Pɑrmïnɑ̀, kí Nikölɑ̀ jɑl Anthɑkiyɑ̀ mɑ ree ɑ́løge Yeudì." 
Acts6:6 Kɑ jøgɑni cïb gen bøli tyëngwöödø. Akwɑjji Jwøk yi tyëngwöödø, kɑ cinggi gen thɑɑny gen kömi gïn." 
Acts6:7 Kɑ kwøbbi Jwøk otɑyø, kɑ kwɑnni jøbɑng Yëso óngënyø ki mendwøng kì Yerusɑlem, kɑ ji mø gïïr kì kelli ókwër oyïëyø." 
Acts6:8 Kɑ Istïpen, ngɑn-ɑ pyëwe pɑ̈ng yi dhwɑ̈ng, kí tegø men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk, ogöögø ki ngïjjì kí gïïngɑ̈ngø mø døngø kì kelli teedø." 
Acts6:9 Kɑ kwï tyëng sinɑgøg, men-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ sinɑgøøg Jøg-ɑ Ágøny, ɑ kelli gen di tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Serin, kí Iskɑnderiyɑ̀, kí Kilikiyɑ̀, kí Ásiyɑ̀, opëmø ki Istïpen." 
Acts6:10 Adhɑɑl gen yi kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi en, mɑ́ e ɑ́nëng-ɑ yi Wëykwërø ki peli wïj men-ɑ 'kööbe." 
Acts6:11 Kɑ ge ongëwø ki ji møg köngi kinni, “Jɑlɑni ɑ́lïngi yi wøn, e okööbø ki kwøb mø rijjø kì ri Mosɑ̀ geki Jwøk!”" 
Acts6:12 Kɑ teedø kí jøgdøngø, kí jøpwönyi Cigg cwɑɑg mɑl yi gen, kɑ ge bï-ɑ kömi Istïpen, kɑ gø mɑg gen, kɑ gø kïdhi gen burø." 
Acts6:13 Kɑ ge ókɑ̈nø ki ji møg köngi ki pyed kinni, “Jɑlɑni pɑ nyi wïyi ki kømmi kwøb mø rijjø kì ri Kengi kwër, geki Ciggi Mosɑ̀." 
Acts6:14 Kɑ lïngi wøn e okööbø kinni, i Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth Kengø ócøøre piny, o kwöng men-ɑ ɑ́wöni kì ri Mosɑ̀ e omïdhø yi wɑ gø wile.”" 
Acts6:15 Kɑ teen-ɑ burø nenn-ɑ yïe, kɑ bøle lidh gen e nɑ bøli wëywödø." 
Acts7:1 Apyëjii yi Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kinni, “Kwøbbɑni bɑ dyër?”" 
Acts7:2 Kɑ Istïpen ólöggø kinni, “Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ kí wëëgɑ, lïngu møgɑ! Jwøng-ɑ yïe di dhwɑ̈ng ɑ́cwöb kì bøli Abrɑhɑm kweyee, keny-ɑ ɑ́yinge Misøpøtɑmiyɑ̀, e nuti dɑ̈gi Arɑn," 
Acts7:3 kɑ gø köbbe kinni, ‘Dhwöödh kì pödhi wun; kì kelli wɑddi wun, kɑ yï bïí yij pönh-ɑ ónyudhɑ yïn.’" 
Acts7:4 Codhe, ɑdhwödhe kì pödhi gen, kɑ kedh-ɑ be bëëdø kì Arɑn. O kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́thøw wïyi Abrɑhɑm, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l Abrɑhɑm piny-ɑ yije bëëd wun èn yi Jwøk." 
Acts7:5 O nuti thödhø yi Jwøk ki piny mɑ mi nyinge, wɑlɑ̀ nuti nëng en ki keny cïbe tyele, de Jwøk ɑ́köngi kinni pinyɑni óbëëd ɑ́ mee; en kí kwɑrre. Abrɑhɑm ɑ́bëëd yïe bong wɑ̈de kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbii møgɑni yi Jwøk." 
Acts7:6 Akööb Jwøk kinni, ‘Kwɑrrí óbëëdø kì pödhø me pɑth, gɑ bɑ̈ngg, o nyingi gen óguud ki runn miy ɑ́ngwen." 
Acts7:7 De pönh-ɑ ógwøg gen gɑ bɑ̈ngg ócɑy yi yɑn, codhe o kwɑrrí bï gen wɑ̈g kì pönhɑni, o yɑ mɑlli yi gen kì keny.’" 
Acts7:8 Kɑ kwööng ngølø mëggi Abrɑhɑm yi Jwøk, ɑ́ ngïji mi kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg yi gen kì bøli kenyɑni. Anywøøl Isɑɑk yi Abrɑhɑm, kɑ gø ngøle kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng. Kɑ Yɑgob ngøl yi Isɑɑk, kɑ Yɑgob wɑ̈dde gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew ngøle, ɑ løg kweyyi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llee gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew." 
Acts7:9 “Kɑ Yosep mod yi kweyyee, kɑ gø ngeew gen wɑ̈g, ɑkïdhii Rïp. De ɑ́køny yi Jwøk," 
Acts7:10 kɑ gø yiele kì yethi rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́bï köme bënn, kɑ thödhi yi Jwøk ki medi pyëw geki peli wïj kì bøli rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, ɑrønyii yi rɑ̈dh ɑ́ jɑgø kì kömi Rïp bëne, kí kömi gøle thyew." 
Acts7:11 Kɑ kɑ̈j me dwøng bï-ɑ kömi Rïp bëne geki Kɑnɑɑn, kɑ kweyyee ojɑdø ki gïncɑm." 
Acts7:12 Kɑ Yɑgob olïngø kinni i dɑ byel kì Rïp, ɑöre kweyyee ki öri tyeli mɑl." 
Acts7:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cige gïn örø, kɑ Yosep ree nyudhe nyiimen, kɑ kwøbbi gøl yɑɑ Yosep yod yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp." 
Acts7:14 Kɑ Yosep oödø, ɑcwøøle Yɑgob wïye kun-ɑ di en, geki gøle bëne, e kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew wïdɑ́bïj." 
Acts7:15 Kɑ Yɑgob kedh-ɑ Rïp. Kɑ othøø, geki kweyyee." 
Acts7:16 Kɑ cu gen tëër Cekïm, kɑ ge koony kej tyëngthøø men-ɑ ɑ́ngew yi Abrɑhɑm ki ngyëny kì yï kwɑrri Amör." 
Acts7:17 “Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh bøli kej gwøgi møg-ɑ ɑ́köngi Abrɑhɑm yi Jwøk e ócyɑ̈ngø, kedh kwɑnni ji ceg-ɑ ngënyø kì Rïp." 
Acts7:18 Arøøny rɑ̈dh megø kì kömi Rïp, me kwïj Yosep." 
Acts7:19 Kɑ juree wëny yi en, kɑ nyingi gïn guude, kɑ kweyyee cïrre weddi nyigi gen, kipe kinni o ge nyi thøw gen." 
Acts7:20 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́nywøøl Mosɑ̀, o ɑ́bëëd e myëër ki mendwøng. Kɑ pidh kì gøl wïye ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Acts7:21 De keny-ɑ ɑ́weddii, ɑkwɑnyii yi nyɑɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, ɑpidhe gøn, e nɑ wɑ̈de ceth." 
Acts7:22 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ pwönyi ki peli wïj Rïp. Kɑ ogöögø ki jɑl me pere teg, me kømmi dyër, o gøgg-ɑ dyër." 
Acts7:23 “Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög runne ki pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, ɑkööbe ki pyëwe kinni, dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi be këëmi nyiimen, gen ɑ kwɑrri Isrɑil." 
Acts7:24 Kɑ ólïdhø ki ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen, e orujø yi wɑ̈d Rïp, ɑcwɑge gøn, kɑ wɑ̈d Rïp nɑ̈ge." 
Acts7:25 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ orumø kinni, di yod yi nyiimen kinni, bɑ ngɑn-ɑ ógwøg yi Jwøk ɑ́ men yiel gen, de møgɑni nuti yood gen." 
Acts7:26 Dhuki ɑyuude ji møøgø kì kelli gen, ge owërø. Aköbbe gïn e lug-ɑ gen kinni, ‘Lïng wun jøg, wu bɑ nyiimëëg, wude ɑ göggu ri wun ki gïnrɑj?’" 
Acts7:27 Adhurii wɑ̈ye yi jɑl-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑg wɑɑd gen piny, kɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Á men ɑ ɑ́røny yïn, yïn ɑ́ jɑgø men nenni gønyyi wøn?" 
Acts7:28 Yï dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yɑn ni kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g wɑ̈d Rïp ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈?’ 
Acts7:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Mosɑ̀, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈re kì Rïp, kɑ kedh-ɑ be bëëdø kì Midyɑn, kɑ ónywølø ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew kì kunɑni." 
Acts7:30 “Kɑ ɑ́pöödh runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, ɑcwöb wëywödø kì yij nyɑ kïrø me lyel ki mɑc, kì yij pɑ̈l kì buti Kïti Sinɑy." 
Acts7:31 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Mosɑ̀, ɑngɑ̈nge kɑ nyeg-ɑ buti nyɑ kïrɑni, kinni o tie lïdhø. Kɑ cwɑggi Wë lïnge e okööbø kinni," 
Acts7:32 ‘Yɑ bene Jwøøg kweyyi wun, Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob.’ Kɑ Mosɑ̀ dële okïrrø, kɑ obwøgø ki lïïdh kenyɑni." 
Acts7:33 Kɑ köbbi yi Wë kinni, ‘Kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑrrí wɑ̈g kì tyellí, mɑ́ keny-ɑ cungi yi yïn èn bɑ kej kwër." 
Acts7:34 Tung-ɑ tuug jiɑ kì Rïp ɑ́lidh yi yɑn, kɑ ywøøg gen lïngɑ, ɑbëënɑ piny be yieli gen. Bïí ɑnɑn, o yï örɑ Rïp.’" 
Acts7:35 “Mosɑ̀, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bɑny yi gen, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, ‘Á men ɑ ɑ́røny yïn, yïn ɑ́ jɑgø men nenni gønyyi wøn?’ Bɑ en ɑ ɑ́ör yi Jwøk ɑ jɑgø men yïëdø, e køny-ɑ yi wëywödø men-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì bøle kì ri nyɑ kïrø." 
Acts7:36 Kɑ jie peeje wɑ̈g kì Rïp, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́gööge ki ngïjjì kí gïïngɑ̈ngø kì Rïp, kí yij Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø. Kɑ gï pyejje kì yij pɑ̈l ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen." 
Acts7:37 Bɑ Mosɑ̀ kiree ɑ ɑ́köbbi tyëng Isrɑil kinni, ‘Wu óödi yi Jwøk ki jɑltöng, ni kɑ ɑ́öre yɑn.’" 
Acts7:38 Bɑ Mosɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈lli tyëng Isrɑil kì yij pɑ̈l, o bɑ en ɑ ɑ́reb kweyye ki wëywön-ɑ ɑ́kööb ki en kì wïj Kïti Sinɑy, e nyi kwɑny-ɑ kwøbbi nënnì kì yïe, o gï nyi lonye ki muuj wɑ." 
Acts7:39 “De kwøbbi Mosɑ̀ ɑ́bɑny yi kweyyee, kɑ gø cøør gen wɑ̈ye. Aløg gen pëthi gen Rïp." 
Acts7:40 Kɑ Aɑron köbbi gen kinni, ‘Cwɑ̈jjí wɑ ki jwøg men cyɑ̈dhi kì bølee, mɑ́ gïn-ɑ mɑɑg Mosɑ̀, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́pëëj wɑ wɑ̈g kì Rïp, kwïj yi wɑ.’" 
Acts7:41 Kɑ ge ocwɑ̈jø ki røjø kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, gøn-ɑ́ jwøøg gen, kɑ gø ngɑ̈ddi gen ki gëdhhì, kɑ pëthi gen ómïnø ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi gen ki cinggi gen." 
Acts7:42 Kɑ Jwøk ngɑ̈je luge gïn, kɑ gï wëgge mɑlli kyelli mɑl, ni kɑ ógwedii kì yij wɑ̈nyi jøtöng kinni, ‘Yïn ɑ gøl Isrɑil, pɑth ki yɑn ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈ddi yi wun ki gëdhhì ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen kì yij pɑ̈l." 
Acts7:43 Wu ɑ́kɑ̈ll-ɑ kemɑ̀ mi Mölek geki ngïji Repɑn, jwøøg kyelø; bene gen ngïjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun gɑ møg mɑlli yi wun. O wu kïdhɑ’ yïnø ngɑ̈ɑ̈j Bɑbïl, kipe kɑ ɑ́gwøg wun gïn ni menɑni.’" 
Acts7:44 “Kweyyee yï gen ɑ́dɑ Kemi Jwøk mɑ ɑ́kɑ̈lli yi gen kì yij pɑ̈l; en ɑ kemɑ̀ men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Mosɑ̀, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Jwøk kinni gwøge gøn e pɑ̈r ki men-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi en." 
Acts7:45 Kemɑni ɑ́lɑg yi kweyyee; en ɑ ɑ́tyëddi yi gen kì mɑl keny-ɑ ɑ́mɑg gen pödhhi jurr-ɑ ɑ́cyeddi yi Jwøk kì bøli gen, ge pyejj-ɑ yi Jöcwø. Kɑ kemɑni obëëdø e nud pïd ri Rɑ̈dh Debïd." 
Acts7:46 Jwøk pyëwe ɑ́bëëd e med ki Debïd. Kɑ Jwøk kwɑjji yi Debïd kinni wiy gëdde Jwøøg Yɑgob ki keny yije bëëde. 
Acts7:47 De ɑ́gëdd-ɑ yi Sølømøn ki ød. 
Acts7:48 “De Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng, pɑ nyi bëëdø kì udd-ɑ ger yi ji ki cinggi gen, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi jɑltöng kinni," 
Acts7:49 ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, mɑl bɑ kwømɑ, o piny bɑ thɑ̈nhi tyellɑ. Á ød me bëëdø kidï ɑ ógërru yɑn? Wɑlɑ̀ kej ywömɑ ying-ɑ keny?" 
Acts7:50 Pɑth ki yɑn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j jɑmmɑni bënn?’ 
Acts7:51 “Muddi wun teeg ki mendwøng! Pëthi wun bogïn, o yïthhi wun pɑ lïngø! Wu nudd wu opëmø ki kwøbbi Wëykwërø, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd kweyyi wun ceth." 
Acts7:52 Dɑ jɑltöng ɑ́kyel me wɑnge nuti bɑɑrø yi kweyyi wun? Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́töng kwøbbi bëëni ngɑntir nuti mɑɑg wun kɑ ge nɑ̈g yi wun? 
Acts7:53 Ciggi Jwøk ɑ́kwɑny yi wun ɑ cinggi wëywödd, de ciggɑni ɑ́cög ge pɑ mïdhi yi wun.”" 
Acts7:54 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbi Istïpen yi jɑggi burø, kɑ ge ceg-ɑ kënyø ki mendwøng, kɑ leggi gen kɑjji gen kipe Istïpen." 
Acts7:55 Kɑ Istïpen nenn-ɑ mɑl e pyëwe pɑ̈ngø yi Wëykwërø, kɑ dhwɑ̈ng Jwøk lidhe, o Yëso ócungø kì wïj kyëëj Jwøk." 
Acts7:56 Akööbe kinni, “Mɑl onennø yi yɑn e bɑ ɑyieb, o Nyɑɑr Dhɑnhø ócungø kì wïj kyëëj Jwøk!”" 
Acts7:57 Kɑ ge óryeerø, yïthhi gen kum gen, kɑ ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ köme." 
Acts7:58 Kɑ gø kïdhi gen wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, gø kïdhi ge’ be bɑ̈llø ki tuggi kïttì. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ bɑ̈llii ógudhi gen cïb gen bøli wøb me cwøl ɑ́ Cɑul." 
Acts7:59 Kɑ Istïpen bɑ̈lli gen, e kwɑjj-ɑ Wë kinni, “Wuö Yëso, kwɑny wëyɑ.”" 
Acts7:60 Arume cønge piny, kɑ óryeerø kinni, “Wuö, orøg men ko cïb kömi gen.” Kɑ ɑ́rume kwøbi møgɑni, ɑthøwe." 
Acts8:1 Cɑul ɑ́bëëd e yïëyø ki nɑ̈ge. Kɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Yerusɑlem wɑnge cɑg ki guudø ki mendwøng kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth. Atɑɑy tyëngyïëyø kelli Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, ɑdöng tyëngwöödø keti gen." 
Acts8:2 Kɑ Istïpen kony yi jøg mø wør Jwøk, kɑ gø ywøg gen ki mendwøng." 
Acts8:3 De Cɑul kedh e rëny-ɑ kɑnïsɑ̀, kɑ nyi pödh-ɑ yethi ud, kɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw geki mɑ̈nn nyi ywɑ̈ɑ̈je wɑ̈g, kɑ gï nyi leenge ød mɑg." 
Acts8:4 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́tɑy ócyɑ̈dhø ge cɑngg-ɑ myërr, ge pwöny-ɑ wöndøj." 
Acts8:5 Kɑ Pïlïp kedh-ɑ kɑɑl megø kì kelli kɑ̈ddi Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, kɑ ócɑ̈gø pwönyi per Mesiy kì yethi kɑ̈ddɑni." 
Acts8:6 Kɑ kwøbbe yïëy yi tyëngɑni bënn kidøøj, mɑ́ ge ɑ́lïng ki kwøbbi gïïngɑ̈ngø møge, o møøgø ɑ́ceg-ɑ lïdhø." 
Acts8:7 Kɑ wëyrijjø bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ri ji ge okïïwø ki cwɑg mø døngø. Kɑ ji mø gïïr mø dëlli gen rɑ̈mø, kí ɑdwɑnyy, kí møg-ɑ bɑ ngöll yiel." 
Acts8:8 Kɑ medi pyëw me dwøng løg-ɑ me nud kì kɑɑlɑni. 
Acts8:9 Jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Sɑymøn, me bɑ ɑjwøgø ɑ́bëëd ɑ kɑɑlɑni, e kømm-ɑ ree cem ɑ́ ngɑn pere teg, kɑ tyëng Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ nyii dɑɑyø yi gwøge." 
Acts8:10 Kɑ ji bënn; tyëngdøngø ki othønhø, tyer-ɑ lïngi møge, kɑ ge nyii kööbø kinni, “Jɑɑl bɑ tegi Jwøk; teng-ɑ dwøng.”" 
Acts8:11 Kɑ møge nyi lïngi gen kidøøj, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bëëd ge dɑɑyø ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r yi thyënh-ɑ nyi thyëdh yi en." 
Acts8:12 De kɑ ɑ́yïëy gen ki mø Pïlïp, kɑ ɑ́lwøbe Wöndøj men-ɑ kööbø kì ri Pödhi Jwøk geki kwøbbi Yëso Mesiy, ɑjwɑ̈ɑ̈g gen; cwøw kí mɑ̈nn." 
Acts8:13 Sɑymøn kiree ɑ́yïëy, kɑ jwɑ̈ɑ̈g, kɑ dɑ̈g-ɑ be cyɑ̈dhø ki Pïlïp. Kɑ nyii ngɑ̈ngø, kenyi lïdhe ki ngïjjì geki gïgdøngø møg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi Pïlïp." 
Acts8:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng tyëngwöödø møg-ɑ ying Yerusɑlem kinni, kwøbbi Jwøk ɑ́yïëy yi tyëng Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, ɑör gen Pïtør geki Jøn." 
Acts8:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi gen Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, ɑkwɑ̈jji gen kipe kinni o tyëng Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ kömi gen bëën yi Wëykwërø." 
Acts8:16 Mɑ́ Wëykwërø nuti wöl bëën kömi dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen, de ge ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g kɑ nyingi Wë Yëso kete." 
Acts8:17 Codhe, ɑthɑɑny gen cinggi gen kömi tyëngɑni, kɑ ge óyïddø ki Wëykwërø." 
Acts8:18 Kɑ lidh yi Sɑymøn kinni, Wëykwërø ɑ́mëggi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy kɑ thɑɑnyi cinggi tyëngwöödø kömi gen. Anënge Pïtør geki Jøn ki ngyëny," 
Acts8:19 kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Nëngu yɑn ki tengɑni thyew, o ngɑn-ɑ köme nyi thɑɑnyɑ cinggɑ nyi yïdde ki Wëykwërø.”" 
Acts8:20 Aköbbii yi Pïtør kinni, “Yï ókedhi pödhi tyëngthøø wuki ngyënyyí, mɑ́ yï orumø kinni, gïg-ɑ nyi muuj yi Jwøk ócuggø ngewø yi yïn ki ngyëny." 
Acts8:21 Nyingí bogïn kì ri gwøøg wøn, bong gïn yod yi yïn kì ree, mɑ́ møg-ɑ ying pyëwí pɑ døøj kì bøli Jwøk." 
Acts8:22 Yewí ki rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn, kɑ Wë kwɑjjí, men-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe ki yïn ki gööj møg-ɑ ying pyëwí." 
Acts8:23 Yɑ ɑ́lïdhi kinni, yï keej nɑ kenø, o yï bɑ ɑtwöj yi orøg.”" 
Acts8:24 Kɑ Sɑymøn ólöggø kinni, “Kwɑjju Wë kiperɑ, o bongii gïjø ɑ́kyel me bï kömɑ kì ri møg-ɑ kømmi yi wun.”" 
Acts8:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki thyeri møg-ɑ ying pëthi gen, kí kømmi kwøbbi Wë, ɑdøøg gen Yerusɑlem, ge pwöny-ɑ wöndøj kì yethi myërri Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ mø ngenyø." 
Acts8:26 Kɑ Pïlïp köbbi yi wëywöni Wë kinni, “Dhwöödh, kɑ yï kedhí kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kɑ yï kɑ̈l yuu-ɑ kedh kì Yerusɑlem e kedh-ɑ Gɑdhɑ̀.” (Yuuɑni ɑ́wiy ki cɑɑdhø ɑnɑn.)" 
Acts8:27 Adhwödhe, kɑ ókedhø. Alïdhe ki jɑl Kuc me bɑ órøj. Bɑ jɑng-ɑ mïdhi jɑmmi gøldwøøng Kɑndɑkɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kuc, rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø. Jɑlɑni bëën-ɑ Yerusɑlem be mɑlli Jwøk," 
Acts8:28 de døøg-ɑ pödhi gen ki yɑ̈ye; yɑ̈y-ɑ nyi pyejji yi kyënyì, e orɑ̈ngø ki wɑ̈nyi Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng." 
Acts8:29 Kɑ Pïlïp köbbi yi Wëykwërø kinni, “Pödhí bølí, kɑ yɑ̈y-ɑcɑ̀ pïïd, kɑ yï cyɑ̈dhí yï cyɑ̈gi ki en.”" 
Acts8:30 Kɑ Pïlïp jwɑn-ɑ yï yɑ̈yɑni, kɑ jɑlɑni lïnge e orɑ̈ngø kì yij wɑ̈nyi Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng. Apyëje jɑlɑni kinni, “Møg-ɑ rɑng yi yïn olïngø yi yïn?”" 
Acts8:31 Kɑ ólöggø kinni, “Ge ócuggi lïngø yi yɑn kidï, e bong ngɑn nyudhi yɑn?” Acwøle Pïlïp kinni kɑdhe yij yɑ̈y kɑ pëgge bute." 
Acts8:32 Møg-ɑ ɑ́rɑng yi en kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø bɑ kinni, ‘Ápej e nɑ dyel men kïdhi be ngɑlø; nɑ órömø kì bøli tyëng-ɑ nyɑr yëyye; nuti wöl löggø." 
Acts8:33 Ágwøg e bong pere, kɑ ruj. Bong ngɑn-ɑ ócuggi lwøbi kwɑrre, mɑ́ wëye ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì kömi piny.’" 
Acts8:34 Kɑ mø Pïlïp løøg yi jɑlɑni kinni, “Köbbí yɑn, ɑ́ men, ɑ kømmi yi jɑltöng kinøw? Kømm-ɑ ree, wɑlɑ̀ kømm-ɑ ngɑn megø?”" 
Acts8:35 Codhe, kɑ Pïlïp dhøge tuge, e cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ ri møgɑni, kɑ gø löbbe wöndøj mi Yëso." 
Acts8:36 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi gen kì kö yöö, ɑwɑ̈dhi gen keny me di pï. Kɑ jɑlɑni okööbø kinni, “Lidh, pï ek. Á gïn ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈n yɑn jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø?”" 
Acts8:37 Kɑ Pïlïp okööbø kinni, “Keløg yï yïëyø ki pyëwí bëne, yï ócuggø jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø.” Alögge kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́yïëy kinni, Yëso Mesiy bɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk.”" 
Acts8:38 Kɑ okööbø kinni cuung yɑ̈y. Akedhi Pïlïp yethi pï geki jɑlɑni, kɑ gø jwɑ̈ɑ̈ge." 
Acts8:39 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën gen wɑ̈g kì yethi pï, ɑgwɑɑr Pïlïp yi Wëyi Wë, kɑ ocögø e pɑ lidh yi jɑlɑni këti, kɑ jɑlɑni kedh-ɑ yuue pyëwe omedø." 
Acts8:40 Kɑ Pïlïp ree yode e ying-ɑ Acdöd, ɑpödhe Kɑysɑriyɑ̀ e cyɑ̈dhi e pwöny-ɑ wöndøj kì yethi myërr bënn." 
Acts9:1 Cɑul nuti wïyø ki guudi nyingi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy Wë, kí nɑ̈gi gen; kɑ kedh-ɑ yï Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng," 
Acts9:2 ɑcwödde ki wɑ̈j kì yïe møg mëggi jɑggi sinɑgøgg kì Dimɑceg, kipe kinni o tyëng Wë møg-ɑ óyod yi en, gɑ cwøw wɑlɑ̀ mɑ̈nn, gï kɑ̈ɑ̈le Yerusɑlem, gɑ ɑtwöj." 
Acts9:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈nge ki Dimɑceg, kɑ piny ceg-ɑ ì tɑr, yi cɑr me kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl." 
Acts9:4 Apɑ̈ɑ̈dhe, kɑ olïngø ki cwɑg mø köbbii kinni, “Cɑul, Cɑul! Yïde ɑ guud wɑngɑ?”" 
Acts9:5 Apëjji Cɑul kinni, “Yïn ɑ́ men, Wuö?” Kɑ cwɑggɑni okööbø kinni, “Yɑ Yëso, ngɑn-ɑ wɑngí cuulø ki en." 
Acts9:6 De dhwödhí mɑl, kɑ yï kedhí kɑɑldwøng, o yï köbbi kì kenyɑni ki gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi yïn.”" 
Acts9:7 Kɑ jøg-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki en ócungø, ge kudø, ge lïng-ɑ cwɑg, de bong dhɑnhø me nenni yi gen." 
Acts9:8 Adhwödh Cɑul, kɑ pej yi jøgɑni kì cinge, kɑ gø kïdhi gen Dimɑceg." 
Acts9:9 Kɑ orïïjø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g nyinge pɑ nëënø, o pɑ cyɑ̈mø wɑlɑ̀ pɑ mɑ̈dhø ki pï." 
Acts9:10 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni ɑ́dɑ jɑlbɑng Yëso kì Dimɑceg me cwøl ɑ́ Anɑniyɑ̀. Kɑ jɑlɑni cwøl yi Wë kì yethi lɑ̈g kinni, “Anɑniyɑ̀!” Kɑ oyïëyø kinni, “Yɑn èn, Wuö.”" 
Acts9:11 Kɑ köbbi yi Wë kinni, “Dhwöödh, kɑ yï kedhí yuu-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Óbödh, kɑ yï pëjjí kì gøl Yeudɑ̀, yï yɑb-ɑ jɑl Tɑrsos me cwøl ɑ́ Cɑul. Jɑlɑni ókwɑ̈jjø ɑnɑn," 
Acts9:12 o jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Anɑniyɑ̀ ɑ́lidh yi en, e bï-ɑ kɑl, kɑ cingge thɑɑnye köme kipe kinni o nyinge døøg gen be nënnø.”" 
Acts9:13 Kɑ Anɑniyɑ̀ ólöggø kinni, “Wuö, yɑ ɑ́lïng kì yï ji mø gïïr i jɑlɑni, jií møg-ɑ Yerusɑlem ge ógöggø yi en ki gïgrijjø mø ngenyø," 
Acts9:14 o ɑnɑn ɑ́bï Dimɑceg, e yïe dɑ tegø men-ɑ ɑ́mëggii yi jɑggi ókwër, kinni mɑge ji bënn møg-ɑ nyi cwöddi ki nyingí.”" 
Acts9:15 Kɑ köbbi yi Wë kinni, “Kedh, mɑ́ jɑlɑni ɑ́myeg yi yɑn ɑ́ jɑlwöödø men kɑ̈lli nyingɑ kì kelli jurr-ɑ kyeelø, kí rɑ̈nhì, kí kwɑrri Isrɑil." 
Acts9:16 O ónyudhi yi yɑn ki orɑng-ɑ óngin yi en kipe nyingɑ.” 
Acts9:17 Adhwödh Anɑniyɑ̀, kɑ pödh-ɑ gølɑni. Athɑɑnye cingge kömi Cɑul, e okööbø kinni, “Cɑul ómïɑ, Wë Yëso, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì bølí kì kö yöö, bɑ en ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn yïí, kipe kinni o nyingí døøg gen be nënnø, o yï pɑ̈ɑ̈ng yi Wëykwërø.”" 
Acts9:18 Kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kɑ gïg mø ni kwɑ́j ódëëmø kì nyinge, kɑ nyinge døøg-ɑ be nënnø. Adhwödhe, kɑ jwɑ̈ɑ̈g," 
Acts9:19 kɑ ocyɑ̈mø, kɑ dële ódøøgø tëngø. Kɑ Cɑul obëëdø kì kelli jøbɑng Yëso møg-ɑ ying Dimɑceg ki cyɑ̈ng mø nøg." 
Acts9:20 Kɑ pödh-ɑ be töngi per Yëso kì yethi sinɑgøgg kinni, “Yëso bɑ Wɑ̈d Jwøk.”" 
Acts9:21 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lïngii bënn ongɑ̈ngø, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Men pɑth ki jɑl-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g ki tyëng-ɑ nyi cwöddi ki nyingɑni kì Yerusɑlem? Ábï keny kɑ per møgɑni ceth, o tyëngɑni mɑge o gï kïdhe bøli jɑggi ókwër.”" 
Acts9:22 Kɑ Cɑul pyëwe ókedhø e ótëngø, kɑ dhøggi Yeud møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Dimɑceg nɑ̈ge, e nyudh-ɑ gïn kinni, Yëso ɑ bɑ Mesiy." 
Acts9:23 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́pöödh cyɑ̈ng mø gïïr, kɑ Yeud dhøggi gen nywɑg gen kipe nɑ̈gi Cɑul," 
Acts9:24 kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg yi gen wɑ̈dh-ɑ yïe. Kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ be kori dhøggi döri kɑɑl, kì dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r ge dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gii." 
Acts9:25 De Cɑul ɑ́kwɑny yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy kì wɑ̈r, kɑ gø miid gen piny kì wɑ̈g, gø kɑ̈ɑ̈l ge’ keny mɑ ɑyieb kì ri dörø kì yij dhöngø." 
Acts9:26 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Cɑul Yerusɑlem, ree ɑ́pɑ̈nye ki rëbø ki jii bɑng Yëso, de ge ɑ́bwøg yi gøn bënn, mɑ́ ge nuti yïëyø kinni, bɑ jɑlbɑng Yëso." 
Acts9:27 Akɑ̈ɑ̈lii yi Bɑrnɑbɑ̀, kɑ gø muuje tyëngwöödø. Alwöbbe gïn kër-ɑ ɑ́lidhe Wë kɑ okööbø ki en kì kö yöö; kí kër-ɑ ɑ́kööbe ki tegi pyëwe kì ri nyingi Yëso kì Dimɑceg." 
Acts9:28 Kɑ Cɑul obëëdø kì kelli tyëngyïëyø kì Yerusɑlem, e ópwönyø ki nyingi Wë e pɑ böggi." 
Acts9:29 Kɑ nyii kööbø ki Yeud møg-ɑ 'kööb dhø Yönɑn, e opëmø ki gïn, kɑ ge oyɑ̈bø ki keny nɑ̈g ge gøn." 
Acts9:30 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yood møgɑni yi nyiimïee, ɑlwøøg ge gøn Kɑysɑriyɑ̀, kɑ gø ör gen Tɑrsos." 
Acts9:31 Kɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Yeudiyɑ̀ bëne, kí Gɑlelì, kí Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ óyïddø ki mër, kɑ ótëngø. Kɑ tyëng kwøbbi Jwøk kedh ge óngënyø, kɑ ge obëëdø ge wør-ɑ Wë, kɑ ge nyi cïj yi Wëykwërø." 
Acts9:32 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi Pïtør kì kelli gen bënn, ɑwɑ̈nhe kun-ɑ di jii Jwøk møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Ludɑ̀ thyew." 
Acts9:33 Kɑ óyïddø ki jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Ainiyɑs, me tyëëg runn ɑ́bïdɑ̈g e dële dwɑnyø, pɑ nyi dhwödh kì yij pyën." 
Acts9:34 Kɑ köbbi yi Pïtør kinni, “Ainiyɑs, yï ɑ́yiel yi Yëso Mesiy, dhwödhí mɑl, kɑ pyëní pyëël.” Kɑ odhwödhø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Acts9:35 Kɑ tyëng Ludɑ̀ kí tyëng Cɑrön bënn Wë yïëy yi gen, kɑ ɑ́lidh gen jɑlɑni." 
Acts9:36 Ádɑ ngetibɑng Yëso megø kì Yɑpɑ̀ me cwøl ɑ́ Tɑbïthɑ̀, (nyinge ki dhø Yönɑn bɑ Dørkɑs, o wɑng-ɑ ɑ́køny). Ngɑnɑni nyi rïïjø e køny-ɑ tyëng-ɑ jɑdø, e ogöögø ki gïgdøj." 
Acts9:37 Kɑ dële ócɑ̈gø ki rɑ̈m kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, kɑ othøø; de kɑ ɑ́rume lwøgø yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ying köme, ɑpyëël ge gøn ød mɑl." 
Acts9:38 O Ludɑ̀ kelli gen cyɑ̈gi ki Yɑpɑ̀. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy kinni, Pïtør nud kì Yɑpɑ̀, ɑöd gen ki jøg ɑ́ryew møg kedhi be kwɑjji Pïtør kinni, “Jwɑn bëën yï wøn, yï ko cwööng.”" 
Acts9:39 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Pïtør, kɑ ókedhø ki gïn. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe, ɑkïdhi ge gøn ød mɑl. Kɑ thwömm bënn ócugø kì bute, ge óywöngø, ge nyødh-ɑ ógudh-ɑ ókwenø, kí ɑ́ywödhh-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø yi Dørkɑs, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde e onëënø." 
Acts9:40 Kɑ tyëngɑni bënn ör wɑ̈g yi Pïtør, kɑ pëgg-ɑ wɑ̈thi cønge, kɑ ókwɑ̈jjø. Codhe, ɑløge ree yï ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thøw, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Tɑbïthɑ̀, dhwödhí mɑl.” Kɑ nyinge yiebe, ɑlidhe Pïtør, kɑ dhwödh-ɑ mɑl." 
Acts9:41 Kɑ Pïtør cinge mëgge gøn, kɑ gø tïnge mɑl. Codhe, ɑcwøle nyiimëëg geki thwömm, ɑmëgge gø gïn e onëënø." 
Acts9:42 Kɑ møgɑni wɑ̈dh-ɑ kelli teedø bëne kì Yɑpɑ̀, kɑ Wë yïëy yi ji mø ngenyø." 
Acts9:43 Kɑ Pïtør obëëdø kì Yɑpɑ̀ ki cyɑ̈ng mø ngenyø, kì buti Sɑymøn bødhi nginy ki pënnì." 
Acts10:1 Ádɑ jɑl megø kì Kɑysɑriyɑ̀ me cwøl ɑ́ Kornelyøs. Jɑlɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ dhɑbïdh kì yij kɑtïm-ɑ nyi cwøl ɑ́ kɑtïbi Itɑliyɑ̀. 
Acts10:2 Bɑ ngɑntir, me böggi Jwøk geki gøle bëne. Nyii muujø kì ri jɑmme, kɑ Jwøk nyi kwɑjji yi en kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
Acts10:3 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kì sɑɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g kì böörø, kɑ wëywöni Jwøk lidh yi en kidøøj kì yethi lɑ̈g, e bï-ɑ yïe, kɑ gø cwøle kinni, “Kornelyøs!”" 
Acts10:4 Kɑ nenn-ɑ yï wëywönɑni, e óböggø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Á ngø, Wuö?” Kɑ köbbi yi wëywönɑni kinni, “Kwɑ̈jjí geki muunyí ɑ́wɑ̈dhi mɑl gɑ møg pɑɑr yïn kì bøli Jwøk." 
Acts10:5 De ɑnɑn, ödí Yɑpɑ̀ ki ji møg dwɑɑy Sɑymøn, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Pïtør." 
Acts10:6 Jɑlɑni bëëd ɑ gøl Sɑymøn bødhi nginy ki pënnì, ɑ gøle ying-ɑ tøg nɑɑm omelø.”" 
Acts10:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh wëywödø men-ɑ ɑ́kööb ki en, ɑcwödde ki ji ɑ́ryew kì kelli tyëng-ɑ nyi göggii, kí ɑlɑthker ɑ́kyel me gɑ̈nni Jwøk kì kelli jøg-ɑ nyi korii." 
Acts10:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume lwöbi gïn møgɑni bënn, ɑöre gïn Yɑpɑ̀." 
Acts10:9 Dhuki ge ócyɑ̈ngø ki Yɑpɑ̀, ɑyedhi Pïtør mɑl wïj óthɑɑng ød, kì dicɑ̈ng, be kwɑjji Jwøk." 
Acts10:10 Amɑgii yi kɑ̈j, kɑ pyëwe dwɑdd-ɑ cɑm. De kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd gïncɑm ogwøgø, ɑbëëde e dhɑ̈y ce ceg-ɑ nwɑyyø." 
Acts10:11 Alidhe mɑl ree yieeb en, o gïjø me ni mɑlɑyɑ̀ me dwøng kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, e kɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ piny kì wɑ̈thi tùnge gɑ ɑ́ngwen." 
Acts10:12 Mɑlɑyɑni yije dɑ wɑ̈thi lɑ̈yy bënn, kí gïg-ɑ nyi mulli kì piny, kí winy." 
Acts10:13 Kɑ cwɑg bï-ɑ yïe kinni, “Pïtør, dhwödhí mɑl. Ngɑ̈ɑ̈d, kɑ yï cyɑ̈ɑ̈m.”" 
Acts10:14 Kɑ Pïtør ólöggø kinni, “Pɑ cuggi Wuö! Yɑ nuti wöl cɑm ki gïn ywëdhø wɑlɑ̀ gïn-ɑ bɑ ɑbwöl!”" 
Acts10:15 Kɑ cwɑggɑni cig-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg e dhïw yi Jwøk, ko cwøllí ɑ́ gïn ywëdhø!”" 
Acts10:16 Møgɑni ɑ́cwöb tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ gïnɑni døøg-ɑ mɑl kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Acts10:17 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd Pïtør wïje cungø yi gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møg-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈rrii, kedh gøl Sɑymøn oyodø yi jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Kornelyøs, kɑ ge ócungø kì dhø kɑl." 
Acts10:18 Kɑ ge ócwöddø, ɑpëjji gen mɑ ying Sɑymøn, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Pïtør gølɑni." 
Acts10:19 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd Pïtør, e orumø kì ri møg-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈rrii, ɑköbbii yi Wëy kinni, “Dɑ jøg ɑ́dɑ̈g kì keny møg yɑb yïn." 
Acts10:20 Dhwöödh, kɑ yï kedhí piny yï gen. Kɑ wu kedh wun ki gen, yï ko lyebbi, mɑ́ yɑn ɑ ɑ́ör gen.”" 
Acts10:21 Kɑ Pïtør kedh-ɑ piny yï jøgɑni, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yɑ bene ngɑn-ɑ yɑb yi wun. Wu ɑ́bï kɑ per ngø?”" 
Acts10:22 Alöggi gen kinni, “Wø ɑ́ör-ɑ yi Kornelyøs. Jɑlɑni bɑ dhɑbïdh me tir, me böggi Jwøk; o per døøje nyii kømmø kì kelli Yeud bënn. Áceg kɑ köbbø yi wëywöni Jwøk, i dwɑ̈ɑ̈ye yïn, o yï kedhí gøle, o møg-ɑ ókømmi yi yïn lïngi yi en.”" 
Acts10:23 Kɑ jøgɑni cwööl kɑl yi Pïtør, kɑ gï köbbe kinni nin gen kì gølɑni. Dhuki ɑdhwödhe, kɑ ókedhø ki gïn, kɑ lwøøg yi kwï nyiimëëg kì Yɑpɑ̀," 
Acts10:24 Kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Kɑysɑriyɑ̀ dhuki. Kornelyøs tyëng-ɑ bɑ wɑdde bënn kí mɑ̈dhhe rumø cwöölø yi en, mɑ́ e yïd-ɑ gïn." 
Acts10:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Pïtør, ɑpɑɑrii yi Kornelyøs, kɑ ree bøødhe piny kì bøle, kɑ gø mɑle." 
Acts10:26 Kɑ tïng mɑl yi Pïtør, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Dhwödhí mɑl, yɑ bɑ dhɑnhø ni yïn.”" 
Acts10:27 Apödhe ød, e okööbø ki gøn. Ayuude ji mø gïïr ri gen cøng gen." 
Acts10:28 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, Yeudì bɑ ɑkerø ki rëbø ki wɑ̈d jur megø, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ lwöbø ki gøn. De yɑ ɑ́nyudhi yi Jwøk kinni, bong dhɑnhø me ywëdhø, wɑlɑ̀ me bɑ ɑbwöl." 
Acts10:29 O keny-ɑ ɑ́cwølu yɑn, ɑbëënɑ e bong gïn jog yɑn. De yɑ ceg-ɑ wun ki pyëjø; yɑ ɑ́cwøl yi wun kɑ per ngø?”" 
Acts10:30 Kɑ Kornelyøs okööbø kinni, “Ágöög ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ngwen ɑnɑn, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ yɑ ókwɑ̈jjø kì gølɑ, kì sɑɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g kì böörø; piny nɑ men, ɑlidhɑ jɑl megø e ócungø kì bølɑ, e órugø ki ógødh me mënyø," 
Acts10:31 kɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Kornelyøs, kwɑ̈jjí ɑ́lïngi, o gïg-ɑ nyi muuj yi yïn, ge opɑrrø kì bøli Jwøk." 
Acts10:32 Anɑn ödí Yɑpɑ̀, kɑ Sɑymøn, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Pïtør cwööl. Jɑlɑni bëëd ɑ gøl Sɑymøn bødhi nginy ki pënnì; gøle ying-ɑ thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø." 
Acts10:33 Codhe, ɑödɑ yïí kì bøli kenyɑni ceth; døøj kɑ ɑ́bëën. Wø ying-ɑ bøli Jwøk ɑnɑn, o møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yïn yi Wë lïngi yi wøn.”" 
Acts10:34 Atug Pïtør dhøge, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Áyod yi yɑn kidyër kinni, bong ngɑn mɑ ɑyieny yi Jwøk kì wɑ̈ye." 
Acts10:35 De kì kelli jurrì bënn ngɑn-ɑ wørii, kɑ nyii göögø ki gwøngtir, bene en ɑ nyi yïëy yi Jwøk." 
Acts10:36 Kwøbbe ɑ́öre kwɑrri Isrɑil, kɑ wöndøj mi mër töng yi en kì ri Yëso Mesiy, ngɑn-ɑ bɑ Wïi piny bëne." 
Acts10:37 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun, eni møg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì Yeudiyɑ̀ bëne, cɑg kì Gɑlelì kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́cwøøl ji be jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø yi Jøn." 
Acts10:38 O ngɑ̈nyi yi wun thyew kinni, Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth ɑ́røny yi Jwøk, kɑ gø thödhe ki Wëykwërø kí tegø, kɑ ócyɑ̈dhø, e ogöögø ki gïgdøj, kɑ tyëng-ɑ rɑngø yi wëyrijjø yiel yi en, mɑ́ Jwøk ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kɑ en." 
Acts10:39 O wø bɑ cwɑ̈gg kipe møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en bënn kì pödhi Yeud geki Yerusɑlem. Gø ɑ́nɑ̈g gen; gø gur ge’ wïj yɑdh. 
Acts10:40 Kɑ tug mɑl yi Jwøk kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, kɑ gø wëgge cwöbø," 
Acts10:41 de pɑth ki bøli teedø bëne, dɑ́ kì bøli wøn, wø tyëng-ɑ yieny yi Jwøk cøn; wø tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m kɑ wø omɑ̈dhø ki en kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́dhwödhe kì yij thøø." 
Acts10:42 Kɑ wø cege kinni pwönyi wøn teedø kɑ kwøbbe thyer wøn kinni, bɑ en ɑ ɑ́røny yi Jwøk, ɑ́ jɑng-ɑ óløøg kwøbbi tyëngnëënø kí tyëngthøø." 
Acts10:43 O jøtöng bënn bɑ cwɑ̈gge; ge ɑ́kööb kinni ngɑn-ɑ óyïëyii, Jwøk lɑɑwe ódwööge piny kipe orøge.”" 
Acts10:44 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd Pïtør kømm-ɑ møgɑni, ɑbëën Wëykwërø piny kömi ji-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge lïng-ɑ kwøbbe bënn." 
Acts10:45 Kɑ ji-ɑ bɑ ɑngøl møg-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki Pïtør ongɑ̈ngø keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi gen kinni ji mø pɑth ki Yeud, ɑ́mëggi Wëykwërø yi Jwøk." 
Acts10:46 Mɑ́ gï ɑ́lïngi gen ge okööbø ki dhøg mø pɑth ki dhøggi gen, ge lejj-ɑ Jwøk. Kɑ Pïtør okööbø kinni," 
Acts10:47 “Ji møg ɑ́yïddi ki Wëykwërø ni wɑ, dɑ́ men ɑ cuggi mɑ̈ɑ̈ni gen jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki pï?”" 
Acts10:48 Akööbe kinni jwɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ki nyingi Yëso Mesiy. Kɑ Pïtør kwɑjji gen kinni bëëde kì buti gen, ki cyɑ̈ng mø nøg." 
Acts11:1 Kɑ tyëngwöödø geki nyiimëëg møg-ɑ Yeudiyɑ̀ olïngø kinni i ji mø pɑth ki Yeud kwøbbi Jwøk yïëëy gen thyew. 
Acts11:2 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ bɑ ɑngøl owërø ki Pïtør, keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhe Yerusɑlem, kɑ ge okööbø kinni," 
Acts11:3 “Yï ɑ́kedhi yï ji mø nuti ngølø, kɑ yï ocyɑ̈mø wuki gen!”" 
Acts11:4 Acɑ̈gi Pïtør ki löbbi gïn ki tyelli kwøbbɑni, e pyël-ɑ gïn kinni," 
Acts11:5 “Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøk kì Yɑpɑ̀, kɑ yɑ ogöögø yɑ ce ceg-ɑ nwɑyyø, ɑlïdhɑ ki gïjø me ni mɑlɑyɑ̀ me dwøng e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, e kɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ piny kì wɑ̈thi tùnge gɑ ɑ́ngwen, kɑ wɑ̈nh-ɑ yïɑ." 
Acts11:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́nennɑ ree kidøøj, ɑlidhɑ wɑ̈thi lɑ̈yyi kömi piny; lɑ̈yy-ɑ døngø, kí møg-ɑ mulli, kí winyyi mɑl." 
Acts11:7 Kɑ yɑ olïngø ki cwɑg mø köbbi yɑn kinni, ‘Dhwödhí mɑl Pïtør, ngɑ̈ɑ̈d, kɑ yï cyɑ̈ɑ̈m.’" 
Acts11:8 Kɑ yɑ okyëdø kinni, ‘Pɑ cuggi Wuö, mɑ́ gïn ywëdhø wɑlɑ̀ gïn bɑ ɑbwöl nuti wöl kedhi dhøgɑ.’" 
Acts11:9 Kɑ cwɑggɑni cig-ɑ kwøb kinni, ‘Gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk e dhïw, ko cwøllí ɑ́ gïn ywëdhø.’" 
Acts11:10 Kɑ møgɑni jøli tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ gïnɑni bëne døøg-ɑ mɑl." 
Acts11:11 Bøli kenyɑni ceth, ɑ ɑ́cungi jøg ɑ́dɑ̈g kì dhø gøl-ɑ bëëdɑ, ge ör-ɑ yïɑ, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Kɑysɑriyɑ̀." 
Acts11:12 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Wëy kinni kedhɑ ki gen, yɑ pɑ lyebbi. Kɑ yɑ lwøøg yi nyiimëëg ɑ́bïkyel, kɑ wø wɑ̈dh-ɑ gøl jɑlɑni." 
Acts11:13 Kɑ wø köbbe ki kër-ɑ liidh en wëywödø me cungø kì bøle, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, ‘Ödí Yɑpɑ̀, kɑ Sɑymøn, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Pïtør cwööl." 
Acts11:14 Yï óköbbe ki wöödø men-ɑ ree óyieel yïn, wuki gølí bëne.’" 
Acts11:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gɑ ki kwøb, ɑbëën Wëykwërø kömi gen, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëne kömee kì tyeli mɑl." 
Acts11:16 Kɑ kwøbbi Wë pɑr yi yɑn, kɑ ɑ́kööbe kinni, ‘Ji ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g yi Jøn kɑ pï, de ji ójwɑ̈ɑ̈g yi wun kɑ Wëykwërø.’" 
Acts11:17 Keløg gïn-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen yi Jwøk, pɑ̈r ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́mëgge wɑ kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́yïëy wɑ Wë Yëso Mesiy, yɑ bɑ men, ɑ pyemɑ dhø Jwøk?”" 
Acts11:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi teen-ɑ ɑ́ying kenyɑni, ɑkud gen, kɑ Jwøk lejji yi gen. Akööb gen kinni, “Ji-ɑ pɑth ki Yeud ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøk ki yöö men yewi gen, o ge yïddi gen ki nënnì.”" 
Acts11:19 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy møg-ɑ ɑ́tɑy kɑ ɑ́guud nyingi ji, kì bɑng nɑ̈gi Istïpen, ge ɑ́dɑ̈ggi Pinikiyɑ̀, kí Kobros kí Anthɑkiyɑ̀. Kɑ kwøbbi Jwøk pwönyi yi gen kì kelli Yeud keti gen, e bong ji møøgø mø köbbi yi gen." 
Acts11:20 De dɑ kwï ji møøgø kì kelli gen mɑ jø Kobros, kí jø Serin, mɑ ɑ́kedhi Anthɑkiyɑ̀, ɑpwönyi gen tyëng-ɑ 'kööb dhø Yönɑn thyew, ki wöndøj mi Wë Yëso." 
Acts11:21 Kɑ ge køny yi Wë, kɑ ji mø ngenyø møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy dwöögɑ kö Wë." 
Acts11:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Yerusɑlem, ɑör gen Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ Anthɑkiyɑ̀." 
Acts11:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe, kɑ dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk lidhe, ɑmïni pyëwe kɑ gï cïje, kinni mɑ̈gi gen ki ri Wë ki pëthi gen bënn." 
Acts11:24 Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑl me tir, me pɑ̈ɑ̈ngø yi Wëykwërø kí yïëyø, kɑ ji mø gïïr dwöög-ɑ tuung Wë." 
Acts11:25 Kɑ Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ kedh-ɑ Tɑrsos be yɑbi Cɑul," 
Acts11:26 keny-ɑ ɑ́yode gøn, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le gøn Anthɑkiyɑ̀. Kɑ run ɑ́kyel tyëg gen, ge obëëdø ki kɑnïsɑ̀, kɑ ji mø gïïr pwönyi yi gen. O bɑ kì Anthɑkiyɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́kwøøng jii bɑng Yëso ki cwøllø gɑ Jii Mesiy (Krïstyɑnn)." 
Acts11:27 Kɑ kwï jøtöng bï-ɑ Anthɑkiyɑ̀, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Yerusɑlem, kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni." 
Acts11:28 Kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen me cwøl ɑ́ Agɑbøs dhwödh-ɑ mɑl. Amɑ̈ɑ̈ge ki kwøb kì ri tegi Wëy kinni, “Kɑ̈j me dwøng óbï kömi piny bëne.” Kɑ møgɑni pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen kì ri Kelɑwdiyøs Kɑysɑr." 
Acts11:29 Kɑ jøbɑng Yëso oyïëyø ki gwɑ̈j ki jɑmmì, ngɑn muuj-ɑ møg-ɑ cuggi yodø yi en, gɑ møg køny gen nyiimëëg møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Acts11:30 Kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi gen ceth, kɑ jɑmmɑni öri jøgdøngi kɑnïsɑ̀; ge ɑ́kɑ̈l-ɑ yi Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ geki Cɑul." 
Acts12:1 Bɑ yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni ɑ ɑ́mɑɑg kwï tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ yi Rɑ̈dh Ërödøs, kɑ gï gögge ki gïnrɑj." 
Acts12:2 Kɑ Yɑgob ómï Jøn nɑ̈g yi en ki pilø. 
Acts12:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhe kinni, pëthi Yeud ɑ́mïni yi møgɑni, ɑmɑge Pïtør thyew. Cyɑ̈nggɑni ɑ́bëëd gɑ cyɑ̈nggi Kwëër Olwëny." 
Acts12:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume mɑgø ɑkïdhe gøn ød mɑg, kun korii yi ɑlɑthker gɑ ɑkudd ɑ́ngwen; ɑkud ɑ́kyel yije dɑ ɑlɑthkerr ɑ́ngwen. O ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ kïdhii bøli teedø keny-ɑ óthumi cyɑ̈nggi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh." 
Acts12:5 Kɑ Pïtør mïdhe kì ød mɑg. Kɑnïsɑ̀ bëne ɑ́bëëd e ókwɑ̈jjø ki mendwøng kipere. 
Acts12:6 Kì yij wɑ̈r-ɑ bɑnge di kɑ̈ɑ̈l Pïtør bøli teedø yi Ërödøs, Pïtør ɑ́bëëd e onenø kì kɑɑm ɑlɑthker ɑ́ryew, e ómɑgø ki ɑ́cwecwel ɑ́ryew, o tyëng-ɑ kurø ócungø kì dhø ød mɑg, ge kor-ɑ gøn." 
Acts12:7 Acwöb wëywöni Wë, kɑ cɑr omënyø kì yij ønɑni. Kɑ Pïtør gøj yi wëywönɑni kì wɑɑng ngëde, kɑ gø tuge kinni, “Jwɑn dhwödhi mɑl.” Kɑ ɑ́cwecwel dëëm-ɑ piny kì cingge." 
Acts12:8 Kɑ köbbi yi wëywönɑni kinni, “Løny ógødhí rií, kɑ wɑrrí gøød tyellí.” Kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi en. Aköbbe gøn kinni, “Leeng ógønhdwøng kömí, kɑ yï lug bɑngɑ.”" 
Acts12:9 Akedhe wɑ̈g, kɑ løg-ɑ bɑnge. De kwïj yi en kinni, gïn-ɑ gwøg yi wëywönɑni bɑ dyër, de gø ɑ́cwølli yi en, e nenn-ɑ gïjø megø kì yethi lɑ̈g." 
Acts12:10 De kɑ ɑ́rum kej kor men-ɑ mɑl ki pöödhø yi gen geki men-ɑ bɑnge, ɑwɑ̈nhi gen dhø dörø men-ɑ yïëbbi kɑɑldwøng; o dhø dörɑni bɑ ngyënyø, kɑ dhø dörɑni ree yïëbbe gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g, kɑ ge bødh-ɑ yij yöö ɑ́kyel, ɑwiyii yi wëywönɑni." 
Acts12:11 Kɑ Pïtør wïje ódwöögø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Áyod yi yɑn ɑnɑn kidyër kinni; Wë, wëywöne ɑ́öre be yieli yɑn kì cingi Ërödøs geki møg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi gwøgø yi Yeud.”" 
Acts12:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ngije møgɑni, ɑbëëne gøl Meerì meyi Jøn, ɑ nyi cwøl ɑ́ Mɑrk, o ji mø gïïr cugø kì kenyɑni, ge ókwɑ̈jjø." 
Acts12:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cwödde kì dhø kɑl, ɑbëën bɑ̈ng-ɑ dhɑjø me cwøl ɑ́ Rödɑ̀ be lïdhø." 
Acts12:14 Kɑ cwɑggi Pïtør ngije, ɑcög dhø kɑl pɑ yieb yi en yi medi pyëw, kɑ reng-ɑ ød, kɑ teedø köbbe kinni, “Pïtør ócungø kì dhø kɑl.”" 
Acts12:15 Kɑ köbbi yi gen kinni, “Yï ceg-ɑ myëlø,” de nudd e otyëëdø kinni, kømm-ɑ dyër ceth. Akööb gen kinni, “Bɑ wëywöne.”" 
Acts12:16 Kedh dhø kɑl ti kɑ pwödø yi Pïtør, codhe ɑyieb gen kɑl, kɑ ge ongɑ̈ngø keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh ge gøn." 
Acts12:17 Kɑ gï kyëdde ki cinge kinni, kud gen. Kɑ kwøbbi kɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lii wɑ̈g yi Wë kì ød mɑg lwøbe. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Dwöggu møgɑni Yɑgob geki tyëng yïëyø.” Codhe ɑdhwödhe, kɑ kedh-ɑ keny megø." 
Acts12:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ru wøw, ɑyölli ɑlɑthkerr ki mendwøng, ki mɑ göög Pïtør kidï." 
Acts12:19 Kɑ Ërödøs omuujø ki cigg kinni yɑɑb Pïtør. Kɑ ocögø e pɑ yod yi en, Atie jøg-ɑ ɑ́kur ki pyënyø, kɑ omuujø ki cigg kinni, nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen. Adhwödh Ërödøs kì Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ kedh-ɑ Kɑysɑriyɑ̀, kɑ obëëdø kì kunɑni." 
Acts12:20 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, Ërödøs ɑ́bëëd pyëwe dɑ liny ki tyëng Suur geki tyëng Sïdön. Kɑ ge onywɑ̈gø ki kwøb, ɑkedhi gen yïe gɑ yɑy, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum Belɑstøs, jɑngi gøldwøng ki pɑngø yi gen. Akedhi gen yï Ërödøs, kɑ gø kwɑjji gen kipe mër, mɑ́ gïgcɑmmi pödhi gen nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑ pödhi rɑ̈nhɑni." 
Acts12:21 Kɑ ge obëënø kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Ërödøs. Kɑ Ërödøs lɑ̈ni rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø lønye ree, kɑ pëgg-ɑ wïj kwøm, kɑ oköörø kì bøli gïn." 
Acts12:22 Kɑ tyëngɑni óryeerø kinni, “Bɑ cwɑggi jwøg. Pɑth ki cwɑggi dhɑnhø, ɑ kööbø.”" 
Acts12:23 Kɑ gøj yi wëywöni Wë, kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, mɑ́ Jwøk nuti lenhø yi en. Kɑ cɑm yi kunnì, kɑ othøø." 
Acts12:24 Kɑ kwøbbi Jwøk otɑyø, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy óngënyø." 
Acts12:25 Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ kí Cɑul, kɑ ɑ́tyëg gen gwøng-ɑ́ pere ɑ́öri gen, ɑdwöög gen kì Yerusɑlem. Kɑ Jøn, ɑ nyi cwøl ɑ́ Mɑrk, kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen." 
Acts13:1 Ádɑ jøtöng geki jøpwönyø kì yij kɑnïsɑ̀ ki Anthɑkiyɑ̀, gen ɑ Bɑrnɑbɑ̀, kí Simeon (ɑ nyi cwøl ɑ́ Ditɑ̈ng), kí Luciyøs (jɑl Serin), kí Menɑin ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ mɑ̈ɑ̈dh modïr Ërödøs ki këër thïnh, kí Cɑul." 
Acts13:2 Kɑ kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́mɑlli gen Wë, ge othuumø, ɑköbbi gen yi Wëykwërø kinni, “Cïb wun Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ geki Cɑul wɑ̈yi gen kiperɑ, o ge gwøg gen gwøng-ɑ́ pere ɑ́cöllɑ gen.”" 
Acts13:3 Athuum gen ge ókwɑ̈jjø, ɑthɑɑny gen cinggi gen kömi gïn, kɑ gï ör gen." 
Acts13:4 Kɑ ge ör yi Wëykwërø, ɑkedhi gen Seleukiyɑ̀, kɑ ge kɑdh-ɑ yij sɑpïnɑ̀ kì kenyɑni ge kedh-ɑ Kobros." 
Acts13:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen Sɑlɑmis, ɑpwönyi kwøbbi Jwøk yi gen kì yethi sinɑgøgg. Jøn ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kɑ gen, e gögg-ɑ gen." 
Acts13:6 Kɑ ge cør-ɑ yij munyɑni bëne gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen Pɑpøs, ɑcwɑ̈nyi gen ki ɑjwøgø megø kì kenyɑni me bɑ Yeudì, me cwøl ɑ́ Bɑryësos, o ree cwølle cem ɑ́ jɑltöng." 
Acts13:7 Jɑlɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ buti modïr, Serjiøs Pøøl, jɑl-ɑ rumme nud. Kɑ Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ cwøl geki Cɑul yi modïrɑni, kɑ gï kwɑjje kinni dwɑdd-ɑ lïngi kwøbbi Jwøk." 
Acts13:8 Kɑ ge dyël yi Elimɑis, eni ɑjwøgø, (kipe menɑni bene gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi nyinge) kɑ wïj modïr bɑ̈nne, o cöge e pɑ yïëy." 
Acts13:9 Kɑ Cɑul, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Pøøl thyew, opɑ̈ngø yi Wëykwërø, ɑnenne yï ɑjwøngɑni." 
Acts13:10 Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Yïn, wɑ̈d Ngɑnrɑj, yï mɑɑn-ɑ gïndøj, o yijí pɑ̈ng yi wëënyø! Yïde ɑ pɑ wïyí ki döddi yëthi Wë, yëth-ɑ bɑ óbödhh?" 
Acts13:11 Cingi Wë ópɑ̈dhi rií ɑnɑn; yï ceg-ɑ cørø, o cɑɑr cɑ̈ng koo lidh yi yïn ki kɑɑm megø.” Kɑ nyinge rïm yi ólɑbø me looj, ɑcɑ̈ge ki werri ree e oyɑ̈bø ki ngɑn pyejjii kì cinge." 
Acts13:12 Kɑ modïr oyïëyø kɑ ɑ́lidhe gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb, kɑ ongɑ̈ngø yi pwönyi Wë." 
Acts13:13 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Pøøl geki mɑ̈dhhe kì Pɑpøs, ɑkedh gen ki sɑpïnɑ̀ ge bï-ɑ Perjɑ̀ kì Pɑmpïliyɑ̀. Kɑ ge wiy piny yi Jøn, kɑ døøg-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
Acts13:14 Kɑ ge odhwödhø kì Perjɑ̀, ge kedh-ɑ Anthɑkiyɑ̀ kì Pïsïdiyɑ̀. Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ sinɑgøg kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ piny." 
Acts13:15 Aödi jɑggi sinɑgøg yï gen, ge okööbø kinni, “Nyiimïɑ, keløg e dɑ kwøb mø nud kì yï wun møg cïju teedø, kwøbu gen.”" 
Acts13:16 Adhwödhi Pøøl mɑl, kɑ ónyudhø ki cinge. Kɑ ócɑ̈gø kwøb kinni, “Wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil, kí wu tyëng-ɑ nyi wør Jwøk, lïng wun." 
Acts13:17 Jwøøg tyëng Isrɑil, kweyyee ɑ́yienye, kɑ gï løge ji mø per gen teg keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gen gɑ wëdhh kì Rïp. Kɑ gï kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì Rïp ki tegø me dwøng." 
Acts13:18 Angine kwøbbi gïn kì yij pɑ̈l ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. 
Acts13:19 Anɑ̈ɑ̈ge ki jurrì ɑ́bïryew kì piny Kɑnɑɑn, kɑ piny gïn mëgge jie." 
Acts13:20 Møgɑni bënn ɑ́tyëg-ɑ runn miy ɑ́ngwen kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj. “Codhe, ɑthödhe gïn ki jɑgg gïti ri Sɑmwel jɑltöng." 
Acts13:21 Kɑ ge ócwöddø ki rɑ̈dh. Amëggi gen Cɑul wɑ̈d Kïc kwɑɑr Ben Yɑmïn, yi Jwøk, kɑ obëëdø ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen." 
Acts13:22 Kɑ gø pɑ̈de, ɑgwøøge Debïd ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen, o ɑ́kööb kì ree kinni, ‘Debïd wɑ̈d Yesì, bɑ jɑl mɑ ɑ́yïëy yi pyëwɑ, o gïg-ɑ dwɑddɑ ógwøg yi en." 
Acts13:23 Bɑ Yëso kwɑɑr Debïd, ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk ɑ́ Yïëdi mi tyëng Isrɑil, ni kɑ ɑ́könge." 
Acts13:24 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil bënn köbbi yi Jøn kinni yewi gen kɑ ge jwɑ̈ɑ̈g. 
Acts13:25 Kɑ kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́kømi kej Jøn tyëgø yi en, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Yɑ pɑth ki ngɑn-ɑ rømmi yi wun. Obëënø kì bɑngɑ, o yɑ pɑ døøj ki göödi wɑrre wɑ̈g kì tyelle.’" 
Acts13:26 “Nyiimïɑ, wun ɑ kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm, kí tyëng-ɑ kelli wun, møg-ɑ wør Jwøk, bene wɑ ɑ ɑ́ödi ki kwøbbi yuu yieli dhɑnhø." 
Acts13:27 Mesiy nuti yodø yi tyëng Yerusɑlem geki jɑggi gen, gen ɑ kwøbbi jøtöng møg-ɑ nyi rɑng kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, kɑ møgɑni tyëg gen ki kuumii ki thøø." 
Acts13:28 Pilɑtø ɑ́köbbi yi gen kinni kuume gøn ki thøø, e bong gïn bɑɑj en." 
Acts13:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki tyëgi møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed bënn kipere, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l ge gøn piny kì wïj yɑdh, kɑ gø cïb gen yij rörø." 
Acts13:30 De ɑ́tug yi Jwøk kì yij thøø. 
Acts13:31 Kɑ nyii cwöbø kì yethi cyɑ̈ng mø ngenyø kì bøli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bï Yerusɑlem ki en bënn ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Gɑlelì. O bɑ tyëngɑni ɑ bɑ cwɑ̈gg møge ɑnɑn kì bøli teedø. 
Acts13:32 O wø muuj-ɑ wun wöndøj men-ɑ ɑ́köbbi kweyyee yi Jwøk; 
Acts13:33 møgɑni ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gïn kì riee, wɑ ɑ bɑ nyigi gen, kɑ ɑ́tuge Yëso mɑl. Bene møgɑni ɑ ógwedø thyew kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Wör kinni, ‘Yï bɑ Wɑ̈dɑ; yɑ ɑ́göög ki wïyí dicyɑ̈ngtïn.’" 
Acts13:34 De kipe kwøbbi kɑ ɑ́tuge gøn kì yij thøø, kɑ dële ocögø e pɑ kwɑ̈g, møgɑni ɑ́kwøbe kinni, ‘Wu ónëngi yi yɑn ki gyëdhhi tirø, gen ɑ gyëdhh-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ kinni ge ómëggɑ Debïd.’" 
Acts13:35 Bene ɑ ɑ́kööbe kì yethi wör møøgø kinni, ‘Bɑ̈ngí, bɑ̈ng-ɑ tir, koo wëggí kwɑ̈ɑ̈g yij rörø.’" 
Acts13:36 Debïd, kɑ ɑ́rume gwøgi møg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi Jwøk kì kelli rïj gen, ɑ́thøw kɑ koony buti kweyye, kɑ kwɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ yij rörø." 
Acts13:37 De ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́tug mɑl yi Jwøk, nuti kwɑ̈gø." 
Acts13:38 Ngɑ̈nyu wøw, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ kinni, wø muuj-ɑ wun wööni Yëso kipe lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi orøg." 
Acts13:39 O kì ree, ji-ɑ yïëy bënn, bɑ ɑgøny kì yij orøg; gïn-ɑ pɑ cuggi lwɑ̈ngø yi Ciggi Mosɑ̀ ki gwøgø." 
Acts13:40 Koru ri wun cyee, kipe ge óbï kömi wun, gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi jøtöng kinni," 
Acts13:41 “Lïdhi wun, wun ɑ jøgɑg! Ngɑ̈ng wun, kɑ wu thøw wun! Mɑ́ gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi yɑn dicyɑ̈ngtïn bɑ gïjø me koo yïëy yi wun cɑgg e di ngɑn löbbii wun.’ ”" 
Acts13:42 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi gen wɑ̈g kì sinɑgøg, ɑkwɑjji gen yi teedø o kwøbbɑni døøg yi gen ki kwøbø ki cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth men-ɑ óbï." 
Acts13:43 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dɑ̈ngi burɑni, kɑ Yeud mø gïïr geki tyëng-ɑ nyi wør Jwøk møg-ɑ ɑ́løg ri gen Yeud, løg-ɑ bɑng Pøøl geki Bɑrnɑbɑ̀. Kɑ tyëngɑni pwönyi yi Pøøl geki Bɑrnɑbɑ̀, ge cïj-ɑ gïn kinni o ge bëëd gen kì yij dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk." 
Acts13:44 Kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth men-ɑ bɑnge, kɑ tyëng kɑɑlɑni cug-ɑ be lïngi kwøbbi Wë." 
Acts13:45 De kɑ ɑ́liidh teedø ge gïïr yi Yeud, ɑmɑɑg gen yi tyiel, kɑ møg-ɑ kømmi yi Pøøl dëddi yi gen, kɑ Pøøl gwɑddi gen." 
Acts13:46 Kɑ Pøøl geki Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Bɑ wun ɑ di kwøng yi wøn ki köbbi kwøbbi Jwøk. De kɑ ɑ́bɑɑny gen yi wun, kɑ ri wun cɑy yi wun kinni, wu pɑ døøj ki yïddø ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer, ri wøn ólugi wøn tyëng-ɑ pɑth ki Yeud." 
Acts13:47 Mɑ́ wø ɑ́ceg yi Wë kinni, ‘Yï ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn, yï bɑ cɑr kipe pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kipe kinni o kömi piny bëne yiel.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi tyëng-ɑ pɑth ki Yeud, ɑmïni pëthi gen, kɑ kwøbbi Jwøk lejji yi gen. Kɑ ji-ɑ bɑ ɑyieny kipe nënn-ɑ ɑtheer kì kelli gen oyïëyø." 
Acts13:49 Kɑ kwøbbi Wë otɑyø kì yij pönhɑni bëne. 
Acts13:50 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ per gen teg, møg-ɑ nyi wør Jwøk geki jøgdøngi kɑɑlɑni pɑng yi Yeud, kɑ nyingi gen ocuulø ki Pøøl geki Bɑrnɑbɑ̀, kɑ gï cyeed gen wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl gen." 
Acts13:51 Kɑ tør tyelli gen tënggi gen tyëng kɑɑlɑni, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Ayköniyɑ̀." 
Acts13:52 De tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy kì Anthɑkiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd pëthi gen med cɑrø, o ge pɑ̈ngø yi Wëykwërø." 
Acts14:1 Kɑ Pøøl kedh-ɑ sinɑgøg geki Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ kì Ayköniyɑ̀ thyew, kɑ ge okööbø kì kenyɑni, kɑ ji mø gïïr kì kelli Yeud geki tyëng Yönɑn oyïëyø." 
Acts14:2 Kɑ tyëngpɑth kì kelli Yeud cwɑɑg mɑl yi Yeud møg-ɑ nuti yïëyø, kɑ wɑ̈thi gïn rënyi gen, o ge mɑ̈ni gen ki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy." 
Acts14:3 Kɑ ge ómɑ̈gø ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r kì kenyɑni, ge ópwönyø, ge pɑ böggi, kì ri tegi Wë. Kɑ Wë kwøbbi dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïe thyer yi en kì ri kɑ ɑ́thöthe gïn ki ngïjjì geki gïïngɑ̈ngø mø gwøg yi gen ki cinggi gen." 
Acts14:4 Kɑ tyëng kɑɑlɑni ópyëdø kì dyëri gen; kwï gen cwɑg-ɑ Yeud, o møøgø cwɑg-ɑ tyëngwöödø." 
Acts14:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yɑ̈ɑ̈b Yeud geki tyëngpɑth kí Yeud geki jɑggi gen ki yöö me tuug gen tyëngwöödø; o gï di bɑ̈lli gen ki tuggi kïttì," 
Acts14:6 kɑ møgɑni lïngi yi gen, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈r gen kɑ̈ddi Listrɑ̀, kí Derbɑ̀, kí Likɑoniyɑ̀ geki myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki kɑ̈ddɑni." 
Acts14:7 Kɑ wöndøj pwönyi yi gen kì kɑ̈jjɑni. 
Acts14:8 Ádɑ jɑl megø kì Listrɑ̀, me bɑ pudh; nuti wöl cyɑ̈dhø kër-ɑ ónywøølii." 
Acts14:9 Ábëëd e olïngø ki kwøbbi Pøøl. Kɑ lidh yi Pøøl kinni jɑlɑni ɑ́yïëy, o ócuggø yielø." 
Acts14:10 Kɑ cwɑgge tïnge, ɑkööbe kinni, “Dhwöödh, kɑ yï cungí kì kömi tyellí, yï bɑ óbödh.” Apɑ̈ɑ̈re mɑl, kɑ ócyɑ̈dhø." 
Acts14:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi teedø ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Pøøl, ɑryeer gen ki dhøg tyëng Likɑoniyɑ̀ kinni, “Jwögg ri gen ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r gen ki ji, kɑ ge bï-ɑ piny yïee!”" 
Acts14:12 Kɑ Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ cɑg ɑ́ Dhiyøs yi gen, kɑ Pøøl cɑg ɑ́ Ërmes, kipe kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ en ɑ kööbø." 
Acts14:13 Kɑ ókwëri Dhiyøs men-ɑ kenge ying dhø döri kɑɑlɑni, kɑ̈n-ɑ dhø dörø ki wɑ̈dhh, kí yɑ̈rri okøggi lum, ókwërɑni geki teedø ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ ngɑ̈ddi tyëngwöödø ki gëëdhi." 
Acts14:14 De keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbɑni yi tyëngwöödø, gen ɑ Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ kí Pøøl, ɑkɑg gen ógudhi gen, kɑ ge reng-ɑ kelli teedø, ge óryeerø kinni," 
Acts14:15 “Jøg, ɑ́ gïn ɑ gwøg yi wun kinøw? Wøn thyew, wø bɑ ji, bëëdi wøn nɑ bëëdi wun ceth. O wø ɑ́bï-ɑ be muuji wun wöndøj, kipe kinni, o gïg-ɑ bong per gen ni møg wiy yi wun, o ri wun løg wun yï Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø; ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j mɑl kí piny, kí nɑɑm omelø, kí gïg-ɑ yethi gen bënn." 
Acts14:16 Kì yethi rïjj-ɑ ɑ́pöödh bënn, jurrì bënn ɑ́wiye, o ge cyɑ̈dhi gen kì yethi yëthi gen." 
Acts14:17 De ɑ́bëëd ree nyii nyodhø yi en ceth kinni nud, kì ri gïgdøj møg-ɑ nyi gwøge. Wu nyi thödhe’ thödhø ki kødh kì mɑl, kɑ wu nyi thödhe ki byel kì bøli kej gen; wu nyii thödhø yi en ki gïncɑm, kɑ wu nyi thödhe ki medi pyëw me dwøng.”" 
Acts14:18 Kwøbbi gen ɑ́dhɑ̈li ki mɑ̈ɑ̈ni teedø ngɑ̈ddi gen ki gëdhhì. 
Acts14:19 Kɑ Yeud møøgø obëënø, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Anthɑkiyɑ̀ kì Pïsïdiyɑ̀ geki Ayköniyɑ̀. Kɑ wɑ̈thi ji pɑng yi gen, ɑbɑ̈lli gen Pøøl ki tuggi kïttì, kɑ gø ywɑɑj gen wɑ̈g kì kɑɑlɑni, e rømmi yi gen i thøø." 
Acts14:20 De keny-ɑ ɑ́cugi jøbɑng Yëso ki bute, ɑdhwödhe mɑl kɑ kedh-ɑ kɑɑl. Dhuki, ɑkedhe Derbɑ̀ geki Bɑrnɑbɑ̀." 
Acts14:21 Kɑ ɑ́rum gen ki pwönyi wöndøj kì bøli tyëng kɑɑlɑni, kɑ ge óyïddø ki ji mø ngenyø mɑ ɑ́løg ri gen jii bɑng Yëso, ɑdøøg gen Listrɑ̀, kɑ ge cig-ɑ dhwödhø ge kedh-ɑ Ayköniyɑ̀ kí Anthɑkiyɑ̀ kì Pïsïdiyɑ̀." 
Acts14:22 Kɑ jøbɑng Yëso pëthi gïn mɑg gen, kɑ gï cïj gen kinni bëëd gen kì ri møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi gen. Kɑ gï köbbi gen kinni, “Bɑ kì bɑng orɑng me ngenyø ɑ ówɑ̈dhi wɑ Pödhi Jwøk.”" 
Acts14:23 Kɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ nyi rönyi gen ki jɑgge, kɑ ge nyii kwɑ̈jjø, kɑ ge nyii thuumø, codhe, o gï nyi cïb gen cingi Wë; ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi gen." 
Acts14:24 Kɑ ge ókedhø ge bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ myërri Pïsïdiyɑ̀, ɑwɑ̈dhi gen Pɑmpïliyɑ̀." 
Acts14:25 Kɑ kwøbbi Jwøk pwönyi gen kì Perjɑ̀, codhe ɑkedhi gen Atɑliyɑ̀." 
Acts14:26 Akɑdhi gen yij sɑpïnɑ̀ kì kenyɑni, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ Anthɑkiyɑ̀, kun-ɑ ɑ́thyeey gen kipe gwøgi gwøng-ɑ ɑ́rum ki tyëgø yi gen, ge kwøll-ɑ yi Jwøk." 
Acts14:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen Anthɑkiyɑ̀, ɑcøng gen kɑnïsɑ̀, kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk ki cinggi gen lwøb yi gen, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́yïëbbe yuu yïëyø tyëng-ɑ pɑth ki Yeud." 
Acts14:28 Kɑ ge kɑl-ɑ bëëdø ki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy. 
Acts15:1 Kɑ kwï ji møøgø obëënø kì Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy pwönyi gen kinni, “Keløg wu pɑ ngøl kì bɑng kwööng Mosɑ̀, wu pɑ cuggi yielø.”" 
Acts15:2 Kɑ kwøbbɑni ókɑ̈nø ki bɑ̈nni dhøg, kí pëëmø kì kɑɑm Pøøl kí Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ geki tyëngɑni. Kɑ Pøøl kí Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ geki kwï ji møøgø yieny yi teedø o ge kedhi gen Yerusɑlem, yï tyëngwöödø geki jøgdøngø kipe kwøbbɑni." 
Acts15:3 Kɑ kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum gen ki lwøøg kö yuu gen yi tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀, ɑkedh gen ge bødh-ɑ kö Pinikiyɑ̀ geki Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, ge dwøngg-ɑ kwøbbi kɑ ɑ́løg tyëngpɑth ki Yeud ri gen. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy bënn pëthi gen ómïnø ki mendwøng." 
Acts15:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi gen Yerusɑlem, kɑ ge ywöör yi kɑnïsɑ̀ kí tyëngwöödø kí jøgdøngø, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk kì ri gen bënn lwøb yi gen." 
Acts15:5 Kɑ kwï tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ Jøpɑresì dhwödh-ɑ mɑl, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Ngøl tyëng-ɑ pɑth ki Yeud, kɑ ge köbbi kinni mïdhi gen Ciggi Mosɑ̀.”" 
Acts15:6 Kɑ tyëngwöödø geki jøgdøngø, ge ócugø kipe lidhi kwøbbɑni." 
Acts15:7 Kɑ ge ómɑ̈gø ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r ge pemm-ɑ møgɑni, ɑdhwödhi Pïtør mɑl, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Nyiimïɑ, ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, kì tyeli mɑl, bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk kì kelli wun, kipe kinni, o Wöndøj pwönyɑ tyëngpɑth ki Yeud, o ge yïëy gen." 
Acts15:8 O ge ɑ́rum ki yïëyø yi Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi møg-ɑ pëëth, kɑ gï mëgge Wëykwërø ni kɑ ɑ́mëgge gøn wɑ." 
Acts15:9 O wɑ nuti dɑ̈ɑ̈ng en ki gen; de pëthi gen ɑ́lwøg yi en kì bɑng yïëyø mi gen. 
Acts15:10 Dɑ́ kipe ngø, ɑ rɑngu Jwøk ɑnɑn, kɑ̀ cïbu kömi jii bɑng Yëso ki ɑcebø mɑ ɑ́ceg dhɑ̈lø ki tyëddø yi kweyyee, kɑ wɑ dhɑle thyew?" 
Acts15:11 O men-ɑ́ wɑ ɑ́yïëy, kinni wɑ yiel-ɑ ri dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri Wë Yëso, o ge yiel kɑ yuuɑni ceth.”" 
Acts15:12 Kɑ burø bëne okudø, ge lïng-ɑ mø Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ geki Pøøl kɑ̀ lwøb gen ngïjjì geki gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk kì ri gen kì kelli tyëngpɑth ki Yeud." 
Acts15:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki kwøb, ɑlöggi Yɑgob kinni, “Nyiimïɑ, lïngu møgɑ." 
Acts15:14 Wu ɑ́lwöbbi yi Sɑymøn ki kwøbbi kɑ ɑ́kwøøng tyëngpɑth ki Yeud ki këëmø yi Jwøk, kipe kinni, o kɑ̈ne wɑ̈g ki ji kì kelli gen mø cölli nyinge." 
Acts15:15 O kwøbbi jøtöng órøømø ki møgɑni ceth, ni kɑ ógwedii kinni," 
Acts15:16 ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Orume, o yɑ dwöögɑ, o pödhi Debïd men-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø dwøøgɑ keje. Kɑ̈jj-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì ree ódøøgɑ ki gerø, o ócigɑ gwøgø e teeg." 
Acts15:17 Codhe, o dhɑnhø bëne bëe yïɑ, gen ɑ pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́cwöölɑ gɑ møgɑ.’" 
Acts15:18 Bene møg-ɑ kømmi Wë, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́nyodh møgɑni kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Acts15:19 “Yɑ orumø kinni, tyëngpɑth ki Yeud møg-ɑ nyi lug ri gen yï Jwøk, ko tuug yi wɑ." 
Acts15:20 De gwëdi wɑ gen ki wɑ̈nyø, kinni ge ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gëdhh-ɑ ngɑ̈lli ngïjji jwögg; kɑ ji mø nuti nywøøm ri gen ko niin; kɑ ge ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gïn-ɑ twij kì cwɑgge; kɑ ge ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki remø." 
Acts15:21 Mɑ́ Ciggi Mosɑ̀ ɑ́wöni ge orɑngø kì sinɑgøgg kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi Sɑbɑth bënn, o kwøbbe opwönyø kì yethi kɑ̈dd bënn.”" 
Acts15:22 Kɑ jøwöödø dhøggi gen reb gen geki jøgdøngø kí kɑnïsɑ̀ bëne, kinni yïëëny gen ki ji kì kelli gen møg ör Anthɑkiyɑ̀ kyeel ki Pøøl kí Bɑrnɑbɑ̀. Akwɑny gen Yeudɑ̀ ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Bɑrsɑbɑ̀ geki Silɑ̀; o ge ɑ́bëëd ge ceg kɑ wørø ki mendwøng yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy," 
Acts15:23 ge ɑ́kedh ge kɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈nyø me kööbø kinni, “Wɑ̈nyø men ör-ɑ yi nyiimï wun, tyëngwöödø geki jøgdøngø; wø gwëd-ɑ wun, wun ɑ nyiimï wøn møg-ɑ pɑth ki Yeud kì Anthɑkiyɑ̀ kì Suriyɑ̀, kí Kilikiyɑ̀; wu óbëëdø ki mër." 
Acts15:24 Wø ɑ́lïng kinni i dɑ ji mø bëën yï wun, ge nuti ör-ɑ yi wøn; kɑ wu jud yi gen, kɑ pëthi wun wëggi gen nyönhø." 
Acts15:25 Areb wøn dhøggi wøn kinni kɑ̈bbi wøn ki jøg ɑ́ryew møg ör yï wøn, kyeel ki Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ geki Pøøl, jøg-ɑ mɑɑr yi wøn;" 
Acts15:26 gen ɑ jøg-ɑ ɑ́weddi pëthi gen kipe nyingi Wë Yëso Mesiy. 
Acts15:27 Wø ör-ɑ wun Yeudɑ̀ geki Silɑ̀, o møg-ɑ gwed yi wøn, ólöbbi wun yi gen." 
Acts15:28 Wëykwërø ɑ́yïëy, kɑ wø oyïëyø kinni, kömi wun ko kïdhi ki cigg mø peg, den-ɑ́ møg-ɑ per gen teg ek:" 
Acts15:29 wu ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gëdhh-ɑ ngɑ̈lli ngïjji jwögg; kɑ wu ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki remø geki gïn-ɑ ceg ki twijø; kɑ dhɑnhø ko niin ki ngɑn nuti nywøøm gen ri gen. Keløg ri wun ókorri yi wun kipe gïgɑni, wu ɑ́gwøg gïndøj. Mɑ̈dhu ri wun.”" 
Acts15:30 Akedh gen, kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Anthɑkiyɑ̀. Acwøl gen tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, kɑ gï mëggi gen wɑ̈nyɑni" 
Acts15:31 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rɑng ge gøn, ɑmïni pëthi gen yi cïïny-ɑ cïïj gen kì yije." 
Acts15:32 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy cïj yi Yeudɑ̀ geki Silɑ̀ ki kwøb mø ngenyø, kɑ pëthi gen ótëngø, mɑ́ jøgɑni ryeet bɑ jøtöng." 
Acts15:33 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki bëëdø ki keny me lɑɑj kì Anthɑkiyɑ̀, ɑlwøøg gen yöö ki mër yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, o ge døøg gen yï ji-ɑ ɑ́ör gen." 
Acts15:34 De Silɑ̀ ɑ́kyëëd cem e pɑ døg, ɑdøg Yeudɑ̀ kete." 
Acts15:35 Kɑ Pøøl kí Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ obëëdø kì Anthɑkiyɑ̀, ge pwöny-ɑ kwøbbi Wë kyeel ki ji møøgø mø gïïr thyew." 
Acts15:36 Bɑng cyɑ̈ng mø nøg ɑköbbi Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ yi Pøøl kinni, “Bïí døøg wɑ be këëmi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy kì yethi kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi wɑ kwøbbi Wë, o ge lidh yi wɑ mɑ bëëd gen kidï.”" 
Acts15:37 Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ kɑ̈li Jøn Mɑrk. 
Acts15:38 De Pøøl ɑ́kyëëd kinni, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wiy gen piny kì Pɑmpïliyɑ̀, o nuti kunyø ki gwøg, pɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki gen." 
Acts15:39 Kɑ pëëmø me teeg ócɑ̈gø kì kelli gen, ɑdɑ̈ngi gen, kɑ Mɑrk kwɑny yi Bɑrnɑbɑ̀, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Kobros ki sɑpïnɑ̀." 
Acts15:40 Kɑ Pøøl kwɑny-ɑ Silɑ̀. Adhwödh gen kì Anthɑkiyɑ̀, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rume thyëyi Wë yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy." 
Acts15:41 Kɑ ókedhø, e kɑ̈l-ɑ kö Suriyɑ̀ kí Kilikiyɑ̀, e cïj-ɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ o tënge." 
Acts16:1 Kɑ Pøøl wɑ̈dh-ɑ Derbɑ̀ geki Listrɑ̀. O ɑ́dɑ Ngeti Mesiy kì kenyɑni me cwøl ɑ́ Timøthì, nyelɑni bɑ wɑ̈d nyɑɑr Yeud me yïëyø, de wïye bɑ wɑ̈d Yönɑn." 
Acts16:2 Kɑ per døøje nyi kømmi yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy møg-ɑ ying Listrɑ̀ kí Ayköniyɑ̀. 
Acts16:3 Kɑ dwɑddi kɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi Pøøl, ɑngøle gøn, mɑ́ e ngɑ̈nyi yi Yeud møg-ɑ myërrɑni, kinni wïye bɑ wɑ̈d Yönɑn." 
Acts16:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh gen, ge ɑ́bødh-ɑ yethi kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi tyëngwöödø geki jøgdøngø møg-ɑ ying Yerusɑlem nyi köbbi gen teedø, kinni mïdhi gen ciggɑni." 
Acts16:5 Kɑ yïëyø mi kɑnïsɑ̀ ótëngø, kɑ kwɑnni ji ókedhø ge óngënyø kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
Acts16:6 Kɑ ge kɑ̈l-ɑ myërri Perïjiyɑ̀ kí Gɑlɑthiyɑ̀, mɑ́ ge ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n pwönyø kì Ásiyɑ̀ yi Wëykwërø." 
Acts16:7 De kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen wïj tuung Misiyɑ̀, kɑ cem ge kedh-ɑ Bithiniyɑ̀, ɑmɑ̈ɑ̈n gen yi Wëyi Yëso." 
Acts16:8 Codhe, ɑpödhi gen Misiyɑ̀, kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Torwɑs." 
Acts16:9 Kɑ Pøøl cɑ̈rri kì wɑ̈r kì yethi lɑ̈g. Kɑ ólïdhø ki jɑl Mɑkdöniyɑ̀ me cungi, e kwɑjj-ɑ gøn kinni, “Bïí Mɑkdöniyɑ̀ løøng-ɑ di wøn, o wø køny yi yïn!”" 
Acts16:10 Kì bɑng kenyɑni ceth, ɑgwir wøn ri wøn kipe kedhi Mɑkdöniyɑ̀, mɑ́ e ɑ́yod yi wøn kinni, wø ɑ́cwøl-ɑ yi Jwøk, o tyëng pönhɑni köbbi yi wøn ki wöndøj." 
Acts16:11 Codhe, ɑdhwödh wøn kì Torwɑs ki sɑpïnɑ̀, kɑ wø pödh-ɑ Sɑmotherɑkiyɑ̀, dhuki ɑkedhi wøn Neɑpølis," 
Acts16:12 ɑpödhi wøn Pïlïpì, ɑ bɑ kɑɑl-ɑ dwøng kì modïri Mɑkdöniyɑ̀, de jɑɑg-ɑ yi mïri Römɑ̀. Kɑ wø obëëdø kì kɑɑlɑni ki cyɑ̈ng mø nøg." 
Acts16:13 Kɑ kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, ɑkedhi wøn wɑ̈g kì kɑɑlɑni, wø kedh-ɑ thɑ̈ngi nɑm keny-ɑ nyi kwɑ̈jji yi Yeud. Apëggi wøn piny, kɑ wø okööbø ki tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn mø cugø kì kenyɑni." 
Acts16:14 Dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbi wøn bɑ ngɑndhɑjø me cwøl ɑ́ Lïdiyɑ̀, ngeti kɑɑl Theyɑtirɑ̀. Ngɑnɑni nyi ngyew-ɑ ógudh-ɑ bɑ ɑ́cwïcwïl, o nyi mɑll-ɑ Jwøk. Kɑ pyëwe yieb yi Wë kipe kinni o lïnge kidøøj ki møg-ɑ kømmi yi Pøøl." 
Acts16:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø kyeel geki tyëng gøle, ɑköbbe wøn kinni, “Keløg wu orumø kinni, yɑ bɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yïëy Wë kidyër, bïu be bëëdø kì gølɑ.” Kɑ wø dyeje ki kedhi gøle." 
Acts16:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi wøn kej kwɑ̈jjø, ɑrøøm wøn ki bɑ̈ng-ɑ dhɑjø me ree di wëy me rɑj; wëyɑni bɑ wëyi rɑng, kɑ wëëge nyii yïddø ki jɑmmì mø ngenyø kì bɑng rɑnge." 
Acts16:17 Kɑ nyɑnɑni ólugø kì bɑng wøki Pøøl, e óryeerø kinni, “Jøg bɑ bɑ̈nggi Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng, o ge pwöny-ɑ wun ki yuu yielø.”" 
Acts16:18 Kɑ ómɑ̈gø ki cyɑ̈ng mø gïïr e ogöögø kinøw. Kɑ Pøøl kööre óbuudhø yi møgɑni, kɑ ree løge, kɑ wëyɑni köbbe kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn ki nyingi Yëso Mesiy, bïí wɑ̈g kì ree.” Abëën wëyɑni wɑ̈g kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Acts16:19 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi wëëg nyɑnɑni kinni, gïn-ɑ́ ree ɑ́yïddi gen ki ngyëny ɑ́kedh, ɑmɑg gen Pøøl geki Silɑ̀, kɑ gï ywɑɑj gen yï jɑggi burø kì ódɑ̈ri kɑɑlɑni." 
Acts16:20 Kɑ gï mëggi gen jɑggi burø, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Jøg bɑ Yeud, de kɑɑlee ceg kɑ rungø yi gen ki mendwøng." 
Acts16:21 Ge pwöny-ɑ kwøbbi kwöng me bɑ ɑkerø ki yïëyø yi wɑ, mɑ́ wɑ bɑ tyëng Römɑ̀.”" 
Acts16:22 Adhwönhi ji mø gïïr kömi gen, kɑ ógudhi gen luny wɑ̈g yi jɑggi gøny, kɑ ge kuum ki pwödø." 
Acts16:23 Kɑ ge pwöd ki pwödø me rɑɑj, ɑleeng gen ød mɑg, kɑ jɑngi ød mɑg ceg kinni ti gen ki korø kidøøj." 
Acts16:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume lïngi møgɑni, ɑkïdhe gïn yij øn-ɑ dïdyëri ød mɑg, kɑ tyeli gïn mɑɑge ri pɑ̈mmì mø peeg." 
Acts16:25 Kì dïwɑ̈r, Pøøl ɑ́bëëd e ókwɑ̈jjø geki Silɑ̀, ge lenh-ɑ Jwøk ki wör, o ɑmɑgg olïngø." 
Acts16:26 Kɑ piny onhɑ̈nhø, kɑ ød mɑg runge ki menteg, kɑ thïg ri gen yieb gen, kɑ ɑ́cwecwelli ɑmɑgg ri gen dɑd gen." 
Acts16:27 Kɑ jɑngi ød mɑg ócyëwø, ɑlidhe thïggi ød gɑ ɑyieb, kɑ pile wødhe, kɑ ree dwɑdde nɑ̈gø, e ceg-ɑ rumø kinni, ɑmɑgg pɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Acts16:28 Kɑ cwøl yi Pøøl e óryeerø kinni, “Rií ko nyïɑ̈ɑ̈g! Wø nud bënn.”" 
Acts16:29 Acwödde ki ɑ́menyø, kɑ jwɑn-ɑ ød, kɑ ree leenge piny kì bøli Pøøl geki Silɑ̀, dële okïïrø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Acts16:30 Akɑ̈ɑ̈le gïn wɑ̈g, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Wun ɑ wëëgɑ, gwøgɑ ngø, o yɑ yiel?”" 
Acts16:31 Kɑ köbbi yi gen kinni, “Yïëy Wë Yëso, o yï yiel, wuki gølí bëne.”" 
Acts16:32 Kɑ gø pwönyi gen ki kwøbbi Wë, en geki tyëng-ɑ ying gøle bënn." 
Acts16:33 Akɑ̈ɑ̈le gïn kì bøli kenyɑni ceth kì wɑ̈r, kɑ keddi gïn lwøge; kɑ jɑlɑni jwɑ̈ɑ̈g geki tyëng gøle bënn." 
Acts16:34 Akïdhe gïn gøle, kɑ gï thödhe ki gïncɑm. Kɑ pyëwe ómïnø ki mendwøng geki gøle bëne, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́yïëy gen Jwøk." 
Acts16:35 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ru wøw, ɑör bölidhh yi jyɑ̈ggi gøny kinni, “Gøøny jøgɑni.”" 
Acts16:36 Kɑ kwøbbɑni löbbi Pøøl yi jɑngi ød mɑg kinni, “Jyɑ̈ggi gøny ɑ́öni i gøøny wun. Anɑn, bïu wɑ̈g, kɑ wu kedh wun ki mër.”" 
Acts16:37 De ge ɑ́köbbi yi Pøøl kinni, “Wø ɑ́pwöd yi gen kì bøli teedø bëne, wø nuti cɑyø, kɑ wø leeng ød mɑg, wøn ɑ́ tyëng Römɑ̀. Anɑn wø dwɑdd-ɑ ryemø yi gen kì gød! Pɑth ki kinøw! Gen kiri gen, bï gen be kɑ̈ɑ̈li wøn wɑ̈g.”" 
Acts16:38 Kɑ kwøbbɑni köbbi jyɑ̈ggi gøny yi bölidhh, kɑ ge obwøgø kɑ ɑ́lïng gen kinni ge bɑ tyëng Römɑ̀." 
Acts16:39 Abëën gen, kɑ ge yömm-ɑ köthi gïn. Akɑ̈ɑ̈l ge gïn wɑ̈g, kɑ gï kwɑjji gen, kinni dhwödh gen kì kɑɑlɑni." 
Acts16:40 Akedhi gen wɑ̈g kì ød mɑg, kɑ Lïdiyɑ̀ këëm yi gen. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki yïddø ki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, ɑcïj ge gïn, kɑ ge ókedhø." 
Acts17:1 Akedh gen, ge kɑ̈l-ɑ Ampïpølis kí Apøløniyɑ̀, kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Tesɑlonikɑ̀, o yije ɑ́dɑ sinɑgøg." 
Acts17:2 Kɑ Pøøl pödh-ɑ sinɑgøg ni kenyi gööge, kɑ ómɑ̈gø kì Sɑbɑɑth ɑ́dɑ̈g, e lømm-ɑ dhøggi gen ki gïn, e nyodh-ɑ" 
Acts17:3 møg-ɑ yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø, gï lwøbe’ lwøbø kinni, bɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi ceth kinni Mesiy bɑ men rɑngø, kí kinni, ódwöög wɑ̈g kì yij thøø. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yëso, ngɑn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́köbbɑ wun, en ɑ bɑ Mesiy.”" 
Acts17:4 Kɑ kwï tyëngɑni oyïëyø, kɑ ge órëbø ki Pøøl geki Silɑ̀. Kɑ ji mø gïïr møg-ɑ nyi wør Jwøk kì kelli tyëng Yönɑn, geki pëjjì mø ngenyø kì kelli tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, órëbø ki gen thyew." 
Acts17:5 Kɑ Yeud mɑg yi tyiel, kɑ ge ókɑ̈nø ki luuy, kɑ teedø me gïïr cøng gen, kɑ kɑɑlɑni tug yi gen ki ɑwøw, kɑ ge pödh-ɑ gøl Yɑsøn, ge yɑb-ɑ Pøøl geki Silɑ̀ kinni o gï di kïdhi gen bøli teen-ɑ cugø." 
Acts17:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cög gï pɑ yod yi gen, ɑywɑɑj gen Yɑsøn wɑ̈g kyeel ki kwï tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, kɑ ge kïdhi bøli jɑggi kɑɑlɑni, ge óryeerø kinni, “Jøg-ɑ rënyi piny ɑ́wɑ̈nhi keny thyew," 
Acts17:7 o ge ying-ɑ gøl Yɑsøn. O ge bënn, ge gøgg-ɑ gïg-ɑ bɑ ɑkerø yi ciggi Kɑysɑr; ge okööbø kinni, i dɑ rɑ̈dh megø me nud, me cwøl ɑ́ Yëso.”" 
Acts17:8 Kɑ teedø bëne kí jɑggi kɑɑlɑni, ceg-ɑ pëddø ki wøwø keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen møgɑni." 
Acts17:9 Kɑ Yɑsøn geki jøg-ɑ ɑ́mɑg köbbi col ki ngyëny, codhe, ɑwiy ge gïn, o ge kedh gen." 
Acts17:10 Bɑ bøli kenyɑni ceth, ɑ ɑ́ör Pøøl geki Silɑ̀ kì wɑ̈r yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, kinni kedhi gen Beriyɑ̀. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen, ɑkedhi gen sinɑgøg." 
Acts17:11 De Yeud møg-ɑ ying kɑɑlɑni rummi gen nud kibøli tyëng Tesɑlonikɑ̀. Yïthhi gen ɑ́kënni gen kwøbbi Jwøk. Kɑ Wɑ̈nyi Kwërø nyi rɑng yi gen kì yethi cyɑ̈ng, ge yɑb-ɑ thɑ́ møg-ɑ kømmi yi Pøøl, mɑ bëëd gɑ dyër." 
Acts17:12 Ji mø gïïr ɑ́yïëy kì kelli gen, kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ bɑ pëjjì kì kelli tyëng Yönɑn, kí jøg-ɑ cwøw thyew." 
Acts17:13 De kɑ ɑ́lïng Yeud mø Tesɑlonikɑ̀ kinni, Pøøl ópwönyø ki kwøbbi Jwøk kì Beriyɑ̀, ɑbëën gen kɑɑlɑni be bɑ̈nni wɑ̈thi ji, kɑ gï tunggi gen." 
Acts17:14 Codhe, ɑör Pøøl yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy kinni kedhe thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø, kɑ Silɑ̀ odöngø kì Beriyɑ̀ geki Timøthì." 
Acts17:15 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lwøøg Pøøl, wɑ̈dh-ɑ Athïnɑ̀, ɑdwöög gen ge ókɑ̈ddø ki wöödø mɑ ɑ́ör yi Pøøl kinni i jwɑn Silɑ̀ geki Timøthì kedhi bɑnge." 
Acts17:16 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́ying Pøøl Athïnɑ̀, e yïd-ɑ Silɑ̀ geki Timøthì, pyëwe ɑ́rënyi kɑ ɑ́lïdhe kinni, kɑɑlɑni pɑ̈ng yi ngïjji jwögg." 
Acts17:17 Codhe, ɑkedhe sinɑgøg kɑ nyii kööbø kì kenyɑni geki Yeud kí ji møøgø møg-ɑ nyi wør Jwøk. Kɑ Pøøl nyii kööbø kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, ki tyëng-ɑ nyi yod yi en kì kɑ̈jji ngyew kì kɑɑlɑni." 
Acts17:18 Kɑ órøømø ki ji mø bɑ tïddi kwøb møg-ɑ nyi cwølli gɑ Epikur kí Istøyik, kɑ kwï gen okööbø kinni, “Á gïn ɑ kømmi yi jɑl-ɑ wɑ̈dhi twɑgø èn?” Kɑ ji møøgø ólöggø kinni, “Jɑlɑni pwöny-ɑ kwøbbi jwögg mø kwïj.” Mɑ́ e töng-ɑ kwøbbi Yëso geki kwøbbi dwöngi mɑl kì yij thøø." 
Acts17:19 Kɑ gø mɑg gen, kɑ gø kïdhi gen bur-ɑ nyi cwøl ɑ́ Aryøpɑgøs. Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Nyudhí wøn pwöny-ɑ nyɑ̈n men-ɑ kømmi yi yïn, wø dwɑdd-ɑ yodi gïn-ɑ wɑnge," 
Acts17:20 mɑ́ yï kɑ̈ll-ɑ kwøb mø nuti kwøngø lïngø yi wøn cøn. O wø dwɑdd-ɑ yodi gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen.” 
Acts17:21 Tyëng Athïnɑ̀ bënn kí wëdhh-ɑ kelli gen, nyi tyëg piny ge tyer-ɑ kwøb kí lïngø ki møg-ɑ nyɑ̈n." 
Acts17:22 Kɑ Pøøl ócungø kì bøli Aryøpɑgøs, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Wun ɑ jøgi Athïnɑ̀, ɑ́lidh yi yɑn kinni, wu bɑ tyëng kwøbbi Jwøk, kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
Acts17:23 Mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́wïïn kì kɑɑl wun, yɑ nenn-ɑ ri kenggi wun, kɑ yɑ óyïddø ki këli lɑm me köme ógwedø kinni, ‘Mëgg-ɑ jwøng kwïj.’ Jwøng-ɑ nyi mɑlli yi wun, e kwïj yi wun, bene en ɑ kwøbbe muujɑ wun ɑnɑn." 
Acts17:24 En ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j lɑ̈bø kí gïg-ɑ yije bënn; en ɑ bɑ Wïi mɑl kí piny, o pɑ nyi bëëdø kì yethi keng møg-ɑ ógerø yi ji ki cinggi gen." 
Acts17:25 O pɑ cuggi göggø yi ji e dhɑ̈y ce dɑ gïn jɑ̈ddii, mɑ́ en ɑ nyi thödhi ji bënn ki nënnì, kí wëy, kí jɑmmì bënn." 
Acts17:26 Wɑ̈thi jurrì bënn ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi en kì ri dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel, kɑ gï cïbe kömi piny; kɑ gï cïbe ki bøli kɑ̈jj-ɑ nud gen, kí kɑ̈jj-ɑ bëëd yi gen." 
Acts17:27 Ágöög kinøw kɑ per kinni o óyɑb yi gen, o yod yi gen, mɑ́ e cyɑ̈gi kì butee wɑ bënn;" 
Acts17:28 ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Bɑ ree ɑ nëën yi wɑ; en ɑ ree cyɑ̈dhi yi wɑ; o en ɑ ree nud wɑ.’ Ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi ɑcɑ̈ggi wun kinni, ‘Wɑ bɑ nyige thyew.’" 
Acts17:29 Kɑ̀ bëëd wɑ bɑ nyigi Jwøk, wɑ ko rum kinni jwøg bɑ gïn cuggi gwøgø yi dhɑnhø ki døøji cinge, ɑ́ dhɑb, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́tegø, wɑlɑ̀ kït." 
Acts17:30 Møgɑni ɑ́wøy yi Jwøk, kì bøli kej kwïji wøw, de ɑnɑn ji bënn, kì yethi kɑ̈jj bënn, cege’ cegø kinni yewi gen ki bëënrɑj," 
Acts17:31 mɑ́ cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ócɑye piny ki gøny-ɑ dyër ki cingi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi en, ɑ́rum ki cïbø yi en. Ngɑnɑni ɑ́rum ki nyudhi dhɑnhø bëne yi en, keny-ɑ ɑ́tuge gøn kì yij thøø.”" 
Acts17:32 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen kwøbbi tugø kì yij thøø, ɑgɑggii yi kwï gen, kɑ møøgø okööbø kinni, “Kwøbbí ócigi lïngø yi wøn kipe møgɑni.”" 
Acts17:33 Codhe, ɑkedhi Pøøl wɑ̈g kì kelli gen." 
Acts17:34 De kwï gen ɑ́rëbi ki en, kɑ ge oyïëyø. Kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy dɑ; Diyønisiyøs, o bɑ jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jɑggi Aryøpɑgøs; kí ngɑndhɑjø me cwøl ɑ́ Dɑmɑris, kí ji møøgø." 
Acts18:1 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Pøøl kì Athïnɑ̀, kɑ kedh-ɑ Körintøs." 
Acts18:2 Kunɑni ɑ ɑ́yode Yeudì me cwøl ɑ́ Akïlɑ̀, o ónywøøl ɑ Pøntøs, o cer-ɑ bëënø e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Itɑliyɑ̀ geki cyëge Priskilɑ̀, mɑ́ Yeud ɑ́ryem kì Römɑ̀ yi Kelɑwdiyøs Kɑysɑr. Akedhi Pøøl be yïddø ki gen," 
Acts18:3 kɑ pëgg-ɑ be gwøg kì buti gen, mɑ́ gwøøg gen bɑ ɑ́kyel, ɑ løg cwɑ̈j ki kemm." 
Acts18:4 Kɑ nyii pwönyø kì cyɑ̈nggi Sɑbɑth bënn kì sinɑgøg, e yɑb-ɑ løgi wɑ̈thi Yeud, kí tyëng Yönɑn bënn." 
Acts18:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Silɑ̀ geki Timøthì, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Mɑkdöniyɑ̀, ɑyuud gen Pøøl wïje ómɑgø yi pwönyø ki menteg, e thyer-ɑ kwøb kì bøli Yeud kinni, Yëso bene Mesiy." 
Acts18:6 De kwøbbe ɑ́bɑny yi gen, kɑ gø gwɑddi gen, ɑbɑ̈ɑ̈de ógødhe, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Keløg wu ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny, cɑ́y óying kömi wun; yïɑ bɑ̈r! Yɑ ceg-ɑ cɑ̈gø ki kedhi yï tyëngpɑth ki Yeud ɑnɑn ceth.”" 
Acts18:7 Adhwödhe kì kenyɑni kɑ kedh-ɑ gøl jɑl me pɑth ki Yeudì me nyi mɑlli Jwøk; nyinge cwøl ɑ́ Titiyøs Yøstøs; gøle ying-ɑ buti sinɑgøg. 
Acts18:8 Kɑ Wë yïëy yi Krispøs jɑngi sinɑgøg geki gøle bëne. Kɑ ji mø ngenyø kì kelli tyëng Körintøs oyïëyø kɑ ɑ́lïngi gen kwøbbi Pøøl, kɑ ge jwɑ̈ɑ̈g." 
Acts18:9 Kɑ Pøøl köbbi yi Wë kì yethi lɑ̈g kì wɑ̈r kinni, “Yï ko böggi! De kööb, yï ko kud," 
Acts18:10 mɑ́ yɑ nud kì butí, o bong ngɑn-ɑ ónywɑl yïn, yïɑ dɑ ji mø ngenyø kì kɑɑl men.”" 
Acts18:11 Kɑ obëëdø kì kɑɑlɑni ki run ɑ́kyel kí dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïkyel, e pwöny-ɑ kwøbbi Jwøk." 
Acts18:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg Gɑliyø ɑ́ modïr mi Akɑiyɑ̀, ɑrëbi Yeud, kɑ Pøøl mɑg gen, kɑ gø kïdhi gen burø," 
Acts18:13 ɑkööb gen kinni, “Jɑlɑni pɑng-ɑ wɑ̈thi ji, kinni nyi mɑl gen Jwøk ki yöö me bɑ ɑkerø yi cigg!”" 
Acts18:14 Pøøl ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ löggø, kɑ Yeud köbbi yi Gɑliyø kinni, “Wun ɑ Yeud, keløg møgɑni di bëëd gɑ kwøbbi gwøg ki gïnrɑj wɑlɑ̀ bɑ̈jjø, kwøbbi wun di lïngɑ ni kɑ̀ dwɑddii yi cigg-ɑ dyër," 
Acts18:15 de kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ pëmø ki kwøb møøgø geki nying kì ri ciggi wun, møgɑni lidh-ɑ yi wun, wu keti wun. Yɑ pɑ bëëdø yɑn ɑ́ jɑgø kipe kwøbbɑni.”" 
Acts18:16 Aryeeme gïn wɑ̈g kì kej gøny. 
Acts18:17 Kɑ Sosthenis, jɑngi sinɑgøg, mɑg gen bënn, kɑ gø pwöd gen kì bøli kej gøny. Kɑ Gɑliyø ree dhïïge." 
Acts18:18 Kɑ Pøøl obëëdø ki cyɑ̈ng mø ngenyø, codhe ɑwiye tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy kɑ kedh-ɑ Suriyɑ̀ ki sɑpïnɑ̀, kyeel ki Priskilɑ̀ geki Akïlɑ̀. Kɑ wïje lyel kì Senkeriɑ̀ kipe møg mø kwööng en." 
Acts18:19 Kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Epɑsos, kɑ Priskilɑ̀ geki Akïlɑ̀ wiy yi Pøøl kì keny-ɑ ɑ́pëggi yi gen, kɑ kedh-ɑ sinɑgøg, kɑ dhøggi gen lømmi gen ki Yeud." 
Acts18:20 Kɑ kwɑjji yi gen kinni kɑle bëëdø, ɑkyëde." 
Acts18:21 Kɑ ɑ́rume mɑ̈dhi gïn, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑ ódwöög yï wun, keløg ɑ́ gïn dwɑddi yi Jwøk.” Kɑ odhwödhø kì Epɑsos ki sɑpïnɑ̀." 
Acts18:22 Kɑ kɑdh-ɑ wɑ̈g kì Kɑysɑriyɑ̀, ɑtönge Yerusɑlem be mɑ̈dhi kɑnïsɑ̀, ɑpödhe Anthɑkiyɑ̀." 
Acts18:23 Kɑ kɑl-ɑ bëëdø kì kenyɑni, codhe ɑdhwödhe, kɑ ókedhø e ócyɑ̈dhø kì kelli myërri Gɑlɑthiyɑ̀ geki Perïjiyɑ̀, e cïj-ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy bënn." 
Acts18:24 Kɑ Yeudì me cwøl ɑ́ Apøløs, o bɑ jɑl Iskɑnderiyɑ̀ bï-ɑ Epɑsos. Jɑlɑni bɑ löngø, o ngɑ̈ny lwøbi møg-ɑ yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kidøøj." 
Acts18:25 Rumø pwönyø ki kwøbbi Wë cøn, o pyëwe ying-ɑ kömi kwøbbɑni, kɑ ócɑ̈gø pwönyø ki kwøbbi Yëso ki yuu-ɑ dyër. De ngɑ̈ny-ɑ jwɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g ji yi Jøn kete." 
Acts18:26 Kɑ ócɑ̈gø kwøb kì sinɑgøg ki tegi pyëwe, ɑlïngi møge yi Priskilɑ̀ geki Akïlɑ̀, ɑcwøøl ge gøn gøl gen, kɑ tyelli kwøbbi yuu Jwøk ti yi gen ki löbbii." 
Acts18:27 Kɑ okööbø cem e dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi Akɑiyɑ̀, ɑcïïjii yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy kì Epɑsos, kɑ ge gwëd-ɑ yï tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy kì Akɑiyɑ̀ kinni cwøøl ge gøn kelli gen. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́göög ki jii Mesiy kì bɑng dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk, gï kønye ki mendwøng." 
Acts18:28 Mɑ́ dhøggi Yeud ɑ́nɑ̈ge ki menteg kì bøli teedø, kɑ gï nyudhe møg-ɑ yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, Yëso bene Mesiy." 
Acts19:1 Pøøl ɑ́kedh e cør-ɑ yij modïrɑni, kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ Epɑsos e Apøløs nudd e ying-ɑ Körintøs. Kɑ óyïddø ki tyëngbɑng Yëso kì kenyɑni." 
Acts19:2 Kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Wu ɑ́di yïddø ki Wëykwërø kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́yïëy wun?” Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Bogøn. Wø nuti wöl lïngø kinni, i dɑ Wëykwërø.”" 
Acts19:3 Akööbe kinni, “De wu ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g ɑ ri ngø?” Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Jwɑ̈ɑ̈gi Jøn.”" 
Acts19:4 Kɑ Pøøl okööbø kinni, “Jwɑ̈ngi Jøn bɑ kipe yewi tyëng Isrɑil ki orøøg gen, e nyi köbb-ɑ teedø kinni, yïëy gen ki ngɑn-ɑ óbï kì bɑnge, ɑ løg Yëso.”" 
Acts19:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen møgɑni, ɑjwɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ki nyingi Wë Yëso." 
Acts19:6 Kɑ Pøøl cingge thɑɑnye kömi gïn, ɑbëën Wëykwërø kömi gen, kɑ ge odhumø ki dhøg mø pɑth ki dhøggi gen, kɑ ge otöngø." 
Acts19:7 Kwɑnni gen wɑ̈dh-ɑ ri pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. 
Acts19:8 Kɑ Pøøl kedh-ɑ sinɑgøg, kɑ dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g tyëge, e ópwönyø ki tegi pyëwe, ge lømm-ɑ dhøggi gen kì ri Pödhi Jwøk, e tyer-ɑ nɑ̈gi dhøggi gen." 
Acts19:9 Kɑ kwï ji opëmø, kɑ ge óbɑ̈nyø ki yïëyø, kɑ ge okööbø ki kwøb mø rijjø kì ri Yuu Wë kì bøli teedø bëne, ɑdhwödh Pøøl kì kelli gen, kɑ jøbɑng Yëso kɑ̈l yi en, kɑ gï nyi pwönye kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kì ød gweed Terɑnøs." 
Acts19:10 Kɑ tyëg-ɑ runn ɑ́ryew kinøw. Kɑ kwøbbi Wë lïngi yi Yeud, kí tyëng Yönɑn, kí ji-ɑ bëëdø kì Ásiyɑ̀ bënn." 
Acts19:11 Kɑ Jwøk ogöögø kì cingi Pøøl ki gïïngɑ̈ngø mø nuti pɑ̈nyø gwøgø cøn. 
Acts19:12 Kɑ mɑndïll kí pɑ̈rrì nyi kɑ̈l kì ree yi teedø, kɑ gï nyi cïb gen ri wɑddi gen møg-ɑ buud, kɑ ge nyii dönyø, kɑ wëyrijjø nyi bï-ɑ wɑ̈g." 
Acts19:13 Kɑ kwï Yeud møg-ɑ nyi wïïnø, ge cyëdd-ɑ wɑ̈g ki wëyrijjø, ri gen pɑ̈nyi gen ki ryëmmø ki nyingi Wë Yëso, kɑ ge nyii kööbø kinni, “Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn ki nyingi Yëso, ngɑn-ɑ pere pwönyi yi Pøøl.”" 
Acts19:14 Ádɑ Yeudì me cwøl ɑ́ Iskɑbɑ̀, o bɑ ókwërø me dwøng. Jɑlɑni yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïryew møg nyi göögø kinøw." 
Acts19:15 Kɑ mø gen løøg yi wëyɑni kinni, “Yëso ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, o Pøøl ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, de wu bɑ møg?”" 
Acts19:16 Kɑ jɑl-ɑ́ ree ɑ́di wëyrɑj pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi gen, kɑ gï tyɑme, ge bënn, kɑ ge reng-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑl, ri gen bong ógudh, o ri gen dɑ kedd." 
Acts19:17 Kɑ møgɑni lïngi yi Yeud geki tyëng Yönɑn møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Epɑsos; kɑ ge obwøgø bënn. Kɑ nyingi Wë Yëso ti ki wørø. 
Acts19:18 Kɑ ji mø ngenyø kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy bï-ɑ be thyeri yïëyi gen kì bøli teedø, kɑ ge óyewø ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi gen ki yɑdh." 
Acts19:19 Kɑ ji mø gïïr kì kelli tyëng-ɑ nyi thëdhø cøn, wɑ̈jji gen cøng gen, kɑ gï rɑ̈b gen kì bøli teedø. Kɑ ngyënyy-ɑ óngeew wɑ̈jjɑni kwɑn, kɑ kwɑnni ngyëny ɑ́tegg møgɑni wɑ̈dh-ɑ ri ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
Acts19:20 Kɑ kwøbbi Wë otɑyø, kɑ ge pödh-ɑ mɑl ki mendwøng." 
Acts19:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gïgɑni ki cwöbø, ɑkööb Pøøl kinni dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi Yerusɑlem, e kɑ̈l-ɑ kö Mɑkdöniyɑ̀ kí Akɑiyɑ̀. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Keny-ɑ órumɑ ki kedhi kunɑni, yɑ ceg-ɑ kedhi be lidhi Römɑ̀ thyew.”" 
Acts19:22 Kɑ Pøøl jøg-ɑ nyi kønyii gɑ ɑ́ryew, gen ɑ Timøthì kí Erɑstøs, öre Mɑkdöniyɑ̀, de ɑ́kɑl bëëdø kì Ásiyɑ̀." 
Acts19:23 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́bëën ɑkørr mø døngø kömi Yuu Wë," 
Acts19:24 mɑ́ e ɑ́dɑ jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Dimitriyøs, o bɑ bødhi køny ki ɑ́tegø; ɑ́bëëd e nyi thɑ̈dh-ɑ ngïjji kengi Artemïs, jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø, o bödhhì ɑ́bëëd ge nyi ceg-ɑ yïddø ki jɑmmì mø gïïr kì bɑng gwøngɑni." 
Acts19:25 Kɑ bödhhɑni cøng kej ɑ́kyel yi Dimitriyøs. Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Nyiimïɑ, ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, bɑ ri gwøngɑni ɑ nyi yïddi yi wɑ ki jɑmmì." 
Acts19:26 Gïg-ɑ gøggi yi jɑl-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Pøøl ɑ́lidh yi wun, kɑ møg-ɑ kømme lïngi yi wun, kɑ̀ pɑngge ji kinni, i jwögg-ɑ gwøg ki cing ge pɑth ki jwögg kinni tek; o pɑth ki Epɑsos kete ɑ kømme møgɑni, dɑ́ kì Ásiyɑ̀ bëne." 
Acts19:27 Pɑth ki gwøgee kete ɑ rënyi, de kengi Artemïs, jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø men-ɑ dwøng, ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø ki dhwɑ̈nge, e men-ɑ́ Artemïs mɑll-ɑ yi ji bënn kì Ásiyɑ̀ kí kömi piny bëne.”" 
Acts19:28 Kɑ pëthi gen ókënyø ki mendwøng, kɑ ɑ́lïngi gen møgɑni, kɑ ge óryeerø kinni, “Artemïs jwøøg Epɑsos, bɑ en ɑ dwøng.”" 
Acts19:29 Kɑ kɑɑl bëne opɑ̈ngø yi ɑgwɑg, kɑ Gɑyøs kí Aristɑrkøs, jø Mɑkdöniyɑ̀ møg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki Pøøl mɑg, kɑ ge ywɑɑj ódɑ̈ri kɑɑlɑni." 
Acts19:30 Pøøl ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi yï teenɑni, de ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n yi jøbɑng Yëso." 
Acts19:31 Kɑ kwï jyɑ̈ggi Ásiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ bɑ mɑ̈dhh ki Pøøl öd-ɑ yïe ge kwɑjj-ɑ gøn kinni, ko kedhi medɑn." 
Acts19:32 Kɑ ɑgwɑg ceg-ɑ ì dut, kwï ji ryeer ge wɑng-ɑ gïjø megø, o møøgø ryeer, ge wɑng-ɑ gïn-ɑ kyeelø; mɑ́ ji mø gïïr kì kenyɑni, gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́cugi ji kwïj yi gen." 
Acts19:33 Kɑ Iskɑnder, cøør mɑl yi Yeud, kɑ cinge tïnge e dwɑdd-ɑ löggi teedø." 
Acts19:34 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ngijii yi gen kinni, bɑ Yeudì; kɑ ge ómɑ̈gø ki sɑɑ̀ ɑ́ryew ge óryeerø wïj ɑ́kyel kinni, “Artemïs jwøøg Epɑsos, bɑ en ɑ dwøng.”" 
Acts19:35 Kì cyɑ̈n cyee, ɑkyëddi teedø yi jɑlgweed kɑɑlɑni kinni, kud gen, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Wun ɑ tyëng Epɑsos, ɑ́ men kì kömi piny, ɑ kwïj wøw kinni, Epɑsos kɑɑlee bene en ɑ kor kengi Artemïs jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø geki kïti kwër men-ɑ ɑ́dëëm kì mɑl?" 
Acts19:36 Bong ngɑn cuggi kyeri møgɑni. De kud wun, kɑ wu ko kööb ki kwøbbi dhëëgø." 
Acts19:37 Anɑn jøg ryeet ge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wun keny, e bong jɑmmì mø kwɑɑl gen kì yij kengø, wɑlɑ̀ bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́kømmi gen kì ri jwøgee jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø." 
Acts19:38 Keløg Dimitriyøs geki bödhhe yï gen dɑ gøny ki ngɑn megø, buri gøny bɑ ɑyieb, o modïr nud. Kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen gøøny gen." 
Acts19:39 De keløg e dɑ gøny megø me nud kì yï wun, ólidh kì yij buri cigg." 
Acts19:40 O nënni wɑ bɑ møg-ɑ ócɑy kipe ɑgwɑɑg dicyɑ̈ngtïn, o bong ngɑn-ɑ ólwøb cɑ̈gi ɑgwɑngɑni.”" 
Acts19:41 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume kwøbi møgɑni, ɑköbbe teenɑni kinni, dɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen." 
Acts20:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg ɑgwɑngɑni piny, kɑ Pøøl tyëngbɑng Yëso cwøle, keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki cïjø yi en, ɑmɑ̈dhe gïn, kɑ odhwödhø, e kedh-ɑ Mɑkdöniyɑ̀." 
Acts20:2 Kɑ kɑ̈l-ɑ köthi kɑ̈ddɑni, e cïj-ɑ tyëngyïëyø, kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ Akɑiyɑ̀." 
Acts20:3 Amɑ̈ge ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g kì kenyɑni, kɑ nywɑ̈ggi dhøg yi Yeud kinni o di nɑ̈g, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́køme kedhi Suriyɑ̀ ki sɑpïnɑ̀, ɑrume kinni, lɑ̈w ke døøge, e kɑ̈l-ɑ Mɑkdöniyɑ̀." 
Acts20:4 Alwøøgii yi Söpɑter wɑ̈d Pirøs, jɑl Beriyɑ̀; kí Aristɑrkøs geki Sekundus jø Tesɑlonikɑ̀; kí Gɑyøs jɑl Derbɑ̀; kí Tikikøs geki Trøpimøs, jø modïri Ásiyɑ̀; kí Timøthì." 
Acts20:5 Jøgɑni ɑ́møøl bøli wøn, kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Torwɑs, ɑyïd wøn yi gen kì kunɑni," 
Acts20:6 Kɑ wø odhwödhø kì Pïlïpì ki sɑpïnɑ̀ kì bɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Kwëër Olwëny, kɑ ge pïïd wøn Torwɑs, kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïj. Kɑ wø obëëdø ki osboo." 
Acts20:7 Kɑ wø ócugø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk, kipe pødi ópun, kɑ Pøøl okööbø ki teedø, mɑ́ e bɑ men dhwödh dhuki. Kɑ ómɑ̈gø ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r e ópwönyø gïti dïwɑ̈r." 
Acts20:8 Ádɑ lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ mø ngenyø kì ød mɑl men-ɑ ɑ́cugi yi wøn. 
Acts20:9 Nyelɑwøb me cwøl ɑ́ Yutikøs ɑ́bëëd ɑ wɑɑng ɑwɑj. Kɑ ócɑ̈gø ki nwɑyyø e Pøøl nudd e ópwönyø, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈dhe kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g dör kì mɑl, kɑ tïng e thøø." 
Acts20:10 Kɑ Pøøl kedh-ɑ piny, ɑleenge ree kömi nyelɑni, kɑ gø dööbe kööre, ɑkööbe kinni, “Pëthi wun ko lïngi, nudd e onëënø.”" 
Acts20:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Pøøl ki døøg dör-ɑ mɑl, ɑpøde ópun, kɑ ocyɑ̈mø. Kɑ pëgg-ɑ be dwøg ki gïn, gïti kɑ ɑ́ru wøw, codhe ɑkedhe." 
Acts20:12 Kɑ nyelɑni kïdhi gøl gen e onëënø, kɑ pëthi gen ómïnø ki mendwøng." 
Acts20:13 Kɑ wø kedh-ɑ kun-ɑ di sɑpïnɑ̀, ɑdhwödh wøn, wø kedh-ɑ Asös, kinni o Pøøl kwɑny yi wøn ki kunɑni, mɑ́ e ɑ́kedhi kunɑni kɑ tyelle." 
Acts20:14 Kɑ wø røøm-ɑ Asös ki en, ɑkwɑny wøn en ki sɑpïnɑ̀, kɑ wø kedh-ɑ Mitilenɑ̀." 
Acts20:15 Kɑ wø odhwödhø kì kenyɑni ki sɑpïnɑ̀, dhuki ɑwɑ̈dhi wøn bøli Kiyøs. Kɑ wø kɑ̈l-ɑ bøli Sɑmös kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng. Codhe ɑwɑ̈dhi wøn Miletøs kì ngween cyɑ̈ng." 
Acts20:16 Kɑ Epɑsos pöödh wøn, wø kɑ̈ll-ɑ nɑɑm omelø, mɑ́ Pøøl nuti dwɑddi cwöngø kì Ásiyɑ̀, de ɑ́ceg-ɑ jwɑ̈ɑ̈nø kipe kinni, o wɑ̈dhe Yerusɑlem cyɑ̈ng-ɑ Pyɑ̈r Ábïj nuti bëënø." 
Acts20:17 Kɑ öd-ɑ Epɑsos e ying-ɑ Miletøs, be cwööli jøgdøngi kɑnïsɑ̀." 
Acts20:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi gen yïe, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Bëëdɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi wun, yɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ kelli wun, cɑg kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́ywöönyɑ tyelɑ Ásiyɑ̀," 
Acts20:19 kí kɑ ɑ́göögɑ kipe Wë ki möölø, yɑ ceg-ɑ kïïmø; kí orɑng-ɑ nyi bï kömɑ kì bɑng kɑ̀ nyi nywɑ̈ggi yɑn dhøg yi Yeud." 
Acts20:20 O bong gïndøj mɑ ɑ́cög e nuti göggi wun yi yɑn, kɑ ɑ́pwönyɑ kì bøli teedø, kí yethi kɑ̈lli wun." 
Acts20:21 Kɑ kwøbbi yewø kì bøli Jwøk geki kwøbbi yïëyi Wë Yëso Mesiy nyi thyerɑ kì bøli Yeud kí tyëng Yönɑn bënn. 
Acts20:22 De ɑnɑn yɑ kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem, yɑ kɑ̈ll-ɑ yi Wëykwërø, o gïn-ɑ óbï kömɑ kì kunɑni kwïj yi yɑn," 
Acts20:23 de yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ nyii köbbø yi Wëykwërø kì yethi kɑ̈dd bënn kinni, dɑ ɑkørr kí digïddì mø yïd yɑn." 
Acts20:24 Kì yïɑ, wëyɑ bong per gen, de yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ tyëgi bøli kejɑ kete, geki gwøng-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Wë Yëso, eni pwönyi Wöndøj mi dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk." 
Acts20:25 “Yɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kì kelli wun bënn, yɑ pwöny-ɑ kwøbbi Pödhi Jwøk. O ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, yɑ pɑ lidh yi wun këti." 
Acts20:26 Bene ɑ köbbɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn kinni, yïɑ bɑ̈r ki remi dhɑnhø bëne," 
Acts20:27 mɑ́ wu nuti kɑ̈nø yi yɑn ki kwøbb-ɑ ying pyëw Jwøk. 
Acts20:28 Koru ri wun, wuki dyëg-ɑ ɑ́cïb cinggi wun bënn yi Wëykwërø; wu tyëng-ɑ kwɑy kɑnïsɑ̀ mi Wë, men-ɑ ɑ́ngewe ki reme." 
Acts20:29 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, kì bɑng keny-ɑ ódhwödhɑ, gøll-ɑ nyi gwɑ̈rø óbï kelli wun, o dyëg koo wiy yi gen." 
Acts20:30 O ji møøgø ódhwödh kì kelli wun, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy peej gen pɑ̈l ki kwøbbi pyed." 
Acts20:31 Nëën wun kidøøj, kɑ wu nyi pɑru kinni wu ɑ́pwönyɑ, e pïi nyingɑ órïngø kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng, ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g, wu nyi cegɑ’ cegø." 
Acts20:32 “De ɑnɑn, wu cïbɑ’ cingi Jwøk geki kwøbbi dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïe. Wu ótïng mɑl yi kwøbbɑni, o wu óyïddi ki gyëdh møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kinni gï ómëgge jie." 
Acts20:33 Yɑ nuti mudø kipe ngyëny wɑlɑ̀ kipe ógudh mø ngɑn megø. 
Acts20:34 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kì ri wun kinni, yɑ ɑ́göög-ɑ cinggɑ møg, kipe kinni o yɑ nyi yïddɑ ki gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn wøki tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki yɑn." 
Acts20:35 Wu ɑ́nyudhɑ kì ri jɑmmì bënn kinni, göög wɑ ki gwøng teg, kɑ tyëng-ɑ nyødh nyi køny wɑ. Kɑ kwøbbi Wë Yëso nyi pɑr wɑ; gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kinni, ‘Medi pyëw men-ɑ yod yi ngɑn-ɑ muujø, lod-ɑ medi pyëw ngɑn-ɑ nëngi yi en.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume kwøbi møgɑni, ɑpëgge wɑ̈thi cønge, kɑ ókwɑ̈jjø kyeel ki tyëngɑni bënn." 
Acts20:37 Kɑ ge óywöngø bënn, kɑ Pøøl döbbi gen, kɑ gø nuum gen." 
Acts20:38 O gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́ti gen kïïmø ki mendwøng, bɑ kɑ ɑ́kööbe kinni, pɑ lidh yi gen këti. Alwøøg ge gøn yij sɑpïnɑ̀." 
Acts21:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum wøn ki dɑ̈ngø ki gen, ɑdhwödh wøn ki sɑpïnɑ̀, wø cïm-ɑ Kös, kɑ wø wɑ̈dh-ɑ Rödis dhuki; kɑ wø pödh-ɑ Pɑtɑrɑ̀." 
Acts21:2 Kɑ wø óyïddø ki sɑpïnɑ̀ me kedhi Pinikiyɑ̀, ɑkɑdhi wøn yije, kɑ wø odhwödhø." 
Acts21:3 Kɑ wø wɑ̈dh-ɑ keny mɑ ɑ́nënni yi Kobros, ɑwiy wø en kì wɑ̈thi cyɑ̈mmi wøn, kɑ wø pödh-ɑ Suriyɑ̀, kɑ wø töng-ɑ wɑ̈g kì Suur, mɑ́ e ɑ́dɑ jɑmmì mɑ ɑ́yëëg wɑ̈g kì yij sɑpïnɑ̀." 
Acts21:4 Kɑ wø óyïddø ki jøbɑng Yëso, ɑbëëd wøn kì kenyɑni ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew. Kɑ Pøøl kyëddi yi tyëngɑni kì bɑng møg lïngi gen kì yï Wëy kinni ko kedhi Yerusɑlem." 
Acts21:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi cyɑ̈nggi wøn kì kenyɑni, ɑdhwödh wøn, kɑ wø lwøøg yi tyëngɑni bënn geki mɑ̈nni gen, kí nyigi gen, gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi wøn ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl. Kɑ wø pëgg-ɑ wɑ̈thi cøngi wøn kì thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø, kɑ wø ókwɑ̈jjø, kɑ ri wøn mɑ̈dh wøn." 
Acts21:6 Akɑdhi wøn yij sɑpïnɑ̀, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ kɑ̈lli gen." 
Acts21:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum wøn ki dhwödhø kì Suur ki sɑpïnɑ̀, ɑwɑ̈dhi wøn Tølemɑis. Amɑ̈dhi wøn ki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, kɑ wø orïïjø ki gen ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel." 
Acts21:8 Dhuki ɑdhwödh wøn, kɑ wø kedh-ɑ Kɑysɑriyɑ̀. Akedhi wøn gøl Pïlïp, jɑl-ɑ nyi pwönyi wöndøj, kɑ wø obëëdø kì bute. Pïlïp bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli ɑ́bïryew." 
Acts21:9 O yïe ɑ́dɑ nyige wojur ɑ́ngwen mø nyi töngø. 
Acts21:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum wøn ki bëëdø ki cyɑ̈ng mø nøg, ɑbëën jɑltöng me kɑ̈ɑ̈l Yeudiyɑ̀, me cwøl ɑ́ Agɑbøs." 
Acts21:11 Kɑ bï-ɑ yï wøn, ɑkwɑnye wëni Pøøl, kɑ tyelle kí cingge twöje, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Wëykwërø okööbø kinni, ‘Wïi wëëni men, ótwöj kinni, yi Yeud kì Yerusɑlem, kɑ cïb cinggi tyëngpɑth ki Yeud.”" 
Acts21:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi wøn møgɑni, wøki tyëng-ɑ kenyɑni, ɑkwɑjji wøn Pøøl kinni cöge e pɑ kedhi Yerusɑlem." 
Acts21:13 Kɑ Pøøl ólöggø kinni, “Á ngø ɑ gwøg yi wun kinnï, ɑ cöd wun pyëwɑ ki ywøg? Riɑ tyeeny yɑn kipe mɑgø, cɑgg ɑ́ kipe thøø kì Yerusɑlem kiper nyingi Wë Yëso.”" 
Acts21:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈le jogø, ɑkud wøn, kɑ wø okööbø kinni, “Wiy møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi Wë gwøg.”" 
Acts21:15 Bɑng cyɑ̈ng mø nøg, ɑcøng wøn jɑmmì, kɑ wø kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
Acts21:16 Kɑ wø lwøøg yi kwï jøbɑng Yëso kì Kɑysɑriyɑ̀, kɑ wø kïdhi gen gøl Menɑsøn jɑl Kobros, o wø bëëd wøn kì gøle. Jɑlɑni bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøbɑng Yëso mø tyeli mɑl." 
Acts21:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi wøn Yerusɑlem, kɑ wø pɑɑr yöö yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy ki medi pëthi gen." 
Acts21:18 Dhuki ɑkedhi wøn be yïddø ki Yɑgob wøki Pøøl, o jøgdøngø bënn ɑ́bëëd ge nud kì kenyɑni." 
Acts21:19 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume mɑ̈dhi gïn, ɑlwøbe kwøbbi gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk kì kelli jurrì bënn." 
Acts21:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen møgɑni, ɑpwøj gen Jwøk. Kɑ Pøøl köbbi gen kinni, “Yïn ɑ ómï wøn, yï ɑ́lïdhi ki ji-ɑ ɑ́yïëy gɑ ɑ́lïp mø ngenyø kì kelli Yeud, ge nudd ge mɑ̈gø ki menteg kì ri Ciggi Mosɑ̀." 
Acts21:21 O jiɑni ɑ́lïng kinni i yï köbb-ɑ Yeud møg-ɑ bëëdø kì pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn kinni, i wiy gen mïdhi Ciggi Mosɑ̀, i kɑ ge kyëddi yi yïn kinni, wɑ̈ddi gen ko ngøl, kɑ kwöng ko mïdhi gen." 
Acts21:22 Á gïn ɑ gwøg ɑnɑn? Mɑ́ bëëní ólïngi yi gen ceth. 
Acts21:23 Anɑn gwøg gïn-ɑ köbbi yïn yi wøn. Yï wøn dɑ jøg ɑ́ngwen mɑ ɑ́köngi. 
Acts21:24 Kɑ̈l jøgɑni, kɑ wu göög wun ki guöög dhïwø, kɑ wïj köngi gen cool, o wɑ̈thi gen lyel gen. Codhe, o yod yi teedø bëne kinni møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi gen kì rií pɑth ki dyër; o Ciggi Mosɑ̀ omïdhø yi yïn ceth." 
Acts21:25 De tyëngpɑth ki Yeud møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, ge ɑ́gwëdi yi wøn ki møg-ɑ ɑ́tyëg yi wøn kinni, ge ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gëdhh-ɑ ngɑ̈lli ngïjji jwögg; kɑ ge ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki remø geki gïn-ɑ ceg ki twijø; kɑ dhɑnhø ko niin ki ngɑn nuti nywøøm gen ri gen.”" 
Acts21:26 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l jøgɑni yi Pøøl, dhuki ɑgwøg gen guöög dhïwø, kɑ Pøøl kedh-ɑ Kengø be ngɑ̈ji bøli keny-ɑ óthumi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ kwër gen ri gen, o ge muuj gen bënn ki gëdhhi wɑ̈thi kwöng." 
Acts21:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kømi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑn ki thumø, ɑliidh Pøøl kì Kengø yi Yeud møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l Ásiyɑ̀. Atug teedø bëne yi gen. Amɑg ge gøn," 
Acts21:28 ge óryeerø kinni, “Wun ɑ jø Isrɑil, kønyu wøn! Jɑlɑni èn, eni jɑl-ɑ nyi pwönyi teedø kì yethi kɑ̈jj bënn ki kwøb mø rënyi juree, kí Ciggi Mosɑ̀, kí Kengø men. Kɑ kɑ̈n-ɑ Kengø ki tyëng Yönɑn, kɑ kej kwër men bwöl yi en.”" 
Acts21:29 (Ge ɑ́kööb kinøw, mɑ́ Terøpimøs jɑl Epɑsos ɑ́lidh yi gen cøn, e ócyɑ̈dhø geki Pøøl kì kɑɑlɑni, o ge ɑ́rum kinni, i jɑlɑni ókɑ̈ɑ̈l yij Kengø yi Pøøl.)" 
Acts21:30 Codhe, ɑtug kɑɑlɑni bëne, ɑmɑɑg Pøøl yi gen, kɑ gø ywɑɑj gen wɑ̈g kì yij Kengø. Kɑ dhø Kengø jwɑn gen ki cyëgø." 
Acts21:31 Kɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gø yi gen, ɑwɑ̈dhi wöödø yï jɑngi kɑtïbɑ̀ mi Römɑ̀ kinni, i ɑgwɑg me dwøng tugø ki Yerusɑlem bëne." 
Acts21:32 Ajwɑne kɑ̈bbø ki jøliny, kí dhɑbïdh, møg rengi kej ɑgwɑg. Kɑ teedø ówïyø pwödi Pøøl, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen jɑngi kɑtïbɑ̀ geki jøliny." 
Acts21:33 Abëën jɑngi dej menɑni, kɑ okööbø kinni mɑɑg Pøøl, kɑ twöj ki ɑ́cwecwel ɑ́ryew. Apëjje ki mɑ yinge men, ki gïn-ɑ gwøøg en." 
Acts21:34 Kɑ kwï teedø óryeerø, ge wɑng-ɑ gïjø megø, o møøgø ryeer, ge wɑng-ɑ gïn-ɑ kyeelø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈li tyelli kwøbbɑni ki yodø yi en, kì bɑng ɑgwɑngɑni, ɑkööbe kinni kïdhi ønbɑ̈r." 
Acts21:35 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen kej pɑ̈ltyel, ɑbyeel Pøøl mɑl, yi jøliny kipe e ónyïɑ̈g yi teedø," 
Acts21:36 mɑ́ teenɑni lug-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng gen ge óryeerø kinni, “Nɑ̈gu en!”" 
Acts21:37 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kømi Pøøl kedhi yij ønbɑ̈r, ɑköbbe jɑngi kɑtïbɑ̀ kinni, “Yï óyïëy köbbø yi yɑn ki gïjø megø?” Kɑ ópëjjø kinni, “Dhø Yönɑn ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn?" 
Acts21:38 Yï pɑth ki wɑ̈d Rïp men-ɑ ɑ́cer tug ki ɑgwɑg, kɑ pëjj-ɑ pɑ̈l ki ɑ́muddi ji gɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́ngwen?”" 
Acts21:39 Alöggi Pøøl kinni, “Yɑ bɑ Yeudì, jɑl Tɑrsos kì myërri Kilikiyɑ̀; yɑ bɑ jɑl kɑɑl me pere teg. Wiy yɑ köbbɑ teedø.”" 
Acts21:40 Kɑ jɑlɑni oyïëyø, ɑcungi Pøøl kì kömi pɑ̈ltyel, kɑ teedø kyëdde ki cinge. Kɑ piny ceg-ɑ ì dïw, ɑköbbe teedø ki dhøg Ibru kinni," 
Acts22:1 “Nyiimïɑ kí wëëgɑ, lïngu møg-ɑ gøny yi yɑn kì bøli wun.”" 
Acts22:2 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngii yi gen kinni 'kööb-ɑ dhøg Ibru ki gen, ɑkud gen, kɑ okööbø kinni," 
Acts22:3 “Yɑ bɑ Yeudì, yɑ ɑ́nywøl-ɑ Tɑrsos kì Kilikiyɑ̀, o yɑ ɑ́pwönyi kì kɑɑl keny yi Gɑmɑliel, ki Ciggi kweyyee ceth, o pyëwɑ ɑ́ying-ɑ mɑl kipe gwøøg Jwøk ni kɑ̀ bëëd pëthi wun bënn dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Acts22:4 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ guud-ɑ wɑɑng Yöö men gïti thøø; kɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn nyi mɑgɑ, kɑ ge nyi leengɑ ød mɑg." 
Acts22:5 O yɑ bɑ ɑcwɑg yi Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kí jøgdøngø bënn kipe kwøbbɑni. Bɑ gen ɑ ɑ́nëngi yɑn ki wɑ̈j møg-ɑ ɑ́muujɑ wɑddee møg-ɑ bɑ Yeud kì Dimɑceg; ɑkedhɑ be mɑgi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy ki Yuuɑni, o ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Yerusɑlem, gɑ ɑtwöj, o ge cɑy." 
Acts22:6 “Kɑ yɑ cïm-ɑ yuuɑ. Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngɑ ki Dimɑceg, piny bɑ dicɑ̈ng, ɑcɑɑr yɑn yi cɑr me dwøng me kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl," 
Acts22:7 ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈dhɑ, kɑ yɑ olïngø ki cwɑg mø köbbi yɑn kinni, ‘Cɑul, Cɑul! Ede wɑngɑ ɑ guudií?”" 
Acts22:8 Kɑ yɑ ólöggø kinni, ‘Yïn ɑ́ men, Wuö?’ Kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, ‘Yɑ bɑ Yëso jɑl Nɑdhɑreth, ngɑn-ɑ wɑngí cuulø ki en.’" 
Acts22:9 Jøg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki yɑn, cɑrɑni ɑ́lidh yi gen, de cwɑggi ngɑn-ɑ köbbi yɑn nuti lïngi gen." 
Acts22:10 Kɑ yɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Gwøgɑ ngø, Wuö?’ Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Wë kinni, “Dhwöödh, kɑ yï kedhí Dimɑceg. Kì kunɑni yï óköbbi ki jɑmmì bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́rum ki pyëlø, gɑ møg-ɑ ógwøg yi yïn.’"
