Romans14:20 Gwøøg Jwøk, ko tɑ̈ɑ̈y wɑ piny kipe gïncɑm. Gïgcɑmm bënn ócuggø cɑmø; de bɑ bɑ̈jjø keløg yï cɑm-ɑ gïn göjji ngɑn megø pɑ̈dhi yij orøg." 
Romans14:21 Gïn-ɑ døøj ki gwøgø yi yïn, bɑ kinni; yï ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki rïngø, kɑ yï ko mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki møgi oløg, wɑlɑ̀ yï ko göög ki gïn göjji wɑɑd wun pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Romans14:22 De mïdhí møg-ɑ yïëy yi yïn kì kɑɑm wuki Jwøk. Tyëng-ɑ nyi gwøg gïn-ɑ rømmi yi gen ɑ́ dyër, kɑ ge ocögø pëthi gen bong kerri gwøngɑni, ri gen dɑ gyëdh." 
Romans14:23 De ngɑn-ɑ yije nyi pyëër ki gïn-ɑ cɑm yi en, köme dɑ cɑ́y kinni gïnɑni nuti gwøøg en kɑ yïëyø. O gïn-ɑ pɑ gwøøg bɑng yïëyø, bɑ orøg." 
Romans15:1 Wɑ tyëng-ɑ yïëyø miee teeg, køny wɑ tyëng-ɑ yïëyø mi gen nøg ki tyëddi gïg peg møg-ɑ dhɑl gen. Wɑ ko yɑb gïg-ɑ mïni pëthee ketee." 
Romans15:2 De nyi gwøg wɑ gïn-ɑ døøj kipe nyiimïee bënn, kipe kinni o yïëyø mi gen kedhe e ódøngø." 
Romans15:3 Mɑ́ Mesiy kiree, nuti gwøg-ɑ gïn mïni pyëwe, de ɑ́gwøg-ɑ møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Yɑ̈ddi tyëng-ɑ nyi yɑnyyi yïn, ge ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömɑ.”" 
Romans15:4 Gïg-ɑ ógweed yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø bënn, ɑ́gwed gɑ møg pwönyi wɑ, kipe kinni o wɑ óyïddi wɑ ki ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì bɑng ngïïnø geki cïïjø møg-ɑ mëggi wɑ yi wɑ̈nyɑni." 
Romans15:5 De ɑnɑn, kɑ̀ bëëd Jwøk bɑ ngɑn-ɑ yïe nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi møgɑni, wiy wu thödhi yi en ki rumm-ɑ bɑng gen óbëëd wun pëthi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel, kì ri yöö men-ɑ ɑ́nyudhi wun yi Yëso Mesiy." 
Romans15:6 O møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni, o wu bëëd wun pëthi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel. O Jwøk, Wïyi Wë Yëso Mesiy, ómɑlli yi wun ki wör e cwɑggi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel." 
Romans15:7 Nyi yïëyu ri wun, ni kɑ̀ ɑ́yïëëy wun yi Mesiy, kipe lejji nyingi Jwøk." 
Romans15:8 Mɑ́ yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, bëëdi bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø men-ɑ ɑ́beed yi Mesiy bɑ kipe Yeud, kipe nyudhi gen kinni Jwøk dhøge nyi mïdhe’ mïdhø; o møg-ɑ ɑ́könge kweyyi gen, ɑ́bï gɑ dyër;" 
Romans15:9 o tyëngpɑth ki Yeud ócuggi gen ki lenhi Jwøk kipe lɑ̈mpyëwe. Ni kɑ̀ kööb yi wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Yï ólenhɑ kì kelli tyëngpɑth ki Yeud; yï ólenhɑ ki wör.”" 
Romans15:10 Okööbø këti kinni, “Med pëthi wun, wu tyëngpɑth ki Yeud; med pëthi wun kyeel ki jii Jwøk!”" 
Romans15:11 Kí kinni, “Lenhu Wë, wun ɑ tyëngpɑth bënn; lenhu en, wun ɑ ji bënn!”" 
Romans15:12 O Icɑyɑ̀ okööbø këti kinni, “Dɑ kwɑɑr Yesì men-ɑ ócwöb; óbï be jɑɑgi tyëngpɑth ki Yeud, en ɑ óngɑ̈dh yi gen.”" 
Romans15:13 Anɑn wun ɑ tyëng Römɑ̀, kɑ ɑ́yïëy wun ki ngɑ̈dhii kinøw, wiy wu thödhi yi en ki medi pëëth geki mër, mɑ́ bene en ɑ yïe nyi ngɑ̈dhɑ gïg-ɑ óbï. O møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni, o ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø dønge kì pëthi wun, kì ri tegi Wëykwërø." 
Romans15:14 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, pëthi wun nyi tyer-ɑ gwøg ki gïgdøj geki dïdø ki kwøbbi Jwøk. O wu nyii cuggø pwönyi ri wun thyew." 
Romans15:15 De kì yij wɑ̈nyø men, yɑ nuti böggø ki pɑ̈ddi wun ki kwøb møøgø. Yɑ nuti böggø kì bɑng dhwɑ̈ng men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Jwøk," 
Romans15:16 kipe kinni o yɑ bëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ bɑ̈ng Yëso Mesiy, o yɑ göggɑ tyëngpɑth ki Yeud, o yɑ göögɑ yɑ nɑ ókwërø, yɑ kɑ̈ll-ɑ Wöndøj men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk, kipe kinni o tyëngpɑth ki Yeud göög gen gɑ gëëdhi me bɑ ɑyïëy yi Jwøk; ge óthyëyyii yi Wëykwërø." 
Romans15:17 De ɑnɑn, kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑn ɑ jɑlbɑng Yëso Mesiy, gïn-ɑ pere pwödɑ köörɑ bɑ kipe gwøng-ɑ gwøg yi yɑn kipe Jwøk." 
Romans15:18 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Mesiy, bɑ gen ɑ ri gen ókööbɑ yɑ pɑ böggi, o tyëngpɑth ki Yeud nyudhɑ kër-ɑ ómïdhi gen kwøbbi Jwøk," 
Romans15:19 ki tegi ngïjjì geki gïïngɑ̈ngø, kí tegi Wëyi Jwøk. Pwönyi Wöndøj mi Mesiy ɑ́tyëgɑ kì Yerusɑlem, kí myërr-ɑ bute, gïti Ilirikøm." 
Romans15:20 Yɑ nuti dwɑddi kinni, o Wöndøj pwönyɑ kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́rum ki lïngi nyingi Mesiy, kipe yɑ ógëddi kömi tyeli ød mɑ ɑ́cïb yi ngɑn megø." 
Romans15:21 Ni møg-ɑ kømmi yi wɑ̈jji kwërø kinni; “Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nuti köbbi pere ólïdhi, o kwøbbe óyod yi tyëng-ɑ nuti pɑ̈nyi kwøbbe ki lïngø.”" 
Romans15:22 O bene gïn-ɑ nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈n yɑn bëën yï wun. 
Romans15:23 De ɑnɑn bong gïn gwøg yi yɑn këti kì yethi pödhhɑni, o pyëwɑ ɑ́bëëd e okønø ceth ki bëën yï wun kì yethi runn-ɑ ɑ́pöödh bënn," 
Romans15:24 yɑ gɑ̈n yɑ ótöngi be lidhi wun keny-ɑ óbëënɑ yɑ kedh-ɑ Ispɑniyɑ̀, o yɑ ókøny yi wun ki kedhi kunɑni, e pyëwɑ rum mïnø kɑ ɑ́yïddɑ ki wun." 
Romans15:25 De ɑnɑn yɑ kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem be kønyi jii Jwøk. 
Romans15:26 Mɑ́ kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Mɑkdöniyɑ̀ geki Akɑiyɑ̀ ge ɑ́göög ki gïjø me døøj; ge ɑ́gwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gïg køny gen nyiimï gen møg-ɑ jɑdø kì Yerusɑlem. 
Romans15:27 Rummɑni ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï gen keti gen; de kidyër ceth, døøj kɑ̀ kunyi gen, mɑ́ gyëdhhi yïëyi Yeud ɑ́nywɑg yi gen ki tyëngpɑth ki Yeud, tyëngɑni ceg-ɑ lunyø ceth ki kønyi Yeud ki jɑmmi kömi piny." 
Romans15:28 Keny-ɑ órumɑ ki mëggi gen jɑmmɑni, yɑ ódhwödh yɑ kedh-ɑ Ispɑniyɑ̀, o yɑ ótöngi be këëmi wun." 
Romans15:29 O ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, keny-ɑ óbëënɑ yï wun, yɑ óbï kɑ gyëdhhi Mesiy bënn." 
Romans15:30 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun ki nyingi Wë Yëso Mesiy kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ muuj yi Wëy, kinni kwɑjji wɑ Jwøk kiperɑ," 
Romans15:31 o yɑ yiele kì cinggi tyëng-ɑ bɑny yïëyø kì Yeudiyɑ̀, o kunyø miɑ óyïëy yi jii Jwøk kì kunɑni." 
Romans15:32 O yɑ óbïɑ yï wun pyëwɑ omedø, keløg ɑ́ gïn dwɑddi yi Jwøk, o këëmi wun óbëëde med kì yïɑ." 
Romans15:33 Wɑ ókøny yi Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ yïe nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi mër. Amen." 
Romans16:1 Anɑn, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, kønyu nyimïee Pïbì, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yi yɑn be muuji wun wɑ̈nyø men. Ngɑnɑni ɑ göögø kì kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Kenkeriyɑ̀." 
Romans16:2 Thegu en ki nyingi Wë, ki thegø men-ɑ kyëëw ki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, kɑ køny wun o óbongii gïn jɑ̈ddii, mɑ́ e ɑ́kunyi ki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy mø ngenyø, kɑ yɑ kønye thyew." 
Romans16:3 Mɑ̈dhu Priskilɑ̀ geki Akïlɑ̀, tyëng-ɑ køny wøn ki gwøøg Yëso Mesiy." 
Romans16:4 Tyëngɑni ɑ́kømi nɑ̈gø kipe kɑ ɑ́yieel yɑn yi gen. O pɑth ki yɑ ketɑ ɑ pwøj gen, de ge opøjjø thyew yi kɑnïsɑ̀ mø tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy ge pɑth ki Yeud bënn." 
Romans16:5 Kɑ tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ møg-ɑ nyi bï gøl gen mɑ̈dh wun thyew. Mɑ̈dh wun Epɑynetøs mɑ̈dhɑ, en ɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki yïëyi Mesiy kì modïri Ásiyɑ̀." 
Romans16:6 Mɑ̈dh wun Meerì ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́køny wun ki gwøng teg. 
Romans16:7 Mɑ̈dh wun Andrønikøs geki Yuniyɑs, gen ɑ Yeud møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì ød mɑg kyeel ki yɑn. Ge bɑ jøg mø ngɑ̈nyi kidøøj kì kelli tyëngwöödø, o gen ɑ ɑ́kwöngi gwøg ki jii Mesiy kibølɑ." 
Romans16:8 Mɑ̈dh wun Ampliyɑtøs, mɑ̈dhɑ nyel-ɑ pere teg kì ri Wë." 
Romans16:9 Mɑ̈dh wun Urbɑnøs, mɑ̈dhɑ kì ri gwøøg Wë geki mɑ̈dhɑ Istɑkøs." 
Romans16:10 Mɑ̈dh wun Apeles, ngɑn-ɑ teg kì ri kwøbbi Mesiy. Kɑ tyëng gøl Aristøbuløs, mɑ̈dh wun bënn." 
Romans16:11 Kɑ Ërödiyøn wɑ̈d Yeud, mɑ̈dh wun, geki jii Mesiy møg-ɑ gøl Nɑrkisøs." 
Romans16:12 Mɑ̈dh wun Tripɑynɑ̀ geki Tripösɑ̀, tyëng-ɑ göögø ki gwøøg Jwøk, mɑ̈dh wun gen. Kɑ mɑ̈dhɑ Persis mɑ̈dh wun, en ɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́göög ki gwøøg Wë ki menteg." 
Romans16:13 Kɑ Rupus, ngɑn-ɑ pere teg kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy Wë mɑ̈dh wun, geki meye ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́mïdhi yɑn yɑ nɑ wɑ̈de." 
Romans16:14 Mɑ̈dh wun Asinkritøs, kí Pelegön, kí Ërmis, kí Pɑtröbɑs, kí Ërmɑs geki Jii Mesiy møg-ɑ bëëdø kì buti gen." 
Romans16:15 Kɑ Pilölögøs, kí Juliyɑ̀, kí Nereøs kí nyiimen, kí Olimpɑs, geki jii Jwøk møg-ɑ buti bënn mɑ̈dh wun." 
Romans16:16 Kɑ ri wun mɑ̈dh wun ki nuumi kwër. Wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ mø Mesiy bënn thyew. 
Romans16:17 Anɑn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun kinni kor wun ri wun kipe tyëng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ni ki gïg dɑ̈ɑ̈ng ji, kɑ yïëyi ji møøgø nyi rënyi yi gen ki kwøb mø bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi wun. Lɑ̈ɑ̈w wun ri wun ki ji-ɑ ni møgɑni!" 
Romans16:18 Mɑ́ ji-ɑ nyi göögø ki gïg ni møgɑni pɑ göögø kɑ per Mesiy Wë. De ge göög ɑ bɑng gïn-ɑ kønø ki pëthi gen. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ rummi gen nøg nyi wëny yi gen ki kwøb mø med. 
Romans16:19 Kwøbbi yïëyi wun ki wöndøj ngɑ̈nyi yi teedø bëne. O pyëwɑ med ki møgɑni. De bëëd wun wɑ̈thi wun pel, wu tyer-ɑ gïndøj, kɑ wu bëëd wun yï wun bɑ̈r ki gïgrijjø." 
Romans16:20 O Cethɑn ójwɑn ki tyɑmø, kɑ cïb thɑ́ tyelli wun yi Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ yïe nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi mër. Dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë Yëso Mesiy óying kömi wun." 
Romans16:21 Wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi Timøthì, ngɑn-ɑ nyi göög wøn. Kɑ wu mɑ̈dh thyew yi Lukiyøs, kí Yɑsøn, geki Susipɑter wɑddi wøn møg-ɑ bɑ Yeud." 
Romans16:22 Yɑ mɑ̈dh-ɑ wun ki nyingi Wë, yɑ Tertiyøs, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́gwed wɑ̈nyø men." 
Romans16:23 Wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi Gɑyøs, jɑl-ɑ gøle bëëd yi wøn, wøki tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ bënn. O wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi Erɑstøs, jɑl-ɑ nyi mïdhi ngyënyyi kɑɑl men. Kɑ wu mɑ̈dh yi Kwɑrtøs ómïee thyew." 
Romans16:24 Wiy dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë Yëso Mesiy bëëde kì ri wun bënn. 
Romans16:25 Lejji wɑ Jwøk! Wu ógwøge wu teeg kì yij yïëyø mi wun, ni møg-ɑ kømmi yi Wöndøj men-ɑ pwönyi yi yɑn, kì ri Yëso Mesiy, kì bɑng møg-ɑ ɑ́yɑl, ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ ɑkɑnn kì yethi rïjj-ɑ gïïr møg-ɑ ɑ́pöödh." 
Romans16:26 Anɑn, dyër ɑ́rum ki nyodhø, kɑ yod yi pödhh bënn kì ri møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed yi jøtöng, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Jwøng-ɑ nudd gïti ɑtheer, kipe kinni o ji óyïëy gen bënn, o møgɑni ómïdhi yi gen." 
Romans16:27 Lejji wɑ Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ wïje pel kete, kì ri Yëso Mesiy. Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Pøøl, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwøl yi Jwøk ni kɑ ɑ́dwɑdde gøn, o bëëde ɑ́ ngeti Wööni Yëso Mesiy. Wɑ̈nyɑni ör-ɑ yi en geki ómïee Sosthenis." 
1Corinthians1:2 Ge öd-ɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ mi Jwøk kì Körintøs; gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwër kì ri nyingi Yëso Mesiy, kɑ gï cwøle, o ge bëëd gen gɑ tyëng kwërø, kyeel ki ji-ɑ kɑ̈jj bënn ki nyingi Wë Yëso Mesiy, Wïi gen, o bɑ Wë." 
1Corinthians1:3 Wiy dhwɑ̈ng geki mër møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk Wïyee geki Wë Yëso Mesiy, ying gen kömi wun." 
1Corinthians1:4 Anɑn, Jwøk nyii pwøjø yi yɑn ki medi pyëwɑ kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kipe kɑ ɑ́thödhe wun ki dhwɑ̈ng kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́yïëy wun Yëso Mesiy," 
1Corinthians1:5 o Jwøk nyii pwøjø yi yɑn thyew kipe kɑ̀ bëëd e bong gïn kwïj yi wun kì ri møg-ɑ ɑ́dïd yi wun, geki møg-ɑ nyi kømmi bëën kipe Mesiy." 
1Corinthians1:6 Mɑ́ møg-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn kipe Mesiy óyod gɑ dyër kì bɑng gïg-ɑ gwøg yi wun. 
1Corinthians1:7 O wu ócög wu pɑ nyi jɑd ki gïjø ɑ́kyel kì ri tegø men-ɑ nyi yod kì yï Wëykwërø kɑ̈ng-ɑ nudd wu nenn-ɑ bøli keny-ɑ ódwöög Yëso Mesiy kömi piny. 
1Corinthians1:8 Mɑ́ bɑ en ɑ mïdhi wun wu teeg kì kɑ̈jji wun gïti thumi piny, o wu óbëëd, kömi wun bong cɑ́y cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óliidh gøny." 
1Corinthians1:9 Gɑ̈nnu Jwøk, eni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwøl wun kipe kinni o wu nywɑ̈ɑ̈g wun ki dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wɑ̈de; Wë Yëso Mesiy." 
1Corinthians1:10 Anɑn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun ki nyingi Wë Yëso Mesiy kinni, reb wun dhøggi wun, o bëëde e bong pëëmø kì kelli wun, kɑ wiy rummi wun geki kwøbbi wun bëëd gen gɑ ɑ́kyel." 
1Corinthians1:11 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, yɑ ɑ́lïng kì yï tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l gøl Keloè kinni i dɑ pëëmø kì kelli wun." 
1Corinthians1:12 Møg-ɑ wɑngi yi yɑn bɑ kinni, nget ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun nyii kööbø kinni, “Yɑ ying-ɑ tuung Pøøl”; kɑ ngɑn megø nyii kööbø kinni, “Yɑ ying-ɑ tuung Apøløs”; kɑ megø nyii kööbø kinni, “Yɑ ying-ɑ tuung Pïtør”. Kɑ megø nyii kööbø kinni, “Yɑ ying-ɑ tuung Mesiy”." 
1Corinthians1:13 Mesiy nyi di pɑ̈ngø? Pøøl ɑ́di gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw kiper wun? Wɑlɑ̀ wu ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g kɑ nyingi Pøøl? 
1Corinthians1:14 Pyëwɑ med kɑ̀ bongii dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g yi yɑn kì kelli wun, dɑ́ Krispøs geki Gɑyøs keti gen, ɑ ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ." 
1Corinthians1:15 O bongii ngɑn cuggi kwøb kinni, ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g kɑ nyingɑ." 
1Corinthians1:16 (Awøø, tyëng gøl Istïpɑnɑ̀ ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ thyew; de pɑ cuggi pɑrø yi yɑn ying e dɑ ngɑn megø me jwɑ̈ɑ̈g yɑn.)" 
1Corinthians1:17 Mɑ́ yɑ nuti ör-ɑ be jwɑ̈ɑ̈gi ji yi Mesiy, de yɑ ɑ́öre’ be pwönyi wöndøj, yɑ pɑ 'kööb-ɑ peli wïj men-ɑ nyi 'kööb yi teedø, kipe tegi thøwi Mesiy kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïw ólwënyi." 
1Corinthians1:18 Pwönyi wööni thøwi Mesiy kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïw bɑ “nøgi wïj” kì yï tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈lli yuu thøø. De bɑ tegi Jwøk kì yïee, wɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yiel." 
1Corinthians1:19 Wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Peli wɑ̈thi tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel órënyɑ o dïdi bödhhi gwed ónyiigɑ.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel ódöng-ɑ keny? O tyëng-ɑ dïdø ying-ɑ keny? Wɑlɑ̀ dɑ bödhhi gwed? Wɑlɑ̀ dɑ ngɑn kwøbbe dhɑ̈li løøgø yi Jwøk? Mɑ́ dïdø ɑ́løg dhëëgø yi Jwøk." 
1Corinthians1:21 Mɑ́ Jwøk ki peli wïj men-ɑ yïe, bëëde ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈ne yodø yi ji ki peli wɑ̈thi gen. De Jwøk ɑ́yöd e göög-ɑ gïn-ɑ cwølli teedø ɑ́ “dhëëgø” eni wöön-ɑ pwönyi yi wøn, o gø yieele tyëng-ɑ yïëy." 
1Corinthians1:22 Yeud nyi yɑb-ɑ nyudhø ki ngïjjì, o tyëng Yönɑn nyi yɑb-ɑ peli wïj," 
1Corinthians1:23 de wø kɑ̈ll-ɑ wööni guri Mesiy wïj yɑdh ɑrïw. Wöönɑni pëthi Yeud nyi ceg-ɑ rënyø yi en, o bɑ óbɑɑd kì yï tyëng Yönɑn," 
1Corinthians1:24 de wöönɑni bɑ Mesiy, ɑ bɑ tegi Jwøk, kí peli wïj Jwøk kì yï tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cwøl kì kelli Yeud kí tyëng Yönɑn." 
1Corinthians1:25 Mɑ́ gïn-ɑ nenni yi ji e nɑ dhëëgø kì yï Jwøk, lod-ɑ peli wɑ̈thi ji. O gïn nënni e nɑ nyødhi Jwøk, teeg kibøli tegi ji." 
1Corinthians1:26 Nyiimïɑ, pɑru bëën-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wun cøn, keny-ɑ ɑ́cwøøl wun yi Jwøk. Mø nøg kì kelli wun ɑ ɑ́nenni yi teedø e wɑ̈thi gen pel, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ teg, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ per gen teg yi teedø." 
1Corinthians1:27 Dɑ́ gïn-ɑ bɑ kwøbbi dhëëgø kì yï tyëng kömi piny, ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk kipe kinni, o tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw ki jɑmmi kömi piny, wɑ̈thi gen lɑ̈ɑ̈y gen; o ngɑn-ɑ nyødh kì kömi piny gwøg yi Jwøk ɑ́ ngɑn teg, kipe kinni o tyëngteg wɑ̈thi gen lɑ̈ɑ̈y gen," 
1Corinthians1:28 o jɑmm-ɑ bong nyingi gen kì yï tyëng kömi piny, geki gïg-ɑ pɑ nyi wør yi teedø kinni tek, bɑ gen ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk kipe kinni, o gïg-ɑ per gen teg ki yï teedø gɑ̈g gen." 
1Corinthians1:29 De møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk kɑ per kinni, o bongii dhɑnhø me lejji ree kì bøle." 
1Corinthians1:30 Anɑn, bëëdi wun kì ri Yëso Mesiy kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, mɑ́ en ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk ɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ree nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi peli wïj men-ɑ yïee. Ree ɑ göög wɑ, wɑ tir kì yï Jwøk; o ree göög wɑ ki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwër gɑ jii Jwøk, kɑ wɑ yiel." 
1Corinthians1:31 Ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Ngɑn dwɑddi lejji ree, lejje gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Wë.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Anɑn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, kɑ ɑ́bëënɑ yï wun, yɑ nuti bëën-ɑ be töngi kwøbb-ɑ dyër mø Jwøk ki medi lebɑ, wɑlɑ̀ kì bɑng dïdø ki jɑmmi kömi piny." 
1Corinthians2:2 Mɑ́ kɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ kì kelli wun, bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́rømmi yi yɑn mɑ megø kì wɑ̈ye, dɑ́ kwøbbi Yëso Mesiy kɑ ɑ́gurii wïj yɑdh ɑrïw." 
1Corinthians2:3 Yɑ ɑ́bï yï wun pyëwɑ nyøødh, o yɑ ceg-ɑ böggø, dëlɑ ceg-ɑ kïïrø," 
1Corinthians2:4 o pwönyɑ kí wöön-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈llɑ nuti kømmi yɑn kɑ yëthi peli wïj men-ɑ nyi 'kööb yi ji kipe kinni o tyëng-ɑ kyeelø yïëy gen, de kwøbbɑni nyi nyodh-ɑ yi Wëyi Jwøk," 
1Corinthians2:5 kipe kinni o yïëyø mi wun bëëde e pɑ mïdh-ɑ yi peli wïj dhɑnhø, de mïdh-ɑ yi tegi Jwøk." 
1Corinthians2:6 De kì tung-ɑ kyeelø, yɑ nyii pwönyø kì kelli tyëng-ɑ rummi gen cyegø kì ri wëy, yɑ kømm-ɑ kwøbbɑni ki peli wïj, de pɑth ki peli wïj mi kömi piny men, ɑ tege nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈ny," 
1Corinthians2:7 dɑ́ peli wïj Jwøk; peli wïny-ɑ bɑ ɑkɑn, ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Jwøk kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti cɑ̈gi piny ɑ́ men bɑnge óyïddi yi wɑ ki dhwɑ̈ng." 
1Corinthians2:8 Kwøbbɑni nuti lïngø yi jyɑ̈ggi kömi piny, mɑ́ keløg møgɑni di ngɑ̈nyi yi gen, ti Wïi mɑ̈r pɑ di gur yi gen wïj yɑdh ɑrïw." 
1Corinthians2:9 De møgɑni nɑ møg-ɑ ógwedø kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Gïn-ɑ nuti lidhø wɑlɑ̀ nuti lïngø yi dhɑnhø, gïn nuti rømmø kinni ócwöb, bene gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwir yi Jwøk kipe ji-ɑ mɑɑrii.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 De bɑ wɑ ɑ ɑ́nyudhi gïg-ɑ ɑkɑnn møgɑni yi Jwøk ki Wëye, mɑ́ Wëy ceg-ɑ pwönyø ki jɑmmì bënn cɑgg ɑ́ møg-ɑ pyëw Jwøk." 
1Corinthians2:11 Bɑ wëy-ɑ ri dhɑnhø ɑ ngɑ̈nyi møg-ɑ pyëw ngɑnɑni. Nɑ menɑni ceth, bɑ Wëyi Jwøk kete ɑ ngɑ̈nyi møg-ɑ pyëw Jwøk bënn." 
1Corinthians2:12 Wëy møg-ɑ ɑ́yod yi wɑ pɑth ki mø piny keny, de bɑ Wëy-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Jwøk, kipe kinni o gïg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wɑ yi Jwøk óbëëd ge ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ." 
1Corinthians2:13 Wø pɑ kømmi kwøb mɑ ɑ́ceg ki pwönyø ki peli wïj dhɑnhø, de wø kømm-ɑ kwøb mɑ ɑ́pwönyi yi Wëy; wø lwøb-ɑ dyër kì ri wëy, ki kwøb mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Wëy." 
1Corinthians2:14 De ngɑn yïe bong Wëy, pɑ yïddi ki gïg-ɑ muuj yi Wëy-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk. Møgɑni pɑ cuggi gɑmø yi wɑ̈thi ji-ɑ ni møgɑni; ge bɑ óbɑɑd kì yï gen, mɑ́ tegi per møgɑni yod kɑ wëy." 
1Corinthians2:15 Ngɑn-ɑ yïe di Wëy, bëëdi gïg-ɑ nud bënn nyii yodø yi en, de bong ngɑn cuggi yodi bëëde." 
1Corinthians2:16 Ni kɑ̀ kööb wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Á men ɑ ngɑ̈nyi rummi Wë? Á men ɑ cuggi cïjii?” Wɑ thyew, yïee dɑ rummi Mesiy." 
1Corinthians3:1 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd møgɑni kinøw, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, yɑ pɑ kööbø ki wun ni ke di kööbɑ ki tyëng-ɑ yï gen di Wëy; de yɑ kööbø ki wun ni ke di kööbɑ ki tyëng-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈dhi kì bɑng gïn-ɑ nyi rømmi yi gen kí cwɑggi gen; rummi wun kì ri Mesiy, nudd ge nɑ rummi othønhø." 
1Corinthians3:2 Wu ɑ́pwönyi yi yɑn kɑ kwøb mø yöd, ni kenyi piidh othinh ki cɑg. Cɑgg ɑ́ ɑnɑn ceth, wu nudd wu nyøødh." 
1Corinthians3:3 Mɑ́ wu nudd wu bëëdø kɑ bëëdi tyëng kömi piny. Anɑn, kɑ̀ nud ɑter geki wëërø kì kelli wun, menɑni pɑ nyodh kinni wu bɑ tyëng kömi piny men? Kɑ̀ bëëd møgɑni kinøw, wu pɑ̈r ki tyëng-ɑ kwïj wøw ceth." 
1Corinthians3:4 Mɑ́ keløg nget ɑ́kyel nyii kööbø kinni, “Yɑ bɑ jɑlbɑng Pøøl”, kɑ megø okööbø kinni, “Yɑ bɑ jɑlbɑng Apøløs,” kɑ̀ göög wun kinøw, wu pɑ pɑ̈r ki tyëng-ɑ nudd ge cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng jɑmmi kömi piny?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Apøløs bɑ men? Wɑlɑ̀ Pøøl bɑ men? Wø bɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø kipe kɑnïsɑ̀ ceth, o bene bɑng wøn ɑ ɑ́yïëy wun. De dhɑnhø gwøg-ɑ gwøge men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yi Wë." 
1Corinthians3:6 Yɑ Pøøl, kɑ ɑ́pwönyɑ kwøbbi Jwøk kì kelli wun kì tyeli mɑl, pɑ̈r ki kinni, yɑ ɑ́ceg-ɑ kɑ̈g. O Apøløs, kɑ ɑ́pwönye kì kelli wun kì cyɑ̈n, pɑ̈r ki kinni, gïg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈g yi yɑn ɑ́cɑwe ki pï. Dɑ́ Jwøk ɑ ɑ́wëggi gïg-ɑ ɑ́pidh døngø." 
1Corinthians3:7 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈g, kí ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈w bong per gen ryeet, dɑ́ Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wëggi gïn-ɑ ɑ́pidh døngø, ɑ pere teg." 
1Corinthians3:8 Bong gïn bɑ̈ɑ̈n kì kɑɑm ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈g kí ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈w; ngö ge óthödhi yi Jwøk ki köögi, e ngɑn mëgg-ɑ köögi men-ɑ kyëëw ki gwøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
1Corinthians3:9 Wø bɑ ji mø göggi Jwøk kì kej ɑ́kyel; o wu bɑ pwödhi Jwøk. Wu bɑ øn-ɑ ger yi Jwøk thyew. 
1Corinthians3:10 Yɑn ɑ ɑ́këël tyeli ønɑni piny ki dïdø men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Jwøk, o bɑ ngɑn megø ɑ gëddi kömi tyeli ønɑni. De ngɑn-ɑ gëdø gwire rumme ki kër-ɑ gëde." 
1Corinthians3:11 Bong tyeli ød megø këti men-ɑ ókëël piny yi ngɑn megø, dɑ́ men-ɑ ɑ́rum ki këël piny yi yɑn ɑ köme gëddi, o tyeli ønɑni bɑ Yëso Mesiy." 
1Corinthians3:12 Keløg e dɑ dhɑnhø me gëdø kì kömi tyeli ønɑni, e gëëd-ɑ dhɑb, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́tegø, wɑlɑ̀ kïtt-ɑ per gen teg, wɑlɑ̀ yenh, wɑlɑ̀ thyɑng, wɑlɑ̀ lum," 
1Corinthians3:13 bëëd ngɑnɑni e ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, gwøge órɑng ceth. Mɑ́ gwøøg dhɑnhø bëne órɑng kì ri thumi piny. Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, gwøøg ngɑnɑni órɑng ki mɑc ni kenyi rɑɑng ngyënyø ki mɑc yi bødhø." 
1Corinthians3:14 Ngɑn gwøge koo rɑ̈bbi, köögi mee óyode." 
1Corinthians3:15 O ngɑn-ɑ gwøge órɑ̈bbi, cingge ceg-ɑ gɑ̈gø; o óbødh, de óbëëd e nɑ ngɑn yïëël wɑ̈g kì dhø mɑc." 
1Corinthians3:16 Kwïj yi wun kinni, wu bɑ kengi Jwøk, o Wëyi Jwøk bëëd ɑ ri wun?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Keløg kengi Jwøk orënyø yi ngɑn megø, ngɑnɑni kiree, órënyi yi Jwøk. Mɑ́ kengi Jwøk bɑ kej kwër, o wun ɑ bɑ kengɑni." 
1Corinthians3:18 Anɑn, ko di dhɑnhø me budh ree kinni, cem e kwøbbi kömi piny men ngɑ̈nyi yi en bënn, mɑ́ keløg e dwɑdd-ɑ yodi møg-ɑ bɑ dyër, wiy løge ree wɑɑd ki dhëg." 
1Corinthians3:19 Kwøbbi ngɑ̈nyi wøw mi piny men bɑ kwøbbi dhëëgø kì yï Jwøk. O bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw, Jwøk dhɑ̈li wënyø yi gen kinni tek, mɑ́ ge ómɑg yï wënyi gen.”" 
1Corinthians3:20 O bɑ ɑgwed thyew kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi Wë kinni, rummi tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel, bɑ yɑnggì yøw.”" 
1Corinthians3:21 Ko di ngɑn pwöd kööre kipe gïn-ɑ cuggi gwøgø yi dhɑnhø. Ge ceg bëëdø gɑ mø wun eni 
1Corinthians3:22 Pøøl, kí Apøløs, kí Pïtør, kí jɑmmi kömi piny, kí thøø, kí ɑnɑn geki dhuki megø; gïgɑni bënn, bɑ mø wun;" 
1Corinthians3:23 de wu bɑ mø Mesiy, o Mesiy bɑ mi Jwøk." 
1Corinthians4:1 Rømmu wøn ceth kinni, wø bɑ bɑ̈nggi Mesiy, o wø bɑ tyëng-ɑ cinggi wøn ɑ́cïb kwøbbi Jwøk møg-ɑ nuti nyodhø cøn." 
1Corinthians4:2 Kɑ thyew, tyëng-ɑ cinggi gen di kwøbbɑni di dwɑddø kinni bëëd gen gɑ tyëngtir ki mendwøng." 
1Corinthians4:3 De keløg gwøgɑ ocɑyø yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ yi ji møøgø, møgɑni bong per gen kì yïɑ, mɑ́ riɑ pɑ nyi cɑy yi yɑn." 
1Corinthians4:4 Bong gïn tɑg yi yɑn, de menɑni pɑ wɑngi kinni yïɑ bɑ̈r kidyër. Mɑ́ e bɑ Wë ɑ ópwøj gwøgɑ, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ ócɑyii." 
1Corinthians4:5 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, ko di ngɑn cɑy yi wun e bøli kej cɑ́y nuti wɑ̈nhø; eni keny-ɑ óbëën Wë, o gïg-ɑ kɑnni kì yij muudhø menye, o gïg-ɑ tyer yi pëëth nyodhe, o dhɑnhø yode pwøjj-ɑ kyëëw ki en kì yï Jwøk." 
1Corinthians4:6 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, o wøki Apøløs, wø óbëëd wøn, wøn-ɑ́ nyuudhi kipe kwøbbɑni, o møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Mïdhu bëëndøj,” dïd yi wun, o bëëd e bong ngɑn lenhi ngɑn megø, o cɑyye ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø." 
1Corinthians4:7 Á men ɑ ɑ́gwøg yïn perí teeg kibøli ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø? Wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ gïn ɑ nud kì yïí, e nuti mëggi yïn ɑ yi Jwøk? Dɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ pwööd köörí e dhɑ̈y gïn-ɑ pere thwøøg nuti cɑɑg kɑ mëggi yïn?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Wu orumø kinni jɑmm-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun bënn, ɑ́rum ki yodø yi wun? Wu ɑ́kɑ̈ri? Wu ɑ́ceg-ɑ gwøg ki rɑ̈nhì, ngö wø nudd wø bɑ ji yøw? Di bëëd e døøj ke di bëëd wun wu bɑ rɑ̈nhì kidyër; rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø di nywɑg yi wɑ." 
1Corinthians4:9 Mɑ́ e nenni yi yɑn kinni, wøn, wø tyëngwöödø, wø ɑ́cïb-ɑ cyɑ̈n yi Jwøk, ni tyëng-ɑ ókuumø ki thøø kì bøli teedø bëne; mɑ́ wø ɑ́göög wø ceg kɑ ywørø yi lɑ̈bø bëne, kí wëywödd geki ji." 
1Corinthians4:10 Wø bɑ dhëgg kipe Mesiy, o wɑ̈thi wun pel kì ri Mesiy; wø nyøødh, o wu teeg. Wø ceg kɑ benyø, o wu ceg kɑ wørø." 
1Corinthians4:11 Wø nudd wø ceg-ɑ orɑng yi kɑ̈j geki röödhø; wø rug-ɑ kwɑ̈llì; wø nyi ceg kɑ pwödø; o wø ceg-ɑ twɑ̈lø; 
1Corinthians4:12 wø pïdø yi gwøg ki cinggi wøn. De kɑ̀ yɑnyyi wøn yi teedø, tyëng-ɑ gwɑddi wøn nyi lɑ̈mmi wø gyëdh, o guun-ɑ guud nyingi wøn ongiinø yi wøn," 
1Corinthians4:13 yɑ̈d nyi løøg yi wøn kɑ kwøb mø døøj. Wø ɑ́bɑny yi kömi piny; wø ɑ́göög ni gïg nyi weddi wïj thur. 
1Corinthians4:14 Wu pɑ gwëdɑ møg kɑ per kinni o wɑ̈thi wun lɑ̈ɑ̈y gen, de yɑ ceg-ɑ wun ni nyigɑ." 
1Corinthians4:15 Cɑgg tyëng-ɑ pwönyi wun ki yuu Mesiy bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø, wïyi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel kete. Mɑ́ kì yij bëëdi wun kì ri Mesiy, yɑ ɑ́göög ki wïyi wun ceth, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́muujɑ Wöndøj wun." 
1Corinthians4:16 O yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun kinni ngøyu bëëdɑ. 
1Corinthians4:17 Bene ɑ pere örɑ Timøthì yï wun, eni wɑ̈dɑ, nyel-ɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn, ɑ mïdhi yïëyø kidøøj. O wu ópɑ̈ddi yi en ki bëëdɑ kì ri Mesiy, ni kɑ ɑ́pwönyɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ ki møgɑni kì yethi kɑ̈jj bënn." 
1Corinthians4:18 Dɑ ji kì kelli wun, mɑ ɑ́rum kinni i yɑ koo bï be këëmi wun, kɑ ge ceg-ɑ tɑ̈dø ki mendwøng." 
1Corinthians4:19 De yɑ óbï yï wun kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh, ke dwɑddii yi Wë. Kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi tyëng-ɑ tɑ̈dø geki gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen, óyod yi yɑn keny-ɑ óbëënɑ." 
1Corinthians4:20 Mɑ́ Pödhi Jwøk pɑth ki kwøb yøw, de bɑ tegø." 
1Corinthians4:21 Á ngø ɑ lɑ̈w kì yï wun? Bïɑ yï wun yɑ kɑ̈ll-ɑ lonh pöödɑ? Wɑlɑ̀ bïɑ yï wun ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø geki möölø? 
1Corinthians5:1 Okømmø ɑnɑn, i dɑ orøg kì kelli wun, men-ɑ́ orøg me pɑ cuggi gwøgø yi tyëngpɑth ki Yeud. I dɑ nyel me bëëdø ki cï wïye." 
1Corinthians5:2 O wu yöd wu ceg-ɑ thwøgø, ngö wu di ceg-ɑ kïïmø! O nyel-ɑ ɑ́gwøg gïn ni menɑni di ceg yi wun kɑ cyeed wɑ̈g kì kelli wun." 
1Corinthians5:3 Cɑgg yɑ lɑ̈wi kì buti wun ki dëlɑ, yɑ nud kì kelli wun ki wëy. Nyel-ɑ ɑ́gwøg orøngɑni ɑ́rum ki cɑyø yi yɑn kì ri nyingi Wë Yëso. Keny-ɑ ócïb burø yi wun këti, rum wun kinni, yɑ nud kì kelli wun ceth, o tegi Wë óbëëd e nud thyew. Kɑ̈ɑ̈l nyelɑni wɑ̈g kì kelli tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀, kɑ cïb cingi Cethɑn, jɑngi wëyrijjø kipe kinni o dële thøwe, o wëye óyiel kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ódwöög Wë kömi piny." 
1Corinthians5:4  
1Corinthians5:5  
1Corinthians5:6 Ri wun ko nyi lejji wun, mɑ́ lejji rek pɑ døj kì bøli Jwøk. Kwïj yi wun kinni, møng-ɑ búr men-ɑ nyi gwøøg ópun nyii twɑgø yi nyɑ kɑmïrɑ̀ me thiinh?" 
1Corinthians5:7 Nyiig wun kɑmïr-ɑ kɑ̈ge dööng, ɑ bɑ mi orøg kì kelli wun, o wu göög wun, wu pɑ̈r ki ɑwɑj me nyɑ̈n, ni kɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈nyɑ wun; mɑ́ Órömi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh miee ɑ́rum ki ngɑlø; en ɑ Mesiy." 
1Corinthians5:8 Gwøg wɑ Kwëër Ákɑɑdh miee ki ópun me ree bong kɑmïrɑ̀ mi orøøg kɑ̈ge dööng. De gwøg wɑ en ki ópun me ree bong kɑmïrɑ̀; ɑ løg ópuun dhïwø geki dyër. 
1Corinthians5:9 Kì yij wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́gwëdɑ wun, wu ɑ́cegɑ kinni, wu ko nyi 'lwööb ki tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ki ngɑn nuti nywøøm gen ri gen." 
1Corinthians5:10 Yɑ nuti wɑng-ɑ tyëng kömi piny, møg-ɑ nyi niin ri gen, wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ pëthi gen døngø, wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ nyi kwɑ̈dø, wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ nyi mɑlli ngïjji jwögg. Mɑ́ keløg wu pɑ di cyɑ̈dhi kì kelli tyëngɑni, wu di ceg-ɑ dhwödhø kì kömi piny men." 
1Corinthians5:11 De møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ wun bɑ kinni: wu ko nyi cyɑ̈dhi ki ngɑn-ɑ nyi cwølli ree ɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, keløg e bɑ ngɑn nyi niin ki ngɑn nuti nywøøm gen ri gen, wɑlɑ̀ pyëwe dwøng, wɑlɑ̀ nyi mɑll-ɑ ngïjji jwögg, wɑlɑ̀ bɑ ɑ́leb, wɑlɑ̀ bɑ mɑ̈dhi møgø, wɑlɑ̀ bɑ kur. Wu ko wöl pëggi kej ɑ́kyel ki ngɑn ni menɑni." 
1Corinthians5:12 De ngɑn pɑ ying kɑnïsɑ̀, ócɑy kɑ per ngø? Pɑ lɑ̈w keløg wu cɑy-ɑ tyëng-ɑ kɑnïsɑ̀?" 
1Corinthians5:13 Mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ pɑ ying kɑnïsɑ̀ ócɑy-ɑ yi Jwøk, ni kɑ̀ kööb wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu ngɑnrɑj wɑ̈g kì kelli wun.”" 
1Corinthians6:1 Keløg dhɑnhø yïe dɑ gøny ki wɑɑd gen, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, ge kedh-ɑ́ɑ̀ dï, ɑ pödhi gen be gøny kì bøli jɑgg-ɑ kwïj Jwøk; ge pɑ gönyi bøli jii Jwøk?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Kwïj yi wun kinni, jii Jwøk, bɑ gen ɑ ólidh gøøny piny bëne? De keløg gøøny piny bëne ólidh-ɑ yi wun, wu pɑ cuggi lidhi gønyy-ɑ yööd?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Kwïj yi wun kinni, bɑ wɑ ɑ ólidh gønyyi wëywödd? De kɑ̀ bëëd møgɑni kinøw, dɑ gïn mɑ̈ɑ̈n wɑ lidhi gønyyi piny men?" 
1Corinthians6:4 De keløg yï wun dɑ gøny, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ nyi kïdhu en bøli tyëng-ɑ bong per gen kì yï kɑnïsɑ̀?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Wɑ̈thi wun pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈y! Pɑ jɑ̈ddi ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun me wïje pel, me cuggi yieli gøøny jii Mesiy." 
1Corinthians6:6 O bongii ngɑn gøøny wɑɑd gen buri tyëng-ɑ nuti yïëyø. 
1Corinthians6:7 Kɑ̀ bëëde e dɑ gønyy kì kɑɑm wun, menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni wu ɑ́dhɑl yi bëëdø. Pɑ di bëëd e lɑ̈w keløg ɑkørr-ɑ ruj wun di ngin yi wun?" 
1Corinthians6:8 De wu yöd wu ruj-ɑ nyiimï wun, kɑ jɑmmi gen nyi kɑb wun!" 
1Corinthians6:9 Kwïj yi wun kinni, tyëng-ɑ nyi rujø ki ji koo wɑ̈dhi Pödhi Jwøk? Ri wun ko wëny wun; de bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ki ngɑn nuti nywøøm gen ri gen, kí tyëng-ɑ mɑlli ngïjji jwögg, kí cwøw-ɑ nyi niin ri gen," 
1Corinthians6:10 kí tyëng-ɑ nyi kwɑ̈dø, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈bø ki jɑmmì, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi nɑ̈g yi møgø; kí tyëng-ɑ nyi yɑ̈dø, geki ɑ́muddi ji, Pödhi Jwøk pɑ lidh yi gen bënn." 
1Corinthians6:11 Kwï wun ɑ́bëëd ɑ nøw. De orøøg wun ɑ́lwöög wɑ̈g; kɑ wu thyëyi Jwøk; wu ɑ́gwøg wu tir kì yï Jwøk yi Wë Yëso Mesiy geki Wëyi Jwøgee. 
1Corinthians6:12 Dɑ ji mø kööbø kinni, “Yɑ bɑ ɑyïëy ki gwøg ki jɑmmì bënn.” De jɑmmɑni pɑ døøj bënn kiperí. Yɑ ócuggø kwøb kinni bong gïjø me bɑ ɑkerø ki gwøgø yi yɑn, de yɑ pɑ yïëy kinni, o yɑ gwøøg bɑ̈ng yi gïjø ɑ́kyel kì kelli jɑmmɑni bënn." 
1Corinthians6:13 Wu nyii kööbø kinni, “Gïncɑm bɑ kipe yij, o yij bɑ kej gïncɑm.” Kwøbbɑni bɑ dyër. De gïgɑni ryeet bɑ møg ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny keny-ɑ óthøw dhɑnhø. Dëël dhɑnhø nuti cwɑ̈jø ɑ́ men yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki mɑ̈nn, de ɑ́cwɑ̈j kɑ per Wë, o bɑ Wë ɑ nyi thödhi dëël dhɑnhø ki gïn-ɑ dwɑdde." 
1Corinthians6:14 O Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́tug Wë kì yij thøø, wɑ ólony yi en ki tugø ki tege." 
1Corinthians6:15 Kwïj yi wun kinni, dëlli wun bɑ gïïi dëël Mesiy? De gïïi dëël Mesiy ókɑ̈l yi dhɑnhø kidï, o gï rebe ki dëël ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi? Møgɑni pɑ cuggi kinni tek." 
1Corinthians6:16 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, ngɑn-ɑ nyi bëëdø ki ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi, dële ɑ́göög ki dël ɑ́kyel ki dëël ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi. Mɑ́ e bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Gen ryeet, ri gen óløg gen dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 De kì tung-ɑ kyeelø, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́rëbi ki Wë Mesiy, wëye ɑ́rëbi ki Wëyi Mesiy." 
1Corinthians6:18 Nyi këëj wun niin ki mɑ̈nn-ɑ pɑth ki mɑ̈nni wun. Bong orøg megø me nyi kɑ̈ni wɑ̈g kì ri dëël dhɑnhø ni niin ki dhɑjø. O ngɑn niin mɑ̈nn mø pɑth, nyïɑ̈g-ɑ dële." 
1Corinthians6:19 Kwïj yi wun kinni, dëlli wun bɑ kengi Wëykwërø, ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøk, o bëëd ɑ ri wun?" 
1Corinthians6:20 Wu ɑ́ceg kɑ ngewø yi en, kɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́ngëwe muuje. Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, mïdhu dëlli wun gɑ møg lejju Jwøk." 
1Corinthians7:1 Anɑn, yɑ løøg-ɑ ɑkørr-ɑ́ per gen ɑ́gwëdu yɑn. Døøj ke cög jɑlø e pɑ nywɑ̈ddi ki dhɑjø." 
1Corinthians7:2 De kɑ̀ bëëd orøg gïïr, bëëd jɑlø yïe dɑ cyëge, kɑ dhɑjø bëëde yïe dɑ jɑlgøle." 
1Corinthians7:3 Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́nyömi ko bɑ̈nyi ki pëggi kej ɑ́kyel ki nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́nywøm yi en, kɑ nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́nywøm ko bɑ̈nyi ki pëggi kej ɑ́kyel ki jɑl-ɑ ɑ́nywømii thyew." 
1Corinthians7:4 Mɑ́ dëël dhɑjø bɑ mi jɑlgøle, o dëël jɑlø bɑ mi cyëge." 
1Corinthians7:5 Ri wun ko nyi bɑny wun, keløg e pɑth ki møg cɑɑg wun kɑ nywɑgø, kipe kinni o wu yïddi wun ki keny mɑllu Jwøk, codhe o wu døøg wun kej ɑ́kyel. Keny-ɑ óbëëd wun kinøw, Cethɑn koo yïddi ki keny thɑɑbe wun be orøg." 
1Corinthians7:6 Wu pɑ ceg yi yɑn ki cegø, de miɑ bɑ yïëyø." 
1Corinthians7:7 Mɑ́ yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, o ji bënn di bëëd gen ni yɑn. De ngɑn bëëdø kɑ bëën-ɑ ɑ́mëggii yi Jwøk, ngɑn mëgg-ɑ gïn, ngɑn mëgg-ɑ gïn-ɑ kyeelø." 
1Corinthians7:8 O yɑ köbb-ɑ tyëng-ɑ nuti nyömø geki thwömm kinni, lɑ̈w keløg ge obëëdø ni yɑn ɑ nuti nyömø." 
1Corinthians7:9 De keløg dhɑnhø dhɑ̈li mɑgi pyëwe, nyöme; mɑ́ lɑ̈w ke nyöme, kibøli ke di bëëde nyinge ókɑ̈ngø yi mɑ̈j." 
1Corinthians7:10 De wun ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nywøm ri wun, yɑ ceg-ɑ wun kinni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́nywøm, jɑlgøle ko nyi wiye piny, o ciggɑni pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïɑ, de ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Wë." 
1Corinthians7:11 De keløg jɑlgøle wiye’ piny, cöge e pɑ cigi nywømø, wɑlɑ̀ cigi gen rëbø ki jɑlgøle. Kɑ jɑlø cyëge ko tɑ̈nge." 
1Corinthians7:12 De tyëng-ɑ kyeelø köbb-ɑ yi yɑn, pɑth ki Wë kinni, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, keløg yïe dɑ dhɑjø me nuti yïëyø, de ngɑnɑni pyëwe dwɑdd-ɑ jɑlgøle, gø ko tɑ̈nge." 
1Corinthians7:13 Wɑlɑ̀ keløg e dɑ ngɑndhɑjø me yïëyø, o jɑlgøle nuti yïëyø, kɑ jɑlɑni oyïëyø bëëdø ki en, gø ko tɑ̈nge." 
1Corinthians7:14 Mɑ́ jɑl-ɑ nuti yïëyø, ree ɑ́løge me pɑ̈r ki ngeti kwøbbi Jwøk kì bɑng cyëge, o dhɑjø men-ɑ nuti yïëyø, ree ɑ́løge me pɑ̈r ki ngeti kwøbbi Jwøk kì bɑng jɑlgøle thyew. Keløg e pɑ di bëëd kinøw, nyigi gen di bëëd ge nɑ nyigi tyëng-ɑ nuti yïëyø, ngö ge bɑ ɑyïëy yi Jwøk." 
1Corinthians7:15 De keløg ngɑn-ɑ nuti yïëëy kwøbbi Jwøk dwɑdd-ɑ kedhø, wiy kedhe. Mɑ́ keløg ge dwɑdd-ɑ dɑ̈ngø, pɑth ki cwɑggi ngɑn-ɑ bɑ ngeti kɑnïsɑ̀ këti. Mɑ́ wu ɑ́cwøl yi Jwøk kɑ per kinni o wu bëëd wun ki mër." 
1Corinthians7:16 Anɑn, yïn ɑ ngɑndhɑjø, ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kidï keløg jɑlgølí di yiel kì bɑngí. Wɑlɑ̀ yïn ɑ jɑlø, ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kidï keløg cyëgí di yiel kì bɑngí." 
1Corinthians7:17 De gïn-ɑ pere teg cɑrø bɑ kinni bëëd dhɑnhø ki bëën-ɑ ɑ́bëëde cøn, keny-ɑ́ nuti cwølii yi Jwøk, o møgɑni cïgɑ’ kɑnïsɑ̀ kì kɑ̈jj bënn." 
1Corinthians7:18 Keløg e dɑ ngɑn-ɑ ócwølø yi Jwøk e rumø ngølø, ngïji menɑni ko wiy yi en. Wɑlɑ̀ keløg e dɑ ngɑn-ɑ ócwølø yi Jwøk e nuti ngølø ko yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki kwøbbi ngølø." 
1Corinthians7:19 Mɑ́ bëëdi dhɑnhø ɑ́ ɑngøl wɑlɑ̀ bëëde e nuti ngølø bogïn wɑngi yi gen, dɑ́ mïdhi ciggi Jwøk kidøøj, ɑ pere teg cɑrø." 
1Corinthians7:20 Bëëd ji bënn ni kɑ ɑ́cwøøl gen yi Jwøk. 
1Corinthians7:21 Keløg yï bëëdø yï bɑ bɑ̈ng cøn, pyëwí ko lïngi. De keløg yï óyïddø ki keny gööny ri wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø, gøny rií ceth." 
1Corinthians7:22 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwøl yi Mesiy e pɑth ki bɑ̈ng, bɑ bɑ̈ng Mesiy ceth." 
1Corinthians7:23 Wu ɑ́ngew yi Jwøk, kɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́ngëëwe muuje, wu ko göög ki bɑ̈nggi ji." 
1Corinthians7:24 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, cög dhɑnhø e nɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde kɑ ɑ́cwølii yi Jwøk." 
1Corinthians7:25 Bong cigg mɑ ɑ́yod yi yɑn kì yï Wë kipe ngɑn-ɑ nuti nyömø, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn-ɑ nuti nywømø. De yɑ kwøb-ɑ møg-ɑ rømmɑ, ni ngɑn cuggi ngɑ̈dhø kì bɑng kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ́ pyëw Wë ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki en." 
1Corinthians7:26 Anɑn, yɑ orumø kinni, lɑ̈w keløg dhɑnhø obëëdø ni kɑ̀ bëëde ɑnɑn, mɑ́ piny órënyi." 
1Corinthians7:27 Keløg dhɑnhø bɑ ɑtwöj yi kwøbbi gøle, ko yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki keny bëëne wɑ̈g kì yethi töjjɑni. Wɑlɑ̀ keløg dhɑnhø nuti nyömø, ko yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki kwøbbi nywöm." 
1Corinthians7:28 De keløg yï ónyömø, menɑni pɑth ki orøg. De tyëng-ɑ nyi nyömi nyii yïddø ki orɑng kì kömi piny men, o yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ wu lɑ̈ɑ̈wø ki orɑngɑni." 
1Corinthians7:29 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi yɑn bɑ kinni, piny kedh e ócyɑ̈ngø thumø, bëëd tyëng-ɑ yï gen di mɑ̈nn ni tyëng-ɑ yï gen bong mɑ̈nn." 
1Corinthians7:30 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ywöngi bëëd gen ni tyëng-ɑ pɑ ywöngi; kɑ tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen med, bëëd gen ni tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen pɑ med; kɑ tyëng-ɑ ngëwø bëëd gen ni tyëng-ɑ yï bong jɑmmì," 
1Corinthians7:31 kɑ tyëng-ɑ yï gen di kɑ̈r pëthi gen ko cïb gen kömi jɑmmɑni. Mɑ́ piny men ki bëën-ɑ bëëde ɑnɑn, koo mɑ̈gi ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r." 
1Corinthians7:32 Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, bëëd wun pëthi wun pɑ lïngø, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ nuti nyömø rumme nyi cïbe’ ri göggi Wë;" 
1Corinthians7:33 de ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́nyömi nyi rømm-ɑ kwøbbi jɑmmi kömi piny, kí gïg-ɑ nyi wëggi pyëw cyëge mïnø;" 
1Corinthians7:34 ceg kɑ tyellø kì wɑ̈thi tùng ɑ́ryew. O nyɑnɑjur men-ɑ nuti nywɑlø yi jɑlø, kí ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ yïe bong jɑlø nyi rum ɑ ri kwøbbi Wë, mɑ́ e dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o dële geki pyëwe bëëd gen gɑ ɑkwër. De ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́nywøm nyi rømm-ɑ jɑmmi kömi piny møg-ɑ nyi mïni pyëw jɑlgøle." 
1Corinthians7:35 Møg kømmi yi yɑn kɑ per kɑ̀ dwɑdd-ɑ kønyi wun. Bong gïn ceg yi yɑn ki dwɑddi mɑ̈ɑ̈ni wun. De yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o wu gwøg wun gïn-ɑ døøj, ɑ bɑ dyër, o ri wun mëggu gwøøg Wë, e pëthi wun pɑ lïngø." 
1Corinthians7:36 Keløg e dɑ ngɑn rumø kinni, nyɑnɑjur men-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi en tyer yi en ki mendwøng, o dwɑdd-ɑ tyëgi nywöm, tyëge nywöm ceth kɑ cyëge kwɑnye; menɑni pɑth ki orøg." 
1Corinthians7:37 De ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yïëy ki pyëwe bëne, kinni ócuggø bëëdø e pɑ nyömi, e pɑth ki ɑcerø, ócuggø bëëdø e nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi en pɑ nywøme." 
1Corinthians7:38 Menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni jɑl-ɑ nyömi ɑ́gwøg-ɑ gïjø me døøj, o jɑl-ɑ nuti nyömø ɑ́gwøg-ɑ gïjø me pëddi døøjø." 
1Corinthians7:39 Ngɑndhɑjø pɑ bëëd wïje kɑ̀ bëëd jɑlgøle onëënø; de ke thøw jɑlgøle, ócuggø kedhi yï jɑl-ɑ dwɑdde; de bëëd jɑl-ɑ yïe kedhe ɑ́ ngeti Mesiy." 
1Corinthians7:40 De yɑ orumø kinni ócuggø bëëdø pyëwe omedø ke cöge e pɑ yɑ̈bø ki jɑlø, o yɑ orumø kinni bɑ Wëyi Jwøk møg-ɑ riɑ ɑ kwøb møgɑni." 
1Corinthians8:1 Anɑn, møg bɑ kipe møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed yi wun kipe gëdhh-ɑ nyi ngɑ̈lli ngïjji jwögg. Bɑ dyër ceth kinni “wɑ dïdø wɑ bënn,” ni kɑ̀ kømmii. Dïdø menɑni dhɑnhø nyi wëgge’ kwööd mɑl yi ngöönø; de mɑ̈ɑ̈dø bɑ en ɑ nyi gëdø." 
1Corinthians8:2 Keløg dhɑnhø nyii rumø kinni, dɑ kwøb mø dïd en ki mendwøng, ngɑnɑni nuti ti dïdø." 
1Corinthians8:3 De keløg Jwøk mɑɑr yi dhɑnhø, ngɑ̈nyi yi Jwøk kinni, ngɑnɑni bɑ ngete." 
1Corinthians8:4 Kì ri kwøbbi rïnggi gëdhh-ɑ nyi ngɑ̈lli ngïjji jwögg; ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ kinni ngïjjɑni pɑth ki jwögg kidyër, o bong Jwøk megø, de Jwøk bɑ ɑ́kyel kete." 
1Corinthians8:5 Cɑgg e di gïg mø cwølli gɑ jwögg, kì mɑl wɑlɑ̀ piny, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ ngeeny jwöggɑni geki wëëg møgɑni," 
1Corinthians8:6 yïee dɑ Jwøk ɑ́kyel, en ɑ Wïy, Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j jɑmmì bënn, o en ɑ ree bëëd yi wɑ; o Wë nud ɑ́ ɑ́kyel, en ɑ Yëso Mesiy; en ɑ ree ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j jɑmmì bënn, o en ɑ ree bëëd yi wɑ." 
1Corinthians8:7 De pɑth ki ji bënn ɑ ngɑ̈nyi møgɑni. Kwï ji wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́kɑ̈l yi møgɑni; pïd ɑnɑn kɑ̀ cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen ki gëdhhi jwöggɑni, ge nyii rumø kinni ge ceg-ɑ ywëdhø, mɑ́ rømmi yi gen ɑ́ mi ngïjjɑni; pëthi gen nyøødh." 
1Corinthians8:8 Wɑ pɑ cuggi kïdhi buti Jwøk yi gïncɑm, o bong gïn kedh kì yïee ke cög wɑ, wɑ pɑ cyɑ̈mø, o ke cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wɑ, bong gïn yod yi wɑ." 
1Corinthians8:9 De gwiru rummi wun kidøøj, kipe bëëdi wun wu göög-ɑ wɑ̈thi wun, ko göög ki men wëggi tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen nyøødh pɑ̈dhi yij orøg." 
1Corinthians8:10 Keløg yïn, yïn ɑ ngɑn-ɑ cwølli rií ce yï dïdø, keløg yï ocyɑ̈mø kì kengi jwøg me pɑth, kɑ yï lidh yi ngɑn-ɑ pyëwe nyøødh, ngɑnɑni pyëwe pɑ ceg tëngø, kɑ ocyɑ̈mø ki rïngi gïn-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈lli jwøng-ɑ pɑth ki dyër?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, ngɑn-ɑ nyødh, othøø kì bɑng dïdø mií, eni ngɑn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́thøw yi Mesiy." 
1Corinthians8:12 O yï ɑ́göög ki orøg kì bøli Mesiy. 
1Corinthians8:13 Keløg gïncɑm göjj-ɑ wɑɑd wøn orøg, yɑ pɑ ciggi cɑm ki gïncɑmɑni, kipe kinni o wɑɑd wøn ócöge e pɑ pɑ̈dhi yij orøg ki göjɑ." 
1Corinthians9:1 Yɑ pɑ bëëd wïjɑ? Yɑ pɑth ki jɑlwöödø? Wë Yëso, nuti liidh yi yɑn? Wu pɑth ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́nywøl yi gwøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ kipe nyingi Wë?" 
1Corinthians9:2 Cɑgg ji møøgø nuti yïëyø kinni yɑ bɑ jɑlwöödø, kì yï wun yɑ bɑ jɑlwöödø ceth, mɑ́ wun kì ri wun, wu bɑ ngïji men-ɑ nyodh kinni, yɑ bɑ jɑlwöödø mi Wë ceth, mɑ́ gwøng-ɑ́ pere ɑ́öri yɑn yi Wë ɑ́gwøgɑ ceth." 
1Corinthians9:3 Kenyi cɑɑy yɑn yi ji møøgø, riɑ nyi nyɑg yi yɑn kɑ kinni:" 
1Corinthians9:4 Yïɑ bong dyër me köme cyɑ̈mɑ kɑ yɑ omɑ̈dhø? 
1Corinthians9:5 Yïɑ bong dyër me cuggɑ nyömø ki dhɑjø me yïëyø, men cyɑ̈dhi ki yɑn ni mɑ̈nni nyiimï Wë geki Pïtør?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Wɑlɑ̀ bɑ wøki Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ keti wøn, ɑ cïrri gwøg kipe gïn-ɑ cɑm yi wøn?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Wu ɑ́wöl lïngø cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kinni, ɑlɑthker nyii göögø, e bong gïn culii? Wɑlɑ̀ dɑ dhɑnhø me nyi pïdhø ki bɑɑg oløg, kɑ ocögø e pɑ cyɑ̈mø ki nywøli oløngɑni? Wɑlɑ̀ dɑ dhɑnhø me nyi mɑ̈gø ki dyëg, kɑ ocögø e pɑ cyɑ̈mø ki cɑɑg dyëgɑni?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn ek pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ cwɑggɑ ketɑ; ge nud kì yethi Ciggi Mosɑ̀. 
1Corinthians9:9 Mɑ́ e bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi Ciggɑni kinni, “Wɑnh-ɑ pyejji gïn-ɑ pwööd byel, dhøge ko nyi twöj.” Anɑn, wu orumø kinni Jwøk kööre lïngø kɑ per wɑ̈dhh?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Pɑ wɑngi wɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe møgɑni? Møgɑni ɑ́gwed kɑ peree ceth. Ngɑn-ɑ purø kí ngɑn-ɑ kɑj byel nyi göögø ge gɑ̈nn-ɑ kinni ge óyïddi ki köögi. 
1Corinthians9:11 Wø ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈g ki köödhi wëy kì kelli wun, bɑ gïg mø ngenyø ɑ cwøl yi wøn kì yï wun, ke cwöddi wøn ki gïïpiny?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Keløg ji møøgø yï gen dɑ tegø me nyi yïddi gen ki jɑmmɑni ki yï wun, tegø mi gen pɑ lod yi tegø mi wøn? Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd møgɑni kinøw, gïg-ɑ di yod yi wøn gɑ mø wøn ceth, nuti yodø yi wøn. De wø ɑ́ngïïn kɑ per kinni o bongii gïn jog Wöndøj kì ri Mesiy." 
1Corinthians9:13 Kwïj yi wun kinni, tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø kì yij Kengø nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ɑ ri Kengø, o tyëng-ɑ nyi muuj gëdhhì nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ɑ ri gëdhhɑni?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Nɑ menɑni ceth, Wë ɑ́cïg kinni, ji-ɑ pwönyi Wöndøj, cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ɑ ri Wöönɑni." 
1Corinthians9:15 De bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́cwølɑ kì ri gïg-ɑ di mëggu yɑn, o yɑ pɑ ceg cwöd ki gïïpiny kì yï wun kɑ̀ gwedɑ møgɑni ɑnɑn. Thøø lɑ̈w kì yïɑ kibøli rënyi dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ ni men." 
1Corinthians9:16 Kɑ̀ pwönyɑ Wöndøj, riɑ pɑ lejji yi yɑn, mɑ́ gwøngɑni bɑ gwøgɑ ceth, o di bëëd ɑ́ cyën kì kömɑ keløg Wöndøj di cög e pɑ pwönyi yi yɑn." 
1Corinthians9:17 Keløg yɑ di pwönyi kɑ cwɑggɑ, yɑ di rum kinni yɑ ónëngi ki köögi, de gwøng-ɑ gwøg yi yɑn, ɑ́ceg kɑ cïb cingɑ yi Jwøk." 
1Corinthians9:18 Köögi miɑ bɑ ngø? Köögi men-ɑ yod yi yɑn bɑ pwönyi Wöndøj, e bong gïn culi yɑn." 
1Corinthians9:19 Yɑ bɑ ngɑn bëëd wïjɑ, yɑ pɑth ki bɑ̈ng ngɑn megø. De riɑ ɑ́løgɑ bɑ̈ng ji bënn, kipe kinni o ji mø gïïr cög ge pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
1Corinthians9:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göögɑ kì kelli Yeud, yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ nɑ gen, kipe kinni o Yeud yïëy gen, o ge ócög, ge pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
1Corinthians9:21 De kɑ̀ kööbɑ kì kelli tyëng-ɑ kömi gen bong Ciggi Mosɑ̀, yɑ ceg-ɑ bëëdø ni gen. De møgɑni pɑ wɑngi kinni, kömɑ bong cigg kidyër, mɑ́ ciggi Mesiy per gen teeg cɑrø kì yïɑ." 
1Corinthians9:22 O thyew, kɑ̀ kööbɑ kì kelli tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen nyøødh, yɑ ceg-ɑ gwøg ni ngɑn pyëwe nyøødh, kipe kinni o ge cög ge pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny thyew. Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn kì kelli ji bënn, kipe kinni o kwï ji yiel kì wɑ̈thi tùngɑni bënn." 
1Corinthians9:23 De møgɑni bënn ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn thyew kipe kinni o yɑ løgɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyëng-ɑ nyi gyëdh kì bɑng kɑ̀ göög gen kipe Wöndøj. 
1Corinthians9:24 Kwïj yi wun kinni, dërr mø gïïr nyi rɑɑdø, de bɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kete kì kelli gen ɑ nyi yïddi ki pwøj? Nyi rɑɑd wun kipe kinni o wu yïddi wun ki gïn pwøøj wun." 
1Corinthians9:25 Tyëng-ɑ nyi tug kì bøli teedø ge nyi ceg kɑ pwönyø kidøøj. Møgɑni nyi gwøg yi gen kɑ per kinni, o ge ópöödh gen keny-ɑ órɑɑng gen, o ge óyïddi gen ki yɑ̈r men pwøøj gen. De yɑ̈r mi gen órënyi, mɑ́ e bɑ mi kömi piny. De yɑ̈r men-ɑ ópwøøj wɑ pɑth ki men-ɑ órënyi, mɑ́ e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk." 
1Corinthians9:26 Bene ɑ bɑnge cwedɑ riɑ ki ngwej kipe kinni, o yɑ wɑ̈dhɑ keny-ɑ rengi; o bene ɑ bɑnge nyïɑ̈ggɑ yɑ nenn-ɑ keny-ɑ gøj yi yɑn ceth." 
1Corinthians9:27 Dëlɑ nyii pwödø yi yɑn, kɑ riɑ nyi cirɑ kipe kinni ko bëëd ɑ́ yɑn ɑ dhɑl yi bëëdø men-ɑ ɑ́pwönyɑ ji." 
1Corinthians10:1 Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ pɑ̈ddi wun nyiimïɑ ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kipe kweyyee møg-ɑ ɑ́lugi kì bɑng Mosɑ̀. Ge ɑ́gëng-ɑ yi pøølø bënn, kɑ Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø bɑ̈ɑ̈n gen ge bënn." 
1Corinthians10:2 Ge ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g kì yij pøølɑni kí yij nɑɑm omelø gɑ jøbɑng Mosɑ̀. 
1Corinthians10:3 Kɑ ge ocyɑ̈mø bënn kì kej ɑ́kyel ki gïncɑm-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Jwøk. 
1Corinthians10:4 Kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø bënn kì kej ɑ́kyel ki pïg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri kïti wëy men-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki gen. O kïnɑni bɑ Mesiy. 
1Corinthians10:5 Cɑgg ɑ́ kì bøli kenyɑni, Jwøk nuti bëëdø pyëwe med ki møøgø kì kelli gen; ɑthøw gen kì yij pɑ̈l." 
1Corinthians10:6 Møgɑni bënn ɑ́bëëd gɑ nyuudhi kiperee, kipe kinni o wɑ cög wɑ pɑ tyer gïgrijjø ni gen." 
1Corinthians10:7 Ngïjji jwögg ko mɑlli wun, ni kɑ ɑ́mɑlli gen yi kwï kweyyee. Ni møg-ɑ kømmi yi wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Teedø ɑ́pëggi piny be cɑm geki mɑdh, kɑ ge dhwödh-ɑ be ngyëëdø.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Wɑ ko pëggi be yɑb ki mɑ̈nn ni kɑ ɑ́göög kwï gen, ɑ ɑ́thøw ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel." 
1Corinthians10:9 Jwøk ko pɑ̈nyi wɑ ni kɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyii yi kweyyee kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈j yi thöllì. 
1Corinthians10:10 Wɑlɑ̀ wɑ ko kwɑ̈ɑ̈dh ni kɑ ɑ́kwɑ̈ɑ̈dh kwï gen, kɑ ge nɑ̈g yi Wëywöni Thøø." 
1Corinthians10:11 Gïgɑni bënn ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi gen gɑ nyuudhi kipe tyëng-ɑ kyeelø; kɑ ge gwed gɑ møg kyëddi wɑ, wɑ tyëng-ɑ riee thumi yi piny." 
1Corinthians10:12 Tyëng-ɑ rumø kinni ge cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi tyelli gen, ri gen ko wëggi gen pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
1Corinthians10:13 Akørr-ɑ ɑ́bï kömi wun, pɑ̈r ki møg-ɑ nyi bï kömi ji. De Jwøk dhøge pɑ wil yi en; kömi wun pɑ wëgge bëën yi ɑkørr mø dhɑ̈li yielø yi wun; wu óthödhe ki tegø me ngïïn wun kì bøli keny-ɑ nyi rɑɑng wun." 
1Corinthians10:14 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, yeki nyiimïɑ, nyi rengi wun kì keny-ɑ mɑlli ngïjji jwögg." 
1Corinthians10:15 Yɑ kööbø ki wun, wun ɑ́ ji mø rummi wun nud; kɑ thɑ́ møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn yɑb wun." 
1Corinthians10:16 Óthɑ̈ngi gyëdh men-ɑ thyey yi wɑ, bɑ nywɑ̈g ki remi Mesiy; o ópun-ɑ nyi pød yi wɑ, bɑ nywɑ̈g ki dëël Mesiy." 
1Corinthians10:17 Wɑ bɑ dëël dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel wɑ bënn, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ ngeeny kwɑnnee; mɑ́ wɑ nywɑg-ɑ ópunɑni ɑ́ ɑ́kyel." 
1Corinthians10:18 Lidh wun kwɑrri Isrɑil; kɑ̀ nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen ki gëdhhì, ge ceg-ɑ nywɑ̈g ki gwøøg këli lɑm." 
1Corinthians10:19 Yɑ wɑng-ɑ kinni, ngïji jwøg geki gënh-ɑ mëggii bong per gen?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Pɑth! Gïn-ɑ wɑngɑ bɑ kinni, gënh-ɑ nyi muuj yi tyëng-ɑ kwïj Jwøk pɑ nyi mëgg-ɑ Jwøk, de nyi mëgg-ɑ wëyrijjø. O yɑ pɑ dwɑddi kinni o wu nywɑ̈ɑ̈g wun ki wëyrijjø." 
1Corinthians10:21 Wu pɑ cuggi mɑdh kì yij óthɑ̈ngi Wë, kedh wu omɑ̈dhø kì yij óthɑ̈ngi wëyrijjø; o wu pɑ cuggi cɑm kì tɑɑw Wë, kedh wu ocyɑ̈mø kì tɑɑw wëyrijjø." 
1Corinthians10:22 Wɑlɑ̀ wu dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o Wë mɑg yi tyiel? Wu orumø kinni wɑ teeg kibøle? 
1Corinthians10:23 Teedø okööbø kinni, “Bong gïn bɑ ɑkerø ki cɑmø.” Bɑ dyër, de jɑmmì pɑ døøj bënn. Kí møg-ɑ kømmi kinni, “Bong gïn bɑ ɑkerø ki gwøgø.” De gïg-ɑ gøggi bënn pɑ nyi nywøl gïndøj." 
1Corinthians10:24 Dhɑnhø ko nyi gwøg gïn-ɑ døøj kipere kete; de nyi gwøg dhɑnhø gïn-ɑ døøj kiper ji møøgø thyew. 
1Corinthians10:25 Yï ócuggø cɑm ki rïngø men-ɑ kej ngyew ni kɑ̀ dwɑddí, e bong gïn pyënyi yi yïn kì ree, o bëëde e bong olïng pyëw." 
1Corinthians10:26 Mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Piny kí jɑmm-ɑ yije bënn, bɑ mø Wë.”" 
1Corinthians10:27 Keløg wu oryejø yi ngɑn nuti yïëyø, kɑ wu oyïëyø ki kedhø, cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun ki gïgcɑmm-ɑ mëggi wun bënn. Kɑ wu ko pëëj, o bëëde e bong olïng pyëw." 
1Corinthians10:28 De keløg wu oköbbø yi ngɑn megø kinni, “Rïngø men bɑ gëdhhi ngïjji jwögg,” wu ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki rïngɑni, mɑ́ wu ɑ́rum ki köbbø, o bëëde e bong olïng pyëw." 
1Corinthians10:29 De yɑ pɑ wɑngi olïng pëthi wun; dɑ́ ngɑn megø ɑ kømmɑ. De ngɑn megø ócuggø pëjjø kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈n yɑn gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi pyëwɑ kipe ngɑn megø?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Keløg Jwøk nyii pwøjø yi yɑn kiper gïncɑmɑni, ɑ́ kipe ɑ cɑɑy yɑn kipe cɑmi gïncɑm mɑ pere ɑ́pwøjɑ Jwøk?”" 
1Corinthians10:31 Keløg wu ceg-ɑ cɑm wɑlɑ̀ wu ceg-ɑ mɑdh, wɑlɑ̀ wu ceg-ɑ gwøg, nyi gwøgu gïgɑni bënn gɑ møg lejju Jwøk." 
1Corinthians10:32 Wu ko göög ki gïn göjji ji møøgø pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø; ying gɑ Yeud, wɑlɑ̀ tyëng Yönɑn, wɑlɑ̀ tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀." 
1Corinthians10:33 De bëëd wun ni yɑn; ɑ nyi pɑ̈nyi riɑ ceth ki gwøgi gïn mïni pëthi ji bënn. O yɑ pɑ nyi gwøg gïn-ɑ døøj kiperɑ, de yɑ nyi gwøg-ɑ gïn-ɑ døøj kipe ji mø gïïr, kipe kinni o ge yiel." 
1Corinthians11:1 Nyi ngøyu bëëdɑ ni kɑ ɑ́ngøyɑ bëëdi Mesiy. 
1Corinthians11:2 Yɑ pwøjɑ wun kipe kɑ̀ nyi pɑrru yɑn kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kí kɑ̀ mïdhu cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun." 
1Corinthians11:3 De yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o yod yi wun kinni, Mesiy, bɑ en ɑ jɑɑg jøg-ɑ cwøw bënn, o jɑlø bɑ en ɑ jɑɑg cyëge, o bɑ Jwøk ɑ jɑɑg Mesiy." 
1Corinthians11:4 Keløg e dɑ jɑlø me mɑlli Jwøk, wɑlɑ̀ me nyi töng mø Jwøk wïje bɑ ɑkum, wɑng-ɑ kinni Wë pɑ wør yi en." 
1Corinthians11:5 De ke di ngɑndhɑjø me mɑlli Jwøk wɑlɑ̀ töng mø Jwøk wïje nuti kum en, wɑng-ɑ kinni jɑlgøle pɑ wør yi en, o pɑ̈r ki ke di bëëde wïje bɑ ɑlyel." 
1Corinthians11:6 Mɑ́ keløg ngɑndhɑjø wïje pɑ kum yi en, lɑ̈w ke di lyëële yëyye wɑ̈g. De kɑ̀ bëëd wïj ngɑndhɑjø nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈yø keløg yëyye bɑ ɑteb wɑlɑ̀ wïje bɑ ɑlyel, wiy gø kume." 
1Corinthians11:7 Anɑn, jɑlø ko dwɑddi kinni o wïje kume, mɑ́ e bɑ ngïji Jwøk, o døøje kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ bɑng døøji Jwøk. De døøji ngɑndhɑjø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri jɑlø." 
1Corinthians11:8 Mɑ́ jɑlø nuti kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri dhɑjø, de dhɑjø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri jɑlø." 
1Corinthians11:9 O thyew, jɑlø nuti cwɑ̈jø kɑ per dhɑjø, dɑ́ dhɑjø ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j kiper jɑlø." 
1Corinthians11:10 Bene kì bɑng menɑni, ɑ nyi kum wïj ngɑndhɑjø ki ógødh kipe kinni o wëywödd ngɑ̈ny gen wøw kinni, ngɑnɑni cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng tegø mi jɑlgøle." 
1Corinthians11:11 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd møgɑni kinøw kì bøli Wë, dhɑjø bëëd ɑ ri jɑlgøle, o jɑlø bëëd ɑ ri cyëge thyew." 
1Corinthians11:12 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l dhɑjø ri jɑlø kì tyeli mɑl, ki yuu-ɑ ni menɑni ceth, jɑlø ɑ́nywøl-ɑ yi dhɑjø, o bɑ Jwøk ɑ nyi gwøg jɑmmì bënn." 
1Corinthians11:13 Løøg wun møgɑni kiri wun. Ngɑndhɑjø døøj ki mɑlli Jwøk, wïje nuti kumø?" 
1Corinthians11:14 Cɑgg ɑ́ kì yij bëëdee kete, ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ kinni, bɑ̈ri yëyyi wïj jɑlø bɑ ɑyɑ̈r," 
1Corinthians11:15 de bɑ̈ri yëyyi wïj dhɑjø bɑ dhwɑ̈ng, mɑ́ yëyy møgɑni ɑ́mëggii yi Jwøk gɑ møg kumii." 
1Corinthians11:16 De keløg e dɑ ngɑn pëmø kì ri møgɑni, gïn-ɑ köbbɑ en bɑ kinni; bong yöö megø men yïëy yi wøn, wɑlɑ̀ men yïëy yi kɑnïsɑ̀ thyew." 
1Corinthians11:17 Anɑn, bong gïn pwøjɑ wun kì ri møg-ɑ köbbɑ wun èn, mɑ́ gïgdøj møg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi wun kɑ̀ cugi wun, nyii lodø yi gïgrijjø møg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi wun kì kenyɑni." 
1Corinthians11:18 Møg-ɑ mɑl bɑ kinni yɑ ɑ́lïng kinni, i dɑ ɑkud me pëmø kì yij buri wun; kɑ yɑ oyïëyø kinni, kwï kwøbbɑni bɑ dyër." 
1Corinthians11:19 (De tyëng-ɑ mïdhi kwøbb-ɑ dyër óyod kidï, keløg e di bëëd e bong ji mø bɑ̈nni wɑ̈thi teedø?)" 
1Corinthians11:20 Kenyi cugi wun be cɑm kì kej ɑ́kyel, wu pɑ nyi cyɑ̈mø kɑ yuu-ɑ nyi cɑɑm gïi kwëër Wë." 
1Corinthians11:21 De dhɑnhø nyi cɑm-ɑ gïncɑme kì wɑ̈ye, kɑ ngɑn megø nyii cögø ree dɑ kɑ̈j, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø nyi nɑ̈g yi møgø." 
1Corinthians11:22 Á kipe ngø, ɑ nyi göög wun kinøw? Yï wun bong kɑ̈llì mø yethi gen nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi wun? Wɑlɑ̀ bong kɑ̈llì møg yethi gen nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈dh yi wun? Kɑnïsɑ̀ pɑ ceg ki yɑ̈rø yi wun, kɑ̀ pɑ nyi køny wun tyëng-ɑ cinggi gen jɑdø? Anɑn, yɑ ókööb ɑ dï kiper wun? Wu ócuggø pwøjø yi yɑn kipe møgɑni? Wu pɑ pwøj yi yɑn kinni tek." 
1Corinthians11:23 Møg-ɑ ɑ́yod yi yɑn kì yï Wë, bɑ gen ɑ ɑ́muujɑ wun, o møgɑni bɑ kinni, Wë Yëso ɑ́kɑ̈bbi ki ópun kì wɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́twɑnyii," 
1Corinthians11:24 ɑpwøje Jwøk, kɑ ópunɑni pøde, ɑkööbe kinni, “Men bɑ dëlɑ men-ɑ muuj kiper wun, nyi gwøgu møgɑni kipe pɑri yɑn.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Kɑ kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki cɑm, kɑ óthɑ̈gi kwɑnye ni menɑni thyew. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Óthɑ̈gi men bɑ lwömi Jwøk, lwöm-ɑ nyɑ̈n kì ri remɑ. Kenyi mɑdhu en, nyi gwøgu en ɑ́ men pɑru yɑn.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Mɑ́ kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun ki ópunɑni, kɑ wu omɑ̈dhø kì yij óthɑ̈ngɑni, wu nyudh-ɑ teedø kwøbbi thøwi Wë, gïti bøli keny-ɑ ódwööge." 
1Corinthians11:27 Menɑni bɑ kinni, ngɑn cyɑ̈mø ki ópuun Wë, kɑ omɑ̈dhø kì yij óthɑ̈nge kì yöö me pɑ myëër ki en, ngɑnɑni köme dɑ cɑ́y, kipe kɑ ɑ́bwöle dëël Wë geki reme." 
1Corinthians11:28 Nyi tyeny dhɑnhø ree møti, codhe o cyɑ̈me ki ópunɑni, o mɑ̈ɑ̈dhe kì yij óthɑ̈ngɑni." 
1Corinthians11:29 Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈mø, kɑ omɑ̈dhø, e pɑ rumø kidøøj ki gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi dëël Mesiy, ngɑnɑni cwööl-ɑ cɑ́y köme." 
1Corinthians11:30 Bene kì bɑng møgɑni, ɑ nyi bëëd ji mø gïïr kì kelli wun dëlli gen nyøødh, o dëlli gen orɑ̈mø, kɑ kwï ji nyii thøø." 
1Corinthians11:31 De keløg riee di gwir yi wɑ møti, wɑ pɑ di cɑy yi Jwøk." 
1Corinthians11:32 De kenyi cɑɑy wɑ yi Wë, ceg-ɑ wɑ ki tyenyø ni kenyi ceg nyɑ gïnthinh, o møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni, o wɑ cög wɑ pɑ yïddi ki cɑ́yi Jwøk kyeel ki tyëng-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈dhi kì bɑng jɑmmi kömi piny." 
1Corinthians11:33 De kɑ̀ bëëd møgɑni kinøw, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, kɑ̀ cugu kej ɑ́kyel be cɑm, nyi yïdu ri wun." 
1Corinthians11:34 Keløg ngɑn megø ree dɑ kɑ̈j, cyɑ̈me kì gøle kipe keny-ɑ ócugu be cɑm, wu ócög wu pɑ cɑy yi Jwøk. De wu óceg yi yɑn ki kwøb møøgø keny-ɑ óbëënɑ yï wun." 
1Corinthians12:1 Anɑn yɑ løøg-ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed yi wun kì ri gïg-ɑ nyi muuj yi Wëykwërø. Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, bëëd gen ge ngɑ̈nyi yi wun." 
1Corinthians12:2 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, kɑ ɑ́bëëd wu nuti yïëyø, wu ɑ́thɑɑb be mɑlli ngïjji jwögg mø ri gen bong wëy." 
1Corinthians12:3 Anɑn yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ köbbi wun kinni bong ngɑn yïe di Wëyi Jwøk me cuggi kwøb kinni, “Yëso ree dɑ cyën!” O bong ngɑn cuggi kwøb kinni, “Yëso bɑ Wë,” keløg e pɑ nyudh-ɑ yi Wëykwërø." 
1Corinthians12:4 Dɑ gïg mø gïïr mø nyi muuj yi wëy, de wëy-ɑ muuj gen bɑ ɑ́kyel." 
1Corinthians12:5 O gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi ji kipe kɑnïsɑ̀ pɑ pɑ̈r; de Wë, ngɑn-ɑ pere göög yi wɑ bɑ ɑ́kyel." 
1Corinthians12:6 O gïg-ɑ nyi yod kì bɑng møgɑni pɑ pɑ̈r, de Jwøk bɑ ɑ́kyel, en ɑ ngɑn-ɑ nyi thödhi ji bënn ki tegø kipe gwøgi gïgɑni." 
1Corinthians12:7 Ji bënn nyi thödh-ɑ yi Jwøk ki tegø men nyodh kinni, Wëykwërø ogöögø kì pëthi gen kipe kinni, o tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ yïddi gen ki gïgdøj." 
1Corinthians12:8 Dhɑnhø othödhø yi Wëy ki kwøbbi peli wïj; kɑ ngɑn megø thödhi yi Wëyɑni ki dïdø kwøb. 
1Corinthians12:9 Kɑ ngɑn megø thödhi yi Wëyɑni kete ki yïëyø; kɑ ngɑn megø mëgge yieli tyëngbuud. 
1Corinthians12:10 Ngɑn megø othödhø yi Wëy ki tegø men gööge ki gïïngɑ̈ngø, kɑ ngɑn megø mëgge töng; kɑ ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø wëgge ngij ki wëy; kɑ megø wëgge kwøb ki dhøg mø gïïr; kɑ megø wëgge løgi dhøggɑni." 
1Corinthians12:11 Møgɑni bënn gwøg-ɑ yi Wëy ɑ́kyel, e gï pɑ̈nge’ pɑ̈ngø kì kelli ji ni kɑ̀ dwɑdde gøn, dhɑnhø nyi mëgge’ me bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki men-ɑ mëgge ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø." 
1Corinthians12:12 Mesiy pɑ̈r ki dëël dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel, ɑ ree di gïg mø gïïr; o bɑ dël ɑ́kyel ceth cɑgg ree di gïg mø gïïr." 
1Corinthians12:13 Wɑ bënn thyew, ying wɑ bɑ Yeud, wɑlɑ̀ wɑ bɑ tyëng Yönɑn, wɑlɑ̀ wɑ bɑ bɑ̈ngg; wɑlɑ̀ wɑ bëëd-ɑ wɑ̈thee, wɑ ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g kɑ Wëy ɑ́kyel, kipe kinni o wɑ bëëd wɑ bɑ dël ɑ́kyel, o wɑ ɑ́mëgg-ɑ Wëyɑni ɑ́ ɑ́kyel." 
1Corinthians12:14 Mɑ́ dëël dhɑnhø pɑth ki gïjø ɑ́kyel kete, de bɑ gïg mø gïïr." 
1Corinthians12:15 Keløg tyelø okööbø kinni, “Kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ pɑth ki cingø, yɑ tøøk kì ri dël,” di bëëd e tøøk kì ri dëël dhɑnhø kidyër?" 
1Corinthians12:16 Wɑlɑ̀ keløg yïth okööbø kinni, “Kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ pɑth ki wɑng, yɑ tøøk kì ri dëël dhɑnhø,” di bëëd e tøøk kì ri dëël dhɑnhø kidyër?" 
1Corinthians12:17 Anɑn, keløg dëël dhɑnhø bëne di bëëd ɑ́ wɑng, dhɑnhø di lïng kidï? Wɑlɑ̀ keløg dëël dhɑnhø bëne di bëëd ɑ́ yïth, dhɑnhø di ngwɑ̈ɑ̈j kidï?" 
1Corinthians12:18 De gïg-ɑ ri dëël dhɑnhø ɑ́cïb-ɑ yi Jwøk ni kɑ ɑ́dwɑdde gøn. 
1Corinthians12:19 Di bong dëël dhɑnhø, keløg e di bëëd ɑ́ gïjø ɑ́kyel." 
1Corinthians12:20 Gïg-ɑ ri dhɑnhø gïïr, o dël bɑ ɑ́kyel." 
1Corinthians12:21 O cingø pɑ cuggi köbbø yi wɑng kinni, “Yï pɑ dwɑddɑ!” O tyel pɑ cuggi köbbø yi wïj kinni, “Wu pɑ dwɑddɑ!”" 
1Corinthians12:22 Gïg-ɑ nënni ge nyøødh kì ri dhɑnhø, yöd ɑ́ gen ɑ per gen pëddi tegø;" 
1Corinthians12:23 gïg-ɑ nenni yi wɑ per gen pɑ teg, yöd ɑ́ gen ɑ korri yi wɑ; o gïg-ɑ nënni ge pɑ myëër kì ri dhɑnhø, bɑ gen ɑ ceg ki wørø," 
1Corinthians12:24 men-ɑ pɑ dwɑddi yi møg-ɑ pëddi myëërø. Gïg-ɑ ri dëël dhɑnhø ópyëlø yi Jwøk kɑ yöö me wøør møg-ɑ nënni per gen bogøn. 
1Corinthians12:25 O møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni o bongii gïn dɑ̈ɑ̈ng gïg-ɑ ri dëël dhɑnhø; o gïgɑni óbëëd gen ge køny-ɑ ri gen. 
1Corinthians12:26 Keløg e dɑ keny rɑ̈mø kì ri gïjø ɑ́kyel, dëël dhɑnhø bëne ceg-ɑ orɑng. O keløg gïjø ɑ́kyel olenhø, gïg-ɑ ri dhɑnhø bënn pëthi gen ceg-ɑ mïnø." 
1Corinthians12:27 Wu bënn, wu bɑ dëël Mesiy; o dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel bɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel kì ree." 
1Corinthians12:28 Ji bënn ɑ́cïb kɑ̈jji gen yi Jwøk kì yij kɑnïsɑ̀; tyëngwöödø ɑ mɑl, ryeew gen bɑ jøtöng; dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen bɑ jøpwönyø; kɑ ji møøgø nënge ki tegø men göög gen ki gïïngɑ̈ngø; møøgø yiel-ɑ tyëngbuud; møøgø køny-ɑ ji; møøgø ceg-ɑ tyëny ki kwøb; o møøgø 'kööb-ɑ dhøg mø kwïj." 
1Corinthians12:29 Ge pɑth ki tyëngwöödø ge bënn, wɑlɑ̀ jøtöng, wɑlɑ̀ jøpwönyø. Pɑth ki ji bënn ɑ yï gen di tegø me göög gen ki gïïngɑ̈ngø," 
1Corinthians12:30 wɑlɑ̀ me yïëëd gen ki tyëngbuud; wɑlɑ̀ me 'kööb ki dhøgg-ɑ kwïj yi gen; wɑlɑ̀ me lwøb gen møg-ɑ kwøb ki dhøng kwïj. 
1Corinthians12:31 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, cïbu pëthi wun ri møg-ɑ ɑ́muuj gɑ møg døj. O wu ónyudhɑ yuu-ɑ pëddi døøjø." 
1Corinthians13:1 Ke 'kööbɑ ki dhøggi ji, wɑlɑ̀ yɑ 'kööbø ki dhøggi wëywödd, de mɑ̈ɑ̈dø bogøn kì pyëwɑ, yɑ nɑ thɑpiyø me pwöd wɑlɑ̀ mɑ̈lø me løng." 
1Corinthians13:2 Keløg yɑ onëngø yi Jwøk ki tegø men pwönyɑ, kí dïdø ki thɑ́ kwøb bënn, o yïɑ dɑ yïëyø me cuggi nyiigi kïttì kì kɑ̈jji gen, de pyëwɑ bong mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, perɑ bogøn." 
1Corinthians13:3 Cɑgg jɑmmɑ bënn, mëggɑ tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn, wɑlɑ̀ cɑgg dëlɑ muujɑ kipe kinni o rɑ̈b ki mɑc, de bong mɑ̈ɑ̈dø kì pyëwɑ, bong gïn yod yi yɑn." 
1Corinthians13:4 Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø bɑ ywøøg yij geki ngïïnø. Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø kwïj ɑter, wɑlɑ̀ kwïj pwödi kɑ̈w. Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø kwïj tɑ̈di wïj, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ nyi kɑ̈ni ki kwøb mø lɑ̈ɑ̈y wïj." 
1Corinthians13:5 Pyëw-ɑ di mɑ̈ɑ̈dø pɑ nyi göögø kɑ per cwɑgge kete, o pɑ nyi jwɑn rënyø, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ nyi cudø ki keje." 
1Corinthians13:6 Pyëw-ɑ di mɑ̈ɑ̈dø pɑ nyi bëëdø e med ki kwøbb-ɑ rijjø, de nyi bëëd e med kɑ kwøbb-ɑ døj." 
1Corinthians13:7 Pyëw-ɑ di mɑ̈ɑ̈dø nyii dyëjø, o nyii yïëyø ki jɑmmì bënn, o nyii ngɑ̈dhø ki gïg-ɑ óyod kì yï Jwøk bënn, o nyii yïdø ki bøli keny-ɑ óbëën gïgɑni bënn thyew." 
1Corinthians13:8 Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø gït-ɑ ɑtheer. De møg-ɑ töng kej gen nyii dhumø; o kwøb ki dhøgg-ɑ kwïj ócög; o dïdø ókedh. 
1Corinthians13:9 Mɑ́ dïdø miee, wɑlɑ̀ töngi mø Jwøk budi gen tøøk." 
1Corinthians13:10 O keny-ɑ óbëën gïn-ɑ bong bude me tøøk, gïg-ɑ budi gen tøøk ceg-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
1Corinthians13:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ yɑ thiinh, kwøbbɑ, kí bëëdɑ, kí rummɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ mø othinh; o kɑ ɑ́døngɑ ɑnɑn, gwøøg thïnh ɑ́wiy yi yɑn." 
1Corinthians13:12 Gïg-ɑ nenni yi wɑ ɑnɑn, nɑ ngïji me dhïïdhø kì yij rɑ̈ɑ̈ngi; de obëën bøli kenyɑni, nyingee ótyëëm wɑ ki ngïji menɑni. Gïg-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn ɑnɑn, bɑ budi gen yøw ɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn; de obëën bøli kenyɑni, ge ótuum, ni kɑ̀ ngɑ̈nyi yɑn yi Jwøk kidøøj." 
1Corinthians13:13 Gïg-ɑ ócög ge nud ceth, bɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g; gen ɑ yïëyø, kí gɑ̈nø, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø; o gïn-ɑ pere teg kì kelli gen bënn bɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø." 
1Corinthians14:1 Nyi yɑbu mɑ̈ɑ̈dø menɑni ceth. Kɑ tegø men-ɑ nyi mëggi dhɑnhø yi Wëykwërø nyi tyeru thyew. De men-ɑ dwɑddi tyerø ki mendwøng bɑ tegø men-ɑ tööng mø Jwøk. 
1Corinthians14:2 Tyëng-ɑ nyi dhumø ki dhøgg-ɑ kwïj, pɑ nyi kööbø ki ji, de ge nyi kööbø kɑ Jwøk. O gïn-ɑ kømmi yi gen pɑ nyi lïngi yi teedø, mɑ́ e bɑ Wëykwërø ɑ kööbø kì ri gen ki kwøb mø nudd gï kwïj yi gen." 
1Corinthians14:3 De tyëng-ɑ pwönyi teedø ki wööni Jwøk nyi köbb-ɑ teedø ki kwøbb-ɑ nyi døm gen, kí kwøbb-ɑ nyi cïïj gen, geki kwøbb-ɑ nyi lug pëthi gen." 
1Corinthians14:4 Tyëng-ɑ nyi dhumø ki dhøgg-ɑ kwïj, nyi døm-ɑ ri gen keti gen, de tyëng-ɑ nyi pwönyi wööni Jwøk nyi døm-ɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ bëne." 
1Corinthians14:5 Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, o wu dhum wun ki dhøgg-ɑ kwïj yi wun, de gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn ki mendwøng bɑ kinni, o wu töngu mø Jwøk ceth. Ngɑn-ɑ pwönyi wööni Jwøk lod-ɑ ngɑn-ɑ dhumø ki dhøg me kwïj; mɑ́ gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi en pɑ yod, keløg e bong ngɑn løg møg-ɑ kømme, kipe kinni o kɑnïsɑ̀ døm yi møgɑni." 
1Corinthians14:6 Keløg yɑ bï-ɑ yï wun, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ yɑ 'kööb-ɑ dhøg me kwïj, ɑ́ ngø ɑ døj ɑ cuggi yodø yi wun kì ri møg-ɑ kømmɑ? Bogøn, de lɑ̈w keløg wu muujɑ’ kwøb mɑ ɑ́yɑl yi Jwøk, wɑlɑ̀ dïdø, wɑlɑ̀ töng, wɑlɑ̀ pwönyø." 
1Corinthians14:7 Keløg gïg-ɑ bɑ gïwwì ni kɑ̈ngì, kí thom, kí gïtɑr pɑ kɑ̈ni ki cwɑg møg ngïjji gen, wör-ɑ wör ki gen óyod kidï?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Wɑlɑ̀ keløg kɑng pɑ ywöngi ki köögø, ɑ́ men ɑ ógwir ree kipe liny?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Bëëd ɑ nøw ki wun thyew. Mɑ́ keløg wu kømm-ɑ kwøb mø pɑ gɑm yi wɑ̈thi ji, gïn-ɑ kømmi yi wun óyod kidï? Kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi wun pɑ ceg ki wɑ̈dhø køølø yi yømø yøw?" 
1Corinthians14:10 Dhøgg-ɑ 'kööb kì kömi piny gïïr, o bong me bogïn wɑnge kì kelli gen." 
1Corinthians14:11 De keløg gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi dhøg megø kwïj yi yɑn, yɑ nɑ ngɑnpɑth kì yï ngɑn-ɑ dhumø ki dhøngɑni; o ngɑnɑni nɑ ngɑnpɑth kì yïɑ thyew." 
1Corinthians14:12 O wun thyew kɑ̀ bëëd wu tyer-ɑ gïg-ɑ nyi muuj yi wëy, tyeru kinni o wu nëngi yi Jwøk ki møg geru kɑnïsɑ̀." 
1Corinthians14:13 Ngɑn-ɑ dhumø ki dhøgg-ɑ kwïj, kwɑjje Jwøk kipe kinni o thödhi ki tegø men lwøbe møg-ɑ kwøbe." 
1Corinthians14:14 Mɑ́ keløg Jwøk kwɑjji yi yɑn kɑ dhøg me kwïj yi yɑn, bɑ wëyɑ ɑ kwɑ̈jji, de bong gïn gɑm yi wïjɑ." 
1Corinthians14:15 Yɑ gwøg-ɑ ngø cyee? Jwøk ceg kɑ kwɑjjø yi yɑn ki wëyɑ geki rummɑ; o wörre wörɑ ki wëyɑ geki rummɑ. 
1Corinthians14:16 Keløg Jwøk pwøj yi yïn kɑ wëyí, pwøjjí óløøg kidï yi ji-ɑ lïngø kinni “Amen,” e gïn-ɑ kømmi yi yïn kwïj yi gen?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Cɑgg kwɑ̈ny-ɑ pwøøj Jwøk døøj, ngɑn megø pɑ døm yi kwøbbɑni kinni tek." 
1Corinthians14:18 Jwøk ceg kɑ pwøjø yi yɑn kipe kɑ̀ ngɑ̈nyɑ dhøg mø ngenyø kibøli wun bënn. 
1Corinthians14:19 Lɑ̈w ke köbb-ɑ ji löggì ɑ́bïj mø cuggi gɑmø yi wɑ̈thi gen, yɑ ceg-ɑ pwönyø, kibøli ke di kööbɑ ki löggì ɑ́lïp mø ngenyø ki dhøg mø kwïj." 
1Corinthians14:20 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wu ko nyi rum ki rummi othønhø, de bëëd wu nɑ othønhø ɑ kwïj gwøg ki rɑj, kɑ wu rømmu rummi döng." 
1Corinthians14:21 Bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø kinni, “Wë okööbø kinni, yɑ ókööbø ki jiɑ kì ri tyëng-ɑ 'kööb dhøg mø pɑth Yɑ ókööbø ki dhøggi tyëngpɑth de cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ jiɑ, kwøbbɑ koo lïngi yi gen.”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Kwøb ki dhøgg-ɑ kwïj bɑ ngïji kì yï tyëng-ɑ nuti yïëyø; pɑth ki ngïji kì yï tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy; o tegi pwönyi wööni Jwøk bɑ ngïji kì yï tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy; pɑth ki ngïji kì yï tyëng-ɑ nuti yïëyø. 
1Corinthians14:23 Ke cugi kɑnïsɑ̀ bëne, kɑ ji bënn ócɑ̈gø dhum ki dhøg mø kwïj, kɑ ji mø nyɑ̈n kì kɑnïsɑ̀ wɑlɑ̀ ji mø nuti yïëyø obëënø, ge pɑ ceg kwøb kinni wɑ̈thi wun dɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gø?" 
1Corinthians14:24 De keløg ji bënn pwöny-ɑ wööni Jwøk, kɑ ji mø nyɑ̈n kì kɑnïsɑ̀ wɑlɑ̀ ji mø nuti yïëyø obëënø, ge ceg kɑ cɑyø yi møg-ɑ lïngi yi gen." 
1Corinthians14:25 Rumm-ɑ kɑnni yi gen kì pëthi gen ceg kɑ yodø, kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny, kɑ Jwøk mɑl yi gen, kɑ ge oyïëyø kinni Jwøk nud kì kelli wun kidyër." 
1Corinthians14:26 Bene gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi yɑn èn nyiimïɑ. Kenyi cugi wun wu ceg-ɑ mɑ̈ddø, nget ɑ́kyel yïe ódi wörø, ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø yïe ódi møg pwönye, o ngɑn megø ólwøb-ɑ gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi. Bëëd møgɑni bënn ge køny-ɑ kɑnïsɑ̀." 
1Corinthians14:27 O keløg wu okööbø ki dhøg mø kwïj, wiy bëëde ɑ́ ji ɑ́ryew wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g ɑ kööbø, e ngɑn kööb ɑ bɑng ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ møg-ɑ kømmi yi gen nyi løg yi ngɑn-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi dhøng-ɑ 'kööb." 
1Corinthians14:28 Keløg e bong dhumi me løg møg-ɑ kømmi ki dhøng-ɑ kwïj, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ 'kööb dhøng-ɑ kwïj cöge e okudø, kɑ köbbe ree kete geki Jwøk." 
1Corinthians14:29 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ pwönyi wööni Jwøk kööb gen gɑ ɑ́ryew wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g, o møg-ɑ kømmi yi gen órømmi yi teedø." 
1Corinthians14:30 De keløg e dɑ ngɑn yïe bëën yi wööni Jwøk, kud ngɑn-ɑ kööbø." 
1Corinthians14:31 Wu ócuggø töngi wööni Jwøk wu bënn, e ceg kɑ lwøbø, kinni ngɑn nyi kööbe kì bɑng ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø, kipe kinni o ji dïd gen, o pëthi gen tëngi gen." 
1Corinthians14:32 Mɑ́ wëyi jøtöng jɑɑg-ɑ yi jøtöng," 
1Corinthians14:33 mɑ́ Jwøk pɑth ki Jwøøg ɑwøw, de bɑ Jwøøg mër. Ni kɑ̀ bëëde kì kɑnïsɑ̀ mi jii Jwøk kì kɑ̈jj bënn," 
1Corinthians14:34 bëëd tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ge okudø kì keny-ɑ cugi yi kɑnïsɑ̀. Ge pɑth ki ɑyïëy ki kwøb, ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi Ciggi Yeud." 
1Corinthians14:35 Keløg e dɑ gïn dwɑddi pyëjø yi gen, nyi pyëj gen cwøwi gen kì kɑ̈lli gen, mɑ́ ngɑndhɑjø pɑ myëër ki kwøb kì yij kɑnïsɑ̀." 
1Corinthians14:36 Wɑlɑ̀ kidï, kwøbbi Jwøk ɑ́cɑ̈g ɑ ri wun? Wɑlɑ̀ ge ɑ́bï-ɑ yï wun keti wun?" 
1Corinthians14:37 Ngɑn kööbø cem ɑ́ jɑltöng, ngɑ̈nye wøw kinni møg-ɑ gwed yi yɑn ek, bɑ ciggi Wë." 
1Corinthians14:38 De ngɑn pɑ yïëy møgɑni, wu ko yïëy ki kwøbbe." 
1Corinthians14:39 Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, cïbu pëthi wun ri töngi wööni Jwøk, kɑ tyëng-ɑ kööbø ki dhøg mø kwïj, ko nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈n wun kwøb;" 
1Corinthians14:40 de gøggi jɑmmì bënn gɑ ɑpyël kidøøj. 
1Corinthians15:1 De ɑnɑn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ pɑ̈ddi wun ki yuu-ɑ ɑ́pwönyɑ Wöndøj kì kelli wun cøn, eni kɑ ɑ́yïëy wun Wöönɑni, kɑ mïdhi yi wun ceth." 
1Corinthians15:2 Bɑ yïëyø menɑni ɑ ree yieel wun, ke mïdhu en kidøøj ni kɑ ɑ́pwönyɑ wun, de keløg Wöönɑni pɑ mïdhi yi wun kidøøj, wu pɑ yiel." 
1Corinthians15:3 Wöödø men-ɑ ɑ́muujɑ wun pere teeg cɑrø, mɑ́ Jwøk ɑ ɑ́mëggii yɑn, o wöönɑni bɑ kinni, Mesiy ɑ́thøw kipe orøgee ni kɑ ógwedii kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø" 
1Corinthians15:4 kinni, ɑ́kony kɑ tug kì yij thøø kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, ni kɑ ógwedii ceth kì yethi wɑ̈jji kwërø;" 
1Corinthians15:5 kinni ɑ́cwöb kì bøli Pïtør. Kɑ cig-ɑ cwöbø kì bøli tyëngwöödø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. 
1Corinthians15:6 Kɑ cig-ɑ cwöbø kì bøli nyiimïee keny-ɑ ɑ́ying gen kej ɑ́kyel, e kwɑnni gen pöödh-ɑ miy ɑ́bïj; mø gïïr kì kelli gen nudd ge onëënø gïti ɑnɑn, o bɑ mø nøg ɑ ɑ́lɑɑy yïnø." 
1Corinthians15:7 Codhe, ɑcwöbe kì bøli Yɑgob. Kɑ cig-ɑ cwöbø kì bøli tyëngwöödø bënn." 
1Corinthians15:8 Kɑ kì cyɑ̈n cyee, ɑcwöbe kì bølɑ, de yɑ nɑ ngɑn-ɑ ónywølø e keje pöödhø." 
1Corinthians15:9 Yɑn ɑ cyɑ̈n kì kelli tyëngwöödø bënn, o riɑ nennɑ yɑ pɑ myëër ki cwøllø yɑn ɑ́ jɑlwöödø, mɑ́ kɑnïsɑ̀ mi Jwøk wɑnge ɑ́guud yi yɑn cøn." 
1Corinthians15:10 De kì bɑng dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk, yɑn ɑ bɑ yɑn èn, o dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́mëgge yɑn nuti wɑ̈dhe’ muujø, dɑ́ kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ ɑ́ yɑn ɑ ɑ́ti dyëjø ki gwøg kibøli tyëngwöödø møg-ɑ kyeelø; ngö yɑ nuti göög-ɑ tegɑ, de yɑ ɑ́køny-ɑ yi Jwøk." 
1Corinthians15:11 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, cɑgg wöönɑni ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yi yɑn wɑlɑ̀ gen, bene møgɑni ɑ pwönyi yi wøn bënn, o bene wöönɑni ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi wun." 
1Corinthians15:12 O ɑnɑn, kɑ̀ bëëd wø pwöny-ɑ kwøbbi kinni, Mesiy ɑ́dhwödh kì yij thøø, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ kööb kwï wun kinni, i tyëngthøø koo dhwödh?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Keløg tyëngthøø koo dhwödh, menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni Mesiy nuti dhwödhø kì yij thøø." 
1Corinthians15:14 O keløg Mesiy nuti dhwödhø kì yij thøø, møg-ɑ pwönyi yi wøn di bëëd gɑ yɑnggì yøw, o yïëyø mi wun di bëëd e bong pere." 
1Corinthians15:15 O thyew keløg tyëngthøø pɑ cuggi dwöög wɑ̈g kì yij thøø, møg-ɑ pwönyi yi wøn kinni, Mesiy ɑ́tug yi Jwøk kì yij thøø di bëëd gɑ kwøbbi pyed." 
1Corinthians15:16 Mɑ́ keløg tyëngthøø pɑ nyi dhwödh, ti Mesiy nuti dhwödhø thyew." 
1Corinthians15:17 O keløg Mesiy nuti dhwödhø kì yij thøø, ti yïëyi wun bong gïn wɑnge, o wu di bëëd wu nudd wu ying-ɑ yij orøøg wun." 
1Corinthians15:18 Kì bɑng menɑni, keløg tyëngthøø pɑ nyi dwöög wɑ̈g kì yij thøø, jii Mesiy møg-ɑ ɑ́rum ki thøø di bëëd gɑ møg lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
1Corinthians15:19 Keløg Mesiy gɑ̈n yi wɑ kɑ per bëëdø kì kömi piny kete, ti bɑ wɑ ɑ nyingee cɑn kibøli ji bënn." 
1Corinthians15:20 De dyër bɑ kinni, Mesiy ɑ́dhwödh kì yij thøø, o bɑ en ɑ wɑd mɑɑl tyëng-ɑ dhwödh." 
1Corinthians15:21 Thøø ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yi dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel, o dhwödhø kì yij thøø ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yi dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel." 
1Corinthians15:22 Wɑlɑ̀ ni kɑ ɑ́thøw dhɑnhø bëne kì bɑng Adɑm, nɑ menɑni thyew, ji bënn óyïddi ki nënnì kì ri Mesiy." 
1Corinthians15:23 De ji ódhwödh ge bɑ ɑpyël; Mesiy ɑ mɑɑl ji bënn, o jie lunyi gen ki dhwödhø, keny-ɑ ódwööge." 
1Corinthians15:24 Codhe, o cögi piny bëe cyee, keny-ɑ ótyɑɑm wëy-ɑ yï gen di tegø, kí jyɑ̈ggi kömi piny, kí tyëng-ɑ teg kì kömi piny yi Mesiy, kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø mëgge Wïy Jwøk." 
1Corinthians15:25 Mɑ́ Mesiy ceg-ɑ jyɑ̈gø ceth, gïti keny-ɑ ótyɑɑm tyëng-ɑ mɑɑnii yi Jwøk, kɑ gï cïbe thɑ́ tyelle." 
1Corinthians15:26 O ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø men-ɑ ótyɑm yi en kì cyɑ̈n bɑ thøø. 
1Corinthians15:27 Mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Gïïpiny bëne ɑ́cïb cinge yi Jwøk kipe kinni o gï jɑɑg yi en.” Kɑ̀ kööbe kinni, “Gïïpiny bëne,” ceg-ɑ nënnø ceth kinni Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cïb gïgɑni cingi Mesiy, tøøk kì kelli gïgɑni." 
1Corinthians15:28 De keny-ɑ órum gïïpiny bëne ki cïb cingi Mesiy, codhe o en, ɑ bɑ Wɑ̈d, ree lonye ki cïb thɑ́ ciggi Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cïb gïïpiny bëne cinge; o gïg-ɑ nud bënn jɑɑg yi Jwøk." 
1Corinthians15:29 Keløg e pɑth ki kinøw, ɑ́ ngø ɑ yod yi ji-ɑ jwɑ̈ɑ̈g ki nyingi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́thøw? Keløg tyëng-ɑ ɑ́thøw pɑ nyi dwöög wɑ̈g kì yij thøø, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ nyi jwɑ̈ɑ̈g ji ki nyingi gen?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ nyi bøy wɑ thøø yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn? 
1Corinthians15:31 Thøø ying-ɑ butɑ yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ! Ngöönø men-ɑ pyëwɑ kiper wun, kí bëëdee wɑ rëbø kì ri Wë Mesiy, bɑ en ɑ wëggi yɑn kwøb kinøw." 
1Corinthians15:32 Keløg yɑ byëddø ki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l kì Epɑsos kɑ per gïg-ɑ nyi tyer yi pyëw dhɑnhø, ɑ́ ngø ɑ di yod yi yɑn? O keløg tyëngthøø pɑ dhwödh, wɑ ceg-ɑ kwøb kyeel ki teen-ɑ kööbø kinni, “Cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wɑ kɑ wɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dh wɑ, mɑ́ wɑ bɑ møg-ɑ óthøw dhuki.”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Wu ko bëëd wu bɑ dhëgg. “Cyɑ̈dhø ki tyëngrijjø nyi rëny-ɑ ngɑn døj.” 
1Corinthians15:34 Nyi yɑbu wɑ̈thi wun, kɑ wu nyi rum wun kidøøj, kɑ orøg wiy wun; mɑ́ Jwøk kwïj yi kwï wun; yɑ kööbø kinøw kɑ per kinni o wu yɑ̈r wun." 
1Corinthians15:35 De ngɑn megø ópëjji kinni, “Tyëngthøø ódwöög be nënnø kidï? Á dël mɑ ngø ɑ órug yi gen?”" 
1Corinthians15:36 Yïn, dhëg! Gïn-ɑ kɑ̈g yi yïn, otwïyø keløg e pɑ thøw?" 
1Corinthians15:37 Gïn-ɑ kɑ̈g yi yïn ócuggø bëëdø ɑ́ wɑɑng byëlø, wɑlɑ̀ köödhø megø yøw, de pɑth ki men-ɑ ógööge ɑ́ thyɑngø." 
1Corinthians15:38 Köödhø menɑni nyii nëngø yi Jwøk ki dël ni kɑ̀ dwɑdde gøn; kɑ köödhø men nyi mëgge dële kì wɑ̈ye. 
1Corinthians15:39 O dëlli gïg-ɑ nëënø bënn pɑ pɑ̈r; dhɑnhø yïe dɑ dële, o lɑ̈y yïe dɑ dële; o winyø yïe dɑ dële; o rëjø yïe dɑ dële." 
1Corinthians15:40 O gïg-ɑ yij mɑl dɑ dëlli gen, o gïg-ɑ kömi piny dɑ dëlli gen thyew. Myër-ɑ myër gïg-ɑ mɑl, bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki myër-ɑ myër gïg-ɑ piny." 
1Corinthians15:41 Cɑ̈ng yïe dɑ myëre; o dwɑ̈y yïe dɑ myëre; o kyell yï gen dɑ myëri gen; o myëri kyelï, bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki myëri kyel-ɑ kyeelø." 
1Corinthians15:42 Bene kër-ɑ óbëëde ɑnɑn, keny-ɑ ódhwödh tyëngthøø. Dël nyi kony e thøø; o ódhwödh e pɑth ki gïnthøw." 
1Corinthians15:43 Nyi kony ɑ́ óngwɑny, o nyøødh; de ódhwödh e myëër, o teeg." 
1Corinthians15:44 Kony ɑ́ dëël dhɑnhø, de ódhwödh ɑ́ wëy." 
1Corinthians15:45 Mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Adɑm mi tyeli mɑl ɑ́cwɑ̈j ɑ́ gïn nëënø,” de Adɑm men-ɑ cyɑ̈n bɑ Wëy me muuj nënnì." 
1Corinthians15:46 Pɑth ki men-ɑ bɑ Wëy ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki bëënø, dɑ́ men-ɑ bɑ dhɑnhø, o men-ɑ bɑ Wëy ɑ́bï-ɑ bɑnge." 
1Corinthians15:47 Ngeti tyeli mɑl bɑ mi kömi piny, men-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j ki lɑ̈bø, de ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́bï kì cyɑ̈n ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yij mɑl." 
1Corinthians15:48 Møg-ɑ bɑ jii kömi piny, nɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j ki lɑ̈bø; o jii mɑl, nɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́bï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yij mɑl." 
1Corinthians15:49 O ni kɑ̀ rug wɑ ngïji jɑl-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j ki lɑ̈bø, ngïji Jɑl-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yij mɑl ólony yi wɑ ki rugø." 
1Corinthians15:50 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ kinni, Pödhi Jwøk pɑ yod yi gïn-ɑ bɑ rïngø kí remø; gïn-ɑ nyi thøw pɑ cuggi lɑgi keny-ɑ yije bong thøø." 
1Corinthians15:51 Lïngu kwøbb-ɑ dyër møg-ɑ bɑ ɑkɑnn; wɑ koo thøw wɑ bënn; de wɑ óceg-ɑ riee ki wilø wɑ bënn, kì bøli kej ɑ́kyel, wïj ɑ́kyel ni kenyi i wɑng yïp. Mɑ́ keny-ɑ ókoodh kɑng, tyëngthøø ótug mɑl, o ge pɑ thøw këti, o bëëdee ówil wɑ bënn." 
1Corinthians15:52  
1Corinthians15:53 Mɑ́ gïn nyi thøw ceg kɑ løgø ɑ́ gïn pɑ thøw. 
1Corinthians15:54 Keny-ɑ ócwöb møgɑni, kɑ gïn-ɑ nyi thøw løg ɑ́ gïn pɑ thøw, kwøbbi wɑ̈nyi kwërø ceg-ɑ pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen kinni, “Thøø ɑ́tyɑm ki mendwøng!”" 
1Corinthians15:55 “Yïn ɑ thøø, tyɑ̈mí ying-ɑ keny? Wɑlɑ̀ ɑdïmí men-ɑ dhøge di sïm ying-ɑ keny?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Thøø teg-ɑ bɑng orøg, o orøg teg-ɑ bɑng Ciggi Mosɑ̀." 
1Corinthians15:57 De pwøj wɑ Jwøk, ɑ nyi wëggi wɑ tyɑ̈mø kì ri Wë Yëso Mesiy." 
1Corinthians15:58 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, bëëd wun pëthi wun teeg. Kɑ wu ko nyi døøg cyɑ̈n. De nyi göög wun ki gwøøg Wë ki mendwøng, mɑ́ wu ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, gwøngɑni pɑ gɑ̈g." 
1Corinthians16:1 Gwøg wun møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Gɑlɑthiyɑ̀ kipe gïg-ɑ nyi muuj jii Jwøk kì Yeudiyɑ̀. Møgɑni bɑ kinni, kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi Jwøk bënn, dhɑnhø kì kelli wun nyi cïbe piny kì ri jɑmm-ɑ nyi yod yi en." 
1Corinthians16:2 Kɑ gï kore kidøøj, kipe kinni o óbongii ngɑn-ɑ ópïd ki cøng këti keny-ɑ óbëënɑ." 
1Corinthians16:3 Keny-ɑ ówɑ̈nhɑ, ji-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi wun kipe kïdhi jɑmmɑni Yerusɑlem, ógwëdɑ ki wɑ̈nyø, o jɑmm-ɑ muuj yi wun ki medi pëthi wun ókɑ̈l yi gen." 
1Corinthians16:4 Keløg e óbëëd ɑ dï, wø ókedh ki gen." 
1Corinthians16:5 De wu ókëëm yi yɑn keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ Mɑkdöniyɑ̀, mɑ́ yɑ ókedhi kunɑni." 
1Corinthians16:6 Yɑ óbëëdø kì buti wun gïti wuudø mɑwɑnø, kipe kinni o yɑ óyïddɑ ki tyëng-ɑ ólwøøg yɑn keny-ɑ ókedhɑ." 
1Corinthians16:7 Yɑ pɑ dwɑddi kinni, o yɑ pöödhɑ yɑ cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ mɑl, de yɑ orumø kinni, yɑ ókɑl bëëdø kì buti wun, ke dwɑddii yi Jwøk." 
1Corinthians16:8 Yɑ óbëëdø kì Epɑsos keny, gïti kwëër cyɑ̈ng-ɑ Pyɑ̈r Ábïj." 
1Corinthians16:9 Mɑ́ yöö ɑ́yieb yi Jwøk kipe kinni o yɑ yïddɑ ki keny tyëgɑ gwøg men-ɑ pere teg. De tyëng-ɑ tyëddi yɑn gïïr cɑrø kì keny. 
1Corinthians16:10 Keny-ɑ ówɑ̈nhi Timøthì yï wun, kɑ ókøny wun, o cöge e bong gïn jɑ̈ddii, mɑ́ e gögg-ɑ Wë ni yɑn." 
1Corinthians16:11 Ko di ngɑn wøyii, de kønyu en ceth, o wele tyëg yi en ki mër; o ódwööge yï wøn; mɑ́ yɑ ónenni yöö kipere ceth wøki nyiimïee." 
1Corinthians16:12 Apøløs ómïee ɑ́kwɑjji yi yɑn ki mendwøng kipe kinni, o di bëe be këëmi wun geki kwï tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, de ɑ́kyëëd, cem e pɑ dwɑddi bëën yï wun ɑnɑn, de óbï keløg wïje ólɑ̈nyi." 
1Corinthians16:13 Nyi koru ri wun kidøøj. Nyi bëëd wun kì ri kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi wun. Nyi göög wun ki tegi pëthi wun, kɑ wu bëëd wu teeg ceth." 
1Corinthians16:14 Nyi gwøøg jɑmmì bënn ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø. 
1Corinthians16:15 Anɑn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni bene gøl Istïpen ɑ ɑ́kwöngi yïëyø kì Akɑiyɑ̀, o bɑ gen ɑ ɑ́muuj ri gen gɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø kipe jii Jwøk." 
1Corinthians16:16 O gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn kì yï wun bɑ kinni, o wu yïëy wun jɑɑgø yi ji-ɑ ni møgɑni geki ji-ɑ nyi göögø kyeel ki wun, keløg ge nyii göögø ki gwøng teg." 
1Corinthians16:17 Pyëwɑ med ki bëëni Istïpen, kí Pørtunɑtøs, kí Akɑikøs; mɑ́ ge ɑ́coolɑ’ kɑ̈jji wun, kɑ̀ tøøk wun," 
1Corinthians16:18 o wɑngɑ ɑ́tëngi kɑ ɑ́bëën gen, ni kenyi tëngi nyingi wun kenyi bëën gen yï wun. Nyi wør wun tyëng-ɑ ni møgɑni kidøøj." 
1Corinthians16:19 Wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Ásiyɑ̀. Ki nyingi Wë; wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi Akïlɑ̀ geki Priskilɑ̀ ki mendwøng, kí tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ møg-ɑ nyi cugi kì gøl gen." 
1Corinthians16:20 O wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi nyiimïee bënn thyew. Kɑ ri wun mɑ̈dh wun kidøøj. 
1Corinthians16:21 Møg ɑ́gwed-ɑ yi yɑn ki cingɑ kinni: 
1Corinthians16:22 Ngɑn pɑ mɑɑr Wë, ree dɑ cyën! Mɑrɑnɑ thɑ̀ – Bïí, yïn ɑ Wïi wøn!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Wiy dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk yinge kömi wun. 
1Corinthians16:24 Kɑ wiy mɑ̈ɑ̈dø miɑ óbëëde kì kömi wun bënn, kì ri Yëso Mesiy." 
2Corinthians1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Pøøl, ngeti wööni Yëso Mesiy, geki Timøthì ómïee, kì bɑng møg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi Jwøk. Ge gwëd-ɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Körintøs geki jii Jwøk møg-ɑ ying Akɑiyɑ̀ bënn." 
2Corinthians1:2 Wiy dhwɑ̈ng geki mër, møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk Wïyee geki Wë Yëso Mesiy ying gen kömi wun." 
2Corinthians1:3 Pwøj wɑ Jwøk, Wïyi Wë Yëso Mesiy, eni Wïy-ɑ pyëwe nyi jwɑn lɑ̈ɑ̈mø; Jwøng-ɑ nyi kunyi." 
2Corinthians1:4 Mɑ́ en ɑ nyi køny wøn ki ɑkørr-ɑ nyi bï kömi wøn bënn, o wø ólony wøn tyëngmøøgø ki cïjø, kí teng-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wøn yi Jwøk." 
2Corinthians1:5 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ rɑngi wøn ki mendwøng kì ri nyingi Mesiy kinøw, pëthi wøn ómɑg yi en ki mendwøng thyew." 
2Corinthians1:6 Keløg wø yïddø ki orɑng, orɑngɑni bɑ kipe kinni, o nyingi wun tëngi gen, o wu óyiel. Keløg wø okønyø, kunyɑni bɑ kipe kønyi wun, o wu óyïddi wun ki tegø men ngïïn wun ki orɑng." 
2Corinthians1:7 Wu ceg kɑ gɑ̈nø yi wøn ceth, mɑ́ wø ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, wu ɑ́rɑngi kyeel ki wøn, o wu bɑ møg-ɑ ókøny kyeel ki wøn ceth." 
2Corinthians1:8 Wø dwɑdd-ɑ pɑ̈ddi wun, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, ki orɑng-ɑ ɑ́yod yi wøn kì Ásiyɑ̀. Akørr-ɑ ɑ́bï kömi wøn døngø ki mendwøng, kɑ wø orumø kinni lɑ̈w ke lɑ̈ɑ̈ny wëyi wøn kì kömi piny." 
2Corinthians1:9 Kidyër, wø ɑ́rum kinni, thøø ɑ́bï kömi wøn ceth. De møgɑni ɑ́bï kɑ per kinni, o wø cög wø pɑ ngɑ̈dhi tegi wøn, dɑ́ kinni o wø óngɑ̈dh wøn ngɑn-ɑ nyi tug tyëngthøø." 
2Corinthians1:10 Wø ɑ́yiel yi en kì dhø thøø, o wø ócige yielø ki gøn. Awøø, ongɑ̈dhø yi wøn ceth kinni wø ócige yielø." 
2Corinthians1:11 De kwɑjju Jwøk kiper wøn, mɑ́ keny-ɑ ógyëëdh wøn yi Jwøk kipe kwɑ̈jji ji mø gïïr, Jwøk ópwøj yi ji mø gïïr kiper wøn." 
2Corinthians1:12 Wø ceg-ɑ köthi wøn ki pwödø, mɑ́ e ɑ́yod yi wøn ki pëthi wøn kinni, bong gïn cɑy kì ri bëëdi wøn kì kelli teedø geki kelli wun. Mɑ́ wø ɑ́bëëd kɑ tɑri pëëth, wø mïdh-ɑ bëën-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk, kì bɑng dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk; de pɑth ki peli wïj dhɑnhø." 
2Corinthians1:13 Møg-ɑ gwëdi wun yi wøn, bɑ møg-ɑ cuggi rɑngø yi wun, kɑ gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen yod yi wun. Cɑgg kwøbbi wøn bënn nuti gɑmø yi wɑ̈thi wun ɑnɑn, yïɑ dɑ gɑ̈nø kinni ge bɑ møg-ɑ ógɑm yi wɑ̈thi wun ceth, kipe kinni o köthi wun ópwöd yi wun kiper wøn kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë, ni keny-ɑ ópwöd wøn köthi wøn kiper wun." 
2Corinthians1:14  
2Corinthians1:15 Møgɑni ɑ́rømmɑ ceth kinni ge ócuggi, bene ɑ kööbɑ kinni wun ɑ ókwøng yi yɑn ki këëmø, kipe kinni o wu óyïddi wun ki gyëdh tyel ɑ́ryew." 
2Corinthians1:16 Mɑ́ yɑ ótöngi yï wun keny-ɑ óbëënɑ yɑ kedh-ɑ Mɑkdöniyɑ̀, o yɑ ócigi töngi yï wun keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ, o yɑ óyïddɑ kì yï wun ki gïn kønyɑ riɑ ki weli Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Corinthians1:17 Kɑ̀ kööbɑ ki kwøbbi bëën yï wun, wu orumø kinni yɑ ceg-ɑ wun ki nɑ̈nø? Wɑlɑ̀ wu orumø kinni, yɑ bɑ ngɑn nyi wɑ̈dhi kwøbbɑ ki wilø yøw, men-ɑ nyi kööbø kinni, “Ngee, ngee” kí “Pɑth, pɑth” kì wïj ɑ́kyel?" 
2Corinthians1:18 De ɑnɑn, kwøbbɑ pɑ nyi wɑ̈dhi wilø yøw, mɑ́ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ myër ki ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
2Corinthians1:19 O kwøbbi Yëso Mesiy Wɑ̈d Jwøk møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi yi yɑn wøki Silɑ̀, kí Timøthì, pɑ nyi wil thyew." 
2Corinthians1:20 Mɑ́ kwëng bënn møg-ɑ kwëng yi Jwøk kinni, ge bɑ dyër ceth, nyi pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen kì bɑng kwøbbi Mesiy; o bene ɑ bɑnge nyi lenhi wɑ Jwøk. Kɑ wɑ nyii kööbø kinni, “Amen.”" 
2Corinthians1:21 De bɑ Jwøk kiree ɑ ɑ́yieny wɑ, kɑ wɑ reb yi en kì ri Mesiy." 
2Corinthians1:22 Kɑ Wëykwërø nyi kedh-ɑ pëthee ɑ́ ngïji men nyodh kinni, wɑ bɑ jie, o wɑ bëëd ɑ ree." 
2Corinthians1:23 Anɑn, gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́cögɑ yɑ pɑ bï Körintøs ngɑ̈nyi yi Jwøk; o bɑ kinni, keløg yɑ di bï, wu di yïddi ki kwøb mø teg. De keløg møg-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn pɑth ki dyër, wiy yɑ ócɑy yi Jwøk." 
2Corinthians1:24 Wu ko nyi rum kinni, wu ceg yi wøn kɑ cirø kì kömi yïëyi wun. Mɑ́ wø ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, yïëyi wun teeg. De wø dwɑdd-ɑ kinni göög wɑ kyeel kipe medi pëthi wun bënn." 
2Corinthians2:1 Bene ɑ bɑnge kööbɑ kinni yɑ pɑ bï yï wun; mɑ́ keløg yɑ di bï yï wun ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ, wu di göjjɑ kïïmø ki mendwøng." 
2Corinthians2:2 Mɑ́ keløg pëthi wun di wëggɑ rënyø, ɑ́ wun ɑ yï wun nyi yïddɑ ki kwøbb-ɑ nyi mïni pyëwɑ, yɑ di yïd ɑ keny ki medi pyëw?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed yi yɑn kì yij wɑ̈nyi tyeli mɑl, ɑ́gwed yi yɑn kinøw kipe kinni o keny-ɑ óbëënɑ yï wun, o yɑ cögɑ yɑ pɑ yïddi ki rɑ̈ji pyëw ki yï wun, wun ɑ ji-ɑ di wëggi pyëwɑ mïnø. Mɑ́ yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw ki mendwøng kinni, gïn-ɑ mïni pyëwɑ bɑ gïn-ɑ mïni pëthi wun thyew." 
2Corinthians2:4 Wu ɑ́gwëdi yi yɑn e pï nyingɑ ómullø, o yijɑ óywöngø, o pyëwɑ orɑ̈mø ki mendwøng. Yɑ nuti dwɑdd-ɑ rënyi pëthi wun, de yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑrɑ wun bënn yod yi wun." 
2Corinthians2:5 De keløg e dɑ ngɑn göögø ki gïnrɑj, pɑth ki yɑ ketɑ ɑ ɑ́wëgge kïïmø, de kwï ji møøgø kì kelli wun pëthi gen ɑ́rɑ̈ɑ̈m thyew. (Møgɑni kwøb yi yɑn kɑ per kɑ̀ pɑ dwɑddɑ cɑyi ngɑnɑni ki cɑy mø teg.)" 
2Corinthians2:6 De ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kwøbbɑni, kɑ ɑ́rume cɑyø yi ji-ɑ ngenyø kì kɑnïsɑ̀ men-ɑ yije di wun, pɑ myëër ki cɑyø këti." 
2Corinthians2:7 Lɑ̈w keløg pëthi wun ólɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki en kipe kinni o wïje cöge e pɑ ti lɑ̈ɑ̈yø. 
2Corinthians2:8 De yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun ki mendwøng kinni, nyudhu ngɑnɑni kinni mɑɑr yi wun kidyër." 
2Corinthians2:9 Wɑ̈nyɑni ɑ́gwëdɑ wun kɑ per kinni o lidh yi yɑn ying kwøbbɑ bënn nyii yïëyø yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ ge pɑ nyi yïëy yi wun." 
2Corinthians2:10 Kenyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m pëthi wun ki dhɑnhø me gwøøg bɑ̈jjø, pyëwɑ ceg-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki en thyew. Mɑ́ kenyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwɑ, pyëwɑ pɑ nyi nudd e dɑ gøølø, møgɑni gwøg yi yɑn ɑnɑn kì bøli Mesiy kɑ per wun." 
2Corinthians2:11 Kipe wɑ ótyɑm yi Cethɑn, e gïg-ɑ kömi gïn ködde ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ." 
2Corinthians2:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhɑ Torwɑs, be pwönyi Wöndøj mi Mesiy, kɑ yodɑ kinni yöö bɑ ɑyieb yi Wë kipe gwøg kì kenyɑni." 
2Corinthians2:13 De yɑ ɑ́bëëd pyëwɑ olïngø kipe kɑ̀ nuti yood yɑn ómïee Tïtø. Codhe, ɑmɑ̈dhɑ ji-ɑ kenyɑni, kɑ yɑ pödh-ɑ Mɑkdöniyɑ̀." 
2Corinthians2:14 Pwøj wɑ Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ pyejji wɑ kì yij yɑɑy tyɑ̈me kì ri Mesiy, kɑ wɑ gwøge wɑ bɑ tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈lli Wööni Mesiy; kɑ wöönɑni otɑyø, eni wöön-ɑ yøme med ni bɑkur." 
2Corinthians2:15 Mɑ́ wɑ nɑ bɑkur-ɑ yøme med, men-ɑ mëggi Jwøk yi Mesiy, men-ɑ medi yøme ótɑɑy kelli tyëng-ɑ óyiel geki tyëng-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
2Corinthians2:16 Bɑ gïjø me yøme nɑ̈gø kì yï tyëng-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny; o bɑ yømø me yïëdø kì yï tyëng-ɑ óyiel. 
2Corinthians2:17 Wø pɑ ni tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈lli kwøbbi Jwøk, ge nɑ gïg ceg yi gen ki ngyewø; de wø kømm-ɑ dyër, wøn ɑ́ bɑ̈nggi Mesiy, mɑ́ wø ɑ́ör-ɑ yi Jwøk." 
2Corinthians3:1 Anɑn, wu orumø kinni wø ceg-ɑ ri wøn ki tïng mɑl? Wɑlɑ̀ wu orumø kinni wø dwɑdd-ɑ gwëdø yi wun ki wɑ̈jji pwøj møg kɑ̈lli yi wøn, ni tyëng-ɑ kyeelø, wɑlɑ̀ wøn ɑ gwëdi wun?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Wun kì ri wun, ɑ kɑ̈lli yi wøn wun ɑ́ wɑ̈nyi pwøj, me bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi minni wøn, ɑ́ men rɑng yi ji bënn." 
2Corinthians3:3 Ceg-ɑ nënnø ceth kinni bɑ Mesiy ɑ ɑ́gwed wɑ̈nyɑni, ɑöre wøn be kɑ̈lii. Pɑth ki ɑgwed ki kïdø men-ɑ gweed wɑ̈nyø, de ógwedø kɑ Wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø; o nuti gweed-ɑ kömi ópɑddi kïttì, de ógweed-ɑ kömi minni ji." 
2Corinthians3:4 Møgɑni kwøb yi wøn kɑ per kɑ̀ ngɑ̈dh wøn Jwøk kì ri Mesiy. 
2Corinthians3:5 Bong gïn wëggi wøn kwøb kinni gwøngɑni ócuggø lwɑ̈ngø yi wøn ki gwøgø ki tegi wøn. De teng-ɑ cuggi wøn ki gwøg kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk; 
2Corinthians3:6 bɑ en ɑ ɑ́nëngi wøn ki tegø men-ɑ cuggi wøn ki gwøg kipe lwöm-ɑ nyɑ̈n, o lwömɑni pɑth ki cigg mø bɑ ɑgwed, de ciggɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri Wëy. Cigg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ thøø, de Wëy nyi muuj-ɑ nënnì." 
2Corinthians3:7 Cigg ɑ́gweed-ɑ kömi ópɑddi kït, kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøk ocwöbø keny-ɑ ɑ́muuj gen. Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil obwøgø ki nenni yï Mosɑ̀, mɑ́ lele ɑ́bëëd e omënyø. Keløg Cigg-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l thøø keny-ɑ ócɑ̈gi gen ki gwøg, bï kɑ mɑ̈r me dwøng kinnï;" 
2Corinthians3:8 döngi mɑ̈ɑ̈r gwøøg Wëy óbëëd ɑ dï? 
2Corinthians3:9 Keløg Cigg-ɑ bɑng gen ɑ́cɑɑy ji ki thøø keny-ɑ ópyeem gen, bï kɑ mɑ̈r; mɑ̈ɑ̈r gwøng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yielø óbëëdø e dwøng ni ngø!" 
2Corinthians3:10 Mɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e dwøng kɑ̈ge dööng, ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì bɑng døøji mɑ̈r men-ɑ lodii ɑnɑn." 
2Corinthians3:11 Keløg men-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny ree dɑ mɑ̈r; mɑ̈ɑ̈r men-ɑ óbëëdø gïti ɑtheer óbëëd ɑ dï? 
2Corinthians3:12 Wø pɑ böggi, kì bɑng kɑ̀ di yï wøn ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
2Corinthians3:13 Wø pɑ ni Mosɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́bëëd e nyi kum-ɑ lele ki thɑrɑ̀, kipe mɑ̈r-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny men-ɑ ɑ́mëëny kì lele ólidh yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
2Corinthians3:14 Ge ɑ́bëëd rummi gen bɑ ɑkum, o pïd dicyɑ̈ngtïn, rummi gen nudd gɑ ɑkum yi thɑrɑ̀ menɑni, kenyi rɑng gen wɑ̈jji lwöm-ɑ weenø. Thɑrɑ̀ menɑni nyiig ɑ keny-ɑ órëbi dhɑnhø ki Mesiy." 
2Corinthians3:15 Pïd dicyɑ̈ngtïn, kenyi rɑɑng Ciggi Mosɑ̀ yi gen, rummi gen nyii kumø yi thɑrɑni." 
2Corinthians3:16 De thɑrɑni ócuggø kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g, ni kɑ ógwedii kì ri Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Mosɑ̀ kenyi kedhe be kwøb geki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, thɑrɑ̀ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈le’ wɑ̈g kì wïje.”" 
2Corinthians3:17 “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j” ɑ ógwedø ɑ́ Wëy kì keny, o keny-ɑ di Wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, dɑ tɑ̈bbø." 
2Corinthians3:18 Wɑ bënn, nyodh wɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøk ki wɑ̈ɑ̈th mø pɑth ki ɑkum, o mɑ̈r-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Wë, ɑ bɑ Wëy, wɑ løge ngïje, me ree di mɑ̈r me pëddi döng." 
2Corinthians4:1 Gwøøng ɑ́mëggi wøn-ɑ yi Jwøk kì bɑng lɑ̈mpyëwe, o ceg kɑ gwøgø yi wøn ceth, wø pɑ lyebbi." 
2Corinthians4:2 Gïgrijjø møg-ɑ nyi gøggi kì gødd geki bëën-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ni ki ɑyɑ̈r, ge ɑ́wiy yi wøn; wø pɑ göögø ki wëënyø, o kwøbbi Jwøk pɑ nyi løg wøn kwøbbi pyed; de wø nyi nyodh-ɑ dyër kì bøli Jwøk, o per wøn tënge kì yï dhɑnhø men-ɑ pyëwe nud." 
2Corinthians4:3 Keløg Wöndøj men-ɑ pwönyi yi wøn bɑ ɑkum; bɑ ɑkum kì yï tyëng-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø. 
2Corinthians4:4 Ge pɑ yïëy, mɑ́ rummi gen mïdh ɑ yij muudhø yi jwøng-ɑ rɑj, jwøøg kömi piny men. Gï mɑ̈ɑ̈ne’ lidhi cɑr e omënyø kì kömi gen, eni cɑr-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri Wöndøj men-ɑ kööbø kì ri dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Mesiy, ɑ ceg bëëdø ɑ́ ngïji Jwøk."
