2Corinthians4:5 Wø pɑ pwöny-ɑ per wøn; de wø pwöny-ɑ per Yëso Mesiy, ɑ bɑ Wë; o wø bɑ bɑ̈nggi wun kiper Mesiy." 
2Corinthians4:6 O Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, “Cɑr ómënyø kì yij muudhø!” Bene Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́wëggi cɑre meny kì yethi pëthee, o wɑ muuje mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøk men-ɑ mënyø kì leli Mesiy." 
2Corinthians4:7 Wøn ɑ kɑ̈lli kɑ̈ɑ̈r Wëy, wø pɑ̈r ki puggi lɑ̈b yøw, men nyodh kinni, teng-ɑ dwøng menɑni bɑ mi Jwøk; pɑth ki mi wøn." 
2Corinthians4:8 Kömi wøn nyii bëënø yi ɑkørr, de wø nuti torø yi ɑkørrɑni; yethi wøn nyii pyërø tyel møøgø, de wø nuti lëngi piny." 
2Corinthians4:9 Nyingi wøn oguudø yi ji, de wø nuti wiy piny yi Jwøk; wø nyi pwööd-ɑ piny, de wø nuti thøø." 
2Corinthians4:10 Wø kɑ̈ll-ɑ orɑɑng thøwi Yëso Mesiy kì dëlli wøn, dëll-ɑ óthøw, kipe kinni o nënne ólidh kì dëlli wøn." 
2Corinthians4:11 Kì yij bëëdi wøn bëne, wø nyi køm-ɑ nɑ̈gø kiper nyingi Yëso, o nënne ólidh kì ri dëlli wøn, dëll-ɑ óthøw." 
2Corinthians4:12 Menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni thøø göög ɑ ri wøn, de nënnì göög ɑ ri wun." 
2Corinthians4:13 Wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́kööb kɑ per kɑ ɑ́yïëyɑ.” O wøn thyew ki wëyi yïëyø menɑni, wø ceg-ɑ kwøb kipe kɑ ɑ́yïëy wøn." 
2Corinthians4:14 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́tug Wë Yëso kì yij thøø, wø ótug yi en thyew, kɑ wø kɑ̈l yi en, wøki wun, wɑ kïdhe’ bute." 
2Corinthians4:15 Møgɑni bënn bɑ kiper wun; o keny-ɑ ókedh dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk e wɑ̈dh-ɑ yï ji mø ngenyø, kwɑnni tyëng-ɑ mɑlli Jwøk ki mɑ́li pwøj óngënyi kɑ Jwøk lejji." 
2Corinthians4:16 Cɑgg dëlli wøn kedh ge órënyø, pëthi wøn pɑ nyönhi; o cɑgg dëlli wøn cyɑ̈ngø ki thøø, wëy ceg-ɑ pëddø ki wööbø yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
2Corinthians4:17 Orɑng-ɑ yije di wøn ki kɑɑm-ɑ nøg èn, gwir-ɑ wøn kipe yodi dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ dwøng men-ɑ óbëëdø gïti ɑtheer." 
2Corinthians4:18 Mɑ́ wø pɑ nenn-ɑ gïg-ɑ nyi lidh yi wɑ ki nyingee, de nyingi wøn tööd-ɑ ri gïg pɑ nënni. Gïn-ɑ lidh ki wɑng nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, de gïn-ɑ pɑ nënni nyii bëëdø gïti ɑtheer." 
2Corinthians5:1 Mɑ́ wø ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni keløg kemɑ̀ mi wøn kì piny keny, ɑ løg dëlli wøn ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, yï wøn dɑ ød me nuti gerø kɑ cing kì mɑl, ød me pɑ nyi pɑ̈ɑ̈dh." 
2Corinthians5:2 Kɑ̀ bëëd wøn ɑnɑn, pëthi wøn okønø ki bëëdø kì yij øn-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl." 
2Corinthians5:3 De møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni, kɑ̀ yïddi wëyi wøn ki kɑ̈jj mø bëëd yi gen, pɑ̈r ki kinni, ge órugø ki ógudh mø nyɑ̈n." 
2Corinthians5:4 Wø torø torø yi kɑ̀ nudd wø rug-ɑ dëlli kömi piny; pɑth ki kinni wø dwɑdd-ɑ bëën wɑ̈g kì yethi dëllɑni, dɑ́ kinni wø dwɑdd-ɑ lønyi dëlli wøn møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl, kömi dëllì mø piny, o dël-ɑ bëëdø ɑ́ men thøw kì ri wøn, mwøøny yi nënnì." 
2Corinthians5:5 Bɑ Jwøk ɑ ɑ́gwir wøn kipe møgɑni, kɑ wø nënge ki wëy." 
2Corinthians5:6 Bene ɑ bɑnge bëëd yï wøn dɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø me dwøng, o wø ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni wø lɑ̈wi ki Wë, kɑ̀ nudd wø rug-ɑ dël men." 
2Corinthians5:7 Mɑ́ wø cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi yïëyø mi wøn, de wø pɑ lug-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng gïg-ɑ nenni yi wøn." 
2Corinthians5:8 Pëthi wøn teeg, o lɑ̈w bëëni wøn wɑ̈g kì yij dël-ɑ rug yi wøn ɑnɑn, o wø kedhi wøn be bëëdø kì buti Wë." 
2Corinthians5:9 De cɑgg wëyi wøn ying buti Wë, wɑlɑ̀ ge tøøk, gïn-ɑ köme köddi yi wøn bɑ gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Wë." 
2Corinthians5:10 Wɑ bënn, wɑ óying bøli Mesiy, keny-ɑ óbëëne kömi piny be lidhi gønyy. O dhɑnhø bëne gønye ólidh kì bɑng gïgdøj wɑlɑ̀ gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gwøøg en kì kömi piny keny." 
2Corinthians5:11 Gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi wøri Wë ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn, bene ɑ bɑnge dyej wøn tyëng-ɑ kyeelø kinni yïëy gen. Wø ngɑ̈nyi yi Jwøk ki mendwøng, o yɑ gɑ̈n yɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi wun ki pëthi wun thyew." 
2Corinthians5:12 Wø pɑ dwɑddi pwøji ri wøn kì bøli wun, de wø dwɑdd-ɑ thödhi wun ki yöö men pwöd wun köthi wun kiper wøn, o wu óyïddi wun ki møg-ɑ óløøg wun kwøbbi tyëng-ɑ nyi lejji døøji dëël dhɑnhø, e pɑth ki gïg-ɑ pyëwe." 
2Corinthians5:13 Keløg wɑ̈thi wøn dɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gø, bɑ kiper Jwøk. O keløg wɑ̈thi wøn nud, bɑ kiper wun." 
2Corinthians5:14 Wø jɑɑg-ɑ yi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi Mesiy, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́yodii yi wøn kinni, dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel ɑ́thøw kɑ per ji bënn; wɑng-ɑ kinni thøwe ɑ́nywɑg yi ji bënn." 
2Corinthians5:15 Áthøw kɑ per ji bënn, kipe kinni o tyëng-ɑ nëënø bëëd ge pɑ nëënø kɑ per cwɑggi gen, de ge nëënø kɑ per ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thøw kɑ odhwödhø kì yij thøø kiper gen." 
2Corinthians5:16 Bëëdi dhɑnhø pɑ yod yi wøn ɑ ri kër-ɑ nënni dële këti. Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́nenni wøn bëëdi Mesiy kì ri dële cøn, wø pɑ göögø kinøw këti." 
2Corinthians5:17 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́rëbi ki Mesiy, bɑ dhɑnhø me nyɑ̈n; dhɑnhi cøn ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, dɑ́ dhɑnh-ɑ nyɑ̈n ɑ nud." 
2Corinthians5:18 Møgɑni bënn gwøg-ɑ yi Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg wɑ, wɑ mër ki en kì ri Mesiy; kɑ wø mëgge gwøøg løgi ji mø mër ki en." 
2Corinthians5:19 Wöön-ɑ kɑ̈lli yi wøn bɑ kinni, Jwøk dhɑnhø bëne løge’ me mër ki en kì ri Mesiy. Kerri orøøg gen nuti mïdhø yi Jwøk, o wø ɑ́mëgge kɑ̈lli wöön-ɑ nyudhi ji kër-ɑ løge gïn mø mër ki en." 
2Corinthians5:20 Wø cyɑ̈dhi wøn ɑ́ kej Mesiy, o wø kööbø e dhɑ̈y nɑ Jwøk kiree ɑ kööbø ki lebbi wøn; kɑ wø mëgge kɑ̈lli kwøbbi rëbi ji ki Jwøk." 
2Corinthians5:21 Mesiy bong orøg mɑ ɑ́gwøge, de ɑ́gwøg e nɑ ngetorøg yi Jwøk kipe kinni o wɑ bëëd wɑ tir." 
2Corinthians6:1 Kì yij gwøøg wøn kì kej ɑ́kyel ki Jwøk, wø kwɑjj-ɑ wun, wu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïddi ki dhwɑ̈ng kì yï Jwøk, kinni dhwɑ̈ngɑni ko wëggu gɑ̈ɑ̈gø." 
2Corinthians6:2 Lïngu møg-ɑ kømmi yi Jwøk kinni, “Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddɑ kønyi wun, kɑ kwɑ̈jji wun lïngɑ Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi cyɑ̈ng-ɑ kønyɑ wun, kɑ wu køny yi yɑn.” Lïng wun! Men bene bøli keny-ɑ kunyi Jwøk; bene cyɑ̈ng-ɑ yïëde èn!" 
2Corinthians6:3 De keløg gïg-ɑ di gwøg yi wøn bɑ gïg-ɑ di mɑ̈ɑ̈n dhɑnhø kɑ̈li yuu Jwøk, gïgɑni pɑ gwøg yi wøn kinni tek. Møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni, o gwøg men-ɑ gwøg yi wøn kipe Jwøk cöge e pɑ cɑy yi ji møøgø." 
2Corinthians6:4 Ri wøn nyii nyodhø yi wøn kì ri gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wøn bënn kinni, wø gögg-ɑ Jwøk, kenyi ngïïn wøn ki ɑkørr, kí jɑdø, kí gïg dhɑ̈li," 
2Corinthians6:5 kí pwödø, kí mɑgø, kí orɑng, kí pïdø, kí dhɑ̈lø nenø, kí ngïnø kɑ̈j." 
2Corinthians6:6 Ri wøn ɑ́nyodh wøn kinni wø bɑ bɑ̈nggi Jwøk ki bëëdi wøn wø dhïw, geki dïdø, kí ngïïnø, kí tɑri pyëw, kí bëëdi kwër, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ dyër," 
2Corinthians6:7 kí kwøbb-ɑ dyër geki tegi Jwøk. Bëëntir ɑ bɑ tøøng wøn, en ɑ këëd wøn, o en ɑ nyɑg wøn ri wøn." 
2Corinthians6:8 Wø nyii lenhø, kɑ wø nyi benyi; wø nyii kwɑ̈dhhø kɑ wø nyi pøjji; wø cwølli wøn ɑ́ tyëngpyed, ngö wø kømm-ɑ dyër;" 
2Corinthians6:9 wø nɑ ji mø kwïj, ngö wø ngɑ̈nyi yi ji bënn; wø nɑ tyëngthøø, de wø onëënø ni kɑ̀ nennu wøn. Wø ɑ́pwööd piny, o wø nuti thøø;" 
2Corinthians6:10 cɑgg wø kïïmø, pëthi wøn nyi bëëd ge med thyew; wø nënni nyingi wøn cɑn, de ji mø gïïr nyi løg wø’ tyëngkɑ̈rì; wø nënni e bong gïn nud kì yï wøn, de jɑmmì bënn nud kì yï wøn." 
2Corinthians6:11 Wun ɑ tyëng Körintøs, wø ɑ́kööb ki wun kɑ tɑri pëthi wøn, o bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́cög e nuti köbbi wun yi wøn." 
2Corinthians6:12 Pëthi wøn nuti rënyø ki kwøbbi wun, dɑ́ wun ɑ pëthi wun ɑ́rënyi ki kwøbbi wøn." 
2Corinthians6:13 Wu köbbi yi yɑn wu nɑ nyigɑ; dwɑddu kwøbbi wøn, ni kɑ̀ dwɑddi wøn kwøbbi wun, kɑ wu bëëd wun pëthi wun tɑr ki wøn thyew." 
2Corinthians6:14 Yɑ ceg-ɑ wun kinni, wu ko nyi rëbi ki tyëng-ɑ pɑ nyi yïëy kwøbbi Jwøk. Mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ yɑb bëëdø ki bëëntir dhɑ̈li rëbø kì kej ɑ́kyel ki tyëng-ɑ nyi yɑb orøg. Cɑr reb-ɑ yi ngø ki muudhø?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Mesiy reb-ɑ yi ngø ki Cethɑn? O ngɑn yïëyø reb-ɑ yi ngø ki ngɑn nuti yïëyø? 
2Corinthians6:16 Kengi Jwøk rëb-ɑ́ɑ̀ ri ngø ki ngïjji jwögg? Wɑ bɑ kengi Jwøk, keng-ɑ nëënø. Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kinni, “Øn-ɑ bëëdɑ óying kelli gen yɑ óbëëdø kì kelli jiɑ; Yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen, o ge óbëëdø gɑ jiɑ.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 Akööb Wë kinni, “Wu ko bëëd kì kelli tyëngɑni; dwöög wun wɑ̈g kì kelli gen, Gïg ywëdhø ko nyi nywɑl wun, o wu yïëyɑ keny-ɑ ódwöög wun köörɑ." 
2Corinthians6:18 Yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Wïyi wun, o wu óbëëdø wun ɑ́ nyigɑ, bene møg-ɑ kømmi yi Wïlɑ̈bø ɑgɑk.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Gïgɑni bënn ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kinni gï ómëgge wɑ yeki nyiimïɑ, de gwir wɑ riee o wɑ göög wɑ, wɑ dhïw, kɑ̀ lɑ̈ɑ̈w wɑ riee ki gïg-ɑ nyi ywëdh dël geki wëy, kɑ wɑ bëëd wɑ, wɑ bɑ ɑkwër, wɑ wør-ɑ Jwøk." 
2Corinthians7:2 Pëthi wun ko rënyi ki wøn. Mɑ́ e bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́göggi yi wøn ki gïnrɑj, wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn mɑ gëe ɑ́kwɑny yi wøn ki wëënyø." 
2Corinthians7:3 Møgɑni pɑ kwøb yi yɑn yɑ cɑy-ɑ wun, o wu ɑ́rum ki köbbø yi yɑn cøn, kinni per wun teeg kì yï wøn, o wɑ óying kej ɑ́kyel ceth, cɑgg wɑ nëënø wɑlɑ̀ wɑ thøø." 
2Corinthians7:4 Wu gɑ̈n yi yɑn ki mendwøng, bene ɑ bɑnge lejjɑ wun. Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd yɑ torø yi ɑkørr, yɑ pɑ böggi, o pyëwɑ med ki mendwøng." 
2Corinthians7:5 Kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi wøn Mɑkdöniyɑ̀, bong keny mɑ ɑ́ywöm wøn dëlli wøn me døøj, mɑ́ wø ɑ́dhing yi ɑkørr kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn; ji møøgø nyii wërø ki wøn, o yethi wøn dɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
2Corinthians7:6 De Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ nyi cïj tyëng-ɑ yethi gen bɑɑrø, wø ɑ́muuje Tïtø." 
2Corinthians7:7 De pɑth ki bëëni Tïtø kete, ɑ ɑ́mïni pëthi wøn, dɑ́ kɑ ɑ́köbbe wøn kwøbbi medi pyëw men-ɑ ɑ́yod yi en kì yï wun, kí kɑ̀ tyeer wun tung-ɑ di wøn." 
2Corinthians7:8 Cɑgg pëthi wun rënyø yi wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́gwëdɑ wun, yɑ pɑ pɑ̈ddi kipe kɑ ɑ́gwedɑ en. Yɑ di pɑ̈ddi kɑ per kɑ ɑ́wëgge pëthi wun rënyø ki nyɑ keny me thiinh." 
2Corinthians7:9 Pyëwɑ omedø ɑnɑn, de pɑth kiper kɑ ɑ́wëggɑ pëthi wun rënyø ɑ med pyëwɑ, dɑ́ kiper kɑ ɑ́wiil bëëdi wun yi rënyi pëthi wun. Rɑ̈ji pyëw menɑni ɑ ɑ́wiil bëëdi wun yi Jwøk; kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́göggi wun yi wøn." 
2Corinthians7:10 Mɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw men-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk, nyii kɑ̈nø yewø kí yieli dhɑnhø, o bong pɑ̈ddø kì ri møgɑni! De rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw men-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l bɑng kwøbbi kömi piny nyii kɑ̈nø ki thøø." 
2Corinthians7:11 Lidhu gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk ki rënyi pëthi wun møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk; rummi wun ɑ́dwöög, kɑ bɑ̈jji wun yod yi wun! Møgɑni wu ɑ́wëggi gen yewø, kí kyeri rɑj, kí bwøgø, kí tyëëdø, kí tyiel, kí cɑyi gwøøg orøg! Kɑ ceg ki nyodhø yi wun ceth kinni yï wun bɑ̈r ki møg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb bënn." 
2Corinthians7:12 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́gwedɑ wɑ̈nyɑni, nuti gweed yɑn kɑ per ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́göög ki bɑ̈jjø, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́göggi ki rɑj; dɑ́ kipe kinni, o teng-ɑ teg per wøn kì yï wun nënne kì bøli Jwøk." 
2Corinthians7:13 Kɑ pëthi wøn ótëngø kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́tëngi pëthi wun. Tëngi pëthi wøn ɑ́rëbi ki medi pyëw men-ɑ ɑ́yod yi Tïtø kì yï wun, mɑ́ e ɑ́køny yi wun, wu bënn kidøøj." 
2Corinthians7:14 Tïtø ɑ́köbbɑ per døøji wun e nuti wɑ̈dhi yï wun, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ en yode gɑ dyër ceth, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëne yï wun. Wø ɑ́wöni wø nyi kømm-ɑ dyër ceth kì ri wun, o pwøny-ɑ nyi pwøøj wun yi wøn ɑ́yod ɑ́ dyër yi Tïtø." 
2Corinthians7:15 Kɑ ceg-ɑ pëddø ki mɑɑri wun, o wïje koo wöl wïlø ki kër-ɑ nyi gwøg wun møg-ɑ nyi köbbe wun bënn, kí wør-ɑ ɑ́wøørii yi wun, e dëlli wun ceg-ɑ okïr kipere." 
2Corinthians7:16 O pyëwɑ med ki gɑ̈nni wun kì ri jɑmmì bënn. 
2Corinthians8:1 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wø dwɑdd-ɑ köbbi wun gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gyëdhhi Jwøk kì kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Mɑkdöniyɑ̀." 
2Corinthians8:2 Ge ɑ́rɑng yi Jwøk ki ɑkørr mø ngenyø, de ge ɑ́yïddi ki medi pyëw me dwøng, mɑ ɑ́wëggi gen muujø ki jɑmmi mø ngenyø, ngö nyingi gen cɑn." 
2Corinthians8:3 O ɑ́lidh yi yɑn kinni, ge ɑ́muuj-ɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́cuggi muujø yi gen, o ge ɑ́ceg-ɑ yɑb ki gïg muuj. O yɑ ceg-ɑ wun ki köbbø kinni ge nuti cɑɑg kɑ cïrri muujø." 
2Corinthians8:4 Wø ɑ́ceg kɑ kwɑjjø yi gen kinni, wiy ge muuj gen thyew ki gïg køny gen jii Jwøk kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Corinthians8:5 Ge ɑ́gwøg-ɑ gïg mø døngø kibøli møg-ɑ ɑ́rømmi yi wøn! Men-ɑ mɑl bɑ kinni ri gen ɑ́mëggi gen Jwøk; codhe ɑmëggi gen ri gen wøn thyew, ni kɑ ɑ́dwɑddii yi Jwøk." 
2Corinthians8:6 O bene ɑ kwɑjji wøn Tïtø, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cɑg kwøbbi muunyɑni, kinni kønye wun ki gwøg ki gwøng-ɑ døj ni menɑni." 
2Corinthians8:7 Wu kɑ̈rø yi jɑmmì bënn; kì yij yïëyø, kí kwøb, kí dïdø, kí kunyø, kí döngi mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑr wøn yi wun. O wø dwɑdd-ɑ kinni; muuj wun ki medi pëëth, kì yij gwøøg mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men." 
2Corinthians8:8 Wu pɑ ceg yi yɑn ki cirø, de yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ nyudhi wun kinni dɑ ji mø tyer kunyø ki mendwøng, yɑ pɑ̈ny-ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi wun ki lidhø, mɑ bëëde ɑ́ dyër." 
2Corinthians8:9 Dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë Yëso Mesiy ngɑ̈nyi yi wun; ɑ́bëëd e kɑ̈rø, kɑ ree løge ɑbuur kiper wun, o wu gwøøge wun ɑ́ tyëngkɑ̈rì kì ri bëëde ɑ́ ɑbuur." 
2Corinthians8:10 Gïn-ɑ rømmɑ bɑ kinni lɑ̈w ke tyëgu gwøng-ɑ ɑ́cɑg yi wun run-ɑ ɑ́pöödh. Wun ɑ ɑ́kwöngi cɑ̈gø, o bɑ wun ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi gwøngɑni." 
2Corinthians8:11 Tyëgu gwøngɑni ɑnɑn ceth, ni kɑ ɑ́cɑgu en." 
2Corinthians8:12 Keløg yï otyëëdø ki muujø, Jwøk óyïëy-ɑ gïn-ɑ nud kì yïí, de pɑth ki gïn-ɑ tyer yi pyëwí ki muujø e bogøn." 
2Corinthians8:13 Yɑ pɑ dwɑddi kinni, o ji møøgø dönyi gen kì bɑng gwøng teg mi wun, de yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o wu bëëd wu pɑ̈r." 
2Corinthians8:14 Kinni o wu kønyu tyëng-ɑ jɑdø ɑnɑn, kɑ̀ di yï wun jɑmmì, o wu ólony yi gen ki kønyø keny-ɑ ólunyi wun ki jɑdø, o wu óbëëd wu pɑ̈r." 
2Corinthians8:15 Mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́gwen mø ngenyø, bong mɑ ɑ́döng kì yïe, o ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́gwen mø nøg nuti jɑdø.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Wø pwøj-ɑ Jwøk kipe kɑ ɑ́göjje Tïtø tyeri kønyi wun, ni kɑ̀ tyer wøn kønyi wun." 
2Corinthians8:17 Nuti bëën yï wun kɑ per kɑ ɑ́köbbii yi wøn, de ɑ́ceg bëëdø e dwɑdd-ɑ kunyø ceth." 
2Corinthians8:18 Ge ɑ́ör yi wøn kyeel ki ómïee, nyel-ɑ pøjji yi kɑnïsɑ̀ kì kɑ̈jj bënn, kipe gwøøg pwönyi wöndøj." 
2Corinthians8:19 Árum ki myegø, kɑ kwɑny thyew ɑ́ ngɑn køny wøn yi tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀, o cyɑ̈dhe ki wøn, e køny-ɑ wøn ki gwøøg mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, kipe døngi mɑ̈ɑ̈r Wë, geki nyodhi kinni wø dwɑdd-ɑ kunyø." 
2Corinthians8:20 Wø pɑ dwɑddi cɑyø kipe yuu-ɑ gwøøg muuny-ɑ dwøng ni men. 
2Corinthians8:21 Mɑ́ wø dwɑdd-ɑ gwøgi gïndøj, kì bøli Wë, kí bøli ji thyew." 
2Corinthians8:22 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, ómïee oörø yi wøn kyeel ki gen; ɑ́pɑ̈nyi yi wøn tyel mø gïïr, kɑ yod yi wøn kinni pyëwe dwɑdd-ɑ kunyø kidyër. Anɑn pyëwe ying-ɑ mɑl kipe kunyø, kì bɑng kɑ̀ gɑ̈nne wun ki mendwøng." 
2Corinthians8:23 De Tïtø nyi 'lwööb kɑ yɑn, gwøg-ɑ gwøng-ɑ gwøg yi yɑn e køny-ɑ wun; o nyiimïee møg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en, bɑ tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ kì kɑ̈jj bënn, men cyɑ̈dhi ɑ́ kej kɑnïsɑ̀ kì keny-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈le, o Mesiy lenhi." 
2Corinthians8:24 Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, nyudhu gen kinni wø mɑɑr yi wun, o yod thyew yi kɑnïsɑ̀ kì kɑ̈jj bënn kinni, pøny-ɑ nyi pøjji wun yi wøn bɑ dyër." 
2Corinthians9:1 De ɑnɑn, yɑ pɑ dwɑddi kinni, o wu gwëdɑ këti kipe gïg-ɑ nyi muuj kipe jii Jwøk kì Yeudiyɑ̀," 
2Corinthians9:2 mɑ́ yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, pëthi wun med ki kønyi gen ceth. Nyingi wun nyii lejjø yi yɑn kidøøj kì bøli tyëng Mɑkdöniyɑ̀; ge nyi köbbɑ’ köbbø kinni, “Nyiimïee kì Akɑiyɑ̀, ge ɑ́bëëd ceth ge dwɑdd-ɑ kunyø këër run-ɑ ɑ́pöödh.”" 
2Corinthians9:3 De nyiimïee óör yi yɑn kipe kinni, o kwøbbi kɑ̀ lejjɑ wun bëëd gen gɑ dyër ceth, o wu óbëëd ri wun tyeeny wun ni kɑ ɑ́kööbɑ." 
2Corinthians9:4 Keløg yɑ di bï wøki kwï tyëng Mɑkdöniyɑ̀, kɑ wu di yuud ri wun nuti tyeeny wun, wø di yɑ̈r-ɑ dï! Yɑ pɑ kømmi yɑ̈ri wun, dɑ́ wøn ɑ yɑ̈r kipe kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi wø wun ki lejjø." 
2Corinthians9:5 Bene ɑ bɑnge kwøngɑ nyiimïee ki ör yï wun, o jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wun kinni ge ómuuj yi wun ópyël yi gen. Codhe, o yɑ ólunyɑ ki bëënø, e jɑmmɑni rumø ki cøngø, o menɑni ónyodhe kinni, bɑ wu keti wun ɑ ɑ́muuj ki tɑri pëthi wun, de wu nuti cɑɑg kɑ köbbi muujø." 
2Corinthians9:6 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, ngɑn-ɑ kɑ̈g köödh mø nøg, ókɑj-ɑ byel mø nøg, de ngɑn-ɑ kɑ̈g köödh mø gïïr, ókɑj-ɑ byel mø gïïr." 
2Corinthians9:7 Muuj dhɑnhø gïn-ɑ ɑ́rømmi yi en ki pyëwe ceth, e pɑ pɑ̈ddi wɑlɑ̀ pɑ cir, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ nyi muujø ki tɑri pyëw mɑɑr yi Jwøk." 
2Corinthians9:8 O wu ócuggø thödhø yi Jwøk ki mø ngenyø kibøli møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun, o óbëëde e bong gïn jɑ̈ddi wun yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, o wu yïddi wun ki døøjø." 
2Corinthians9:9 Wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Ngɑn jɑdø nyi thödhe’ thödhø døøje gït-ɑ ɑtheer.”" 
2Corinthians9:10 O Jwøk ɑ nyi muujø ki köödh møg kɑ̈g, kí gïncɑm men cɑm, wu ónënge ki köödh kɑ gï wëgge twïyø, kɑ ge onywølø ki byel mø gïïr, kì bɑng kɑ̀ nyi muuj wun." 
2Corinthians9:11 Wu ówëgge kɑ̈rø, kipe kinni o wu nyi muuj wun ceth, o Jwøk ópwøj yi ji mø gïïr kipe gïg-ɑ muuj yi wun, o ge cïb cinggi gen yi wøn." 
2Corinthians9:12 Gïg-ɑ muuj yi wun kinøw, gɑ møg yieel jii Jwøk, pɑ cöög ri gen, de Jwøk ópwøj ki mendwøng kì bɑng muunyɑni thyew." 
2Corinthians9:13 Muujø menɑni nyodh-ɑ yïëyø mi wun, o Jwøk ólenhi kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́yïëy wun ki Wöndøj mi Mesiy geki kɑ nyi yïëy wun ki nywɑ̈g ki jɑmmi wun ki jii Jwøk kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ kyeelø." 
2Corinthians9:14 O ge ókwɑ̈jji kiper wun, kipe dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøk." 
2Corinthians9:15 Pwøj wɑ Jwøk kipe gïgdøj møg-ɑ nyi muuje. 
2Corinthians10:1 Yɑ Pøøl, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun ki möölø geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø ni ke di kwɑjji wun yi Mesiy. Cɑgg ɑ́ kenyi kööb ji møøgø kì kelli wun kinni, i yɑ bɑ mölø kenyi kööbɑ kì bøli wun, de wu nyi gwëdɑ’ kwøb mø teeg, kenyi bëëdɑ yɑ lɑ̈wi ki wun." 
2Corinthians10:2 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun kinni yɑ ko wëggu kwøb ki kwøb mø teeg keny-ɑ óbëënɑ; mɑ́ yɑ ócuggø kwøb ki kwøb mø teeg ki tyëng-ɑ kööbø i wø göögø kɑ per jɑmmi kömi piny. 
2Corinthians10:3 Bɑ dyër kinni wø bëëd ɑ kömi piny, de wø pɑ nyïɑ̈ggi kɑ per jɑmmi kömi piny." 
2Corinthians10:4 Mɑ́ jɑmmi liny mø wøn pɑth ki mø kömi piny, de ge bɑ mø Jwøk møg-ɑ teeg, møg-ɑ dhuri wøn piny ki uddi dörr-ɑ teeg. Tyëng-ɑ pëëm pyed dhøggi gen nyii nɑ̈gø yi wøn;" 
2Corinthians10:5 pëëmø ki pyed ki kwøbb-ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈n dïdø ki kwøbbi Jwøk bënn nyi cøør wø’ piny, rummì bënn nyii mɑgø yi wøn, kɑ ge nyi løg wøn møg lïngi kwøbbi Mesiy." 
2Corinthians10:6 Keny-ɑ órum wun ki yïëyø kidøøj, ngɑn-ɑ pëmø ceg kɑ cɑyø yi wun." 
2Corinthians10:7 Tidu kwøbb-ɑ dyër kidøøj. Ngɑn rumø cem ɑ́ ngeti Mesiy, rømme ree kidøøj, mɑ́ wø ceg bëëdø wø bɑ jii Mesiy ni en." 
2Corinthians10:8 Mɑ́ wïjɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈y keløg riɑ lejji yi yɑn kɑ per tegø men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wøn yi Wë, ɑ́ men tïng wun mɑl, de pɑth ki men cøør wun piny." 
2Corinthians10:9 Yɑ pɑ dwɑddi kinni, o wu böggi wun yi wɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi gwed yi yɑn." 
2Corinthians10:10 Ngɑn megø kì kelli wun ócuggø kwøb kinni, “Wɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi gwed yi Pøøl, kwøbbi gen teeg; de nyi 'kööb-ɑ möölø kenyi yinge kellee!”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Wiy ngɑn ni menɑni ngɑ̈nye wøw kinni, gïg-ɑ nyi gwëdɑ wun kì yethi wɑ̈j, bɑ møg-ɑ di kwøb yi yɑn keløg yɑ di bëëd yɑ nud." 
2Corinthians10:12 Riɑ pɑ cuggi pɑ̈ɑ̈rø yi yɑn ki tyëng-ɑ nyi lejji ri gen, mɑ́ ge ceg bëëdø gɑ dhëgg! Ri gen ɑ́tïng gen mɑl, o ri gen rømmi yi gen kɑ këër keny-ɑ ɑ́tïng gen ri gen." 
2Corinthians10:13 De ri wøn pɑ lejji yi wøn ki gïn nuti gwøøg wøn. Ri wøn ólejji yi wøn kɑ per gwøng-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wøn yi Jwøk kete, o menɑni reb-ɑ gwøøg wøn kì kelli wun." 
2Corinthians10:14 O kì bɑng kɑ̀ ying wun yij keew-ɑ göög yi wøn, kewɑni nuti cɑɑg wøn kɑ pöödhø keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën wøn yï wun, wø kɑ̈ll-ɑ Wöndøj mi Mesiy." 
2Corinthians10:15 Ri wøn pɑ lejji yi wøn kɑ per gwøng-ɑ ógwøgø yi ji møøgø kì løøg kew-ɑ ɑ́cïb wøn yi Jwøk. De wø kwɑjj-ɑ kinni o yïëyø mi wun dønge, o wø ócuggi wøn ki gwøg ki gïg mø ngenyø kì kelli wun, e kew-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Jwøk pɑ pöödh yi wøn." 
2Corinthians10:16 Codhe, o wø ócuggi wøn ki pwönyi Wöndøj kì pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, de ri wøn pɑ lejji yi wøn kipe gwøng-ɑ ógwøgø kì kej ngɑn megø." 
2Corinthians10:17 Mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Ngɑn dwɑddi lejji ree, lejje gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Wë.”" 
2Corinthians10:18 Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ lejji yi Wë, bɑ en ɑ yïëy yi Jwøk, de pɑth ki ngɑn-ɑ lejji ree." 
2Corinthians11:1 Lïngu kwøbbɑ yøw, cɑgg yɑ kømi bëëdø yɑn ɑ́ dhëg!" 
2Corinthians11:2 Yɑ nyii mɑgø yi tyiel kiper wun, ni kenyi mɑɑg Jwøk yi tyiel, mɑ́ wu nyömmɑ’ jɑlø ɑ́kyel, en ɑ Mesiy, o mëggɑ nyɑnɑjur me dhïw, me nuti pɑ̈nyø nywɑlø yi jɑlø." 
2Corinthians11:3 Yɑ óböggø kinni, rummi wun órënyi, kɑ wu opɑ̈ɑ̈dø kì ri Mesiy, ni kɑ ɑ́wëëny Awɑ̀ yi thwöl." 
2Corinthians11:4 Mɑ́ ke bëën ngɑn megø be pwönyi wun ki kwøbbi Yëso, me pɑth ki Yëso men-ɑ́ kwøbbe ɑ́pwönyi yi wøn, kɑ wu köbbe yïddø ki wëy geki wöndøj me bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki wëy geki wöndøj men-ɑ ɑ́yod yi wun kì yï wøn, kwøbbe pɑ di ceg yi wun ki yïëyø?" 
2Corinthians11:5 Yɑ pɑ rumø kinni yɑ ying-ɑ cyɑ̈n yi ji-ɑ cwølli gɑ tyëngwöödø møg-ɑ døngø! 
2Corinthians11:6 Cɑgg yɑ kwïj kwøb kì bøli teedø, yɑ bɑ ngɑn dïdø ceth. O wu ɑ́rum ki thödhø yi wøn ki kwøbb-ɑ dyër kì ri jɑmmì bënn." 
2Corinthians11:7 Yɑ ɑ́ceg-ɑ bɑ̈jjø kɑ̀ nuti cwöddi yɑn ki köögi kì yï wun, keny-ɑ ɑ́pwönyɑ wun ki wööni Jwøk, kɑ riɑ dwøøgɑ cyɑ̈n kipe kinni o per wun tënge?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ nyi nëng-ɑ yi kɑnïsɑ̀ men-ɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ kyeelø keny-ɑ ɑ́göögɑ kì kelli wun; yɑ nyi kwɑny-ɑ jɑmmi gen kipe kinni o yɑ kønyɑ wun. 
2Corinthians11:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ kì buti wun, wu nuti jud yɑn; yɑ nuti cwöd ki ngyënyø kì yï wun. Bɑ nyiimïee møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Mɑkdöniyɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́muuj yɑn ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddɑ bënn. Nɑ kɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ cøn, gïti dhuki megø, wu koo jud yi yɑn kipe jɑmm-ɑ dwɑddɑ." 
2Corinthians11:10 Kɑ̀ bëëd dyër mi Mesiy ying-ɑ riɑ, yɑ pɑ wïyi ki lejji riɑ kipe møgɑni kì Akɑiyɑ̀ bëne." 
2Corinthians11:11 Møgɑni kwøb yi yɑn kɑ per kɑ̀ pɑ mɑɑrɑ wun? Ngɑ̈nyi yi Jwøk kinni, wu mɑɑr yi yɑn ki mendwøng!" 
2Corinthians11:12 Yɑ pɑ wïyi ki gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yɑn ɑnɑn, kipe kinni o “tyëngwöödø” møg-ɑ kyeelø jɑ̈ddi gen ki keny kööb gen ce ge göögø kɑ yuu-ɑ göög yi wøn." 
2Corinthians11:13 Jøgɑni pɑth ki tyëngwöödø møg-ɑ dyër, ge göög-ɑ wëënyø, o ge kɑngg-ɑ ri gen ce ge bɑ jøwööni Mesiy." 
2Corinthians11:14 De pɑth ki gïn ngɑ̈ɑ̈ng yi ji, mɑ́ Cethɑn kiree, ree nyii kɑɑngø yi en kɑ ónënnø e nɑ wëywöni cɑr!" 
2Corinthians11:15 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, pɑth ki gïïngɑ̈ngø keløg bɑ̈ngge ri gen okɑɑngø yi gen, o ge nënni gen ge nɑ bɑ̈nggi tirø. De kì ri thumi piny, ge óyod-ɑ gïjø me kyëëw ki gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen." 
2Corinthians11:16 Wu cigɑ’ köbbø kinni, yɑ pɑth ki dhëg. De keløg wu orumø kinni yɑ bɑ dhëg, yïëyu yɑn ki dhëëgɑ yøw, o yɑ yïddɑ ki gïn pere lejjɑ riɑ." 
2Corinthians11:17 Møg-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn ɑnɑn, pɑth ki møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi Wë, mɑ́ yɑ bɑ dhëg kidyër kì ri kwøbbi lejji rɑw." 
2Corinthians11:18 De kɑ̀ bëëd e dɑ ji mø lejji ri gen kipe kwøbbi kömi piny, yɑ ceg-ɑ lunyø lejji riɑ thyew." 
2Corinthians11:19 Wu ceg bëëdø wɑ̈thi wun pel, bene ɑ bɑnge nyi yïëy wun kwøbbi dhëgg!" 
2Corinthians11:20 Mɑ́ wu pɑ nyi wër ki ngɑn cïrri wun bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø, kí ngɑn tuug wun, kí ngɑn yerri wun, kí ngɑn pwöd wun ki ɑtɑyø kì yethi nyingi wun." 
2Corinthians11:21 Yɑ ɑ́mɑg yi ɑyɑ̈r kipe kɑ ɑ́gwøg wøn møgɑni ki nyødhi pëthi wøn. De keløg e dɑ ngɑn lejji ree kipe gïïpiny — yɑ kööbø nɑ dhëg cyee — riɑ ólejjɑ thyew. 
2Corinthians11:22 Ge bɑ tyëng Ibru? Yɑ bɑ wɑ̈d Ibru thyew. Ge bɑ tyëng Isrɑil? Yɑ bɑ ngeti Isrɑil thyew. Ge bɑ kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm? Yɑ bɑ kwɑɑr Abrɑhɑm thyew. 
2Corinthians11:23 Ge bɑ bɑ̈nggi Mesiy? Yɑ ce 'kööb-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gø — de yɑ bɑ bɑ̈ng me lɑ̈w kibøli gen! Yɑ ɑ́göög ki gwøg me teeg kibøli gen; Yɑ ɑ́kïdhi ød mɑg ki tyel mø gïïr; kɑ yɑ pwöd ki tyel mø gïïr; kɑ yɑ nyii cyɑ̈ngø ki thøø. 
2Corinthians11:24 Yɑ ɑ́pwöd yi Yeud tyel ɑ́bïj; yɑ nyi pwöd kɑ dëllì pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïngwen. 
2Corinthians11:25 Yɑ ɑ́pwöd tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g yi tyëng Römɑ̀. Kɑ yɑ bɑ̈lli ki tuggi kïttì tyelø ɑ́kyel. Kɑ sɑpïnɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g ótørrø yɑ nud kì yethi gen, kɑ wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng tyëgɑ yɑ kwɑ̈ng-ɑ wɑ̈g kì nɑɑm omelø." 
2Corinthians11:26 Kì yij wɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑdhɑ bëne, yɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki mudø; kɑ yɑ ócyɑ̈ngø nɑ̈gø yi kurrì; kɑ yɑ kømi nɑ̈gø yi wɑddi wøn Yeud, kí tyëngpɑth ki Yeud; yɑ nyi bëëd yɑ obɑjjø yi thøø kì yethi kɑ̈dd, kí yij pɑ̈l, kí yethi nɑ̈mmi omelø, kí ji-ɑ nyi wënyø ce ge bɑ wɑdd." 
2Corinthians11:27 Kɑ yɑ nyii göögø ki gwøng teg. Yɑ nyii dhɑ̈lø nenø tyel mø gïïr; kɑ yɑ nɑ̈g yi kɑ̈j kí röödhø; kɑ yɑ nyii jɑdø ki gïncɑm, kí keny bëëdɑ; kɑ yɑ nyii jɑdø ki ógønh rugɑ." 
2Corinthians11:28 Møgɑni bënn ceg-ɑ rëbø ki tɑng-ɑ tɑɑgɑ kwøbbi bëëdi kɑnïsɑ̀ kì kɑ̈jj bënn kì yethi cyɑ̈ng. 
2Corinthians11:29 Kenyi di ngɑn nyødh, yɑ nyi ceg-ɑ nyönhø thyew; kenyi di ngɑn pɑ̈dhi yij orøg, yɑ nyi ceg-ɑ juudø." 
2Corinthians11:30 Keløg riɑ dwɑddɑ’ lejjø, riɑ lejjɑ kɑ per gïg-ɑ nyodh nyødhɑ." 
2Corinthians11:31 De ngɑ̈nyi yi Jwøk, Wïyi Wë Yëso — wiy nyinge lenhi gïti ɑtheer — kinni yɑ pɑ ceg pyed." 
2Corinthians11:32 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yingɑ Dimɑceg, modïr men-ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg kɑɑlɑni kì ri Rɑ̈dh Aretɑs, ɑ́cïbi dhø döri kɑɑl ki ɑlɑthker møg mɑg yɑn." 
2Corinthians11:33 Kɑ yɑ miid piny, yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yij dhöngø, yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny me twïyø kì ri döri kɑɑl, ɑbødhɑ ki thøø." 
2Corinthians12:1 Riɑ ceg yi yɑn kɑ lejjø ceth, cɑgg e bong gïndøj me gwøg yi møgɑni. De ɑnɑn yɑ ceg-ɑ kwøb kì ri møg-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈rri yɑn kí møg-ɑ ɑ́yɑ̈lli yɑn yi Wë." 
2Corinthians12:2 Ádɑ jɑl mɑ ngeti Mesiy mɑ ɑ́kïdhi mɑl; ɑ́göög ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen ɑnɑn kër-ɑ ɑ́cwöb møgɑni, (kwïj yi yɑn ying møgɑni cwöbø kidyër, wɑlɑ̀ ócɑɑg kɑ cɑ̈rri møgɑni — ngɑ̈ny-ɑ yi Jwøk kete)." 
2Corinthians12:3 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni jɑlɑni ɑ́ceg kɑ gwɑɑr Pɑrdös, (kwïj yi yɑn ying e ókɑ̈ɑ̈lø kɑ dële — ngɑ̈ny-ɑ yi Jwøk)." 
2Corinthians12:4 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni ɑ́kïdhi Pɑrdös, kɑ olïngø ki kwøb mø dhɑ̈li kwøbø yi dhɑnhø yøw, o bɑ ɑkerø ki pɑrri gen." 
2Corinthians12:5 Jɑlɑni ólejji yi yɑn kipe møgɑni, de riɑ ólejjɑ kɑ per nyødhɑ kete." 
2Corinthians12:6 Keløg yɑ di dwɑdd-ɑ lejji riɑ, yɑ pɑ di bëëd yɑ bɑ dhëg, mɑ́ yɑ kømm-ɑ dyër. De yɑ pɑ dwɑddi lejji riɑ, kipe ngɑn megø órumø i yɑ dwøng kibøli nenn-ɑ nenne yɑn, wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ nyi lïnge kì riɑ." 
2Corinthians12:7 De yɑ ɑ́thödhi ki koodhø me rɑ̈mø kì dëlɑ, kipe yɑ ókwöd yi ɑthwøg kì bɑng møg-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ; koonhɑni ying dëlɑ e nɑ wëywöni Cethɑn, men nyi cwøb yɑn, o yɑ nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈ne thwøgø." 
2Corinthians12:8 Kɑ Wë kwɑjjɑ tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g kinni kɑ̈ɑ̈le koonhɑni wɑ̈g kì riɑ. 
2Corinthians12:9 De yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi en kinni, “Dhwɑ̈ngɑ kete ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn; mɑ́ tegɑ døng-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng nyødhí.” O pyëwɑ med kenyi lejjɑ nyødhɑ kipe kinni o yɑ yïddɑ ki tegø kì yï Mesiy." 
2Corinthians12:10 Bene ɑ bɑnge bëëdɑ yɑ yïëyø ki ngini bëëdɑ yɑ nyøødh, kí ngini yɑ̈d geki jud, kí ngini guun-ɑ guud wɑngɑ geki pïdø kiper Mesiy; mɑ́ kenyi bëëdɑ yɑ nyøødh, bene ɑ nyi bëëdɑ yɑ teeg." 
2Corinthians12:11 Yɑ ɑ́göög ki dhëg – dɑ́ wun ɑ ɑ́wëggi yɑn gwøg ki dhëg. Bɑ wun ɑ di pwøj gwøgɑ. Mɑ́ cɑgg yɑ bong perɑ, yɑ pɑ lod yi tyëng-ɑ cwølli gɑ “tyëngwöödø” møg-ɑ døngø." 
2Corinthians12:12 Ngïjj-ɑ nyodh kinni yɑ bɑ jɑlwöödø, ɑ́gwøg-ɑ kelli wun ki ngïïnø me dwøng." 
2Corinthians12:13 Wu lod kɑ ngø yi kɑnïsɑ̀ møg-ɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ kyeelø, e pɑth ki kɑ̀ nuti toor wun yi yɑn ki cwöd ki jɑmmì? Lɑ̈ɑ̈m pëthi wun ki yɑn, kipe bɑ̈jjø menɑni!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Anɑn riɑ gwiir yɑn kipe bëën yï wun, ki dɑ̈ɑ̈g bëënø — o bong gïjø men-ɑ ócwøl yi yɑn kì yï wun. Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ wun kiri wun, de pɑth ki ngyënyyi wun ɑ dwɑddɑ. Pɑth ki othønhø ɑ nyi pidh wëëg gen, de bɑ wëëg ɑ nyi pidh nyigi gen." 
2Corinthians12:15 Pyëwɑ med ki muuji jɑmmɑ bënn, cɑgg ɑ́ riɑ thyew, yɑ køny-ɑ wun. Yɑ pɑ ti yi wun ki mɑɑrø, kɑ per kɑ̀ mɑɑrɑ wun ki mendwøng?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Wu nuti jud yɑn kidyër, ki cwöd ki jɑmmì. De yɑ ɑ́di bëëdø yɑn ɑ́ wëny, kɑ wu thɑbbɑ ki pyed?" 
2Corinthians12:17 Dɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cɑm ngyënyyi wun kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́örɑ wun? 
2Corinthians12:18 Tïtø ɑ́kwɑjji yi yɑn ki mendwøng kinni, bëe be këëmi wun, kɑ ómïee megø örɑ kyeel ki en. Dɑ gïjø mɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi Tïtø kì yï wun? Wø pɑ ködd-ɑ kömi gïjø ɑ́kyel? O yëth-ɑ göög wøn pɑ pɑ̈r?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wu orumø kinni, wø ceg-ɑ ri wøn ki cwɑgø? Pɑth! Wø kööb ɑ bøli Jwøk kì ri Mesiy, o møg-ɑ kømmi yi wøn bënn bɑ kipe tyenyi wun." 
2Corinthians12:20 Yɑ bögg-ɑ kinni, bëëdi wun óyod yi yɑn e pɑth ki men-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn; kɑ bëëdɑ yod yi wun e pɑth ki men-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi wun thyew, keny-ɑ óbëënɑ yï wun. Wɑlɑ̀ wu óyuud yi yɑn kelli wun dɑ wërø, kí ɑter, kí keji pëëth, kí tyiel, kí yɑ̈d, kí ɑtum, kí ɑthwøg geki ɑwøw." 
2Corinthians12:21 Yɑ bögg-ɑ kinni keny-ɑ ócigɑ bëën yï wun, wïjɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈y yi Jwøgɑ kì bɑng bëëdi wun; kɑ yɑ óywöngø kipe tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji cøn, kɑ ge ocögø ge pɑ yewi kipe kwïji bëëdø, kí niini ji mø nuti nywøøm ri gen, kí niini cwøw ri gen." 
2Corinthians13:1 Men ɑnɑn bɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈g bëënɑ be këëmi wun. “Dhɑnhø gøøny ɑ kömi dhøggi ji-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi gɑ ɑ́ryew wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g” — ni kɑ ógwedii kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø. 
2Corinthians13:2 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëënɑ yï wun ki ryeew këëmɑ, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́røngi ɑ́köbbɑ, o møgɑni ɑ köbbɑ tyëng-ɑ göögø kinøw yɑ tøøk; ge ɑ́köbbɑ kinni, keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ yï wun, pyëwɑ pɑ cigi lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki dhɑnhø," 
2Corinthians13:3 mɑ́ wu dwɑdd-ɑ gïn nyodh kinni Mesiy okööbø ki lebɑ. O wu pɑ mïdhi yi Mesiy kɑ nyødhø, de ceg bëëdø e teeg kì kelli wun." 
2Corinthians13:4 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́gurii wïj yɑdh ɑrïw e nyøødh, onëënø ɑnɑn ki tegi Jwøk. O wøn thyew wø nyøødh kì ree, de wø óbëëd wø onëënø ki tegi Jwøk, kɑ̀ ying wøn kelli wun." 
2Corinthians13:5 Nyi rɑngu ri wun mɑ bëëd yïëyø mi wun kidï. Kenyi lïïdh wun ri wun, pɑ nyi yod yi wun kinni Mesiy nud kì kelli wun?" 
2Corinthians13:6 Codhe, o yod yi wun kinni, pwöny-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi yi wøn kì kelli wun bɑ dyër." 
2Corinthians13:7 Jwøk nyii kwɑjjø yi wøn kiper wun, kipe kinni o wu cög wu pɑ göögø ki gïnrɑj; pɑth kipe nyodhi ri wøn kinni wø ɑ́göög ki gwøg me døøj, dɑ́ kipe kinni o wu nyi gwøg wun gïn-ɑ bɑ dyër, cɑgg e nënni wø ódhɑlø yi gwøøg wøn." 
2Corinthians13:8 Mɑ́ wø pɑ cuggi bɑnyi dyër, de wø göög-ɑ per dyër ceth." 
2Corinthians13:9 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ bëëd wøn wø nyødh de wu teg, pëthi wøn med. O gïn-ɑ nyi kwɑjji yi wøn kì yï Jwøk bɑ kinni, o wu dönyi wun." 
2Corinthians13:10 Wɑ̈nyø men gwed yi yɑn yɑ nuti bëënø, kɑ per kinni, o yɑ cögɑ, yɑ pɑ wër ki wun, kì kömi tegø men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Wë ɑ́ mi tyëny, de pɑth ki mi cödi piny." 
2Corinthians13:11 Anɑn wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, mɑ̈dhu ri wun! Tyer wun bëëndøj; lïngu møg-ɑ cïgɑ wun; nyi kømmu kwøb ɑ́kyel; bëëd wun ki mër. O wu ókor yi Jwøk, ɑ bɑ Jwøøg mɑ̈ɑ̈dø kí mër." 
2Corinthians13:12 Mɑ̈dh wun ri wun ki nuumi kwër. Wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi jii Jwøk bënn. 
2Corinthians13:13 Dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë Yëso Mesiy, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi Jwøk, geki nywɑ̈ɑ̈g Wëykwërø, óying kömi wun bënn." 
Galatians1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïɑ, yɑ Pøøl jɑlwöödø, ngɑn-ɑ nuti cwøl-ɑ yi dhɑnhø, wɑlɑ̀ nuti cwølø kɑ yëth-ɑ nyi cwöddi yi ji, de yɑ ɑ́cwøl-ɑ yi Yëso Mesiy geki Jwøk Wïy, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́tugii kì yij thøø." 
Galatians1:2 Yɑ mɑ̈dh-ɑ wun, wu tyëng Gɑlɑthiyɑ̀; wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh thyew yi nyiimïee bënn, møg-ɑ buti gen bëëdɑ kì keny." 
Galatians1:3 Wiy dhwɑ̈ng geki mër møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk Wïyee geki Wë Yëso Mesiy, ying gen kömi wun." 
Galatians1:4 Mesiy ree ɑ́muuje o gøøm bøli orøgee, e gwøg-ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi Wïy Jwøk, o wɑ yieele wɑ̈g kì yij rïny-ɑ rɑj èn." 
Galatians1:5 Lejji wɑ Jwøk gïti ɑtheer! Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Yɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈ng yi bëëdi wun! Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwøl wun ki dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Mesiy, ɑ́jwɑn yi wun ki wiy piny, kɑ wu oyïëyø ki wöndøj megø." 
Galatians1:7 Pɑth ki kinni dɑ wöndøj megø kidyër, de yɑ kømm-ɑ kenyi pɑɑng wun yi ji møøgø, kipe kinni o Wöndøj mi Mesiy wil yi wun." 
Galatians1:8 Cɑgg ɑ́ wøn ɑ pwönyi wun, wɑlɑ̀ wu pwönyi yi wëywödø me bï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, e pwöny-ɑ wöndøj me bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki men-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi wun yi wøn cøn, ngɑnɑni ree dɑ cyën." 
Galatians1:9 De wø köbb-ɑ wun këti ni kɑ ɑ́kwøng wøn wun ki köbbø cøn kinni, keløg e dɑ ngɑn pwönyi wun ki wöndøj me bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki men-ɑ ɑ́yod yi wun kì yï wøn, ngɑnɑni ree dɑ cyën!" 
Galatians1:10 Ónënnø kinni yɑ tyer-ɑ gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi ji? Pɑth! Yɑ tyer-ɑ gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk. Yɑ tyer-ɑ pøjjø yi ji? Keløg yɑ di tyer pøjjø yi ji, yɑ pɑ di bëëd yɑn ɑ́ bɑ̈ng Mesiy." 
Galatians1:11 Bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny wøw, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ kinni, wöndøj men-ɑ ɑ́pwönyɑ wun, nuti kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï ji." 
Galatians1:12 Mɑ́ wöönɑni nuti yood yɑn ɑ yï dhɑnhø, wɑlɑ̀ nuti pwönyi yɑn ɑ yi dhɑnhø, de ɑ́nyudhi yɑn ɑ yi Yëso Mesiy kiree." 
Galatians1:13 Wu ɑ́rum ki köbbi bëën-ɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ yɑ mïdh-ɑ kwøbbi Yïëyi Yeud, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́guudɑ wɑɑng kɑnïsɑ̀ mi Jwøk e pyëwɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m, kɑ riɑ pɑ̈nyɑ ki tɑ̈ɑ̈yii piny." 
Galatians1:14 Kɑ perɑ ótëngø kì kelli yɑ̈jji wøn kì bɑng kɑ̀ di yijɑ tyiel kipe kwøbbi Yïëyi Yeud geki kwööng kweyyi wøn. 
Galatians1:15 De Jwøk ki dhwɑ̈nge, yɑ ɑ́myege yɑ nudd yɑ ying-ɑ yij meyɑ, kɑ yɑ cwøøle be göggii. O keny-ɑ ɑ́dwɑdde" 
Galatians1:16 nyudhi Wɑ̈de yɑn, kì bɑng medi pyëwe, kipe kinni o yɑ pwönyɑ wöndøj mi Wɑ̈de kì kelli tyëngpɑth ki Yeud, bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́pëjjɑ møgɑni," 
Galatians1:17 wɑlɑ̀ yɑ nuti kedhi Yerusɑlem be lidhi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi gwøg ki tyëngwöödø kibølɑ. De yɑ ɑ́kedh-ɑ Pödhi Árɑb. Codhe, kɑ yɑ dwöög-ɑ Dimɑceg." 
Galatians1:18 Kì bɑng runn ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ yɑ kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem be këëmi Pïtør. Kɑ yɑ obëëdø kì bute ki osboo ɑ́ryew." 
Galatians1:19 Bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́lidhɑ kì kelli tyëngwöödø, den-ɑ́ Yɑgob, ómï Wë ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ kete." 
Galatians1:20 Møg-ɑ gwëdɑ wun bɑ dyër. O ngɑ̈nyi yi Jwøk kinni yɑ pɑ ceg pyed. 
Galatians1:21 Codhe, kɑ yɑ kedh-ɑ myërri Suriyɑ̀ geki Kilikiyɑ̀." 
Galatians1:22 O yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ nuti lidhø yi tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ kì myërri Yeudiyɑ̀. 
Galatians1:23 De ge ɑ́wɑ̈dh-ɑ lïngø kinni, i ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́guud nyingi gen cøn, pwöny-ɑ teedø kinni yïëy gen ki kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́dwɑdde rënyø." 
Galatians1:24 Kɑ Jwøk lenhi yi gen kiperɑ. 
Galatians2:1 Kì bɑng runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen, kɑ yɑ kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem wøki Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ ki ryeew kedhø. Kɑ Tïtø ókedhø ki wøn thyew." 
Galatians2:2 De wø ɑ́kedhi kunɑni kɑ per gïn-ɑ ɑ́nyudhi yɑn yi Jwøk. Kɑ kwøbbi Wöndøj men-ɑ nyi pwönyi yi yɑn kì kelli tyëngpɑth ki Yeud, lwøb yi yɑn kì bøli tyëngdøngø keti gen. Yɑ nuti dwɑddi kinni o gwøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn cøn, wɑlɑ̀ men-ɑ ógwøg yi yɑn dhuki megø thøwe piny." 
Galatians2:3 Tïtø, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki yɑn, ngö e bɑ wɑ̈d Yönɑn, nuti cïrri ngølø;" 
Galatians2:4 ngö e ɑ́dɑ kwï ji mɑ ɑ́dwɑddi kinni i ngøl. Jiɑni ri gen ɑ́kɑɑng gen ce ge bɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, kɑ ge bï-ɑ kellee gɑ yïthhi piny mø dwɑddi rënyi tɑ̈bbø men-ɑ ɑ́yod yi wɑ kì ri Yëso Mesiy, o wɑ di løg gen bɑ̈ngg." 
Galatians2:5 De kwøbbi gen nuti yïëëy wun kinni tek, kipe kinni o kwøbb-ɑ dyër mø Wöndøj mïdhi kidøøj, ni kɑ̀ ngɑ̈nyu en." 
Galatians2:6 De tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nënni gɑ pëjjì — yɑ kööbø kinøw kɑ per kɑ̀ bongii gïn wɑnge kì yïɑ, ying gɑ ngø wɑlɑ̀ ngø, mɑ́ Jwøk pɑ nyi nenn-ɑ bëëdi dëël dhɑnhø — yɑ nuti kønyø yi pëjjɑni ki rummì." 
Galatians2:7 De ge ɑ́yöd ge ceg-ɑ kwøb kinni i Jwøk yɑ ɑ́mëgge’ gwøøg pwönyi tyëngpɑth ki Yeud; ni kɑ ɑ́mëgge Pïtør pwönyi Yeud. 
Galatians2:8 Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör Pïtør yï Yeud, bɑ en ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn yï tyëngpɑth ki Yeud." 
Galatians2:9 Yɑgob, kí Pïtør, kí Jøn, ɑ bɑ pëjjì; kɑ ɑ́lidh gen dhwɑ̈ng kí teng-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Jwøk, kɑ cinggi wøn mɑg gen, ɑyïëy gen kinni kedhi wøn yï tyëngpɑth ki Yeud, o ge ókedhi yï Yeud." 
Galatians2:10 Gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwɑjji yi gen bɑ kinni, wɑ̈thi wøn ko wïl ki tyëng-ɑ jɑdø kì yij ɑkuud gen; o bene gïn-ɑ ɑ́tyer yi pyëwɑ ki gwøgø thyew." 
Galatians2:11 De keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Pïtør Anthɑkiyɑ̀, ɑ́cɑyɑ kì bøli teedø, mɑ́ e ɑ́ceg-ɑ bɑ̈jjø." 
Galatians2:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Yɑgob nuti wɑ̈nhø, Pïtør ɑ́bëëd e onywɑ̈gø ki tyëngpɑth ki Yeud. De kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi jøgɑni, kɑ ree lɑ̈ɑ̈we ki jiɑni; ɑ́bëëd e óböggø yi tyëng-ɑ kööbø i ngøl ji." 
Galatians2:13 Kɑ kwï Yeud møg-ɑ bɑ jii Mesiy, ri gen løg gen tyëngɑdud kyeel ki en. Kɑ Bɑrnɑbɑ̀ óngöyø ki kwøbbɑni thyew." 
Galatians2:14 De kɑ ɑ́yodɑ en kinni ge pɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì yij yuu-ɑ bɑ óbödh, ɑ kyëëw ki Wöndøj, ɑköbbɑ Pïtør kì bøli teedø kinni, “Yï bɑ Yeudì, o yï pɑ bëëdø ki bëëdi Yeudì, dɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ dwɑddí ciri tyëngpɑth ki Yeud kinni bëëd gen ki bëëdi Yeud?”" 
Galatians2:15 Wøn kì ri wøn, wø ɑ́nywøl wø bɑ Yeud, de wø pɑth ki tyëngorøg ni kɑ̀ cwøllu tyëngpɑth ki Yeud." 
Galatians2:16 O wø ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, dhɑnhø pɑ göögø e tir kì yï Jwøk kì bɑng kɑ̀ mïdhe Cigg, dɑ́ kɑ̀ yïëye Yëso Mesiy. Mɑ́ bong ngɑn göögø e tir kì yï Jwøk kì bɑng kɑ̀ mïdhe Cigg." 
Galatians2:17 Anɑn, keløg wø yɑb-ɑ gwøg wø tir kì ri Mesiy, ngö wø ying-ɑ kelli tyëngorøg, bɑ kinni Mesiy göögø kɑ per orøg? Pɑth ki kinøw." 
Galatians2:18 Keløg yɑ di døøg be geri gïn-ɑ ɑ́cøørɑ piny, riɑ di gwøøgɑ yɑn ɑ́ ngɑn pyem Cigg." 
Galatians2:19 Mɑ́ keløg ɑ́ kömi Cigg ɑ köddi, yɑ rum thøø — yɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ yi Ciggɑni kiri gen — kipe kinni o yɑ ónënnɑ Jwøk. Yɑ ɑ́rum ki nɑ̈gø kyeel ki Mesiy kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïwe." 
Galatians2:20 Yɑ ɑ́gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw kyeel ki Mesiy, o pɑth ki yɑn ɑ nëënø ɑnɑn, dɑ́ Mesiy ɑ nëënø kì riɑ. Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ onëënø, yɑ rug-ɑ dël, yɑ nëën ɑ yij yïëyi Wɑ̈d Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr yɑn, kɑ wëye muuje kiperɑ." 
Galatians2:21 Yɑ ɑ́kyëëd ki bɑnyi dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk. Mɑ́ keløg dhɑnhø göögø e tir kì bɑng kɑ̀ mïdhe Cigg, ti bong gïjø mɑ pere ɑ́thøw yi Mesiy!" 
Galatians3:1 8 Wu bɑ dhëgg, wu tyëng Gɑlɑthiyɑ̀! Á men ɑ ɑ́thyëdh wun? Wu nuti rumø ki nyudhi Yëso Mesiy e ógur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw?" 
Galatians3:2 Gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ yodø kì yï wun bɑ kinni: Bɑ kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́mïdhu Cigg, ɑ ɑ́yïddi wun ki Wëykwërø, wɑlɑ̀ kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́yïëy wun møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wun?" 
Galatians3:3 Wu ceg bëëdø wun ɑ́ dhëgg kidyër? Wu ɑ́cɑ̈gi kɑ wëy, wu rum kɑ dël?" 
Galatians3:4 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́dïd yi wun cøn bɑ møg gɑ̈g? O dïdø menɑni ógɑ̈g kidï? 
Galatians3:5 Jwøk, keny-ɑ ɑ́mëgge wun Wëykwërø, gø ɑ́muuj yi en kɑ per kɑ̀ mïdhu Cigg, wɑlɑ̀ kipe kɑ ɑ́yïëy wun Wöndøj men-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wun?" 
Galatians3:6 Nɑ kɑ ɑ́yïëëy kwøbbi Jwøk yi Abrɑhɑm, kɑ kwɑny yi Jwøk ɑ́ ngɑntir kì bɑng yïëye." 
Galatians3:7 Ceg wun en ki yodø ceth kinni, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy bene gen dïl kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm." 
Galatians3:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈gii ki yodø yi wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni tyëngpɑth ki Yeud ógwøg ge tir yi Jwøk kì bɑng yïëyø, ɑköbbe Wöndøj Abrɑhɑm kinni, “Dhɑnhø bëne kì kömi piny, ógyëdh yi yɑn, gyëdh kedh-ɑ́ɑ̀ rií.”" 
Galatians3:9 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy ógyëdh ni Abrɑhɑm ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yïëy." 
Galatians3:10 Tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì ri mïdhi Cigg keti gen, ri gen dɑ cyën bënn. Mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Cyënni Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn pyem Ciggi Jwøk bënn geki pwönye.”" 
Galatians3:11 Ceg-ɑ nënnø ɑnɑn, kinni bong ngɑn gwøg e tir yi mïdhi Cigg, mɑ́ e bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ göögø e tir kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́yïëye, bɑ en ɑ ónëënø.”" 
Galatians3:12 De mïdhi Cigg kelli gen lɑ̈wi ki yïëyø. Mɑ́ e bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ nyi gwøg møg-ɑ kømmi yi Cigg, ónëënø kì bɑng møgɑni.”" 
Galatians3:13 Mesiy wɑ ɑ́yiele ki cyënn-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Cigg, kɑ ɑ́gööge ki ngeti cyën kiperee, mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Dhɑnhø men-ɑ ryërri kì ri yɑdh, köme dɑ cyënni Jwøk.”" 
Galatians3:14 Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi Mesiy kɑ per kinni, o gyëdh møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Abrɑhɑm yi Jwøk, ómëggi tyëngpɑth ki Yeud, kì ri Yëso Mesiy; kipe kinni o wɑ yïddi wɑ kì bɑng yïëyø, ki Wëy-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kinni gï ómuuje." 
Galatians3:15 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wu köbbɑ’ gïjø me nyi cwöb yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn; kenyi nywɑg ji ɑ́ryew dhøggi gen kipe gïïpiny, kɑ møgɑni gweed gen piny, bong ngɑn nyi pɑ̈d lwömɑni, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ kïdhi kömi gen ki møøgø." 
Galatians3:16 Anɑn Jwøk ɑ́kwëng-ɑ Abrɑhɑm geki “kwɑre” de nuti kööbø kinni geki “kwɑrre” ɑ́kwøb-ɑ kwɑre ɑ́kyel kete, en ɑ Mesiy." 
Galatians3:17 Gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ kwøbø bɑ kinni, Jwøk ɑ́lwööb ki Abrɑhɑm kɑ gø kwënge. O Cigg-ɑ ɑ́bï kì bɑng runn miy ɑ́ngwen kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g kì bɑng lwömɑni, møg-ɑ ɑ́kwëng yi Jwøk pɑ cuggi pɑ̈dø yi gen." 
Galatians3:18 Mɑ́ keløg kwënggi Jwøk di kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri Cigg, ge pɑ di cuggi bëëdø gɑ kwëng, mɑ́ Abrɑhɑm ɑ́thödh ɑ bɑng kwënggɑni yi Jwøk ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́mëggii." 
Galatians3:19 Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, Cigg ɑ́muuj kɑ per ngø? Ciggɑni ɑ́muuj kɑ per nyodhi bɑ̈jjø, o ɑ́dwɑddi kinni ge ówiy-ɑ keny-ɑ óbëën kwɑɑr Abrɑhɑm men-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kinni óbï. Ciggɑni ɑ́thyey-ɑ yi wëywödd, kì cingi jɑl-ɑ kɑɑm; ɑ ɑ́gɑ̈mmi ciggɑni teedø." 
Galatians3:20 Ngɑn-ɑ kɑɑm pɑ dwɑddi kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ nget ɑ́kyel ɑ göögø, o Jwøk göög ɑ kete." 
Galatians3:21 Cigg tyëdd-ɑ ri gen ki møg-ɑ kwëng yi Jwøk? Pɑth! Ri gen pɑ tyëddi yi gen kinni tek. Mɑ́ keløg ji di mëgg-ɑ Cigg møg muujø ki nënnì, bëëntir di kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri Ciggɑni." 
Galatians3:22 De wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, i kömi piny bëne jɑɑg-ɑ yi orøg; o gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb kinni ómuuj ɑ ri yïëyi Mesiy, ómëggi tyëng-ɑ óyïëyii." 
Galatians3:23 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nuti bëën yïëyø, wɑ ɑ́mïdhi yi Cigg wɑ bɑ ɑmɑgg, pïd keny-ɑ ónyoodh yïëyø." 
Galatians3:24 Wɑ ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ yi Cigg gïti keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Mesiy, kipe kinni o wɑ göög wɑ, wɑ tir kì yï Jwøk kì bɑng yïëyø." 
Galatians3:25 O ɑnɑn kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi bøli kej yïëyø, wɑ pɑ jɑɑg-ɑ yi Cigg këti." 
Galatians3:26 Bɑ kì ri yïëyø ɑ bëëd wu bɑ nyigi Jwøk kì ri Yëso Mesiy. 
Galatians3:27 Anɑn kɑ ɑ́rum wun ki jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø kì ri Mesiy, wu ɑ́göög ki møg rug Mesiy." 
Galatians3:28 Bong gïn bɑ̈ɑ̈n Yeudì ki ngɑn pɑth ki Yeudì këti; o bogïn bɑ̈ɑ̈n bɑ̈ng ki ngɑn göög wïje; o bogïn bɑ̈ɑ̈n cwøw ki mɑ̈nn; wu bɑ ɑ́kyel wu bënn, wu rëbø ki Yëso Mesiy." 
Galatians3:29 Keløg wu bɑ jii Mesiy, bene wun kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm, møg-ɑ óyïddi ki møg-ɑ kwëng yi Jwøk." 
Galatians4:1 Yɑ ceg-ɑ kwøb kinni; nyel-ɑ lɑg jɑmmì pɑ̈r ki bɑ̈ng kɑ̀ nudd e thiinh, ngö jɑmmɑni mïdhi gɑ møge." 
Galatians4:2 Mɑ́ e nudd e ying-ɑ cinggi tyëng-ɑ pidhii gïti bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi wïye. 
Galatians4:3 Wɑ bëëd ɑ nøw thyew, kɑ ɑ́bëëd wɑ cøn, e yïëyø miee nudd e thiinh; wɑ ɑ́bëëd wɑ bɑ bɑ̈nggi wëyi jwögg-ɑ nyi mɑlli yi teedø kì kömi piny bëne." 
Galatians4:4 De kɑ ɑ́bëën bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Jwøk, ɑöre Wɑ̈de kömi piny, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri ngɑndhɑjø kipe kinni, o bëëde e ying-ɑ thɑ́ Ciggi Mosɑ̀." 
Galatians4:5 De møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni o tyëng-ɑ ying thɑ́ Ciggi Mosɑ̀ ódwöög gen wɑ̈g kì ri kwøbbɑni, o ge ókwɑny yi Jwøk gïn-ɑ́ nyige." 
Galatians4:6 Jwøk ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ nyodhi kinni wu bɑ nyige, ɑöre Wëyi Wɑ̈de yethi pëthee, eni Wëy-ɑ nyi cwöddi kinni, “Abɑ̀! Wïyø!”" 
Galatians4:7 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, yï pɑth ki bɑ̈ng këti, de yï bɑ nyɑre. O jɑmm-ɑ nyi lɑg yi nyigi Jwøk óyod yi yïn ceth." 
Galatians4:8 Cøn, ɑ́dɑ bøli keny mɑ ɑ́bëëd wun Jwøk kwïj yi wun. O wu ɑ́bëëd wu bɑ bɑ̈nggi jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër." 
Galatians4:9 De ɑnɑn, Jwøk ɑ́yod yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ wu ɑ́yod yi en; wu cigu døøg be mɑlli jwöggi piny kidï, gen ɑ jwögg-ɑ nyødh, ɑ bong per gen; wude ɑ dwɑddu døøg be gwøg ki bɑ̈nggi gen?" 
Galatians4:10 E wu kwër-ɑ cyɑ̈ng, kí dwɑ̈tt, kí buddi run, kí run!" 
Galatians4:11 Pyëwɑ ceg-ɑ olïng kiper wun! Gwøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn kì kelli wun bɑ men gɑ̈g? 
Galatians4:12 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, bëëd wu nɑ yɑn, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́rum ki gwøg ni wun. Bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́göggu yɑn." 
Galatians4:13 O ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, wun ɑ ɑ́kwøng yi yɑn ki pwönyø ki wöndøj kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlɑ." 
Galatians4:14 De cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́bëëd dëlɑ rɑɑj kinøw, yɑ nuti gɑggø yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ yɑ nuti benyø yi wun; de yɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi wun, yɑ nɑ wëywöni Jwøk, wɑlɑ̀ men-ɑ́ Mesiy kiree." 
Galatians4:15 Wu ɑ́bëëd pëthi wun omedø! Dɑ́ ngø ɑ ɑ́cwöb? Men-ɑ́ yɑ ɑ́rum kì bøli kenyɑni, kinni nyingi wun bɑ møg di gööl wun wɑ̈g kɑ ge di mëggu yɑn, keløg ɑ́ gïn di cuggi." 
Galatians4:16 Yɑ ɑ́ceg-ɑ gwøg ki ngɑn mɑ̈n ki wun kipe kɑ̀ köbbɑ wun møg-ɑ dyër? 
Galatians4:17 Jiɑni kømm-ɑ kinni per wun teeg yi gen, de gïn-ɑ dwɑddi gwøgø yi gen pɑ døøj. Gïn-ɑ ceg yi gen ki dwɑddø, bɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈ngi wun ki yɑn, kipe kinni o per gen tënge kì yï wun." 
Galatians4:18 Keløg wɑ bɑ wɑdd kì yij yöö men-ɑ myër, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈ng wɑddee kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ tøøk kì kelli wun?" 
Galatians4:19 Yeki nyigɑ! Kiper wun, yɑ nɑ ngɑndhɑjø me ngin ledhi dhø pɑ̈dhi piny, gïti keny-ɑ óløg wun ri wun ngïjji Mesiy." 
Galatians4:20 Yɑ ɑ́rum kinni, yɑ ce di ying-ɑ buti wun ɑnɑn, o cwɑggɑ di wilø, mɑ́ wïjɑ ɑ́muum yi kwøbbi wun." 
Galatians4:21 Wiy yɑ pyëjɑ tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi bëëdø kì thɑ́ Cigg kì kelli wun: møg-ɑ kømmi yi Ciggɑni pɑ lïngi yi wun? 
Galatians4:22 Ciggɑni okööbø kinni i Abrɑhɑm bëëdø yïe dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew; ɑ́kyel bɑ wɑ̈d bɑ̈ng, o ɑ́kyel bɑ wɑ̈d nyɑn-ɑ pɑth ki bɑ̈ng." 
Galatians4:23 De wɑ̈d bɑ̈ng nuti yood ɑ bɑng kwënggi Jwøk, dɑ́ wɑ̈d ngɑn-ɑ bɑ ɑnywøm ɑ ɑ́yod kì bɑng møg-ɑ ɑ́kwëng yi Jwøk." 
Galatians4:24 Kwøbbɑni bɑ gɑ́j, mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møgɑni ryeet, cungi gɑ kɑ̈jji møg-ɑ ɑ́lwøb yi Jwøk gɑ ɑ́ryew. Kyeel gen bɑ Äjer, ɑ nyige ɑ́nywøøl yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø, o cungi ɑ́ kej lwöm-ɑ ɑ́lwøb kì Kïti Sinɑy." 
Galatians4:25 Äjer, cungi ɑ́ kej Kïti Sinɑy, en ɑ bɑ ngïji Yerusɑlem men-ɑ ying yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø ɑnɑn kí jie bënn." 
Galatians4:26 De Yerusɑlem men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl, pɑth ki bɑ̈ng, o en ɑ bɑ meyee." 
Galatians4:27 Mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Med pyëwí, yïn ɑ ngɑn yïí bong nyigí! Ryeer ki medi pyëwí, yïn ɑ ngɑn nuti bel ledhi dhø pɑ̈dhi piny! Mɑ́ nyigi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wiy piny, óbëëdø ge gïïr kibøli nywøli ngɑn-ɑ nuti pɑ̈nyø wiy piny yi jɑlgøle.”" 
Galatians4:28 Anɑn wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wu bɑ nyigi Jwøk, møg-ɑ ɑ́nywøl kì bɑng kwëngge; wu nɑ men-ɑ́ Isɑɑk." 
Galatians4:29 Nɑ kɑ ɑ́bëëde cøn kinni, wɑ̈n-ɑ ɑ́yod kì ri Wëyi Jwøk, ɑ́tuug yi wɑ̈n-ɑ ɑ́yod ki yuu-ɑ nyi nywøøl ji; o bɑ mø ni møgɑni ɑ nud dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Galatians4:30 De wɑ̈nyi kwërø kööb ɑ dï? Okööbø kinni, “Ryem nyɑn-ɑ bɑ bɑ̈ng geki wɑ̈de; mɑ́ wɑ̈d bɑ̈ng pɑ cuggi lɑ̈gø ki jɑmmì kyeel ki wɑ̈d nyɑn-ɑ pɑth ki bɑ̈ng.”" 
Galatians4:31 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wɑ pɑth ki nyigi bɑ̈ng këti, de wɑ bɑ nyigi nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́ceg ki nywømø." 
Galatians5:1 Anɑn, wɑ ɑ́dwöög wɑ̈g kì thɑ́ Ciggi Mosɑ̀ yi Mesiy. Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, bëëd wun wu teeg, kɑ ri wun ko wëggu dwøøg yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø." 
Galatians5:2 Lïng wun! Yɑ Pøøl, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, keløg wu oyïëyø ki ngølø, menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni Mesiy bong pere kì yï wun." 
Galatians5:3 Wu ɑ́rum ki cegø yi yɑn kinni, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́rum ki ngølø, ceg-ɑ Ciggi Mosɑ̀ ki mïdhø bënn ceth." 
Galatians5:4 Tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi gwøg ge tir kì bɑng mïdhi Cigg, ge ceg-ɑ dɑ̈ngø ki Mesiy. Ge tøøk kì yij dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk." 
Galatians5:5 De keløg ɑ́ peree, wɑ ngɑ̈dh-ɑ kinni wɑ ógwøg wɑ tir yi Jwøk; ki tegi Wëyi Jwøk kì bɑng yïëyø miee." 
Galatians5:6 Mɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd yï rëbø ki Yëso Mesiy, bong gïn wil yi ngølí wɑlɑ̀ cögí yï nuti ngølø; gïn-ɑ pere teg, bɑ yïëyø men-ɑ göögø kì ri mɑ̈ɑ̈dø." 
Galatians5:7 Bëëdi wun ɑ́bëëd e døøj! Á men ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n wun gwøgi dyër? Wu ɑ́thɑb yi en ɑ dï? 
Galatians5:8 Kwøbbɑni nuti kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ cwøøl wun yïe." 
Galatians5:9 Teedø nyii kööbø kinni, “Awɑj nyii kwödø yi nyɑ kɑmïrɑ̀ me thiinh.”" 
Galatians5:10 Wu nudd wu ongɑ̈dhø yi yɑn ki mendwøng. Bëëdee kì ri Wë, yɑ ɑ́wëgge ngɑ̈dhi wun, o jɑl-ɑ jud wun, ócɑy yi Jwøk ceth, cɑgg e bɑ men." 
Galatians5:11 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, keløg yɑ di bëëd yɑ ópwönyø kinni ngølø pere teeg, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ guud wɑngɑ? Yɑ pɑ di yïddi ki orɑng thyew kì bɑng kɑ̀ pwönyɑ per yɑdh ɑrïw Mesiy." 
Galatians5:12 Tyëng-ɑ dhɑ̈ɑ̈l wun kipe kwøbbi ngølø, pɑ lɑ̈w keløg jɑmmi gen di ceg yi gen ki ngul wɑ̈g?" 
Galatians5:13 Anɑn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wu ɑ́cwøl yi Jwøk kɑ per kinni o wu dwöög wun wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø. De dwöög wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø, dhɑnhø ko løge ngɑn tyer gøggi gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi dële, de kønyu ri wun ki yuu mɑ̈ɑ̈dø." 
Galatians5:14 Mɑ́ Cigg bënn thum-ɑ́ɑ̀ ri gïjø ɑ́kyel kinni, “Mɑɑr ngɑn-ɑ butí ni kɑ̀ mɑɑr rií.”" 
Galatians5:15 De keløg wu cɑmm-ɑ ri wun ni lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, ri wun ceg yi wun kɑ tyëgø." 
Galatians5:16 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, nyi cyɑ̈dhi wun kì bɑng Wëy. Kɑ pyëw dhɑnhø ko nyi køni ki gïg-ɑ nyi tyer yi dëël dhɑnhø." 
Galatians5:17 Mɑ́ gïg-ɑ nyi tyer yi dëël dhɑnhø bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi Wëy. Ge nyi tyëdd-ɑ ri gen, o menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni wu pɑ wɑ̈dhi gwøg ki gïg-ɑ tyer yi wun." 
Galatians5:18 Keløg wu pyejj-ɑ yi Wëy, wu pɑ ying thɑ́ Cigg." 
Galatians5:19 Gïg-ɑ nyi gøggi yi dhɑnhø nyi bëëd ge ceg-ɑ nënnø kì ri yɑb ki mɑ̈nn, kí niini cwøw ri gen, kí wɑ̈dhi cyɑ̈dhø kì kɑ̈jji orøg," 
Galatians5:20 kí mɑlli ngïjji jwögg, kí thyëdh, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kí liny, kí tyiel, kí mɑngø yi liny, kí döngi pyëw, kí bëëdi ji ge dɑ̈ɑ̈ngø," 
Galatians5:21 kí mud, kí nɑ̈gø yi møgø, kí cyɑ̈ɑ̈mø, kí gøggi gïg ni møgɑni bënn. Yɑ kyëdd-ɑ wun ni kɑ ɑ́kyëddɑ wun cøn kinni, tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø kinøw, Pödhi Jwøk pɑ yod yi gen." 
Galatians5:22 De gïg-ɑ nyi yod yi dhɑnhø kì ri Wëy bɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, kí medi pyëw, kí mër, kí ngïnø, kí tɑri yij, kí døøji burø, kí mïdhi kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi dhɑnhø," 
Galatians5:23 kí möölø geki mɑgi pyëw. O bong cigg mø kyer gïgɑni. 
Galatians5:24 O ji-ɑ bɑ mø Yëso Mesiy, gïg-ɑ nyi yɑb yi dëël dhɑnhø ɑ́rum ki nɑ̈gø yi gen, kyeel ki tyëëdø, kí okøn pyëw ki gen." 
Galatians5:25 Keløg wɑ bëëd ɑ ri Wëy, cyɑ̈dhi wɑ kì bɑng Wëyɑni ceth." 
Galatians5:26 Kɑ wɑ ko tɑ̈d, kɑ riee ko tyëddi wɑ, wɑlɑ̀ riee ko mod wɑ." 
Galatians6:1 Anɑn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, keløg e dɑ ngɑn bɑ̈jji kì kelli wun, tyeny yi tyëng-ɑ yï gen di wëy, de kømmu møgɑni mɑ̈ɑ̈dh. Kɑ ri wun tid wun, kipe wu óthɑb thyew." 
Galatians6:2 Nyi kønyu ri wun ki ɑkørr, o ciggi Mesiy mïdhi yi wun kɑ yuu-ɑ ni menɑni." 
Galatians6:3 Mɑ́ ngɑn rumø ce pere teeg, e pere pɑ teeg kidyër, wëny-ɑ ree kete." 
Galatians6:4 Nenni dhɑnhø bëëde kete. Keløg bëëdí døøj, yï ócuggø lejji rií kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn, de rií ko lejjí kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi ngɑn megø." 
Galatians6:5 Mɑ́ wɑ bënn, ngɑn yïe dɑ gïn peg me tyëdde." 
Galatians6:6 Tyëng-ɑ ceg ki pwönyø ki kwøbbi Jwøk, nywɑg gen jɑmm-ɑ døøj kì yï gen bënn ki jøpwönyi gen." 
Galatians6:7 Ri wun ko nyi wëny wun, mɑ́ Jwøk pɑ cuggi wënyø. Ji ókɑj-ɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈g yi gen ceth." 
Galatians6:8 Keløg ge kɑ̈g-ɑ yij pwödhi gïg-ɑ tyer yi dëlli gen, bɑ thøø ɑ ókɑj yi gen kì yij pwönhɑni; keløg ge kɑ̈g-ɑ yij pwödhi Wëy, ge ókɑ̈jø kì ri Wëyɑni ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer." 
Galatians6:9 Wɑ ko pïd yi gwøg ki gïgdøj, mɑ́ keløg wɑ pɑ pïd, bøli keny-ɑ ókɑj wɑ gïgɑni óbï ceth." 
Galatians6:10 O keløg wɑ óyïddø ki keny göög wɑ, göggi wɑ ji bënn ki gïgdøj, ɑ́ nyiimïee møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy ɑ kwøng ki göggø." 
Galatians6:11 Lidhu møg-ɑ gwëdɑ wun ek, ngëddi gen døngø!" 
Galatians6:12 Tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi wun cïrri ngølø, bɑ tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi lejji rek kipe gïg-ɑ nënni kì ri dëël dhɑnhø. Gïgɑni gøggi yi gen kɑ per kinni o ge ócög nyingi gen pɑ guud kipe yɑdh ɑrïw mi Mesiy." 
Galatians6:13 Cɑgg ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ bɑ ɑngøl, Cigg pɑ mïdhi yi gen, de ge dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o wu ngøl kipe kinni o ri gen lejji gen kipe dëlli wun." 
Galatians6:14 De riɑ ólejjɑ kɑ per yɑdh ɑrïw Wë Yëso Mesiy kete; mɑ́ kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́gurii wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, kömi piny ɑ́göög e ógur wïj yɑdh kì yïɑ, kɑ yɑ ogöögø yɑ ógur wïj yɑdh kì yï kömi piny." 
Galatians6:15 Bong gïn wɑngi yi bëëdi dhɑnhø e bɑ ɑngøl wɑlɑ̀ nuti ngølø, gïn-ɑ pere teg bɑ bëëde e nɑ ngɑn-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø e nyɑ̈n." 
Galatians6:16 Wiy tyëng-ɑ mïdhi ciggɑni kì yij bëëdi gen, yïddi gen ki mër geki lɑ̈mpyëw kyeel ki jii Jwøk bënn." 
Galatians6:17 Ko di ngɑn jud yɑn këti, mɑ́ kedd-ɑ ɑ́rɑngɑ kiper Yëso nudd ge ónënnø kì dëlɑ." 
Galatians6:18 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wiy dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë Yëso Mesiy, yinge kömi wun, wu bënn. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Pøøl, ngeti Wööni Yëso Mesiy kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́dwɑddii yi Jwøk. E gwëd-ɑ jii Jwøk kì Epɑsos, møg-ɑ mïdhi yïëyø mi gen, ge bɑ ɑ́kyel kì ri Yëso Mesiy." 
Ephesians1:2 Wiy wu ónëngi ki dhwɑ̈ng geki mër yi Jwøk Wïyee geki Wë Yëso Mesiy. 
Ephesians1:3 Lenhi wɑ Jwøk Wïyi Wë Yëso Mesiy! Mɑ́ wɑ ɑ́thödhe ki dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ nyi muuj yi wëy e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, kì bɑng bëëdee wɑ rëbø ki Mesiy." 
Ephesians1:4 De kwøbbɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ bɑng kɑ ɑ́yieeny wɑ yi en kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nuti cwɑ̈ɑ̈j piny kipe kinni, o wɑ óbëëd wɑ bɑ ɑkwër kì ri nyingi Mesiy, o óbëëd e bong gïn-ɑ ócɑ̈yyi wɑ yi en. De møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi en ɑ bɑng kɑ̀ mɑɑre wɑ." 
Ephesians1:5 Mɑ́ e ɑ́rum ki cïbø yi Jwøk ceth kinni, wɑ óløge nyige kì ri Yëso Mesiy; o bɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑdde gwøgø ki medi pyëwe." 
Ephesians1:6 Lenhi wɑ Jwøk kipe dhwɑ̈nge, dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ dwøng men-ɑ ɑ́mëgge wɑ kì ri Wɑ̈de ɑ́mɑɑre." 
Ephesians1:7 Mɑ́ wɑ ɑ́gööny wɑ̈g yi remi Mesiy, bɑ kinni orøgee ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny. Dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk pëddi döng;" 
Ephesians1:8 eni dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kønye kömee! Kì bɑng peli wïj geki ngɑ̈nyi kwøb bënn," 
Ephesians1:9 møg-ɑ dwɑdde ɑ́gwøge, kɑ wɑ nyudhe gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwire gɑ møg-ɑ ógwøg kì ri Mesiy." 
Ephesians1:10 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwir yi Jwøk gɑ møg-ɑ ógwøg kì bøli kɑ̈jji gen, bɑ møg-ɑ óreb gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j bënn, kì mɑl kí piny kej ɑ́kyel, ɑ́ Mesiy ɑ bɑ wïj." 
Ephesians1:11 Jɑmmì bënn nyi gwøg kɑ yuu-ɑ ɑ́gwiir gen yi Jwøk, o wɑ ɑ́rum ki myegø yi Jwøk wɑ ɑ́ jie kì ri Mesiy, e ködd-ɑ kömi gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑdde gwøgø ceth." 
Ephesians1:12 Lejji wɑ dönge, wɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki ngɑ̈dhi gïn-ɑ óyod kì ri Mesiy, lenhi wɑ döngi Jwøk!" 
Ephesians1:13 Wun thyew, wu ɑ́göög ki jii Jwøk, keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi wun wöön-ɑ dyër, en ɑ Wöndøj men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yieli wun. Mesiy ɑ́yïëy yi wun, kɑ Jwøk ngïji men-ɑ nyodh kinni wu bɑ møge, thɑɑnye kömi wun, kɑ ɑ́mëgge wun Wëykwërø, ni kɑ ɑ́kööbe ceth." 
Ephesians1:14 Wëykwërø en ɑ bɑ nyuudhi kinni, møg-ɑ ɑ́kwëng yi Jwøk kipe jie bɑ møg-ɑ óyod yi wɑ kì yïe ceth. Menɑni bɑ kinni Jwøk jie ówëgge tɑ̈bbø. Lenhi wɑ dönge!" 
Ephesians1:15 Kɑ Jwøk pwøjɑ kipe kɑ ɑ́lïngɑ kinni Wë Yëso yïëëy wun; o nyiimïee, jii Mesiy mɑɑr yi wun." 
Ephesians1:16 Yɑ nuti wïyø pøjji Jwøk kiper wun, wu nyii pɑrrø yi yɑn ceth kenyi kwɑ̈jjɑ," 
Ephesians1:17 kɑ Jwøøg Wë Yëso Mesiy, Wïy ɑ yïe di mɑ̈r, nyi kwɑjjɑ kinni nënge wun ki Wëy, men-ɑ ónëngi wun ki peli wïj, o Jwøk nyudhe wun, o óbëëde e ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kidøøj." 
Ephesians1:18 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ kinni yiebe wɑ̈thi wun, o cɑre lidh yi wun, o ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø men-ɑ́ pere ɑ́cölle wun yod yi wun. O óyod yi wun thyew kinni, gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kinni gï ómëgge jie bɑ gïg mø døngø." 
Ephesians1:19 Kí kinni, tege men-ɑ göögø kì riee dwøng, wɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy. Teng-ɑ göögø kì riee dwøng nɑ" 
Ephesians1:20 teng-ɑ ɑ́gööge keny-ɑ ɑ́tuge Mesiy kì yij thøø, kɑ gø cïbe wïj kyëje kì mɑl." 
Ephesians1:21 Kɑ Mesiy óyïddø ki tegø kì kömi jyɑ̈ggì bënn, kí dhɑnhø bëne, kí wëy bënn, kí lɑ̈gø bëne. Kɑ nyinge kedh-ɑ mɑl kibøli nying bënn, kì kömi piny men, geki men-ɑ óbï thyew." 
Ephesians1:22 Kɑ jɑmmì bënn cïb thɑ́ tyelli Mesiy yi Jwøk, kɑ gø cïbe kömi jɑmmì bënn, ɑ́ wïj kɑnïsɑ̀," 
Ephesians1:23 ɑ bɑ dëël Mesiy ki këre bëne, eni ngɑn-ɑ nyi muuj jɑmmì bënn." 
Ephesians2:1 Kì tyeli mɑl cøn, wu ɑ́bëëd tïbbi wun thøø kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́bëëd wu ying-ɑ yij orøg." 
Ephesians2:2 Wu ɑ́cyɑ̈dh ɑ bɑng jɑmmi kömi piny kì bøli kenyɑni; wu ɑ́lug ɑ bɑng jɑngi wëyrijjø, wëy-ɑ göögø ɑnɑn kì kelli tyëng-ɑ nudd ge opëmø." 
Ephesians2:3 Wɑ ɑ́bëëd wɑ nɑ jiɑni, wɑ bënn, o wɑ ɑ́bëëd wɑ jɑɑg-ɑ yi dëllee, wɑ nyi gwøg-ɑ gïg-ɑ tyer yi dëllee. Kɑ pëthee nyii kønø ki jɑmmi kömi piny, o wɑ di cɑy yi Jwøk kì ri thumi piny ni ji-ɑ kyeelø bënn." 
Ephesians2:4 De Jwøk ɑ lɑ̈mpyëwe bong cöge, o mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee pɑ nyi lwënyi," 
Ephesians2:5 wɑ ɑ́thödhe ki nënnì kì ri Mesiy, ngö wɑ ɑ́bëëd tïbbee thøø. Wu ɑ́yiel kɑ dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk." 
Ephesians2:6 Kì bɑng rëbee ki Yëso Mesiy, wɑ ɑ́kïdhe mɑl, o wɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈g wɑ kyeel ki en kì mɑl." 
Ephesians2:7 Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi en kɑ per kinni, o döngi dhwɑ̈nge geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee kì ri Yëso Mesiy, lidh yi rïjj-ɑ óbï." 
Ephesians2:8 Wu ɑ́yiel kɑ dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk, kì bɑng yïëyø," 
Ephesians2:9 de pɑth ki bɑng gwøg, o bongii ngɑn lejji ree." 
Ephesians2:10 Wɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk wɑ nɑ kɑ̀ nënni wɑ ɑnɑn, kɑ wɑ thödhe ki bëëdø me nyɑ̈n kì ri Yëso Mesiy kipe gwøngdøj men-ɑ ɑ́pyël yi en ɑ́ men gwøg yi wɑ." 
Ephesians2:11 Wu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nywøl wu pɑth ki Yeud; wu cwølli wun ɑ́ “tyëng-ɑ nuti ngølø” (men nyodh gïn-ɑ gwøg yi ji kì dëlli gen); pɑrri wun kër-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wun cøn. 
Ephesians2:12 Wu ɑ́bëëd wu lɑ̈wi ki Mesiy, kì bøli kenyɑni. Wu ɑ́bëëd wu bɑ tyëngpɑth; wu tøøk kì kelli ji-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk. Ábëëd e bong kej wun kì yij lwöbø, men-ɑ ɑ́bï kì bɑng kwënggi Jwøk møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbe jie, o wu ɑ́bëëd kì kömi piny men e bong gïn ngɑ̈dh yi wun, o yï wun bong Jwøk." 
Ephesians2:13 De kɑ ɑ́rëbi wun ki Yëso Mesiy, wu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wu lɑ̈wi, wu ɑ́nyïïg yi remi Mesiy." 
Ephesians2:14 Mɑ́ Mesiy kiree ɑ ɑ́thödhi wɑ ki mër, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́gwøge Yeud kí tyëngpɑth ki Yeud, gɑ ji ɑ́kyel; kɑ dör-ɑ ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen cøøre piny." 
Ephesians2:15 Ciggi Mosɑ̀ ɑ́cuunge kí kwööng gen, kipe kinni o ɑkuddɑni ryeet rebe ree, o ge göög gen ki ji ɑ́kyel, o bëëde e dɑ mër kì kɑɑm gen." 
Ephesians2:16 O gï rebe ki Jwøk kì ri thøwe kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, kɑ gï gwøge gɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel." 
Ephesians2:17 Mesiy ɑ́bï, kɑ Wöndøj mi mër pwönye ji bënn – wu ɑ́pwönye wu tyëng-ɑ pɑth ki Yeud, ngö wu ɑ́bëëd wu lɑ̈wi ki Jwøk, kɑ Yeud tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge cyɑ̈gi ki Jwøk pwönye thyew." 
Ephesians2:18 Bɑ ri Mesiy ɑ rëbi yi wɑ kì yij wëy ɑ́kyel, Yeud kí tyëng-ɑ pɑth ki Yeud, wɑ ɑ́rëbi kì yij wëy ɑ́kyel kì bøli Wïy." 
Ephesians2:19 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, wu pɑth ki tyëngpɑth këti, wɑlɑ̀ wu pɑth ki wëdhh. De wu bɑ jii Jwøk, ni Yeud ceth." 
Ephesians2:20 Wun thyew, wu ógeer-ɑ kömi tyeli ød men-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi tyëngwöödø, o kïn-ɑ mïdhi ønɑni bɑ Yëso Mesiy kiree." 
Ephesians2:21 En ɑ mïdhi ønɑni ree mɑɑg en kidøøj, gø løge’ kengi kwër, men thyëyi Wë." 
Ephesians2:22 Kɑ̀ rëbi wun kì ree thyew, wu ógeer-ɑ kej ɑ́kyel ki tyëng-ɑ kyeelø, wun ɑ́ keny bëëd yi Jwøk kì ri Wëye." 
Ephesians3:1 Bɑ kiper møgɑni ɑ kwɑjjɑ Jwøk, yɑ Pøøl; yɑ bɑ ɑmɑɑg Yëso Mesiy kiper wun, wu tyëng-ɑ pɑth ki Yeud." 
Ephesians3:2 Wu ɑ́rum ki lïngø ki kwøbbi dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk, men-ɑ ɑ́mëgge yɑn ɑ́ men göögɑ kiper wun." 
Ephesians3:3 Møg-ɑ ɑ́gwir gɑ ɑkɑnn yi Jwøk, gï ɑ́nyudhe yɑn. (Yɑ ɑ́gwëëd ki kwøb mø nøg kì ri møgɑni," 
Ephesians3:4 o keny-ɑ órɑng wun møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed yi yɑn, gïg-ɑ ɑ́dïd yi yɑn kì ri møg-ɑ ɑkɑnn kì ri Mesiy, óyod yi wun.)" 
Ephesians3:5 Ji ɑ́bëëd ge nuti nyudhi ɑkɑnn møgɑni cøn, de ge ɑ́yɑl yi Jwøk ɑnɑn kì ri Wëy, kɑ gï nyudhe tyëngwöödø geki jøtöng møge, gen ɑ tyëng kwërø." 
Ephesians3:6 Kwøbb-ɑ ɑkɑnn møgɑni bɑ kinni, tyëngpɑth ki Yeud ɑ́yïddi kì ri kwëngg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Yeud yi Jwøk, kì bɑng wöndøj; o ge ying-ɑ ri dël ɑ́kyel, ge nywɑg-ɑ kwënggi Jwøk, kì ri Yëso Mesiy." 
Ephesians3:7 Yɑ ɑ́gwøg yɑn ɑ́ ngɑn pwönyi Wöndøj, ki tegø men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Jwøk." 
Ephesians3:8 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ yingɑ cyɑ̈n kibøli jii Jwøk bënn; yɑ ɑ́nëngi yi Jwøk ki dhwɑ̈ng kipe kinni, o tyëngpɑth ki Yeud pwönyi yi yɑn ki kwøbbi kɑ̈ɑ̈r Mesiy; kɑ̈r-ɑ bong cöge," 
Ephesians3:9 o ji bënn nyudhɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́gwir gɑ ɑkɑnn yi Jwøk, kí kër-ɑ ógwøøg møgɑni;" 
Ephesians3:10 o møg-ɑ ɑ́gwire ki peli wïje yod kì yï kɑnïsɑ̀, kì bøli keny-ɑ di wɑ ɑnɑn, yi jyɑ̈ggi wëywödd møg-ɑ mɑl geki wëy-ɑ yï gen di tegø." 
Ephesians3:11 Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk e ködd-ɑ kömi møg-ɑ ɑ́gwire gɑ møg gïti ɑtheer, ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen kì ri Wë Yëso Mesiy," 
Ephesians3:12 Kɑ̀ yïëy wɑ ngɑ̈dhi Mesiy, ngëddee ceg-ɑ tëngø, kɑ wɑ kedh-ɑ bøli Jwøk e pëthee pɑ lïngø." 
Ephesians3:13 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun kinni, pëthi wun ko nyönhi kì bɑng kɑ̀ rɑngɑ kiper wun; mɑ́ møgɑni bënn bɑ kipe dönyi wun." 
Ephesians3:14 Bene ɑ bɑnge rumɑ cøngɑ piny, yɑ mɑll-ɑ Wïyee," 
Ephesians3:15 mɑ́ nying-ɑ cwølli kɑ̈llì bënn kì mɑl kí piny, kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïe." 
Ephesians3:16 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ yïe di mɑ̈r, o wu nënge kì ri Wëy; ki tegø men tëngi pëthi wun." 
Ephesians3:17 O yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ kinni, o Mesiy bëëde kì pëthi wun kì bɑng yïëyø mi wun. O yɑ ókwɑ̈jjø kipe kinni o byerri wun niyeeng gen piny kì yij mɑ̈ɑ̈dø," 
Ephesians3:18 o wu yïddi wun, wuki jii Jwøk bënn, ki tegø men yod wun këër lɑ̈j geki bɑ̈r, kí dörø geki ludhi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi Mesiy." 
Ephesians3:19 Ngee, bëëdi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi Mesiy óyod yi wun – cɑgg e pɑ cuggi yodø bëne – codhe, o wu pɑ̈ng wun yi ngɑ̈nyi këër bëëdi Jwøk." 
Ephesians3:20 Lenhi wɑ Jwøk, ɑ bogïn dhɑlii; ngɑn-ɑ tegø mee göögø kì riee, o gööge ki gïg mø ngenyø kibøli møg-ɑ ɑ́cwøl yi wɑ, wɑlɑ̀ mø pɑ cuggi kɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi wɑ̈thee." 
Ephesians3:21 Lenhi wɑ Jwøk kì kɑnïsɑ̀, kì ri Yëso Mesiy, kì yethi rïjj bënn, gïti ɑtheer! Amen." 
Ephesians4:1 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun – yɑ ngɑn-ɑ bɑ ɑmɑg kipe Wë: bëëd wun ki bëëdø me kyëëw ki cwøl-ɑ ɑ́cwøøl wun yi Jwøk." 
Ephesians4:2 Nyi bëëd wun, wun ɑ́ mööl, e bong dhɑ̈w kì pëthi wun. Nyi ngïïn wun, kɑ wu nyi guum wun ki kwøb kì bɑng mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk." 
Ephesians4:3 Nyi tyeru bëëdø kì kej ɑ́kyel ki mër, mɑ́ kwøbbɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri Wëy." 
Ephesians4:4 Wu bɑ dëël dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel; kí Wëy ɑ́kyel, ni kɑ̀ bëëd gïn ngɑ̈dh men-ɑ́ pere ɑ́cölli wun yi Jwøk bɑ ɑ́kyel." 
Ephesians4:5 O Wïi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel, kí yïëyø ɑ́kyel, kí jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø ɑ́kyel." 
Ephesians4:6 Kí Jwøk ɑ́kyel, en ɑ Wïyee bënn, ngɑn-ɑ rïïm piny bëne, ɑ göögø kì ri jɑmmì bënn, o nud kì yethi jɑmmì bënn." 
Ephesians4:7 Wɑ ɑ́yïddi, wɑ bënn ki dhwɑ̈ng; ngɑn ɑ́mëgg-ɑ men-ɑ kyëëw ki en yi Mesiy." 
Ephesians4:8 Ni møg-ɑ kømmi yi wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhe yij mɑl kun lɑ̈wi, ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈d ki ɑmɑggi liny mø ngenyø; kɑ teedø thödhe ki jɑmmì mø gïïr.”" 
Ephesians4:9 Kɑ̀ kwøbii kinni, “ɑ́kedhi mɑl” wɑng-ɑ ngø? Wɑng-ɑ kinni ɑ́ceg-ɑ kwöngø ki kedhi piny thɑ lɑ̈bø." 
Ephesians4:10 Bɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́bï piny, ɑ ɑ́kedhi mɑl, kɑ mɑl pöödhe, o lɑ̈bø bëne bëëde e pɑ̈ngø yi en." 
Ephesians4:11 En ɑ nyi muujø; kɑ kwï ji gwøge gɑ tyëngwöödø; kɑ møøgø gwøge gɑ jøtöng; møøgø bɑ tyëng kwøbbi Jwøk; o møøgø bɑ ókwër; møøgø bɑ jøpwönyø. 
Ephesians4:12 Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi en kɑ per gwiri jii Jwøk bënn kipe göggi jii Mesiy, kipe geri dëël Mesiy." 
Ephesians4:13 O wɑ rëbi wɑ bënn kì yij yïëyø miee, geki dïdee Wɑ̈d Jwøk, göög wɑ ki tyëngdøngø, kɑ wɑ bɑ̈ri wɑ, o wɑ̈thee pɑ̈ɑ̈r gen ki wïj Mesiy." 
Ephesians4:14 Codhe, o wɑ bëëd wɑ pɑth ki othønhø mø wɑ̈dhi ki wøjjø yi ɑpɑgø, kɑ ge nyi køøl kun kí kun yi yømi pwönyi tyëngwëënyø, møg-ɑ nyi peej tyëng-ɑ kyeelø pɑ̈l ki pel." 
Ephesians4:15 De bëëd wɑ, wɑ kømm-ɑ dyër kì ri mɑ̈ɑ̈dø. O kɑnïsɑ̀ kedhe e ódøngø ni kenyi døngi dhɑnhø, mɑ́ kɑnïsɑ̀ pɑ̈r ki dëël dhɑnhø, dɑ́ Mesiy ɑ bɑ wïj." 
Ephesians4:16 Kɑ̀ jɑɑge dël bëne, bɑ en ɑ mïdhi gïg-ɑ ri dëlɑni gɑ ɑ́kyel ki nyingi cu. Gïjø ɑ́kyel kɑ̀ gööge kidøøj, bɑ dël bëne ɑ døngi, e ger kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø." 
Ephesians4:17 O yɑ köbb-ɑ wun ki nyingi Wë kinni, wu ko ngöyi këti ki bëëdi tyëng-ɑ kwïj Jwøk, ɑ rømmi gïg bong per gen," 
Ephesians4:18 ge ying-ɑ yij muudhø. De kɑ̀ bëëd gen ge kwïj wøw kinøw, ge lɑ̈wi ki yuu Jwøk, mɑ́ ge kwïj wøw, o muddi gen teeg." 
Ephesians4:19 Dëlli gen pɑ nyi ì ywɑ̈y, o wɑ̈thi gen pɑ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈y. Kɑ ge ogöögø ki ji mø mɑɑr gwøg ki orøg geki gïgrijjø bënn." 
Ephesians4:20 Møgɑni pɑth ki gen ɑ ɑ́dïd yi wun kì ri Mesiy. 
Ephesians4:21 Kwøbbi Mesiy nuti lïngø yi wun? Wu nuti pwönyø ki kwøbb-ɑ dyër kì ri Mesiy? 
Ephesians4:22 Adɑ́ wiy wun bëëdø mi tyeli mɑl, eni bëëdø men-ɑ ɑ́wëggi wun rënyø yi wëënyø geki gïg-ɑ tyer yi pëëth." 
Ephesians4:23 Gwøg wun minni wun geki pëthi wun gɑ møg nyɑ̈n," 
Ephesians4:24 kɑ wu kwɑny wun dël-ɑ nyɑ̈n, eni dël-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j ɑ́ ngïji Jwøk, men-ɑ nyodh ree kì ri bëëntir kí bëëdi tyëng kwërø." 
Ephesians4:25 Bong pyed këti cyee! Nyi kømmu dyër ki ri wun, mɑ́ wu bɑ ɑ́kyel kì ri dëël Mesiy." 
Ephesians4:26 Keløg yï omɑgø yi liny, rií ko wëggi peej yij orøg yi linyɑni, kɑ cɑ̈ng ko tyëëg pyëwí rɑɑj." 
Ephesians4:27 Cethɑn ko thödhí ki kej wɑng. 
Ephesians4:28 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge okwɑ̈dø, wiy gen kwɑl, kɑ ge göög gen ki cinggi gen, o ge ócuggi gen ki kønyi tyëng-ɑ jɑdø." 
Ephesians4:29 Yï ko nyi kööb ki kwøb mø ledh, de nyi kømmí kwøb mø med; kwøbb-ɑ kunyi ki tyëny, o tyëng-ɑ lïngi kwøbbɑni óyïddi gen ki døøjø." 
Ephesians4:30 Pyëw Wëyi Jwøk kwërø ko wëggu rënyø; mɑ́ Wëyɑni ɑ ɑ́thɑɑny kömi wun ɑ́ ngïji men nyodh kinni wu bɑ mø Jwøk, o bɑ en ɑ bɑnge óyieel wun, obëën Cyɑ̈ngɑni." 
Ephesians4:31 Wiyu keji pëëth, kí wëërø, kí yɑ̈d. Wu ko nyi kööb wu óryeerø kɑ ri wun ko nyi jɑnggi wun." 
Ephesians4:32 De bëëd wun ki tɑri pëëth, kí möölø, kɑ pëthi wun nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m gen ki ri wun, ni kɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw Jwøk ki wun kì ri Mesiy." 
Ephesians5:1 Kɑ̀ bëëd wun, wun ɑ́ nyigi Jwøk møg-ɑ mɑɑr yi en, pɑ̈nyu ri wun ki bëëdø wu nɑ en." 
Ephesians5:2 Nyi bëëd wun kì yij yuu mɑ̈ɑ̈dø thyew, ni kɑ ɑ́mɑɑr wɑ yi Mesiy, kɑ ree muuje kiperee, ɑ́ gëëdhi me yømi tole med, men mïni pyëw Jwøk." 
Ephesians5:3 Mɑ́ wu bɑ jii Jwøk, kwøbbi yɑb ki mɑ̈nn, kí gwøg ki gïgrijjø geki döngi pyëw ko pɑ̈nyi ki lïngø kì kelli wun." 
Ephesians5:4 O wu pɑ myëër ki kømmi møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l lɑ̈ɑ̈yi wɑ̈ɑ̈th, kí kwøbbi dhëëgø geki ɑthwøg. De nyi bëëd wun wu pøjj-ɑ Jwøk." 
Ephesians5:5 Bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ngɑn nuti nywøøm gen ri gen; kí tyëng-ɑ nyi gøggi gïgrijjø; kí tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen døngø; ge koo yïddi ki kɑ̈jji gen kì pödhi Mesiy geki Jwøk." 
Ephesians5:6 Ri wun ko wëggu wënyø ki kwøbb-ɑ pɑth ki dyër, mɑ́ pyëw Jwøk nyii rënyø ki tyëngpëëmø." 
Ephesians5:7 Wu ko nyi rëbi ki ji-ɑ ni møgɑni. 
Ephesians5:8 Wun kiri wun, wu ɑ́bëëd ɑ yij muudhø, de kɑ ɑ́göög wun ki jii Wë, wu ying-ɑ yij cɑr. Kɑ wu bëëd wun cyee ki bëëdi jii cɑr." 
Ephesians5:9 Mɑ́ cɑr nyi nywøl-ɑ døøjø kí bëëntir, kí dyër." 
Ephesians5:10 Dïd wun ki gøggi gïg-ɑ nyi mïni pyëw Wë. 
Ephesians5:11 De wu ko nyi yïëy ki gwøg ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi teedø kì yij muudhø, de nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈lu gïgɑni yij cɑr." 
Ephesians5:12 Gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg kì yij muudhø wɑ̈ɑ̈th nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈yø yi gen; cɑgg ɑ́ ngɑn kwøb gen, wïje nyi ceg-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈yø." 
Ephesians5:13 Keny-ɑ órum jɑmmì bënn ki kɑ̈ɑ̈l yij cɑr, këër bëëdi gen ceg-ɑ nënnø;" 
Ephesians5:14 mɑ́ gïn-ɑ bɑ ɑnyodh, kɑ ónënnø nyi ceg-ɑ gwøg ki cɑr. Bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́kwøbii kì yethi wör møøgø kinni, “Dhwödhí mɑl, yï ngɑn-ɑ nin, dhwöödh kì yij thøø, o Mesiy mëënye kì kömí.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Gwiru wɑ̈thi wun ki kër-ɑ bëëd wun. Wu ko bëëd ni ji mø kwïj wøw, de bëëd wun wɑ̈thi wun pel." 
Ephesians5:16 Ko di gïndøj men wëggu bodhø, mɑ́ rɑj gïïr yethi cyɑ̈ng møg." 
Ephesians5:17 Wu ko bëëd wɑ̈thi wun nøg, de nyi yɑbu yodi gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk." 
Ephesians5:18 Ri wun ko nyi wëggu nɑ̈gø yi møgø, mɑ́ wu órënyi yi en; de pɑ̈ng wun yi Wëy." 
Ephesians5:19 Nyi kööb wun wu pɑrr-ɑ kwøbb-ɑ yethi wör, kɑ wu nyi wör wun, wu lenh-ɑ Jwøk ki wörri pwøj ki pëthi wun bënn." 
Ephesians5:20 Nyi pwøj wun Wïy Jwøk kipe jɑmmì bënn, ki nyingi Wë Yëso Mesiy." 
Ephesians5:21 Nyi lïngu dhøggi wun; kipe kɑ̀ wør wun Mesiy. 
Ephesians5:22 Wun ɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, nyi yïëyu jɑɑgø yi cwøwi wun ni kɑ̀ jɑɑg wun yi Wë." 
Ephesians5:23 Mɑ́ jɑlø yïe dɑ tegø kì kömi cyëge ni kɑ̀ bëëd Mesiy yïe dɑ tegø kì kömi kɑnïsɑ̀; o Mesiy bene ɑ bɑ yïëni kɑnïsɑ̀, ɑ løg dële." 
Ephesians5:24 Jɑɑg tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn yi cwøwi gen, ni kɑ̀ jɑɑg kɑnïsɑ̀ yi Mesiy ceth." 
Ephesians5:25 Wun ɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw, mɑɑr wun mɑ̈nni wun, ni kɑ̀ mɑɑr kɑnïsɑ̀ yi Mesiy, kɑ wëye muuje kipere," 
Ephesians5:26 kipe kinni o kɑnïsɑ̀ thyëye Jwøk ki kwøbbe, keny-ɑ órume lwøgø ki pï;" 
Ephesians5:27 o kɑnïsɑ̀ óthyëyye ree e myëër, o dhïw e bong gïn gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ree, o ree bong jweng, o bong keny me rɑɑj kì ree." 
Ephesians5:28 Jøg-ɑ cwøw, mɑɑr gen mɑ̈nni gen, ni kɑ̀ mɑɑr gen dëlli gen ceth. Jɑl-ɑ mɑɑr cyëge, ree omɑɑrø yi en thyew." 
Ephesians5:29 (Mɑ́ bong ngɑn mɑɑn dële, de gø nyi korre’ korrø ceth, ni kɑ̀ korri kɑnïsɑ̀ yi Mesiy," 
Ephesians5:30 mɑ́ wɑ bɑ gïg ying ri dële.) 
Ephesians5:31 Bene ɑ bɑnge nyi wiy jɑlø wïye geki meye, kɑ ómɑ̈gø kì ri cyëge, kɑ ge ogöögø ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel." 
Ephesians5:32 Men bɑ gïjø me pere teg men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e nuti nyodhø cøn; yɑ kømm-ɑ bëëdi Mesiy geki kɑnïsɑ̀. 
Ephesians5:33 Wu bënn, mɑɑr dhɑnhø cyëge ni kɑ̀ mɑɑre ree, kɑ ngɑndhɑjø wøre jɑlgøle." 
Ephesians6:1 Othønhø, lïngu kwøbbi wëëg wun geki mëëg wun, mɑ́ menɑni bene gïn-ɑ døj ki gwøgø yi tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì bɑng Wë." 
Ephesians6:2 “Wør wïyí kí meyí” bene cigg-ɑ bɑng gen di kwëng; 
Ephesians6:3 “o yï óyïddí ki døøjø, o runní óngënyi gen kì yij piny.”" 
Ephesians6:4 Wun ɑ wëëg kí mëëg, nyigi wun ko nyi göggi wun ki gïg rënyi pëthi gen. De pidhu gen ge opwönyø yi wun ki ciggi Wë geki bëëndøj." 
Ephesians6:5 Wun ɑ bɑ̈ngg, nyi lïngu kwøbbi tyëng-ɑ cinggi gen bëëd yi wun kì kömi piny. Wør wun gen ki mendwøng ni kenyi wør wun Mesiy." 
Ephesians6:6 Nyi göög wun ceth cɑgg wu pɑ nenni yi gen, mɑ́ wu pɑ göögø kɑ per kinni o wu ópøjji yi gen, de gwøg wun gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk ki medi pëthi wun, mɑ́ wu bɑ bɑ̈nggi Mesiy." 
Ephesians6:7 Göög wun pëthi wun omedø, wu ce gögg-ɑ Wë, de pɑth ki ji yøw." 
Ephesians6:8 Bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, ji bënn ókøøg yi Jwøk kipe gwøngdøj, cɑgg ge bɑ bɑ̈ngg wɑlɑ̀ ge bëëd-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen." 
Ephesians6:9 Wu tyëng-ɑ yï wun di bɑ̈ngg, mïdhu bɑ̈nggi wun ki bëëndøj, kɑ ge ko nyi cɑ̈rri wun. Kɑ wu bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny wøw ceth kinni Wïi wun ki gen bɑ ɑ́kyel kì mɑl; ji pɑ̈r kì yïe, o bong ngɑn geny yi en." 
Ephesians6:10 Møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn kì cyɑ̈n bɑ kinni, cwed wun pëthi wun, kɑ wu ngɑ̈dhu tegi Wë." 
Ephesians6:11 Løny wun ɑ́dhedheg men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøk ri wun, o wu ócuggi wun ki cung kì bøli wëënyø mi Ngɑnrɑj." 
Ephesians6:12 Mɑ́ wɑ pɑ nyïɑ̈ggi kɑ ji mø ri gen di dël kí remø, de wɑ nyïɑ̈ggi kɑ wëyi lɑ̈bø bëne; gen ɑ jɑgg, kí wëy-ɑ yï gen di tegø, kí wëyrijjø." 
Ephesians6:13 De løny wun ɑ́dhedheg Jwøk! Kipe kinni o wu ócungi wun kì kɑ̈jji wun obëën cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng rɑj; o wu ópëggu kɑ̈jji wun, keny-ɑ órum liny ki nyɑgø." 
Ephesians6:14 Kɑ wu cungi wun kì kɑ̈jji wun, yethi wun dɑ wëni dyër, e köddi wun bɑ bëëntir," 
Ephesians6:15 o wɑrri wun bɑ Wöndøj mi mër. 
Ephesians6:16 Kɑ yïëyø mi wun nyi kɑ̈llu ceth ɑ́ kwöd, mɑ́ en ɑ ókëëj wun nywøli weth mø Ngɑnrɑj, møg-ɑ dhøggi gen di mɑc." 
Ephesians6:17 Kɑ kwøbbi yielø cïb wun wɑ̈thi wun ɑ́ ɑcudh, kɑ kwøbbi Jwøk kwɑny wun gɑ pilø men-ɑ mëggi wun yi Wëy." 
Ephesians6:18 Nyi gwøg wun møgɑni bënn wu ókwɑ̈jjø kipe kunyi Jwøk. Nyi kwɑ̈jji wun kì bøli kɑ̈jj bënn, wu pyejj-ɑ yi Wëy. Bëëd wun ri wun tyeeny wun ceth, kɑ köthi wun ko buudh; kɑ wu nyi kwɑ̈jji wun ceth kipe jii Jwøk." 
Ephesians6:19 Nyi kwɑjji wun Jwøk kiperɑ thyew, kipe kinni o yɑ nyi nënge ki wöödø kenyi kømmɑ kwøb; o yɑ ókööbɑ yɑ pɑ böggi kenyi kwøbɑ kwøbb-ɑ ɑkɑnn mø Wöndøj." 
Ephesians6:20 Yɑ bɑ cwɑ̈ɑ̈g Jwøk, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ yingɑ ød mɑg ɑnɑn. Nyi kwɑ̈jji wun ceth, kipe kinni o yɑ kööbɑ ki tegi pyëwɑ ni kɑ̀ dwɑddii yi Jwøk." 
Ephesians6:21 Tikikøs, ómïee, nyel-ɑ bɑ bɑ̈ng Wë bɑ̈ng-ɑ dyër, wu óköbbe, o kër-ɑ bëëdɑ yod yi wun, o wöddɑ bënn ómuuje wun." 
Ephesians6:22 Áörɑ yï wun kɑ per kinni o wu óköbbe kër-ɑ bëëd wøn, o wu ócïj yi en thyew." 
Ephesians6:23 Wiy mër kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk Wïyee geki Yëso Mesiy Wɑ̈de, bëëd gen kì pëthi nyiimïee bënn, kì bɑng yïëyø." 
Ephesians6:24 Wiy dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk yinge kömi ji-ɑ mɑɑr Wë Yëso Mesiy ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men koo lɑ̈ɑ̈ny. 
Philippians1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï bɑ̈nggi Yëso Mesiy, gen ɑ Pøøl geki Timøthì. Ge gwëd-ɑ jii Jwøk bënn kì Pïlïpì, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ rëbø ki Yëso Mesiy, kí jɑggi kɑnïsɑ̀ geki tyëng-ɑ kunyi." 
Philippians1:2 Wiy dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk Wïyee geki Yëso Mesiy, yinge kömi wun." 
Philippians1:3 Jwøgee nyii pwøjø yi yɑn kenyi rumɑ kì ri wun. 
Philippians1:4 Kenyi kwɑjjɑ Jwøk kiper wun, yɑ nyi kwɑ̈jji pyëwɑ omedø." 
Philippians1:5 Mɑ́ wɑ nudd wɑ nywɑg-ɑ gwøg ɑ́kyel, en ɑ pwönyi Wöndøj." 
Philippians1:6 O yɑ orumø ceth kinni Jwøk, ɑ ɑ́cɑg gwøngɑni kì ri wun, óbëëd e nudd e ogöögø ceth kì ri wun, pïd keny-ɑ óthume kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë Yëso Mesiy." 
Philippians1:7 Pyëwɑ ying-ɑ kömi wun ceth! O bɑ gïjø me døøj kɑ̀ rumɑ kinøw kiper wun. Mɑ́ gwøng-ɑ gwøg yi wɑ bɑ ɑ́kyel, eni gwøng-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Jwøk; cɑgg yɑ ying ød mɑg ɑnɑn, kí keny-ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggɑ kipe kinni o Wöndøj cïb piny kidøøj." 
Philippians1:8 Ngɑ̈nyi yi Jwøk kinni yɑ nyi kømm-ɑ dyër, kenyi kööbɑ kinni rumm-ɑ rømmɑ kiper wun kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Yëso Mesiy." 
Philippians1:9 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøk kinni o mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi wun kedhe e ódøngø, kì bɑng dïdø geki ngɑ̈nyi wøw," 
Philippians1:10 o wu ócuggi wun ki myegi gïn-ɑ pëddi døøjø. Codhe, o wu óbëëd wu dhïw, o bongii gïn pere ócɑɑy wun cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óbëën Wë." 
Philippians1:11 O wu óbëëd wun ki bëëndøj men-ɑ nyi yod kì ri Yëso Mesiy, kipe lejji Jwøk kí dhømme." 
Philippians1:12 Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o yod yi wun, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ kinni, gïg-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömɑ ɑ́kunyi ki tɑyi Wöndøj." 
Philippians1:13 Cɑgg ɑ́ kwøbbi bëëdɑ yɑ bɑ ɑmɑg kipe Mesiy ɑ́tɑy, kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ yij gøldwøng." 
Philippians1:14 Kɑ nyiimïee mø gïïr, yïëyø mi gen ótëngø kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́mɑɑg yɑn, kɑ ge ti-ɑ pëddø ki pwönyi kwøbbi Jwøk, ge pɑ böggi." 
Philippians1:15 O bɑ dyër thyew kinni kwï gen pwönyi kɑ tyiel, o møøgø pwönyi kɑ tɑri pyëw," 
Philippians1:16 o ge göög-ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, ge ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi Jwøk, yɑn ɑ́ ngɑn nyɑg per Wöndøj." 
Philippians1:17 De tyëng-ɑ pwönyi kwøbbi Mesiy ki tyiel, ge dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, o yɑ nɑ̈g yi rummì kì ød mɑg." 
Philippians1:18 Møgɑni bong per gen, mɑ́ kwøbbi Mesiy opwönyø ki yëëth bënn, cɑgg tyëngɑni pwönyi kɑ tyiel wɑlɑ̀ tɑri pëëth. O yɑ ócög pyëwɑ omedø," 
Philippians1:19 mɑ́ yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni yɑ ógøny kì bɑng kwɑ̈jji wun, kí kuny-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Mesiy." 
Philippians1:20 Gïn-ɑ tyer yi pyëwɑ ki mendwøng bɑ kinni, yɑ ko dhɑl yi gwøgɑ, o yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ kinni, o yɑ göögɑ yɑ pɑ böggi, o yɑ göögɑ ki pyëwɑ bëne, o Mesiy ólejji, cɑgg yɑ nëënø wɑlɑ̀ yɑ thøø." 
Philippians1:21 Nënnì bɑ ngø? Kì yïɑ, nënnì bɑ Mesiy. O thøø bɑnge óyïddi ki mø ngenyø." 
Philippians1:22 De keløg bëëdɑ yɑ onëënø dɑ gïndøj me nywøle; kwïjɑ cyee ying yɑ myeg-ɑ nënnì wɑlɑ̀ thøø; 
Philippians1:23 yɑ ɑ́dɑɑg yi møgɑni; yɑ tyer-ɑ wiyi nënnì, o yɑ yingɑ buti Mesiy, o bene men-ɑ lɑ̈w." 
Philippians1:24 De bëëdɑ kì kelli wun pere pëddi tegø, kipe kinni o wu køny yi yɑn." 
Philippians1:25 Møgɑni nennɑ gɑ dyër, o yɑ óbëëdø ceth kì kelli wun, o wu ókønyɑ ki kedhi bøli wun, o wu óyïddi wun ki medi pyëw geki yïëyø," 
Philippians1:26 o keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ yï wun, o ri wun óti yi wun ki lejjø kì ri Yëso Mesiy." 
Philippians1:27 Anɑn, gïn-ɑ pere teg bɑ kinni, o wu bëëd wun ki bëën-ɑ kyëëw ki Wöndøj mi Mesiy. O cɑgg yɑ pɑ bï yï wun, yɑ órïïj yɑ olïngø ceth kinni i pëthi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel, o rummi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel, o wu göög ɑ kej ɑ́kyel kipe Wöndøj mi Mesiy." 
Philippians1:28 Wu ko böggi yi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn wun, de cwed wun pëthi wun, o óyod yi gen kinni bong gïn-ɑ óyod yi gen, de gwøøg wun ópɑ̈dhi keje, mɑ́ Jwøk ɑ nyi muuj tyɑ̈mø." 
Philippians1:29 De dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøk pɑth kiper mïdhi yïëyø kete, de wu ɑ́thödhe ki orɑng thyew kipe nyingi Mesiy." 
Philippians1:30 Anɑn yɑ ócuggø kønyø yi wun ki nyɑɑg. Bɑ liny-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wun e onyɑɑgø yi yɑn cøn, o wu olïngø ɑnɑn kinni yɑ nudd yɑ ónyïɑ̈ggø." 
Philippians2:1 Wu ceg kɑ gwøgø wu teeg yi bëëdø kì ri Mesiy, o wu ceg-ɑ yïddø ki ywömø kì ri mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, wu nywɑg-ɑ Wëy kí døøjø, wu mɑɑr-ɑ ri wun." 
Philippians2:2 De kɑ̀ bëëd møgɑni kinøw, nyi bëëd wun pëthi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel, o mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel, o burø mi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel, o rummi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel thyew, kipe kinni, o medi pyëwɑ pɑ̈dhe keje." 
Philippians2:3 Ko di gïn gwøg yi dhɑnhø kipe cwɑgge kete, wɑlɑ̀ ko di gïn gwøg yi dhɑnhø ki döngi pyëwe. De bëëd dhɑnhø e orumø kinni, pɑth ki en ɑ døj kete." 
Philippians2:4 Dhɑnhø ko nyi yɑb gïn-ɑ døj kipere kete, de nyi rume kipe ji møøgø." 
Philippians2:5 Nyi rum wun ki rummi Yëso Mesiy. 
Philippians2:6 Bëëde bɑ bëëdi Jwøk ceth, de nuti dwɑddi kinni o cöge e obëëdø ki tegø, e pɑ̈r ki Jwøk." 
Philippians2:7 De ree ɑ́dwööge cyɑ̈n, e kete, kɑ kwɑny-ɑ bëëdi bɑ̈ng. Ágöög e nɑ dhɑnhø, e nënni ɑ́ dhɑnhø ceth" 
Philippians2:8 Ácyɑ̈dh-ɑ möölø kí yömi yïthh, e meer-ɑ thøø thøw-ɑ ɑ́thøwe wïj yɑdh ɑrïw." 
Philippians2:9 Bene ɑ bɑnge tïngii mɑl ki mendwøng yi Jwøk kɑ gø cɑ̈gge ki nying mø ying mɑl kibøli nying-ɑ cwöddi bënn. 
Philippians2:10 O kipe wøri nyingi Yëso, gïg-ɑ nëënø bënn kì mɑl kí piny, kí thɑ piny cøngi gen órum gen piny," 
Philippians2:11 kɑ ge okööbø kinni Yëso Mesiy bɑ Wë. kipe lejji Jwøk Wïy. 
Philippians2:12 Anɑn wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, kɑ̀ bëëd møgɑni kinøw, yïëyu møg-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn yɑ lɑ̈wi ɑnɑn; ki yïëyø me lod yïëyi møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́yingɑ kelli wun. Göög wun ki gwøng teg wu óböggø, dëlli wun okïrrø kipe yieli wun," 
Philippians2:13 mɑ́ Jwøk ceg-ɑ gwøg ceth kì ri wun, o wu løge møg tyer lïngi kwøbbe." 
Philippians2:14 Nyi gwøg wun jɑmmì bënn wu pɑ nguni, wɑlɑ̀ wu pɑ pëmø." 
Philippians2:15 Møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni o wu cög wun yï wun bɑ̈r ki orøg, o óbëëd e bong cɑ́y kì kömi wun, ni nyigi Jwøk, møg bëëdø kì kömi piny me rɑj, kì kelli tyëngorøg. Bëëd wun wu omënyø kì kelli gen ni kyelli mɑl," 
Philippians2:16 kɑ̀ mëggu gen wööni nënnì. Keny-ɑ ógöög wun kinøw, riɑ ólejjɑ kiper wun kì Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Mesiy, mɑ́ menɑni ónyodh-ɑ kinni, pïdø miɑ bëne kí gwøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ nuti gɑ̈gø." 
Philippians2:17 Keløg yɑ ónɑ̈g, kɑ remɑ dëëm-ɑ piny ɑ́ gëëdhi men-ɑ mëggi Jwøk yi yïëyø mi wun, pyëwɑ ceg-ɑ mïnø kyeel ki wun, wu bënn." 
Philippians2:18 Bëëd wun pëthi wun med thyew kyeel ki yɑn. 
Philippians2:19 Keløg ɑ́ gïn dwɑddi yi Jwøk, Timøthì óörɑ yï wun kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh. Mɑ́ pyëwɑ ómïni keny-ɑ ólïngɑ per wun kì yïe." 
Philippians2:20 Bong ngɑn megø me tyer kwøbbi wun ni en. 
Philippians2:21 Mɑ́ ji-ɑ kyeelø bënn, nyi gøgg-ɑ mø cwɑggi gen, de yï gen bɑ̈r ki kwøbbi Yëso Mesiy." 
Philippians2:22 De ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kenyi køny yɑn yi Timøthì ki pwönyi Wöndøj; ɑ́bëëd e nɑ kenyi køny dhɑnhø yi wɑ̈de ki gwøg. 
Philippians2:23 Timøthì ójwɑn yi yɑn ki ör yï wun, kì bɑng keny-ɑ óyodɑ gïn-ɑ ócwöb kiperɑ." 
Philippians2:24 De yɑ orumø kinni yɑ ókøny yi Wë, kɑ yɑ bï-ɑ yï wun, kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh." 
Philippians2:25 Pyëwɑ med ki Epɑprøditøs ómïee, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́køny yɑn ki gwøg, kɑ yɑ kønye ki liny, kɑ nyi örɑ yï wun." 
Philippians2:26 Pyëwe tyer-ɑ bëën be lidhi wun bënn, o pyëwe olïngø thyew, mɑ́ kwøbbi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dële ɑ́lïngi yi wun." 
Philippians2:27 Kidyër, ɑ́bëëd dële orɑ̈mø, kɑ køm-ɑ thøø, de Jwøk pyëwe ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki en, kɑ obødhø. De pyëwɑ ɑ́mïni, mɑ́ keløg e di thøw, yɑ di kïïm ki mendwøng." 
Philippians2:28 Bene ɑ dwɑddɑ örii yï wun ceth, kipe kinni o pëthi wun pëggi gen piny keny-ɑ ólidhu en." 
Philippians2:29 Kɑ óyïëy wun ki medi pëëth, ni ómï wun ceth kì ri Wë. Nyi wør wun ji-ɑ ni en ceth," 
Philippians2:30 mɑ́ e ɑ́ceg-ɑ böyø, kɑ køm-ɑ thøø kì bɑng gwøøg Mesiy, kipe kinni o yɑ mëgge gïjø me pɑ di lwɑ̈ng yi wun ki mëggi yɑn." 
Philippians3:1 Møg-ɑ gwëdɑ wun kì cyɑ̈n bɑ kinni, nyi bëëd wun pëthi wun med kì ri nyingi Wë. Cɑgg wu cigɑ gwëdø ki møg ni mø tyeli mɑl, yɑ pɑ pïd, mɑ́ wɑ̈nyø men-ɑ gwed yi yɑn bɑ men kor wun." 
Philippians3:2 Nyi koru ri wun kipe ji-ɑ nyi wɑ̈dhi gwɑ̈y ni gwögg yøw. Kɑ ri wun kor wun kipe tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø ki gïgrijjø. Kɑ ri wun kor wun thyew kipe tyëng-ɑ nyi rënyi dëlli gen ki ngølø. 
Philippians3:3 Bɑ wɑ, de pɑth ki gen ɑ ɑ́kwɑny ngøl-ɑ dyër, mɑ́ Jwøk kwɑjji yi wɑ kɑ Wëye, e pëthee med kì bɑng kɑ̀ bëëd wɑ rëbø ki Yëso Mesiy. Wɑ pɑ ngɑ̈dhi gïg-ɑ gøggi kì ri dël." 
Philippians3:4 Yɑ di bëëd yɑ gɑ̈nn-ɑ gïg ni møgɑni, keløg ji bënn di gɑ̈nn-ɑ møgɑni." 
Philippians3:5 Mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́ngøl kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi yɑn piny. O yɑ bɑ wɑ̈d Isrɑil, kì gøl Ben Yɑmïn; yɑ bɑ dïl wɑ̈d Ibru. O keløg ɑ́ per mïdhi Cigg, yɑ ɑ́ying-ɑ yij ɑkuud Jøpɑresì," 
Philippians3:6 o yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ pëddi tyiel, kɑ wɑɑng kɑnïsɑ̀ guudɑ. O kipe bëëntir men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi mïdhi Cigg, bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́bɑj yi yɑn." 
Philippians3:7 Gïgɑni di yod yi yɑn gɑ gïgdøj, de ge ɑ́göög ge bong nyingi gen kì yïɑ, mɑ́ Mesiy ɑ pere teg." 
Philippians3:8 Pɑth ki møgɑk keti gen; de jɑmmì bënn bong nyingi gen kì yïɑ kipe gïn-ɑ pere pëddi tegø, ɑ løg ngɑ̈nyi Wɑ̈ɑ Yëso Mesiy. Jɑmmì bënn ɑ́weddɑ kipere; jɑmmì bënn ɑ́bɑnyɑ kipe yodi Mesiy," 
Philippians3:9 o yɑ óbëëdɑ kì ree. O bëëdtir cöge e pɑ yod yi yɑn kì bɑng mïdhi Cigg, de yod yi yɑn kì bɑng yïëyi Mesiy, o bene bëëntir men-ɑ nyi muuj yi Jwøk kì bɑng Yïëyø." 
Philippians3:10 Gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ bɑ yodi Mesiy, kí teng-ɑ ɑ́dhwödhe kì yij thøø, o yɑ yïddɑ kì ri orɑnge, o riɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈rɑ ki en kì yij thøwe," 
Philippians3:11 yɑ ngɑ̈dh-ɑ kinni yɑ ótug kì yij thøø. 
Philippians3:12 De yɑ pɑ ceg kwøb kinni, møgɑni ɑ́rum ki yodø yi yɑn, wɑlɑ̀ kinni bëëdɑ ɑ́rum ki pɑ̈dhi keje. De yɑ nudd yɑ odyëjø kipe kinni o kwøbbɑni ti ki yodø yi yɑn, ni kɑ ɑ́yood kwøbbɑ yi Mesiy." 
Philippians3:13 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, yɑ pɑ rumø kinni, bëëdɑ ɑ́rum ki pɑ̈dhi keje, de gïn-ɑ tyer yi yɑn bɑ kinni, o wïjɑ wïle ki møg-ɑ ɑ́pöödh, o yɑ nennɑ gïg-ɑ óbï." 
Philippians3:14 De yɑ ceg-ɑ dyëjø ki ngwej, o ji yöömɑ kun-ɑ rengi, o köögi ókwɑny yi yɑn, o köögi menɑni bɑ cwøøli ji yethi nënnì yi Jwøk kì pɑn-ɑ mɑl, kì ri Yëso Mesiy." 
Philippians3:15 Nyi rum wɑ kinøw, wɑ tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì yij yuu-ɑ bɑ óbödh. De keløg yï wun dɑ rummì møøgø, ge óti ki nyudhi wun yi Jwøk." 
Philippians3:16 Møg-ɑ ɑ́rum ki yodø yi wɑ gɑ dyër, ko wiy wɑ; de mïdhi wɑ gen kidøøj." 
Philippians3:17 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, ngøy wun bëëdɑ, kɑ tyëng-ɑ bëëdø ni wɑ nyi tid wun." 
Philippians3:18 Wu ɑ́rum ki köbbø yi yɑn, o wu cigɑ’ köbbø ɑnɑn e pïi nyingɑ órïngø kinni, dɑ ji mø gïïr, mø bëëd bëëdø me wëggi gen gwøg ki ji mø mɑ̈n ki yɑdh ɑrïw Mesiy." 
Philippians3:19 Ge ókïdhi yij mɑc, mɑ́ jwøøg gen bɑ gïn-ɑ tyer yi dëlli gen. Ge thwøg kɑ per gïn di ceg gen yɑ̈rø, o ge rømm-ɑ per gïg-ɑ bɑ mø kömi piny." 
Philippians3:20 De wɑ bɑ tyëng mɑl, o wɑ yïd-ɑ bëëni Yëso Mesiy Yïënee; keny-ɑ óbëëne e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl." 
Philippians3:21 Bɑ en ɑ ówil dëllee, møg-ɑ ying riee ɑnɑn, o gï gwøge gɑ ngïjji dële, dël-ɑ di mɑ̈r; møgɑni ógwøge ki tege men-ɑ jɑɑge jɑmmì bënn." 
Philippians4:1 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, per wun teeg, o kej wun ɑ́dwɑ̈ddi kì yïɑ. Pyëwɑ med, o riɑ nyi lejjɑ’ lejjø kiper wun. Gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, bɑ kinni mɑ̈gi wun kì ri Wë, kɑ wu cungi wun wu teeg." 
Philippians4:2 Euodiyɑ̀ wuki Sintikɑ̀, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun, kinni rëbi wun, ki rëbi nyiimëëg kì ri Wë." 
Philippians4:3 Kɑ yïn thyew, yi ngɑn-ɑ göögø kyeel ki wøn, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, kinni køny tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møgɑni, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́køny yi gen ki gwøøg pwönyi Wöndøj. Gen kí Kelement, kí ji-ɑ ɑ́køny yɑn bënn, nyingi gen bënn bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyi nënnì." 
Philippians4:4 Bëëd wun pëthi wun med, wu rëbø kì ri Wë. Yɑ ceg-ɑ kwøb këti kinni med pëthi wun." 
Philippians4:5 Wiy døøji buri wun lidh yi teedø bëne. Mɑ́ bëëni Wë ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. 
Philippians4:6 Pëthi wun ko wëggu olïng. De nyi kwɑjju Jwøk kipe gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun; nyi kwɑjju en e opøjjø yi wun. 
Philippians4:7 O mër møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk; mër-ɑ dhɑ̈li gɑmø yi wïj dhɑnhø, minni wun geki rummi wun ókore, wu rëbø kì ri Yëso Mesiy ceth." 
Philippians4:8 Kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n kwøbbɑ, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, yɑ köbbɑ wun kinni, cïbu rummi wun ri gïg-ɑ bɑ dyër, gïg-ɑ døøj, ɑ ri gen bong ruj, kí rɑj; kí gïg-ɑ døøj ki lïngø bënn, kí dhwɑ̈ng geki gwøng bɑnge nyi yood pwøj." 
Philippians4:9 Nyi göög wun kì ri møg-ɑ ɑ́dïd yi wun, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wun kì yïɑ. O wu ókøny yi Jwøøg mër." 
Philippians4:10 Pyëwɑ med ki mendwøng kɑ ɑ́døøg wun be kønyi yɑn, o møgɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Wë. Kidyër, kwøbbɑni ɑ́bëëd ge nud kì pëthi wun cøn, de bong keny mɑ ɑ́yod yi wun men kønyu yɑn."
