Philippians4:11 Anɑn, bong gïn rømmi yi yɑn këti kipe kwøbbi jɑdɑ. Mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́dïd ki bëëdø kinøw, de bong gïjø megø me yɑbɑ këti, de yɑ ócöög ri gïn-ɑ nud kì yïɑ ceth." 
Philippians4:12 Jɑdø ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, o ngenyi jɑmmì ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn thyew. Cɑgg kɑ̈j nud wɑlɑ̀ kɑ̈j bogøn, cɑgg rɑ̈jø nud wɑlɑ̀ rɑ̈jø bogøn, yɑ dïdø ki rugi gen bënn." 
Philippians4:13 Mɑ́ yïɑ dɑ tegø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Wë kipe gwøg ki jɑmmì bënn. 
Philippians4:14 De bɑ gïjø me døøj kɑ ɑ́kønyu yɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́rɑngɑ. 
Philippians4:15 Wun ɑ tyëng Pïlïpì, ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, kɑ ɑ́dhwödhɑ kì Mɑkdöniyɑ̀, kër-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gɑ ki pwönyi Wöndøj, bong kɑnïsɑ̀, mɑ ɑ́køny yɑn ki ngyëny den-ɑ́ wun keti wun." 
Philippians4:16 Yɑ ɑ́ödi yi wun ki jɑmmì, tyelø ɑ́kyel wɑlɑ̀ tyel ɑ́ryew, keny-ɑ ɑ́jɑdɑ yɑ ying-ɑ Tesɑlonikɑ̀." 
Philippians4:17 Møgɑni pɑ kwøb yi yɑn kɑ per kinni yɑ nyi mɑɑr-ɑ thödhø, dɑ́ kipe kɑ̀ tyerɑ kinni, o kwɑnni jɑmmi wun møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwedd, lidhɑ ge óngënyø." 
Philippians4:18 Bong gïn cɑ̈nni yɑn këti, mɑ́ gïg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi wun ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Epɑprøditøs, o ge gïïr thyew kibøli møg-ɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ddi yɑn. Gïgɑni nɑ gëëdhi, me yøme med, men mëggi Jwøk; o gø yïëye ceth ki medi pyëwe." 
Philippians4:19 Wiy gïg-ɑ jɑ̈ddi wun bënn, mëggi wun yi Jwøk kì kelli gïgdøj bënn møg-ɑ ying yï Yëso Mesiy kì pɑre mɑl." 
Philippians4:20 Wiy nyingi Jwøk Wïyee nyi lenhi gïti ɑtheer! Amen. 
Philippians4:21 Mɑ̈dhu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwër gɑ jii Yëso bënn. Wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi nyiimïee møg-ɑ buti gen bëëdɑ. 
Philippians4:22 Kɑ wu mɑ̈dh yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwër gɑ jii Jwøk, de tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈dh wun ki mendwøng, bɑ tyëng-ɑ göögø kì gøl Rɑ̈nhdwøng." 
Philippians4:23 Wiy dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë Yëso Mesiy yinge kömi wun. 
Colossians1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Pøøl, ɑ bɑ bɑ̈ng Yëso Mesiy ni kɑ ɑ́dwɑddii yi Jwøk, geki Timøthì ómïee." 
Colossians1:2 Ge öd-ɑ jii Jwøk kì Kölösì, gen ɑ nyiimï wøn møg-ɑ ɑ́rëbi ki wøn kì ri Mesiy. Wiy dhwɑ̈ng geki mër møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk Wïyee ying gen kömi wun." 
Colossians1:3 Wø nyi pwøj-ɑ Jwøk, Wïyi Wë Yëso Mesiy, kenyi kwɑ̈jji wøn kiper wun." 
Colossians1:4 De gïn-ɑ pere nyi pwøj wøn Jwøk bɑ kipe kɑ ɑ́lïng wøn kinni, i wu yïëyø ki ngɑ̈dhi Mesiy ɑ́ Yïëdi, kí kɑ̀ mɑɑr wun tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwër gɑ jii Jwøk bënn." 
Colossians1:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi wöön-ɑ dyër; en ɑ Wöndøj ki bëën yï wun, kwøbbi gɑ̈ɑ̈nø men-ɑ nyi muuj yi en ɑ́lïngi yi wun. O yïëyø kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi wun ködd-ɑ kömi gïn-ɑ gɑ̈nni yi wun, men-ɑ mïdhi kì mɑl ɑ́ men-ɑ ómëggi wun." 
Colossians1:6 Wöndøj nudd e ókɑ̈nø ki gyëdh, o ceg-ɑ tɑɑy kömi piny bëne, ni kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe yï wun ceth, kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kwøøng per dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk ki lïngø yi wun, kɑ bëëde yod yi wun kidyër." 
Colossians1:7 Kwøbbi dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk ɑ́lïngi yi wun ɑ yï Epɑprɑs, ómïee nyel-ɑ göögø kyeel ki wøn ki gwøøg Mesiy ki pyëw ɑ́kyel." 
Colossians1:8 Wø ɑ́köbbe kwøbbi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Wëykwërø. 
Colossians1:9 Bene ɑ pere nyi kwɑ̈jji wøn kiper wun, wø ɑ́cɑ̈gi ki kwɑ̈j ɑ bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi wøn møgɑni ceth. Wø ókwɑ̈jjø kipe kinni, o wu nyudhi yi Jwøk ki møg-ɑ dwɑdde; o wu thödhe ki peli wïj geki ngɑ̈nyi wøw møg-ɑ nyi muuj yi Wëye." 
Colossians1:10 O wu ócuggi wun ki bëëdø ki yuu-ɑ dwɑddi yi Wë, wu gøgg-ɑ gïg mïni pyëwe; wu gwøg-ɑ gïgdøj kì yij bëëdi wun, kí dïdi mø Jwøk." 
Colossians1:11 Wiy wu óthödhi yi Jwøk ki tege, o wu ócuggi wun ki ngïnø ki jɑmmì bënn. O Wïy ópwøj yi wun ki medi pëthi wun; eni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wëggi wun nywɑ̈g ki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Jwøk gɑ mø jie, kì pödhi cɑr." 
Colossians1:12  
Colossians1:13 Wɑ ɑ́døm yi en, kɑ wɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì yij tegi muudhø, kɑ wɑ kïdhe pödhi Wɑ̈de, Wɑ̈n-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑre," 
Colossians1:14 en ɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́døm wɑ, kɑ orøgee lɑ̈ɑ̈nye." 
Colossians1:15 Mesiy bɑ ngïji Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ pɑ nyi lidh. En ɑ bɑ Wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø, ɑ dwøng kibøli gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j bënn." 
Colossians1:16 Mɑ́ ree ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j jɑmmì bënn; møg-ɑ mɑl kí møg-ɑ kömi piny; møg-ɑ nënni, kí møg-ɑ pɑ nënni; kí wëy-ɑ jyɑ̈gø; kí wëy-ɑ yï gen di tegø; kí jɑggi wëy bënn. Lɑ̈bø bëne ɑ́cwɑ̈j-ɑ ree gøn ɑ́ mee yi Jwøk." 
Colossians1:17 Mesiy ɑ́bëëd e nud keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd jɑmmì bënn bogïn, o en ɑ ree ɑ́cïb jɑmmì bënn kɑ̈jji gen." 
Colossians1:18 En ɑ bɑ wïj kì ri dële, o dëlɑni bene kɑnïsɑ̀; o en ɑ ree kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi nënni dëlɑni. Bene Wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø men-ɑ ɑ́tug kì yij thøø, kipe kinni o óyinge mɑl kì ri jɑmmì bënn." 
Colossians1:19 Mɑ́ Jwøk ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi kinni, o Wɑ̈de bëëde ni en ceth." 
Colossians1:20 Jwøk lɑ̈bø bëne ɑ́dwøøge yïe kì ri Wɑ̈d; mër ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Jwøk ki remi Wɑ̈de kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, codhe ɑdwøøge jɑmm-ɑ mɑl kí piny bënn yïe." 
Colossians1:21 Kɑ̈ge dööng, wu ɑ́bëëd wu mɑ̈n ki Jwøk, kì bɑng gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi wun kí møg-ɑ ɑ́rømmi yi wun." 
Colossians1:22 De ɑnɑn Jwøk ɑ́mërri ki wun, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́thøw Wɑ̈de, kipe kinni o wu dwøøge yïe ki këër wun, wu dhïw, e bong gïn gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ri wun." 
Colossians1:23 De mïdhu møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi wun ceth, kɑ wu bëëd wu teeg; ri wun ko wëggu rungø, kɑ wu ko wïyi ki ngɑ̈dhi Wöndøj men-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wun. Bɑ kipe Wöndøj menɑni ɑ ɑ́göögɑ yɑ nɑ bɑ̈ng, eni wöndøj men-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi dhɑnhø bëne kì kömi piny." 
Colossians1:24 Anɑn, pyëwɑ med kɑ̀ rɑngɑ kiper wun, o kwï orɑɑng Mesiy tyëëgɑ ri dëlɑ, kipe dëël Mesiy, ɑ bɑ kɑnïsɑ̀." 
Colossians1:25 Yɑ ɑ́løg bɑ̈ng kɑnïsɑ̀ yi Jwøk kiper wun. Mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́mëgge’ gwøøg pwönyi wööne ki këre bëne; 
Colossians1:26 gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́wöni gɑ ɑkɑnn kì yethi rïjj bënn, de ɑnɑn gï ɑ́nyudhe jie." 
Colossians1:27 Møg-ɑ ɑ́gwir yi Jwøk, bɑ kinni o møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ ɑkɑnn nyudhe jie; eni gïn-ɑ myër, ɑ bong gïn jɑ̈ddi kì ree, ɑ ɑ́mïdhe ɑ́ mi ji bënn. O ɑkɑnnɑni bɑ kinni, Mesiy ying-ɑ ri wun, o menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni wu óyïddi kì ri dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk." 
Colossians1:28 Bɑ kwøbbi Mesiy ɑ pwönyi ji bënn yi wøn. Møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni o ji bënn bëëd gen rummi gen cyegø kì ri kwøbbi Mesiy. 
Colossians1:29 O bɑ kipe gwøgi møgɑni ɑ nyïɑ̈ggɑ kì bɑng tegø men-ɑ nyi muuj yi Mesiy, ɑ́ men göögɑ." 
Colossians2:1 Wiy wu köbbɑ kër-ɑ ɑ́göögɑ ki gwøng teg kiper wun, kí per tyëng-ɑ Lɑwdikiyɑ̀, kí tyëng-ɑ kwïj yɑn bënn." 
Colossians2:2 O pëthi gen tëngi gen, o ri gen ti yi gen ki mɑɑrø, o ge óyïddi gen ki kɑ̈r-ɑ nyi muuj yi dïdø men-ɑ dyër. O møg-ɑ nuti nyodhø yi Jwøk yod yi gen, gen ɑ møg-ɑ ceg bëëdø gɑ Mesiy kiree." 
Colossians2:3 Mɑ́ ngɑ̈nyi wøw geki dïdø møg-ɑ per gen teg, yod ɑ ri Mesiy." 
Colossians2:4 Møgɑni köbbɑ’ wun kipe wu ówëny yi tyëng-ɑ nyi pɑnggi wɑ̈thi ji. 
Colossians2:5 Cɑgg yɑ tøøk kì kelli wun, wëyɑ nud kì buti wun ceth. De pyëwɑ med kɑ̀ lïngɑ kinni, i wu ying-ɑ kɑ̈jji wun, o wu nuti wïyø ki ngɑ̈dhi Mesiy." 
Colossians2:6 Kɑ ɑ́rum wun ki yïëyi Yëso Mesiy ɑ́ Wïi wun, bëëd wun kì ree ceth." 
Colossians2:7 Nyi bëëd wun pëthi wun teeg kì ri yïëyø, ni kɑ ɑ́pwönyi wun. Kɑ Jwøk nyi pwøj wun ki mendwøng." 
Colossians2:8 Koru ri wun, o wu cög wu pɑ thɑb yi tyëng-ɑ nyi cwølli ri gen gɑ tïddi kwøb møg-ɑ nyi wɑ̈dhi ji ki wënyø yøw, mɑ́ kwøbb-ɑ pwönyi yi gen kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri kwööng ji geki wëyi kömi piny, de ge pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri pwönyi Mesiy." 
Colossians2:9 Mesiy kete ɑ ree di bëëdi Jwøk bëne, kì ri bëëde ɑ́ dhɑnhø." 
Colossians2:10 O wu ɑ́yïddi ki nënnì kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rëbi wun ki en. En ɑ dwøng kì kömi wëy-ɑ jyɑ̈gø bënn, kí møg-ɑ yï gen di tegø." 
Colossians2:11 Wu ɑ́ngøl-ɑ ri Mesiy; o wu nuti ngølø kɑ cing, de wu ɑ́ngøl kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈li dëël orøøg dhɑnhø wɑ̈g, o menɑni bene ngøl mi Mesiy." 
Colossians2:12 Mɑ́ keny-ɑ ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g wun, wu ɑ́ceg kɑ konyø kyeel ki en, kɑ wu odhwödhø kyeel ki en thyew; kipe kɑ ɑ́yïëy wun ki tegi Jwøk; teng-ɑ ɑ́tugii kì yij thøø." 
Colossians2:13 Wu ɑ́bëëd wu thøø yi gööj orøøg wun, kí bëëdi wun wu nuti ngølø. De Jwøk wu ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le yethi nënnì ɑnɑn kì ri Mesiy. Orøgee bëne ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi Jwøk;" 
Colossians2:14 körri orøgee ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì kömee; kɑ gï gure wïj yɑdh ɑrïw. 
Colossians2:15 O kì wïj yɑdh ɑrïw, Mesiy wëy-ɑ jyɑ̈gø geki møg-ɑ yï gen di tegø ɑ́tyɑme; kɑ gï køøle gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
Colossians2:16 O bëëde e bong ngɑn thödhi wun ki cigg kipe gïg-ɑ cɑm geki gïg-ɑ mɑdh yi wun; kí ciggi cyɑ̈nggi wööwø, kí cɑ̈gi dwɑ̈y, kí cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth." 
Colossians2:17 Gïgɑni bënn bɑ tïbbi gïg-ɑ óbï dhuki megø; de dyër ceg bëëdø ɑ́ Mesiy. 
Colossians2:18 Wu ko yïëy cɑyø yi tyëng-ɑ kööbø ce per gen teg, kì bɑng møg-ɑ nyi cɑ̈rri gen, kí gwøgi ri gen gɑ mööl, kí mɑlli wëywödd. Cɑgg ge nënni per gen teeg, møg-ɑ kømmi yi gen, kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri rummi dhɑnhø yøw, o ge pɑth ki dyër," 
Colossians2:19 mɑ́ ri gen ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈w yi gen ki Mesiy, ɑ ceg bëëdø ɑ́ wïj men-ɑ thödhi dël ki tegø; o bɑ en ɑ mïdhi dël gø mɑɑg en kej ɑ́kyel ki nyingi cu, o dëlɑni ceg-ɑ piidhø ni kɑ̀ dwɑddii yi Jwøk." 
Colossians2:20 Wu ɑ́thøw kyeel ki Mesiy, kɑ wu kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì thɑ́ ciggi wëy-ɑ jyɑ̈gø kì kömi piny. Á kipe ngø ɑ bëëd wun wu nɑ tyëng kömi piny men? Á kipe ngø ɑ mïdhu cigg-ɑ kööbø kinni," 
Colossians2:21 “Gïn ko kwɑɑny,” “Gïn-ɑni ko cɑɑm,” “Gïn-ɑni ko nywɑɑl”?" 
Colossians2:22 Ciggɑni bënn kyer-ɑ gïg-ɑ ógöögø ge bong per gen, keny-ɑ ógwøøg gen; ngee, ciggɑni geki pwönyɑni bɑ kwøbbi ji yøw." 
Colossians2:23 Ge nënni ge nɑ kwøbbi peli wïj, kɑ̀ di ri gen mɑ̈ddø kí möölø geki juudi dëël dhɑnhø; de bong gïn gwøg yi gen, kipe mɑ̈ɑ̈ni gïg-ɑ tyer yi dëël dhɑnhø." 
Colossians3:1 Wu ɑ́rum ki tugø kì yij thøø kyeel ki Mesiy, kɑ pëthi wun cïb wun ri jɑmm-ɑ yij mɑl, kun-ɑ bëëd yi Mesiy kì wïj kyëëj Jwøk." 
Colossians3:2 Cïb wun rummi wun ri jɑmm-ɑ kunɑni, kɑ wu ko rum kì ri jɑmm-ɑ kömi piny." 
Colossians3:3 Mɑ́ wu ɑ́thøw, o wëyi wun ókɑɑn ri Mesiy kì yï Jwøk." 
Colossians3:4 O kì bøli keny-ɑ ócwöb Mesiy, ngɑn-ɑ bɑ nënni wun, wu ócwöb kyeel ki en kì yij dhwɑ̈nge." 
Colossians3:5 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, nɑ̈g wun jɑmmi kömi piny, møg-ɑ göögø kì ri wun; ni niini ji-ɑ nuti nywøøm ri gen; kí gøggi gïgrijjø, kí tyeri gïgrijjø, kí ngöng, kí döngi pëëth (mɑ́ döngi pëëth bɑ wɑdd ki niini ji-ɑ nuti nywøøm ri gen)." 
Colossians3:6 Mɑ́ cɑ́yi Jwøk nyi bï-ɑ kömi tyëngpëëmø møg-ɑ nyi göögø ki gïgɑni. 
Colossians3:7 Wun kiri wun, wu ɑ́bëëd wu gøgg-ɑ gïg ni møgɑni." 
Colossians3:8 De ɑnɑn, wiyu gïgɑni bënn; ko di liny, kí wëërø, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Ko di yɑ̈d, kɑ kwøbb-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ni ki lɑ̈ɑ̈yi wɑ̈ɑ̈th ko wöl wun ki tïng dhøggi wun." 
Colossians3:9 Wu ko nyi kööb ki kwøbbi pyed, mɑ́ bëëdi tyeli mɑl ɑ́wiy yi wun." 
Colossians3:10 Kɑ bëëdø men-ɑ nyɑ̈n, men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l bɑng ngɑ̈nyi Jwøk yod wun. Kɑ ri wun løg wun ngïji ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j wun." 
Colossians3:11 O møgɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kinni, bong gïn bɑ̈ɑ̈n këti kì kɑɑm Yeudì ki ngɑn pɑth ki Yeudì; wɑlɑ̀ kɑɑm ngɑn-ɑ óngølø ki ngɑn nuti ngølø; wɑlɑ̀ kɑɑm tyëng-ɑ dhøg gen kwïj ki tyëng-ɑ wïïnø kì pɑ̈l; wɑlɑ̀ kɑɑm bɑ̈ng ki ngɑn cyɑ̈dhi wïje. Dɑ́ Mesiy ɑ ree røøm, o en ɑ rïbø." 
Colossians3:12 Wun ɑ bɑ jii Jwøk; wu ɑ́mɑɑr yi en, kɑ wu myege wun ɑ́ jie. Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, nyi ywöngi yethi wun ki wɑddi wun, kɑ wu bëëd wun ki tɑri pëëth, kí möölø, kí bëëndøj geki ngïïnø." 
Colossians3:13 Nyi guum wun kwøbb-ɑ ledh kì kelli wun; nyi wiy wun wɑddi wun kenyi cɑɑg gen wun piny. Nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m pëthi wun ki ri wun ceth, ni kɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw Wë ki wun." 
Colossians3:14 Wiy mɑ̈ɑ̈dø yinge mɑl kibøli jɑmmì bënn, mɑ́ bene en ɑ nyi reb jɑmmì kej ɑ́kyel bënn." 
Colossians3:15 Wiy mër men-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Mesiy bëëde kì kelli wun thyew, mɑ́ wu ɑ́cwøl yi Jwøk kɑ per kinni o wu bëëd wun kì ri mërɑni, o wu göög wun ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel. Kɑ wu bëëd wun wu ceg-ɑ pwøj ceth." 
Colossians3:16 Bëëd wööni Mesiy kí kɑ̈re bëne kì pëthi wun. Kɑ ri wun pwönyi wun ki kwøbbi peli wïj bënn. Nyi wör wun ceth ki wörri pwøj, geki wörri kwër; nyi wör wun wu pøjj-ɑ Jwøk ki pëthi wun bënn." 
Colossians3:17 Kɑ møg-ɑ nyi kømmi, geki møg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi wun bënn, nyi gwøøg gen ki nyingi Wë Yëso, e Jwøk Wïyee opøjjø yi wun kì ree." 
Colossians3:18 Anɑn, wun ɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, nyi yïëyu jɑɑgø yi cwøwi wun, mɑ́ e bɑ gïjø me myër kipe tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀." 
Colossians3:19 Wun ɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw, mɑɑru mɑ̈nni wun. Kɑ ge ko nyi jɑngi wun." 
Colossians3:20 Othønhø, nyi lïngu kwøbbi wëëg wun kí mëëg wun, mɑ́ møgɑni med kì pyëw Wë." 
Colossians3:21 Wun ɑ wëëg, pëthi nyigi wun ko nyi wëggu rënyø, kipe nyingi gen óbɑɑr." 
Colossians3:22 Wun ɑ bɑ̈ngg, nyi gwøg wun gïn-ɑ kwøb yi tyëng-ɑ cinggi gen bëëd yi wun ceth; pɑth ki kenyi bëëd wu onennø yi gen kete, de nyi göög wun ki pyëw ɑ́kyel, wu wør-ɑ Wë." 
Colossians3:23 Kɑ gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi wun bënn nyi gwøg wun ki medi pëëth, wu ce gögg-ɑ Wë, de pɑth ki ji." 
Colossians3:24 Kɑ wu bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny wøw ceth, kinni wu ónëngi yi Wë ki köögi, mɑ́ wu gögg-ɑ Mesiy Wë." 
Colossians3:25 O ngɑn-ɑ gøggi rɑj, óyod-ɑ kööngi gwøge, mɑ́ Jwøk dhɑnhø nyi mëgge’ kööng-ɑ kyëëw ki gwøge ceth." 
Colossians4:1 Wu tyëng-ɑ yï wun di bɑ̈ngg, mïdhu bɑ̈nggi wun ki bëëndøj, kɑ ge ko nyi jɑngi wun. Kɑ wu bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny wøw ceth kinni yï wun dɑ Wïi wun thyew kì mɑl." 
Colossians4:2 Wu ko nyi wïyi ki kwɑjji Jwøk, kɑ nyi pwøj wun." 
Colossians4:3 Kɑ wu nyi kwɑ̈jji wun kiper wøn thyew, kipe kinni o yuu pwönyi wøn yieb yi en, o kwøbbi Mesiy møg-ɑ bɑ ɑkɑnn, töng yi wøn kì bøli teedø, gen ɑ møg-ɑ bɑng gen yingɑ ød mɑg ɑnɑn." 
Colossians4:4 Nyi kwɑ̈jji wun kipe kinni o kwøbbɑni ókømmi yi yɑn kidøøj, ki yöö me myëër." 
Colossians4:5 Bëëd wun ki peli wïj, kì kelli tyëng-ɑ nuti yïëyø, e bong keny wëggu bodhø." 
Colossians4:6 Kɑ gïg-ɑ nyi kømmi yi wun kì bøli gen, ko bëëd ni gïncɑm me ree bong omelø, de bëëd ge myëër. Kɑ kwøbbi ji nyi løøg wun kidøøj." 
Colossians4:7 Kwøbbɑ bënn ólïngi yi wun kì yï Tikikøs ómïee, ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn; o bɑ ngɑn-ɑ nyi køny yɑn ki gwøøg Wë." 
Colossians4:8 Áörɑ yï wun kɑ per kinni o wu köbbi yi en këër bëëdi wøn; o wu ócïj yi en thyew. 
Colossians4:9 Onesimøs ómïee, nyel-ɑ ngɑ̈ny bëëdø kidøøj, o bɑ jɑl pödhi wun, ɑ́örɑ kyeel kí Tikikøs. Wu óköbbi gen gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì keny bënn." 
Colossians4:10 Wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi Aristɑrkøs, jɑl-ɑ ying ød mɑg kyeel ki yɑn. Kɑ wu mɑ̈dh yi Mɑrk, ówï Bɑrnɑbɑ̀. (Wu ɑ́rum ki cegø kinni køny wun en, keløg e ódi bëën yï wun.)" 
Colossians4:11 Wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi Jöcwø, ɑ nyi cwøl ɑ́ Yøstøs. Jøgɑni gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, bene gen keti gen ɑ bɑ Yeud, kì kelli tyëng-ɑ göög wøn kyeel kipe Pödhi Jwøk, o yɑ ɑ́køny yi gen ki mendwøng." 
Colossians4:12 Kɑ wu mɑ̈dh yi Epɑprɑs, jɑl pödhi wun megø, o bɑ bɑ̈ng Yëso. Nyi rïïj e kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøk kiper wun, kipe kinni o wu løge mø teg, o wu bëëd wun, wun ɑ́ jii Mesiy mø yïëyø kidøøj, o wu gøggu møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk." 
Colossians4:13 O yɑ ceg-ɑ kwøb ceth kinni, ɑ́pïd yi gwøg ki mendwøng kiper wun, wuki tyëng Lɑwdikiyɑ̀, kí tyëng Ërɑpølis." 
Colossians4:14 Wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi Luk, ɑkïm men-ɑ mɑɑr yi dhɑnhø bëne; kɑ wu mɑ̈dh yi Demɑs." 
Colossians4:15 Mɑ̈dh wun nyiimïee kì Lɑwdikiyɑ̀; kɑ Nimpɑ̀ mɑ̈dh wun geki tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ møg-ɑ nyi cugi kì gøle. 
Colossians4:16 Keny-ɑ órum wɑ̈nyø men ki rɑngø yi wun, kɑ ör wun kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Lɑwdikiyɑ̀, o gø lony gen ki rɑngø. Kɑ wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́örɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Lɑwdikiyɑ̀ cwøl wun, o lony yi wun ki rɑngø thyew." 
Colossians4:17 Kɑ Arkipøs köbbi wun kinni, “Tyëg gwøng-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi yïn ki nyingi Wë.”" 
Colossians4:18 Møg gwed yi yɑn kɑ cingɑ. Wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl ki ɑ́cwecwell-ɑ cinggɑ! Wiy dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk yinge kömi wun. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Pøøl, kí Silɑ̀, kí Timøthì. Ge gwëd-ɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Tesɑlonikɑ̀, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ bɑ mø Wïy Jwøk, kí Wë Yëso Mesiy. Wu óbëëdø yï wun dɑ dhwɑ̈ng geki mër." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Jwøk nyii pwøjø yi wøn kipe wun bënn, kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn; kɑ wu nyi pɑr yi wøn kenyi kwɑ̈jji wøn." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Kɑ ge nyi kwøb wøn kì bøli Wïyee Jwøgee, gen ɑ kwøbbi kɑ̀ nyɑ̈ggi wun kömi yïëyø, kì bɑng mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, kí kɑ̀ gɑ̈nu Wë Yëso Mesiy ki mendwøng." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn, kinni wu mɑɑr yi Jwøk, o wu ɑ́rum ki myegø yi en wun ɑ́ jie." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Mɑ́ Wöndøj nuti muuj wun yi wøn kɑ kwøb yøw, de ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wøn kɑ tegø geki Wëykwërø, ki yïëyø me dwøng geki dyër. Kër-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wøn ngɑ̈nyi yi wun keny-ɑ ɑ́ying wøn kelli wun; wø ɑ́göög kɑ per kinni o wu dönyi wun." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Kɑ bëëdi wøn geki bëëdi Wë ngøy yi wun; o cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́rɑngi wun ki mendwøng, wöödø ɑ́yïëy yi wun ki medi pyëw men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Wëykwërø." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Kɑ wu ogöögø ki nyuudhi kipe ji-ɑ ɑ́yïëy bënn kì kelli tyëng Mɑkdöniyɑ̀ geki Akɑiyɑ̀. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Pɑth ki per kɑ ɑ́kedh wöödø kì yï wun, kɑ tɑɑy-ɑ Mɑkdöniyɑ̀ geki Akɑiyɑ̀ kete; de wöddi kɑ ɑ́yïëyu Jwøk ɑ́tɑɑy kömi piny bëne. O bogïn kømmi yi wøn këti." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Jiɑni bënn kømm-ɑ kwøbbi kɑ ɑ́yïëyu pwönyø mi wøn, geki kɑ ɑ́wiy wun ngïjji jwögg, kɑ wu døøg-ɑ be mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø; Jwøng-ɑ dyër," 
1Thessalonians1:10 o wu yïd-ɑ bëëni Wɑ̈de; keny-ɑ óbëëne e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl; eni Wɑ̈de Yëso, ɑ ɑ́tug yi en kì yij thøø; o bɑ en ɑ ódøm wɑ obëën rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøk." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ kinni wø nuti wɑ̈dh-ɑ wëli yï wun." 
1Thessalonians2:2 O ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kɑ ɑ́göggi wøn ki gïnrɑj, kɑ wø gwɑddi kì Pïlïpì, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wø nuti bëën yï wun kì Tesɑlonikɑ̀. De cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́di pëëmø, wø ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøgee ki tegi pyëw men pwönyi wøn Wöndøj men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïe." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Møg-ɑ pwönyi yi wøn bong bɑ̈jjø kì ri gen, o bɑ kwøb mø dhïw, mø yethi gen bong wëënyø." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Wø nyi kømm-ɑ møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk ceth, mɑ́ wø ɑ́yod yi en wø myëër ki kɑ̈lli Wöndøj. Wø pɑ nyi gwøg-ɑ gïn mïni pëthi ji, de wø nyi gwøg-ɑ gïn mïni pyëw Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ nyi rɑng pëthi wøn." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, ri wøn pɑ nyi kwɑjji yi wøn, kipe kinni o wø yïddi wøn ki gïi cwɑggi wøn; o møgɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi Jwøk thyew." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Wø pɑ dwɑddi pøjjø yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ yi ji møøgø." 
1Thessalonians2:7 De wu mïdhi yi wøn ni kenyi mïdhi nyɑ gïnthinh yi meye. 
1Thessalonians2:8 Kì bɑng kɑ̀ mɑɑr wun yi wøn, wø nuti dwɑdd-ɑ nywɑgi Wöndøj mi Jwøk kete ki wun, de cɑgg ɑ́ bëëdi wøn ɑ́dwɑddi wø’ nywɑgø ki wun thyew. Wu mɑɑr yi wøn ki mendwøng!" 
1Thessalonians2:9 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni wø ɑ́ceg-ɑ tïj ki menteg kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng, mɑ́ wø nuti dwɑddi judi wun, wø pwöny-ɑ wun, ki Wöndøj men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Bëëdi wøn ngɑ̈nyi yi wun, o ngɑ̈nyi yi Jwøk, kinni wø ɑ́bëëd kì kelli wun kɑ bëëdø me døøj, me yije bong geny, wɑlɑ̀ bong bɑ̈jjø." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Wø ɑ́bëëd ki wun kɑ bëëdi dhɑnhø ki nyige. 
1Thessalonians2:12 Wu ɑ́pwönyi yi wøn, kɑ wu cïj yi wøn, kɑ wu nyi köbbi wøn kinni bëëd wun ki bëëdø men-ɑ med kì pyëw Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwøøl wun yij Pödhe, o wu bëëd wun kì yij dhwɑ̈nge." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Jwøk nyii pwøjø yi wøn kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, mɑ́ keny-ɑ ɑ́muuj kwøbbi Jwøk wun yi wøn, ge ɑ́lïngi yi wun kɑ ge yïëy wun gɑ wöödø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk; o bɑ dyër ceth. Mɑ́ Jwøk ogöögø kì ri wun, wu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, bong gïn bɑ̈ɑ̈n kì kɑɑm wun ki tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ mi Yëso Mesiy, møg-ɑ ying Yeudiyɑ̀; mɑ́ rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́göggi wun yi tyëng pödhi wun, pɑ̈r ki rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́göggi gen yi Yeud." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Bɑ tyëngɑni ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g Wë Yëso geki tyëngtöng mø Jwøk; kɑ nyingi wøn guud yi gen thyew. Jwøk pyëwe rɑɑj ki gen! Ge ɑ́göög ge mɑ̈n ki ji bënn. 
1Thessalonians2:16 Kɑ ri gen pɑ̈nyi gen ki mɑ̈ɑ̈ni wøn muuji tyëngpɑth ki Yeud, wöön-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yieli gen. Jwøk linye ɑ́ngøøge kömi gen, ɑnɑn cyee." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wø ɑ́lɑ̈wi ki wun ki nyɑ keny me thiinh – pɑth ki rummi wøn, den-ɑ́ dëlli wøn ɑ lɑ̈wi ki wun – kɑ kej wun ceg-ɑ dwɑ̈ddø ceth; o wø tyer-ɑ bëën be lidhi wun!" 
1Thessalonians2:18 Pëthi wøn ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ bëën yï wun. Yɑn kiriɑ, yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ dwöög yï wun tyel mø gïïr, de wø ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n yi Cethɑn." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Mɑ́ e ceg bëëdø ɑ́ wun ɑ gɑ̈n yi wøn; de pɑth ki ji møøgø; wun ɑ nëngi wøn ki medi pyëw; o bɑ per wun ɑ ólejji wøn ri wøn kì bøli Wë, kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ódwööge, kinni wø ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈m." 
1Thessalonians2:20 Bɑ dyër ceth; wø lejji ri wøn kɑ per wun, o wø yïd-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng wun ki medi pyëw." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Kɑ ɑ́pïd wøn yi ngïïnø, ɑpëggi wøn be bëëdø kì Athïnɑ̀ keti wøn," 
1Thessalonians3:2 kɑ Timøthì ómïee, nyel-ɑ göggi Jwøk, ki gwøøg pwönyi wööni Mesiy ör wøn yï wun be cïji wun," 
1Thessalonians3:3 o bongii ngɑn døøg cyɑ̈n kì kelli wun, kì bɑng jud." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Kɑ ɑ́ying wøn buti wun cøn, wu ɑ́köbbi yi wøn kinni, wɑ bɑ møg-ɑ óyïddi ki orɑng ceth, o møgɑni ɑ́cwöb ni kɑ̀ ngɑ̈nyu en." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́örɑ Timøthì. Pyëwɑ ɑ́ceg-ɑ dhɑ̈lø mɑgø, ɑörɑ en be lidhi yïëyø mi wun, mɑ́ yɑ óböggø kinni wu óbëëd wu ópɑ̈nyø yi jɑlthɑb, kɑ wø thuw-ɑ pïdø." 
1Thessalonians3:6 De ɑnɑn, Timøthì ɑ́dwöög ki wöödø me døøj kipe yïëyø geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi wun; kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, i per wøn nyii rømmø yi wun ceth; o wu tyer-ɑ lidhi wøn ni kɑ̀ tyerɑ lidhi wun." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Wø ɑ́bëëd wø torø yi ɑkørr kí orɑng me dwøng; de pëthi wøn ɑ́tëngi, yeki nyiimïɑ, kì bɑng yïëyø mi wun." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Bëëdɑ kì kömi piny ɑ́dönyi cyee, kì bɑng kɑ̀ cungi wun wu teeg kì ri Mesiy." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Á pwøj mø bëëdø dï ɑ ópwøj wøn Jwøk kiper wun? Mɑ́ pëthi wøn ɑ́mïni ki mendwøng kì bøli Jwøk kɑ ɑ́lïngi wøn kwøbbi wun. 
1Thessalonians3:10 Kɑ Jwøk nyi kwɑjjɑ kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng kipe kinni, o nyingee ólidh yi wɑ këti; o keny-ɑ gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ri yïëyø mi wun tyeny yi wɑ." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Anɑn, bëëni wøn yï wun ying-ɑ cingi Jwøk Wïyee geki Wë Yëso." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Wiy mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ mɑɑr wun ri wun, kí mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑr wun ji bënn, med yi Wë Yëso, o tënge ni mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑr wun yi wøn." 
1Thessalonians3:13 O pëthi wun wëgge tëngø, o wu óbëëd wu bɑ ɑkwër, e bong gïn cɑy kì ri wun kì bøli Wïyee Jwøgee, keny-ɑ ódwöög Wë Yëso geki tyëng kwërø møge. Amen." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Møg-ɑ kwøb yi wøn kì cyɑ̈n, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, bɑ kinni dïd wun kì yï wøn ki bëëdø men-ɑ med kì pyëw Jwøk. O bɑ bëënɑni ceth ɑ beed yi wun; de wø kwɑjj-ɑ wun ɑnɑn ki nyingi Wë Yëso, kinni bëëd wun ki bëëdø me lod menɑni ki døøjø." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Mɑ́ møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi wun yi wøn ki tegi Wë Yëso, ge ngɑ̈nyi yi wun ceth." 
1Thessalonians4:3 Møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk bɑ kinni, bëëd wun wu bɑ ɑkwër, kɑ dhɑnhø ko niin ki ngɑn nuti nywøøm gen ri gen." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Kɑ dhɑnhø bëëde e ngɑ̈ny korri dële ɑ́ ɑkwër, e ree owørø yi en." 
1Thessalonians4:5 Kɑ wu ko nyi nɑ̈g yi mɑ̈j ni tyëng-ɑ kwïj kwøbbi Jwøk. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Ko di dhɑnhø me bɑ̈jji ki wɑɑd gen ngeti Mesiy, wɑlɑ̀ ko di ngɑn ruj ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø. Bɑ Wë ɑ ócɑ̈yyi kipe møgɑni, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi wun yi wøn cøn." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Wɑ nuti cwølø yi Jwøk kɑ per bëëdi orøg; de wɑ ɑ́cwøl yi en kɑ per bëëdø ki bëëde kwërø. 
1Thessalonians4:8 O ngɑn pyem kwøbbɑni, pɑ pyem-ɑ kwøbbi dhɑnhø; de pyem-ɑ kwøbbi Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ thödhi wun ki Wëykwërø." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Wu ɑ́rum ki dïdø kì yï Jwøk ki mɑɑri ri wun yeki nyiimïɑ, o bong gïn gwëdi wun yi wøn kì ri kwøbbɑni." 
1Thessalonians4:10 O wu bëëd ɑ nøw ceth kidyër; tyëng Mɑkdöniyɑ̀ mɑɑr yi wun; de wø kwɑjj-ɑ wun yeki nyiimïɑ kinni, nyi mɑɑru ri wun ki mendwøng." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Bëëd wun mɑ̈ɑ̈dh. Kɑ dhɑnhø nyi gööge ki gwøge kidøøj. Nyi göög dhɑnhø ki cingge ceth; ni kɑ ɑ́ceg wun yi wøn. 
1Thessalonians4:12 Møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni, o wu wør yi ji-ɑ pɑth ki tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀; o wu cög wu pɑ nenni cwɑggi ji møøgø." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Anɑn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wø pɑ dwɑddi kinni, o wu bëëd wu kwïj wøw ki kwøbbi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́thøw. Møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni, o wu cög wu pɑ ywöngi kipe gen; ni ji-ɑ yï gen bong gɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Keløg wɑ yïëyø kinni, Yëso ɑ́thøw, kɑ odhwödhø kì yij thøø, ji-ɑ ɑ́thøw ge yïëyø, ge ódwöög yi Jwøk kyeel ki Yëso." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Møg-ɑ pwönyi wun yi wøn ɑnɑn, bɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi yi Wë kinni; wɑ tyëng-ɑ nëënø, wɑ koo møøl bøli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́thøw." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Mɑ́ Wë kiree óbï piny e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, keny-ɑ ólïngi cwɑggi jɑngi wëywödd, kí ywøøg kɑɑng Jwøk; o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́thøw e Mesiy rumø yïëyø yi gen, kwöngi gen ki dhwödhø." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Codhe, o wɑ gwɑɑr mɑl kì yij pøølø, wɑ tyëng-ɑ yuud wɑ onëënø, o wɑ røøm wɑ yij mɑl ki Wë, o wɑ cöög wɑ buti Wë." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Cïj wun ri wun ki kwøbbɑni. 
1Thessalonians5:1 De ɑnɑn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, bong mø gwëdɑ wun, kipe bøli keny-ɑ ócwöb møgɑni." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Mɑ́ wu ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë óbï e nɑ bëëni kur kì wɑ̈r." 
1Thessalonians5:3 O keny-ɑ ókööb ji kinni, “Bogïn böggi; piny dɑ mër,” ge ceg kɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈y piny yi ryɑ̈g, ni kenyi pɑ̈ɑ̈y ngɑndhɑjø piny yi pɑ̈dhi piny; o ge pɑ cuggi bodhø." 
1Thessalonians5:4 De wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wu pɑ ying yij muudhø, me yije ópɑ̈ɑ̈y wun piny yi Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë;" 
1Thessalonians5:5 mɑ́ wu bënn, wu bɑ jii cɑr; wu bɑ tyëng dicɑ̈ng. Wɑ pɑth ki tyëng wɑ̈r, wɑlɑ̀ wɑ pɑth ki tyëng muudhø." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Wɑ ko nin ni ji-ɑ kyeelø, de bëëd wɑ, wɑ̈thee onëënø." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Ji nyi nen-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑ̈r, o bɑ wɑ̈r ɑ nyi nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen yi møgø." 
1Thessalonians5:8 De wɑ, ɑ bɑ nyigi dicɑ̈ng, bëëd wɑ ceth wɑ̈thee onëënø, kɑ yïëyø geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø rug wɑ gɑ ɑ́dhedheg; kɑ gɑ̈ɑ̈nø kinni wɑ óyiel, rug wɑ ni ɑcudh." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Wɑ nuti yienyø yi Jwøk kɑ per kinni o wɑ cɑy; dɑ́ kipe kinni o wɑ yïddi wɑ ki keny yieel wɑ ki nyingi Wë Yëso Mesiy," 
1Thessalonians5:10 ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thøw kiperee, kipe kinni o wɑ nëën wɑ bënn kyeel ki en, ying wɑ yuud wɑ onëënø wɑlɑ̀ wɑ thøø keny-ɑ óbëëne." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Nyi køny wun ri wun; kɑ ri wun nyi cïj wun, ni kɑ̀ göög wun ɑnɑn." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Anɑn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wø kwɑjj-ɑ wun kinni, nyi wør wun tyëng-ɑ göögø kì kelli wun, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ pyejji wun, ɑ pwönyi wun ki bëëdi jii Mesiy." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Kɑ ge wør wun, ge omɑɑrø yi wun ki mendwøng, kipe gwøng-ɑ gwøg yi gen. Kɑ wu bëëd wun ki mër." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Wø köbb-ɑ wun yeki nyiimïɑ kinni, nyi cïj wun tyëng-ɑ bɑ rɑj, geki tyëng-ɑ bɑ wɑ̈rrì, kɑ tyëng-ɑ nyøødh nyi køny wun, kɑ kwøbbi ji bënn nyi ngin wun." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi göggi wun ki gïnrɑj, ko nyi göggi wun ki gïnrɑj thyew. De nyi bëëd wu gögg-ɑ ri wun gïgdøj, kɑ tyëng-ɑ kyeelø nyi göggu gïgdøj thyew." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Wiy pëthi wun nyi bëëd ge med yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Nyi kwɑjju Jwøk yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Nyi pwøju Jwøk kipe jɑmmì bënn. Bene gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk kì yï wun kɑ̀ nëën wun kì ri Yëso Mesiy. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Bøli gwøøg Wëykwërø ko nyi rïwwi wun; 
1Thessalonians5:20 møg-ɑ töng ko nyi wøy wun. 
1Thessalonians5:21 De nyi rɑng wun jɑmmì bënn; kɑ wu nyi mɑ̈gi wun kì ri gïn-ɑ døj; 
1Thessalonians5:22 kɑ gïgrijjø bënn nyi këëj wun. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Wu ógwøg wu bɑ ɑkwër kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn yi Jwøøg mër, kɑ wu kore kì yij bëëdi wun bëne – wëyi wun, tïbbi wun kí dëlli wun – e bong gïnrɑj me kedhi ri wun, kì ri bëëni Wë Yëso Mesiy" 
1Thessalonians5:24 Møgɑni ógwøg yi ngɑn-ɑ cwølli wun, mɑ́ dhøge nyi mïdhe’ mïdhø." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Yeki nyiimïɑ, nyi kwɑjju Jwøk kiper wøn." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Mɑ̈dhu nyiimïee bënn, ki nuumi mër." 
1Thessalonians5:27 Yɑ ceg-ɑ wun ki nyingi Wë, kinni kɑ wɑ̈nyø men órɑ̈ngu nyiimïee bënn." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Wiy dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë Yëso Mesiy yinge kömi wun. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Pøøl, kí Silɑ̀, kí Timøthì. Ge gwëd-ɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Tesɑlonikɑ̀, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ bɑ mø Wïy Jwøk, kí Wë Yëso Mesiy." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Wiy dhwɑ̈ng geki mër møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk ying gen kömi wun. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, Jwøk ceg kɑ pøjjø yi wøn ceth kiper wun. Bɑ gïjø mɑ dyër, mɑ́ yïëyø mi wun kedh e ódøngø, o mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑru ri wun kedh e ódøngø ki mendwøng." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Bene ɑ bɑnge nyi lejji wun yi wøn kì bøli kɑnïsɑ̀ mi Jwøk kì yethi kɑ̈jj bënn. Wu olejjø yi wøn kipe kɑ̀ ngïïn wun, wu mïdh-ɑ yïëyø mi wun, ngö nyingi wun ceg kɑ guudø, o wu ceg-ɑ orɑng." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Møgɑni bënn nyodh-ɑ kinni löggi Jwøk bɑ dyër, o wu óbëëd wu myër ki kedhi yij Pödhe; pönh-ɑ pere bëëd wu orɑngø." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Jwøk ógöögø ki gïn-ɑ dyër; tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wëggi wun orɑng, gï ógöjje orɑng." 
2Thessalonians1:7 Kɑ wun ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïddi ki orɑng kyeel ki wøn; wu óyiel kì yij orɑng kì bøli keny-ɑ ódwöög Wë Yëso, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl geki wëywödde møg-ɑ teg," 
2Thessalonians1:8 ge ókɑ̈ddø ki mɑc me ceg opɑ̈m, e bï-ɑ be cɑyi tyëng-ɑ bɑny Jwøk, ɑ pɑ dwɑddi lïngi Wöndøj mi Wë Yëso." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Tyëngɑni óryem kì bøli Jwøk, kɑ ge lɑ̈ny-ɑ wɑ̈yi gen gïti ɑtheer. Kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ nyi ying yï Wë ocögø gø pɑ lidh yi gen," 
2Thessalonians1:10 keny-ɑ óbëëne kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, o lenhi yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwër gɑ jii Jwøk. O ji-ɑ ɑ́yïëy bënn ki ngɑ̈dhii, pëthi gen mïni gen ki mendwøng. O wu óbëëd wu nud kì kenyɑni thyew; mɑ́ kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi wun yi wøn ɑ́yïëy yi wun ceth." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Bene ɑ nyi kwɑ̈jji wøn kiper wun yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kipe kinni o wu gwøg yi en wu myër ki gwøng-ɑ́ pere ɑ́cwøle wun, o gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́tyer yi wun ki gwøgø, ówëgge pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen ki tege." 
2Thessalonians1:12 O Wë Yëso ólenhi kì bɑng wun, o wu óyïddi wun ki dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk geki dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë Yëso Mesiy." 
2Thessalonians2:1 De møg-ɑ kømmi kipe bëëni Wë Yëso Mesiy, kí rëbee ki en, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ," 
2Thessalonians2:2 wɑ̈thi wun ko muum yi gen, kɑ̀ kømmii i Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë rum bëënø. Ócuggø bëëdø e nënni e ókwøb-ɑ yi wøn, wø ceg-ɑ töng, wɑlɑ̀ wø ceg-ɑ pwönyø, wɑlɑ̀ ge gweed wø’ yij wɑ̈nyø." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Ri wun ko wëggu wënyø yi dhɑnhø. Mɑ́ cyɑ̈ngɑni óbï e pëëmø rum døngø, o Ngɑnrɑj rum cwöbø, eni ngɑn-ɑ köme di cɑ́y." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Ngɑnɑni kööre ópwöd yi en cem e ying-ɑ mɑl kibøli gïg-ɑ nyi cwølli yi teedø gɑ jwögg. Kɑ obëëdø kì yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ dyër; kɑ okööbø cem ɑ́ Jwøk. 
2Thessalonians2:5 Wɑ̈thi wun ɑ́ceg-ɑ wïlø? Wu ce ɑ́köbbɑ’ møgɑni tyel mø gïïr keny-ɑ ɑ́yingɑ buti wun? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Dɑ gïjø me mɑ̈ɑ̈n møgɑni cwöbø ɑnɑn, o gïnɑni bëëde ngɑ̈nyi yi wun. Ngɑnrɑj óbï-ɑ bøli keje." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Pëëmø men-ɑ thɑre kwïj nudd e ogöögø ɑnɑn, de gïn-ɑ ócwöb pɑ cwöb gïti keny-ɑ ónyiig ngɑn-ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈nii cwöbø." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Codhe, o Ngɑnrɑj nyodh. De keny-ɑ óbëën Wë Yëso ki cɑre, ngɑnɑni ónɑ̈g yi en ki yømø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l dhøge." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Ngɑnrɑj óbï kɑ tegi Cethɑn, o ógöögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø, kí ngïjjì mø pyed," 
2Thessalonians2:10 o ji-ɑ ɑ́cïb gɑ møg lɑ̈ɑ̈ny thɑb yi en ki wëënyø me rɑj. Ge ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny mɑ́ ge ɑ́bɑny-ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ dyër, kinni o ge di yiel." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Bene ɑ nyi ödi kömi gen yi Jwøk ki tegø me lɑ̈ɑ̈ny gen, o ge nyi yïëy gen ki kwøbbi pyed." 
2Thessalonians2:12 O ge cɑy, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ pɑ nyi yïëy ki dyër, ɑ tyer gøggi rɑj." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Jwøk nyii pøjjø yi wøn yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kiper wun yeki nyiimïɑ, wu tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yi Wë. Wu ɑ́rum ki yienyø yi Jwøk cøn, wun ɑ́ møg yiel ki tegi Wëy, o wu gwøg wun ɑ́ tyëng kwër, kì ri yïëyø kí dyër." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Kɑ wu cwøl yi en kipe kinni o wu yiel kì bɑng Wöndøj men-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi wun yi wøn, kipe kinni o wu óyïddi wun ki dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë Yëso Mesiy." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, mïdhu møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi wun yi wøn, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́gwëdi wun yi wøn." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Wë Yëso Mesiy kiree, geki Wïyee Jwøk ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr wɑ, kɑ wɑ thödhe ki dhwɑ̈nge, kí gɑ̈ɑ̈nø me dwøng;" 
2Thessalonians2:17 pëthi wun ówëggi gen tëngø, o wu nyi kømmu dyër, o wu nyi gøggu dyër." 
2Thessalonians3:1 De gïn-ɑ kwøb yi wøn kì cyɑ̈n, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, bɑ kinni, nyi kwɑjju Jwøk kiper wøn, o kwøbbe jwɑn gen tɑyø, o lenhi ni kɑ̀ lenhii kì kelli wun." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Kɑ wu nyi kwɑ̈jji wun thyew kipe kinni, o wø yiel kì cinggi tyëngpëëmø geki tyëngorøg; mɑ́ e pɑth ki ji bënn ɑ nyi yïëy kwøbbi Jwøk." 
2Thessalonians3:3 De kɑ̀ bëëd Wë, e myër ki ngɑ̈dhø, wu óthödhi yi en ki tegø; o wu ókor yi en ki Ngɑnrɑj." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Wø ogɑ̈nø ceth ki nyingi Wë kinni, cigg-ɑ kømmi yi wøn ɑ́yïëy yi wun ɑnɑn, o ge óyïëy yi wun dhuki megø thyew." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Wu ónyudhi yi Wë, kɑ bëëdi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi Jwøk gɑm yi wɑ̈thi wun, kɑ wu odïdø ki ngïïnø men-ɑ nyi muuj yi Mesiy." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Anɑn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wø ceg-ɑ wun ki nyingi Wë Yëso Mesiy kinni, lɑ̈ɑ̈w wun ri wun ki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy møg-ɑ bɑ rɑj, ɑ pɑ dwɑddi lïngi møg-ɑ nyi ceg gen yi wøn." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni wu di ceg-ɑ bëëdi wøn ki ngøyø. Wø nuti bëëdø wø bɑ rɑj keny-ɑ ɑ́ying wøn kelli wun. 
2Thessalonians3:8 O bong gïncɑɑm ngɑn megø mɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi ki cɑmø yi wøn. De wø ɑ́ceg-ɑ gwøg kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng, kipe kinni o bongii ngɑn jud yi wøn." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Menɑni pɑth kipe kinni, yï wøn bong tegø men cwöddi wøn kì yï wun; de wø ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ nyudhi wun tegi per gwøg." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ying wøn kelli wun, wu ɑ́bëëd wu nyii köbbø yi wøn kinni, “Ngɑn bɑ̈nyi ki gwøg, ko wëggu cɑm.”" 
2Thessalonians3:11 Møgɑni kwøb yi wøn kɑ per kɑ ɑ́lïng wøn kinni, i dɑ ji møøgø kì kelli wun mø wɑ̈dhi bëëdø ge pɑ göögø; de ge ceg-ɑ wïïnø kì kelli teedø ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ wöddi gïg-ɑ gøggi yi ji møøgø." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Ceg wun ji-ɑ ni møgɑni; kɑ ge köbbi ki nyingi Wë Yëso Mesiy kinni göög gen, ge okudø." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, köthi wun ko buudh yi gwøg ki gïgdøj." 
2Thessalonians3:14 O keløg e dɑ ngɑn bɑ̈nyi ki lïngi kwøbbi wøn møg-ɑ yij wɑ̈nyø men, tidu en, kɑ këëj wun, o wïje lɑ̈ɑ̈ye." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Ko gwøg wun ɑ́ ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø; de nyi cegu en ni wɑd. 
2Thessalonians3:16 Wu óthödhi ki mër yi Wë, ngɑn-ɑ yïe nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi mër kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, ki yëëth bënn. Wu ómïdhi yi Wë, wu bënn." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Yɑn ɑ gwed møg ki cingɑ. Bene yuu-ɑ nyi thɑnyɑ wɑ̈jj-ɑ gwedɑ bënn ɑnɑn; bene gwedɑ ɑnɑn 
2Thessalonians3:18 Wiy dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë Yëso Mesiy yinge kömi wun bënn. 
1Timothy1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Pøøl, jɑlwööni Yëso Mesiy, kì bɑng møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi Jwøk Yïënee, geki Yëso Mesiy, ngɑn-ɑ gɑ̈n yi wɑ." 
1Timothy1:2 Yɑ gwëd-ɑ Timøthì wɑ̈dɑ, wɑ̈n-ɑ dyër kì yij yïëyø. Wiy dhwɑ̈ng kí mër geki lɑ̈mpyëw møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk Wïyee geki Wë Yëso Mesiy, ying gen kömí." 
1Timothy1:3 Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o yï bëëd kì Epɑsos, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn cøn, e yɑ kedh-ɑ Mɑkdöniyɑ̀. Dɑ ji mø pwönyi kwøbbi pyed kì kunɑni, kyëddí gen kinni wiy gen pwönyɑni." 
1Timothy1:4 Köbbí gen kinni wiy gen wɑ́j-ɑ ócyɑ̈ɑ̈ngi, kɑ løbbi kwɑyy wiy gen, mɑ́ møgɑni nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pëëmø yøw; møgɑni pɑ göögø kì ri møg-ɑ ɑ́gwir yi Jwøk; gen ɑ møg-ɑ nyi yod kì bɑng yïëyø." 
1Timothy1:5 Gïn-ɑ pere ceg møg, bɑ kipe tugi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yethi pëth-ɑ tïl, o yeth bëëd ge bong ɑ́dud, o yïëyø bëëde ɑ́ yïëy-ɑ dyër." 
1Timothy1:6 Ji møøgø ɑ́dwöög wɑ̈g kì ri møgɑni, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be kømmi kwøb mø bong thɑ́ gen." 
1Timothy1:7 Ge dwɑdd-ɑ løgi ri gen jøpwönyi Ciggi Mosɑ̀; de gïg-ɑ kømmi yi gen kwïj yi gen; o møg-ɑ tenyi yi gen, kwïj yi gen." 
1Timothy1:8 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ kinni, Ciggi Mosɑ̀ døøj, keløg ge omïdhø kidøøj." 
1Timothy1:9 De wɑ̈thi ji ko wïl kinni, cigg nuti gwøgø kɑ per tyëngtir, de ge ɑ́gwøg kɑ per tyëngpëëmø, kí tyëngorøg, kí tyëng-ɑ bɑny Jwøk geki tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr orøg; kí tyëng-ɑ nuti yïëyø; kí tyëng-ɑ pɑth ki ɑkwër, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi nɑ̈g wëëg gen geki mëëg gen, kí ɑ́muddi ji," 
1Timothy1:10 kí tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ngɑn nuti nywøøm gen ri gen; kí cwøw-ɑ nyi niin ri gen; kí tyëng-ɑ nyi kwɑlli nyigi ji møøgø; kí tyëngpyed, wɑlɑ̀ tyëng-ɑ nyi köngi ki pyed, ɑ nyi pwönyi kwøbb-ɑ pɑth ki dyër." 
1Timothy1:11 Pwöny-ɑ dyër ying-ɑ yij wöndøj men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn kinni o köbbɑ ji, eni Wöndøj men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ lenhi kɑ lejji." 
1Timothy1:12 Yɑ pwøj-ɑ Wë Yëso Mesiy, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thödhi yɑn ki tegø men göögɑ. Yɑ pwøj-ɑ en kipe kɑ ɑ́yode yɑn yɑ døøj ki göggii," 
1Timothy1:13 cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ yɑ bɑ ngɑn mɑ ɑ́kømmi kwøb mø rijjø kì ree cøn kɑ gwɑddɑ. De Jwøk pyëwe ɑ́ceg-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki yɑn, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ nuti yïëyø kì bøli kenyɑni, o yɑ ɑ́gwøg-ɑ gïjø me kwïj yi yɑn." 
1Timothy1:14 Kɑ dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́yod yi yɑn kì yï Wë, ree mede kì bɑng yïëyø geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ nyi yod yi dhɑnhø kɑ̀ yïëye ki ngɑ̈dhi Yëso Mesiy." 
1Timothy1:15 Kwøbb-ɑ myër ki ngɑ̈dhø yi dhɑnhø, o ge døøj ki yïëyø yi teedø bëne, bɑ kinni Yëso Mesiy ɑ́bï kömi piny be yieli tyëngorøg; o teedø bëne lod yi yɑn ki orøg," 
1Timothy1:16 de Jwøk pyëwe ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki yɑn, kipe kinni o ngïni Yëso Mesiy kwønge ki nyodhø kì riɑ; yɑ ngɑn-ɑ pëddi ki orøg, o yɑ bëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ nyuudhi kipe tyëng-ɑ yïëyii kì bɑngɑ, o ge óyïddi gen ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer." 
1Timothy1:17 Wøør Rɑ̈nh-ɑ pɑ thøw, o pɑ nënni; ɑ bɑ Jwøk kete, kɑ lejji gïti ɑtheer! Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Timøthì wɑ̈dɑ, gïg-ɑ cïgɑ yïn ɑ́cïbɑ cingí kì bɑng kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́töng kì rií kɑ̈ge dööng. Gwøg kwøbbɑni gɑ møg nyïɑ̈ggí ki liny;" 
1Timothy1:19 mïdhí yïëyø mií, kɑ yï göög yijí bong ɑ́dud. Kwï ji ɑ́ceg-ɑ bɑ̈nyø ki gwøgi møg-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi gen gɑ dyër, kɑ yïëyø mi gen rënyi gen." 
1Timothy1:20 Kelli tyëngɑni dɑ Ëmenɑøs, kí Iskɑnder; jøg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi ri gen Cethɑn; kipe kinni o ge ódïd gen kì bɑng møgɑni, o nyingi Jwøk wiy yi gen ki bwölø." 
1Timothy2:1 Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn kinni nyi gwøg kì kɑnïsɑ̀ bɑ cwöd kì yï Jwøk, kí kwɑ̈jjø, kí mɑ́l, kí pwøj kipe ji bënn;" 
1Timothy2:2 kí kiper rɑ̈nhì, kí jɑgg, kipe kinni, o wɑ bëëd wɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki bëëntir, kí mëri Jwøk, kí wuödø." 
1Timothy2:3 Møgɑni døøj ki gwøgø, o pyëw Jwøk Yïënee med ki gen," 
1Timothy2:4 mɑ́ e dwɑddi kinni o ji yiel bënn, o ge dïd gen ki kwøbb-ɑ dyër." 
1Timothy2:5 Mɑ́ Jwøk bɑ ɑ́kyel kete, o ngɑn-ɑ reb ji ki Jwøk bɑ ɑ́kyel, en ɑ Yëso Mesiy;" 
1Timothy2:6 ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́muuj wëye ge gøøm-ɑ bølí dhɑnhø bëne," 
1Timothy2:7 o bɑ per møgɑni ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn, yɑn ɑ́ jɑlwöödø me pwönyi tyëngpɑth ki Yeud, o yɑ kwøbɑ wööni yïëyø geki dyër. Yɑ pɑ ceg pyed; yɑ kømm-ɑ dyër!" 
1Timothy2:8 Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni nyi kwɑ̈jji cwøw kì kɑnïsɑ̀ kì kɑ̈jj bënn, e ri gen thyeey gen, o cinggi gen tïngi gen Jwøk ge dhïw, e bong wëërø wɑlɑ̀ pëëmø kì kelli gen." 
1Timothy2:9 O yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni rug tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ki ógudh møg kum dëlli gen kidøøj, kɑ ge gwøg gen dhwɑ̈ng me pere wøør gen; o yëyy pɑ nyølli; o ge ko rug ki dhɑb geki tigg-ɑ per gen teg." 
1Timothy2:10 Kɑ ge bëëd gen ge gøgg-ɑ gïgdøj, mø kyëëw ki tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ wør Jwøk." 
1Timothy2:11 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn dïd gen, ge bëëd-ɑ möölø e bong gwɑgø." 
1Timothy2:12 O yɑ pɑ yïëy kinni pwönyi ji yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, kɑ cwøw ko jɑɑg yi gen, de ceg gen bëëdø mɑ̈ɑ̈dh." 
1Timothy2:13 Mɑ́ Adɑm ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki cwɑ̈jø, codhe ɑloony Awɑ̀ ki cwɑ̈jø." 
1Timothy2:14 O pɑth ki Adɑm ɑ ɑ́thɑb, de bɑ ngɑndhɑjø ɑ ɑ́thɑb kɑ ciggi Jwøk pyeme." 
1Timothy2:15 De ngɑndhɑjø óyiel kì ri pɑ̈dhe piny, keløg e obëëdø ki bëëndøj kì kömi yïëyø kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, ɑ ɑkwër." 
1Timothy3:1 Møg-ɑ kømmi kinni; ngɑn yɑb gwøg ɑ́ jɑgø kì kömi kɑnïsɑ̀, ɑ́kwɑny gwøg me døøj, bɑ dyër." 
1Timothy3:2 De bëëd jɑngi kɑnïsɑ̀ köme bong ɑyɑ̈r, e cyëge bɑ ɑ́kyel; kɑ bëëde wïje onëënø, o ngɑ̈ny mɑgi pyëwe, o ngɑ̈ny gwïdø; kɑ bëëde ɑ́ ngɑn bute nyi töngi yi wëll; o ócuggø ki pwönyi ji;" 
1Timothy3:3 o pɑ nyi nɑ̈g yi møgø, o pyëwe pɑ dwøng kipe ngyëny." 
1Timothy3:4 Kɑ bëëde gøle okorø yi en kidøøj, o kwøbbe olïngø yi nyige, e owørø yi gen ki mendwøng." 
1Timothy3:5 Mɑ́ keløg e dhɑl-ɑ yi mïdhi gøle, kɑnïsɑ̀ mi Jwøk ómïdhi yi en kidï?" 
1Timothy3:6 Kɑ ko bëëd ɑ́ ngɑn me cer yïëyø, kipe wïje ótɑ̈d, kɑ cɑy ni kɑ ɑ́cɑɑy Cethɑn." 
1Timothy3:7 De bëëde ɑ́ ngɑn me wør yi teen-ɑ pɑ ying kɑnïsɑ̀, o cöge e pɑ yɑ̈r kɑ mɑg yi ɑ́kɑ̈lli Cethɑn." 
1Timothy3:8 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ kunyi ki gwøg kì kɑnïsɑ̀ bëëd gen gɑ ji mø wør yi teedø, o ge pɑ nyi kømmi dhøg ɑ́ryew; o ge pɑ nyi mɑ̈dhø møgø me gïïr; kɑ ge bëëd gen pëthi gen pɑ ngɑm kipe ngyëny wɑlɑ̀ jɑmmì mø gïïr;" 
1Timothy3:9 kɑ ge bëëd gen gɑ ji mø mïdhi kwøbb-ɑ ɑkɑnn mø yïëyø ki pëëth mø tïl. 
1Timothy3:10 Cɑɑg tyëngɑni ki rɑngø møti, oyood gen e bong gïnrɑj kì yï gen, o ge røny cyee." 
1Timothy3:11 Kɑ mɑ̈nni gen bëëd gen gɑ ji mø wør thyew, o ge pɑth ki tyëngkwɑ̈dh; o wɑ̈thi gen ogöögø, o ge bɑ ji mø nyi cungi kì kömi dhøggi gen kì ri jɑmmì bënn." 
1Timothy3:12 Ngɑn-ɑ kunyi ki gwøg kì kɑnïsɑ̀ bëëde cyëge bɑ ɑ́kyel, kɑ bëëde gøle geki nyige omïdhø yi en kidøøj." 
1Timothy3:13 Tyëng-ɑ kunyi møg-ɑ göögø kidøøj, per gen nyii tëngø kɑ ge gɑ̈nni; kɑ ge nyii kööbø ge pɑ böggi kì ri yïëyø mi gen ki Yëso Mesiy." 
1Timothy3:14 Møg-ɑ gwëdɑ yïn ɑnɑn bɑ kinni, yɑ ogɑ̈nø yɑ ójwɑn bëën yïí." 
1Timothy3:15 De keløg yɑ ócwöngø, bëëd yï ngɑ̈ny gïn-ɑ døøj ki gwøgø yi yïn kì gøl Jwøk, ɑ bɑ kɑnïsɑ̀ mi Jwøng-ɑ nëënø; ɑ bɑ löj men-ɑ mïdhi dyër." 
1Timothy3:16 Bong pëëmø kì ri döngi kwøbb-ɑ ɑkɑnn mø yielø kinni: Ácwöb e rug-ɑ dëël dhɑnhø, kɑ nyodh yi Wëykwërø kinni bɑ dyër kɑ lidh yi wëywödd. Kwøbbe ɑ́pwönyi kì yethi pödhh, kɑ møge yïëy yi lɑ̈bø bëne, kɑ kïdhi yij mɑl." 
1Timothy4:1 Wëy okööbø ceth kinni kwï ji yïëyø mi gen ówiy yi gen kì cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ cyɑ̈n; ge ódøøg be lïngi kwøbbi wëy-ɑ ceg pyed, kɑ ge yïëy-ɑ pwönyi Cethɑn." 
1Timothy4:2 Pwönyø menɑni kɑ̈ll-ɑ yi tyëngwëënyø møg-ɑ ceg pyed; gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen thøø, de ge ce ócwɑ̈yø kɑ ngyënyø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì mɑc e kwɑɑr." 
1Timothy4:3 Ge mɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ ji nywöm kí cɑm ki kwï gïgcɑmm, e gïgcɑmmɑni ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi Jwøk gɑ møg cɑm, o nyi pwøj kiper gïgɑni yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, kɑ dyër yod yi gen." 
1Timothy4:4 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi Jwøk døøj bënn, o ko di gïjø me cuggi bɑnyø, de di dwɑddø kinni yïëëy gen bënn, kɑ Jwøk pwøj kiper gen." 
1Timothy4:5  
1Timothy4:6 Keløg nyiimyëw nyudhí ciggɑni, yï óbëëd yïn ɑ́ ngeti gwøøg Yëso Mesiy me døj; mɑ́ yï cɑɑm rií kɑ kwøbbi yïëyø geki pwöny-ɑ dyër men-ɑ bɑnge cyɑ̈dhi yi yïn." 
1Timothy4:7 Këëj wɑ́j-ɑ pɑ kyëëw ki kwøbbi Jwøk, geki møg-ɑ nyi wɑjji yi ywödhh; kɑ rií pwönyí ki bëëdø ki bëëntir." 
1Timothy4:8 Pwönyi dël ki dyëjø døøj, de pwönyi rɑw ki bëëntir døøj kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn, mɑ́ ree dɑ ngɑ̈dhi nënni ɑnɑn kí nënn-ɑ óbï dhuki megø." 
1Timothy4:9 Kwøbbɑni bɑ dyër, o ge døøj ki yïëyø yi ji bënn, kinni;" 
1Timothy4:10 wɑ ɑ́dyëëj ki gwøg, mɑ́ wɑ ngɑ̈dh-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ nëënø, ɑ bɑ Yïëni ji bënn, o mɑɑl gen bɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy." 
1Timothy4:11 Nyi pwönyí teedø ki møgɑni, kɑ ge nyi ceg ki kër-ɑ ómïdhi ge gïn." 
1Timothy4:12 Rií ko wëggí cɑyø yi ngɑn megø kipe kɑ̀ bëëd yï bɑ wøb. De kwøbbí, kí bëëdí, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií, kí yïëyí, geki kɑ̀ bëëd kelli wun lɑ̈wi ki gïgrijjø, wiy bëëd gen gɑ nyuudhi kipe tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy." 
1Timothy4:13 Kɑ wɑ̈nyi Jwøk nyi rɑɑng kì bøli teedø, kɑ ge nyi pwönyí, kɑ ge nyi cïïj, gïti keny-ɑ óbëënɑ." 
1Timothy4:14 Tegø men-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Jwøk kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́thɑɑny cinggi jøgdøngø kömí keny-ɑ ɑ́røøny yïn, ko wëggí lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
1Timothy4:15 Kɑ rií ngiij ki dyëjø ki gwøngɑni kipe kinni o bëëdí lidh yi teedø bëne e kedh e ódönyø. 
1Timothy4:16 Tid rií, kɑ pwönyí tiid. Dyëëj ki gøggi møgɑni; mɑ́ keløg yï ógöögø kinøw, rií óyiel yi yïn, wuki ji-ɑ nyi lïngi møgí." 
1Timothy5:1 Ngɑn-ɑ dwøng kibølí ko nyi jɑngí, de nyi kööb mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki en, e nɑ wïyí ceth. Kɑ yɑnythønhø mïdhí ge nɑ nyiimyëw." 
1Timothy5:2 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ døngø mïdhí ni ke di mïdhí meyí. Kɑ womɑ̈nn mïdhí ki tɑri pyëwí, ge nɑ nyiimyëw." 
1Timothy5:3 Wør tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ bɑ thwömm. 
1Timothy5:4 Keløg e dɑ ngɑndhɑjø me yïe di nywøl wɑlɑ̀ kwɑrr, dïd gen møti ki møg-ɑ kømmi yi kwøbbi Jwøk kipe kønyi tyëng kɑ̈lli gen; mɑ́ e bɑ gïjø me døøj kì bøli Jwøk, keløg tyëng-ɑ ɑ́pidh gen okønyø yi gen." 
1Timothy5:5 Ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ bɑ thwöm, o bëëd ɑ kete ki cwɑgge, nyi ngɑ̈dh-ɑ Jwøk, o gønye nyi gönye’ Jwøk yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
1Timothy5:6 De ngɑn-ɑ bɑ thwöm-ɑ nyi rumø kipe jɑmmi kömi piny, cɑgg e nëënø, pɑ̈r ki ngɑnthøø kì bøli Jwøk." 
1Timothy5:7 Nyi ceg gen ki møgɑni, kipe kinni o bongii ɑyɑ̈r kì kömi gen." 
1Timothy5:8 Keløg e dɑ dhɑnhø me pɑ nyi thödhi wɑddi gen wɑlɑ̀ tyëng gøl gen ki gïn-ɑ jɑ̈ddi gen, møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi en cøn ɑ́pyeme, o lod-ɑ ngɑn-ɑ nuti yïëyø ki rɑ̈jø." 
1Timothy5:9 Ko di ngɑndhɑjø me gwed kinni bɑ thwöm, keløg runne nuti wɑ̈dhi ri pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, o ko bëëd e ónywømø tyel ɑ́ryew." 
1Timothy5:10 De ngɑn-ɑ gwed ɑ́ thwöm bëëde ɑ́ ngɑn me ngɑ̈nyi yi teedø bëne kinni, nyi gøgg-ɑ gïgdøj, o nyige piidh en kidøøj, o bute nyii töngø yi wëll, o kɑ̈jji tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwër gɑ jii Jwøk nyii tyenyø yi en, o nyii kunyø ki tyëng-ɑ kömi gen di ɑkørr. O nyi gwøg-ɑ gïn-ɑ døøj ceth." 
1Timothy5:11 De tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ nudd ge thønhø ko gwed kinni ge bɑ thwömm møg pidh yi kɑnïsɑ̀, mɑ́ kenyi køni kwøbbi nywømø ki pëthi gen, Mesiy nyi wiy ge’ piny," 
1Timothy5:12 kɑ pɑ̈di møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöng yi gen ogöögø ki cɑ́y kì kömi gen. 
1Timothy5:13 Ge nyi tyëg piny ge owïïnø kì kelli kɑ̈llì, kɑ ge nyii dïdø ki ɑtum, kɑ ge nyi kedh-ɑ yethi kwøb mø pɑth ki mø gen, kí kømmi kwøb mø rijjø." 
1Timothy5:14 Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni nywøøm mɑ̈nn-ɑ thwömm møg-ɑ bɑ othønhø, o ge yïddi gen ki nyigi gen, o kɑ̈lli gen kor yi gen. Møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni, o ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø cöge e pɑ yïddi ki yöö men yɑnye wɑ," 
1Timothy5:15 mɑ́ kwï ji ɑ́rum ki peej pɑ̈l yi Cethɑn. 
1Timothy5:16 Keløg e dɑ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø me wɑɑd gen bɑ thwöm, kønye gøn, mɑ́ kɑnïsɑ̀ ókøny-ɑ thwömm møg-ɑ bong wɑddi gen, de pɑth ki kinni o pïd ki thwömm møg-ɑ di wɑddi gen." 
1Timothy5:17 Bëëd yï ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, tyëngdøngø møg-ɑ jɑɑg kɑnïsɑ̀ kidøøj, bɑ gen ɑ ngyënyyi gen cuggi medø, mɑɑl gen bɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi pwönyi kwøbbi Jwøk, kɑ gï lwøb gen kidøøj." 
1Timothy5:18 Mɑ́ e bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Wɑdh, men-ɑ ywɑjji gïn-ɑ pwööd byel kì yij rɑrø, dhøge ko nyi twöj.” Kí kinni, “Nyi mëggi dhɑnhø köönge.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Yï ko yïëy ki lidhi gøøny ngɑn dwøng mi kɑnïsɑ̀ kɑ̀ gøønyii yi ngɑn megø e bong cwɑ̈gg ɑ́ryew wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g. 
1Timothy5:20 De nyi cɑy tyëng-ɑ røngi kì bøli teedø bëne, kipe kinni o ji møøgø óböggi gen ki gwøg ki orøg." 
1Timothy5:21 Bɑ bøli Jwøk geki Yëso Mesiy kí wëywödd, ɑ cegɑ yïn kinni, mïdhí møg-ɑ köbbɑ yïn ek, kɑ ko di ngɑn cwɑg yi yïn kibøli ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø." 
1Timothy5:22 Kɑ yï ko nyi jwɑn røny ki ji mø bëëdi gen kwïj yi yïn, møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni, o yï ócöög yï pɑ cɑy kipe orøng-ɑ ógwøg yi gen. Nyi kor rií ki gïgrijjø." 
1Timothy5:23 Yï ko nyi mɑdh pï keti gen, de nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki møgi oløg me nøg, kipe kinni o gïncɑm nyi jwɑne töyø kì yijí, mɑ́ dëlí nyii rɑ̈mø." 
1Timothy5:24 Ji møøgø nyi bëëd ge ngɑ̈nyi kinni, ge bɑ tyëngorøg, o ge bɑ møg-ɑ óyïddi ki cɑ́y, de ji møøgø orøøg gen nyi cwöb-ɑ cyɑ̈n mɑ̈ɑ̈dh. Nɑ menɑni ceth, gïgdøj møg-ɑ gøggi yi ji møøgø nyi bëëd ge ngɑ̈nyi, o gïgdøj mø ji møøgø nyi bëëd ge kwïj, o ge bɑ møg-ɑ ócwöb thyew." 
1Timothy5:25  
1Timothy6:1 Wiy tyëng-ɑ nudd ge ying-ɑ yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø wør gen tyëng-ɑ cinggi gen di gen. Møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni, o nyingi Jwøk geki pwönye cög ge pɑ bwöl yi gen." 
1Timothy6:2 Kɑ bɑ̈ngg-ɑ bëëdø kì cinggi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, wëëg gen ko benyi gen, mɑ́ ge bɑ nyiimëëg, de ti gen gwøg mɑ́ ge gögg-ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy mø ceg ki mɑɑrø yi gen. Nyi pwönyí ji ki møgɑni, kɑ ge nyi cïïj kidøøj." 
1Timothy6:3 De keløg e dɑ ngɑn megø me nyi pwönyi ki kwøb møøgø, o pɑ nyi yïëy ki kwøbbi Mesiy møg-ɑ dyër, ɑ kyëëw ki bëëntir," 
1Timothy6:4 ngɑnɑni wïje tɑ̈dø, o bong gïn ngɑ̈nyi yi en. Tyer-ɑ gïg mø rijjø, møg nywøl pëëmø, kí wëërø, kí tyiel, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kí ɑgwɑddø, kí myën," 
1Timothy6:5 kí gøny kì kɑɑm ji-ɑ́ wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́rënyi, møg-ɑ ɑ́göög ge kwïj kwøbb-ɑ dyër. Ge rømm-ɑ kinni i kwøbbi Jwøk bɑ gïg bɑng gen kɑ̈ri." 
1Timothy6:6 Ngee, dhɑnhø nyii kɑ̈rø yi kwøbbi Jwøk kidyër, keløg pyëwe gøøj en kömi jɑmm-ɑ yïe keti gen." 
1Timothy6:7 Á ngø ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wɑ kömi piny keny-ɑ ɑ́nywøøl wɑ? Bogøn! Á ngø ɑ ókɑ̈l yi wɑ kì kömi piny? Bogøn! 
1Timothy6:8 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, bong gïn dwɑddi yi wɑ këti keløg yïee dɑ gïncɑm kí ógødh." 
1Timothy6:9 Mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ nyi rïngi kì bɑng kɑ̈rì nyi jwɑn kɑ thɑbø yi wëyrijjø, kɑ ge nyii göögø ki bɑ̈ngge, kɑ pëthi gen nyii tyëëdø ki mendwøng, kɑ ryɑ̈g nyi jwɑn-ɑ pɑ̈dhi kömi gen." 
1Timothy6:10 Mɑ́ rɑj bënn nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ bɑng mɑɑri ngyëny. Dɑ ji møøgø mɑ pëthi gen ɑ́døngi kipe ngyëny, kɑ ge ówɑ̈ɑ̈nyø ki yuu yïëyø, ɑyïddi gen ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw me dwøng." 
1Timothy6:11 De yïn, jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk, lɑ̈ɑ̈w rií ki jɑmmɑni bënn. Nyïɑ̈ggí kipe bëëntir, kí bëëndøj, kí yïëyø, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, kí ngïïnø, geki bëëdø mɑ̈ɑ̈dh." 
1Timothy6:12 Nyɑg rií kidøøj kipe møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi yïn; kɑ nënn-ɑ ɑtheer kwɑɑny gɑ kööngí; mɑ́ per nënnɑni ɑ ɑ́cwøøl yïn yi Jwøk, kɑ ɑ́yïëëy kì bøli ji mø gïïr." 
1Timothy6:13 Yï ceg yi yɑn ɑ bøli Jwøk thyew, ngɑn-ɑ nyi muuj wëy kí jɑmmì bënn; kí bøli Yëso Mesiy, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cony møge kì bøli Pilɑtø jɑl Pøntøs, e pɑ böggi." 
1Timothy6:14 Mïdhí cigg kidøøj, gïti Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óbëën Wë Yëso Mesiy." 
1Timothy6:15 Mɑ́ e ócwöb kì bøli keje; eni bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Jwøk, ngeti gyëdh, ɑ jyɑ̈gø e kete, Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh rɑ̈nhì, Wïi wëëg." 
1Timothy6:16 E kete ɑ pɑ thøw; bëëd ɑ yij cɑr me bute pɑ wɑ̈dhi yi dhɑnhø. Bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyii ki lidhø; bong ngɑn cuggi lidhii. En ɑ wør, ɑ jyɑ̈gø gïti ɑtheer! Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 Köbbí tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈rø yi jɑmmi kömi piny kinni ge ko thwøg, wɑlɑ̀ rummi gen ko cïb gen ri kɑ̈r-ɑ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈ny. De cïb gen rummi gen ri Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ nyi thödhi wɑ ki jɑmm-ɑ nyi mïni pëthee." 
1Timothy6:18 Kɑ tyëngkɑ̈rì nyi göög gen ki gïgdøj, kɑ ge nyi muuj gen ki tɑri pëëth, ge køny-ɑ tyëng-ɑ kyeelø ki jɑmmi gen." 
1Timothy6:19 Kɑ̀ göög gen kinøw, ge cøng-ɑ gïg-ɑ ómïdhi gen kidøøj dhuki megø, o ge óyïddi gen ki nënn-ɑ dyër." 
1Timothy6:20 Timøthì, kor møg-ɑ ɑ́cïb cingí kidøøj; këëj kwøbb-ɑ bɑ yɑnggì geki wɑ̈dhi pëmø, kí kwøbb-ɑ cwølli yi kwï ji i bɑ dïdø." 
1Timothy6:21 Mɑ́ ji møøgø ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ møgɑni, kɑ ge ówɑ̈ɑ̈nyø ki yuu yïëyø. Wiy dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk yinge kömí." 
2Timothy1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men ör-ɑ yi Pøøl, jɑlwööni Yëso Mesiy kì bɑng gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi Jwøk; ɑ́ör ɑ́ jɑlwöödø men kɑ̈lli wööni nënn-ɑ yod kì bɑng rëbø ki Yëso Mesiy." 
2Timothy1:2 Yɑ gwëd-ɑ Timøthì wɑ̈dɑ wɑ̈n-ɑ mɑɑrɑ. Wiy kwøbbi kɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw Jwøk kiperí, kí dhwɑ̈ng geki mër møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk Wïyee geki Wë Yëso Mesiy, ying gen kömí." 
2Timothy1:3 Yɑ pwøj-ɑ Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ göggɑ ni kɑ ɑ́göög kweyyee cøn, e bong ɑ́dud kì yethi gen. Nyii pwøjø yi yɑn kenyi kwɑ̈jjɑ kiperí yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
2Timothy1:4 Yɑ nyi rïïj yɑ orumø kiperí yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kɑ ywøng-ɑ ɑ́ywøg yi yïn kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́dɑ̈ngi wɑ, nyi pɑɑrɑ." 
2Timothy1:5 Yïëyø mií, yïëy-ɑ dyër orømmø yi yɑn ceth; eni yïëy-ɑ ɑ́ying yï wøngí Løis geki meyí Yunïkɑ̀ cøn." 
2Timothy1:6 Bene ɑ pere pɑ̈ddɑ yïn kinni, mïdhí tegø men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yïn yi Jwøk kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́thɑɑnyɑ cinggɑ kömí." 
2Timothy1:7 Mɑ́ wɑ pɑ løg wɑ̈rrì yi Wëy-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wɑ yi Jwøk, de wɑ ceg kɑ thödhø yi Wëyɑni ki tegø geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, kí kori rɑw." 
2Timothy1:8 Kɑ wïjí ko lɑ̈yyi cyee ki kømmi mø Wë, kɑ wïjí ko lɑ̈ɑ̈y kipe kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ bɑ ɑmɑg. De yïëëy ki orɑng kipe Wöndøj, kɑ̀ thödhi yïn yi Jwøk ki tegø men gwøøg møgɑni." 
2Timothy1:9 Wɑ ɑ́yiel yi Jwøk kɑ wɑ cwøle o wɑ bëëd wɑ, wɑ bɑ jie. De pɑth ki per gïn gwøøg wɑ, dɑ́ gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi pyëwe kì bɑng døøje. Dhwɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́mëgge wɑ kì ri Yëso Mesiy cøn, e piny nuti cwɑ̈jø," 
2Timothy1:10 de møgɑni ɑ́nyudhi wɑ ɑnɑn, kì ri bëëni Yïënee, Yëso Mesiy. Thøø ɑ́tyɑm yi en, kɑ kwøbbi nënn-ɑ ɑtheer nyodhe kì ri wöndøj." 
2Timothy1:11 Yɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi Jwøk, yɑn ɑ́ jɑlwöödø, kɑ yɑ gwøge yɑn ɑ́ jɑlpwönyi Wöndøj men kɑ̈llii kì kelli teedø." 
2Timothy1:12 Bɑ kiper møgɑni ɑ ɑ́rɑngɑ yi gïg mø gïïr e wïjɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈y, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi yɑn ngɑ̈nyɑ, o gïn-ɑ ɑ́cïbe cingɑ ómïdhi gïti keny-ɑ óbëën Cyɑ̈ngɑni." 
2Timothy1:13 Mɑ̈gí kidøøj kì ri kwøbb-ɑ dyër møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyɑ yïn bënn, kɑ yï bëëd yï mïdh-ɑ yïëyø, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Yëso Mesiy." 
2Timothy1:14 Korrí kwøbb-ɑ dyër, møg-ɑ ɑ́cïb cingí, o yï ókøny yi Wëykwërø ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì riee." 
2Timothy1:15 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni, yɑ ɑ́wiy piny yi tyëng Ásiyɑ̀, kí Pijeløs geki Ërmojenes kì kelli gen." 
2Timothy1:16 Gøl Onisipørøs ókøny yi Jwøk, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́cïj yi en, o wïje nuti lɑ̈ɑ̈yø yi yëll-ɑ cinggɑ." 
2Timothy1:17 De yɑ ɑ́yɑbe keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe Römɑ̀, kɑ yɑ yode." 
2Timothy1:18 Jwøk pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki en kì Cyɑ̈ngɑni! O óyïddi ki gyëdh. Mɑ́ e ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn ki mendwøng, kinni yɑ ɑ́køny yi en keny-ɑ ɑ́yingɑ Epɑsos." 
2Timothy2:1 De ɑnɑn, yïn ɑ wɑ̈dɑ, bëëd yï teeg kì bɑng dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ nyi yod kɑ̀ yïëy dhɑnhø ki ngɑ̈dhi Yëso Mesiy." 
2Timothy2:2 Kɑ pwönyɑ men-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi yïn kì kelli ji mø gïïr, nyi loony ki pwönyi tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈nyí yi yïn ceth kinni, ge bɑ ji mø cuggi pwönyi ji møøgø." 
2Timothy2:3 Nyi böyí ki orɑng ni ɑlɑthker men-ɑ nyi nyïɑ̈ggi kidøøj kipe Mesiy. 
2Timothy2:4 Mɑ́ bong ɑlɑthker me nyi göögø ki gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi tyëng-ɑ pɑth ki ɑlɑthker. De gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi en bɑ kinni, o gwøge bëëde e døøj kì bøli ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kwɑnyii." 
2Timothy2:5 Kɑ thyew, ngeti tugø pɑ nyi wɑ̈dhi thödhø ki yɑ̈r men-ɑ nyi pwøøj tyëng-ɑ ɑ́pöödh, dɑ́ kenyi pöödhe geki kɑ̀ nyi mïdhe ciggi tugø kidøøj." 
2Timothy2:6 O ngeti pur men-ɑ ɑ́göög ki gwøng teg, bɑ en ɑ kwøng ki thödhø kì ri byellɑni." 
2Timothy2:7 Yod møg-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn kidøøj, mɑ́ yï óthödhi yi Wë ki rummì mø døøj kipe kwøbbɑni bënn." 
2Timothy2:8 Wïjí ko wïl kinni Yëso Mesiy, ɑ ɑ́dhwödh kì yij thøø, bɑ wɑ̈d gøl Debïd, ni kɑ̀ pwönyɑ møgɑni kì yij Wöndøj men-ɑ kɑ̈lli yi yɑn." 
2Timothy2:9 O bɑ kipe kɑ̀ pwönyɑ Wöndøj menɑni ɑ yïddɑ ki orɑng, kɑ yɑ opödø ki yëll ni ngetorøg. De kwøbbi Jwøk pɑ cuggi mɑgø ki yëll," 
2Timothy2:10 bene ɑ bɑnge nginɑ gïg mø gïïr kipe tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yieny gɑ jii Jwøk, kipe kinni o ge óyïddi gen ki yielø men-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l bɑng kɑ̀ yïëy dhɑnhø ki ngɑ̈dhi Yëso Mesiy, o ge óbëëd gen kì yij cɑɑr Jwøk gïti ɑtheer kyeel ki en." 
2Timothy2:11 Kwøb møg bɑ dyër kinni, “Keløg wɑ thøø kyeel ki en, wɑ ónëënø kyeel ki en thyew," 
2Timothy2:12 Keløg wɑ pɑ wïyi ki ngïïnø, wɑ ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø kyeel ki en thyew, Keløg e óbɑny yi wɑ, wɑ ólony yi en ki bɑnyø thyew." 
2Timothy2:13 Keløg wɑ døøg-ɑ cyɑ̈n, pɑ cuggi døøg cyɑ̈n, mɑ́ ree pɑ cuggi bɑnyø yi en.”" 
2Timothy2:14 Nyi pɑ̈ddí tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ ki møgɑni. Kɑ ge nyi kyëddí kinni, ge ko nyi wɑ̈dhi pëmø kì kelli gen, mɑ́ pëëmɑni rɑɑj kì bøli Wë, o nyi rëny-ɑ yïëyø mi tyëng-ɑ lïngø." 
2Timothy2:15 Nyi göög kidøøj kipe kinni, o rií nyudhí Jwøk, o yï óyïëy yi en kinni, yï bɑ ngeti gwøg me wïje pɑ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈y, mɑ́ kwøbb-ɑ dyër nyii lwøbø yi yïn kidøøj." 
2Timothy2:16 Nyi këëj kwøbb-ɑ bong thɑ́ gen, mɑ́ kwøbbɑni nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈w-ɑ ji mø gïïr ki yuu Jwøk." 
2Timothy2:17 Kwøbbɑni nɑ ɑ́rudø ɑ nyi cɑm dëël dhɑnhø; Ëmenɑøs geki Piletøs nud kì kelli ji-ɑ kɑ̈lli kwøbbɑni. 
2Timothy2:18 Yuu dyër ɑ́wiy yi gen, o ge rëny-ɑ wɑ̈thi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, kɑ̀ kööb gen kinni, i dhwödhø miee rum bëënø." 
2Timothy2:19 De tyeli øn-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Jwøk pɑ cuggi ki onhɑ̈nh, mɑ́ köme ógwedø kinni, “Wë ji-ɑ bɑ møge ngɑ̈nye” de “Tyëng-ɑ kööbø ce ge bɑ mø Wë, ceg gen wïyø ki gwøg ki gïgrijjø møti.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Yij øn-ɑ dwøng nyi dɑ puggì kí óthɑ̈ggì mø döngi ngëddi gen bɑ̈nni; møøgø ócwɑ̈jø kɑ dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø, møøgø ógwøgø kɑ ɑ́bwödø kí lɑ̈bø; kwï gen bɑ mø ryëj; o møøgø wɑ̈dhi kɑ gwøg yøw." 
2Timothy2:21 Keløg ji ri gen ogwøgø yi gen ge dhïw, kɑ̀ lɑ̈ɑ̈w gen ri gen ki gïgrijjø møgɑni, ge ceg-ɑ gwøg gɑ mø ryëj, mɑ́ ge bɑ ɑthyey, o ge døøj kì yï wïi gen, ge bɑ ɑgwir ceth kipe gwøng døj." 
2Timothy2:22 Këëj gïg-ɑ nyi tyer yi pëthi wøbb, kɑ yï tyer bëëntir kí yïëyø, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø geki mër, wuki tyëng-ɑ cwølli Wë ki pëëth mø tïl kinni kunye." 
2Timothy2:23 Kɑ rií lɑ̈ɑ̈w ki tyëng-ɑ nyi wɑ̈dhi pëmø ki kwïji wøw geki dhëëgø, mɑ́ ge yɑb-ɑ wëërø kete." 
2Timothy2:24 De ngɑn-ɑ nyi göögø kì bɑng Wë, ko bëëd ɑ́ ngɑn nyi yɑ̈bø ki wëërø; de bëëde ɑ́ ngɑn nyi bëëdø mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki ji bënn. Kɑ bëëde ɑ́ jɑlpwönyø me døøj, o ngɑ̈ny ngïnø." 
2Timothy2:25 Kɑ kwøbbi tyëng-ɑ pemmi dhøge nyi løøge mɑ̈ɑ̈dh, e bong wëërø, mɑ́ gø kwïj yi en ying pëthi gen óløg yi Jwøk, kɑ ge óyewø. Kɑ kwøbb-ɑ dyër yod yi gen." 
2Timothy2:26 Kɑ ge obodhø kì dhøggi ɑ́kɑ̈lli Cethɑn, mɑ́ gï mɑɑg en, kɑ gï løge møg lïngi kwøbbe." 
2Timothy3:1 Bëëd yï ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, keny-ɑ óbëën cögi piny, kwøb mø peeg ócwöb." 
2Timothy3:2 Pëthi ji ódøngi kipe jɑmmi kömi piny, kɑ ge ogöögø ge pɑ nywɑ̈gø, ge pwöd-ɑ köthi gen, ge thwøgø, ge ceg-ɑ gwɑ̈dø, o othønhø pemm-ɑ dhøggi wëëg geki mëëg; o ngɑn göggi gïndøj pɑ pwöjji, o kwøbbi Jwøk ówiy;" 
2Timothy3:3 ji ógöögø pëthi pɑ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m; ge ceg-ɑ pɑ̈d ki kwøb; ge ceg-ɑ kwɑ̈dh; ge nyɑ̈gg-ɑ ri gen; pëthi gen keej; o ge ógöögø ge mɑɑn-ɑ gïndøj. 
2Timothy3:4 Ge ógöögø ki tyëngɑmolpiny; yethi gen órönyi, kɑ ge otɑ̈dø; o Jwøk óbɑny yi gen, kɑ ge mɑɑr-ɑ gïg-ɑ tyer yi pëthi gen." 
2Timothy3:5 Ge ómɑ̈gi kì ri møg-ɑ bɑ pɑ̈ddi kwøbbi Jwøk, de yethi kwøbbɑni óbɑny yi gen. Kɑ rií lɑ̈ɑ̈w cyee ki jiɑni." 
2Timothy3:6 Kwï jøgɑni nyi kedh-ɑ kɑ̈lli ji møøgø, kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ pëthi gen nyøødh nyi jwɑn ki tyɑmø yi gen, mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møgɑni nyi yuud ge torø yi kerri orøøg gen, ge pyejj-ɑ yi gïg-ɑ tyer yi pëthi gen bënn;" 
2Timothy3:7 tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møgɑni ri gen nyii pɑ̈nyø yi gen ki dïdø, de ge dhɑ̈li ki yodi dyër." 
2Timothy3:8 Jøgɑni pɑ̈r ki Yɑnis geki Yɑmbres; jøg-ɑ ɑ́tyëddi Mosɑ̀, o jiɑni ge bɑny-ɑ dyër thyew; ge bɑ ji mø wɑ̈thi gen pɑ göögø, o ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li yïëyø." 
2Timothy3:9 De bong keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhi yi gen, mɑ́ nøgi wɑ̈thi gen óyod yi ji bënn. O bɑ gïn ni menɑni ɑ ɑ́cwöb kipe Yɑnis geki Yɑmbres." 
2Timothy3:10 De yï ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ pwönyɑ, kí bëëdɑ, kí gïn-ɑ köme köddɑ, kí yïëyɑ, kí ngïnɑ, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø miɑ, kí bëëdɑ yɑ pɑ nhɑ̈nhi," 
2Timothy3:11 kí ɑbɑɑrɑ, kí orɑngɑ. Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni gïgɑni bënn ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömɑ kì Anthɑkiyɑ̀, kí Ayköniyɑ̀ geki Listrɑ̀; wɑngɑ ɑ́guud ki mendwøng! De yɑ ɑ́yiel yi Wë ki møgɑni bënn." 
2Timothy3:12 Mɑ́ ngɑn dwɑddi bëëdø ki bëëntir kì ri Yëso Mesiy, wɑnge ceg kɑ guudø ceth." 
2Timothy3:13 De tyëngorøg, kí tyëngwëënyø, ge ceg-ɑ pëddø ki rɑ̈jø; ge óthɑ̈bø ki ji, o ge ólony ki thɑbø." 
2Timothy3:14 De yïn, mïdhí yuu-ɑ dyër men-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi yïn yï thiinh, kɑ yïëyø menɑni mïdhí. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi yïn ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn." 
2Timothy3:15 Mɑ́ yï ɑ́wöni yï thiinh, e wɑ̈jji kwërø ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, o yï ócuggø thödhø yi wɑ̈jjɑni ki peli wïj men-ɑ nyodh yuu yielø, kì ri yïëyi Yëso Mesiy." 
2Timothy3:16 Møg-ɑ yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø bënn ɑ́yɑl-ɑ yi Jwøk, gɑ møg pwönyi dyër, kí cɑyi bɑ̈jjø, kí tyëny, kí cigg kipe bëëntir." 
2Timothy3:17 Kipe kinni o ngeti kwøbbi Jwøk óbëëde e bong gïn gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ree, o óbëëde ɑ́ ɑgwir kipe gwøg ki gwøng døj." 
2Timothy4:1 Yï kwɑjji yi yɑn ɑ bøli Jwøk geki Yëso Mesiy, ngɑn-ɑ óløøg kwøbbi tyëngnëënø kí tyëngthøø keny-ɑ ócwöbe kì bøli keje." 
2Timothy4:2 Pwönyí wöödø, (cɑgg ɑ́ kì bøli keny me døøj ki pwönyø wɑlɑ̀ pɑ døøj), kɑ yï dyëëj, o ge yïëy gen; kɑ ge nyi kyëddí; kɑ ge nyi cïïj; kɑ yï pwönyí ceth e köörí pɑ buudh." 
2Timothy4:3 Bøli keny-ɑ óbɑ̈nyi ji ki pwöny-ɑ dyër obëënø. Ge ótyer-ɑ jɑmm-ɑ mɑɑr yi gen, o ge óyɑ̈bø ki jøpwönyø møg-ɑ óköbbi gen gïg-ɑ med ki lïngø yi yïthhi gen." 
2Timothy4:4 Ge óbɑ̈nyi ki lïngi møg-ɑ dyër, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be lïngi wɑ̈thi ngur." 
2Timothy4:5 De yïn kirií, bëëd wïjí onëënø. Kɑ yï ngïïn ki orɑng. Kɑ yï göög ki gwøøg jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk, kɑ gwøgí nyi gwøøg kidøøj." 
2Timothy4:6 Keløg ɑ́ perɑ, sɑɑ̀ men-ɑ ngɑɑl yɑn, yɑn ɑ́ gëëdhi ɑ́wɑ̈nhi; o bøli keny-ɑ kedhɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi thyew." 
2Timothy4:7 Yɑ ɑ́rum ki nyɑɑg kidøøj kipe kwøbbi Jwøk, o møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi yɑn mïdhɑ’ mïdhø. Møgɑni pɑ̈r ki kinni, yɑ ɑ́pöödh kì yij rɑɑdø." 
2Timothy4:8 O dɑ köögi me mïdhi yi Jwøk kiperɑ; kööngɑni ómëggi yɑn kì Cyɑ̈ngɑni yi Wë Jɑng-ɑ dyër, kiper kɑ ɑ́tyɑ̈mɑ. Pɑth ki yɑ ketɑ ɑ óthödhi, dɑ́ ji bënn møg-ɑ yïd cwöbe ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø." 
2Timothy4:9 Jwɑn bëën yïɑ. 
2Timothy4:10 Mɑ́ Demɑs, pyëwe ɑ́døngi kipe jɑmmi kömi piny, kɑ yɑ wiye piny, ɑkedhe Tesɑlonikɑ̀. O Kreskes ɑ́kedhi Gɑlɑthiyɑ̀. Kɑ Tïtø kedh-ɑ Dɑlmɑthiyɑ̀." 
2Timothy4:11 Luk ɑ ɑ́döng kì butɑ kete. Kwɑny Mɑrk kɑ wu bï wun kyeel, mɑ́ en ɑ nyi køny yɑn ki gwøgɑ." 
2Timothy4:12 De Tikikøs ɑ́örɑ Epɑsos. 
2Timothy4:13 Keny-ɑ óbëën wun, kɑ wu ótöngi wun gøl Kɑrpøs kì Torwɑs, kɑ pɑrɑ men-ɑ ɑ́wiyɑ kunɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun geki wɑ̈j; møg-ɑ per teg cɑrø bɑ wɑ̈jj-ɑ bɑ pënnì." 
2Timothy4:14 Yɑ ɑ́göggi ki gïjø me rɑɑj yi Iskɑnder, bødhi dilɑl. De ócɑy-ɑ yi Wë kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gögge yɑn." 
2Timothy4:15 Kor rií thyew kipere, mɑ́ kwøbbɑ ɑ́bɑny yi en ki mendwøng." 
2Timothy4:16 Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́ying tungɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́nyɑɑgɑ riɑ kì tyeli mɑl; yɑ ɑ́wiy piny yi gen ge bënn. Ge ówiy yi Jwøk! 
2Timothy4:17 De Wë ɑ́bëëd e nud kì butɑ, kɑ yɑ thödhe ki tegø men lwøbɑ kwøbbe kidøøj, kipe kinni o ge lïngi yi tyëngpɑth ki Yeud bënn; ɑbødhɑ ki kuumø thøø." 
2Timothy4:18 Yɑ óyiel yi Wë ki rɑj bënn, kɑ yɑ kïdhe pödhe kì mɑl ki tɑrø. En ɑ lejji gïti ɑtheer! Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Mɑ̈dh Priskilɑ̀ geki Akïlɑ̀, kɑ tyëng gøl Onisipørøs mɑ̈ɑ̈dh." 
2Timothy4:20 Erɑstøs ɑ́cöög Körintøs. O Trøpimøs ɑ́wiyɑ Miletøs, mɑ́ dële ɑ́bëëd e orɑ̈mø." 
2Timothy4:21 Jwɑn bëënø kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti köni wuudø. Yï ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi Yubuløs kí Pudens, kí Lïnøs, kí Kelɑwdiyɑ̀, geki nyiimïee bënn." 
2Timothy4:22 Wë, wëyí ómïdhe. Dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk óying kömi wun bënn." 
Titus1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Pøøl, bɑ̈ng Jwøk, o bɑ jɑlwööni Yëso Mesiy. Yɑ ɑ́ceg kɑ myegø, kɑ yɑ ör be kønyi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yieny gɑ jii Jwøk kì bɑng yïëyø, o ge peejɑ yij dyër men-ɑ pwönyi yi kwøbbi Jwøgee," 
Titus1:2 dyër menɑni bɑ ngɑ̈dhi nënn-ɑ ɑtheer. Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ pɑ nyi kømmi pyed, bɑ en ɑ ɑ́kööb e piny nuti cɑ̈gø, kinni nënnɑni ómëgge wɑ." 
Titus1:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi Jwøk Yïënee kipe nyodhe møgɑni, ɑnyodhe gïn kì ri pwönyø men-ɑ ɑ́cïbe cingɑ. Mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́ceg yi en kinni, pwönyɑ gen ceth." 
Titus1:4 Yɑ gwëd-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Tïtø, mɑ́ yï bɑ dïl wɑ̈dɑ kì bɑng yïëyø men-ɑ reb wɑ. Wiy dhwɑ̈ng geki mër, møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk Wïyee geki Yëso Mesiy Yïënee, ying gen kömí." 
Titus1:5 Gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́wiyɑ yïn kì Kirit bɑ kinni, o gïg-ɑ bɑ̈jjø kì yij kɑnïsɑ̀ kì pönhɑni tyeny yi yïn. Codhe, o yï rööny ki jɑggi kɑnïsɑ̀ kì yethi myërr bënn ni kɑ ɑ́nyudhɑ yïn cøn." 
Titus1:6 Bëëd jɑngi kɑnïsɑ̀ köme bong kwøb, kɑ bëëde cyëge bɑ ɑ́kyel, o kwøbbi Jwøk óyïëyø yi nyige, o ge ngɑ̈ny bëëdø, o ge pɑ pëmø." 
Titus1:7 Mɑ́ jɑngi kɑnïsɑ̀ mïdh-ɑ gwøøg Jwøk, ko bëëd köme dɑ cɑ́y. Ko bëëd ɑ́ jɑlɑthwøg, o ko bëëd ɑ́ ngɑn nyi mɑngi yi liny, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn nyi nɑ̈g yi møgø, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn kwøbbe teeg; kɑ ko bëëd pyëwe dwøøng kipe ngyëny." 
Titus1:8 De bëëde ɑ́ jɑl nyi cwøøl wëll gøle, o mɑɑr-ɑ gwøng døj. Bëëde wïje onëënø, e tir, o bɑ ngeti kwër me ngɑ̈ny bëëdø." 
Titus1:9 Kɑ bëëde e mïdh-ɑ kwøbb-ɑ dyër møg-ɑ kyëëw ki pwönyee. Møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni, o ócugge pwönyø ki kwøbb-ɑ dyër ceth, o dhøggi tyëng-ɑ pëmø nɑ̈g yi en." 
Titus1:10 Tyëng-ɑ pëmø gïïr; mɑɑl gen dɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ Yeud; ge ceg-ɑ pëmø, o ge wëny-ɑ ji ki kwøbbi pyed." 
Titus1:11 Kyëddí jiɑni, mɑ́ ge rëny-ɑ kɑ̈llì mø gïïr, kɑ̀ pwönyi gen gïg mø pɑ døøj ki pwönyø, kipe kinni o ge yïddi gen ki ngyëny." 
Titus1:12 Bɑ jɑl Kirit kiree; o bɑ jɑltööng gen ɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, “Tyëng Kirit ceg bëëdø gɑ tyëngpyed; ge bɑ lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l; ge bɑ rɑj, o ge bɑ cɑ̈mmì.”" 
Titus1:13 Kwøbbɑni bɑ dyër ceth. De cem nyingi gen ki mendwøng, o yïëyø mi gen óbëëde ɑ́ dyër." 
Titus1:14 Wiy gen mïdhi kwööng Yeud geki ciggi tyëng-ɑ bɑny kwøbb-ɑ dyër. 
Titus1:15 Jɑmmì bënn dhïw kì yï tyëng-ɑ dhïw, de bong gïjø me dhïw kì yï tyëng-ɑ ywëdhø, ɑ nuti yïëyø; mɑ́ rummi gen kí pëthi gen ywëdhø." 
Titus1:16 Ge okööbø ce Jwøk ngɑ̈nyi yi gen, de gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen nyodh-ɑ kinni, Jwøk bɑɑny gen. Ge bɑ tyëngrijjø mø pëddi pëmø, o bong gïndøj me cuggi gwøgø yi gen." 
Titus2:1 De kømmí møg-ɑ kyëëw ki pwöny-ɑ dyër. 
Titus2:2 Pwönyí jøgdøngø kinni bëëd gen wɑ̈thi gen onëënø, ge wør-ɑ ri gen, o lebbi gen okorø yi gen, o yï gen dɑ yïëyø, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, kí ngïïnø." 
Titus2:3 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ døngø pwönyí thyew kinni bëëd gen ki bëëdi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ bɑ tyëng kwërø; ge ko bëëd gɑ tyëngkwɑ̈dh, wɑlɑ̀ ge ko nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki møgø me gïïr. De nyi nyodh gen bëën-ɑ døj." 
Titus2:4 Møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni o tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ nudd gɑ kɑyy pwönyi yi gen ki mɑɑri cwøwi gen geki nyigi gen," 
Titus2:5 o ge bëëd gen rummi gen nud, o ge cög ge pɑ røngø ki cwøw møøgø, o ge korri gen kɑ̈lli gen kidøøj, o ge bëëd gen buri gen døøj kì bøli ji bënn, o ge nyi lïngi gen ciggi cwøwi gen. Møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni o kɑnïsɑ̀ cöge, e pɑ cɑy kì bɑng gen." 
Titus2:6 Kɑ yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb ceg kinni bëëd gen rummi gen nud. 
Titus2:7 Kɑ yï bëëd yï bɑ nyuudhi kipe gwøng døj, kɑ yï pwönyí yijí bong ɑ́dud." 
Titus2:8 Nyi kømmí kwøb mø bong gïn cuggi cɑyø kì ri gen; o ngɑn-ɑ pëmø wïje ólɑ̈ɑ̈ye, o jɑ̈dde ki gïnrɑj me kwøbe kì riee." 
Titus2:9 Bɑ̈ngg lïngi gen ciggi tyëng-ɑ cinggi gen bëëd yi gen. Kɑ ge nyi gwøg gen gïgdøj kipe jyɑ̈ggɑni kì yethi yëëth bënn, e bong pëmø." 
Titus2:10 Kɑ ge ko kwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì yï gen. De nyodh gen ri gen ceth kinni ge bɑ ji mø døøj. Møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni o kwøbb-ɑ pwönyi yi wɑ kipe Jwøk Yïënee, pwøj yi teedø kì bɑng gen." 
Titus2:11 Mɑ́ Jwøk dhwɑ̈nge ɑ́nyodhe kinni bɑ men yieel dhɑnhø bëne. 
Titus2:12 Dhwɑ̈ngɑni pwöny-ɑ wɑ ki wiyi bëëdø men-ɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki bëën-ɑ dwɑddi yi kwøbbi Jwøk, kí wiyi mɑɑri jɑmmi kömi piny, o wɑ bëëd wɑ ki bëëntir, wɑ mïdh-ɑ pëthee, o wɑ lïng-ɑ kwøbbi Jwøk," 
Titus2:13 o wɑ yïd-ɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng gyëdh men-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi wɑ; eni cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ócwöb mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøgee, geki Yïënee Yëso Mesiy," 
Titus2:14 ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́muuj ree kipe dømee, kɑ wɑ løge ji mø dhïw, mø bɑ jie kete, møg tyer gøggi gïgdøj." 
Titus2:15 Köbbí møgɑni teedø bëne, kɑ ge nyi cïïj kipe gwøng døj, kɑ ge nyi kyëddí ki gwøg ki gïnrɑj. Rií ko wëggí dhɑ̈ɑ̈ng cyɑ̈n yi ngɑn megø." 
Titus3:1 Nyi pɑ̈ddí teedø kinni bëëd gen ge lïng-ɑ ciggi jyɑ̈ggì geki tyëng-ɑ cinggi gen di tegø, kɑ gïg-ɑ nyi köbbi gen yi tyëngɑni nyi lïngi gen, kɑ ge bëëd gen ri gen tyeeny gen kipe gwøg ki gïndøj," 
Titus3:2 kɑ ko di dhɑnhø me yɑny yi gen, kɑ wëërø nyi këëj gen, kɑ ge bëëd gen gɑ mööl, ge owuödø ki ji bënn." 
Titus3:3 Wɑ ɑ́bëëd cøn wɑ bɑ dhëgg, o wɑ rɑj ki pëmø; o wɑ nɑ ji mø lɑ̈nyi pɑ̈l; o wɑ jɑɑg-ɑ yi gïg-ɑ tyer yi pëthee; wɑ ɑ́bëëd wɑ ceg-ɑ wëny, o wɑ ceg-ɑ mud, wɑ mɑɑn-ɑ riee." 
Titus3:4 De keny-ɑ ɑ́nyoodh døøji Jwøk Yïënee geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee," 
Titus3:5 wɑ ɑ́yiele. Wɑ nuti yieel en kɑ per gïndøj me gwøøg wɑ, de møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi en ɑ bɑng kɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe, kì ri Wëykwërø ɑ nyi wëggi wɑ døøgø nywølø, kɑ wɑ thödhe ki nënn-ɑ nyɑ̈n kɑ ɑ́lwøøg wɑ." 
Titus3:6 Wëykwërø ɑ́køny kömee yi Jwøk kì ri Yëso Mesiy Yïënee," 
Titus3:7 kipe kinni, o wɑ løg tyëngtir yi dhwɑ̈nge; o wɑ óyïddi wɑ ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer men-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi wɑ." 
Titus3:8 Kwøbbɑni bɑ dyër. Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, pwönyí kwøbbɑni kipe kinni, o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy Jwøk pëggi gen be gwøg ki gwøng døj; mɑ́ møgɑni døøj, o dhɑnhø nyii kønyø yi gen." 
Titus3:9 De këëj pëëmi dhëëgø, kí kwøbbi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, kí wëërø, kí nyïɑ̈ggø kì kömi Cigg, mɑ́ e bong gïn nywøl yi gen, o bong gïndøj me yod kì bɑng gen." 
Titus3:10 Keløg dhɑnhø okyëddø yi yïn tyelø ɑ́kyel, wɑlɑ̀ tyel ɑ́ryew de nudd e opëmø, ko di gïn kømmí ki en këti." 
Titus3:11 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni ji-ɑ ni møgɑni bɑ tyëngrijjø, o orøøg gen nyodh-ɑ rɑ̈ji gen." 
Titus3:12 Keløg Artemɑs wɑlɑ̀ Tikikøs óörɑ yïí, nyɑg rií, kɑ yï bï yïɑ kì Nikøpølis, mɑ́ yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ tyëgi wuudø kì kɑɑlɑni." 
Titus3:13 Pɑ̈nyí rií ki kønyi Dhenɑs bødhi Cigg, geki Apøløs ki gwiri ri gen kipe wel, o óbongii gïn jɑ̈ddi gen kì kö yöö." 
Titus3:14 Dïd jiee ki gwøg ki gwøng døj, o óbëëde e bong gïn jɑ̈ddi gen, kɑ ge ko wɑ̈dhi bëëdø yøw." 
Titus3:15 Yï ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi teen-ɑ buti gen bëëdɑ kì keny. Kɑ wɑddee kì yij yïëyø mɑ̈ɑ̈dh. Wiy dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk yinge kömi wun bënn. 
Philemon1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Pøøl, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́mɑg kipe nyingi Yëso Mesiy, geki Timøthì ómïee. E gwëd-ɑ Pilemøn, ngɑn-ɑ pere teg kì yï wøn, ɑ göögø kyeel ki wøn;" 
Philemon1:2 kí kɑnïsɑ̀ men-ɑ nyi cugi kì gølí; kí nyimïee Apiyɑ̀; kí Arkipøs, wɑn-ɑ nyɑg wɑ liny." 
Philemon1:3 Wiy wu óthödhi ki dhwɑ̈ng kí mër yi Wïyee Jwøk, geki Wë Yëso Mesiy." 
Philemon1:4 Kenyi kwɑjjɑ Jwøk kɑ nyi pwøjɑ, nyingí nyii pɑrø yi yɑn, yeki ómïɑ Pilemøn." 
Philemon1:5 Mɑ́ kwøbbi mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑr jii Jwøk yi yïn, kí yïëyí Wë Yëso olïngø yi yɑn." 
Philemon1:6 Kɑ Jwøk nyi kwɑjjɑ kipe kinni, o nywɑgí yïëyø ki wøn bëëde ɑ́ yöö men gwøg wɑ gïn-ɑ cuggi gwøgø yi wɑ kiper nyingi Mesiy." 
Philemon1:7 Pyëwɑ ɑ́tëngi kì bɑng mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií, yeki ómïɑ, mɑ́ pëthi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwër gɑ jii Jwøk nyii mïnø kì bɑngí." 
Philemon1:8 Bene ɑ bɑnge bëëdɑ yɑ pɑ böggi ki köbbi yïn kì ri Mesiy ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ kinni gwøg. 
Philemon1:9 De yɑ ɑ́tyer-ɑ kwɑjji yïn ki nyingi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, yɑ jɑldwøng Pøøl, yɑ bɑ ɑmɑg ɑnɑn kipe nyingi Mesiy," 
Philemon1:10 kiper Onesimøs, wɑ̈dɑ kì ri Mesiy, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́göög ki wïye kì ri kwøbbi Jwøk yɑ ying-ɑ ød mɑg." 
Philemon1:11 Nyelɑni ɑ́bëëd pere bogøn kì yïí kì bøli keny megø, de ɑnɑn, pere ɑ́tëngi kì yïee ryeet." 
Philemon1:12 Döggɑ’ yïn ɑnɑn, o men-ɑ́ pyëwɑ ɑ́kedh ki en." 
Philemon1:13 Ádwɑddɑ’ mïdhø kì butɑ, yɑ ying-ɑ ød mɑg kipe wöndøj, o yɑ di kønye ɑ́ kejí." 
Philemon1:14 De yɑ pɑ dwɑddi ciri yïn kinni göggí yɑn; yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni ceg kunyø yï kuny-ɑ cwɑggí. O bong gïjø me cuggi gwøgø yi yɑn keløg yï pɑ yïëy. 
Philemon1:15 Ócuggø bëëdø kinni Onesimøs kedhø kì butí ki keny me nøg, kiper kinni o ódwööge e cöög-ɑ yïí." 
Philemon1:16 O pɑth kipe kinni o bëëde ɑ́ bɑ̈ng yøw këti, de pere teeg kibøli bɑ̈ng; mɑ́ e bɑ ómïee kì ri Mesiy. Pere teeg kì yïɑ ki mendwøng! O pere koo ceg pëddø ki tëngø kì yïí, mɑ́ e bɑ bɑ̈ngí, o bɑ ómyëw kì ri Wë!" 
Philemon1:17 De ɑnɑn, keløg yɑ orømmø yi yïn kinni, wɑ gwøg-ɑ gwøg ɑ́kyel, kwɑɑny ni ke di kwɑɑny yɑn ceth." 
Philemon1:18 Keløg e dɑ gïnrɑj men-ɑ ógöggi yïn yi en, wɑlɑ̀ dɑ gïïpiny kì cwɑgge, wiy kwörɑni yinge cwɑggɑ." 
Philemon1:19 Møgɑni ɑ gwedɑ ki cingɑ èn kinni: (De kì tung-ɑ kyeelø, cɑgg yï pɑ köbbi yi yɑn, ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn ceth kinni, yielø mií kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïɑ)" 
Philemon1:20 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, gwøg gïn-ɑ köbbɑ yïn yeki ómïɑ, kipe nyingi Wë; gwøg gïn mïni pyëwɑ, mɑ́ yɑ bɑ ómyëw kì ri Mesiy!" 
Philemon1:21 Kɑ̀ gwedɑ møgɑni ɑnɑn, yɑ gwëdø yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, gïn-ɑ köbbɑ yïn ógwøg yi yïn ceth; o ceg bëëdø e ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn ceth kinni yï ócuggø gwøg ki gïjø me lod men-ɑ köbbɑ yïn." 
Philemon1:22 Kɑ yɑ yɑ̈bbí ki ød thyew, mɑ́ yɑ ogɑ̈nø kinni, kwɑ̈jji wun óløøg yi Jwøk kɑ yɑ dögge wun." 
Philemon1:23 Yï ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi Epɑprɑs, jɑl-ɑ ying wøn ød mɑg kipe nyingi Yëso Mesiy." 
Philemon1:24 O yï ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi Mɑrk kí Aristɑrkøs, kí Demɑs kí Luk, jøg-ɑ göögø ki wøn kì kej ɑ́kyel." 
Philemon1:25 Wiy dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë Yëso Mesiy yinge kömi wun bënn. 
Hebrews1:1 Cøn, Jwøk ɑ́kööb ki kweyyee kì yethi kɑ̈jj bënn ki yëëth mø gïïr kì ri jøtöng møge." 
Hebrews1:2 De kɑ ɑ́thumi bøli kɑ̈jjɑni, ɑkööbe ki wɑ kì ri Wɑ̈de, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi en kipe kinni o jɑmmì bënn cïbe cinge, mɑ́ bene ree ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j jɑmmì bënn." 
Hebrews1:3 O bɑ ree ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi cɑɑr Jwøk, o bɑ en ceth ɑ nyudhi wɑ bëëdi Jwøk. Jɑmmì bënn omïdhø yi en kì kɑ̈jji gen ki tege. Mɑ́ e ɑ́thøw e gøøm-ɑ bøli dhɑnhø bëne, kipe kinni o ge dhïwi gen. Codhe ɑpëgge wïj kyëëj Jwøk kì pɑɑre mɑl." 
Hebrews1:4 Wɑ̈d ɑ́gwøg e dwøng kibøli wëywödd, ni kɑ̀ bëëd nyinge ying-ɑ mɑl kibøli nyingi gen." 
Hebrews1:5 Mɑ́ Jwøk bong ɑ́kyel kì kelli wëywödde mɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Yï bɑ Wɑ̈dɑ, yɑ ɑ́göög ki wïyí dicyɑ̈ngtïn.” Wɑlɑ̀ bong wëywödø mɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kinni, “Yɑ ógöögø ki wïye, kɑ ogöögø ki wɑ̈dɑ.”" 
Hebrews1:6 Jwøk keny-ɑ ɑ́öre Wɑ̈de, Wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø kömi piny, ɑ́kööb kinni, “Mɑlli yi wëywöddi Jwøk bënn.”" 
Hebrews1:7 De kì ri wëywödd Jwøk ɑ́kwøb-ɑ kinni, “Jwøk wëywödde ɑ́gwøge gɑ yømø, kɑ bɑ̈ngge gwøge gɑ lebbi mɑc.”" 
Hebrews1:8 De møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kì ri Wɑ̈d bɑ kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøk, kwømí óbëëdø gïti ɑtheer; jií jɑɑg yi yïn kɑ gøggi dyër." 
Hebrews1:9 Yï mɑɑr-ɑ gïn-ɑ bɑ dyër, o men-ɑ bɑ bɑ̈jjø mɑɑn yi yïn bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́myeeg yïn yi Jwøgí kɑ yï thödhe ki medi pyëw geki dhwɑ̈ng me dwøng kibøli men-ɑ ɑ́mëgge jøg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi wun.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Ákööb thyew kinni, “Wuö, piny ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi yïn kì tyeli mɑl, kɑ mɑl cwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki cinggí." 
Hebrews1:11 Ge ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny, de yï ódöng yï nud ge órënyi ni ógødh." 
Hebrews1:12 Ge óbɑn yi yïn, ni kenyi bɑɑn ɑ́ywödh, o ge ówil yi yïn, ni kenyi wiil ógudh. De yï ócög yï nɑ kejí ceth, o runní bong cögi gen.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Bong wëywödø mɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøk kinni, “Bëëd kì wïj kyëjɑ gïti keny-ɑ ócïbɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn, thɑ́ tyellí.”" 
Hebrews1:14 Mɑ́ wëywöddɑni bënn bɑ wëy, o ge gögg-ɑ Jwøk, o gï nyi öre’ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yieny gɑ møg-ɑ óyiel." 
Hebrews2:1 Bene ɑ pere dwɑddi wɑ mïdhi møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi wɑ cøn, o wɑ cög wɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
Hebrews2:2 Mɑ́ kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́köbbi kweyyee yi wëywödd cøn, ɑ́bï gɑ dyër, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi gen, wɑlɑ̀ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈nyi gwøgi møgɑni, cɑy ki cɑ́y-ɑ kyëëw ki gen." 
Hebrews2:3 De wɑ óbødh-ɑ dï ki cɑyø, keløg kwøbbi yiel-ɑ dwøng ni men owøyø yi wɑ? Yielø menɑni ɑ́kwøb-ɑ yi Wë kiree, kɑ wɑ lony ki köbbø yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lïng, kinni møgɑni bɑ dyër ceth." 
Hebrews2:4 Kɑ kwøbbɑni nyodh yi Jwøk gɑ dyër thyew kì ri ngïjjì kí gïïngɑ̈ngø mø bɑ̈nni geki muuji Wëykwërø ni kɑ̀ dwɑdde gøn. 
Hebrews2:5 Wëywödd nuti kwɑnyø yi Jwøk gɑ møg-ɑ ójɑɑg piny-ɑ óbï, eni piny-ɑ kømmi yi wɑ." 
Hebrews2:6 De nɑ møg-ɑ kømmi yi wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Dhɑnhø bɑ ngø, ɑ rømmí pere yïn ɑ Jwøk; yïde ɑ tɑɑg kwøbbi dhɑnhø yøw?" 
Hebrews2:7 Ge ɑ́cïbí cyɑ̈n nyɑ me thiinh kibøli wëywödd, kɑ ge thödhí ki mɑ̈r kí dhwɑ̈ng," 
Hebrews2:8 kɑ ge wëggí jɑɑgi jɑmmì bënn.” Okööbø kinni i ji ógwøgø yi Jwøk gɑ møg jɑɑg jɑmmì bënn. O cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, ji pɑ nenni yi wɑ ɑnɑn ge jɑɑg-ɑ jɑmmì bënn." 
Hebrews2:9 De Yëso onennø yi wɑ; eni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg e nøg kibøli wëywödd ki nyɑ keny me thiinh, kipe kinni o thøwe kì ri dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk kiper ji bënn. Nenni yi wɑ ɑnɑn e yïe dɑ dhwɑ̈ng kí mɑ̈r kì bɑng thøw-ɑ ɑ́rɑnge." 
Hebrews2:10 Bɑ gïjø me døøj ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j jɑmmì bënn, o bɑ en ɑ mïdhi jɑmmì bënn, kɑ ɑ́gwire Yëso ki orɑng kipe peeji ji bënn yij dhwɑ̈nge. Mɑ́ e bɑ Yëso ɑ peej gen yij yielø." 
Hebrews2:11 En ɑ kwër ji, o bɑ ɑ́kyel ki tyëng-ɑ kwër yi en; wïyi gen bɑ ɑ́kyel. Bene ɑ bɑnge cwølli gen yi Yëso gɑ wɑdde, e wïje pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈y." 
Hebrews2:12 Jwøk ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Wɑddi wøn óköbbɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn, yï ólenhɑ kì yij buri gen.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Okööbø thyew kinni, “Yɑ óngɑ̈dh-ɑ Jwøk.” O okööbø thyew kinni, “Yɑn ɑ kej ɑ́kyel èn ki nyig-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Jwøk.”" 
Hebrews2:14 O kɑ̀ bëëd nyig-ɑ kømmi yi en bɑ ji mø ri gen di dël kí cu, ɑgöög Yëso ni gen. Kipe kinni o tyɑme Ngɑnrɑj, ɑ løg jɑngi thøø;" 
Hebrews2:15 o ji-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge ómɑgø yi wɑ̈ri thøø bënn, pɑ̈ɑ̈de wɑ̈g kì yethi töjji wɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Hebrews2:16 Mɑ́ e ceg-ɑ nënnø ceth kinni nuti bëën-ɑ be kønyi wëywödd, de ɑ́bï-ɑ be kønyi kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm." 
Hebrews2:17 Menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni ceg-ɑ gwøg ceth e pɑ̈r ki wɑdde kì yethi yëëth bënn, kipe kinni o bëëde ɑ́ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, me pyëwe yöd, e gögg-ɑ Jwøk yije bong ɑ́dud thyew." 
Hebrews2:18 Anɑn, tyëng-ɑ rɑngø okønyø yi en, mɑ́ e ɑ́rɑngi kɑ ongïnø." 
Hebrews3:1 Nyiimïɑ, wu ɑ́ceg kɑ cwølø thyew yi Jwøk ni kɑ ɑ́cwøøl wøn! Rum wun kì ri Yëso, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör ɑ́ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng mi yïëyee yi Jwøk." 
Hebrews3:2 Ágöög-ɑ pyëw ɑ́kyel kì bøli Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́örii, ni kɑ ɑ́göög Mosɑ̀ ki pyëw ɑ́kyel kì ød Jwøk." 
Hebrews3:3 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ger ød nyi bëëd pere teeg kibøli øn-ɑ ɑ́ger yi en; nɑ menɑni ceth, Yëso pere teeg kibøli Mosɑ̀." 
Hebrews3:4 Ød nyi dɑ ngɑn geerii, de ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j jɑmmì bënn bɑ Jwøk." 
Hebrews3:5 Mosɑ̀ ɑ́göög kidøøj kì ød Jwøk ɑ́ bɑ̈ng, kɑ okööbø kì ri møg-ɑ ógwøg yi Jwøk." 
Hebrews3:6 De Mesiy ɑ́göög kidøøj e ceg bëëdø ɑ́ Wɑ̈d Jwøk. Wɑ ɑ bɑ øde keløg pëthee pɑ nyönhi ki ngɑ̈dhi gïg-ɑ óyod yi wɑ. 
Hebrews3:7 Menɑni nɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wëykwërø kinni, “Keløg cwɑggi Jwøk ólïngi yi wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn," 
Hebrews3:8 kɑ muddi wun ko tëngi, ni muddi kweyyi wun ɑ ɑ́pyem dhø Jwøk, kì cyɑ̈ngɑni kì yij pɑ̈l keny-ɑ ɑ́rɑng gen Jwøk." 
Hebrews3:9 Yɑ ɑ́rɑng yi gen, kɑ yɑ pɑ̈nyi gen kì kunɑni, ngö gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøggɑ ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen ɑ́lidh yi gen." 
Hebrews3:10 Kɑ pyëwɑ órënyø ki jiɑni, ɑkööbɑ kinni, ‘Ge bɑ ji mø lɑ̈nyyi pɑ̈l, o ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi mïdhi ciggɑ.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd pyëwɑ rɑɑj, ɑköngɑ kinni, ‘Ge pɑ wöl kedhi piny-ɑ yije di thödhɑ gen ki ywömø!’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Koru ri wun yeki nyiimïɑ, o bongii ngɑn yïe di pyëw me rɑj, me nuti yïëyø kì kelli wun, men lugi ngɑ̈je Jwøng-ɑ nud ceth." 
Hebrews3:13 De nyi cïju ri wun kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, o bongii ngɑn thɑb yi orøg kɑ ogöögø ki ngeti pëëmø, mɑ́ “Dicyɑ̈ngtïn” men-ɑ kømmi yi wɑ̈nyi kwërø köbb-ɑ wun thyew." 
Hebrews3:14 Mɑ́ wɑ göög ɑ kyeel ki Mesiy kɑ̀ mïdhi wɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø men-ɑ ɑ́ying yïee kì tyeli mɑl. 
Hebrews3:15 Møg-ɑ kømmi yi wɑ̈nyi kwërø bɑ kinni, “Keløg cwɑggi Jwøk ólïngi yi wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn, kɑ muddi wun ko løgu mø teeg, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd kweyyi wun keny-ɑ ɑ́pyem gen kwøbbi Jwøk.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Á møg ɑ ɑ́lïngi cwɑggi Jwøk kɑ muddi gen ótëngø ki en? Bɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́pëëj wɑ̈g kì Rïp bënn yi Mosɑ̀. 
Hebrews3:17 Jwøk ɑ́bëëd pyëwe rɑɑj kɑ møg ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen? Pyëwe ɑ́bëëd e rɑɑj kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́røngi, ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh ge thøø kì yij pɑ̈l." 
Hebrews3:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́köngi Jwøk kinni, “Ge pɑ wöl kedhi piny-ɑ yije di thödhɑ gen ki ywömø!” Ákømm-ɑ møg? Ákømm-ɑ tyëng-ɑ́ muddi gen ɑ́tëngi." 
Hebrews3:19 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ kinni, ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li kedhi pinyɑni kɑ per kɑ̀ nuti yïëëy gen." 
Hebrews4:1 Kɑ ɑ́rum wɑ ki köbbø yi Jwøk kinni wɑ ómëgge ywömø men-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi en, kor wɑ riee cyee, o bongii ngɑn-ɑ ójɑ̈ddi kì kelli wun ki ywömɑni." 
Hebrews4:2 Mɑ́ wöndøj ɑ́rum ki lïngø yi wɑ ni kɑ ɑ́lïngii yi gen. De bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́yod yi gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́cög ge nuti yïëyø keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen wöönɑni." 
Hebrews4:3 Wɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, wɑ óyïddi ki ywömø men-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kinni gø ómëgge wɑ. Nɑ kɑ ɑ́kööbe ceth kinni, “Pyëwɑ ɑ́ceg-ɑ rënyø, ɑköngɑ kinni, ‘Ge pɑ kedhi piny-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn kinni ge óthödhɑ ki ywömø kì yije.’ ” Møgɑni ɑ́kwøbe, ngö gwøge ɑ́rum kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈je piny." 
Hebrews4:4 Mɑ́ møgɑni bɑ ɑkwøb kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Jwøk gwøng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gø ogwøgø yi en ɑ́tyëge, kɑ oywömø kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng.”" 
Hebrews4:5 Møgɑni ɑ ɑ́cigi kwøbø kinni, “Ge pɑ wɑ̈dhi piny-ɑ yije di thödhɑ gen ki ywömɑ.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwøng Wöndøj ki lïngø, ywömø menɑni nuti yood gen, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́pëëm gen. O dɑ ji møøgø ceth møg-ɑ óyod ywömɑni." 
Hebrews4:7 Møgɑni nyodh-ɑ yi cïb Jwøk ki cyɑ̈ng megø me cwøl ɑ́ “Dicyɑ̈ngtïn”. Kì ri Debïd kì bɑng runn mø gïïr, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøbø kì keny megø kinni, “Keløg cwɑggi Jwøk olïngø yi wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn, kɑ muddi wun ko tëngi.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Keløg tyëng Isrɑil di yïddi ki ywöm-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kì bɑng Jöcwø, ti bong cyɑ̈ng megø me di kwøb yi Jwøk." 
Hebrews4:9 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, dɑ ywömø mɑ ɑ́döng kipe jii Jwøk, me ni ywöm-ɑ ɑ́ywööm yi Jwøk kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng." 
Hebrews4:10 Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi yij ywömi Jwøk ceg-ɑ cögø e pɑ göögø, ni kɑ ɑ́ywöm Jwøk ree kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng." 
Hebrews4:11 Pɑ̈nyi wɑ riee kidøøj, o ywömø menɑni yod yi wɑ, o bongii ngɑn jɑ̈ddi ki ywömø ni jiɑni, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́pëëm gen." 
Hebrews4:12 Mɑ́ lögi Jwøk onëënø, o teeg, o nɑ pilø me bɑ̈lle ryeet bedh. Nyi wɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑɑm tïbi dhɑnhø geki wëye, kí nyingi cu. Gïg-ɑ tyer yi pyëw dhɑnhø kí møg-ɑ rømme nyii ngijø yi en." 
Hebrews4:13 Bong gïn cuggi kɑnø kɑ ódhɑ̈lø yodø yi Jwøk, jɑmmì bënn onennø yi en, o bɑ en ɑ óløøg kwøbbee." 
Hebrews4:14 Mɑ̈gi wɑ kì ri møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi wɑ. Mɑ́ yïee dɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng me pëddi döng, mɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi bøli Jwøk; en ɑ Yëso Wɑ̈d Jwøk." 
Hebrews4:15 Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng miee bɑ ngɑn pyëwe nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m, o nyødhee ngɑ̈nyi yi en, mɑ́ e bɑ ngɑn mɑ ɑ́thɑb kì yethi yëëth bënn ni wɑ, dɑ́ orøg ɑ nuti gwøøg en kinni tek." 
Hebrews4:16 Kedhi wɑ bøli kwøøm Jwøk keny-ɑ di dhwɑ̈ng, e yethee pɑ pyëër. Jwøk pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wɑ, kɑ wɑ thödhe ki dhwɑ̈ng." 
Hebrews5:1 Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng nyi yieny-ɑ kelli wɑdde, o nyi kwɑny ɑ́ kej ji, o gögge Jwøk, o nyi muuje gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kí gënhi orøg." 
Hebrews5:2 Kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ ngɑn nyødh thyew, ócuggø dwöögi pëthi tyëng-ɑ kwïj wøw kí tyëng-ɑ nyi bɑ̈jji." 
Hebrews5:3 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́bëëde e nyøødh thyew, ɑ́bëëd e nyi ceg-ɑ muujø ki gëëdhi kipe orøge, ni kenyi muuje ki gëëdhi kipe orøøg teedø." 
Hebrews5:4 Bong ngɑn cuggi rønyi ree ɑ́ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, e nuti cwøøl-ɑ yi Jwøk ni kɑ ɑ́cwøøl Aɑron cøn." 
Hebrews5:5 Nɑ menɑni ceth, Mesiy ree nuti røøny-ɑ yi en ɑ́ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, de ɑ́røny-ɑ yi Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́köbbii kinni, “Yï bɑ Wɑ̈dɑ yɑ ɑ́göög yɑn ɑ́ wïyí dicyɑ̈ngtïn.”" 
Hebrews5:6 O Jwøk ɑ́kööb kì keny megø kinni, “Yï óbëëdø yï bɑ ókwërø gïti ɑtheer, kì yij lɑw-ɑ ɑ́ying yï Melkidhedek.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Yëso kì kömi piny, ɑ́bëëd e nyii kwɑ̈jjø e óryeerø pïi nyinge ómullø, e kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ cuggi yielii ki thøø. Kɑ kwɑ̈jje lïngi yi Jwøk, mɑ́ e ɑ́kwɑ̈jj-ɑ möölø e ceg-ɑ odhɑm." 
Hebrews5:8 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ Wɑ̈d Jwøk, ɑ́dïd ki bëëdi möölø kì bɑng orɑng-ɑ ɑ́rɑnge." 
Hebrews5:9 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́gööge e bong gïn gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ree, ree ɑ́løge Ngɑn-ɑ óyiel ji-ɑ ólïngi kwøbbe bënn, o ge óyïddi gen ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer." 
Hebrews5:10 Mɑ́ e ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk ɑ́ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kì ri kwööng Melkidhedek. 
Hebrews5:11 Dɑ kwøb mø gïïr mø di kømmi yi wøn kì ri møgɑni, de lwøbi gen teeg, mɑ́ wɑ̈thi wun pɑ nyi jwɑn gɑ̈mmø ki kwøb." 
Hebrews5:12 Bøli keny-ɑ di göög wun ki jøpwönyø ɑ́pöödh ki mendwøng. De wu nudd wu dwɑdd-ɑ ji mø pwönyi wun ki kwøbbi Jwøk møg-ɑ yöd cɑrø. Pɑth ki gïncɑm-ɑ teg ɑ dwɑddi yi wun, de wu dwɑdd-ɑ cɑg ni othønhø." 
Hebrews5:13 Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ nyi mɑdh cɑg keti gen bɑ othinh, kwøbbi bëëntir nuti yodø yi en." 
Hebrews5:14 De gïncɑm-ɑ tek bɑ kipe tyëngdøngø, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dïd ki ngiji gïgdøj kí gïgrijjø." 
Hebrews6:1 Kedhi wɑ mɑl, ri pwönyø ki kwøbb-ɑ døngø, kɑ pwöny-ɑ ɑ́mwøøl wööni Mesiy wiy wɑ cyɑ̈n. Wɑ ko døøg ri møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki pwönyø kipe wiyi gøggi rɑj, kí yïëyi Jwøk," 
Hebrews6:2 kí pwönyi jwɑ̈ɑ̈gø, kí thɑɑnyi cing kömi ji, kí dhwödhø kì yij thøø, kí cɑ́y-ɑ gïti ɑtheer." 
Hebrews6:3 Kedhi wɑ bølee! Bene gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi wɑ, ke dwɑddii yi Jwøk." 
Hebrews6:4 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïddi ki cɑɑr Jwøk kì pëthi gen, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ cyɑ̈n, ge ócuggi dwöög be yewø këti? Ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ cɑɑr Jwøk, kɑ ge óbïdø ki gïg-ɑ nyi muuj ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑ mɑl, kɑ ge óyïddø ki Wëykwërø." 
Hebrews6:5 Kɑ medi kwøbbi Jwøk yod yi gen, kí ngïjji piny-ɑ óbï." 
Hebrews6:6 Codhe kɑ yïëyø mi gen wiy gen! Ge pɑ cuggi dwöögø kɑ ge óyewø këti, mɑ́ Wɑ̈d Jwøk ceg kɑ cigi gur wïj yɑdh ɑrïw yi gen, o ceg kɑ yɑ̈rø yi gen kì bøli teedø." 
Hebrews6:7 Mɑ́ pwönh-ɑ yije mɑ̈gi yi kødh tyel mø gïïr, kɑ jɑmm-ɑ døj otwïyø kì yije, bɑ ɑgyëdh yi Jwøk." 
Hebrews6:8 De keløg ɑ́ koodh kí lum ɑ twïy kì yije, bong gïndøj kì ree; bɑ men köme óbëën yi cyënni Jwøk, o órɑ̈b ki mɑc."
