Hebrews6:9 De cɑgg wø kööbø kinøw, wun ɑ wɑddi wøn, bong gïn tɑg yi wøn kiper wun." 
Hebrews6:10 Mɑ́ Jwøk bɑ ngɑn nyi nenni dyër, o wïje pɑ cuggi wïlø ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun, geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ nyodh yi wun kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́kønyu jii Jwøk, o ge nudd ge okønyø yi wun ɑnɑn thyew." 
Hebrews6:11 Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi wøn kì yï wun, bɑ kinni bëëd wun wu odyëjø ceth gïti cöge, o gïg-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi wun óbï gen gɑ dyër." 
Hebrews6:12 Wø pɑ dwɑddi kinni o wu bëëd wun dëlli wun ledh ki gwøg, de wø dwɑdd-ɑ kinni ngøy wun bëëdi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy kɑ ge ongïnø, ɑyïddi gen ki møg-ɑ ɑ́kwëng yi Jwøk." 
Hebrews6:13 Abrɑhɑm keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbii kwëng yi Jwøk, Jwøk ɑ́köngi kinni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe ógwøg yi en. De kɑ̀ bëëde e bong ngɑn dwøng kibøle, ɑ́kwöng-ɑ ree kinni," 
Hebrews6:14 “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingɑ; yï gyëdhɑ’ gyëdhø, o yï ónëngɑ ki kwɑrr mø gïïr.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́ngïïn Abrɑhɑm kidøøj, møg-ɑ ɑ́kwëng yi Jwøk ɑ́yod yi en." 
Hebrews6:16 Ji nyi köngi kɑ nyingi ngɑn me dwøng kibøli gen, kɑ pëëmø nyi cung yi köngø møgɑni." 
Hebrews6:17 Nɑ menɑni ceth, Jwøk ɑ́köngi ki ree kinni, “Gïn-ɑ óngɑ̈dh yi teedø óyod yi gen ceth.” Møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni o tyëng-ɑ óyïddi ki møg-ɑ ɑ́kwëng yi en, óbëëd ge ngɑ̈ny wøw ki mendwøng kinni, bɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi Jwøk." 
Hebrews6:18 Jɑmmì ɑ́ryew møgɑni pɑ cuggi wili ri gen, o Jwøk pɑ cuggi kwøbi pyed kì ri gen. Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, wɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ywööm bute, wɑ bɑ ɑcïj kinni, mɑ̈gi wɑ kì ri ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø men-ɑ ɑ́cïb bølee." 
Hebrews6:19 Ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø menɑni pɑ̈r ki ódëli sɑpïnɑ̀ kipe wëyi dhɑnhø. O kì bɑnge, wɑ nyii bødhø kì ri gïg-ɑ di dwøøg wɑ cyɑ̈n. De nyi bëëd wɑ kì kɑ̈jjee ceth, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi wɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi yij gëng." 
Hebrews6:20 Mɑ́ Yëso ɑ́wɑ̈dhi kunɑni kiperee, kɑ ogöögø ki Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng gïti ɑtheer, kì bɑng kwööng Melkidhedek." 
Hebrews7:1 Melkidhedek ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Cɑlem, o bɑ ókwëri Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng, kɑ kedh-ɑ be pɑɑri Abrɑhɑm keny-ɑ ɑ́dwööge kì be tyɑmi rɑ̈nhhɑni gɑ ɑ́ngwen," 
Hebrews7:2 kɑ nëngi yi Abrɑhɑm ki ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmì bënn. (Nyingi Melkidhedek wɑng-ɑ “Rɑ̈nh Tir” o kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Cɑlem, menɑni bɑ kinni “Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mër”.)" 
Hebrews7:3 Melkidhedek bong wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye me ngɑ̈nyi; wɑlɑ̀ bong kweyye, o bong ngɑn ngɑ̈nyi kër-ɑ ónywøølii. Nɑ wɑ̈d Jwøk, o cög ɑ́ ókwërø gïti ɑtheer." 
Hebrews7:4 Nyi rømmi wun tegi per Melkidhedek, kɑ ɑ́thödhii yi Abrɑhɑm kweyee ki ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmì, kì ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi en kì yij liny." 
Hebrews7:5 O ókwër møg-ɑ bɑ Kwɑrri Leebì, ge oköbbø yi Cigg kinni i nyi kɑ̈bbi gen ki ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈ri jɑmmì kì yï teedø, o teenɑni ceg bëëdø gɑ wɑddi gen bënn, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd gen thyew gɑ kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm." 
Hebrews7:6 Melkidhedek ɑ́bëëd e pɑth ki Kwɑɑr Leebì, de ɑ́kɑ̈bbi kì yï Abrɑhɑm ki ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈ri jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi en kì yij liny, kɑ Abrɑhɑm ngɑn-ɑ köme di kwënggi Jwøk kwënge." 
Hebrews7:7 Bong pëëmø kì ri kinni, bɑ ngɑn-ɑ dwøng ɑ nyi kwëng ngɑn-ɑ thinh kibøle." 
Hebrews7:8 Kì tuung ókwër, ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈r kwɑny-ɑ yi ji mø nyi thøw, de ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rr-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Melkidhedek, ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ yi ngɑn pɑ thøw, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi wɑ̈nyi kwërø." 
Hebrews7:9 Wɑ ócuggø kwøb kinni, keny-ɑ ɑ́muuj ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈r yi Abrɑhɑm, Leebì (ɑ kwɑrre nyi kwɑny ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈r) ɑ́muuj thyew." 
Hebrews7:10 Mɑ́ Leebì ɑ́bëëd e nuti nywølø kì bøli kenyɑni, de ɑ́bëëd e nud kì dëël kweye Abrɑhɑm, keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi Melkidhedek be pɑɑrii." 
Hebrews7:11 Keløg kwöng di pɑ̈dhi keje kì ri kwëër Kwɑrri Leebì; ɑ ceg bëëdø ɑ́ tyeli Cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi teedø, di dɑ ókwërø megø me dwɑddi, me mïdhi kwööng Melkidhedek? Wɑ̈nyi kwërø ɑ́kwøb-ɑ Melkidhedek, de nuti kwøøb-ɑ Aɑron." 
Hebrews7:12 Mɑ́ keløg kwër owilø, cigg ceg kɑ wilø thyew." 
Hebrews7:13 O Wë ngɑn-ɑ pere kømmi, bɑ wɑ̈d kɑl megø, o bong ngeti gøl gen mɑ ɑ́göög ɑ́ ókwërø." 
Hebrews7:14 O ngɑ̈nyi ceth kinni, Wë bɑ wɑ̈d gøl Yeudɑ̀, o gølɑni nuti kwøbø yi Mosɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kwööng ókwër." 
Hebrews7:15 Kɑ møgɑni ceg-ɑ ti nënnø kidøøj, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën ókwërø megø me pɑ̈r ki Melkidhedek." 
Hebrews7:16 Mɑ́ ngɑnɑni nuti rønyø ɑ́ ókwërø kɑ røny-ɑ nyi røøny ji, de ɑ́røny kɑ tegi nënnì møg koo thumi." 
Hebrews7:17 Mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Yï bɑ ókwërø men-ɑ óbëëdø gïti ɑtheer, kì bɑng kwööng Melkidhedek.”" 
Hebrews7:18 Cigg-ɑ kɑ̈gi gen dööng ɑ́wiy, mɑ́ ge pɑ teeg, o bong døøjø me dwøng, me yod kì bɑng gen." 
Hebrews7:19 Mɑ́ Ciggi Mosɑ̀ bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́cïb gen keje. Akwɑɑny keje yi ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø men-ɑ ree göög wɑ, wɑ cyɑ̈gi ki Jwøk." 
Hebrews7:20 Kömi møgɑni dɑ kwënggi Jwøk thyew. Ábëëd e bong kwëng mø ni møgɑni, keny-ɑ ɑ́røøny Kwɑrri Leebì gɑ ókwër." 
Hebrews7:21 De Yëso ɑ́göög ki ókwërø kì bɑng kwëng; keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Jwøk kinni, “Wë ɑ́rum ki kwëng, o kwënggɑni pɑ pɑ̈d yi en; ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Yï óbëëdø yïn ɑ́ ókwërø gïti ɑtheer.’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 Kwënggɑni Yëso ɑ́gwøg gen ɑ́ nyuudhi mi lwöbø, me lod lwömi tyeli mɑl." 
Hebrews7:23 Dɑ gïjø me bɑ̈ɑ̈n kì kɑɑm gen thyew; ókwërrɑni kwɑnni gen gïïr, mɑ́ ge nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ cöög yij gwøøg gen yi thøø." 
Hebrews7:24 De Yëso gït-ɑ ɑtheer e onëënø, o gwøge ɑ́ ókwërø pɑ cög." 
Hebrews7:25 Yëso yïe dɑ tegø men cugge yieli ji-ɑ nyi ywøøg kö Jwøk ki nyinge. Mɑ́ e nud gïti ɑtheer, o kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøk kiper gen." 
Hebrews7:26 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, Yëso bene Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng men-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi wɑ. Bɑ kwërø, o bong gïnrɑj kì ree, o yije bong orøg. Árum ki dɑ̈ngø ki tyëngorøg, kɑ tïng mɑldwøng." 
Hebrews7:27 Pɑ pɑ̈r ki ókwërr-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ kyeelø; bong gënhi orøg me muuje kipere møti, wɑlɑ̀ kiper orøøg teedø yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. Ámuuj-ɑ gëëdhi ɑ́kyel me bɑnge pɑ muuj ki megø, keny-ɑ ɑ́muuje ree ɑ́ gëëdhi." 
Hebrews7:28 Mɑ́ ji-ɑ nyi røny gɑ ókwër kì bɑng Ciggi Mosɑ̀ nyi bëëd ge nyøødh, de Wɑ̈d Jwøk, men-ɑ bɑ kwërø ɑ́røny-ɑ bɑng kwënggi Jwøk, o óying keje gïti ɑtheer." 
Hebrews8:1 Møg-ɑ ceg ki kømmø bɑ kinni, yïee dɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng me pere teg, me bëëdø kì wïj kyëëj Kwøøm Rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì yij mɑl." 
Hebrews8:2 Göögø ɑ́ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kì Kej Kwërdwøng, men-ɑ yij kemɑ̀ men-ɑ dyër, men-ɑ ɑ́gur piny yi Wë; nuti ger-ɑ yi dhɑnhø." 
Hebrews8:3 Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng nyi røny ɑ́ ngɑn ngɑ̈ddi Jwøk ki gëdhhì. Men wɑngi kinni Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng miee dɑ gïjø me muuje. 
Hebrews8:4 Keløg Yëso di ying-ɑ kömi piny, pɑ di gwøg ɑ́ ókwërø kinni tek, mɑ́ e dɑ ji mø nyi muuj gëdhhì, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Cigg." 
Hebrews8:5 Gwøng-ɑ gwøg yi gen gɑ ókwër bɑ surɑ̀ kí tïbi gïg-ɑ gøggi kì mɑl. Mɑ́ keny-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi Mosɑ̀ guddi piny ki kemɑ̀, ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøk kinni, “Nëën kidøøj, kɑ jɑmmì bënn gwøøg ge nɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́nyudhɑ yïn kì wïj kït.”" 
Hebrews8:6 De ɑnɑn, ɑ́thödhi ki gwøøg ókwërø me lod mi gen, ni kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ en ɑ ree nywɑɑg lwöbø men-ɑ lɑ̈w kibøli lwömi tyeli mɑl. Mɑ́ lwöm-ɑ nyɑ̈n ɑ́cïb-ɑ kömi kwëng mø lɑ̈w kibøli kwëngg-ɑcɑ̀." 
Hebrews8:7 Ke di bongii gïnrɑj kì ri lwömi tyeli mɑl, bong lwöbø megø me di dwɑddi." 
Hebrews8:8 De Jwøk ɑ́ceg-ɑ yïddø ki gïn gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ri jie, kɑ̀ kööbe kinni, “Wë ɑ́kööb kinni cyɑ̈ng møøgø óbï, mø yethi gen ólwöbɑ ki lwöbø me nyɑ̈n wøki tyëng Isrɑil kí tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Hebrews8:9 De lwömɑni koo bëëdø e nɑ lwömi tyeli mɑl, kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́pëëjɑ gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp ge mïdhɑ’ mïdhø kì cinggi gen, Lwöm-ɑ ɑ́lwøb yi wøki gen nuti mïdhi gen, bene ɑ bɑnge wøyɑ gen." 
Hebrews8:10 O bene lwöm-ɑ ónywɑg yi yɑn wøki tyëng Isrɑil èn Wë okööbø kinni, kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ óbï: Ciggɑ ócïbɑ wɑ̈thi gen, kɑ ge gweedɑ kömi minni gen. Yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen, o ge óbëëdø gɑ jiɑ." 
Hebrews8:11 Bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ópwönyi wɑɑd gen, wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn köbbi wɑɑd gen kinni, ‘Yod Wë,’ Mɑ́ yɑ óyod yi gen bënn, cɑg kì ri ngɑn pere teg gïti ri ngɑn bong pere." 
Hebrews8:12 Orøøg gen ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyɑ o gïg-ɑ ɑ́bɑj yi gen koo pɑrrɑ këti.” 
Hebrews8:13 Kɑ̀ kööb Jwøk kinni i dɑ lwöbø me nyɑ̈n, lwömi tyeli mɑl ɑ́gwøge ɑ́ men-ɑ weenø, o gïn-ɑ kɑ̈ge døngi kɑ oyöø, ceg-ɑ cyɑ̈ngø ki lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
Hebrews9:1 Lwöm-ɑ mɑl yïe ɑ́dɑ ciggi mɑ̈ddø kí kej mɑ̈ddø kì kömi piny. 
Hebrews9:2 Ádɑ Kemɑ̀ mɑ ɑ́cwöödh piny, bene øn-ɑ mɑl, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Kej Kwër. Yije ɑ ɑ́di teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈, kí tɑrɑbedhɑ̀ men-ɑ köme nyi cïb ópun-ɑ mëggi Jwøk." 
Hebrews9:3 Ngɑ̈ɑ̈j ryeew sitɑrrì dɑ kemɑ̀ me cwøl ɑ́ Kej Kwërdwøng. 
Hebrews9:4 Yije ɑ di këli dhɑb men-ɑ köme nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b bɑkur, kí Sɑnduug Cigg men-ɑ bɑ ɑmwøn ki dhɑb, yije dɑ pugi dhɑb men-ɑ yije di mɑnɑ̀, kí loodh Aɑron men-ɑ ɑ́nyog, kí ópɑ̈nni kït ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ kömi gen ógweed cigg." 
Hebrews9:5 Kí ngïjji kerobb ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ nyodh bëëdi Jwøk e nud kì kömi sɑndungɑni, obërri gen peedh gen kì mɑl, kì kömi keny-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny orøg. De men pɑth ki bøli keny-ɑ cuggi gïgɑni bënn ki tyëgø lwøbø." 
Hebrews9:6 Bene kër-ɑ ópyëël gïgɑni ɑnɑn. Ókwër nyi kedh-ɑ yij Kem-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, be gwøg ki gwøøg gen." 
Hebrews9:7 De bɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kete ɑ nyi kedhi yij Kem-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød tyelø ɑ́kyel kì yij run. Nyi kedhi yije e ókɑ̈ddø ki remø men-ɑ nyi muuj ɑ́ gëëdhi me gøøm orøge kí orøng-ɑ nyi gwøg yi teedø ge kwïj wøw kinni ge ceg-ɑ orøg. 
Hebrews9:8 Wëykwërø ópwönyø kì ri pyël-ɑ ópyëël gïgɑni kinni, yuu-ɑ kedhi Kej Kwërdwøng nuti yiebø, kì bɑng kɑ̀ nudd Kem-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g e ócungø." 
Hebrews9:9 O møgɑni keny-ɑ ópyëël gen kinøw, ge nyodh-ɑ gïg-ɑ nud kì bøli keny ɑnɑn. Menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni pyëw ngɑn-ɑ mɑlli Jwøk pɑ tyeny yi gëdhhì geki gïg-ɑ nyi muuj." 
Hebrews9:10 Mɑ́ ge ceg bëëdø gɑ gïgcɑmm kí gïg mɑdh, kí guöög tɑ̈ri dël. Ge ɑ́cïb gɑ møg gwøg gïti bøli keny-ɑ ótyeeny jɑmmì bënn yi Jwøk." 
Hebrews9:11 De Mesiy ɑ́rum ki bëënø ɑ́ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, mi gïgdøj møg-ɑ keny ek. Kem-ɑ yije gööge ki kwër pere teg kibøli mi tyeli mɑl, o bong gïn gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ree, pɑth ki kemɑ̀ men-ɑ ógwøgø ki cingi dhɑnhø; men wɑngi kinni pɑ ying kelli gïg-ɑ ɑ́ceg ki cwɑ̈jø." 
Hebrews9:12 De Yëso ɑ́kedhi Kej Kwërdwøng tyelø ɑ́kyel kete, e bong remmi dyëg wɑlɑ̀ remmi wɑ̈dhh mɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l yi en, dɑ́ reme ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le, kɑ óyïddø ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer kiperee." 
Hebrews9:13 Remmi dyëg geki wɑ̈dhh kí beli røny-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈b, ɑ nyi wiid ri tyëng-ɑ ywëdhø, o ge dhïwi gen." 
Hebrews9:14 Mɑ́ møgɑni bɑ dyër, bɑ gïjø me ni ngø ɑ cuggi gwøgø yi remi Mesiy! Kì ri Wëye møg-ɑ gïti ɑtheer ge nud; keny-ɑ ɑ́mëgge ree Jwøk ɑ́ gënh-ɑ dyër. Pëthee ólwøg yi en kɑ gwøng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ni ki thøø kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g, o wɑ ócuggi wɑ ki göggi Jwøng-ɑ nud gïti ɑtheer." 
Hebrews9:15 Bene ɑ bëëde ɑ́ Mesiy ɑ gwir lwöm-ɑ nyɑ̈n, kipe kinni o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cwøl yi Jwøk yïddi gen ki gyëdhh-ɑ gïti ɑtheer møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kinni gï ómuuje. Mɑ́ en ɑ ɑ́thøw e gøøm-ɑ bøli orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi teedø kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi lwömi tyeli mɑl." 
Hebrews9:16 Jɑmm-ɑ ceg kinni ge ólɑg, pɑ cuggi kwɑnyø e ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cïg nuti thøø." 
Hebrews9:17 Wɑ̈ny-ɑ gwed yi dhɑnhø e nyodh-ɑ kër-ɑ ólɑɑg jɑmme, nyi ceg-ɑ bëëdø gïti bøli keny-ɑ óthøwe, de jɑmme pɑ cuggi lɑgø e nudd e onëënø." 
Hebrews9:18 Bene ɑ pere ɑ́thyeey lwömi tyeli mɑl ki remø. 
Hebrews9:19 Mosɑ̀ ɑ́ceg-ɑ teedø ki rɑ̈ngi cigg bënn. Codhe ɑkwɑnye remmi wɑ̈dhh kí ónyögg, kɑ gï tole ki pï, ɑkinye gïn kömi wɑ̈nyi Cigg geki ji, e kïny-ɑ yelø kí kori yëyy me kwɑrø." 
Hebrews9:20 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Men bɑ rem-ɑ thyeey lwöm-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun yi Jwøk kinni mïdhu en.”" 
Hebrews9:21 Kɑ Kemi Kwër geki jɑmmi kwër bënn ri gen wïddi yi Mosɑ̀ ki remø ni menɑni. 
Hebrews9:22 Kì ri Ciggi Mosɑ̀, jɑmmì bënn nyi gwøg ge dhïw kɑ remø, o orøg pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny e bong remø me dëëm piny." 
Hebrews9:23 Keløg jɑmm-ɑ bɑ tïbbi gïg-ɑ mɑl, gwøg ge dhïw kɑ guöng ni men, jɑmm-ɑ mɑl kiri gen, pɑ gwøg ge dhïw kɑ gëdhhì mø lod møgɑni?" 
Hebrews9:24 Mɑ́ Mesiy nuti kedh-ɑ Kej Kwër men-ɑ ógwøg-ɑ yi dhɑnhø ki cingge, ɑ́ tïbi men-ɑ dyër. De ɑ́kedh-ɑ yij mɑl kiree, keny-ɑ bëëde ɑnɑn kì bøli Jwøk kiperee." 
Hebrews9:25 Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng nyi kedhi Kej Kwërdwøng kɑ tyelø ɑ́kyel kì yij run, e ókɑ̈ddø ki remø me pɑth ki reme. De Mesiy nuti kedhi mɑl be muuji ree kɑ tyel mø gïïr ni kenyi göög Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng." 
Hebrews9:26 Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, ti Mesiy di rɑngi kɑ tyel mø gïïr, e wön-ɑ́ɑ̀ kër-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j piny. De ɑ́cwöb ɑnɑn ki tyelø ɑ́kyel, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́rum jɑmmì ki cïb kɑ̈jji gen, kipe kinni o orøg lɑ̈ɑ̈nye, e mëgg-ɑ ree Jwøk ɑ́ gëëdhi." 
Hebrews9:27 Dhɑnhø nyi thøw-ɑ tyelø ɑ́kyel, codhe o gønye nyi lidh yi Jwøk." 
Hebrews9:28 Nɑ menɑni ceth, Mesiy, ɑ́muuj ɑ́ gëëdhi tyelø ɑ́kyel kipe lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi orøøg ji mø gïïr. Ódøøg ki cwöbø, de koo dwöög kɑ per lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi orøg, de óbï-ɑ be yieli tyëng-ɑ yïd bëëne." 
Hebrews10:1 Mɑ́ Ciggi Yeud bɑ tïbbi gïgdøj møg-ɑ óbï, de pɑth ki gïgɑni kiri gen, tyëng-ɑ nyi muuj gëdhhì kì yethi runn bënn, pɑ cuggi gwøgø yi Ciggɑni ge tir kì yï Jwøk." 
Hebrews10:2 O keløg tyëng-ɑ mɑlli Jwøk di göög ge dhïw kidyër, pëthi gen di wïyi ki olïng kipe orøg kɑ gëdhhì di wiy ki ngɑllø." 
Hebrews10:3 De kenyi ngɑɑl gëdhhì kì yethi runn bënn, guöngɑni nyi pɑ̈dd-ɑ dhɑnhø kinni, orøg nuti lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì pyëwe," 
Hebrews10:4 mɑ́ orøg dhɑ̈li lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì pyëwe yi remmi wɑ̈dhh geki remmi dyëg keti gen. 
Hebrews10:5 Bene gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́kööb Mesiy keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëne kömi piny, e köbb-ɑ Jwøk kinni, “Yï pɑ dwɑddi gëdhh-ɑ ngɑl geki gïg-ɑ muuj, de yɑ ɑ́göggí ki dël." 
Hebrews10:6 Pyëwí pɑ med ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b kì wïj këli lɑm wɑlɑ̀ gëdhh-ɑ nyi muuj kipe gøømi bøli orøg.” 
Hebrews10:7 Codhe, ɑkööbɑ kinni, “Yɑn èn Jwøk, gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn ógwøgɑ ni kɑ ógwedii kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Cigg.”" 
Hebrews10:8 Ákwöngi ki kwøb kinni, “Yï nuti dwɑdd-ɑ gëdhhì geki gïg-ɑ nyi muuj, o pyëwí nuti bëëdø e med ki lɑ̈yy-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b gɑ møg lɑ̈ɑ̈ny orøg.” Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi en ngö gïgɑni bënn nyi ceg kɑ gwøgø ceth ni kɑ ókwøøb gen yi Cigg." 
Hebrews10:9 Codhe ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑn èn Wuö Jwøk, gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn ógwøg yi yɑn.” Codhe ɑcuung gëdhh-ɑ weenø yi Jwøk, kɑ gënhi Mesiy cïbe kɑ̈jji gïn." 
Hebrews10:10 Kɑ wɑ yiel ki orøgee yi gënh-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Yëso Mesiy tyelø ɑ́kyel, ɑ́ dële kiree, mɑ́ e ɑ́gwøg-ɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi Jwøk." 
Hebrews10:11 Ókwëri Yeud nyi dhwödh-ɑ be gwøgi gwøge yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn; kɑ nyii ngɑ̈dø ki gëdhhì tyel mø gïïr; de orøg dhɑ̈li lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø yi gëdhhɑni. 
Hebrews10:12 De Mesiy ɑ́muuj-ɑ gëëdhi ɑ́kyel men lɑ̈ɑ̈ny orøg gïti ɑtheer, codhe ɑpëgge wïj kyëëj Jwøk." 
Hebrews10:13 O obëëdø ɑnɑn kì kunɑni e yïd-ɑ bøli keny-ɑ ógwøøg tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki en gɑ thɑ̈nhi tyelle yi Jwøk. 
Hebrews10:14 Mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwër yi en ɑ́gwøge ge tir gïti ɑtheer kɑ gëëdhi ɑ́kyel. 
Hebrews10:15 O bɑ møgɑni ceth ɑ ɑ́kwøb thyew yi Wëykwërø. Ákwöngi ki kwøb kinni: 
Hebrews10:16 “Men bene lwöm-ɑ ónywɑg yi wøki gen kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ óbï ciggɑ ócïbɑ yethi minni gen kɑ ge gweedɑ yethi wɑ̈thi gen.” 
Hebrews10:17 Kɑ cig-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Orøøg gen geki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi gen pɑ cigɑ pɑrrø.”" 
Hebrews10:18 Kɑ ɑ́rum møgɑni ki lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø bënn, bong gëëdhi me dwɑddi këti kipe lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi orøg." 
Hebrews10:19 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ; wɑ ócuggø kedhi Kej Kwërdwøng ni kɑ̀ dwɑddii yi wɑ, wɑ kɑ̈l-ɑ ri thøwi Yëso." 
Hebrews10:20 Wɑ ɑ́yïëbbe ki yöö me nyɑ̈n, me nëënø, kì ri gëng, men-ɑ bɑ dële." 
Hebrews10:21 Yïee dɑ ókwërø me dwøng, me mïdhi ød Jwøk." 
Hebrews10:22 Kɑ wɑ døøg wɑ kö Jwøk ki pyëw ɑ́kyel, kí yïëyø mɑ dyër, kí min mø yethi gen ókɑ̈ɑ̈l kerri orøg wɑ̈g, kí dëllì møg-ɑ ólwøgø kidøøj." 
Hebrews10:23 Mɑ̈gi wɑ kì ri ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø men-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi wɑ, mɑ́ wɑ gɑ̈nn-ɑ Jwøk kinni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe ógwøge ceth." 
Hebrews10:24 Konggi wɑ riee, kɑ riee nyi køny wɑ, wɑ mɑɑr-ɑ riee, wɑ gøgg-ɑ gïgdøj." 
Hebrews10:25 Kɑ wu ko wïyi ki cugø, ni kenyi göög yi kwï wun, de nyi cïj wun ri wun, mɑ́ wu ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
Hebrews10:26 Keløg wɑ ogöögø ki orøg ki tirø, wɑ rum lïngø ki møg-ɑ bɑ dyër, bong gëëdhi men-ɑ ógøøm orøg këti." 
Hebrews10:27 De tyëng-ɑ pyem kwøbbi Jwøk ócɑy, kɑ ge leeng yij mɑc me lyëdh ki mendwøng." 
Hebrews10:28 Ngɑn pyem Ciggi Mosɑ̀, kɑ gøøny yi ji ɑ́ryew wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi, nyi ceg kɑ cɑyø ki thøø." 
Hebrews10:29 Wu orumø bɑ cɑ́y mø bëëdø kidï ɑ ócɑɑy tyëng-ɑ nyøn Wɑ̈d Jwøk, kɑ rem-ɑ ɑ́thyeey lwöbø gwøg gen ɑ́ gïn bong pere, kɑ Wëyi Jwøk geki dhwɑ̈nge gwɑddi gen?" 
Hebrews10:30 Mɑ́ ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ, eni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, “Gøølø col-ɑ yi yɑn; yɑn ɑ ócɑ̈yyi.” Kɑ okööbø thyew kinni, “Wë gøøny jie ólidhe.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Ngɑn-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi cingi Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, ree dɑ cyën." 
Hebrews10:32 Pɑr wun keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wun kɑ̈ge dööng; kɑ ɑ́rum cɑɑr Jwøk ki meny kì kömi wun, wu ɑ́rɑngi yi gïg mø gïïr, de wu ɑ́cög wu nuti tyɑmø yi gïgɑni." 
Hebrews10:33 Wu ɑ́bëëd wu ceg kɑ gwɑddø yi teedø, kɑ wu nyi göggi ki gïgrijjø, kɑ wu nyii göögø møg rëbi ki tyëng-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ nyi göggi ki gïg ni møgɑni." 
Hebrews10:34 Kɑ yethi wun nyii ywöngø kiper tyëng-ɑ ying ød mɑg, o pëthi wun nuti rënyø, kɑ ɑ́mɑɑg jɑmmi wun. Mɑ́ e ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni yï wun dɑ jɑmmì møøgø mø lod møgɑni, møg-ɑ óbëëdø gïti ɑtheer." 
Hebrews10:35 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, pëthi wun ko wëggu nyönhø, mɑ́ köögi men-ɑ óyod yi wun kì yï Jwøk dwøng." 
Hebrews10:36 Ngïïn wun, o wu gwøg wu gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk, o köögi men-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi en óyod yi wun." 
Hebrews10:37 Nɑ kɑ̀ kööb wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh, ngɑn-ɑ bï óbï koo cwööng." 
Hebrews10:38 Jiɑ, tyëngtir óyïëy kɑ ge óyïddø ki nënnì, de keløg e dɑ ngɑn døøg cyɑ̈n kì kelli gen, pyëwɑ koo bëëdø e med ki en.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Wɑ tøøk kì kelli tyëng-ɑ nyi døøg cyɑ̈n, kɑ ge ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø. De wɑ bɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, o wɑ óyiel ceth." 
Hebrews11:1 Yïëyø bɑ bëëdi dhɑnhø e yïëyø kinni gïg-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi en, ngö gï pɑ nenne óyode ceth." 
Hebrews11:2 Bɑ kì bɑng yïëyø ɑ ɑ́pwøøj tyëng-ɑ ócyɑ̈ɑ̈ngi yi Jwøk. 
Hebrews11:3 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ wëggi wɑ yodi kinni lɑ̈bø ɑ́cwɑ̈j kɑ lögi Jwøk, o gïn-ɑ cuggi nennø gwøg kì ri gïn pɑ cuggi nennø." 
Hebrews11:4 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggi Abel muujø ki gëëdhi me lod mi Kɑin. Kɑ pwøj yi Jwøk kinni bɑ ngɑntir keny-ɑ ɑ́yïëye gënhe. O bɑ kì bɑng yïëyø, ɑ nudd Abel e okööbø ngö e rum thøø." 
Hebrews11:5 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n Enök thøø. De ɑ́kïdh-ɑ yï Jwøk, kɑ ocögø e bong ngɑn yodii, mɑ́ e ɑ́kïdhi mɑl yi Jwøk. Wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, i keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Enök nuti kïdhi mɑl, Jwøk ɑ́bëëd pyëwe med ki en." 
Hebrews11:6 Bong ngɑn cuggi bëëdø pyëw Jwøk med ki en, keløg yïe bong yïëyø, mɑ́ e bong ngɑn cuggi wɑ̈dhi bøli Jwøk keløg e nuti yïëyø kinni Jwøk nud, o nyi køøg-ɑ tyëng-ɑ yɑbii." 
Hebrews11:7 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggi Nöö lïngi kwøbbi Jwøk, kɑ gïg-ɑ ócwöb dhuki megø yïëye, ngö gï pɑ nenne. Kwøbbi Jwøk ɑ́lïnge, ɑgude ki sɑpïnɑ̀ men-ɑ ɑ́yielii geki gøle. Codhe, ɑcɑɑy lɑ̈bø, kɑ Nöö óyïddø ki gyëdhhi Jwøk kì bɑng yïëye." 
Hebrews11:8 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggi Abrɑhɑm lïngi kwøbbi Jwøk, keny-ɑ ɑ́cwööle gøn wɑ̈g kì pödhi gen, o kedhe pönh-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kinni ómëggii yi en. Ádhwödh kì pödhi gen e kun-ɑ kedhe kwïje" 
Hebrews11:9 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggii bëëdø ɑ́ wëdh kì pönh-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kinni ómëggii. Abrɑhɑm ɑ́bëëd ɑ yethi kemmì, en kí Isɑɑk kí Yɑgob, jøg-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg gen kwëng ɑ́kyel." 
Hebrews11:10 Mɑ́ Abrɑhɑm ɑ́bëëd e nenn-ɑ bøli keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhe kɑɑldwøng men-ɑ́ tyele ɑ́këël piny kidøøj yi Jwøk kɑ gø gere. 
Hebrews11:11 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggi Sɑrɑ̀ yïddø ki dhɑnhø, e bɑ bwøj o rum yöø, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kwëngii kinni óyïddi ki dhɑnhø gɑ̈n yi en." 
Hebrews11:12 Abrɑhɑm ɑ́yïddi ki kwɑrr mø gïïr ni kyelli mɑl, kɑ ge nɑ ɑyejø kì thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø, ngö e ɑ́bëëd e nɑ ngɑnthøø." 
Hebrews11:13 Tyëngɑni bënn ge ɑ́thøw-ɑ yij yïëyø. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kinni gï ómëgge gïn nuti yood gen, de gïgɑni ɑ́lidh yi gen ge lɑ̈wi lɑ̈wi, kɑ ge ópwöjjø, ɑyïëy gen kinni ge bɑ wëdhh kì wïj piny." 
Hebrews11:14 Tyëng-ɑ kööbø kinøw nyodh-ɑ kinni, ge oyɑ̈bø ki pödhø me bɑ mi gen." 
Hebrews11:15 Ge nuti cögø ge rømm-ɑ kwøbbi kun-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen; keløg gø di rømmi yi gen, ge di yïddi ki keny døøg gen kunɑni." 
Hebrews11:16 De ge ɑ́tyer-ɑ yïddø ki pödhø me døøj kibøli menɑni, pödhi Jwøk. O Jwøk wïje koo lɑ̈ɑ̈y kɑ̀ cwøllii yi gen ɑ́ Jwøøg gen, mɑ́ gï ɑ́gëdde ki kɑɑl." 
Hebrews11:17 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggi Abrɑhɑm muuji wɑ̈de Isɑɑk ɑ́ gëëdhi, keny-ɑ ɑ́rɑngii yi Jwøk. Bɑ Abrɑhɑm ɑ ɑ́köbbi kwëng yi Jwøk, de ɑ́yöd wɑ̈de wɑ̈dkyel omuujø yi en ɑ́ gëëdhi." 
Hebrews11:18 Abrɑhɑm ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøk cøn kinni, “Kwɑrr-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn kinni ge ómëggɑ yïn, ge ónywøl-ɑ yi Isɑɑk.”" 
Hebrews11:19 Mɑ́ Abrɑhɑm ɑ́rum kinni, cɑgg dhɑnhø thøw, ócuggø tugø yi Jwøk kì yij thøø, o ɑ́bëëd e Isɑɑk ce ótug ɑ yij thøø kidyër." 
Hebrews11:20 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggi Isɑɑk kwëngi Yɑgob geki Isøø. 
Hebrews11:21 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggi Yɑgob kwëngi wɑ̈ddi Yosep, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi thøwe, kɑ Jwøk mɑlle e ree mïdhe kɑ keme." 
Hebrews11:22 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggi Yosep köbbi tyëng Isrɑil ki kwøbbi bëën wɑ̈g kì Rïp, kɑ gï cege kinni kwöög ge gøn keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kinni ókoonyii. Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi en ɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈nge ki thøø." 
Hebrews11:23 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggi Mosɑ̀ kɑnnø yi wïye geki meye ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́nywølii. Áceg kɑ lidhø yi gen kinni bɑ nyelthinh me døøj, ɑböyyi gen ki pyemi kwøbbi rɑ̈dh." 
Hebrews11:24 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggi Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈nyø ki cwøllø ɑ́ wɑ̈d nyɑɑr rɑ̈dh, keny-ɑ ɑ́dønge." 
Hebrews11:25 Ákwɑny-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli jii Jwøk, kɑ medi bëëdi orøg, ɑ nyi jwɑn lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø bɑnye." 
Hebrews11:26 Mosɑ̀ ɑ́bøy-ɑ orɑng kiper Mesiy, ɑbɑnye kɑ̈ɑ̈r Rïp, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd rumme cïb en ri köögi men-ɑ óyod yi tyëngtir dhuki megø." 
Hebrews11:27 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggi Mosɑ̀ dhwödhø kì Rïp, e pɑ böggi yi liny rɑ̈dh. Ábëëd e dhɑ̈y Jwøk ɑ pɑ nyi nenni, di nennø yi en, ɑcöge e nuti døøg ngɑ̈je." 
Hebrews11:28 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggii gwøgi Ákɑɑdh, kí gɑ̈ɑ̈ji remø ri bɑ̈lli ud, kipe kinni o wëywön-ɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈gø ócöge e pɑ nɑ̈gi ki wɑ̈dd-ɑ bɑ kɑyyi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Hebrews11:29 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggi tyëng Isrɑil bɑ̈ɑ̈ni Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø, ge ce cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ piny me thwøwø; kɑ tyëng Rïp mwøøny yi pï keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi gen ri gen ki bɑ̈ɑ̈ni nɑmɑni." 
Hebrews11:30 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́tɑ̈ɑ̈y döri kɑɑl Yerikö piny, kɑ ɑ́rume wenø yi tyëng Isrɑil ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Hebrews11:31 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́yiel Rɑɑ̈b, ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi, kì kelli tyëng-ɑ pëmø, mɑ́ lyëwwi tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́cwøøle gøle." 
Hebrews11:32 Á ngø ɑ kwøbɑ këti? Bong keny kööbɑ kì ri, Gideon, kí Bɑrɑk, kí Cimcön, kí Yeptɑɑ̀, kí Debïd, kí Sɑmwel, geki jøtöng." 
Hebrews11:33 Bɑ yïëyø ɑ ɑ́wëggi gen tyɑmi pödhh. Ge ɑ́gwøg-ɑ dyër, ɑyïddi gen ki gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́kwëng yi Jwøk. Dhøggi ngurrì ɑ́cyëëg gen," 
Hebrews11:34 kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈c mø døngø nɑ̈g gen; kɑ ge obødhø kì dhø pilø. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge nyødh, de ge ɑ́tëngi; ge ɑ́bëëd ge teg ki liny, kɑ lìnyi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø tyɑm gen." 
Hebrews11:35 Kì bɑng yïëyø, tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, mø nyigi gen thøø, ɑ́dwöög gen be nënnø. Kwï gen ɑ́bøy-ɑ orɑng, kɑ ge óbɑ̈nyø ki yielø, kipe kinni o ge óyïddi gen ki yuu-ɑ ódhwödhi gen yethi nënn-ɑ dyër." 
Hebrews11:36 Møøgø ɑ́gɑggi kɑ ge pwöd, kɑ møøgø twöj ki ɑ́cwecwel, kɑ ge kïdhi ød mɑg." 
Hebrews11:37 Kwï gen ɑ́bɑ̈lli ki tuggi kïttì, kɑ møøgø kɑg ki mocɑr; kɑ møøgø keb ki pilø. Møøgø ɑ́rug-ɑ lɑ̈wwi dyëg; ge jɑdø, o nyingi gen ceg kɑ guudø." 
Hebrews11:38 Kɑ bëëdø kì kömi piny órënyø kì yï gen! Ge ɑ́ceg-ɑ twɑ̈lø kì yij ryɑng, kí kelli kïttì, ge bëëd ɑ yethi órøggi kïttì kí yethi burrì." 
Hebrews11:39 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́rɑngi tyëngɑni kinøw, kɑ yïëyø mi gen yod e teeg cɑrø, møg-ɑ ɑ́kwëng yi Jwøk nuti yood gen kì bøli kenyɑni," 
Hebrews11:40 mɑ́ e dɑ gïjø me lɑ̈w kibøli møgɑni mɑ ɑ́gwir yi Jwøk kiperee. Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk bɑ kinni, ge ógwøg ge tir e bong gïn gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ri gen kyeel kɑ wɑ." 
Hebrews12:1 Wɑ bɑ ɑwen yi teen-ɑ nenni gwøgee. De ceg wɑ gïg-ɑ toor wɑ geki orøg bëne ki leeng piny, kɑ wɑ rengi wɑ, wɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ thwør-ɑ yije rɑɑd." 
Hebrews12:2 Cög wɑ, wɑ nenn-ɑ ri Yëso ngɑn-ɑ ree bëëd yi yïëyee. Gure wïj yɑdh ɑrïw ɑ́ngine e pɑ böggi ki ɑyɑ̈r, kipe medi pyëw men-ɑ óyod yi en; bëëd ɑ wïj kyëëj kwøøm Jwøk ɑnɑn." 
Hebrews12:3 Rum wun kì ri ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ngin kwøbbi tyëngorøg møg-ɑ mɑɑnii, o pëthi wun cög ge pɑ nyönhi." 
Hebrews12:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi wun ki orøg, bong ngɑn mɑ reme ɑ́dëëm." 
Hebrews12:5 Wɑ̈thi wun ɑ́ceg-ɑ wïlø ki møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun yi Jwøk e ceg-ɑ nyige? Ákööb kinni, “Wɑ̈dɑ, nyi kyën yïthhí kenyi tyeeny yïn yi Wë, kɑ pyëwí ko nyi nyönhi kenyi cɑye yïn." 
Hebrews12:6 Mɑ́ Wë nyi tyeny-ɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yi en, o ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi en, ɑ́ nyɑre nyii cɑyø yi en ki mendwøng.”" 
Hebrews12:7 Ngin wun orɑng men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l bɑng ceng-ɑ ceg wun yi Jwøk wïyi wun. Á men ɑ pɑ nyi ceg yi wïye? 
Hebrews12:8 Keløg wu ocögø wu pɑ tyeny kyeel ki jii Jwøk bënn, wɑng-ɑ kinni, wu pɑth ki nyige, de wu bɑ nywøl møg-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈lø kì wɑ̈g." 
Hebrews12:9 O thyew, yïee dɑ wëëgee kì kömi piny møg-ɑ nyi tenyi wɑ, o ge nyii wørø yi wɑ. Pɑ lɑ̈w keløg ngɑn-ɑ bɑ Wïyee kì mɑl owørø yi wɑ, kipe kinni o wɑ óyïddi wɑ ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer?" 
Hebrews12:10 Wɑ nyii cegø yi wëëgee møg-ɑ bɑ ji ki kɑɑm me nøg, ni kɑ̀ dwɑddii yi gen; de wɑ tyeny yi Jwøk kɑ per dönyee, o wɑ yïddi wɑ kì ri kwëre." 
Hebrews12:11 Pyëw dhɑnhø nyii rënyø kenyi pwödii e ceg kɑ cegø, de nyii yodø yi en kì cyɑ̈n kinni bɑ gïndøj ɑ ógöggii kenyi yïdde ki bëëntir." 
Hebrews12:12 Tïng wun cinggi wun, cingg-ɑ dhɑ̈ɑ̈rø mɑl; kɑ tyelli wun, tyell-ɑ kïrrø këël wun piny kidøøj." 
Hebrews12:13 Kɑ wu kɑ̈lli wun yëth-ɑ bɑ óbödhh, kipe tyel-ɑ ngølø ódhɑ̈li ki cyɑ̈dhø, de wiy cɑɑge dönyø." 
Hebrews12:14 Bëëd wun ki mër kì kelli ji bënn, kɑ wu bëëd wun ki bëëntir; mɑ́ ngɑn pɑ bëëdø kinøw pɑ cuggi wɑ̈dhi bøli Wë." 
Hebrews12:15 Koru ri wun; dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk ko wiyu piny. Ko di ngɑn wëggu gwøg e nɑ yɑdh me keej, mɑ́ ji mø gïïr órënye." 
Hebrews12:16 Ko di ngɑn pɑ wør Jwøk kì kelli wun, wɑlɑ̀ ko di ngɑn pyëwe nyönhi ni Isøø ɑ ɑ́muuj kej kɑyø kipe gïncɑm me cɑm tyelø ɑ́kyel yøw." 
Hebrews12:17 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, kɑ ɑ́kwɑ̈jje ki gyëdh kì yï wïye, bong gyëdh mɑ ɑ́yode, ngö e ɑ́kwɑ̈jji e ceg-ɑ ywøg." 
Hebrews12:18 Wu nuti bëënø kɑ bëëni tyëng Isrɑil, wu nuti kedh-ɑ yï gïn nenni yi wun, kɑ Kïti Sinɑy lidh yi wun e opɑ̈mmø ki mɑc, o piny bɑ muudhø, e ɑtunø me teeg ókwöddø," 
Hebrews12:19 e ywøøg kɑng olïngø, kí cwɑg mø kööbø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi cwɑggɑni yi teedø, ɑkwɑ̈jji gen kinni ge ko cigi lïngø ki kwøbbɑni," 
Hebrews12:20 mɑ́ ge ɑ́bwøg yi cigg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb kinni, “Keløg kït men onywɑlø; cɑgg ɑ́ lɑ̈y ɑ nywɑlii, bɑ̈lli lɑ̈yɑni ki tuggi kïttì, o thøwe.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Ji ɑ́bwøg yi gïn-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi gen; men-ɑ́ Mosɑ̀ kiree ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́bwøg, o dëlɑ ceg-ɑ kïïrø!”" 
Hebrews12:22 De wu ɑ́kedh-ɑ Kïti Dhɑyøn, kɑɑl kwër; kɑɑl Jwøk; Yerusɑlem men-ɑ mɑl, ki wëywödde gɑ ɑ́lïp mø ngenyø." 
Hebrews12:23 Wu ɑ́kedh-ɑ keny-ɑ bëëd yi kɑyyi Jwøk, møg-ɑ nyingi gen bɑ ɑgwed kì mɑl. Wu ɑ́kedh-ɑ yï Jwøk jɑngi gøøny ji bënn, keny-ɑ bëëd yi wëyi tyëngdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg ge tir." 
Hebrews12:24 Wu ɑ́kedh-ɑ yï Yëso, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thyey lwöm-ɑ nyɑ̈n, ki rem-ɑ ɑ́dëëm piny men-ɑ muuj døøjø me dwøng kibøli døøny-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi remi Abel." 
Hebrews12:25 Koru ri wun, kɑ wu ko bɑ̈nyi ki lïngi kwøbbi ngɑn-ɑ kööbø. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈nyi ki lïngi kwøbbi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́muuj wööni Jwøk kì kömi piny, nuti bødhø ki cɑyø. De wɑ óbødh-ɑ dï ki cɑyø keløg wɑ bɑny-ɑ kwøbbi ngɑn-ɑ ying mɑl!" 
Hebrews12:26 Piny ɑ́nhɑ̈nhi yi cwɑgge cøn, de ɑ́kööb ɑnɑn kinni, “Pɑth ki piny kete ɑ ógöjjɑ onhɑ̈nh këti, de mɑl ógöjjɑ onhɑ̈nh thyew.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Kwøbbe kinni “këti”, wɑng-ɑ kinni gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j órungi kɑ ge nyiig, codhe o gïg-ɑ pɑ cuggi rungø döng gen." 
Hebrews12:28 Pwöjji wɑ, mɑ́ wɑ ɑ́yïddi ki pödhø me pɑ cuggi rungø. Pwøj wɑ Jwøk, kɑ mɑlli wɑ ki mɑ́l-ɑ med kì pyëwe, e owørø yi wɑ, wɑ óböggø yi en," 
Hebrews12:29 mɑ́ Jwøgee bɑ mɑc me ceg rɑ̈b. 
Hebrews13:1 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, bëëd wun wu mɑɑr-ɑ ri wun ni nyiimëëg ceth." 
Hebrews13:2 Kɑ wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl ki thegi wëll, mɑ́ e ɑ́dɑ ji mɑ ɑ́theg wëywödd gï cwølli gen gɑ ji yøw." 
Hebrews13:3 Wɑ̈thi wun ko nyi wïl ki tyëng-ɑ ød mɑg, de bëëd wu ce ying-ɑ ød mɑg kyeel ki gen. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen guud nyi pɑrri wun, wu ce ceg-ɑ orɑng kyeel ki gen." 
Hebrews13:4 Wøør nywöm yi ji bënn, kɑ wiy pyëën tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nywøm ri gen bëëde e dhïw, mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ nyi kedhi yethi pënnì mø pɑth ócɑy yi Jwøk." 
Hebrews13:5 Pëthi wun ko göjju mɑɑri ngyëny, de mɑg wun pëthi wun ki møg-ɑ yï wun. Mɑ́ Jwøk ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wu pɑ wøyɑ; wɑlɑ̀ wu pɑ wiyɑ piny.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Nyi kööb wɑ yethee pɑ pyëër kinni, “Bɑ Wë ɑ nyi køny yɑn, yɑ pɑ böggi. Á ngø ɑ cuggi göggi yɑn yi dhɑnhø?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Nyi pɑrri wun pëjji wun mø tyeli mɑl, jøg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun wööni Jwøk. Rømmu kër-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gen kí kër-ɑ ɑ́thøw gen, kɑ yïëyø mi gen ngøy wun." 
Hebrews13:8 De Yëso ying-ɑ keje ceth; bëëde ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ pɑ̈r ki bëëde dicyɑ̈ngtïn; gït-ɑ ɑtheer ree pɑ wile. 
Hebrews13:9 Ri wun ko wëggu peej pɑ̈l yi tyëng-ɑ nyi pwönyi møg-ɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki kwøbbi Yëso geki pwöny-ɑ pɑth ki dyër, mɑ́ e lɑ̈w keløg dhɑnhø obëëdø kì ri dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk, de pɑth ki mïdhi cigg kipe gïgcɑmm, mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ mïdhi ciggɑni nuti kønyø yi mïdhi gen." 
Hebrews13:10 Yïee dɑ këli lɑm me gëdhh-ɑ köme pɑ cuggi cɑmø yi ókwërr-ɑ ɑ́göög cøn kì Kemi Kwër. 
Hebrews13:11 Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng ɑ́bëëd e nyi kïdh-ɑ Kej Kwërdwøng ki remmi lɑ̈yy mø muuje ɑ́ gëëdhi me gøøm orøg; de rïnggi gëdhhɑni nyi rɑ̈b ɑ dhøg kemɑni kì wɑ̈g. 
Hebrews13:12 Bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́thøw Yëso dhøg döri kɑɑl, kipe kinni o ji gwøge ge dhïw ki reme." 
Hebrews13:13 Kedhi wɑ yïe kì dhøg kemɑ̀ kì yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g, kɑ ɑyɑ̈re nywɑg wɑ ki en." 
Hebrews13:14 Mɑ́ e bong kɑɑl me ceg bëëdø ɑ́ miee kì kömi piny; wɑ yïd-ɑ kɑɑl-ɑ óbï. 
Hebrews13:15 Pwøj wɑ Jwøk yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, e pwøjjɑni bɑ kej gëëdhi men-ɑ di mëggii yi wɑ kì ri Yëso." 
Hebrews13:16 Wɑ̈thi wun ko nyi wïl ki gwøg ki gïgdøj, wɑlɑ̀ ki nywɑ̈g ki jɑmmi wun, mɑ́ møgɑni pɑ̈r ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi wëggi pyëw Jwøk mïnø." 
Hebrews13:17 Nyi lïngu kwøbbi tyëngdøngi wun, mɑ́ ge bɑ pëjji wun. O ge korr-ɑ wëyi wun, mɑ́ ge bɑ møg-ɑ ócɑy yi Jwøk ke pɑ kor ge gïn. Keløg kwøbbi gen olïngø yi wun, ge ceg-ɑ gwøg ki medi pëthi gen, de keløg ge ógöögø pëthi gen rijjø, bong kunyø me yod yi wun." 
Hebrews13:18 Nyi kwɑjju Jwøk kiper wøn, mɑ́ wø ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, bong gïnrɑj kì pëthi wøn kipe gwøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wøn. De wø nyi tyer-ɑ gwøg ki gïg-ɑ myëër kì ri jɑmmì bënn." 
Hebrews13:19 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun ki mendwøng kinni kwɑjju Jwøk ceth, o yɑ ójwɑne kì döggi wun." 
Hebrews13:20 Jwøk, Wë Yëso Mesiy ɑ́tuge kì yij thøø ki remi lwöm-ɑ gïti ɑtheer; eni Jɑl-ɑ dwøng, jɑl-ɑ kwɑy dyëge. Wu óthödhi yi Jwøøg mër ki gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun bënn, kipe kinni o wu gwøgu gïn-ɑ dwɑdde, kɑ wiy wu wëgge gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑdde kì ri Yëso Mesiy. Wiy dhwɑ̈ng bëëde ɑ́ mi Mesiy gïti ɑtheer! Amen." 
Hebrews13:21  
Hebrews13:22 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun, yeki nyiimïɑ, kinni lïngu kwøbb-ɑ cïïjɑ wun; mɑ́ wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́gwëdɑ wun pɑth ki wɑ̈nyø me dwøng." 
Hebrews13:23 Yɑ ngɑ̈j-ɑ wun kinni, Timøthì ómïee ɑ́gööny wɑ̈g kì ød mɑg. Keløg e jwɑn-ɑ bëënø, yɑ ólwöög yi en keny-ɑ óbëënɑ yï wun." 
Hebrews13:24 Mɑ̈dh wun pëjji wun geki jii Jwøk bënn. Wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi nyiimïee møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l Itɑliyɑ̀. 
Hebrews13:25 Wiy dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk yinge kömi wun bënn. 
James1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Yɑgob bɑ̈ng Jwøk geki Wë Yëso Mesiy. Yɑ mɑ̈dh-ɑ jii Jwøk møg-ɑ tɑɑy kömi piny bëne. 
James1:2 Nyiimïɑ, ngɑ̈nyu wøw kinni, ri wun dɑ gyëdh kɑ̀ rɑngi wun kinøw kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn," 
James1:3 mɑ́ wu ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni kɑ̀ cuggi wun ki ngini orɑngɑni kì bɑng tegi yïëyø mi wun, wu ceg-ɑ yïddø ki tegø men ngïïn wun." 
James1:4 Ngïïn wun ceth kɑ pëthi wun ko wëggu nyönhø, o óbongii gïn gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ri wun, wɑlɑ̀ gïn jɑ̈ddi wun." 
James1:5 De keløg e dɑ ngɑn jɑ̈ddi ki peli wïj kì kelli wun, kwɑjje Jwøk, o óthödhi yi Jwøk ki peli wïj, mɑ́ Jwøk ji bënn nyi thödhe’ thödhø e muujø kɑ medi pyëwe." 
James1:6 De nyi kwɑ̈jji wun yethi wun pɑ pyëër; mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ yije nyi pyëër nɑ ɑpɑng-ɑ nyi pwöj yi yømø kì nɑɑm omelø. 
James1:7 Ngɑn ni menɑni ko rum kinni dɑ gïn-ɑ óyod yi en kì yï Wë," 
James1:8 mɑ́ e bɑ dhɑnhø me rumme tɑyø, o nyi døøg-ɑ cyɑ̈n kì ri gïg-ɑ gøgge bënn." 
James1:9 Tyëng-ɑ jɑdø kì kelli nyiimïee, nyi mïni pëthi gen, keløg ge tïng-ɑ mɑl yi Jwøk." 
James1:10 Kɑ ngetikɑ̈r, nyi med pyëwe ceth kɑ̀ wɑ̈ɑ̈ny kɑ̈re; mɑ́ ngetikɑ̈r ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny ni okøggi luum pɑ̈l." 
James1:11 Mɑ́ kenyi tuul cɑ̈ng kɑ ólënhø, lum nyi ceg-ɑ thwøwø kɑ okøgge odyëmø, kɑ myëre ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø; bëëd ɑ nøw ceth, ngetikɑ̈r óthøw e cong-ɑ jɑmme." 
James1:12 Ngɑn nyi ngïnø kɑ̀ rɑngii, ree dɑ gyëdh, mɑ́ keny-ɑ óthumi orɑngɑni, óthödhi yi Jwøk ki köögi men-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kinni gø ómëgge tyëng-ɑ mɑɑrii." 
James1:13 De kenyi thɑɑb dhɑnhø, ko nyi kööb kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́thɑb-ɑ yi Jwøk”, mɑ́ Jwøk kiree, pɑ nyi thɑb yi rɑj, o bong ngɑn nyi thɑb yi en thyew." 
James1:14 De dhɑnhø nyi thɑb-ɑ yi gïnrɑj men-ɑ nyi kønø kì pyëwe, kɑ nyi mɑg yi gïn-ɑ tyer yi pyëwe." 
James1:15 Okøn pyëw ki gïnrɑj nyii nywølø ki orøg, o orøg kɑ̀ ngënye kì pyëw dhɑnhø nyii kɑ̈nø ki thøø." 
James1:16 Ri wun ko wëggu wënyø, yeki nyiimïɑ!" 
James1:17 Gïn-ɑ muuj e døj, kí gïn-ɑ muuj e bong gïn gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ree nyi bï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl; nyi bï piny e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j gïg-ɑ mëënyø kì mɑl, eni ngɑn-ɑ pɑ nyi wil ree, ɑ bong tïbe kenyi wiire ree." 
James1:18 Bɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑdde ɑ ɑ́gwøge, keny-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈je wɑ ki kwøbb-ɑ dyër, kipe kinni o wɑ óying wɑ mɑl kibøli gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈je bënn." 
James1:19 Wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl yeki nyiimïɑ kinni, nyi jwɑn dhɑnhø lïngø, de ko nyi jwɑn löggø, kɑ ko nyi jwɑn ki mɑgø yi liny." 
James1:20 Mɑ́ liny dhɑnhø, bong dyër me gwøge kì bøli Jwøk." 
James1:21 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, bɑny wun gïgrijjø geki bëëdi orøg. Kɑ ri wun cïb wun cingi Jwøk, kɑ kwøbb-ɑ cïbe pëthi wun nyi mïdhi wun, mɑ́ wu ócuggø yielø yi kwøbbɑni." 
James1:22 Ri wun ko wëny wun; kwøbbi Jwøk ko nyi wɑ̈dhi wun ki lïngø, de nyi gwøg wun gïn-ɑ köbbe wun." 
James1:23 Ngɑn lïngi kwøbbi Jwøk, kɑ ocögø e gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk pɑ gwøge, nɑ ngɑn lidh ree kì yij rɑ̈ɑ̈ngi." 
James1:24 Ánenni ree kidøøj, kɑ ókedhø; de wïje ɑ́jwɑn wïlø kinni nënni e nɑ ngø." 
James1:25 De tyëng-ɑ nenni ri cigg-ɑ nyi pɑ̈d ji kì yethi töjjì, kɑ gï mïdhi gen ceth, e gï pɑ wëggi gen wïlø, de gïn-ɑ kømmi yi ciggɑni nyii gwøgø yi gen, Jwøk tyëngɑni ógëdhe gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen bënn." 
James1:26 Ngɑn rumø kinni mïdh-ɑ kwøbbi Jwøk, de lebe pɑ mïdhe, budh-ɑ ree; o kwøbbi Jwøk møge, bong gïn wɑngi yi gen." 
James1:27 Møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi Wïyee Jwøk bɑ kinni: køny kïjj geki thwömm kì yij orɑɑng gen, kɑ dhɑnhø ree ko wëgge rënyø yi bëëdi kömi piny." 
James2:1 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, mɑ́ wu bɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy Wë Yëso Mesiy, Wïi mɑ̈r; ji ko nyi genyyi wun kipe nënn-ɑ nënni dëlli gen." 
James2:2 Keløg e dɑ ngetikɑ̈r me bï keny-ɑ cugi wun, e lwede dɑ gweli dhɑb, o orugø ki ógudh mø døj, codhe kɑ ngɑn me wɑnge cɑn ólunyø bëënø, e rug-ɑ ógudh mø bɑ kwɑ̈llì," 
James2:3 kɑ ngɑn-ɑ ree di ógudh-ɑ døj köbbi yi wun kinni, “Mɑɑg rií keny”, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ wɑnge cɑn köbbi yi wun kinni, “Cungí kì keny-ɑn, wɑlɑ̀ pëggí piny keny-ɑ cïb wøn tyelli wøn ek,”" 
James2:4 menɑni bɑ kinni dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel ɑ́geny yi wun kì kelli gen, kɑ ri wun løg wun jɑgg mø rijjø." 
James2:5 Lïngu møg-ɑ köbbɑ wun yeki nyiimïɑ kinni, tyëng-ɑ nënni gɑ ɑbuur kì kömi piny, bɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk gɑ møg-ɑ ólɑg pönh-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kinni gø ómëgge tyëng-ɑ mɑɑrii." 
James2:6 De wude ɑ benyi wun tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur! Á møg ɑ guud nyingi wun, ɑ nyi ywɑɑj wun burø? Pɑth ki tyëngkɑ̈rì?" 
James2:7 Pɑth ki gen ɑ nyi kööbø ki gïgrijjø kì ri Yëso Mesiy, ngɑn-ɑ ceg ki lenhø, ɑ nyinge cölli wun?" 
James2:8 Bɑ gïjø me døøj, keløg wu mïdh-ɑ cigg-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ kööbø kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Mɑɑr ngɑn-ɑ butí ni kɑ̀ mɑɑr rií.”" 
James2:9 De keløg ji møøgø nyii genyyø yi wun, wu ɑ́røngi; o wu bɑ møg-ɑ ócɑy, mɑ́ ciggɑni ɑ́pyem yi wun." 
James2:10 Ngɑn mïdhi Cigg bënn, kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli ciggɑni pyeme, cɑ́ye pɑ̈r ki cɑ́yi ngɑn-ɑ pyem ciggɑni bënn." 
James2:11 Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cïg kinni, “Yï ko niin kí ngɑn nuti nywøøm wun ri wun,” bɑ en ɑ ɑ́cïg thyew kinni, “Yï ko nɑ̈gi ki dhɑnhø.” Cɑgg yï pɑ niin ki ngɑn nuti nywøøm wun ri wun, kɑ yï ónɑ̈ggø ki dhɑnhø, cigg ɑ́pyem yi yïn." 
James2:12 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, nyi kööb wun, kɑ wu nyi göög wun ni tyëng-ɑ ócɑy yi Jwøk, e ködd-ɑ kömi cigg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈d wɑ wɑ̈g kì yethi töjjì." 
James2:13 Mɑ́ Jwøk pyëwe koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki ngɑn pyëwe pɑ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m, keny-ɑ ólidhe gønyy, de cɑ́y ótyɑm yi lɑ̈mpyëw." 
James2:14 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, ɑ́ gïjø mɑ ngø ɑ yod yi ji, keløg ge okööbø kinni, yï gen dɑ yïëyø, e bong gïn gwøg yi gen? Ge ócuggø yielø yi yïëyɑni?" 
James2:15 Keløg ómï wun, wɑlɑ̀ nyiimï wun cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, wɑlɑ̀ yïe bong gïncɑm," 
James2:16 ɑ́ ngø ɑ gwøg yi kwøbbi wun kinni, “Yï ógyëdh yi Jwøk!” Keløg e pɑ thödhi yi wun ki gïn-ɑ jɑ̈ddii?" 
James2:17 Yïëyø bëëd ɑ nøw, keløg ɑ́ en kete ɑ nud de bong gwøg, yïëyø menɑni thøø." 
James2:18 Ngɑn megø ócuggø kwøb kinni, “Ngɑn megø yïe dɑ yïëyø, o ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø yïe dɑ gwøg.” Kwøbbi ngɑnɑni óløøgɑ kinni, “Nyudhí yɑn kër-ɑ cuggi dhɑnhø ki bëëdø yïe dɑ yïëyø, e pɑ göögø? Yïëyø miɑ ónyudhɑ yïn kɑ gwøgɑ.”" 
James2:19 Yï yïëyø kinni, Jwøk bɑ ɑ́kyel? Døøj! Møgɑni bɑ ɑyïëy yi wëyrijjø thyew, o dëlli gen ceg-ɑ kïïrø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø kì bɑng møgɑni." 
James2:20 Dhëg! Yï dwɑdd-ɑ nyudhø kinni yïëyø e bong gwøg, bogïn døj kì ree?" 
James2:21 Lidh wïyee Abrɑhɑm, nuti yïëyø yi Jwøk kinni bɑ ngɑntir kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́muuje wɑ̈de kì kömi këli lɑm, ɑ́ gëëdhi?" 
James2:22 Kɑ yod yi yïn ceth kinni, yïëyø mee ɑ́lwööb kɑ gwøge; kɑ yïëye pɑ̈dh-ɑ keje kì bɑng gwøge." 
James2:23 Kɑ møg-ɑ ógwedø kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Jwøk ɑ́yïëy yi Abrɑhɑm, kɑ cwølli yi Jwøk ɑ́ ngɑntir,” pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen. Acwølli Abrɑhɑm ɑ́ mɑ̈ɑ̈dh Jwøk." 
James2:24 Áyod yi wun cyee kinni, dhɑnhø nyi göögø e tir kì bɑng gwøg de pɑ göögø e tir yi yïëyø kete." 
James2:25 Nɑ menɑni thyew, Rɑɑ̈b, ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi ɑ́cwɑg yi Jwøk kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́kïdhe lyëwwì gøle, kɑ gï öre wɑ̈g ki yöö megø." 
James2:26 Dëël dhɑnhø kɑ̀ bong ree wëy, rum thøø; yïëyø thyew, ke pɑ 'lwööbe ki gwøg, rum thøø." 
James3:1 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, ko di ji mø gïïr kì kelli wun mø gwøg ri gen gɑ jøpwönyø, mɑ́ e ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, cɑ́y-ɑ ócɑɑy wɑ, wɑ jøpwönyø teeg kibøli cɑ́y-ɑ ócɑɑy ji yøw." 
James3:2 Wɑ nyii bɑ̈jjø bënn tyel mø gïïr. De keløg dhɑnhø pɑ nyi bɑ̈jji kì ri kwøbb-ɑ kømme, bɑ ngɑntir, o ree ócuggø korø yi en." 
James3:3 Dhøg kyeny nyii göddø yi wɑ ki yël men gerrii, o nyi kedhe kun-ɑ dwɑddi yi wɑ." 
James3:4 Lidhu sɑpïnɑ̀ ki dönge, kí yøm-ɑ teeg ɑ nyi wøjjii; nyi gerri yi jɑlkëw kɑ lɑwi me thiinh yøw, kɑ nyi kedh-ɑ kun-ɑ dwɑddi yi jɑlkëwɑni." 
James3:5 Leb bëëd ɑ nøw thyew; nënni e thiinh, de ócuggø tïnggø ki gïg mø døngø. Lidh opeli mɑc ɑ thiinh, ede ɑ nyi rɑ̈be thïm me dwøng!" 
James3:6 Leb pɑ̈r ki mɑc. Ying-ɑ ri dhɑnhø ɑ́ gïn cuggi rënyi bëëdø kì kömi piny bëne. Bëëdee nyi rɑ̈be’ rɑ̈bø ni kenyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b mɑc, o rɑ̈ɑ̈b-ɑ men-ɑ́ mɑɑc pödhi thøø kiree." 
James3:7 Lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l bënn, kí winy, kí gïg-ɑ mulli, kí rij; ge ócuggø mɑ̈ɑ̈gø yi dhɑnhø." 
James3:8 De bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́lwɑ̈ng leb ki mɑgø. Leb rɑj, o dhɑ̈li mɑgø, o yije pɑ̈ng yi sïm me nɑ̈ɑ̈gø." 
James3:9 Wë geki Wïyee nyi lenhi yi wɑ kɑ en, o tyëng-ɑ kyeelø nyi gwɑddi yi wɑ kɑ en thyew, e men-ɑ́ ge ɑ́cwɑ̈j gɑ ngïjji Jwøk." 
James3:10 Dhøngɑni kete ɑ yije kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gyëdh geki ɑgwɑddø; gïn ni menɑni ko cwöb yeki nyiimïɑ! 
James3:11 Dɑ pï mø med geki pï mø tɑng mø cuggi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yij yith ɑ́kyel? 
James3:12 Ólɑm pɑ nyi nywøl ki benø, wɑlɑ̀ oløg pɑ nyi nywøl ki nywøli ólɑm; o wɑɑng pï mø tɑng pɑ cuggi kɑ̈nø ki pï mø med." 
James3:13 Keløg e dɑ ngɑn wïje pel kì kelli wun o dïdø, bëëde ki bëëndøj men-ɑ nyodh peli wïje geki dïde." 
James3:14 De keløg yethi wun dɑ mud kí mɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kí geny; wu ko pëëd kì kömi dyër, kɑ̀ kööb wun ce wɑ̈thi wun pel." 
James3:15 Mɑ́ peli wïny ni menɑni pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl; bɑ mi kömi piny; bɑ peli wïj dhɑnhø yøw, o kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Cethɑn." 
James3:16 Keny-ɑ di mud geki mɑ̈ɑ̈nø, yije nyi bong-ɑ bëëndøj; dɑ́ olïng pëëth geki rɑj bënn ɑ nyi ying yije." 
James3:17 De peli wïj men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl, dhïw o bogïn rɑj kì ree; pëddi mëërø thyew, o bɑ mölø, ngɑ̈ny bëëdø, o pyëwe nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø; pɑ nyi gënyø, o pɑ nyi wënyø." 
James3:18 O bɑ bëëntir ɑ nyi nywøl yi gïn-ɑ pidh yi tyëng-ɑ göögø kipe mër, ge pïïdh-ɑ mër." 
James4:1 Liny geki wëërø men-ɑ kɑɑm wun kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny? Ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri gïg-ɑ tyer yi dëlli wun, gïgɑni ceg-ɑ byëddø kì ri wun." 
James4:2 Pëthi wun otyëëdø, de gïg-ɑ tyer yi pëthi wun pɑ nyi yod yi wun; kɑ wu nyi yöd wu dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈g ki ji; pëthi wun otyëëdø ki jɑmmì, de ge pɑ cuggi yodø yi wun, bene ɑ bɑnge nyi wër wun kɑ wu ónyïɑ̈ggø. Dɑ gïg jɑ̈ddi wun, mɑ́ wu pɑ nyi cwöddi kì yï Jwøk." 
James4:3 Cɑgg wu nyi kwɑ̈jji, wu pɑ nyi yïddi, mɑ́ kenyi kwɑ̈jji wun, wu nyi kwɑjj-ɑ gïg-ɑ tyer yi pëthi wun, gɑ mø cwɑggi wun." 
James4:4 Wu bɑ tyëngɑdud! Kwïj yi wun kinni wu ceg-ɑ mɑ̈nø ki Jwøk, kɑ̀ bëëd wu mër ki kömi piny? Tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi bëëdø ge mër ki kömi piny, ceg-ɑ gwøg ge mɑ̈n ki Jwøk." 
James4:5 Wu ko rum kinni bong dyër kì ri møg-ɑ kømmi yi wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Wëy-ɑ ɑ́cïb riee yi Jwøk pëddi tyiel.”" 
James4:6 De dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ muuj yi Jwøk pëddi döng. Ni kɑ̀ kööb wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Ngeti ɑthwøg nyi thɑɑny-ɑ cyɑ̈n yi Jwøk, de mölø nyi thödhe’ thödhø ki dhwɑ̈ng.”" 
James4:7 De cïbu ri wun cingi Jwøk, kɑ wu nyïɑ̈ggi wun ki Ngɑnrɑj, o renge kì buti wun." 
James4:8 Nyegu buti Jwøk, o ónyïnge buti wun. Lwøgu cinggi wun, wun ɑ tyëngorøg! Gwøgu pëthi wun ge dhïw, wun ɑ tyëngwëënyø!" 
James4:9 Tɑg wun rɑjji wun, kɑ wu kïïm wun, kɑ wu ywöngi wun; løgu ngyerø mi wun ɑ́ ywøg, kɑ medi pëthi wun løg wun ɑ́ kïïmø!" 
James4:10 Gwøgu ri wun wu bɑ mööl kì bøli Wë, o wu ótïnge mɑl." 
James4:11 Ri wun ko nyi kwɑ̈dhhi wun, yeki nyiimïɑ. Mɑ́ ngɑn kwɑ̈dh wɑɑd gen, wɑlɑ̀ cɑy wɑɑd gen ki pyed, kømm-ɑ rɑj kì ri Cigg, o cɑyy-ɑ Cigg. Keløg yï cɑyy-ɑ Cigg, yï pɑth ki ngɑn mïdhi Ciggɑni, de yï bɑ ngɑn nenni gen." 
James4:12 Jwøk kete ɑ nyi muuj cigg, o bɑ en kete ɑ nenni ciggɑni. Bɑ en kete ɑ cuggi yïëdø, o bɑ en ɑ cuggi nɑ̈ggø. Yï bɑ men cøn, ɑ cɑyyí wɑɑd wun?" 
James4:13 Wu tyëng-ɑ nyi kööbø kinni, “Wø ókedhi kɑɑl-ɑni tïn wɑlɑ̀ dhuki, o wø tyëg wøn run kì kunɑni wø óngyëwø, o wø yïddi wøn ki ngyëny mø gïïr.”" 
James4:14 Kwïj yi wun kinni wu óbëëd ɑ dï dhuki! Wu nɑ yïr-ɑ nyi ì twɑ̈ɑ̈g, kɑ nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh." 
James4:15 Wu di kwøb-ɑ kinni, “Keløg ɑ́ gïn dwɑddi yi Jwøk, wø ókedh kɑ wø ogöögø ki gïn-ɑni.”" 
James4:16 De ɑnɑn wu ceg-ɑ thwøgø, wu lejj-ɑ ri wun; lejji rek bɑ bɑ̈jjø." 
James4:17 Ngɑn ngɑ̈ny gwøgi gïndøj, kɑ ocögø gø pɑ gwøge, ɑ́røngi." 
James5:1 Wun ɑ tyëngkɑ̈rì, ywöngi wun, kɑ wu kïïm wun kipe ɑkørr-ɑ óbï kömi wun!" 
James5:2 Kɑ̈rri wun ɑ́kwɑ̈g, o ógudhi wun ɑ́cɑm yi rob." 
James5:3 Dhɑɑb wun kí ɑ́tengi wun kömi gen pɑ̈ng yi nyɑllì; nyɑllì nyodh-ɑ cɑ́yi wun, o rïnggi wun ócɑm yi nyɑllɑni ni cɑɑm mɑc. Mɑ́ wu ɑ́pëggi be congi kɑ̈rì kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ cyɑ̈n ek." 
James5:4 Tyëng-ɑ göögø kì yethi pwödhhi wun nuti mëggu köggi gen. Lïngu gøøny gen! Gøøny tyëng-ɑ kɑj byelli wun ɑ́lïngi yi Jwøk, ɑ bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø." 
James5:5 Wu ɑ́bëëd kì kömi piny yï wun dɑ jɑmmì mø døj, wu yɑ̈ngø yɑ̈ngø, o wu cɑmm-ɑ wɑ̈dhh mø cwɑɑdhø cwɑɑdhø." 
James5:6 Ji mø yï gen bɑ̈r, ɑ́cɑy yi wun ki pyed, kɑ ge nɑ̈g wun, ge dhɑ̈li nyɑgi ri gen." 
James5:7 Ngïïn wun, yeki nyiimïɑ gïti keny-ɑ óbëën Wë. Lidhu jɑlpur kenyi ngïïne e yïd-ɑ cyegi byelle. Cwir nyi yïde’ yïdø pyëwe gøøj en." 
James5:8 Wun thyew, ngïïn wun, kɑ pëthi wun ko wëggu nyönhø, mɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng bëëni Wë ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
James5:9 Wu ko nyi nguni ki ri wun, yeki nyiimïɑ; o wu ócög wu pɑ cɑy yi Jwøk. Jɑngi gøny cyɑ̈gi; ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki cwöbø." 
James5:10 Pɑrri wun bëëdi jøtöng møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi mø Wë cøn; ngøy wun bëëdi gen ki orɑng-ɑ ɑ́ngin yi gen. 
James5:11 Tyëng-ɑ nyi ngïnø ri gen dɑ gyëdh. Kwøbbi ngïni Ayub ɑ́lïngi yi wun, kɑ kër-ɑ ɑ́køøgii yi Jwøk kì cyɑ̈n yod yi wun. Mɑ́ Jwøk døøj, o pyëwe nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø." 
James5:12 Gïn-ɑ pere teg wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, bɑ kinni, wu ko nyi köngi ki mɑl wɑlɑ̀ ki piny, wɑlɑ̀ ki gïjø megø yøw. Nyi kwøb kinni “Yɑ ɑ́yïëy,” kenyi yïëëy; kɑ yï nyi kwøb kinni “Yɑ ɑ́kyëëd,” kenyi kyëëd, o yï ócög yï pɑ cɑy yi Jwøk." 
James5:13 Keløg e dɑ dhɑnhø kì kelli wun me ying yij orɑng, kwɑjje Jwøk. O keløg e dɑ ngɑn pyëwe med, lenhe Jwøk ki wör." 
James5:14 Keløg e dɑ ngɑn buud ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dël, cwøle tyëngdøngø mø kɑnïsɑ̀, o Jwøk kwɑjji yi gen kì köme, o gïny yi gen ki møøw kwër ki nyinge Wë." 
James5:15 Mɑ́ kwɑ̈ny-ɑ kwɑjji ki yïëyø, ngɑn-ɑ buud nyi yiele’ yielø, kɑ dële nyi wëggi yönø yi Wë. O keløg e dɑ orøg me gwøøg en, orøngɑni nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈nye’ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
James5:16 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, nyi töng dhɑnhø orøge kì bøli ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø. Kɑ wu nyi kwɑ̈jji wun kipe tyëng-ɑ kyeelø, o dëlli wun nyi yöni gen. Mɑ́ kwɑ̈jji tyëngtir yïe dɑ tegø me dwøng." 
James5:17 Eliyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ dhɑnhø ni wɑ, kɑ Jwøk kwɑjje ki mendwøng kinni, cög kødh e pɑ mɑ̈gi, kɑ kødh ocögø e pɑ mɑ̈gi ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g kí dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïkyel." 
James5:18 Codhe, ɑkwɑ̈jje këti kɑ kødh ómɑ̈gø, kɑ piny ódøøgø twïyø ki jɑmmì." 
James5:19 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, keløg dhɑnhø ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø ki yuu dyër, kɑ dwöög yij yöö yi ngɑn megø," 
James5:20 wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl cyee kinni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́dwöög dhɑnhø yij yuu dyër, ɑ́yiel-ɑ ngɑnɑni kì yij thøø, kɑ orøg me dwøng wëgge lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
1Peter1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Pïtør, jɑlwööni Yëso Mesiy. E gwëd-ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk møg-ɑ tɑyø kì modïrri Pøntøs, kí Gɑlɑthiyɑ̀, kí Kɑpɑdökiyɑ̀, kí Ásiyɑ̀, kí Bithiniyɑ̀." 
1Peter1:2 Wu ɑ́ceg kɑ yienyø ni kɑ ɑ́dwɑddii yi Wïy Jwøk, kɑ wu kwër yi Wëye kipe kinni o wu ómïdhi wun kwøbbi Yëso Mesiy, o wu gwøg wu dhïw yi reme. Wiy dhwɑ̈ng geki mër møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk med gen ri gen kì kelli wun." 
1Peter1:3 Pwøj wɑ Jwøk, Wïyi Wë Yëso Mesiy! Mɑ́ pyëwe ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wɑ, kɑ wɑ thödhe ki nënnì mø nyɑ̈n, kɑ ɑ́tuge Yëso Mesiy kì yij thøø. Kɑ wɑ thödhi yi møgɑni ki bëëdi ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø," 
1Peter1:4 o wɑ yïd-ɑ bëëni gyëdhh-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ mïdhi yi Jwøk gɑ mø jie. Ge mïdhi yi en gɑ mø wun, kì mɑl, kun-ɑ bëëd gen ge pɑ rënyi, o ge pɑ kwɑ̈g wɑlɑ̀ ge pɑ nungi." 
1Peter1:5 Ge bɑ mø wun, wu tyëng-ɑ korri yi Jwøk kì bɑng yïëyi wun, wun-ɑ́ møg-ɑ óyiel ki tegi Jwøk kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ cyɑ̈n." 
1Peter1:6 Med pëthi wun kipe møgɑni, cɑgg pëthi wun nyi rënyi kenyi rɑɑng wun kɑ wu orɑngø." 
1Peter1:7 Rɑngø menɑni bɑ kipe lidhi yïëyi wun, mɑ bëëde ɑ́ dyër. Mɑ́ cɑgg ɑ́ dhɑb ɑ cuggi rënyø, nyi rɑng kɑ mɑc; yïëyi wun thyew, ɑ pere teeg, ceg kɑ rɑngø. Codhe, o wu óyïddi wun ki pwøj geki dhwɑ̈ng, o wu ówør kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ócwöb Yëso Mesiy." 
1Peter1:8 Yëso mɑɑr yi wun, ngö e nuti liidh wun; kɑ yïëy yi wun e pɑ nenni yi wun ɑnɑn, kɑ pëthi wun nyii mïnø ki medi pyëw me pɑ yïëy kwøbø," 
1Peter1:9 mɑ́ yieli wëyi wun bene gïn-ɑ óyod yi wun kì bɑng yïëyø menɑni. 
1Peter1:10 Mɑ́ bene yielø menɑni ɑ ɑ́yɑb yi jøtöng cøn, kɑ kwøbbi dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ óyod yi wun töng yi gen." 
1Peter1:11 Kɑ bøli keny-ɑ ócwöb møgɑni kí kër-ɑ óbëën dhwɑ̈ngɑni yɑb yi gen. O bøli kenyɑni bene bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́nyudhi gen yi Wëyi Mesiy, ɑbɑg gen orɑng-ɑ óngin yi Mesiy, kí dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ óbï kì bɑng orɑngɑni." 
1Peter1:12 Jøtöng møgɑni ɑ́nyudhi yi Jwøk kinni, ge pɑ göögø kɑ per cwɑggi gen, de ge ɑ́göög kɑ per wun, keny-ɑ ɑ́kømmi gen gïg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wun kì yï jøwöödø, møg-ɑ ɑ́muuj wun Wöndøj, ki tegi Wëykwërø men-ɑ ɑ́ör kì mɑl. Gïgɑni ɑ thɑ́ gen ceg ki yɑbø yi wëywödd kiri gen." 
1Peter1:13 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, gwir wun rummi wun, kɑ wɑ̈thi wun yieb wun, wu gɑ̈nn-ɑ dhwɑ̈ng men-ɑ óyod yi wun keny-ɑ ócwöb Yëso Mesiy." 
1Peter1:14 Mïdhu kwøbbi Jwøk, kɑ pëthi wun ko wëggu kɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi gïg-ɑ tyer yi dëlli wun, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd wun wu kwïj wøw cøn." 
1Peter1:15 De bëëd wun wu bɑ tyëng kwërø kì ri gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wun bënn, ni kɑ̀ bëëd Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ cwølli wun ɑ́ kwërø." 
1Peter1:16 Wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Bëëd wun wu bɑ ɑkwër, mɑ́ yɑ bɑ kwërø.”" 
1Peter1:17 Jwøk nyi cwølli yi wun ɑ́ Wïyi wun kenyi kwɑjju en, eni ngɑn-ɑ nyi lidh gøøny ji e bong ngɑn geny yi en, e ngɑn cɑ̈yy-ɑ per gïn-ɑ gwøøg en; kɑ wu bëëd wun cyee, wu wør-ɑ en kì kömi piny keny." 
1Peter1:18 Mɑ́ e ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni ɑ́gøøm-ɑ bøli wun kì bɑng bëënrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́lɑg yi wun kì yï kweyyi wun. Bøli wun nuti gøømø kɑ gïg nyi rënyi ni dhɑb wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́tegø; 
1Peter1:19 dɑ́ Mesiy ɑ ɑ́muuj ɑ́ gëëdhi; e nɑ órömø me bong gïn gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ree. 
1Peter1:20 Áyieny yi Jwøk e lɑ̈bø nuti cwɑ̈jø; ɑnyodhii kì cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ cyɑ̈n ek kiper wun. 
1Peter1:21 Ree ɑ ɑ́yïëëy Jwøk yi wun, eni Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́tugii kì yij thøø kɑ gø thödhe ki dhwɑ̈ng; ɑgöög Jwøk ɑ́ en ɑ köme köddi yi yïëyi wun, o en ɑ gɑ̈n yi wun." 
1Peter1:22 Anɑn kɑ ɑ́rum wun ki gwøgi ri wun wu dhïw kì bɑng kɑ̀ mïdhu dyër, kɑ wu døøg-ɑ be mɑɑri ri wun, wu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy; cög wun wu mɑɑr-ɑ ri wun ceth ki pyëw ɑ́kyel." 
1Peter1:23 Mɑ́ wu ɑ́ceg kɑ cigi nywølø wun ɑ́ köödh møg koo thøw, kì ri lögi Jwøk, löng-ɑ nëënø." 
1Peter1:24 Mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Ji pɑ̈r ki lum, o dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen bëne nɑ okøggi luum pɑ̈l. Lum nyii nɑ̈rø, kɑ okøgg ódëëmø." 
1Peter1:25 De lögi Jwøk óbëëdø gïti ɑtheer.” Löngɑni bene Wöndøj men-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi wun. 
1Peter2:1 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, wiy wun thɑb, kí wëënyø, kí ɑ́dud, kí ɑter, kí mud geki kwɑ̈dh bënn." 
1Peter2:2 Bëëd wun, wu nɑ othønh-ɑ ócer nywølø, wu tyer-ɑ cɑɑg wëy, cɑg-ɑ dhïw." 
1Peter2:3 Ni møg-ɑ kømmi yi wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Áyod yi wun kiri wun kinni Jwøk pëddi døøjø.”" 
1Peter2:4 Anɑn, dwöög wun kö Wë, ɑ bɑ kïti gyer, kïn-ɑ nëënø men-ɑ ɑ́bɑny yi teedø i bong pere, de bɑ ɑyieny yi Jwøk, o pere teeg kì yïe thyew." 
1Peter2:5 Wu bɑ kïtti gyer mø nëënø thyew, o wu geer-ɑ kengi wëy, kì keny-ɑ ógöög yi wun wu bɑ ókwër, wu muuj-ɑ gëëdhi mi wëy; gënh-ɑ óyïëy yi Jwøk ki nyingi Yëso Mesiy." 
1Peter2:6 Wɑ̈nyi Kwërø okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́yïëëny ki kïti gyer me pere teg, men cïb yi yɑn ɑ́ kïn-ɑ mïdhi ød kì Dhɑyøn; o ngɑn yïëyii wïje pɑ wöl lɑ̈ɑ̈yø.”" 
1Peter2:7 Bɑ kït me pere teg kì yï wun, wu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy; o bene “Kïti gyer men-ɑ ɑ́bɑny yi bödhhi gyer, en ɑ ɑ́göög ki kïn-ɑ mïdhi ød.”" 
1Peter2:8 Wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø thyew kinni ‘Tyelli ji ócwɑnyyi gen kì ri kïnɑni, kɑ ge ópɑ̈nhø.’ Ge ópɑ̈nhi kì bɑng kɑ̀ nuti yïëëy kwøbbɑni yi gen; o bene gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi Jwøk kiper gen." 
1Peter2:9 De wu bɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́yieny gɑ tyëng kwërø, jii Jwøk; o wu bɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́kwër gɑ møg-ɑ ónyodh døøji Jwøk; o bɑ Jwøk kiree ɑ cwööl wun wɑ̈g kì yij muudhø, wu cwøøle’ yij cɑre; cɑr-ɑ bɑ ngɑ̈ngø." 
1Peter2:10 Wu nuti bëëdø wun ɑ́ jii Jwøk cøn, de wu bɑ jie ɑnɑn; lɑ̈mpyëw Jwøk ɑ́bëëd e kwïj yi wun cøn, de ɑnɑn, lɑ̈mpyëwe ɑ́yod yi wun." 
1Peter2:11 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun yeki nyiimïɑ kinni, bɑny wun gïg-ɑ nyi tyer yi pyëw, kipe kɑ̀ nyi nyïɑ̈ggi gen ki wëy; mɑ́ wu bɑ wëll kì kömi piny men." 
1Peter2:12 Bëëd wun ki bëëdø me døøj kì kelli teen-ɑ nuti yïëyø, o døøji bëëdi wun ópɑr yi gen kì bøli keny-ɑ ókwøøbii i wu bɑ tyëngrijjø; o Jwøk ópwøj yi gen kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óbëëne." 
1Peter2:13 Nyi yïëyu jɑɑgø yi ji-ɑ jyɑ̈gø; nyi lïngu kwøbbi rɑ̈nhdwøng, ngɑn-ɑ jɑɑg ji bënn." 
1Peter2:14 Kí kwøbbi modïrr-ɑ ɑ́røny yi en gɑ møg nyi cɑy tyëng-ɑ gøggi rɑj, o ge nyi pwøj gen tyëng-ɑ gøggi gïgdøj." 
1Peter2:15 Mɑ́ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk bɑ kinni, o dhøggi tyëng-ɑ bɑ dhëgg nɑ̈g yi wun kì bɑng kɑ̀ göög wun ki gïgdøj." 
1Peter2:16 Nyi göög wun wɑ̈thi wun; kɑ wu ko bëëd ni tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø ki orøg kenyi wiy gen ge göög-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen; de bëëd wun wu bɑ bɑ̈nggi Jwøk. 
1Peter2:17 Nyi wøru ji bënn, kɑ tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ mɑɑr wun kidøøj. Böggu Jwøk, kɑ rɑ̈nhdwøng wør wun." 
1Peter2:18 Wun ɑ bɑ̈ngg, nyi lïngu kwøbbi tyëng-ɑ cinggi gen bëëd yi wun, kɑ ge wør wun. Wu ko wør møg-ɑ mïdhi wun kidøøj keti gen, de wøru møg-ɑ guud nyingi wun thyew." 
1Peter2:19 Wu ógyëdh yi Jwøk keløg wu óngïnø kipe kɑ̀ ngɑ̈nyu gïn-ɑ dwɑdde. 
1Peter2:20 Á köögi mɑ ngø ɑ yod yi wun, keløg wu cɑy kɑ per gïjø me bɑɑj wun? De keløg wu ngin-ɑ orɑng wu gøgg-ɑ dyër, wu ceg kɑ gyëdhø yi Jwøk kipe møgɑni." 
1Peter2:21 O bene gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́cwøøl wun yi Jwøk. Mɑ́ Mesiy ɑ́rɑngi kiper wun, kɑ wu wïye ki nyuudhi, o wu ókwøbbu tyelle." 
1Peter2:22 Bong orøg mɑ ɑ́gwøge, o bong kwøbbi pyed mɑ ɑ́lïngi kì dhøge." 
1Peter2:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yɑnyyii, nuti pɑ̈nyi yɑ̈ddø; keny-ɑ ɑ́rɑnge nuti pɑ̈nyi lwɑ̈g, de ɑ́gɑ̈nn-ɑ Jwøk, ɑ nyi løøg dyër ceth." 
1Peter2:24 Mesiy orøgee ɑ́tëëre wïj yɑdh ɑrïw kì dële, kipe kinni o bëëdø kì yij orøg wiy yi wɑ, o wɑ óbëëd wɑ ki bëëntir. Wu ɑ́yiel kɑ kedde." 
1Peter2:25 Wu ɑ́bëëd wu nɑ dyëg mø lɑ̈nyi pɑ̈l, de ɑnɑn wu ɑ́dwöög be lugø kì bɑng ngɑn-ɑ kwɑy wun, ɑ mïdhi wëyi wun." 
1Peter3:1 Wun ɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn thyew, lïngu kwøbbi cwøwi wun; keløg e ódi ngɑn me nuti yïëëy kwøbbi Jwøk kì kelli gen, óyïëy kì bɑng døøji bëëdi wun, cɑgg e nuti köbbø yi wun." 
1Peter3:2 Mɑ́ ge óyïëy-ɑ keny-ɑ ólidh gen wør-ɑ wøør wun, kí kɑ̀ korru ri wun ki bëëntir." 
1Peter3:3 Mɑ́ døøji wun koo nën-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi wun kete, kipe ɑkɑ̈ddi yëyy, wɑlɑ̀ kipe dhɑm-ɑ rug geki ógudh;" 
1Peter3:4 de døøji wun ying-ɑ yethi pëthi wun, kí tɑri pyëw geki möölø, o bëëdø menɑni pere teeg kì yï Jwøk." 
1Peter3:5 Mɑ̈nn-ɑ bɑ tyëng kwërø ge ɑ́bëëd ɑ nøw cøn, e ri gen jyɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen ri Jwøk, o ge lïng-ɑ kwøbbi cwøwi gen." 
1Peter3:6 Ni Sɑrɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́bëëd e lïng-ɑ kwøbbi Abrɑhɑm, kɑ gø cwølle ɑ́ wɑ̈n. Wu bɑ nyigi Sɑrɑ̀ ɑnɑn, keløg wu gøgg-ɑ gïgdøj e bong gïn böggi yi wun." 
1Peter3:7 Wun ɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw, bëëd wun wu olwöbø ki mɑ̈nni wun, wu ngɑ̈ny wøw ceth kinni ge nyøødh kibøli wun. Wøru gen, mɑ́ ge óyïddi ki dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng nënnì kyeel ki wun. Bëëd wun kinøw o óbongii gïn-ɑ órïwwi bøli kwɑ̈jjø mi wun." 
1Peter3:8 Gïn-ɑ kwøbɑ kì cyɑ̈n bɑ kinni, nyi bëëd wun wu kømm-ɑ dhøg ɑ́kyel. Mɑɑru ri wun ni kenyi mɑɑr nyiimëëg ri gen, ki døøji burø geki möölø." 
1Peter3:9 Kɑ rɑj ko nyi col ki rɑj, wɑlɑ̀ yɑ̈d ko nyi col ki yɑ̈d, de nyi lɑ̈mmu gyëdh tyëng-ɑ gwɑddi wun, mɑ́ keny-ɑ ɑ́cwøøl wun yi Jwøk, wu ɑ́köbbe kinni wu óthödhe ki gyëdh;" 
1Peter3:10 ni kɑ ógwedii kì yij wɑ̈nyi kwërø kinni, “Ngɑn dwɑddi bëëdø pyëwe omedø, o dwɑdd-ɑ kinni bëëd e bong rɑj, ko kööb ki kwøb mø rijjø, kɑ kwøbbi pyed wiye." 
1Peter3:11 Kɑ gwøg ki gïgrijjø wiye, kɑ nyi gwøge gïgdøj; kɑ yɑbe bëëdø ki mër ki pyëwe bëne." 
1Peter3:12 Mɑ́ tyëngtir okorrø yi Wë o kwɑ̈jji gen nyi lïnge’ lïngø; de pɑ dwɑddi tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø ki rɑj.” 
1Peter3:13 Keløg wu tyer-ɑ gwøg ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøk, ɑ́ men-ɑ ógöggi wun ki gïgrijjø?" 
1Peter3:14 O ri wun dɑ gyëdh keløg wu rɑng ɑ kömi dyër! Ko di ngɑn böggi yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ pëthi wun ko lïngi." 
1Peter3:15 De kwër wun Mesiy kì pëthi wun, kɑ wør wun ceth ɑ́ Wïi wun. Kɑ wu bëëd wun ri wun tyeeny wun kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kipe nyudhi tyëng-ɑ ópëjji wun gïg-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi wun gɑ møg-ɑ óbï." 
1Peter3:16 De nyi løøgu kwøbbɑni mɑ̈ɑ̈dh, wu owuödø. Bëëd wun pëthi wun gøøj wun, kipe kinni keløg wu ódi yɑnyø, o tyëng-ɑ óyɑny wun kipe bëëdi wun, wun ɑ́ jii Mesiy, wɑ̈thi gen ólɑ̈ɑ̈y gen." 
1Peter3:17 Mɑ́ e lɑ̈w keløg wu rɑngø kɑ per gøggi dyër, ke bëëde ɑ́ gïn dwɑddi yi Jwøk, kibøli ke rɑngi wun wu gøgg-ɑ rɑj." 
1Peter3:18 Mɑ́ Mesiy ɑ́thøw kɑ per orøg tyelø ɑ́kyel kete. Áthøw e tir kipe tyëngrijjø, kipe kinni o gï nyiige buti Jwøk. Ánɑ̈g kɑ dële othøø, de ɑ́tug yi Jwøk ɑ́ wëy," 
1Peter3:19 ɑkedhe ɑ́ wëy, kɑ wëy-ɑ bɑ ɑmɑgg cïje." 
1Peter3:20 Wëyɑni bɑ wëyi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cög kwøbbi Jwøk nuti lïngø yi gen, keny-ɑ ɑ́ngine gïn kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Nöö e ogudø ki yɑ̈y, ɑbødh ji ɑ́bïdɑ̈g keti gen kì dhøggi pï." 
1Peter3:21 De pïi bɑɑyɑni gɑj-ɑ jwɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́jwɑ̈ɑ̈g wun, ɑ yiel wun ɑnɑn. Pɑth ki lwöögi cïlli dël wɑ̈g, dɑ́ møg köbbi Jwøk ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pyëw me døøj. Wu yiel yi en ɑ ri dhwönhi Mesiy," 
1Peter3:22 ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kedhi mɑl, o bëëd ɑ wïj kyëëj Jwøk, e jɑɑg-ɑ wëywödd bënn, kí wëy-ɑ yï gen di tegø, geki wëy-ɑ jyɑ̈gø." 
1Peter4:1 Mesiy ɑ́ceg-ɑ orɑng kì kömi piny, wun thyew cwed wun pëthi wun wu rømm-ɑ møgɑni; mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ rɑngø bong gïn rebii ki orøg." 
1Peter4:2 Cɑg ɑnɑn ceth, bëëd wun wu gwøg-ɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk, kɑ wu ko nyi tyer gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi ji." 
1Peter4:3 Wu ɑ́rum ki bëëdø ni tyëng-ɑ kwïj Jwøk; kɑ ɑ́bëëd wun wu cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ kɑ̈jji orøg, wu gøgg-ɑ gïg-ɑ tyer yi dëlli wun; wu mɑdhh-ɑ muggì; wu mɑll-ɑ ngïjji jwögg-ɑ kømi pyëw lɑ̈mmø." 
1Peter4:4 De ɑnɑn, tyëng-ɑ kwïj Jwøk ɑ́ceg ngɑ̈ngø yi kɑ ɑ́cög wun wu pɑ nyi kedhi kelli gen, bene ɑ bɑnge gwɑddi wun yi gen." 
1Peter4:5 De kwøbbi gen óløøg-ɑ yi Jwøk, ngɑn ɑ bɑ jɑngi gøny; en ɑ óløøg kwøbbi tyëngnëënø kí tyëngthøø." 
1Peter4:6 Bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́pwönyi Wöndøj kì kelli tyëngthøø thyew, mɑ́ cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́cɑɑy gen ki thøø, kɑ ɑ́ying gen kömi piny, wëyi gen óyïddi ki keny nëën gen kì yï Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ bɑ wëy." 
1Peter4:7 Anɑn, cögi piny geki cögi jɑmmì møg-ɑ ying yije bënn ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Kɑ wu bëëd wun wɑ̈thi wun onëënø, kɑ ri wun nyi kor wun thyew, kɑ Jwøk nyi kwɑjji wun kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
1Peter4:8 De gïn-ɑ pere teg cɑrø bɑ kinni, wu ko wïyi ki mɑɑri ri wun, mɑ́ orøg me dwøng nyii kumø yi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø." 
1Peter4:9 Nyi yïëbbu kɑ̈lli wun ji, wu pɑ köörø." 
1Peter4:10 Teng-ɑ ɑ́mëggi dhɑnhø yi Jwøk nyi mïdhe gøn kidøøj, kɑ gø nyi kønye ji-ɑ kyeelø." 
1Peter4:11 Ngɑn pwönyi, pwönye wööni Jwøk; ngɑn göög cinge, gööge ki teng-ɑ ɑ́mëggii yi Jwøk; o Jwøk ólenhi kì ri Yëso Mesiy; ngɑn-ɑ gïti ɑtheer e yïe dɑ dhwɑ̈ng kí tegø. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Wu ko nyi ngɑ̈ng yi orɑng-ɑ ngin yi wun, orɑngɑni nɑ mɑc men rɑɑng wun." 
1Peter4:13 De nyi bëëd wun pëthi wun med kɑ̀ yïddi wun ki orɑng ni men-ɑ ɑ́yod yi Mesiy. Mɑ́ keny-ɑ ódwöög Yëso kömi piny keny, ree ódi cɑɑr Jwøk, o pëthi wun ómïni ki mendwøng." 
1Peter4:14 Keløg wu ogwɑddø yi teedø kipe nyingi Mesiy, ri wun dɑ gyëdh; mɑ́ menɑni nyodh-ɑ kinni wëyi mɑ̈r, ɑ bɑ wëyi Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi wun." 
1Peter4:15 Ke di ngɑn rɑngø kì kelli wun, pɑ rɑngi kɑ per bëëde ɑ́ ngɑn nɑ̈ɑ̈g dhɑnhø, wɑlɑ̀ kur, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn nyi kedhi yethi kwøbbi tyëngmøøgø." 
1Peter4:16 Keløg yï rɑngø kɑ per kɑ̀ bëëd yïn ɑ́ ngeti Mesiy, wïjí ko lɑ̈ɑ̈y, de ceg Jwøk ki pwøjø kipe kɑ̀ cölli yïn Mesiy." 
1Peter4:17 Bøli keny-ɑ óliidh gønyy ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, o gønyyɑni ócɑ̈gi kɑ tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ ceth. De keløg gønyyɑni ócɑ̈gi kɑ wɑ, ɑ́ gïn ɑ óyod yi tyëng-ɑ bɑny Wöndøj mi Jwøk, keny-ɑ óliidh gønyyi gen kì cyɑ̈n?" 
1Peter4:18 Mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Keløg yieli tyëngtir teeg; óbëëd ɑ dï kipe tyëngorøg, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ pɑ wør Jwøk!”" 
1Peter4:19 Anɑn, wiy tyëng-ɑ nyi yïddi ki orɑng kì bɑng gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk, göög gen ki gwøng døj; wiy ngɑntir men-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j gen gɑ̈n yi gen ɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ óyiel wëyi gen." 
1Peter5:1 Yɑ bɑ jɑldwøng thyew, o yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ jøgdøngi kɑnïsɑ̀ møg-ɑ kelli wun. Orɑng-ɑ ɑ́ngin yi Mesiy ɑ́lidh yi yɑn, o yɑ óyïddi kì ri dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ óbï. Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun kinni," 
1Peter5:2 kor wun dyëg-ɑ ɑ́cïb cinggi wun yi Jwøk. Ge ko kor ki cïr, de koor gen ki medi pëëth. Ge ko kor yi wun kipe kinni o wu óyïddi wun ki jɑmmi kömi piny; de bëëd gwøngɑni e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pëthi wun ceth." 
1Peter5:3 Kɑ wu ko bëëd wu bɑ jɑgg mø kwøbbi gen teeg, de bëëd wun, wu bɑ pëjjì mø døøj, møg-ɑ bɑng gen nyi lugi yi dyëg." 
1Peter5:4 Keny-ɑ ówɑ̈nhi Jɑlkwɑ̈y-ɑ dwøng, wu ónënge ki yɑ̈r me cɑre ko lɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
1Peter5:5 Wun ɑ yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun thyew kinni, nyi lïngu kwøbbi jøgdøngø, kɑ wu nyi bëëd wun, wu bɑ mööl. Mɑ́ wɑ̈nyi kwërø okööbø kinni, “Ngeti ɑthwøg nyi thɑɑny-ɑ cyɑ̈n yi Jwøk, de pyëwe nyi med kɑ ngɑn-ɑ bɑ mölø.”" 
1Peter5:6 Nyi yömmi wun kö Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ yïe di tegø bëne. Mɑ́ kɑ̈jji wun ótyeny yi en, kì bøli keny megø." 
1Peter5:7 Keløg e dɑ gïn lïngø kì pëthi wun, nyi cïbu en cingi Jwøk, mɑ́ per wun teeg kì yïe." 
1Peter5:8 Nyi koru ri wun, kɑ wu nëën wun kidøøj! Ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø mi wun, Ngɑnrɑj wïïnø e óngɑ̈rrø ni ngur, me yɑ̈bø ki ngɑn cɑm yi en." 
1Peter5:9 Mïdhu yïëyi wun e teeg, kɑ wu nyïɑ̈ggi wun ki en, mɑ́ wu ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni wɑddi wun, ɑ løg tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy kì kömi piny bëne, ge ceg-ɑ orɑng kinøw." 
1Peter5:10 De kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rɑngi wun ki nyɑ keny me thiinh, Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ yïe nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi dhwɑ̈ng bëne, ɑ cwøøl wun be nywɑ̈g kì ri Mesiy ki dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ ko lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, wu ówëgge tëngø; kɑ wu ócungø wu teeg kì kɑ̈jji wun ceth." 
1Peter5:11 En ɑ yïe di tegø gïti ɑtheer! Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Wɑ̈ny-ɑ gwëdɑ wun e cyeeg èn, yɑ ɑ́køny-ɑ yi Silɑ̀ ki gwedii. O jɑlɑni ceg bëëdø ɑ́ ngeti Mesiy me mïdhi yïëyø kidøøj. Yɑ cïj-ɑ wun kinni, menɑni bene dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk, dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ dyër. Mɑ̈gi wun kì ree." 
1Peter5:13 Wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ men-ɑ Bɑbïl, ge bɑ ɑyieny thyew yi Jwøk, kɑ wu mɑ̈dh thyew yi Mɑrk wɑ̈dɑ." 
1Peter5:14 Mɑ̈dhu ri wun ki nuumi mër. Wu óbëëdø ki mër, wun ɑ jii Mesiy bënn. Amen." 
2Peter1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Sɑymøn Pïtør, ɑ bɑ bɑ̈ng kɑ løg-ɑ jɑlwööni Yëso Mesiy. E gwëd-ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy, ɑ ɑ́göög ge tir kì ri nyingi Yëso Mesiy Yïënee." 
2Peter1:2 Wiy wu óyïddi wun ki dhwɑ̈ng geki mër mø døngø, kì bɑng dïdi wun ki kwøbbi Jwøk geki Wë Yëso." 
2Peter1:3 Wɑ ɑ́thödhi yi tegi Jwøk ki gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi wɑ kiper bëëdø ki bëëndøj men-ɑ kyëëw ki ngɑ̈nyi kwøbbi Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwøøl wɑ be nywɑ̈g ki døøje geki dhwɑ̈nge." 
2Peter1:4 Wɑ ɑ́mëgge gïgdøngø møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kinni gï ómëgge wɑ ki yuu-ɑ ni menɑni, o wu óbødh wun ki nɑ̈gø yi döngi pëëth kipe jɑmmi kömi piny, o wɑ ónywɑ̈ɑ̈g wɑ ki bëëde kwërø." 
2Peter1:5 Kipe gïg ni møgɑni, pɑ̈nyu ri wun kɑ kömi yïëyø kïdhi wun ki døøjø, kɑ kömi døøjø kïdhi wun ki dïdø;" 
2Peter1:6 kɑ kömi dïdø kïdhi wun ki mɑgi pyëw; kɑ kömi mɑgi pyëw kïdhi wun ki ngïïnø; kɑ kömi ngïïnø kïdhi wun ki bëëdø kì yuu Jwøk," 
2Peter1:7 kɑ kömi bëëdø kì yuu Jwøk kïdhu mɑɑri jii Mesiy. 
2Peter1:8 Keløg gïg-ɑ døøj ni møgɑni nud kì yï wun, kɑ ge mïdhi yi wun, wu løg ge’ ji mø nyi göögø ge teg kì ri ngɑ̈nyi wøw men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Wë Yëso Mesiy." 
2Peter1:9 De ji-ɑ yï gen bong gïgdøj ni møgɑni, ge bɑ cörr, o wɑ̈thi gen wïlø kinni ge ɑ́rum ki gwøgø ge dhïw; bong kerri orøøg kɑ̈ge dööng kì kömi gen." 
2Peter1:10 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, nyi tyeru gwøg ceth ki gïg-ɑ per gen ɑ́yieeny wun yi Jwøk; keløg wu ógöögø kinøw, yïëyø mi wun koo pɑ̈nyi yi wun ki wiyø;" 
2Peter1:11 o wu ówëggi kedhi Pödhi Wë ɑ bɑ Yïënee, en ɑ Yëso Mesiy, eni pönh-ɑ óbëëdø gïti ɑtheer." 
2Peter1:12 O ri wun ópɑ̈ddi yi wun ki møgɑni, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ ngɑ̈nyu gen, o wu mɑ̈gø kì ri dyër men-ɑ ɑ́yod yi wun." 
2Peter1:13 Yɑ orumø kinni døøj kenyi pɑ̈ddɑ wun ki møgɑni kɑ̈ng-ɑ nëënɑ. 
2Peter1:14 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, dël-ɑ nyi thøw èn, ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki løny piny yi yɑn, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn ceth yi Wë Yëso Mesiy." 
2Peter1:15 Riɑ ópɑ̈nyɑ ki gwøg ki gïjø me nyi wëggi wun pɑrri møgɑni ceth, kì bɑng thøwɑ." 
2Peter1:16 Wø nuti kømm-ɑ kwøb møg nyi ceg ki cwɑ̈jø, kɑ ɑ́nyudhi wun yi wøn ki tegi Wë Yëso Mesiy, geki kwøbbi bëëne, mɑ́ dönge ɑ́lidh yi wøn ki nyingi wøn." 
2Peter1:17 Wø ɑ́bëëd wø nud kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́yïdde ki mɑ̈r geki dhwɑ̈ng kì yï Jwøk Wïy, kɑ ɑ́bëën cwɑg yïe ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng kinni, “Men bene Wɑ̈dɑ, wɑ̈n-ɑ med kì pyëwɑ!”" 
2Peter1:18 Cwɑggɑni ɑ́lïngi yi wøn ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, keny-ɑ ɑ́ying wøn wïj kïti kwër wøki en." 
2Peter1:19 Kɑ wø ceg-ɑ pëddø yïëyi kwøbbi jøtöng. O bɑ gïjø me døøj ke cïb wun rummi wun ri møgɑni, mɑ́ ge nɑ cɑr me mëënyø kì yij muudhø, pïd cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ótuul kyeli ru wøw kì yethi pëthi wun." 
2Peter1:20 Gïn-ɑ pere teg men-ɑ dwɑddi kinni bëëde e ngɑ̈nyi yi wun bɑ kinni, bong ngɑn cuggi lwøbi gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møg-ɑ ɑ́töng kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Kwërø ki cwɑgge." 
2Peter1:21 Mɑ́ jøtöng nuti tööng-ɑ møg kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï dhɑnhø, de jiɑni ɑ́kööb-ɑ tegi Wëykwërø kenyi töng gen møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk." 
2Peter2:1 Ódi jøpwönyi pyed møg-ɑ ócwöb kì kelli wun, ni kɑ ɑ́cwöb jøtöng mø pyed kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil cøn. Ge ókɑ̈ni ki ryɑ̈g, kí pwönyø me pɑth ki dyër, o Wïi gen ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́døm gen óbɑny yi gen, kɑ ge jwɑn-ɑ kɑ̈ni kömi gen ki thøø." 
2Peter2:2 Ji mø gïïr óngöyi ki gwøg ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi gen, kɑ ji møøgø okööbø ki gïgrijjø kì ri Yuu Dyër ki gööj gen." 
2Peter2:3 Pëthi gen ódøngi kipe ngyëny, kɑ ngyënyyi wun cɑm yi gen kì bɑng wɑ́j-ɑ pɑth ki dyër. De cɑ́yi gen koo cwöng; ngɑn-ɑ nɑ̈g gen yïdø nyinge yieeb en!" 
2Peter2:4 O Jwøk, wëywödd-ɑ ɑ́göög ki orøg nuti wiy en gï pɑ cɑye, de gï ɑ́leenge kej cɑ́y, kun mïdhi gen gɑ ɑmɑgg ki ɑ́cwecwel kì yij muudhø, ge yïd-ɑ Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Gøny." 
2Peter2:5 Jwøk, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kömi piny kɑ̈ge dööng nuti wiy en, de bɑɑyø ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le kömi tyëngrijjø; o bɑ Nöö, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cïj teenɑni kinni bëëd gen ki bëëntir, geki ji ɑ́bïryew keti gen ɑ ɑ́wiy yi Jwøk." 
2Peter2:6 Kɑ̈ddi Sødømɑ̀ geki Gømørɑ̀ ɑ́rɑ̈b yi Jwøk ki mɑc, kɑ gï løge belø, kɑ gï gwøge gɑ nyuudhi kipe tyëngrijjø møg-ɑ ólunyi kì bɑng gen." 
2Peter2:7 Kɑ Lot, ngɑntir, ɑ ɑ́bɑny bëëdi orøg gø yiele." 
2Peter2:8 Lot ɑ́bëëd ɑ kelli tyëngɑni, e olïngø, o onëënø ki rɑjj-ɑ gøggi yi gen, kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kɑ pyëwe nyii rɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki mendwøng." 
2Peter2:9 Jwøk ngɑ̈ny yuu-ɑ nyi yiele tyëngtir kì yij orɑng, o tyëngrijjø nyi mïdhe’ mïdhø ge yïd-ɑ Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Cɑ́y." 
2Peter2:10 Ji-ɑ nyi tie ki cɑyø, bɑ tyëng-ɑ gøggi gïg-ɑ tyer yi dëlli gen, o döngi Jwøk pɑ wør yi gen. Jøpwönyi pyed møgɑni tɑ̈dø; wëy-ɑ døngø kì mɑl pɑ wør yi gen; de gï yöd ge ceg kɑ gwɑddø yi gen." 
2Peter2:11 Cɑgg ɑ́ wëywödd, ɑ pëddi tegø kibøli jøpwönyi pyed møgɑni, jiɑni pɑ nyi gøøny yi gen kì bøli Jwøk." 
2Peter2:12 Jiɑni göög-ɑ nøgi wɑ̈ɑ̈th; ge nɑ lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, ɑ nyi nywøl gɑ møg dwɑr o ge nɑ̈g. Gïn-ɑ bëëde pɑ gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen, nyi ceg kɑ gwɑddø yi gen. Ge ónɑ̈g ni lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l," 
2Peter2:13 o ge ócɑy kɑ ge orɑngø kipe orɑng men-ɑ ɑ́göjji gen ji. Ge nyi tyer-ɑ gøggi gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi dëlli gen kì dɑ̈ri cɑ̈ng; ge nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ɑyɑ̈r kömi wun kenyi nywɑ̈ɑ̈g wun ki gïgcɑmm ki gen, mɑ́ ge mɑɑr-ɑ wëënyø." 
2Peter2:14 Ge tyer-ɑ nenni mɑ̈nn-ɑ røngø; ge pɑ nyi yɑ̈ng yi orøg. Tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen nyøødh nyi peej ge’ yethi ɑ́kɑ̈llì. Ge thøø yi pwönyø ki döngi pyëw. Ge ógöjji cyën yi Jwøk! 
2Peter2:15 Mɑ́ yuu-ɑ dyër ɑ́wiy yi gen, kɑ ge töng-ɑ wɑ̈yi gen, kɑ ge løg-ɑ bɑng Bɑlɑɑm wɑ̈d Beor, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr køøgø kipe gwøng rɑj." 
2Peter2:16 Kɑ Bɑlɑɑm cɑy kipe orøge. Adere ɑ́löggi ki cwɑggi dhɑnhø, kɑ jɑltöngɑni wïje dwööge." 
2Peter2:17 Jøpwönyɑni nɑ nyingi pï mø cungø; ge nɑ pøøl mø wøjji yi yømø; ge ɑ́rum ki wïyø yi Jwøk ki keny-ɑ ókïdhi gen kì yij muudhø men-ɑ piny piny. 
2Peter2:18 Ge tɑ̈dø tɑ̈dø, o ge kööbø dhøggi gen omedø, ge wëny-ɑ ji-ɑ nyi kømi bëën wɑ̈g kì kelli teen-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, ki gøggi gïg-ɑ tyer yi dël." 
2Peter2:19 Ge okööbø kinni gï ódwöög gen wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø, e men-ɑ́ gen kiri gen, ge bɑ bɑ̈nggi ryɑ̈g, mɑ́ dhɑnhø bɑ bɑ̈ng yi gïn-ɑ dhɑlii." 
2Peter2:20 De keløg kwøbbi Wë Yëso Mesiy Yïënee óyïëyø yi ji, kɑ ge yiel; codhe kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be bëëdø ki bëëdi kömi piny, bëëdi gen ceg-ɑ pëddø ki rënyø ki me lod rɑ̈ji tyeli mɑl." 
2Peter2:21 Mɑ́ e di bëëd e lɑ̈w keløg bëëntir di bëëd e kwïj yi gen, kibøli kenyi døøg gen cyɑ̈n kɑ cigg pyem gen." 
2Peter2:22 Menɑni pɑ̈r ki møg-ɑ nyi gɑj kinni, “Gwög ɑ́døøg kömi ngwøgge.” Kí kinni, “Kundhøngø men-ɑ ɑ́rum ki lwøgø, ɑ́døøg be ngyelli ree kì yij bub.”" 
2Peter3:1 Men bɑ ryeew wɑ̈jj-ɑ gwëdɑ wun, yeki nyiimïɑ. Riɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyɑ ki pɑ̈ddi wun kì yethi wɑ̈jjɑni ryeet, o wu órum wun kì ri møgɑni." 
2Peter3:2 Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ pɑ̈ddi wun ki møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi jøtöng mø Jwøk, geki møg-ɑ cïgi wɑ yi Wë Yïënee, gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun yi tyëngwöödø." 
2Peter3:3 Gïn-ɑ mɑl kì ri møgɑni bɑ kinni, bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni dɑ ji møg-ɑ ócwöb kì cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ cyɑ̈n, møg-ɑ dir yi jɑmmi kömi piny. Wu ógɑggi yi gen," 
2Peter3:4 kɑ ge opëjø kinni, “Nuti kööbø cem e óbï? De ɑ́gøne en? Kweyyee ɑ́thøw, o piny nudd e nɑ keje, bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́wil ree, kër-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j piny.”" 
2Peter3:5 Gïn-ɑ wøy yi gen, e gø ngɑ̈nyi yi gen bɑ kinni, Jwøk ɑ́ceg-ɑ kwøb, ɑcwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑl kí piny. Piny ɑ́gwøg-ɑ ri pï, e gwøg kɑ pï." 
2Peter3:6 O bɑ pï, pïi bɑɑyø ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g piny kɑ̈ge dööng." 
2Peter3:7 De mɑl kí piny møg-ɑ nud ɑnɑn ge mïdh-ɑ yi ciggɑni ceth; o mïdhi ɑ́ men-ɑ órɑ̈b ki mɑc. Gïgɑni mïdhi kɑ per cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óløøg kwøbbi tyëngrijjø, o ge cɑy." 
2Peter3:8 De gïjø ɑ́kyel ko wïl kì wɑ̈thi wun, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ; kinni cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kì yï Jwøk, pɑ̈r ki runn ɑ́lïp; o runn ɑ́lïp pɑ̈r ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel." 
2Peter3:9 Wë pɑ nyi cwööng ki gwøgi gïn-ɑ kwøbe kinni gø ógwøge, ni kɑ̀ rum kwï ji. De bëëdi wun ceg kɑ nginø yi en, mɑ́ e pɑ dwɑddi kinni o bëëde e dɑ ngɑn wëye lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, dɑ́ kinni yewi ji bënn." 
2Peter3:10 Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë, óbï e nɑ kur. Mɑl ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì cyɑ̈ngɑni e ceg-ɑ ruurø ni kenyi pööde, kɑ gïg-ɑ mɑl órɑ̈bbø, kɑ piny ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø geki gïg-ɑ yije bënn." 
2Peter3:11 Kɑ̀ bëëd jɑmmì bënn gɑ møg-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny kinøw, wu óceg bëëdø wun ɑ́ ji mɑ ngø? Bëëd wun wu bɑ tyëng kwërø, o wëyi wun óthyëyyi Jwøk," 
2Peter3:12 wu yïd-ɑ Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk, wu kwɑjj-ɑ kinni jwɑne bëënø; eni cyɑ̈ng-ɑ órɑ̈bbi mɑl kɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø; kɑ gïg-ɑ mɑl olenyø yi lëdhi mɑc." 
2Peter3:13 De wɑ yïd-ɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk kinni gø ógwøge; ɑ løg mɑl me nyɑ̈n kí piny me nyɑ̈n, møg yethi gen óbëëd ki bëëntir." 
2Peter3:14 Pɑ̈nyu ri wun ki tyenyø yeki nyiimïɑ, o wu óyuud yi cyɑ̈ngɑni e bong gïn gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ri wun, o bongii gïn pere ócɑɑy wun." 
2Peter3:15 Lidhu ngïn-ɑ ngïïn yi Wë, kɑ̀ wëgge wun ki keny yewi wun, ni møg-ɑ ɑ́gwëdi wun yi Pøøl ómïee, e gwëëd-ɑ peli wïj men-ɑ ɑ́mëggii yi Jwøk." 
2Peter3:16 Kwøbbɑni ɑ nyi gwed yi Pøøl, kenyi gwëde kì ri møgɑni. De kwï kwøbbɑni teeg; ge pɑ yïëy gɑmø yi wɑ̈thi ji møøgø, kɑ ge nyi myen yi gen ni kenyi myen gen wɑ̈jji kwërø møg-ɑ kyeelø. Tyëngɑni nyi cwööl-ɑ thøø kömi gen." 
2Peter3:17 De møgɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi wun nyiimïɑ. Kor wun ri wun, o wu ócög wu pɑ thɑɑb pɑ̈l yi bɑ̈jji tyëng-ɑ ɑ́døøg cyɑ̈n, kɑ wu ódhɑ̈lø cung kì kɑ̈jji wun." 
2Peter3:18 De pëddi wun ki dïdi kwøbbi Wë, Yïënee, Yëso Mesiy. En ɑ lenhi ɑnɑn, gïti ɑtheer! Amen." 
1John1:1 Wø köbb-ɑ wun møg-ɑ ɑ́wöni cøn, o ge ɑ́lïngi yi wøn, kɑ ge lidh yi wøn ki nyingi wøn. Awøø, ɑ́lidh yi wøn kɑ nywɑl yi wøn ki cinggi wøn thyew." 
1John1:1 Wø köbb-ɑ wun møg-ɑ ɑ́wöni cøn, o ge ɑ́lïngi yi wøn, kɑ ge lidh yi wøn ki nyingi wøn. Awøø, ɑ́lidh yi wøn kɑ nywɑl yi wøn ki cinggi wøn thyew." 
1John1:2 Álidh yi wøn keny-ɑ ɑ́nyodhe ree kì bøli teedø, o bɑ en ɑ pere kømmi yi wøn ɑnɑn. O møg-ɑ nyi pwönyi yi wøn bɑ kinni, ngɑnɑni ɑ́ying-ɑ yï Wïy cøn, de ree ɑ́nyodhe, o wø köbb-ɑ wun kwøbbi nënn-ɑ ɑtheer møg-ɑ ɑ́yod yi wøn kì yïe." 
1John1:2 Álidh yi wøn keny-ɑ ɑ́nyodhe ree kì bøli teedø, o bɑ en ɑ pere kømmi yi wøn ɑnɑn. O møg-ɑ nyi pwönyi yi wøn bɑ kinni, ngɑnɑni ɑ́ying-ɑ yï Wïy cøn, de ree ɑ́nyodhe, o wø köbb-ɑ wun kwøbbi nënn-ɑ ɑtheer møg-ɑ ɑ́yod yi wøn kì yïe." 
1John1:3 Dɑ́ møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wøn geki møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wøn ɑ köbbɑ wun thyew, o møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni o wɑ cyɑ̈dhi wɑ kì yöö ɑ́kyel, o wɑ yïddi wɑ ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer kì yï Wïy geki Yëso Mesiy Wɑ̈de, ngɑn-ɑ pere kømmi yi wøn." 
1John1:3 Dɑ́ møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wøn geki møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wøn ɑ köbbɑ wun thyew, o møgɑni bɑ kipe kinni o wɑ cyɑ̈dhi wɑ kì yöö ɑ́kyel, o wɑ yïddi wɑ ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer kì yï Wïy geki Yëso Mesiy Wɑ̈de, ngɑn-ɑ pere kømmi yi wøn." 
1John1:4 De wø gwëd-ɑ wun møgɑni ɑnɑn kipe kinni o medi pëthee kedh gen ge ódøngø. 
1John1:4 De wø gwëd-ɑ wun møgɑni ɑnɑn kipe kinni o medi pëthee kedh gen ge ódøngø. 
1John1:5 Anɑn, wöön-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wøn kì yï Wɑ̈de, gen ɑ møg-ɑ kwøb yi wøn ek, bɑ kinni: Jwøk bɑ cɑr, o bong muudhø kì ree kinni tek." 
1John1:5 Anɑn, wöön-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wøn kì yï Wɑ̈de, gen ɑ møg-ɑ kwøb yi wøn ek, bɑ kinni: Jwøk bɑ cɑr, o bong muudhø kì ree kinni tek." 
1John1:6 Keløg wɑ okööbø kinni, wɑ cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ yöö ɑ́kyel ki en, de wɑ nudd wɑ bëëd ɑ yij muudhø, wɑ ceg-ɑ pyed, o wɑ pɑ gøggi dyër." 
1John1:6 Keløg wɑ okööbø kinni, wɑ cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ yöö ɑ́kyel ki en, de wɑ nudd wɑ bëëd ɑ yij muudhø, wɑ ceg-ɑ pyed, o wɑ pɑ gøggi dyër." 
1John1:7 De wɑ ócyɑ̈dhi kì yöö ɑ́kyel ki en, keløg wɑ cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ yij cɑr ni kɑ̀ bëëde kì yij cɑrɑni, o wɑ óbëëd wɑ bɑ ɑ́kyel, o orøgee ólwöög wɑ̈g yi remi Yëso Wɑ̈de." 
1John1:7 De wɑ ócyɑ̈dhi kì yöö ɑ́kyel ki en, keløg wɑ cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ yij cɑr ni kɑ̀ bëëde kì yij cɑrɑni, o wɑ óbëëd wɑ bɑ ɑ́kyel, o orøgee ólwöög wɑ̈g yi remi Yëso Wɑ̈de." 
1John1:8 De keløg wɑ okööbø kinni, yïee bong orøg, wɑ budh-ɑ riee yøw, o kwøbb-ɑ dyër bogïn kì yïee." 
1John1:8 De keløg wɑ okööbø kinni, yïee bong orøg, wɑ budh-ɑ riee yøw, o kwøbb-ɑ dyër bogïn kì yïee." 
1John1:9 De ke tönggi wɑ orøgee Jwøk, lɑɑwe dwööge’ piny kipe orøngɑni mɑ́ e døj, o dhøge pɑ nyi wil yi en." 
1John1:9 De ke tönggi wɑ orøgee Jwøk, lɑɑwe dwööge’ piny kipe orøngɑni mɑ́ e døj, o dhøge pɑ nyi wil yi en." 
1John1:10 Keløg wɑ okööbø kinni, bong orøg mɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wɑ, wɑng-ɑ kinni, Jwøk ɑ́gwøg yi wɑ ɑ́ ngeti pyed, o møge tøøk kì pëthee." 
1John1:10 Keløg wɑ okööbø kinni, bong orøg mɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wɑ, wɑng-ɑ kinni, Jwøk ɑ́gwøg yi wɑ ɑ́ ngeti pyed, o møge tøøk kì pëthee." 
1John2:1 Anɑn, wun ɑ nyigɑ, møgɑni gwëdɑ’ wun kipe kinni, o wu ócög wu pɑ røngø. De ke bɑ̈jji dhɑnhø, yïee dɑ ngɑn køny wɑ kì bøli Wïy. O ngɑnɑni bɑ Yëso Mesiy; en ɑ ngɑntir." 
1John2:1 Anɑn, wun ɑ nyigɑ, møgɑni gwëdɑ’ wun kipe kinni, o wu ócög wu pɑ røngø. De ke bɑ̈jji dhɑnhø, yïee dɑ ngɑn køny wɑ kì bøli Wïy. O ngɑnɑni bɑ Yëso Mesiy; en ɑ ngɑntir." 
1John2:2 En ɑ nyi gøøm bøli orøgee. De pɑth ki kipe orøgee kete, dɑ́ kipe orøøg kömi piny bëne." 
1John2:2 En ɑ nyi gøøm bøli orøgee. De pɑth ki kipe orøgee kete, dɑ́ kipe orøøg kömi piny bëne." 
1John2:3 Keløg cigge omïdhø yi wɑ, nyodh-ɑ kinni, Yëso ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ ceth." 
1John2:3 Keløg cigge omïdhø yi wɑ, nyodh-ɑ kinni, Yëso ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ ceth." 
1John2:4 De ngɑn-ɑ kööbø kinni, Yëso ngɑ̈nyi yi en, de cigge pɑ mïdhe, ngɑnɑni bɑ ngeti pyed, o bong dyër kì yïe." 
1John2:4 De ngɑn-ɑ kööbø kinni, Yëso ngɑ̈nyi yi en, de cigge pɑ mïdhe, ngɑnɑni bɑ ngeti pyed, o bong dyër kì yïe." 
1John2:5 Tyëng-ɑ lïngi kwøbbe bënn bɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr Jwøk kidøøj; o bene kër-ɑ óyodii yi wɑ kinni wɑ rëbø ki Jwøk. 
1John2:5 Tyëng-ɑ lïngi kwøbbe bënn bɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr Jwøk kidøøj; o bene kër-ɑ óyodii yi wɑ kinni wɑ rëbø ki Jwøk. 
1John2:6 Tyëng-ɑ kööbø kinni ge mïdh-ɑ kwøbbi Jwøk, bëëd gen ceth ki bëën-ɑ ɑ́beed yi Yëso Mesiy." 
1John2:6 Tyëng-ɑ kööbø kinni ge mïdh-ɑ kwøbbi Jwøk, bëëd gen ceth ki bëën-ɑ ɑ́beed yi Yëso Mesiy." 
1John2:7 Anɑn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ møg-ɑ mɑɑrɑ, cigg-ɑ gwëdɑ wun pɑth ki cigg mø nyɑ̈n, de ge bɑ cigg mø kɑ̈gi gen dööng, mɑ́ ge ɑ́rum ki lïngø yi wun kì tyeli mɑl." 
1John2:7 Anɑn, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ møg-ɑ mɑɑrɑ, cigg-ɑ gwëdɑ wun pɑth ki cigg mø nyɑ̈n, de ge bɑ cigg mø kɑ̈gi gen dööng, mɑ́ ge ɑ́rum ki lïngø yi wun kì tyeli mɑl." 
1John2:8 De kì tung-ɑ kyeelø, yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun ki cigg mø nyɑ̈n, o bëëdi gen gɑ dyër nën-ɑ́ɑ̀ ri Mesiy kí ri wun thyew. Mɑ́ muudhø kedh e ówɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, o cɑɑr Jwøk men-ɑ bɑ dyër ɑ́rum ki cɑ̈gø meny." 
1John2:8 De kì tung-ɑ kyeelø, yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun ki cigg mø nyɑ̈n, o bëëdi gen gɑ dyër nën-ɑ́ɑ̀ ri Mesiy kí ri wun thyew. Mɑ́ muudhø kedh e ówɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, o cɑɑr Jwøk men-ɑ bɑ dyër ɑ́rum ki cɑ̈gø meny." 
1John2:9 Ngɑn kööbø cem e ying-ɑ yij cɑrɑni, de wɑɑd gen mɑɑn yi en, ngɑnɑni nudd e ying-ɑ yij muudhø." 
1John2:9 Ngɑn kööbø cem e ying-ɑ yij cɑrɑni, de wɑɑd gen mɑɑn yi en, ngɑnɑni nudd e ying-ɑ yij muudhø." 
1John2:10 Ngɑn mɑɑr wɑɑd gen, bëëd ɑ yij cɑrɑni, o tyele koo cwɑnye kì yij cɑr." 
1John2:10 Ngɑn mɑɑr wɑɑd gen, bëëd ɑ yij cɑrɑni, o tyele koo cwɑnye kì yij cɑr." 
1John2:11 De ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑn wɑɑd gen, bëëd ɑ yij muudhø, o cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ yij muudhø; o yuu-ɑ kedhe kwïje, mɑ́ e ɑ́gwøg ɑ́ cwør yi muudhø." 
1John2:11 De ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑn wɑɑd gen, bëëd ɑ yij muudhø, o cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ yij muudhø; o yuu-ɑ kedhe kwïje, mɑ́ e ɑ́gwøg ɑ́ cwør yi muudhø." 
1John2:12 Yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun ki wɑ̈nyø men, wun ɑ nyigɑ, kipe kinni o wu óngɑ̈nyu wøw kinni, Jwøk lɑɑwe ɑ́dwööge piny kipe orøøg wun kì ri nyingi Yëso Mesiy." 
1John2:12 Yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun ki wɑ̈nyø men, wun ɑ nyigɑ, kipe kinni o wu óngɑ̈nyu wøw kinni, Jwøk lɑɑwe ɑ́dwööge piny kipe orøøg wun kì ri nyingi Yëso Mesiy." 
1John2:13 O wun ɑ wëëg, yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun thyew, mɑ́ e bɑ wun ɑ ngɑ̈nyi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e nud kì ri cɑ̈gi piny gïti ɑnɑn. O wun ɑ yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb, yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun, mɑ́ Ngɑnrɑj ɑ́tyɑm yi wun." 
1John2:13 O wun ɑ wëëg, yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun thyew, mɑ́ e bɑ wun ɑ ngɑ̈nyi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e nud kì ri cɑ̈gi piny gïti ɑnɑn. O wun ɑ yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb, yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun, mɑ́ Ngɑnrɑj ɑ́tyɑm yi wun." 
1John2:14 Yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun, wun ɑ yɑnythønhø, mɑ́ Wïy ngɑ̈nyi yi wun. Yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun, wun ɑ wëëg, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wöni e nud kì ri cɑ̈gø cøn, ngɑ̈nyi yi wun. Yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun, wun ɑ yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb, mɑ́ wu teg, o kwøbbi Jwøk obëëdø kì pëthi wun, o Ngɑnrɑj ɑ́tyɑm yi wun." 
1John2:14 Yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun, wun ɑ yɑnythønhø, mɑ́ Wïy ngɑ̈nyi yi wun. Yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun, wun ɑ wëëg, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wöni e nud kì ri cɑ̈gø cøn, ngɑ̈nyi yi wun. Yɑ gwëd-ɑ wun, wun ɑ yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb, mɑ́ wu teg, o kwøbbi Jwøk obëëdø kì pëthi wun, o Ngɑnrɑj ɑ́tyɑm yi wun." 
1John2:15 Kömi piny wɑlɑ̀ jɑmm-ɑ yije ko mɑɑr wun, mɑ́ keløg jɑmmi kömi piny omɑɑrø yi dhɑnhø, mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi Wïy tøøk kì pyëwe." 
1John2:15 Kömi piny wɑlɑ̀ jɑmm-ɑ yije ko mɑɑr wun, mɑ́ keløg jɑmmi kömi piny omɑɑrø yi dhɑnhø, mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi Wïy tøøk kì pyëwe." 
1John2:16 Jɑmmi kömi piny bënn, ɑ løg jɑmm-ɑ tyer yi pyëw orøg, gen ɑ jɑmm-ɑ nenni yi ji; ɑ tyer yi pëthi gen, kí jɑmmi kömi piny bënn, møg-ɑ per gen nyi thwøøg yi dhɑnhø; ge pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Wïy, de ge nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kömi piny." 
1John2:16 Jɑmmi kömi piny bënn, ɑ løg jɑmm-ɑ tyer yi pyëw orøg, gen ɑ jɑmm-ɑ nenni yi ji; ɑ tyer yi pëthi gen, kí jɑmmi kömi piny bënn, møg-ɑ per gen nyi thwøøg yi dhɑnhø; ge pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Wïy, de ge nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kömi piny." 
1John2:17 Piny men ówɑ̈ɑ̈ny geki okøn pëëth kipe jɑmm-ɑ ying yije, de ngɑn-ɑ nyi gwøg gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk, óbëëdø gïti ɑtheer." 
1John2:17 Piny men ówɑ̈ɑ̈ny geki okøn pëëth kipe jɑmm-ɑ ying yije, de ngɑn-ɑ nyi gwøg gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk, óbëëdø gïti ɑtheer." 
1John2:18 Nyigɑ, thumi piny ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, o ni kɑ ɑ́lïng wun kinni, ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø mi Mesiy obëënø; o tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn Mesiy mø gïïr ɑ́cwöb ɑnɑn, bene ɑ yod wɑ en kinni, thumi piny ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
1John2:18 Nyigɑ, thumi piny ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, o ni kɑ ɑ́lïng wun kinni, ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø mi Mesiy obëënø; o tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn Mesiy mø gïïr ɑ́cwöb ɑnɑn, bene ɑ yod wɑ en kinni, thumi piny ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
1John2:19 Tyëngɑni ɑ́cwöb kì kellee, de ge pɑth ki wɑddee këti. Mɑ́ keløg ge di bëëd gɑ wɑddee, ge di bëëd kì kellee, de kɑ ɑ́kedhi gen wɑ̈g, menɑni nyodh-ɑ kinni, ge pɑth ki wɑddee këti." 
1John2:19 Tyëngɑni ɑ́cwöb kì kellee, de ge pɑth ki wɑddee këti. Mɑ́ keløg ge di bëëd gɑ wɑddee, ge di bëëd kì kellee, de kɑ ɑ́kedhi gen wɑ̈g, menɑni nyodh-ɑ kinni, ge pɑth ki wɑddee këti." 
1John2:20 De wu ɑ́rum ki yodi Wëykwërø, ɑ́køny kömi wun yi Mesiy, bene ɑ bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny dyër, wu bënn." 
1John2:20 De wu ɑ́rum ki yodi Wëykwërø, ɑ́køny kömi wun yi Mesiy, bene ɑ bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny dyër, wu bënn." 
1John2:21 Wu pɑ gwëdi yi yɑn kɑ per kinni dyër kwïj yi wun, dɑ́ kipe kɑ̀ bëëde e ngɑ̈nyi yi wun; o ngɑ̈nyi yi wun thyew kinni bong pyed me nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri dyër." 
1John2:21 Wu pɑ gwëdi yi yɑn kɑ per kinni dyër kwïj yi wun, dɑ́ kipe kɑ̀ bëëde e ngɑ̈nyi yi wun; o ngɑ̈nyi yi wun thyew kinni bong pyed me nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri dyër." 
1John2:22 De ngɑn-ɑ nyi pëmø kinni, Yëso pɑth ki Mesiy, bɑ ngeti pyed, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ nyi pyem Wïy geki Wɑ̈d, mɑ̈n ki Mesiy, o bɑ ngɑn tyëddii." 
1John2:22 De ngɑn-ɑ nyi pëmø kinni, Yëso pɑth ki Mesiy, bɑ ngeti pyed, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ nyi pyem Wïy geki Wɑ̈d, mɑ̈n ki Mesiy, o bɑ ngɑn tyëddii." 
1John2:23 Mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ bɑny Wɑ̈d, bɑny-ɑ Wïy thyew. Tyëng-ɑ yïëy Wɑ̈d, Wïy nud kì yï gen thyew." 
1John2:23 Mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ bɑny Wɑ̈d, bɑny-ɑ Wïy thyew. Tyëng-ɑ yïëy Wɑ̈d, Wïy nud kì yï gen thyew." 
1John2:24 Wiy møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wun kì ri Wɑ̈d kì tyeli mɑl bëëd gen kì pëthi wun, mɑ́ ke mɑ̈gi wun kì ri møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wun cøn, wu ceg-ɑ mɑ̈gø thyew kì ri Wɑ̈d kí Wïy." 
1John2:24 Wiy møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wun kì ri Wɑ̈d kì tyeli mɑl bëëd gen kì pëthi wun, mɑ́ ke mɑ̈gi wun kì ri møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wun cøn, wu ceg-ɑ mɑ̈gø thyew kì ri Wɑ̈d kí Wïy." 
1John2:25 Mɑ́ møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi Yëso gɑ møg-ɑ óyod yi wɑ ceth, ge bɑ nënn-ɑ ɑtheer." 
1John2:25 Mɑ́ møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi Yëso gɑ møg-ɑ óyod yi wɑ ceth, ge bɑ nënn-ɑ ɑtheer." 
1John2:26 Wu gwëdi yi yɑn kɑ per kinni o ri wun kor yi wun ki tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi wun wënyø. 
1John2:26 Wu gwëdi yi yɑn kɑ per kinni o ri wun kor yi wun ki tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi wun wënyø. 
1John2:27 De keløg ɑ́ per wun, Wëykwërø ɑ́rum ki køny kömi wun yi Mesiy. O kɑ̀ bëëd Wëykwërø kì kömi wun, bong ngɑn dwɑddi yi wun ɑ́ ngɑn pwönyi wun. Mɑ́ wu ópwönyi yi Wëye, o møg-ɑ pwönye bɑ dyër, pɑth ki pyed. Lïngu møg-ɑ pwönyi yi Wëy, kɑ wu bëëd wun wu mɑ̈gø kì ri Mesiy." 
1John2:27 De keløg ɑ́ per wun, Wëykwërø ɑ́rum ki køny kömi wun yi Mesiy. O kɑ̀ bëëd Wëykwërø kì kömi wun, bong ngɑn dwɑddi yi wun ɑ́ ngɑn pwönyi wun. Mɑ́ wu ópwönyi yi Wëye, o møg-ɑ pwönye bɑ dyër, pɑth ki pyed. Lïngu møg-ɑ pwönyi yi Wëy, kɑ wu bëëd wun wu mɑ̈gø kì ri Mesiy." 
1John2:28 Ngee, wun ɑ nyigɑ, mɑ̈gi wun kì ree, o wɑ óbëëd wɑ pëthee teeg keny-ɑ ócwöbe, o wɑ̈thee ócög ge pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈y kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ódwööge." 
1John2:28 Ngee, wun ɑ nyigɑ, mɑ̈gi wun kì ree, o wɑ óbëëd wɑ pëthee teeg keny-ɑ ócwöbe, o wɑ̈thee ócög ge pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈y kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ódwööge." 
1John2:29 Keløg wu ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, Wɑ̈d Jwøk bɑ ngɑntir kì bøli Jwøk, bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny wøw thyew kinni, tyëng-ɑ nyi ngøy bëëde, kɑ ge obëëdø ge tir ni en, ge bɑ nyigi Jwøk ceth." 
1John2:29 Keløg wu ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, Wɑ̈d Jwøk bɑ ngɑntir kì bøli Jwøk, bëëd wu ngɑ̈ny wøw thyew kinni, tyëng-ɑ nyi ngøy bëëde, kɑ ge obëëdø ge tir ni en, ge bɑ nyigi Jwøk ceth." 
1John3:1 Jwøk, mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee ɑ́nyudhe wɑ ki mendwøng kipe kɑ̀ cwølli wɑ, wɑ bɑ nyigi Jwøk; o wɑ bɑ nyige kidyër ceth. De gïn-ɑ pere bëëd wɑ kwïj yi tyëng kömi piny, bɑ kɑ̀ kwïj gen Jwøk." 
1John3:1 Jwøk, mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee ɑ́nyudhe wɑ ki mendwøng kipe kɑ̀ cwølli wɑ, wɑ bɑ nyigi Jwøk; o wɑ bɑ nyige kidyër ceth. De gïn-ɑ pere bëëd wɑ kwïj yi tyëng kömi piny, bɑ kɑ̀ kwïj gen Jwøk." 
1John3:2 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wɑ bɑ nyigi Jwøk ɑnɑn, de bëëdø men-ɑ óbeed yi wɑ dhuki megø nuti nyudhi wɑ yi en. De ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ kinni, kì bøli keny-ɑ ódwöög Yëso kömi piny, wɑ óbëëdø ni en ceth, mɑ́ e ólidh yi wɑ ɑ́ Wɑ̈d Jwøk ceth." 
1John3:2 Wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, wɑ bɑ nyigi Jwøk ɑnɑn, de bëëdø men-ɑ óbeed yi wɑ dhuki megø nuti nyudhi wɑ yi en. De ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ kinni, kì bøli keny-ɑ ódwöög Yëso kömi piny, wɑ óbëëdø ni en ceth, mɑ́ e ólidh yi wɑ ɑ́ Wɑ̈d Jwøk ceth." 
1John3:3 De ngɑn-ɑ nyi ngɑ̈dhi dwönge, ree nyii tyenyø yi en. Mɑ́ e ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, Wɑ̈d Jwøk kelli gen pɑ cyɑ̈gi ki gïgrijjø." 
1John3:3 De ngɑn-ɑ nyi ngɑ̈dhi dwönge, ree nyii tyenyø yi en. Mɑ́ e ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, Wɑ̈d Jwøk kelli gen pɑ cyɑ̈gi ki gïgrijjø."
