2John1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïɑ, yɑ Jɑldwøng. Yɑ gwëd-ɑ Dhɑnhdwøng geki nyige, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn. Pɑth ki yɑ ketɑ ɑ mɑɑr wun, de wu mɑɑr yi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr dyër bënn," 
2John1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïɑ, yɑ Jɑldwøng. Yɑ gwëd-ɑ Dhɑnhdwøng geki nyige, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn. Pɑth ki yɑ ketɑ ɑ mɑɑr wun, de wu mɑɑr yi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr dyër bënn," 
2John1:2 mɑ́ dyër ɑ́mɑ̈gi kì riee, o ócög e obëëdø kì riee gïti ɑtheer." 
2John1:2 mɑ́ dyër ɑ́mɑ̈gi kì riee, o ócög e obëëdø kì riee gïti ɑtheer." 
2John1:3 Wɑ óthödhi ki dhwɑ̈ng, kí lɑ̈mpyëw, kí mër yi Jwøk Wïy geki Yëso Mesiy, Wɑ̈d Wïy, wiy ge ócög gen gɑ møgee kì yij dyër geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø." 
2John1:3 Wɑ óthödhi ki dhwɑ̈ng, kí lɑ̈mpyëw, kí mër yi Jwøk Wïy geki Yëso Mesiy, Wɑ̈d Wïy, wiy ge ócög gen gɑ møgee kì yij dyër geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø." 
2John1:4 Pyëwɑ ɑ́mïni ki mendwøng, kɑ ɑ́lïngɑ kinni kwï nyigí bëëd ɑ ri dyër, ni kɑ ɑ́ceg wɑ yi Wïy." 
2John1:4 Pyëwɑ ɑ́mïni ki mendwøng, kɑ ɑ́lïngɑ kinni kwï nyigí bëëd ɑ ri dyër, ni kɑ ɑ́ceg wɑ yi Wïy." 
2John1:5 De yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Dhɑnhdwøng, kinni mɑɑr wɑ riee. Bɑ møgɑni ɑ cïgɑ yïn ɑnɑn, o bɑ ciggɑni ɑ ɑ́mïdhi yi wɑ ceth kì ri cɑ̈gø cøn." 
2John1:5 De yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Dhɑnhdwøng, kinni mɑɑr wɑ riee. Bɑ møgɑni ɑ cïgɑ yïn ɑnɑn, o bɑ ciggɑni ɑ ɑ́mïdhi yi wɑ ceth kì ri cɑ̈gø cøn." 
2John1:6 Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ wɑngɑ bɑ kinni, bëëd wɑ, wɑ mïdh-ɑ ciggi Jwøk. Cigg-ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki lïngø yi wun bënn kì ri cɑ̈gø cøn bɑ kinni, bëëd wun bënn, wu mɑɑr-ɑ ri wun." 
2John1:6 Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ wɑngɑ bɑ kinni, bëëd wɑ, wɑ mïdh-ɑ ciggi Jwøk. Cigg-ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki lïngø yi wun bënn kì ri cɑ̈gø cøn bɑ kinni, bëëd wun bënn, wu mɑɑr-ɑ ri wun." 
2John1:7 Tyëngwëënyø mø gïïr ɑ́tɑɑy kömi piny bëne; tyëngɑni bɑ møg-ɑ nuti yïëyø kinni Yëso ɑ́bï ɑ́ dhɑnhø. Ngɑn ni menɑni bɑ wëny, o bɑ ngɑn mɑ̈n ki Mesiy." 
2John1:7 Tyëngwëënyø mø gïïr ɑ́tɑɑy kömi piny bëne; tyëngɑni bɑ møg-ɑ nuti yïëyø kinni Yëso ɑ́bï ɑ́ dhɑnhø. Ngɑn ni menɑni bɑ wëny, o bɑ ngɑn mɑ̈n ki Mesiy." 
2John1:8 Nyi korru ri wun kipe kinni, o gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́göög yi wun cöge e pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, dɑ́ kipe kinni o köögi mi wun óyod yi wun." 
2John1:8 Nyi korru ri wun kipe kinni, o gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́göög yi wun cöge e pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, dɑ́ kipe kinni o köögi mi wun óyod yi wun." 
2John1:9 Ngɑn pɑ mïdhi kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi yi Mesiy, Jwøk pɑ yod yi en." 
2John1:9 Ngɑn pɑ mïdhi kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi yi Mesiy, Jwøk pɑ yod yi en." 
2John1:10 Ngɑn bï yï wun e pɑ kɑ̈ll-ɑ pwönyø menɑni, ko cwøøl wun kɑ̈lli wun; ko wöl ki köbbø kinni, “Yï óbëëdø ki mër.”" 
2John1:10 Ngɑn bï yï wun e pɑ kɑ̈ll-ɑ pwönyø menɑni, ko cwøøl wun kɑ̈lli wun; ko wöl ki köbbø kinni, “Yï óbëëdø ki mër.”" 
2John1:11 Mɑ́ ngɑn mɑ̈dh gen, køny-ɑ gen ki gwøng rɑj men-ɑ gwøg yi gen." 
2John1:11 Mɑ́ ngɑn mɑ̈dh gen, køny-ɑ gen ki gwøng rɑj men-ɑ gwøg yi gen." 
2John1:12 Yïɑ dɑ kwøb mø gïïr, mø dwɑddɑ köbbi wun, o yɑ pɑ dwɑddi gweedi gen yij wɑ̈nyø; de yɑ tyer-ɑ këëmi wun, o wɑ kööb wɑ, wɑ nenn-ɑ nyingee, o pëthee mïni gen ki mendwøng." 
2John1:12 Yïɑ dɑ kwøb mø gïïr, mø dwɑddɑ köbbi wun, o yɑ pɑ dwɑddi gweedi gen yij wɑ̈nyø; de yɑ tyer-ɑ këëmi wun, o wɑ kööb wɑ, wɑ nenn-ɑ nyingee, o pëthee mïni gen ki mendwøng." 
2John1:13 Wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi nyigi nyimyëw, møg-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk." 
2John1:13 Wu ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi nyigi nyimyëw, møg-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk." 
3John1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïɑ, yɑ Jɑldwøng. Yɑ gwëd-ɑ Gɑyøs, jɑl-ɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn ki mendwøng." 
3John1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïɑ, yɑ Jɑldwøng. Yɑ gwëd-ɑ Gɑyøs, jɑl-ɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn ki mendwøng." 
3John1:2 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøk kiperí, wɑɑd wøn; kinni o yï bëëd pyëwí omedø, o dëlí yööd – ni kɑ̀ ngɑ̈nyɑ en kinni wëyí bëëd-ɑ tɑrø." 
3John1:2 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøk kiperí, wɑɑd wøn; kinni o yï bëëd pyëwí omedø, o dëlí yööd – ni kɑ̀ ngɑ̈nyɑ en kinni wëyí bëëd-ɑ tɑrø." 
3John1:3 Pyëwɑ ɑ́mïni ki mendwøng kɑ ɑ́bëën nyiimïee, kɑ perí kwøb yi gen kinni, i yï mïdh-ɑ dyër, o yï bëëdø yï gøgg-ɑ dyër." 
3John1:3 Pyëwɑ ɑ́mïni ki mendwøng kɑ ɑ́bëën nyiimïee, kɑ perí kwøb yi gen kinni, i yï mïdh-ɑ dyër, o yï bëëdø yï gøgg-ɑ dyër." 
3John1:4 Bong medi pyëw me lod men-ɑ yïɑ kɑ̀ lïngɑ kinni, i nyigɑ bëëdø ge mïdh-ɑ dyër." 
3John1:4 Bong medi pyëw me lod men-ɑ yïɑ kɑ̀ lïngɑ kinni, i nyigɑ bëëdø ge mïdh-ɑ dyër." 
3John1:5 Gwøgí døøj wɑɑd wøn, mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy ɑ́køny yi yïn, yï ködd-ɑ kömi yïëyø, cɑgg ge bɑ tyëngpɑth." 
3John1:5 Gwøgí døøj wɑɑd wøn, mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yïëy ɑ́køny yi yïn, yï ködd-ɑ kömi yïëyø, cɑgg ge bɑ tyëngpɑth." 
3John1:6 O yï ɑ́pwøj yi gen, kipe kɑ̀ mɑɑr tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ bënn. Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, køny gen ceth, o weel gen tyëg yi gen, ki yuu-ɑ døøj kì bøli Jwøk." 
3John1:6 O yï ɑ́pwøj yi gen, kipe kɑ̀ mɑɑr tyëng kɑnïsɑ̀ bënn. Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, køny gen ceth, o weel gen tyëg yi gen, ki yuu-ɑ døøj kì bøli Jwøk." 
3John1:7 Mɑ́ ge ɑ́kedhi be wel kɑ per nyingi Mesiy, o ge nuti wöl kɑ̈bbø ki gïïpiny kì yï tyëng-ɑ nuti yïëyø." 
3John1:7 Mɑ́ ge ɑ́kedhi be wel kɑ per nyingi Mesiy, o ge nuti wöl kɑ̈bbø ki gïïpiny kì yï tyëng-ɑ nuti yïëyø." 
3John1:8 Jiɑni ceg kɑ kønyø yi wɑ ceth, wɑ køny-ɑ gen ki gwøg kipe dyër." 
3John1:8 Jiɑni ceg kɑ kønyø yi wɑ ceth, wɑ køny-ɑ gen ki gwøg kipe dyër." 
3John1:9 Kɑnïsɑ̀ ɑ́rum ki gwëdø yi yɑn ki wɑ̈nyø megø, de Dyøtrepes, jɑl-ɑ dwɑddi gwøg ɑ́ jɑngi gen, pɑ dwɑddi lïngø ki kwøbbee." 
3John1:9 Kɑnïsɑ̀ ɑ́rum ki gwëdø yi yɑn ki wɑ̈nyø megø, de Dyøtrepes, jɑl-ɑ dwɑddi gwøg ɑ́ jɑngi gen, pɑ dwɑddi lïngø ki kwøbbee." 
3John1:10 Keny-ɑ óbëënɑ, gïgrijjø møg-ɑ kømme kì riee, kí kwøbbi pyed møg-ɑ kømme, ge óköbbɑ wun. De pɑth ki møgɑni keti gen; wɑdde, jii Mesiy pɑ nyi yïëy yi en, kɑ tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi kunyø nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈ne kønyi gen, kɑ gï nyi dwɑdde cyeed wɑ̈g kì kɑnïsɑ̀." 
3John1:10 Keny-ɑ óbëënɑ, gïgrijjø møg-ɑ kømme kì riee, kí kwøbbi pyed møg-ɑ kømme, ge óköbbɑ wun. De pɑth ki møgɑni keti gen; wɑdde, jii Mesiy pɑ nyi yïëy yi en, kɑ tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi kunyø nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈ne kønyi gen, kɑ gï nyi dwɑdde cyeed wɑ̈g kì kɑnïsɑ̀." 
3John1:11 Wɑɑd wøn, yï ko nyi ngöyi ki gwøg ki gïgrijjø, ngøy gwøgi gïgdøj. Ngɑn gøggi gïgdøj bɑ ngeti Jwøk; o ngɑn gøggi gïgrijjø, Jwøk nuti liidh en." 
3John1:11 Wɑɑd wøn, yï ko nyi ngöyi ki gwøg ki gïgrijjø, ngøy gwøgi gïgdøj. Ngɑn gøggi gïgdøj bɑ ngeti Jwøk; o ngɑn gøggi gïgrijjø, Jwøk nuti liidh en." 
3John1:12 Dimitriyøs ceg kɑ pøjjø yi ji bënn; o ceg kɑ pøjjø yi dyër kiree. O opøjjø yi wøn thyew, o ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni pwøjji wøn bɑ dyër." 
3John1:12 Dimitriyøs ceg kɑ pøjjø yi ji bënn; o ceg kɑ pøjjø yi dyër kiree. O opøjjø yi wøn thyew, o ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni pwøjji wøn bɑ dyër." 
3John1:13 Yïɑ dɑ kwøb mø gïïr mø dwɑddɑ köbbi yïn, de yɑ pɑ dwɑddi gweedi gen yij wɑ̈nyø." 
3John1:13 Yïɑ dɑ kwøb mø gïïr mø dwɑddɑ köbbi yïn, de yɑ pɑ dwɑddi gweedi gen yij wɑ̈nyø." 
3John1:14 Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ bëën be këëmi wun kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh; o møgɑni kømmi yi wɑ, wɑ nenn-ɑ nyingee." 
3John1:14 Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ bëën be këëmi wun kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh; o møgɑni kømmi yi wɑ, wɑ nenn-ɑ nyingee." 
3John1:15 Yï óbëëdø ki mër. Yï ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi mɑ̈dhhí bënn. Mɑ̈dh wɑddee bënn; nyi mɑ̈dh ngɑn ki nyinge. 
3John1:15 Yï óbëëdø ki mër. Yï ɑ́mɑ̈dh yi mɑ̈dhhí bënn. Mɑ̈dh wɑddee bënn; nyi mɑ̈dh ngɑn ki nyinge. 
Jude1:1 Bene yɑn Yeudɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Yëso Mesiy, o yɑ bɑ ómï Yɑgob. Yɑ gwëd-ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cwøl yi Jwøk; gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yij mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi Wïyee Jwøk, ge kor-ɑ yi Yëso Mesiy." 
Jude1:2 Wiy Jwøk pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈me ki wun, o wu thödhe ki mër geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mø bong cögi gen." 
Jude1:3 Riɑ ɑ́ceg yi yɑn kɑ pɑ̈nyø ceth, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, ki gwëdi wun ki wɑ̈nyø kipe kwøbbi yielø men-ɑ nywɑg yi wɑ bënn. Pyëwɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ cïji wun, o wu nyïɑ̈ggi wun kipe yïëyi wun, kí per jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Jwøk gï mëgge’ jie." 
Jude1:4 Mɑ́ e dɑ ji møøgø, mø pɑ wør Jwøk mɑ ɑ́bï kellee ge kwïj yi wɑ. Jiɑni wööni dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk ɑ́wil yi gen, o kyëëwe ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi gen, o Wë Yëso Mesiy, ngɑn-ɑ cinge di wɑ bɑ ɑbɑny yi gen. Tyëngɑni cɑ́yi gen rumø ki gweed piny kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Jude1:5 Cɑgg møgɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi wun, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ pɑ̈ddi wun ki kër-ɑ ɑ́yieel tyëng Isrɑil yi Wë kì cinggi tyëng Rïp; de tyëng-ɑ ɑ́pëëm kì kelli gen ɑ́nɑ̈ge." 
Jude1:6 Nyi pɑrri wun wëywödd-ɑ ɑ́bëëd pëthi gen pɑ med ki lɑ̈ni mø gen, kɑ kɑ̈jji gen wiy yi gen; ge bɑ ɑmɑg ki ɑ́cwecwel, kì yij muudhø kì thɑ piny; kunɑni ɑ mïdhi gen yi Jwøk, ge yïd-ɑ cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óliidh kwøbbi gen." 
Jude1:7 Pɑrri wun Sødømɑ̀ kí Gømørɑ̀, kí myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki gen, ki kër-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑy gen ki mɑc, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́pëggi gen be orøg, ge gøgg-ɑ gïgrijjø. Ge ɑ́cɑy kinøw kɑ per kinni o tyëng-ɑ kyeelø bwøg gen." 
Jude1:8 Jiɑni nyi ceg-ɑ lɑ̈g, kɑ ge nyi göjji orøg ki dëlli gen yi lɑ̈ggɑni; jyɑ̈gø mi Jwøk pɑ wør yi gen, kɑ wëy-ɑ jyɑ̈gø kì mɑl nyi tir ki gwɑddø yi gen." 
Jude1:9 Cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ Mikɑil, jɑngi wëywödd, nuti göögø ki gïn ni menɑni. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wër Mikɑil geki Ngɑnrɑj kì kömi dëël Mosɑ̀, Mikɑil Ngɑnrɑj nuti pɑ̈ny en ki yɑnyø, de gø ɑ́köbbe’ kinni, “Yï ócɑ̈wwi yi Jwøk!”" 
Jude1:10 De tyëngɑni, gïg-ɑ tyelli gen kwïj yi gen nyi ceg kɑ gwɑddø yi gen; o men-ɑ́ gïg-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi gen nɑ møg-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l; o bɑ gïgɑni ɑ nyi kɑ̈ni kömi gen ki thøø." 
Jude1:11  
Jude1:12 Ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ɑyɑ̈r yij tɑɑw wun; mɑ́ ge tyer-ɑ pɑ̈ngi yethi gen ki jɑmm-ɑ tyer yi pëthi gen. Ge korr-ɑ ri gen keti gen. Ge nɑ pøøl mø wøjji yi yømø, de ge pɑ kɑ̈ni ki kødh. Ge nɑ yenh mø pɑ nyi nywøl, cɑgg piny bɑ cwir; gen ɑ yenh-ɑ óputhø ki byerri gen, o ge rum thøø." 
Jude1:13 Ge nɑ ɑpɑgø kì nɑɑm omelø, o gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi gen nɑ óbööy dhøg ɑpɑngɑni. Ge nɑ kyell mø wɑ̈dhi cyɑ̈dhø, møg-ɑ ówïyø yi Jwøk ki kej gen kì yij muudhø." 
Jude1:14 Enök, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi piny kì ri bïryeew rïjj kì bɑng Adɑm, per tyëngɑni ɑ́kwøb yi en kinni, “Wë óbï e olwøngø yi wëywödde mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp mø ngenyø." 
Jude1:15 Bï-ɑ be løøgi kwøbbi dhɑnhø bëne, o tyëngrijjø cɑye kipe gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen kì bøli Jwøk, kí gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi gen kì ree.”" 
Jude1:16 Teenɑni nyi ceg-ɑ køør ge cɑyy-ɑ tyëng-ɑ kyeelø; ge yɑb-ɑ gïgrijjø møg-ɑ tyer yi pëthi gen; ge lejj-ɑ ri gen, o ge thɑbb-ɑ ji ki dhøng yöm kipe gïg-ɑ yɑb yi gen." 
Jude1:17 De nyi pɑrri wun møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun cøn yi jøwööni Wë Yëso Mesiy. 
Jude1:18 Wu ɑ́köbbi yi gen kinni, “Keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny, ódi ji møg-ɑ ócwöb, gɑ møg-ɑ ógwɑddi wun; ge óbëëd gɑ ji mø pɑ wør Jwøk, o ge tyer-ɑ gøggi gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi pëthi gen.”" 
Jude1:19 Bene tyëngɑni ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l dɑ̈ɑ̈ngi ji ri gen, mɑ́ ge nyi cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng jɑmmi kömi piny, o ri gen bong Wëy." 
Jude1:20 De wun ɑ nyiimïɑ, nyi dømu ri wun ki yïëy-ɑ́ ree ɑ́kwëër wun. Nyi kwɑ̈jji wun ki tegi Wëykwërø." 
Jude1:21 Mïdhu ri wun kì ri mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk; wu yïd-ɑ bøli keny-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw Wë Yëso Mesiy ki wun, kɑ wu thödhe ki nënn-ɑ ɑtheer." 
Jude1:22 Nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m pëthi wun ki tyëng-ɑ yethi gen pyëër; 
Jude1:23 kɑ kwï ji møøgø kì kelli gen nyi yiel wun, ge gwɑ̈ɑ̈ru’ wɑ̈g kì yij mɑc. De nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m pëthi wun ki ji møøgø, e yethi wun óböggø, de mɑɑn wun rɑjji gen, kí men-ɑ́ ógudh-ɑ ywëëdh dëlli gen." 
Jude1:24 Lenhu ngɑn-ɑ ko wëggi wun pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, o wu ókïdhe bøli mɑ̈r ki medi pyëw e bong gïn gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì ri wun." 
Jude1:25 Lenhu Yïënee, ɑ bɑ Jwøk kete, kì ri Wë Yëso Mesiy; eni ngɑn-ɑ yïe di mɑ̈r, kí döng, kí tegø, kí jyɑ̈gø møg-ɑ ɑ́wöni weenø, kí ɑnɑn e gït-ɑ ɑtheer! Amen." 
Revelation1:1 Kwøb møg, bɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́cïb cingi Yëso Mesiy yi Jwøk, o bɑ̈ngge nyudhe gïg-ɑ ójwɑn cwöbø, ɑöre wëywöne kinni o møgɑni nyudhe Jøn," 
Revelation1:2 møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi Jøn gï ɑ́kwøbe bënn. Menɑni bene wöön-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk, kí dyër men-ɑ ɑ́nyodh yi Yëso Mesiy." 
Revelation1:3 Ngɑn rɑng wɑ̈nyø men kì bøli teedø ree ódi gyëdh, o tyëng-ɑ ólïngi møg-ɑ töng kì yij wɑ̈nyø men, kɑ møg-ɑ ógwedø kì yije mïdhi yi gen, ri gen dɑ gyëdh." 
Revelation1:4 Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïɑ yɑ Jøn, yɑ gwëd-ɑ ɑkuddi kɑnïsɑ̀ gɑ ɑ́bïryew kì modïri Ásiyɑ̀. Wu óthödhi ki dhwɑ̈ng geki mër yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e nud cøn, o nud ɑnɑn, o bɑ en ɑ óbï, geki wëy ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ cungi kì bøli kwøme," 
Revelation1:5 kí Yëso Mesiy, cwɑ̈ng-ɑ dyër, o bene ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki tugø kì yij thøø, ɑ jɑɑg rɑ̈nhi kömi piny. Wɑ mɑɑr yi en, kɑ wɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈de wɑ̈g kì yethi töjji orøg ki thøwe." 
Revelation1:6 Kɑ wɑ gwøge wɑ bɑ pödhi ókwër møg göggi Wïye Jwøk; o bɑ en ɑ lejji; o en ɑ yïe di tegø ɑnɑn gïti ɑtheer! Amen. 
Revelation1:7 En ɑ bï ɑnɑn e kɑ̈ll-ɑ wɑ̈thi pøøl! Ólidh yi dhɑnhø bëne; o ólidh thyew yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cwøbii ki tøng. Kɑ ywøg yi ji bënn kì kömi piny. Møgɑni óbï kinøw ceth. Amen. 
Revelation1:8 Kɑ Wë Jwøk Áyïmø okööbø kinni, “Yɑn ɑ mɑl, o yɑn ɑ cyɑ̈n.” En ɑ nud ɑnɑn, en ɑ ɑ́bëëd e nud cøn, o bɑ en ɑ óbï." 
Revelation1:9 Yɑ bɑ Jøn, ómï wun, o kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ bɑ ngeti Yëso, wɑ ngïïn ɑ kyeel ki orɑng-ɑ nyi bï kömi tyëng Pödhe. Yɑ ɑ́cïb yij muji Pɑtmøs kɑ per kɑ ɑ́pwönyɑ kwøbbi Jwøk geki dyër men-ɑ ɑ́nyodh yi Yëso." 
Revelation1:10 Kɑ Wëy bï-ɑ kömɑ kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë, kɑ yɑ olïngø ki cwɑg mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l ngɑ̈jɑ, ge nɑ ywøøg kɑng." 
Revelation1:11 Kɑ cwɑggɑni okööbø kinni, “Gweed gïg-ɑ nenni yi yïn yij wɑ̈nyø, ke ge ör yï ɑkuddi kɑnïsɑ̀ møg-ɑ kɑ̈ddi: Epɑsos, Semirnɑ̀, Pergɑmum, Theyɑtirɑ̀, Sɑrdïs, Pilɑdelpiyɑ̀ kí Lɑwdikiyɑ̀.”" 
Revelation1:12 Kɑ riɑ wirɑ, o yɑ lidhɑ ngɑn-ɑ kööbø ki yɑn, kɑ yɑ lidh-ɑ teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ ɑ́bïryew mø bɑ dhɑb," 
Revelation1:13 o dïdyëri gen dɑ gïjø me ni dhɑnhø, me rugø ki ɑ́ywödh me wɑ̈dhi ri tyelle piny, kí wëni dhɑb me ween en ɑ́ngɑne," 
Revelation1:14 o yëyyi wïje tɑr ge nɑ yëyyi dyel wɑlɑ̀ ge nɑ ɑ́piy, o bøle ce lyel ɑ́ mɑc," 
Revelation1:15 tyelle ceg-ɑ orɑ̈ng ni ngyënyø dilɑl men-ɑ ólenyø kidøøj kɑ yoj, o cwɑgge lïngi ge nɑ luuli pïg rïngi piny kì wïj kït." 
Revelation1:16 Cingi kyëje dɑ kyell ɑ́bïryew, o dhøge dɑ pilø me bɑ̈lle ryeet bedh, o bøle rɑ̈nggø nɑ cɑ̈ng kenyi yeere." 
Revelation1:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ en, kɑ yɑ ceg-ɑ pɑ̈dhi dhøggi tyelle yɑ nɑ ngɑnthøø. Kɑ yɑ nywɑle ki cingi kyëje, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yï ko böggi! Yɑn ɑ mɑl, o yɑn ɑ cyɑ̈n." 
Revelation1:18 Yɑn ɑ nëënø! Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ thøø, de yɑ ónëënø ceth gïti ɑtheer. Yïɑ dɑ tegø kì kömi thøø, geki pödhi tyëngthøø." 
Revelation1:19 Gwed gïg-ɑ nenni yi yïn cyee; gen ɑ gïg-ɑ nud ɑnɑn, kí møg-ɑ ócwöb." 
Revelation1:20 Gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi kyell ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ cingi kyëjɑ, geki teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ bɑ kinni: kyell ɑ́bïryew bɑ wëywödd mø ɑkuddi kɑnïsɑ̀ gɑ ɑ́bïryew, o teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ bɑ ɑkuddi kɑnïsɑ̀ møgɑni." 
Revelation2:1 “Gwëdí wëywöni kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Epɑsos kinni, “Bene møg-ɑ kømmi ek, yi ngɑn-ɑ mïdhi kyell ɑ́bïryew kì cingi kyëje, ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì kelli teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈:" 
Revelation2:2 Gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn ngɑ̈nyɑ; ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni yï ɑ́göög ki gwøng teg, kɑ yï ongïnø. Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni yï pɑ nyi yïëy ki bëëdi tyëngrijjø, kɑ tyëng-ɑ pëëdø ce ge bɑ tyëngwöödø rɑng yi yïn, kɑ yod yi yïn ceth kinni ge ceg-ɑ pyed." 
Revelation2:3 Yï ngɑ̈ny ngïïnø; yï ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi kipe nyingɑ, o yï nuti pïdø." 
Revelation2:4 De gïn-ɑ bɑny yi yɑn kì yïí bɑ kinni: yɑ pɑ mɑɑr yi yïn ɑnɑn, ni kɑ ɑ́mɑɑr yɑn kì tyeli mɑl." 
Revelation2:5 Yod kër-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh yi yïn, kɑ yï yewí, kɑ yï døøg be gwøg ni mi tyeli mɑl. Keløg yï pɑ yewi, yɑ óbï yïí kɑ tengi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ mií kwɑnyɑ kì keje." 
Revelation2:6 De bɑ gïjø me døj kì yïɑ kɑ̀ mɑɑn gwøøg jø Nikølɑ̀ ni kɑ̀ mɑɑnɑ gen. 
Revelation2:7 “Ngɑn yïe di yïthhe, lïnge møg-ɑ köbbi ɑkuddi kɑnïsɑ̀ yi Wëy! “Ngɑn-ɑ ótyɑ̈mø ówëggɑ cɑm ki nywøli yɑɑdh Nënnì, kì yij Bɑɑg Jwøk." 
Revelation2:8 “Kɑ wëywöni kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Semirnɑ̀ gwëdí kinni, “Møg-ɑ kømmi ek, yi ngɑn-ɑ mɑl kí cyɑ̈n, eni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thøw kɑ cig-ɑ dwöög be nënnø:" 
Revelation2:9 Akørrí ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn; ngɑ̈nyi yɑn kinni yï jɑdø, de yïí dɑ kɑ̈r! Gïgrijjø møg-ɑ kømmi kì rií yi tyëng-ɑ kööbø ce ge bɑ Yeud, ngö ge pɑth ki Yeud, ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, ge bɑ ɑkuud Cethɑn." 
Revelation2:10 Yï ko böggi yi orɑng men-ɑ nudd e ying-ɑ bølí. Mɑ́ wu órɑng yi Ngɑnrɑj kɑ kwï wun leenge ød mɑg, kɑ wu orɑngø ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈rø. Mïdhí yïëyí pïd thøø, o yï ónëngɑ ki nënnì, gɑ pwøj kipe kɑ ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈m." 
Revelation2:11 “Ngɑn yïe di yïthhe, lïnge møg-ɑ köbbi ɑkuddi kɑnïsɑ̀ yi Wëy! “Tyëng-ɑ ótyɑ̈mø, pɑ wöl ki nyïɑ̈ɑ̈gø yi ryeew thøø kinni tek." 
Revelation2:12 “Kɑ wëywöni kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Pergɑmum gwëdí kinni, “Bene møg-ɑ kømmi ek, yi ngɑn-ɑ yïe di pil-ɑ bɑ̈lle ryeet bedh:" 
Revelation2:13 Keny-ɑ bëëd yi yïn ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, Cethɑn kwøme cïb en kenyɑni. Yɑ nudd yɑ yïëëy yïn ceth, yï nuti døøg cyɑ̈n; cɑgg ɑ́ kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g Antipɑs, jɑl-ɑ yïëyø ki mendwøng kì keny-ɑ bëëd yi Cethɑn." 
Revelation2:14 De dɑ gïg mø nøg mø per gen cɑyɑ yïn: dɑ kwï ji kì kelli wun møg mïdhi pwönyi Bɑlɑɑm, ɑ ɑ́pwönyi Bɑlɑk ki peeji tyëng Isrɑil be orøg; kɑ ɑ́kölle gïn cɑm ki gëdhh-ɑ ngɑ̈lli ngïjji jwögg, o ge niin gen ki tyëng-ɑ nuti nywøøm gen ri gen." 
Revelation2:15 O yïí dɑ kwï ji mø mïdhi pwönyi jø Nikølɑ̀. 
Revelation2:16 Yewí ki orøgí! Keløg yï pɑ yewi, yɑ óbï yïí, kɑ yɑ ónyïɑ̈ggø ki jiɑni ki pil-ɑ dhøgɑ." 
Revelation2:17 “Ngɑn yïe di yïthhe, lïnge møg-ɑ köbbi ɑkuddi kɑnïsɑ̀ yi Wëy! “Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈m, ge óthödhɑ kì ri mɑnɑ̀ men-ɑ bɑ ɑkɑn. Ge óthödhɑ bënn thyew ki ópɑ̈nni kït mø tɑr; ngɑn ki mee, e köme ógwëdø ki nying mø pɑ yod yi ngɑn megø; dɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ mëggii kete ɑ óngɑ̈nyi nyingɑni." 
Revelation2:18 “Kɑ wëywöni kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Theyɑtirɑ̀ gwëdí kinni: “Men bene wöön-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Wɑ̈d Jwøk, eni ngɑn-ɑ nyinge lyel ni mɑc, ɑ tyelle rɑ̈nggø ni dilɑl me thøø yi yojø." 
Revelation2:19 Gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yïn ngɑ̈nyɑ. Mɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈d yi yïn ngɑ̈nyɑ, kí mïnh-ɑ mïdhí yïëyø, kí gwøng døj men-ɑ gwøg yi yïn, kí ngïn-ɑ ngiin yi yïn. Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni yï ceg-ɑ gwøg ɑnɑn ki gwøng teg me lod gwøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn cøn." 
Revelation2:20 De dɑ gïn pere cɑyɑ yïn: yïde ɑ ngiin kwøbbi Yidhɑbel, ngɑn-ɑ cwølli ree ɑ́ ngetitöng; kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑlli yɑn nyi wënye, kɑ gï nyi kölle cɑm ki gëdhh-ɑ ngɑ̈lli ngïjjì jwögg, o ge niin gen ki tyëng-ɑ nuti nywøøm gen ri gen." 
Revelation2:21 Ánëngɑ ki keny yewe ki orøge, de ɑ́dhɑ̈li wïyø ki gøggi rɑj." 
Revelation2:22 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, ngɑnɑni óleengɑ yij pyën men-ɑ órɑnge ki menrɑj geki teen-ɑ ɑ́niinii bënn. Møgɑni gwøgɑ’ gwøgø keløg ge pɑ wïyi ki gøggi rɑj geki ngɑnɑni." 
Revelation2:23 O tyëng-ɑ lugi kì bɑnge ónɑ̈g yi yɑn, codhe o yod yi ɑkuddi kɑnïsɑ̀ kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ kyeelø bënn, kinni bɑ yɑn ɑ ngɑ̈ny rummi ji bënn, kí gïg-ɑ tyer yi gen. Dhɑnhø kì kelli wun ócuddɑ ki köögi me kyëëw ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøge" 
Revelation2:24 “De mø ngenyø kì kelli wun, kì Theyɑtirɑ̀ ge nuti yïëyø ki kwøbb-ɑ pwönyi yi ngɑnɑni; wu nuti dïdø ki gïn-ɑ cwølli yi jiɑni ɑ́ kwøbb-ɑ ɑkɑnn-ɑ døngø mø Cethɑn." 
Revelation2:25 De mïdhu møg-ɑ yï wun ɑnɑn, pïd keny-ɑ óbëënɑ." 
Revelation2:26 Mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ ótyɑ̈mø, kɑ ge ocögø ge gögg-ɑ yɑn, gïti ri thumi piny, ge ónëngɑ ki tegø men-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi yɑn kì yï Wïyɑ: ge ónëngɑ ki tegø kì kömi pödhh, o gï jɑɑg gen cinggi gen dɑ lødh mø bɑ ngyënyø dødø, o gï mød gen ni puggi lɑ̈bø. Ge ónëngɑ thyew ki kyeli ru wøw." 
Revelation2:27  
Revelation2:28  
Revelation2:29 “Ngɑn yïe di yïthhe, lïnge møg-ɑ köbbi ɑkuddi kɑnïsɑ̀ yi Wëy!”" 
Revelation3:1 “Kɑ wëywöni kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Sɑrdïs gwëdí kinni: “Bene møg-ɑ kømmi ek, yi ngɑn-ɑ yïe di wëyi Jwøk gɑ ɑ́bïryew kí kyell ɑ́bïryew: Gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yïn ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn; ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni yï kømmi i yï onëënø, ngö yï rum thøø!" 
Revelation3:2 Cyëëw, kɑ rií nyɑɑg, o yï tëngí, kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti pïïd yïn yi thøø. Mɑ́ gïg-ɑ gøggí pɑ nënni ge tir kì yï Jwøgɑ." 
Revelation3:3 Nyi pɑrrí møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi yïn, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi yïn; mïdhí møgɑni kɑ yï wïyí ki orøg. Keløg yï pɑ cyëëw, yɑ óbï yïí ni kur, o bøli keny-ɑ óbëënɑ koo yod yi yïn." 
Revelation3:4 De dɑ ji mø nøg kì kelli wun kì Sɑrdïs, mɑ ɑ́mïdhi ógudhi gen ge tɑr. Yï ócyɑ̈dhi ki yɑn yï rug-ɑ ógønh tɑr, mɑ́ yï døøj ki rugii." 
Revelation3:5 Tyëng-ɑ ótyɑ̈mø órug-ɑ ógudh mø tɑr, o nyingi gen pɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈jɑ wɑ̈g kì yij wɑ̈nyi nënnì. Yɑ ókööbø kì bøli Wïyɑ geki wëywödde, kinni jiɑni bɑ møgɑ." 
Revelation3:6 “Ngɑn yïe di yïthhe, lïnge møg-ɑ köbbi ɑkuddi kɑnïsɑ̀ yi Wëy!" 
Revelation3:7 “Kɑ wëywöni kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Pilɑdelpiyɑ̀ gwëdí kinni: “Bene møg-ɑ kømmi ek, yi ngɑn-ɑ bɑ kwërø, o bɑ dyër: Muptɑɑ̀ men-ɑ bɑ mi Debïd nud kì yïe, o kɑ̀ yiebe thïgø, bong ngɑn cuggi cyëgii; o kɑ̀ cyëge gøn bong ngɑn cuggi yiebii." 
Revelation3:8 Gwøgí ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn; o ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni yïí dɑ tegø me thiinh; pwönyɑ ɑ́mïdhi yi yïn, o yɑ nuti bɑɑny yïn. Yï ɑ́yïëbbɑ thïgø, me bong ngɑn cuggi cyëgii." 
Revelation3:9 Tyëng-ɑ yij ɑkuud Cethɑn, ɑ pëëdø ce ge bɑ Yeud, ngö ge pɑth ki Yeud, ge ówëggɑ bëën yïí kɑ ri gen bøødh gen bølí. O óyod yi gen bënn kinni yï mɑɑr yi yɑn." 
Revelation3:10 Yï ókor yi yɑn ki ɑkørr-ɑ óbï kömi piny, gen ɑ ɑkørr-ɑ órɑɑng dhɑnhø bëne, mɑ́ kwøbbɑ ɑ́mïdhi yi yïn kidøøj, kɑ yï ongïnø." 
Revelation3:11 Yɑ ójwɑn bëënø. Korrí gïg-ɑ yïí, o bongii ngɑn kɑb köögi men-ɑ mëggi yïn kipe kɑ ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈m." 
Revelation3:12 Tyëng-ɑ tyɑ̈mø ógwøg yi yɑn gɑ löjj kì yij kengi Jwøgɑ, o ge koo kedh kì yije. Nyingi Jwøgɑ, kí nyingi kɑɑl Jwøgɑ, ɑ bɑ Yerusɑlem men-ɑ nyɑ̈n ógweedɑ kömi gen. Nyingɑ men-ɑ nyɑ̈n ógweedɑ kömi gen thyew." 
Revelation3:13 “Ngɑn yïe di yïthhe, lïnge møg-ɑ köbbi ɑkuddi kɑnïsɑ̀ yi Wëy!" 
Revelation3:14 “Kɑ wëywöni kɑnïsɑ̀ kì Lɑwdikiyɑ̀ gwëdí kinni: “Bene møg-ɑ kømmi ek, yi Amen, ngɑn-ɑ nyi kømmi dhøg ɑ́kyel, ɑ nyi kwøb dyër, ɑ ree kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi jɑmmì bënn:" 
Revelation3:15 Gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn; yï ngɑ̈nyɑ kinni yï pɑ lïb, o yï pɑ lëëdh. Yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o yï di bëëd yï lïb wɑlɑ̀ yï lëëdh!" 
Revelation3:16 Mɑ́ yï ceg bëëdø yï mør; yï pɑ lëëdh, o yï pɑ lïb; yï ngoolɑ’ piny kì dhøgɑ!" 
Revelation3:17 Yï okööbø kinni, ‘Yɑ kɑ̈rø, bong gïn jɑ̈ddi yɑn.’ De kwïj yi yïn kinni yijí bɑɑrø, o wɑngí ocɑnø! Yï bɑ ɑbuur; yï cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, o yï bɑ cwør." 
Revelation3:18 Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn ki møg døj kinni, ngëëw ki dhɑm dhïw kì yïɑ, o yï kɑ̈rí. Kɑ yï ngëëw thyew ki ógønh tɑr men kum rií, o yï wïyi ki cyɑ̈dhi nøw, o ɑyɑ̈r bëe wɑ̈g kì kömí. Ngëëw thyew ki yɑdh men kïdhí nyingí, o yï nëën." 
Revelation3:19 Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn nyii cɑ̈wwø yi yɑn kɑ ge nyi cɑyɑ. Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, gwir rummí kɑ yï wïyí ki orøg." 
Revelation3:20 Yɑn ɑ cwöddi èn kì dhø ød. Ngɑn lïngi cwɑggɑ kɑ ød yiebe, yɑ kedh-ɑ ød kɑ yɑ onywɑ̈gø ki gïncɑm ki gen, o ge ólunyi nywɑ̈g ki yɑn." 
Revelation3:21 Tyëng-ɑ ótyɑ̈mø, ge ówëggɑ bëëdø kì butɑ kì wïj kwømɑ, ni yɑn ɑ ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈m, ɑbëëdɑ ɑnɑn kì buti Wïyɑ kì wïj kwøme." 
Revelation3:22 “Ngɑn yïe di yïthhe, lïnge møg-ɑ köbbi ɑkuddi kɑnïsɑ̀ yi Wëy!”" 
Revelation4:1 Kɑ yɑ cigi cɑ̈rrø ki møøgø; yɑ ɑ́lidh-ɑ thïgø me bɑ ɑyieb kì mɑl. Kɑ yɑ olïngø ki cwɑg mø ni ywøøg kɑng, kɑ yɑ köbbi yi cwɑggɑni kinni, “Bïí mɑl keny, o yï nyudhɑ gïn-ɑ ócwöb.”" 
Revelation4:2 Kɑ yɑ gwɑɑr mɑl yi Wëy, kì bøli kenyɑni ceth. Mɑl kunɑni dɑ kwøm kí ngɑn me bëëdø kì wïje." 
Revelation4:3 De ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì kenyɑni ree dɑ cɑr me tɑr cɑrø, kí megø me kwɑrø geki ówɑw. Kwømɑni bɑ ɑwen yi órøngø me ni kïdi ting-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ dhɑmröd." 
Revelation4:4 Bɑdhhi kwømɑni dɑ kwømm pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngwen; wɑ̈thi kwømmɑni dɑ jøgdøngø pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngwen, mø rug ógudh mø tɑr, o wɑ̈thi gen dɑ yɑ̈rri dhɑb." 
Revelation4:5 Kɑ ogwel kí pööd mɑl kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri kwømɑni, e bøle olyelø yi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ ɑ́bïryew, gen ɑ wëyi Jwøk gɑ ɑ́bïryew." 
Revelation4:6 Bøli kwømɑni dɑ nɑm me di pïg kwïlø. Kwømɑni wɑ̈thi tùnge gɑ ɑ́ngwen dɑ gïg mø nëënø gɑ ɑ́ngwen mø ri gen pɑ̈ng yi nying kì bøli gen kí ngɑ̈thi gen. 
Revelation4:7 Men-ɑ mɑl nënni e nɑ ngur, o ryeew gen nɑ wɑdh, o dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen bøle nɑ bøli dhɑnhø, o ngween gen nɑ cor me pɑ̈rri." 
Revelation4:8 Lɑ̈yyɑni bënn, yï gen dɑ obërr; ɑ́kyel yïe dɑ obërr ɑ́bïkyel. Ri obërrɑni ótɑɑgø ki nying kì kömi gen geki yethi gen. Ge nyi lɑng-ɑ wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng ge owörø kinni, “Kwërø, kwërø, kwërø, bene Jwøk Wïlɑ̈bø, en ɑ ɑ́bëëd e nud, en ɑ nud ɑnɑn, o bɑ en ɑ óbï.”" 
Revelation4:9 Gïg nëënø møgɑni gɑ ɑ́ngwen, ge ceg-ɑ wör ge lejj-ɑ ngɑn-ɑ wïj kwøm, ge lenh-ɑ en, o ge pøjj-ɑ en; en ɑ ngɑn-ɑ óbëëdø gïti ɑtheer." 
Revelation4:10 Kɑ jøgdøngɑni gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngwen, ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bøli ngɑn-ɑ wïj kwøm, en ɑ ngɑn-ɑ óbëëdø gïti ɑtheer; kɑ yɑ̈rri wɑ̈thi gen leeng gen bøli kwøm, ɑkööb gen kinni:" 
Revelation4:11 “Yïn ɑ Wïi wøn, Jwøøg wøn! Yï døøj ki lenhø, o yï døøj ki wørø thyew. Mɑ́ yïn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j jɑmmì bënn; kɑ ge obëëdø ge onëënø ceth ni kɑ̀ dwɑddí.”" 
Revelation5:1 Kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki wɑ̈ny-ɑ nyi bɑn men-ɑ ógwedø kì yije kí köme, kì cingi kyëëj ngɑn-ɑ wïj kwøm; wɑ̈nyɑni ódijø ki kitimmi ónyɑɑm dij ɑ́bïryew." 
Revelation5:2 Kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki wëywödø me teg, kɑ wëywönɑni okööbø ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Á men ɑ døøj ki yiebi wɑ̈nyø, o ónyɑɑm-ɑ ódijii tore?”" 
Revelation5:3 De ɑ́bong-ɑ dhɑnhø kì mɑl, wɑlɑ̀ kì kömi piny, wɑlɑ̀ kì thɑ́ piny, mɑ ɑ́cuggi yiebi wɑ̈nyɑni, o di lidhe møg-ɑ yije." 
Revelation5:4 Kɑ yɑ óywöngø ki mendwøng, kipe kɑ̀ bongii ngɑn mɑ ɑ́yod e døøj ki yiebi wɑ̈nyɑni." 
Revelation5:5 Aköbbi yɑn yi ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøgdøngø kinni, “Yï ko ywöngi. Ngur men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l gøl Yeudɑ̀, kwɑɑr Debïd ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈m, o ócuggø tori ónyɑɑm dij, o wɑ̈nyø óyieb yi en.”" 
Revelation5:6 Codhe, ɑlïdhɑ ki Órömø me cungi kì bøli kwøm ɑ́ ɑwen yi gïg nëënø gɑ ɑ́ngwen geki jøgdøngø. Órömɑni ɑ́nënni e nɑ ɑngɑl. Yïe dɑ nying ɑ́bïryew, kí tùng ɑ́bïryew, gen ɑ wëyi Jwøk gɑ ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ ɑ́ör kömi piny bëne." 
Revelation5:7 Kɑ Órömø kedh-ɑ yï ngɑn-ɑ wïj kwøm, kɑ wɑ̈nyø kwɑnye kì cingi kyëëj ngɑn-ɑ wïj kwøm." 
Revelation5:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kwɑnye wɑ̈nyø, kɑ gïg nëënø gɑ ɑ́ngwen ri gen bøødh gen piny geki jøgdøngø gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngwen. Cinggi gen bënn dɑ thøm kí óthɑ̈ggi dhɑb mø pɑ̈ng yi bɑkur; ngɑn cinge dɑ thom ki óthɑ̈gi; gïgɑni bɑ mɑlli tyëng kwërø." 
Revelation5:9 Kɑ ge owörø ki wörø me nyɑ̈n kinni, “Wuö, yïn ɑ døøj ki yiebi wɑ̈nyø, o ónyɑɑm-ɑ ódijii tor yi yïn. Mɑ́ yï ɑ́ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø, kɑ Jwøk ngëwwí ki remí ki ji kì ri jurrì bënn, kí wɑ̈thi dhøg bënn, kì yethi pödhh bënn, kí wïj dhɑnhø bëne." 
Revelation5:10 Kɑ ge gwøg yi yïn gɑ pödhi ókwër, møg göggi Jwøgee o ge ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø kì kömi piny.”" 
Revelation5:11 Acigɑ lïdhø, kɑ yɑ olïngø ki cwɑggi wëywödd mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp mø ngenyø; kwøm kí gïg nëënø gɑ ɑ́ngwen, kí jøgdøngø gï wen gen dïdyër." 
Revelation5:12 O ge owörø ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Óröm-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g bɑ en ɑ døøj ki mëggi jyɑ̈gø, kí kɑ̈r, kí peli wïj, kí tegø, en ɑ døøj ki wørø, kí lejjø, kí lenhø!”" 
Revelation5:13 Kɑ gïg-ɑ mɑl, kí møg-ɑ piny, kí møg-ɑ thɑ piny, ki møg-ɑ nɑɑm omelø – men-ɑ́ gïg-ɑ yij lɑ̈bø bënn – lïngɑ ge owörø kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì wïj kwøm geki Órömø bɑ gen ɑ lenhi, gen ɑ wør; gen ɑ yï gen di mɑ̈r kí tegø, gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Revelation5:14 Kɑ gïg nëënø gɑ ɑ́ngwen okööbø kinni, “Amen!” Kɑ jøgdøngø ri gen bøødh gen piny ge ómɑ̈ddø." 
Revelation6:1 Kɑ Órömø lidhɑ e tor-ɑ ónyɑɑm dij men-ɑ mɑl kì ri ɑ́bïryewɑni, kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli gïg nëënø gɑ ɑ́ngwen, cwɑgge lïngɑ e okööbø kinni, “Bïí!”" 
Revelation6:2 Kɑ wïjɑ tïngɑ, ɑlïdhɑ ki kyeny mɑ nyibøng. Ngɑn-ɑ kömi kyenyɑni cinge dɑ weth, kɑ nëngi ki yɑ̈r. Kɑ ókedhø e nënni ɑ́ ngɑn me rum tyɑ̈mø, me kedhi be tyɑ̈mø." 
Revelation6:3 Codhe, ɑtoor ryeew ónyɑɑm dij yi Órömø, kɑ ryeew gïg nëënø okööbø kinni, “Bïí!”" 
Revelation6:4 Kɑ kyeny mɑ didïgø bï-ɑ wɑ̈g. Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ köme nëngi ki tegø me kɑ̈ɑ̈le mër wɑ̈g kì kömi piny, o ji nyïɑ̈ggi gen ki ri gen, kɑ nëngi ki pilø me dwøng." 
Revelation6:5 Atoor dɑ̈ɑ̈g ónyɑɑm dij yi Óromø, kɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈g gïg nëënø lïngɑ e okööbø kinni, “Bïí!” Atïngɑ wïjɑ, kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki kyeny mɑ ditɑ̈ng. Ngɑn-ɑ köme cinge dɑ midhɑn." 
Revelation6:6 Kɑ cwɑg mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l kelli gïg nëënø gɑ ɑ́ngwen lïngɑ e okööbø kinni, “Gemè me nøg ɑ bɑ köögi mi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, o rummì ɑ́dɑ̈g mø ceir bɑ köögi mi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel. De dhetun geki bɑ̈ggi oløg ko rënyí.”" 
Revelation6:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́toor ngween ónyɑɑm dij yi Órömø, ɑlïngɑ ngween gïg nëënø e okööbø kinni, “Bïí!”" 
Revelation6:8 Atïngɑ wïjɑ, kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki kyeny mɑ dithwöl. O ngɑn-ɑ köme cwøl ɑ́ Thøø, o Pödhi Thøø cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑnge. Kɑ jii budø ɑ́kyel kì kelli buddi piny gɑ ɑ́ngwen cïb cinggi gen, o gï nɑ̈g gen ki pilø, kí kɑ̈j, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì geki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l." 
Revelation6:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́toor bïïj ónyɑɑm dij yi Órömø, ɑlidhɑ wëyi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kipe yïëyi gen ki kwøbbi Jwøk, kì thɑ këli lɑm." 
Revelation6:10 Kɑ wëyɑni óryeerø ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Wuö, yï teg o yï dwøng, o yï bɑ kwërø! Yï pïd-ɑ wɑɑng e tyëng kömi piny pɑ cɑy yi yïn, kipe kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g wøn yi gen?”" 
Revelation6:11 Kɑ ge thödhi ki ógudh mø tɑr bënn. Kɑ ge köbbi kinni, i ywöm gen ri gen, ki nyɑ keny me thiinh, gïti keny-ɑ óthumi kwɑnni bɑ̈ngg-ɑ wɑddi gen kí nyiimï gen møg ónɑ̈g ni gen." 
Revelation6:12 Kɑ Órömø lidhɑ e tor-ɑ bïkyeel ónyɑɑm dij, kɑ piny onhɑ̈nhø ki mendwøng, kɑ cɑ̈ng ólunyø ni ógønh lojø, kɑ dwɑ̈y ogöögø e nɑ remø." 
Revelation6:13 kɑ kyell odyëmø ni nywøli ólɑm kenyi nïngi gen yi ɑtunø. 
Revelation6:14 Kɑ mɑl ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø ni kenyi bɑɑn wɑ̈nyø, kɑ kïttì geki muj bënn ónyegø kì kɑ̈jji gen." 
Revelation6:15 Kɑ rɑ̈nhi piny, kí jɑgge, kí pëjji liny, kí tyëngkɑ̈rì, kí tyëngteg, kí ji-ɑ kyeelø bënn; bɑ̈ngg kí ji-ɑ bëëd wɑ̈thi gen, reng-ɑ be pɑ̈nø kì kelli kïttì." 
Revelation6:16 Kɑ kïttɑni köbbi gen kinni, “Pɑ̈dhu kömi wøn, kɑ wø kum wun piny, o wø cög wø pɑ nenni yi ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì wïj kwøm, kí Órömø ɑ pyëwe keej." 
Revelation6:17 Mɑ́ cyɑ̈ng-ɑ rënyi pëthi gen ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, ɑ́ men ɑ cuggi cung kì keje?”" 
Revelation7:1 Codhe, ɑlïdhɑ ki wëywödd ɑ́ngwen ge ócungø kì wɑ̈thi tùngi piny gɑ ɑ́ngwen, ge mïdh-ɑ yømø kì wɑ̈thi tùngɑni, o bongii yømø me köddi kömi piny, wɑlɑ̀ nɑɑm omelø, wɑlɑ̀ kömi yenh." 
Revelation7:2 Kɑ wëywödø megø lidhɑ e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, e ókɑ̈ddø ki kitim dij mi Jwøng-ɑ nëënø, kɑ ócwöddø ki cwɑg mø døngø, e cwøll-ɑ wëywödd ɑ́ngwen mø tyeli mɑl, møg-ɑ ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøk ki tegø men rënyi gen piny geki nɑ̈mmì." 
Revelation7:3 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Piny, kí nɑ̈mmì, kí yenh, ge ko rënyi wun, kɑ̈ng-ɑ nudd wø dïjj-ɑ bøli jii Jwøgee ki ngïjjì ki kitim dij.”" 
Revelation7:4 Kɑ yɑ olïngø i kwɑnni tyëng-ɑ́ bøli gen ɑ́dïjji ki ngïjjì bɑ ɑ́lïp miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ngwen, ge bɑ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil bënn." 
Revelation7:5 Kɑl ɑ́kyel yije kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yi ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew; o kɑ̈llɑni bɑ gøl: Yeudɑ̀, Ruben, Gɑd, Aceer, Nɑptɑlì, Mɑnɑsè, Cimeøn, Leebì, Isɑkɑr, Dhebulun, Yosep, kí Ben Yɑmïn." 
Revelation7:6  
Revelation7:7  
Revelation7:8  
Revelation7:9 Codhe, ɑtïngɑ wïjɑ kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki teedø mø ngenyø, mø pɑ cuggi kwɑnø, ge bɑ wɑ̈thi pödhh bënn, kí jurrì bënn, kí wïj dhɑnhø bëne, men 'kööb-ɑ dhøge! Ge cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ bøli kwøm kì bøli Órömø, ge rug-ɑ ógudh mø tɑr, o cinggi gen dɑ ówɑwwi benø mø mɑr." 
Revelation7:10 Kɑ ge óryeerø ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Tyɑ̈mø muuj-ɑ yi Jwøgee ngɑn-ɑ wïj kwøm geki Órömø!”" 
Revelation7:11 Kɑ wëywödd bënn ócungø kì bɑdhhi kwøm geki jøgdøngø, kí gïg nëënø gɑ ɑ́ngwen. Codhe, kɑ ri gen bødh gen, wɑ̈thi gen këël gen piny, kɑ Jwøk mɑl gen," 
Revelation7:12 ge okööbø kinni, “Amen! Lejø geki döng; peli wïj geki pwøj; kí wuödø geki tegø, ge bɑ mø Jwøgee gïti ɑtheer! Amen!”" 
Revelation7:13 Kɑ yɑ pyëj yi ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøgdøngø kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ rugø ki ógudh-ɑ tɑr bɑ møg, o ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kun?”" 
Revelation7:14 Alöggɑ kinni, “Wuö, kun-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen kwïj yi yɑn, dɑ́ yïn ɑ ngɑ̈nyii.” Kɑ ólöggø kinni, “Ge bɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bodh kì bɑng guun-ɑ ɑ́guud nyingi ji ki mendwøng. Ógudhi gen ɑ́lwøg gen, kɑ gï gwøg gen ge tɑr ki remi Órömø." 
Revelation7:15 Bene ɑ bɑnge cungi gen kì bøli kwøm, ge gögg-ɑ Jwøk kì yij Kenge, kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng. Ge ókorri yi ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì wïj kwøm." 
Revelation7:16 Ge pɑ cigi mɑgø yi kɑ̈j wɑlɑ̀ röödhø; o ge pɑ rɑ̈b yi cɑ̈ng wɑlɑ̀ lëdhi piny," 
Revelation7:17 mɑ́ ge kwɑy-ɑ yi Órömø, ngɑn-ɑ dïdyëri kwøm, kɑ gï nyi køøle kömi nyingi pïi nënnì. O pï ópoj yi Jwøk kì nyingi gen.”" 
Revelation8:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́toor bïryeew ónyɑɑm dij yi Órömø, kɑ mɑl ceg-ɑ kudø, kɑ tyëg-ɑ gïn ni budi sɑɑ̀ e okudø." 
Revelation8:2 Alidhɑ wëywödd ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ cungi kì bøli Jwøk, kɑ ge nëngi ki kɑ̈ngì; men ki kɑnge." 
Revelation8:3 Kɑ wëywödø megø obëënø, e ókɑ̈ddø ki ópɑni bɑkur me bɑ dhɑb, ɑcunge kì bøli këli lɑm, kɑ thödhi ki bɑkur me gïïr, men muuje kyeel kí kwɑ̈jji tyëng kwërø, kì wïj këli lɑm, men-ɑ bɑ dhɑb, ɑ cungi kì bøli Jwøk." 
Revelation8:4 Kɑ yïri bɑkurɑni ceg-ɑ ì twɑ̈ɑ̈g kì cingi wëywödø, kɑ kedh-ɑ mɑl bøli Jwøk, kyeel ki kwɑ̈jji tyëng kwërø." 
Revelation8:5 Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny ópɑni bɑkur menɑni yi wëywödø, kɑ gø pɑ̈nge ki lelli mɑc mɑ ɑ́kwɑnye kì wïj këli lɑm, ɑleenge gøn piny. Kɑ ɑgwɑg otugø kì piny, kɑ mɑl opödø e ceg-ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dø, kɑ piny onhɑ̈nhø." 
Revelation8:6 Kɑ wëywödd ɑ́bïryew, møg-ɑ cinggi gen di kɑ̈ngì ɑ́bïryew, ri gen tim gen." 
Revelation8:7 Kɑ wëywön-ɑ mɑl kɑnge kodhe, kɑ ɑ́piy kí mɑc kí remø ceg-ɑ ì buk kì piny, kɑ ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g buddi piny órɑ̈bbø, kí ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g yenh kí lum-ɑ mɑr bëne." 
Revelation8:8 Kɑ ryeew wëywödd kɑnge kodhe, kɑ gïjø me ni kït me dwøng me lyel ɑ́ mɑc, pɑ̈dh-ɑ nɑɑm omelø. Kɑ ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g buddi nɑɑm omelø ree løge remø," 
Revelation8:9 kɑ ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g buddi gïg-ɑ nëënø kì nɑɑm omelø othøø, kɑ ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g buddi sɑpïnnì ótørrø." 
Revelation8:10 Codhe, kɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈g wëywödd kɑnge kodhe. Kɑ kyelø me dwøng me lyel ɑ́ mɑc ódëëmø kì mɑl, kɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g buddi nɑ̈mm-ɑ rïngi geki nyingi pï." 
Revelation8:11 Kɑ pï ókënyø, kɑ ji mø gïïr nɑ̈g yi pïgɑni, mɑ́ ge keej." 
Revelation8:12 Kɑ ngween wëywödd kɑnge kodhe, kɑ ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g buddi cɑ̈ng, kí dwɑ̈y, kí kyell göjji muudhø, kɑ ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g buddi cɑɑr gen ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø. Kɑ bong-ɑ cɑr kì ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g buddi wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng." 
Revelation8:13 Kɑ wïjɑ tïngɑ, ɑlïdhɑ ki cor me pɑ̈rri kì mɑl, e óryeerø ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Ryɑ̈g! Ryɑ̈g! Ryɑ̈g me dwøng pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi tyëng-ɑ kömi piny, keny-ɑ ókoodh kɑ̈ngì yi wëywödd ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ ɑ́döng ge nuti kodh!”" 
Revelation9:1 Kɑ bïïj wëywödd kɑnge kodhe. Kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki kyelø me dëëm piny, kɑ mëggi muptɑɑ̀ mi ölø" 
Revelation9:2 Kɑ dhø ölɑni yiebe, kɑ yïrø me ni yïri mɑc me dwøng bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kenyɑni. Kɑ cɑ̈ng ólunyø, kɑ piny ólunyø bëne yi yïr-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yij ölɑni." 
Revelation9:3 Kɑ bɑ̈nyø me ngenyø bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yij yïrɑni, kɑ wïj piny cyëge, kɑ nëngi ki tegø me ni teng-ɑ yï ïïdh." 
Revelation9:4 Kɑ bɑ̈nyø köbbi kinni, lum kí yenh, kí gïg mɑr ko nywɑl gen; de töngi gen ri tyëng-ɑ bøli gen nuti dïjjø ki ngïji Jwøk." 
Revelation9:5 Bɑ̈nyø nuti wëggi nɑ̈gi tyëngɑni, de ɑ́wëgg-ɑ buudhi köthi gen ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïj, kɑ jiɑni ceg-ɑ orɑng de ge ce kɑ̈ɑ̈j-ɑ yi ïïdh." 
Revelation9:6 Kì yethi dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïj møgɑni, jiɑni thøø óyɑb yi gen, de pɑ yod yi gen; ge ódwɑddi thøø, de thøø órengi kì yï gen." 
Revelation9:7 Kɑ bɑ̈nyɑni lidhɑ e nɑ kyënyì mø kedhi be liny; wɑ̈thi gen dɑ gïg mø ni yɑ̈rri dhɑb, o bølli gen nɑ bølli ji." 
Revelation9:8 Yëyyi wɑ̈thi gen nɑ yëyyi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, o leggi gen nɑ leggi ngurrì." 
Revelation9:9 Köthi gen bɑ ɑkum ki gïjø me ni ɑ́dhedheg ngyënyø dødø, o ywøøg obërri gen nɑ ywøøg tyelli yɑ̈ɑ̈th mø ngenyø, møg rengi be liny ge pyejj-ɑ yi kyënyì." 
Revelation9:10 Yï gen dɑ yëbb mø nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈j ni yëbbi ïïdh, yëbbɑni ɑ cööb gen ji ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïj." 
Revelation9:11 Yï gen dɑ rɑ̈dh me jɑɑg gen, o rɑ̈nhɑni bene wëywön-ɑ mïdhi ölø. Nyinge cwøl ɑ́ Abɑdön kì dhøg Ibru; o cwøl ɑ́ Apølyøn (ɑ wɑngi Nɑ̈ɑ̈g) ki dhøg Yönɑn." 
Revelation9:12 Ryɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl ɑ́pöödh; o bɑnge óbëën yi ryɑ̈gg ɑ́ryew mø pëddi rɑ̈jø. 
Revelation9:13 Kɑ bïkyeel wëywödd kɑnge kodhe. Kɑ yɑ olïngø ki cwɑg mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈thi tùngi këli lɑm-ɑ bɑ dhɑb, men-ɑ cungi kì bøli Jwøk." 
Revelation9:14 Kɑ bïkyeel wëywödd köbbi yi cwɑggɑni kinni, “Gøny wëywödd ɑ́ngwen møg-ɑ bɑ ɑmɑgg kì kömi Nɑm Porɑt!”" 
Revelation9:15 Kɑ wëywöddɑni gøny; ge ɑ́mïdhi ceth gɑ møg nɑ̈g ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g kwɑnni ji kì kömi piny, kì sɑɑ̀ menɑni, kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, kì dwɑ̈yɑni, kì runɑni." 
Revelation9:16 Kɑ kwɑnni tyëng-ɑ kömi kyënyì köbbi yɑn; kwɑnni gen bɑ mïlyönn miy ɑ́ryew. 
Revelation9:17 Kɑ yɑ nyudhi kyënyì kí tyëng-ɑ kömi gen; köthi jøgɑni dɑ ɑ́dhedheg mø kwɑrø ni mɑc, kí ówɑw ni kïdi mɑl, kí óbwörø ni kibrït. Wɑ̈thi kyënyì nɑ wɑ̈thi ngurrì, o dɑ mɑc, kí yïrø, kí kïbrït mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l dhøggi gen." 
Revelation9:18 Kɑ ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g kwɑnni ji kì kömi piny, nɑ̈g yi ryɑ̈ggɑni gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g; ɑ løg mɑc, kí yïrø, kí kïbrït møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l dhøggi kyënyì." 
Revelation9:19 Tegi kyënyɑni ɑ́ying-ɑ dhøggi gen kí yëbbi gen thyew. Yëbbi gen nɑ thöllì mø di wɑ̈ɑ̈th mø nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ki ji. 
Revelation9:20 De tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng ge nuti nɑ̈gø yi ryɑ̈ggɑni, nuti wïyø ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen ki cinggi gen; ge ɑ́cög ge mɑll-ɑ wëyrijjø, kí ngïjj-ɑ ógwøgø ki dhɑb, kí ɑ́tegø, kí dilɑl, kí kïttì, kí yenh; gen gïg-ɑ pɑ nëënø, o ge pɑ lïngø wɑlɑ̀ ge pɑ cyɑ̈dhi." 
Revelation9:21 Ge nuti yewø thyew kipe ji-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen; ge nuti wïyø ki thyëdh, o ge nuti wïyø ki wɑ̈dhi ri gen ki niin, wɑlɑ̀ ge nuti wïyø ki kwɑl." 
Revelation10:1 Kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki wëywödø me teeg e bï-ɑ piny e orugø ki pøølø, o wïje dɑ órøngø, o bøle nɑ cɑ̈ng, o twel tyelle nɑ löjji mɑc ɑ́ryew." 
Revelation10:2 Ókɑ̈ddø ki wɑ̈ny-ɑ nyi bɑn me thiinh. Kɑ tyeli kyëje cïbe nɑɑm omelø, kɑ tyeli cɑɑme cïbe piny keny thwøwø." 
Revelation10:3 Aryeere ki cwɑg mø døngø ni ngɑ̈ri ngurrì, kɑ ɑtunnì ɑ́bïryew ólöggø ge ceg-ɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Revelation10:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́löggi gen ceth, kɑ riɑ timɑ kinni o yɑ di gwëdɑ, ɑlïngɑ ki cwɑg mø kööbø e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl kinni, “Kɑn møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi ɑtunnɑni gɑ ɑ́bïryew; ge ko gweed piny!”" 
Revelation10:5 Kɑ wëywön-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi yɑn e ócungø e tyelle kɑɑr en, ɑ́kyel ying-ɑ nɑɑm omelø, o ɑ́kyel ying-ɑ wɑ̈g, cinge tïnge mɑl," 
Revelation10:6 Kɑ óköngø ki nyingi ngɑn-ɑ nëënø gïti ɑtheer; ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j mɑl geki jɑmm-ɑ yije, kí piny geki jɑmm-ɑ yije. Wëywönɑni ɑ́köngi kinni, “Bong cwöngø këti!" 
Revelation10:7 De bïryeew wëywödd keny-ɑ ókodhe kɑnge, gïg-ɑ ɑ́mïdhi yi Jwøk gɑ ɑkɑnn ógwøge, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe gïn bɑ̈ngge, ɑ løg jøtöng.”" 
Revelation10:8 Kɑ yɑ köbbi këti yi cwɑgg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl kinni, “Kedh, kɑ wɑ̈ny-ɑ bɑ ɑyieb kì cingi wëywön-ɑ cungi kì kömi nɑɑm omelø geki wɑ̈ng thwøwø kwɑɑny.”" 
Revelation10:9 Akedhɑ yï wëywönɑni, kɑ nyɑ wɑ̈nyɑni cwølɑ kì yïe. Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Kwɑɑny kɑ cɑɑm; ókënyi kì yijí, de óbëëdø e med ni møøw kïc kì dhøgí.”" 
Revelation10:10 Kɑ nyɑ wɑ̈nyɑni kwɑnyɑ kì cinge, ɑkïdhɑ en dhøgɑ, kɑ ceg-ɑ gwøg e med ni møøw kïc kì dhøgɑ. De keny-ɑ ɑ́mwønyɑ en, kɑ ceg-ɑ gwøg e keej cɑrø kì yijɑ." 
Revelation10:11 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn kinni, “Cigí wööni Jwøk töngø, eni wöön-ɑ kööbø kì ri pödhh, kí jurrì, jur ki dhøge, kí rɑ̈nhì.”" 
Revelation11:1 Kɑ gïjø me ni thyɑng-ɑ nyi rum mëggi yɑn, kɑ yɑ köbbi kinni, “Dhwöödh, røm kengi Jwøk geki këli lɑm. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi mɑlli Jwøk kì kenyɑni kwɑɑn." 
Revelation11:2 De ódɑ̈r-ɑ wɑ̈g ko røm, mɑ́ e ɑ́mëgg-ɑ jurr-ɑ kyeelø, o Kɑɑl Kwër ónyøn yi gen ceth ki dwɑ̈tt pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ryew." 
Revelation11:3 Cwɑ̈ggɑ gɑ ɑ́ryew óör yi yɑn ge rug-ɑ ocwɑ̈llì, o wööni Jwøk ókɑ̈lli yi gen kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni gɑ ɑ́lïp kí miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel.”" 
Revelation11:4 Cwɑ̈ggɑni ryeet bɑ yenh dhetun ɑ́ryew, kí lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ cungi kì bøli Wïi piny." 
Revelation11:5 Ke di ngɑn dwɑddi göggi gen ki gïnrɑj, mɑc óbï wɑ̈g kì dhøggi gen kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn gen nɑ̈g gen. O ngɑn dwɑddi göggi gen ki gïnrɑj nɑ̈g kɑ yuu-ɑ ni menɑni ceth." 
Revelation11:6 Yï gen dɑ tegø men cyëëg gen mɑl, o bongii kødh me mɑ̈gi kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ótööng gen. O yï gen dɑ tegø me løg gen pï remø, o piny ócuggø göjji wïj ryɑ̈g bëne yi gen ni kɑ̀ dwɑddii yi gen." 
Revelation11:7 Keny-ɑ órum cwɑ̈ggɑni ki töng, kɑ lɑ̈y-ɑ rɑj bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yij ölø, kɑ ónyïɑ̈ggø ki gen. Gï ótyɑme kɑ gï nɑ̈ge," 
Revelation11:8 kɑ ge obuddø ge thøø kì yij yöö kì kɑɑldwøng, keny-ɑ ɑ́gur Wïi gen wïj yɑdh ɑrïw kɑ othøø. Nyingi ɑngølli kɑɑlɑni bɑ Sødømɑ̀, wɑlɑ̀ Rïp." 
Revelation11:9 Ge óbuud ge thøø kinøw ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g kí budø, o ge nenni yi tyëng pödhh bënn, kí jurrì bënn, jur ki dhøge, o ge koo wëggi konyø." 
Revelation11:10 Tyëng kömi piny pëthi gen ómïni kì bɑng thøwi jøgɑni ryeet. Ge óceg tugø kɑ ri gen nëngi gen ki jɑmmi medi pëëth, mɑ́ kömi piny ɑ́muuj ki orɑng yi jøtöngɑni ryeet." 
Revelation11:11 Kì bɑng thumi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g kí budø, kɑ yømi wëy kedh-ɑ ri gen, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, kɑ ge dhwödh-ɑ kömi tyelli gen; kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen bënn ceg-ɑ bwøgø ki mendwøng." 
Revelation11:12 Kɑ jøtöngɑni ryeet olïngø ki cwɑg mø døngø, mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl e okööbø kinni, “Bïu mɑl keny!” Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ mɑl kì yij pøølø, ge onennø yi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn gen." 
Revelation11:13 Kɑ piny okïïrø ki mendwøng kì bøli kenyɑni ceth; kɑ ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈ri buddi kɑɑl ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kɑ ji ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïryew othøø, kɑ teen-ɑ ɑ́döng obwøgø, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki lenhi Jwøøg mɑl." 
Revelation11:14 Ryeew ryɑ̈gg ɑ́pöödh, de dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ójwɑn bëënø." 
Revelation11:15 Kɑ bïryeew wëywödd kɑnge kodhe. Kɑ cwɑg mø døngø lïngi ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl ge okööbø kinni, “Teng-ɑ jɑɑg lɑ̈bø ɑnɑn, bɑ mi Wë geki Mesiy, o ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø gïti ɑtheer!”" 
Revelation11:16 Kɑ jøgdøngø gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngwen, møg-ɑ bëëdø kì bøli Jwøk kì wɑ̈thi kwømmi gen, ri gen bøødh gen piny, kɑ Jwøk mɑl yi gen," 
Revelation11:17 ge okööbø kinni, “Wuö Jwøk Áyïmø, yï nud ɑnɑn, o yï ɑ́wön ɑ weenø! Wø pwøj-ɑ yïn kipe kɑ ɑ́kwɑɑny rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kɑ yï ócɑ̈gø ki jyɑ̈gø." 
Revelation11:18 Tyëng-ɑ pɑ wør Jwøk ɑ́mɑg yi liny, mɑ́ bøli keny-ɑ mɑɑg yïn yi liny ɑ́bï; eni bøli keny-ɑ løøg kwøbbi tyëngthøø. Bøli keny-ɑ køøg bɑ̈nggí jøtöng ɑ́bï, geki jií bënn; gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wør yïn bënn, møg-ɑ døngø kí møg-ɑ thønhø. Bøli keny-ɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g tyëng-ɑ nɑ̈g piny ɑ́wɑ̈nhi!”" 
Revelation11:19 Kɑ kengi Jwøk ree yiebe, kɑ Sɑnduug Cigg ónënnø. Kɑ mɑl ogwelø kɑ opödø, kɑ piny okïïrø, kɑ ɑtuni ɑ́piy ceg-ɑ ì buk kì kömi piny." 
Revelation12:1 Kɑ gïjø me dwøng me bɑ gïïngɑ̈ngø ocwöbø kì mɑl; ngɑndhɑjø me rug cɑ̈ng, o dwɑ̈y ying-ɑ thɑ́ tyelle, o wïje dɑ yɑ̈r mɑ lwøøb kyell pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew." 
Revelation12:2 Ngɑnɑni ceg-ɑ pɑ̈dhi piny, de óywöngø yi ledhi dhø pɑ̈dhi piny." 
Revelation12:3 Kɑ gïïngɑ̈ngø megø ocwöbø kì mɑl; nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng me dwøng, me bɑ didïgø, o wɑ̈the bɑ ɑ́bïryew kí tùng pyɑ̈rø, wɑ̈thɑni dɑ yɑ̈rr bënn." 
Revelation12:4 Kɑ ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g buddi kyell ywɑɑje piny ki yëbe. Kɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng ócungø kì bøli ngɑnɑni, e yïd-ɑ bëëni dhɑnhø wɑ̈g, o gø di mwønye kì ri nywøle ceth." 
Revelation12:5 Kɑ ngɑnɑni pɑ̈dh-ɑ piny ki wɑ̈d; o bene wɑ̈nɑni ɑ ójɑɑg pödhh bënn ki lodh mɑ ngyënyø dødø kì cinge. De wɑ̈de ɑ́gwɑr yi Jwøk, kɑ kïdhi kwøøm Jwøk." 
Revelation12:6 Kɑ ngɑnɑni reng-ɑ be pɑ̈nø pɑ̈l, kì keny mɑ ɑ́rum ki pyëlø yi Jwøk, o ókɑ̈lli kì kunɑni ki cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ bɑ ɑ́lïp kí miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel." 
Revelation12:7 Kɑ liny ótuumø kì mɑl; Mikɑil geki wëywödde ge ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng geki wëywödde. 
Revelation12:8 Kɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng tyɑm, kɑ cyeddi kì mɑl geki wëywödde." 
Revelation12:9 Kɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng gïn ditïngdïr ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì mɑl; en ɑ thwöl-ɑ kɑ̈ge dööng, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Ngɑnrɑj wɑlɑ̀ Cethɑn; ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wëny lɑ̈bø bëne; ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh geki wëywödde." 
Revelation12:10 Kɑ yɑ olïngø ki cwɑg mø døngø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, ge okööbø kinni, “Jwøk ɑ́yïëëd dicyɑ̈ngtïn! Jwøk ree ɑ́nyodhe kinni bɑ rɑ̈dh ki tegø me dwøng! Mesiy men-ɑ ɑ́yienye jyɑ̈ge ɑ́nyodhe! Mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e nyi gøøny-ɑ nyiimïee kì bøli Jwøgee, kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng ɑ́rum ki leeng piny." 
Revelation12:11 Átyɑm yi nyiimïee ki remi Órömø, kí dyër men-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi gen; o ge ɑ́ceg-ɑ böyø ki muuji wëyi gen; ge nuti böggø ki thøø." 
Revelation12:12 Kɑ pyëwí mïne yïn ɑ mɑl, kí tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yijí. Cyën ying-ɑ kömí yïn ɑ piny, wuki nɑɑm omelø! Mɑ́ Ngɑnrɑj ɑ́bï piny yï wun, o bï pyëwe rɑɑj ki mendwøng, mɑ́ e ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni cyɑ̈ngge ɑ́döng ge nøg.”" 
Revelation12:13 Kɑ ɑ́yodii yi nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng kinni ɑ́leeng piny, ɑcɑ̈ge ki guudi wɑɑng ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi piny ki wɑ̈de, wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø." 
Revelation12:14 Kɑ ngɑnɑni nëngi ki obërri cor mø døngø, o gï pɑ̈ɑ̈re keje kì yij pɑ̈l; kun bëëde e okorrø kipe nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g kí budi run." 
Revelation12:15 Kɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng ongøgø ki pï mø gïïr, kipe kinni o ngɑnɑni di mude." 
Revelation12:16 De ngɑnɑni ɑ́yiel yi piny; piny dhøge ɑ́yiebe, kɑ nɑm-ɑ ɑ́cøør piny yi nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng kì dhøge mwønye." 
Revelation12:17 Kɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑngɑni mɑg yi liny ki mendwøng ki ngɑnɑni. Kɑ kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki kwɑrri ngɑnɑni; gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ mïdhi ciggi Jwøk, kɑ kwøbbi Yëso nyi töng yi gen." 
Revelation12:18 Kɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑngɑni ócungø kì kömi nɑɑm omelø. 
Revelation13:1 Kɑ lɑ̈y megø lidhɑ e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ nɑɑm omelø. Lɑ̈yɑni yïe dɑ tùng pyɑ̈rø, kí wɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́bïryew, wɑ̈thi tùngɑni dɑ yɑ̈r; ɑ́kyel kì wïj tung; o dɑ nying møg-ɑ ógweed ri wɑ̈the; wïj ɑ́kyel dɑ nying; o nyingɑni gwɑɑd-ɑ Jwøk." 
Revelation13:2 Lɑ̈yɑni nënni e nɑ kwej, o tyelle nɑ tyelli løny dub, o dhøge nɑ dhøg ngur. Kɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng tege mëgge lɑ̈yɑni, kí kwøme kí lɑw-ɑ jɑɑge." 
Revelation13:3 Wïje ɑ́kyel ɑ́nënni ree dɑ kedø me dwøng cøn, kɑ kenɑni jwɑn-ɑ nøggø, kɑ piny ongɑ̈ngø bëne. Kɑ teedø bënn løg-ɑ bɑng lɑ̈yɑni." 
Revelation13:4 Kɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng mɑl yi teedø kipe kɑ ɑ́mëgge lɑwe lɑ̈yɑni. Amɑlli gen lɑ̈yɑni, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Á men ɑ pɑ̈r ki lɑ̈y? Wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ men ɑ ócuggi nyɑɑg ki en?”" 
Revelation13:5 Lɑ̈yɑni ɑ́ceg kɑ wiyø o gwɑdde Jwøk ki tɑ̈dø, kɑ nëngi ki tegø me jyɑ̈ɑ̈ge ki dwɑ̈tt pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ryew." 
Revelation13:6 Kɑ ócɑ̈gø ki gwɑddi Jwøk, kí nyingi Jwøk, kí keny-ɑ bëëd yi Jwøk, kí teen-ɑ bëëdø kì mɑl bënn." 
Revelation13:7 Kɑ lɑ̈yɑni óyïddø ki keny nyïɑ̈gge ki jii Jwøk, kɑ gï tyɑme, kɑ óyïddø tegø men jɑɑge jurrì bënn, kí pödhh bënn, kí wïj dhɑnhø bëne, men ki dhøge." 
Revelation13:8 Kɑ mɑlli yi jii kömi piny bënn; gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen nuti gweed yij wɑ̈nyi nënnì kì ri cɑ̈gi lɑ̈bø; ɑ løg wɑ̈nyi Óröm-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g. 
Revelation13:9 “Lïng wun cyee, keløg yï wun dɑ yïthh!" 
Revelation13:10 Ngɑn-ɑ ógwedø ɑ́ men mɑg, ceg kɑ mɑgø; ngɑn-ɑ ógwedø ɑ́ men nɑ̈g ki pilø, ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø. Menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni ngïïn tyëng kwërø kɑ yïëyø mi gen mïdhi gen.”" 
Revelation13:11 Codhe, kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki lɑ̈y me bï wɑ̈g kì piny. Lɑ̈yɑni wïje dɑ tùng ɑ́ryew mø ni tùngi órömø. De okööbø ni nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng." 
Revelation13:12 Kɑ lɑwi lɑ̈ɑ̈y tyeli mɑl kwɑnye e nud. Kɑ piny bëne cïrre mɑlli lɑ̈ɑ̈y tyeli mɑl, lɑ̈y-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ree dɑ kedø me dwøng." 
Revelation13:13 Kɑ ogöögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø mø døngø, kɑ kɑ̈n-ɑ piny ki mɑc, mɑc kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl kì bøli ji bënn." 
Revelation13:14 Kɑ jii kömi piny thɑbe ki ngïjj-ɑ gøgge ki teng-ɑ ɑ́yode kì yï lɑ̈ɑ̈y tyeli mɑl. Kɑ jii kömi piny köbbe kinni göggi lɑ̈ɑ̈y tyeli mɑl ki ngïji; eni lɑ̈y-ɑ́ ree ɑ́di kedi pilø, de ɑ́cög e nuti nɑ̈gø yi kenɑni." 
Revelation13:15 Kɑ thödhi ki tegø men kudhe ri ngïji lɑ̈yɑni ki wëy, kɑ ngïji menɑni okööbø, kɑ nëngi ki tegø men cugge nɑ̈gi tyëng-ɑ pɑ mɑlli ngïji lɑ̈yɑni." 
Revelation13:16 Kɑ ji bënn; othønhø kí tyëngdøngø, tyëngkɑ̈rì kí tyëng-ɑ jɑdø, kí bɑ̈ngg, kí ji-ɑ bëëd wɑ̈thi gen, gï cire kinni o cinggi gen wɑlɑ̀ bøli gen kïdhi ki ngïji." 
Revelation13:17 Bong ngɑn cuggi ngyew ki gïïpiny, o bong ngɑn cuggi ngëwwi wɑ̈g keløg ree bong ngïji menɑni. Ngïji menɑni bɑ nyingi lɑ̈yɑni, wɑlɑ̀ kwɑnn-ɑ cungi ɑ́ kej nyingɑni." 
Revelation13:18 O møgɑni dwɑdd-ɑ peli wïj. Ngɑn wïje pel, ócuggø ki yodi gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi kwɑnn-ɑ bɑ kej nyingi lɑ̈yɑni, mɑ́ kwɑnnɑni cungi ɑ́ kej nyingi dhɑnhø. Bɑ kwɑn miy ɑ́bïkyel kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́bïkyel." 
Revelation14:1 Kɑ wïjɑ tïngɑ, ɑlidhɑ Órömø, e ócungø kì wïj Kïti Dhɑyøn, bute dɑ ji mø bøli gen di ngïje geki ngïji Wïye; jiɑni kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ngwen." 
Revelation14:2 Kɑ yɑ olïngø ki cwɑg mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl, ge ruur nɑ pï kenyi rengi gen piny kì wïj kït, wɑlɑ̀ ge nɑ mɑl kenyi mɑ̈ɑ̈re, o nɑ ywøøg thøm kì tung-ɑ kyeelø." 
Revelation14:3 Kɑ ji-ɑ bøli gen di ngïji Jwøk owörø ki wörø me nyɑ̈n kì bøli Jwøk geki gïg nëënø gɑ ɑ́ngwen. De bong ngɑn cuggi dïdi wörɑni, den-ɑ́ jøgdøng-ɑ kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ngwen ɑ ɑ́dïdii. Bene gen ɑ ɑ́døm keti gen." 
Revelation14:4 Jøgɑni bɑ gen ɑ ɑ́mïdhi ri gen ge dhïw; ri gen nuti ywëëdh gen ki niin ki mɑ̈nn; Ge lug-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng Órömø kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ cyɑ̈dhe bënn. Gen ɑ ɑ́døm kì kelli ji bënn, o bene gen ji-ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki mëggi Jwøk geki Órömø." 
Revelation14:5 Bong kwøbbi pyed mɑ ɑ́yod kì dhøggi gen, wɑlɑ̀ kömi gen bong cɑ́y." 
Revelation14:6 Kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki wëywödø megø e ópɑ̈rrø kì dïmɑl. Kɑ̈ll-ɑ Wöndøj men gïti ɑtheer, men muuje dhɑnhø bëne kì kömi piny." 
Revelation14:7 Wëywönɑni ceg-ɑ ryeerø ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Wøru Jwøk kɑ dönge lejji wun! Mɑ́ bøli keny-ɑ lidhe gønyy ɑ́wɑ̈nhi. Mɑllu ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j mɑl kí piny, kí nɑɑm omelø, kí nyingi pï!”" 
Revelation14:8 Kɑ wëywödø megø obëënø, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Ápɑ̈ɑ̈dh! Ápɑ̈ɑ̈dh! Kɑɑldwøng Bɑbïl ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh! Ji bënn ɑ́cïre mɑdh ki møgi oløge, eni møgi orøge møng-ɑ keej.”" 
Revelation14:9 Kɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈g wëywödd obëënø e ócwöddø kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ mɑlli lɑ̈y geki ngïje, kɑ ree kïdhi ki ngïji lɑ̈yɑni kì cinge wɑlɑ̀ bøle," 
Revelation14:10 ceg-ɑ mɑ̈dhø ki møgi rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøk, møng-ɑ keej! Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́göög ki gïn ni menɑni ge ceg kɑ göjji orɑng yi mɑc, kí kïbrït, kì bøli wëywöddi kwërø geki Órömø." 
Revelation14:11 O yïri mɑny-ɑ rɑ̈b gen ócög e pïdh-ɑ mɑl gïti ɑtheer. Bong ywömø me yod kì wɑ̈r wɑlɑ̀ dicɑ̈ng, yi tyëng-ɑ mɑlli lɑ̈y geki ngïje; gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ri gen di ngïji lɑ̈yɑni.”" 
Revelation14:12 Menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni ngïïn jii Jwøk, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ mïdhi Ciggi Jwøk, e Yëso yïëëy gen kidøøj." 
Revelation14:13 Kɑ cwɑg møgø lïngɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, ge okööbø kinni, “Gwed møg: tyëng-ɑ thøw ge gögg-ɑ Wë ri gen dɑ gyëdh!” Kɑ Wëy ólöggø kinni, “Ngee bɑ dyër! Ri gen óywöm yi gen ki gwøg, mɑ́ köggi gwøøg gen cøn cyɑ̈dhi kɑ gen.”" 
Revelation14:14 Kɑ wïjɑ tïngɑ, ɑlïdhɑ ki pøølø me tɑr. Kömi pøølɑni obëëdø yi gïjø me ni dhɑnhø, me wïje di yɑ̈ɑ̈r dhɑb, o cinge dɑ ɑ́ngön me bedh." 
Revelation14:15 Kɑ wëywödø megø bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kengø. Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì kömi pøølɑni köbbe kinni, “Mɑg ɑ́ngön kɑ yï nyɑ̈ɑ̈r. Piny ɑ́cyeg, o bøli kej nyɑre ɑ́wɑ̈nhi!”" 
Revelation14:16 Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kömi pøølø ɑ́ngöne leenge piny, kɑ piny nyɑre." 
Revelation14:17 Kɑ wëywödø megø bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yij keng-ɑ mɑl, e cinge dɑ ɑ́ngön me bedh thyew." 
Revelation14:18 Kɑ wëywödø men-ɑ mïdhi mɑc, bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì këli lɑm, kɑ wëywön-ɑ cinge di ɑ́ngön-ɑ bedh köbbe ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Mɑg ɑ́ngön kɑ yï nyɑ̈ɑ̈r, nyɑr oløg kì yethi bɑ̈gg kì kömi piny, mɑ́ oløg ɑ́cyeg!”" 
Revelation14:19 Kɑ wëywönɑni ɑ́ngöne leenge piny, kɑ oløg nyɑɑre piny kì yethi bɑ̈gg, kɑ gø leenge yij buur bïjø mi liny Jwøk, bur-ɑ dwøng." 
Revelation14:20 Kɑ oløg bij kì yij bur kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, kɑ remø rïng-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yij burɑni, ɑ́ bɑɑyø, döre bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew, o bɑ̈re bɑ kïlomïtïr miy ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Revelation15:1 Kɑ yɑ ólïdhø kì mɑl ki gïïngɑ̈ngø megø; bɑ ngïji me dwøng. Yɑ ɑ́lidh-ɑ wëywödd ɑ́bïryew mø kɑ̈ddi ki ryɑ̈gg ɑ́bïryew, o bene gen ryɑ̈gg-ɑ cyɑ̈n, mɑ́ gen ɑ tyëg rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøk." 
Revelation15:2 Kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki nɑɑm omelø me pïge bɑ ɑdhɑ̈nh-ɑ ólenyø, kí mɑc. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́tyɑm lɑ̈y kí ngïje, kí kwɑnn-ɑ cungi ɑ́ kej nyinge, lidhɑ ge ócungø kì kömi nɑɑm ɑdhɑ̈dh menɑni, yï gen dɑ thømi Jwøk," 
Revelation15:3 ge owörø ki wöri Mosɑ̀, bɑ̈ng Jwøk, kí wöri Órömø kinni, “Wuö, Jwøk Áyïmø, yï gøgg-ɑ gïgdøngø mø bɑ gïïngɑ̈ngø! Yï bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh pödhh; yëthí bɑ dyër o ge bɑ óbödh!" 
Revelation15:4 Á men ɑ koo böggi yïn Wuö? Á men ɑ koo lejji yïn? Yï ketí ɑ bɑ kwërø. Pödhh bënn óbï, kɑ yï mɑlli yi gen, mɑ́ gïg-ɑ dyër møg-ɑ gøggí onennø yi dhɑnhø bëne.”" 
Revelation15:5 Codhe, ɑtïngɑ wïjɑ, kɑ kengø lidhɑ ɑ́ ɑyieb kì mɑl, ki Kemi Kwër kì yije." 
Revelation15:6 Kɑ wëywödd ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ kɑ̈ni kömi piny ki ryɑ̈gg ɑ́bïryew, bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kengø, ri gen dɑ ógudhi kor-ɑ yöm mø ceg rɑ̈ɑ̈dø, o ɑ́ngɑddi gen dɑ wënni dhɑb." 
Revelation15:7 Kɑ wëywöddɑni nëngi ki tɑ̈mmi dhɑb ɑ́bïryew yi ɑ́kyel kì kelli gïg nëënø ɑ́ngwen; tɑ̈mmɑni pɑ̈ng yi liny Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ nëënø gïti ɑtheer." 
Revelation15:8 Kɑ yij kengø opɑ̈ngø yi yïri mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøk geki tege; o bong ngɑn cuggi kedhi kengø, pïd keny-ɑ óthumi ryɑ̈gg ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ kɑ̈lli yi wëywöddɑni gɑ ɑ́bïryew." 
Revelation16:1 Kɑ cwɑg mø døngø lïngɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yij kengø, ge köbb-ɑ wëywöddɑni kinni, “Kedh wun, kɑ gïg-ɑ yethi tɑ̈mmi liny Jwøk, køny wun kömi piny!”" 
Revelation16:2 Kɑ wëywön-ɑ mɑl kì kelli gen ókedhø, kɑ tɑbe kønye piny. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ri gen di ngïji lɑ̈y; ɑ nyi mɑllii dëlli gen mɑg yi bør mø rijjø." 
Revelation16:3 Kɑ ryeew wëywöddɑni, tɑbe kønye nɑɑm omelø, kɑ pï ri gen løg gen remø, kɑ gïg-ɑ nëënø kì nɑɑm omelø othøø bënn." 
Revelation16:4 Kɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈g wëywödd, tɑbe kønye yethi nɑ̈mm-ɑ rïngi geki yïïth, kɑ pïi gen ogöögø ki remø thyew." 
Revelation16:5 Kɑ wëywön-ɑ mïdhi pï lïngɑ e okööbø kinni, “Wuö, yï bɑ kwërø, o cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi yïn bɑ dyër, yïn ɑ nud ɑnɑn, o yï ɑ́wöni yï nud!" 
Revelation16:6 Remmi jii Jwøk geki remmi tyëngtöng ɑ́nyïɑ̈ɑ̈g piny yi gen, bene ɑ bɑnge mëggí gen remø o gø mɑdh gen. Ge kwɑny-ɑ köögi men-ɑ kyëëw ki gen.”" 
Revelation16:7 Kɑ cwɑg møøgø lïngɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ këli lɑm, ge okööbø kinni, “Wuö Jwøk Áyïmø! Cɑ́yí bɑ dyër, o yethi gen bong ruj!”" 
Revelation16:8 Kɑ ngween wëywöddɑni tɑbe kønye kömi cɑ̈ng, kɑ cɑ̈ng göjji rɑ̈bi ji." 
Revelation16:9 Kɑ ji rɑ̈b yi lëdhi cɑ̈ng, kɑ Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ryɑ̈ggɑni gwɑddi gen. De ge nuti yewø ki orøøg gen, wɑlɑ̀ Jwøk nuti lenhi gen." 
Revelation16:10 Kɑ bïïj wëywödd tɑbe kønye wïj kwøøm lɑ̈yɑni. Kɑ muudhø ceg-ɑ ì bïp kì kömi pödhe, kɑ ji lebbi gen kɑ̈ɑ̈j gen yi gööj rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlli gen." 
Revelation16:11 Kɑ Jwøk gwɑddi gen, kipe kɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlli gen, kí bør-ɑ ri gen. De ge nuti wïyø ki gøggi rɑj." 
Revelation16:12 Kɑ bïkyeel wëywödd tɑbe kønye Nɑm Porɑt. Kɑ nɑmɑni othwøwø, o rɑ̈nhi wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl thödhe yöö men bëën gen." 
Revelation16:13 Kɑ wëyrijjø ɑ́dɑ̈g mø ni ógwɑ̈llì lidhɑ; ɑ́kyel kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ dhøg nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng, ɑ́kyel kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ dhøg lɑ̈y, o dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ dhøg jɑltööng pyed." 
Revelation16:14 Wëyɑni bɑ wëyrijjø mø göögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø, kɑ ge nyi kedh-ɑ yï rɑ̈nhi kömi piny bënn, ge cong-ɑ liny kipe cyɑ̈ng-ɑ dwøng, Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøk Áyïmø." 
Revelation16:15 “Lïng wun! Yɑ obëënø ni kenyi bëën kur! Ngɑn-ɑ óbëëdø e pɑ nin, o ógudhe okorø yi en, ree dɑ gyëdh, kipe ócyɑ̈dhi nøw kì bøli teedø, kɑ oyɑ̈rø.”" 
Revelation16:16 Kɑ rɑ̈nhì cøng yi wëyɑni, kì keny-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Armɑjedön ki dhøg Ibru." 
Revelation16:17 Kɑ bïryeew wëywöddɑni tɑbe kønye yij yømø. Kɑ cwɑg mø døngø obëënø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri kwøm kì yij kengø, ge okööbø kinni, “Árum ki gwøgø!”" 
Revelation16:18 Kɑ mɑl ogwelø, kɑ opödø, kɑ piny okïïrø ki mendwøng; piny nuti pɑ̈nyi kïïrø kinøw, kër-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j ji." 
Revelation16:19 Kɑ kɑɑldwøng ópyëdø ɑ́ ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ kɑ̈ddi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø. Kɑ kɑɑldwøng Bɑbïl pɑr yi Jwøk, ɑwëgge gøn mɑ̈dhø ki óthɑ̈ngi linye, liny-ɑ keej." 
Revelation16:20 Kɑ muj ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø bënn, kɑ kïttì ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø thyew." 
Revelation16:21 Kɑ ɑtuni ɑ́piy me dwøng ódëëmø; pegi wɑɑng ɑ́piy ɑ́kyel bɑ kïllì pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, kɑ Jwøk gwɑddi yi ji kipe ryɑ̈ng-ɑ dwøng, ɑ pëddi rɑ̈jø ni menɑni." 
Revelation17:1 Codhe, kɑ wëywödø ɑ́kyel kì kelli ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ mïdhi ki tɑ̈mmì, bï-ɑ yïɑ, kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, “Bïí bɑngɑ, o yï nyudhɑ cɑ́y-ɑ ócɑɑy ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi; eni kɑɑl-ɑ dwøng, ɑ ógeer buti nɑ̈mm-ɑ gïïr." 
Revelation17:2 Mɑ́ rɑ̈nhi kömi piny bënn nyii göögø ki orøg ki en. Kɑ ge nyi nɑ̈g yi møgi oløg men-ɑ nyi mɑdh yi gen kì bute.” 
Revelation17:3 Kɑ yɑ kïdhi yij pɑ̈l yi Wëy. Kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki ngɑndhɑjø me bëëdø kì kömi lɑ̈y mɑ didïgø me köme ógwedø bëne ki nying mø gwɑddi Jwøk. Lɑ̈yɑni yïe dɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́bïryew kí tùng pyɑ̈rø. 
Revelation17:4 Ngɑnɑni ɑ́rug-ɑ ógødh me bɑ ɑ́cwïcwïl, kí kïddì mø kwɑrø. Cingge dɑ yëlli dhɑb, o yedhe dɑ tigg mø ngewi gen teeg. O cinge dɑ óthɑ̈ngi dhɑb, me pɑ̈ng yi jɑmm-ɑ nyi lwɑ̈ɑ̈nge ki ji." 
Revelation17:5 O bøle ógwëdø ki nying me di kwøbb-ɑ ɑkɑnn, mø wɑngi kinni, “Bɑbïl, meyi tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ki köögi, o bene ngɑn-ɑ rënyi lɑ̈bø.”" 
Revelation17:6 Kɑ ngɑnɑni lidhɑ e mɑdh-ɑ remmi jii Jwøk, møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kipe kɑ ɑ́yïëy gen Yëso. Kɑ yɑ ceg-ɑ tyɑɑjø keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ ngɑnɑni." 
Revelation17:7 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi wëywönɑni kinni, “Yïde ɑ tyɑɑj! Yï ónyudhɑ gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi ngɑnɑni geki lɑ̈y-ɑ köme bëëde, ɑ yïe di wɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́bïryew kí tùng pyɑ̈rø." 
Revelation17:8 Lɑ̈y-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi yïn ɑ́bëëd e nud cøn, de pɑ nudd e nud. Óbï wɑ̈g kì yij ölø kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh, codhe o kedhe kun thøwe. O tyëng kömi piny møg-ɑ nyingi gen nuti gwedø cøn kì yij wɑ̈nyi nënnì ótyɑɑj keny-ɑ ólidh gen lɑ̈yɑni. Ábëëd e onëënø; o pɑ nudd e onëënø ɑnɑn, de ódøøg ki cwöbø." 
Revelation17:9 “Møgɑni dwɑdd-ɑ peli wïj kí dïdø. Wɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́bïryew bɑ kïtt-ɑ thønhø ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ kömi gen bëëd yi ngɑnɑni. Ge bɑ rɑ̈nhì ɑ́bïryew thyew. 
Revelation17:10 Ábïj kì kelli gen ɑ́rum ki pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, o ɑ́kyel nudd e ojyɑ̈gø; o ɑ́kyel nuti bëënø, o koo mɑ̈gi ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r keny-ɑ óbëëne." 
Revelation17:11 O lɑ̈y-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e onëënø, o pɑ nudd e onëënø, ceg bëëdø ɑ́ bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g rɑ̈nhì møgɑni gɑ ɑ́bïryew, o kedh-ɑ kun thøwe." 
Revelation17:12 “Tùng pyɑ̈rø møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi yïn, bɑ rɑ̈nhì pyɑ̈rø mø nuti cɑ̈gø jyɑ̈gø. De ge ówiy o ge jyɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ki sɑɑ̀ ɑ́kyel, kyeel geki lɑ̈y." 
Revelation17:13 Pyɑ̈rø møgɑni bënn ködd-ɑ kömi gïjø ɑ́kyel, o lɑ̈wwi gen ómëggi gen lɑ̈y." 
Revelation17:14 Ge ónyïɑ̈ggi ki Órömø, de ge ótyɑm yi Órömø geki ji-ɑ ɑ́yieny gɑ møge, ɑ ɑ́yïëyii; mɑ́ e bɑ Wïi wëëg, o bɑ Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh rɑ̈nhì.”" 
Revelation17:15 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi wëywönɑni kinni, “Nɑ̈mm-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi yïn, møg-ɑ buti gen bëëd yi ngɑnɑni, bɑ pödhh, kí jurrì, kí wïj dhɑnhø bëne jur ki dhøge." 
Revelation17:16 Ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi menɑni ómɑɑn yi lɑ̈y geki tùng-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi yïn gɑ pyɑ̈rø; jɑmme ókwɑny yi gen kɑ odöngø e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw; rïnge ócɑm yi gen kɑ gø rɑ̈b gen ki mɑc. 
Revelation17:17 Mɑ́ pëthi gen ɑ́cïbi yi Jwøk ki tyëëdø men gwøg gen gïn-ɑ dwɑdde, ge göög ɑ kej ɑ́kyel, kí kinni o ge yïëy gen ki mëggi lɑ̈wwi gen lɑ̈y, o kwøbbi Jwøk pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen." 
Revelation17:18 “Ngɑnɑni bɑ kɑɑldwøng, men-ɑ jɑɑg rɑ̈nhi kömi piny bënn.”" 
Revelation18:1 Kɑ wëywödø me yïe di tegø me dwøng lidhɑ e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl. Kɑ piny meny yi cɑre. 
Revelation18:2 Kɑ óryeerø ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Ápɑ̈ɑ̈dh! Ápɑ̈ɑ̈dh! Kɑɑldwøng Bɑbïl ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh! Yije bëëd-ɑ yi wɑ̈l geki wëyrijjø, winyy-ɑ cödhø, ɑ bɑ mugø bënn bëëd ɑ yije ɑnɑn." 
Revelation18:3 Mɑ́ pödhh bënn ɑ́mɑ̈dhi ki møgi oløge, kɑ niin yi rɑ̈nhi kömi piny bënn, kɑ jøngyëwø mø kömi piny bënn, nyi bï-ɑ be ngyew kì ri kɑ̈re.”" 
Revelation18:4 Kɑ cwɑg møøgø lïngɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, ge okööbø kinni, “Bï wun wɑ̈g jiɑ! Dhwödh wun kì bute! Wu ko ngöyi ki orøge; cɑ́ye ko nywɑg wun ki en!" 
Revelation18:5 Mɑ́ orøge óröör piny kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ mɑl, o gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøgge pɑ wïl kì yï Jwøk." 
Revelation18:6 Göggu en ki gïn ni men-ɑ ɑ́gögge wun, colu gøøli orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøge ɑ́ tyel ɑ́ryew. Pɑ̈ng wun óthɑ̈nge ki møgø me lod mi tyeli mɑl ki kejø tyel ɑ́ryew ni møng-ɑ keej men-ɑ ɑ́gögge wun cøn." 
Revelation18:7 Göjju en orɑng, o kïïme; orɑng me kyëëw ki døøjø men-ɑ ɑ́mëgge ree. Mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd e lejj-ɑ ree kinni, ‘Yɑ bëëdø kì keny yɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø! Yɑ pɑth ki thwöm, yɑ koo wöl kïïmø!’" 
Revelation18:8 Köme ópɑ̈ɑ̈r yi yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g, kɑ othøø kì cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel; köme ópɑ̈ɑ̈r yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dël, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈m yij, kí kɑ̈j. O órɑ̈b ki mɑc, mɑ́ Wë Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ cɑyii, teg ki mendwøng.”" 
Revelation18:9 O rɑ̈nhi kömi piny møg-ɑ ɑ́göög ki orøg kì kɑɑlɑni óywöngi ki mendwøng keny-ɑ ólidh gen yïri mɑc men-ɑ órɑ̈ɑ̈bii. 
Revelation18:10 Kɑ ge ócungø ge lɑ̈wi ki en, mɑ́ ge óböggø yi cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑyii. De ge ógɑ̈y kinni, “Á gïn ɑ rɑɑj kinnï! Bɑ gïjø me pëddi rɑ̈jø! Kɑɑldwøng Bɑbïl, yï ɑ́rënyi kì sɑɑ̀ ɑ́kyel!”" 
Revelation18:11 O óywøg ki mendwøng yi jøngyëwø kì kömi piny, mɑ́ e bong ngɑn-ɑ óngew jɑmmi gen këti." 
Revelation18:12 Gïg-ɑ bɑ dhɑb, kí ɑ́tegø, kí tigg-ɑ per gen teg, kí ógudh-ɑ per gen teg ni mø rɑ̈nhì, kí møg-ɑ bɑ ɑrir, kí møg kwɑrø, kí wɑ̈thi ryɑ̈ɑ̈, kí wɑ̈thi yenh-ɑ nyi yɑb yi bödhhi pɑ̈mmì, kí jɑmm-ɑ ógwøgø ki lëji lyej, kí pɑ̈mm-ɑ per gen teg, kí dilɑl, kí ngyënyø dødø, kí kïtt-ɑ per gen teg," 
Revelation18:13 kí gïrpɑ̀, kí bɑkur, kí ryɑ̈ mor, kí lubɑn, kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun, kí møng-ɑ búr, kí gemè, kí dhög, kí dyëg, kí kyënyì, kí yɑ̈th-ɑ nyi pyejji yi kyënyì, kí bɑ̈ngg." 
Revelation18:14 Bɑbïl óköbbi yi tyëng ngyëwø kinni, “Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́tyer yi pyëwí ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, o yɑ̈ɑ̈ngø ɑ́kedh geki døøjø bëne, ge pɑ yod yi yïn këti!”" 
Revelation18:15 Mɑ́ tyëng ngyëwø møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ri kì bɑng Bɑbïl ócungi ge lɑ̈wi ge óböggø yi cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi kɑɑlɑni. Ge óywöngi kɑ ge okïïmø ki mendwøng," 
Revelation18:16 kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Á gï ngø ɑ rɑj ni men! Kɑɑldwøng ɑ́gɑ̈g! E ɑ́bëëd e nyi rug-ɑ ógudh-ɑ yöm, kí ɑ́cwïcwïl, kí ógudh-ɑ kwɑrø, ree dhyɑɑw en ki dhɑb, kí tigg-ɑ per gen teg, kí tigø ɑ́gør!" 
Revelation18:17 Alɑ̈ɑ̈ny gïgɑni bënn èn kì sɑɑ̀ ɑ́kyel yøw!” Kɑ jɑggi sɑpïnnì bënn, kí tyëngwel, kí jøkëw, kí teen-ɑ cyɑ̈mø kì ri nɑ̈mmi omelø bënn, ócungø ge lɑ̈wi." 
Revelation18:18 Kɑ ge óywöngø kɑ̀ nenni gen mɑc kí yïrø e töng-ɑ mɑl, ge okööbø kinni, “Bong kɑɑl megø mɑ ɑ́bëëd e dwøng ni kɑɑl men!”" 
Revelation18:19 Kɑ wɑ̈thi gen yëddi gen ki búr, kɑ ge ogɑ̈yø ki mendwøng kinni, “Ápɑ̈ɑ̈dh! Ápɑ̈ɑ̈dh! Kɑɑldwøng Bɑbïl ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh! Tyëng yɑ̈thi nɑm bënn ɑ́kɑ̈ri yi jɑmme! Jɑmmɑni bënn ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì sɑɑ̀ ɑ́kyel yøw!”" 
Revelation18:20 Kɑ cwɑg møøgø lïngi ge okööbø kinni, “Yïn ɑ mɑl, mïni pyëwí kipe kɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dhe! Mïni pëthi wun, wun ɑ tyëng kwërø, kí jøwöödø, kí jøtöng mɑ́ e ɑ́cɑy yi Jwøk, kɑ per gïn-ɑ ɑ́gögge wun.”" 
Revelation18:21 Kɑ wëywödø megø ókɑ̈bbø ki tungi kït me dwøng ni kïti thɑonɑ̀, kɑ gø leenge nɑɑm omelø e okööbø kinni, “Bɑbïl óleeng piny ni men, o koo cigi yodø kinni tek." 
Revelation18:22 Mɑ́ bong wörø, wɑlɑ̀ cwɑggi bul, wɑlɑ̀ ywøøg supɑrɑ̀, wɑlɑ̀ ywøøg kɑng, wɑlɑ̀ thom, møg-ɑ ólïngi këti kì kɑɑlɑni. O bong bödhhì møg-ɑ ógöögø kì kɑɑlɑni këti. O bong ngɑn-ɑ ólïngi e ogurø këti," 
Revelation18:23 wɑlɑ̀ bong mɑc men-ɑ ówöl ki lidhø, wɑlɑ̀ bong buul nywöm men-ɑ ócøng. Jøngyëwø møgí ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ gen ɑ pëddi tegø kì kömi piny bëne, kɑ pödhhi kömi piny wëny yi yïn ki yɑdhí.”" 
Revelation18:24 Bɑbïl ɑ́cɑy kɑ per kɑ ɑ́yood remmi jøtöng geki jii Jwøk kì yije, geki remmi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yije bënn." 
Revelation19:1 Codhe, ɑlïngɑ ki cwɑg mø ruur ni cwɑggi teedø mø ngenyø kì mɑl e okööbø kinni, “Lenhi wɑ Jwøk! Mɑ́ Jwøgee ɑ nyi yïëdø, o en ɑ nyi muuj tegø!" 
Revelation19:2 Nyi løøg-ɑ dyër, o pɑ nyi rujø; ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi men-ɑ ɑ́rënyi piny, gø ɑ́cɑye. Ácɑy yi Jwøk kɑ per kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ge bɑ̈nggi Jwøk.”" 
Revelation19:3 Kɑ teenɑni cig-ɑ ryeerø kinni, “Lenhi wɑ Jwøk! Wiy yïri mɑc men-ɑ rɑ̈b kɑɑlɑni cöge e odungø gïti ɑtheer!”" 
Revelation19:4 Kɑ jøgdøngø gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngwen geki gïg nëënø gɑ ɑ́ngwen, ri gen bøødh gen piny, kɑ Jwøk mɑl yi gen, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Amen! Lenhi wɑ Jwøk!”" 
Revelation19:5 Kɑ cwɑg møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri kwøm, ge okööbø kinni, “Lenhu Jwøgee, wun ɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑllii, kí tyëng-ɑ wørii; othønhø kí tyëngdøngø bënn!”" 
Revelation19:6 Kɑ yɑ olïngø ki cwɑg mø ni cwɑggi teedø mø ngenyø, o nɑ ruuri pï mø ngenyø, o nɑ omɑ̈ɑ̈r mɑl, ge okööbø kinni, “Lenhi wɑ Jwøk! Mɑ́ Wë Jwøgee bɑ rɑ̈dh me teg!" 
Revelation19:7 Mïni pëthee kɑ wɑ tug wɑ; lejji wɑ dönge! Mɑ́ bøli kej nywööm Órömø ɑ́wɑ̈nhi; o nyɑn-ɑ nywøme ɑ́rum ki gwøg ki dhwɑ̈ng. 
Revelation19:8 Kɑ nëngi ki ógødh kor-ɑ yöm me pëddi tɑrø ɑ́ men ruge.” (Kor-ɑ yöm bɑ gwøng døj men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi jii Jwøk.) 
Revelation19:9 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi wëywönɑni kinni, “Gwed møg: tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cwøøl kej thyëëg Órömø, ri gen dɑ gyëdh!” Acigi wëywönɑni kwøb kinni, “Møg bɑ kwøbbi Jwøk, møg-ɑ dyër!”" 
Revelation19:10 Kɑ riɑ bøødhɑ piny kì bøle yɑ mɑl-ɑ en, de yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Gïn ni men ko gwøøg! Yɑ bɑ bɑ̈ng ni yïn, wɑki wɑddí møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy Yëso bënn. De mɑllí Jwøk!” Mɑ́ dyër men-ɑ ɑ́nyodh yi Yëso, bene wëy-ɑ ɑ́göög kì ri tyëngtöng." 
Revelation19:11 Codhe, kɑ mɑl lidhɑ ɑ́ ɑyieb. Kɑ kyeny mɑ nyibøng lidhɑ. Jɑl-ɑ kömi kyenyɑni cwøl ɑ́ jɑl pɑ nyi wil dhøge; ɑ nyi kømmi dyër ceth; jyɑ̈gø e gøgg-ɑ dyër, o nyïɑ̈gg-ɑ dyër." 
Revelation19:12 Nyinge lyel nɑ mɑc, o wïje dɑ yɑ̈rr mø gïïr. Dɑ nying møg-ɑ ógweed köme; o nyingɑni ngɑ̈ny-ɑ yi en kete kete." 
Revelation19:13 Rug-ɑ ógødh men-ɑ ójwɑ̈ɑ̈g yij remø, o cwøl ɑ́ “Lögi Jwøk.”" 
Revelation19:14 Bɑnge lug-ɑ yi kyënyì mɑ nyibøngg, kömi gen dɑ yɑɑy mɑl, mø rug ógudhi kor-ɑ yöm mø pëddi tɑrø." 
Revelation19:15 Dɑ pilø me bedh, me nyi bï wɑ̈g kì dhøge; pilɑni ɑ tyɑɑme pödhh. Gï ójɑɑge cinge dɑ lodh mɑ ngyënyø dødø, o møgi oløg mi rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøk Áyïmø óbïïje wɑ̈g ki tyelle kì yij bure." 
Revelation19:16 Dɑ nying møg-ɑ ógweed ri ɑ́ywödhe, kí rɑ̈me kinni, “Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh rɑ̈nhì, kí Wïi wëëg.”" 
Revelation19:17 Codhe, ɑlïdhɑ ki wëywödø me cungi kì kömi cɑ̈ng, e óryeerø e köbb-ɑ winyy-ɑ pɑ̈rri kì yij yømø kinni, “Bïu, cungu ri wun kej ryëëj Jwøk ryëny-ɑ dwøng!" 
Revelation19:18 O wu cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun ki rïnggi rɑ̈nhì, kí pëjji liny, kí ɑlɑthkerr, kí kyënyì geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ying kömi gen, kí rïnggi ji bënn, bɑ̈ngg kí ji-ɑ bëëd wɑ̈thi gen, kí tyëngdøngø kí othønhø.”" 
Revelation19:19 Kɑ lɑ̈y lidhɑ geki rɑ̈nhi piny kí yɑ̈yyi gen, ge cong-ɑ ri gen kipe nyɑɑg ki pënyi linyɑni geki yɑye." 
Revelation19:20 Kɑ lɑ̈y mɑg kì yij linyɑni geki jɑltööng pyed men-ɑ ɑ́göög ki gïïngɑ̈ngø kì bøli lɑ̈y, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ri gen di ngïji lɑ̈y wënye. Kɑ lɑ̈y geki jɑltööng pyed leeng yij nɑɑm mɑɑc kïbrït ge onëënø." 
Revelation19:21 Kɑ jøliny gen bënn nɑ̈g yi pil-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l dhøg jɑl-ɑ kömi kyeny-ɑ bɑ nyibøng, Kɑ winy bënn oyɑ̈ngø yi rïnggi gen." 
Revelation20:1 Codhe, ɑlïdhɑ ki wëywödø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl, cinge dɑ muptɑɑ̀ mi ölø kí ɑ́cwecwel me dwøng." 
Revelation20:2 Kɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng mɑge; en ɑ thwöl-ɑ kɑ̈ge dööng, ɑ bɑ Ngɑnrɑj wɑlɑ̀ Cethɑn, kɑ gø mɑɑge piny ki ɑ́cwecwel, o bëëde ɑ́ ɑmɑg ki runn ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyel." 
Revelation20:3 Kɑ leeng yij ölø kì thɑ piny yi wëywönɑni, kɑ dhøg ölø dije, kɑ gø thɑnye ki kitim dij, o cöge e pödhh pɑ wënye ki runn ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyel. Codhe, o ókɑl ki gønyø keny-ɑ óthumi runnɑni." 
Revelation20:4 Kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki kwømm wɑ̈thi gen dɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny gɑ jɑggi gøny. Kɑ wëyi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kipe kɑ ɑ́töng gen dyër men-ɑ ɑ́nyodh yi Yëso, kí kwøbbi Jwøk, lidhɑ thyew. Lɑ̈y nuti mɑlli gen, o ngïje nuti mɑlli gen, o bøli gen wɑlɑ̀ cinggi gen nuti dïjjø ki ngïji lɑ̈yɑni. Ge ɑ́dwöög be nënnø kɑ ge ojyɑ̈gø kyeel ki Mesiy ki runn ɑ́lïp." 
Revelation20:5 (Tyëngthøø møg-ɑ kyeelø bënn pɑ dwöög be nënnø, pïd keny-ɑ óthumi runn ɑ́lïp.) Men bene kwöngi tyëngthøø ki dhwödhø kì yij thøø." 
Revelation20:6 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki dhwödhi mɑl kì yij thøø ri gen dɑ gyëdh mø døngø. Ryeew thøø yïe bong tegø kì kömi gen; de ge óbëëdø gɑ ókwërri Jwøk geki Mesiy; o ge ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø kyeel ki Mesiy ki runn ɑ́lïp. 
Revelation20:7 Cethɑn ógööny wɑ̈g kì øn-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑgii, keny-ɑ óthumi runnɑni gɑ ɑ́lïp." 
Revelation20:8 O ókedhi be wënyi pödhh-ɑ wɑ̈thi tùngi piny gɑ ɑ́ngwen; gen ɑ Gög kí Mɑgög. Ge ókɑ̈ɑ̈l be liny yi Cethɑn; o ge óbï kwɑnni gen nɑ nyingi ɑyejø kì thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø. 
Revelation20:9 Kɑ ge ceg-ɑ ì jɑɑj kì kömi piny bëne, kɑ kɑɑl jii Jwøk geki kɑɑldwøng men-ɑ mɑɑre tyeg gen. De mɑc ɑ́bï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, kɑ gï nɑ̈ge." 
Revelation20:10 Kɑ Cethɑn, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thɑb gen, leeng yij nɑɑm kïbrït, keny-ɑ bëëd yi lɑ̈y geki jɑltööng pyed, o ge rɑngi gen kì dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r, gïti ɑtheer." 
Revelation20:11 Kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki kwøm me tɑr, o dwøng, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì wïje lidhɑ. Piny ɑ́rengi geki mɑl kì bøle, kɑ ge ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø; ge pɑ nenni." 
Revelation20:12 Kɑ tyëngthøø; tyëngdøngø kí othønhø lidhɑ ge ócungø kì bøli kwømɑni. Kɑ wɑ̈j yieb, ɑlidhɑ wɑ̈nyø megø e oyiebø, en ɑ bɑ wɑ̈nyi nënnì. Kɑ tyëngthøø cɑy ki cɑ́y-ɑ ógweed yethi wɑ̈j; ngɑn cɑy kɑ per gïn gwøøg en." 
Revelation20:13 Kɑ nɑɑm omelø tyëngthøø møge muuje. Kɑ thøø geki pödhi tyëngthøø, tyëngthøø mø gen muuj gen thyew. Kɑ ngɑn nyi cɑy ki cɑ́y-ɑ kyëëw ki gïn gwøøg en." 
Revelation20:14 Codhe, kɑ thøø geki pödhi tyëngthøø leeng nɑɑm mɑc. (Nɑɑm mɑc menɑni bene ryeew thøø.)" 
Revelation20:15 O tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yod nyingi gen tøøk kì yij wɑ̈nyi nënnì, ge ɑ́leeng nɑɑm mɑc." 
Revelation21:1 Codhe, ɑlïdhɑ ki piny me nyɑ̈n kí mɑl me nyɑ̈n, mɑ́ mɑl men-ɑ kɑ̈ge dööng geki piny-ɑ kɑ̈ge dööng ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, o bong nɑm me nud." 
Revelation21:2 Codhe ɑlidhɑ Kɑɑl Kwër, Yerusɑlem men-ɑ nyɑ̈n, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl yï Jwøk, e nɑ nyɑn nywøm me thøø yi ruugø, o kedh-ɑ be yïddø ki jɑl-ɑ nywømii." 
Revelation21:3 Kɑ cwɑg mø døngø lïngɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï ngɑn-ɑ wïj kwøm kinni, “Anɑn, Jwøk pɑɑre ying-ɑ kelli ji! Óbëëdø kì kelli gen, o ge óbëëdø gɑ jie, o óbëëd ɑ́ Jwøøg gen." 
Revelation21:4 Pï ópoje kì nyingi gen. O óbong thøø këti; bong kïïmø, o bong ywøg; bong rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì. Mɑ́ jɑmm-ɑ weenø ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny.”" 
Revelation21:5 Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì wïj kwøm okööbø kinni, “Anɑn, jɑmmì bënn løgɑ’ møg nyɑ̈n!” Kɑ yɑ köbbe thyew kinni, “Gwed møgɑni, mɑ́ kwøb møg bɑ dyër, o ge ócuggø ngɑ̈dhø.”" 
Revelation21:6 Kɑ yɑ köbbe thyew kinni, “Jɑmmì ɑ́rum ki gwøgø bënn! Bɑ yɑn ɑ mɑl, o bɑ yɑn ɑ cyɑ̈n; yɑ bɑ cɑ̈gø kí cögø. Ngɑn ree di röödhø, ówëggɑ mɑ̈dhø kì wɑɑng pïi nënnì e bong gïn cole." 
Revelation21:7 Gïgɑni bënn, ómëggɑ tyëng-ɑ ótyɑ̈mø: Yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen, o ge óbëëdø gɑ nyigɑ." 
Revelation21:8 De wɑ̈rrì, kí tyëngɑmolpiny, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi pɑ̈ɑ̈dø ki kwøb, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi nɑ̈gø ki ji, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi wɑ̈dhi niin ki ji møøgø, kí ɑ́jwöggì, kí tyëng-ɑ mɑlli ngïjji jwögg, kí tyëngpyed –– kej gen bɑ yij mɑɑc kïbrït me lyel; menɑni bene ryeew thøø.”" 
Revelation21:9 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi wëywödø ɑ́kyel kì kelli wëywödd ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ yï gen di tɑ̈mmì ɑ́bïryew mø ryɑ̈g kinni, “Bïí o yï nyudhɑ nyɑn-ɑ nywøm yi Órömø.”" 
Revelation21:10 Akwɑɑny yɑn yi Wëy, kɑ yɑ kïdhe wïj kït me bɑ̈r. Kɑ yɑ nyudhe Yerusɑlem, Kɑɑl Kwër, e bï piny, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl yï Jwøk," 
Revelation21:11 e ceg-ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dø yi mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøk. Kɑɑlɑni ceg-ɑ orɑ̈ng ni tigø me pere teg; tïl nɑ ɑdhɑ̈dh. 
Revelation21:12 Ówenø ki dörø me bɑ̈r, o dörɑni dhøgge bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, ge kor-ɑ yi wëywödd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. Dhøggi dörø ógwëdø ki nying, gen ɑ nyingi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew." 
Revelation21:13 Tuung dörø dɑ dhøg ɑ́dɑ̈g: ɑ́dɑ̈g kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl; ɑ́dɑ̈g kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl; ɑ́dɑ̈g kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø; ɑ́dɑ̈g kì wɑɑng wuudø. 
Revelation21:14 O döri kɑɑl cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi tyel pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, tyelø ɑ́kyel köme ógweed-ɑ nyingi dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyëngwöödø møgi Órömø." 
Revelation21:15 Wëywödø men-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn, ɑ́bëëd yïe dɑ thyɑngi røm me bɑ dhɑb, me røme kɑɑl, kí thïgge, kí dörre." 
Revelation21:16 Kɑɑlɑni bɑ óør, bɑ̈re pɑ̈r ki lɑ̈je. Kɑ røm yi wëywödø, kɑ bɑ̈ri dörø yod ɑ́ kïlomïtïr ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew kí miy ɑ́ngwen, o lɑ̈je nɑ bɑ̈re." 
Revelation21:17 Kɑ dörø røm yi wëywönɑni, kɑ yod bɑ̈ri döre e töng-ɑ mɑl, bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel." 
Revelation21:18 Dörɑni ógerø kɑ kïti yeceb, o kɑɑl kiree ógerø kɑ dhɑb, me mïllø ni rɑ̈ɑ̈ngi." 
Revelation21:19 O tyelli dörɑni ógwelø kɑ wɑ̈thi tigg mø gïïr; tyel-ɑ mɑl bɑ yeceb, ryeew gen bɑ yɑgut ówɑw, dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen bɑ ɑgig me tɑr, ngween gen bɑ dhɑmröd," 
Revelation21:20 bïïj gen bɑ ɑgig me lojø, bïkyeel gen bɑ ɑgig me kwɑrø, bïryeew gen bɑ dhɑbɑrjed óbwörø, bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g gen bɑ yedhè ówɑw, bïngween gen bɑ yɑgut óbwörø, pyɑ̈ri gen bɑ ɑgig me mɑr, pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyeel gen bɑ perudh me kïde bɑ ɑ́dwøgø, o pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew gen bɑ jemced." 
Revelation21:21 De dhøggi döri kɑɑlɑni gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, ógerø kɑ kïtti tigg, men ki kïte. O ódɑ̈ri kɑɑl bɑ dhɑb me mïllø ni rɑ̈ɑ̈ngi." 
Revelation21:22 Bong Kengø mɑ ɑ́lidhɑ kì kɑɑlɑni. Mɑ́ Wë Jwøk Áyïmø geki Órömø, ɑ bɑ Kenge." 
Revelation21:23 Bong cɑɑr cɑ̈ng wɑlɑ̀ cɑɑr dwɑ̈y me dwɑddi kipe kɑɑlɑni. Mɑ́ mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøk omënyø kì köme, o Órömø bɑ lɑ̈mbɑ̈ mee." 
Revelation21:24 Jii kömi piny ócyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ yij cɑre, o rɑ̈nhi kömi piny kɑ̈ɑ̈r gen ókɑ̈ɑ̈l gen yije." 
Revelation21:25 Dhøggi döri kɑɑlɑni ócög gɑ ɑyieb; ge koo wöl ki cyëgø, mɑ́ e óbëëd e bong wɑ̈r kì kunɑni." 
Revelation21:26 Kɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi piny geki dhwɑ̈nge ókɑ̈ɑ̈l kɑɑlɑni. 
Revelation21:27 De bong gïn ywëdhø men-ɑ ókedhi kɑɑlɑni, wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn nyi göögø ki gïi ɑyɑ̈r, kí ngeti pyed men-ɑ ókedhi yije. Tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen ógweed yij wɑ̈nyi Órömø, wɑ̈nyi nënnì, bɑ gen ɑ ókedhi kɑɑlɑni." 
Revelation22:1 Kɑ yɑ nyudhi nɑɑm pïi nënnì yi wëywönɑni, nɑmɑni pïge tïl, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri kwøøm Jwøk geki Órömø," 
Revelation22:2 e reng-ɑ yij yuu dïkɑɑl. Nɑmɑni köme dɑ yenhi nënnì ɑ́ryew; ɑ́kyel kì tuung, kí ɑ́kyel kì tung-ɑ kyeelø. Yenhɑni nyi nywøl-ɑ tyel pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì run ɑ́kyel; kì yij dwɑ̈ɑ̈n kí dwɑ̈ɑ̈n; o yïthhe bɑ møg nyi tuur pödhh." 
Revelation22:3 O jɑmm-ɑ kömi gen di cyënni Jwøk óbëëdø ge bogïn kì kɑɑlɑni. Kwøøm Jwøk geki Órömø óying kɑɑlɑni, o ómɑlli yi bɑ̈ngge." 
Revelation22:4 Ólidh yi gen, o nyinge óbëëd ɑ́ ɑgwed kì bøli gen." 
Revelation22:5 Óbëëd e bong wɑ̈r, o bong cɑɑr cɑ̈ng wɑlɑ̀ cɑɑr lɑ̈mbɑ̈ men-ɑ ódwɑddi yi gen. Mɑ́ Wë Jwøk ɑ óbëëd ɑ́ cɑɑr gen, o ge ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø gɑ rɑ̈nhi gïti ɑtheer." 
Revelation22:6 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi wëywönɑni kinni, “Mïdhí kwøbbɑni kidøøj, mɑ́ ge bɑ dyër ceth. O Wë Jwøk, ɑ nyi mëggi Wëye tyëngtöng, wëywöne ɑ́öre be nyudhi bɑ̈ngge gïn-ɑ ócwöb, o koo cwööng ki cwöbø.”" 
Revelation22:7 Yëso okööbø kinni, “Lïng wun! Yɑn ɑ jwɑn bëënø èn! Tyëng-ɑ ógwøg møg-ɑ bɑ ɑtöng kì yij wɑ̈nyø men, ri gen dɑ gyëdh!”" 
Revelation22:8 Yɑ Jøn, gïgɑni ɑ́lïngɑ kɑ ge lidhɑ. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rumɑ ki lïngi møgɑni kɑ ge lidhɑ, ɑpɑ̈dhɑ dhøggi tyelli wëywön-ɑ ɑ́nyudhi yɑn møgɑni, yɑ mɑl-ɑ en." 
Revelation22:9 De yɑ ɑ́kyëdde kinni, “Yɑ ko mɑɑl, mɑ́ yɑ bɑ bɑ̈ng ni yïn, wuki jøtöng, wɑddí; kí tyëng-ɑ mïdhi kwøbb-ɑ yij wɑ̈nyø men. De mɑllí Jwøk!”" 
Revelation22:10 Kɑ yɑ köbbe këti kinni, “Møg-ɑ kømmi kì yij wɑ̈nyø men ko kɑɑn, mɑ́ bøli kɑ̈jji gen ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
Revelation22:11 Kɑ wiy tyëngorøg, røngi gen; kɑ ngɑn-ɑ cödhø cöge e cödhø; kɑ ngɑn-ɑ døj cöge e døj. Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ bɑ ɑkwër, cöge ɑ́ ɑkwër.”" 
Revelation22:12 Yëso okööbø kinni, “Lïng wun! Yɑ ójwɑn bëënø! Köögi men-ɑ muujɑ ókwöögɑ, o dhɑnhø mëggɑ kööng-ɑ kyëëw ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
Revelation22:13 Yɑn ɑ mɑl, o yɑn ɑ cyɑ̈n; yɑn ɑ bɑ cɑ̈gø kí cögø.”" 
Revelation22:14 Tyëng-ɑ ólwøg ógudhi gen kɑ ge ótɑ̈rø, ri gen dɑ gyëdh; ge ówiy o ge cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen ki yɑɑdh nënnì, o ge ówëggi kedhi kɑɑl ge kɑ̈l-ɑ dhøggi döre." 
Revelation22:15 De tyëng-ɑ ócög ge pɑ wëggi kedhi kɑɑl, bɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi pɑ̈ɑ̈dø ki kwøb, kí ɑ́jwöggì, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi wɑ̈dhi niin ki ji møøgø, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi nɑ̈gø ki ji; kí tyëng-ɑ mɑlli ngïjji jwögg, kí tyëngpyed møg-ɑ pɑ nyi gøggi dyër." 
Revelation22:16 “Yɑ Yëso, ɑ ɑ́ör wëywönɑ, o møgɑni köbbe wun kì yethi ɑkuddi kɑnïsɑ̀. Yɑ bɑ kwɑɑr Debïd; yɑn ɑ bɑ kyeli ru wøw.”" 
Revelation22:17 Wëy okööbø geki nyɑn-ɑ nywøm kinni, “Bïí!” Ngɑn-ɑ lïngi møgɑni kööbe thyew kinni, “Bïí!” Bï ngɑn ree di röödhø; kɑ kɑ̈bbe ki pïi nënnì, e bong gïn cole." 
Revelation22:18 O yɑn yɑ Jøn, yɑ kwëng-ɑ ngɑn lïngi kwøbb-ɑ töng kì yij wɑ̈nyø men kinni: kömi gen ko kïdhi ki gwedø ɑ́kyel, ke kïdhi kömi gen, ryɑ̈gg møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyø men, ge ceg kɑ medø yi Jwøk." 
Revelation22:19 O ke di ngɑn kɑ̈ni wɑ̈g kì ri møg-ɑ bɑ ɑtöng kì yij wɑ̈nyø men ki gwedø ɑ́kyel, gïn-ɑ di mëggii kì ri yɑɑdh nënnì, kí møg-ɑ di mëggii kì kɑɑl kwër, pɑ yode; gen ɑ gïg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyø men." 
Revelation22:20 Ngɑn-ɑ nyodh kwøbbɑni okööbø kinni, “Ngee bɑ dyër! Yɑ ójwɑn bëënø!” Wø ɑ́yïëy. Bïí, Wuö Yëso!"
